Name: Ourofino Saúde Animal
Description:
A Ourofino Saúde Animal, atua desde 1987, quando iniciou suas atividades na produção e na comercialização de produtos farmacêuticos para a saúde animal. Possui uma das maiores e mais modernas fábricas da América Latina, com área total de 125 mil metros quadrados, localizada em Cravinhos/SP.

A Ourofino construiu ao longo de sua história de respeito e credibilidade. Possui uma marca forte e reputação consolidada nos mercados nacional e internacional, principalmente nas Américas. 

Hoje é um dos principais exportadores do setor, com negócios em mais de 30 países.

Name: MSD Saúde Animal
Description:
A MSD Saúde Animal, conhecida como MSD Animal Health fora dos Estados Unidos e do Canadá, é a unidade de negócios global de saúde animal da Merck.

A MSD Saúde Animal oferece a veterinários, fazendeiros, proprietários de animais de estimação e governos a mais ampla variedade de produtos farmacêuticos veterinários, vacinas e soluções e serviços de gerenciamento de saúde. A MSD Saúde Animal se dedica a preservar e melhorar a saúde, o bem-estar e o desempenho dos animais.

Name: AVMA (American Veterinary Medical Association)
Description:
The AVMA is the nation’s leading advocate for the veterinary profession. Representing more than 108,000 members, we protect, promote and advance the needs of all veterinarians and those they serve.

Our commitment is to advance the shared interests, values and goals of our membership, through a variety of avenues:

- We develop positions on key issues and advocate for veterinarians, advancing their ability to provide crucial veterinary services.
- We provide educational accreditation and certification programs that protect and elevate the quality of veterinary care.
- We provide timely and relevant products and services to our members that enhance their opportunities for success and service, and support them in protecting the health and welfare of animals in their care.
- We educate the public on the important and varied types of work that veterinarians do to advance both animal and human health.

Name: Bayer Animal Health
Description: Elanco’s combination with Bayer Animal Health brings together 166 years of experience in innovating, delivering and creating value for farmers, veterinarians, pet owners, and society as a whole. This is a key step on our journey to build a fit-for-purpose, customer-centered, purpose-driven, independent global animal health leader poised for the next era of growth.

Name: VCA Animal Hospitals
Description:
A leader in veterinary care, VCA Animal Hospitals is committed to taking care of the future of veterinary medicine. We are a family of hometown animal hospitals determined to positively impact pets, people and our communities. From general practice to emergency and specialty care, VCA delivers world-class medicine and hometown care to more than four million pets each year. We invest in cutting-edge tools, training and technology that enable Associates across our national network of hospitals to lead the industry today and into tomorrow. Among our talented 35,000 Associates are nearly 7,000 veterinarians – including 430 who are board-certified specialists – nearly 4,000 credentialed technicians and over 10,000 veterinary assistants – all dedicated to giving pets the very best in medical care.  

As part of the Mars Veterinary Health family of brands, VCA is taking care of the future of veterinary medicine to help achieve the Mars Petcare Purpose—A Better World for Pets. To learn more about VCA, visit: www.vca.com or find us on Facebook, Instagram, Twitter and LinkedIn. 

https://bit.ly/vcaprivacy   https://bit.ly/vcalegal

Name: NVA General Practice
Description:
At NVA General Practice, we’re on a mission to give every pet their best life. Our network of neighborhood veterinary clinics partners with pet parents to deliver high-quality medicine and individualized care to ensure the health and happiness of each patient. We believe pets are family and deserve the best possible care—every day, at every stage of their lives.

Since our founding nearly 30 years ago, we’ve channeled our passion and resources into improving the lives of animals and the people who love them. Today, we are a leading pet care provider with nearly 1,000 hospitals across the United States and Canada. Our dedicated team of over 25,000 members, including 5,000 veterinarians, cares for millions of animals annually through best-in-class medicine, products, and health services.  

Together, as one team, we’re shaping the future of general practice medicine. 

Learn more at https://gp.nva.com/

Name: Vetnil
Description:
Fundada há mais de 30 anos pelo Médico-Veterinário Dr. João Carlos Ribeiro (In Memoriam), somos uma empresa 100% nacional e referência em pesquisa e desenvolvimento de produtos voltados à saúde, performance e bem-estar de pets e equinos. Com sede em Louveira (SP), nos destacamos pela inovação, qualidade e parceria com os profissionais da Medicina Veterinária, mantendo-nos entre as líderes de mercado no Brasil.
Como “Parceira de quem Cuida”, buscamos fortalecer a relação com tutores, veterinários, tratadores, cuidadores e colaboradores — protagonistas na entrega do cuidado aos animais. Também apoiamos iniciativas com impacto social positivo, mantendo parcerias com instituições como AMALO, Associação Mata Ciliar, INATAA, Instituto Tamanduá, CAD, APAE Louveira, Casa do Vira-Lata e o Centro de Equoterapia de Jaguariúna.
Estamos presentes nos principais congressos, eventos e competições do setor, para fomentar a troca de experiências e o desenvolvimento técnico-científico da Medicina Veterinária. Exportamos nossas soluções para mais de 17 países e acumulamos reconhecimentos importantes, como o prêmio de “Produtos Veterinários” do Anuário do Agronegócio (Globo Rural – 2016, 2018 e 2021) e os rankings da GPTW como uma das Melhores Empresas para Trabalhar nos segmentos Indústria, São Paulo e Agronegócio. Também consolidamos a liderança nacional no mercado de produtos voltados à saúde e bem-estar de equinos, segundo o ranking do Sindan 2023.
Em 2024, demos início a uma nova fase com a inauguração da nossa moderna estrutura logística — um marco de inovação e sustentabilidade que representa a primeira etapa da futura sede. Com base em valores sólidos — companheirismo, profissionalismo, integridade e humildade —, seguimos evoluindo com a missão de antecipar soluções, superar expectativas e contribuir de forma significativa para o cuidado com a vida animal.

Name: Covetrus
Description: Covetrus is the first tech-enabled veterinary practice improvement company. Our mission is to drive better financial and clinical outcomes for veterinarians.

Name: British Veterinary Association (BVA)
Description:
British Veterinary Association is the national representative body for the veterinary profession.

We guide members throughout their careers, from student to retirement, with the support and knowledge they need to achieve their goals, and speak up for them on the issues that matter most.

We are the only UK veterinary association that looks after the interests of all vets in all disciplines. Our members are at the heart of everything we do and, with the power of more than 19,000 members behind us, we’re able to provide a voice to represent and services to support.

Name: National Veterinary Associates
Description:
NVA General Practice is a leading provider of pet care, with nearly 1,000 veterinary hospitals across  the United States and Canada. Our 20,000+ team members and 5,000+ veterinarians care for millions of animals each year by delivering the highest quality medicine and services. Veterinarian-founded, we’re on a mission to provide exceptional, accessible care to improve the lives of animals and the people who love them.

Learn more at https://gp.nva.com/

Name: Banfield Pet Hospital
Description:
Banfield Pet Hospital was founded in Portland, Ore. in 1955 and today is a pioneer in preventive veterinary care with more than 1,000 general veterinary hospitals in 42 states, Washington D.C., Puerto Rico, and Mexico. Every year, Banfield’s veterinary teams provide high-quality veterinary care to over three million pets, including more than 2 million Optimum Wellness Plan clients. As part of the Mars Veterinary Health family of practices, Banfield’s more than 19,000 Associates nationwide are committed to positively impacting society through the Banfield Gives Back program and advancing veterinary medicine in service of our purpose — A BETTER WORLD FOR PETS — because pets make a better world for us.

Please visit jobs.banfield.com to learn more about joining Banfield’s team of passionate pet health care providers.

Page subject to mars.com/legal & mars.com/privacy. Mars is not responsible for content or activity made available via 3rd party sites/services.

Name: Veterinary Information Network
Description:
Since 1991, VIN has provided a secure, veterinarian-only community. VIN is a place for clinical information, continual education, collegial support, and ancillary services that help you succeed and feel good about yourself and your practice. VIN has been the number one online veterinary destination - and always has been and always will be -- For Veterinarians, By Veterinarians.

Those who don't "know" VIN, likely think VIN is a website. But VIN members (VINners) quickly recognize that although VIN is a "site" on the "web", it is much more than a website.

Name: VEG ER for Pets
Description:
In 2014, VEG was born with a mission to help people and their pets when they need it most. This meant challenging the status quo and fixing everything that was wrong with the ER experience. Since then, we’ve expanded rapidly, with hospitals nationwide open 24/7, 365 days a year, and created a better emergency experience—not only for people and their pets, but also for everyone who works here—our VEGgies!

At VEG we find a way to say yes to the career you want in veterinary emergency medicine. This means transforming how ER works, from our open-concept hospitals, where you can handle emergency cases of every kind (even exotics!) to our immersive, customer-focused experience, which helps us give people and their pets the care they deserve.

This also means saying yes to creating the best experience possible for our VEGgies. Yes to working in an environment where you can find your place and feel valued for the amazing work you do. Yes to having unparalleled opportunities for learning and mentorship so you can grow where you want to go in your career. And yes to making an impact here in ways you never thought possible.

Name: American Animal Hospital Association
Description:
The American Animal Hospital Association (AAHA) is the premier organization dedicated to accrediting animal hospitals across the United States and Canada. As the sole accrediting body for veterinary hospitals, AAHA sets the benchmark for excellence in pet health care. Our accredited hospitals voluntarily undergo rigorous evaluations against approximately 900 standards of veterinary care, ensuring the highest level of service and facility quality.

With over 3,600 small animal veterinary hospitals accredited, AAHA is a trusted resource for veterinarians committed to delivering superior medical care. Our consultants provide ongoing support and regular visits to ensure continuous compliance with AAHA standards, helping practices maintain their commitment to excellence.

Mission:

-Enhance the abilities of veterinarians to provide exceptional medical care to companion animals.
-Support veterinarians in successfully managing their practices and maintaining top-tier facilities.
-Fulfill the public's expectations for high-quality small animal veterinary medicine.

By choosing AAHA accreditation, veterinarians align with a community dedicated to advancing veterinary care and ensuring the best outcomes for pets and their families.

Name: VETgirl
Description:
VETgirl is the #1 online veterinary continuing education (CE) service offering RACE-approved, online veterinary CE for veterinary professionals. 

Why Choose VETgirl?
Because you are looking for convenient, cutting edge, clinically relevant, and practical veterinary CE to fit into your busy schedule.

Constant Access
Learn when you have time…on the run, while running, hiking, commuting. Our content is always on-demand.

RACE-Approved CE
Rest assured that you’re getting the CE credits you need from a reliable, credible source.

Cost Effective
Nothing is more valuable than your time. Except your money. For the cost of a cup of coffee, you can be learning and earning practical CE credits

With a $269 annual subscription, you get 200+ hours of RACE-approved CE on all topics relevant to veterinary medicine. 

Even better, with our TEAM memberships, each member of your clinic team can access VETgirl's CE library and learn at a fraction of the price.  

Sign up today to get access to the latest, cutting edge veterinary continuing education. For more information, check out www.vetgirlontherun.com.

Name: Mars Veterinary Health
Description:
As part of a family-owned business with more than 30 years of experience in veterinary services, Mars Veterinary Health is a purpose-driven pet healthcare network made possible by 70,000+ pet-loving Associates across North America, Europe, and Asia who are united in delivering high-quality veterinary care—from preventive and wellness to specialty and emergency—when and where pets and their owners need it. 

Veterinary medicine is a calling, and we are committed to supporting the people who play a role in making that care possible. Together, we harness our combined knowledge, talent, and resources for the long-term in support of our Purpose: A BETTER WORLD FOR PETS and the people who care for them.

Page subject to mars.com/legal & mars.com/privacy. Mars is not responsible for content or activity made available via third-party sites and services.

Name: BSAVA (British Small Animal Veterinary Association)
Description:
The British Small Animal Veterinary Association (BSAVA) exists to promote excellence in small animal practice through education and science.

The Association was founded in 1957 as a professional body to serve veterinary surgeons who treat companion animals and now has over 10,000 vet and vet nurse members. The majority of our members work in practice, and represent over a third of the working veterinary surgeons in the UK.

Name: Antech Diagnostics
Description:
Smarter Diagnostics. Better Care.

You deserve a choice when making diagnostic decisions for your patients.
Antech is a global veterinary diagnostics company driven by innovation that helps veterinarians deliver better animal health outcomes. Our products and services span 90+ reference laboratories around the globe. We also provide in-house laboratory instruments and consumables, including digital cytology and rapid assays; local and cloud-based data services; practice information management software and support; imaging equipment; continuing education and training; and board-certified specialist support services.

Together, we’re advancing veterinary care and continuing our shared mission to make a better world for pets, every day.
Subject To: https://www.antechdiagnostics.com/privacy-policy & https://www.antechdiagnostics.com/terms-of-use

Subject To: https://www.mars.com/privacy and https://www.antechdiagnostics.com/terms-of-use

Name: JA Saúde Animal
Description:
A JA Saúde Animal é uma indústria farmacêutica veterinária, 100% brasileira, especializada no desenvolvimento, fabricação e comercialização de produtos para saúde animal.

Com a missão de oferecer ao mercado soluções seguras e inovadoras, a empresa conta com equipe técnica capacitada para apoiar seus clientes e apresentar à pecuária soluções baseadas em conceitos de fácil execução e de alta eficácia.

Em acordo com as Boas Praticas de Fabricação (BPF/GMP), a JA mantém ampla estrutura produtiva, licenciada pelo Ministério da Agricultura, Pecuária e Abastecimento (MAPA) para fabricação de medicamentos injetáveis e não injetáveis. Possui laboratórios de controle de Qualidade Físico-Químico e Microbiológico com modernos equipamentos laboratoriais, garantindo a qualidade e segurança dos seus medicamentos.

Além disso, a JA também oferece serviço de industrialização a empresas terceiras na área de produtos injetáveis penicilínicos e não penicilinicos.

Name: Vansil Animal Health
Description:
De capital 100% brasileiro e fundada em 1992, apresentamos um mix de mais de 150 produtos fabricados, atestados pelo mercado consumidor e pelas empresas que nos propõem alianças, pois oferecemos e garantimos a eficácia dos produtos que fabricamos, tanto os que carregam nossa marca quanto os que são representados por marcas consagradas mundialmente.
A Vansil figura no cenário nacional como uma sólida e eficaz indústria veterinária. Atuamos nos mercados de Aves, Suínos, Pet, Peixes, Pássaros, Avestruzes, Equinos, Bovinos, Ovinos e Caprinos.

Name: VetBR Saúde Animal
Description:
Um dos principais distribuidores de produtos para saúde animal no Brasil.

A VetBR foi fundada em março de 1975 e vem construindo uma história de sucesso e crescimento.

A companhia faz parte do portfólio Aqua Capital, o maior fundo de investimentos de agronegócio da América Latina.

É reconhecida pelo constante crescimento e por formar a empresa mais completa do setor!

Sua estratégia de Canais permite a companhia identificar o potencial e explorar cada vez mais o mercado de saúde animal do país.

www.vetbr.com.br 

MISSÃO VETBR
Desenvolver um negócio sustentável, através de clientes altamente satisfeitos, colaboradores engajados e alianças estratégicas com fornecedores.

VISÃO VETBR
Ser líder na distribuição de saúde animal com elevados padrões de excelência.

PILARES VETBR
Colaborador, Cliente e Fornecedor

VALORES VETBR
COMPROMISSO COM RESULTADO
Trabalhamos duro, com senso de dono e alta persistência.

ESPÍRITO DE TIME
Enfrentamos juntos os desafios com pro atividade, proximidade e abertura.

ATITUDE TRANSFORMADORA
Buscamos as melhores soluções para o negócio, sempre!

PAIXÃO PELO QUE FAZEMOS
Somos apaixonados pelo que fazemos!

SOMOS ÍNTEGROS
Fazemos o que é certo, sem jeitinhos, sem atalhos.

Name: BluePearl Pet Hospital
Description:
We have hospitals located throughout the country, many of which are open 24 hours a day, every day of the year. Our veterinarians use innovative procedures, high-tech equipment and the latest treatment methods to provide comprehensive medical care to pets. We combine this expertise with a love for animals and the belief that kindness is the foundation of veterinary medicine.

Our mission: Provide exceptional specialty and emergency care for pets by supporting each other through our shared passion, knowledge and talents.

At BluePearl, we recognize that pets are part of the family. We honor the human-animal bond by providing the very best in advanced medical care for pets – including techniques that were once reserved exclusively for humans.

Our vision: Elevate the industry in pursuit of sustainable veterinary excellence so pets receive the best care when they need it most.

We are committed to upholding the highest medical standards and are constantly searching for new and better ways to treat our patients and advance our profession.

Our Guiding Principles

These Five Principles connect all of our BluePearl hospitals and guide the actions and decisions of our Associates every day.

Quality: Quality begins with delivering our best to the people and pets we serve. It continues through all that we do.

Responsibility: We take responsibility without being asked. We support the responsibilities of others.

Mutuality: A mutual benefit is a shared benefit. A shared benefit will endure.

Efficiency: Our resources are precious. Being efficient helps us accomplish more and waste less. 

Freedom: Freedom lets us shape our future. Performance allows us to remain free.

Our Privacy Policy can be viewed at https://www.mars.com/privacy.

Name: MWI Animal Health
Description:
MWI Animal Health, a Cencora company, is a leading global animal health distributor and technology provider. We partner with innovators and manufacturers to provide access to products and solutions designed to help animals and your business thrive.  
 
Our people drive us to think forward every day, bringing you what’s now and next in animal health. Through our comprehensive customer support, we are committed to working with you to develop innovative solutions to combat common challenges. We are the ally you need and a catalyst for change. Together, we transform animal health for good.

Name: Premix
Description:
A Premix atua há 45 anos no mercado, oferecendo soluções em nutrição integradas para a pecuária nacional.

O nosso propósito é nutrir a cadeia produtiva do agronegócio de forma sustentável e inovadora, criando prosperidade e respeitando o planeta em que vivemos, por meio de inovação, relacionamento e conhecimento compartilhado, nossos pilares de marca.

Em nosso Centro de Pesquisa, localizado em Patrocínio Paulista (SP), desenvolvemos produtos de alta qualidade para bovinos de corte e de leite, equinos, ovinos e caprinos, conforme o clima e época do ano em cada região do país, categoria animal e fase de desenvolvimento.

Oferecemos consultoria técnica especializada, seja presencialmente, nas propriedades de nossos clientes, ou através do serviço Técnico Digital, que pode ser acessado gratuitamente em nosso site.

Com moderna estrutura de produção e distribuição, possuímos presença onde a pecuária está, com fábricas próprias em Patrocínio Paulista (SP), Presidente Prudente (SP), Araguaína (TO), Cuiabá (MT), Jataí (GO) e Anápolis, (GO), além de centros de distribuição em Maringá (PR), Campo Grande (MS), Linhares (ES) e Xinguara (MT), investindo constantemente em inovação e desenvolvimento tecnológico de novos produtos, com pesquisas e parcerias com as mais renomadas instituições de ensino do Brasil.

Name: Battersea
Description:
Battersea is here for every dog and cat, and has been since 1860. However they need us and wherever they are, we're all in, for them.

At Battersea we offer our love and expert care to dogs and cats who need us by rescuing, rehabilitating and rehoming animals at our centres, and by sharing our knowledge and resources with rescue organisations around the world. We do this because we want to help every dog and cat, everywhere.

Registered charity no. 206394

Name: MCassab Nutrição e Saúde Animal
Description:
A Nutrição e Saúde Animal, uma das cinco áreas do Grupo MCassab, possui mais de 50 anos de experiência e pauta sua história em investimentos em novas tecnologias e soluções estratégicas para o mercado, promovendo o propósito de ajudar a alimentar o mundo de forma segura, acessível e sustentável.

Dividimos nossa atuação em quatro macro linhas de produtos para os mercados de avicultura, suinocultura, bovinocultura, aquacultura e pet.  

Conheça nossas soluções!

Name: Royal College of Veterinary Surgeons (RCVS)
Description:
We aim to enhance society through improved animal health and welfare. We do this by setting, upholding and advancing the educational, ethical and clinical standards of veterinary surgeons and veterinary nurses.

As a statutory regulator we are responsible under the Veterinary Surgeons Act 1966 for keeping the Register of Veterinary Surgeons eligible to practise in the UK, setting standards for veterinary education and regulating the professional conduct of veterinary surgeons.

We also exercise powers under our Royal Charter to award Fellowships, Diplomas and Certificates to veterinary surgeons, veterinary nurses and others.

Name: Fear Free, LLC
Description:
Founded in 2016 upon the mission to prevent and alleviate fear, anxiety, and stress in pets, Fear Free provides online education to veterinary professionals, pet professionals, animal welfare communities, and pet owners. Our courses are developed and written by the most respected veterinary and pet experts in the world, including boarded veterinary behaviorists, boarded veterinary anesthesiologists, pain experts, boarded veterinary internists, veterinary technicians (behavior), experts in shelter medicine, animal training, grooming, boarding, and more.

With all the false (and harmful!) pet information on the internet, Fear Free aims to keep veterinary healthcare teams and pet professionals at the forefront as the true pet health experts. By closely listening to the needs of the profession and those of the new generation of pet owners, Fear Free has become one of the single most transformative initiatives in the history of companion animal practice, providing unparalleled education on emotional wellbeing, enrichment, and the reduction of fear, anxiety, and stress in pets and improving the experience of every human and pet involved.

Name: Pet Care Centro Veterinário
Description:
O Grupo Pet Care é referência em cuidado animal. Conquistamos essa reputação a partir de escolhas estratégicas, sendo uma das principais o alinhamento dos profissionais que contratamos aos nossos pilares: competência, cuidado e conexão. Para nós, é essencial que nosso time compartilhe da missão que temos de estar sempre à frente das novidades do setor, seguindo boas práticas e construindo laços afetivos com todos que integram nosso ecossistema, especialmente os pets e suas famílias.

Onde estamos
Nosso grupo é formado por 15 marcas, unindo hospitais veterinários completos, centros de diagnóstico, laboratórios de alta tecnologia e unidades de varejo que facilitam o acesso a produtos e serviços de qualidade. São 20 hospitais veterinários estrategicamente localizados – 7 na capital de São Paulo, 4 no ABC Paulista, 1 no interior paulista (Itu), 1 no Rio de Janeiro, 1 em Minas Gerais, 5 no Rio Grande do Sul e 1 em Santa Catarina – incluindo atendimento para urgências e emergências 24 horas, medicina preventiva, clínica geral e especialidades, cirurgias, UTI e semi-intensivo, além de exames de imagem e laboratório.  

Além disso, contamos com 5 laboratórios distribuídos em São Paulo, Campinas, São José do Rio Preto, Rio de Janeiro e Minas Gerais, garantindo diagnósticos ágeis e precisos, e 8 unidades de varejo em São Paulo, ABC Paulista, Itu, Rio de Janeiro, Minas Gerais e Santa Catarina, que ampliam o cuidado preventivo e terapêutico.

Nossas marcas
O Grupo Pet Care reúne, entre os hospitais veterinários, Pet Care, Pet Care Animália, Dr. Hato, Vet Quality, Pet Support, Ariza e Hospital Veterinário São Francisco de Assis. Dos laboratórios, integram o grupo: TECSA, CIAPAV, Imagem.Vet, Vet Análises e R&K Diagnóstico Veterinário. Hemovet, Ezvet, Vet Sapiens e Vet We Care integram os demais segmentos que completam nosso ecossistema.
Nosso negócio é cuidar da saúde de pets.

Conecte-se com a gente em outros canais:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/hv_petcare/

Name: MedVet
Description:
MedVet is the leading veterinarian owned and led network of specialty and emergency hospitals dedicated to delivering exceptional care and a deeply supportive experience to pets and their loving families, referring veterinarians, and team members. For more than 35 years, MedVet’s empathetic, insightful, and driven team of expert caregivers has helped the organization grow to be the preferred choice for high quality, compassionate care, proudly serving more than 500,000 patients each year in communities throughout the United States. 

Our caregivers are deeply committed to MedVet's mission of Leading Specialty Healthcare for Pets and our driven by our core values of Teamwork, Leadership, and Compassion.

Visit www.medvet.com for further information and to view employment opportunities at MedVet. MedVet is an Equal Opportunity Employer.

Name: IVC Evidensia
Description: At IVC Evidensia, our vision is to be the world's best veterinary group. That starts with everything we do being focused on our purpose - Healthy Animals, Happy Owners. Follow us here to keep up to date with news from across the world of IVC Evidensia.

Name: Medion Group
Description: Medion telah berkiprah lebih dari 50 tahun sejak didirikan pada 1976. Awalnya berfokus pada produksi dan distribusi farmasi, vitamin, vaksin, serta peralatan unggas. Kini Medion telah berkembang ke perhotelan, peternakan, proyek infrastruktur dan konstruksi, pertanian, akuakultur, serta produk untuk hewan kesayangan. Didorong oleh tenaga ahli profesional, riset mendalam, teknologi mutakhir, dan tata kelola yang baik, Medion terus menghadirkan inovasi holistik dengan visi global.

Name: DrogaVET - Farmácias de Manipulação Veterinária
Description:
A DrogaVET é líder em Farmácias de Manipulação Veterinária, com mais de 100 unidades no Brasil, e leva saúde e qualidade de vida para os animais, por meio de medicamentos manipulados com diferentes formas, sabores e cheiros que agradam seu pet. 
Mas nossa atuação não se resume à manipulação de medicamentos para animais domésticos. Vamos muito além disso. Animais de montaria, ornamentais, de exposição (ex: zoológicos e feiras), reprodutores e várias outras categorias fazem parte de nosso portfólio de atendimento.
Somos uma empresa inovadora e que tem como principal objetivo aliar a qualidade de seus produtos à satisfação de seus clientes. Sempre buscamos aliar um rigoroso controle de qualidade ao uso racional e eficiente de medicamentos, proporcionando economia aos proprietários, maior aceitação pelos animais e melhores resultados nos tratamentos ministrados pelos médicos veterinários.

Name: Vaxxinova Brasil
Description: “Cuidar de Vidas. Alimentar o Mundo” é o propósito da nossa empresa, que atua no segmento de animais de produção como Vaxxinova, e exclusivamente no mercado pet através da marca Biovet.

Name: Charoen Pokphand Indonesia
Description: PT Charoen Pokphand Indonesia Tbk produces and sells poultry feed, processed chicken, and day old chicks (DOC) in Indonesia. The company offers broiler and layer poultry feed; and various poultry feed products for parent stock, duck, native chicken, fighting cock, and quail, as well as feed for cattle and swine under the brands of HI-PRO, HI-PRO-VITE, BINTANG, BONAVITE, ROYAL FEED, TURBO FEED, and TIJI. It also provides various types of DOC, such as broiler DOC; layer DOC; and other DOC, such as DOC for parent stock and male layer. In addition, the company sells various food products under the Golden Fiesta, Fiesta, Champ, and Okey brands. Further, it is involved in poultry farming and beverage activities; trading of processed food and medicine; the production of plastic packaging products; the production and distribution of raw material for feed; and the operation of restaurants and convenience stores. The company was formerly known as PT Charoen Pokphand Indonesia Animal Feedmill Co. Limited. PT Charoen Pokphand Indonesia Tbk was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Charoen Pokphand Indonesia Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Charoen Pokphand Indonesia Group.

Name: National Association of Veterinary Technicians In America (NAVTA)
Description: The National Association of Veterinary Technicians in America (NAVTA) is a non-profit association that represents and promotes the profession of Veterinary Technology.   Incorporated in 1981, NAVTA is the national organization devoted exclusively to developing and enhancing the profession of veterinary technology, through education, advocacy and promotion within the industry and to the general public. NAVTA is committed to education, career growth and the advancement of its members.

Name: Vetoquinol Saúde Animal
Description:
Prazer, somos a Vetoquinol.

Uma das maiores empresas farmacêuticas veterinárias do mundo, com sede na França e presença em mais de 24 países.

Atuamos há mais de 90 anos com um compromisso claro: cuidar da saúde dos animais. Somos o 9º maior laboratório veterinário global e o 4º mais dedicado exclusivamente à saúde animal, oferecendo soluções para pets, animais de produção e equinos.

Nos orgulhamos de ser uma empresa familiar, independente e com forte presença internacional. Nossa proximidade com médicos-veterinários, pecuaristas e tutores impulsiona nossa capacidade de inovar em medicamentos, suplementos e cuidados que atendem às necessidades específicas de cada espécie.

Com centros de pesquisa, produção e distribuição em diversos continentes, levamos qualidade, ciência e confiança para mais de 100 países, apoiados por uma equipe global de mais de 2.500 colaboradores.

Nossa missão
Enriquecer a vida das pessoas por meio da dedicação à saúde e ao bem-estar animal.

Nossa visão
Ser reconhecida como referência em inovação no mercado veterinário, construindo relações duradouras com nossos clientes e parceiros.

Nossos Valores
CONFIAR – OUSAR – COLABORAR 
Vetoquinol. Ao lado de quem cuida. Em qualquer lugar do mundo.

Name: Vetic
Description:
Vetic is a seed-funded startup founded by Gaurav Ajmera, Ex-COO, OYO & Ex - CBO, Pristyn Care. Vetic focuses on integrating technology to provide the best-in-class medical experience while bridging the gap in pet healthcare by providing accessible and modern infrastructure for pets, ensuring convenience for pet parents. 

Our clinics are equipped with modern medical infrastructure with cutting-edge innovations like Diagnostics, X-Ray, etc., and comprehensive integrated super specialty and grooming facilities, all under one roof. 

We bring together an outstanding pool of veterinarians to promote collaborative, multidisciplinary investigation of diagnosing and treating your fur buddies and preventing diseases. A one-of-its-kind initiative, Vetic aims at elevating the clinic experience for pets and humans alike.

Name: WSAVA (World Small Animal Veterinary Association)
Description: The WSAVA represents more than 200,000 veterinarians worldwide through its 110 member associations and works to enhance standards of clinical care for companion animals.  Its core activities include the development of WSAVA Global Guidelines in key areas of companion animal veterinary practice and lobbying on important issues affecting companion animal care worldwide.

Name: MEVAC for Vaccines
Description:
MEVAC is an American Egyptian Animal Health Vaccines leading global provider of innovative animal health solutions.
Established in 2011, MEVAC has built a strong reputation for excellence in research and development, manufacturing, and
distribution of high-quality vaccines for Poultry, Ruminant, and Aquaculture .
With a robust infrastructure comprising four state-of-the-art production lines and four manufacturing sites, we
possess the capacity to meet the growing demand for animal health vaccines. Our research and development
excellence centers drive innovation projects, allowing MEVAC to develop cutting-edge vaccines that address the
evolving needs of the global animal health industry.
At MEVAC, we are committed to upholding the highest standards of quality. Our facilities are GMP- Accredited,
ensuring that our vaccines meet stringent regulatory requirements. We employ a team of more than 450
dedicated professionals representing seven nationalities, who work tirelessly to develop and deliver products
that safeguard animal health and welfare.
MEVAC has 3 Headquarters In , Egypt , UAE & KSA,.We have a strong presence in key markets. Our extensive
distribution network enables us to export our products to over 30 countries worldwide in 2023 & is planned
to reach 90 Countries by 2027, supporting the health and well-being of animals across the globe.

Name: AniCura
Description:
AniCura is a leading provider of veterinary care in Europe. Our company was born out of the philosophy that sharing resources can create opportunities for better veterinary care and outcomes. 

Our services include a wide range of high-quality medical services covering preventive and basic health care as well as specialized care, including advanced diagnostics, internal medicine, intensive care, surgery, and orthopaedics. We also provide rehabilitation, physiotherapy, and dietary advice and offers selected pet food and care products.

AniCura’s network includes 500 clinics across 17 countries in Europe, providing over 4.5 million high-quality pet consultations each year. AniCura has been part of Mars Veterinary Health since 2018. Mars Veterinary Health comprises a network of more than 3,000 clinics worldwide taking care of more than 25 million pets every year. Together, we are able to provide the highest standards in pet care and achieve our collective purpose: A BETTER WORLD FOR PETS.
For more information, please visit our website www.anicuragroup.com

Our Privacy Policy can be viewed at https://www.mars.com/privacy

Name: Pet Society
Description:
A Pet Society, fundada em 20 de outubro de 2004, é uma das mais reconhecidas marcas de higiene, embelezamento e saúde animal do mercado brasileiro.

Aliando o amplo conhecimento de mais de 25 anos na área de ingredientes cosméticos e formulações às necessidades do mercado veterinário, a Pet Society desenvolve e oferece ao mercado não somente produtos inovadores, seguros, de alta qualidade e eficácia, mas também conceitos modernos proporcionando um diferencial aos seus clientes.

A Pet Society possui uma moderna fábrica de produtos para higiene e saúde, atendendo a todas as exigências do Ministério da Agricultura (MAPA). Os produtos são fabricados somente com matérias-primas de grau cosmético e seguindo os mais rigorosos padrões de boas práticas de fabricação e controle de qualidade físico-química e microbiológica.

Todos os novos produtos da Pet Society tem eficácia testada por profissionais especializados da área veterinária: médicos veterinários e groomers (esteticistas animais que são referências do mercado).

Além de disponibilizar ampla linha de produtos para pet shops e clínicas veterinárias, a Pet Society, desde a sua criação, preocupa-se com o aperfeiçoamento dos profissionais que atuam neste mercado, levando informações, palestras e cursos sobre temas diversos a várias cidades e capitais do Brasil e do exterior, contribuindo para que os profissionais estejam cada vez mais preparados para atender as exigências deste mercado que já ocupa a segunda colocação no mundo.

Por todos estes fatores, a Pet Society é uma das principais empresas do mercado pet, agregando valor aos diferentes negócios em que atua e aos seus clientes, nossos grandes amigos de estimação, para os quais dedicamos a nossa maior atenção, para oferecermos sempre produtos inovadores, eficazes, seguros e que lhes tragam beleza e bem-estar!

Name: Ethos Veterinary Health
Description: Ethos Veterinary Health is at the forefront of innovation and world-class medicine. As the premier network of over 140 specialty and emergency hospitals across North America, Ethos brings together a dedicated community of more than 1,500 specialized doctors providing care for nearly 2 million pets annually. The integrated and collaborative network of veterinary professionals utilize state-of-the-art technology and a scientific, evidence-based approach to deliver compassionate, unparalleled care and rewarding careers. Committed to revolutionizing veterinary medicine, Ethos sets the standard in veterinary excellence.

Name: Vets for Pets
Description:
Vets for Pets and Companion Care are our brands within The Pets at Home Vet Group. We are part of the Pets at Home Group plc, which also includes Pets at Home retail stores and Pets Grooming salons. Together, we are the UK’s leading pet care business, providing pet owners with everything they need to be able to look after their pets.

We are proud to be one of the largest veterinary groups in the UK with a national network of practices of all shapes and sizes run by our Joint Venture Partners (JVPs). The Pets at Home Vet Group operates 440+ small animal veterinary practices across the UK, including standalone and in-store practices.

We believe in giving Veterinary Surgeons, Nurses and Practice Managers the opportunity and freedom to take control of their own career and future by owning and running their own practice. We are the home of joint venture partnership for ambitious veterinary surgeons in the UK veterinary market, we are committed to delivering first class service and high standards of care. Our practices are supported by dedicated business professionals based in our Support Office in Handforth who have the expertise to help them thrive.

We were extremely proud to be announced the winners of the 2020 Institute of Student Employers Award’s Best Graduate Onboarding and Induction Activities Programme category, in recognition of our two-year Graduate Development Programme. Designed by vets with extensive practice and industry experience, we help develop medical, surgical and professional skills.
 
If our unique veterinary business interests you, you can find out more on our dedicated careers site: https://www.vets4petscareers.com/

Name: Medivet & Partners
Description:
We are Medivet. 

Where exceptional veterinary care is at the heart of everything we do. Our community is dedicated to providing outstanding care for pets while supporting and valuing the people who make it possible. At Medivet, we’re not just focused on animal health; we’re committed to nurturing a workplace that champions both our people and the pets they care for. 

Discover why Medivet is a unique and rewarding place to build your career in veterinary care.

Ready to join our community? Apply today to become part of something exceptional.

Name: Mission Pet Health
Description: Mission Pet Health is a vet-owned and managed network of animal hospitals, named #2 on America's Top 100 Most Loved Workplaces list and #1 in vet care four years running. Formed by the joining of Southern Veterinary Partners and Mission Veterinary Partners, Mission is reimagining excellence in vet care by providing world-class support to hospital teams on a hyper-local basis. We’re based in Birmingham, AL, with 850+ animal hospitals and 20,000+ teammates across the US. Our Home Office resources enable our hospital teams to focus on what matters most—the medicine and caring for their patients. Our WAG Values—Work Together, Amaze, and Grow—allow us to drive a lasting impact for our teams, the communities we serve, and the pets we care for.

Name: VetStrategy
Description:
Being part of VetStrategy is about being part of something bigger – an ever-growing community, where we connect person-to-person and skill-to-need, united by a common purpose of healthy animals, happy owners.  From our humble beginning in 2006 to the present day, we continue to make a difference in the lives of people who have dedicated themselves to this industry.

When VetStrategy co-founders Orin Litman and his wife, Dr. Michelle Cutler, decided to acquire McLean Animal Hospital in 2006, they focused on three promises – our Customer Promise of world-class veterinary care, delivered locally; our People Promise, to be a great place to work; and our Sustainability Promise to be a force for good for patients, people and our plant.

Keeping our three promises led VetStrategy to become the leading veterinary network in Canada, with veterinary practices, 24-hour emergency care, and specialty hospitals coast-to-coast. We have developed and refined a model for supporting our practices across the country.

What we do:

We care for those dedicated to caring for animals by creating a workplace where we focus on innovation, engagement, and teamwork.

We know the blood, sweat and tears that have gone into building each practice, and we don’t want to touch that – we truly embrace the uniqueness of each clinic.  Our heritage first approach means we won’t change a clinic’s name, culture or heritage.

We understand the challenges our veterinary teams face and are committed to doing what’s right – for them, their clients, and their patients.

We care about the future of veterinary medicine. Everything we do comes back to ensuring that veterinarians have the time, support, and infrastructure to focus on responsible medicine and quality care.

We believe in empowering our support office and clinic staff and providing them opportunities to develop their skills and grow in their careers.

Name: LifeLearn Animal Health
Description:
Busy practices need a trusted partner to help save time, improve operational efficiency, and strengthen client relationships. At LifeLearn, we help practices achieve all three goals with customizable online software solutions to make the working lives of animal health professionals easier, more efficient, and more effective. With 25+ years of experience as a leading and trusted name in the animal health industry, we’re the perfect partner for your practice. 

Join the many veterinarians who have grown their practice with LifeLearn. Call (800) 375-7994 or visit www.LifeLearn.com to learn more.

Name: NSV - Veterinary Recruitment
Description:
When it comes to veterinary jobs we are the experts.
 
With over 50 years of recruitment experience between the two founding partners we offer the best full recruitment services nationally & internationally for locum and permanent veterinary professionals.
 
Our number one priority is service, always being on hand and available whenever our clients or candidates require support. We go beyond only matching the skills for clients and candidates to find you the perfect role or the perfect person for the job. We find careers that fit your character and ambition.
 
We pride ourselves on nurturing long-term relationships and personal touch. We look forward to working with you soon

Name: Sanam veterinary
Description:
At Sanam Veterinary Care, we are committed to delivering exceptional veterinary care for your animals. Our state-of-the-art veterinary hospital, located in Rawdat Al Khail Street, Al Hilal, Doha, Qatar. offers a full range of services, including surgery, grooming, cat boarding, and more. We also operate three specialized pharmacies in Muaither, Ash-Sheehaniya, and Sawda Natheel, catering to the needs of large animals like camels, horses, cows, sheep, and goats.

Our Team

We have assembled a team of expert veterinary professionals dedicated to bringing the highest quality healthcare practices to Qatar. We prioritize continuous professional development and maintain a healthy, collaborative work environment.

Our Values

Performance: We are committed to excellence in every aspect of medical veterinary care.
Customer Commitment: We strive to optimize our customers' experience at every touchpoint.
Passion: Our passion drives us to continuously develop and improve.
Integrity: We uphold honesty, openness, and fairness in all our interactions.
Collaboration: We value diverse ideas and perspectives, fostering a culture of healthy debate and innovation.

Careers 

We are always looking for energetic veterinary professionals and business support experts to join our team. If you are passionate about animal care and possess the right skills and attitude, we encourage you to contact us.

Comprehensive Veterinary Services

Our experienced veterinary professionals provide preventive care, diagnostics, surgery, and more to ensure your pet's health and well-being. We are open 24/7 to handle emergencies and offer a range of grooming services to keep your pets looking and feeling their best. All our services are provided at affordable prices, ensuring quality care for every pet.

Name: Anydiag
Description:
UN LABORATOIRE CONSTRUIT SUR L’EXPERIENCE
Le regroupement de 4 laboratoires aux spécialités complémentaires, Vebio, InovieVet, LAPV Amboise et LPVN 59 permet à Anydiag de proposer une expertise de plus de 30 ans. Présent sur tous les segments de l’analyse de biologie médicale vétérinaire, nous proposons, à vous, professionnels, un accompagnement personnalisé quelque soit votre besoin et tout au long du diagnostic, dans l’intérêt de vos patients et de leurs propriétaires.


 UNE OFFRE VARIEE ET POINTUE
Grâce à une expertise reconnue en cytologie et histologie, une différenciation par la cytométrie en flux et une maîtrise approfondie des analyses de bactériologie, PCR, biologie, et endocrinologie, … que les vétérinaires d’Anydiag s’imposent comme des référents dans leur domaine. 

Une ligne directe est dédiée aux échanges entre nos vétérinaires qualifiés et vous, confrères, favorisant un diagnostic collégial pour vous accompagner au mieux.

Name: Afrivet - A Bimeda Company
Description:
We empower all customers by providing them with the most effective and innovative animal health solutions available. We strive to exceed our customers' expectations by delivering high-quality, cost effective, research-driven products and services that address their unique needs, and optimise the wellbeing of their animals.

Through our commitment to research, innovation, and collaborations with farmers, stockowners, veterinary professionals and pet owners, we commit to improving the quality of life for animals and contributing to the advancement of veterinary medicine. With our unwavering commitment to quality and customer satisfaction, you can trust us to be your partner in success.

Our vision is to be the premier provider of quality animal health solutions in the AMEA Region (Africa Middle East and Asia), trusted by customers to improve their livelihoods and the welfare of their animals. By treating all stakeholders with equal respect, we aim to become the supplier and employer of choice in the industry, driving growth and making a positive impact on all the communities we serve.

Name: Veterinary Pathology Group (VPG)
Description:
We’re VPG, the veterinary diagnostics and testing experts, here to support you, your practice and your customers by delivering excellence everywhere.

As vets ourselves, and with over 20 years experience of working closely in partnership with a wide range of practices, we know what matters to you. Personal service, access to experts, comprehensive testing and high-quality, right-first-time results.

Our pathologists work alongside you in partnership. They’ll commit to a diagnosis, using their experience and insight to help you get to the right answer without the need for further testing.

You benefit from the advanced technologies, forward-thinking research and on-demand expertise that you need from our local labs. But you also benefit from our wider, global capabilities and purpose — strong, long-term working relationships, an independent approach and a commitment to sustainable, 
ecological and positive social initiatives.

VPG, the veterinary diagnostics and testing experts focused on excellence everywhere.

Name: Canadian Animal Health Surveillance System
Description: The Canadian Animal Health Surveillance System (CAHSS): A shared national vision leading to effective, responsive, integrated animal health surveillance in Canada. Le Système canadien de surveillance de la santé animale (SCSSA): Une vision nationale commune qui mènera à une surveillance efficace, souple et intégrée de la santé animale au Canada.

Name: Hospital Veterinario UCV
Description: El Hospital Veterinario de la Universidad Católica de Valencia “San Vicente Mártir” es un centro docente que trabaja exclusivamente como Hospital de Referencia para los veterinarios y servicio de urgencias 24h los 365 días del año. Contamos con personal cualificado y con experiencia en cada una de las especialidades que se ofrecen para ofrecer a las mascotas el mejor trato y de la mejor calidad.

Name: CANARY PET GROUP
Description:
CANARY Pet Group is the leading provider of pet care services in the northern Emirates. With six companies operating under the CANARY brand in three Emirates, we offer a comprehensive range of services to meet all of your pet's needs. From pet products and accessories, both in-store and online, to grooming, veterinary care, hotel stays, training, recreation, a pet taxi, and mobile grooming, our full-service hub has everything you need to keep your pet healthy and happy.

At CANARY Pet Group, we believe in a holistic approach to pet care. That's why we offer a wide range of services designed to meet all of your pet's needs, from nutrition to exercise and beyond. We also have the largest indoor pet center in the northern Emirates, providing a safe and comfortable environment for your pet to play and socialize.

Established in 2001, CANARY Pet Group has a long-standing reputation for providing the best veterinary services and a wide range of other pet care services. We are committed to providing quality, comprehensive care for all pets, and we strive to make sure that every pet in our care receives the individual attention and care they deserve.

Name: Veterinary Specialty and Emergency Center
Description:
Our Mission is to enhance the human-animal bond by providing our community of referring veterinarians and pet owners with exceptional specialty and emergency care.

In 1994, Dr. Robert J. Orsher opened the doors to the Veterinary Specialty and Emergency Center (VSEC), a 24-hour multi-specialty referral and emergency small animal hospital in Bucks County, Pennsylvania. His goal for this veterinary specialty hospital was to bring board-certified specialists from multiple disciplines under one roof to practice as a cohesive team.

Veterinary specialists in; anesthesia, cardiology, clinical pathology, dentistry & oral surgery, dermatology, diagnostic imaging, emergency & critical care, holistic medicine & acupuncture, internal medicine, neurology/neurosurgery, oncology, ophthalmology, surgery and radiation oncology have joined together to actualize Dr. Orsher's vision. VSEC offers leading-edge medicine while working closely with pet owners and their referring veterinarians to ensure the highest level of communication and care.

VSEC operates out of our state-of-the-art facility in Levittown, PA. The hospital features several amenities, including a linear accelerator to provide radiation therapy for cancer patients and a special room to administer radioactive iodine treatment for hyperthyroid cats, along with a CT scanner, MRI scanner, dedicated ICU, separate canine and feline wards and a presentation room for continuing education lectures. 

In February 2013, VSEC opened its second location, VSEC Philadelphia at 1114 South Front Street in Philadelphia. This hospital brings our state-of-the-art, personalized specialty veterinary medicine to the Philadelphia, South Jersey and Northern Delaware communities. These two new hospitals will help VSEC carry out its mission. 

In 2016 VSEC joined the BluePearl Veterinary Partners Network, a MARS Petcare brand.

Name: HISPALGAN Salud Animal
Description: En HISPALGAN trabajamos para contribuir al bienestar del mundo a través de la salud animal, la seguridad alimentaria y el medio ambiente. Ofrecemos a nuestros clientes una amplia gama de servicios y productos que suponen una valiosa contribución en todos los ámbitos de la producción animal y animales de compañía. En la que destaca el asesoramiento ganadero y veterinario. El valor añadido de estos servicios se traduce en una mayor rentabilidad para nuestros clientes, en una mayor seguridad para el consumo humano y un mayor respeto al planeta.

Name: Le Point Vétérinaire
Description:
Le Point Vétérinaire est la revue et le site web de référence de formation post-universitaire des vétérinaires. 
Au service des praticiens, Le Point vétérinaire donne une information directement applicable en pratique, dans un style clair et concis.

Le Point Vétérinaire s’adresse à la fois aux praticiens canins, ruraux et mixtes.
Les articles subissent la validation du comité scientifique composé de plusieurs dizaines d’enseignants et de praticiens reconnus dans leur spécialité.
Le Point Vétérinaire est indexé dans de nombreuses bases de données internationales.
La rédaction du Point Vétérinaire est à votre écoute pour toute proposition ou suggestion d’article :
redaction-pv@lepointveterinaire.fr

Pour s'abonner :http://www.lepointveterinaire.fr/publications/le-point-veterinaire/je-m-abonne.html

Name: Global DX Ltd - Scotland, UK
Description:
Global DX – your experts in veterinary lateral flow (LF) diagnostics.

In a world where the food-chain, animal health and public health face continual disruption due to disease – African Swine Fever (ASF), Avian Influenza (AIV), H5N1 – Global DX specialise in the provision of diagnostic solutions to safe-guard the future of the food-chain, industry and global health. 

Our history goes back to before the establishment of Global DX Ltd. Our founder, Andrew Shepherd, late husband to Co-founder and now CEO Sharon Shepherd, established Omega Diagnostics plc in 1987 to serve the human IVD market through a network of international distributors in 110 countries. Andrew dedicated his life to the industry, working as a consultant for WHO, CHAI, MSF and a volunteer for the Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation, being a renowned authority on TB, malaria and HIV.  Omega Diagnostics plc was awarded the Queen's Award for Exports, presented by HM the late Queen Elizabeth II at Buckingham Palace.

Building on 60+ years’ experience in the IVD industry, our expertise falls into 3 categories:

Herdscreen Range
A range of rapid tests which can be conducted flock-side/pen-side.  Outbreaks of AIV H5N1 and ASF have put our AIV H5 Ag and ASF Ab tests in the spotlight. 

Petscreen Range
Our extensive range of rapid companion animal tests provide diagnosis within 10 minutes, allowing for prompt decisions and actions, potentially saving lives.  

Global DX Solutions
Looking to outsource your LF development?  Want to introduce a range of LF diagnostics for aquaculture?  Want to lead-the-way in dromedary healthcare?  Whether looking to improve an existing assay or to develop a new assay, as experts in LF diagnostics we understand the importance of high quality and accurate performance, delivering you robust and reliable tests for the global market.

Contact us about our Herdscreen Range, Petscreen Range, or Global DX Solutions via LinkedIn or https://globaldx.com/contact-us/

Name: DoveLewis Veterinary Emergency & Specialty Hospital
Description: DoveLewis Veterinary Emergency and Specialty Hospital, established in 1973 and based in Portland, Oregon, is the only nonprofit, 24-hour emergency and intensive care unit in the region. With 50 years of service to the community, DoveLewis has treated more than 750,000 animals. DoveLewis also has seven donor-supported community programs that serve animals in need and the animal-loving community.

Name: Instituto Rosenbusch S.A.
Description:
Laboratorio argentino con más de 100 años de historia y experiencia en Sanidad Animal. Elabora y comercializa una línea completa de vacunas y productos farmacéuticos  para rumiantes de producción pecuaria, equinos y animales de compañía. Además, es elaborador de Biolarvicidas para el control ambiental de los mosquitos transmisores de enfermedades, entre ellos, el Dengue y Malaria.

Con sede en Argentina y filiales en Brasil, Uruguay y Paraguay, es un referente del sector en Sudamérica, exportando sus productos a todo el mundo. 

Su historia comienza en 1917, en la Sociedad Rural Argentina (la entidad más representativa del sector agropecuario del país). En 1924, ante un cambio de estructura en la Sociedad Rural, el Instituto se constituye como sociedad comercial individual, bajo el nombre Instituto de Biología Experimental SRL, a cuyo frente estaba el Dr. Francisco Rosenbusch. En 1946, el Instituto cambió su denominación por la de Instituto Rosenbusch S.A. de Biología Experimental Agropecuaria, transformándose en Sociedad Anónima. 

En sus años de historia, forjó con realidades, una imagen de alta calidad en sus productos, ofreciendo una asistencia técnica continua, tanto al productor como al veterinario. Pionero en el desarrollo y producción de productos con tecnología propia. 

La actividad comercial, dedicada a la sanidad animal y ambiental, basada en la participación de médicos veterinarios radicados en todo el país, ha colocado a Rosenbusch  dentro de las empresas más importantes de Argentina y líder en muchos sectores del mercado. Es la primera empresa del sector en cotizar en la Bolsa de Comercio de Buenos Aires.
Location: Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires, Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Creature Comforts
Description:
We’re redesigning the entire vet experience, making access to care seamless, joyful, and everyday.

Open now in St. John's Wood, Notting Hill, Chiswick, Putney, Chelsea, Barnet & St. Albans.

Name: Veterinary Purchasing Co. Ltd.
Description:
Veterinary Purchasing was formed in 1972 with the key, simple purpose of delivering products and supplies in a timely and economical manner to Ontario veterinarians.  We are a shareholder-owned company and our shares are owned by only licensed veterinarians who own an accredited facility in Ontario.  Currently, the operation is run out of a 145,000 sq. ft. warehouse, divided into 7 distinct zones that are organized by product groupings.  Picking, packing and shipment of pharmaceuticals, pet food, supplies, clinic supplies, and much more, is streamlined for efficient service via bar coded bin cards, terminals with bar code scanners, and an automated computerized conveyer system.  On our busiest days we ship approximately 1,200 orders and 11,200 pieces! 

Mission Statement: “We are dedicated to providing the highest level of service to our member clinics through the personal actions of people who care.”

Name: The Animal Referral Hospital
Description:
The Animal Referral Hospital (ARH) is a well-established and leading group of specialist and emergency veterinary hospitals. 

We offer a wide range of specialist services and provide 24-hour emergency and critical care throughout our facilities in Sydney NSW, Baulkham Hills NSW, Gosford NSW, Fyshwick ACT, Essendon Fields VIC and now in Sinnamon Park QLD. 

Services offered in our hospitals include internal medicine, surgery, medical oncology, radiation oncology, ophthalmology, dentistry, dermatology, animal behaviour, exotics and avian, diagnostic imaging (including CT, MRI, X-ray, ultrasound) emergency and critical care, and physiotherapy. 

The ARH employs over 500 staff including internationally recognised specialists, highly experienced vets, a strong and dedicated team of nurses and support staff. We strive for excellence in everything we do and as many of us are pet owners we aim to make our patient's visits as comfortable as possible. 
 
At night, weekends and public hoildays our hospitals are staffed by experienced vets and nurses who constantly communicate with our specialists. The same staff provide an "out of hours" service to clients of other vets throughout our sites, to provide emergency treatment for their patients and overnight monitoring of critical cases. 
 
Our emergency service staffs our ICU at night, and deals with problems such as heart failure, patients hit by car, gastric dilation and volvulus (GDV or bloat), seizures and poisonings.
 
ARH also runs regular workshops and seminars to provide continuing education to our referring veterinarians and nurses. Our flagship hospital located at Homebush in Sydney includes training rooms and an onsite seminar room which can comfortably seat 100 guests.

Description:
Vet Empowered is a veterinary-led, personal discovery and coaching game changer, founded by Katie Ford and Claire Grigson in 2020. We have over 25years' experience in practice, and still continue to work on the ground too.

THE VET EMPOWERED MISSION:
To provide high quality, empowering personal development content and support to professionals in animal-related industries. We strive to remind every individual that we come in contact with of their inherent value, and leave them with an impression of increase. We create a community of supportive, likehearted professionals where they can connect and support each other.

OUR CORE VALUES
Kindness | Fun | Authenticity  Collaboration | Gratitude | Compassion

Read some of our testimonials:

"I cannot recommend this course highly enough. It is truly the most relevant, enlightening, empowering, life-changing experience. I suffered imposter syndrome after returning to practice after my second maternity leave. I doubted myself, my capabilities which in turn caused so much chronic stress and fatigue.

Just when I thought I was done with the stress of clinical practice, I found a way to manage my life, my stress, my anguish, that sinking feeling on the way to work. I am now on a different path to finding what I truly want from life and learning about myself. I don't worry about the day to day stresses of clinical life or negativity from clients. It simply doesn't fill my thoughts & take over my life.

I implore anyone who is not enjoying clinical practice to do this course. It does exactly what it says on the tin. Empowering."

"Katie and Claire are knowledgeable and convey the content in a manner that is easy to digest and fun, they bounce off each other beautifully and really know their stuff. They are very supportive and you really feel like they are invested in you and your personal journey."

"I was going to say this course changed my life, more accurately it has given me the skills and motivation to change my own life."

Name: VetPartners Portugal
Description:
VetPartners é um grupo formado por algumas das mais prestigiadas e respeitadas clínicas veterinárias do Reino Unido e estamos a trabalhar para estar ao mesmo nível em Portugal. 

Liderados por veterinários, conhecemos os desafios e alegrias do dia-a-dia da clínica e trabalhamos em estreita colaboração com a nossa família de clínicas e hospitais para alcançar o nosso objetivo principal: garantir o melhor cuidado para pacientes e clientes. 

Acreditamos na proximidade e no sentimento de pertença e preocupamo-nos com as pessoas, os seus animais e a nossa profissão. 

Com mais de 6.000 colaboradores a trabalhar em mais de 500 centros, estamos em constante crescimento com o objetivo de ser o grupo veterinário de eleição tanto para clínicas, hospitais e respetivos funcionários. 

Para alcançar este objetivo contamos com um excelente ambiente de trabalho, expandimos o nosso grupo incorporando centros que se preocupam em melhorar e desenvolver a profissão e promovemos o nosso negócio de forma eficiente, ética, sustentável e rentável. 

Não há duas clínicas iguais, por isso adoptamos e impulsionamos esse espírito independente, e simultaneamente fornecemos apoio central personalizado em finanças, tecnologia, marketing, contabilidade, gestão e recursos humanos. 

Desenvolvemos indivíduos, hospitais, clínicas e equipas, proporcionando às nossas pessoas formação de elevada qualidade e investindo nos nossos centros, proporcionando as mais recentes tecnologias, equipamentos e instalações. 

Os nossos valores de proximidade, respeito, colaboração, apoio e dedicação definem a forma como trabalhamos. 

Se quer fazer parte desta incrível viagem, estaremos de braços abertos para o acompanhar.

Name: Veterinary Council of Ireland
Description:
The Veterinary Council of Ireland the statutory body responsible for the regulation and management of the practise of veterinary medicine and veterinary nursing. The principal function of the Veterinary Council is to regulate the practise of veterinary medicine and veterinary nursing in the Republic of Ireland, in the interest of animal health and welfare and in the interest of veterinary public health.

The functions of the Veterinary Council include protection of the public through the supervision of veterinary education, the maintenance of the register of veterinary practitioners and nurses, the registration of veterinary premises, and through disciplinary action in cases of professional misconduct.

There are 3,697 Veterinary Practitioners and 1,280 Veterinary Nurses registered with the Veterinary Council of Ireland.

There are currently 771 veterinary premises registered under the Council’s Statutory Premises Accreditation Scheme. These include Veterinary Clinics, Veterinary Offices and Veterinary Hospitals.

Description:
VET PLANET has been caring for the health and comfort of all animals for over 15 years.

The Company mission is to support pet parents and veterinarians in their everyday decisions regarding care and treatment so that every animal could look, feel and live the best.

VET PLANET products are used by veterinary surgeons, breeders and pet parents in over 45 countries on 4 continents.

High quality and efficiency of our products has been repeatedly noticed and awarded. It is our priority to meet most stringent production quality requirements.  

VET PLANET portfolio includes three brands: 
- VET EXPERT - professional products that support animals,
- RAW PALEO - superpremium dogs and cats food, rich in meat,
- MR. BANDIT - snacks for dogs and cats.

VET PLANET product portfolio:
- supplements for companion animals in an innovative, easy to administer TWIST OFF capsule – joints, skin & coat, immunity, liver, urinary tract,
- maintenance pet food - supernatural, balanced food for pets in harmony with their primeval needs,
- veterinary diets - prepared by best in class experts in the field of veterinary dietetics based only on ingredients that have proven and documented dietary action,
- rapid diagnostic tests for dogs, cats and livestock,
- an innovative cosmetic & care line - specialised veterinary shampoos line, ear and dental care, odour management,
- line of snacks and treats for dogs and cats.

It is our priority to meet most stringent production quality requirements. Our products are manufactured exclusively in plants with the highest pharmaceutical quality certificate, GMP (Good Manufacturing Practice), and the process conforms to the same standards as those applied in the production of human medication. All production stages are strictly controlled and supervised. Product compositions are designed in cooperation with veterinary doctors and scientists.

Name: Clinique Vétérinaire Alliance
Description:
Installée au centre de Bordeaux, la clinique vétérinaire Alliance accueille une équipe pluridisciplinaire de 60 personnes et un plateau technique de haute performance. 

Le Service des urgences : 24H/24, 7J/7, une équipe de vétérinaires et ASV assure en permanence des soins médicaux ou chirurgicaux efficaces.

Le Service de la médecine générale reçoit vos animaux au quotidien pour de la prévention, de la médecine et de la chirurgie générale. 

Les Services Spécialisés vous reçoivent sur demande de votre vétérinaire traitant ou pour un second avis :
    . la médecine interne : la médecine interne est la spécialité médicale qui s’intéresse à la prise en charge globale (diagnostique et thérapeutique) des problèmes de santé. Le spécialiste en médecine interne, appelé interniste, intervient lors de démarche diagnostique complexe et lors de prise en charge d’un patient pouvant présenter des troubles liés aux dysfonctionnements de plusieurs organes.
   . la chirurgie spécialisée : ce service prend en charge les chirurgies complexes telles que l’orthopédie, la chirurgie des tissus mous, la neurologie et la chirurgie mini-invasive 
   . la dermatologie spécialisée : Le service de dermatologie se consacre aux maladies touchant la peau de votre animal mais pas seulement…Il s’intéresse également aux oreilles, aux griffes et aux coussinets, à toutes les jonctions entre peau et muqueuses comme la truffe, les paupières ou la zone anale.
   . l'imagerie spécialisée : le service d’Imagerie se consacre à la réalisation et à l´interpretation sur site des examens complémentaires d’imagerie médicale. Il regroupe radiographie, scanner, IRM et échographie.
   . la cancérologie : dédié à la prise en charge des animaux affectés par un cancer, ce service comprend aujourd’hui 4 vétérinaires (chirurgiens, médecin oncologue et radiothérapeute).
   . la neurologie se consacre au diagnostic et à la prise en charge des maladies du cerveau, de la moelle spinale, des nerfs et des muscles.

Name: Animal Aid Unlimited
Description:
Animal Aid Unlimited is one of India's leading street animal rescue centers. 

Our mission is to rescue and treat the un-owned street animals who have become ill or injured, and through their rescue inspire and develop the community to protect and defend the lives of all animals. Our goal is equality and protection for all animals and an end to the use and abuse of animals. 

Our emergency help-line receives an average of 100 reports of street animals in need each day, resulting in our ambulances admitting more than 15,000 animals each year. We treat in our hospital approximately 500 animals on any given day.

We provide a forever-home to about 400 disabled and special-needs animals who would not be able to access food on the street or flee from traffic.

Name: Buddha Society For Animal Welfare
Description:
BSAW is established to provide veterinary medical service to those animals who are less privileged than others deprived of minimum essential veterinary medical aid.

It's a brainchild of the Hon'ble "Shiksha Ratan" Dr S.P. Sharma.

Every year trust also imparts training and teaching to those who are passionate to provide veterinary care to these less intellectuals creatures in remotest corner of the nations.

By supporting BSAW we can help ensure the continued health and welfare of our nation's animals even in the remotest of areas.

Ramashish Animal Welfare and Research Institute (RAWRI), run under BSAW works to train Indian citizens on first aid veterinary treatment including basic clinical treatment of diseases.

Name: Biocheck.UGent
Description:
Through years of research, Ghent University developed a unique risk-based
scoring system to measure the level of biosecurity at the farm level.
This resulted in a free biosecurity assessment tool, available for different
animal species and in multiple languages.

OUR SERVICES

Advanced users
Take biosecurity evaluation a step further with personalized feedback,
sharing of reports, setting own benchmarks, tracking of your progress visually.

E-learning
Short interactive online lectures to improve knowledge regarding biosecurity.
(available in different languages)

Training & education
Live on-site biosecurity training by our experts.
After the training, you will be able to perform biosecurity assessments and
use the Biocheck.UGent methodology.

Consultancy
Audits performed by our experts during a farm visit, a thorough evaluation
and report is provided afterwards.

API
Our surveys and scoring algorithm can be integrated in your applications or
software, giving you access to our worldwide database for benchmarking.

Name: ELBA Encuentro Latinoamericano de Bienestar Animal
Description:
Bienvenido al Primer Encuentro Latinoamericano de Bienestar Animal, ELBA 2024, donde líderes y profesionales se unen para promover prácticas éticas y sostenibles en la producción animal y atención a animales de compañía.

Participantes:
Autoridades, medios de comunicación, sociedades y empresas de la industria.

Este encuentro es organizado por ACBA (Asociación Chilena de Bienestar Animal) y AEBA (Asociación Ecuatoriana de Bienestar Animal).
Se estructura en tres grandes áreas de ponencias: bienestar en la producción de aves y cerdos; bienestar en la producción acuícola; y bienestar animal en animales de compañía.
Con la participación de 400 asistentes, se ofrecerán 36 charlas internacionales y contará con el respaldo de 40 auspiciadores comprometidos con la causa del bienestar animal.

“El Bienestar Animal es esencial para la sostenibilidad y la salud, impactando positivamente en la cadena de suministro y la calidad de vida de los animales.”

Objetivos de ELBA 2024:

- Elevar la calidad de la producción animal.
- Mejorar la experiencia del paciente canino o felino y su tutor en el marco de una atención médico veterinaria con bienestar animal.
- Potenciar el ‘One Welfare', o Un bienestar, concepto que aborda el bienestar dentro del marco de la producción animal o atención sanitaria de animales de compañía, incluyendo a todos quienes participan del proceso, junto a los animales.

El Bienestar Animal es un pilar importante de la Sostenibilidad y la estrategia correcta para disminuir el uso de antibióticos en animales.

Participa en ELBA 2024 y sé parte del cambio hacia una producción animal más ética y sostenible.

Autoridades, medios de comunicación, sociedades y empresas de la industria estarán presentes en este evento único. 

Producir proteína animal es positivo gracias al Bienestar Animal y toda la cadena de suministros que, involucrados con esta nueva ciencia, permiten llevarlo a cabo.

Name: WIMBA
Description:
We've invented the most advanced, custom-fit, lightest-weight pet orthotics ever — with zero plaster mess involved. Vets can scan, specify, and order WIMBA orthotics right from their smartphones: our Al-powered app scans an animal's limb precisely in just minutes. High-fidelity 3D printing yields durable orthotic devices created exactly to a vet's therapeutic or protective specifications, typically printed within 15 working days and ready for worldwide shipment.

Our mission is to help the most pets possible live their best lives with greater mobility.

Our team of orthopedic device specialists and veterinary medical experts knew there had to be a better way to provide pets with optimal orthopedic support with shorter production times, lower costs, and an easier creation process for vets. Vets who've adopted our plaster-free orthotics process have been very enthusiastic about the ease and products.

Every WIMBA device model has been developed and rigorously tested by our multi-disciplinary team of medical experts and orthopedic device specialists.

WIMBA devices have been awarded four patents and numerous accolades among the veterinary medical community and leading pet venture organizations, including MARS, R/GA, LeapVentureStudio and Michelson Found Animals Foundation.

We invite vets and investors to connect with us here and explore our website: wimba.vet Let's leap into the future of pet orthotics together!

Name: CHV Languedocia
Description:
Centre Hospitalier Vétérinaire Languedocia – L’excellence au service de vos animaux 

Depuis 2011, le CHV Languedocia s’engage à offrir des soins de pointe grâce aux dernières avancées scientifiques et technologiques, dans un seul but : garantir le bien-être et la santé des animaux de compagnie.

 Un pôle d’expertise vétérinaire
Nous accueillons les cas référés par les vétérinaires de la région Occitanie ainsi que les pathologies complexes nécessitant l’avis de spécialistes reconnus.

 Urgences 24h/24 et 7j/7
Notre équipe est mobilisée à tout moment, pour assurer une prise en charge immédiate et efficace.

 Un plateau technique de pointe
Doté d’équipements de haute technologie (IRM, scanner, endoscopie, échographie, radiographie, arthroscopie, coelioscopie, électrodiagnostic, laboratoire d’analyses, 6 blocs opératoires...), nous offrons des diagnostics et traitements de précision.

 Une équipe dévouée et passionnée
Nos 50 vétérinaires, dont 12 spécialistes, et nos auxiliaires vétérinaires qualifiés mettent tout en œuvre pour offrir les meilleurs soins.

 Un espace d’hospitalisation adapté à chaque espèce
Parce que chaque patient est unique, nos infrastructures permettent une prise en charge optimale et un confort adapté.

 Situé en Occitanie, le CHV Languedocia est un acteur majeur de la santé vétérinaire, toujours tourné vers l’innovation, l’excellence et la formation des spécialistes de demain.

 Suivez-nous pour découvrir nos actualités et notre expertise !
