Name: WELFCERT
Description:
Ofrecemos la primera certificación Welfcert para bienestar animal en sistemas productivos- Chile y Latinoamérica, con estándares creados en el País, basados en la ciencia.

 Nuestros auditores se encuentran totalmente capacitados.

Name: Pawsibilities Vet Med
Description:
Pawsibilities Vet Med is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization that proactively increases all forms of diversity within the veterinary profession through mentorship, professional development and resources to all intersecting identities including but not limited to ability, ethnicity, gender identity, non-traditional paths, race, sexual orientation, socioeconomic background, religion, and veteran status.

VISION
A robust and thriving community that fuels an inclusive veterinary profession which mirrors the diversity of society.

MISSION
To diversify all roles within the veterinary profession by providing mentorship, professional development, and resources to all intersecting identities including but not limited to ability, ethnicity, gender identity, non-traditional paths, race*, sexual orientation, socioeconomic background, religion, and veteran status.
*Social construct

CORE VALUES
Pawsibilities leads among its peers with fundamental core values that promote diversity, mentorship, and leadership.  These values are the underpinning of our services and are reflected in our vision and mission.

- Leadership
- Community
- Inclusion
- Service

Name: Altano Group
Description: Altano is an international group of leading equine clinics and practices. Together we stand for veterinary medicine of the future. We bundle know-how and experience to ensure the best possible medical care. We create synergies to provide our patients with optimal care. For us, every animal is valuable. That is why we value advanced diagnostics, high veterinary quality and a trusting and appreciative corporate culture.

Name: Veterinary United
Description: At Veterinary United , we’re more than a group of practices—we’re a family, and our values are the driving force behind every decision we make. At the core of these values is a strong focus on what’s best for you, your team, and your practice. Our family of hospitals all support each other, operating like a hub and spoke model. This model creates a strong connection between each of our locations and allows us to deliver higher quality care to the pets in those areas. When hospitals support each other in providing the very best care for patients, we’re able to grow together and not only meet our goals, but exceed them.

Name: Poultry Health Services
Description:
At Poultry Health Services the primary focus is our clients – the productivity, health and welfare of flocks and the profitability of their business. This includes providing a proactive service tailored to the individual needs of our clients to ensure they realise their business potential.   

Our clients demand rapid diagnostic support and veterinary intervention to keep their birds healthy and performing well. We have a long track record in all meat birds, including broilers, turkeys and ducks, as well as egg producing birds. In addition, we support high biosecurity establishments such as hatcheries and Parent, Grandparent and Great Grandparent farms. We offer a bespoke service, working with different sized farms, from 1 million birds down to a few hundred. 

Our team of vets are based in seven practices spread across the country and are available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week on farm, in the hatchery, feed mill or processor.

Poultry Health Services is part of the Origin group of production animal focused vet practices and reference laboratories. Origin is accelerating its investment in its leading edge laboratory services and technology enabled data analytics to ensure that it remains at the forefront of proactive, evidence based poultry health services

Name: Pets Haven Veterinary Clinic
Description: Pets Haven is located in Al Wasl Road, Jumeirah 1, Dubai UAE. Pets Haven Veterinary Clinic aims to be a one-stop shop for your pet companions - from Consultation and Surgeries to pet store and boarding. Our team is composed of dynamic and well-experienced professionals to ensure that your animal companions will receive the best pet care and assistance they truly deserve. We aim to provide an advanced veterinary care and service with affordable and fair price. Our team have combined experience of over 25 years in the Veterinary Medicine field specializing in Orthopedics Surgery, Accupuncture and General Health."

Name: LABORATORIOS AGROINSUMOS S.A.
Description: Veterinary products

Name: Intracare
Description:
PIONEERS IN FUTURE PROOF SOLUTIONS 

Global challenges related to diseases, pathogens and their prevention are more important than ever. How do we ensure healthy and safe growth together? 

We believe in smart, safe alternatives that contribute to a better future for everyone involved. We improve the health and well-being of plants, animals and consumers. Our innovative strength creates sustainable growth and financial returns for farmers and businesses. 
 
Intracare develops, produces and supplies proven and effective veterinary medicines, biosecurity, hygiene products, nutrients and innovations for sustainable and modern intensive livestock farming, horticulture and aquaculture worldwide. The effect of cooperation is more than the sum of its parts. 

Our state-of-the-art R&D department develops solutions for the challenges of tomorrow. Working with our people in the field, we create products that achieve sustainable growth and reduce the use of antibiotics and pesticides. And that makes us pioneers in future-proof solutions.

Name: Life Pet Hub
Description:
A Life Pet Hub é o ecossistema que integra os planos de saúde Dog Life, Pet Life e CatLife, unindo inovação e cuidado para impulsionar o bem-estar pet em todo o Brasil.

Também oferecemos o Meu+ Pet, em parceria com o Mercantil, ampliando o acesso a soluções que facilitam o cuidado com a saúde dos pets.

Conectamos tutores e profissionais de excelência de forma simples e acessível, por meio da nossa plataforma exclusiva, desenvolvida para facilitar o acesso a cuidados veterinários e incentivar a prevenção.

Conheça nossas marcas e veja como descomplicamos as idas ao veterinário:

doglife.com.br
petlife.com.br
catlife.com.br

Name: Clinica Veterinaria VET'S
Description: Clinica Veterinaria lider en emergencia y cuidados intensivos

Name: VetLed
Description:
We inspire, create and champion positive veterinary culture for our people, our patients and our profession.

VetLed was founded by a vet who understands first-hand the significant challenges that you have to overcome every day, the inner workings of the profession, and the strongest belief that together we can make things better.

VetLed are the perfect partners to help you to make the change that you want to see - on a cultural level, at a performance level and always underpinned by supporting the wellbeing of our people.
 
How can we help you to thrive?

Name: VetTalks
Description: Daima Yanında

Name: Egypt Equine Aid
Description:
Egypt Equine Aid is a registered nonprofit organisation dedicated to improving the lives of working horses, donkeys, mules and camels in Egypt - animals who quietly carry the weight of local economies and families, yet often receive little protection or care themselves.

Every day, millions of equines transport goods, support agriculture, and provide income for their owners. When these animals suffer from injury, exhaustion, or preventable disease, entire families are affected. Our mission is to break this cycle by delivering free, high-quality veterinary care, emergency treatment, farrier services, and practical welfare education to communities where resources are limited and need is greatest.

We believe real, lasting change happens through partnership. By working hand-in-hand with local animal owners, Egyptian veterinarians, international volunteers, and global supporters, we focus not only on treating animals, but on building knowledge, trust, and sustainable welfare practices that endure long after a single intervention.

At Egypt Equine Aid, compassion guides our work - but accountability and impact drive it. We are committed to transparency, ethical operations, and measurable outcomes that demonstrate how improved animal welfare directly strengthens livelihoods, dignity, and community resilience.

Through collaboration with donors, corporate partners, and advocates around the world, we strive to create a future where working equines are no longer invisible, but valued, protected, and cared for as the vital partners they are.

Name: AQUATRECK ANIMAL HEALTH S.L
Description:
AQUATRECK ANIMAL HEALTH S.L. is a new aquaculture pharmaceutical company established in Galicia in Spain by CZVaccines S.A and MARINNOVAC Limited.

AQUATRECK aims to support global aquaculture development providing autogenous, experimental and licensed vaccines and novel, innovative, reliable, accurate diagnostic services for the fish and shrimp farming industry. 
 
“The mission of AQUATRECK is to fast track innovative fish & shrimp disease prevention strategies by building effective open collaboration alliances of top talented teams to serve the global aquaculture industry’s sustainable future” 
Prof. Patrick Smith MARINNOVAC chairman 
 
“We have long experience as CMO GMP producers of fish vaccines for the last 25 years and we decided to focus to accelerate the sustainable global aquaculture growth by preventing the major fish and shrimp diseases so we launch today AQUATRECK a new dynamic open innovation aquatic health company” Andrés Fernández Álvarez-Santullano, CEO of CZ Vaccines S.A
 
“AQUATRECK provides  long experience in fish vaccine development, close collaboration and continuous interaction with fish and shrimp farmers to develop comprehensive health strategies, top level leading viral vaccine research and development facilities in Cambridge, UK, sub-unit fish vaccine research and development facilities in Dortmund, Germany, state of the art GMP Fish vaccine manufacturing facilities in Spain and a vibrant network of fish immunology and pathology scientists around the world. 
Dr. Panos Christofilogiannis AQUATRECK Director

Name: SPVS Ltd
Description: SPVS is a not-for-profit organisation for professionals within the veterinary industry, promoting responsible leadership by providing tools and resources that enable members to develop and expand their business and leadership skills.

Name: BIOPETCAMP
Description:
Desde 1996, a Biopet atua como distribuidora especializada em produtos e medicamentos veterinários, com processos estruturados e eficientes para oferecer soluções de alta qualidade a médicos-veterinários, lojas, petshops, hospitais e revendas do segmento PetVet.

Com sede em Campinas/SP e presença em toda a Região Metropolitana e interior paulista, nossa operação une logística ágil, equipe técnica altamente qualificada e um atendimento personalizado e humanizado, que garante suporte estratégico para o sucesso dos nossos clientes.

Ao longo de quase três décadas, construímos uma estrutura sólida, orientada para compreender as demandas do mercado e entregar soluções que agregam valor, produtividade e excelência aos atendimentos clínicos veterinários.

Acreditamos que a excelência na saúde animal começa pela excelência nos processos, no atendimento e, acima de tudo, no relacionamento com quem confia em nós.

Conte com quem é movido por paixão, profissionalismo e compromisso com a vida.
Biopet. Amamos os pets!

Name: Innovative Vet Path
Description: A veterinarian owned and operated diagnostic pathology service serving the Kansas City metro area and beyond. We specialize in providing top-notch personalized service with a special focus on quality over quantity. Our most popular services include: dermatopathology (both biopsy and additional clinical dermatology consult), OFA sebaceous adenitis screening for Poodles, and surgical biopsies.

Name: Delta Masr For Poultry Production
Description: Delta Masr Group was established in 1997, and it was one of the first companies that specialized in the field of broiler poultry farming of all strains raised in the Egyptian market. Over the years, the group expanded into many sectors and activities with the aim of adversely affecting its primary activity which is poultry rearing. So it started to import raw materials such as yellow corn, gluten, soybeans, and soon became one of the largest companies that trade feed raw materials of the highest quality. And based on the group’s leadership in providing feed stuffs, and based on the group’s experience in breeding all available breeds in the Egyptian market, the company has set up a feed factory under the commercial name Delta Masr Feed mill that produces nutritionally balanced feed for all types of poultry. Today the company is made up of five distinct sectors in the fields of agricultural industries, the poultry sector, the feed manufacturing sector, the animal production sector , the agricultural sector, land reclamation and the grain trade sector. All these expansions resulted from the group’s insightful vision towards providing healthy food and security for local and external consumers with the highest international quality standards, so the group today is one of the pioneers of agricultural industries in Egypt.

Name: 2Feet4Paws Veterinary Clinic
Description:
At 2Feet4Paws Veterinary Clinic in Dubai, we believe every pet deserves exceptional care, compassion, and understanding. Founded in 2015, this British-owned and managed clinic provides high-quality care for dogs, cats, birds, and exotic pets in a calm and friendly environment.

Our dedicated team of qualified veterinarians offers a full range of services, including wellness check-ups, vaccinations, dental care, advanced imaging, and emergency support. Every procedure is performed to Royal College of Veterinary Surgeons (United Kingdom) standards, ensuring your pet receives the best possible care.

At 2Feet4Paws, our approach is guided by ethics and empathy. We take time to get to know every pet and owner, offering honest, clear, and reassuring advice. Whether you visit for a routine check-up or urgent care, our focus is always on your pet’s comfort and well-being.

We care for a wide range of species, from playful puppies and curious kittens to colourful parrots, reptiles, and fish. With advanced facilities, experienced staff, and a genuine love for animals, we’ve earned a trusted reputation across Dubai for professional, compassionate, and ethical veterinary care.

At 2Feet4Paws, your pets are part of our family - and their health, happiness, and comfort are always at the heart of what we do.

Name: LIPTOSA
Description: Liptosa has a long experience working with phytobiotics and nutraceuticals in animal production (aquaculture, poultry, swine, ruminants, etc.). By another hand, Liptosa is present in more than 60 countries around the world, improving animal production performance and helping to decrease the usage of antibiotics.

Name: Esthima
Description:
[Esthima, n°1 des pompes funèbres animalières]
Réseau de 17 crématoriums et 2 agences funéraires répartis sur tout le territoire français.
Nous sommes fiers de notre histoire, qui nous a permis de devenir les référents du marché des obsèques animalières :

 Partenaires historiques des vétérinaires et experts de la crémation animale, nous sommes aux côtés des professionnels de la santé animale depuis près de 30 ans.

   Nous apportons également une solution aux familles dont l'animal décède à domicile ou accidentellement, en les accueillant directement dans nos agences et crématoriums.

Esthima, Horsia, Crematis, Cyclavet, des services de Veternity France.

Name: New Zealand Veterinary Association Te Pae Kīrehe
Description:
The New Zealand Veterinary Association Te Pae Kīrehe is the largest membership association representing veterinarians in Aotearoa. We have been proudly supporting our members since 1923.

We are committed to safeguarding the high skills, continuing development and ethical standards of the New Zealand veterinary profession, helping veterinarians be better recognised and valued for the unique role they play in society.

Name: Vet Jobs Plus
Description:
Our aim is to offer an easy solution for veterinary professionals seeking work within the industry and to act as a one stop shop for veterinary jobs. We currently have a wide range of positions available throughout the UK and Europe, whether you’re seeking a position in practice or any role within the industry, there should be something of interest to you.

We have realised that the veterinary industry is in need of a more professional, flexible approach towards recruitment, with there being so many different routes to access employment it can get confusing where to start.

We offer:

·         A comprehensive list of vacancies

·         Resources offering advice on, writing CVs, interview techniques and industry information

·         Job search tool, so you are able to search your ideal vacancy easily

·         An open approach to engaging with our audience through Social Media channels such as Facebook, Twitter and LinkedIn 

With our extensive knowledge of the veterinary industry, we understand what information veterinary professionals wish to see when looking to take the next step in their career. With the largest range of positions throughout the industry all on one website, we hope that you are able to find your next position.

We aim to be the premier veterinary recruitment, industry information and news website. If there is content that you would like to see on our website, don’t hesitate contact us, as we are flexible and always striving to improve our service.

Description: Over more than 10 years Poulpharm is a reliable, independent partner for veterinarians and the veterinary pharmaceutical and nutritional industry. Name: RECOVER Initiative
Description:
The internationally recognized authority in veterinary CPR.

Founded in 2010 by veterinary emergency and critical care specialists, The Reassessment Campaign on Veterinary Resuscitation (RECOVER) Initiative developed and disseminated the first evidence-based veterinary CPR guidelines.
The RECOVER Initiative has three core goals:

Guidelines: Continuously develop and update evidence-based, consensus-driven veterinary CPR guidelines through a rigorous review of the CPR literature.

Education: Offer the only standardized CPR certification for veterinary professionals and pet owners, endorsed by the American College of Veterinary Emergency and Critical Care and the Veterinary Emergency and Critical Care Society.

Research: Drive and support scientific research to enhance CPR practices and improve outcomes in animals.

Name: Natureza Distribuidora de Produtos Veterinários
Description:
Fundada em 1986, a Natureza Distribuidora de Produtos Veterinários é uma empresa referência no setor, lançando a oferta de soluções completas para o cuidado e bem-estar dos animais. Ao longo desses anos, conquistamos a confiança de nossos clientes e estabelecemos parcerias sólidas com os principais laboratórios do mercado pet, além das marcas mais renomadas de rações e acessórios.

Nosso diferencial é qualidade e inovação. Fomos pioneiros ao conquistar as certificações ISO 9001 e ISO 14001, o que reforça nosso compromisso com a excelência em nossos processos e a sustentabilidade. Buscamos sempre evoluir, trazendo as melhores opções para nossos clientes, com foco em soluções que atendam às necessidades do mercado, promovendo a saúde animal e a satisfação de quem confia em nosso trabalho.

Na Natureza, o cliente está sempre no centro de tudo o que faz. Nossa equipe especializada está constantemente em busca de novas tecnologias e práticas para garantir que nossos parceiros tenham acesso ao que há de mais moderno e eficaz. Estamos prontos para continuar uma jornada de mais de 35 anos, trazendo inovação e qualidade.

Name: Wear Referrals Veterinary Hospital
Description:
Wear Referrals is a multi-disciplinary, triple award winning specialist veterinary referral hospital just off Junction 60 of the A1.  

We are the leading North East multidisciplinary practice offering Neurology, Orthopaedics, Soft Tissue, Internal Medicine, Cardiology, Out of Hours Emergency Care and Rehabilitation. 

Practice facilities include a dedicated ICU ward for critical patients staffed 24 hours a day, in-house MRI & CT, 4 operating theatres, endoscopy and ultra-sound facilities and dedicated patient wards. 

We are proud to be part of the Linnaeus family of veterinary practices.

Wear Referrals are part of the Linnaeus Veterinary Ltd (A Mars Company). You can find our terms of use and privacy policy by visiting:

Description: Companion animal Clinic working toward The Next Generation of Veterinary Care. Proudly from Jeddah, Saudi Arabia

Name: Suprimax Vet
Description:
Com as perspectivas de crescimento do mercado veterinário brasileiro, para Pet Shops e Lojas do mercado agropecuário, os fundadores da Suprimax Vet iniciaram no setor como distribuidores em 1991, atuaram no Estado de São Paulo, estados do sul do Brasil e exportações para a América Latina.

Esta história de 29 anos a Suprimax Vet pretende dar continuidade, oferecendo produtos e serviços com qualidade a seus parceiros comerciais.

Name: AÚNA Especialidades Veterinarias
Description:
AÚNA Especialidades Veterinarias es un Hospital Veterinario colaborador de todo veterinario clínico que necesite apoyo diagnóstico y terapéutico para sus pacientes. Como centro de referencia, no admite pacientes que no sean remitidos por otros compañeros o centros veterinarios, salvo en su servicio de Urgencias 24h. 

Trabajamos en estrecha colaboración con los veterinarios remisores, complementando su actividad con sus pacientes y ofreciendo servicios de especialidad en Cirugía (tejidos blandos y traumatología), Diagnóstico por Imagen, Neurología y Neurocirugía, Oncología, Medicina Interna, Cardiología e Intervencionismo, Dermatología, Etología, Anestesia, Urgencias y Cuidados Intensivos.

Situado en las afueras de Valencia, con dos naves de más de 800 m2 y más de 60 profesionales, nuestro equipo humano está formado por más de 6 Diplomados Europeos y/o Americanos de las distintas especialidades. 

Contamos con salas de hospitalización de perros, gatos e infecciosos independientes, UCI, laboratorio propio bien equipado, gasometría, monitorización avanzada, TAC helicoidal de 16 cortes, radiología digital directa, fluoroscopio, ecógrafo de altas prestaciones, electrocardiógrafo, endoscopio rígido y flexible, dos quirófanos totalmente equipados, y aparato de electrodiagnóstico para investigaciones neuromusculares, así como sala de formación para impartir conferencias y seminarios, y contamos con el sello Oro como Cat Friendly Clinic por la Sociedad Internacional de Medicina Felina.

AUNA ESPECIALIDADES VETERINARIAS es un hospital de referencia 24h con atención en las distintas especialidades veterinarias y uno de los centros de mayor prestigio en España. AUNA es parte de IVC Evidensia, el mayor grupo veterinario a nivel mundial, y forma parte de una red de hospitales 24h y clínicas presentes en 17 países.

Name: Galaxy Vets
Description:
Galaxy Vets is an employee-owned veterinary urgent care group. Founded in 2021, we are building and operating urgent care practices across the U.S. and Canada, offering a new way for veterinary professionals to become business owners with zero upfront investment.

Our partnership model prioritizes burnout prevention and is designed for entrepreneurial veterinarians. For ER vets, we offer a path to open your own urgent care clinic without the burden of overnight shifts. General practice vets can shift toward more advanced medicine while taking on ownership. As a practice owner with Galaxy Vets, you'll receive equity, operational support, and recruiting assistance. With a mission to give veterinary medicine back to veterinary professionals, we also allocate equity to all employees — veterinarians, technicians, and support teams — making them co-owners of the entire group. Become a part of Galaxy: https://galaxyvets.com/.

Name: ICVA – International Council for Veterinary Assessment
Description: The International Council for Veterinary Assessment (ICVA) is a world leader in veterinary assessments. Our products, including the North American Veterinary Licensing Examination (NAVLE), are administered in 68 countries.  At ICVA we collaborate with stakeholders in academia, licensing boards and practicing veterinarians to ensure our tools can effectively assess the knowledge and skills required for veterinary practice. Our passion for developing high-quality products strengthens our commitment to providing world-class examinations and other assessment tools to protect the public, and animal health and welfare.

Name: CatMyPet
Description:
A CatMyPet é uma marca especializada em gatos e em quem é apaixonado por eles. Tanto para quem tem um amigo felino em casa, quanto para quem ainda não tem um, mas não resiste aos seus bigodinhos.

Estamos sempre preocupados em promover o maior respeito com os animais através da informação, e principalmente facilitando a interação, ajudando assim a construir vínculos fortes e duradouros.

Buscamos ser uma marca referência e formadora de opinião no segmento felino, auxiliando os lares onde existam um gato e um humano, e trazendo a confiança necessária para que nossos clientes possam sempre contar com a gente!

Queremos nos conectar de forma transparente com todos que possuem os mesmos valores que nós e o amor incondicional pelos gatos!

Name: RESEAU CRISTAL
Description:
Depuis 1994, le **Réseau Cristal** fédère des **cabinets vétérinaires indépendants** spécialisés dans la **production animale**. Notre mission est de mutualiser les compétences en **santé animale**, **nutrition** et **hygiène** pour optimiser les performances des élevages et répondre aux attentes sociétales actuelles.

En tant qu'**association loi 1901**, nous favorisons l'**échange** et le **partage** entre professionnels pour innover et proposer des solutions adaptées aux différents profils d'éleveurs.

Nos valeurs fondamentales sont :
- **Proximité** : Un maillage territorial proche des clients, avec des équipes réactives et mobiles.
- **Technicité** : Des consultants formés et experts dans leurs domaines, proposant des solutions innovantes.
- **Engagement** : Des professionnels passionnés assurant une sécurité sanitaire globale pour tous les acteurs de l’élevage et de la santé animale. 

Rejoignez-nous pour bénéficier d'un accompagnement personnalisé, de méthodes éprouvées et d'outils performants, et participez à une démarche collaborative visant l'excellence en **santé animale**.

Name: Agrobovi Saúde Animal
Description: A Agrobovi possui expertise técnica e prática em todas as etapas necessárias para agregar rentabilidade e baratear custo.. Formada por especialistas de larga vivência nas áreas de medicina veterinária e zootecnia, que chegou ao mercado através da experiência de um jovem inovador, Claudimar Batista por quase uma década esteve junto ao pecuarista apresentando programas de televisão em todos os canais de TV voltados para o agronegócio brasileiro. Por esta razão a Agrobovi Nutrição e Saúde Animal Avançada coloca no mercado uma linha de produtos cadastrados e registrados no MAPA e acompanha do inicio ao fim do tratamento, dando todo suporte necessário para o pecuarista, somos especialistas em atender as necessidades do rebanho aprimorando suas técnicas e abrindo caminho para uma era de desenvolvimento.

Name: Noah's Ark Animal Clinics
Description:
Transforming Pet Health Care for Everyday Families

At Noah’s Ark, we focus on the good in our work - or as we like to say, the “wins”. There’s no such thing as a bad day when you’re doing what you love and we place high priority on celebrating that.

We understand that not every moment with a pet brings good news, but our genuine love for animals - and for each other - motivates us to maintain and improve upon our culture of joy, teamwork, and hope. We treat your pet just like our own.

We want that passion to be clear to everyone we interact with - owners, pets, and each individual on our staff. It is our mission to approach the owners who trust us with the care of their animal with compassion and appreciation. Not only is it an honor to take care of someone’s pet, but we remind ourselves that every time someone steps through our doors, we have an opportunity to do the thing that we love most.

Noah’s Ark Animal Clinics now boast four full-service, state-of-the-art clinics, caring for over 50,000 dogs and cats in Greater Cincinnati each year. From laser-assisted surgery, ultrasound, digital x-ray, to a full in-network lab for quick results – we have everything needed to care for your pet.

Name: Veterinary Emergency & Critical Care Society (VECCS)
Description:
Vision – Raising the level of patient care.
Mission – Inspiring excellence in emergency and critical care for animals
by cultivating an inclusive community and empowering
one another to thrive.
Core Values – Integrity, service, excellence, collaboration, support, wisdom, and inclusiveness.
Purpose Statement -The purpose of the Society is to promote the advancement of knowledge and high standards of practice in veterinary emergency medicine and critical patient care. Toward this purpose, the Society will:
Associate and affiliate into one organization doctors of veterinary medicine, veterinary technicians, veterinary students, veterinary practice managers, and other individuals engaged in the practice of, or who have special interest in, the field of veterinary emergency and critical care;
Establish and promote uniform standards and guidelines for the practice of veterinary emergency and critical patient care;
Foster and encourage education, research and scientific progress in veterinary emergency and critical patient care; disseminate information pertinent to veterinary emergency and critical care to all interested groups and organizations.

Name: Kepro Holland
Description:
Our mission is to help every livestock farmer make sure their animals remain healthy, wherever they may be in the world. To fulfil this mission, we develop veterinary solutions with our customers’ changing demand in mind. Kepro supplies veterinary pharmaceuticals for preventing and solving health problems with animals. We offer added value to our clients thanks to constant development of products and services and the application of our knowledge and skills.

The livestock industry in the Netherlands is highly regarded internationally, due in part to the special position it occupies in veterinary science. Farmers from all over the world benefit from this know-how via Kepro. We consider good quality for a fair price crucial. Our business operation is based on sustainability, efficiency and sharing our knowledge. Improve life: Share knowledge, Work efficiently and Act sustainable.

From its location in the Netherlands, Kepro has been producing veterinary pharmaceuticals for livestock since 1972. Our products can be found in 85 countries worldwide, from Europe, Africa, the Middle East and Asia to Central and South America. We manufacture sterile as well as non-sterile veterinary pharmaceuticals. These are mainly watersoluble powders, oral liquids, injectables and specialities such as antiparasitic substances. The high-end production process meets the latest European GMP (Good Manufacturing Practice) standards so that quality is always guaranteed.

Name: Salmix Industria e Comercio Ltda
Description:
A SALMIX atua na produção e desenvolvimento de aditivos e suplementos na área de nutrição animal, produtos veterinários farmacêuticos e produtos saneantes domissanitários.

Nosso objetivo é disponibilizar produtos de alta qualidade com extrema excelência, respeitando o meio ambiente e as pessoas, buscando garantir com suas práticas a preservação ambiental, a segurança e saúde dos trabalhadores.

Name: Animal Emergency Australia
Description:
Animal Emergency Australia is a dynamic network of 10 emergency clinics, 3 general – and the ICU practices, and an education arm, Improve Veterinary Education, all supported by a dedicated corporate service office in Springwood. With a team of over 800 passionate professionals, we are united by one guiding belief: the constant pursuit of better patient outcomes.

Our commitment is to inclusive care, supporting pet families, and empowering our team members. Every decision we make reflects our innate desire to improve lives whether for the pets we treat, the people we serve, or the teams that make it all possible.

Name: UNISVET
Description:
UNISVET (Unione Italiana Società Veterinarie) nasce il 10 Settembre 2004 dalla fusione del Circolo Veterinario Milanese, del Circolo veterinario Siciliano, di ANVO (Associazione Nazionale Veterinari per l’Oftalmologia) e di varie delegazioni regionali.

L'associazione, non avente scopo di lucro, persegue fini di educazione permanente, formazione e qualificazione professionale dei medici Veterinari.
Unisvet si avvale dell’utilizzo di tutti i canali informativi disponibili per la crescita e la diffusione della cultura scientifica veterinaria organizzando Congressi, Seminari, Corsi teorici e pratici, Executive Master e Master Universitari, nel rispetto più rigoroso dei più alti standard di qualità e serietà scientifica.

Il Comitato Scientifico è l’organo garante per la qualità scientifica degli eventi formativi di UNISVET ed è composto, nella quasi sua totalità, da Diplomati Americani ed Europei.

Il Consiglio Direttivo, massimo organo rappresentativo statutario, viene eletto ogni 4 anni dall’Assemblea dei Soci.

Unisvet è presente su tutto il territorio Italiano per soddisfare le esigenze delle diverse realtà geografiche e per ottenere impulsi e stimoli dai colleghi di tutta Italia.

Obiettivi a favore dei soci di Unisvet
- aumentare e migliorare l’offerta formativa
- acquisire maggiore competitività nell’ambito del panorama formativo e culturale
- ottenere impulsi e stimoli provenienti da tutte le regioni d’Italia
- soddisfare esigenze di realtà geografiche diverse
- lavorare con un numero sempre maggiore di relatori internazionali di alto livello
- mettere le attività formative a disposizione dei colleghi più lontani
- aggiungere iniziative di svago e aggregazione per il tempo libero

Name: Yem-Vit
Description:
As YEM-VİT, our adventure began in 1987. Since 1987, Yem-Vit is a growing company and today one of the leading companies in feed additive sector. We make sale and production of premixes and feed additives for poultry, ruminant and aqua groups. Manufacturing plant of our company is in Izmir. Our company export with sales network from all sides of our country in 15 countries for now. Our sectorial market share has constantly grown since the date of our establishment. We improve our works constantly by following technology with allocated indefinite budget for R&D and our well-trained experts. We fulfill our producing mentality in global standarts by products which provided in global standarts determine our posture without any compromise for high quality.

Our company which has ISO 9001:2008, ISO 22000:2005 and GMP certificates, will maintain its quality policy with innovative products as always.

While we continue our actions, a partnership agreement was signed with Irish leading company Devenish Nutrition. According to the partnership agreement signed in July of 2017, Devenish entered Turkish feed additives market as a 50% partner to Yem-Vit. This partnership strengthens Yem-vit’s power on its current and the surrounding markets.

Founded in Northern Ireland's capital city, Belfast, in 1952, Devenish is one of the most important feed and feed additives manufacturers in the industry. Beside this, Devenish has investments in England, Ireland, North America and Africa. Devenish has made its first investment in Turkey with a partnership with Yem-Vit. The company is engaged in export to more than 40 countries and this includes ruminants, poultry, aqua and other types of nutrition, feed production, veterinary services and technical solutions to a wide range of customers.

We work with a wide range of businesses within the pet industry (including veterinary clinics, pet insurers, charities, pet food manufacturers, eRetailers and other pet tech businesses) to add value to their customer propositions. Pet owners can also access our services on a pay-as-you-go or subscription basis.

For any enquiries, please email welcome@pawsquad.com.

Name: In Vitro Equinos

With a lot of dedication and researches, In Vitro team was capable to develop a viable ICSI protocol and the company was renamed In Vitro Equinos Ltda in 2021, working exclusively with horses, offering excellence at in vitro fertilization through ICSI, cloning services, and genetic preservation (tissue bank).

In Vitro Equinos Ltda. is duly regulated by the Ministry of Agriculture (MAPA) and National Technical Commission on Biosafety (CTNBio), which guarantees the recognition of our services by the Breed Associations that recognize the technologies offered.


A empresa foi fundada em 2005 como In Vitro Brasil Clonagem Animal, e passou a oferecer serviços de clonagem de bovinos e equinos. The team is committed to ensuring that all patients receive the best possible care, continually striving to stay up-to-date with latest veterinary techniques and technologies to achieve this. 

We believe our commitment to ethics and exceptional patient care has earned us a loyal base of clients who value our expertise and dedication. We are dedicated to providing high-quality veterinary services to both Small Animal & Exotic Pets in Dubai, and are staffed by a team of experienced and qualified veterinarians and support staff. 2Feet4Paws Veterinary Clinic places great importance on the ethical, compassionate, and animal-centred medical care of animals.

VetnCare was founded in 2012 with a simple yet powerful vision, to create a community of veterinary hospitals that deliver next-level care, next-door. What started as a passion for helping pets has grown into a thriving community of 13 veterinary hospitals across Northern California.

We believe that exceptional pet care starts with exceptional people. That’s why we invest in our teams, providing the professional mentorship, training, and resources they need to grow and thrive. Behind the scenes, our centralized support team—including operations, HR, finance, IT, and marketing —ensures that our hospitals run smoothly, allowing our clinical teams to focus on what they do best: provide exceptional veterinary care.

Name: VetMedux
Description: VetMedux (formerly Brief Media) provides trusted education and powerful tools to support veterinarians and their teams as they navigate the complexities of modern practice. By guiding veterinarians’ most critical decisions, we help ease the stress on the remarkable people entrusted with helping pets live longer, healthier lives. Under the leadership of a team of practicing veterinarians, our leading brands bring practical, peer‑reviewed education and point‑of‑care support to more than 260,000 veterinarians worldwide.

Name: Facultad de Veterinaria - Universidad de Córdoba
Description:
Los estudios de Veterinaria, únicos en Andalucía, fueron implantados en Córdoba en el año 1847, al crearse la Escuela Subalterna de Veterinaria, elevándose a rango de Facultad en 1943. El plan de estudios del Grado de Veterinaria que se cursa en la actualidad, inició su impartición en el curso 2010-2011 y está regulado por la Directiva Europea 36/2005, parcialmente modificada por la Directiva 55/2013, en las que se establecen los contenidos mínimos obligatorios que deben incluir los estudios de Veterinaria y que los estudios de Veterinaria deben tener una duración mínima de 5 años. Así, para conseguir ser Graduado en Veterinaria se necesitará cursar 300 créditos ECTS (5 cursos).

Otra característica diferencial de los estudios del Grado de Veterinaria, que asegura la calidad de los mismos dentro del marco normativo europeo, es que las Facultades que la imparten se someten a una evaluación periódica, cada 10 años, por un comité de expertos de la Asociación Europea de Establecimientos para la Enseñanza Veterinaria (European Association of Establishments for Veterinary Education, EAEVE). En 1978, la actual Unión Europea (UE) creó el Comité Asesor para los Estudios de Veterinaria (Advisory Commitee for Veterinary Training, ACVT), cuya principal función ha sido actualizaro los requisitos básicos para las enseñanzas de Veterinaria, y encomendó a la EAEVE la responsabilidad de desarrollar y llevar a cabo un método de evaluación que garantice su cumplimiento en los países miembros de la UE.

Según informe emitido por el Comité de expertos de la EAEVE el 13 de noviembre de 2009, nuestra Facultad cumple con los criterios de calidad establecidos por dicha Asociación y por el Comité Europeo de Educación Veterinaria (European Committee of Veterinary Education, ECOVE).

Name: Humane Society of Missouri
Description:
Since 1870, the Humane Society of Missouri has been dedicated to second chances. We provide a safe and caring haven to all animals in need - large and small - that have been abused, neglected or abandoned. Our mission is to end the cycle of abuse and pet overpopulation through our rescue and investigation efforts, spay/neuter programs and educational classes. We are committed to creating lasting relationships between people and animals through our adoption programs. We further support that bond by making available world-class veterinary care. 

The Humane Society of Missouri operates three adoption center and veterinary medical center locations throughout the St. Louis area, as well as Longmeadow Rescue Ranch, a horse and farm animal rescue facility in Union, MO.

Name: RumeXperts
Description:
RumeXperts is a consultancy in Ruminants medicine and production management. Based on a group of veterinarian, former clinicians from University of Liege, the consultancy has grown expertise in different fields of Ruminant production. Reproduction, Udder Health, Nutrition and Lameness are our core of expertise. 
The project is by essence inspired by research in ruminant veterinary science, launch as a Spin-off for University of Liege. 

We deliver service as Contractual Research Organisation to companies specialised in biotechnologies and biopharma. RumeXperts has developped a veterinary expertise adapted for applied research and development in Ruminants Health using edge biomarkers and AI powered bigdata platforms

Our clients are farms and farming oriented specialists

Description:

Just trust VidiVet.

Description:
North Downs Specialist Referrals is an internationally-acknowledged centre of excellence for specialist veterinary care, offering access to one of the largest groups of recognised veterinary specialists in the UK and Europe.

The specialist vets working at our multi-disciplinary referral service provide the highest levels of care for dogs and cats referred to us by veterinary surgeons across the UK.

As an inspired member of the Petstock Group, we are inspired by pets, to grow as people.

When you join our vet team, you will be joining a group of professionals that truly values the skills and experience you bring.

Not only will you be provided with the opportunity to grow and develop in your role, but you will also be given the flexibility and work life balance to achieve this…our fun, friendly and inclusive culture has been created to make sure you are set up for success!

Anicura Ospedale Veterinario I Portoni Rossi si propone come centro di referenza specialistico e, avvalendosi di uno Staff medico di circa 90 veterinari copre diverse aree terapeutiche.
Tra le Unità Operative di supporto emergono Pronto Soccorso, attivo 24/24 per 365 giorni all'anno, Degenza, Terapia Intensiva con strutture e competenze dedicate e specifiche e i servizi offerti dall’Unità di Anestesia, composta da un team attivo 7 giorni su 7. 
Il Laboratorio Analisi, offre un servizio completo e affidabile sia di analisi di laboratorio che di Istopatologia e Citopatologia, anche a veterinari esterni.

Name: Pet Emergency and Referral Center
Description: At Pet Emergency and Referral Center we love what we do. While emergency and specialty care is high paced and often high stress, we are proud to be there for animal patients and their worried human family members in times of need. Our staff members have many years of experience in various fields of veterinary medicine and come from all parts of the country, and the world for that matter, which brings many viewpoints, bits of knowledge, and techniques all together for a more complete and knowledgeable care-taking center. We strive to offer you and your pets the best possible medical and surgical care while maintaining affordable prices. We are a FULL service veterinary medical and surgical center with all the necessary facilities and equipment to treat any emergency disease or injury and nearly all surgical ailments.

Name: ESCCAP (European Scientific Counsel Companion Animal Parasites)
Description:
Founded in 2005, the European Scientific Counsel Companion Animal Parasites (ESCCAP) is an independent, not-for-profit organisation consisting of experts in the field of parasitology and public health from across Europe. It was formed to address the need for a consistent European approach to parasite control in pets, a subject which has become ever more important due to the increase in the movement and transportation of pets within Europe.

ESCCAP is a free and independent parasite control resource for veterinary professionals. Its primary function is to develop free best-practice guidelines for the treatment and control of parasites in pet animals. Its aim is to protect the health of pets, enhance the safety of the public and preserve the human–animal bond.

Name: Agrolabo Spa
Description: AGROLABO S.p.A. is engaged in the manufacture and distribution of Nutritional Products for livestock animals, as well as Diagnostic and Therapeutic products for Companion Animals. AGROLABO, an organisation of professionals belonging to the veterinary sector, dominates 60% of the Italian zootechnical market, a market quota that is far superior than that of its competitors. It is, in fact, the leading brand in Italy for the manufacture of high quality feed supplements for production animals.  The company's diagnostic products are distributed worldwide.  We offers a vast portfolio of  highly technological diagnostic test kits for the detection of infectious diseases in  companion and livestock animals. Agrolabo is also highly specialised in the veterinary dermatology field.  Laboratories and veterinary surgeries throughout the world turn to Agrolabo for its a wide range of specialised services and therapeutics for animals. AGROLABO is dedicated to producing highly technological and innovative products.  All of our feed supplements for livestock animals are manufactured in line with the most recent indications for the modern development of breeding farms, while striving to promote animal wellbeing, the quality of meat, milk and derivatives. Our entire range of diagnostic products are developed with the most up-to-date technologies to respond to the growing demand for specialised veterinary care for companion animals; we are involved in Microcapillary and Genomic Technology.

Description:

In case you were wondering, Gozl means the young pigeon in Arabic.

Name: VetLit.org
Description:
VetLit.org is designed to help us keep to date with recent veterinary literature.

The website has constantly refreshing articles from a huge number of journals divided by specialty (www.vetlit.org), sign up to the newsletter for ECC and Internal Medicine article updates, or follow on social media.

With the increasing number of open access journals and articles, there are plenty of articles accessible to all practitioners. Promotion of and improving access to veterinary literature are the main goals, enabling us all to practice evidence-based medicine.

I hope you enjoy!

Simon Cook BSc BVSc MVetMed DipACVECC DipECVECC FHEA MRCVS
RCVS recognised specialist in Emergency and Critical Care

As a self-governing profession, the ABVMA is required to perform its regulatory and professional functions in accordance with the law and in a manner responsible to the public of Alberta through the government of Alberta Employment and Immigration.

The Alberta Veterinary Medical Association (ABVMA) is committed to inclusion across gender identity, ethnicity, religion, age, neurodiversity, physical or mental ability and sexual orientation. The ABVMA membership is multicultural and we value multiple approaches and different points of view in a safe, positive and collaborative environment.

Over the course of 20 years, we have grown to become the largest and most trusted supplier of veterinary medicine in the UK, assisting millions of customers in finding the medicines, supplements, and food their pets need.

At our core, we are not only pet owners, but passionate pet lovers as well. Our mission is to provide the highest level of care for pets nationwide, just as we do for our own furry companions.

Pet Drugs Online is part of IVC Evidensia, Europe’s leading veterinary care provider across 11 countries. We are a registered veterinary practice and are governed by the Royal College of Veterinary Surgeons and the Veterinary Medicines Directorate.

anni dalla nostra Fondazione, il Medico Veterinario rimane l’unico protagonista della nostra Storia!

Name: MercoLab Laboratórios
Description:

Fundado em 2002, em Cascavel (PR), o laboratório nasceu com o propósito de oferecer suporte técnico e científico à indústria, contribuindo para o controle, monitoramento e investigação de doenças que impactam a produtividade e a segurança dos sistemas agroindustriais.

Nossa equipe multidisciplinar é composta por médicos-veterinários, biólogos, zootecnistas, tecnólogos em alimentos e técnicos especializados, todos comprometidos em garantir resultados precisos e confiáveis, com suporte técnico diferenciado para interpretação e aplicação prática dos dados analíticos.

O MercoLab é credenciado pelo Ministério da Agricultura, Pecuária e Abastecimento (MAPA) para a realização de análises oficiais de controle e monitoramento de Salmonella e Micoplasmas em aves, conforme o PNSA, além de exames para Anemia Infecciosa Equina (AIE).

Estamos em constante evolução, aperfeiçoando processos, incorporando novas tecnologias e ampliando nosso portfólio de serviços para atender com excelência as demandas do setor.

Nosso propósito é construir parcerias sólidas com nossos clientes, fortalecendo a segurança, a qualidade e a produtividade das cadeias agropecuárias brasileiras.

Name: GlobalVetLink
Description:
As the pioneer and leader in digital animal health and movement compliance, GlobalVetLink (GVL) helps veterinarians improve accuracy and reduce the time-consuming administration related to regulatory compliance. The GVL platform provides an intelligent online solution to streamline the creation and management of digital animal health certificates, EIA testing, veterinary feed directives, and prescriptions, resulting in improved efficiency and accuracy for regulatory compliance. Over 180 million animals per year in the pet-wellness, equine, and U.S. production animal food chain utilize GlobalVetLink for state, federal, and international health compliance. For more information on GlobalVetLink visit www.globalvetlink.com.

Since 2001, GlobalVetLink has been providing online applications to enable veterinarians and animal health practitioners, state authorities, diagnostic laboratories and other animal health officials to build, access, and monitor animal movement records with ease and efficiency. The first digital software applications available through GlobalVetLink were companion and food animal Certificates of Veterinary Inspection (CVIs) — known as health certificates and a secure alternative to USDA APHIS 7001 forms — and Equine Infectious Anemia (EIA) certificates.

Today, all 50 states and 3 U.S. territories accept GVL digital certificates as official animal documentation. GVL’s product portfolio expands beyond EIA certificates and CVIs to include veterinary prescriptions, Veterinary Feed Directives (VFDs), Extended Equine CVIs (EECVIs), For Sale pet certificates, and veterinary diagnostic results aggregation and analysis tools.

GlobalVetLink is the nation’s leader in digital animal records with millions of animals transported within the U.S. using GVL’s certificates. GVL users continue to improve their business processes, enhancing animal traceability, ensuring regulatory compliance, and contributing to animal wellness and safety.

Name: Ready, Vet, Go
Description:
Ready, Vet, Go (RVG) is a mentorship and education platform supporting new and early-career veterinarians as they navigate the realities of modern veterinary practice. Through remote mentorship, practical education, and a connected community, RVG helps veterinarians build confidence, clinical judgment, and professional sustainability—beyond what is typically taught in veterinary school.

RVG offers two primary ways to engage:
• The Ready, Vet, Go Mentorship Program
A structured, cohort-based mentorship experience that complements in-clinic guidance. This program supports early-career veterinarians with longitudinal mentorship, skill development, and reflection—while helping practices improve engagement, culture, and retention.
• RVG Community and Community Connect
A membership-based professional community offering access to on-demand education, live events, AMAs, roundtables, and ongoing connection with peers and mentors across career stages.

At its core, Ready, Vet, Go is about supporting veterinarians as whole humans—and helping them build careers they can grow into and stay in.

 Learn more at readyvetgo.co

Name: Pet King Brands: Maker of ZYMOX and Oratene
Description:
The year was 1998 when Pet King Brands President and Founder, Pamela Bosco, introduced ZYMOX to the veterinary world.  Based on years of research, she knew she had a product that was going to change the way people managed pet ear infections.  Her predictions have been proven correct.  Today, the patented LP3 Enzyme System is in all the products Pet King produce from the ear products to skin topicals to shampoo and rinse and brushless oral care products.  ZYMOX remains a stark contrast to other products on the market; offering effective solutions that are easy to use, free of harsh chemicals and antibiotics and made right here in the USA.  

The ZYMOX line represents true advancement in the field of veterinary health.  Bosco owes this discovery to her brother, Michael Pellico, the bioscientist credited with adapting his enzyme technology in Biotene, the #1 dentist recommended product for people suffering from Dry Mouth, for the safe use in pets.  The feedback about ZYMOX has been overwhelmingly positive with THANK YOU, FINALLY SOMETHING THAT WORKS as the common sentiment.

Pet King Brand's unwavering commitment to the well-being of pets is the reason we take such great pride in delivering high quality products that are safe and effective.  To learn more about ZYMOX, visit the product pages on the website.  To share your story, visit us on your favorite social media platform.

Name: Biogal Labs
Description:
Biogal – Galed Laboratories is dedicated to the development, manufacturing and marketing of excellent infectious disease diagnostic tools for companion animals and  farm animals.
Biogal was established in 1986 and has been at the forefront of veterinary diagnostic breakthroughs.
Biogal has 2 distinct innovative product lines:

1.	Biogal’s new flagship product, PCRun is a point of care PCR kit, initially for the diagnosis of the diseases canine Leptospira, Leishmania, Ehrlichia, Parvovirus and Babesia and Feline Mycoplasma haemofelis.
The entire reaction is designed to be performed with minimal steps in very basic conditions and can be completed from start to results in 60 min. There is no need for expensive set up costs for thermocyclers.

2.	The ImmunoComb provides a test for detecting antibody levels in blood or serum. 
The ImmunoComb is a quick, simple and portable dot-ELISA test kit. The ImmunoComb VacciCheck, for instance, has been instrumental in reducing unnecessary “over vaccination” in both cats and dogs and is mentioned as an integral component of pet vaccination guidelines.

The main need for our innovative kit range is to provide a simple and accurate solution to both the veterinary clinic and veterinary lab alike. The unique benefits that our kits provide are rapid test responses, easy to operate, do not require any previous technical knowledge or additional instrumentation, and can be carried out at points of care. 
We value strategic alliances with other companies and joint ventures for our R&D’s continuous growth as a means of creating a strong base for innovative products and technologies

Name: Colegio Oficial de Veterinarios de Sevilla
Description:
Os damos la bienvenida al Ilustre Colegio Oficial de Veterinarios de Sevilla, una organización que lleva esforzándose desde 1906 en mantener el prestigio y calidad en la actividad profesional que realizan nuestros Veterinarios en Sevilla.

Los nuevos tiempos y la gran presencia de internet en la vida diaria de muchos Veterinarios y ciudadanos ha hecho que abramos un nuevo canal de comunicación digital. Nuestro objetivo es hacer llegar toda la información relacionada con la profesión en materia de Medicina Animal, Producción e Higiene y Seguridad Alimentaria a todos los profesionales Veterinarios y a la ciudadanía para concienciar de la importante labor del Veterinario en el desarrollo de nuestra sociedad.

Os invitamos a participar de las actividades que desde el Colegio promovemos y a hacer uso de las instalaciones que tenemos en exclusiva para nuestros veterinarios colegiados. Igualmente os agradecemos cualquier tipo de sugerencia.

Name: Granta Veterinary Specialists
Description: Small Animal Veterinary Specialist Referral Centre

Name: BCF Technology
Description:
We are world leaders in veterinary imaging including ultrasound, X-ray, digital image management (PACS), CT and MRI. 

Established in 1983, our global headquarters are located in Scotland, with additional offices in Ireland, France, North America, India and South Africa along with an extensive distribution network. 

Now part of the IMV Technologies Group,  we are widening our offering to the entire reproduction management sector.

The BCF team has reached over 100 employees worldwide and we remain committed to our core values of Partnership, Innovation and Learning. 

Find out more at, www.bcftechnology.com/international

Name: Ghannam Veterinary Medicines Trading
Description: We are Ghannam Veterinary Medicines Trading (G.V.M.T.) is an Egyptian fast-growing company in the UAE - Dubai and one of the largest animal health products distributor in the UAE. We are a market leading expertise in the import and trade of high-quality animal health products in the UAE. We provide the best value for money, and we stand up for our promise .

Name: Relief Rover (Acquired by Hound)
Description:
The founders of Relief Rover and Hound recognized a shared mission of helping people work how they want, love their work, and care for more pets. In 2023, Hound acquired Relief Rover. While the Relief Rover spirit is still alive and well, our teams have been unified under the Hound brand.

Relief Rover was created in 2017 by Dr. Cindy Trice out of a passion to help vets do what they love doing (caring for and healing animals) without giving up freedom, control, variety, and even the opportunity to experience different parts of the country and sometimes the world. It’s not the typical routine, which is why we love relief work and enabling the professionals who choose this career path.

Name: GlobalGen vet science
Description:
A GlobalGen vet science é uma joint venture fruto da parceria entre a holding americana de pesquisas ReproGen Animal Health e a empresa brasileira UCBVET Saúde Animal. Traz em sua origem com a ReproGen a experiência no manejo reprodutivo e a competência dos pesquisadores Dr. Milo Wiltbank, PhD e Dr. J. Richard Pursley, PhD, reconhecidos mundialmente pela criação do protocolo OvSynch, que possibilitou o uso da Inseminação Artificial por tempo fixo (IATF) com reconhecimento em escala global.

O know-how técnico é reforçado pela aliança estratégica com a UCBVET, empresa fundada em 1917 em Jaboticabal (SP) pelo visionário Dr. João Brunini. É uma das mais tradicionais e inovadoras indústrias veterinárias do país, tendo em sua estrutura modernos laboratórios e equipamentos com o mais alto nível tecnológico para a produção de medicamentos. Assim nasceu a GlobalGen vet science,  uma empresa formada por criadores e técnicos, para técnicos e criadores.

Name: Alliance Animal Health
Description:
At Alliance Animal Health, we’re proud to be home to 225+ veterinary practices across the U.S., and we believe that the best medicine and the best culture start at the local level. That’s why we prioritize medical autonomy and support our veterinarians in making the decisions that matter most for your patients and your community.

When a practice joins our network, the identity and leadership are maintained. Our role is to be a true partner, offering dedicated support in areas like recruitment, marketing, finance, and operations, so our veterinarians can stay focused on what they do best: caring for their patients.

Whether you're just getting started in your career, growing in a central support role, or planning for practice ownership, we’re here with personalized pathways and a team that’s behind you the whole way.

Our mission is simple: support those made to heal and care for animals while creating a place where veterinary professionals thrive. We build everything on a foundation of our core values: Passion, Engagement, Trust, and Service, a commitment that earned us a spot on Inc.’s Best Workplaces 2025. We’re proud to share that recognition with every member of our team.

Name: Fórmula Animal - Farmácia de Manipulação Veterinária
Description:
UMA RECEITA DE AMOR

Somos a Fórmula Animal, Farmácia de Manipulação Veterinária, uma rede de franquias dedicada à inovação e à excelência no cuidado veterinário, refletindo o compromisso e o amor pelos animais em cada detalhe de nossa operação. Nosso propósito é promover o bem-estar animal e de toda a família, transformando o tratamento dos pets em cuidado personalizado, atrativo e eficiente.

Nossa rede é aliada da medicina veterinária, garantindo uma relação de confiança entre médico veterinário, tutor e paciente. Oferecemos orientação especializada sobre dosagens, farmacologia e interações, com controle de qualidade e seguindo todas as normas do Ministério da Agricultura - MAPA. Os produtos são manipulados na dose exata para cada animal, evitando desperdício, e estão disponíveis em formatos e sabores diversos, resultando em maior aceitação pelo animal e num tratamento ainda mais efetivo.

Na Fórmula Animal, unimos a paixão por animais com oportunidades de negócio sólidas, mostrando passo a passo, o mesmo caminho que percorremos e que nos permitiu espalhar esse sonho por todo Brasil. Nosso compromisso é com a paixão, o encantamento e a ética. Somos uma franqueadora consolidada e uma opção rentável para empreendedores que desejam atuar no mercado pet, com a segurança de fazer parte da única rede de franquias do segmento a ostentar quatro Selos de Excelência em Franchising da ABF, conquistados consecutivamente.

Também nos destacamos através da marca de varejo Ser Natural, uma linha de higiene e beleza, que conta com produtos enriquecidos com óleos essenciais, que promovem cuidado e bem-estar de forma segura. A Ser Natural oferece um cuidado que vai além da estética e abraça um estilo de vida mais consciente.

Já somos mais de 100 unidades espalhadas em todo o Brasil e no exterior, assim seguimos crescendo, dedicados ao nosso propósito.

Faça parte da nossa manada!

Name: modernvet
Description:
At modernvet, we’re revolutionizing veterinary care. With a commitment to the highest medical standards and expertise, we provide pet owners and their beloved pets with care that goes beyond expectations. Our clinics are thoughtfully designed for comfort, equipped with state-of-the-art facilities and the latest technology to ensure a superior experience for both pets and their families.

What sets us apart? We blend first-class hospitality with transparency and tech-enabled services, creating an environment where customers feel valued, veterinary professionals feel proud, and exceptional care thrives.

modernvet is a place where pets, owners, and vets truly thrive.

If you're passionate about making a difference in pet care and want to be part of a dynamic, forward-thinking team, join us at modernvet!

Name: AGROFIELD S.R.L.
Description:
Empresa Paraguaya, inicia sus actividades en el año 1980 en los rubros Agricultura y Ganadería Exclusivamente. Actualmente cuenta con 3 Unidades de Negocios adicionales: Salud Ambiental, Clínica de Pequeños Animales y Distribución de Productos.
Proveemos soluciones para los sectores Agrícola y Ganadero, Casa & Jardín, Mascotas y Saneamiento Ambiental.
Para ello, fabricamos, representamos y comercializamos una amplia variedad de productos y servicios, a través de Centros de Atención o cadenas de distribución que nos permitan una presencia destacada en el mercado nacional o regional.
Buscamos satisfacer las exigencias del mercado, lograr resultados rentables, estando a la vez comprometidos con nuestros funcionarios, con la sociedad, el desarrollo del país y el cuidado del medio ambiente.

Name: Mission Pet Health
Description: Mission Pet Health is one of the leading veterinary care organizations in the U.S., formed by the merger of Southern Veterinary Partners and Mission Veterinary Partners.  We were founded by veterinarians who believe local practices thrive when autonomy, collaboration, and medical excellence lead the way. At Mission Pet Health, we are reimagining excellence in veterinary care by providing world-class support to hospital teams on a hyper-local basis. We are committed to delivering exceptional service, personalized medicine, and innovative experiences to our clients while empowering our team members with medical autonomy and unparalleled opportunities for personal and professional development. Driving our award-winning culture are our WAG values – Work Together, Amaze, and Grow. These values allow us to drive a tangible, lasting impact for our teams, the communities we serve, and the pets we care for.

Name: North American Veterinary Community (NAVC)
Description:
Founded in 1982 and headquartered in Gainesville, Florida, with offices in Orlando, Florida, the North American Veterinary Community (NAVC) is a non-profit organization providing world-class professional development to the global veterinary healthcare community. Its largest initiative, VMX (formerly the NAVC Conference), hosts more than 17,000 attendees each year. 

The NAVC (North American Veterinary Community) is a nonprofit organization that provides world-class continuing professional development and support services for the global veterinary healthcare community.

We invite you to explore our programs and resources designed to empower you all year long. 

NAVC Products Available to You:

- We offer 4 free publications to the veterinary community: Today’s Veterinary Practice, Today’s Veterinary Nurse, Today’s Veterinary Business and Veterinary Advantage Magazine. 
- We have both free and subscription-based continuing education opportunities through our Vetfolio learning platform. 
- We have multiple conferences available to you each: VMX (Veterinary Meeting & Expo), NAVC Institute and the Veterinary Innovation Summit. 
- The NAVC Retriever App is a free job-seeking app where you can browse over 1,000 job opportunities. 
- We have 4 certification opportunities: The Human-Animal Bond Certification, the Pet Nutrition Coach Certification, Therapeutic Pet Nutrition Coach Certification and the Veterinary Business Leader Certification. 
- We offer a free online video channel specifically designed for the veterinary community, Spark!

In addition to these offerings, we also provide advocacy support to the veterinary community through the Veterinary Innovation Council and Embrace. 

For more information, please visit: www.navc.com

Name: IBASA
Description:
The IBASA Laboratory has been working in the manufacture of pharmaceutical products for veterinary use since 1990 and, together with Importadora Bagé, forms the IBASA Group.

Investments in human resources and technology have always been necessary to maintain and broaden the benchmark and quality standard.

In addition, the IBASA laboratory produces cosmetics with the same quality standard. The Ibapet line has hygiene and beauty products, a complete line of anti-flea treatments, a premium line of aesthetics and treatment with moisturizing masks, finishers and deocolonies.

There are more than 40 products that include antibiotics, antifungal, analgesics, policides and carapaticides, vermifuges, antidiarrheals, vitamins and hygiene products and beautification marketed in distributors, farms, pet shops and cooperatives throughout Brazil, Peru, Chile and Paraguay.
Investimentos em recursos humanos e em tecnologia sempre foram condições necessárias para manter e ampliar o padrão de referência e qualidade. 

Atualmente conta com uma estrutura para produção de medicamentos estéreis que, além de cumprir todas as exigências do MAPA (Ministério da Agricultura, Pecuária e Abastecimento) de acordo com as normativas de Boas Práticas de Fabricação, cumpre exigências da norma de certificação internacional ISO 14644.

Além de medicamentos, o laboratório IBASA produz cosméticos com o mesmo padrão de qualidade. A linha Ibapet possui, além de produtos de higiene e beleza, uma linha completa de tratamento Antipulgas, uma linha premium de estética e tratamento com máscaras de hidratação, finalizadores e deocolônias.

Atualmente são mais de 40 produtos que incluem antibióticos, antifúngicos, analgésicos, pulicidas e carrapaticidas, vermífugos, antidiarréicos, vitaminas e produtos de higiene e embelezamento comercializados em distribuidoras, agropecuárias, pet shops e cooperativas em todo o Brasil.

LABORATÓRIO IBASA
Qualidade em saúde animal
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: PT Charoen Pokphand Ind. Tbk
Description: PT Charoen Pokphand Ind. Tbk merupakan perusahaan penghasil pakan ternak, Day Old Chicks (DOC) dan makanan olahan terbesar di Indonesia. Perusahaan ini berdiri pada tahun 1972, dengan pabrik pakan ternak terbesar yang pertama di Jakarta (Ancol). Beberapa cabang pabrik pakan ternak kami terdapat di Balaraja, Medan, Bandar Lampung, Semarang, Sepanjang, Krian, dan Makassar.

Name: Lap of Love Veterinary Hospice
Description:
At Lap of Love, we recognize that many veterinarians today are seeking something more: a way to reconnect with the why behind their work, to form deeper bonds with families, and to practice with presence, compassion, and purpose.

We are the nation’s largest network of veterinarians solely dedicated to end-of-life care. Our services include in-home euthanasia, telehospice consultations, in-home veterinary hospice, and pet loss support—all designed to provide a peaceful, personal experience for pets and the people who love them.

Our work is centered on the human-animal bond. We honor that connection by helping families navigate one of life’s most difficult moments with empathy, expertise, and grace.

As a Lap of Love veterinarian, you’ll serve your community in one of the most meaningful ways imaginable: by helping pets pass in the comfort of home, surrounded by love. You’ll experience the gratitude of clients, the freedom of working outside a traditional clinic, and the fulfillment of practicing in a way that truly aligns with your values.

We're looking for compassionate, self-motivated veterinarians who communicate with empathy, connect with intention, and want to make a difference, one peaceful goodbye at a time.

Name: Vets Now
Description:
Vets Now is dedicated to improving the lives of pets and vets by providing emergency care  when most vets' surgeries are closed. For pets, we're an out-of-hours accident and emergency service. For vets, we're trusted, expert partners providing an extension to the practice's  daytime activity.

Vets Now was founded in 2001 by Richard Dixon, a veterinary surgeon who understood the stress of being on-call round the clock while trying to maintain a decent quality of life. His solution was Vets Now - a dedicated out-of-hours emergency and critical care service for pets.

Over the following years Richard and his team helped to revolutionise the way emergency veterinary care is provided outside normal surgery hours. The key to the Vets Now service is a dedicated, full-time team who only work at night, over weekends and during public holidays. We employ some of the country's leading specialists in emergency and critical care, and because of their work pattern, our staff have a wealth of experience in the field.

We have out of hours clinics across the country, as well as state-of-the-art pet emergency hospitals in Glasgow, Swindon and Manchester. We've also pioneered other ways to help vets and animals, with a comprehensive referrals service, training and CPD events, including ECC Congress - the UK's largest emergency and critical care congress with internationally-renowned speakers and exhibitors.

Name: Bond Vet
Description:
Founded by a veterinarian, we are doctor-forward and doctor-led at every level, elevating the clinic experience for pets and people alike. 

We’re challenging the status quo by prioritizing our team’s happiness and development to create more sustainable and fulfilling veterinary careers. It was critical to us when we founded Bond Vet to keep veterinary professionals in every level of the business.

From our veterinarian co-founder Dr. Zay Satchu, to our Medical Operations team of DVMs and LVTs, our experienced team members help to make clinic life better and smoother every day because they’ve been there, too.

Name: Salus Nutrição Animal
Description:
Located in Santo Antônio de Posse-SP, Salus is a company specialized in animal nutrition.
Salus develops nutritional products for all categories of animals. In addition, offers a complete line of additives and technical assistance. With focus on safety and quality, Salus has a modern factory capable of match the needs of each client.

Salus is part of the Avril Group.
The Avril Group, established in 1983 in France, operates in the oil and protein sectors. Its mission is to create lasting values in these business areas, helping to improve the quality of food and the preservation of the planet.

The industrial activity of the Avril Group is organized in two sectors that work in synergy. The vegetable sector brings together the oilseed processing and the valorization of the oil in: edible oil, seasoning sauces and renewable energy and chemistry.
In the animal sector, it has activities in nutrition and animal production, biosafety, nutritional specialties and, finally, food products.

Name: Organnact
Description: With a distribution network that spans the entire country, the Organnact Group is present in over 20,000 points of sale across Brazil, ensuring comfort and satisfaction for our customers. For more than 20 years, we’ve been dedicated to developing and enhancing solutions that promote the health and well-being of animals—because when they thrive, so do the people who love and care for them. With one of the finest veterinary laboratories in Brazil, we continue to invest in innovation, always striving to make a positive impact on the lives of animals and those who share their journey.

Name: dvm360
Description:
Delivering veterinary continuing education for over 20 years across print, digital, in-person, and on-demand platforms. As a trusted media and education company, Fetch conferences combine innovation, expertise, and community to inspire the veterinary industry. Together, let’s advance vet care with trusted resources and forward-thinking education.

Visit our website: dvm360.com OR register now for our upcoming Fetch conferences at https://www.dvm360events.com
