Name: The Webinar Vet
Description:
The Webinar Vet was established in 2010 by Anthony Chadwick (BVSc CertVD MRCVS), with the express wish of making veterinary education easier, more accessible and affordable for veterinary professionals with very busy lives.

We provide vet professionals with the highest quality online content, and we’re here to help you complete your CPD at a time that fits around your busy schedule and commitments. We’re proud to be the largest online veterinary community in the world offering live interactive CPD webinars, online events, and Q&A sessions with expert speakers from around the world.

With us, you can watch high quality webinars in the comfort of your own home, but still in a professional live lecture format. All of our webinars are recorded so you can come back to them later, or if you just want to go over something from the lecture again. We have an extensive library of 2,500+ hours of CPD webinars on a huge variety of topics that you can access on demand - there’s content for everyone, no matter what your specialism. 

Also be sure to check out VETchat, our podcast for vets  anchor.fm/vetchat

We are also passionate about helping regenerate the veterinary world, and we are proud to be a carbon negative company.

Name: Vetcor
Description:
We mean it when we say life is better here.

Vetcor is a national network of 906 (and growing!) exceptional veterinary hospitals. We have built an impressive reputation by maintaining each hospital’s unique veterinary medicine practice while providing tailored support in marketing, training, human resources, accounting, and more.

Vetcor hospitals offer collaborative and supportive environments for new graduates and experienced veterinarians and staff alike. 

Each Vetcor location provides:

•	A salary that grows with your skills
•	Paid licenses, liability insurance, and dues to keep more money in your pocket
•	Customized orientation plan for each new hire to get you started off right
•	Investment in your success with continued mentorship and CE support
•	Generous benefits including health, retirement, and wellness plan
•	Peer support from our national network of successful veterinary hospitals

Grow your clinical, diagnostic, and surgical skills while practicing high-quality medicine among our established network of thriving hospitals! Find out more about joining Team Vetcor by visiting www.vetcor.com/careers.

Name: MEVAC for Vaccines
Description:
MEVAC is an American Egyptian Animal Health Vaccines leading global provider of innovative animal health solutions.
Established in 2011, MEVAC has built a strong reputation for excellence in research and development, manufacturing, and
distribution of high-quality vaccines for Poultry, Ruminant, and Aquaculture .
With a robust infrastructure comprising four state-of-the-art production lines and four manufacturing sites, we
possess the capacity to meet the growing demand for animal health vaccines. Our research and development
excellence centers drive innovation projects, allowing MEVAC to develop cutting-edge vaccines that address the
evolving needs of the global animal health industry.
At MEVAC, we are committed to upholding the highest standards of quality. Our facilities are GMP- Accredited,
ensuring that our vaccines meet stringent regulatory requirements. We employ a team of more than 450
dedicated professionals representing seven nationalities, who work tirelessly to develop and deliver products
that safeguard animal health and welfare.
MEVAC has 3 Headquarters In , Egypt , UAE & KSA,.We have a strong presence in key markets. Our extensive
distribution network enables us to export our products to over 30 countries worldwide in 2023 & is planned
to reach 90 Countries by 2027, supporting the health and well-being of animals across the globe.

Name: Southern Veterinary Partners
Description:
Southern Veterinary Partners (SVP) is a veterinarian-owned and managed network of animal hospitals with the common mission of providing best-in-class personalized veterinary care with exceptional client experiences. We’re based in Birmingham, AL, but the heartbeat of SVP is in the 400+ animal hospitals and 9000+ teammates across the country. 

Providing integrated support, our Home Office resources enable our hospital teams to focus on what matters most – the medicine and caring for their patients. 

Each day is truly a partnership (hence, the “P” in SVP).

Driving our culture of meaningful partnerships are our WAG values – Work Together, Amaze, and Grow, which has led to being named #1 Most Loved Work Workplace in Healthcare in 2023.

Let’s talk about your amazing future. Start the conversation with our teams today!

Name: Avert Saúde Animal
Description:
Com dez anos de história, a Avert é especialista em cuidados para cães e gatos em todas as fases da vida. Somos espectadores do crescimento e parceiros no desenvolvimento, desde os primeiros passos até a velhice. Na Avert, não existe uma fórmula para manter o bem-estar dos pets. Existe cuidado individual para cada cão e gato, com suporte 360º em qualquer idade. 

Nosso portfólio conta com produtos voltados para as mais diferentes necessidades, do banho aos cuidados especiais com o coração. Contamos com um time de peso com mais de 80 colaboradores, quase todos veterinários, que nos permite estar presente em 20 mil pontos de venda espalhados pelo Brasil, além da nossa presença online. Atendemos mais de 8 mil médicos-veterinários em 19 especialidades, e levamos todos os dias a missão de uma medicina integrativa nos cuidados com os pets.



Avert Saúde Animal,
Um cuidado completo para cada pet

Name: Tortuga
Description:
A Tortuga, empresa brasileira, pioneira em nutrição animal, é a maior indústria de suplementos minerais para animais do país e uma das maiores do mundo. A empresa comercializa produtos no Brasil e em mais nove países da América Latina, atendendo às exigências de empresários rurais que trabalham nas áreas de pecuária (corte e leite), suinocultura, avicultura, equinocultura, ovinocultura e caprinocultura, e de criadores de animais de companhia.

Com 59 anos de existência, desde sua origem a Tortuga vem contribuído decisivamente para o progresso da produção animal do Brasil, tendo introduzido, de forma pioneira, novos conceitos de suplementação mineral e vitamínica e outras tecnologias indispensáveis para o aumento da produtividade.

A empresa foi a primeira em seu setor, nas Américas, a conquistar a certificação máxima mundial da qualidade no processo produtivo: a certificação GlobalG.A.P. (Global Good Agriculture Practice), garantindo aos seus clientes um produto com qualidade e segurança que atendem às rígidas exigências do mercado internacional.

A Tortuga conta com mais de 1.200 funcionários e cerca de 700 empresas representantes comerciais autônomas distribuídas por todo o Brasil. Possui três Unidades Industriais localizadas em Mairinque (SP), São Vicente (SP) e Pecém (CE).

Name: Veterinary Hospitals Association
Description:
Established in 1984, Veterinary Hospitals Association (VHA) is a not-for-profit, member-driven association organized to represent the interests of members and the veterinary community. VHA currently serves nearly 400 member veterinary practices.

The goal of VHA is to enhance the profitability of each member practice by positively impacting its bottom line. With member involvement, VHA will continue to offer services that either save money or make money for all members.

The Growth of VHA:

A group of dedicated veterinarians founded VHA to improve the methods and efficiency of animal hospitals, to cooperate with other veterinary organizations, and to promote and further the best interests of its members.

1985 - VHA began a group purchasing service for members, positively influencing the product availability and pricing in the veterinary marketplace. 

1986 - A pet cremation service was launched to provide a dignified, caring and ethical means of cremating clients’ pets. It is one of the founding cornerstones of our association. 

As VHA evolved over the years, additional services have been added, taking advantage of the efficiencies that come from individual practices joining together as a group.

Name: VECOL S.A.
Description:
la Empresa Colombiana de Productos Veterinarios Vecol, es una Empresa de Economía Mixta, bajo la razón social de Empresa Colombiana de Productos Veterinarios S.A VECOL S.A.  En ella participan conjuntamente el Gobierno, representado por el Ministerio de Agricultura y las asociaciones de los productores agropecuarios. La Empresa funciona como una Empresa privada.

Somos una empresa de biotecnología que investiga, desarrolla, fabrica y comercializa productos para promover la salud, productividad al sector agropecuario y bienestar al ser humano. 

Nuestro fuerte es la produccion de biologicos; vacunas antiaftosa y antirabica entre otras. Contamos con una completa linea de productos para la ganaderia y una linea de agroquimicos. mayor informacion en www.vecol.com.co

Name: The Australian Veterinary Association
Description: Official account for the Australian Veterinary Association - the national professional association for veterinarians, representing thousands of members from across Australia since 1921.

Name: Safeeds
Description:
Somos hoje a empresa brasileira líder no mercado de aditivos não antibióticos e a mais qualificada para elaborar projetos AGP Free.

Safeeds vem da junção das palavras em inglês: Safe (seguro) e Feed (Alimento).
Ou seja, Alimento Seguro.
Com isso imprimimos nossa essência em nosso Nome.

O equilíbrio perfeito para produção e saúde animal é garantido por uma nutrição segura e saudável. 
Os aditivos funcionais, proporcionam o equilíbrio necessário entre a nutrição e a proteção da ração, resultando em um melhor desempenho dos animais.

É com este foco que nasceu em 2004 a Safeeds, uma empresa moderna orientada pela ciência, tecnologia e segurança alimentar, que contribui com a indústria de produção de alimentos, através do desenvolvimento de aditivos funcionais para a alimentação animal. 

A segurança está em todos os aspectos de nossa empresa. Instalada de forma sustentável, em uma área de 110 mil metros quadrados, no Oeste do Paraná, com capacidade de produzir aditivos líquidos e em pó, dentro dos mais altos padrões de qualidade e com o mesmo controle de sanidade e equipamentos de uma indústria farmacêutica humana. Detentora das mais importantes certificações de qualidade e produzindo produtos registrados pelo Ministério da Agricultura, a indústria conta com linhas independentes, sem contaminação cruzada e capazes de produzir produtos fracionados.

Tudo graças a segurança de nossa indústria e a agilidade de nossa logística. Nosso estoque é capaz de atender prontamente todos os nossos clientes no Brasil e exterior.

A busca mais intensa por BIOINSUMOS na agropecuária transforma o Brasil em um dos principais players da tecnologia no mundo e a Safeeds se insere na produção destes BIOINSUMOS para segurança alimentar.

Name: Not One More Vet
Description:
Not One More Vet, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) with the goal of ending suicide in the veterinary community.

NOMV will transform the status of mental wellness within the profession so veterinary professionals can survive and thrive through education, resources, and support.

NOMV addresses wellbeing in veterinary medicine through multiple innovative pathways including: the world’s largest veterinary peer-to-peer support group, an educational program providing leadership focused on wellness; a support grant program providing immediate financial support; an online crisis support system specifically designed for veterinary professionals; and research to further the advancement of wellness, mental health, and the reduction of suicide in veterinary professionals.

Name: Dechra Brasil
Description:
A Dechra é uma empresa multinacional especializada em produtos farmacêuticos veterinários e produtos relacionados. Nossa experiência está no desenvolvimento, fabricação e venda de produtos de alta qualidade para veterinários em todo o mundo. Somos movidos pelo nosso propósito de melhoria sustentável da saúde e bem-estar animal l.
Possuímos estruturas de vendas e marketing em 25 países e comercializamos nossos produtos em 63 outros países ao redor do mundo por meio de distribuidores ou parceiros. 
Veterinary Perspective – é assim que vemos as coisas
Continuamos a crescer porque entendemos os desafios que os veterinários enfrentam. Fornecemos treinamento, suporte e informações que os auxiliam a ajudar os animais. Ciência acessível que permite que os veterinários se comuniquem melhor com tutores e proprietários. É essa perspectiva que nos torna uma empresa distinta no mercado. Compreender os clientes está intrínseco em nosso modelo de negócios. Damos aos veterinários o que eles precisam, desde tratamentos diários baseados em evidências até conhecimento sobre doenças mais raras. Para apoiar nossa atuação e garantir o crescimento, não somos apenas uma empresa farmacêutica animal. Somos a empresa farmacêutica do profissional veterinário.
#TheVeterinaryPerspective. 

Saiba mais sobre nossa empresa no site: www.dechra.com.br

Name: Today's Veterinary Nurse
Description: Today’s Veterinary Nurse is an official peer-reviewed journal of the NAVC. This bi-monthly publication is free to veterinary professionals and provides information on a wide variety of clinical topics and industry information important to the veterinary practice today.

Name: Digital Practice
Description: We are Digital Practice, a leading pet tech company founded by vets. We believe that easy access to the right vet means better welfare for animals. So we design and develop digital products that make it super simple (and a total pleasure) for pet parents and vet practices to connect and communicate.

Name: vet times jobs
Description: We’re on a mission to help vets and nurses love what they do, search thousands of veterinary jobs or talk to us about building veterinary teams for today and tomorrow.

Name: Pearson Saúde Animal
Description: A Pearson Saúde Animal, empresa que atua há mais de 100 anos no mercado veterinário brasileiro, foi adquirida pelo Grupo Eurofarma em 1997. A Pearson tem hoje atuação 100% independente da linha humana e segue a tendência do mercado mundial na busca do conceito de saúde integrada, visando produtividade e bem-estar animal, com a adoção de políticas efetivas para prevenção e controle de enfermidades, tanto para animais de produção, quanto para animais de companhia. Focando a todo momento em tecnologia e inovação. Afinal, cuidar é da nossa natureza.

Name: German Standard Group
Description:
German Standard Group (GSG) is a frontrunner in the UAE veterinary industry with a growing range of veterinary equipment. We market veterinary equipment and instruments exclusively for veterinary practices across the region and strive to offer the most up-to-date in veterinary supplies to vet community, facilitating them to cater to the health concerns of their customers better, concurrently conducting a more cost-effective and profitable business..

Established in 2009 with headquarters in Germany, the company operates from offices and warehouse premises in the UAE and Saudi Arabia. GSG is now established as one of the fastest growing in this industry sector. Over the course of years, we have built an inimitable reputation of delivering a well-organized and cost effective service by providing personalized services that meet our customers’ specific needs. In addition to a rapidly growing range of veterinary products with exclusive UAE distribution rights, we have an exceptional reputation and customer loyalty in the form of repeat business and client referrals. We are proud to be an authorized supplier and exclusive distributor for top names in the industry.

Name: Bimeda
Description:
Founded in Ireland in 1960, Bimeda is an international developer, manufacturer and marketer of veterinary pharmaceuticals and animal care products. In addition to distributing Bimeda branded products in over eighty countries world-wide, Bimeda also manufacture private label for distributors, agents and international  companies.

Bimeda has 9 manufacturing facilities based in Ireland, the UK, Canada, the US, Brazil, and China. The company employees over 1,000 employees worldwide and has its global headquarters in Carrickmines, Dublin, Ireland.  Bimeda's North American headquarters are in Schaumburg, Illinois.


To find out about career opportunities at Bimeda, visit bimedacareers.com

Name: WeVets
Description:
WeVets é um ecossistema de saúde veterinária com ambição de transformar o setor. Acolhemos pets, tutores e colegas veterinários com o objetivo de prolongar e preservar vidas. Nosso grupo une tradição e inovação através de centros veterinários que são referências há décadas, com tecnologia de ponta, estrutura completa e um corpo clínico de excelência.

Inscrições Programa de Estágio: https://shre.ink/my8J

Name: Laboratorios Richmond División Veterinaria
Description:
Laboratorios RICHMOND División Veterinaria S. A.
Una empresa argentina que produce para el mundo un nuevo concepto en terapéutica y desarrollo de medicamentos y equipamiento para uso veterinario.
Comercio Interno – Atención al cliente

Contamos con una red de distribución nacional propia, brindando atención técnica y comercial personalizada a nuestros clientes en todo el país.

Nuestro equipo de promoción y ventas está específicamente capacitado en cada área, con el objetivo de brindar el soporte técnico y científico necesario a veterinarios y productores, asegurando de esta forma el correcto uso y resultados de nuestros medicamentos. 

RICHMOND Veterinary Research Center: Una nueva planta de elaboración y desarrollo destinada exclusivamente a la industria veterinaria. Bajo normas GMP, produce nuestros propios productos y brinda servicios de tercerización a laboratorios nacionales y extranjeros, como también elaboración y registro de dossiers, desarrollo de medicamentos y pruebas de eficacia a campo.

Comercio Exterior: actualmente exportamos a 24 países entre ellos:  Uruguay, Paraguay, Chile, Brasil, Perú, Ecuador, Costa Rica, Panamá, Nicaragua, Qatar y Emiratos Árabes Unidos.

Nuestros Productos: Nuestra fortaleza se concentra en la elaboración y desarrollo de medicamentos diferenciales y nuevas soluciones terapéuticas en patologías específicas para Bovinos de Carne, Bovinos de Leche, Porcinos, Ovinos, Equinos, Pequeños animales y especies exóticas.

Name: Vitalcan
Description:
Nacimos en 2001 en Argentina, impulsados por la pasión emprendedora y un objetivo claro: mejorar la vida de las mascotas a través del desarrollo, producción, comercialización y distribución de las mejores soluciones nutricionales integrales.
Así, nos convertimos en la primera empresa latinoamericana en lograr un acuerdo de investigación con una universidad nacional, conformando nuestro propio Centro de Investigación y Desarrollo en la Facultad de Ciencias Veterinarias de la Universidad Nacional del Centro (UNICEN), ubicada en Tandil.
Somos la única compañía que investiga y produce en la Argentina. Nuestros productos, respaldados por veterinarios especialistas en nutrición, se comercializan en veterinarias y pet shops. 
Ofrecemos el porfolio de productos más amplio del mercado, integrado por marcas de recomendación veterinaria como Vitalcan Therapy, Vitalcan Balanced, Vitalcan Complete, Vitalcan Línea V y los alimentos húmedos Vitalcan Balanced Wet y Vitalcan Complete Wet. 
Cada marca ofrece una solución nutricional específica centrada en la calidad y adaptada a las necesidades de cada especie, en todas sus etapas y condiciones. 
Los productos Vitalcan también nutren la vitalidad de perros y gatos en países como Chile, Bolivia, Paraguay, Uruguay, Perú, Ecuador entre otros países alrededor del mundo.
Nuestra misión es mejorar el mundo junto a las mascotas, a través de la creación de marcas, productos y servicios que otorguen cuidado de la salud, vitalidad y bienestar, nutriendo el vínculo con sus familias siempre.
Location: Buenos Aires, Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Vetcove
Description:
Vetcove is how veterinarians buy the supplies they need to keep America's pets healthy.  Our community of more than 23,000 veterinary hospitals employs tens of thousands of veterinarians and delivers care to many millions of animals every year across all 50 states.  As of 2024, Vetcove powers purchasing and supply chain infrastructure for the majority of America's general practices, emergency and specialty clinics, SPCAs, zoos, aquariums, and veterinary consolidators.

Vetcove's eCommerce and mobile platforms afford veterinary hospitals a frictionless purchasing experience, and facilitate delivery of medications to pet parents across the country. Simply put, Vetcove helps veterinary organizations spend more time giving care, and less time comparing suppliers and managing inventory. We're completely revolutionizing the way veterinarians discover and buy products, and how animal health brands engage their veterinary customers.

We're hiring!  Come join us on our journey to transform how vets buy and prescribe the animal healthcare products that keep our pets in peak condition!

Name: CVS Group UK
Description:
Established in 1999, CVS Group is a leading provider of integrated veterinary services with around 500 practices throughout the UK and Australia.

CVS is built upon recommending and providing the best clinical care every time and we believe this is what drives the success of our practices. We aim to deliver the highest standard of healthcare and empower our colleagues to make the right clinical decisions for our patients.

Alongside around 500 practices we provide great facilities and equipment and we operate:
- 10 specialist referral hospitals - ensure clients and their animals receive a first-class service even in the most complex cases
- 35 dedicated out-of-hours sites – to provide emergency care 24 hours a day
- 2 diagnostic laboratories and MiLab, a desktop analyser business - offer fast and accurate diagnostic services
- Healthy Pet Club – a scheme that provides preventative veterinary care and helps clients to spread the cost of regular health checks
- MiPet pet insurance
- AnimedDirect – our online retail business
- VetDirect – our buying group

We support and develop our teams to be the best in their role, which includes access to industry-leading learning, education and development.

We are a great place to work and have a career and our practices benefit from the strengths of operating within a group that at every level combines the talents of vets and non-clinical leaders. 

To view and search career opportunities at CVS Group, please visit http://www.careerswithcvs.co.uk

Name: PetVet Care Centers
Description: PetVet Care Centers is a network of over 420+ Specialty and General Practice Veterinary Hospitals across the nation.  Each location is operated locally and supported globally. We appreciate the differences in each and every community and support the local traditions which have made our member hospitals so successful.  Visit our website to learn more about our career opportunities for veterinarians and veterinary office support staff.

Name: Mundo Animal Laboratório Veterinário
Description:
Fundado em 1985, o Mundo Animal vem se destacando pelas práticas apresentações e principalmente pela qualidade de seus produtos. De lá pra cá, constantes investimentos em nossos laboratórios aumentam a segurança e eficácia das preparações medicamentosas. Desde a aquisição do princípio ativo, passando por todas as etapas produtivas, são seguidas as normas de BPF (Boas Práticas de Fabricação).

O Mundo Animal se preocupa com as questões que afetam a sociedade e o meio ambiente, apoiando e participando, de campanhas educacionais ligadas à saúde animal.

Nossa cultura corporativa permite manter uma equipe de profissionais comprometida e motivada, que busca a proximidade com os clientes, detectando necessidades e oferecendo soluções inteligentes e dinâmicas com flexibilidade e qualidade nos serviços e produtos.

Sempre buscando novas oportunidades e detectando necessidades, o Mundo Animal lança produtos que atendam a diversos segmentos do mercado, procurando promover a satisfação completa dos clientes e, a cada dia que passa, conquistando mais e mais proprietários, veterinários, criadores e lojistas.

Atualmente, estamos na capital paulistana e em Pindamonhangaba, no interior de São Paulo.

Name: Calier
Description:
Comercializamos soluciones de alta calidad que dan respuesta a los nuevos desafíos en salud animal. Nuestra actividad se centra en avicultura, apicultura, ganadería y animales de compañía, además del desarrollo de autovacunas para diferentes especies. 

Con un equipo de más de 400 profesionales, tenemos presencia global a través de nuestras filiales y distribuidores.

Bienvenidos a Calier!

Name: Klybeck Life Sciences MENA
Description:
Klybeck Life Sciences, HQ in Basel, Switzerland is founded through commercial-industrial partnerships and decades of success in the manufacturing and development of Veterinary products with diverse expertise across the biopharmaceutical and animal health industries for over 35 years.

At Klybeck Life Sciences, we are meticulous in ensuring our vaccine development and manufacturing is the best in-class, meeting international specifications with specific reference to Epi-linked isolated pathogenic strains to maximize immunity against diseases and epidemics worldwide.

Klybeck Life Sciences SA Factory is the 1st Veterinary Vaccines Manufacturing Plant in Saudi Arabia that produces various range of vaccines against infectious diseases of Poultry, Aqua, Livestock & Companion Animals.

Our Klybeck Life Sciences Factory, located in Dammam, Saudi Arabia uses the latest internationally recognized production techniques, follows international standards (GMP) and (ISO14001 : ISO45001) in the production of vaccines to ensure high quality with due consideration to environmental impacts, including biosecurity concerns and contamination.

Name: Provet - Medicina Veterinária Diagnóstica
Description:
O Provet é o maior e mais completo centro de diagnóstico veterinário da América Latina.

Estamos há mais de 30 anos no mercado com a missão de proporcionar diagnósticos precisos através de profissionais qualificados, utilizando tecnologia de ponta, com excelência no atendimento e dedicação aos animais. 

Atualmente com quatro unidades na cidade de São Paulo, em bairros estratégicos para atender pets de várias localidades e também oferecemos logística nacional para a retirada de amostras em clínicas e laboratórios em todo o Brasil.

Name: VetPartners Limited
Description:
Some of the most respected and trusted veterinary, farming, mixed and equine practices in the UK are part of VetPartners. Veterinary practice is all about its people, and we aim to nurture a caring, supportive culture making it easier to do the job you love. We are led by vets and a team of dedicated, experienced professionals, who love the veterinary industry. Working in collaboration with our practices, we aim to deliver the best in veterinary care for clients and patients.

Established in November 2015, we have more than 7,000 employees within the group working in around 550 sites across the UK and from its headquarters in York. We provide centralised support tailored to individual practice requirements in areas from HR to finance and marketing. For practice owners considering joining us, we offer an open and honest insight into what we are about, and we fully appreciate that no two practices are the same. We embrace individuality and encourage practices to have their own identity.

We are proud of all our team members and aim to continually develop and improve their skills through our clinical and non-clinical training, helping them to flourish in their chosen career. Our VetPartners Graduate Programme opens doors to the future and we are committed to recruiting, developing and retaining some of the best young vets in the profession.

We are growing all the time, and our practices are thriving.

Name: Vetstoria
Description:
Built by veterinarians, for veterinarians.

Vetstoria facilitates veterinary practices' digital transformation to become more robust and adaptable with tools such as real-time online booking, online payments and more. Integrated with over 30 practice management systems globally, Vetstoria caters to the full VCPR ecosystem, benefiting both veterinarians and pet-owners by offering automated processes, front-desk workflow optimisations and analytics which help practices realise their full growth potential.

Founded in 2015, Vetstoria now serves practices worldwide with offices in EMEA, North America, and Asia-Pacific.

Over 6,000 practices trust Vetstoria to book more than 350,000 appointments every month.

Take a look at our reviews here: https://www.vetstoria.com/customer-stories/

Name: IVC Evidensia UK
Description:
IVC Evidensia is a leading veterinary services provider with a network of more than 1,300 clinics and hospitals and approximately 16,000 employees across 12 countries in Europe.

Core to our mission are clinical independence, international cooperation, and continuous education to develop our people and their careers.

As a Disability Confident Employer we are keen to hear from candidates with disabilities and long term health conditions, and would be happy to discuss any reasonable adjustments needed during the recruitment process.

Name: Vet Education
Description:
Vet Education is dedicated to bringing the veterinary profession the very best continuing education - in a truly environmentally friendly online format! 
We offer approved CE programs in the form of webinars, short courses, and conferences for Vets, Vet Nurses and Vet Technicians.

Name: Zigly Pet Care
Description:
Zigly: Redefining Pet Care in India 

Zigly is India’s leading omnichannel pet care platform, offering world-class veterinary services, luxury grooming, and premium pet products thus, becoming a complete ecosystem for all your pet care needs. Our mission is two-fold; to provide easy access to reliable, standardized & quality pet care for pet parents and to provide steady & equitable income opportunities to care givers & pet lovers who chose to transform their passion into profession.

Zigly Multi-Speciality Hospital is raising the bar for pet healthcare with advanced facilities and expert care.

At Zigly, we make pet parenting effortless - by serving for healthy & happy pets.

Explore  
 www.zigly.com
 Visit our Pet Care Centers (https://stores.zigly.com/)

Name: Small Door
Description: Small Door is membership-based veterinary care designed with human standards that is better for pets, pet parents, and veterinarians alike. We designed and delivered a reimagined veterinary experience via a membership that includes exceptional care, 24/7 telemedicine, and transparent pricing - delivered with modern hospitality in spaces designed by animal experts to be stress-free. We opened our flagship location in Manhattan's West Village in 2020 and have quickly expanded across the East Coast. Small Door now operates in New York City, Boston, and Washington DC.

Name: UCBVET Saúde Animal
Description:
A UCBVET Saúde Animal é uma moderna empresa de medicamentos veterinários comprometida com a qualidade e tecnologia de seus produtos. 
Desde 1917, ano da sua fundação, a UCB Saúde Animal tem focado em inspirar plena confiança aos criadores de animais de produção e de companhia. 
Com atuação em todo o território brasileiro, a empresa, 100% nacional, exporta produtos para diversos países da América do Sul e da África. Esse é o resultado da sua excelência em produzir saúde animal.

Name: SignalPET
Description:
SignalPET has transformed radiographic interpretation in the veterinary industry — through the power of precision. With an array of patented end-to-end solutions that utilize the expertise of trusted veterinary specialists, cutting-edge artificial intelligence, and deep machine learning, SignalPET delivers fast, affordable and accurate X-ray interpretation, allowing veterinary professionals to provide superior care to their beloved pet patients. 

Our mission is to place the power of precision in every veterinary practitioner's hands, allowing them to read their own films while instantly supported by the most advanced technology available. Every time a practitioner uses SignalPET, the machine learning system improves, supporting other veterinary specialists and improving pet health outcomes everywhere. We encourage our colleagues to join us in shaping the future of veterinary care. Visit our website to book your demo today!

Name: Veterinary Practice Partners
Description:
Veterinary Practice Partners (VPP) is a trusted business partner to veterinarians. 

We co-own practices in partnership with veterinarians, and work relentlessly to grow and manage each practice, while retaining its unique identity and culture. VPP’s family of practices has enjoyed industry-leading growth and profitability improvements. Our team has deep experience in driving sustained, above-average revenue growth, cultivating exceptional practice staff, and overseeing back-office operations, including marketing, finance, accounting and human resources. Veterinarians partner with us because we enable them able to focus on delivering high-quality patient care and fostering lasting relationships with pet owners, while remaining owners in the practices they have committed a lifetime to building.

Name: Modern Animal
Description:
At Modern Animal, we are on a mission to better the lives of animals by building a place that’s better for all of us who love them. During our collective decades in the veterinary industry, we observed numerous pain points for both pet owners and veterinary professionals, ultimately concluding that through intentional design and innovations in technology, we could deliver a better experience.

Today, we have 28 clinics across Greater Los Angeles, Orange County, the San Francisco Bay Area, Dallas, Houston and Austin, which have garnered rave reviews.

We have also raised capital from leading venture capital funds (including Founders Fund, True Ventures, and Upfront Ventures), which will allow us to continue to bring modern veterinary care to more practitioners and pet owners.

We are a new kind of veterinary company; we believe a better one. We are just getting started, and we cannot wait to meet you.

Name: SEVETYS
Description:
Sevetys est un groupe vétérinaire français de plus de 250 cliniques réparties sur l’ensemble du territoire et compte aujourd’hui plus de 1 800 collaborateurs.

Grâce au dynamisme et à l’expertise de nos équipes, nous avons pour vocation d’accompagner la modernisation du secteur vétérinaire et de participer au bien-être animal en France.
 
Nos équipes travaillent en grappes locales pour partager les bonnes pratiques et viser constamment l’excellence médicale.
Nos vétérinaires et les auxiliaires spécialisés vétérinaires forment une véritable communauté travaillant au quotidien dans un esprit de convivialité.

Chaque clinique possède son expertise (Canine, NAC, Équine, Rurale), mais toutes ont le même objectif : la bonne santé des animaux et la satisfaction de leurs propriétaires.

Name: ANCLIVEPA-SP
Description:
Associação Nacional de Clínicos Veterinários de Pequenos Animais - São Paulo

Visão geral da empresa: 

Seja bem-vindo à página oficial da Anclivepa-SP no Linkedin!! Esta página é destinada aos clínicos de pequenos animais que desejam receber informações sobre todos os eventos promovidos pela entidade e suas coirmãs. Saiba mais sobre congressos, cursos de especialização, cursos intensivos, ciclos de palestras gratuitas e confraternizações. Basta entrar na página e clicar em "curtir"!! Aproveite!!

Name: Veterinary Practice Partners
Description:
Veterinary Practice Partners (VPP) is a trusted business partner to veterinarians. 

We co-own practices in partnership with veterinarians, and work relentlessly to grow and manage each practice, while retaining its unique identity and culture. VPP’s family of practices has enjoyed industry-leading growth and profitability improvements. Our team has deep experience in driving sustained, above-average revenue growth, cultivating exceptional practice staff, and overseeing back-office operations, including marketing, finance, accounting and human resources. Veterinarians partner with us because we enable them able to focus on delivering high-quality patient care and fostering lasting relationships with pet owners, while remaining owners in the practices they have committed a lifetime to building.

Name: Nuproxa Group
Description:
Nuproxa is a Swiss company founded in 2007, supplying high-quality solutions to the Animal Nutrition and Health Industry. 

Our solutions are 100% based on nature!

With technology created by nature, unquestionably safe.
Effective, with results demonstrated by scientific experiments and field tests in real conditions. Applicable to efficiently solve real problems faced by the ANH industry.

Vision

Nuproxa aims to contribute to a world where the well-being and nutrition of animals is provided by nature-based ingredients. Our commitment is to be the preferred supplier of natural solutions for animal health and nutrition.

Mission

Our mission is to supply the animal production industry with the most cost-effective natural nutrition and health solutions, while being recognized for our science-driven, innovative and sustainable approach. 

We differentiate ourselves by scientifically substantiating new applications for already known substances from the nature, as well as guaranteeing the quality of our products through the FAMI-QS certification (ours and our suppliers). The result is the delivery of natural, sustainable and reliable solutions, proven in research facilities and in the field.

Quality 

Nuproxa has a strong feed safety, quality, and regulatory process to ensure the integrity of its products. Therefore, we offer our distributors and customers safe, high quality products in compliance with the strictest regulations. To ensure this level of excellence, Nuproxa works with suppliers who are committed to quality and feed/food safety and are rigorously selected on the basis of their reputation, track-record and quality certifications.

Nuproxa’s Feed Safety and Quality Management System (FSQMS) is established in Switzerland, strategically structured to oversee our global supply chain. The system is audited and verified periodically by an independent Certification Body that attests compliance with the Regulations and FAMI-QS Code.

Name: Nova Pharma
Description:
NOVA PHARMA GROUP is a leading veterinary company distributing and marketing an extensive range of veterinary pharmaceuticals, nutraceuticals, animal feeds, veterinary equipment and veterinary management solutions and services. We are passionately committed to uniting the world's best-in-class animal health brands under one roof.  We act as a vital bridge between global innovation and local application.

Our Strategic Reach

Headquartered in the dynamic hub of Dubai, United Arab Emirates, our strategic location enables us to efficiently serve a rapidly growing regional network. To ensure proximity and dedicated support for our clients, we have established a strong presence across the Middle East & Africa, with branches and operations in:

- United Arab Emirates (UAE)
- Kingdom of Saudi Arabia (KSA)
- Morocco
- Egypt
- Qatar
- Oman
- Bahrain

Our Core Values

What truly sets us apart is the foundation upon which we were built:

- Veterinary-Led Expertise: Our founding principle. Every solution we offer is vetted and validated by our team of veterinary professionals, ensuring practical efficacy and relevance.
- Partnership & Collaboration: We view our clients as partners. We work hand-in-hand with them, providing not just products, but also knowledge, training, and ongoing support.
- Quality & Innovation: We relentlessly pursue the most advanced and effective products and digital tools on the global market, ensuring our partners have access to cutting-edge solutions for animal care.
- Integrity & Trust: We build lasting relationships based on reliability, ethical practices, and an unwavering commitment to our promises.

NOVA PHARMA GROUP is more than a supplier, we are your dedicated partner in advancing animal health, welfare, and performance for a healthier future.

Name: Qvetech
Description: Consultancy company work to support Animal Health companies & animal producers to develop business  in Middle East & Africa

Name: AniCura España
Description:
AniCura es proveedor líder de atención veterinaria en Europa. Nuestra compañía nació de la filosofía de que compartir recursos puede crear oportunidades para mejorar la atención veterinaria y sus resultados. 

Nuestros servicios incluyen una amplia gama de especialidades veterinarias de alta calidad que abarcan desde la atención sanitaria preventiva y básica, así como la atención especializada, incluidos el diagnóstico avanzado, la medicina interna, los cuidados intensivos, traumatología, cirugías y la ortopedia, entre otros. También proporcionamos rehabilitación, fisioterapia y asesoramiento dietético. 

La red de AniCura se constituye de 500 clínicas en 17 países de Europa, que ofrecen más de 4,5 millones de consultas de alta calidad para mascotas cada año. AniCura forma parte de Mars Veterinary Health desde 2018. Mars Veterinary Health comprende una red de más de 3.000 clínicas en todo el mundo que atienden a más de 25 millones de mascotas cada año. Juntos, somos capaces de proporcionar los más altos estándares en el cuidado de mascotas y lograr nuestro propósito colectivo: UN MUNDO MEJOR PARA LAS MASCOTAS.

Legal: mars.com/legal-spain
Privacy: mars.com/privacy-policy-spain

Name: Vivaldis Animal Health
Description: VIVALDIS is a leading Animal Healthcare company born out of the vision of professionals passionate about animal and human healthcare. The company plays an active role in the care, cure and management of companion animal health by introducing innovative and path breaking treatment options. The product basket compromises of unique range of lifestyle disease management products & enzyme based novel formulations, duly supported by the routine formulations for infection & infestation control which maximise health, agility, productivity and performance of companion animals.

Name: The Royal (Dick) School of Veterinary Studies
Description:
We aim to provide world class education, research and clinical service to improve the health of animals and human beings alike.

Our mission is to benefit society and the environment by educating veterinary surgeons to become members of world-wide public and professional health care teams; and to advance veterinary and comparative medicine through research into disease and disease processes, with the goal of improving the health and welfare of both animals and human beings.

Using outstanding Educational, Research and Clinical Facilities, we:

-	Ensure a stimulating educational environment to equip our students for the profession and life-long learning, underpinned by an excellent curriculum.

-	Undertake veterinary clinical and biomedical research to improve animal health and welfare.

-	Provide a veterinary service of the highest quality to our clients, and in doing so provide clinical opportunities for our students in a wide variety of domestic species.

-	Protect society through safe food production and control of emerging and zoonotic diseases.

Through our activities, we will support the aims of the University of Edinburgh in its fundamental mission to advance and disseminate knowledge and understanding.

Name: Henry Schein Animal Health
Description:
Located in Dublin, Ohio, we employ approximately 900 team members, including 300 field sales representatives and 200 telesales and customer support representatives. With 12 strategically positioned, state-of-the-art distribution facilities and 10 inside sales centers nationwide, we maintain a greater than 98 percent order-fill ratio, accomplishing our mission to provide the best customer experience possible.

Partnering with over 400 of the leading animal health manufacturers in the world, we are positioned to bring the broadest selection of veterinary products and strategic business solutions to over 26,000 veterinary professionals nationwide.

Name: AniCura Italia
Description:
AniCura è leader nelle cure veterinarie in Europa. La nostra azienda è nata dalla filosofia secondo cui la condivisione delle risorse può creare opportunità per cure e risultati veterinari migliori.

I nostri servizi comprendono un'ampia gamma di servizi medici di alta qualità che coprono l'assistenza sanitaria preventiva e di base, nonché cure specialistiche, tra cui diagnostica avanzata, medicina interna, terapia intensiva, chirurgia e ortopedia. Forniamo anche consulenza riabilitativa, fisioterapica e dietetica.

La rete di AniCura comprende 500 cliniche in 17 paesi in Europa, che forniscono oltre 4,5 milioni di consulenze di alta qualità per animali ogni anno. AniCura fa parte di Mars Veterinary Health dal 2018. Mars Veterinary Health comprende una rete di oltre 3.000 cliniche in tutto il mondo che si prendono cura di oltre 25 milioni di animali domestici ogni anno. Insieme, siamo in grado di fornire gli standard più elevati nella cura degli animali domestici e raggiungere il nostro scopo collettivo: UN MONDO MIGLIORE PER GLI ANIMALI DOMESTICI.

Legal: https://www.mars.com/legal-italy
Privacy: https://www.mars.com/privacy-policy-italian

Name: Vetsource Data Services
Description:
At Vetsource, we build the foundation for success, enabling those in the pet healthcare ecosystem to thrive. Formerly VetSuccess, our Data & Insights team remains the industry’s definitive data experts. We make sense of veterinary data and turn it into actionable information, metrics, and benchmarks for veterinary corporate groups and industry organizations. 

From veterinary market trends data to pet owner outreach programs, our innovative business solutions harness the power of data to help our partners expand their knowledge and reach, make data-driven decisions, and nurture lasting bonds with their customers. 

Pet healthcare is rapidly evolving, and we’re constantly seeking new ways to help create a better, brighter future for pets and those who care for them. Follow our general account to keep up with all things Vetsource, @vetsource.

Name: Shepherd Veterinary Solutions
Description:
Shepherd Veterinary Software is the nation’s fastest-growing practice information management system. Our team is made up of clinically trained veterinary professionals and industry experts who create software that brings joy to vets.
 
Who We Are: We’ve been there for the dewormings, vaccinations, 2 a.m. barn calls, emotional pet owners, and wriggling litters. We’ve seen it all, and we’re here to remind you that amongst the chaos - You deserve joy.
 
What We Believe: Vets deserve joy. We’re here to simplify running veterinary practices so vets can rekindle their passion for veterinary medicine and lead more fulfilled teams.
 
Our Approach: Shepherd is designed to work the way vets work. Our intuitive dashboard, SOAP-based medical records, and essential automation tools give veterinary teams more time and more opportunities to provide the best care.
 
Get to Know Us: Let’s bring joy back into veterinary medicine together! Visit our website at www.shepherd.vet to learn more.

Name: Destination Pet, LLC
Description:
We are on a mission to redefine the standard of care for pet health and well-being. We offer a full spectrum of services through a "whole health" approach, to help pets everywhere live happier, healthier lives.

We are 1,200+ pet people all across the US, working together every day to deliver high-quality care for pets and a better customer experience for pet owners.

With a long-term vision, we are focused on building and growing a world-class team of pet care professionals. We are committed to continuously improving the standard of care, developing our employees, and maintaining the quality and culture our customers love and have come to expect.

Name: DCC Animal Hospital
Description: A Global chain of veterinary hospitals to ensure complete pet healthcare. We aim at creating parity for pet health needs at par with humans! Download our mobile app, available on Android and iOS, DCC PetConnect and we will help manage your pet's health

Name: UNAVETS
Description:
El Grupo UNAVETS es, actualmente, uno de los mayores grupos sanitarios veterinarios de la Península Ibérica. Nació en diciembre de 2019 y en la actualidad cuenta con más de 1.600 profesionales que trabajan en sus 161 centros veterinarios, 87 en España, 73 en Portugal y 1 en Gibraltar. 

El Grupo está centrado en apoyar a las clínicas con su modelo de "servicios compartidos", proporcionando marketing, finanzas, operaciones, compras, recursos humanos y apoyo informático a todas sus clínicas. Paralelamente, el Grupo sigue innovando y desarrollando nuevas líneas de servicio, mejorando el compromiso digital con sus clientes y promoviendo la colaboración y el desarrollo profesional continuo y la formación veterinaria de los equipos clínicos.

UNAVETS fue financiada en 2019 por Oaktree Capital Management L.P. ("Oaktree"). Oaktree es líder entre los gestores de inversiones globales especializados en inversiones alternativas, con 164.000 millones de dólares en activos bajo gestión a 31 de marzo de 2022. La firma hace hincapié en un enfoque oportunista, orientado al valor y de riesgo controlado de las inversiones en crédito, capital privado, activos reales y acciones cotizadas.

Name: Feline Veterinary Medical Association
Description: The Feline Veterinary Medical Association (FelineVMA) supports its members in improving the health and welfare of cats through high standards of practice, continuing education, and evidence-based medicine.

Name: Basso Pancotte
Description:
Em Outubro de 1988, na recém emancipada cidade de Nova Alvorada, duas pessoas davam um passo para iniciar uma grande conquista em suas vidas. Vislumbrando as oportunidades que surgiriam com a emancipação do Distrito de Alvorada, os empreendedores Oneide Francisco Basso e Jair Antônio Pancotte se uniram e fundaram a Basso & Pancotte Ltda, um comércio que atendia as necessidades dos produtores e pecuaristas locais, vendendo produtos da área agrícola, veterinária e material de construção.

Com uma grande visão de expandir os negócios, os dois sócios resolveram ampliar a atuação para cidades vizinhas, proporcionando uma maior proximidade com as indústrias e despertando o interesse de atuar no ramo atacadista.

Aos poucos foram sendo incorporadas novas regiões, sempre de forma consciente e planejada, começando pelo atendimento de todas as regiões do Estado do Rio Grande do Sul, Santa Catarina e Paraná. Hoje a atuação compreende todo o país.

O atual cenário econômico mundial, no qual o Brasil exerce um papel de destaque no setor do agronegócio, serviu de impulso para a expansão e o grande crescimento da Basso Pancotte, que hoje figura como o principal distribuidor de produtos veterinários no Brasil.

Com a atualização constante das estruturas de tecnologia da informação, operacional e logística, uma excelente força de vendas e grandes profissionais na área administrativa e de apoio, a empresa expandiu sua atuação para o restante do Brasil de forma sustentada. Hoje conta com Centro de Operações em Cambé, PR e Vespasiano, MG.

Um dos diferenciais da empresa é oferecer amplas oportunidades de escolha à disposição dos clientes com um amplo e diversificado mix de produtos que ultrapassa os 8.500 itens, sendo eles: medicamentos e instrumentos veterinários, vacinas, equipamentos de segurança e camping, ferragens, material de construção, sementes de hortaliças e pastagens e toda linha para pet-shops, atendendo assim as exigências de seus clientes.
Location: Nova Alvorada, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Ourofino Salud Animal
Description:
El #EquipoOurofino juega para ganar, cuida a las personas y se conecta con el mundo. Estos son #NuestrosValoresOurofino!

Somos más de mil colaboradores, apasionados por lo que hacemos y dedicados al desarollo de productos y servicios que contribuyan al mercado de la salud animal.

Si piensa como nosotros, interactúe!

Sigue también:

Name: Vetline
Description: A Vetline é uma das maiores distribuidoras de produtos pet do Brasil e está no mercado desde 2003. Ela está presente no dia a dia dos proprietários de Pet Shop, Médicos Veterinários, Clínicas Veterinárias, Banho e Tosa e Casas Agropecuárias levando as melhores marcas dos melhores fabricantes do setor.

Name: Veterinary Management Group (VMG)
Description:
VMG is the membership association for all those in management and leadership roles, and those aspiring to be, within the veterinary sector.  We champion the personal and professional development of people and practices.  #learnsharegrow
(Formerly the VPMA/Veterinary Practice Management Association)

Name: Unión Agronegocios
Description:
Empresa dedicada a la importación y distribución de productos además de la prestación de servicios agropecuarios, asesoramiento técnico mayormente para el sector ganadero.

Visión
Ser el modelo de agronegocios líder en Latino América.

Misión
Creamos valor promoviendo la producción de alimentos sanos, transfiriendo tecnología para el bienestar animal y aportando al desarrollo de sector agropecuario.
Location: Santa Cruz , Santa Cruz de la Sierra

Name: Western Veterinary Partners
Description: Western Veterinary Partners is a people-centric veterinary support organization that partners with veterinarians across the United States.  Our mission is to improve the lives of veterinarians, and help them grow professionally and personally, while providing a supportive environment for team members, families, and their pets.

Name: VETPORT EMEA
Description:
VETPORT EMEA is a specialized B2B platform dedicated to accelerating growth within the animal health and veterinary industry across Europe, the Middle East, and Africa.

We connect producers, distributors, manufacturers, and decision-makers through curated, one-to-one pre-scheduled business meetings designed to maximize ROI, market expansion, and strategic partnerships.

Our model offers a streamlined alternative to traditional trade shows by focusing on:
	•	High-quality matchmaking with pre-qualified attendees
	•	Guaranteed business meetings with the right partners
	•	Focused networking with industry professionals
	•	Market access across the Middle East, Africa, and Europe
	•	Cost-efficient & time-efficient business interactions

VETPORT EMEA creates an exclusive environment where companies can expand distribution networks, explore new markets, launch innovations, and build long-term partnerships.

Where Veterinary Business Takes OFF.

 Abu Dhabi – October 2026
 Serving Europe, Middle East & Africa
 boarding@vetport.ae

Name: Ordre national des vétérinaires
Description:
L'Ordre national des Vétérinaires est l'organisme d'habilitation à l'exercice de la profession vétérinaire en France. 
L'Ordre, constitué de tous les vétérinaires inscrits, représente la profession auprès de l'administration, du public et des clients : il est le garant de la compétence des vétérinaires et de leur éthique.

L'Ordre des Vétérinaires est administré par 12 Conseils régionaux et un Conseil national.

Name: Tectron
Description: We create intelligent solutions for animal production, through people, products and services, with the aim of adding value for our customers and to the business. For this reason, we bring together our exclusive competencies in Nutrition and Animal Health to create solutions that nurture, protect and enhance animal performance.

Name: The Vets
Description: The Vets is redefining the traditional veterinary experience, building an at-home, mobile veterinary service that’s seamless, comfortable, and stress-free for pets and vets alike.  We are dedicated to delivering gold-standard pet care in the comfort of home, and to creating an environment that prioritizes the well-being and work-life balance of our team.  Our growing team of skilled and compassionate veterinary professionals cares for pets in cities across the US.

Name: Zomedica
Description: Zomedica (OTCQB: ZOMDF) is a veterinary health company focused on meeting the needs of clinical veterinarians in ways that promote both patient and practice health.  Our team of animal health professionals, innovative scientists, clinical veterinarians, and business experts is committed to helping practitioners remember why they chose to care for animals and recapture the joy in their career.

Name: Linnaeus
Description:
Linnaeus Veterinary Ltd (A Mars Company). 

You can find our terms of use and privacy policy by visiting:  
Privacy statement - www.mars.com/privacy 
Legal notice - www.linnaeusgroup.co.uk/legal-notice/
Contact Information - www.linnaeusgroup.co.uk/contact-us/


Linnaeus, formed in 2014 and backed by Mars Petcare, is a leading veterinary services group comprising some of the most highly-respected practices in the UK. The group has seen continued growth and has had fantastic investment in its service offering, enabling it to maintain its position at the very forefront of specialist and first opinion veterinary services and excellence. 

Linnaeus is a vibrant, forward-thinking partnership of highly respected veterinary practices across the UK, comprising some of the best clinicians in the profession who were carefully selected to ensure the highest levels of patient care across our group. 

Together we provide a growing community of like-minded veterinary professionals who are passionate about what they do. We are incredibly proud of each and every member of our diverse portfolio, from the UK’s most respected small animal referral centres to our selection of high-quality first opinion practices.

Through its flexible and supportive culture, its practice teams can focus on delivering top-quality care to their patients. For more on Linnaeus, please visit www.linnaeusgroup.co.uk.  

Committed to Excellence

Name: MSD Santé Animale France
Description: By collaborating closely with each other and our customers, we build strong partnerships in an effort to improve the health of animals around the world. We approach our work every day with a deep sense of responsibility – to our customers, consumers, animals, society and the planet.

Name: Fitzpatrick Referrals
Description:
Fitzpatrick Referrals was founded in 2005 by Professor Noel Fitzpatrick whose vision was to create an environment where it would be truly possible to marry compassionate care with excellence in veterinary medicine.

Our state-of-the-art referral centre specialises in the treatment of orthopaedic, neurological and dental conditions with further specialised rehabilitation and regenerative medicine services. We have a team of dedicated people working with vets and the families who are referred to us, to help our animal friends regain a pain-free, functional quality of life.

Name: Community Veterinary Partners
Description:
At Community Veterinary Partners, we believe a kinder, more compassionate world begins with how we care—for animals, for people, and for each other.

We’re a growing community of over 140 locally led general practice, exotic, large animal, and ER/Specialty veterinary hospitals, across 18 states, united by a shared mission: to create more meaningful moments between pets and people.

Each hospital in our community has its own story, culture, and values—and we believe in honoring and celebrating that individuality. What brings us together is a commitment to care that’s not just clinically excellent, but deeply human in spirit.

Our work is guided by four core pillars:
• Elevate Care: through clinical autonomy, innovation, and shared expertise
• Champion People: with well-being support, mentorship, and career growth
• Enhance Experiences: for our teams, clients, and patients alike
• Expand Impact: in the communities we serve and the profession we love

Whether it’s mentoring the next generation of doctors, hosting clinical trials, fostering leadership, or helping a team open the doors to a new hospital, CVP is building something lasting: a trusted community where veterinary professionals feel seen, supported, and empowered to lead.

We’re not just in the business of veterinary medicine—we’re building a place where people grow, teams thrive, and every meaningful moment of care makes a difference.

Name: Today's Veterinary Business
Description:
Today’s Veterinary Business is the first addition to the NAVC family of publications to focus on the business side of the animal health practice. With a dedication to leadership, innovation, and success, Today’s Veterinary Business provides content that will inspire veterinary practice teams to elevate overall practice performance. 

Share each issue’s business information and educational resources with your team to improve financial knowledge, enhance client relationships and service, increase the level of patient care, and build healthier teams.

Name: Royal GD
Description: Our company is a market-oriented organisation primarily for the improvement of animal health and safety of animal products. Veterinary specialists provide farmers and veterinary practitioners with assistance and advice not only for the fight against infectious diseases but also regarding aspects of animal husbandry and animal welfare.

Name: Veros Hospital Veterinário
Description:
No Veros Hospital Veterinário, oferecemos uma estrutura completa, com tecnologia de ponta e atendimento 24h para pets, tutores e médicos-veterinários. Localizado próximo aos principais polos de São Paulo, contamos com serviços integrados como atendimento de urgência/emergência, internação, UTI, consultas, exames de imagem e laboratoriais, cirurgias e especialidades para felinos.

Aqui, unimos cuidado, tecnologia e especialistas para oferecer tudo o que seu pet precisa em um só lugar.

Name: VetPartners Australia and New Zealand
Description:
VetPartners is Australia and New Zealand’s leading vet care network.

We bring together a community of more than 270 individual clinics and specialty hospitals, united by a commitment to providing compassionate patient-centred care.
 
We support teams to learn and grow, with unmatched access to training, investment in innovation and equipment, and by providing essential services  so that -  together - we can focus on the most important priority: our patients.

VetPartners gives you the support to have the veterinary career you’ve always wanted: to deliver care your way with a team you can trust, as part of a local community, connected nationally. 

When you join us, we grow together.

Name: RCVS Knowledge
Description:
We are RCVS Knowledge, an independent charity sitting at the heart of the veterinary professions.

We help advance the quality of care for the benefit of animals, the public and society.

We meet our goals, by working with you. We support and collaborate with veterinary teams on the ground and in practice, influence policy, and engage educators and other organisations.

To do this, we translate and disseminate the latest research from across the globe. We foster approaches to shared learning with training and tools. All underpinned by our veterinary archive that logs and tracks our evolving profession.

Find out how we can support you rcvsknowledge.org

Name: Nova Vets Veterinary Clinic & Hotel
Description:
Who we are 

As one of the leading veterinary medicine service providers in Qatar. Nova Vets Veterinary Clinic & Hotel are committed to providing exceptional care to your animals. Our Veterinary Hospital is a full-service pet hospital whose mission is to provide the highest standard of veterinary care for pets, Equipped with state-of-the-art machinery and tools. Our mission is to provide the highest quality medical and surgical care to our patients while providing our clients with education and assistance in all aspects of animal care and ownership.

Our People

We at Nova Vets Veterinary Clinic & Hotel have assembled an expert team of veterinary professionals to bring the best possible healthcare practices to Qatar following the global quality standards. We equip our team with success factors and encourage the continuous development of our human assets. Maintaining a healthy work environment is one of our goals and valuable investments. 

Our Values

- Performance: Providing Medical Veterinary Care is the foundation for all we do and executional excellence is a core value of our team.
- Customer Commitment: We are committed to optimize the quality of our customer's experience 
- Passion: Passion is at the heart of our daily activities. We are continuously moving forward, developing, and improving. 
- Integrity: We are honest, open, ethical, and fair. People trust us to adhere to our word.
- Delivery: We know it takes people with different ideas strength, interests, and cultural backgrounds to make our clinics succeed. We encourage healthy debate and differences of options. 

Careers

Energetic veterinary professionals, as well as Business support experts, are always welcomed in our organization, if you have the right attitude to join our winning team please feel free to contact us.

Name: Nuproxa Brasil
Description:
Nuproxa Brazil is part of the Nuproxa Switzerland Group of Companies. Founded in 2007, we provide high-quality natural solutions for the animal nutrition and health industry. 

Discover our product line at https://linktr.ee/nuproxa_brasil. 

Our products are: Based on technology created by nature and unquestionably safe. They are effective, with results demonstrated by scientific studies and verified in the field under real conditions. They are created to efficiently solve the real problems faced by the ANH industry. 

Vision: Nuproxa aims to contribute to a world where the well-being and nutrition of animals is provided by nature-based ingredients. Our commitment is to be the preferred supplier of natural solutions for animal health and nutrition. 

Mission: our mission is to supply the animal production industry with the most cost-effective natural nutrition and health solutions, while being recognized for our science-driven, innovative and sustainable approach. 

Quality: Nuproxa Brasil has robust food safety, quality, and regulatory processes to ensure the integrity of its products. Therefore, we offer our customers safe, high-quality products that comply with the most stringent regulations. Our Food Safety and Quality Management System (FSQMS), established in Switzerland, is strategically structured to oversee our global supply chain. The system is periodically audited and verified by an independent certification body that certifies compliance with FAMI-QS regulations and codes.

Name: Semex Brasil
Description:
Há mais de 35 anos especializada em genética animal, a Semex é uma das maiores empresas de genética bovina do mundo.

São mais de 400 touros provados a cada ano e 11 touros com mais de 1 milhão de doses vendidas até agora.

Nossa rede de representantes é formada por mais de 80 profissionais capacitados para prestar assistência de manejo, nutrição e claro fornecer o melhor da genética!

Name: LABORATORIOS TORNEL S.A. de C.V.
Description:
Since 1976 we are the Maximum Dimension in Animal Health. We have more than 200 products and export to more than 18 countries in Africa, the Middle East, Asia, the Caribbean, South America and Central America.

Laboratorios Tornel means quality, productivity, competitiveness and standards of standardization.

We distinguish ourselves by having 100% Mexican capital, quality products, the focus on the needs of our customers, the continuous improvement of processes and the development of Human Talent.

Today we occupy one of the first places among national companies and we are placed among the first ten companies in the Animal Health market in Mexico. In 2017, we were recognized for the second time in a row as one of the Best Mexican Companies.
Location: Naucalpan de Juarez, Estado de México

Name: Vaxxinova
Description:
Vaxxinova develops, produces and markets a wide range of innovative vaccines and diagnostic services to protect livestock and fish against diseases. We create high quality solutions to improve animal health and to support our customers. We believe that innovation and excellence in research are essential to produce premium products that match the current and future requirements in animal health. That is why Vaxxinova invests strongly in R&D. 

Locations
Our current network comprises production, research & development, sales and diagnostic facilities in 12 countries: Brazil, Chile, Croatia, Germany, Italy, Japan, Jordan, Norway, the Netherlands, South Africa, Thailand and the USA. Vaxxinova is active in more than 75 countries.

Job opportunities
We are currently expanding our organization, both locally and at the head office. We are looking for new talents and professionals who feel at home in a driven, entrepreneurial and down to earth working environment. Vaxxinova offers their employees excellent opportunities for further professional development.

Background
Vaxxinova is part of the family-owned EW Group, a German based company specialized in the field of Life Sciences: genetics, nutrition and animal health. The EW Group is highly committed to R&D, operates in more than 165 countries and records consistent international growth.

Name: Greencross Vets
Description:
Established in 1994, Greencross Vets is the largest veterinary services provider in Australia where we operate over 150+ clinics including General Practices and Animal Emergency Clinics.

As Australia's leading veterinary group, we provide pet owners access to a network of well-equipped veterinary practices run by local veterinary teams, which offer exceptional client and patient care.

We feature some of the most advanced practices in the veterinary industry and choose the best diagnostic tools, treatments and preventative measures based on clinical excellence. 

Greencross are part of a community of vets who enjoy sharing their knowledge and clinical expertise. Complex cases can be discussed with our centres of excellence, where we have the most advanced equipment and nationally recognised teams of specialist vets. Finally, there’s our Vet Advisory Board (VAB) that leads our clinical practice and maintains our high standards consistently across the group.

Our operations include:

     •	General Practices
     •	Emergency Centres
     •	Specialist Centres 

General practices,  consisting of veterinary practices that offer consultations and associated diagnostics  capabilities and general practice medical and surgical treatment options.  Emergency centres,  providing full animal hospital facilities for after-hours care and treatment of sick pets, and Specialist centres providing veterinary care across a number of specialist services including medicine, surgery, pathology, radiology, dermatology, cardiology, ophthalmology and dentistry.

For more information about Greencross Vets and our culture please visit www.greencrossvet.com.au or www.greencrossvet.com.au/careers to learn more about joining Greencross Vets.

Name: Petfolk
Description:
We’re Petfolk. And we’re reshaping pet care as we know it.

Founded and led by vets, Petfolk understands what it takes to provide world-class veterinary care. When too often the veterinary experience falls short, we’re here to make it better for everyone: pets, their parents, and vets alike.

Our goal is to integrate everything pets and their parents need in their journey — from scheduled on-site care to virtual visits. We believe the easier it is for the parent, the healthier and happier the pet. 

On a deeper level, we see ourselves as part of a greater community of people with pets. We share the same values all devoted pet parents do, and we understand the bond between pets and their owners inherently. 

Most important, our support is as much for you as it is for your pet. We believe that with the right tools and knowledge, you’re empowered to make the best decisions possible for them.

It’s a journey, and we’ll always be by your side for it.

Name: AVEPA - Asociación de Veterinarios Españoles Especialistas en Pequeños Animales
Description:
AVEPA (Asociación de Veterinarios Españoles Especialistas en Pequeños Animales), engloba como Asociación al 90% de los veterinarios españoles cuya actividad pasa, en alguna medida, por el trabajo en la clínica de animales de compañía (perros, gatos, aves de jaula, animales exóticos, etc.). Con una historia de más de 30 años, AVEPA tiene, entre sus objetivos de trabajo, el incremento del nivel técnico y científico de sus asociados veterinarios mediante la organización de congresos, actividades y conferencias de carácter técnico y la edición de diversas publicaciones.
El objetivo de AVEPA es desarrollar el nivel cultural y científico de los veterinarios especialistas en pequeños animales, en especial con respecto a las especies caninas, felinas, pájaros domésticos, animales de adorno, animales de laboratorio y otros animales de compañía; así mismo deberá proteger los intereses de los asociados.

Name: Noble Veterinary Clinics
Description:
We’re reimagining how people think about veterinary care

Since 2006, our goal has been to provide the highest standards of routine and emergency veterinary care. We strive to create an experience where families feel heard and pets feel safe. This vision continues to guide us today.

Our founders have designed each clinic for comfort, privacy, and a welcoming, stress-free experience at every visit. Our conveniently located branches ensure expert care is always close by.

Transparency matters to us; we openly discuss all treatment options and costs upfront, ensuring clarity and peace of mind. As fellow pet parents, we care for your pets as we would our own.

Name: VetCare Canada
Description:
Nice to meet you! We're VetCare. Our Canada-wide community of veterinary practices is taking a fresh approach to veterinary medicine. How? By combining the personal touch of private practice with the strength and resources of a powerful network.

While our medical teams exchange knowledge, expand their skills, and provide personalized care, our strategic team works behind-the-scenes– offering hands-on mentorship, supporting our practice managers, helping with recruitment efforts, and more.

This collective approach allows us to accomplish more together than we could alone. Because at the end of the day, we’re all pet lovers with a shared calling: to advocate for animals and the people who care for them.

WHY WORK WITH US?

Caring Leadership: We prioritize effective leadership that empowers our teams to thrive. Our training programs emphasize psychological safety and shared purpose, helping you excel in providing top-notch care.

Tailored Mentorship: We’re committed to your growth, offering personalized coaching and resources for RVT tuition, specialized training, and hands-on skills development. Our mentorship ensures you have the support you need for continuous learning.

Distinctive Culture: Each practice has its own unique vibe, but all share our core values. With a pulse survey showing 97% of team members feel valued, you’ll find strong coworker relationships and opportunities for community involvement.

Join us to practice world-class medicine in a supportive environment— plus, we have the cutest pets around, no bias here! (Okay...maybe a little.)

Name: Laboratório Bravet Ltda.
Description: O Laboratório Bravet é uma indústria de medicamentos veterinários que atua há mais de 45 anos no Brasil e América Latina, desenvolvendo produtos de alta qualidade para melhoria da sanidade animal. Com produtos reconhecidos pelo mercado em seu portifólio, o Laboratório Bravet investe constantemente em tecnologia e inovação, buscando excelência na manutenção da qualidade de vida dos animais.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: VETS INFO
Description: Vets info is a page where you can get latest and updated information about Veterinary Field so join us to get updates and information.

Name: Photon Surgical Systems Ltd
Description:
Photon Surgical Systems provides new and used equipment as well as servicing and repairs to the veterinary profession at realistic prices. We pride ourselves on our customer service and are happy to offer as much help as needed regardless of the query size.

Surgical Systems Ltd and Photon Imaging Systems Ltd joined forces in 2018 to offer their customers a wider range of products and a greater level of technical support.

We have an ethos of providing the best quality products at affordable prices and fully supporting them with our own team of highly skilled and experienced technicians and engineers.

Name: Food for Joe
Description:
Food for Joe is ... 
 Real food for your pet (cat or dog)
 Natural ingredients
 Slowly cooked
 Human grade quality 
 Deliver at your convenience

Name: Bestof Veterinary Services
Description:
Pet & livestock vaccinations (dogs, cats, poultry, cattle, pigs)

Name: VetStage

Wir unterstützen daher unsere Partner:innen vom Personalmanagement bis hin zum Employer Branding und Marketing - durch persönliche Betreuung, regelmäßige Schulungen und Weiterbildung.

Wer oder was ist VetStage?
VetStage wurde 2013 gegründet und ist die führende Plattform für Veterinärmediziner:innern, TFA und Animal Health Experts in D-A-CH. Unser Team setzt sich aus Tiermediziner:innen, HR-und Sales-Experten, Marketern und Entwicklern zusammen. Gemeinsam helfen wir Vets, den Überblick im Job und Fortbildungsdschungel zu wahren und unterstützen Arbeitnehmer:innen auf Wunsch aktiv bei der Suche nach ihren Traumarbeitgeber:innen. Zudem bieten wir eine persönliche Betreuung für Tierarztpraxen, -kliniken und Industrieunternehmen und unterstützen diese breit aufgestellt: vom Recruiting zur Weiterbildung bis hin zum Employer Branding und Marketing. Wir glauben, Personal und Marketing gehen Hand-in-Hand!
