Today Village Vets is run by Karl's children Charles and Julianne who are also vets and share the passion of improving independent Veterinary Practice in Ireland and building a sustainable and progressive future for their teams.
Village Vets mission is to make lives better through excellence in veterinary care while truly caring for the best interests of our patients, customers, and colleagues. With their investment in research & development and staff training, Village Vets is well placed to become one of the top destinations for your pet needs in Ireland.

Name: ART Lab Solutions
Description:
ART Lab Solutions delivers technologies that make a positive impact to valuable livestock breeding. We combine scientific pedigree with an extensive knowledge of the livestock IVF sector, transforming success rates for in vitro embryo production.  

Our market leading range of cattle IVF media formulations are serum free, and have been developed with over 30 years of research, development and industry consultation, led by the company’s founder, Professor Jeremy Thompson.

Our products provide improvements across the whole in vitro embryo production system, to ensure the best chance of successful live birth outcomes.

We maintain an active research and development association with The University of Adelaide and our established client base. This has been key to product development and the success of continually improving media formulations and IVF systems.

Name: Maven Pet
Description:
Maven Pet is your 24/7 pet health assistant for cats and dogs — helping pet parents and vets detect early signs of illness through continuous wellness monitoring.

Co-created with veterinarians and clinically validated, Maven combines proprietary collar-based sensor technology with a pet health app to track key health indicators:
• Activity
• Rest
• Heart rate
• Respiratory rate
• Itch behaviors
• Water intake (dogs)

Subtle changes in these metrics often precede visible symptoms. Maven empowers proactive care by delivering real-time insights and alerts to pet parents, and actionable data to veterinarians.

Not every pet needs GPS, but all pet parents deserve peace of mind about their pet’s health. Maven supports healthier lives and better outcomes — from anxious pets to aging pets, and those managing chronic conditions.

Maven is offered as a monthly or annual subscription and integrates seamlessly with veterinary care to provide data-driven insights between appointments.

 Monitor Always. Detect Sooner. Love Longer.

Name: VetZ GmbH
Description:
Seit Jahren zählen wir zu den führenden Anbietern von Praxismanagementsoftware, Webanwendungen und digitalen Röntgensystemen in der Tiermedizin. Unsere Bildmanagementsoftware wird von Tierärzten und Spezialisten weltweit am häufigsten genutzt. Das verdanken wir Ihnen und unserem Leitprinzip: work easy. Unsere Produkte vereinfachen und optimieren den Praxisalltag und die Geschäftsabläufe unserer Kunden und Partner in allen Bereichen der Tiergesundheit. Unsere Innovationen ermöglichen 15.000 Kunden und Partnern und Millionen von Tierhaltern auf der ganzen Welt, einfacher zu arbeiten und sich besser miteinander zu verbinden.

1997 hatten Ingo und Thomas Fraedrich die Vision einer einfachen und integrierten Praxismanagementsoftware. Mit den ersten Kunden und einer Handvoll Mitarbeitern schlug VetZ einen Weg ein, der die Art und Weise, wie Tierärzte und Helferinnen ihren Praxisalltag meistern, nachhaltig verändern sollte. Die Möglichkeiten, wie Daten und Informationen in der Tiermedizin verarbeitet und ausgetauscht werden, wurden von VetZ entscheidend beeinflusst. Schon damals zeigte sich, dass die einfache und einheitliche Integration aller Anwendungen, Geräte und des Internets in eine einzige Software zu einem der wichtigsten Markenzeichen von VetZ werden würde.

Als erfolgreiches und unabhängiges Familienunternehmen haben wir gerade die Weichen gestellt für noch mehr Innovationen und noch einfachere Lösungen. Freuen Sie sich auf die nächsten Generationen von easyVET und easyIMAGE und seien Sie mit dabei, wenn wir petsXL.com vorstellen, unser neues Portal für Tiergesundheit und Kommunikation.

Name: WILMAH (Women in Leadership and Management in Animal Health)
Description:
Women in Leadership and Management in Animal Health (WILMAH) was founded to meet the needs of the increasing number of women who work in the animal health field. WILMAH members unite to provide professional resources, development, opportunities and advocacy.  

 WILMAH began several years ago from discussions involving a few key female leaders sharing personal leadership journeys. It was from these open and honest discussions that the idea and need for an industry-wide organization began to develop. The name, WILMAH, was born along with a vision to ignite a culture of empowering current and future female leadership.

WILMAH took shape during a project planning meeting in Indianapolis, Indiana in September 2016 where attendees discussed the landscape, inspiration, values, priorities and future trajectory for the organization. Those participants and advisory board members resolved that WILMAH will function through a dynamic lens of trust, intention, engagement and innovation.

Name: VetFamily France
Description:
L'aventure VetFamily a démarré il y a près de 25 ans.
À l’origine, ce sont quelques vétérinaires voisins, installés au Danemark qui ont décidé de s’unir pour trouver des solutions ensemble avec cette conviction forte : « Seul on va vite, ensemble on va loin ! » Rapidement, un premier groupe de 10 cliniques s’est formé, puis 20, puis 30...

Aujourd’hui, plus de 950 cliniques en France et 7500 cliniques à l'international nous font confiance pour les accompagner dans leur développement, ce qui fait de VetFamily le premier réseau européen de cliniques vétérinaires indépendantes. Notre réseau est pluri-spécialités : canin, rural, équin. Cette pluralité des expertises donne une richesse incroyable que nous aimons partager. L’univers vétérinaire est en pleine mutation. Notre rôle est de vous accompagner au quotidien et vous préparer aux enjeux de demain.

Créer des liens, développer la confiance, dans une famille qui souhaite prendre soin de chacun. C’est ça, l’esprit VetFamily !

Name: American College of Veterinary Surgeons - ACVS
Description:
Founded in 1965, the American College of Veterinary Surgeons (ACVS) is the American Veterinary Medical Association specialty board which sets the standards for advanced professionalism in veterinary surgery. Following the 2024 certification examination, ACVS includes more than 2,500 Diplomates. Approximately 70 veterinarians earn their Diplomate credentials every year.  

More than 65 percent of ACVS Diplomates operate in private and specialty practices that accept cases on a referral basis from primary care practitioners. The remainder are primarily employed by academic institutions and industry where they teach, conduct research, practice in teaching hospitals, and participate in the development of new products and treatments which improve the quality of veterinary and human health care.  

For more information about ACVS, including its mission, history, and commitment to diversity, visit the ACVS website.

Name: Royal Pets Clinic
Description:

Our experts don't just use best practices; they create them. Our advanced care teams include oncologists, surgeons, and specialized veterinary professionals who are leaders in their fields. Whatever the situation, you can be confident that your pet is receiving the best possible care. You come to RPC when it matters the most.
Our critical and emergency care teams are trained and equipped to handle a wide range of emergencies, including traumatic injury, respiratory emergencies, shock, poisoning, and severe illness. We aim to create lasting change through our culture of caring and belonging campaign, real-world success stories that make way for progress, and scholarship and mentorship programs to bolster students at each step of their journey. In doing this, we hope to spark a movement that continues to grow in the veterinary industry.

We are united behind a greater purpose. We are action-oriented with specific goals and objectives. And we are ready to go to work.

For more information, visit our site our email us at info@diversifyetmed.org

OVER es una empresa argentina especializada en la síntesis, elaboración, comercialización y distribución de productos de alta calidad para uso en medicina veterinaria. 

Misión 
La aplicación de tecnología de avanzada y un excelente nivel profesional, impulsan a OVER en la búsqueda constante de innovación en medicina y producción veterinaria. Su misión es contribuir al bienestar de grandes, medianos y pequeños animales, y optimizar sistemas sanitarios y productivos mediante productos de alta calidad, que posibilitan una mayor y mejor provisión de alimentos para la población mundial.

Name: National Veterinary Care Ltd
Description:
NVC was acquired by VetPartners in April 2020.

VetPartners is a group of veterinary hospitals sharing knowledge and business systems to improve the comfort and well-being of pets. When you join VetPartners, your practice retains its heritage, brand and culture.  We want your clients and staff to experience the same great service they get today.  With clinics all over Australia, we believe that the vision for veterinary medicine should be cultivated at each clinic. If you're interested in "staying you" and removing some of the risk and burden of practice ownership, let's have a chat.

Name: PSIvet
Description:
PSIvet is a trusted advocate for independent veterinary practices with comprehensive, proprietary solutions that help its members save on pharmaceuticals and other animal health supplies, healthcare and other programs geared to strengthen their practices and assist them to make smarter business decisions.

Unlike traditional GPOs that provide limited support, and consulting firms and analytics providers that are expensive and time-consuming to engage and implement, PSIvet offers integrated services including a purchasing program, education, training, and technology solutions to deliver unmatched value, to help members successfully compete with corporate hospitals, big-box stores, and online retailers.

To learn more, visit www.psivet.com or call 888.275.6523

Name: Veterinary Purchasing Co. Ltd.
Description:
Veterinary Purchasing was formed in 1972 with the key, simple purpose of delivering products and supplies in a timely and economical manner to Ontario veterinarians.  We are a shareholder-owned company and our shares are owned by only licensed veterinarians who own an accredited facility in Ontario.  Currently, the operation is run out of a 145,000 sq. ft. warehouse, divided into 7 distinct zones that are organized by product groupings.  Picking, packing and shipment of pharmaceuticals, pet food, supplies, clinic supplies, and much more, is streamlined for efficient service via bar coded bin cards, terminals with bar code scanners, and an automated computerized conveyer system.  On our busiest days we ship approximately 1,200 orders and 11,200 pieces! 

Mission Statement: “We are dedicated to providing the highest level of service to our member clinics through the personal actions of people who care.”

Name: Equine Behavioural Sciences Institute (EBSI)
Description:
I'm Valentina, an Equine Behavioural Psychologist, and I have a huge love for horses and equine behaviour; the way horses behave and the reason behind their behaviour are my passion! 

Most importantly, my wish is to use this knowledge and passion in the managed environment in order to improve equine welfare through owner and practitioner empowerment - an empowered, knowledgeable owner is a responsible owner.

My aim through Equine Behavioural Sciences Institute (EBSI) is therefore to provide owners and practitioners with scientific, evidence-based information and training tools in order to ensure that equine welfare is promoted and protected at all times throughout the training and management process of horses, and that human safety is maintained while still gaining the desired performance outcomes from the horse.

A little bit about me...

I hold a degree in Animal Psychology and diplomas in Equine Science and Equine Psychology. I'm certified in Animal Behaviour specialising in horses and have completed various courses and certifications covering equine management, health, and behaviour. I'm a member of the International Society for Applied Ethology (ISAE), and the European Federation of Animal Science (EAAP), and have previously been a member of the International Society for Equitation Science (ISES).

Connecting with me...

Whilst I'm based in Serbia, the services on offer through EBSI are fully online so no matter where you are in the world, you are welcome to connect with me!

Name: Provet
Description:
Provet (formerly Provet Cloud) is a cloud-based, AI-enabled veterinary practice management system built to serve clinics and hospitals of all sizes, from independent practices to multi-site enterprise groups. Designed to reduce administrative burden and improve clinical efficiency, Provet includes a wide range of features that come together to save one hour, per person, per day in every veterinary practice.

New capabilities like Provet's Clinical AI offer a native AI scribe, intelligent patient summaries, and AI-generated patient discharge instructions, helping veterinary teams save time and focus more on patient care.

Provet is built for flexibility, allowing users to tailor the system with custom fields, role-based permissions, and workflow-specific configurations. Our open API and strong partner ecosystem make it one of the most interoperable platforms in the market today.

Trusted by practices across more than 45 countries, Provet is backed by a team of veterinary software specialists focused exclusively on this space. We’re committed to building long-term value for our customers by delivering intuitive tools, reliable performance, and continuous innovation.

Name: Vetadom - Veterinario a Domicilio & Supporto Vet
Description:
SERVIZI VETERINARI A DOMICILIO:
- Visite
- Emergenze
- Servizi Infermieristici
- Laserterapie
- Cattura Animali
- Eutanasie
- Sfratti e Atti Giudiziari
- Trasporto Animali

Name: Movement Referrals: Independent Veterinary Specialists
Description:
Movement Referrals is an independent, Specialist-led orthopaedic, neurology and neurosurgery referral service. We aim to be the referral service that vets would use for their own pets, based on our experience, expertise, efficiency, compassion and effective communication. 

Your confidence in us is borne out of our highest level of clinical qualifications, our extensive referral experience, and our track record in clinical research and education.

You can expect thorough, careful and caring communication throughout the referral process, from booking your appointment, through your consultation with the Specialist, to all aspects of your pet's treatment and aftercare.

www.movementvets.co.uk

Name: Adiveter
Description:
In 1999, four years after the birth of ADIVETER as a company, the European Union was already announcing, through the White Paper on Food Safety, a new and radical way of how to guarantee high standards of food safety. It put animal feed on a par with the same control standards as human food and proposed new control and supervisory methods in order to reach the targeted goal.

Over the years this objective has been implemented through new legislation to control manufacturing, quality standards, labelling, etc.

Adiveter, based the HACCP principles, faces the challenges present by its customers using the best products and the best dosing equipment in order to optimize results. Afterwards, once the control program has been implemented, we carry out an exhaustive testing in order to comply with the technical standards and legal requirements.

In Adiveter we have always innovated in all areas (chemical, controls, engineering, etc.) to guarantee our customers that we will always reach the targeted goal, both technically and economically.

Being leaders in the area of primary production chain of microbiological control, we now propose, under the same approach, new solutions in the area of chemical and nutritional control.

Name: AniCura Deutschland
Description:
AniCura ist ein europäischer, führender Verbund von Tierarztpraxen und Tierkliniken. AniCura wurde 2011 mit der Vorstellung gegründet, durch den Einsatz gemeinsamer Ressourcen über mehrere Tierkliniken und Tierarztpraxen hinweg, die tierärztliche Versorgung weiter verbessern zu können. 

Unsere medizinischen und chirurgischen Dienste beinhalten das volle Spektrum, von der Prävention und Grundversorgung bis hin zu moderner Diagnostik, Innerer Medizin, Intensivbetreuung, Chirurgie und Orthopädie sowie Reha-Maßnahmen, Krankengymnastik und Ernährungsberatung. 

AniCura behandelt in mehr als 500 Kliniken und Praxen in Europa, jedes Jahr rund 4,5 Millionen Patienten. Seit 2018 ist AniCura ein Teil von Mars Veterinary Health. Mars Veterinary Health umfasst ein Netzwerk von mehr als 3.000 Kliniken weltweit, die sich jedes Jahr um mehr als 25 Millionen Tiere kümmern. Gemeinsam können wir die höchsten Standards in der Tiermedizin bieten und unser gemeinsames Ziel erreichen: Eine BESSERE WELT FÜR TIERE.

Legal: https://www.mars.com/legal-germany
Privacy: https://www.mars.com/privacy-policy-germany

Name: VetDrive
Description:
VetDrive is a cloud based practice management software for veterinary clinics. We give our clients the ability to document their patients clinical and purchase histories efficiently and perform powerful data analytics. 
With our "on farm" app for our large animal vets, our desktop version for our small animal vets, and our full integration with QuickBooks accountancy package, we provide a complete practice management software for our veterinary clients.

Name: Conselho Regional de Medicina Veterinária do Estado de Minas Gerais
Description: O Conselho Regional de Medicina Veterinária do Estado de Minas Gerais (CRMV-MG) tem por finalidade orientar e fiscalizar o exercício das profissões de médico-veterinário e zootecnista, bem como servir de órgão de consulta dos governos da União, dos Estados e dos Municípios, em assuntos referentes ao exercício profissional, ao ensino, à pesquisa, à extensão, à produção animal, à defesa sanitária, à saúde pública e ao meio ambiente, assim como em matéria direta ou indiretamente relacionada com a indústria e o comércio de produtos veterinários, produtos de origem animal e seus derivados, no território do Estado de Minas Gerais.

Name: VETERINAIRES 2 TOUTE URGENCE
Description:
VETERINAIRES 2 TOUTE URGENCE
Aujourd'hui, ce sont 12 services d'urgences dans toute la France :  9 cliniques vétérinaires, le service d'urgence du CHV Onlyvet, le service d'urgence UCVET et le service d'urgence de la clinique Evolia.
Nos localisations : Paris, Rouen, Aix-en-Provence, Marseille, Toulon, Montpellier, Lyon, Rennes, L'Isle-Adam, Nîmes, Saint-Etienne, Clermont-Ferrand.
Nous offrons du temps libre et de la sérénité à nos consœurs et confrères en gérant leurs urgences toutes les nuits et les week-ends. C'est un véritable partenariat entre eux et nous.

Name: MWI Animal Health United Kingdom
Description: We were founded by vets, for vets. Our experience led us to create a comprehensive solution flexible enough to help any veterinary practice focus on what matters most: caring for animals. To do it, we brought together a best-in-class wholesale distributor (Centaur Services), a practice management software innovator (Vet Space), and two buying groups with relationships across the industry (St Francis Group and Vetswest). The result is MWI Animal Health.

Name: Lort Smith
Description:
Lort Smith, Australia’s largest not-for-profit animal hospital, has been an integral part of Melbourne’s compassionate community since 1936. As proud Melburnians, we understand the significance of a cohesive society which places a high value on the health, wellbeing, and safety of both our citizens and their beloved pets.

To help facilitate this our purpose is clear:
We believe pets and their people should be put before profits.

Our commitment to providing veterinary care to animals in need has not only helped shape the landscape of pet welfare in Melbourne, but also reinforced the bond that defines our great city. As a result, our not for profit Animal Hospital means that people with more, can help their fellow Melburnians who may be less fortunate. And bring people together over a shared love of their animals.

Lort Smith staff and volunteers strive every day to be the animal hospital all of Melbourne truly admires and is proud of.

Animal Hospital | Veterinary Clinic | Adoption Centre | Community Outreach

Name: Casper Pet Store
Description:
Somos una empresa familiar con gran experiencia y reconocimiento en el rubro de las mascotas.

Casper, un emprendimiento joven y dinámico conformado por dos hermanos, significa compromiso y confianza. Siempre con la intención de brindar la mejor atención y servicio, con base en la calidez y la personalización en el vínculo.

Actualmente disponemos de cinco sucursales ubicadas en barrios centrales de Capital Federal: Almagro, Palermo Norte, Palermo Sur, Palermo Hollywood y Barrio Norte/Recoleta.

Contamos con un staff que trabaja día a día con el compromiso de brindar un asesoramiento personalizado y eficiente para que disfrutes de una buena experiencia de compra.

Además ofrecemos los mejores precios y promociones para que puedas llevarte lo que necesites para tu mascota, y sino... te lo conseguimos!

En la post-venta contamos con el respaldo para cubrir con todas las necesidades y solucionar cualquier inconveniente después de la compra de cualquier producto.

Por todas estas razones, a la hora de buscar alimento, atención y servicio, no des más vueltas: vení a Casper Pet Store.
Location: Barrio Norte, Capital Federal, Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Segalab - Laboratório de Sanidade Animal e Segurança Alimentar
Description:
A Segalab é uma empresa que presta serviços laboratoriais, consultadoria técnica e formação. Focamos a nossa atividade na área da Saúde Animal, Análises Clínicas Veterinárias e Segurança Alimentar, tendo anos de experiência cimentada e reconhecida no setor do Leite e dos Laticínios.

O ativo mais importante da Segalab são os seus clientes, sendo a nossa razão, de ser a prestação de serviços que acrescentem valor na cadeia sua de produção.

A Segalab conta com uma equipa alargada e multidisciplinar, com diversos graus académicos (mestres, licenciados) onde se encontram médicos-veterinários, biólogos e engenheiros. Apostamos fortemente na formação contínua e na atualização permanente dos nossos quadros.

Porque a garantia da qualidade dos serviços que prestamos é essencial temos uma importante gama de ensaios acreditados.

Name: Village Vet
Description:
Village Vets is part of the Linnaeus Veterinary Ltd (A Mars Company). You can find our terms of use and privacy policy by visiting:  

Privacy statement - www.mars.com/privacy 
Legal notice - https://villagevet.co.uk/legal-notice
Contact Information - https://villagevet.co.uk/

Name: Stallen South Asia Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Stallen South Asia Private Limited is one of the leading Animal Health Companies in India since 1997. We offer wide range of Poultry and Cattle products.The products are manufactured in a modern well-equipped factory,which is complying to WHO-GMP Standard.  At the time of inception of the company it had a collaboration with Stallen  AG , Switzerland and thereafter the stake of Stallen AG has been taken over by FATRO S.P.A, Italy. who haave been working in Veterinary Medicine since 1947 with  guiding principle ''Animal health your Health''. 
To spread Stallen's products in every nook and corner of India, Stallen has about 20 dedicated sales offices across India,where in building long term direct relationship with the customers, achieve better price realization by avoids the distributor/retail margins and also helps in understanding their requirements.
Stallen's Veterinarians have traveled across India to explain it's products to the farmers and to help with their questions.

Name: Veterinary Instrumentation
Description:
For over three decades, Veterinary Instrumentation have been at the forefront of the animal healthcare community we proudly serve.

Founded by a pioneering vet, John Lapish, the wellbeing of animals and the advancement of the industry is our passion and mission. 

With a portfolio of over 5,000 products to select from, our dynamic and comprehensive range of Surgical and Orthopaedic Instrumentation, Joint Surgery and Fracture Fixation products, allow Practices and users to consolidate and drive value from their clinical service through one reputable source.  

The quality and efficacy of our products is demonstrated through 19,000 Vi products being implanted each year, giving you the ultimate peace of mind when adopting a Vi product.

Underpinning the above, is over 90 years of in-Practice experience through our dedicated team of Veterinary nurses, delivering a remote consultation and partnership approach to support you and your Practice.

Through constructive dialogue with animal healthcare professionals, our goal is to advance animal healthcare together.

Name: COVE Animal Health
Description:
COVE hospitals are built on decades of trusted care. Our network spans 24/7 multi-specialty and emergency centers, seamlessly connected to local hospitals delivering primary care, surgery, and dentistry. Backed by regional tertiary care hubs, every local location combines community roots with advanced medical support—bringing high-quality care closer to home.

Led by experienced, practicing veterinarians with personal connections to their regions, our teams don’t just operate hospitals—they grow them. Together, we’ve opened new locations, expanded existing ones, and built internship and residency programs that help train the next generation of veterinary professionals.

Name: GLOBALVET
Description: Somos una empresa peruana dedicada a la comercialización de productos relacionados con la salud y nutrición animal. Fundada en Julio del año 2007 con el objetivo de cubrir principalmente las necesidades del mercado avícola, ganadero y de mascotas.

Name: VeHiCe, Veterinary Histopathology Center Spa
Description: VeHiCe es el primer centro especialista en patología e histopatología multiespecie en Chile. Nuestro foco es la salud animal, entregando soluciones para la prevención y diagnósticos de enfermedades en las principales especies de producción, que incluyen peces, moluscos, crustáceos, aves, entre otros. Nuestro laboratorio cuenta con equipos de última generación que permiten el desarrollo y validación de técnicas histopatológicas de vanguardia. El equipo de trabajo está integrado por profesionales especializados y una red de asesores internacionales con títulos de maestría y doctorado.

Name: Mais Pet (+Pet)
Description:
A +Pet (Mais Pet) conta com soluções inovadoras para oferecer o melhor convênio para o seu animal de estimação. 

Nossos planos são divididos por idade: até 7 anos temos os planos LIGHT +PET, MAX +PET e TOP +PET. Acima de 8 anos, LIGHT SÊNIOR +PET, MAX SÊNIOR +PET.

Os planos não têm taxa de adesão e incluem a instalação gratuita de microchip de identificação no pet..

Name: Tecsa Laboratórios
Description: Tecsa is the largest veterinary laboratory in Brazil and the only accredited by MAPA (Brazi's USDA) in five veterinary segments. It has the most compreenhensive variety of exams in the country, several were developed by the company itself, highlighting its pioneering and constant search for innovation.

Name: Battilana Nutrición
Description:
Battilana Nutrición SAC inicia sus operaciones en el mercado pecuario del Perú en el año 1993.

Inicialmente, las actividades comerciales estuvieron orientadas a la importación y comercialización de sub-productos de soya boliviana. A mediados de 1998, después de realizar los ensayos de campo previos, se inició la comercialización de sustitutos lácteos para ganado lechero, cerdos y aves. Así marcamos el inicio de una trayectoria en brindar productos y servicios de calidad para la nutrición animal.

Actualmente tenemos distribuidores a nivel nacional que cuentan con el respaldo de un equipo humano profesional; capacitado para resolver cualquier problema nutricional dentro de la producción pecuaria.

Name: Coveto
Description: Société coopérative créée et détenue par des vétérinaires praticiens, Coveto est un des leaders de la distribution de médicaments, produits, matériels et services destinés aux vétérinaire en France.

Name: Elite Vet Clinic
Description:
We are the first veterinary clinic in Saudi Arabia equipped with the latest global technologies, and one of the fastest-growing veterinary healthcare groups redefining the client experience through advanced services and a truly human touch.

From Riyadh to our upcoming expansions in Jeddah, we move forward with a vision built on innovation, modern infrastructure, and a team that believes every animal deserves care that reaches both heart and science.

Name: Hospital Veterinario Privet
Description:
Un gran equipo de Veterinarios que han sido seleccionados por su extraordinario curriculum, su intachable trayectoria profesional, su dedicación y fundamentalmente por su amor y pasión por los animales. 

De este modo se ha conseguido formar un equipo multidisciplinar para el desarrollo y ejercicio de una medicina de la más alta calidad para todo tipo de animales.

Name: Pet First Veterinary Clinic
Description:
A new breed of veterinary clinic in Dubai with the promise to enhance the veterinary services in the region.

Our vision is to provide exemplary veterinary medicine and patient care driven by the love of pets.  By taking one health perspective, we believe that we can support lifelong health and wellness.  

At Pet First, we are fully committed to align promises with health. We will base our practice on compassionate veterinary care with a personal touch and are committed to help our patients to overcome all unseen health challenges whilst doing it with passion and professionalism. We pledge to be sympathetic, approachable and to improve everyone’s comfort and well-being by providing the most loving and convenient service for both patients and our clients.  We will faithfully and passionately believe in our capabilities of pushing the boundaries in veterinary medicine, putting all pets at the core of our mission, treating each one of them responsibly, respectfully and one at a time in an experienced, trustful and compassionate environment.

Name: PetSmart Veterinary Services
Description:
PetSmart Veterinary Services works on an ownership model that’s unlike anything else. It’s a simple but powerful solution that gives veterinarians control of their practice in a reduced time-frame with reduced startup costs. Additionally, PetSmart Veterinary Services helps with certain back-office support allowing veterinarians to focus more time on care, and less time on the day-to-day business operations. 

Once we hand you the key, you are the owner of your practice!

Name: The Veterinary Cooperative
Description: TVC was started by 4 veterinarians to level the playing field in pricing, marketing and business techniques for independent veterinary practices. Corporate clinics, big box stores, pharmacies, online providers and pet stores have the ability to leverage their purchasing power to procure goods and services at a lower cost. As an independent purchaser you cannot obtain the same pricing. TVC uses the collective purchasing power of the group to match the corporate buying power. TVC can obtain the best pricing for your independent veterinary business, making you competitive and more profitable.

Name: A
Description: Not a company

Name: Veterinary Poisons Information Service (VPIS)
Description:
The Veterinary Poisons Information Service (VPIS) is a 24-hour telephone emergency service providing information on the management of actual and suspected poisoning in animals. We provide direct support to veterinary professionals and the public.
Each poisoning case is directly handled by one of our trained veterinary information scientists. VPIS can provide advice on the effects of thousands of toxic substances in small animals, livestock, exotics, or wildlife.
For each enquiry VPIS will cover the risk assessment for that toxin and species, the anticipated clinical effects and the ideal treatment protocol with prognostic advice, in order to ensure that the veterinary professional is in the best position to provide optimum treatment.
Our advice is based on our case database of over 300,000 past cases and extensive resources obtained through research of published data. We constantly refine our advice to offer current best practice and ensure our veterinary information scientists are qualified and fully trained to handle your enquiry.
Members of the public or pet owners may contact us for a £35 (£45 out of hours) consultation fee on our Animal PoisonLine (01202 50 90 00). This is a triage service, which will let owners know if a trip to their vet is required. We are the first point of call for owners concerned that their pet may have been exposed to something that could potentially be poisonous. Owners will not be advised on specific treatment.

Name: Animal HealthLink
Description:
Animal HealthLink (AHL) provides remote triage, aka "TeleTriage" services for veterinary practices. Our expert team of RVTs has an average of 15 years of experience. We act as an extension of veterinary practices and provide professional, competent, and compassionate service to veterinary clients. AHL TeleTriage service is designed by and for veterinary professionals to integrate with primary care, emergency, and referral facilities. 

AHL helps on-call practices by a 75% reduction in after-hours phone calls. We also provide appropriate advice and reassurance to those clients during those stressful calls. We work hard to ensure veterinary teams are well-rested and set up for success for the true emergencies and are the best version of themselves during the day.

Our ER hospital services allow hospital staff to focus on the critical patient in front of them. Blending TeleTriage and in-person care revolutionizes ER workflow and redeploys critical staff to improve patient care and hospital efficiency. Integration of TeleTriage into ER workflows results in staff retention, improved hospital profitability, and most importantly - patient care.


We created AHL with the vision to improve the lives of veterinary professionals and the patients they serve.

Our mission is to give veterinary professionals the ability to focus on what they do best: taking care of the patient.

Name: Vet Sustain
Description:
Vet Sustain is the organisation dedicated to supporting veterinary professionals to drive change towards a more sustainable future.

The world is facing a multitude of complex and pressing challenges including climate change, biodiversity depletion and public health pandemics that present existential threats to human civilisation and the natural world. Veterinary professionals and members of the vet-led team occupy an extraordinary niche at the animal-human-environment interface, and deliver a wide range of sustainability services to society . These services include upholding animal welfare, reducing waste in food chains associated with livestock disease, supporting wildlife health and conservation, and reducing the risk of antimicrobial resistance to public health through responsible medicine use.

But as veterinary professionals and members of the vet-led team, we also hold an opportunity to use our skills as multi-disciplinary scientists and our position of trust in communities to leverage change towards a more sustainable future - for our own profession, for the sectors we influence, and for wider society. Vet Sustain believes the veterinary profession can assume a leadership role in addressing some of the most pressing sustainability issues of our time.

Name: Tecnoblock Nutrição Animal
Description:
A TECNOBLOCK NUTRIÇÃO ANIMAL é uma empresa brasileira com alta tecnologia italiana, especializada na produção e comercialização de suplementos sólidos em bloco específicos para bovinos criados a pasto.
A suplementação em bloco representa o futuro da suplementação a pasto. Nosso produtos são modernos, inovadores, tecnológicos e representam uma novidade no cenário da pecuária brasileira.
Location: Campo Grande, Mato Grosso do Sul

Name: The-Conceptors for Animal Health
Description:
We want to help your pet have optimal health and stay in shape every day.

The best products to help strengthen the animal’s health and prevent disease. Protect your pets from most risks and take care of their health so that they grow healthy, strong and happy.

Name: VetLine Recruitment
Description:
We are a Specialist Veterinary Recruitment Agency, situated in Leeds, West Yorkshire, focusing solely on the provision of permanent (and temporary) Veterinary Professionals across the United Kingdom.

We strive to be a reliable and trusted recruitment and certification provider. We redefine the candidate's experience through friendly professionalism, honesty and candid communication - our culture and methods drive superior business results.

Name: Animal Doctors International
Description:
We know how much your pets mean to you. And, like you, we want only the best for them. That’s why we’re dedicated to offering the highest standard of medical services for your furry friends.

We founded Animal Doctors International to fulfil the need for world-class veterinary services and preventative care in Southeast Asia. When it comes to pet healthcare, we hold ourselves to the same standards of excellence you’d find at the best animal hospitals around the world.

Your pets can’t tell us about their lives and their symptoms, which is why quality pet care starts with our veterinarians establishing a close partnership with the people who know them best. We take as long as you need to talk through your pet’s health because we know you need to feel confident about entrusting us with the health and wellbeing of a beloved family member.

Our veterinarians are experts in animal health and wellness, but you are the expert in your pet.

Name: Star Veterinary Clinic
Description:
Since day one, our mission has been to provide the highest standard of routine and emergency care, while creating an environment where pets feel safe and owners feel heard.

Our clinics are thoughtfully designed to reduce stress and make every visit as comfortable as possible for pets and their families. Transparency sits at the heart of everything we do. We clearly communicate treatment options, medical recommendations, and costs upfront, so you can make informed decisions with confidence.

As fellow animal lovers, we care for every pet that comes through our doors with the same attention, respect, and love we would give our own.

Name: Vetcare
Description:
Tetragon Chemie Pvt. Limited is popularly known as VETCARE.  VETCARE ranked  as "Number One"  Animal Health and Nutrition Company is celebrating its 25 years, has recorded a  turnover of Rs. 2080 million (42.91 million USD) by Manufacturing and Exporting Veterinary Pharmaceutical products.

VETCARE, as the name stands for Innovation, Customer Satisfaction and Technology Transfer in the farming community. VETCARE follows the tradition of Innovation and has several "firsts" in its milestones of growth for the last 25 years in Poultry, Small and large animals and Aquaculture. 

VETCARE has wide range of therapeutic and nutritional products for Poultry, large and small animals, aquaculture catering domestic and overseas market. It operates under four main divisions to meet the diverse needs of the veterinary and animal farming community i.e. Vetcare, Petcare, Aquacare, Equicare. 

With more than 450 employees, 5 plant locations, a Research Farm, Kennel, exports to over 20 countries and a broad spectrum of ideas, our achievements have been unique in the field of Animal Agriculture.    

Post Joining hands with PROVIMI, one of the giants in Animal Health and Nutrition, Vetcare introduced many products in Premix and Dairy specialties.  
  
TETRAGON CHEMIE PVT. LTD.

Name: DSAND Animal Nutrition Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
DSAND Animal Nutrition Pvt Ltd. is established in Mar, 2016 by Dr Sandeep Gupta Ph. D. (Animal Nutrition). DSAND has an automatic fully stainless steel batch mixing premix plant with 300-400 MT per month capacity in single shift under all standard quality parameters. DSAND is manufacturer of Poultry and Dairy Nutrition feed premixes and committed to introduce innovative premixes. It is a developing company to introduce efficient research based feed additives to livestock Industry. DSAND has introduced first time feed additives and premix to Livestock industry like new food grade cysteine protease enzyme in poultry industry and its patent has also been published in India, Milkease and Fatease in dairy Industry. All products, I have launched commercially in Market with good response. DSAND has also completed field trials of two new innovative products and launched in market Growease poultry (hydrolysed protein based) and Bio emulsifier.
For more details and product offering visit the website.

Name: Nova Vet Family
Description: Headquartered in Dubai, Nova Vet Family is your clinic's partner that delivers advanced clinical tools, business support, and continuing education—so you can stay efficient while preserving your unique edge. We integrate cutting-edge tech with regional demands, ensuring the right solutions are implemented with maximum efficiency.

Name: HallMark Veterinary & Compliance Services
Description:
Our Story
Since 2002, HallMark Veterinary & Compliance Services has been a cornerstone in the UK Agrifood Sector. Our journey, marked by innovation and adaptability, has been committed to delivering superior resourcing solutions throughout the UK, catering to both governmental and private sectors. Our steadfast dedication to quality and efficiency has solidified our status as a frontrunner in food and farming compliance, spanning both regulatory and commercial domains.
Our Expertise
HallMark stands out for its comprehensive range of services pivotal to the Food and Farming Industry. Our expertise spans Veterinary Public Health, Animal Health, Animal Welfare, Veterinary Export Health Certification, Specialist Resource Provision, Portal Official Veterinarian Import Control, Agricultural Inspections, Disease Surveillance and National Surveys and Research. Our skilled team, comprising expert veterinarians and technicians, excels in managing large-scale operations, upholding the highest standards of compliance and quality.
Our Clients
We proudly serve an extensive and prestigious client base, including the Department for Environment, Food & Rural Affairs (Defra), the Animal Plant Health Agency (APHA), the Rural Payments Agency (RPA), the Food Standards Agency (FSA), Food Standards Scotland (FSS), Natural England (NE), DAERA, the Agriculture & Horticulture Development Board (AHDB), Scotland’s Rural College (SRUC), various laboratories, and numerous UK Port Health Authorities (PHA)/Border Control Posts (BCPs). Our services extend to exporters of Products of Animal Origin (POAO), laboratories, Port Health Authorities, and Councils across the UK, reinforcing our position as a trusted partner in the Agrifood sector.

Name: Colegio Médico Veterinario de Chile
Description:
Somos el Colegio Médico Veterinario de Chile. Somos la organización que reúne a las y los médicos veterinarios con el objeto de promover una sola salud, integrando la salud animal con la humana y ambiental, velando por los intereses de nuestros colegiados y promoviendo la formación, educación y posicionamiento de nuestras temáticas.

UNA SOLA SALUD
Porque creemos que la salud es un ecosistema, cómo médicos veterinarios trabajamos para aportar a una mejor calidad de vida desde una integración positiva entre animales, personas y medio ambiente.

Velamos por los valores, prerrogativas y prestigio de la profesión de Médico Veterinario y defendemos los intereses de nuestras y nuestros colegiados.

Nuestros Pilares
El desarrollo de nuestros profesionales y de la medicina veterinaria, son ejes fundamentales del Colegio Médico Veterinario de Chile, estableciendo acciones concretar para representar al gremio en torno a nuestras demandas, fomentar el conocimiento de nuestras socias y socios y de la comunidad, e incidiendo en políticas públicas bajo el enfoque de Una Salud.

Name: myVETgroup
Description:
myVETgroup (MVG) is a deal advisory firm with decades of experience in the corporate worlds of private equity, investment banking and veterinary operations in both Western Europe and North America. Our focus is to accurately and honestly advise you on transitioning your practice while maximizing the value. With MVG’s expertise, you can avoid common mistakes, and keep your focus where it belongs – on your patients!

The best part of success and hard work is having the opportunity to enjoy it. With over $2B in transactional experience, our industry knowledge will ultimately help every veterinary practice to earn and achieve what you value most.

Name: AWAT
Description:
Global Reach, Trusted Quality

AWAT is a leading provider of veterinary pharmaceuticals, vaccines, feed additives, and animal health solutions, serving the Middle East and East Africa. With branches in Saudi Arabia, UAE, Qatar, Oman, and East Africa, we bring world-class veterinary solutions to farmers, veterinarians, and animal health professionals.

Name: Humane Animal Rescue of Pittsburgh
Description: Humane Animal Rescue of Pittsburgh (HARP) is one of Pennsylvania’s largest non-profit organizations dedicated to the welfare of animals, pet owners and the community. With our two domestic animal shelters and fully licensed Wildlife Rehabilitation Center, HARP is a trusted and caring resource helping more than 25,000 animals each year through our adoption programs, veterinary medical centers, care for injured or orphaned native Pennsylvania wildlife, pet food distribution and community engagement activities.  Our open door policy ensures that no animal is ever refused shelter.

Name: Carthage Veterinary Service, LTD
Description: For over 40 years, Carthage Veterinary Service has been a trusted choice for producers who value science based solutions and service. We believe in keeping things real — as in practical, farm based decision-making aligned with your operation’s goals. As experts in swine health and production, we understand that it takes more than just keeping pigs healthy to be competitive in today’s pork industry. That’s why we offer a comprehensive suite of services to meet our producers’ needs. From the latest in health, nutrition, diagnostics and more, we only recommend what propels your success.

Name: EquiCord
Description:
EquiCord is a multidisciplinary company formed by veterinarians, researchers and engineers dedicated to the research & development, manufacturing and commercialization of Stem Cell based medicines for animals.

In 2019, we obtained the European Marketing Authorization of the fisrt and unique pure Mesenchymal Stem Cell veterinary medicine worldwide: HorStem.

Recently , we submitted for centralized MA, DogStem, the first Stem Cell based medicine for the treatment of pain and lameness in canine OA.

EquiCord's mission is to develop afforable, innovative, highly effective, safe  and regenerative advanced therapies medicines available to all the animals worldwide.

Our regulatory department is preparing the expansion of HorStem and DogStem to the USA, Middle East, Asia and Latin America. We offer our services on a global basis with maximum efficiency and quality standards.

Name: Burgess Diagnostics Ltd
Description:
Burgess Diagnostics is the UK’s leading provider of advanced, mobile imaging services exclusively for the veterinary sector. We deliver a flexible, cost-effective, and high-quality MRI and CT scanning service to practices across the UK and Ireland. Our mission is to make the latest advanced imaging tools both accessible and cost-effective for veterinary professionals to add to their range of client services.

Our onboard imaging teams consist of veterinary-trained radiographers and imaging specialists with a wealth of experience and expertise in all aspects of MRI and CT. 

With the Burgess Diagnostics Mobile Imaging Service, you can: 
 
1. Offer your clients a more comprehensive service and the best possible patient care
2. Keep more cases in-house
3. Boost your practice income without a large financial outlay
4. Develop your in-house team’s imaging skills

If you’re interested in discussing how MRI and/or CT scanning could help you and your practice team please get in touch on 0845 3714012 or email enquiries@burgessdiagnostics.com. 

Follow our company page for all the latest news on our mobile imaging services.

Name: AzurVet
Description:
AzurVet est un Centre de Vétérinaires Spécialistes situé dans la région de Nice dans les Alpes-Maritimes. Notre équipe comprend 25 Docteur Vétérinaires, 25 ASV et 2 personnels administratifs. Nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec les cliniques vétérinaires du sud est de la France (activité référée). 
AzurVet comprend 6 services spécialisés (Cardiologie - Chirurgie - Dentisterie - Imagerie - Médecine Interne - Neurologie - Laboratoire AzurVet-Lab). L'objectif est de fournir un service médical de pointe dans des domaines spécialisés de la médecine vétérinaire.

Tous les vétérinaires d'AzurVet sont des spécialistes européens diplômés d'un collège ou anciens résidents d'un collège :  
Dr Hervé BRISSOT, DipECVS, spécialiste en chirurgie

Dr Julien FRITZ, DipECVDI, spécialiste en imagerie médicale
Dr Delphine RAULT, DipECVDI, spécialiste en imagerie médicale

Name: Animalaria
Description:
Animalaria, Formación y Gestión S.L. fue fundada en 2006 por Responsables de la Salud y el Bienestar Animal de varias Universidades españolas y nuestro objetivo es la salvaguarda del bienestar de los animales mediante:

I+D+i en Alternativas a la investigación y docencia con animales.

Cursos de formación en Experimentación Animal (RD 53/2013).

Diseño de Animalarios / Estabularios. 

Asesoría Veterinaria en salud y bienestar animal.

Animalaria está registrada en ETPLAS, la Plataforma para la Educación y la Formación para la Ciencia del Animal de Laboratorio www.etplas.eu.

ETPLAS se ha creado para servir como punto central de información sobre la educación y formación en la Ciencia del Animal de Laboratorio y depende de sus contactos y agentes sociales para el intercambio de información. Los contactos de ETPLAS incluyen los proveedores de cursos, los representantes de los organismos que aprueban o acreditan los mismos y las autoridades de los Estados Miembros de la Unión Europea.

Del mismo modo Animalaria se ha adherido al Acuerdo de Transparencia sobre el Uso de Animales en Experimentación Científica promovido por la COSCE, SECAL y EARA (PDF) con una firme apuesta por la experimentación animal responsable y por el respeto a la legislación vigente y al bienestar animal, sin renunciar a los beneficios ciertos que esta experimentacion animal puede ofrecer al progreso de la ciencia.

Animalaria tiene un convenio con la Sociedad Española para las Ciencias del Animal de Laboratorio (SECAL) www.secal.es para la realización de los cursos de experimentación animal.

Nuestros servicios se dirigen a Investigadores, Técnicos y Cuidadores relacionados con los animales de laboratorio además de a los centros de investigación y a las empresas de ingeniería y arquitectura.

Name: Hilltop Bio
Description: TARGETED THERAPIES FOR EVERYDAY USE:  Hilltop Bio products are room-temperature stable, practical, and ready-to-go purified therapies containing specific levels of selected regenerative components like extracellular vesicles, exosomes, growth factors, cytokines and microRNA that studies have shown to be effective at minimizing inflammation and promoting  healing.

Name: Humanea Vétérinaire
Description:

Nos vétérinaires spécialistes offrent leur expertise avec un accompagnement bienveillant, en collaboration des vétérinaires traitants. Notre mission : garantir un parcours de soin fluide, transparent et adapté aux besoins de chaque animal.

Name: PetsFirst
Description: PetsFirst Veterinary Clinics provide high quality care for Pet animals in a caring and transparent manner. We stand for quality, transparency and convenience. Our team of caring vets makes sure that your furry friends are back to health as quickly as possible while keeping the overall cost of pet care affordable. We also have a team of veterinarians that provides at-home healthcare services to minimize stress for furries who prefer to be treated at home.

Name: Ontario Association of Veterinary Technicians
Description:
The OAVT is a professional association with the following objectives: 
- To promote, maintain and regulate the professional standards of veterinary technicians and veterinary technologists. 
- To promote and further the education of veterinary technicians and veterinary technologists. 
- To sponsor, encourage and promote liaison with other individuals, associations and groups engaged in similar or related fields of activity. 
- To promote the interests of the Association. 
- To promote humane medical care of all animals.

Description:
The Singapore Veterinary Association is the professional society representing the interests of veterinary surgeons & the veterinary community in Singapore.

The objectives of the SVA are to:

 - support, protect and foster the character, status, interests, honour and dignity of the veterinary profession

Name: LABORATÓRIO MICROSULES DO BRASIL
Description:

Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Intermountain Pet Hospital
Description:
Great or small, each and every animal deserves personalized care and consideration. This core belief has been the foundation of Intermountain Pet Hospital's practice since we opened our doors more than 30 years ago. Pet owners in Meridian, Boise, and Middleton ID have seen the benefits of our staff's skill and dedication--that's how we've stayed in business for so long.

Over the years, we've worked hard to stay on the cutting edge of veterinary medicine. We moved into our fully renovated facilities in 2003 and have continued to invest in the latest and best equipment. This allows us to offer top-notch preventative, diagnostic and treatment services to our clients and their beloved pets.

Name: Clinique Vétérinaire Boulogne Roland-Garros
Description:
La clinique vétérinaire Boulogne Roland-Garros assure une prise en charge globale de la santé et du bien-être de vos animaux, 7j/7, 24h/24. 

- Une équipe multidisciplinaire et des vétérinaires spécialisés qui travaillent en synergie pour garantir des soins adaptés à chaque animal : consultations de médecine générale et interne, imagerie, chirurgie, hospitalisations et urgences
- Un plateau technique de pointe avec des équipements dernière génération pour un diagnostic précis et rapide (radiographie, scanner, laser thérapie, laboratoire d'analyses complet…)
- Un service de cardiologie : consultations spécialisées, échographies cardiaques, chirurgie cardiaque, holter, électrocardiogramme
- Un service de gastro-entérologie : consultations spécialisées, échographies abdominales, endoscopie / fibroscopie
- Un service de neurologie : consultations spécialisées, scanner / myéloscanner, ponction de LCR, neurochiurgie
- Un service dédié aux nouveaux animaux de compagnie (NAC)
- Des experts en nutrition, en ostéopathie et un centre de physiothérapie (médecine préventive, rééducation,…)
- Des infrastructures modernes et 3 chenils pour accueillir confortablement vos animaux

Name: Avecer
Description:
Nuestro objetivo es mejorar su negocio mediante la entrega de soluciones efectivas basadas en tecnologías innovadoras y de avanzada.

Nuestro trabajo se orienta al aumento de la productividad, gracias a una mejor salud, en su granja o criadero.

Name: Solâme
Description:
Et si la fin de vie de votre animal devenait un moment de respect et de douceur ?

Chez Solâme, nous accompagnons la fin de la vie des animaux, avec un objectif : offrir une expérience empreinte de bienveillance et de sérénité, pour les animaux comme pour leurs familles.

 Notre mission :
→ Apporter un soutien humain et professionnel lors des moments difficiles.
→ Pratiquer des euthanasies douces et empreintes de dignité
→ Accompagner le deuil animalier.
→ Sensibiliser et former les professionnels sur l’accompagnement de la fin de vie animale.

Sur notre page Solâme, retrouvez :
→ Des conseils pour accompagner nos animaux vieillissants et en fin de vie et pour vivre ces instants avec apaisement.
→ Des ressources pour mieux comprendre et vivre le deuil animalier.
→ Des actualités et outils pour les vétérinaires et ASV.

 Envie d’aller plus loin ?
Inscrivez-vous à nos newsletters et découvrez des contenus approfondis sur ces sujets si importants.

Parce que la fin de vie mérite autant de soin que le début, nous sommes là pour vous accompagner à chaque étape. 

Rejoignez-nous pour honorer nos compagnons avec respect et amour.

Name: Indian Herbs Specialities Pvt Ltd
Description:
In the middle of a dark dense forest, one man saw a light of hope. That great man, Shri Ram Lal Agrawal was inspired by a thought published in an eminent Journal on practical medicine THE PRACTITIONER, December, 1950, that :-

"The lore of the countryman is built upon the experience of generations
- often of centuries - and the data upon which it is based have often been
obtained at a price in human lives which no modern research
worker would ever dream of considering. It is particularly appropriate
at the present moment, when the pharmaceutical companies of the
world are emitting an unceasing flow of new synthetic drugs,
that attention should be turned to the possible remedies that may be
found among indigenous herbs of this and other countries",


Inspired by this, we have investigated what our ancestors did 6, 000 years ago, searched, researched, scientifically developed, pharmacologically tested and clinically evaluated the herbal products on modern scientific lines using the latest technology.
  
Indian Herbs Specialities Pvt Ltd PVT. LTD. was established to harness the rich treasure of herbs for developing and producing Ayurmed Specialities (Herbal Medicines) with the aim of 'Bridging The Gaps In Modern Medicine'.

Today Indian Herbs is a market leader in Herbal Veterinary Products with an ORG ranking of number 4 in Total Veterinary Market, successfully competing with multinational companies. Most of the Indian Herbs' products are Brand leaders in their respective therapeutic segments.

Indian Herbs Specialities Pvt Ltd brings into the Indian Pharmaceutical Industry a range of unique Ayurmed Specialities, based on original research of many years. These products have assured performance in terms of efficacy, reliability and safety.

Name: Vetnio (YC W25)
Description: Our goal is simple: to streamline admin work so that vets can focus on what matters most - providing the best care possible for animals.

Name: CEVE Empresarios Veterinarios
Description:
CEVE es la Confederación Empresarial Veterinaria Española.

Somos la patronal del sector de centros sanitarios veterinarios y la única organización veterinaria española configurada legalmente como interlocutor social.

Unido a ello, CEVE tiene representatividad reconocida, lo que implica ser un interlocutor válido y tener voz en iniciativas políticas, así como acceso a las leyes recientes y previstas en el futuro, para proponer los cambios necesarios en las regulaciones que nos afecten. Además, tenemos el apoyo constante de las confederaciones empresariales nacionales.

Estamos en disposición y capacidad de convocar a la administración para regularizar aquellos aspectos que nos afectan, – mediante normativas de obligado cumplimiento – y ser interlocutores en el Convenio Colectivo del Sector.

En este sentido, nos posicionamos como defensores de nuestros intereses empresariales.

Ocupar este espacio significa haber logrado el reconocimiento de la profesión por los diferentes actores sociales, institucionales y políticos y así, trabajar para potenciar el aumento del mercado veterinario, explorando nuevas posibilidades de negocio para crear empleo de calidad.

Si tienes un centro sanitario veterinario, eres empresario.

Name: LabianaPets
Description: LabianaPets es marca del GRUPO LABIANA dedicada al sector de los animales de compañía. Nuestra principal misión es proporcionar soluciones preventivas y terapéuticas eficaces poniendo el foco en la clínica veterinaria.

Name: GRIF - Groupe de Réflexion et d'Intérêt Félin
Vedis | Answers you can trust
Description:
Dedicated to promoting animal health through expert veterinary pathology services. We play a crucial role in supporting vets, researchers and pet owners in diagnosing and understanding diseases in a one-health approach. Our team of experienced veterinary pathologists and laboratory technicians are specialised in a wide range of diagnostic services, providing accurate diagnoses and timely results. 

Why Choose Vedis?  
Accurate Diagnoses: We leverage state-of-the-art technology and a meticulous approach to ensure the highest level of accuracy in our diagnostic services. • Innovation: We stay at the forefront of veterinary diagnostics, continuously updating our methodologies and reporting guidelines, as well as expanding our offerings. • Quality Assurance: Under the supervision of a Diplomate Pathologist, we adhere to the highest standards, ensuring correct and reliable results.

Name: agv salud animal - Laboratorio Veterinario
Description: Somos un laboratorio Veterinario dedicados a la venta de medicamentos para pequeños y grandes animales, llevamos 38 años en el mercado siempre trabajando de la mano de grandes personas profesionales.

Name: International Institute of Veterinary Education & Research
Description: IIVER is recognized by the Govt. of India as a private veterinary education institution in the state of Haryana. We are affiliated with Lala Lajpat Rai University, Hisar and offer undergraduate veterinary education through Bachelor's of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & A.H.) and Veterinary Livestock Development Diploma (VLDD).

Name: The Animal Foundation
Description:
The Animal Foundation is a non-profit organization operating Nevada’s largest animal shelter (Lied Animal Shelter) and animal adoption center. 

We envision a humane and compassionate community for all animals. Our mission is to save the lives of all healthy and treatable animals in the Las Vegas valley.

Founded in 1978 as a small low-cost spay and neuter clinic, The Animal Foundation quickly picked up speed and soon after opening its doors, began offering adoption services. Over the years, growth has been a constant. Today, The Animal Foundation operates and manages an 8 acre Las Vegas campus that houses a multitude of services and provides a refuge for the more than 35,000 homeless, lost, neglected, unwanted and abused animals received each and every year.

Name: VAKA (Veteriner Araştırma Kariyer Akademisi)
Description:
VAKA KİMDİR?
Selçuk Üniversitesi Veteriner Fakültesi bünyesinde kurulmuş bir topluluk olan VAKA; veteriner fakültesi öğrencilerinin veteriner hekimlik meslek bilincine katkıda bulunmak ve mesleğimizin getirdiği gelişmeleri ilk elden takip etmelerini sağlamak amacıyla mesleğimizde uzman kişiler tarafından hazırlanmış sempozyumlar, seminerler, kongreler ve mesleğimizle ilgili kültürel alanda faaliyette bulunan bir topluluktur.

AMACIMIZ VE HEDEFLERİMİZ?
Mesleki açıdan yetkin bireylerin gelişmesi için kısa veya uzun süreli , teori ve uygulamaya dayalı her türlü eğitim faaliyetlerini planlamak , koordine ederek yürütmek ve araştırma geliştirme faaliyetlerinde bulunmaktır.

Name: PLANTAXION.sarl
Description:
Plantaxion-Biodevas Laboratoires, spécialisée dans des solutions naturelles, agit pour une agriculture plus saine et plus productive. Forte de sa solide base R&D, l’entreprise aide les professionnels à faire face aux défis auxquels ils sont confrontés.
- Apporter des solutions innovantes au monde agricole.
- Contribuer à la réduction des intrants chimiques en production animale et en production végétale.
- Faciliter la transition du secteur agricole vers une agriculture écologiquement performante.
- Respecter la santé animale et végétale sans oublier la santé humaine.

La technologie développée par le laboratoire repose sur la GESTION DU STRESS OXYDATIF généré par les agressions envers les êtres vivants. La maîtrise précoce de ce stress oxydatif, par la stimulation des défenses naturelles des animaux, empêche les pathologies de passer d’un état sub-clinique à un état clinique.

Name: ANTECH Germany
Description:
Als weltweite Spitzenreiter in der veterinärmedizinischen Diagnostik, Technologie und Bildgebung arbeitet ANTECH täglich mit Tausenden von Tiermedizinern zusammen, um akkurate Ergebnisse für die Gesundheit von Tieren zu bieten. Unser umfassendes Diagnostikportfolio schafft das Vertrauen, das Tierärzte benötigen, um Tag für Tag bessere Diagnosen zu treffen. Wir machen es schneller und einfacher, Krankheiten zu diagnostizieren und zu überwachen, wenn unsere Partner und deren Patienten es am meisten benötigen. Denn akkurate Diagnoselösungen führen zur optimalen Gesundheit. ANTECH ist stolz darauf, Teil von Mars Petcare zu sein, einem vielfältigen Unternehmen, das einem einzigen Ziel gewidmet ist: A BETTER WORLD FOR PETS. 

Wenn Sie unsere Website besuchen, werden Ihre personenbezogenen Daten gemäß unserer Datenschutzerklärung wie folgt behandelt: https://www.mars.com/privacy-policy-german und https://www.mars.com/legal-germany

Name: Pharmsure International Ltd
Description: Pharmsure International Ltd is a niche pharmaceutical company specialised in the development, marketing and distribution of poultry vaccines and medicines across all of Europe. Operating from premises within the UK and Ireland with field support staff based on the European mainland, Pharmsure International distributes its range of products through a network of poultry specialist distributors across the continent.

Laboratório de Patologia Veterinária, referência na Serra Gaúcha.

Estamos a sua disposição para que seu animalzinho receba o melhor em diagnósticos.
Location: Caxias do Sul, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: ProVéto Junior Conseil
Description:
Association à but non lucratif  régie par la loi de 1901, ProVéto Junior Conseil met en relation les entreprises ayant des besoins uniques et étudiants vétérinaires qui réalisent les missions relevant de leurs domaines de compétences. 
Nos compétences en tant que futurs vétérinaires sont variées : connaissances scientifiques solides, capacité de diagnostic et d'adaptabilité et qualités relationnelles... Le principal objectif de la Junior est de mettre à profit ces atouts dans le monde de l'entreprise et d'ajouter une plus-value à notre formation.
Affiliée à la CNJE (Confédération Nationale des Juniors Entreprises) depuis 2015, notre structure est constamment suivie via des échanges téléphoniques mensuels ainsi que des audits semestriels assurant une qualité optimale de nos services.

ProVéto jouit enfin du soutien d'un comité d'experts vétérinaires, d'un appui de professeurs reconnus ainsi qu'un accès aux laboratoires et aux différentes cliniques de l'Ecole.

Pour plus d'infos, rendez-vous sur https://proveto.net.

 As a non-profit association governed by the law of 1901, ProVéto Junior Conseil connects companies with unique needs and veterinary students who carry out missions in their fields of expertise. 
Our skills as future veterinarians are varied: solid scientific knowledge, diagnostic capacity, adaptability and interpersonal skills... The main objective of the Junior is using these assets in the business world and adding  value to our training.
Affiliated to the CNJE (National confederation for young enterprise) since 2015, our structure is constantly monitored through monthly phone exchanges as well as annual audit ensuring an optimal quality of our services.

ProVéto also benefits from the support of a committee of veterinary experts, the mentoring of recognized professors as well as the access to the laboratories and various clinics of the school.

For more information, visit https://proveto.net.

Name: Association of Veterinary Technician Educators (AVTE)
Description: AVTE promotes quality education for Vet Techs through the lens of "One Community" - collaboration to create a sustainable framework for growth and innovation in education, strengthening students, faculty, programs, and the care delivery system we serve.

Name: Yeniçağ Veteriner Ecza
Description: As Yeniçağ Veterinary Supply, we bring together the products processed with scientific background with veterinarians.

Name: Deepet Pharma
Description:
A Deepet Pharma é uma empresa especializada em produtos e serviços farmacêuticos para o setor veterinário.

Name: ESAVS
Description:
ESAVS courses consist of lectures, practicals and wetlabs. They are taught by internationally recognized specialists with excellent didactic skills. Participants receive a certificate of attendance on completion of the course. During the courses, the students mutually benefit from interaction with other veterinarians of different geographical and professional backgrounds. A great opportunity to broaden their horizon in small animal veterinary medicine.


The European School for Advanced Veterinary Studies (ESAVS) is a non for profit organization registered in Luxembourg. ESAVS is dedicated to the advancement of veterinary medicine for companion animals. ESAVS was founded in 1991 as a project in the frame of the European Union‘s COMETT II and LEONARDO DA VINCI programs. It is affiliated with the Faculty of Science, Technology and Medicine at the University of Luxembourg and a member of FEDE (an international association of ca. 500 private schools of higher education, which holds participatory status in the council of the European Union). The ESAVS has an outstanding faculty with over 400 veterinary lecturers from over 20 countries. All are certified specialists with excellent didactic skills. ESAVS offers continuing education based on residential courses in various European locations and distance learning. The ESAVS is a leading international continuing education organization in clinical veterinary medicine for companion animals. It has over 30 years of experience. More than 650 residential courses in 21 clinical disciplines have been organized for over 15.000 participants from 51 countries. ESAVS courses and study programs inspired many to continue their professional development becoming diplomates of European and American specialist colleges and lecturers at universities.

ANECA brings together professionals in poultry science for their professional development by disseminating current knowledge, and thereby supporting the productivity and development of the Poultry Industry.

VISION

To be an avant-garde Association that associates and represents all the associations and professionals in the country, that freely disseminates knowledge and exercises strong leadership in the field, where the member and union member have a deep pride in participating and belonging to our Association .

Name: Vet Space Ireland
Description:
Vet Space Ireland is an online and, in person veterinary media and events organisation. At VSI we are committed to keeping you up to date with all that’s current and new in veterinary, in Ireland.

ENTERTAIN
At Vet Space Ireland, we understand that all veterinary professionals work in a busy and at times mentally, physically and emotionally challenging environment. As such, we want to do our little bit to try to lighten your day. The Vet Space podcast will discuss all the weird, wonderful and sometimes bizarre antics that go on in veterinary life. Our hope is simply to bring a smile to your face.

INFORM
Along the way we will be talking to experts in their particular field in veterinary. Asking them how they achieved success, their top tips and how they manage their work life balance and maintain wellbeing. Also keep an eye out for Vet Space Ireland educational events.

ENGAGE
Vet Space Ireland is intended to be a platform for all veterinary professionals to engage in a constructive and supporting way. The Vet Space Podcast will help you keep up to date with all that’s current and new in the industry. Engage and entertain also go hand in hand so stay tuned for Vet Space Ireland’s social events.

INSPIRE
“means to excite, encourage, or breathe life into”. 

Mental health and wellbeing is something both Hazell and Michelle are very passion about. Vet Space Ireland’s main aim is to help inspire all veterinary professional’s to be their best, enjoy their work and most importantly look after themselves. Sometimes it really is the little things that help get you through the day. Vet Space wants to ensure that positive wellbeing is achievable for everyone, to advocate for appropriate and necessary work life balance and to offer support where we can.

Name: VET VENUE
Description:
Welcome to Vet Venue. 

Vet Venue is a premier private Veterinary Clinic located in Dhaka, Bangladesh, dedicated to delivering top-notch animal healthcare services. Our esteemed team comprises highly qualified Veterinary Doctors with stellar academic achievements, committed to providing exceptional clinical care to our patients. Since our inception in 2021, we have extended our reach through online platforms and, in response to overwhelmingly positive feedback, commenced physical clinical operations in 2022.

At Vet Venue, our vision revolves around ensuring comprehensive animal healthcare, and we go beyond commercial interests. Our commitment extends to the welfare of street animals through ongoing field campaigns, delivering vital healthcare facilities where they are needed most. Collaborating with leading animal drug manufacturers, we ensure the availability of a wide range of drugs for various animal diseases. Additionally, Vet Venue has established partnerships with international brands, facilitating access to cutting-edge disease testing kits and essential food supplements.

Our extensive array of services includes Animal Healthcare Consultancy, General Surgery, Medicine Prescription, Grooming, Vaccination and Pet Accessories. Vet Venue stands as a beacon in the realm of veterinary care, driven by a passion for the well-being of animals and a commitment to excellence. Join us on this journey, where compassion meets expertise, and together, let's create a world where every animal receives the care it deserves.

#VetVenue #AnimalHealthcare #VeterinaryExcellence

Name: BVS Vets
Description:
About Us

We are the leading veterinary careers advisory service in the UK and our goal is to provide a full range of veterinary services to the UK industry and offer impartial advice and careers opportunities for Vets and Nurses of all experience levels.

In the recruitment field we have some of the best professionals in the industry who know the veterinary market inside out. We have preferred suppliers status with all of the corporate organisations and due to our sensible pricing structure we work closely with the majority of private practices in the UK.

We work with nearly all of the leading organisations including Battersea Dogs & Cats Home, the PDSA, IVC, CVS, Medivet, Vets4pets and the majority of private practices and groups across the UK.

For locum staff we offer a fully managed payroll service and all locums will receive cleared funds within 7 days of submitting a time sheet and we are happy to advise on the most suitable means of payment for your individual circumstances (umbrella, limited, self-employed etc)

We are currently speaking with Universities and Nursing Colleges all across the UK and offering impartial careers advice and help to prepare the young vets and nurses for working life.

Additionally we have a dedicated non-clinical team who have a huge selection of industry and non-clinical roles to chose from.

We are sponsors of the CPD events this year for the BVNA and our Director Scott Ashcroft is a member of the marketing team for the Cheetah Conservation Fund UK (CCF).

If you would like to speak with a member of our team then email info@bvsvets.co.uk and we will reply promptly and in confidence.

If you would like to book us to speak at a University or College then email scotta@bvsvets.co.uk

For help and advice with locum work then email locums@bvsvets.co.uk

www.bvsvets.co.uk

The AVBA's charter is to be the hub for veterinary business management and out members share the vision of: OUTSTANDING VETERINARY BUSINESS SUCCESS.
