Name: Hospital Veterinário LeVet
Description:
A paixão do Dr. Luiz Felipe Ximenes Cibin pelos animais, seu extenso currículo e qualificação em medicina veterinária e a impecável gestão administrativa da sua esposa, Eveline Cibin, sócios proprietários, tornam o Hospital Veterinário LeVet num modelo em Curitiba. Desde 2013 praticam um novo conceito em saúde animal, priorizando a prevenção através de uma equipe altamente qualificada, contínuos investimentos em inovação, tecnologia e infraestrutura para proporcionar maior qualidade de vida aos seus pacientes.

Ética, respeito e confiança são os princípios do LeVet, que tem como propósito, prevenir, diagnosticar e tratar com respeito as enfermidades que acometem os animais domésticos.

Referência no setor, conta com uma equipe multidisciplinar em cardiologia, ortopedia, endocrinologia, anestesia, neurologia, dermatologia, oncologia, nefrologia, oftalmologia e odontologia animal. Conta também com especialista e área de atendimento exclusiva para felinos, além de serviços de exames de laboratório e imagens, fundamentais para maior precisão nos diagnósticos e realização de procedimentos com segurança. 

O atendimento emergencial 24 horas é realizado por uma equipe incansável em carinho e dedicação total aos pacientes pets e seus tutores e a satisfação dos clientes é o principal indicador da excelência e profissionalismo.

Name: Pride Veterinary Medical Community
Description:
The Pride Veterinary Medical Community (formerly known as LGVMA) mission is to create a better world for the LGBTQ+ veterinary community. Our vision is an empowered LGBTQ+ veterinary community embraced by society as their authentic selves.

Our goals are as follows:

1. Fight discrimination against LGBTQ+ people in the veterinary medical profession.
2. Build collaborative networks for the LGBTQ+ veterinary medical community.
3. Support LGBTQ+ students in veterinary medicine through mentorship, program development, and scholarships.

Name: Nightingale Veterinary Partners
Description:
We are a growing team of veterinary professionals with a focus on both excellent medicine and a collaborative team culture so that veterinary medicine can be a more sustainable career for all. 

We are on a mission to deliver world-class care to pets while transforming the veterinary profession’s culture of burnout into a happier, healthier place. With a focus on team happiness and an eye for innovation, we’re building a different kind of veterinary practice, and we’re looking for people who believe in different too. 
Beyond our passion for bringing the excellence and innovation of human healthcare to veterinary medicine, we also believe in putting our team first, with a robust benefits package and many other perks specially designed around the needs of our profession.

Name: Inspire Veterinary Partners Inc
Description:
Whether we are collaborating with veterinarians and technicians or discussing the goals and dreams of hospital owners, Inspire believes each relationship is unique. We are committed to clear communication and the pursuit of shared value as central aspects of our every day operations. 

Because our funding and compensation models are unlike just about any other in veterinary medicine, we think and operate differently. Our team members share in our success and, for us, contributing to the advancement of the veterinary profession isn’t an afterthought - it’s the reason we do what we do.

Description:
Co-led by Drs. Jason Coe and Kat Sutherland at the Ontario Veterinary College, the RCVM@OVC research program is anchored in the relationships that lie at the foundation of veterinary medicine. This research program was founded from the VCA Canada Chair in Relationship-Centred Veterinary Medicine.

The goal of this research is to leverage aspects of these relationships to promote optimal outcomes, contributing to the prospect of positive change for veterinary teams and the clients and animals they serve, internationally.

Name: SAGE Centers for Veterinary Specialty and Emergency Care
Description:
SAGE Centers for Veterinary Specialty and Emergency Care is San Francisco Bay Area's largest locally owned referral veterinary specialty practice.  

SAGE Centers' veterinary practice includes more than 70 highly-trained veterinarians, providing advanced care for cats and dogs in four state-of-the-art veterinary medical centers throughout the Bay Area: Campbell, Concord, Dublin and Redwood City. All four locations offer 24 hour / 7 days a week emergency pet care and comprehensive critical care. 

SAGE Centers offers specialty veterinary specialty care in a wide variety of areas, including:

* Veterinary Surgery
* Veterinary Neurology
* Veterinary Internal Medicine
* Veterinary Oncology
* Veterinary Cardiology
* Animal Physical Rehabilitation
* Pain Management for Animals
* Integrative Medicine Options for Animals

SAGE Centers doctors are highly trained experts in their respective areas of specialty, and frequently collaborate on individual cases to provide a level of comprehensive care available nowhere else. 

While our facilities feature state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment and surgical tools, we pride ourselves on providing compassionate, loving care, for pets and their families alike.

Name: Univet Animal Health
Description:
A Univet tem o portfólio completo de equipamentos para atenção à saúde dos animais: Ultrassom Veterinário,  Radiologia Veterinária, Arco Cirúrgico, Tomografia, Ressonância e Análises Clínicas. 

Entregamos aos médicos veterinários soluções para diagnóstico por imagem e análises clínicas: equipamentos, insumos, acessórios, serviços e entrega com agilidade e qualidade. 

Nossos consultores atuam em todo o Brasil e estão preparados para atender você e sua clínica vet de maneira personalizada.

Name: Equalis Medicina Veterinária
Description:
Bem-vindo à Equalis! 

A Equalis é uma renomada instituição de ensino que se dedica exclusivamente à formação de profissionais na área de medicina veterinária, oferecendo cursos em modalidades EAD, Semipresencial e Presencial.

Nosso compromisso é com o sucesso de cada aluno. Com uma equipe de profissionais apaixonados por medicina veterinária, nos dedicamos diariamente a impulsionar e enriquecer a jornada educacional de nossos estudantes.

Com mais de duas décadas de experiência, somos pioneiros em moldar carreiras bem-sucedidas na veterinária.

Temos o privilégio de ter contribuído para a formação de mais de 25.000 alunos, fornecendo ensino de qualidade com um corpo docente altamente experiente em diversas especialidades.

Nossos cursos de pós-graduação, que contam com mais de 500 horas de aula, são reconhecidos pelo MEC, garantindo um padrão de excelência e reconhecimento profissional.

Nosso objetivo é oferecer uma experiência educacional que se destaca pela empatia, inovação e preparo efetivo para os desafios diários da profissão veterinária.

Convidamos você a visitar nosso site https://www.equalisveterinaria.com.br/ e descobrir como podemos ajudar você a alcançar seus sonhos profissionais na medicina veterinária.

Junte-se a nós e transforme sua paixão por animais em uma carreira de sucesso!

Name: VetCircle
Description:
VetCircle is a proudly Canadian, membership-based organization dedicated to supporting independently owned veterinary hospitals across Canada. We believe that independence should be a strength—not a struggle.

Our mission is to provide veterinary practice owners and managers with the support, savings, and strategy they need to thrive, so they can focus on delivering exceptional patient care and building strong client relationships.

Through membership, clinics gain access to:

Business Strategy & HR Support – protocols, handbooks, and management guidance.

Procurement & Rebates – exclusive vendor pricing and tailored rebate programs.

Continuing Education & Wet Labs – hands-on training and CE events for veterinary teams.

Practice Health Assessments – data-driven insights to optimize performance.

Community & Collaboration – a network of like-minded independent practices.

Whether you’re starting your dream clinic, growing an established practice, or planning for the future, VetCircle partners with you at every stage.

 Our Promise: Independence doesn’t mean doing it alone. With VetCircle, you have a trusted partner to help your practice dream, build, and thrive.

Name: Encipharm Chile
Description:
Encipharm es una empresa con más de 20 años de experiencia en la industria pecuaria, fundada en el año 2000, con presencia en Chile y Perú. Encipharm se ha focalizado en la búsqueda de productos, servicios y soluciones que contribuyan y sean un aporte al desarrollo de nutrición y salud animal.
Representantes y partners de importantes empresas internacionales, que cuentan con una vasta y exitosa trayectoria en la elaboración de productos innovadores y de calidad, con un fuerte soporte en Investigación y Desarrollo.  
Nuestro equipo técnico está siendo permanentemente capacitado para poder asesorar a nuestros clientes en busca de soluciones eficientes en el uso de productos y servicios para la salud y nutrición animal, tales como vacunas, enzimas, ácidos orgánicos, desinfectantes y detergentes, antioxidantes, antifúngicos, secuestrantes de micotoxinas, fitogénicos, fuentes de ácido butírico, preservantes de piensos, además de equipos y bebederos, kits de PCR y serología para diagnóstico de enfermedades, kits detección de micotoxinas, tratamiento y dosificación de medicamentos al agua de bebida y bioseguridad para distintas especies animales, como cerdos, aves, bovinos y peces.
Location: La Reina, Región Metropolitana de Santiago

Name: Nutrimas SA
Description:
Somos Nutrimas, líderes en nutrición animal. 
¿Qué nos hace diferentes? Nuestro equipo de referentes técnicos en nutrición animal, nos permite ofrecerte asesoramiento técnico especializado en producción porcina, avícola y ganadera.

Name: Vetlink Employment Service
Description:
Vetlink Employment Service is an Australian based specialist recruitment agency for the veterinary industry. Since 1997 over 10,000 locum and permanent placements have been made by Vetlink throughout Australia, the United Kingdom, Ireland, New Zealand, Asia, Canada and other countries.

Vetlink is owned by Dr Mark Eagleton BSc BVMS, a qualified veterinarian with over 20 years recruiting experience.

Each consultant at Vetlink has a veterinary background and/or extensive recruiting experience. Unlike many other recruitment agencies Vetlink caters only to the veterinary profession.

Placements are made into private practice, industry, government, universities and animal welfare organisations.

We have offices in Perth and Sydney as well as a consultant based in Victoria.

Name: iClubpet
Description:
Somos uma gestora de saúde pet com um clube de benefícios. 

As melhores redes veterinárias que um plano poderia ter e mais um time de saúde que vai trabalhar para seu melhor amigo ter sempre uma vida mais saudável.

Temos uma solução inovadora para sua empresa. 
Podemos oferecer economia com os cuidados essenciais para os bichinhos, tanto de saúde, quando de higiene, lazer e outros. São diversos médicos e clínicas credenciados, com facilidade de encontrar o que precisa, sem filas de espera e burocracias.

Name: Laboratorio Weizur
Description:
Líderes en bienestar y sanidad animal.

Desde 1992 Weizur ofrece una completa solución a las necesidades del productor lechero. Nuestra misión es ser una efectiva, honesta y confiable opción para nuestros consumidores. Desarrollamos y elaboramos cada una de nuestros productos, la mayoría de estos atienden necesidades del productor lechero pero también de aves, cerdos e industrias alimenticias. 

Nuestros clientes valoran y reconocen nuestras trayectoria y continúan eligiendo nuestro productos. Esto es el resultado de una entrenamiento constante, colaboracionismos y actitud de servicio por parte de quienes trabajamos en Weizur.

Name: SM Regulatory Solutions
Description:
A SM Regulatory Solutions é uma empresa focada no desenvolvimento de soluções regulatórias sob a lógica do Ministério da Agricultura, Pecuária e Abastecimento - MAPA.

Nossa missão é a de identificar e fornecer soluções regulatórias para empresas veterinárias e de produtos de origem animal, tanto nacionais quanto internacionais.

________________________________________________

SM Regulatory Solutions is a company focused on the development of regulatory solutions under the logic of the Ministry of Agriculture, Livestock and Supply - MAPA.

Our mission is to identify and provide regulatory solutions for veterinary and animal products companies, both national and international.

Name: Laboratorios Bimex SRL
Description:
Ofrecemos al sector avícola argentino alternativas de primer nivel internacional, tanto en el sector veterinario como en las áreas de implementos y maquinarias para plantas de incubación, galpones de reproductoras, galpones de engorde, plantas de procesado, plantas de subproductos y tratamiento de efluentes. Es gracias a todo esto que podemos decir que somos la empresa argentina con el mayor abanico de oferta de productos para la producción avícola local.

Nuestra misión es mantener un puesto de liderazgo en la comercialización de bienes de capital para la industria avícola y porcina mediante la investigación y el desarrollo de productos, la representación de empresas internacionales de primera línea, y la pronta y certera asistencia a nuestros clientes, brindado herramientas para mejorar día a día la eficiencia productiva.

Como garantías debemos satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes, con la premisa de que sus problemas son los nuestros, así como también son nuestra responsabilidad.
Poner al alcance de nuestros clientes las tecnologías más avanzadas a nivel mundial.
Acercar el mercado argentino a nuestros proveedores del exterior.
Emplear las últimas innovaciones nacionales e internacionales.
Mantener una estrecha comunicación y generar permanentemente instancias de evaluación con el cliente.
Recorrer un camino de constante evolución, actualización y capacitación.
Location: La Paternal, Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: VETERINARY RECRUITING AND STAFFING SOLUTIONS
Description: The best veterinary practices start with the best teams. Veterinary Recruiting and Staffing Solutions connects qualified veterinary professionals with animal hospitals, clinics, and other facilities throughout the United States. As your partner in building an amazing team, we are here to guide you every step of the way and will work with you to ensure that your staffing needs are met in the most efficient and affordable manner possible. We understand that a strong support team is vital in veterinary practices and are here to help you find the right vet techs, assistants, groomers, and more.

Name: CIRCULO VETERINARIO
Description:
¿QUÉ TE OFRECEMOS?
Círculo Veterinario es una empresa orientada a conseguir mejores condiciones de compra para sus clínicas asociadas, ya sean particulares, autónomos o empresas. Está gestionada por personal con amplia experiencia en centrales de compra y en negociación con proveedores, que dedican el 100% de su tiempo a dar servicio a nuestras clínicas asociadas buscando los productos que mejor se adecuan a cada socio y al conjunto de todos y con las mejores condiciones económicas del mercado.

Somos un modelo de negocio “flexible” para tu clínica, “sin obligaciones”, todos nuestros productos o servicios son de utilización libre por el veterinario y pensados de acuerdo a su nivel de necesidades.

Descubre nuestros servicios 360º, con todo lo que necesitas para la gestión diaria de tu negocio.

Name: EVIPE - Capacitação Veterinária
Description:
O EVIPE surgiu do sonho de professores apaixonados por animais que vivem intensamente a Medicina Veterinária e a Zootecnia.

Temos como principal objetivo evoluir e desenvolver essas profissões no Brasil através da capacitação e atualização técnica de profissionais e estudantes.

Por meio da junção de metodologias ativas, aulas práticas e técnicas tradicionais de ensino, nossos professores especialistas, mestres e doutores transmitem seu conhecimento e experiência para profissionais e estudantes.

Nossos clientes estão sempre em busca de atualização técnica e desenvolvimento de competências para enfrentar o mercado de trabalho cada vez mais competitivo e exigente.

Venha aprender com o EVIPE!

Name: American Association of Industry Veterinarians
Description:
The American Association of Industry Veterinarians, an AVMA allied organization, was formed in 1954 by a group of veterinarians working in the pharmaceutical industry. It is a federally recognized non-profit organization with membership just under 500. AAIV members are veterinarians working in industry.

The AAIV exists to:

	- To advance the professional standards and development of veterinarians engaged in any phase of industry employment.

	- To inform of the contributions that veterinarians can make to their diversified operations.

	- To inform the veterinary profession of the increasing employment opportunities in industry.

	- To promote free communications among the members of this organization, within the limits of individual corporate policy.

	- To promote communication and cooperation between this organization and other organizations with mutual interests.

Name: European Society of Toxicologic Pathology
Description: European Society of Toxicologic Pathology (ESTP)

Name: AniCura Guadiamar Hospital Veterinario
Description:
Hospital Veterinario de Pequeños Animales. Abierto 24 horas.

Centro de Especialidades Veterinarias que ofrece un Servicio de Medicina Avanzado consiguiendo que por primera vez nuestras mascotas tengan las mismas oportunidades que en el resto de los Paises más desarrollados.

Atender a la salud de la mascota y ofrecer la mayor calidad en nuestros servicios, son los objetivos por los que llevamos más de 10 años trabajando.

Nuestro principal objetivo es la salud y el bienestar de nuestros pacientes. Consolidar nuestro centro como un referente del sector y alcanzar la satisfacción del trabajo bien hecho
Location: SANLÚCAR LA MAYOR, SEVILLA, Sanlúcar la Mayor

Name: proVET Nordic
Description:
proVET Nordic er et dansk firma med speciale i import og salg af veterinærprodukter.

Vi markedsfører produkter til gavn og glæde for dyrlægerne og deres klienter.

I vort sortiment har vi produkter til:

 Hest
 Kvæg
 Smådyr 
 Bier
 Homøopati
 Sutur
 Test og udstyr til dyrlæger

Ligesom vi har foder til hund og kat.

proVET er etableret i 2009 og vi har i dag distribution og salg af veterinærprodukter i hele Danmark. Ligesom visse produkter også distribueres i Norge og Sverige.

Vi er dyrlægens leverandør. Vi har ikke salg til privatpersoner og landmænd.

Er du dyrlæge, og ønsker du at bestille varer, skal du først oprettes og godkendes som kunde. Det kan du gøre på vores hjemmeside.

Name: Worldwide Vets
Description:
Worldwide Vets is a non-profit organisation that aims to reduce suffering, advance welfare and improve medical care available to all species worldwide.
 
In order to achieve this goal, we work in over 10 countries, across 4 continents, supporting local people and animals, vet clinics and conservation initiatives. Each of our locations is unique, but whether we are working with wild or domestic animals, helping shelters, organising TNR campaigns or training local vets, the aim is the same: to improve the lives of the animals in our care. 

We offer a multi-modal approach to assisting animals, including:

-Sending vets to areas needing support
-Sourcing and sending medications and equipment
-Training local vets and technicians
-Ongoing volunteer programs and set date outreach missions

Our dedicated team of vets, nurses, technicians, and conservation support staff ensure that any animal presented to us can receive the best possible care and treatment. On any given day, between the four continents where we operate, our team are carrying out worthwhile missions for a range of animals. It may be that we are rescuing snared wildlife or translocating endangered species like lions, rhinos, elephants, pangolins, turtles or sloths to safer environments. Often we are reaching deep into poverty-stricken communities, providing preventative and reactive medicine to dogs and cats, cows, goats, sheep and poultry.

UK registered non-profit organization. Registration No. 14590043
USA registered 501(c)3 charitable organization. EIN: 92-3351721
Ukraine registered Charitable Trust. Registration No. 449 354 99

Name: Novagen Agronegócios
Description:
Missão
“Fornecer à Ovinocultura e Caprinocultura excelência em qualidade de sêmen, assim como viabilizar o incremento genético de rebanhos comerciais com sêmen de animais de alta performance, permitindo a maximização da produção e lucratividade de toda a cadeia produtiva.”
Informações gerais
Situada no município de Itapira – SP, próximo a Região Metropolitana de Campinas, a NOVAGEN Genética Ltda., foi inaugurada em 2008, adotando apenas em 2010 o nome atual.

Atua no segmento de sêmen congelado, cursos de capacitação técnica & treinamentos e distribuição de produtos relacionados à pecuária.

Com corpo técnico altamente especializado, a NOVAGEN garante excelência nos serviços prestados.

No Centro de Coleta e Processamento de Sêmen, credenciado pelo Ministério da Agricultura, Pecuária e Abastecimento, a NOVAGEN presta serviço de congelamento em ovinos e caprinos para clientes e empresas de comercialização de sêmen, com técnicas avançadas usadas na Austrália. Com parceria com a SEMEX (www.semex.com.br), nossos clientes dispõe do serviço de distribuição de sêmen à nível nacional.

Com Cursos de Capacitação Técnica e Treinamentos para veterinários, zootecnistas, engenheiros agrônomos, técnicos agrícolas e funcionários de apoio, com cursos de rotina e/ou criados sob medida para cada cliente.

A NOVAGEN distribui também os produtos da YES (www.yes.ind.br) e equipamentos de reprodução de fabricação própria e importados.

Name: British Veterinary Receptionist Association
Description: BVRA is a membership association committed to supporting the role of veterinary receptionists. We aim to do this through training, education and development to improve the standards of welfare and communication within practice for both clients and colleagues.

Name: Vetstream Ltd
Description: Vetstream is a unique, hard-working knowledgeable team experienced in positively supporting teams and empowering individuals in the veterinary community. We are dedicated to deliver a range of trusted, innovative solutions correctly tailored to our clients' needs and passionately believe in interacting with integrity and honesty.

Name: VMA Veterinary Management Academia
Description:
Our course condenses into 50 hours of high-quality content the combined experience of two trainers specialized in veterinary management, Pere Mercader and Miguel Ángel Díaz, who have trained more than 2,000 veterinarians from 35 countries on 4 continents. 

Combining in a unique way the economic management tools (management indicators, quantitative analysis, investments and profitability) with those of people leadership, we teach you to manage a veterinary clinic efficiently. 

Because the numbers are nothing more than a reflection of the behaviors of our team!

Name: EICKEMEYER UK
Description: For over 60 years EICKEMEYER have become experts not just in the science of veterinary medicine, but also in how to build and grow a successful practice. We have always sought to supply the finest instruments and equipment available, carefully sourcing the best and most practical products from all around the world. And where we can't find a product which meets our exacting quality and value criteria, we design and make our own.

Name: European Veterinary Centre
Description:
With over 2 decades of experience providing animal care services in UAE, European Veterinary Centre is thrilled to announce its upgraded facilities under new management.

EVC offers high quality veterinary care in Dubai providing a wide range of services including internal medicine, soft tissue and orthopedic surgery, diagnostic imaging and laboratory analysis.

Name: Vets Central
Description:
AUSTRALIA & NZ’S FASTEST GROWING VETERINARY GROUP
Veterinary Partnerships | Non-Corporate Acquisitions | Brand Equity | Operational Support | Employee Benefits

At Vets Central, our mission is to build meaningful veterinary partnerships across Australia and New Zealand that enhance the delivery of quality animal care. Founded in 2021, we provide operational support, employee benefits, and brand equity frameworks—allowing clinics to focus on what matters most: their patients and people.

Our non-corporate acquisition model preserves the legacy, values, and identity of each clinic, while enabling growth and sustainability. We’re 100% committed to improving the lives of veterinarians, their teams, and the animals they care for.

Why clinics choose Vets Central:
• 2× Great Place to Work certified
• Mental Health First Aid recognised
• 15+ years of corporate leadership, including consolidated group expertise
• Financial fairness (earn-out pathways, procurement savings)
• Collaborative engagement that supports local decision-making
• Employee benefits via key health and wellness alliances
• Operational support from specialists in HR, finance, marketing & IT
• Community giving: Sophie’s Legacy, Pets in the Park & more

We support veterinary teams with:
• Flexible work and retirement pathways
• Allied healthcare, bonus incentives & 'perental' leave
• Clinic equity partnerships where staff are part of the team

Our core values—transparency, accountability, adaptability, and responsibility—guide everything we do. We’re proud to be a trusted, values-led alternative to corporate ownership in the veterinary sector.

Name: Byron Bay Wildlife Hospital
Description:
Byron Bay Wildlife Hospital's mission is to conserve, protect and ensure positive welfare outcomes for Australian wildlife through treatment, rehabilitation, research and education.

We are no ordinary hospital. The Australian bushfire crisis of the summer of 2019-2020 devastated Australian flora and fauna, killing over one billion native animals. Whole populations were decimated, often because specialist wildlife rescue and medical care facilities were inundated with patients or simply not available.

Thanks to dedicated sponsors, crowdfunding and teamwork, our customised semi-trailer is built to facilitate an immediate response to wildlife in crisis anywhere in Australia. This self-contained mobile hospital is equipped with state-of-the-art medical equipment and is based at our 100 acres of gifted land on Ewingsdale Road in Byron Shire.

Led by CEO Dr Stephen Van Mil, a veterinarian, filmmaker and wildlife conservationist, Byron Bay Wildlife Hospital is a not-for-profit organisation well-placed to become Australia's pre-eminent wildlife treatment, rehabilitation and conservation hub. Our sole purpose is #forthewildlife - we aim to bridge a significant gap in specialist care and facilities for treatment and rehabilitation and build positive relationships with wildlife veterinarians, rescuers, carers and organisations.

Name: HapiVet AI
Description: HapiVet AI is an all-in-one, AI-driven veterinary practice management system designed to automate up to 50% of daily tasks across every clinic role built in collaboration with the best veterinarians in the USA.

Name: Nuctramix Brasil
Description: Seja bem-vindo à Nuctramix. Somos uma empresa especializada em nutrição animal, nós oferecemos soluções que agregam valor a nutrição. Investimos em tecnologia aplicada que garante resultados superiores, nós garantimos.

Name: Nutrifarms
Description:
Somos otra empresa de Grupo Dos Ríos que nace en 2012 como resultado del trabajo en conjunto de profesionales del medio local e internacional, con el objetivo de ofrecer al mercado argentino lo último en tecnología en nutrición porcina. 

Producimos alimentos completos, premezclas y núcleos vitamínicos minerales que acompañen a los cerdos en sus diferentes etapas de vida.

Somos socios estratégicos de nuestros clientes. Poseemos valores que se centran en la calidad, la innovación y el acompañamiento con un alto grado de personalización, innovación, tecnología y compromiso social y ambiental.

Nuestros servicios:

 Capacitación y formación de equipos de trabajo en granjas
 Formulaciones especiales en establecimientos
 Análisis de materias primas
 Postventa y acompañamiento profesional
 Red de distribución en todo el país

Name: VetScale
Description:
“Happier Vets, Healthier Pets”

Revolutionizing Veterinary Operations with Remote Vet Assistants
- At VetScale, we empower veterinary clinics, hospitals, and independent practitioners to streamline operations, reduce costs, and focus on delivering exceptional pet care.

Our mission is to make veterinary practice management effortless by providing top-tier remote Vet Assistants who handle everything from client communication and scheduling to invoicing and social media management.

 Why Choose VetScale?

- Hire the Top 1% Remote Vet Assistants: Trained professionals ready to support your clinic operations.
- Cut Staffing Costs by Up to 70%: Eliminate expenses related to office space, training, and benefits.
- Boost Efficiency: Free up your in-house team to focus on pet care, not paperwork.
- No Long-Term Commitments: Experience our 2-week free trial before deciding.
- Streamlined Onboarding: Get matched with the right talent within 48 hours.

Who We Support:

1. Independent Vet Practitioners
2. Veterinary Clinics & Hospitals
3. Emergency Vet Services
4. Specialty Veterinary Practices
5. Mobile Vet Services
6. Animal Welfare Organizations

Our Approach:
 
We take the hassle out of hiring by understanding your unique needs and matching you with pretrained & best-fit talent. From payroll management to training, we handle it all while you focus on growing your practice.

 Schedule a Free Consultation and discover how VetScale can help your clinic thrive!
Calendly link: https://calendly.com/scaling-business/business-growth	 

 Visit our website to learn more: vetscale.co.uk
  Get in touch: info@vetscale.co.uk
  Call us: +44 7916268845

Name: DNA Vetcare Ltd
Description:
We are a small independent and award-winning group of veterinary surgeries. Our teams are dedicated to providing excellent service to clients and respectful, caring and expert care for animals across London, Surrey, Sussex, Oxfordshire and Kent.

A strong caring attitude underpins the running of all of the surgeries and the staff that work there. All the vets have many years of dedicated small animal practice and many of our vets have certificates in further advanced areas, which allows us to perform more complex surgeries in house without the need for expensive referrals. The nurses and support staff are friendly, dedicated and we support their training to the highest level.

Name: Veterinary Team Solutions
Description: Welcome to Veterinary Team Solutions, where our experienced Practice Managers offer the unparalleled support of a "corporate" office, enabling you to concentrate on what truly matters—providing exceptional care to your furry patients. We specialize in streamlining every aspect of your veterinary practice, from efficient office management to strategic marketing, meticulous inventory control to seamless human resources solutions. Let us simplify the complexities of running a successful veterinary clinic, so you can devote more time and resources to nurturing the well-being of your beloved animal companions. Trust Veterinary Team Solutions for a healthier, happier practice.

Name: Fish Veterinary Society
Description:
The Fish Veterinary Society is a Specialist Division of the British Veterinary Association (BVA). 
It is a forum for Veterinary Surgeons, Fish Health Professionals and veterinary students with an interest in fish.
It also promotes fish welfare and an increasing stake in the health management of fish whether farmed, in public aquaria or in the ornamental sector including fish kept as pets.

Name: King Animal Hospital
Description:
Leading With Care.

King Animal Hospital is a newly constructed 60,000 sq ft. Equine and Small Animal Referral and Emergency Hospital. 

The Hospital is situated in a serene location on 50 acres of land in King City, ON and will house all veterinary specialty areas under one roof including: surgery, neurology, oncology, diagnostic imaging, ophthalmology, anesthesiology, cardiology, internal medicine, dermatology, and rehabilitation.

With a strong multidisciplinary team, and leading diagnostics, tools, and practices our team will ensure that each animal receives compassionate and informed care.

You will know more, do more and save more lives through collaboration with a multidisciplinary team and leading diagnostics including:

1.5 MRI (Siemens) for equine and 3.0 T MRI (GE) for small animal, CT scan for equine and small animal, CT scan with robotic arm, c-arm in orthopedics OR, x-ray, and ultrasound.

The hospital has 8 Operating Rooms, 12 exam rooms, 2 staff kitchens, education center with state-of-the-art AV equipment, employee gym, 6000 sq ft indoor equine arena, in-house lab and pharmacy. 

Our rehabilitation includes pool and water treadmills for small animal, water treadmill for equine, rehabilitation room equipped with hyperbaric chamber, and laser therapy. 

The Hospital was founded on the belief that every animal is a living being that deserves to be treated with kindness and respect. The hospital aims to revolutionize animal care by ensuring that every animal has access to the most compassionate and committed care possible.

Name: Vetpharm
Description: Vetpharm is a leading distributor of veterinary medicines within the European Union, specializing in high-quality pharmaceutical products for farm animals. Established in 2011, we are GDMP licensed and FCA certified, providing veterinary pharmaceuticals, feed compounds, and supplements. Our mission is to bridge the gap between manufacturers and veterinarians, ensuring timely access to the best solutions for animal health. With a customer-oriented approach, we offer expert guidance and innovative products to address the unique challenges in maintaining animal health and productivity. Join us in enhancing animal well-being and agricultural success.

Name: EveryCat Health Foundation
Description:
The future of feline medicine starts here.
Since 1968, EveryCat Health Foundation has funded groundbreaking research that benefits every cat, every day. From disease prevention and veterinary treatment to healthy home habits, we help advance the science behind better health for millions of cats and their cat-loving companions just like us.

Name: EMERGENCE, Vet emergency & critical care
Description:
Urgence veterinaire de A à Z..! 
Emergence est le premier service d'urgences vétérinaires en France, regroupant toutes les solutions dédiées aux animaux de compagnie.

Avec plus de 20 millions d'habitants couverts sur la métropole, et plus de 150 collaborateurs, Emergence est le leader du secteur.

Avec une implantation résolument tournée vers l'international, Emergence a pour vocation de diffuser sa vision des soins d'urgence à travers les autres pays européens.

Name: Veterinaria del Mar
Description:
L'Hospital Veterinari del Mar ha estat fundat amb la voluntat d'exercir la medicina veterinària més actual i innovadora, promovent una comunicació transparent, honesta i comprensible.
El nostre objectiu principal és aportar qualitat en l’atenció diària amb els nostres clients a més d’oferir un servei d'urgències presencial les 24 hores / 365 dies l'any en medicina veterinària de petits animals i exòtics, fent partícip en tot moment al propietari sobre l'evolució i l'estat de salut actual del seu animal de companyia (pacient).
A l'Hospital Veterinari del Mar creiem fermament en una comunicació orientada al client, la finalitat és fomentar la participació del propietari en el seguiment de l'estat de salut de la seva mascota i de l'activitat que es porta a terme diàriament a l'Hospital Veterinari del Mar.
Comptem amb un equip altament qualificat d'especialistes en totes les àrees de la medicina veterinària de petits animals i exòtics. Un grup d'especialistes en constant aprenentatge i formació de noves tècniques i avenços amb el clar objectiu de resoldre qualsevol cas que es presenti, tant referit com propi. 
Les instal·lacions de l'Hospital Veterinari del Mar disposen dels recursos i la tecnologia d'última generació pel diagnòstic, tractament i prevenció de malalties tant de petits animals com d'exòtics. Apostem per la recerca i innovació amb l'objectiu que els nostres pacients accedeixin a serveis i tractaments innovadors que en els alguns casos els permet una millora evident de la seva qualitat de vida.
Creiem en la col.laboració entre companys del sector veterinari, per això donem suport i oferim un servei integral d’especialitats veterinàries també per  casos de pacients referits d’altres centres i clíniques veterinàries.  
Els nostres valors i ètica professional es basen en la comunicació transparent i de qualitat la capacitat d'innovació i la confiança.
Dedicats i compromesos en millorar per seguir aportant salut i benestar a la teva mascota.

Name: ElleVet Sciences
Description:
Nothing is more rewarding than innovating for animals.

ElleVet Sciences was created because we discovered a way to truly elevate the lives of animals and their owners by developing safe, effective hemp CBD + CBDA products. Our team’s combined backgrounds in science, medicine, business, and animal health reflects a dedication to animals through research and innovation. ElleVet is the only CBD + CBDA product proven to work in multiple clinical trials, and is the leader in cannabinoid research and evidence-based products for pets. Currently conducting more than 40 R&D projects / clinical studies at leading universities and referral centers, our team is rapidly growing and expanding our business both domestically and internationally.

Name: The VET Expo
Description:
Designed to inspire and encourage collaboration and knowledge exchange, the VET Expo is an all in one business festival to showcase thought leaders and disruptors who promise clinical excellence and operational innovation.

The VET Expo is an event which brings together all these elements in a new format with forward thinking, new technology, more efficiency and best practice.

10 world class conference tracks focusing on the latest developments in Companion Animals, Small & Large Animal, Dermatology, Disruptive Technology, Practice Management, Veterinary Nursing, Disease Control, Dentistry, Animal Health & Welfare, Wildlife & Behaviour - there's over 50 hours of learning and knowledge sharing available for all attendees

Name: Cita Indonesia Group
Description:
Cita Indonesia, we innovate with purpose: to uplift animal health, empower farmers, strengthen communities, and advance the entire livestock industry. We believe that better nutrition and better health lead to a better future.

Through science-driven solutions, responsible sourcing, and dedicated technical support, we build sustainable progress  where productivity and care coexist in harmony.

For a Better Life reflects our promise to lead with innovation, grow with integrity, and serve with meaningful impact.

#forabetterlife

Name: Multicultural Veterinary Medical Association (MCVMA)
Description: The Multicultural Veterinary Medical Association exists to lead veterinary medicine towards the racial and ethnic diversity, equity, and inclusivity that our profession needs to serve a multicultural society.

Name: Veterinary Nurse Solutions
Description: Veterinary Nurse Solutions provides veterinary nurses with an interactive learning environment, delivering high quality, pertinent continuing education courses and seminars. From InClinic Training, attendance seminars, and several forms of online courses – there is something here to suit every nurse and practice.

Name: Hometown Veterinary Partners
Description:
We're Hiring! 

You Belong Here
Your experience, background, and unique viewpoints are valued here! At Hometown Veterinary Partners, you are empowered to create rewarding and sustainable veterinary careers in your hospital and for our veterinary community.  

Exciting changes in the veterinary industry start with us and we are just getting started. We want you to be excited and happy doing what you love most. You can expect to grow and nourish the culture and community in your local hometown veterinary hospital. Plus, you’ll earn competitive compensation and annual performance bonuses combined with opportunities for growth and a full suite of benefits that start at a minimum of 32 hours per week. 

Our shared values:  we work hard together for our beliefs of CULTURE, COMMUNITY, and COLLABORATION. 

Culture
The center of what makes each hospital special is its culture. We give you the space to build and foster a healthy workplace at each location and support you along the way.

Community
We share in our teams’ excitement to be contributing members of their neighborhoods and to create positive change in our veterinary industry. Our veterinary teams are empowered to maintain local autonomy and growth in their community.

Collaboration
We encourage our teams to embrace an entrepreneurial spirit and operate with growth mindsets. We celebrate everyone’s individual viewpoints, experiences, and backgrounds. We grow together!

Name: PROPEC - FARMACÊUTICA, LDA
Description:
Empresa de referência no sector veterinário.
Contribui para o melhoramento e desenvolvimento do serviço em veterinária.
A Propecuária é atualmente o principal parceiro de negócio numa grande parte dos CAMV em Portugal.

Name: Instituto Adimax
Description:
O Instituto Adimax é uma iniciativa sem fins lucrativos que surgiu em 2015 para dar assistência a quem precisa: pessoas carentes de recursos, com deficiências ou idosos.

Sua primeira atividade é o treinamento de Cães-Guias para dar mais autonomia, mobilidade e uma nova perspectiva de vida as pessoas com deficiência visual.

Construído em uma área de 15.000 m² na cidade de Salto de Pirapora (SP), o instituto possui uma estrutura de primeiro mundo para garantir a excelência do atendimento aos seus assistidos, além do acolhimento e treinamento dos futuros cães-guias.

Como parte deste processo, investe em infraestrutura e em equipe de ponta, sendo o responsável pela maioria das etapas de formação do animal e do seu usuário.

Para ajudá-lo neste propósito, o instituto conta com o importante trabalho de instrutores, psicólogos, veterinários, tratadores e de outros especialistas dispostos a melhorar a inclusão e mobilidade das pessoas com deficiência visual na sociedade.

Seu principal objetivo é promover a inclusão em diversas esferas da sociedade, proporcionando a indivíduos e comunidades carentes ferramentas e recursos que impulsionam e transformam vidas.

Name: Guardian Veterinary Specialists
Description:
Guardian Veterinary Specialists, a new 29,000 square foot advanced, state-of-the-art emergency, critical care and specialty hospital located at 4 Hardscrabble Heights in Brewster, NY. Equipped with the latest diagnostic and treatment technologies, the facility offers comprehensive services in virtually all veterinary disciplines, including Emergency and Critical Care 24/7/365, as well as specialty services in Internal Medicine, Surgery, Neurology, Oncology, Cardiology, Ophthalmology, Sports Medicine and Rehabilitation, Diagnostic Imaging and Dermatology. Guardian even has its own on-site diagnostic laboratory, Bloodhound Laboratories, which also extends its services to local veterinary hospitals.  

Staffed by only the most dedicated and compassionate board certified veterinary specialists, licensed veterinary technicians and expertly-trained support staff, Guardian Veterinary Specialists' fundamental mission is to provide community-centric service for every client.  Our clients are the center of our focus, and our goal is to consistently provide only the most positive experience for them.  Guardian Veterinary Specialists is founded by Jason Berg, DVM, DACVIM, a highly respected, board certified neurologist and internist with over 17 years’ experience in practice and as a veterinary business founder and owner. The recipient of numerous awards, a published author and much sought after lecturer, Dr. Berg has also received much recognition for his compassionate work with animal shelters and the rescue community.
GVS serves referring veterinarians, pet owners and pets in Putnam, Dutchess, Westchester, Fairfield, Litchfield, Orange, Rockland and Bronx counties.

Name: The Andys Veterinary Clinic Limited
Description:
Founded in 2004, The Andys Veterinary Clinic is one of Kenya’s leading providers of veterinary care, serving pet owners through four branches located in Nairobi (Loresho, Kiambu Road, and Ngong Road) and Nanyuki.

We are a mixed animal practice — with about 90% small animal medicine and 10% equine, livestock, and exotic medicine. Our team of 12 veterinary doctors and 24 support staff work passionately to deliver compassionate, ethical, and professional care to all our animal patients.

Our services include:

Name: Nouvet
Description:
O Nouvet é um centro veterinário de alta complexidade localizado nos Jardins, em São Paulo.
Atuamos com foco em medicina especializada, estrutura hospitalar completa e uma cultura baseada em acolhimento, precisão diagnóstica e excelência técnica.

Contamos com mais de 20 especialidades, Pronto Atendimento 24h, internação, UTI e um dos serviços de diagnóstico por imagem mais avançados da região, oferecendo suporte resolutivo para casos clínicos, cirúrgicos e oncológicos.

Para colegas veterinários, o Nouvet Alliance disponibiliza uma estrutura pensada para apoiar decisões clínicas: encaminhamento de exames, cirurgias e internação, além de comunicação clara, boletins consistentes e parceria responsável.

Nosso compromisso é entregar medicina veterinária de alta complexidade com eficiência, ética e cuidado, sempre priorizando segurança, conforto e processos clínicos sólidos.

Acesse nossas vagas em https://nouvet.vagas.solides.com.br/

Name: Televet

Name: Veterinary Site
Description:
The Veterinary Site is a free knowledge base that covers all fields of veterinary science under one umbrella. We are a team of veterinary professionals that have more than 5 years of experience in veterinary expertise.
We cover following areas of veterinary science:
Guidance about starting a low cost poultry farm, small scale dairy farm layout, pet care (pet fitness & well being), cheap chicken feed & fish farming feasibility.
Veterinary Site is a mesh that connects a farmer to a veterinarian. This is work of hardworking team that dedicates its time to bring quality content for enthusiasts.
We empowers vets and para-vets to grow their professional competence and also educate pet lovers in fitness, well being & care of their dear ones.
Contact details/Email : info@theveterinarysite.com

Name: Caring Vets
Description:
Zolang mensen dieren gebruiken hebben wij een verantwoordelijkheid voor het welzijn van deze dieren. Caring Vets wil haar expertise en wetenschappelijke kennis inzetten om dierenwelzijn te optimaliseren.  

Wij adviseren collega’s, maatschappelijke & politieke organisaties aangaande verbeteringen op het gebied van dierenwelzijn. De onderwerpen waar wij ons op focussen zijn ‘Dierenarts & Praktijk’, ‘Politiek & Wetgeving’ en ‘Opleiding & Onderzoek’.

Wij zijn onderdeel van Caring Movement en werken nauw samen met onze zusterorganisaties Caring Farmers en Caring Doctors. Gezamenlijk organiseren wij jaarlijks het Caring Congres. 

Caring Vets is an Association of Dutch Veterinarians taking a stand to improve Animal Welfare, based on the Veterinary Code of Conduct. This website is mainly in Dutch, however, we very much welcome our colleagues from abroad to contact us at info@caringvets.nl to unite forces. For statements and articles in English please visit our website.

Name: Toronto Veterinary Emergency and Referral Hospital
Description:
The referral service was originally located at Morningside and founded by Dr A. Gillick in 1974 and was relocated to our new facility, the Toronto Veterinary Emergency Hospital in Oct 2009. We are located at 21 Rolark Drive.

Our emergency clinic provides onsite 24/7 Emergency care by experienced emergency clinicians and technicians.
Our Critical Care Service (ICU) is overseen by our certified specialist in emergency and critical care medicine.
Referral Service - Our specialists have extensive training in a wide variety of services including:
Surgery: Orthopedics, arthroscopy, laparoscopy, reconstructive surgery, oncology, joint replacement
Medical Services: Disease management, diagnostic and endoscopic procedures, chemotherapy, nutritional management
Diagnostic Imaging: Inpatient and outpatient ultrasound services and imaging consultation including onsite CT and MRI Scans
Critical Care Service (ICU) is overseen and provided by a board certified specialist in critical care.
Cardiology: Referral appointments and advanced procedures including diagnostic and corrective procedures overseen by Dr Mike O'Grady.
Anesthesiology: Anesthesiology overseen by board certified anesthesiologist.
Rehabilitation: Rehab and Pain control provided by Dr Tara Edwards.
----------------------------- 
Your pet’s well-being is our highest priority. We value the trust you and your veterinarian have placed in us. We are open 24 hours a day 365 days a year for emergencies

Name: VerticalVet
Description: VerticalVet is a Group Resource Community (GRC). We provide independent veterinarians and their practice managers access to customized best practices and education and alongside unique, real-time data insights proven to build trust with clients. Our community is stronger together, allowing you to focus on what matters most: providing excellent patient care.

Name: Torigen, Inc.
Description: Torigen is committed to helping improve the lives of pets by harnessing the power of their immune systems to change the way cancer is treated with an individualized vaccine. Cancer affects nearly 10 million companion animals every year, yet pet owners may have limited knowledge of all available treatment options. Our experimental autologous prescription product, backed with over a decade of supporting research, uses the patient's own tumor cells to create a personalized cancer treatment. Our goal is to empower veterinarians, through partnership and collaboration early in the diagnostic process, to be part of the solution.

Name: Tecbio Distribuidora
Description: Distribuidora de produtos veterinários na região de São Paulo!

Name: PathoSense
Description:
PathoSense is a spin-off from Ghent University and developed a complete sample-collection-to-diagnostic interpretation platform for infectious diseases in veterinary medicine using nanopore sequencing. Without prior knowledge, a full overview of all pathogens in a sample can be given. We are currently scaling this platform by setting up partnerships with veterinary diagnostic laboratories in Europe.

Furthermore, PathoSense is an Oxford Nanopore Technologies Certified Services Provider and we offer fast and complete bacterial whole genome sequencing, microbiome analysis and viral whole genome sequencing. We are not just a sequencing provider but want to understand your question and help you in the best way possible to obtain biologically meaningful insights from your data.

Name: Dermavet.online
Description: Dermavet.Online è un portale a servizio esclusivo dei medici veterinari dedicato alla dermatologia degli animali da compagnia. Lo abbiamo creato per condividere esperienze, discutere casi, informare, aggiornare, trasmettere conoscenze in modo chiaro, pratico, semplice, ma con solide basi scientifiche.

Ofrecemos productos con beneficios para la salud de tu mejor amigo.
Location: Caba, Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: The Veterinary Cancer Center
Description:
The Veterinary Cancer Center (The VCC) strongly believes that the best veterinary care comes from a team approach; individuals working together, and capitalizing on the strength of each of its members. This strength helps us to deliver the best cancer care possible, whether that be chemotherapy, radiation therapy, immunotherapy, or other modalities –  we are the experts in the treatment, diagnosis, and care of cancer in your pet.
 
We do not want to minimize the very valuable information, advice and care of the other members of your pet’s health care team – and we believe strongly that they should not minimize our role.
 
We work closely with your local veterinarian(s) and other members of your pet’s team, but we do not instruct others on how to administer chemotherapy or instruct them on what chemotherapy to use. Nor do we want to take away from the valuable information you get from your local veterinarian or diminish the long term relationship you have with them.
 
We adopt this philosophy with the best interests of you and your pet in mind, and believe that it is important for each “team member” to remain true to their core competencies. Because of the amount of ever-changing medical information, our doctors only focus on cancer. By only treating cancer and relying on your local veterinarian and other specialist to treat everything else, we will ensure the best possible care for you and your pet.

Name: DrVet.ch
Description:
Try our DrVet.ch application for free, dedicated to veterinary telemedicine.

The DrVet.ch app interface is fully personalized with the name of your veterinary practice or your own name, providing a unique experience for your patients.

This application allows exchanges of diagnoses, prognoses and patient monitoring using messages, images or videoconferencing.

No additional fees are associated with each teleconsultation or advice. The price of the teleconsultation is set by the veterinarian.

We offer telemedicine training, provided by our expert veterinarians on the DrVet.ch application.

Take advantage of the first six months of use free and discover the advantages of our service. After this period, a monthly subscription fee of €80 will be applied.

You can automatically cancel your subscription at the end of the free trial period unless you wish to extend it.

If you decide to continue, a contract will be sent to you and a monthly payment of €80 will be required to continue benefiting from our service.

Name: VetFamily España
Description:
Actualmente VetFamily es la mayor comunidad de clinicas veterinarias independientes en el mundo con más de  8.000 clínicas asociadas en 11 paises y 3 continentes.
VetFamily no sólo ayuda a sus miembros con la compra profesional de productos y servicios, sino que les apoya en muchos otros aspectos, como por ejemplo, con el acceso a herramientas digitales modernas, el intercambio de ideas y buenas prácticas y con la continua información sobre las novedades y tendencias en el sector. 

Gracias a VetFamily nuestros socios pueden pasar más tiempo con sus pacientes y obtener una mejor rentabilidad, que les permite invertir más en su personal y equipamiento, optimizando de esta manera aún más la atención veterinaria. 

El mercado veterinario en España está cambiando a un ritmo muy rápido con la irrupción de diversas agrupaciones de clínicas. VetFamily está dando a las clínicas independientes la oportunidad de beneficiarse de ser parte de un grupo multinacional, manteniendo siempre la independencia de la clínica en todos los aspectos.

VetFamily ayuda a las clínicas veterinarias en su día y día y a prepararse para el futuro.

Name: Vetyou
Description:
Somos veterinarios y nuestra misión en Vetyou es: 

Difundir a la sociedad el desarrollo de la medicina veterinaria y sus especialidades.

Implantar servicios de Telemedicina veterinaria que ayuden al sector en los nuevos retos a los que se enfrenta.

Agrupar a los centros veterinarios y profesionales especializados para proporcionar a las familias un servicio de calidad.

Facilitar a los usuarios el acceso a los servicios veterinarios mediante el uso de herramientas digitales.

¿Nos ayudamos?

Name: IGNITE
Description:
IGNITE partners with veterinary teams to build skills and capabilities that advance animal care – improving every role in the hospital, from the front desk to the practice owner.

Veterinary Receptionist Certificate of Excellence (VRCE) - The #1 Veterinary CSR Development Program
VRCE is a proven tool that elevates CSR skills. VRCE graduates show higher competence and confidence in their role, increased appointment bookings, improved phone skills, and better client experiences. VRCE is available for both General Practice and Specialty/ER. 

IGNITE Veterinary Assistant Program (IVAP) - Elevate Productivity in Your Practice
Created by experienced, credentialed technicians, this modern learning program will equip veterinary assistants with the skills and knowledge to deal with challenging scenarios in practice today and tomorrow. Drive a positive client experience and improve patient care.

Elevate your veterinary team with IGNITE - Visit our website to learn more about our industry-leading training programs and learning communities.

Name: VETCANN (Medicina Veterinaria Funcional y sostenible)
Description:
La Red es una plataforma de educación e investigación, enfocada en la Educación Continuada en Cannabis para el sector Agropecuario con enfoque agroecológico. 
Su objetivo misional es garantizar el bienestar y la salud animal de la mano de los Médicos Veterinarios calificados en la modulacion del SEC.
Cuenta con la vinculación activa de 1.900 miembros en 12 países de Iberoamérica. Médicos Veterinarios y Zootecnistas titulados y estudiantes investigadores capacitados.

El desarrollo investigativo de Vetcann está respaldado con trabajo conjunto con 7 Universidades con participación de Médicos Veterinarios; investigadores y docentes.

2016: Nace la Red de Cannabis Medicinal Veterinaria como continuidad del proceso con la ONG Conciencia Verde pero de manera independiente.

2018: Constitución Jurídica de la Red de Cannabis Medicinal Veterinaria.

Actividades que desarrolla: 
Capacitación virtual (no formal) y presencial (formal) de manera periódica con contenido de actualidad académica relacionado con el uso médico del cannabis en el ejercicio veterinario.

Congresos, Seminarios, Cursos y Diplomados nacionales e internacionales.

Apoyo a iniciativas de eventos académicos y/o empresariales que fomenten la industria del cannabis Medicinal en Veterinaria.

Boletín y/o directorio de profesionales

Apoyo mediante interconsulta, estudios de caso, interacción con otros colegas y acompañamiento.

-Certificación a Clínicas veterinarias sobre el uso del Cannabis Medicinal.

Ver otras actividades en: www.vetcann.org/Experiencia

Name: شركة مجموعة سلام البيطرية
Description: مجموعة سلام البيطرية لا تنظر إلى الإبل من جانبها البيطري فقط ، وإنما هي منظومة متكاملة تبدأ من تقديم الرعاية الصحية الفائقة لها مروراً بعمل الأبحاث عنها بكافة تفاصيلها الصحية، والحفاظ على سلالاتها النادرة عبر تقنية زراعة الأجنة و فحوصات الحمض النووي

Name: TopSpec
Description:
Horse Feed 

Feed Balancers,Supplemints, Blends and Chops


TopSpec products are highly respected throughout the equine industry for their nutritional integrity. They have been used successfully by horse owners to improve the performance, condition and relaxation of their horses and ponies.

TopSpec’s nutritionists work closely with many of the leading equine veterinary practices in the UK and provide ‘follow-up’ advice on nutrition and management to their clients. We also produce products to provide nutritional support for horses and ponies that the vets have treated, for example ponies prone to laminitis and those recovering from colic or ‘tying-up.’ Hoof quality problems affect all types of horses and therefore we have put an effective hoof-improvement supplement into several different products in order to provide the perfect solution for every horse.

We believe, where appropriate, in supplying optimum levels of all the micronutrients needed for a specific purpose within a broad-spectrum supplement or balancer. This makes life simpler and more cost-effective for owners and eliminates the risks of unbalanced or over-supplementation when several different products are bought for one horse.

Name: Medical Plus EQ Trading
Description:
Medical Plus is also the leader in high quality veterinary specific imaging equipment. We are proud to be the distributor for Esaote (MyLab), Cuattro, Sedecal and more.
We import the latest in ultrasound technology to make veterinary care and diagnosis a simpler process for vets across Middle East region.

Name: Veterinary Advantage Magazine
Description:
Vet-Advantage Magazine is the only publication focused on activating the animal health distribution channel. Our mission is to actively engage, educate and inform animal health distributor sales reps (DSRs) enabling them to increase their value to animal health customers and suppliers.

Our primary reader is the DSR, both inside and outside, as well as management, executives, customer service and operations/purchasing. We enhance the skills of those who touch the veterinarian customer by providing high level content on the industry including insights on market and economic trends, new products and technology, as well as cutting edge sales and marketing advice from industry leaders.

A key component of our mission is to bring the distribution and manufacturing communities closer together. We play a role in making animal health a better and more productive business, to the benefit of all it's constituents: distributors, manufacturers, veterinarians, vet techs, office personnel and the animals under their care. We currently have over 6,000 subscribers receiving both the Companion and Livestock editions of Vet-Advantage Magazine.

Name: Cornell University Veterinary Specialists
Description:
Cornell University Veterinary Specialists (CUVS) is a veterinary specialty and emergency center located in Stamford, CT. As the largest, and one of very few university-owned veterinary referral centers in the country, CUVS redefines the delivery of veterinary specialty medicine by bringing together the best of academia with the best of specialty private practice.  We differ from other veterinary specialty hospitals in that we are university-affiliated and mission-driven.  Our mission is to provide the most sophisticated and compassionate patient care, to contribute to the advancement of companion animal medicine and to contribute to our community. We are integrated with the diagnostic, research and education programs of Cornell’s leading College of Veterinary Medicine, and all net revenue from CUVS supports Cornell’s educational and discovery missions.
 
CUVS is purely a referral and emergency center and does not offer general practice. Our specialties include: Emergency & Critical Care, Internal Medicine, Soft Tissue and Orthopedic Surgery, Oncology, Cardiology, Ophthalmology, Dentistry & Oral Surgery, Dermatology and Radiology. Many of our specialists are world-renowned in their fields, active in clinical research, widely published and sought-after as lecturers. We are open 24/7 for emergencies and are specialist-staffed, 7 days a week. Our ICU and Emergency Service are run by board-certified critical care specialists and an outstanding nursing staff, offering unparalleled Emergency and Critical Care expertise.
 
CUVS provides exceptional medical care by integrating the latest medical and scientific advances with compassion and with personalized, efficient service. We collaborate closely with the pet owner, the primary care veterinarian and other specialists to provide the best options possible for each and every pet.

Name: VANE
Description:
The Veterinary Angel Network for Entrepreneurs (VANE) is an angel investing network focused on leading-edge ventures in the veterinary services and animal health industry. 

VANE provides direction, connection, and funding in the animal health industry for early-stage ventures and VANE members. 

Our members are veterinarians, business owners, entrepreneurs, and industry experts supporting innovation in the animal health field through investments, mentorship, and networking for animal health business startups and entrepreneurs.

LEARN more or JOIN US as a member, a partner, or an advocate at www.vane.vet!

Name: Nutrofar
Description:
Somos una compañía especializada en la distribución de productos de salud y nutrición animal con una dilatada experiencia en el sector, que apuesta por la tecnología y la innovación como motores de crecimiento permanente. Para ello contamos con un experto equipo de profesionales que abarcan todas las áreas de la producción animal: nutrición, patología, analítica, legislación, medioambiente, manejo y bioseguridad.

Name: Aqua Pharma Group
Description:

Name: GENEPRO Brasil
Description:
Líder e referência mundial em Inseminação Artificial de suínos.

Name: Digi Vet Care
Description:
Cows undergo various disorders that are very much predictable and manageable, yet there is no solution to monitor, provide medical intervention or care for them. This has been affecting cows, the dairy industry and the entire human-animal relationship.

At Digi Vet Care, we have developed a patented AI-based cattle biometric identification and real-time health monitoring system focused on comprehensive healthcare management for cattle and improving their productivity.

Name: VetProCentral
Description:
VetProCentral is a full-service search and recruiting firm serving the veterinary industry. We partner with employers seeking to fill positions for associate, specialty, and emergency veterinarians, as well as practice managers, and hospital administrators.

Our client base spans from coast-to-coast, including Canada, and ranges from small neighborhood clinics to large 20+doctor emergency & specialty hospitals. We work with both corporate consolidators and privately owned veterinary practices.

What Sets Us Apart from The Pack? Exclusivity, confidentiality, and a dynamite guarantee!

We work exclusively with veterinary hospitals, veterinarians, practice managers, and hospital administrators to find the best fit for all involved parties. We will not ‘over sell’ hospitals to our candidates, nor will we ‘over sell’ candidates to our clients. A successful long-term relationship is more important than a quick placement. This philosophy has served us, and our clients, very well since 1992.

The details of every client (hospital name, street address, etc) is kept confidential as dictated by the client. Candidates can engage with our staff - privately - on a confidential basis where communication is handled predominately by phone.

We guarantee all placements and provide support to placed candidates for the first full year. Our results speak for themselves as we’ve had to replace few candidates in the last twenty-five years. Most placements result in long-lasting and mutually beneficial employment relationships.

How We Do It: 
Relationships built on decades of quality service and trust. Name: Kleintierpraxis Cremlingen
Description:
Entdecken Sie die Kleintierpraxis Cremlingen - Ihre vertrauensvolle Tierarztpraxis in der Nähe von Braunschweig! 

Bei uns steht die Gesundheit Ihres Haustieres an erster Stelle. Ob Hund, Katze oder Kleintier, unser engagiertes Team aus erfahrenen Tierärzten und Tiermedizinischen Fachangestellten ist mit Leidenschaft dabei, für das Wohlergehen Ihrer vierbeinigen Freunde zu sorgen.

Warum Kleintierpraxis Cremlingen?

· Moderne Ausstattung: Digitales Röntgen, Ultraschall und ein hauseigenes Labor ermöglichen schnelle und präzise Diagnosen.
· Schonende Behandlungsmethoden: Inhalationsnarkose mit modernstem Patientenmonitoring (EKG, CO2, SPO2) für sichere Operationen.
· Vielfältige Leistungen: Von umfangreichen Operationen bis hin zur spezialisierten Herzüberwachung und Endoskopie.
· Intensive Betreuung: Eine eigene Station für die intensivmedizinische Betreuung Ihrer Lieblinge.

Flexibilität für Sie: Um Wartezeiten zu minimieren, arbeiten wir ausschließlich mit Terminsprechstunden. Für besondere Situationen sind Termine auch außerhalb der regulären Sprechzeiten möglich.

Einfache Terminvereinbarung: Nutzen Sie unsere Online-Terminbuchung, schreiben Sie uns eine E-Mail oder rufen Sie einfach an. Wir machen es Ihnen so leicht wie möglich!

Standortvorteil? Wir sind Ihr Tierarzt in strategisch günstiger Lage am südlichen Rand des Landkreises Wolfenbüttel, mit hervorragender Anbindung an Königslutter und Wolfsburg.

Wir freuen uns darauf, Sie und Ihren tierischen Begleiter in unserer Praxis willkommen zu heißen! 

https://kleintierpraxis-cremlingen.de/datenschutz

Name: CVS Vets Australia
Description:
Established in 1999, CVS Group is a leading provider of integrated veterinary services with around 500 practices throughout the UK and Australia.

CVS is built upon recommending and providing the best clinical care every time and we believe this is what drives the success of our practices. We aim to deliver the highest standard of healthcare and empower our colleagues to make the right clinical decisions for our patients.

Alongside around 500 practices we provide great facilities and equipment and we operate:
- 10 specialist referral hospitals 
- 35 dedicated out-of-hours sites 
- 2 diagnostic laboratories and MiLab a desktop analyser business 
- 10 pet crematoria 
- Healthy Pet Club 
- MiPet pet insurance
- AnimedDirect online retail 
- VetDirect buying group

We support and develop our teams to be the best in their role, which includes access to industry-leading learning, education and development. This includes; our unique Knowledge Hub educational platform which offers over 261 courses and 235 webinars covering a wide range of clinical and non-clinical education and training; and our Vet Oracle vet-to-vet telemedicine service which offers specialist interpretation of results in 5 disciplines (cardiology, dermatology, medicine, neurology, oncology, radiology) and practical virtual assistance to our vets on a global scale. 

We are a great place to work and have a career and our practices benefit from the strengths of operating within a group that at every level combines the talents of vets and non-clinical leaders. 

We offer practices a wide range of operational support, leaving colleagues free to focus on looking after their patients. Our experienced Australian Recruitment Team will support practices in hiring vets, veterinary nurses, practice assistants and receptionists. Whilst our expert HR teams are on hand to support managers with all aspects relating to the smooth running of their practice.

Name: Speed Veto
Description:
Bienvenue sur la première application de recrutement vétérinaire et ASV !
SPEED VETO, c’est surtout et avant tout l’histoire d’une aventure humaine.

L’histoire d’une bande de copains vétérinaires, confrontés comme tous les autres aux problèmes de recrutement et chez qui germe, puis grandit l’idée qu’il faut penser le recrutement autrement. C’est ensuite l’histoire de collègues, embarqués dans l’aventure sans trop savoir où aller au départ, mais capables de s’engager derrière un projet qui a réellement du sens pour toute une profession.
C’est enfin l’histoire d’un groupe tout entier de femmes et d’hommes, partageant les mêmes valeurs humaines et apportant toute sa force au projet, pour voir le recrutement vétérinaire autrement !

SPEED VETO, c’est certes une application toute simple, mais c’est aussi tout ça à la fois !

Name: Institute of Animal Technology
Description:
The Institute of Animal Technology (IAT) recognises and supports the benefits of using animals in research. Our members strongly believe that excellence in animal care and welfare goes hand in hand with excellence in science.

By our activities we continue to advance and promote excellence in technology and the practice of laboratory animal care and welfare.

In 1985 a Register of Animal Technicians was established to emphasise the Institute's position regarding the ethical and legal aspects of care of laboratory animals. Many members of the Register, who are bound by a Code of Ethics, are named under the Animals (Scientific Procedures) Act 1986 as the Named Animal Care & Welfare Officer (NACWO) they are responsible for the care of all animals in designated establishments.

The IAT actively support the three R's - Refinement, Reduction & Replacement. We have expertise in our membership that are able to advise on all aspects of Animal welfare and technology.

We work closely with Animal Welfare organisations to promote best practice and draft guidelines on the care of all laboratory species including rodents, dogs, primates, farm animals, birds and fish

Name: PetScan
Description:
PetScan Nordic AB is a leading provider of advanced diagnostic solutions, specializing in veterinary care across the Nordics and Iberia. The company is committed to enhancing pet healthcare through the integration of cutting-edge technologies like SignalPET, a powerful AI-driven platform that supports veterinary practices with precise, efficient radiographic analysis and expert second opinions. With a focus on customer-centric service and innovative tools, PetScan Nordic AB ensures that veterinary professionals have access to the best resources for accurate diagnosis and treatment.

The company operates through a strong local presence in both the Nordics and Iberia, offering tailored support for clinics of all sizes. PetScan Nordic AB's services aim to streamline the diagnostic process, reduce administrative workloads, and improve clinical outcomes for pets, ensuring that both veterinarians and pet owners benefit from faster, more reliable results.

PetScan Nordic AB is the exclusive distributor of SignalPET in the Nordics and the Iberia region, and it works closely with veterinary clinics to onboard them onto a subscription model for continuous support and access to the latest technology. The company’s goal is to expand its network by partnering with a growing number of independent and corporate clinics, empowering them to provide top-tier care to pets while optimizing their operational efficiency.

Description:
The Federation of Independent Veterinary Practices (FIVP) is a not-for-profit business made up of independently owned veterinary practices across the UK. FIVP provides membership which not only means members are supporting the independent veterinary sector but in return receive benefits.

We support current business owners and entrepreneurs in finding their veterinary practices and help a variety of different veterinary professionals finding their career in an independent veterinary practice. If you are looking for a job, we can help!

Membership is practice based and open to all independent veterinary practices in the UK. We consider an independent practice to be one in which the owners work within the practice and play a significant role in its day-to-day activities.

Alors suivez-nous dans l'aventure !
