Name: Pawsitive Veterinary Clinic
Description:
Pawsitive Veterinary Clinic is a veterinary-owned and led clinic with state-of-the-art facilities, and offers 24-hour emergency veterinary care. The Company offers a broad range of mainly small animal veterinary services – including both routine and advanced surgery – to meet all a pet’s health and wellbeing needs, from microchipping and neutering to more complicated surgeries and leading-edge diagnostic technology. The business has been built on its unique branch partnership model, where vets can become equity partners in their own clinic, with complete clinical freedom and unrivaled support. Our core purpose is to deliver exceptional care whenever needed and to build a national community of passionate vets offering progressive care to pets and their pet owners.

What we offer
Our caring & capable staff are always there to help. Whether your pet simply needs a check-up or requires emergency or specialist attention, we promise to deliver exceptional care that’s thoughtful, caring, and flexible.

Name: ANTECH Italia
Description:
In qualità di leader di livello mondiale nella diagnostica veterinaria, nella tecnologia e nell'imaging, ANTECH collabora quotidianamente con migliaia di Medici Veterinari per garantire migliori risultati per la salute degli animali. Il nostro portafoglio completo per la diagnostica infonde la fiducia necessaria ai Medici Veterinari per decidere il trattamento più efficace, giorno dopo giorno. Rendiamo più veloce e semplice lo screening, la diagnosi e il monitoraggio delle malattie quando i nostri partner e i loro pazienti ne hanno più bisogno. Perché soluzioni diagnostiche più intelligenti conducono a cure migliori. ANTECH è orgogliosamente parte di Mars Petcare, un'azienda diversificata dedicata a un unico scopo: A BETTER WORLD FOR PETS. 

Se visiti il nostro sito web, i tuoi dati personali saranno trattati in conformità con la nostra Informativa sulla Privacy come segue: https://www.mars.com/privacy e https://www.mars.com/legal-italy

Name: Grupo Hospitalar Veterinário Pet Support
Description:
Eﬁciência e cuidado no atendimento veterinário. É dessa forma que os profissionais especializados do Pet Support acolhem seus pacientes. Assim, oferecemos o que há de mais moderno em Medicina Veterinária, sempre prezando pela qualidade de vida. Nosso propósito de existência é CUIDAR DE FAMÍLIAS, curando cães e gatos através da estrutura hospitalar, equipe altamente qualiﬁcada, assistência 24h e, o principal: muito amor.

Acreditamos profundamente em nosso lema: “amor que move excelência”. Foi assim que construímos a nossa história e é assim que atendemos cada paciente e sua família.

Missão:
Cuidar da saúde de cães e gatos, do início ao fim da sua jornada, através da busca de soluções médicas completas e integradas, com desenvolvimento científico, tecnológico, humano e do bem-estar, proporcionando acolhimento, confiança, cuidado e satisfação dos tutores.

Visão:
Ser reconhecido como um Centro referência na integração do atendimento acolhedor ao paciente pet e ao seu tutor, aliado ao suporte de saúde preventivo e curativo intensivo para cães e gatos. Atingir esses objetivos pela qualidade dos serviços prestados visando o bem-estar animal, a ética e o respeito para com o tutor e o médico veterinário parceiro.

Valores:
- Excelência (do verbo exceder, fazer além da expectativa).
- Melhoria contínua, através da inovação e da superação dos erros.
Comunicação assertiva, redundante, empática e simpática.
- Desenvolvimento profissional e pessoal constante dos colaboradores.
- Somos um corpo: cada um fazendo seu papel diferenciado, mas interrelacionado, de forma orgânica e organizada.
- Ética profissional, sempre auxiliando colegas internos e parceiros externos.
- E Amor prático como o principal valor, permeando todos os valores acima.

Name: CATalyst Council
Description:
The CATalyst Council is the outcome of two grassroots efforts – Re-Branding Felix and the CATalyst Summit. Following these two meetings, CATalyst Council, a non-profit entity, was created that includes three distinct groups: Veterinary Medicine, Shelter/Animal Welfare, and related Industry entities such as Foundations and Cat Fanciers, the Media, and commercial companies. By virtue of the open and inclusive structure of the board, these bodies are able to represent a broad range of diverse stakeholders in feline healthcare and welfare. Many of these stakeholders participated in the CATalyst Summit. Working together the Council intends to make a difference in the way the United States sees and experiences cats.

The CATalyst Purpose addresses our desire to change society’s image of cats as aloof and not needing human contact or care.

Our Vision is to raise the level of care and welfare of cats by cat owners – one that any owner will embrace through the human-animal bond and can achieve – supported by the highest quality veterinary care, preventative medicine, and cat specific products.

Name: The Companion Animal Parasite Council
Description:
Founded in 2002, the Companion Animal Parasite Council (CAPC) is an independent, non-profit organization that is dedicated to increasing awareness of the threat parasites present to pets and family members.  By generating and disseminating credible, accurate and timely information for the diagnosis, treatment, prevention and control of parasitic infections, CAPC works to educate pet owners and veterinary professionals.

With its vision to have “Every Pet Tested and Protected”, CAPC has created many innovative and informative programs including its parasite forecasts, parasite prevalence maps and parasite guidelines.   These programs were designed to keep veterinary professionals and pet owners informed on the growing risk parasites pose to the health of both pets and humans in North America.

The activities of the Companion Animal Parasite Council are directed by a board of directors that consists of both practicing companion animal veterinary professionals and research/academic parasitologists.  These individuals are leaders in their fields and provide extensive practical and technical knowledge in their respective areas of expertise.
https://www.capcvet.org
CAPC is recognized by the IRS as a corporation organized and operated primarily for charitable and educational purposes under Sec. 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to the Companion Animal Parasite Council, a tax-exempt organization under Sec. 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code, are deductible for computing income and estate taxes.

Name: Dox-al Italia SpA
Description:
Dox-al is an Italian company that has been operating for over 40 years to create, design, produce and distribute feed and pharmaceutical products for animal welfare.

We are inspired by a unique way of working, which can be summarized in two words: "Feed good". Literally, "feed well", but for us, the meaning goes far beyond. 
Dox-al, in fact, studies solutions to help breeders to follow good feeding techniques combined with proper breeding management, respecting the needs and rhythms of different species of animals, which in this way live better and grow healthier. 
Reducing the use of pharmacological treatments allows an improvement in the quality of meat and milk produced for the benefit of consumers, but also greater production yields to the benefit of the breeder and the protection of the environment.

The group is divided into two production sites located in Italy, which are spread over a total area of 24,000 square meters, and has 18 production facilities and 3 analysis laboratories.
Active on the Italian market, which represents 50% of turnover, Dox-al exports directly to 46 countries, especially in the Middle and the Far East, in China, India, and South America.

 The research field is the fulcrum around which the company has grown over the years, and has led it to collaborate
with academic offices throughout Europe and giving life to 18 original patents, with rights extended to the five continents. 
It's the result of an approach to animal husbandry that favors work in close contact with breeding farms and feed mills, which allows Dox-al to know closely problems and critical aspects of the various operations and to study the most appropriate solutions for different specificities.

Name: Premier Vet Alliance

Premier Vet Alliance is a global leader in preventative pet healthcare, supporting veterinary practices across the UK, Europe, and North America. As one of the only health plan providers with direct experience in owning and managing veterinary practices, we offer a unique understanding of the challenges practices face. Our bespoke pet health plans are simple, flexible and easy to manage, helping practices deliver excellent care while benefiting from improved compliance, increased client retention, and a reliable revenue stream.
 
Our services include convenient home delivery solutions, and the PVA Training Academy, which offers tailored training and support to meet the needs of modern veterinary teams.

With more than a decade of experience and over 3,000 partner practices worldwide, Premier Vet Alliance combines deep veterinary expertise with innovative technology to help practices grow. Our dedicated teams provide hands-on support and data-driven insights to ensure your health plan performs at its best. 

Whether you're looking to launch a new pet health plan, switch providers or enhance your existing offering with home delivery, PVA delivers the tools, technology, and training needed to unlock your practice’s full potential, wherever you are in the world.

Description:

Name: European College of Zoological Medicine (ECZM)
Description:
The European College of Zoological Medicine (ECZM) is one of the 27 European Board of Veterinary Specialisation (EBVS)-recognised veterinary specialist colleges. 

The EBVS covers 40 veterinary specialties, of which ECZM covers of the following five:
-Avian Medicine and Surgery
-Herpetological Medicine and Surgery
-Small Mammal Medicine and Surgery
-Wildlife Population Health
-Zoo Health Management

Name: St David's Poultry Team
Description:
St David’s Poultry Team offers a complete service for all poultry veterinary requirements. We operate on a ‘hands-on,’ approach, providing clients with health care programmes tailored to their individual needs and requirements. In doing so, we aim to be proactive rather than reactive, focusing on preventative measures and strategic health planning with regular site visits and routine monitoring where required.

The expert team of veterinary surgeons consists of 25 poultry and game vets and are led by directors Richard Turner and Alan Beynon. With over thirty years experience in poultry and game medicine, they have gathered a wealth of specific knowledge and continue to develop innovative solutions to help clients achieve better results. The veterinary team are supported by our Field Service Staff, Office Team and Dispensary Staff. 

Whilst head office is based near Exeter, Devon, we have national coverage through our network of fifteen practices across the United Kingdom and Ireland.

Name: Alefah Trading Company
Description:

Also to be a reliable and provide consultancy services, supplies, and veterinary products in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and the Arab region through quality performance and service excellence, and become a strategic partner of choice for Arab and international destinations profit, non-profit organization working in the veterinary field. And not forget to contribute to the work to support and increase animal production through the provision of veterinary services sustainability.

Name: The SkinVet
Description:
The SkinVet is a specialized veterinary dermatology service dedicated to providing exceptional care for dogs and cats with skin conditions. We leverage cutting-edge diagnostics and treatments to achieve optimal results for your furry companions.

Our Philosophy:
As the veterinary profession embraces specialization, The SkinVet Co. fulfills a growing need.

Dr. Diu Somani, a passionate veterinary dermatologist, leads our team. We offer comprehensive dermatology care, from consultations and advanced diagnostics to multimodal therapy and, when necessary, surgical intervention.

We're committed to keeping you informed about all things skin-related for your pets. Follow us for valuable insights and updates!

Name: Forte Healthcare Ltd
Description:
Founded in 2002, Forte Healthcare, the pharmaceutical wing of the Forte Group, distributes products to veterinary practices in Ireland, UK, and across the EU with exclusive partnerships included in its product portfolio. We focus on companion and large animals, emphasising innovation, regulatory affairs, and proprietary R&D. 

Forte Healthcare Ltd are now a producer and distributor of a number of niche, novel and innovative animal healthcare products, as well as some of the best known brands & generics.

Our portfolio includes a number of market leading products which cover companion, performance and intensive production animals.
Since 2002, our portfolio has grown substantially and includes a number of market leading products.

We have invested heavily in regulatory affairs and technical support so that we can offer to our partner companies the use of our expertise in these areas along with assistance with developing new export markets.

We now register our own products and have a global presence; exporting to over 18 countries in Europe, Asia and the Middle East.
Forte Healthcare operates its own sales teams in Ireland, UK, and Poland and is adding other countries through partnerships, joint ventures and our own subsidiaries.

We are pleased to have recently brought our exciting range of new products to the market under our own brand. We plan continuous additions to not only our own range but also to our portfolio of other brands which share our vision of Innovation in Animal Healthcare.

Name: VetTrue System from Epona Biotec Ltd
Description:
Epona Biotec Ltd has developed a disposable biosensor that attaches beneath the tail of a horse and accurately measures the core body temperature of multiple horses in real-time. 
This wireless system is a world first in the equine veterinary market and is ideal for use during international horse transportation, in quarantine units and in veterinary hospitals.

Name: KUZEY PET Veteriner Ürünleri
Description:
2003 yılında kurulan şirketimiz; 2004 yılında Nestle Marmara Bölgesi Tek satıcılık sözleşmesi yaparak; Nestle Purina kedi köpek ürünlerinin Marmara Bölgesi’ nde satışına başladı. 2008 yılında Nestle Purina ürünlerinin yanı sıra veteriner ilaç ve sarf malzeme ithalatını yaptığımız pet ürünleri satışı ile hızlı bir büyüme sağlayarak sektörde söz sahibi firma konumuna yükseldik. 2011 yılında müşteri odaklı hizmet kalitemiz, global markalarımız ve müşterilerimizin güvene dayalı iş birliği sayesinde hızlı ve güçlü büyümemize paralel olarak kurumsal kimlik çalışmalarımızı da hızlandırdık.

2012 yılında yurt dışı üretici, girişimci ve büyüme odaklı olan MAABAROT firması ile gelişim ve büyüme hızımızı artırmayı amaçlayarak KUZEY PET ismi altında yeni bir yapılanmaya gittik.

KUZEY PET olarak Nestle Purina markasına; Ferplast, Ever Clean ve Simple Solution  gibi markaların Türkiye Distribütörlüğü’ nü ekleyerek ürün ve hizmet yelpazemizi genişlettik.

Marmara Bölgesi’nde devam ettiğimiz Nestle Purina tek satıcılık görevimize Antalya - Adana Bölgesi’ni dahil ederek iş hacmimizi genişlettik. 2012 yılından bu yana KUZEY PET kurumsal kimliği ile müşteri odaklı hizmet kalitemiz ve güçlü global markalarımız eşliğinde çalışmalarımıza ve sektörel yatırımlarımıza devam etmekten gurur duyuyoruz. 



Firmamızın değişmeyen prensipleri; daimi kalite, kusursuz hizmet, zamanında teslimat ve uygun fiyat olmuştur.

‘Başarı ve sürekliliğin teminatı, hizmette dürüstlük ve kalitedir.’ prensibiyle çalışan KUZEY PET, gösterdiğiniz yakın ilgi ve desteğinizden ötürü teşekkür ederek sizlere bugün olduğu gibi gelecekte de prensiplerinden ödün vermeden hizmet vermeye devam edecektir.

Description:
VetGruppen hat seine Wurzeln in der Vision engagierter Tiermedizinerinnen und Tiermedizinern aus Dänemark und Norwegen. Inzwischen haben wir uns zu einem europäischen tiermedizinischen Netzwerk entwickelt, das stolze 130 Qualitätspraxen umfasst. Wir sind alle ein Team - 1.700 Kolleginnen und Kollegen, darunter viele Fachtierärztinnen und Fachtierärzte, in 7 Ländern: Dänemark, Schweden, Finnland, Norwegen, Deutschland, Österreich und der Schweiz.

In Deutschland zählen wir bereits mehr als 15 zugehörige Praxen und Kliniken im Kleintier- sowie Pferdebereich, und wir suchen weitere Betriebe und Fachkräfte, die unserem Netzwerk beitreten. Unser deutsches Team mit Sitz in Hamburg und Frankfurt ist bundesweit unterwegs, um sich mit interessierten und potenziellen Standorten auszutauschen.

Bei uns wird der Begriff "Gruppe" neu gedacht – jeder Standort bewahrt seine lokale Individualität und bleibt Miteigentümerin und Miteigentümer.

Bei landes- und europaweiten Veranstaltungen sowie internationalen Themengruppen ist unser gemeinsames Engagement einander zu helfen, besonders spürbar. Mit unserer Akademie wird der Wissenstransfer zudem jederzeit möglich - in Person, hybrid oder online.

Name: American Association of Avian Pathologists
Description:
The American Association of Avian Pathologists is an international association whose mission is to facilitate member collaboration to advance science-based knowledge, expertise, and education on poultry health, welfare, and food safety. It is open to anyone who is engaged in some phase of poultry health. Each year AAAP conducts a scientific program and symposium where the latest findings and issues regarding poultry health are shared and discussed. AAAP also publishes Avian Diseases, a quarterly, international journal for original basic or clinical research from various disciplines including microbiology, immunology, and pathology. In addition, AAAP publishes many educational materials on avian health including Diseases of Poultry and the Avian Disease Manual. AAAP committees and interest groups offer members a forum for discussion and action on specific poultry topics and issues. Through the AAAP Foundation, scholarships and awards are given each year to support those who are striving for careers in poultry health and acknowledge outstanding achievement in the area of poultry health.

AAAP members are veterinary practitioners, diagnosticians, researchers, and students interested in poultry health and medicine. It was founded in 1957. The organizing group consisted of poultry pathologists who met at the poultry section of the American Veterinary Medical Association (AVMA) convention’s scientific program. Once started, AAAP began organizing a poultry scientific program that replaced the AVMA’s. AAAP’s membership has always been open to non-veterinarians in contrast to the AVMA’s membership criteria, but AAAP maintains close ties with the AVMA. It is an allied constituent organization to the AVMA. Full AAAP members must be AVMA members.

Name: Australasian Veterinary Boards Council
RECRUIT-VET
Description:
Recruit-Vet is an international recruitment platform in the field of Animal Health, where prospective employers can publish their job offers and where candidates can post, free of charge, their profiles and resumes in our CV library for employers to access.
Our platform provides customized job offers (for example, featuring photos and/or publishing on select social networks) in Animal Health, access to our updated CV library, and an alert system tailored to your requirements and needs.
Recruit-Vet also searches for talent specialized in the field of Animal Health. Based in France, we work with candidates and employers in Europe as well as in North and South America.
We understand the economic and human implications of a recruitment process. Our mission is to help animal health and veterinary care providers  find the candidate who will perfectly meet their needs. In this particularly competitive market, our knowledge of the industry and our presence on various social networks are a real asset.
At Recruit-Vet, sharing is part of our values. That is why we believe that a successful recruitment must satisfy all three actors involved: the candidate, the employer and Recruit-Vet. We are convinced that trust and transparency are essential, and because we are confident in our efficiency, when you entrust us with a recruitment, you only pay when you succeed - that is, when a contract is signed between the employer and a candidate. 
Whether you are an employer or a candidate, whether you are looking for the perfect match or whether you are in search of a new career or a new challenge, we will meet your needs and we look forward to meeting and working with you!


info@recruit-vet.com

Name: Hamilton Specialist Referrals
Description:
Hamilton Specialist Referrals is dedicated to providing clinical excellence in a caring and friendly environment. We believe that our compassion for our patients should extend to our clients and team.

We opened in early July 2018 - and are located just outside High Wycombe (J4, M40) Buckinghamshire, in a purpose built state-of-the-art hospital.

We deliver world-class, exemplary clinical services, but with a clear focus on the people that make that a reality. By nurturing our workforce we are able to offer the very best services to the pets entrusted into our care and also to their owners.

Hamilton Specialist Referrals was born of the belief that there is room for a new wave of veterinary excellence across the UK.  There is a strong focus on providing a personal and reassuring client experience from first contact through to discharge.  Excellent clinical care, that is second-to-none, delivered in a friendly and supportive manner to referring vets, is paramount to the team.

The hospital is operational 24 hours a day, 365 days a year and offers the most advanced treatment options available for orthopaedic, neurological, internal medicine, soft tissue surgery and cardiology referral cases.

Facilities include on-site 1.5T MRI and CT scanner suites, a variety of joint replacement systems, electro diagnostics, and a full complement of the latest radiography and arthroscopy equipment. Furthermore, the hospital has a dedicated physiotherapy and rehabilitation department, which includes aqua treadmills and computerised gait analysis technology.

Referring vets should think of us as an extension to their practice - always on hand for support or advice.  We will provide a warm and friendly service for them, their clients and patients.

Over the years, this has led to a broad selection of innovative products and enabled us to evolve into one of the world’s leading suppliers of 

Avian vaccines

Name: VEKO CARE PVT. LTD.
Description: Veko Care Pvt. Ltd. are manufacturers of veterinary medicines. Veko has a world-class manufacturing facility accredited by WHO, Australia, USA – EPA, Costa Rica, Kenya and compliant with stringent GMP guidelines. We make specialty medicines for Dogs, Cats, Equine, Poultry, Livestock, Cattle and Aquaculture. Our manufacturing unit stands as a testament to our dedication to quality. Equipped with cutting-edge machinery and technology, the facility adheres to the highest industry standards, ensuring the production of safe, effective, and reliable veterinary pharmaceuticals. The facility houses two dedicated manufacturing units with unidirectional workflow – one for external preparation and the other for oral preparation. At this manufacturing facility, Veko manufactures a large suite of oral solids in the form of tablets, bolus, powders, granules and oral paste – batch sizes ranging from 30 to 250 Kgs. Veko also manufactures external preparations that include ear drops, spot-on, sprays, pour-on, shampoo and dusting powders in flexible batch sizes from 5 to 500 liters. 73% of the dosages form applicable in the Veterinary Medicines Industry (both Value / Volume wise)

Description:
Welttierschutzstiftung (WTS) is a German  charitable foundation, established in 2015 by Welttierschutzgesellschaft e.V. The foundation promotes animal welfare worldwide. The main focus of its work lies on improving animal welfare through academic education and continuous professional development in emerging and developing countries, on scientific research on animal welfare, on raising awareness towards animal welfare in society and on the search for solutions to a global animal-friendly future. 
With its main programme VETS UNITED, WTS supports animal health and welfare education in emerging and developing countries, mainly in Africa. The foundation works in close cooperation with educational institutions, veterinary associations and local government departments. It provides technical and financial support to the projects until they can be handed over and sustained by the local partners and institutions.

Name: Dr. Kelly's Surgical Unit
Description:
Dr. Kelly’s Surgical Unit serves the greater Phoenix and Tucson areas and specializes in quality, compassionate surgical and preventative procedures for your furbabies. As pet owners, veterinarians, and former vet clinic operators, we know how expensive and swamped in-office vet clinics and hospitals can be. They take time out of your busy schedule, make it hard to book speedy appointments when your pet needs help the most, and sometimes cost an arm and a leg! For many pet owners with limited schedules, finding affordable procedures at convenient places and times can be stressful.

That’s why we created a better option with the same great surgical and preventative care options you receive in traditional veterinary hospitals. In every one of our mobile units, you can expect quality, loving care at the highest level, but also enjoy cost savings and flexible scheduling.

We’re made up of true animal lovers and dedicated pet owners. We’ve had our own experience with veterinary hospitals and pet clinics and have used this knowledge to better craft our own, affordable model. At Dr. Kelly’s, your furry companion will receive the TLC he or she deserves, and you can go back to enjoying the things that really matter.

Name: Gorilla Doctors
Description:
Gorilla Doctors is dedicated to saving the mountain and Grauer's gorillas one gorilla patient at a time and is the only group providing these animals with direct, hands-on care in the wild. Our international veterinary team provides medical care to ill and injured mountain and Grauer's gorillas living in the national parks of Rwanda, Uganda, and the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC). With just over 1,000 mountain gorillas left in the world today, the health and well being of every individual gorilla is vital to the species’ survival.

In addition to providing eastern gorillas with healthcare, our veterinary team helps rescue and treat mountain and Grauer’s gorillas orphaned by poachers and conducts research on emerging pandemic threats in human and wildlife populations in Uganda and Rwanda.

Name: Calier Uruguay
Description:
Somos la filial de Calier en Uruguay. Nuestro compromiso es mejorar la calidad y cantidad de proteína animal que consume la población, así como velar por el bienestar de los animales de compañía, sus propietarios y familias. 
Con este objetivo, y desde nuestro nacimiento en 1968, nos hemos centrado en la investigación, desarrollo, fabricación y comercialización de productos farmacológicos y biológicos para animales de producción y de compañía, así como en poner al alcance de los profesionales del sector veterinario aquellos servicios que le faciliten su labor diaria. 
Con sede en Barcelona (España) contamos con una amplia red de filiales y tenemos actividad comercial en Europa, Latinoamérica, Oriente Medio y Asia. Con plantas de producción a la vanguardia en España, Colombia y Uruguay, todos nuestros procesos se rigen por las Buenas Prácticas de Manufactura (BPMs).

Description:

A empresa foi fundada no dia 1º de Janeiro de 2011 e tem como atividades principais a comercialização de material genético através de sêmen e consultoria genética e reprodutiva para seus clientes.

A SELECT SIRES DO BRASIL foi fundada através da aquisição de um distribuidor da SELECT SIRES Inc. que atuava no Brasil. A Select Sires Inc. é uma Central de Cooperativas de Inseminação Artificial (IA) americana, com sede em Plain City, Ohio, fundada em 1º de Julho de 1969 através da fusão de diversas Cooperativas de IA. A Select Sires Inc. possui empresa própria nos EUA e no Canadá, mas atua em todos os continentes através de distribuidores que compram e revendem seu produto.

Para melhor atender o mercado da IA do Brasil, a Select Sires Inc. percebeu a necessidade de possuir um maior controle sobre o desenvolvimento do seu produto nesse mercado então decidiu adquirir o distribuidor SEMEIA GENÉTICA constituindo a empresa SELECT SIRES DO BRASIL GENÉTICA Ltda, sendo este o primeiro investimento da Select Sires Inc. fora da América do Norte.

Name: Utah Humane Society
Description:
About the Humane Society of Utah

The Humane Society of Utah is dedicated to the elimination of pain, fear, and suffering in all animals. Since 1960, the Utah Humane Society has been sheltering homeless animals, fighting cruelty and neglect, and creating an atmosphere of respect, responsibility, and compassion for all animals. As the largest open-admission private animal resource center in the state, the Utah Humane Society welcomes any companion animal that can legally be admitted. We work hard to ensure that every healthy and treatable pet that enters the facility will be placed into a loving home. The Humane Society of Utah is a local, independent 501(c)(3) private nonprofit organization that does not receive any state or government funding and is not a branch of any national organization. It is funded by the voluntary contributions of individuals, businesses, and foundations. Read more online at www.utahhumane.org.

Scribenote - used by thousands of veterinary professionals - automatically generates accurate records by capturing conversations during appointments and other key workflows.

Name: MEDiVET S.A.
Description:
MEDiVET S.A. is a leading provider of veterinary services and products on the Polish market. Since 2019, we are part of the international veterinary corporation Covetrus, which employs more than 5500 people worldwide. 

We have been building our experience for over 25 years. The company's head office in Poland is located in Śrem near Poznań. 

We care about health and well-being of animals, providing a wide range of products to clinics across the country. Based on our knowledge of the local market and unique international experience, we help our customers to develop their clinics and support them in making the most effective use of their animal treatment time. 

We base our business on three pillars: PRODUCTS, SERVICES, EDUCATION, which combine responsibility for animals with attention to commitment, knowledge and harmonious human development. 

If our values are close to you, we invite you to join our Team. Let's change Polish veterinary medicine together!

Name: Veternity
Description:
For more than 25 years Veternity’s funeral expertise has been at the service of families mourning the loss of their furry companion. Fuelled by their passion for animals and the respect they deserve, our funeral agents have been trained to deal with grief and bereavement. We are established in France, Germany, Belgium and Poland and we are leaders on the two largest markets in Europe. 
More recently, we have crossed the Atlantic and are now present in North America where the prospects are more than promising as there are over 1000 crematories and over 200 M cats and dogs. Our ambition : The values and the services that we have been incessantly improving and diversifying have appealed to many private individuals and professionals.

Name: Veterinary Specialists of Sydney
Description:
Welcome to Veterinary Specialists of Sydney (VSOS)!
We are a world-class team of compassionate veterinary specialists and emergency vets delivering cutting-edge care to your beloved pets. 
Based in Sydney, VSOS operates a unique hybrid model—combining a 24/7 Advanced Treatment Centre in Miranda with mobile services that bring specialist surgery, internal medicine, ultrasound, and cardiology directly to local vet clinics across Greater Sydney.
Our internationally trained experts in Internal Medicine, Cardiology, Neurology, Surgery, Emergency & Critical Care (ECC), and Anaesthesia are redefining veterinary excellence in Australia. 
From pioneering life-saving procedures like Mitral Valve Repair and Interventional Radiology to providing heartfelt, collaborative care—we go beyond possible to deliver the very best outcomes for pets and their families.

Name: Animal Trust Vets CIC
Description: Animal Trust is a leading veterinary social enterprise committed to providing quality yet affordable care through our General Practice, Referral, and Pet A&E services. As a Community Interest Company, we support pet owners across all social demographics, celebrating the unique bond between people and their pets and helping them with accessible and compassionate care.

Bristol Vet Specialists (BVS) is a new state-of-the-art Specialist veterinary referral hospital for small animals, opening in autumn 2023. With cutting edge facilities and Specialists in every discipline, we will be able to diagnose and treat almost any condition for cats and dogs.

Name: AniCura Belgium
Description:
AniCura is een toonaangevende aanbieder van diergeneeskundige zorg in Europa, ontstaan vanuit de gedachte dat het delen van middelen kansen creëert voor hoge kwaliteit in de veterinaire zorg en betere resultaten voor onze patiënten. Wij bieden een breed scala aan hoogwaardige medische behandelingen, van preventieve en basisgezondheidszorg tot gespecialiseerde zorg, waaronder geavanceerde diagnostiek, interne geneeskunde, intensive care, chirurgie en orthopedie. Ook revalidatie, fysiotherapie, voedingsadvies en geselecteerde diervoeding en verzorgingsproducten maken deel uit van ons aanbod.

Ons netwerk omvat 500 klinieken in 17 Europese landen, met jaarlijks meer dan 4,5 miljoen patiëntbezoeken. Sinds 2018 maakt AniCura deel uit van Mars Veterinary Health, een netwerk van meer dan 3.000 klinieken wereldwijd die jaarlijks voor meer dan 25 miljoen huisdieren zorgen. Samen streven we naar de hoogste standaard in huisdierenzorg en ons doel: EEN BETERE WERELD VOOR HUISDIEREN.

--

AniCura est un leader en soins vétérinaires en Europe, fondé sur l'idée que le partage des ressources améliore les soins. Nos services comprennent les soins préventifs et de base, les diagnostics avancés, la médecine interne, les soins intensifs, la chirurgie, l'orthopédie, la réhabilitation, la physiothérapie, les conseils diététiques et une sélection d'aliments et produits de soins pour animaux.

Avec 500 cliniques dans 15 pays européens, AniCura offre plus de 4,5 millions de consultations annuelles. Depuis 2018, AniCura fait partie de Mars Veterinary Health, un réseau de plus de 3 000 cliniques mondiales soignant plus de 25 millions d'animaux par an. Ensemble, nous visons les plus hauts standards de soins pour animaux et notre objectif commun: UN MEILLEUR MONDE POUR LES ANIMAUX DE COMPAGNIE.

Legal: https://www.mars.com/legal-belgium
Privacy: mars.com/privacy-policy-belgium

Name: VetFamily Brasil
Description:
Olá! Seja bem-vindo à nossa rede!

Nascemos há mais de 20 anos, a partir de um grupo de veterinários que compartilhavam as mesmas paixões e propósitos, mas também os mesmos desafios.

Assim, desenvolvemos soluções que fortalecem os negócios de veterinários independentes. Hoje, nossa comunidade abraça mais de 4.300 clínicas e 6.500 veterinários em mais de 10 países.

Acreditamos no potencial dos médicos-veterinários. Por isso, trabalhamos para contribuir com o seu crescimento, porque sonhamos com o seu sucesso e desenvolvimento!

Oferecemos vantagens comerciais, conhecimento, ferramentas de gestão e tecnologias inovadoras, através de uma cadeia integrada e sustentável.

Somos a VetFamily, bem-vindo à nossa família!

Name: Veterinary Management Solutions
Description:
Your team is your business’s lifeblood. A top performing team means consistency of client care, patient care, and business performance. A dysfunctional team means a high stress environment, inconsistent care, and an underperforming business. 

We exist because we believe that improving your team and culture can and will be transformative for your veterinary practice. We take the time to understand the difference that you need to be made in the practice and design an engagement around what will truly bring meaningful change. This will be one of the best things you can do for your team, your clients, your patients, and yourself.

Name: Functional Nutriments
Description:
At Functional Nutriments, we research, develop and bring to market first-in-class nutraceuticals that support the critically-important biological process of apoptosis. 

Apocaps CX was developed for dogs and millions of doses have been used by dog lovers, veterinarians and veterinary oncologists since 2010. 

Our other veterinary/pet products include EverPup and Nutrocept. 

Everything we make is made to the highest standards in the USA with all-natural, 100% human ingredients in an FDA registered and inspected facility.

Name: Itch
Description:
We’re Itch. We’re here to send pests packing and keep pets healthy, happy and always full of beans (not literally though, imagine the guffs).

A complete range of scientifically proven, vet strength treatments to keep our furry friends flea, tick and worm free. Personalised to your pet and delivered exactly when you need it, so you never forget.

We’re no nonsense and knowledgeable, there’s no fluff here (except for the stuff that’s all over our floors!), so you know where to come if you need a friendly ear and some expert advice. Our Vet Team, led by Dr Zoe Costigan, is professionally qualified in Veterinary Medicines advice. Nothing makes them happier than helping pets and their parents be flea free.

Name: Okivét
Description:
En juin 2020, Fabrice Crépin, Docteur vétérinaire, crée Okivét. L’idée est de répondre efficacement aux besoins des équipes vétérinaires de se recentrer sur leur cœur de métier.

Parce qu’être vétérinaire est le métier d’une vie, Okivét est avant tout un projet médical & humain où chacun a du temps pour se former, développer ses compétences, travailler en équipe et aussi du temps pour soi !

Ceux qui nous rejoignent nous parlent tous de bien-être, d’une dynamique saine et d’un état d’esprit familial. C’est exactement notre ambition de proposer une médecine d’excellence et de proximité portée par des équipes qui se sentent accompagnées, soudées et délestées des tâches ingrates.

––––––––––––––––––––––

Développer ce réseau et ses valeurs vient du plus profond de nous.
Et nous irons chercher de meilleurs résultats afin de GRANDIR ENSEMBLE :
● en satisfaisant une exigence économique adaptée à la réalité de notre projet,
● en étant proactifs sur les mutations rapides de notre secteur,
● en favorisant des plans de formation pour satisfaire notre volonté commune d'excellence.

––––––––––––––––––––––

La belle énergie comme la qualité de vie partagée au sein du réseau expliquent sans doute l’accélération de notre croissance en 24 mois. Nous sommes heureux de fédérer autour de nos fondamentaux :
 Mutualiser nos ressources en tissant des grappes de cliniques locales.
 Progresser grâce à la diversité des salariés, de leurs parcours, et des générations.
 Encourager la médecine préventive et faciliter l’accès aux médecines complémentaires.
Faire de la lutte contre la douleur une priorité.
 S’engager autant que possible dans les initiatives OneHealth.
 Renforcer la qualité des soins grâce à des équipements médicaux à la pointe et nos services digitalisés.
 Étayer une équipe support qui connaît la réalité terrain.

# Suivez notre actualité et nos coulisses
https://www.okivet.com/nous-rejoindre/le-blog/

# Nous rejoindre
https://www.okivet.com/nous-rejoindre/

Name: ChesterGates Veterinary Specialists
Description: We have an outstanding team of RCVS and European Recognised Specialists in a range of disciplines providing veterinary referral services to clients in the Northwest of England and beyond. Our services include orthopaedics, soft tissue surgery, interventional radiology, cardiology, medicine, dermatology and anaesthesia. We provide gold standard, multi-disciplinary care to dogs and cats together with 24 hour/7 days a week hospitalisation facilities. We are supported by a fantastic team of dedicated and highly skilled interns, nurses and receptionists.

Name: AcuroVet
Description:
AcuroVet is a complete veterinary practice management software, regardless of the type of veterinary medicine you practice small animal or large animal; mobile or hospital based; small practice or large practice; holistic or allopathic; general practitioner or specialist.  

AcuroVet provides imaged-based record keeping, with view left, right, dorsal and ventral views of animal models (dog, cat, horse ,etc with more to come!)  Map out skin mass, imaging results, acupuncture findings and treatment, chiropractic findings and treatment, and much more.  

AcuroVet veterinary software allows on-the-go access to your medical records offline allowing you the freedom to take medical notes even in remote areas or in patient’s homes.  Make your next appointment and create invoices quickly and easily with this application.  

AcuroVet is considered the best veterinary software, best mobile vet software, best vet clinic software & best holistic software by its users. With more than 10 years of exeperience, AcuroVet has managed to expand its reach from United states to all over the globe.

Name: Nutricare Life Sciences Ltd
Description:
Founded in 1989, Nutricare Life Sciences Limited India is a fast growing, vertically integrated manufacturing & marketing company headquartered in India. Among the pioneers of Phytogenic Feed Additives and Herbal Medicine in India, we are committed to use the knowledge and experience of centuries bygone, for the betterment of animal health. Nutricare has the uniqueness of integrating modern science with Ayurveda. 
With an experience of  more than three decades in manufacturing of quality herbal formulations, Nutricare products are research based and derived from fractionations and sub-fractionations of phytogenic extracts. Nutricare has been successful in registering its presence in major markets around the globe through an organised and ever-expanding distributorship network. 

At Nutricare, our focus is on…...
Essential oils which are potential alternatives to antibiotics
Herbal medicaments composed of medicinal herbs and their extracts
Feed additives are fortified with phyto-extracts, prebiotics and probiotics
Phyto-nutritions like phyto-amino acids and vitamins. 

Nutricare manufactures Phytogenic Feed Additives, Natural Therapeutics and Nutraceuticals in Liquid, Power, Granules, Bolus and Spray forms for Poultry, Livestock, Pets and Aqua. 

For more information, please visit http://www.nutricare.in/

Name: SUN PHARMA - VETERINARY PRODUCTS
Description: Since its foundation, Sun Pharmaceutical is among the largest companies operating in Animal Health field of Vietnam and specializing in distributing imported veterinary APIs, medicine, vaccine, aquatic medicine, supplements and biological products for veterinary use.

Name: Flair & cie
Description:
Flair & cie regroupe 10 établissements vétérinaires fièrement indépendants, à travers le Québec.

Sous la présidence de Dre Lucie Hénault, les 10 établissements Flair & cie occupent une place unique dans le paysage de la médecine vétérinaire au Québec. Ils sont détenus à 100% par 11 associées, dont 9 vétérinaires généralistes, 1 vétérinaire spécialiste et 1 technicienne en santé animale.

Flair & cie s’attache à des valeurs d’entraide, de soutien, de développement et d’accompagnement de ses équipes vétérinaires, au quotidien.

Les établissements Flair & cie sont dans la grande région de Montréal, à Québec et dans les Laurentides :

- Hôpital vétérinaire de Montréal, Westmount
- Hôpital vétérinaire Legardeur, Repentigny
- Hôpital vétérinaire du Nord, Montréal

Name: Wolf Learning Consulting
Description:
Founded by a veterinarian, Wolf Learning Consulting provides learning strategic consultancy, agile learning project management and learning content creation for the Animal Health industry and industry stakeholders.

We support Animal Healthy private companies (pharmaceutical and pet-food companies, raw material suppliers, pet trade...), veterinary associations and universities and other industry stakeholders in building and executing learning strategies. We address diverse audience such as employees (field sales force teams...) , customers (veterinarians, nurses, pet trade staff...) and consumers (breeders, pet owners...).

We apply principles of agile project management for learning experiences, putting user experience & iterations at the core of our ways of working. We can help you by reducing both your timelines and influencing time-to-market. Thanks to our knowledge of the industry reinforced by an international network of experts and learning strong capabilities, we are able to remove resources on your side by bringing a lot of autonomy to the project.

You operate in the Animal Health sector and looking for partners to strengthen your learning strategy? Well, you can stop looking, you have found one...    a very passionate one.

Name: ANIBIO, Groupe Vétérinaire
Description:
Anibio est un Groupe Vétérinaire composé de 10 structures Canines et Mixtes réparties principalement dans les Pyrénées Atlantiques et les Landes avec un fonctionnement en grappe autour de 3 cliniques pivots.
Toutes nos structures disposent d’un plateau technique complet et nous avons au sein du groupe de nombreux diplômes : CES Orthopédie, Ophtalmologie, hemato-bioch, CEAV de Médecine Interne. 
Ils nous permettent de référer en interne et de proposer aux vétérinaires des formations dans les domaines qui les intéressent.
L'équipe rurale est jeune et dynamique, elle a réussi à développer de nombreux services en suivi repro, alimentation et qualité du lait afin de fournir des services complémentaires à la pratique quotidienne et aux urgences.
Nous sommes également très actifs dans les productions organisées, volailles, veaux de boucherie et porc. Notre rôle est de veiller à l'aspect sanitaire, au bien-être et aux performances zootechniques. 
Nous accompagnons également les différents acteurs vers les nouvelles attentes sociétales.

Comprehenxive pet foods range - Hills, Harrisons, Royal Canin, Iams.  Consultancy service for veterinary startups. Media services. Specialist ophthalmologist visits. Cataract surgery.

Name: VetCheck
Description:
VetCheck’s mission is to simplify pet care and improve pet health outcomes through innovative veterinary tools. 

VetCheck is an innovative communication and hospital workflow platform that supports the veterinary team throughout the whole clinical process.
- Digital practice forms with e-signature
- Healthcare questionnaires
- Digital dental, GA and hospital charts
- Discharge instructions and homecare videos
- Fully integrated hospital whiteboard and workflow
- Marketing add-ons with automated client satisfaction surveys

Name: Lumbry Park Veterinary Specialists
Description:
Lumbry Park is one of the largest and most advanced veterinary specialist referral centres in the UK.

At Lumbry Park we offer a broad range of specialist veterinary referral services. Our vets, nurses and administrative staff are here to work with general veterinary practitioners to provide the highest quality diagnostic and treatment options in the South of England. We only see cases that are referred by primary care veterinary surgeons.

Name: Centro Pet Argentina
Description: El pet-shop mas completo de argentina. Alimentos, Juguetes, accesorios, medicamentos y mas para perros, gatos y pequeños animales

Name: Synergy Animal Research
Description:
We are a Veterinary Contract Research Organization, specialized in conducting clinical studies with production and companion animals (cattle, swine, horses, dogs and cats).

The name Synergy, derived from the Greek word synergía, reiterates our desire and commitment to enhance results through the union of efforts of exceptional people. To this end, we rely on the national and international experience of our collaborators, deriving from work in other CROs and in the veterinary industry, and the support of a group of specialists in various branches of Veterinary Medicine.

We emerged with the objective of meeting the growing demand of the pharmaceutical industry for solutions in the area of R&D of veterinary medicines, offering alternatives with complete and personalized service to meet the demand of our customers.

We have the desire to innovate, focusing on health promotion, animal welfare and scientific advancement of Veterinary Medicine.

Name: Nutrivet Farmácia Veterinária
Description:
A Nutrivet nasceu de um desejo comum dos sócios Fábio e Adriana Parizi de facilitar o atendimento veterinário e levar cada vez mais qualidade a campo. Em 1997, na cidade de Jaguariúna/SP, essa história começava seus primeiros capítulos.

De lá pra cá já são mais de duas décadas expandindo, aprimorando e modernizando todo o atendimento, sem nunca esquecer dos objetivos iniciais: qualidade, venda orientada, entrega rápida e preço justo. Hoje, a Nutrivet orgulha-se da posição que ocupa: a maior farmácia veterinária do Brasil.

A farmácia veterinária conta com uma equipe especializada, com atendimentos presenciais e on-line. São mais de 70 colaboradores, tendo entre eles veterinários e farmacêuticos, sempre dispostos a instruir corretamente cada cliente em relação aos produtos, independente da necessidade.

Foi pensando assim que a Nutrivet se tornou uma das maiores e mais completas farmácias veterinárias do Brasil. 

Seja bem-vindo e conte sempre com a gente! Avante!

Veterinary ultrasound knowledge popularizer.

Name: Asto CT
Description: Asto CT was founded on the principle of offering safe, high-quality fan-beam imaging to improve quality of life for horses and ensure peace of mind for their owners. We are pioneering the use of cutting-edge robotics in combination with medical computed tomography (CT) to provide state-of-the-art screening. Our mission is to improve diagnosis and treatment of conditions of the distal limb and diseases of the head and neck in horses.

Name: Vetnordic
Description: We walk the extra mile, setting new standards for veterinary teams, creating competitive value-added solutions

Name: Andrés Pintaluba SA, APSA
Description:
Andrés Pintaluba, SA (APSA) was founded in the city of Reus (Spain), in 1978 by Andrés Pintaluba Esporrín. Established as a family business, an identity that remains unchanged to this day, it is now the parent company of the Pintaluba Group, which is made up of twelve national and international companies.

The establishment of the company coincided with the emergence of a thriving poultry industry in Reus. It initially focused on marketing additives and currently manufactures and markets additives and medicated premixes for animal feed, nutrition and health. Furthermore, Andrés Pintaluba, SA (APSA) is continuing to grow and develop in the sector and in new related fields.

Currently, the international activity of Andrés Pintaluba, SA (APSA) is in over 70 countries, making one of the largest suppliers for the animal feed industry in Europe, with activity on a global scale. It workforce, service and the quality of our products are the cornerstones of our business activity and growth, as is our commitment to meeting the needs of our clients to develop sustainable businesses.

Name: Fuzzy
Description: We're building the future of pet health care. Members pet parents get 24/7 access to exceptional virtual veterinary care in less than 1 minute, with pet health & wellness products for their pets' health needs.

Name: zazuu bem-estar pet
Description:
Cuidar de pets é coisa séria. E pra nós, é também coisa de amor.

Na zazuu, oferecemos uma experiência de bem-estar pet que acompanha todas as fases da vida dos nossos bichinhos, com carinho, segurança e conforto.

Somos uma startup que conecta tutores a serviços essenciais para a saúde e higiene de seus pets, com atendimento a domicílio e experiências sem estresse: nada de trânsito, filas ou deslocamentos.

Por trás da tela do nosso app, existe uma rede de profissionais apaixonados: veterinários e profissionais de banho e tosa que compartilham com a gente a missão de transformar a rotina de cuidados dos pets.

Na palma da mão, o tutor pode gerenciar tudo: consultas, vacinação, vermifugação, antipulgas, banho e tosa, exames e mais.

Vem com a gente revolucionar o cuidado pet no Brasil.

Name: Gateway Services Inc.
Description:
Gateway Services is North America’s leading accredited pet aftercare provider offering 24/7 professional grief support, memorial keepsakes, pet burial, and fully trackable pet cremation. With over 120 locations and 2,000+ team members, Gateway has built a solid reputation for providing compassionate and respectful aftercare for pets and the people who love them.

Built on the foundation of Gateway Pet Memorial Services, Canada’s first accredited pet aftercare provider, Gateway Services Inc. continues to carry the legacy of ethical pet cremation across North America.

As a team of talented people with a shared vision for upholding the highest pet aftercare standards in the industry, we believe that the same principles that guided the path of Gateway Pet Memorial – respect, honesty, trust, and integrity – hold true for today.

From our leading-edge technology and extensive line of products to our streamlined processes and modern facilities, we have established the benchmark for the highest level of pet aftercare across our group of companies.

With a solid reputation for helping veterinary partners give their clients the best pet aftercare services possible, we are always mindful of our special responsibility to provide a dignified and respectful memorial choice for every pet.

OUR VISION
As the cornerstone for pet aftercare, we will continue to build our family of companies and create meaningful partnerships in order to offer the best pet aftercare services across North America.

OUR VALUES
•	People First
•	Exceed Expectations
•	(HIT) Honesty, Integrity, Trust
•	Be Passionate and Caring
•	Continuously Improve

Gateway has proudly achieved the esteemed Great Place To Work Certification in both Canada and the USA, a testament to our exceptional workplace culture and employee satisfaction. Join our team and experience the rewarding environment that has earned us this prestigious recognition.

Name: Centro Veterinário Seres | Petz
Description:
O Centro Veterinário Seres nasceu com o propósito de entregar o que há de melhor em medicina veterinária, por meio de uma experiência cuidadosa e singular para os pets e seus tutores. 

Com a criação da marca Seres, a qualidade e o carinho que a Petz já tinha, se somaram à mais alta tecnologia do segmento de saúde veterinária. O nosso objetivo é proporcionar a melhor infraestrutura e atendimento, desde os procedimentos simples aos tratamentos de alta complexidade. Além disso, apoiamos parceiros veterinários que necessitam de alguma especialidade ou exame específico. 

Conte conosco para uma rotina de amor e cuidados com os pets. Afinal, nosso instinto é cuidar!

Name: IVC Evidensia Nederland
Description:
Stronger together
Evidensia was founded in early 2012 by the merger of four of Sweden’s leading specialist  hospitals. Two of our founder hospitals date back to the 1950's and are considered the inventors of the modern veterinary medicine for companion animals in the Nordic region.

Given our legacy, the idea behind Evidensia was to continue being innovative and by working together creating the veterinary care of tomorrow.

Today, Evidensia is a trusted partner for pet owners, employees and referring veterinarians across Europe.

In 2017 we were joined by independent Vetcare and are happy to offer care in the United Kingdom.

Our commitment to the highest standards has helped us grow into what we have become today; a European leader in high quality veterinary care.

We want to thank the thousands of animal owners and animals that visit our clinics across Europe every day. We work tirelessly to bring you the best possible care for you and your companion!

Name: Modern Vet
Description: Modern Vet is the largest and oldest group of veterinary clinics and hospitals in the UAE and the only 24-hour, multi-specialty veterinary hospital in Dubai. Since 1995, Modern Vet has been a pioneer in the local veterinary field.

Name: Hospital Clínic Veterinari de la UAB
Description:
El Hospital Clínic Veterinari pone su equipo de especialistas diplomados, el mayor del Estado y unos de los principales de Europa, a disposición de todos los veterinarios para colaborar con ellos en dar el mejor servicio a sus paciente: desde una segunda opinión a una prueba diagnóstica sofiticada.

Desde su creación en 1990, la misión del HCV ha sido la difusión de la excelencia médica entre la profesión clínica veterinaria con el objetivo de mejorar la salud y el bienestar de los animales de compañía en nuestra sociedad.

Esta misión se fundamenta en tres grandes ejes:

1. Dar soporte docente a estudiantes de veterinaria, veterinarios y otros profesionales de la sanidad animal a través de las prácticas de grado de la Facultad de Veterinaria de la UAB, los programas de formación de veterinarios internos y residentes, y otros programas de formación de postgrado.

2. Ofrecer un servicio de soporte médico integral a la sociedad y, muy especialmente, al colectivo profesional clínico veterinario, basado en los principios de rigor científico, aprendizaje permanente, honestidad y respeto mútuo.

3. Dar soporte a la investigación que se realiza en la Facultad de Veterinaria, en la UAB, en empresas privadas y en otras instituciones.

Name: Indian Herbs Specialities Pvt Ltd
Description:
Our history & vision:

Established in 1951, Indian Herbs, started research & manufacturing of herbal animal health care products for ruminants, poultry, pigs, equines, pets, aqua and other animal species to provide benchmark sustainable, safe and science based solutions.

Indian Herbs vision is to be the world’s leading herbal AHP company, respected and trusted for its ability to manufacture high quality result oriented products based on original research.

Responding to emerging global needs:

Recognizing the importance of nutrition, optimizing health & production indices, Indian Herbs pioneered promising solutions through the launch of a range of value-added, medicinal plant/herbs-enriched quality feed supplements and medicinal products. Indian Herbs is the pioneer & oldest company in India that innovated and translated science based applications of Ayurveda for animal health & wellness and caters livestock industry with the multi-species product portfolio of phytogenic feed supplements (PFS) and healthcare products.

Name: MSD Animal Health Italia
Description:
MSD Animal Health Srl è l’azienda leader nel settore della ricerca, dello sviluppo e della produzione farmaceutica in ambito veterinario. 

Da sempre impegnata a preservare e a migliorare la salute e il benessere degli animali, offre un portfolio tra i più innovativi e completi del mercato farmaceutico che comprende prodotti per la prevenzione, per il trattamento e per il controllo delle malattie di animali, sia da allevamento, sia da compagnia.

In Italia, MSD Animal Health è presente con una sede a Milano e un sito produttivo, situato ad Aprilia, oltre ad una ampia rete di forza vendita capillare su tutto il territorio.

La nostra ricerca, la salute di tutti è il posizionamento che MSD Animal Health vuole mantenere attraverso investimenti costanti in progetti di ricerca scientifica, con l’obiettivo di rispondere ad esigenze di mercato sempre più precise, soprattutto da parte del consumatore finale.

Le linee guida specifiche per la community MSD Animal Health su Linkedin sono disponibili al seguente indirizzo: https://bit.ly/2I7eyZb

Name: NC State College of Veterinary Medicine
Description: The NC State College of Veterinary Medicine is where compassion meets science. Our mission, is to advance the veterinary profession and animal health through ongoing discovery and medical innovation; provide animals and their owners with extraordinary, compassionate medical care; and prepare the next generation of veterinarians and veterinary research scientists.

Name: Vets Stay Go Diversify!
Description:
We're on a mission to help veterinary professionals create satisfying careers and find their right fit. We help employers showcase themselves so candidates can see them!
We provide:

Join our community of over 30,000 veterinary professionals all wanting to to grow and create satisfying careers.

Description: Propet is a company based in Brazil.

Name: Planet Pet Distribuidora
Description: Distribuidora de produtos veterinários, com atuação em São Paulo e Grande São Paulo.

Name: Kubbar International
Description:
Kubbar International is a Kuwait based company that specializes in import, export and distribution an expanding range of Animal Feeds and feed supplements including Phytobiotic, Probiotics, Performance Enhancers, Feed Enzymes, as well as vaccines, Dairy and Poultry Farm Equipment.
We are the proud sole distributors of the well acclaimed Companies supplying more than one-third of Kuwait Farms for quality animal health products, beside our valued customers in Egypt, KSA, Oman and UAE.
Through our innovative products, and our commitment to excellence, we make the effort to nurture and maintain long term relationships with all whom we work with.

Name: Vetlife
Description:
Vetlife's mission is to provide support to members of the UK veterinary community and their families who have emotional, health or financial concerns, whilst seeking ways to prevent such situations in the future.

The veterinary community continues to experience significantly higher levels of depression and suicide than the general population. Vetlife works to ensure that those engaged in the veterinary community are aware of available assistance, and signposts them to sources of help should they, or a colleague, be in need of support. Support needs vary according to circumstance and may involve short-term support to cope with an immediate crisis or longer term support for those affected by age, ill health or disability.

Where possible, the Charity tries to enable those they help to become independent and self-sufficient again, and also to maintain longer term support for those who are not able to do this because of age, ill health or disability.

Name: AniCura France
Description:
AniCura est un fournisseur de soins vétérinaires de premier plan en Europe. Notre entreprise est née de la philosophie selon laquelle le partage des ressources peut créer des opportunités pour de meilleurs soins vétérinaires et résultats.

Nos services comprennent une large gamme de services médicaux de haute qualité couvrant les soins préventifs et de base ainsi que les soins spécialisés, y compris les diagnostics avancés, la médecine interne, les soins intensifs, la chirurgie et l’orthopédie. Nous offrons également des services de réhabilitation, de physiothérapie et des conseils diététiques.

Le réseau d’AniCura comprend 500 cliniques dans 17 pays européens, fournissant chaque année plus de 4,5 millions de consultations de haute qualité pour les animaux de compagnie. AniCura fait partie de Mars Veterinary Health depuis 2018. Mars Veterinary Health comprend un réseau de plus de 3 000 cliniques dans le monde entier, prenant soin de plus de 25 millions d’animaux chaque année. Ensemble, nous sommes capables de fournir les normes les plus élevées en matière de soins pour animaux et d’atteindre notre objectif commun : UN MEILLEUR MONDE POUR LES ANIMAUX DE COMPAGNIE.

Name: Petslife Distribuidora
Description:
Fundada em outubro de 2006, a Petslife nasceu com o propósito de distribuir grandes marcas no mercado veterinário, iniciando sua trajetória no Rio Grande do Sul. Com um crescimento sólido e consistente, expandiu suas operações ao longo dos anos, fortalecendo sua presença no Sul e Sudeste do país.

Hoje, a Petslife atua nos estados do Rio Grande do Sul, Santa Catarina, Paraná, São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro e Espírito Santo, levando ao mercado soluções completas em produtos veterinários.

Somos uma distribuidora focada em oferecer soluções integradas para o mercado pet, com uma estratégia voltada a atender de forma ampla as necessidades dos nossos clientes, permitindo que eles concentrem seus esforços no core business de seus negócios.

Nosso diferencial está no atendimento próximo e personalizado, com uma equipe capacitada, orientada à inovação, praticidade e agilidade. Aliamos preços competitivos, logística eficiente e entregas rápidas, garantindo eficiência em cada etapa da parceria.

A Petslife segue crescendo com o compromisso de conectar marcas, profissionais e negócios, entregando valor, confiança e resultados ao mercado veterinário.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Expressão Animal Homeopatia
Description:
Quem somos

Empresa especializada em elevar Rentabilidade e Lucratividade na Pecuária Nacional.

A Expressão Animal Homeopatia Veterinária (Laboratório Veterinário Homeopático Ltda) é uma Empresa de Homeopatia Animal de Excelência e Qualidade. Produzimos e Comercializamos Produtos Homeopáticos Veterinários; além de possuir um corpo especializado em Acompanhamento Técnico Especializado. 

A Expressão Animal Homeopatia é uma empresa licenciada e registrada no Ministério da Agricultura, Pecuária e Abastecimento (MAPA)  que atende todo o território nacional. 
Nossos medicamentos apresentam cadastro no Ministério da Agricultura, Pecuária e Abastecimento (MAPA), atendendo aos mais altos padrões de qualidades exigidos por esse órgão.

Atuamos há mais de 20 anos no segmento de homeopatia animal (também conhecida como homeopatia veterinária), fundada a partir da necessidade de solucionar problemas causados pelas inúmeras variáveis na exploração dos bovinos, ou seja, gado de corte e leite, tanto em sistema intensivo quanto a pasto.

Name: KNMvD
Description: De Koninklijke Nederlandse Maatschappij voor Diergeneeskunde is de beroepsorganisatie van en voor alle dierenartsen in Nederland. De KNMvD bevordert de professionele ontplooiing van de dierenarts op het terrein van dierenwelzijn, diergezondheid, volksgezondheid en voedselveiligheid. Zij behartigt de belangen van dierenartsen die actief zijn in uiteenlopende werkvelden.

Name: Vet Candy
Description: This isn’t a brand. It’s a movement. We built Vet Candy because veterinary medicine deserved more—more honesty, more connection, more representation, and more courage to challenge the status quo. At Vet Candy, we don’t wait for permission to grow, lead, or innovate—we do it together. Born from the real realities of veterinary life—long nights, imposter syndrome, unseen brilliance, and burnout no one talks about—we exist to turn shared experience into collective power. We believe veterinary medicine is better together, knowledge should never be gatekept, and every voice in this profession matters. Vet Candy is where real people share real stories and real veterinary mastery, where students, technicians, veterinarians, and visionaries don’t just consume content—they belong. If you’re here, you’re already part of it. We rise together.

Name: Zoetis France
Description: En tant que leader mondial de la santé animale, Zoetis est animée par un objectif unique : nourrir notre monde et l'humanité en faisant progresser la santé animale. Depuis plus de 70 ans, Zoetis innove pour prédire, prévenir, détecter et traiter les maladies animales tout en continuant de soutenir les personnes qui élèvent et soignent des animaux dans le monde entier, qu'il s'agisse de vétérinaires, de propriétaires d'animaux de compagnie ou d'éleveurs. Le portefeuille et le pipeline de médicaments, de vaccins, de diagnostics et de technologies de l'entreprise font la différence dans plus de 100 pays. Zoetis, qui figure au classement Fortune 500, a généré un chiffre d'affaires de 8,1 milliards de dollars en 2022 et emploie environ 13 800 personnes.

Name: PetVet365 (We're Hiring)

Name: AMVAC - Asociación Madrileña de Veterinarios de Animales de Compañía
Description:
AMVAC, Asociación Madrileña de Veterinarios de Animales de Compañía, fue creada por y para veterinarios clínicos de pequeños animales y está comprometida con la dignificación de la profesión veterinaria y la representación de sus miembros en foros relevantes. 

Nuestros objetivos son: 

1 Defender los intereses de nuestros asociados individual y colectivamente, mejorar sus condiciones de trabajo y proporcionar formación continua de alta calidad.

2 Colaborar con las Administraciones en asesoramiento y apoyo de las actividades relacionadas con los animales de compañía.

3 Fomentar el espíritu de servicio a la sociedad, inherente al ejercicio de nuestra actividad profesional.

4 Colaborar en todas las actividades que repercuten en la mejora de la Sanidad Pública.

5 Trabajar por el bienestar animal.

 Nuestra misión:

Proporcionar a los veterinarios clínicos las herramientas y conocimientos necesarios para su desarrollo profesional, así como representar sus intereses ante instituciones y en la sociedad. 

 Los valores de AMVAC:

    • Compromiso: Trabajar incansablemente por los intereses de los veterinarios y la profesión. 
    • Aprendizaje: Mantenerse al día en cuestiones técnicas, legales y científicas para ofrecer lo mejor a sus asociados; afán por aprender.
    • Involucramiento: Fomentar una relación estrecha y personal con sus miembros, atendiendo sus necesidades y consultas de manera eficiente. Sentido de pertenencia.
    • Cooperación: Trabajar conjuntamente con otros profesionales y organizaciones para crear sinergias que beneficien a la profesión veterinaria. 

 ¿Cuáles son los beneficios de asociarte a AMVAC?

- Convenios.
- FORMAMVAC.
- AMVAC cultural.

- Directorio de centros veterinarios.

Name: Pet Poison Helpline, a division of SafetyCall International
Description:
Pet Poison Helpline (PPH) is a 24-hour service available throughout North America for pet owners and veterinary professionals who require assistance with treating a potentially poisoned pet. Our Pet Poison Control Center is staffed with trained veterinary health professionals experts (including board-certified veterinary emergency critical care and internal medicine specialists, board-certified veterinary toxicologists, veterinarians, and veterinary technicians), along with clinical toxicologists and pharmacologists. 

PPH has over 30  years of experience and expertise in the management of pets exposed to potentially dangerous substances such as pesticides, household chemicals, drugs, and plants, and works with different industries to ensure pharmacoviligence and safety for both humans and pets. A $59/incident fee encompasses toxicological and medical advice and management for the duration of the case, along with consultation with a variety of specialists. 

More information can be found at our website: www.petpoisonhelpline.com or by calling 1-866-823-1588. 

If you have a pet emergency, please call 1-800-213-6680.

Name: IRTA-CReSA Centre de Recerca en Sanitat Animal
Description:
IRTA-CReSA is aesearch center belonging to the Animal Health Program of the IRTA (Institute for Research in Agrifood Technologies) of the Department of Agriculture, Livestock, Fisheries, Food and Natural Environment of the Generalitat of Catalonia.
We work to improve animal health and the quality and safety of animal products intended for human consumption. We transfer the progress achieved in this research to the animal production sector and society in general.
The research subprogrammes are devoted to Epidemiology and Risk Analysis, Endemic Diseases and Exotic Diseases. Highlights include research on innovative and effective vaccines, studies on epidemiology, risk assessment for human health and the realization of infection models and diagnostic techniques.
IRTA-CReSA is a referent center in animal health, both nationally and internationally. We have a 3-level Biocontention Laboratory plant that, together with CISA-INIA, form the Network of High-Security Biological Laboratories (RLASB), cataloged as ICTS (Singular Scientific and Technological Infrastructure). We also offer services to slaughterhouses through the SESC (Support to Abattoirs) and other scientific-technical services to companies in the veterinary and agri-food sector.

Name: Encore Vet Group
Description:
Encore Vet Group is more than a group of veterinary hospitals. We’re reimagining what it means to support the entire veterinary profession.

Work with us.
Our community of veterinary hospitals is built on connection, collaboration, and growth. We lighten the administrative load so practices can focus on what matters most — caring for pets — while we help teams thrive through mentorship, leadership development, and operational support. Joining Encore means you get the strength of a larger network without losing what makes your hospital unique.

Learn with us.
We believe learning never stops in veterinary medicine. That’s why our onsite and virtual education programs are available to EVERYONE in vet med — from veterinary students to client service representatives, practice managers, and beyond. Our programs are designed to grow skills, spark innovation, and keep the profession moving forward.

Consult with us.
Encore Veterinary Consulting brings expert guidance to both Encore hospitals and independent veterinary practices. Our consulting team partners with leaders to strengthen culture, improve operations, and build sustainable growth strategies — helping veterinary practices reach new heights!

At Encore, we believe that when the profession grows, we ALL grow. Connect with us to see how we’re building a stronger future for veterinary medicine.

Name: Wildlife Vets International
Description:
Wildlife Vets International is a British Registered Charity that saves Endangered species by providing in-country veterinary support and establishing sustainable capacity through partnership with local organisations. 

Our long term projects include working on the reintroduction of Amur leopards in the Russian Far East, disease surveillance and conflict tiger resolution in the Russian Far East, Sumatra and Bangaldesh, creating new populations of endangered birds and reptiles in Mauritius and the Seychelles, creating a disease barrier for African painted dogs in Zimbabwe, supporting the release of endangered primates in Vietnam. 

We are involved with numerous other smaller projects, providing veterinary expertise.

Name: Vetlab India
Description:
VETLAB, a division of ALL VET DIAGNOSTIC SOLUTIONS PVT LTD, has been at the forefront of veterinary diagnostics and imaging for over 12 years. With multiple centers across India, we are recognized as a trusted name in the field, committed to strengthening veterinary resilience through reliable diagnosis.

As India’s first privately managed veterinary laboratory accredited by NABL (National Accreditation Board for Testing and Calibration), we comply with ISO/IEC 17025:2005 standards for biological testing. This prestigious certification reflects our unwavering commitment to delivering accurate and high-quality diagnostic services.

Our comprehensive range of services includes:

Haematology
Biochemistry
Parasitology
Serology
Microbiology
Clinical Pathology
Histopathology
Endocrinology
Molecular Diagnosis
Digital X-rays
Ultrasonography
We cater to a diverse clientele, including veterinary hospitals, private clinics, dairy farms, government institutions, race clubs, and security agencies.

At VETLAB, we understand that behind every test is the life of an animal, which drives our commitment to accuracy and excellence. We are dedicated to transforming the veterinary care landscape in India and remain your trusted partner for all veterinary diagnostic needs.

Name: AO VET
Description:
Who we are
AO VET is an independent, nonprofit organization representing a global network of surgeons, scientists, and other professionals highly specialized in the field of veterinary surgery of the musculoskeletal system.

AO VET’s aim is to advance the practice of veterinary surgery to improve patient outcomes. We accomplish this by building a network of professionals who share this goal and demonstrate their passion for orthopedics and teaching by sharing their experiences, knowledge, and expertise in a collegial and collaborative way.

What we do
Education: AO VET provides curriculum-based courses and training worldwide which focus on methods, not products, in peer-to-peer, interactive learning environments.

Community: With access to a dynamic global network, and the only worldwide academic community, AO VET is the voice and professional resource to enhance your career.

Research & Development: AO VET not only advances patient care with evidence-based medicine through experimental and clinical research but is also a member of AAALAC International for animal welfare in research.

AO VET is one of the four clinical divisions within the AO Foundation.

Name: Salam Veterinary Group
Description: The world’s largest scientific group specializing in veterinary and environmental treatments and research, wildlife health, and pharmaceutical industries, aimed at creating meaningful impact on the health of humans, animals, and the environment.

Name: Harmony Vet Clinic
Description: Harmony Vet Clinic is an animal health care facility primarily devoted to the care of small animals. We provide preventative care, medical, dental, surgical, and nutritional services to our canine and feline patients.

Name: Vétérinaires Sans Frontières Germany/ Tierärzte ohne Grenzen
Description:
HEALTHY ANIMALS - HEALTHY PEOPLE - HEALTHY ENVIRONMENT
Vétérinaires Sans Frontières Germany (VSF Germany) is an international non-governmental organisation, providing humanitarian aid and development assistance to pastoralists and vulnerable communities in areas where livestock is of importance. In the greater Horn of Africa and beyond, VSF Germany implements integrated programs following the One Health approach in Sudan, South Sudan, Kenya, Somalia, Uganda and Ethiopia. VSF Germany not only provides support in food security, animal health, agriculture, marketing and other livestock related issues. It also develops the capacity of communities and governmental institutions, initiates peace and conflict resolutions.

Unsere Hinweise zum Datenschutz finden Sie hier: https://www.togev.de/datenschutz/

Name: Veterinary Hospital Managers Association
Description: The Veterinary Hospital Managers Association Inc. was formed in 1981 to provide individuals actively involved in veterinary practice management a means of effective communication and interaction.
