Our membership is composed of hospital administrators, practice managers, office managers, veterinarians, consultants, and others interested in veterinary management. The mission of VHMA is to enhance and serve professionals in veterinary management through superior education, certification and networking.

Name: Wellcon Animal Health
Description: Wellcon Animal Health is a manufacturing and marketing company who deals with Veterinary products. The company is a leading Drug manufacturers & marketers situated in Excise free zone in Uttarakhand & recognized in the market, due to our ability to manufacture, export, supply a diverse and qualitative range of 4th generation antibiotic, Non Beta Lactum Tablets, Bolus, Capsules, External Liquid Section, Dry Powder, Liquids, Veterinary  Injectables,  Large  Volume  Parental  500ml & Small Volume Injectables.

Name: Gruppo Animalia
Description:
CHI SIAMO
Animalia è un gruppo italiano di strutture veterinarie d'eccellenza nato nel 2019, in cui tutti i veterinari condividono la stessa passione per la cura degli animali e lo stesso desiderio di migliorarsi ogni giorno.
Nel 2020 è incominciato il percorso di crescita di Gruppo Animalia e ad oggi contiamo più di 50 strutture veterinarie e un team di oltre 700 collaboratori! Ma ancora molto altro ci aspetta.
 
IL NOSTRO APPROCCIO
Ogni clinica veterinaria in Italia è differente per storia, territorio, servizi offerti e clientela: per questo richiede soluzioni diverse e specifiche per funzionare al meglio. Centralizziamo tutti i servizi accessori all’attività medico-scientifica (Formazione, Marketing, Risorse Umane, Amministrazione etc.) e lasciamo completa autonomia veterinaria alla guida scientifica del Direttore Sanitario di ciascuna Clinica. All’interno di Animalia, ogni clinica collabora con il team centrale attraverso un dialogo diretto e flessibile finalizzato a un sopporto concreto e continuo.
 
LE PERSONE
Grazie al nostro network, costruiamo equipe veterinarie di eccellenza provenienti da diverse cliniche, in ottica di:
• Collaborazione tra le strutture all’interno del Gruppo, per un miglior servizio al paziente.
• Condivisione del sapere medico tra i professionisti che collaborano con le strutture del Gruppo, tramite strumenti di comunicazione snelli e intuitivi.
• Percorsi di formazione progettati sulle esigenze di ciascun Veterinario, per lo sviluppo delle competenze del singolo e delle cliniche.
• Percorsi di carriera e opportunità di crescita professionale, grazie a collaborazioni con le diverse realtà e specializzazioni del Gruppo Animalia.
• Collaborazione diretta con team manageriale e opportunità di crescita anche in ambito “non-veterinario”.
 
Se sei interessato ad Animalia, contattaci all'indirizzo info@animalia.care
 
Se vuoi unirti al nostro Team, esplora le posizioni aperte o contattaci all’indirizzo risorseumane@animalia.

Name: Importadora Bagé
Description:
Especializada desde 1954 em produtos veterinários, a Importadora Bagé oferece mais porque conhece mais o mercado em que atua. Somos pioneiros na distribuição de produtos veterinários no Rio Grande do Sul e Brasil. Por isso, entendemos a fundo as necessidades de cada cliente e as soluções para atendê-las.

Através da Importadora Bagé, você conta com uma parceira completa para o seu negócio por meio de um vasto portfólio de produtos com qualidade reconhecida. A esses, somamos ainda diferenciais como distribuição ágil, equipe de representantes técnicos especializados e atendimento eficiente.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Hospital Veterinário Animaniac's
Description:
O Hospital Veterinário Animaniac's atende pequenos animais desde 2002 e têm se destacado por oferecer uma das melhores estruturas médicas veterinárias de São Paulo, contando com 3 unidades hospitalares 24 horas, com mais de 700 m² de área útil por unidade, nos bairros Vila Matilde, Tatuapé e Mooca, além de 3 Núcleos de Atendimento Veterinário (NAVE) nos bairros de Casa Verde, Planalto Paulista e Vila Prudente.

Nossa equipe é formada por mais de 150 colaboradores que se revesam em turnos para proporcionar atendimento humanizado, 24 horas por dia e 365 dias por ano, para pets e tutores.

Name: Karaman Veterinary Medicines Co. - Group
Description:
KARAMAN GROUP is one of the leading Veterinary Medicines companies established in 1985 in UAE, Oman, Qatar, Bahrain, and Kuwait for Distribution of Veterinary Pharmaceutical Medicines to the private, semi and governmental sectors including Dairy Farms, Sheep/Goat Farm, Veterinary Hospitals, Clinics, Pharmacies, Stables, Equestrian Clubs, Retail Dealers, Consultant’s offices & Laboratories.

KARAMAN GROUP is a Privately-owned Veterinary Distributor consistently enjoying double-digit annual growth as a result of its intensive evolution and numerous strategic acquisitions. Our company is responsive, efficient, and competitive, all attributes we take pride in.
It is how we began over 35 years ago, and how we continue to grow today.
We represent several multinational brands from various pharmaceutical, and animal health specialties companies offering a growing line of products to meet the health needs of Livestock, Poultry, Equine, Pets, etc. 

We have dedicated teams that aim to meet the specific demands of each species.
Establishing a direct and strong relationship with our customers is key to our success, coupled with exceptional sales and marketing teams positioned all over UAE and Oman to serve the markets in a better and faster way with concrete plans to expand our portfolio in the future.

These innovations improve business efficiency significantly and free up time so our clients can focus on what really counts — animal care.

Name: DWR Veterinary Specialists
Description:
DWR Veterinary Specialists is part of the Linnaeus Veterinary Ltd (A Mars Company). You can find our terms of use and privacy policy by visiting:  
Privacy statement - https://www.mars.com/privacy 
Legal notice - www.dickwhitereferrals.com/wp-content/themes/dick-white/pdf/legal-notice.pdf
Contact Information - www.dickwhitereferrals.com/contact/

Name: Kivet Clínicas Veterinarias
Description:
Descubre Kivet, tu mejor opción en cuidado veterinario!  

Te ofrecemos lo mejor para tu animal!  

¿Por qué elegir Kivet? 

Más de 300 profesionales comprometidos/as con el bienestar de tu animal. 

Con más de 50 clínicas, siempre encontrarás una cerca de ti! 

Nuestras modernas instalaciones están equipadas con lo último en tecnología. 

Horario ininterrumpido de lunes a sábado, y sí, algunos de nuestros centros están abiertos los domingos sin ningún cargo adicional! 

Ofrecemos una amplia gama de servicios veterinarios, incluyendo medicina felina y planes de salud personalizados! 

 

En Kivet, cuidamos de los animales como si fueran parte de nuestra familia. Dales la atención que se merecen! Accede a nuestra web: https://www.kivet.com 

 

¿Te gustaría formar parte de nuestro equipo? Únete a través de este enlace: https://www.kivet.com/trabaja-con-nosotros

Name: Connan Geração de Resultados
Description:
Somos especialistas em nutrição animal. Com soluções inovadoras e sustentáveis, promovemos uma agropecuária rentável e eficiente, apoiando os produtores a realizarem sua tarefa de produzir alimentos saudáveis e seguros e levando em conta o bem-estar animal.

Conheça nossas linhas exclusivas para garantir o desenvolvimento do rebanho e a produtividade durante o período das secas.

Conheça Aglomerax, nossa tecnologia exclusiva para o período das chuvas que garante até 16% mais rendimento em comparação aos suplementos convencionais, evita o empedramento e a perda de nutrientes no cocho e garante um ganho adicional de até 40g diários no peso dos animais.

Eficiência no cocho, resultado no bolso:
Na Connan, o futuro do produtor começa com tecnologia, inovação e resultados comprovados.

Name: Thrive Affordable Vet Care
Description:
Thrive Pet Healthcare is one of the first veterinary services offering a comprehensive continuum of care for pets’ primary, specialty, and acute needs. Through a nationwide network of over 400 veterinary providers, and an industry-leading membership program, Thrive Pet Healthcare provides personalized, accessible care through every stage of a pet’s life and health.  

The veterinarian founded and led organization provides industry-first benefits for practice staff while elevating privately held veterinary hospitals with innovative service and technology solutions. By focusing on the needs of care providers and professional collaboration, Thrive Pet Healthcare is supporting the well-being of the industry and raising the national bar for veterinary excellence.

Name: FirstVet
Description:
We're raising happier, healthier pets!

Our mission at FirstVet is to serve as the first point of contact for pet parents by making first class pet care easier, cheaper and more enjoyable to access wherever, whenever. Offering on-demand access to trustworthy knowledge and advice from licensed veterinarians as well as science-backed products and services, we provide pet parents with a community of professionals to turn to for support.

Name: Calier Colombia
Description: We are Calier's subsidiary in Colombia. Our commitment is to improve the quality and quantity of animal protein consumed by the population, as well as ensure the welfare of pets, their owners and families. With this objective, and since our birth in 1968, we have focused on the research, development, manufacture and marketing of pharmacological and biological products for production and companion animals, as well as making those services available to professionals in the veterinary sector To facilitate your daily work. Based in Barcelona (Spain), we have a wide network of subsidiaries and we have commercial activity in Europe, Latin America, the Middle East and Asia. With cutting-edge production plants in Spain, Colombia and Uruguay, all our processes are governed by Good Manufacturing Practices (BPMs).

Name: Willows Veterinary Centre & Referral Service
Description:
Willows Veterinary Centre and Referral Service is a state-of-the-art veterinary practice located in Solihull, West Midlands. We provide top-quality care both for pets in the surrounding area and also for those referred to us by their own veterinary surgeons for specialist investigation and treatment.

Specialities:
• A friendly, highly trained and caring team of staff, dedicated to looking after pets and their owners
• General veterinary care for pets belonging to clients living in the locality
• Specialist care for dogs and cats referred to us by veterinary surgeons across the UK
• Specialist disciplines include:
---- Orthopaedics and spinal surgery
---- Neurology and neurosurgery
---- Ophthalmology
---- Internal medicine
---- Soft tissue surgery
---- Cardiology
---- Oncology
---- Dermatology
---- Diagnostic imaging
---- Anaesthesia and analgesia
---- Nutrition
• Superb facilities, unsurpassed in the UK 
• Online information on general pet care, specific health issues, diseases and their management
• A commitment to excellence in every aspect of our service.

Willows is part of the Linnaeus Veterinary Ltd (A Mars Company). You can find our terms of use and privacy policy by visiting:  

Privacy statement: www.mars.com/privacy 
Legal notice: willows.uk.net/legal/
Contact Information: willows.uk.net/contact/

Name: VetPlus
Description:
For over 25 years, VetPlus has pioneered the development and acceptance of nutraceuticals within the UK veterinary profession. We are today the global leader in veterinary nutraceuticals and have exclusive partners in over 50 countries.

At VetPlus, we believe animals deserve the best possible products to help them enjoy life to the maximum. This is why we work tirelessly to develop high quality nutraceutical products, made from the best possible ingredients, in our state-of-the-art UK facility.

Name: Omnis Vets Hospital Veterinário
Description:
Desde 2011 atuamos na Zona Norte de São Paulo e Guarulhos, proporcionando o melhor atendimento através de uma equipe médica Veterinária especializada e infraestrutura pronta para atender da melhor forma seu animal de estimação, 24 horas, todos os dias.

Serviços prestados:
Clínica Médica
Clínica Cirúrgica
Internação ( Semi-UTI / Comum / Isolamento / Hotel Care)
Especialidades 
Laboratório
Exames de Imagem

Name: Animal Data Analytics, S.L.
Description:
Animal Data Analytics SL is a company whose origins are in the Department of R & D Proinserga Group, which was established in September 2000, becoming independent of the group in late 2007.

Our activity is aimed at consulting livestock, mainly pigs, and is defined in different areas but with a common basis to transform the data generated by the sector activity into useful information, capable of generating the knowledge needed to improve decision making

Name: Botupharma Saúde e Biotecnologia Animal
Description:
Presente nos 5 continentes com sua linha de produtos destinada a grandes animais, a Botupharma é referência graças ao seu núcleo 
de pesquisa e desenvolvimento, à assessoria de professores e cientistas internacionalmente renomados, à sua estrutura que atende as mais
rígidas normas de produção no Brasil e nos Estados Unidos, e à sua
vocação para a constante inovação.

São diversos os trabalhos científicos de abrangência mundial que citam
os produtos Botupharma como inovadores e responsáveis por resultados expressivos, o que faz da empresa referência nas áreas de reprodução equina e suplementação para cavalos.

Em 2014, com o desenvolvimento conquistado, a Botupharma pôde olhar para os pequenos animais com todo o carinho, desenvolvendo com ciência e qualidade suplementos exclusivos para alimentação natural, suplementos para atingir a alta performance em saúde e medicamentos. 

Sempre a partir de uma perspectiva integral, a Botupharma Pet dedica-se para que os pets possam ter uma vida com mais saúde, bem-estar e qualidade de vida, do jeito que eles merecem.

Botupharma. Escolha inteligente.

Name: Top Vet Clinic
Description: Welcome to Top Vet Clinic, where exceptional veterinary care meets a passion for animals. Our clinic blends modern technology and skilled professionals to ensure your pets receive the best possible care. From routine check-ups to specialized treatments, surgeries, and various services, we're here to support your pets' well-being.

Name: Bretanha Suínos
Description: Empresa especializada em soluções tecnológicas para a suinocultura nacional. Uma das líderes do mercado em fornecimento de material de inseminação artificial de suínos, projetos de centrais de inseminação e serviços técnicos aos clientes. Também atua na área de produção com fornecimento de tecnologias em suplementos alimentares para os suínos.
Location: Passo Fundo, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: The British Veterinary Nursing Association
Description:
The British Veterinary Nursing Association (BVNA) was formed in 1965. It is the only representative organisation for veterinary nurses and other veterinary support staff in the UK.

Our mission is to empower veterinary nurses to develop as individuals and increase their impact on the profession, animal health and welfare.

Name: Laboratorios Aurofarma SAS empresa asociada ITALCOL
VETLINE
Description:
VETLINE is an accredited provider of innovative and high quality animal health care products and feed supplements. A Division of Simfa Labs Pvt. Ltd., Vetline is a professionally managed organization headquartered in Indore, Madhya Pradesh, INDIA. It is a part of Simran Group, one of the leading Poultry Groups in India.

At Vetline, we understand the requirements of animal production and feed industries. Our expertise lie in identifying new opportunities, creating sustainable solutions, delivering benefits and continuously striving to improve the economics of livestock farming.

Name: CoVet
Description: CoVet is the AI-powered assistant built by veterinary professionals who understand the realities of life in the clinic - designed to simplify operations and reduce administrative strain. Backed by decades of hands-on experience, CoVet’s in-house medical team informs every feature with real-world insight. Its context-aware platform adapts to the unique needs of general practice, specialty, and large-animal medicine, while providing enterprise-grade performance and privacy compliance for practices of every size, from solo DVMs to global veterinary groups. By combining automation with intuitive design, CoVet empowers veterinary teams to enter each exam more prepared, and leave confident that every step is complete, allowing them to spend more time caring for patients.

Name: VSS
Description: This business is closed.

Name: The Cancer Vet
Description:
The Cancer Vet is a comprehensive cancer care center, equipped with all the facilities under one roof.
Our centers in Mumbai and Pune are designed to exceed international standards and provide the best possible care for pets with Cancer. Our team of expert Oncologists, Radiologists, and Pathologists work tirelessly to offer hope and a brighter future to pets and their families.
Dr. Noopur Desai, an American Board-Certified Veterinary Oncologist and Founder/CEO of The Cancer Vet has over 10 years of experience in helping pets diagnosed with Cancer.

Name: Ecuphar Veterinaria
Description: Ecuphar Veterinaria es una compañía farmacéutica perteneciente al grupo ANIMALCARE PLC; dedicada a la Salud Animal. Nos enorgullece ser una organización sostenible que se preocupa profundamente por el bienestar de los animales y reconoce el impacto positivo que los animales sanos tienen en la sociedad. Únete a nosotros en nuestra misión de promover la salud animal y marcar la diferencia en la vida de los animales y las personas.

Name: World Vets
Description: World Vets focus is to help animals, people and the places they call home. World Vets is a non-government organization (NGO) providing veterinary aid, veterinary training and disaster relief around the globe. In addition, we work to protect and conserve marine species, with work focused in the Pacific Northwest and the Galapagos Islands. World Vets collaborates with animal advocacy groups, foreign governments, US and foreign military groups and veterinary professionals abroad.  Founded in 2006, World Vets is a 501c3 organization.

Name: Lakefield Veterinary Group
Description:
Lakefield Veterinary Group is a family-owned veterinary hospital acquisition company, preserving the independence and local legacy for veterinarians looking to sell their practice. Our promise is to preserve and elevate what makes your practice special. Our approach is tailored to each individual hospital. And it's driven by our belief that every client, like every pet, is different and is looking for someone who sees their individual needs.

We’re continuously looking to partner with those who share our values and understand the importance of legacy and community. Looking to sell your practice or interested in joining our team? 

Please contact us at talentacquistion@lakefieldvet.com.

Name: Guybro Animal Health P. Ltd.
Description:
Guybro Chemical was established in 1989, with a vision towards Empowering Life & well being & has rapidly emerged as the premier integrated Veterinary Company in India. Business focuses on the manufacturing and marketing of Poultry & Aquaculture feed supplement & Disinfectant range of products with quality services to clients across the country & globe. Its product & service portfolio includes a range of Nutraceuticals , Antibiotics, Branded Ethical Formulations and Contract Manufacturing Services.

Guybro Chemical is an ISO 9001-2008, GMP certified organization with three state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities with its own warehouses strategically located at key pockets all over India. We have developed one patent and 50 trademark registered products. These products now represent a significant and ever-growing share of our business.

Guybro Chemical is now recognized as a leading manufacturer, marketer and distributor of animal health products. Through ongoing expansion, we have established markets in more than eleven countries worldwide. At Guybro Chemical, our endeavour is to invent and produce high- quality products for Poultry, Aquaculture and Livestock industry and offer a wide-ranging customer-driven service at a market-conscious price level.  Our product and service portfolio includes a range of Nutraceuticals, Antobiotics, Branded ethical formulations and contract manufacturing services. 

With our workforce based at International locations as well, we have more than 100 employees currently associated with our brand. This number is expected to double in the coming year with the launch of Livestock division. Our workforce comprises of qualified Veterinarian and skilled personnel with experience in Poultry, Aquaculture and Livestock Industry. Our talent pool has extensive experience, market knowledge, technical experience, scientific support, international exposure and market creditability.

Name: Fisio Care Pet
Description:
A Fisio Care Pet nasceu do desejo de revolucionar a maneira que cuidamos de nossos amigos peludos.
Promovemos o reconhecimento da reabilitação e fisioterapia animal através de um tratamento personalizado, com os melhores, mais eficientes e mais inovadores métodos!
Além disso, somos pioneiros em promover a capacitação de profissionais e estudantes de veterinária que queiram atuar na área de reabilitação e cuidado animal. Proporcionamos, pela Fisio Care Pet Academy, de cursos gratuitos a pós-graduações sobre esse tema. 
Estamos desde 2010 transformando vidas de diversos pets e profissionais da área!

Name: Anima Care
Description:
Anima Care est une entreprise de services funéraires animaliers. 

L’attachement unique et intense qui unit les familles à leurs animaux impose des rites funéraires dignes de ce lien.
Anima Care, avec l’équipe vétérinaire, premier conseil des familles, s’engage avec passion et professionnalisme au respect de l’animal, de son corps et à la qualité des hommages qui accompagnent son départ. 

La gestion de la fin de vie et des corps des animaux décédés reflète les valeurs et l’identité de l’établissement vétérinaire à laquelle Anima Care propose de contribuer. 

En 2023, Anima Care déploie en France 5 crématoriums animaliers proposant une offre moderne, digne de la confiance que font les familles aux équipes vétérinaires. 

Dans nos établissements : 
• Les équipes ont suivi une formation d’hote(sse) funéraire animalier 
• Tous les appareils de filtration sont équipés de ligne de filtration qui diminuent les rejets environnementaux
• La chaleur des appareils de crémation est transformée en électricité

Dans votre clinique : 
• Vous et les propriétaires pourront suivre le parcours funéraire de leur animal depuis le départ de la clinique, jusqu’au retour de l’urne. 
• Des housses funéraires seront mises à disposition de tous les corps, quel que soit le type de crémation
• La crémation individuelle que vous proposerez sera réellement individuelle 
• La crémation collective que vous proposerez pourra être accompagnée
• L’urne fournie sera unique et fabriquée en Europe 

Anima Care accompagne aussi les cliniques vétérinaires à créer leur service de fin de vie grâce à des consommables, outils de communication et formations qui permettent d’opérer des prestations de fin de vie à la hauteur des attentes des familles et ainsi aider le retour des familles dans l’établissement avec l’autre animal.

Name: WVC
Description:
Knowledge you can use now.

WVC is dedicated to providing quality continuing education to the veterinary community through an array of learning styles and environments. Our courses provide comprehensive, progressive and practical knowledge that can be applied immediately to the veterinary practice.

Our Mission

To provide the highest quality year-round continuing education to health care professionals by engaging recognized authorities to deliver valuable information utilizing innovative and effective methodologies, that enhance animal and human health worldwide.

Name: NVS Group
Description:
NVS Group is the UK’s leader for veterinary wholesale, consumables, software and laboratory services. NVS Group aims to support veterinary practitioners with everything they need to run an efficient practice through trustworthy delivery and unrivalled customer service.
 
We employ more than 500 people across the UK. We also have a dedicated team of Territory Managers which cover the whole of the UK, for all of our products and services.

Name: AniCura Nederland
Description:
AniCura is een groot internationaal netwerk van dierenklinieken dat zich heeft toegelegd op hoogkwalitatieve diergeneeskunde voor huisdieren. AniCura behandelt per jaar meer dan 3 miljoen huisdieren in 300 klinieken in Europa, waarvan meer dan 70 in Nederland. Het aanbod van hoogkwalitatieve medische diensten omvat alles van preventieve en basiszorg tot en met geavanceerde diagnostiek, interne geneeskunde, intensieve zorg, chirurgie en orthopedie. Het netwerk telt totaal 7000 medewerkers en 2.500 gediplomeerde dierenartsen. Door samenwerking, een gemeenschappelijke infrastructuur, moderne apparatuur en geavanceerde specialismen ontwikkelt AniCura diergeneeskunde voor de toekomst. AniCura is in 2011 opgericht in Scandinavië, voortgekomen uit het idee dat het delen van kennis en middelen kansen biedt voor betere diergeneeskundige zorg. 

Sinds 2018 maakt AniCura deel uit van Mars Petcare, een familiebedrijf gericht op veterinaire zorg en diervoeding. Voor meer informatie: www.anicura.nl en www.anicuragroup.com
.
Legal: anicura.nl/legal
Privacy: anicura.nl/privacy

Name: Vetminas Produtos Veterinários
Description: Distribuidora de produtos veterinários .

Name: Mazraaty - مزرعتي
Description:
Mazraaty is the MENA region's foremost Agri-Vet Academy and EdTech platform, dedicated to shaping the next generation of food security leaders.
For over a decade, we have seamlessly connected academia with industry demands through innovative digital learning and hands-on training.
Our ecosystem equips professionals with cutting-edge skills in veterinary science, crop management, and animal production, fostering sustainable agricultural development and industry readiness

Name: Ellie Diagnostics
Description:
Ellie Diagnostics is the #1 independent full-service veterinary diagnostics laboratory dedicated to transforming animal health by making wellness testing more accessible. Ellie provides next-day lab results, complimentary shipping, pathology consultations, data protection, mobile access to orders and results and innovative laboratory reporting. Our comprehensive test menu includes routine lab testing, histopathology, cytology, microbiology and a wide variety of specialty tests.

Our goal is to be flexible to your clinic’s needs. Give us a call and let’s customize our services for you!

Name: Lovet Pet Health Care
Description:
Lovet Pet Health Care is here to make vet care easier for all pet parents by offering convenient and flexible veterinary care, including urgent, preventative, dental, and surgical treatment. After operating as AZPetVet in Arizona for over 40 years, we’re bringing our excellent standard of care to a national level under a new name to serve our mission of providing better care to more pets.  

At Lovet, we’re fostering a collaborative team committed to bringing unparalleled vet care to people and their pets. That means more opportunities for growth, competitive benefits, and continued investment in the well-being of all 500+ of our team members. 

Our 100+ licensed veterinarians are hand-picked, highly trained, and ready to deliver the most advanced medical care available. Ready to be a part of the team? Check out our open positions at careers.lovet.com!

Name: Disprovef Ecuador S.A
Description:
Somos importadores y distribuidores de medicamentos, productos y equipos veterinarios, así como de accesorios de peluquería canina profesional.

Trabajamos con las mejores marca a nivel nacional e internacional del sector veterinario!

En medicamentos y balanceado: Zoetis, Molerpa, Pronaca, Basic Farm, Vetall.
En peluquería canina: Andis, Metropolitan, Mars, Shorline.
En equipos clínicos veterinarios: Rayto, Chison, Firefly, RWD Life Science, Contec, Vetscan, SINO Medical.

Name: Labyes do Brasil
Description:
Representante exclusiva dos produtos Labyes e Deltavet no Brasil.
Atua no segmento Pet nacional com os produtos: Gerioxx, Ostecart Plus, Condroitin, Tears, Tobramax, Ciprovet, Aziplus, Crema 6A e no segmento equino com os produtos: Osteocart Equinos, Osteocrem e Condroitin Equinos.

Name: IMEVE
Description:
O nome comercial "IMEVE", já demonstra estreita afinidade com o propósito de fabricar insumos veterinários. Também, não poderia ter maior coincidência, constituir uma empresa voltada para o ramo veterinário, justamente, tendo como vizinha a Faculdade de Ciências Agrárias e Veterinárias de Jaboticabal - campus da UNESP.
A localização geográfica também é uma das mais privilegiadas, pois, a cidade de Jaboticabal se situa numa região extremamente otimizada em relação à facilidade de acesso e interligação com os grandes centros fornecedores de matéria-prima, que, igualmente, propicia o fluxo de saídas e entradas de todo o movimento operacional - tanto comercial quanto industrial - com extrema facilidade.
A IMEVE possui laboratórios especialmente projetados e aparelhados para executar atividades farmacotécnicas, essenciais aos setores de produção, inclusive, para análises e controle de qualidade de produtos acabados.
É uma empresa genuinamente brasileira, voltada para a pesquisa e desenvolvimento de produtos veterinários, com tecnologia própria. Possui uma equipe de pesquisadores (Médicos Veterinários, Zootecnistas e Farmacêuticos), cujos estudos fundamentam-se, principalmente, na investigação de medicamentos ainda inéditos no Brasil. Indubitavelmente, este fato, a coloca entre as melhores indústrias de maior conceito em relação à credibilidade no mercado veterinário.

Name: AmeriVet Veterinary Partners
Description:
AmeriVet Veterinary Partners is building the future of veterinary care — rooted in community, shaped by compassion, and driven by innovation.

Our story has always been about community: the kind that strengthens relationships among veterinarians and pet owners, unites care teams and neighborhoods, and ties people to purpose. With over 200 hospitals across the U.S., we’re proud to support veterinary teams and the communities they serve — empowering them with tools, resources, and connection. 

Our mission is simple: To strengthen the communities we serve by providing personalized veterinary care. Because when we care for one another, we make it possible to care better — for every pet, and every team.

At AmeriVet, we believe thriving teams build thriving communities. You will have the tools, resources, and opportunities to grow your career — no matter where you start.

Rooted in community. Personalized by pet. United by care.

Name: ARTAT Enterprise
Description: ARTAT Enterprise, based in Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, is a fast-growing company specialized in Animal Health and Nutrition for all types of species especially Dairy animals and Poultry. It was established in 2003 and since then has supplied thousands of products to the livestock industries and organizations worldwide and became the sole agent for many international manufacturers of feed and feed additives as well as vaccines, disinfectant and other hygiene products.

Name: Real H Nutrição e Saúde Animal
Description:
A Real H Nutrição e Saúde Animal é 100% brasileira, com sede em Campo Grande (MS) e que conta ainda com duas filiais, sendo uma em Cuiabá (MT) e outra em Ji-Paraná (RO).
A empresa de Nutrição e Saúde Animal é pioneira no uso da Homeopatia Populacional. Este método terapêutico, desenvolvido pelo médico veterinário prof. Dr. Claúdio Martins Real - que em 2001 recebeu o título de "Pai da Homeopatia Veterinária no Brasil" - tem por objetivo promover ganhos produtivos através da redução do estresse dos animais e também da racionalização do uso de medicamentos químicos.
O laboratório homeopático da Real H, instalado junto à matriz da fábrica de nutrição, é hoje o maior da América Latina e atende não somente todos os estados brasileiros, mas também o Paraguai e a Colômbia. Outras nações como Uruguai, Argentina, Panamá, México e África do Sul em breve também deverão conhecer a eficácia da Homeopatia Populacional, produzida pela Real H.
Hoje a empresa trabalha com cinco Linhas de Produtos, sendo a Homeo Base, Homeo Bovis, Homeo Capriovi, Homeo Suis e Homeo Pet.

Name: PT Berdikari
Description: PT Berdikari yang merupakan BUMN bagian dari Holding Pangan ID FOOD yang ditugaskan oleh pemerintah untuk mensukseskan program pemerintah dalam meningkatkan penyediaan pangan hewani yang aman dan kesejahteraan peternak melalui kebijakan dan program pembangunan peternakan yang berdaya saing dan berkelanjutan dengan mengoptimalkan pemanfaatan sumber daya lokal. Tujuan khususnya adalah terjaminnya ketersediaan benih dan bibit ternak yang berkualitas, meningkatkan populasi dan produktivitas dan meningkatkan serta mempertahankan status kesehatan hewan, jaminan keamanan produk dan meningkatkan pelayanan prima kepada masyarakat.

Name: Allagro
Description: Allagro, a member of the Klybeck Group, is a leading force in feed additives and food additives industries, alongside a diverse portfolio spanning several other sectors. With a strong commitment to excellence, we offer high-quality, cutting-edge products and services that cater to the evolving needs of our diverse sectors.

Name: Eville & Jones
Description: E&J is the principal provider of outsourced official veterinary controls throughout England & Wales. Our dedicated and highly trained team deliver audit, verification, and enforcement services in the fields of animal health, public health and animal welfare. Our strength lies in the competence of our staff and the management team delivering our core service. Our people are our success: our teams have a wide range of skills and expertise built over the 27 years that we have been in business – ensuring that most requirements can be met directly from within the team. The company is recognised as the clear UK industry leader and is well connected to key decision-makers throughout Europe and further afield. E&J is committed to the safeguarding of public health and to maintaining the food supply chain through all our essential activities, while ensuring the protection of animal welfare. We highly value both our customers and our family of dedicated professional people. We get it done, we do it well, we make a difference.

Name: Improve Veterinary Education
Description:
Improve Veterinary Education, part of Improve International Group, is a world leader in veterinary postgraduate training and education. 

It has enabled over 40,000 fellow professionals worldwide to gain new skills, progress their careers and help animals thrive. 

Its customers can choose from Face to Face and Online Learning courses across many clinical subjects, in eight different languages and gain qualifications through its accreditation and qualifications partner, the International School of Veterinary Postgraduate Studies (ISVPS).  

Improve Veterinary Education was the first organisation to be awarded a contract from Defra for the training and assurance of the Official Veterinarians in the UK.

Name: Rarebreed Veterinary Partners
Description: Rarebreed Veterinary Partners was founded with a single vision to reimagine the veterinary work experience. Our mission is to provide exceptional patient care, outstanding client service and a kick-ass work experience for all team members.

Name: Midwest Veterinary Supply
Description:
Midwest Veterinary Supply strives daily to support veterinary practices and build meaningful relationships in the animal health community. We are a full-service distributor for everything a veterinary clinic needs to deliver care to animals.

Join us on Facebook: facebook.com/midwestveterinarysupply
Join us on Instagram: @midwestveterinarysupply
Join us on LinkedIn:  midwest-veterinary-supply

Name: Pathway Vet Alliance
Description:
Thrive Pet Healthcare is one of the first veterinary services offering a comprehensive continuum of care for pets’ primary, specialty, and acute needs. Through a nationwide network of over 400 veterinary providers, and an industry-leading membership program, Thrive Pet Healthcare provides personalized, accessible care through every stage of a pet’s life and health.  

The veterinarian founded and led organization provides industry-first benefits for practice staff while elevating privately held veterinary hospitals with innovative service and technology solutions. By focusing on the needs of care providers and professional collaboration, Thrive Pet Healthcare is supporting the well-being of the industry and raising the national bar for veterinary excellence.

Name: Heartland Veterinary Partners
Description:
Heartland Veterinary Partners is a support organization that is committed to improving the lives of veterinarians. We purchase veterinary practices and provide operational support to relieve administrative burdens such as payroll, recruiting, HR, marketing and accounts payables. If needed, we invest to support growth. The practices maintain their unique branding, culture and clinical autonomy.

At Heartland, we believe that selling a veterinary practice shouldn’t mean losing what makes it remarkable. When we acquire a practice, the doctor comes first. We listen closely to their needs in order to create a one-of-a-kind solution to ease their administrative burdens—all without disrupting their day-to-day operations, the culture they’ve fostered, and the relationships they’ve built. In other words, the name over the door doesn’t go away. The headaches of running a business do. 

Partnering veterinarians appreciate an improved work-life balance, less financial worry, and the confidence that their teams will be in good hands. Best of all, they get to focus on why they entered the business in the first place: to care for animals and to be present when their clients need them most. Practice team members enjoy the warm culture of their individual community practices combined with the support and resources that Heartland brings to the table.

Improving the lives of veterinarians means supporting them at all stages of their careers. Whether you're a veterinary student or a new graduate looking for hands-on learning to begin your career or an experienced veterinarian looking to tackle management and leadership opportunities, we keep your goals at the heart of everything we do.

The Heartland Support Center team is hardwired to serve. We follow the philosophy of servant leadership and put the needs of others first with a genuine desire to help. As a result, Heartland’s practices count on team members to be there for them with heart and solution, not a corporate agenda.

Name: IndeVets
Description:
IndeVets is a veterinary staffing company built on the mission of bringing balance, fulfillment, and joy back to a burned-out industry. Vet-led and doctor-driven since day one, we employ highly credentialedveterinarians who provide trusted, consistent coverage to animal hospitals nationwide, filling staffing gaps without compromising care. We make it easy for veterinarians to get the time back they deserve for better work-life balance by giving them control over the hours they work, along with professional growth, mental health support, and comprehensive benefits. For our hospital partners, that means minimized stress, maximized continuity, and a proven return on investment. 
 
We’re united in caring for pets across the country by ensuring veterinarians can deliver their best to the clinics and animals they serve. Officially certified as a Great Place to Work.

For more information, visit indevets.com or follow us on Instagram, and Facebook.

Name: NVA Compassion-First
Description:
Ethos Veterinary Health (“Ethos”) consists of over 145 world-class specialty and emergency hospitals dedicated to advancing animal health and providing exceptional, compassionate care. 

With a network of over 2,000 board-certified specialists and emergency doctors, Ethos brings together an integrated community of expertise and collaboration enabling continuous growth and learning.  

As one of the largest veterinary specialty networks, Ethos takes a scientific, evidence-based approach to lead the advancement of cutting-edge medicine to extend and improve the lives of pets.  

For more information, visit www.ethosvet.com. 

Ethos is the new, industry-leading community of legacy Ethos Veterinary Health, Compassion-First Pet Hospitals, SAGE Veterinary Centers, and NVA Specialty and Emergency hospitals.

Name: INATA
Description:
Somos a Inata Biológicos, uma empresa com 14 anos de atuação no mercado e mais de 38 anos de expertise em saúde animal.

Nossa trajetória é marcada pela inovação e pioneirismo: fomos os primeiros no Brasil a produzir vacinas autógenas virais e os primeiros no mundo a desenvolver uma vacina contra o Senecavírus em suínos. Também lideramos avanços com a criação da primeira vacina brasileira contra o Aviadenovírus e o Astrovírus, a revolucionária Adenovírus ATV.

Além disso, somos a única fabricante nacional de antígenos para Mycoplasma e Salmonella, reforçando nosso compromisso com soluções inovadoras e de alta qualidade.

Produzimos vacinas autógenas e comerciais para aves, suínos, bovinos e peixes, sempre com o objetivo de fortalecer o mercado, impulsionar a produtividade e proteger a saúde animal em cada etapa da cadeia produtiva.

Name: BIŌNTE Animal Nutrition
Description:
BIŌNTE is a spin-off of Andrés Pintaluba SA (APSA), head of the Pintaluba Group, a multinational conglomerate of 14 companies based in 7 countries.

In 2022, after +20 years of experience, BIŌNTE was born. A company focused on providing solutions to the challenges of mycotoxins to face a more demanding environment, with specialization and technical service as differentiating elements.

Our commitment is to remain a global benchmark in mitigating the effects of mycotoxins through scientific investigation, innovation and technical service, providing effective and sustainable solutions for a better animal nutrition.

Name: BIOLAB Vétérinaire
Description:
BIOLAB Vétérinaire est une compagnie algerienne spécialisée dans l’Importation et la Distribution des produits pharmaceutiques vétérinaires à capitaux privés. Cette indépendance nous confère une réelle vision à long terme qui est résumée en une phrase : « Créer de la valeur par l’Innovation ».
Qui sommes-nous ?

La société BIOLAB Vétérinaire a été créée en septembre 2000 pour répondre à deux objectifs principaux, à savoir :

    Le renforcement des acquis de la première société BIOVITAL qui active sur le marché de l’importation et de la distribution depuis 1994.
    Proposer des produits d’Intérêt thérapeutique majeur à usage vétérinaire provenant de laboratoires de renommée internationale.

Name: Istituto Zooprofilattico Sperimentale delle Venezie
Description:
The Istituto Zooprofilattico Sperimentale delle Venezie is an Italian public health authority that operates in the fields of animal health and food safety.

The Institute employs veterinarians, biologists, chemists, biotechnologists, technicians and administration staff. Its activities are: diagnostic services on animals; analytical controls on food; monitoring plans and disease control; scientific research; training for veterinarians and the food industry staff; scientific communication; promotion of animal welfare.

The Institute is responsible for the North East (of) Italy, and it is part of a network of 10 similar institutes distributed throughout Italy. It is a technical-scientific reference centre for the Italian Ministry of Health; local governments; local health authorities; veterinary professionals; the livestock sector; food companies; the general public.

It also collaborates with international organizations such as the European Commission; the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA); the World Organisation for Animal Health (OIE); the Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (FAO).

Name: Agroline Produtos Agropecuários
Description:
Empresa criada em 16 de abril de 1997, iniciou suas operações em 14 de julho de 1.997. 

Formada a partir da sociedade de três ex-funcionários de uma extinta empresa agropecuária, a Agroline mudou a apresentação e concepção de varejo veterinário no Brasil. 

Eliminando barreiras físicas para os clientes, instalou ilhas de mercadorias pela loja, mudando um layout que a muito tempo existia no varejo. Criou-se aí, o desprendimento e facilidade de acesso do cliente aos produtos. 

Com uma estrutura inicial enxuta, algumas atitudes foram fundamentais. O foco no varejo exigia um mix de produtos atualizados, modernos e de resultados para o consumidor. Da mesma forma havia a necessidade de particularizar e aprimorar o atendimento. Com isso o mix dos produtos aumentou para 2.500 itens, e 10 equipes de profissionais de vendas, atendendo hoje os seus clientes individualmente. 

A gradualidade das mudanças criou consistência, ganhou o mercado e faturamento. 

Agroline Produtos Veterinários, Agropecuários e Ruais. Mais Comodidade para o Homem Rural. Faça suas Compras Online! www.Agroline.com.br
Location: Campo Grande, Mato Grosso do Sul

Name: Innovetive Petcare
Description:
Our Vision

Innovetive Petcare owns and operates veterinary practices across the country. Our clinics benefit from our tools, resources, and a great support team dedicated to helping veterinary practices prosper and grow.

Innovetive Petcare runs a great business so our veterinarians can focus on providing exceptional patient care.  We want our veterinarians and staff to enjoy a better life, with more work-life balance, a strong supportive community, and ongoing training and career development.

Our Team
At Innovetive Petcare, it all begins with a great team. From the veterinarians, veterinary technicians, practice managers and administrative staff at our clinics, to the great support team in our home office, our team is passionate about animal health. 

Happy employees, happy clients
 
When we become your partner, we invest in your people. We believe in the power of company culture and do whatever we can to ensure a fulfilling career with work-life balance. Along with a generous benefits package, we offer continuous development and education opportunities for your employees to learn, grow and develop.

Name: Invetsa
Description:
Transformamos vidas a través del cuidado y la salud animal. 

Desde 1992, en Invetsa impulsamos el bienestar animal y la sostenibilidad del sector veterinario en el Perú.
Somos pioneros en la importación y comercialización de productos de uso veterinario, y brindamos soluciones innovadoras y acompañamiento técnico permanente en salud, nutrición y tecnología animal.

Más de 30 años liderando con excelencia, innovación y compromiso.

Name: The Schwarzman Animal Medical Center
Description: The Stephen & Christine Schwarzman Animal Medical Center (AMC) is the world’s largest non-profit animal hospital with 140+ veterinarians providing the highest quality medical care across 20+ specialties and services, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year. Our mission to provide the best in care, research, and education has been the foundation of our work for over a century. Accredited by the American Animal Hospital Association (AAHA). Learn more about AMC at: www.amcny.org

Name: Zoetis Middle East
Description:
Zoetis is a global animal health company dedicated to supporting customers and their businesses in ever better ways. Building on 60 years of experience, we deliver quality medicines and vaccines, complemented by diagnostic products and genetic tests and supported by a range of services. We are working every day to better understand and address the real-world challenges faced by those who raise and care for animals in ways they find truly relevant.

Our name, Zoetis (zō-EH-tis), has its root in zo, familiar in words such as zoo and zoology and derived from zoetic, meaning “pertaining to life.” It signals our company’s dedication to supporting the veterinarians and livestock producers everywhere who raise and care for the farm and companion animals on which we all depend.

Name: Crown Veterinary Services Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Crown Vet is one of India's leading healthcare facilities dedicated to pet animals. Since inception in 2016 the company has grown to multiple branches and now has a presence in 5 major cities. We take pride in giving pet owners a quality service experience where their pets are treated with the love and respect they deserve. 

Our veterinarians are trained in the Crown Vet way, and understand the importance of good client communication and ethical practice. 

Crown Vet is the brainchild of Pratapsinh Gaekwad. His vision is to create a platform, to support the development of veterinary medicine in India. Through this endeavour Crown Vet hopes to raise the bar in the field of pet care in India. 

In just a few short years the company boasts of recruiting and training one of the largest veterinary teams in the country. With India seeing phenomenal growth in pets and allied petcare services in the last five years, Crown Vet is positioning itself to be a leader in corporate veterinary care, delivering standardised services across every corner of the country.

Name: Blue River PetCare
Description:
Blue River PetCare is a growing community of veterinary practices and dedicated professionals working together to better the lives of the patients we treat and those who love them. 

From coast-to-coast, we offer a long-term home for veterinary practices to continue to grow and thrive, and a welcoming environment that encourages career growth and development for our team members across the country. If you’re looking for options to secure the future of your practice or opportunities to further your career in veterinary medicine, we’d love to hear from you.

Name: British Equine Veterinary Association
Description: The British Equine Veterinary Association (BEVA) is a world leading equine veterinary association with 2,800 members globally. It is a highly regarded authority representing the equine veterinary industry at the highest level, running outstanding Continuing Professional Development (CPD) and producing universally respected journals.

Name: Veterinary Innovative Partners
Description: Veterinary Innovative Partners (VIP) champions a network of nearly 70 esteemed veterinary clinics and hospitals across 11 states. We provide the highest standard of care to the pets we treat and the amazing people who choose to work with us. Our approach is simple: Treat every team member like the VIP they are and always do the right thing.

Name: EBVS - European Board of Veterinary Specialisation
Description: Umbrella Organisation that overseas the training, evaluation and recertification of over 5,000 EBVS European Veterinary Specialists in 27 colleges in 38 disciplines from 59 countries.

Name: Charoen Pokphand Indonesia, Jakarta
Description: PT Charoen Pokphand Indonesia Tbk ("the Company") is Indonesia's largest producer of poultry feed, Day Old Chicks and processed chickens. The Company was established in 1972 as the first high-volume feed mill in Jakarta manufacturing premium quality poultry feed.

Name: TECNOBEEF
Description:
Com origem em uma tradicional família de pecuaristas, a TECNOBEEF carrega o conceito de oferecer soluções personalizadas, com confiabilidade e alta tecnologia para atender às exigências específicas de cada cliente, de produtor para produtor. 
Fundada em 2017 a partir da vivência prática na pecuária de alta performance e da necessidade do mercado por mais qualidade e eficiência, a empresa se tornou referência no fornecimento de produtos para suplementação animal formulados sob medida para todo o ciclo produtivo de bovinos.

Name: United Veterinary Care
Description: We are veterinary professionals who empower our partner hospitals with support, training and technology to elevate their businesses, retain employees, and strengthen their unique brands to consistently deliver a superior client experience.

Name: Vets Choice Radiology
Description: Vets Choice Radiology is a full service teleradiology company with experienced board certified veterinary radiologists and staff. We offer routine and stat interpretations on radiographs, ultrasound, CT, and MRI studies.

Name: NVA Canada
Description: We partner with pet parents to give every pet their best life. Every day, at every stage. Their best life is your best life.

Name: VetPartners España
Description:
VetPartners es un grupo formado por más de 80 centros en España y un total de más de 700 centros y 10.000 empleados en Europa.

Dirigidos por veterinarios, conocemos los desafíos y las alegrías de la vida clínica y trabajamos en estrecha colaboración con nuestra familia de clínicas y hospitales para conseguir nuestro objetivo principal: garantizar la mejor atención para pacientes y clientes.

Creemos en la cercanía y el sentimiento de pertenencia y nos preocupamos por las personas, sus animales y nuestra profesión.

Estamos en constante crecimiento buscando ser el grupo veterinario de elección tanto para las clínicas y hospitales como para los empleados.

Para logarlo contamos con un excelente ambiente laboral, ampliamos nuestro grupo incorporando centros que se preocupen por superarse y desarrollar la profesión y fomentamos nuestro negocio de manera eficiente, ética, sostenible y rentable.

No hay dos clínicas iguales, por lo que adoptamos e impulsamos su espíritu independiente, al tiempo que brindamos un soporte central personalizado en finanzas, tecnología, marketing, contabilidad, administración y recursos humanos.

Desarrollamos individuos, hospitales y clínicas y equipos proveyendo a nuestra gente de formación de alta calidad e invirtiendo en nuestros centros proporcionando las últimas tecnologías, equipos e instalaciones.

Nuestros valores de cercanía, respeto, colaboración, apoyo y dedicación definen cómo trabajamos.

Si quieres formar parte de este increíble viaje, nos encantará acompañarte.

Privacidad: https://vetpartners.es/politica-de-privacidad-redes-sociales/

Name: Instinct Science
Description: Instinct is a leading veterinary software system focused on enhancing patient care and improving staff efficiency. We already power many of the world's most advanced care centers including teaching hospitals, private specialty centers, and leading ER/general practice hospitals. Instinct includes digital whiteboards and treatment sheets, patient safety warnings, built in Plumb's, live invoice auditing, and much more!

Name: Heart + Paw
Description:
This is petcare reimagined

Heart + Paw is an integrated pet care company serving pets and their parents.  Bringing together a tailored physical space and digital experience designed for the dynamics between pets, their parents, and the care team, our brand serves the modern dimensions of pet parenthood.  Heart + Paw will offer veterinary care, grooming, day care, boarding, retail, and other complementary services at its centers.  Thoughtfully designed, digitally enabled and powered by the best and the brightest, Heart + Paw will be the destination for pets and their parents.

Name: VCA Canada
Description:
VCA Canada Animal Hospitals is a family of over 140 small animal veterinary practices located across 6 Canadian provinces. Our team of over 4,000 associates provide our communities with general, emergency and specialty services in our practices, offering compassionate care for pets and their families. Our purpose of Caring For Life’s Greatest Companions is felt in every part of the VCA Canada experience, whether it is our patients, our clients, our team members, or our communities.

As part of the Mars Veterinary Health family of brands, VCA Canada is taking care of the future of veterinary medicine to help achieve the Mars Petcare Purpose—A Better World for Pets. To learn more about us, please visit www.vcacanada.com or find us on Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn.

https://bit.ly/vcaprivacy   https://bit.ly/vcalegal

Name: BetterVet (Acquired by The Vets)
Description:
BetterVet is an industry leader in mobile veterinary care and pet wellness. Our mission is to provide a better veterinary experience for pets, pet parents, clients, and our care providers. We strive to provide best-in-class care to our patients and clients and a more balanced work environment for veterinary professionals.

Our business division, BetterVet for Business, is an excellent partnership opportunity for corporations to provide enhanced pet benefits and vet care to their employees. We work with companies of all sizes across the United States. For more information about BetterVet for Business, reach out to jack@bettervet.com.

Along with offering an excellent benefits package, we’ve built a collaborative, inclusive environment where people feel valued, and empathy and compassion rule. Visit our careers page for a complete list of job openings and benefits, or contact careers@bettervet.com for more information.

Connect with us on Facebook at facebook.com/BetterVetUSA
Get social with us on Instagram at instagram.com/bettervet

Name: Digitail
Description: Digitail is the leading cloud-based, AI-native platform built to power every part of a veterinary clinic including scheduling & intake, medical records, invoicing, inventory management, and client communication. Trusted by over 10,000 veterinary professionals, Digitail helps teams work smarter, see up to 2× more patients per day, and finally get home on time. With a fleet of 15+ AI Agents, 30+ integrations, and a connected Pet Parent App, Digitail saves clinics 50+ hours a month in administrative work. For more information, please visit digitail.com.

Name: FVE - Federation of Veterinarians of Europe
Description: The Federation of Veterinarians of Europe (FVE) is a non-profit umbrella organisation of veterinary organisations from 38 European countries. It was founded in 1975 and nowadays represents around 200,000 European veterinarians. The FVE strives to support veterinarians in delivering their professional responsibilities and representing the veterinary profession to the outside world. The FVE provides a platform for veterinarians across Europe to interact, to discuss and to develop position papers and professional guidelines. The current FVE motto is: "Veterinarians care for animals and people!" FVE publishes 4 times a year a newsletter which can be found on the FVE website.

Name: Dr. Hato - Hospital Veterinário e Pet Shop
Description: Dr. Hato possui 3 unidades na região do Grande ABC (2 unidades com hospital veterinário com atendimento 24h e pet shop), e 1 loja (pet shop) no Jardim Paulista - São Paulo - SP, totalizando mais de 13.000 m² de estrutura e cerca de 400 colaboradores. Além disso, desde 2018, possui uma loja on-line com diversos produtos e acessórios para pets.

Name: Nest Veterinary
Description:
We create preventative healthcare membership solutions that delight hospitals, veterinarians, and pet parents.

Nest partners with veterinary organizations to craft preventative care memberships that improve pet health outcomes and generate dependable recurring revenue for clinics.

Name: Veterinary Management Groups - VMG
Description:
Who is VMG? Simply put, we’re a professional membership organization dedicated to helping hospitals with veterinary ownership experience practice success through collaboration. 

Comprised of over 50 groups and 1,600 practices located throughout the US and Canada, we are the sum of our member community. A group of problem solvers, brainstormers, lifelong friends, industry leaders and veterinarians who focus on the highest levels of patient care, always searching for new ways to improve.

Name: CareVet
Description: We are a network of veterinary hospitals anchored by a deep commitment to the teams who serve our clients and patients. As one CareVet team, we’re united by a single focus: better clinical outcomes. As a CareVet Team Member, you’ll receive the same quality of care and support you provide every day through our Whole Person Approach.

Name: GALVmed
Description:
Millions of people in low-and-middle-income countries rely on livestock to address basic needs.  GALVmed is a non-profit organisation working with partners to make livestock health products available, accessible and affordable to small-scale producers, within a sustainable economic framework. 

Our principle ‘’Protecting Livestock – Improving Human Lives’’ underlines that better livestock health contributes to a transformational improvement in the livelihoods of small-scale producers.

Our vision is transformational improvement in the well-being and economic progression of small-scale livestock producers.

Our Mission 
We will contribute to the transformation of small-scale livestock producers’ lives by:

•	understanding the constraints to animal health and how to overcome them;
•	engaging the animal health industry; and
•	ensuring awareness, availability, and adoption of effective animal health interventions.

Name: Vet-AI
Description:
Founded in 2017 by tech expert Paul Hallett alongside veterinarians Robert Dawson and Sarah Warren, Vet-AI was born with a clear mission: to make pet care more accessible and affordable, while supporting vets, pets, and their owners.

From day one, Vet-AI has combined clinical expertise with cutting-edge technology. Its flagship brand, Joii Pet Care, launched in 2019, delivering a powerful mix of telemedicine, vet-trained Large Language Models, automated triage, vision tools, and rapid clinical trial capabilities.

With over 1.5m pet owners having access to Joii Pet Care, clinically validated AI solutions and Knowledge Transfer Partnerships with leading academics, Vet-AI is well and truly disrupting the £100bn veterinary market.

Today, the business works with leading pet health companies, pet food brands, insurers, and research institutions, earning recognition through awards such as Tech Team of the Year and Top 5 B2B Start-up in Europe. As pet ownership rises and vets face immense pressure, Vet-AI continues to pioneer smarter, scalable solutions designed to transform care in the UK and beyond.

Name: Medivet España
Description:
Fundada en 1987, somos un proveedor líder de servicios veterinarios, con presencia en el Reino Unido, Alemania, España y Francia, con más de 500 clínicas y 27 centros veterinarios de última generación abiertos las 24 horas. 

A través de nuestro exclusivo modelo de copropiedad, una marca líder y un modelo totalmente integrado, en Medivet formamos una gran comunidad de más de 1.500 veterinarios dedicados y comprometidos a proporcionar una atención excepcional. 

El objetivo principal de Medivet es proporcionar una atención excepcional siempre que sea necesario. Por ello, hemos creado una comunidad nacional e internacional de veterinarios que ofrecen la mejor atención, tanto a las mascotas como a sus tutores. La base de esta atención excepcional se encuentra en nuestro modelo operativo "hub and spoke", que permite a las clínicas más pequeñas acceder a los mejores especialistas, diagnósticos y tratamientos a través de una red nacional de hospitales y centros 24 horas. 

La sede central de Medivet España, nuestro centro de soporte, se encuentra en Madrid. Desde aquí proporcionamos apoyo administrativo y de back office para la red de clínicas a través de los departamentos de RRHH, IT, Legal, Finanzas, Adquisiciones, Marketing, Servicios clínicos y Seguridad y Salud. Este apoyo especializado garantiza que cada clínica esté equipada y capacitada para centrarse en brindar una atención excepcional a sus mascotas y tutores.

Name: American Association of Equine Practitioners (AAEP)
Description:
The American Association of Equine Practitioners (AAEP) is the world’s largest association for veterinary professionals who are dedicated to raising the standard in horse health. 

The 9,300 veterinarians and veterinary students who comprise the AAEP’s membership are involved in a broad range of equine disciplines and practice veterinary medicine in a variety of fields, from private practice and academia to industry and regulatory.

All members have exclusive access to a community of peers and the latest in clinical information to help solve the issues faced every day in veterinary practice.  If you would like to learn more or are interested in joining the association, please go to http://www.aaep.org/info/join-aaep.

Name: Viticus Group - Animal Health (Formerly WVC)
Description:
Viticus Group is dedicated to providing quality continuing education to the veterinary community through an array of learning styles and environments. Our courses provide comprehensive, progressive, and practical knowledge that can be applied immediately to the veterinary practice.

Our Mission

To provide the highest quality year-round continuing education to health care professionals by engaging recognized authorities to deliver valuable information utilizing innovative and effective methodologies, that enhance animal and human health worldwide.

Name: Hasvet A.Ş.
Description:
Hasvet Animal Healthcare Ecosystem | One and Only in the World

Since our establishment, we have been offering innovative solutions to our colleagues and the veterinary sector with a team of over 500 employees, including 65 veterinarians. Through our unique brands such as Evet, Safir, Travmavet, Pifarma, FDN İlaç, Vilsan İlaç, Vindino, Hasvet Academy, and Vettalks, we have built an ecosystem that prioritizes value-driven services for our profession and professionals.

Our success story in Turkey has gained global recognition, making a Turkish brand’s business model a point of discussion worldwide. With groundbreaking projects like the Hasvet Ratem Radiology, Diagnosis, and Training Center, we continue to stand by our colleagues and add value to the sector.

At Hasvet, we are always committed to achieving better for the profession and our colleagues.

Name: MicroVet
Description: MicroVet é um laboratório veterinário especializado em saúde suína. A companhia produz vacinas autógenas para controlar as doenças mais importantes de suínos no Brasil. A empresa atende clientes em várias partes do país, incluindo produtores e grandes empresas, oferecendo soluções para aumentar a saúde e a produtividade dos rebanhos. Conta com equipe de veterinários bem treinada, capaz de trabalhar diretamente com os produtores para oferecer suporte técnico para o controle de doenças e manejo do rebanho. Técnicas modernas de microbiologia e de biologia molecular são utilizadas para o diagnóstico dos agentes microbianos envolvidos nas doenças de suínos. A MicroVet tem a certificação ISO 9001 desde 2002 e em 2010 foi certificada pela CTNBio para trabalhar com organismos geneticamente modificados (Biossegurança Qualidade certificada-CQB).

Name: CUBEX
Description: CUBEX provides automated inventory management for veterinary hospitals. Our smart cabinets and intuitive, cloud-based software help hospitals take control of inventory, reduce risk, streamline workflows, and improve profitability—so staff spend less time tracking product and more time focused on patient care.

Name: University of Veterinary and Animal Sciences
Description: Being an expert in Molecular Biology and Biotechnology, can provide best services in research and academics.

Name: Saudi Feed Premixes Co. ( Saudi Mix)
Description:
Saudi Feed Premixes Co. (Saudi Mix) was established in 2009 with purpose to serve the Animal Health sector with premium Feed Additives products thru alliance with globally recognized companies supplying premium feed additives portfolio from Vitalac (France), Sumitomo (Japan), Phileo-LeSaffre (France) BASF (Germany) and CJ (Korea). 

We are aware of the values and principles that we have created; investing in agricultural development is the cornerstone of business success and sustainability. For success our focus is to measure the satisfaction of our customers, meet their needs and expectations. Based on these principles, the vision was expended in 2015 to establish a Feed Premixes facility to cater local market needs initially than expand regionally since market was relying on outsourcing from different continents. We did this thru know-how collaboration with Trouw Nutrition-Nutreco.
 
We continue to strive to improve our performance and find ways to better meet the vision of Saudi Arabia (2030) and seek new opportunities to increase our activities in animal health within and outside the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia Ltd. 

                                                                                 Who we are

Saudi Mix is set to help its valued customers achieving their best-feed performance results. We do it by providing them with a wide range of cost-effective Feed Premixes that is all of superior premium ingredients; which is insured thru our accreditation of FAMI Qs certifications.
                                    “Production & Trading of B1. Premixtures based on European Standard”

                                                                                    Mission
To help our valued customers achieving their best feed performances by providing a wide range of innovative and cost-effective products made with eco-friendly ingredients.  

                                                                                     Vision
To be a competent and trusted manufacturer of Feed Premixes & Additives, capable of developing and patenting new superior quality and cost-effective products and services that fulfill customers’ needs.

Our focus to serve our customers through 3 main sectors

- Manufacturing  
The new, state of art, premises has been designed to operate at the best internationally recognized quality and manufacturing standards to produce wide range of premium quality Feed Premixes for Poultry, Ruminant and Aquaculture animal species. 

- Distribution   
We represent a range of globally recognized and quality focused companies with a wide portfolio of specialty products for Ruminant, Poultry and aquaculture industries. 

- Technical Support Services   
We assist our customers to achieve their best cost-effective feed performance by providing feed analysis and formulation services. Along with our new establish laboratory that will be certified for ISO 17025. Together with our global partners, we help farmers achieving better productivity with a very reasonable cost.

Name: The Ralph (Veterinary Referral Centre)
Description:
We are an independent, compassionate and ethical-practice focused veterinary referral centre for dogs and cats located in Marlow, Buckinghamshire (on the M4/M40 corridor to the west of London). We opened our doors in February 2019. 

Our services include Emergency and Critical Care (which operates 24-7-365), Internal Medicine, Orthopaedics, Soft-Tissue Surgery, Ophthalmology, Oncology, Diagnostic Imaging, Cardiology, Neurology and Neurosurgery, Dentistry, Anaesthesia and Analgesia, and Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation. 

The Ralph is very much a passion- and vision-driven hospital founded on a strong organisational culture and authentic core values.

**Founding core values:

•	We care for every animal as we would our own 
•	We act with compassion, integrity and humility 
•	We treat ourselves and others with patience and gratitude 
•	We value our people and prioritise their wellbeing 
•	We embrace a learning mindset which has creativity at its core 
•	We champion a community that nurtures a shared vision  
•	We are a team that paves our own way and leads by example 

Thanks for taking the time to read this and do get in touch (shailen@theralph.vet).

Name: Onevet Group
Description:
O Onevet Group é uma rede de medicina veterinária constituída por clínicas de proximidade e hospitais de referência nacional.
Connosco pode contar com um corpo clínico experiente, acesso a meios de diagnóstico e tratamentos mais avançados e a conveniência da informação clínica do seu animal estar integrada em rede, facilitando avaliações mais complexas.

Name: VetPartners Italy
Description: We call ourselves VetPartners because we believe in working closely with our group's clinics. As veterinarians ourselves, we are familiar with the critical issues and challenges our profession puts us through. We also know that no two veterinary facilities are the same: that's why we respect their independence. We believe that investing in people, practices, equipment and the latest technology is critical to achieving our core mission: to ensure the best veterinary care for our patients and their owners. Since 2019, we offer to a steadily increasing number of hospitals that decide to join us, professional support to grow and prosper: reliable management models, support in the areas of finance, administration, accounting, regulatory and labor aspects, team management, marketing, communication and much more. If today we have more than 500 hospitals and more than 6000 professionals in Italy, UK and France, it is only thanks to the concreteness, transparency and experience that we guarantee to those who join our family. People are the strength of our Group: we firmly believe that dialogue, listening and empathy for those in front of us are the fundamental pillars for development. Aware of our qualities, we are always looking for new practices to join us to improve and grow, pursuing a future full of success in the medical and professional fields, with full satisfaction of veterinarians, animals and pet parents.

Name: Calbos Saúde Animal
Description:
Calbos Saúde animal , tecnologia a serviço da saúde 

Indústria farmacêutica - desde 1970

Name: Ayurvet - A division of Zenex Animal Health India Pvt Ltd
Description: Ayurvet, a division of Zenex Animal Health India Private Ltd.

Name: Veterinarians without Borders North America
Description: Helping to improve the livelihoods of communities in need throughout the world is what Veterinarians without Borders / Vétérinaires sans Frontières is all about. Established in 2005, VWB/VSF works with governments, educational institutions, non-governmental organizations, local communities, farmers’ groups, and international agencies, to tackle root-cause issues affecting public health, animal health and ecosystem health in developing communities around the world.

Name: Actualidad Avipecuaria
Description: Actualidad Avipecuaria es un medio de comunicación líder en su rubro. Tenemos a la mejor plana periodística e informativa del sector. Siempre presente con la información pertinente que nuestro público desea saber, conocer y leer.

Name: IVC Evidensia France
Description:
IVC Evidensia est leader dans la prestation de services vétérinaires, avec plus de 2 500 cliniques réparties dans 22 pays à travers le monde.
 
En 2018, le réseau s'est implantée en France. Aujourd'hui, il compte 280 cliniques dans tout le pays : 211 cliniques canines, 46 cliniques mixtes et 6 centres hospitaliers vétérinaires ou centres de référé.
 
Au quotidien, ce sont 2 500 professionnels qui contribuent au succès d'IVC Evidensia France, soignant environ 600 000 animaux chaque année.
 
L’indépendance clinique, le partage d'expérience à l'échelle locale et internationale ainsi que la formation continue sont au cœur de nos préoccupations, avec un objectif : accompagner l’évolution des équipes et leurs carrières.

We Care - prendre soin des animaux, des membres du réseau et de la planète.

We Dare - favoriser la prise d’initiative pour faire évoluer la profession vétérinaire au profit de l'excellence médicale. 

We Share - partager les bonnes pratiques, savoir-faire et savoir-être pour aller plus loin ensemble. 

Des valeurs qui nous guident à travers toutes nos activités & toutes nos initiatives.

Notre mission ?
Être le réseau vétérinaire de référence, au service du soin et du bien-être des animaux, des humains et de la planète.

Name: VetEvolve
Description:
At VetEvolve, our goal is simple: to ensure every team member is “Happy Here” so they want to build a career with us and provide the best care possible to the pet families in the communities in which
we serve.

In our people-first culture, we are all about making things better for veterinary professionals. We focus on every team member as an individual to understand their unique career goals and provide them with the resources and support they need to be successful, now and in the future.

Our mission is creative positive change in the veterinary profession to enhance the lives of pets and people.  We live by our values to Serve, Evolve and Trust.

Name: VET.CT
Description: VET.CT’s mission is to make the veterinary world a better place by delivering exceptional radiology reports and specialist case advice, and providing high-quality education. As a certified B Corp, we strive to be a force for good in the veterinary industry and beyond.

Name: APC Latin America
Description:
A APC é líder mundial na produção e comercialização de proteínas sanguíneas derivadas de plasma e hemácias. Nossa história começou em 1981, quando os cientistas da APC descobriram o poderoso papel que as proteínas funcionais derivadas do plasma desempenham em ajudar a apoiar e manter a função imunológica em animais. O negócio pioneiro focado em estudos científicos rendeu mais de 600 artigos publicados em revistas científicas internacionais e mais de uma dúzia de patentes relacionadas à coleta e processamento das proteínas do sangue e do plasma. Hoje, a APC emprega mais de 500 pessoas e opera 17 fábricas em oito países em todo o mundo. A APC continua comprometida com a essência de sua missão de ajudar animais a atingir o melhor desempenho por meio do uso de proteínas funcionais inovadoras que impactam positivamente a saúde animal.

 APC es reconocida como líder mundial en la fabricación y venta de proteínas plasmáticas funcionales derivadas del plasma y las células rojas que afectan a miles de millones de animales cada año. Nuestra historia comenzó en 1981, cuando los científicos de APC descubrieron el poderoso papel que desempeñan las proteínas funcionales derivadas del plasma para ayudar a apoyar y mantener la función inmunológica en los animales. El negocio pionero centrado en estudios científicos ha producido más de 600 artículos publicados en revistas científicas internacionales y más de una docena de patentes relacionadas con la recolección y procesamiento de proteínas sanguíneas y plasmáticas. Hoy, APC emplea a más de 500 personas y opera 17 fábricas en ocho países de todo el mundo. APC sigue comprometida con la esencia de su misión de ayudar a los animales a lograr el mejor rendimiento mediante el uso de proteínas funcionales innovadoras que impactan positivamente en la salud animal.

 www.APCproteins.com

Name: Farcovet
Description:
Fármacos y Cosméticos Veterinarios S.A., es una empresa ecuatoriana, especializada en la comercialización y distribución de productos veterinarios de calidad.
Enfocados en las necesidades del mercado hemos generado alianzas estratégicas con empresas de prestigio internacional, apoyados en un staff de profesionales veterinarios y asesores de negocios, para el desarrollo del mercado veterinario.

Name: Veritas Veterinary Partners
