Description: Veritas Veterinary Partners is collection of premier specialty and emergency veterinary hospitals across the U.S. Our hospitals are led by best-in-class doctors, technicians and staff who provide exceptional and compassionate care. With specialists in surgery, oncology, cardiology, neurology, critical care, internal medicine and more, our teams collaborate to tackle the most challenging cases in veterinary medicine. Through our mentorship-driven culture, industry-leading benefits and professional development programs, we ensure the well-being of our people. Our trusted network provides the collective strength, resources and wisdom of many, while preserving the clinical autonomy that makes each practice special.

Name: Centre Hospitalier Vétérinaire Frégis
Description:
Le Centre Hospitalier Vétérinaire Frégis est le 1er Centre français regroupant le plus grand nombre de vétérinaires spécialisés. Une équipe de plus de 130 personnes (dont 60 vétérinaires), assure des services spécialisés, des urgences avec des techniques de pointe.  
2 adresses pour nous rendre visite :
Rue Jacques Destrée, 75 013 Paris : 
Accès piétons : 8h00 - 20h00
9 rue de Verdun, 94 250 Gentilly :
Accès parking, urgences et piétons : 24h/24, 7 j/7

Envie d’en savoir plus sur nous  : www.fregis.com

Name: Natural Life - Apasionados por tu mascota
Description:
NUESTRA VISIÓN

Las mascotas son nuestra pasión. Trabajamos todos los días para mejorar su calidad de vida, como así también la relación con sus tutores mediante el traspaso de información útil y la recomendación de productos adecuados.

NUESTRA MISIÓN 

Lograr que nuestra comunidad comparta la misma pasión que nosotros por las mascotas y de esta forma, seguir fomentando el cuidado de las mismas. Continuar brindando la mejor atención por medio de personal capacitado para informar y cubrir las necesidades del cliente y su mascota con productos de primera calidad.

Name: Distrivet
Description:
Empresa dedicada al suministro de productos y servicios que aporten valor al profesional de sanidad y cuidado animal. 

Ofrecemos un servicio de aprovisionamiento integral, tanto en productos de sanidad como instrumental y equipamiento, alimentación y fungible.

Name: HUVEPHARMA, INC
Description:
Huvepharma is a fast growing global pharmaceutical company with a focus on developing, manufacturing and marketing human and animal health products. The company also manufactures and markets enzymes for food, feed and industrial applications. 
Huvepharma is a privately owned company headquartered in Sofia, Bulgaria.

Name: Al Barsha Veterinary Clinic, Dubai
Description:
Al Barsha Veterinary Clinic is the primary Veterinary healthcare clinic in Dubai since October 2004. Providing full service veterinary care with qualified, friendly staff.

Our Mission.

We aim at the highest quality Veterinary Medical Care and Service as a First line Veterinary Clinic. We want the best for our pet-clients and a satisfied, well-informed and happy owner who feels confident enough to refer friends and family to our clinic.
In our advice to you “The Quality of life” of your pet will always be our highest aim considered before treatment is started.
Although we start of small, we want to grow to be a milestone in Veterinary Care in Dubai. Providing full service veterinary care to most of the species in a state of the art veterinary clinic, with specialists on every topic and a qualified, friendly staff.

Name: Argos Vétérinaire
Description:
Argos Vétérinaire est un groupe de cliniques et cabinets vétérinaires créé en janvier 2014 par le Docteur Emeric Lemarignier. Début 2019, notre réseau comptait 9 cliniques vétérinaires sur l’agglomération bordelaise.  Après avoir validé l’intérêt de ce concept auprès des clients et des vétérinaires, nous sommes maintenant prêts à vous proposer cette nouvelle approche dans d’autres grandes villes françaises: Nantes, Montpellier, Saint-Etienne, Grenoble…

Toutes nos cliniques sont regroupées sous la marque “Argos Vétérinaire”, travaillent en équipe, fédèrent les vétérinaires dans leur profession et proposent une expertise médicale élevée à nos clients. Tout cela est rendu possible au quotidien grâce à des valeurs profondément ancrées dans notre ADN que sont la Passion, la Proximité et l’Excellence. 

Notre projet s’appuie également sur des engagements forts vis-à-vis de nos clients, partenaires et collaborateurs.

• Argos, c’est l’histoire d’une passion partagée:
C’est un réseau de compétences et d’expertises au service de la qualité des soins. C’est la garantie de confier la santé et le bien-être de l’animal à des équipes passionnées.

• Argos, c’est l’alliance de la compétence et de la proximité:
C’est la combinaison du savoir-faire médical et de la bienveillance. C’est la volonté constante d’offrir les meilleures solutions.

• Argos, ce sont des structures à taille humaine:
C’est l’assurance d’être écouté, compris, conseillé. C’est une relation privilégiée.

C’est guidé par ces engagements forts qu’aujourd’hui, nos équipes vétérinaires et Support participent activement au développement et à la réussite de cet objectif commun qui est de proposer une qualité de service vétérinaire la plus élevée possible à nos clients.
Location: Bordeaux, Paris, Lyon, Toulouse, Marseille, Nantes, Metz, Grenoble...

Name: IVC Evidensia España
Description:
IVC Evidensia es la compañía líder en prestación de servicios veterinarios en Europa. Nuestro grupo fue creado en 2011, y actualmente forman parte de él más de 2.500 clínicas repartidas en 22 países, con un equipo de más de 40,000 profesionales. 

Pese a nuestro crecimiento, mantenemos un enfoque personalizado, donde las clínicas mantienen su identidad, y así nos gusta que sea. Estamos orgullosos de ofrecer a nuestros equipos veterinarios todo el soporte necesario para que puedan concentrar sus esfuerzos en lo mas importante, una atención clínica de primer nivel y excelencia en el trato a quienes recurren a nuestros servicios.

Apostamos por un modelo de negocio sostenible, con nuestros profesionales en el centro de nuestras acciones, desarrollando a las personas como elemento clave de nuestra visión. 

Creemos en la flexibilidad, la autonomía y la responsabilidad como elementos básicos de nuestro trabajo y nos sentimos orgullosos de generar ese tipo de cultura en nuestro actual proceso de expansión en España y Portugal.

Name: The Eye Vet
Description:
The EyeVet is India's first and only speciality veterinary ophthalmology clinic that offers complete eye care for animals including consultations, diagnostic tests, advanced ophthalmic surgeries. The state-of-the art clinics have world class facilities including advanced operating theaters that are equipped beyond international norms.

It is also India’s pioneering Veterinary Ophthalmology Practice and Training Institute, which offers certificate courses and training programs  designed specifically for Veterinarians in Primary Practice that will help the Veterinarians in diagnosing and treating ophthalmic conditions.

Veterinary Ophthalmic Consultations & Surgeries | Veterinary Ophthalmology Practice & Training Institute

Name: Vetworks
Description: Vetworks is a dynamic team of independent poultry consultants providing technical support and hands-on trainings all over the world.

Name: Organización Colegial Veterinaria
Description:
La Organización Colegial Veterinaria (OCV) es el órgano de representación de todos los colegiados de veterinaria de España. Se fundó en 1980 y, desde entonces, se ha constituido en foro permanente de opinión y encuentro entre los profesionales y la sociedad española, órganos de la Administración y organismos internacionales.

La OCV está integrada por los 52 Colegios Provinciales, por los Consejos Autonómicos y por el Consejo General de Colegios Veterinarios, que a su vez forma parte de la Unión Profesional que reúne todos los Consejos Generales de Colegios Profesionales.

A través del Consejo General, la veterinaria española está también presente en los organismos internacionales, tales como la Asociación Mundial Veterinaria, la Federación de Veterinarios Europeos, la Asociación Europea de Veterinarios Oficiales, etc., así como en los distintos Comités de la Unión Europea.

Name: AlchemyPet Medicina Diagnóstica Veterinária
Description: The company working on in the areas of Veterinary Clinical Analysis and Research and Development of new Veterinary Products. In addition, the company is the only company in Latin America to perform predictive testing in veterinary oncology. We work with an industry dedicated to developing new methods and new diagnostic solutions.

Name: Vetanco Brasil
Description:
A Vetanco é um laboratório veterinário internacional que vem desenvolvendo, fabricando e comercializando produtos inovadores para saúde e produção animal há 30 anos.

Presente em mais de 40 países, a Vetanco oferece produtos internacionalmente comprovados, controlados e seguros para a melhoria da produtividade e segurança agroalimentar, dentro dos padrões de qualidade necessários para alcançar os mercados mais exigentes.

Como referência internacional em aditivos e especialidades para o agronegócio, o portfólio de produtos da Vetanco é amplo e diversificado.

A Vetanco possui projetos de pesquisa da mais avançada tecnologia, tanto em seus laboratórios de P&D quanto em colaboração com centros de excelência em todo o mundo. A este respeito, destaca o seu novo laboratório de biotecnologia, a BV Science, sua aliança estratégica para a inovação com a empresa Dr. Bata (Hungria), e participação societária na empresa público-privada Bioinnovo criado no âmbito da nova Lei sobre Biotecnologia Argentina, em conjunto com o INTA.

Name: GoodVets
Description:
GoodVets is a leading modern veterinary care platform purpose-built to revolutionize the animal care experience. Founded in 2016, GoodVets partners with entrepreneurial veterinarians to operate state-of-the-art care facilities in fast-growing markets. GoodVets’ mission is to reimagine today's animal care experience, empower veterinarians to become owners and deliver exceptional healthcare for pets.

Our Approach

Under GoodVets' leadership, veterinarians act as local hospital owners while benefiting from our significant resources and support. As an employer, we offer robust veterinarian and support staff mentorship, career development opportunities, attractive compensation packages, and much more. Our collaborative model enables veterinarians to focus on delivering premier medicine and leading their teams.

We currently operate more than 40 clinics across multiple markets in the US and will have over 55 locations by the end of 2024.

Name: NUZOA
Description:
Empresa Nacional líder en la distribución de productos y servicios de salud animal.
La propuesta de valor de Nuzoa está basada en la calidad del servicio, poniendo el foco en dar la mejor atención a veterinarios y productores, ayudándolos a impulsar su negocio, con un catálogo con más de 13.000 referencias, un equipo de 120 profesionales y con 4 principales líneas de negocio para cubrir todas las necesidades de los veterinarios; farmacológicos, equipamiento, fungibles y alimentación animal, tanto en animales de compañía como en ganadería.

Name: Allivet
Description: Allivet, a Tractor Supply Company, has been a trusted leader in pet pharmacy care since 1992. As part of the Tractor Supply family, we are a leading online pet pharmacy, partnering with veterinarians to enhance pet care. Our fully licensed pharmacy supports pet parents with prescription and over-the-counter medications, supplements, and wellness essentials sourced directly from manufacturers or authorized distributors to ensure safety and reliability.  Allivet provides unmatched value, convenience, and a shared commitment to your pet's well-being. We strive to complement veterinary care by providing easier access to medications and wellness essentials. Our AutoShip program simplifies pet care with automatic delivery, savings on each delivery, and prescription renewal reminders. Tractor Supply’s acquisition expands our reach to 37 million Neighbor's Club members, allowing us to support the "Life Out Here" lifestyle. Fast delivery, exceptional customer service, and competitive prices make Allivet a trusted Ally in Pet Pharmacy Care. With a robust e-commerce platform, Allivet delivers a vast selection of pet medications, parasite prevention, supplements, and more.  We are a best-in-class platform, excited to grow within Tractor Supply. Allivet also powers a market-pioneering PetRx-as-a-Service platform with marquee partners, such as the American Kennel Club (AKC), Fetch, GoodRx, PetSmart, Giant Eagle, and Blain's Farm & Fleet. As Allivet continues to grow, we remain a pet pharmacy at our core, driving innovation and setting new standards in pet health, ensuring every pet parent achieves the best possible long-term health outcomes for their beloved companions.

Name: A.L.P.H.A. Plus - Zoetis Sub-Saharan Africa
Description:
Zoetis Alpha Plus, in partnership with the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation, is dedicated to advancing veterinary care and diagnostic services to foster sustainable livestock production and improve rural livelihoods across Sub-Saharan Africa. Our A.L.P.H.A. Plus initiative, spanning from December 2022 to November 2027, focuses on key livestock species in the region: poultry, dairy and beef cattle, and aquaculture. 

We expand our reach into rapidly developing markets such as Kenya, Ivory Coast, and other African nations where population growth and the need for sustainable protein sources are greatest. 

Our mission is to integrate innovative solutions that ultimately enhance livestock health, productivity, and food security in the region.

Name: American Veterinary Group (AVG)
Description:
At American Veterinary Group (AVG), we are no strangers to growth. In 2023, we hit an exciting milestone: over 150 veterinary practices within our family of hospitals and a footprint that extends across 13 states. We continue to grow and leverage our infrastructure to empower veterinary practices and professionals by providing exceptional support for hospital operations, medical expertise, recruiting, training, marketing, finance, and human resource functions. In short, we serve to support our Family of Hospitals and we got here by caring, listening, and fostering genuine partnerships with each of our veterinary hospitals to empower their strength, expertise, and medical autonomy at the local level.

Today, we get to call the 2,300 hospital employees, including over 300 veterinarians and 125 home office support staff, our colleagues, mentors, and cheerleaders. Tomorrow will bring us even more growth in talent and expertise. And the best part? There’s room for you at the table to also grow and be supported if you join our team!

Name: Meu Pet Club
Description:
Somos uma empresa health pet com foco em bem-estar animal, que oferece tranquilidade para os tutores, por meio dos nossos planos de saúde para cães e gatos. 

Criado em 2018, o Meu Pet Club, uma startup curitibana, traz uma nova forma de cuidar da saúde pet que hoje conta com mais de 160 mil focinhos protegidos.

Aqui, valorizamos a sua liberdade e por isso trabalhamos com o método de reembolso, o que te dá autonomia e independência para levar o seu pet em qualquer clínica veterinária em todo o Brasil. E melhor ainda: sem burocracia para receber seu dinheiro de volta!

Acreditamos que o conceito de família vai além dos laços sanguíneos e por isso nos preocupamos com seu pet e enaltecemos as famílias multiespécies de uma maneira que nenhum outro já fez. Cuidar é o nosso propósito.
 
Prazer, somos o Meu Pet Club.
Protegemos a saúde dos pets facilitando a vida de quem cuida

Name: CityVet
Description:
CityVet empowers their veterinarians to provide their kind of care that follows their heart and honors their oath. 

CityVet has been vet founded, led, and owned for 25 years. We offer veterinarians the opportunity to own their own practice, while being surrounded by kindness, support, and having full autonomy to practice the best medicine for each individual patient. Delivering the right kind of care to both clients and team members is the reason we were voted #11 on Glassdoor's Best Small/Medium Companies to Work For in 2025.

Name: Purdue University College of Veterinary Medicine & Veterinary Hospital
Description:
The Purdue University College of Veterinary Medicine is one of only 30 veterinary schools in the United States and the only veterinary college in Indiana. Since the graduation of its first class of DVMs in 1963, the college has produced more than 3,000 veterinarians who now practice in all 50 states and fill important roles in government, industry and academia.  

The forerunner to the College was the Veterinary Science Department in the College of Agriculture, and the original structure that housed that department has been preserved and modernized and now houses one of the College's three academic departments, the Department of Comparative Pathobiology. The other two departments, Basic Medical Sciences and Veterinary Clinical Sciences, and the College's Veterinary Teaching Hospital (VTH) are located in Lynn Hall, which was completed in 1960 and expanded as part of a major addition in 1995. Adjacent to Lynn Hall is the Indiana Animal Disease Diagnostic Laboratory, which provides vital diagnostic services to veterinarians and animal owners. In 2000, a sculpture, "Continuum" by Larry Anderson, depicting the human-animal bond and the role of veterinary medicine, was installed and dedicated in front of the College.

Educational opportunities at the College are not limited to students seeking DVM degrees. The College also offers associate and bachelor's degrees in veterinary technology, as well as graduate and post graduate programs within its three academic departments. The Veterinary Technology Program was begun in 1975 and has graduated more than 900 veterinary technicians (AS-VT degree) and more than 250 veterinary technologists (BS-VT degree). Given Purdue University's standing as a major research university, the research roles of the Purdue Veterinary Medicine faculty bring innovative solutions to current and future problems in animal and human health.

Name: Empleo Veterinario
Description:
www.empleoveterinario.com

     Empleo Veterinario surge de la mano de veterinarios y psicólogos de recursos humanos, con el objetivo de subsanar la falta de unificación informativa en materia laboral en nuestro sector y con el propósito último de ejercer una mejora tangible en la situación del empleo veterinario en nuestro país. 

     Empleo Veterinario surge como el primer portal unificado y especializado en materia de empleo veterinario (tanto para veterinarios como para auxiliares) de tal forma que se facilite la búsqueda de empleo en un sólo lugar, se garantice el cumplimiento de la legislación de las ofertas publicadas, velando por la transparencia informativa, y se realice una cobertura personalizada de los puestos pudiendo aconsejar rangos salariales o de experiencia a los empleadores para facilitar el ajuste del mercado laboral. Así mismo, facilitamos el acceso informativo a nuestros veterinarios y auxiliares a través del envío semanal de las ofertas de empleo a su correo electrónico y difusión en redes sociales.

     Por otra parte, Empleo Veterinario invierte el concepto de búsqueda de empleo aproximándolo al resto de la comunidad europea, activando los mecanismos de búsqueda pasiva. Es decir, los candidatos pueden optar a que su perfil sea enviado de manera automática a aquellas ofertas que encajen con su perfil y con sus requisitos laborales, de tal forma que sin buscar empleo de forma activa, les realicen ofertas constantemente. 

    Asimismo, Empleo Veterinario aporta a los candidatos veterinarios asesoramiento personalizado en materia de empleabilidad, derechos laborales, gestión de carreras profesionales, redacción de CV, realización de entrevistas....etc.

    Por último, Empleo Veterinario considera crucial la internacionalización del veterinario, y para ello estamos cerrando acuerdos con los principales empleadores en Reino Unido y Francia para poder cubrir sus puestos de trabajo con veterinarios españoles.

Name: Mon Véto
Description:
Créé en 2010 par des vétérinaires, le groupe Mon Véto est un réseau de cliniques vétérinaires généralistes.

Il s’est historiquement développé en Normandie puis s’est étendu en Ile-de-France et en Bretagne.

En 2021, Mon Véto s’agrandit avec l’acquisition de nouvelles cliniques dans les régions : Hauts de France, Pays de la Loire, Grand – Est, Centre Val de Loire, Auvergne – Rhône Alpes, Bourgogne-Franche Comté et Provence Alpes Côte d’Azur.

Le groupe en quelques chiffres :
Près de 300 cliniques vétérinaires
Plus de 2000 vétérinaires et ASV ont rejoint Mon Véto.

Name: SKS Veterinary Hospital
Description:
SKS Veterinary Hospital is proud to be India's leading chain of multi-specialty pet hospitals, delivering world-class veterinary care since 2003. With a network of over 14 state-of-the-art branches across Chennai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Visakhapatnam, Coimbatore, Trichy, Tiruppur, Hosur, and Thiruvananthapuram, SKS Veterinary Hospital is committed to excellence for pets and their families.

Our comprehensive centers of excellence include Cardiology, Orthopaedic Surgery, Dermatology, Ophthalmology, Radiology, Dental Care, Laboratory Services, and more. Each facility is equipped with the latest diagnostic tools and advanced surgical suites - ensuring precision, safety, and swift recovery.

We are home to a highly qualified team of veterinarians and surgeons, including Dr. V. Arun (Founder & Chief Consultant, Dermatologist), Dr. Anandraj (Orthopedic Consultant & Surgeon) and many other expert consultants, with decades of experience in small animal medicine and surgery. SKS Veterinary Hospital doctors are recognized for compassionate care and a commitment to advancing pet health through evidence-based medicine and continuous innovation.

Beyond Immunization and routine treatments, our hospitals offer emergency care, in-patient intensive care, preventive wellness programs, pet boarding, professional grooming (routine and medicated baths). Our in-house pharmacies provide prescription diets, flea/tick solutions, and trusted heartworm preventatives. We also have an in-house pet shop, offering a curated selection of quality pet foods, treats, toys, accessories, and daily essentials - making each branch a true one-stop destination for your pet’s health, happiness, and well-being.

At SKS Veterinary Hospital, every experience is patient-centered: from a calming clinic environment to personalized follow-up care - your pet’s physical and emotional well-being guide everything we do.

Name: Davies Veterinary Specialists
Description:
Davies Veterinary Specialists is part of Linnaeus Veterinary Ltd (A Mars Company). You can find our terms of use and privacy policy by visiting:
Privacy statement - https://www.mars.com/privacy 
Legal notice - https://vetspecialists.co.uk/legal-notice/ 
Contact Information - https://vetspecialists.co.uk/how-to-find-and-contact-us/

Name: Veterinary Growth Partners
Description:
Veterinary Growth Partners (VGP) is a membership organization for forward-thinking veterinary practices. Our number-one priority is improving your business processes. We give you the tools and resources you need to increase transactions and generate a higher average transaction charge. 

As a group of experienced consultants and advisors, we are pleased to offer our members a scalable proven process to help veterinary hospitals achieve their short term and long term goals. Together with our industry partners, we are committed to providing powerful resources that help you grow your revenue and profit. From savings on items you buy every day, to marketing tools that are new to the veterinary field, we do the leg work so that you don't have to. We also provide training programs and system templates to make practice management easier. 

Your membership in Veterinary Growth Partners gives you confidence that you are doing all the right things to tend to your business. Call 800-577-0120 or find us at vgpvet.com/contact for more information.

Name: Zenex Animal Health
Description:
With a rich legacy of nearly seven decades in serving Animal Health in India, Zenex Animal Health is the leading Indian animal health Company in Animal Healthcare industry in India. The company offers products for Large & Small Ruminants, Poultry and Companion Animals and is uniquely positioned as an organization which offers extensive range of products including herbal products. Zenex Animal Health enjoys a leadership position in many product segments in livestock and poultry healthcare.

The company keeps on exploring newer opportunities to serve the unmet needs of animal healthcare fraternity in India and has the credit of introducing one of the highest numbers of innovative & first to the market products. Zenex Animal Health has developed a first ever novel strain, Bacillus Siamensis ZMT02, for probiotic use in poultry. The Company has more than 800 research publications in leading national and international journals.
Zenex Animal Health has two state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities at Haridwar (Uttarkhand) and Baddi (Himachal Pradesh), dedicated to manufacture veterinary products for domestic and international markets.
With the help of its highly trained field force and wide distribution network, 
Zenex Animal Health provides solution based technical services to the dairy and poultry farming communities on various health issues and also to improve productivity.

Besides domestic prominence, the company has made significant strides in international business and with a focused approach exports to Asia, Africa, CIS, EU, LATAM, MENA regions.

For its decades of excellence and innovation in animal health care industry, the Company has been recognised with internationally acclaimed awards like S&P Global Animal Health Awards selected as “Best Company in the Rest of the World” in 2023 and ‘The Best Animal Health Company in India, Middle East & Africa by Animal Pharm (UK) in 2018, 2016 and 2015 and several national awards.

Name: BIO ZOO
Description:
BIO ZOO es una empresa Farmacéutica Biológica fundada en 1956 enfocada en generar valor a través de soluciones integrales en salud animal, contribuyendo al bienestar humano y del entorno.

Estas soluciones están basadas en procesos de innovación a través de un experto departamento de Investigación y Desarrollo en las áreas farmacéutica y biológica, que trabajan diariamente con las nuevas tendencias mundiales y en asociación con institutos de investigación nacionales e internacionales.

A través de sistemas de calidad y de mejora continua, BIO ZOO fabrica una amplia gama de productos tanto para animales de producción como para animales de compañía, focalizando esfuerzos en la prevención de enfermedades y la optimización del bienestar animal.

Así, BIO ZOO está presente a través de distribuidores y de un equipo propio en México y en Latinoamérica, consolidándose como un laboratorio veterinario que genera valor a sus socios comerciales en las distintas etapas de su cadena productiva y comercial.

Name: UrgentVet
Description:
UrgentVet is a whole new breed of pet clinic --- providing prompt, attentive care on a more convenient schedule.  Until now, if a pet was sick or injured outside of regular office hours, owners had two choices: pay a premium price at an emergency vet or wait for an appointment with their regular vet.  UrgentVet was created to fill the gap between these choices by offering a more affordable and more convenient alternative.  We provide prompt care for cases that aren't serious enough for an emergency vet, but are too pressing to wait for a scheduled appointment.

UrgentVet offers after-hours treatment for common pet illnesses and injuries --- just like an urgent care center for people.  We are open 3 p.m. to 11 p.m. on weekdays and 10 a.m. to 8 p.m. on weekends, when traditional veterinary hospitals are closed.  We provide immediate relief for dogs and cats with ailments such as post-operative incision complications, minor wounds, ear infections, mild vomiting and diarrhea, and numerous urgent but non-life threatening conditions.  When a pet is sick or injured, owners simply drop in --- no appointment necessary!  UrgentVet costs less than the emergency vet and there's no need to miss work to see the regular vet the next business day.

We accept referrals from other veterinarians, and we will provide owners and referring vets with clear and concise discharge instructions.  Remember, your pet can't wait to feel better!

Name: International Veterinary Students' Association
Description:
The International Veterinary Students' Association (IVSA) was founded in 1951 and exists to benefit the animals and people of the world by harnessing the potential and dedication of veterinary students to promote the international application of veterinary skills, education and knowledge.

IVSA is the largest veterinary student organization in the world with approximately 40 000 members.

Name: Clinicas Veterinarias Wecan
Description: Clínicas Wecan es una red de clínicas veterinarias asociadas en España que busca aplicar el esfuerzo común para mejorar los resultados de las clínicas otorgando una atención exquisita al paciente y al cliente dentro de los más altos estándares de calidad en el servicio veterinario.

Name: La Compagnie des Animaux
Description:
La Compagnie des Animaux c'est un jeune groupe en pleine croissance dédiée à la santé animale : Le 1er site Français de vente de produits vétérinaires.

Elle vend et expédie à travers le monde, via ses différents sites des produits destinées aux animaux allant de la nourriture aux accessoires en passant par les médicaments non soumis à ordonnance.

Créée en 2008 par un Vétérinaire, elle compte aujourd'hui plus 40 personnes en France et en Angleterre

Le Groupe la Compagnie des Animaux, c'est 4 sites de E-commerce : Dogteur.com, Lacompagniedesanimaux.com, Dogtor.vet, Dogtore.it et un blog.

Name: MI:RNA Diagnostics
Description: MI:RNA Diagnostics have developed a novel early disease detection technology for the veterinary market that uses microRNA biomarkers to accurately identify if disease is present, through blood sample analysis. By combining this method with an artificial intelligence learning model to enable interpretation, they have adopted a true precision medicine approach. Paving the way, they hope, for many other innovative solutions in this field. It is their mission to reduce disease through research and innovation, resulting in a cascade of ethical, environmental, and economic benefits.

Name: SAVC - South African Veterinary Council
Description: The South African Veterinary Council (SAVC) is the veterinary statutory body in South Africa, with powers and functions for the registration of persons practising in the veterinary and para-veterinary professions. The SAVC has legal authority over the practising of veterinary and para-veterinary professions, and for matters connected with those professions.

Name: Movora
Description: Movora is a global company focused on the advancement of animal health. Rooted in veterinary orthopedics, Movora’s foundation is built on three decades of advancements in animal mobility. Movora utilizes legacy expertise to deliver a broad range of innovative products by bringing together key leaders in veterinary medical technology to deliver progressive solutions. Movora embodies a philosophy of always caring. Anticipating consumer needs and offering reliable solutions, alongside education, provide our customers value beyond product. Movora is proudly forward thinking. We prioritize reinvention, individuality, and always making the next leap in innovation.

Name: VIP Petcare
Description:
We provide pet parents with the highest quality preventive veterinary care and wellness services to ensure your pet is healthy year-round.

The best way to ensure your pet lives a healthy, happy life is to take a proactive approach to their health and wellness. Every animal has unique needs, so we offer a variety of ways for you to get necessary, non-emergency care that’s right for you and right for them.

Our Wellness Centers are permanent clinic locations within our partners’ retail stores. These clinics offer annual wellness and minor medical service options for your pet, including physical exams, vaccinations, ear and eye flushes, nail trims, skin scrapes, health panels, and more. Look to see if a Wellness Center is available in your area.

With thousands of locations across the country, our pop-up Community Clinics can be found within local pet and retail stores right in your neighborhood. Each clinic operates during designated days and hours throughout the month. Use our easy location finder to see nearby clinic locations, then bring your pet in during the hours posted. Services may vary by location.

Name: SANUT
Description:
Desde 1987, SANUT apoya el desarrollo agropecuario de República Dominicana, distribuyendo en el país productos de alta calidad para la nutrición y salud animal. Además de suplir a sus clientes con las reconocidas marcas que representa, les ofrece asesoramiento técnico especializado.

Apoyados en la filosofía de que la unión hace la fuerza, SANUT, junto a sus clientes, productores, autoridades gubertamentables y la comunidad, ha sido líder del crecimiento y fortalecimiento del sector de los agronegocios.

Hoy en día, su experiencia, conocimientos y visión de sostenibilidad, ha llevado a la empresa a incursionar en brindar productos y servicios de manera responsable en distintos países del mundo.

Nuestra misión es ser integradores de soluciones para el mundo de los agronegocios, de modo que nuestros clientes puedan aumentar su rentabilidad, tecnificación y desarrollo, ofertando productos y servicios de óptima calidad, basados en la innovación y el valor del capital humano.

Name: PetWell Partners
Description: We founded PetWell Partners with the deep belief that pets deserve high-quality medical care and that their families should always be well-informed. We are a growing veterinary company with multiple clinics in the Houston, TX, Dallas/Fort Worth, TX , Portland, OR, Virginia, and Arizona areas. Our clinics offer competitive compensation, benefits, career advancement opportunities, and a positive culture.

Name: HawkCell
Description:
Engineered for Veterinary Imaging  - Optimized for Pets. Life-Changing for Vets. 

We focus on MRI & CT because they diagnose the hardest cases and change treatment decisions. Our vision is to standardize excellence in veterinary MRI and CT.

 Values —
Ambition • Trust • Innovation • Excellence • Grit

 Mission — 
Standardize excellence in veterinary MRI & CT.

 Products —
HawkAI & HawkCT: AI based on veterinary data, delivering faster scans with zero compromise on image quality; higher efficiency via automation that reduces specialist time, anesthesia duration, and energy use; and superior ROI through lower operating costs and new revenue opportunities. Built by engineers, data scientists, PhDs, and veterinarians, our systems embed best practice into every workflow so any site can perform at a referral-center level—consistently, safely, and sustainably. We don’t just build imaging tools; we elevate clinical outcomes and the economics of care.

HawkSpine: The first veterinary MRI & CT positioning system for precise, safe animal placement in ~2 minutes. It replaces ad-hoc aids (sandbags/foam/tape), adapts from kittens to German Shepherds via width adjustments and a hammock, cuts scan time and anesthesia, and saves staff time; delivering consistent, reproducible positioning across teams.

We are consolidating our presence in Europe and expanding to the US & Asia. Today, HawkCell is the only player offering augmented MRI solutions with strategic partnerships with leading MRI manufacturers.

 Don’t miss the shift; lead it: hawkcell.com.

Name: Puro Trato Nutrição Animal
Description:
Envie seu currículo para curriculo@purotrato.com.br

A Puro Trato é uma empresa gaúcha especializada em nutrição animal. As rações, concentrados e suplementos minerais que produz são comercializados e reconhecidos na região sul do Brasil pela sua alta qualidade nutricional.
A fábrica da Puro Trato está localizada na cidade de Santo Augusto, considerada uma das maiores produtoras de grãos do RS, ou seja, os produtos Puro Trato são elaborados com os melhores grãos, conferindo produtos de altíssima qualidade devido sua excelente matéria-prima.
A empresa atua no mercado há mais de 20 anos, sendo considerada hoje uma das líderes em produção de rações em alguns segmentos animais. Atualmente produz mais de 130 produtos registrados no Ministério da Agricultura, oferecendo uma linha completa de rações, concentrados e suplementos minerais para todas as fases de desenvolvimento de espécies como equinos, bovinos, ovinos, suínos, aves, roedores, cães, gatos e peixes.
Apresenta uma equipe de colaboradores altamente qualificada, fazendo a diferença nos diversos setores da empresa. Atende seus clientes com eficiência e rapidez, já que possui 80% da frota própria para o transporte dos produtos, possibilitando assim uma logística diferenciada.
Para atender um mercado cada vez mais exigente, a empresa está em constante investimento em tecnologia de produção, desenvolvendo produtos inovadores para animais de alta performance.
Location: Santo Augusto, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Hill's Veterinary Network AU & NZ
Description:
Hill’s Pet Nutrition Veterinary Network is a place for vets and vet nurses across Australia and New Zealand to connect and learn more about the veterinary profession. Work that matters, fuelled by a passion for pets!

Since 1948, Hill's Pet Nutrition has supported the Veterinary Profession globally. We continue to invest in customised programs for vets and vet nurses to enhance their nutrition knowledge and skills, to help ensure the best patient care is delivered to every pet, every time.

Through this page, those who believe in feeding scientifically researched, complete, and balanced pet food can network and share ideas. You will also find interesting and entertaining veterinary related content and news. 

We invite you to learn more about Hill’s Pet Nutrition below:  
www.Hillsvet.com.au
www.Hillsvet.co.nz
www.Hillspet.com.au
www.Hillspet.co.nz

https://www.facebook.com/HillsVetCommunity
https://www.facebook.com/groups/HillsVetAuNz/
https://www.facebook.com/HillsVetNurse/

Name: IDEXX LABORATORIES LIMITED
Description: IDEXX LABORATORIES LIMITED is a veterinary company based out of GRANGE HOUSE SANDBECK WAY, WETHERBY, United Kingdom.

Name: P3 Veterinary Partners
Description:
We are a veterinary practice group that connects Pets, People, and Practice to help you offer unparalleled care in your community. Our Canada-wide, community-based practices enjoy the resources and capabilities of a large company combined with the personality and flexibility of an independently owned hospital. P3 Veterinary Partners serves communities across Canada, providing high standards of veterinary health care in Western Canada, the Prairies, and Central and Atlantic Canada.

We are pet focused. We do what is best for the pet. We are there when our patients need us.

We value our clients and community. We provide exceptional client service and create positive, memorable experiences. We are action and solution oriented. We are transparent and explain procedures and care options in terms clients understand. We develop lasting relationships with our clients and support the care of their pets together. We are active in and give back to our community.

We act as one team. We combine our efforts to achieve common goals. We perform through teamwork and are supportive of each other’s well-being.

We value respect. We are relationship oriented, thoughtful, and accountable. We honour and promote diversity and inclusion.

We value honesty. We are constructive and truthful. We are trusting and trustworthy, making decisions confidently based on facts.

We value collaboration and continuous improvement. We collaborate, learn, and strive to be better together every day. We proactively seek out opportunities to improve in medicine, business, and patient, client, and team experiences.

For career or partnership opportunities, or to learn more about how we facilitate a connection between Pets, People, and Practice, visit www.p3vetpartners.ca. With our growing family of hospitals across Canada, there’s always a new opportunity with P3 for DVMs, RVTs, and hospital managers.

Name: Vets Beyond Borders
Description:
Vets Beyond Borders is an Australian-based, non-profit organisation established by veterinary volunteers in 2005. We work towards creating a world of better health for animals and people.

Mission
A world of better health for animals and people.

Company Overview
We are an Australian based, non-profit, established by veterinary volunteers in 2003.

Description
Vets Beyond Borders co-ordinates and runs veterinary based animal welfare and public health programs in developing communities across the globe. Our current projects are focused around the Asia and Pacific regions including local programs within Australia.

Name: Vimian Group
Description: Vimian is a global animal health company covering four essential and rapidly evolving areas: Specialty Pharma, MedTech, Veterinary Services and Diagnostics. At Vimian, we believe that every animal deserves the best available care. We bring pioneering and entrepreneurial businesses together to make the market’s most innovative offerings accessible to more animal health professionals and pet owners. Headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden, Vimian reaches over 17,000 veterinary clinics and laboratories, sells to over 80 markets, has 1,200 employees and annual revenues of approximately EUR 375 million. For more information, please visit: www.vimian.com.

Name: Vets online
Description: Vets online ist das exklusive, kostenlose Online-Portal für Tierärzt*innen und Tiermedizin-Studierende. Nur approbierte und immatrikulierte Tiermediziner*innen können die geschützte Plattform Vets-online.de nutzen. Hierzu ist eine einfache Registrierung nötig und wir schalten Sie zeitnah frei, sodass Sie alle Inhalte kostenlos einsehen können. Neben Fachartikeln und News aus der Tiermedizin sowie einer Community, gibt es eine große Jobbörse mit vielen spannenden Jobs in Klinik, Praxis und Industrie.

Name: Langford Vets
Description:
Langford Vets are the clinical teaching platform for the University of Bristol Veterinary School and provide both undergraduate and post graduate clinical training for vet and veterinary nursing students. We achieve this by delivering the full spectrum of care to all species, in both first opinion and Diploma led Specialist referral settings – our students learn their professional clinical skills by spending time in our practices and seeing outstanding care being delivered every day. Our commitment to career long learning for all our teams means that we are always at the forefront of innovation and development.

In addition to Equine, Farm Animal and primary care Small Animal practices, we have state of the art diagnostic laboratories and the largest team of Diploma level Veterinary Specialists in the Southwest in our Small Animal Referral Hospital. These facilities, and the expertise of our teams enable us to deliver the very best clinical care and client service for referring vets, clients and their animals, 24 hours a day and every day of the year.

Outstanding care, dedicated to learning

Name: Ortho-vet
Description:
Orthovet company is the first specialized veterinary orthopedic company in the middle east, that provide all small animal orthopedic implants and tools
OUR MISSION
To deliver the best orthopedic experience by providing the highest standard of care, comfort, education, and service. 
OUR VISION
 To provide the world's best orthopedic patient care, education and research , in Egypt & Middle est.
Our Goals 
Our patients come first2.We thrive on innovation and we embrace change
Research is fundamental to improving patient care.
Education enhances our profession and patient care

Name: The Ark Animal Clinic
Description:
Welcome to THE ARK Animal Clinic's LinkedIn Profile
Join Our Team and Make a Difference in Pet Care!
Who We Are:
THE ARK Animal Clinic, established in 2013, is a leading veterinary clinic with a commitment to excellence. Our journey began in Garden City, Downtown Cairo, and has since expanded to Dahab, South Sinai and Dubai, UAE.
Vision:
Our vision is to set the standard for high-quality veterinary care, guided by honesty, integrity, and professionalism.
Mission:
We provide comprehensive veterinary services, utilizing advanced technology and compassionate care to enhance pet well-being and ensure the best patient outcomes.
Why Choose THE ARK:
•	Cutting-Edge Care: We stay at the forefront of veterinary technology.
•	Animal Welfare: Our commitment extends to Trap-Neuter-Return (TNR) campaigns in Egypt and the UAE.
•	Community Engagement: We actively contribute to animal welfare through outreach and education.
•	Endless Growth: Join us for professional development and career advancement.
Your Future with Us:
At THE ARK Animal Clinic, you'll be part of a dynamic team dedicated to excellence in pet care. Make a meaningful difference in the lives of animals and their owners in a supportive and compassionate environment.
Explore Opportunities:
Follow our LinkedIn page for updates on veterinary medicine, pet care tips, and exciting career opportunities with THE ARK Animal Clinic.
Join us in our mission to provide outstanding care to pets and their families. Together, let's continue nurturing pets across continents, one paw at a time.

Name: Colegio Oficial de Veterinarios de Madrid
Description:
Con esta página pretendemos establecer otro canal de comunicación con todos los veterinarios, como con los ciudadanos interesados en lo que la Profesión Veterinaria les puede aportar en sus variadas facetas.

La veterinaria juega un papel fundamental en la vida de los ciudadanos, desde la salud y el bienestar animal, el control de las zoonosis, la seguridad alimentaria, la salud púbica y el medio ambiente

Los veterinarios necesitamos responder a las demandas de los ciudadanos y para ello actualizar nuestros conocimientos, siempre con una base científica, y para ello queremos compartir en esta página información de interés para profesionales y ciudadanos.

Name: Burtons Medical Equipment Ltd
Description:
Burtons Medical Equipment has been manufacturing, distributing and servicing a complete range of veterinary and medical equipment since the company was founded by Fred Burton in 1981
Now run by Fred’s son, David Burton, it has remained a company with family at its heart, keeping the core values of remaining a service based company its top priority.

Starting out as just a small company in Maidstone, Burtons began as a broad supplier and servicing company to private NHS hospitals & veterinary practices. The constant connection to vets and customer requests made it clear that the veterinary market would soon become the main focus, and there began one of the markets leading brands Burtons Veterinary Equipment. 

Manufacturing many of its key product lines at its principal facility in Staplehurst, Kent. whilst working closely with some of the world’s leading brands in medical and veterinary supplies Burtons is now one of the UK’s biggest and most respected suppliers of capital equipment to the Veterinary market. Fully backed by its own, nationwide, service and repair division.

Our extensive range of veterinary equipment and services now covers everything from anaesthesia to X-ray, with continuous expansion into new areas year on year.

Name: Laboratório Vitafort Industria e Comércio
Description: A Vitafort é a única com tecnologia de extração de aminoácidos e polipeptídeos provenientes de hidrólise de glândulas e órgãos animais para estimulação do metabolismo anabólico e controle das mastites em bovinos.

Name: Chair Poultry Health Sciences
Description: To encourage partnership with national and international industrial partners, universities, and research institutes focusing on poultry research and education.

Name: Tangerine Group
Description:
Tangerine is a successful, growing group of businesses based in the delightful seaside town of Lytham St Annes. We are a family business from Farming Roots.

We specialise in the manufacture and marketing of nutritional health products for farm, equine and companion animals.  

The Group consists of three divisions VetPlus – companion animals , Agri Lloyd, an agriculture focused unit and Mill Farm Sports Village a multi-purpose leisure complex incorporating a fully owned football club with associated facilities.

We are #TeamTangerine

Name: felmo
Description:
Unsere Mission - Die beste & modernste tierärztliche Versorgung für Haustiere.

felmo möchte Hunden und Katzen stressfreie & moderne medizinische Versorgung zukommen zu lassen. Wir glauben fest daran, dass einfühlsame TierärztInnen in Kombination mit moderner Technologie das Wohlbefinden unserer Vierbeiner steigern und bessere medizinische Versorgung ermöglichen. Als vertrauenswürdiger Partner für PatientenbesitzerInnen arbeiten wir tagtäglich daran, PatientenbesitzerInnen einfachen Zugang zu und Umgang mit Tiergesundheit zu ermöglichen. Unsere TierärztInnen sind dabei das Herzstück von felmo - sie kümmern sich täglich liebevoll um das Wohl vieler Fellnasen.

Wir bieten TierärztInnen planbare & flexible Arbeitszeiten, eine faire Vergütung mit zusätzlichen Benefits wie Privatnutzung des Firmenwagens und umfangreichen Fortbildungsbudgets. Die tägliche Arbeit wird mit eigens entwickelten Tools erleichtert und wir unterstützen unsere TierärztInnen und PatientenbesitzerInnen mit der einzigen volldigitalen Krankenakte datenbasiert bei einer optimalen Terminvorbereitung.

Wir legen größten Wert auf flache Hierarchien und Kommunikation auf Augenhöhe, weil das gemeinsame Ziel bessere medizinische Versorgung für Haustiere anzubieten nur im Team erreicht werden kann. Unsere TierärztInnen können sich daher in lokalen Teams organisieren, um fachlichen Austausch und soziales Beisammensein zu fördern. Unsere fachlichen Support-Teams in der Zentrale stehen bei Fragen tagtäglich zur Seite.

felmo sucht deutschlandweit nach talentierten TierärztInnen, für die das Tierwohl an erster Stelle steht und die an die Möglichkeit glauben, medizinische Versorgung grundlegend zu verbessern.
Interessiert?

Dann lerne uns kennen und überzeuge Dich davon, dass auch Du Teil des felmo Teams werden solltest

https://felmo.de/informationen-fuer-tieraerzte

Name: Brian's Bandages
Description: Established in 2021, Brian’s Bandages aims to share proper bandaging techniques with veterinarians, technicians and animal practices all over the world. The goal is simple; help our furry friends heal faster and keep them as comfortable and stylish as possible during their recovery. Consider supporting Brian's Bandages at https://www.patreon.com/briansbandages or https://www.briansbandages.com/bandagebuddies

Name: APC Europe
Description:
Who is APC Europe? 

We are the world’s largest manufacturer of Spray-Dried Plasma, Hydrolyzed Proteins and other High-Quality Proteins. Our main goal is researching and producing feed ingredients with the best quality to enhance health and animal nutrition.
APC Europe is part of the LGI Group and subsidiary of APC Inc. -Ankeny (Iowa).

 What APC Europe does?

At APC, we market, research and develop products principally derived from blood proteins based on customer need.  We efficiently procure and manufacture safe and effective products for use in animal, with a product line with nearly 20 different ingredients and complete end-user products. Our commitment is to improve:
     1 – Swine nutrition and production.
     2 – Pets welfare, as well as a homogeneous and palatable finished product.
     3 – Poultry nutrition and production.
     4 – Aquaculture production.
     5 – It can be used for industrial applications.  

 Why APC Europe?

Our more than 30 years of experience, together with the leadership at R & D, whose staff has published more than 500 peer-reviewed journal articles, abstracts, proceedings and articles relating to the efficacy and use of blood and plasma proteins, has make of APC a reliable Functional Proteins supplier of a large list of customers worldwide. In addition, APC's products are manufactured under severe quality controls and safety regulations.

APC is present around Europe with 6 production units in England, Northern Ireland, Poland and Spain.

Follow our profile and do not miss any updates or news.
#animalnutrition #apceurope #apcfunctionalproteins

You can find out more about APC Europe and it's Functional Proteins.


 info@apc-europe.com
 +34 938 615 060
 www.apcproteins.com

Name: Associated Veterinary Partners
Description: Associated Veterinary Partners or AVP is partnering with veterinary clinics throughout the United States. By partnering with AVP veterinarians retain ownership in their practices as well as complete clinical control. We bring operational know-how and shared services across a network of otherwise independent practices.

Name: Grupo Covepa
Description: Presentes en el mercado paraguayo desde 1998. El Grupo Covepa reúne a empresas comprometidas con la salud, nutrición, manejo y genética de animales de producción y de compañía.

Name: Camon Spa
Description:
Camon Spa è un’azienda specializzata nell'offrire prodotti e soluzioni per il benessere degli animali da compagnia. Il nostro maggior impegno è aiutare l'appassionato degli animali da compagnia ad occuparsi di loro con grande piacere e grandi risultati.
Lo Staff  Camon è formato da decine di persone giovani e motivate. L'entusiasmo e la professionalità della squadra sono gli elementi aggiuntivi con cui l’azienda costruisce giorno per giorno il proprio successo. 
Camon ha creduto fin da subito in una strada innovativa, sposando valori legati all'ecologia e alla naturalità per questo tutti i nostri prodotti sono concepiti per essere più possibile in sintonia con l’ambiente e l’animale. 
Lo stabilimento principale di Albaredo d'Adige è situato nella magnifica campagna veronese ed è dotato di modernissimi sistemi per l'ottimizzazione dell'energia e del riscaldamento. 
In pochi anni la solidità, la completezza dell'offerta e l'affidabilità Camon ha conquistato non solo il mercato italiano - del quale detiene una fetta importante - ma anche parte dei più importanti mercati europei.

Name: IVC Evidensia Portugal
Description:
IVC Evidensia é uma rede global líder na prestação de serviços médico-veterinários. Estamos presentes em mais de 2500 localizações, espalhadas por 20 países.

A independência clínica, a cooperação internacional e o investimento na formação contínua dos nossos profissionais com a vista à progressão das suas carreiras, são os elementos-chave da nossa missão.

Siga-nos através desta página para ficar a par das últimas novidades e posições em aberto não só em Portugal, como em todas as regiões onde a IVC Evidensia opera.

Name: Animal Health and Veterinary Laboratories Agency
Description:
The Animal Health and Veterinary Laboratory Agency (AHVLA) became the Animal and Plant Health Agency (APHA) on 1 October 2014 after merging with parts of the Food and Environment Research Agency to became one agency dedicated to animal, plant and bee health. This page is inactive. 
Please view the active APHA page here: https://www.linkedin.com/company/aphagovuk/

Name: UMN College of Veterinary Medicine
Description: The University of Minnesota College of Veterinary Medicine affects the lives of animals and people every day through educational, research, service, and outreach programs. Established in 1947, the University of Minnesota College of Veterinary Medicine is Minnesota’s only veterinary college. We are dedicated to the education of future and current veterinarians and biomedical scientists and the discovery of new knowledge and skills.

Name: Grup Gepork
Description:
Grup Gepork opera en el mercado de la veterinaria desde el año 1979. 
Inicialmente la empresa centró su actividad en la inseminación artificial porcina, de la cual fue la introductora en nuestro mercado.
 
Su vocación por orientarse al servicio al cliente hizo que se especializara en dos líneas de negocio diferentes: Gepork (1979), dedicada al sector ganadero de grandes animales, y Centauro (1992), orientada al servicio de distribución de productos zoosanitarios para clínicas veterinarias. 

Fue el resultado de ampliar la gama de servicios la que llevó la empresa a impulsar la línea Bionet (2005), con tres áreas relacionadas con la bioseguridad: control de plagas, gestión de residuos y laboratorio de análisis especializado.

Name: Multitrato - Nutrição Animal
Description: A Multitrato Nutrição Animal atende o mercado de todo norte e médio norte do Mato Grosso no setor de gado de corte e leite. A fábrica fica localizada no município de Matupá - MT e possui uma moderna planta industrial, garantindo assim um excelente controle na produção de seus produtos. Trabalhando sempre com matérias primas de qualidade, seus foco é adequar seus produtos ao sistema de produção dos clientes que são acompanhados de perto com profissionais experientes e capacitados.

We support veterinary ownership.

Suveto supports veterinary professionals with innovative opportunities to create a better veterinary future. We believe veterinary professionals should be empowered and equipped to take ownership of their professional growth, personal well-being and veterinary medicine.

Name: VANO GROUP
Description:
Welcome to Vano Group!
Vano Group is a leading specialist in poultry production, proudly serving as the distributor for the renowned Aviagen Ross308 and Hendrix-ISA breeds in Iraq. With a commitment to excellence in animal health, our subsidiary, Vanovet, is dedicated to providing top-quality veterinary products and vaccines. 
Located in Dubai, our regional base ensures that we offer comprehensive support to Vano Group distributors across the Middle East. Together, we strive to enhance the poultry industry through innovation, quality, and dedicated service. Join us as we shape the future of poultry production!

.

Name: Facultad de Veterinaria, Universidad de la República
Description:
La Facultad de Veterinaria de la Universidad de la República se fundó en 1903 con el propósito de incorporar a la enseñanza universitaria de nivel terciario la medicina veterinaria. Con el fin de formar profesionales en el área que participen en el fomento de la producción, la vigilancia de los alimentos de origen animal para salvaguardar la salud pública, así como también el cuidado de los animales domésticos y de compañía. 
La carrera de Doctor en Ciencias Veterinarias tiene una duración de cinco años y una carga horaria total de 4400 horas incluyendo el practicantado y la tesis de grado. La carrera cuenta con un título intermedio de Asistente Veterinario que se otorga al culminar el Ciclo Común Obligatorio, tiene una duración de cuatro años y una carga horaria total de 3400 horas. Al finalizar el Ciclo Común Obligatorio el estudiante deberá optar por una de las siguientes orientaciones: Medicina Veterinaria, Producción Animal  o Higiene, Inspección-Control y Tecnología de los Alimentos de origen animal. 


Facultad de Veterinaria, Universidad de la República 
Alberto Lasplaces 1550 1620 
www.fvet.edu.uy 
comunicacion@fvet.edu.uy

Name: Vet Practice Magazine
Description:
What is Vet Practice?
You’ve spent years learning all you can about veterinary science. But being a practising vet in the real world throws up problems that you’re not always prepared for.
Vet Practice’s content
“A magazine specifically for the veterinary community, Vet Practice will look at your profession, your world, your business and your life. We recognise veterinary science is a special profession and poses challenges in the real world that you aren’t always trained to overcome. We’ll be here to help you fill that knowledge gap.”
Rob Johnson, editor

Name: German Veterinary Clinic
Description:
The German Veterinary Clinic (GVC) was established by Dr Katrin Jahn in 2008.

Situated in Abu Dhabi, the capital of the United Arab Emirates, GVC has been providing outstanding veterinary care and associated services for cats, dogs and other small animals for over a decade.

We are very proud that GVC was the first clinic in the Middle East to be certified as an ISFM Gold Standard Cat Friendly Clinic, a standard of excellence that we have built upon since 2014.

As part of our ongoing business improvement and service excellence strategy, in 2019 GVC went Fear Fear. By investing in each member of the team to achieve the Fear Free Professional Certification we continue to demonstrate our commitment to delivering outstanding quality care for our patients and customers.

We believe that every pet is an individual and deserves to be treated with compassion, respect and professionalism. At GVC, we care as much as you do.
Your pet's welfare is our highest priority, we offer the highest standards of medical care and will treat your pet as we would our own. It is important to us that you and your animal feel comfortable and well looked after whilst in our care.

Name: Optimi S/A - Matriz RS
Description:
A Optimi é uma empresa moderna, focada no resultado e na excelência da execução de cada processo que envolve a distribuição de produtos veterinários de alta qualidade. 
Ao longo dos anos, nos preocupamos em observar o mercado e suas tendências, estando sempre atentos às necessidades de nossos clientes, e, baseados nestas informações, criamos nossas estratégias. Deste modo estamos crescendo, proporcionando satisfação e tendo a admiração de nossos clientes e do mercado veterinário.

Name: San Marco Vet
Description:
San Marco is one of the largest Veterinary Center in Europe, with an in-house world recognized Laboratory. 

San Marco is a specialized consultative centre that has personnel and state-of-the-art technologies for special investigation, and advanced therapeutic procedures. San Marco applies a patient-centered approach, with rigorous clinical method, systematic data collection, and data management since 1988.

It is an internationally recognized center for clinical research and education.

It offers several clinical training, residency programs, and research opportunities thought for veterinarians who wish to develop their veterinary skills, experience and knowledge by working under supervision in a multi-disciplinary, tertiary hospital or developing clinical and research skills.

Name: PETHELP
Description:
PETHELP - is complete veterinary care. Preventive veterinary packages and insurance for pets! The offer is available for every dog or cat owner and as an employee benefit for companies and corporations. 
Additionally, we can organise for your employees: 
- a PetDay event - specialist webinars e.g. with behaviourists, nutritionists, veterinarians 
- a pre-veterinary rescue demonstration 
If you are interested in the offer, please email us at kontakt@pethelp.pl or call 790 277 277.

Name: Grupo Nutrisal
Description:
Somos um grupo de pessoas em que acreditamos nos valores da empresa com dedicação e amor, compartilhado em um ambiente familiar, somos resultados da confiança e da força de cada um de nossos parceiros e clientes.

Atualmente o Grupo Nutrisal é composto por várias empresas, que agregam valores ao seu potencial no agronegócio. 

O Grupo Nutrisal quer inspirar colaboradores, clientes e parceiros a diante de qualquer desafio, quebrar paradigmas, acreditar na mudança, sair da zona de conforto para seguir em frente, fazendo diferente e levando qualidade em nutrição animal com presteza e respeito ao consumidor.

Name: Dr Milou
Description:
Dr Milou c'est le meilleur du soin sans bouger une oreille 

Dr Milou, c'est un service qui permet de prendre soin de son animal de compagnie sans avoir besoin de se déplacer :
- En prenant RDV avec un vétérinaire à domicile (Paris/Région parisienne, Lille, Rennes, Angers, Nantes, Bordeaux, Toulouse, Nîmes, Montpellier, Aix-en-Provence, Marseille, Toulon, Nice et Lyon pour le moment, mais d'autres ouvertures sont prévues !),

Nous sommes notés 5 étoiles sur Google par tous nos clients

Name: Toronto Wildlife Centre
Description:
Toronto Wildlife Centre (TWC) is a leader in the field of wildlife rescue, veterinary care, rehabilitation and education, providing a vital and unique service in Southern Ontario.

A registered charity supported primarily by donations, TWC has grown into Canada's busiest wildlife centre – since opening in 1993, hundreds of  thousands of people have received help on TWC’s Wildlife Hotline, and over 74,000 wild animals representing over 270 different species have been admitted for care.
 
TWC’s work is carried out by a small group of highly skilled paid staff, and several hundred dedicated volunteers working in all areas of the centre, from wildlife care to administration.

Name: Vilsan Veterinary Pharmaceuticals
Description: 1986'dan bugüne köklü marka mirası ve güncel yüksek üretim kapasitesiyle, Hasvet Pharma’nın güçlü ekosistem çatısı altında, veteriner hekimlerin günlük klinik ihtiyaçlarına, yetkin kadrosu tarafından kaliteli ürün yelpazesi ile hızlı ve etkili şekilde çözüm ortağı olarak hizmet sunan ve 25'den fazla ülkeye ihracaat gerçekleştiren yerli bir ilaç üreticisidir.

Name: AGROVET CHILE
Description:
Agrovet inició sus actividades en 1974, como laboratorio importador de productos biológicos. Fue responsable de la introducción del primer antiparasitario inyectable para bovinos en Chile, asi como la colocación del primer DIIO oficial a nivel nacional y la importación e introducción de la vacuna contra brucella abortus RB 51, entre otros desarrollos. Desde entonces ha sido un actor relevante en el rubro, aportando productos de calidad e innovación al servicio de la medicina veterinaria. Ha potenciado con éxito la introducción de alimento para animales menores, contando con licencias de los más prestigiosos productos especializados en nutrición para mascotas.

Con la adquisición de la división veterinaria de Lab. Chile en 2014, Agrovet cuenta con el más amplio portafolio de productos veterinarios, insumos y equipos de la más alta tecnología y confianza.
Agrovet cuenta con el respaldo del grupo Mathiessen.

Name: Vetspire
Description: Vetspire is an all-in-one, cloud-based practice management software built with a bold vision: to place medicine and clinical workflows at the heart of veterinary care. Unlike traditional platforms that prioritize billing over clinical needs, Vetspire was designed from the ground up to support veterinarians in delivering better, more efficient care. This innovative, medicine-first approach has made a clear impact, with Vetspire now trusted by veterinary practices across the country—from independent clinics to large enterprise groups.

Name: Vet Dynamics (UK) Ltd
Description:
Our business development consultants and supporting team have many years of practical and successful experience and expertise in veterinary practice development. Meet our team and find out how they can help your business.  Many veterinary practices have used our products and consultancy over the years to help grow and drive their businesses forward in a competitive market. 

We are looking to work with practices that really want to make a difference and commit to long-term change in the way they manage their practices....and themselves. We would recommend that you either attend one of our Veterinary Business Accelerator events to see what is possible in your practice or for a more bespoke solution you could engage one of our consultants for a Practice Performance Review. Individual management solutions are available in our Vet Dynamics Services section on our website.

www.vetdynamics.co.uk

Name: Blue Cross of India
Description:
Blue Cross of India - Embarking into our seventh decade in service to the voiceless.

Blue Cross of India (BCI) was registered as a society in 1964 with the aim to formalise what was already a fully functioning volunteer driven group that came together in 1959. As we enter our fifty eighth year of service to the voiceless, we stand tall amongst the most active animal welfare groups in India with hospitals, shelters, ambulance services and an active humane education programme.

Established in 1959 by Captain V. Sundaram, the Animal Welfare Board of India granted recognition to BCI in1966. Over the last five decades, BCI has grown to become one of the country's largest and most recognised animal welfare organisations.

BCI is the first of a new genre of organisations that looks after the welfare of all kinds of animals. BCI is home to cattle, dogs, cats, birds and scores of other species. We care for all street, community and wild animals (with permission from the forest department), that are orphaned, abandoned, old, injured, abused by cruel minds or physically disabled by speeding vehicles. 
Our activities include sheltering, adoption, in-patient and out-patient veterinary services, ambulances and facilities for animal cremations. BCI also works closely with other NGOs in Animal Welfare.

We were the first animal welfare organisation in India to get the Guide Star Platinum Seal of Transparency (something we have been accredited with since 2013-14). This recognition shows commitment to transparency, by providing up-to-date information, BCI allows potential donors and funders to make informed decisions on donations.

Name: Animal Rescue League of Berks County
Description:
The Animal Rescue League of Berks County is a charitable 501c3 organization caring for nearly 5,000 animals each year to help them find second chances in a new home or to help reunite them with their grateful owners. For more than 65 years, we’ve worked tirelessly to care for the sick, treat the injured, comfort the unwanted and protect the abused. Whether helping people in need keep their pets through surrender prevention programs, offering low-cost veterinary services and clinics, as well as outreach and education events throughout the county, our work goes far beyond the walls of the shelter.

We are open weekdays from 1-7 and from 12-5 on the weekends.

Name: XLVets
Description:
XLVets is a group of independently owned, progressive veterinary practices that work together to achieve the highest standards of veterinary care.
 
Spanning the length and breadth of the UK, XLVet member practices work together; sharing experience, knowledge, and skills in order to define and deliver the highest standards of veterinary practice, animal health, and productivity.
 
Founded in 2005, XLVets originated from a group of dynamic farm animal veterinary practices, who worked to create a model of how individual practices can work successfully in partnership. Following rapid growth, XLVets is also recognised nationally as a 'quality mark' for veterinary care; not only for livestock, but also in the fields of small animal and equine care.
 
The group also endeavours to source and supply the highest quality, best-priced medicines, equipment, and products.  XLVets also works alongside academic bodies, commercial research, and manufacturing companies; forging strong industry partnerships to place its member practices at the forefront of veterinary science.
Location: Newcastle Upon Tyne, Newcastle Upon Tyne

Name: Vetmedia
Description:
Vetmedia nace con la voluntad de ofrecer al veterinario videos de alta calidad realizados por especialistas de diferentes colegios europeos y americanos así como líderes de opinion en el sector.

Vetmedia garantiza el rigor científico de todos los videos y apuesta por la calidad en la realización de los mismos.

The international site of reference on veterinary medicine and animal production.

Poultry farming - Pig farming - Ruminants - Aquaculture

(published in Spanish and English)

The company was founded in 2012 with the main objective of offering rigorous and scientific information on veterinary medicine and animal production. Our content department regularly produces news, articles, and posts with scientific and technical updates on poultry, swine, ruminants, and aquaculture. In addition, universities, associations, congresses, and companies collaborate in the content for the website.

Name: Southfields Veterinary Specialists
Description:
Southfields Veterinary Specialists (formerly VRCC) provides outstanding Specialist veterinary care. We accept referrals in Medicine, Surgery, Oncology, Orthopaedics, Neurology, Feline Medicine and Cardiology, as well as offering the most advanced cancer treatment available for dogs and cats. We are passionate about ensuring the best possible outcome and the highest standards of care for pets, their owners and their referring vets. Our multi-disciplinary team are dedicated to providing 24-hour veterinary and nursing care for our patients. 

Our services include: 
•	RCVS, European and American Specialist-led teams
•	Radiotherapy delivered by linear accelerator – one of the few facilities in Europe where this treatment is available
•	Continuous investment in our team, our facilities and our equipment enabling us to provide exceptional levels of expertise and treatment options
•	A commitment to excellence in every aspect of our service.

Southfields is part of the Linnaeus Veterinary Ltd (A Mars Company). You can find our terms of use and privacy policy by visiting: 
Privacy statement - https://www.mars.com/privacy
Legal notice - https://www.southfields.co.uk/legal
Contact Information - https://www.southfields.co.uk/contact

Name: Radimal
