SOLUCIONES VETERINARIAS S.A.C. R.U.C. 20504973990

Name: University of Glasgow School of Biodiversity, One Health and  Veterinary Medicine
Description:
The University of Glasgow’s School of Biodiversity, One Health and Veterinary Medicine is renowned for teaching, research and clinical provision, and attracts students, researchers and clinicians from around the world. The internationally accredited school provides expert referral services via the Small Animal Hospital, the Weipers Centre Equine Hospital and the Scottish Centre for Production Animal Health & Welfare alongside a full range of Veterinary Diagnostic Services for animal owners and referring practitioners throughout the UK and beyond. 

The School was founded in 1862 and is located on the 80 hectare Garscube campus at the northwest boundary of the city, four miles from the University’s Gilmorehill campus.  The School of Veterinary Medicine has a 190 hectare commercial farm and research centre at Cochno, 15 minutes from Garscube (5 miles north).

The School has approximately 200 staff (academic, research and support) with 60 research students (including clinical scholars) and 700 undergraduate students.

In the 2014 UK-wide Research Excellence Framework (REF2014), Glasgow’s veterinary and animal health research activity was ranked top amongst the UK veterinary schools for research quality with an outstanding contribution to societal impact globally. 

In the 2016 National Student Survey, the School of Veterinary Medicine was voted number 1 in the UK for Veterinary Science.

The School was ranked 1st in the UK for Veterinary Medicine in the Complete University Guide 2020 for the second consecutive year.

Name: Virtual Veterinary Specialists
Description:
Using the latest technologies, we are helping veterinary professionals to raise the standards of veterinary care.

Our secure and user-friendly digital platform makes it possible to have real-time live interactions with Veterinary Specialists, enabling you to access specialist knowledge and advice for your patients wherever and whenever you need it.

Improve your knowledge and skills through working up your own cases under the real-time live guidance of our Specialists - from interactive case discussions to real-time live consultations and guided case work-ups. 

Our solution is convenient and cost effective for your clients and less stressful for your patients, as they remain in the familiar surroundings of your clinic.

VVS is your multi-disciplinary Virtual Referral Service, shaping the future of Specialist Veterinary Healthcare.

Name: ECO Linha Veterinária
Description:
Linha Veterinária | SD Biosensor ECO Diagnóstica
Tecnologia e confiança a serviço da saúde animal.

Name: Laboratorios ERMA
Description: Somos un laboratorio farmacéutico colombiano especializado en la fabricación y distribución de productos de la más alta calidad para el sector veterinario.

Name: Wilson Vet Co.
Description:
We believe poultry and the people who care for them deserve professional services delivered with compassion and common sense.

Wilson Veterinary Company offers fresh input and access to veterinary and technical advice to pursue the best that commercial poultry flocks can provide, as we believe that birds ultimately hold the keys to success. We succeed in finding the best that birds can achieve through unique diagnostic approaches and consistent and standardized field methods. Wilson Vet. Co. satisfies customer needs through full-service unbiased technical support, hands-on integration with production teams, and information-based decision making.

Name: Animal Jobs Direct
Description:
Animal Jobs Direct was established in 2003 by experienced animal care and welfare professionals who have a thorough understanding of the current companion animal care, wildlife, conservation and animal charity sectors.
Our small team of experts are passionate about animal welfare and we are dedicated to improving standards in animal care and welfare through education.

In collaboration with employers in the animal care and welfare sector, we have developed a unique range of Certificate and Diploma courses. Our courses have been designed to raise standards of care for animals as well as broaden career options for anyone wanting to work with animals.

Animal Jobs Direct is an approved IIQ NCFE  training centre. Our tutors and course writers are experienced animal care professionals, experts in their field, passionate about animal care and welfare and accredited by NCFE. We are also approved and accredited by LANTRA and ABC Awards, all national awarding bodies.

We have students in over 42 countries worldwide and are proud to be the market leader in animal care and welfare training.

We have combined our specialised animal welfare knowledge with recruitment expertise and now offer employment opportunities to our students via the Animal Jobs Direct Job Board where candidates can upload their CVs and search for the latest jobs worldwide.

Name: Pride Veterinary Referrals
Description:
Pride Veterinary Referrals is a Derby-based veterinary referral hospital, offering a multi-disciplinary and specialist-led referral service to referred pet owners in the Midlands area. 

Our hospital facilities include an advanced imaging suite:
•	16 slice CT
•	1.5T MRI
•	Digital Radiography
•	Fluoroscopy
•	Separate Cardiology and Abdominal Ultrasound
We have 5 large operating theatres, Endoscopy, Radioiodine Suite, Chemotherapy Suite, ICU, Isolation Wards, Separate Dog and Cat Wards and a large Prep Area, which is central to the hospital.

Our referral services include:
•	Soft Tissue Surgery
•	Internal Medicine
•	Orthopaedic and Spinal Surgery
•	Neurology
•	Ophthalmology
•	Dermatology
•	Cardiorespiratory Medicine
•	Diagnostic Imaging
•	Anaesthesia and Pain Management
•	Physiotherapy and Hydrotherapy

Our Diplomate-led referral services are supported by a highly experienced and qualified Veterinary Nursing Team.

Name: Laboratório INNO
Description:
INNO is the leading reference laboratory for veterinary diagnostic services in Portugal. Since 2007, we have partnered with veterinary professionals, combining cutting-edge technology with expert knowledge to deliver the highest standards of diagnostic accuracy.

With over 4 million analyses performed, we provide reliable, rapid and personalized support tailored to the evolving needs of the veterinary community. Our commitment goes beyond delivering results and ensures they translate into diagnostic confidence for optimal patient care.

Built by veterinarians, for veterinarians, we are dedicated to advancing veterinary medicine through innovation and scientific excellence.

Name: CHV OnlyVet
Description:
Le CHV OnlyVet est une structure pluridisciplinaire regroupant des vétérinaires spécialistes et des vétérinaires en exercice référé exclusif.
Dotée d’un plateau technique performant et d’une équipe de soins compétente, OnlyVet vous garantit une prise en charge optimale pour les animaux de compagnie.
Le CHV OnlyVet vous propose des consultations et interventions en médecine interne, oncologie, cardiologie, dermatologie, allergologie, neurologie, chirurgie, orthopédie, arthroscopie, chirurgie mini-invasive et orl.
Un service d’imagerie est en place équipé du matériel suivant : Scanner haute définition, échographie et radiographie.

Name: Intracare India
Description:
We believe in smart, safe alternatives that contribute to a better future for everyone involved. We improve the health and well-being of plants, animals and consumers. Our innovative strength creates sustainable growth and financial returns for farmers and businesses. 
 
Intracare SEA supplies proven and effective veterinary medicines, biosecurity, hygiene products, nutrients and innovations for sustainable and modern intensive livestock farming, horticulture and aquaculture.  

Intracare’s state-of-the-art R&D department develops solutions for the challenges of tomorrow. Our products help achieve sustainable growth and reduce the use of antibiotics and pesticides and that makes us pioneers in future-proof solutions.

Name: iM3 | Veterinary Dentistry
Description:
iM3 is a family owned veterinary Dental Company established in Sydney Australia over 28 years ago. In that time, iM3 has grown to become a leading veterinary dental company setting the standard in product innovation, industry firsts and continuing education.

From its three locations in Sydney Australia, Vancouver WA, USA and Co Meath , Ireland (Europe), iM3 supplies veterinarians throughout the world with high quality yet affordable veterinary dental products.

iM3 continues to design, develop and manufacture the latest veterinary dental machines, instruments, X-rays and dental consumables. Our large involvement in CE throughout the world means the people responsible for the development of new products also know how to use them.

iM3 prides itself on providing the best possible after sales and customer technical support in the industry. Our dental only focus and the fact that iM3 manufacturers its own dental machines at our three locations means you are dealing with knowledgeable / experienced people who can offer you sound advice. You can have confidence knowing that leading dental specialist worldwide use and recommend iM3 products.
The iM3 name is your guarantee of quality veterinary specific dental products coupled with the very best after sales support and warranty in the industry. Discover the difference!

Name: AniCura Valencia Sur Hospital Veterinario
Description:
El Hospital clínico veterinario AniCura Valencia Sur ofrece un servicio integral de especialidades veterinarias dedicadas a casos referidos y urgencias 24 horas. 

En los últimos años se ha consolidado como un centro de referencia en la investigación de alternativas médicas quirúrgicas. Esto se debe a que su equipo lo conforman reputados profesionales expertos en técnicas pioneras que aportan su experiencia adquirida en hospitales de Europa y Estados Unidos para resolver los casos más complicados. Enfocado al diagnóstico, manejo médico y quirúrgico de las distintas especialidades; el hospital ofrece un amplio servicio en estrecha colaboración con todos los compañeros remitentes.

Name: Sanex Comércio e Indústria Veterinária
Description:
A SANEX Comércio e Indústria Veterinária Ltda opera por meio de duas unidades de negócios sinérgicas: SANEX Saúde Animal e SANEX Saúde Ambiental.

A unidade de negócio Saúde Animal é responsável pela pesquisa, desenvolvimento, produção, comercialização e assistência técnica das linhas de produtos: adsorventes de micotoxinas, eletrólitos e vitaminas efervescentes, nutracêuticos, acidificantes, ácidos orgânicos e antibióticos.

A unidade de negócio Saúde Ambiental é responsável pela pesquisa, desenvolvimento, produção, comercialização e assistência técnica das linhas de produtos: inseticidas domissanitários, rodenticidas domissanitários, inibidores de crescimento de insetos, bioinseticidas domissanitários, acessórios e equipamentos para controle de pragas e vetores de importância em saúde veterinária e saúde pública.

Name: Istituto Zooprofilattico Sperimentale del Piemonte, Liguria e Valle d'Aosta
Description:
l'Istituto Zooprofilattico Sperimentale del Piemonte, Liguria e Valle d'Aosta fornisce prodotti e servizi per difendere la salute del cittadino attraverso la sicurezza degli alimenti e la salute degli animali che li producono.

The Veterinary Medical Research Institute for Piemonte, Liguria and the Valle D’Aosta (IZS) supplies products and services for safeguarding public health, through control programmes for food safety and animal health.

Name: Pet Blood Bank UK
Description: We support vets by providing a blood service for pets, just like the one we have as humans. We run donation sessions across the country where owners bring their much loved companions to give blood. The blood is taken to our processing centre in Loughborough where it is separated into different products. It is then stored and sent out to vets when they need it. We operate 24 hours a day, seven days a week, to ensure blood is always available.

Name: AniCura Portugal
Description:
A AniCura é um prestador de cuidados veterinários líder na Europa. A nossa empresa nasceu da filosofia de que a partilha de recursos pode criar oportunidades para melhores cuidados e resultados veterinários. 

Os nossos serviços incluem uma vasta gama de serviços médicos de alta qualidade que abrangem cuidados de saúde preventivos e básicos, bem como cuidados especializados, incluindo diagnósticos avançados, medicina interna, cuidados intensivos, cirurgia e ortopedia. Também prestamos serviços de reabilitação, fisioterapia e aconselhamento dietético e oferecemos alimentos e produtos de cuidados seleccionados para animais de estimação.

A rede da AniCura inclui 500 clínicas em 17 países da Europa, proporcionando mais de 4,5 milhões de consultas de alta qualidade a animais de estimação todos os anos. A AniCura faz parte da Mars Veterinary Health desde 2018. A Mars Veterinary Health é composta por uma rede de mais de 3000 clínicas em todo o mundo que cuidam de mais de 25 milhões de animais de estimação todos os anos. Juntos, somos capazes de fornecer os mais elevados padrões de cuidados a animais de estimação e alcançar o nosso objetivo coletivo: UM MUNDO MELHOR PARA OS ANIMAIS DE ESTIMAÇÃO.

Legal: https://www.mars.com/legal-portugal
Privacy: https://www.mars.com/privacy-policy-portuguese

Name: XVET Germany
Description:
In XVET we are concerned about the future of the environment and the health of next generations. We work to offer an alternative and responsible solution which contribute to a safe and sustainable agriculture and improve the health of both animals and humans.

XVET feed and drinking water additives are GMP+ Certified and exported to about 40 countries worldwide.  Our vast range contains a series of natural based products that can be used as alternatives to Antibiotic Growth Promoters aiming to a create a better tomorrow. 

Learn more about us here: www.xvetgermany.com and here www.lessantibiotics.com

Name: Vetophonie
Description:
Vétophonie est un service de régulation des urgences vétérinaires 24h/24 et 7j/7. 

Vétophonie est un service créé par des vétérinaires pour des vétérinaires et géré exclusivement par des vétérinaires !

ECOUTER car nous sommes à l’écoute des problématiques de nos clients ; Au sein des entreprises vétérinaires la réponse téléphonique est la clé de voûte du système. Il est important d’y apporter le plus grand soin. Dans de nombreuses activités économiques, la délégation de la réponse téléphonique est une réalité depuis très longtemps. La profession vétérinaire commence à prendre ce chemin petit à petit. 
Nous sommes également à l’écoute des clients de nos clients : les propriétaires d’animaux ! Jour et nuit, nous leur offrons une oreille attentive et professionnelle et tâchons de comprendre leurs besoins et de les orienter.

COMPRENDRE ensuite car il nous faut traduire les problématiques de nos clients en solutions adéquates ; Est-ce de secrétariat « médical » avec prise de RDV de message etc dont ils ont besoin, ou de se délester de la réponse téléphonique aux heures de garde, tâche parfois difficile à assumer quand on travaille 60 à 70h / semaine…comprendre également les motifs d’appels des propriétaires, catégoriser l’urgence, rassurer…

ORIENTER, enfin, parce qu’une fois comprise la problématique de nos clients il nous faut leur proposer les meilleures solutions ; celles-ci se présentent sous la forme de différentes formules, de jour ou de nuit et parfois 24/24 ou bien, pour des besoins très spécifiques de solutions « à la carte ». Mais aussi orienter les patients, les animaux malades vers les bonnes structures de garde ou au contraire tranquilliser, rassurer pour patienter jusqu’au lendemain matin quand cela peut attendre.

Name: MentorVet
Description: MentorVet leverages evidence-based to empower veterinary professionals, creating a healthier profession for individuals and communities. Our flagship program, MentorVet Leap, for early-career veterinarians as well as our MentorVet Tech program for veterinary technicians provide a toolkit of resources including peer and paired mentorship, professional skills training, and mental health and financial coaching.

Name: Southeast Veterinary Neurology
Description:
Neurologists are veterinary specialists with expertise in conditions of the brain and spinal cord including seizures, intervertebral disk disease (IVDD or slipped discs), encephalitis, vestibular disease, atlantoaxial instability, lumbosacral stenosis, hydrocephalus, degenerative myelopathy and many others.  These conditions often require special training or equipment to accurately diagnose and treat. Veterinary neurologists are board-certified by the American College of Veterinary Internal Medicine specialty of Neurology.

Southeast Veterinary Neurology is a leader in veterinary neurology, neurosurgery and advanced imaging. We aim to provide the best service to our patients and their families.

Specializing in diseases of the brain, spinal cord and neuromuscular system, including seizures, paralysis and hind limb weakness, balance disorders, neck or back pain, and weakness.

Founded in 2010, Southeast Veterinary Neurology exclusively treats medical and surgical diseases of the brain, spinal cord, nerves and muscles.  We offer the full spectrum of expertise, compassion, and state-of-the-art equipment to provide your pet with optimal care.  Our veterinary neurologists use high-field MRI, CT scans, electrodiagnostic, CSF analysis and operating microscopes to diagnose and treat your pet’s neurological conditions.

Our philosophy is simple:  Be there when you need us; treat your pet as if he or she were our own; offer the latest technology, expertise and techniques.

Name: Vetim S.A.
Description:
Vetim es una empresa costarricense que distribuye y fabrica productos para la salud y el bienestar de animales domésticos y productivos. Realiza su misión a través de una amplia gama de productos farmacéuticos, biológicos y nutricionales, así como de equipos de ordeño e implementos para el bienestar animal, fabricados en muchos países por los líderes mundiales de sus sectores y en Costa Rica en las plantas propias.

Distribuye sus líneas a través de una amplia cadena con cientos de distribuidores minoristas, Clínicas y Farmacias Veterinarias, Almacenes Agropecuarios y Cooperativas del sector pecuario en todo el territorio nacional y comercializa directamente una serie de insumos y equipos para la industria láctea, avícola y porcina, fabricantes de alimentos para animales y fabricantes de núcleos y premezclas. Además, cuenta con subsidiarias en Panamá y en Nicaragua, y exporta parte de su producción a varios países de la región. Lo anterior es apoyado por un sólido equipo profesional que participa activamente en la relación con todos sus clientes.

Name: Veterinary Recruitment - Empowering Vets & Nurses to Thrive in Their Careers Across the US & UK
Description:
We know every veterinary practice is unique, and every veterinary surgeon and vet nurse is an individual. Both have different values, principles, and reasons why they do what they do.

Our primary aim is to make the veterinary recruitment process as straight forward and stress-free as possible and to find you the perfect locum or permanent veterinary job when and where you want it. We care for those that care.

As a market leading veterinary agency with over 25 years’ collective experience exclusively focusing on the veterinary industry, we have developed a detailed understanding, knowledge and reputation to be able to deliver the aspirations that you seek.

We understand that working life balance, career progression, culture, a supportive environment along with financials and even commute are common talked about factors when considering your next permanent veterinary career move.

At Vet Seekers USA, we work with:

Independent, charity and larger group corporate practices UK Wide

Working in partnership within the Veterinary industry to exceed expectations through innovation, service, enthusiasm and value.

Name: APC
Description: APC, Inc. is the global leader in the manufacture and sale of plasma-derived functional proteins. Name: Empowering Veterinary Teams (EVT)
Description:
Our Vision: 
Inspire, support, and guide animal healthcare so that every member of every team has a voice, is valued, and finds fulfillment. 

Our Mission:
Through creative education, ongoing innovation, and unflagging determination we will meet teams where they are with what they need.

Our Values:
Authenticity - Show up as your authentic self.
Leadership - Surround yourself with excellence and lead with direction, delegation, and deference.
Balance - Create a world where everyone is free to grow.
Adventure - Find joy in discovery and the adventure along the way.
Connection - Intentionally connect with the people you encounter and the world you inhabit.

Name: VILLANUEVA
Description:
Desde la división Ganadería distribuimos insumos de alta calidad para el sector veterinario de grandes animales y lideramos la gestión de soluciones tecnológicas para la industria ganadera.
Desde nuestra división Agricultura, comercializamos silobolsas e inoculantes para la conservación de granos y forrajes, y ponemos al alcance del productor agropecuario una amplia gama de insumos agrícolas a partir de nuestros centros de distribución estratégicamente ubicados.
Desde nuestra división Motos comercializamos moto vehículos, repuestos, indumentaria y accesorios, garantizando experiencias ejemplares de compra para nuestros clientes.

Name: Paras Nutritions Pvt Ltd
Description: Paras Nutritions, a sister concern of Paras Spices, is one of the fastest growing animal feed and nutrition company. Asees, the brand name of Paras Nutrition has become a synonym to premium Quality aflatoxin free feed and is a brand leader in it's category.We go far beyond just selling cattle feed. We believe that a well-managed and hygienic dairy farm that fulfils the nutritional requirements of the cattle, holds the key to profitability of all dairy farmers. Therefore, we have invested heavily in the development of farmer,where we have trained over 2,00,000 farmers on good dairy farming practices. Guidance is imparted on ways to reduce Aflatoxin - a toxin fungi that affects milk production & cattle health. Asees intends to continue to lead the way  for improving dairy farming in India.

Name: Original Vet.
Description:
Origina Vet é uma importadora, distribuidora e representante de marcas líderes no mercado de equipamentos, móveis e instrumentais. Com um portfólio diversificado, oferecemos aos nossos clientes uma ampla gama de produtos de alta qualidade, sempre com informações detalhadas e garantia de excelência. Nosso compromisso é fornecer soluções eficientes e confiáveis, garantindo a satisfação e o sucesso de nossos parceiros comerciais.

Estamos situado na cidade de Palhoça - SC onde temos uma sede com toda a infraestrutura necessária para atender todos nossos clientes. Com assistência técnica de Ultrassom, Emissores de Raio-x, Digitalizadores e outros equipamentos.

Name: Hawthorne Animal Hospital, Ltd.
Description: Hawthorne Animal Hospital is a full-service veterinary medical facility, located in Glen Carbon, Illinois. We also have two satellite locations located throughout the Metro-East area.  The professional and courteous staff at Hawthorne Animal Hospital seeks to provide the best possible medical care, surgical care and dental care for their highly-valued patients. We are committed to promoting responsible pet ownership, preventative health care and health-related educational opportunities for our clients.  Hawthorne Animal Hospital strives to offer excellence in veterinary care in Glen Carbon and surrounding areas.

Name: Apiam Animal Health Limited
Description:
The name Apiam Animal Health and the logo were inspired by the honey bee, which belongs to the Genus Apis.  Honey bees are industrious and hardworking characters, and working together they build wonderfully efficient, meticulous, hexagonal hives that are robust and strong.  

So it's no accident that our name and logo are inspired by the honey bee!  Our team of over 100 industry leading veterinarians are today located across Australia, and specialise in production and mixed animal veterinary practices, including pigs, dairy, feedlot, sheep, equine and not to mention, cats and dogs too in our vet clinics.   This is also supported by our veterinary wholesale, warehousing, logistics and ancillary services.

Working together, we enrich the lives of people and animals in our care.

For more information on Apiam, please visit our website at www.apiam.com.au or email enquiries@apiam.com.au

Name: Agrosul Catarinense
Description: Fundada em 1986, a Agrosul Catarinense, é uma empresa especializada na distribuição de medicamentos e alimentação pet para o Estado de Santa Catarina.

Name: Vet Konect
Description: Vet Konect is a digital animal health company that is leveraging technology to enable access to animal care and social protection for livestock farmers and pet owners across Africa regardless of their location through their mobile devices.

Name: Hagyard Equine Medical Institute
Description:
For more than 130 years, the veterinarians of Hagyard-Davidson-McGee Associates, PLLC, have dedicated themselves to the health and well-being of the horse. Founded in Central Kentucky in 1876 by Edward T. Hagyard, DVM, the firm has long stood for excellence in veterinary medicine. Its reputation is built, in part, on a continued effort to increase veterinary knowledge and thereby improve the state-of-the-art treatments and surgeries offered to its diverse equine clientele which represent international breeding operations, world-renowned race horses as well as 3-day eventers and pleasure horses. E. T. Hagyard and Sons Clinic Building.

Over the years, the practice encountered several name changes and in 1951, after the death of E.T. Hagyard, adopted the name of Hagyard-Davidson-McGee Associates, P.S.C. In 2004, the current name, Hagyard Equine Medical Institute was established with the philosophy of highlighting each department and paying homage to our founders by establishing the names Davidson Surgery Center, McGee Medicine Center, McGee Fertility Center, and Hagyard Laboratory.

Name: Vet Plus Center
Description:
Vet Plus is an Advance Veterinary Center and is the premier destination for all your pet care needs in Sharjah and Dubai, which was established in 2012, Our state of the art facility boasts a specialist veterinary team with extensive experience and knowledge in all aspects of animal health. We are proud to be equipped with the latest technologies and equipment to ensure that your pets receive the highest standard of care.

With a total center size of over 12,000 square feet, we have designed our clinic to provide the ultimate in comfort and convenience for both you and your pet. Our welcoming reception area is the perfect place to relax and get to know our friendly staff, while our spacious examination rooms offer a quiet and private space for your pet to receive the care they need.

At Vet Plus, we understand the unique bond between you and your pet, and we are dedicated to providing the highest level of care to ensure that your furry friend is healthy and happy. Our team of experienced veterinarians is here to provide a full range of services, from routine check-ups to complex surgeries, and everything in between.

Whether you are seeking routine preventative care or advanced veterinary services, you can rest assured that your pet is in the best possible hands at Advance Veterinary Center. We are dedicated to providing the highest standard of care and to ensuring that your pet receives the attention and care they deserve.

Visit us today and discover the difference that Advance Veterinary Center can make in your pet's life.
Location: Dubai Marina , Sharjah Muwaileh, Sharjah & Dubai

Name: MSPCA-Angell
Description:
The mission of the Massachusetts Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals is to protect animals, relieve their suffering, advance their health and welfare, prevent cruelty, and work for a just and compassionate society.  The MSPCA-Angell believes that all animals possess intrinsic value, independent of their relationships to or use by human beings. Furthermore, the MSPCA-Angell recognizes that the lives of all creatures–human and non-human–are inextricably intertwined; that our actions impact them and our fate is linked to theirs as interdependent inhabitants of the same planet. It is for these reasons that the MSPCA-Angell is dedicated to the protection of animals and the advancement of their welfare, and believes that these objectives represent legitimate and important areas for society’s ethical and legal concern.

The MSPCA-Angell further recognizes that the fate of animals within our society is dependent upon the willingness of human beings to acknowledge the significance of their fellow creatures and to accept responsibility for their well-being. Consequently, the MSPCA-Angell also commits itself to the conduct of programs and activities designed to create an enlightened and compassionate citizenry that is actively concerned about protection of animals and the environment we all share.

Name: Soul Veterinary Clinic
Description:
Soul Veterinary Clinic is a modern, fully equipped veterinary center providing comprehensive medical and surgical care for dogs, cats, birds, falcons, and exotic pets.

Our clinic features advanced imaging and surgical technologies, including CT scanning, laparoscopic procedures, and specialized neurosurgeries and delicate operations for small animals.

We offer a wide range of services:
	•	Orthopedic consultations with one of the leading orthopedic surgeons in the Middle East
	•	Specialized care in avian and exotic animal medicine and surgery
	•	Cardiology services, including echocardiography (ECHO) and comprehensive heart disease screening and diagnostics
	•	Ophthalmology, Dermatology & Nutrition
	•	Emergency care, Vaccinations & Deworming
	•	Microchipping, Dental Procedures & General Surgery
	•	Intensive Care, Digital X-rays & Ultrasound
	•	Fully equipped In-house Laboratory
	•	Grooming, Boarding, Veterinary Diets, Pet Food & Accessories

 Locations:

Name: VetNova
Description:
VetNova is a company founded in 2007 by veterinarians and made for veterinarians, dedicated to the Health and Wellbeing of Companion Animals and Horses.
Although we started in Spain and Portugal, where we have a strong presence with our own affiliates, we have a global vocation and we already export our products to several countries in Europe, America and Asia.

Name: AniCura Vetsia Hospital Veterinario
Description:
Somos un Hospital Veterinario que colabora con el sector clínico veterinario, para complementar sus servicios, con medios y equipos de innovación y personas con alta cualificación. 

Deseamos ser reconocidos por la profesión veterinaria como un hospital de referencia por calidad. 
Nos apoyamos en valorar y respetar a personas y pacientes, en dignificar la profesión veterinaria trabajando éticamente, como un equipo, contando con profesionales especialistas veterinarios reconocidos, proporcionando una información clara y veraz, recibiendo formación de manera continua y avanzada, compartiéndola, y tratando de lograr que el cliente reciba y perciba un trato excelente.

Name: Hospital Veterinario Santa Ines
Description:
Uma das maiores estruturas hospitalares de São Paulo se faz completa todos os dias em que salvamos,melhoramos ou a amenizamos a dor destes entes queridos de quatro patas.  Juntar o conhecimento especifico,tecnologia ao amor nos credenciam a execução das melhores práticas quando o assunto é salvar vidas. 
Santa Inês medicina veterinária onde você procura as melhores especialidades e encontra confiança!
Trabalhando 24 horas por dia nossa equipe e estrutura se destaca no mercado regional e nacional pela competencia e humanização no trato com os pets e seus tutores.

UNIDADES
Matriz: Avenida Santa Ines, 1357  São Paulo
Filial: Avenida leoncio de Magalhães, 745 São Paulo
Pet Shop e Cursos: Avenida Santa Ines, 1346

Site: www.santainesvet.com.br
Facebook: www.facebook.com/hospitalveterinariosantainessp
Instagram: www.instagram.com/Hospital Vet. Santa Ines

Name: BluVet
Description:
BluVet is an Italian organization of passionate people, which knows and supports the Italian Veterinary World, helping it to grow and prosper in an ethical and sustainable way.
We invest in veterinary facilities, in the skills of doctors, in the efficiency of processes and their digitization.
We want to offer the best care to our animal friends, through structured, efficient and innovative services.

Name: VPLUS - Réseau 100% Vétérinaire et Indépendant
Description:
Are you looking for a veterinary network that combines medical excellence, human values, and independence? VPLUS Veterinarian is the answer. We offer a rewarding professional journey focused on animal well-being and team development.

In a rapidly changing veterinary landscape, many practitioners feel isolated or fear losing their autonomy by joining large groups. Pet owners, on the other hand, seek quality care, comprehensive support, and a trusting relationship with their veterinarian.

VPLUS provides a unique solution:

A human-scale network promoting exchanges and shared experiences.

Professional support through VPLUS Services (HR, Finance, Communication).

A continuous training program to ensure excellence in care.

Specialized centers for comprehensive care.

A quality charter ensuring exemplary practices.

Our uniqueness:

An economic model where capital is primarily owned by veterinarians, ensuring independence and decisions close to the field.

Controlled growth along the Bordeaux-Paris axis, strengthening clinic cohesion.

Team synergy enabling the sharing of skills and technical resources.

Opportunities for each collaborator to develop their potential with the support of experienced peers.

Join the VPLUS Veterinarian adventure and help build a future-oriented veterinary model that combines medical excellence, professional fulfillment, and independence. Contact us today to explore opportunities within our network and shape the future of veterinary medicine in France.

Name: Innovet Italia
Description:
Innovet is a science-based company of premium supplements for pets. Our mission is to transfer scientific innovation to pet healthcare market, to help dogs and cats live healthier and happier lives.

In over 25 years of research, we have identified a new class of substances, the Aliamides, which have been proven able to enhance and optimize the defence mechanisms that Nature has devised to counteract negative stimuli and thus keep the body healthy.

Those substances are PEA (palmitoylethanolamide), aliamide used in our complementary feeds, and Adelmidrol, for topical products. Thanks to innovative and patented technological processes, we have developed Aliamides in active, ultra-micronized or co-micronized forms with other natural substances, to increase their bioavailability and effectiveness.

Our products cover a wide range of therapeutic areas: orthopedics, behavior, dermatology, odontostomatology, algology, gastroenterology, urology, nephrology and ophthalmology.

Name: Koala Health
Description: Koala has all the medications and health products your pet needs. We package them by date and time to make pet care simpler. The best part? There are no service or shipping fees — you only pay for what your pet needs.

Name: Otto
Description: Otto is how modern veterinary clinics deliver big wins. We partner with you to put tedious tasks on Otto-pilot so you can focus on the best parts of your job.

Name: London Vet Show & BVA Live
Description:
The apex of the veterinary calendar, the London Vet Show is Europe’s largest and most exciting veterinary conference and exhibition. Run with education partners the Royal Veterinary College and British Veterinary Association, we bring together thousands of veterinary professionals, 400+ exhibitors, and more than 200 knowledgeable, inspiring speakers from around the world. Spread over just two days, our conference is long enough to offer you tons of fascinating practical content and short enough that you won’t get overwhelmed. It also means you don’t have to be away from home and work for too long.

There’s also plenty of space to socialise and network, so you can enjoy catching up with friends, make new connections and explore one of the world’s largest and most diverse veterinary marketplaces. 

Our expert speakers don’t just know their stuff – they know how to share it in an interesting and practical way. So as well as ticking your CPD boxes you’ll actually enjoy your learning and walk away with knowledge you can easily and immediately put into action in your everyday practice.

With more than 200 talks across multiple streams – from companion animals, business, equine, and farm, to nursing and advanced diagnostics – you can tailor-make your own conference programme. 

The London Vet Show will take place on the 20-21 November 2025 in ExCeL.

Name: Addvet Animal Health
Description:
We are Jordanian  company ( ADDVET ) producing veterinary medicine ,nutritional additives, feed additives and disinfectants in Jordan. We handle exporting for many years .
We focus on poultry (layer, broiler, breeder) , livestock, dairy cow, aquaculture medicine and nutritional supplement , including: oral solution, soluble powder,  premix. Disinfectant products .

Name: AniMeta
Description:
Animeta Agritech proudly stands as India's premier digital platform for dairy farming community. We are trying to bring veterinary service close to the dairy farm.
Farmer friendly tech platform to diagnose more than 250 dairy cow & buffalo disease automatically and get immediate prescription for herbal ethnoveterinary solutions.
Our auto feed calculator assess the nutritional requirement of the animal and prescribe farmers with right type of feed to improve the milk production.
#AniMeta and its brand YourFarm is an one stop solution for maintaining animal health and nutrition.
We impacted more than 2,00,000 dairy farming community through 45,000+ Vet consultations and benefiting 6,00,000+ dairy cow & buffalo
Our vision is to help every Indian dairy farmers to Rear animal scientifically. Produce more milk. Live better
Join us to revolutionize agriculture and elevate the standard of living for farmers.
Website: https://yourfarm.co.in/
App link : https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.yourfarm
Mail I'd: info@yourfarm.co.in

Name: Carus Laboratories Private Limited
Description:
Launched in 2006, the company has introduced many innovative solutions in Veterinary Industry. Operating from Karnal, Haryana (INDIA), the company has become a source of inspiration for many young entrepreneurs.
Carus is renowned as one of the leading veterinary feed supplements manufacturer. We are known for quality products with timely delivery across the Indian & International markets.

FAMI qs (Feed Additive and Premixture System) approved manufacturing plant on GMP guidelines is one of the few automated plants with minimal intervention

The liquid section has a capacity of 7500 liters/day (extendable up to 15000 liters/day)
The powder section has a capacity of 12 tons/day (extendable up to 24 tons/day)
Equipped with ultra-modern amenities and a highly qualified team.
For distributor's inquiries email us at amit@carus.in

Name: VitusVet
Description:
VitusVet is a complete client engagement platform with digital payment tools that seamlessly connects pet owners and their care providers to improve the health and safety of pets. 

VitusVet was founded by a veterinarian and former practice owner who understands the pain points animal clinics can experience. 

Pets are our passion and our team of animal lovers work hard to help thousands of independent veterinary practice users run smoother –– allowing them to focus on the health and wellbeing of our furry (or feathered, or scaly) friends. Our solution strengthens client relationships, boosts appointments, and increases wellness compliance.

Name: Clinica Veterinaria Panda
Description:
Somos el resultado de un anhelo que nació mientras cursábamos la Facultad de Veterinaria como dos jóvenes estudiantes. Creíamos posible el ejercicio de la medicina veterinaria desde el trabajo grupal multidisciplinario, a través de la excelencia médica y la calidez humana. Pasaron ya 26 años desde que nació Veterinaria Panda en un pequeño local de la calle Cullen, Villa Urquiza, y todos los días trabajamos para seguir materializando aquel sueño.

Trabajamos con los mejores profesionales en cada especialidad. Ponemos en el centro de nuestro trabajo a sus mascotas y a ustedes, sus tutores. Contamos con un equipo de excelentes profesionales asistentes y colaboradores.

Todos los que formamos parte de Veterinaria Panda compartimos la misma filosofía de trabajo: sabemos que queremos hacer y, sobre todo, como queremos hacerlo.

En forma constante estamos haciendo crecer nuestro equipo, tanto en profesionales de la salud como administrativos. No dudes en postularte y formar parte!
Location: Buenos Aires, City of Buenos Aires

Name: Vets Pets
Description:
We are a cooperative group of Veterinary Hospitals in North Carolina and operate After Hours Emergency, 24-Hour Emergency, Primary Care, HQHV Spay/Neuter, and Specialty Hospitals as well as Pet Resorts.  We try to live with a "can-do" philosophy focused on growth in people, medicine, and service.  Our organization is our people, and we work to challenge, develop, and support each other.  

We provide opportunity through growth in medicine, leadership, and ownership.
We offer flexible positions geared towards veterinarians’ interests, work-life balance, and aspirations. 
We invest in our people, equipment, and facilities for the long term.
Our CEO is a company founder, and we are 100% owned by the founding family and veterinarians. 

Our focus is to partner with future veterinary leaders and aspiring practice owners.  Our preferred growth model is through joint-venture partnerships with veterinarians.  We are flexible and generate growth through multiple channels, including acquisitions, start-ups, the addition of services, and organic initiatives.  Growth initiatives are location-specific and built around individual practice leaders’ interests, strengths, and individual market opportunities.
 
We always seek to develop relationships and welcome a discussion about career opportunities, whether in the near or distant future.

Name: Zamira Australia
Description: Zamira Australia is an animal health company with a mission to improve the health, wellbeing and productivity of farm animals through detection, prevention and treatment. Our research-based animal health solutions include therapeutic and preventative approaches for poultry, pigs, cattle and aquaculture species.

Name: American College of Veterinary Internal Medicine (ACVIM)
Description:
The American College of Veterinary Internal Medicine (ACVIM) is a not-for-profit organization dedicated to improving the lives of animals and people through education, training and certification of specialists in veterinary internal medicine, discovery and dissemination of new medical knowledge, and increasing public awareness of advances in veterinary medical care.

The ACVIM is the American certifying organization for veterinary specialists in cardiology, large animal internal medicine, neurology, nutrition, oncology and small animal internal medicine. 

Learn about our social media policy: bit.ly/SocialPolicyACVIM

Name: Vet4Ever
Description:
Vet4ever, is the market leader in Egypt’s companion animal health industry offering enormous product range of superior quality and added value services to guarantee the accomplishment of premium veterinary solution.
Partnering with the world leader animal health multinational companies to introduce a world-class products and services through promoting education and improve the veterinary practice quality.
Developing our business created expansion opportunities in equine and livestock markets. 
Thanks to our business-market experienced team.

Name: Medion, PT
Description: Move to Medion Group. Please Unfollow this account (Medion, PT) immediately

Name: Laudo Laboratório
Description: LAUDO Laboratório é uma empresa de prestação de serviços laboratoriais veterinários voltada principalmente para a Indústria Avícola. Como laboratório credenciado pelo Ministério da Agricultura, Pecuária e Abastecimento (MAPA), o LAUDO realiza testes oficiais para atendimento ao Plano Nacional de Sanidade Avícola (PNSA).

Name: Nurture Technology
Description:
Experts in Manufacturing Phytogenic Feed Additives & Feed Supplements

We at Nurture are constantly striving to provide ingenious solutions to our customers by bringing the latest in Innovative, Sustainable and Quality Products to their doorsteps. Our focus is producing inventive & breakthrough products through an amalgamation of Ayurvedic Herbal Ingredients and Modern Scientific Technologies. Our dedication and discipline in scientific research remain constant, because at Nurture we believe maintaining a high rate of innovation is essential to industry leadership as well as the long-term success. We question, every day, how we can channel our expertise and experience into new opportunities to improve the quality of life of the animal communities and the processes for the farmers.

Our goal is to provide our customers with clinically proven, scientific, and long-term solutions which not only enhances their processes & improves their operational environment but also elevates the health of their animal communities. 

We strive to sustainably transform the quality of life every day for the animal communities of the world with our products and services.

Every Nurture product is backed by extensive research, outstanding technical support from our veteran team of veterinarians, pharmacologists, pathologists, chemists, microbiologists, botanists, herbalists and other veterinary experts and a company-wide commitment to customer service. Experienced sales technologists and trained agents can help you select the best product for your processes and applications. 

Our specialized experience in sourcing quality products and strong portfolio of products has brought us to a stage to understand and solve your specific problems. By providing effective and reliable products, our clients across the globe have been experiencing and gaining success.

Name: Jørgen KRUUSE A/S
Description:
We want to improve animal well-being and health by preventing and reducing suffering.

This is the essence of what we want at KRUUSE and how, we together can make a difference for animals every day, every week, and every single year all around the world.

We focus 100% on the veterinary market, and our work at KRUUSE is based on close dialogue with veterinarians and other experts. This makes us familiar with the challenges, wishes and needs of veterinarians - and veterinarians know that our brand name is their guarantee of quality and relevant product functionality. We also back our customers with a complete assortment of consumables.

At KRUUSE, we see every single day as an opportunity to learn and improve, and we place great emphasis on constantly challenging our skilled employees professionally.

Being a proud member of the American Covetrus group gives us more than 5,000 colleagues worldwide and makes us part of the world's largest veterinary equipment providers.

KRUUSE. WE CARE.

_______

Vi vil forbedre dyrs trivsel og sundhed ved at forbygge og mindske lidelse. 

Det er hele essensen af, hvad vi vil i KRUUSE, og hvordan vi i fællesskab kan gøre en forskel for dyrene hver eneste dag, hver eneste uge, hvert eneste år rundt omkring i hele verden.

Vi fokuserer nemlig 100% på veterinærmarkedet, og vores arbejde bygger på en tæt dialog med dyrlæger og andre eksperter. Vi kender derfor dyrlægernes udfordringer, ønsker og behov - og dyrlægerne ved, at vores navn er garanti for kvalitet og relevante produktfunktionaliteter. Vi tilbyder også vores kunder et komplet sortiment af forbrugsartikler. 

Hos KRUUSE ser vi hver eneste dag som en mulighed for at lære og for at blive bedre, og vi lægger stor vægt på at give vores dygtige medarbejdere faglige udfordringer. 

Som en del af den amerikanske koncern Covetrus har vi mere end 5000 kollegaer på verdensplan, hvilket tilsammen gør os til verdens største udbyder af veterinærudstyr.

KRUUSE. WE CARE.

Name: World Veterinary Association (WVA)
Description: The World Veterinary Association (WVA) is an association representing veterinary professionals around the world. The WVA aims to provide global leadership for the veterinary profession and promote animal health and welfare and public health, through advocacy, education, and partnership.

Name: Interchemie
Description:
Interchemie werken ‘De Adelaar’ B.V. was founded on the 19th of January 1979 in Castenray, the Netherlands. From its humble beginnings in The Netherlands, Interchemie is now supplying partners worldwide with veterinary products including veterinary medicines, feed additives, pesticides and disinfectants. We offer our products to careful selected distributors worldwide in Europe, Asia, Africa, South America and the Middle-East.

It is our mission to provide products by people you can rely on. We want to establish the same high quality in each and every one of our products. This is our obligation to both our customers and their animals. 

To fulfill this mission our factories produce veterinary medicines according to G.M.P. regulations and feed additives according to G.M.P. + regulations. Our facilities are inspected yearly by our authorities which results into full G.M.P. approval and G.M.P. + approval. To meet the clients demand we offer customized labeling and legitimate registration of every medicine, complying with international rules and regulations.

Interchemie has attained this high quality standard by continuously researching and developing new products. Because only by improving our product line we can safeguard the health of animals in the future. 

Our high standard are also reflected by our employees. We believe our people should be just as reliable as our products. The ongoing demand of our customers worldwide requires a trustworthy team and clear communication. Interchemie offers reliable and efficient customer service while working together with many partners around the world.

We realize that knowledge sometimes helps more than only offering a solution. Preventing the problem before it arises is why Interchemie not only provides veterinary medicines, but also manufactures feed additives to keep animals healthy.

Name: VetPartners France
Description:
VetPartners France est un groupe de cliniques vétérinaires dédié aux soins des animaux de compagnie, des chevaux et des animaux de production. Les équipes des cliniques vétérinaires qui rejoignent VetPartners rejoignent une famille.
Nous partageons des valeurs fortes : accueil, respect, collaboration, accompagnement et engagement, qui nous animent dans les soins que nous apportons aux animaux.

Name: Aviespecialistas de México- AVEM
Description: AVEM (antes AECACEM) nace como una asociación nacional e independiente, única en su tipo en México, ya que es liderada por Profesionales encargados de la producción avícola en México. En el año 2008, un grupo de gerentes y directores de las empresas avícolas en el entorno nacional creamos AECACEM. El grupo era encabezado por los Dres. Alberto García, Victor Manuel Petrone, Emilio Pardo y Guillermo Téllez Isaías. AECACEM se fundó como la asociación donde los directivos y gerentes de las principales empresas productoras de pollo, huevo y reproductoras, tuviéramos un espacio propio de reunión y discusión técnico y científico en México. Ahora tenemos la satisfacción de la meta lograda, ya que nuestras reuniones anuales se han distinguido por su alto nivel científico, donde las pláticas magistrales han abarcado temas de interés relevante para la producción avícola, procurando que tengan un mínimo de contenido de productos comerciales. Y aunque nuestras reuniones anuales se diseñaron como eventos para un número pequeño de asistentes, alrededor de 50. La convocatoria que se logro fue no sólo para los gerentes de producción, sino también para académicos y personal de la industria de nutrimentos y farmacológica. Por lo que desde nuestra primera reunión anual hemos tenido la asistencia en nuestras reuniones anuales de al menos 250 personas, llegando a 874 personas en nuestra 13ª reunión Anual. Afortunadamente, sin perder nuestra esencia de asociación enfocada a las ciencias de la producción avícola sin afanes comerciales, ni de lucro.

Name: Movet
Description:
En Movet combinamos alta tecnología con la experiencia de nuestros especialistas para ofrecer el mejor cuidado a tus mascotas. Con más de 9 sedes en Bogotá, estamos comprometidos con ser el aliado en la salud y bienestar de perros y gatos, proporcionando servicios de emergencias 24/7. Además, somos la primera línea de emergencias veterinarias del mundo con solo tres dígitos: #909, un número corto y fácil de recordar que permite a los tutores acceder rápidamente a orientación profesional en momentos críticos.

Queremos transformar la cultura sobre el cuidado de mascotas en Colombia, promoviendo la medicina preventiva y tratamientos de calidad que permitan alargar y mejorar la vida de las mascotas. Somos la comunidad ejemplar del cuidado de mascotas, y esto nos impulsa a seguir trabajando para convertirnos en la red de clínicas veterinarias más grande del país, disponibles 24 horas al día, todo el año.

Name: DNAtech
Description:
A DNAtech é o primeiro laboratório português de análises clínicas exclusivamente veterinárias e conta atualmente com mais de 1700 clientes em todo o país. Com laboratórios em Lisboa, Porto e Algarve, faz análises clínicas e investigação em Medicina Veterinária, trabalhando sempre em equipa com o médico para garantir diagnósticos rápidos e fiáveis.

A história da DNAtech começa em 2004 com a área da Imunologia, passando depois para especialidades como Citologia, Hematologia, Toxicologia, Microbiologia, Biologia Molecular, Histopatologia. À diversidade de áreas juntou a qualidade do serviço, o que lhe permitiu trabalhar com as mais prestigiadas instituições nacionais.

No seu leque de clientes conta com grupos de investigação da indústria farmacêutica e dos mais prestigiados institutos da especialidade, como o Instituto Gulbenkian de Ciência, o Instituto de Medicina Molecular e o Instituto de Conservação da Natureza. Colabora ainda com várias faculdades do país, dando apoio a teses de doutoramento e de mestrado, e com a Direção-Geral de Alimentação e Veterinária.

Name: NVA Equine
Description: As one of the leading communities of Equine veterinary teams, NVA Equine is committed to the exceptional care of horses by delivering high-quality medicine supported by local leadership teams. With thriving partnerships across the United Stated and Canada, we encourage collaboration, support professional development and cherish the unique nature of equine medicine. Learn more at https://www.nva.com/equine.

Name: SINDAN
Description:
O Sindicato Nacional da Indústria de Produtos para Saúde Animal (SINDAN), entidade de âmbito nacional, foi fundado em 04.03.1966, tendo como pilares de atuação:
• Estudar, coordenar e representar a Indústria de Produtos para Saúde Animal no território nacional
• Promover eventos, visando o desenvolvimento do setor e de seus associados
• Colaborar com os Poderes Públicos e com as demais entidades de classe, no sentido da solidariedade social e da subordinação aos interesses nacionais
• Representar, perante as autoridades constituídas, os interesses gerais de sua categoria econômica
• Colaborar com o Estado, como órgão técnico e consultivo, nos estudos e soluções dos problemas sanitários e tributários e igualmente com sua categoria econômica

Atualmente, a entidade congrega mais de 90 empresas responsáveis por mais de 90% do mercado brasileiro de produtos para saúde animal. Todas as empresas são devidamente registradas no Ministério da Agricultura, Pecuária e Abastecimento. O SINDAN tem atuação em todo o território nacional e colabora com os Poderes Públicos e as demais entidades de classe, no sentido da solidariedade social e da sua subordinação aos interesses nacionais.

O Sindicato Nacional da Indústria de Produtos para Saúde Animal (SINDAN) tem como Presidente Elcio Inhe, que está à frente da Diretoria Executiva – Gestão 2017/2019 e do Conselho Consultivo da entidade.

O SINDAN atua em todas as áreas de interesse da indústria de produtos para saúde animal. Para isso, conta com a colaboração de várias Comissões, com atribuições específicas. São elas: Comissão para Assuntos de Aftosa (CAS), Comissão de Animais de Companhia (COMAC), Comissão Tributária e Fiscal (COMTRIF), Comissão de Informações de Mercado (COINF), Comissão de Legislação Ambiental, Comissão de Logística (COLOG), Comissão de Recursos Humanos, Comissão Técnica de Aditivos Alimentares (COTAL) e Comissão Técnica de Registro (CTR).

Name: Companion Animal Health
Description:
Companion Animal Health (a division of LiteCure, LLC and DJO Global) is an animal health company committed to improving the quality of life for animals through innovative health care solutions, designed to provide superior outcomes at every stage of care. 

Companion works closely with veterinary professionals to identify industry needs and develop products with a demonstrated and evidence-backed ability to fulfill those needs. Offering on-going educational opportunities and industry leading customer care, Companion partners with its customers to deliver both the products and support required to provide the best care possible at every step in the animal health care journey.

Name: Drovet
Description:
Empresa dedicada desde 1975 a la venta y distribución de insumos veterinarios y agrícolas, instrumental, silobolsas, alimentos balanceados y todo lo relacionado al sano crecimiento de sus animales de produccion y mascotas.
Contamos con 7 sucursales dispuestas a lo largo y ancho del pais, especialmente en el corazón productivo de la pampa húmeda y las mejores zonas de cría, llegando a través de logistica propia en el menor tiempo posible, a todas las ciudades del interior, representando a mas de 50 Laboratorios y fabricantes de insumos

Name: Linavet Distribuidora
Description:
Somos uma distribuidora de produtos veterinários de qualidade, com sede no Rio de Janeiro, possuímos 2 armazéns com uma área total de 1.000 mts²  e mais de 200 posições porta paletes para alocação dos produtos.

Nossa página é www.linavet.com.br
Lá você pode conhecer mais sobre nós e comprar conosco.

Instagram: www.instagram.com/linavetdistribuidora/
Facebook:  pt-br.facebook.com/LinaVet-507749936049334/


Nossa história teve inicio em 2002 com comercialização dos kits de diagnóstico e equipamentos da Idexx.

Hoje contamos com uma equipe de 22 consultores de vendas, 4 televendas, 10 promotoras técnicas, coordenação comercial, coordenação de marketing e promotores de ponto de venda. Além dos nossos estoquistas que separam nossos pedidos com todo carinho e auxiliares que trabalham sempre pra entregar os produtos no menor espaço de tempo possível.

Distribuímos:  Boehringer Ingelheim, Hill’s, Livelong, Classe A Saúde, Spin, Vansil, além dos kits diagnósticos da Idexx.

Name: Best Friend Vet Clinic
Description: We're dedicated to providing top-notch care for your pets including Grooming, Check-ups, Vaccinations, Diagnostic imaging, Lab Tests, & Surgeries

Name: Penn Veterinary Supply Inc.
Description:
Penn Vet was created in 1981 with veterinarians in mind.  The founder of our company believed there was a better way to provide product to the veterinary profession as well as many needs that weren't being met or even considered.  We pride ourselves on doing the simple things better and on going above and beyond the expectations of our customers; We simply believe it's the way it should be done. 

We do not claim to be the biggest supplier, nor are we a one-stop shop, but we believe there is something to be said for offering choice to our customers.  Our selection of products allows us to offer you money-saving alternatives to big-name products other larger distributors can't carry, or don't promote, due to their obligations to big-name manufacturers.  

Our home office, located in Lancaster, PA, is also home to our Conference Center where we offer continuing education seminars (most free of charge) to our customers.

Name: MYLAV - Laboratorio di analisi veterinarie
Description:
MYLAV è un laboratorio di Analisi Veterinarie organizzato in reparti specialistici coordinati da un centro direzionale scientifico ed organizzativo. Eseguiamo esami di laboratorio per conto dei Veterinari liberi professionisti.

Abbiamo realizzato un servizio di consulenza scientifica effettuato da specialisti del settore. 

Siamo i primi in Italia ad aver abbiamo ottenuto,  le certificazioni ISO 9001 e ISO 15189 che prevedono controlli di qualità presso laboratori esterni, abbiamo realizzato un servizio di ritiro campioni GRATUITO giornaliero con consegna nella penisola entro 24 ore compreso il sabato.

I nostri clienti dispongono di tutti gli strumenti web per controllare e supervisionare tutto ciò che riguarda la loro attività lavorativa, dalla richiesta degli esami da effettuare, al controllo delle fasi di spedizione e lavorazione, ai referti, la contabilità ed infine la consulenza.

Siamo un'azienda giovane e dinamica, abbiamo ulteriori progetti e ambizioni.

Vienici a trovare su www.laboratoriolavallonea.net e su www.mylav.net

Name: NorthStar VETS, Veterinary Emergency, Trauma and Specialty Centers
Description:
NorthStar VETS is a 24 hour emergency vet hospital with three locations in New Jersey. We are revolutionizing traditional hospital visits by not only focusing on specialized patient care but also rolling out the red carpet and providing five star service for everyone who walks through our doors. As part of our commitment to leading the way, NorthStar VETS is currently the only AAHA Accredited Referral Hospital in NJ that provides veterinary emergency, trauma and specialty services for animals and pets including dogs, cats, avian, and exotics.

NorthStar VETS proudly provides emergency veterinarians, board-certified surgeons and internists 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year throughout the New Jersey, New York, Philadelphia, and Delaware region to ensure that pets get the care they deserve.

We welcome you to experience the difference at NorthStar VETS.

Name: blendVET
Description:
What if every veterinary professional truly felt like they belonged?

That bold question sparked the creation of blendVET—a culture-forward certification and pathway program built by veterinary professionals, for the veterinary profession.

It began in 2020 when Dr. Niccole Bruno spoke to over 800 students nationwide. Their response made one thing clear: the profession needed to evolve. That conversation became the catalyst for something bigger—blendVET.

Today, we create belonging in veterinary medicine by Building, Leading, Educating, Navigating, and Diversifying the profession—driving measurable impact across people, pets, and practices.

Since launch, we’ve lead the profession forward:
•	2021: Introduced the first culture-forward lectures at a national conference
•	2022: Released the only veterinary-curated, RACE-approved curriculum in inclusive leadership and cultural competency
•	2023: Partnered with NAVC to launch Youth Pathways at VMX
•	Now: Over 600 students reached and counting

Our three pillars—Youth Pathways, Education Pathways, and Partner Pathways—equip academic institutions, veterinary hospitals, and industry leaders with the tools to strengthen teams from classrooms to clinics.

Through certification programs, workshops, and real-world learning experiences, blendVET builds confident leaders who cultivate:
•	Healthier workplace cultures
•	Better pet patient outcomes
•	Sustainable practice growth
Because when veterinary professionals feel seen, heard, and valued—the entire profession thrives.

Name: Agrocampo Colombia
Description:
Buscamos ofrecer experiencias y generar valor liderando el cambio hacia un mundo mejor. Nos dedicamos a comercializar y distribuir medicamentos, alimentos e insumos agropecuarios, a través de nuestro centro logístico. Todo gracias un equipo de trabajo especializado en brindar productos y servicios de alta calidad. 

Somos un equipo humano que, a través de sus valores corporativos, promueve una cultura organizacional enmarcada en la calidad de vida y el bienestar de nuestros colaboradores. 

Siempre dejando huella en quienes hacen parte de la familia AGROCAMPO S.A.S.

Único hipermercado del sector veterinario en Colombia!

Name: Laboratorios Faryvet S.A.
Description: Somos una empresa dedicada a la formulación, producción y comercialización de productos de calidad para la industria de nutrición y salud animal, a través de personal competente, inducido y productivo, infraestructura moderna, tecnología eficiente y acreditada bajo normas internacionales.

Name: Ca' Zampa
Description:
Ca’ Zampa è un progetto imprenditoriale italiano che nasce dal 2019 con l’obiettivo di sviluppare un polo nazionale di eccellenza nel settore della medicina veterinaria.

Una realtà in continua crescita sul territorio nazionale con decine di strutture presenti in varie regioni che operano in vari ambiti.

Cliniche specialistiche che sul territorio rappresentano un punto di riferimento per gli ambulatori e le cliniche di base. Offrono servizi specialistici in diversi ambiti e possono contare su un team altamente qualificato e riconosciuto.
Ospedali che offrono servizi H24, Pronto Soccorso, chirurgia avanzata, specialistica, medicina di referenza. Riferimenti sempre più importanti per le strutture presenti sul territorio ma anche per i proprietari, offrendo loro il miglior supporto professionale, specialistico e tecnologico.
Cliniche veterinarie di primo livello che offrono servizi di medicina “first opinion”, prevenzione e specialistica di base. In molte strutture sono presenti anche servizi integrati per prendersi cura del benessere del pet a 360°.

Siamo un gruppo certificato UNI-EN-ISO 9001 (per una gestione efficiente e di massima qualità delle strutture) e Buone Pratiche Veterinarie – ANMVI (il golden standard per i servizi veterinari).

Ci impegniamo attivamente a contribuire al benessere sociale e ambientale delle comunità in cui operiamo e ad essere motore di cambiamento positivo: per questa l'azienda ha ottenuto lo status di Società Benefit.

Name: IMV imaging
Description:
IMV imaging, your complete animal imaging solution. 

Combining the expertise of both BCF Technology and ECM (Echo Control Medical), IMV imaging has over 40 years’ experience in providing cutting edge imaging technology to the veterinary market.

All our equipment is designed and manufactured in-house or sourced from the world's leading healthcare and imaging providers. We are specialists in veterinary imaging - ultrasound, X-ray, CT, MRI and PACS. Whatever the species, small animal, equine and farm animals, we can help.

We are committed to achieving our vision through remaining committed to our core values of partnership, learning and innovation;
•	To be the world leader in the invention, development and provision of animal diagnostic imaging equipment.
•	To build a team of world-class experts and maintain an inspiring working environment in which they can excel.
•	To deliver technology that really makes a difference in animal care.

Name: Ars Veterinaria (Hospital)
Description: Somos un Hospital veterinario de referencia en España que nació del sueño de sus pioneros fundadores (Joan Mascort, Josep Maria Closa, Artur Font), pero también de una necesidad: la de nivelar la medicina veterinaria de finales de los años 70 con la medicina que se hacía en humana. Nuestra casa actualmente la conforma un equipo multidisciplinario de 70 profesionales y veterinarios altamente especializados, cuya misión es dar respuesta a los casos clínicos de mediana a elevada complejidad que nos son enviados para diagnóstico y tratamiento. Somos además un referente de formación veterinaria en el sector, tanto en estancias formativas de veterinarios nacionales e internacionales, programas de internado en asociación con la Universitat Autònoma de Barcelona y en programas de residencia del Colegio Europeo de Especialidades Veterinarias. Disponemos de Diplomados por el Colegio Europeo y/o Americano en las siguientes disciplinas veterinarias: Medicina Interna, Neurología, Oftalmología, Oncología, Cardiología, Cuidados Intensivos, Oftalmología, Cirugía y Traumatología, Odontología y Cirugía Maxilofacial, Etología y Medicina del Comportamiento, Dermatología, Diagnóstico por Imagen.

Name: The Pet Vet (formerly The Vet)
Description:
We’re the UK’s largest, independent, family-owned veterinary group with a nationwide presence. We offer exceptional care in the local communities we serve, helping pets to live long, happy and healthy lives with their families.

Our state-of-the-art surgeries are purpose-built, light and spacious and equipped with the latest technology. We’re committed to creating an environment that offers exceptional clinical care and where our colleagues love to work, our patients are calm and our customers feel assured. 

We're continually investing in our team. We understand the importance of providing opportunities for professional development, nurturing a positive workplace culture and supporting a healthy work/life balance. In addition to our market-leading salaries, we also offer our team a package of fantastic discretionary benefits.

We aim to recruit colleagues who embody our company values, which are:

- We care
- We are friendly, open and honest
- We all work together as a team
- We strive to be better every day

We have plenty of exciting new career opportunities. Take a look at our current vacancies and if you think you could be the perfect fit, we’d love to hear from you. If you have any questions, please email recruitment@thevet.co.uk.

Name: CENTRE HOSPITALIER VÉTÉRINAIRE HOPia - Univet
Description:
CLINIQUE VETERINAIRE HOPIA : DE L’URGENCE AUX INTERVENTIONS DE POINTE

UNE OFFRE DE SOINS PLURIDISCIPLINAIRES
Notre offre de soins comprend les urgences et les soins intensifs, la chirurgie (cardiaque, à cœur ouvert ou non, interventionnelle (dilatations par ballonets, ACDO, pace-makers...), thoracique, ORL, neurologique, abdominale et autres tissus mous), la cardiologie médicale et interventionnelle ainsi que l’imagerie. Elle comprend également la Médecine Interne Spécialisée et les Nouveaux Animaux de Compagnie. Un centre de physiothérapie/hydrothérapie de 100 m2 est également disponible.

UN PLATEAU TECHNIQUE UPTODATE
La Clinique HOPia, existant depuis 30 ans, un complexe actuellement de 2100 m2, est dotée d’un plateau technique et d’équipements de pointe afin de pouvoir effectuer sur place pratiquement tous les traitements, examens et analyses dont aurait besoin votre animal.

HOPia, CLINIQUE RECONNUE POUR LA CHIRURGIE CARDIAQUE, Y COMPRIS À CŒUR OUVERT

Name: FMVZ - Unesp - Botucatu
Description:
Departamento de Clínica Veterinária
Faculdade de Medicina Veterinária e Zootecnia - Unesp - Campus de Botucatu

Name: SPANA
Description:
Founded in 1923, SPANA is the charity for the working animals of the world.

Millions of people depend on animals for their livelihoods, yet many lack access to professional veterinary care. Across Africa and the Middle East, SPANA clinics treat hundreds of thousands of donkeys, horses, mules, camels and livestock every year.

During conflict, drought and natural disaster, our emergency programme gets help to animals and the communities who depend on them, whenever and wherever we're needed.

Our education programme reaches tens of thousands of children each year, teaching respect and compassion for animals.

We believe every working animal deserves to be treated with humanity and kindness. We're working towards a day when animal suffering will cease to exist. Until then, there is a lot of work to be done.

Name: Apaixonados por Quatro Patas
Description:
Somos a Apaixonados por Quatro Patas, a maior e mais completa rede de clínicas veterinárias populares do Brasil, com mais de 100 unidades franqueadas.

Nascemos em 2016 a partir de um projeto social voltado ao resgate de animais em situação de risco. Hoje, além de mantermos uma ONG que acolhe cerca de 800 animais, oferecemos serviços veterinários de excelência a preços acessíveis, democratizando o acesso à saúde animal.

Nossa rede disponibiliza uma ampla gama de serviços, incluindo atendimento 24 horas, castração, consultas, exames laboratoriais, cirurgias, ortopedia, cardiologia, oncologia, vacinas importadas, ultrassonografia, raio-X e farmácia.

Nossa missão é democratizar a medicina veterinária, garantindo atendimento de qualidade, justo e acessível a todos os animais e seus tutores. 

Atuamos em um modelo de negócio sustentável e escalável, gerando oportunidades para franqueados e fortalecendo nosso compromisso com o bem-estar animal.

Entre em contato:
 Site: www.apaixonadosporquatropatas.com.br
 Facebook: @apaixonadosporquatropatas
 Instagram: @apaixonadosporquatropatas
Location: Rio De Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: University of Florida College of Veterinary Medicine
Description:
Way before 1976, it was there. The unscratchable itch that says, do not accept things as they are. Trust what’s in your heart. And treat every obstacle as a means to a better you. That spirit not only built a college, it has safeguarded Florida’s food supply, made the needs of pets and owners top priority, and brought care for animals, people and the environment together. 

Today, we see it in the advancement of shelter medicine, in the treatment for animal glaucoma that’s used to help people and the yoga sessions that help students decompress. With every challenge we accept and every norm we challenge, we broaden the horizon for future veterinarians and elevate veterinary medicine’s place in the world.

The UF College of Veterinary Medicine is Florida’s only veterinary medical college.

Our mission is the advancement of the health and welfare of animals, humans and the veterinary medical profession through world-class education, innovative research, and state-of-the-art clinical services.

Following graduation of its first class in 1980, the college has built on the university’s reputation for excellence. Today we claim approximately 3000 graduates of our professional degree program. Our veterinary medical alumni are active throughout the world, in areas ranging from in-depth scientific research to traditional small and large animal practice, zoological and aquatic medicine, public health, epidemiology and the military. 

We pride ourselves in our commitment to advancing scientific knowledge. Approximately 800 individuals have completed either master of science  or doctor of philosophy degrees in Veterinary Medical Sciences. These individuals are working in academia, in the biomedical sciences, in government and in industry to advance animal, human and environmental health. 

The College of Veterinary Medicine is fully accredited by the American Veterinary Medical Association Council on Education.

Name: ZAGRO
Description:
For more than 70 years, ZAGRO has been providing a wide spectrum of quality agrisolutions for the agribusiness industry.

A leading agrisolutions manufacturer and distributor of animal health products, crop care products and public health products, ZAGRO has its footprints in many parts of the world, in more than 70 countries. The company has offices in the Philippines, Singapore, Malaysia, Myanmar, Pakistan, Sri Lanka, Thailand, Indonesia, Taiwan, Zambia, and more.

ZAGRO animal health, crop care and public health agrisolutions products are manufactured by state-of-the-art, GMP- and ISO-accredited manufacturing facility and quality-controlled by Pacific Lab Services, a SAC-SINGLAS accredited and ISO/ IEC 17025:2005-awarded laboratory.

With commitment to quality and to further assure its partners of its product quality being on top-notch compliance to very stringent quality standards, ZAGRO was awarded the ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 22000 for the manufacturing, formulating and repacking of crop protection products. It is also awarded with GMP in 2004 in addition to its initial accreditation since 1999, the ISO 9002 and IEC Singlas. In April 2010, ZAGRO has achieved ISO 22000 Certification inclusive of HACCP Certification for all our production facilities making it one of Asia’s First Animal Premix Plant to be accredited. In June 2011, they achieved the FAMI-QS Code of Practice for Feed Additives and Premixture Operators – Version 5.

ZAGRO's commitment to crop care, animal health and public health products quality is equally strong as its commitment to service.

Name: TECSA Laboratórios
Description:
Celebrando três décadas de atuação em Medicina Veterinária Diagnóstica, a história do TECSA Laboratórios é marcada por um legado de contribuições significativas no setor, estabelecendo um padrão de referência graças ao nosso compromisso com a melhoria contínua e a aplicação de avanços tecnológicos. Como pioneiros em diversas metodologias, nossa abordagem inovadora nos colocou na vanguarda do setor, sempre um passo à frente na evolução diagnóstica.,

Com o compromisso de apoiar os médicos veterinários com diagnósticos precisos que facilitam uma prática clínica eficiente, os pilares de qualidade e excelência são a fundação sobre a qual construímos nossa marca. Operando unidades em locais estratégicos como Belo Horizonte, São Paulo, São José do Rio Preto, Campinas e Rio de Janeiro, o TECSA Laboratórios expande seu alcance para mais de 500 cidades, assegurando um serviço de diagnóstico acessível e de alto padrão em todo o território nacional.

A partir do ano de 2020, sob nova gestão, passamos a integrar a rede da VCA Animal Hospitals Inc., que conta com mais de 850 estabelecimentos veterinários espalhados pelos Estados Unidos e Canadá. Além de um avançado sistema de laboratórios clínicos, o Antech Diagnósticos, disponível em todos os 50 estados dos EUA e no Canadá.

Name: The City Vet Clinic
Description:
The City Vet Clinic is equipped with the latest clinical, surgical and laboratory equipment in order to provide the best possible care for your pets.

The City Vet Clinic services are Consultation & treatment (dogs, cats, birds, falcons & exotic pets), Home Service, Specialized consultation in orthopedic, ophthalmology, dermatology and nutrition, Emergency, Vaccination and Deworming, Micro-chipping and Municipality Tag, Dental care, Surgery, Intensive care, Digital radiography, Ultrasound, In-house laboratory, Grooming, Boarding, Vet Diet, Pet food & accessories, hydrotherapy (Fun & Fitness / Therapy), Artificial Insemination, Whelping and Delivery.

Located at Al Wasl Street, Corner Al Manara, Villa No. 881, Dubai , U.A.E., Phone: +971-4-388-3990, Emergency Number: +971-55-875-5553, Fax: +971-4-388-3991, Email: alwasl@thecityvetclinic.com
