Klybeck is spread over 40 countries and has regional offices in Brazil, Peru, Nigeria, Egypt, Philippines and Saudi Arabia.

Animeta Agritech proudly stands as India's premier digital platform for dairy farming community. We are trying to bring veterinary service close to the dairy farm.
Farmer friendly tech platform to diagnose more than 250 dairy cow & buffalo disease automatically and get immediate prescription for herbal ethnoveterinary solutions.

Name: CHV des Cordeliers
Description:
Etablissement d'excellence de soins vétérinaires
Centre Hospitalier Vétérinaire

IRM/neuroimagerie, scanner, endoscopie, ophtalmologie médicale et chirurgicale, chirurgie spécialisée (tissus mous, orthopédie/arthroscopie, oncochirurgie, cœlioscopie, chirurgie mini-invasive, neurochirurgie), neurologie médicale, électrophysiologie, cardiologie interventionnelle, médecine interne

Name: VETRINA
Description:
Vetrina Healthcare is an innovation-driven animal nutrition and health care company in India. We develop innovative customized solutions for optimum health and productivity of animals.

Established in 2012 and now catering to the needs of livestock, poultry, companion and exotic animals, Vetrina Healthcare is a team of veterinary experts, nutritionists, technical consultants, researchers and functional staff. Founded by a veterinarian, run by experts in animal science and devoted to the service of animal farmers, veterinarians and pet parents, we are an animal healthcare company in its truest sense.

Our culture is driven by relentless pursuit of the highest standards of integrity, accountability, professionalism, excellence and quality. Innovation and customer satisfaction are the benchmarks by which our success is measured.

Ensuring health and productivity of livestock and companion animals is our first priority. We support veterinarians and livestock farmers by offering nutritional solutions for well being of animals.

Name: König Brasil
Description:
Grupo empresarial com mais de 35 anos de história no mercado argentino, que concentra seus esforços em pesquisa, desenvolvimento e na comercialização de novos produtos para o mercado veterinário.

É uma empresa química – farmacêutica veterinária com atividades integradas, que tem por objetivo melhorar a qualidade de vida do homem atuando diretamente sobre a proteção da saúde dos animais produtivos e de companhia, além do meio ambiente.

O princípio da König é o de fabricar, controlar e garantir a qualidade. Controles estritos, uma adequada infraestrutura e equipamentos de alta precisão e de última tecnologia resultam invariavelmente em produtos de alta qualidade.

Presente em quase todos os países da região, o Laboratorios König S.A. tem a sua sede central na Argentina, de onde planeja, organiza e executa operações técnico-comerciais para Bolívia, Brasil, Equador, Paraguai, Uruguai, México e Venezuela.

Através dos anos, a reconhecida qualidade e confiabilidade de seus produtos, seus princípios éticos, a eficiência e segurança de seus processos industriais e suas boas práticas comerciais têm contribuído para cimentar o prestígio do Laboratorios König S.A. em toda América do Sul.

Name: Goddard Veterinary Group
Description:
We are very proud to be a long-standing veterinary group across Greater London. Since we were established in 1952, we have grown to 44 veterinary practices and 3 flagship veterinary hospitals, ensuring we can cater to London’s pets 24 hours a day across all 365 days of the year.

Across the industry, we have built our reputation by providing high-quality care to pets from across all areas of London — we pride ourselves on delivering the same level of care for our team as we do for our pets. 

Get in touch to find out about our full-time, part-time, and flexible roles across the group.

Name: Rood & Riddle Equine Hospital
Description: Rood and Riddle Equine Hospital is a full-service equine hospital established in 1986 as a referral center for horses requiring specialized medical and surgical care. The hospital facility offers a full range of services including surgery, internal medicine, advanced diagnostic imaging, a focused Podiatry Center and specialized Reproductive Center.

Name: Universidade Federal de Santa Maria
Description: graduação em Medicina Veterinária pela Universidade Federal de Santa Maria. Com experiência na área de manejo, produção e reprodução de bovinos de corte. Atualmente é mestrando do Programa de Pós-Graduação em Medicina Veterinária da Universidade Federal de Santa Maria na área de Fisiopatologia da Reprodução no Laboratório de Biotecnologia e Reprodução Animal (BioRep). Atua na área de Ginecologia e Andrologia Animal com ênfase em fisiologia e manipulação do ciclo estral, produção in vitro de embriões e biologia molecular.

Name: Veterinary Voices UK
Description:
We share posts, articles and information on campaigns and issues that the 18000+ members of Veterinary Voices UK (who are all vets and vet nurses) believe would be of interest to animal owners.

Through our public Facebook page and website we aim to:

- Share our members’ various articles, blogs and fundraising activities with the public.
-Counter misinformation arising on social media about the veterinary profession and veterinary medicine.
- Inform and engage with the public via social media by providing a balanced view on medical and veterinary issues.  We envisage that promoting a better understanding of the veterinary decision making process will foster greater trust and confidence in the profession. 
- Raise public awareness of campaigns run by veterinary organisations to improve animal and human welfare, and to present evidence of support from the profession for these campaigns. 


Through our closed Facebook discussion group we aim to:

- Provide a safe place for vets, nurses and students to share issues and support each other with humour and solidarity. This includes providing the facility to post anonymously for advice when necessary.
- Provide a forum for vets, nurses and students to discuss topical and ethical issues relating to our profession. 
- Provide vets, nurses and students a platform from which they can directly engage with and influence veterinary political organisations by providing a ‘grassroots' perspective.

Name: FECAVA
Description:
The Federation of European Companion Animal Veterinary Associations (FECAVA) currently represents more than 25,000 companion animal veterinarians in 40 European countries.
FECAVA strives to improve the veterinary care of pets through professional development. It also provides a voice for companion animal issues at European level and works closely with other European veterinary organisations and stakeholders.
FECAVA is also strongly committed to topics such as One Health, animal welfare, the human-animal bond, continuing education, antimicrobial resistance and the availability of medicines.

Name: Medisch Centrum voor Dieren
Description:
Het Medisch Centrum voor Dieren (MCD)  biedt zowel specialistische diergeneeskunde als intensieve en spoedeisende zorg voor gezelschapsdieren. De kliniek is 24 uur per dag, 7 dagen in de week geopend. 

De specialistenkliniek ontvangt patiënten na verwijzing van een dierenarts. Voor foktechnische keuringen is geen verwijzing nodig. De spoedkliniek neemt de avond-, nacht- en weekenddiensten van aangesloten dierenartsen (abonnementhouders) waar. Na onderzoek en/of behandeling krijgt de verwijzend dierenarts een verslag toegestuurd.

Bij het MCD werken 11 specialisten, 20 dierenartsen, 40 paraveterinairen en 5 mensen in een leidinggevende of ondersteunende functie. 

Het MCD is sinds 2010 gehuisvest in een 1700m2 groot pand. De kliniek heeft de beschikking over een CT, MRI, echo, 2 röntgentafels, 5 operatietafels, een chemoruimte, 12 polikamers, en een ruime opname (verdeeld in een afdeling voor honden, katten en dieren met een infectieuze aandoening.

Name: Vansil Industry
Description:
Uma empresa fundada fruto do olhar visionário dos irmãos Silvio e Celso Fila que na década de 80 se depararam com a oportunidade de contribuir com o progresso do homem do campo, oferecendo produtos que cuidam da saúde, bem estar e produtividade dos animais. Nascia em Descalvado/SP, a Vansil Saúde Animal, uma empresa confiável, parceira e comprometida com a sociedade também na geração de emprego e renda.
Alavancada pelos resultados altamente positivos e para melhorar o foco de atendimento e do desenvolvimento, foram criadas as unidades de negócios de Animais de Companhia, Aquicultura, Aves e Suínos e Pecuária, fortalecendo assim o crescimento e expansão da marca desencadeando uma visão focada na produtividade e qualidade de vida dos animais.
Estes investimentos resultaram na inauguração de uma área específica para produção de penicilânicos em 2007, uma das primeiras plantas industriais destinadas ao mercado de saúde animal do Brasil, criando assim a unidade de negócios de industrialização.
Logo aumentou seu portfólio com a aquisição de uma linha de produtos destinados a animais de companhia em 2010, em 2012 adquiriu outra destinada aos mercados de pecuária, aves e suínos.
Com base nas premissas de sustentabilidade, agilidade, crescimento e excelência nos resultados a Vansil Saúde Animal incorpora no ano de 2015 a Nature Lab, um moderno Laboratório de análises e pesquisas que junto ao Núcleo de Avaliação Veterinária – Natvet, fundado em 2016, resultaram em uma integração perfeita.
Para proporcionar maior sinergia e força aos negócios foi criado o Grupo Vansil em 2019, consolidando uma gestão unificada das empresas e permitindo uma ampla  visão 360º dos negócios.
Atualmente a Vansil está presente na vida de cada consumidor, cada parceiro de negócio, cada tutor, proporcionando qualidade de vida aos animais, gerando produtividade com segurança aos criadores e profissionais da área, seja ele do segmento de Animais de Companhia, Aquicultura, Aves, Suínos ou Pecuária.

Name: Realpet Distribuidora

Distribuidora de produtos veterinários, atuante em todo o território de Santa Catarina.

Name: Go Puppy

Go Puppy is the first grooming VAN in Egypt.

Name: SAGE Veterinary Centers
Description: SAGE is one of the leading veterinary groups on the West Coast, providing business and clinical support services to 17 locations: SAGE Veterinary Centers, Veterinary Vision, Veterinary Specialists of Alaska, Yakima Pet Emergency Service, Mid-Columbia Pet Emergency Service, Advanced Veterinary Specialists, Animal Internal Medicine and Specialty Services, Arizona Animal Hospital, and two strategic partnerships with Adobe Animal Hospital and Central Texas Veterinary Specialty & Emergency Hospital. Name: Veterinary Woman

Name: ALFAVET
Description:
Especialistas em distribuição de produtos veterinários e agropecuários no estado do Rio de Janeiro desde 1990.

 Na Alfavet, vamos além da entrega de produtos. Nossa equipe de vendas atua diretamente nos pontos de venda, oferecendo suporte técnico qualificado para lojistas, clínicas e veterinários — ajudando a esclarecer dúvidas e impulsionar o uso consciente e estratégico dos produtos.

 Valorizamos a transparência, a melhoria contínua e a autonomia, em um ambiente de trabalho informal, dinâmico e aberto a novas ideias. Investimos no desenvolvimento constante do nosso time com treinamentos técnicos mensais.

 Atuamos com uma ampla variedade de marcas — desde líderes consolidadas até fabricantes em expansão — conectando cada produto ao canal ideal, com capilaridade e eficiência em toda a nossa área de atuação.

 Com estrutura própria de armazém, frota dedicada e parceiros logísticos estratégicos, entregamos agilidade, visibilidade e confiança para toda a cadeia veterinária.

 Se você busca uma distribuidora com visão de futuro, paixão pelo setor e compromisso com resultados, venha fazer parte da Alfavet.

Deseja trabalhar conosco?
Envie seu currículo para: selecao@alfavet.com.br

Name: Zoo Lógica Veterinaria e Pet Shop
Description:
A Clínica Veterinária Zoo Lógica foi fundada no início de 2004 na região
da Vila Mariana, Zona Sul da cidade de São Paulo, com o objetivo de oferecer um atendimento clínico e cirúrgico de excelência para animais
de companhia.

Além do atendimento a cães e gatos, disponibilizamos assistência veterinária a animais exóticos, como aves, répteis e
pequenos mamíferos.

Dispomos também de Pet Shop, uma loja diferenciada, contando com o que há de melhor em produtos e novidades para seu animal de estimação, além de um completo centro estético para cães e gatos, o melhor Banho e Tosa da região.

Com uma equipe formada por médicos veterinários jovens e atualizados, e diversos profissionais experientes, mantemos sempre em primeiro lugar o bem-estar animal. Isso porque o amor e o respeito pelos animais não são princípios somente dos veterinários e sim de toda equipe Zoo Logica.

Name: Butler Animal Health Supply
Description:
We Have a Unique View of Animal Healthcare At Butler, providing healthcare supplies to veterinarians quickly and simply is our job.  Like you, we're committed to keeping the
world's animal population healthy. It's our goal to make the process of obtaining the supplies you need efficient and simple.  Animal healthcare is in your hands.  We'll
make sure the supplies you need are as well.

Name: Amity Veterinary Clinic
Description:
Caring for Every Pet Like Our Own.

At Amity, we don’t just treat pets — we care for them with the same compassion, dignity, and professionalism we’d want for our own animals. Every client interaction, whether in our veterinary clinic in Dubai, online, or over the phone, is a chance to show what our name truly stands for: trust, sincerity, and hospitality.

We provide a full range of veterinary services, including routine checkups, vaccinations, advanced diagnostics, and surgical procedures. We are committed to delivering the highest standard of veterinary medical expertise, with genuine kindness. 

What We Stand For:
 Transparent, integrity-led veterinary care.

 Empowering pet-parents through education.

 A calm, respectful experience — even during tough decisions.

 Giving back through community programs and animal welfare sponsorships.

Whether your pet is with us for a routine checkup or long-term care, you can expect the highest standard of medical expertise, delivered with genuine kindness.

 Based in Dubai.
 Visit www.amityvet.com |  info@amityvet.com

Name: ICAR-National Institute of Veterinary Epidemiology & Disease Informatics
Description: NIVEDI - National Institute Of Veterinary Epidemiology And Disease Informatics, has a long successful history of delivering predicted informatics and solutions for various animal diseases. The institute has been set up under the regulations of the Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR).

Name: Animalia Saúde Animal
Description:
Fundada em 2001 com a finalidade de atender clientes do mercado Pet, com produtos de qualidade, trabalhando com respeito e ética. 
Aperfeiçoando a cada dia nossas relações com clientes e colaboradores, para buscar uma melhora contínua de nossas relações comerciai

Name: NATIONAL OFFICE OF ANIMAL HEALTH LIMITED
Description:
NOAH is the trade association representing the UK animal health industry. We support our members’ businesses and ensure the sustainability of our sector by helping shape the regulatory, political and social climate.

We foster innovation and promote responsible use of our members’ products. Our vision is to be at the forefront of UK animal health and welfare, championing licensed medicines and solutions for all animals

Name: WAYZON Pharma
Description: WAYZON Pharma is a well-established Egyptian company specializing in marketing veterinary pharmaceuticals and related products. Our expertise is in selling and marketing high-quality animal health products.

Name: Revista Producción Animal
Description: Desde su fundación PRODUCCIÓN ANIMAL ha tenido un claro objetivo, difundir entre los profesionales del sector los últimos avances y conocimientos en todos los campos relacionados con la producción, la sanidad, etc..., en aquellas especies de interés ganadero.

Name: NationWide Laboratories
Description:
At NationWide Laboratories we believe good relationships are built on trust.

As an independent veterinary diagnostic laboratory, we are dedicated to the improvement of animal health through direct support of veterinary practices in the UK and Worldwide and have been delivering this service now for over 30 years.

We pride ourselves in being one of the UK’s leading veterinary diagnostic laboratories.

We offer a full range of veterinary diagnostic services.

We pride ourselves in providing a comprehensive service adhering to highest standards of quality and offering services and support in the most approachable and supportive manner.

Name: WellHaven Pet Health
Description:
Your Care Companion. 

WellHaven Pet Health helps veterinarians and their teams succeed both personally and professionally.  We value our owner veterinarians and encourage them to stay.  

Our focus on personal growth, practice support and life balance provide the framing of the relationship we want to have with our doctor leaders.  For those who wish to exit practice management, we support them with a smooth transition plan focused on both the owner and the hospital team.  

We provide leader doctors an opportunity to share in the rewards of practice ownership without the risks associated.  We are committed as servant leaders to ensure the success of our doctors, our hospital teams, and our profession.

Name: Bova UK
Description:
Register for new product notifications on the homepage of the website. 

Bova UK is a Specials Manufacturer dedicated to the veterinary market and is regulated by the Veterinary Medicines Directorate (VMD). It is the first in the UK to hold a ManSA (Manufacturer ‘Specials’ Authorisation) to manufacture sterile and non-sterile products for the veterinary market. 

Nicholas Bova founded the company in 2008, which specialised in this niche market in Australia - the largest of its kind nationally- and brings over ten years of its experience to the UK veterinary market.

Currently servicing the equine, small animal (dog and cat), and exotic markets, with plans for numerous formulation releases in 2019, 2020 and beyond.

Products attributes:

Urgent market shortages
Oral Pastes
Oral Suspensions
Transdermal Creams
Thermo-Reversible Gel
Synthetic Flavouring (no animal protein)
pH Friendly Formulations
Sterile Injectable
Ophthalmic Preparations
Chemotherapy & Cytotoxic Agents 
Tablets (soon to be released)
Capsules 
Products no longer on the market

The Synthetic Flavourings used at Bova UK does not contain animal protein and will increase in choice as the business grows. The flavours available, which are widely popular, include:

Molasses
Chicken
Grilled Chicken
Roast Chicken
Beef
Liver,beef, bacon

The well-established quality culture ensures that the business remains compliant with current Good Manufacturing Practices (cGMP) and Good laboratory practices (GLP).  Bova UK laboratories are fitted with specialty high-tech equipment in its world-class, brand new facility.  

All raw materials and finished products are tested against set standards as per ICH guidelines and the facility is due to open its newly built analytical laboratories to perform stability studies on new & existing products to monitor and improve product quality and patient safety.

Name: VETERIOS
Description:
Veterios es un Hospital Veterinario de Referencia de 1.750 m2 con Urgencias 24 horas en Madrid. Nos encontramos en: C/ Arrastaria, 23, junto al C.C Plenilunio (Zona noreste de Madrid).

El servicio de referencia del Hospital Veterios está dirigido por especialistas europeos formados en los mejores hospitales veterinarios de Europa, siguiendo las directrices del EBVS (European Board of Veterinary Specialisation).

Disponemos de:
· Salas de espera, consultas y hospitalizaciones independientes para perros y gatos
· Unidad de cuidados intensivos (UCI) 
· Laboratorio completo
· TAC de 32 cortes
· Resonancia magnética de alto campo
· 3 quirófanos
· Fisioterapia e hidroterapia
· Plazas de parking privadas
· Zona de paseo exterior para perros hospitalizados
· Aula de formación y conferencias

Name: Grupo Avante
Description:
O Grupo Avante é especializado na comercialização e distribuição de produtos veterinários há mais de 20 anos, sempre crescendo e se estruturando de forma consistente no mercado veterinário nacional.

Com seriedade e muito trabalho, criamos uma relação de confiança com os nossos clientes e fornecedores, selecionando os melhores produtos e firmando parcerias sólidas com os nossos colaboradores. Consolidamo-nos como uma empresa capaz de suprir o mercado com grandes volumes, excelência e um amplo portfólio para atender de forma personalizada e valorizando as marcas representadas, produtos distribuídos e todas as pessoas ligadas ao negócio.

Contamos hoje com uma equipe comercial, técnica e administrativa que faz toda a diferença no nosso desenvolvimento como empresa e que é constantemente desafiada a se aprimorar para atender às necessidades atuais do mercado.

Name: Canitas
Description:
Canitas es la seguridad social de las mascotas. Una nueva generación veterinaria que rompe con la forma con la que siempre se han tratado a las mascotas. Ponemos a los animales al mismo nivel que las personas dándoles acceso a todos los cuidados de salud que necesitan a un coste muy limitado. Queremos proteger a los animales dándoles atención, cuidado, cariño, prevención, profesionales especializados, los equipos más innovadores e instalaciones de calidad. Dándoles todo lo que se merecen por derecho.

Canitas no es un seguro médico, ni un plan de salud. Es un servicio integral y universal para la salud de tu mascota. Con una red de clínicas propias en pleno plan de expansión nacional e internacional y un gran equipo veterinario dedicados a su bienestar. 

Canitas, la seguridad de tu mascota

ÚNETE A NUESTRO EQUIPO! Descubre todas nuestras oportunidades de empleo y accede a las más de 15 vacantes que tenemos disponible en: https://empleo.canitasveterinaria.eu/jobs

Name: Vimar Animal Health
Description:
Vimar was founded in 1995 and is based in İstanbul in order to serve on “Animal Nutrition and Animal Health” issues. Even though our company’s main activity is poultry sector,  with the investments made in accordance to developing technology, we are also advancing with sure steps, both in livestock farming and fishery sectors.

Vimar has 2650 m2 closed area and between the years 2007 and 2008 has renewed its premix production facilities. In May 2009 heat controlled liquid vitamin and essential fat production units and in November 2009 drying installation with spray dry technology have founded. Vimar; which is based on harmony and continuity of continuous developing technology, in the year 2010, veterinary pharmaceutical’s production line has facilitated. Since its foundation, Vimar makes differences with the concept of its quality and it is been riveted by ISO 9001:2008 certificate and European Union GMP+ document.

Vimar; by its vast knowledges on animal nutrition and  animal health issues, wide product diversity, strong technical staffs, directs to Turkish Livestock Sector. Therefore, Vimar has rich product portfolio which can meet all kinds of pharmaceuticals and feed additives needs of its customers and has production capacity of customer specific formulations. 

Vimar; in its innovative and open to new developments quality control laboratory which is generated within its own structure, performs raw material, finished products and feed additives analyses. At Vimar’s R&D lab, in accordance of views and thoughts comes from its precious customers, new product forms been working and developing.
 
As Vimar, we are producing veterinary pharmaceuticals and feed additives at global standards. We are always going to be in service of sector, with contributing our precious customers about reaching to their targets.

Name: Coveli Indústria e Comércio
Description: A Coveli é pioneira na criação de produtos de higiene e medicamentos para animais de estimação. Há 50 anos a Coveli participa dessa troca de olhares entre veterinários e pacientes, desenvolvendo produtos que fortaleçam a relação de confiança que se estabelece a cada nova consulta.

Name: Duggan Veterinary Supplies
Description: Duggan Veterinary, was founded in 1987 with its principal aim of providing the veterinary and agricultural industry with premium, affordable products for use in treating animals, be they large or small(companion animal) . The Duggan Veterinary warehouse, a 16000 square foot warehouse, strategically and centrally located in Holycross, Co Tipperary ensures ease of access to our customer base who are more than welcome to visit and discuss their current product requirements. Uncompromising in our quest to be the premium distributor, Duggan Veterinary employs efficient and closely monitored order/ supply systems to ensure that the assembly of each order is to our customer's satisfaction..Our customers and supply partners rely on Duggan Veterinary to expeditiously and accurately fulfil orders and have the required products to their destination quickly and in the correct condition.. We take this responsibility very seriously. Our obligation to our partners is inextricably linked to a custom of 4 to 24-hour delivery from receipt of the order. We pride ourselves in offering tangible, unique, and exceptional service. By providing same-day order shipment, large stock levels, and technical support and remains number one in customer service. Duggan Veterinary sells only to licensed veterinarians, industry  and members of the trade in the pet and animal industry

Name: Fellowship of Animal Behaviour Clinicians (FABC or FAB Clinicians)
Description: FAB Clinicians represent independently accredited Clinical Animal Behaviourists and Veterinary Behaviourists and support those working towards independent accreditation. Our aim is to promote close links with the Veterinary profession, provide high quality CPD and help animal carers access the very best support.

Name: VetTrust
Description: VetTrust AG is the leading animal health group with over 40 locations. As a Swiss-based family business, we care for our well over 150,000 patients annually with professionalism, friendliness and passion. We offer succession solutions (complete practice/clinic takeovers (with and without continued employment) or just the takeover of the client base when a practice is closed) - We offer participation models (i.e. joint operation of a practice or clinic as a partner) - We offer support (e.g. As the largest employer in veterinary medicine, we offer very good employment conditions, a professional exchange with specialists, many further education and training options (including an online learning platform) and a great and motivated team. If you are interested, a confidential discussion is possible at any time.

Name: The Equine Hospital
Description: The Hospital offers advanced care for horses in a resourceful setting. Our board-certified specialists, dedicated and skilled vets and nurses work together to provide the best available emergency care, diagnostic procedures, treatment, and hospitalization for equine patients. We are open around-the-clock every day of the year for emergency and critical care cases. Routine and specialized health care services are readily available. Services are supported by up-to-date diagnostic imaging procedures, which include ultrasound, various types of endoscopy and and high-resolution radiography.

Name: Hospital Popular de Medicina Veterinária
Description:
Somos o primeiro Hospital Popular de Medicina Veterinária do país e nascemos com o objetivo de entregar alta qualidade em medicina veterinária a todas as camadas da população.
Contamos com uma equipe de profissionais altamente especializados e experientes, e seguimos os mais altos padrões de qualidade internacional. Nossas unidades oferecem consultas clínicas e de emergência, Raio-X, ultrassonografia, internação, centro cirúrgico completo, além de exames laboratoriais e atendimento com especialistas em oncologia, odontologia, ortopedia, dermatologia, nefrologia, cardiologia, oftalmologia, endocrinologia e neurologia.
Com mais 100 mil atendimentos já realizados, somos um time com 200 profissionais dedicados a garantir a saúde de nossos pets, em seis unidades na cidade, e com novos espaços para serem inaugurados em breve! 

Onde estamos?
Barra da Tijuca (24h), Campo Grande (24h), Del Castilho (24h), Realengo (24h), Tijuca (24h), Botafogo (24h), Senador Camará (12h). Em breve: Praça Seca, Ilha do Governador e Rocinha.

Venha nos conhecer!

Name: VETEX Laboratório Veterinário
Description:
Somos um grupo de laboratórios veterinários de análises clínicas. Com ampla experiência desde 2008, possuímos uma equipe de médicos veterinários com conhecimento nos diversos segmentos da patologia clínica.

Priorizamos a importância da interação entre a nossa equipe laboratorial e nossos clientes, portanto estamos prontamente disponíveis para atender e esclarecer dúvidas, visando à qualidade e confiança do diagnóstico na Medicina Veterinária.

Missão: Transformar a experiência dos clientes (médicos veterinários), através de um serviço de patologia clínica veterinária de excelência

Visão: Se tornar uma rede nacional de laboratórios veterinários de referência

Valores: Competência, parceria, suporte técnico, agilidade, ética, comprometimento, inovação

Name: Veterinary Innovation Podcast
Description: Veterinary Innovation Podcast is a podcast for veterinarians, veterinary owners, practice managers, nurses, and students. Veterinary technology entrepreneurs Shawn Wilkie and Dr. Ivan Zakharenkov chat with industry leaders and innovators about the biggest challenges they’re facing - and how they’re overcoming them.

Name: Covetrus Brasil
Description: Impulsionando a medicina veterinária no mundo com tecnologia, paixão pelos animais, respeito e confiança. Todos por você.

Name: Ergone
Description:
Créée en 2009, l’association Ergonε s’adresse à tous les vétérinaires praticiens. Son objectif est de fédérer et d’accompagner les praticiens soucieux d’entreprendre et de développer leur activité.

LES VALEURS D’ERGONE

*** Entreprendre : permettre aux vétérinaires d’avoir une vision de leur activité comme une entreprise.

*** Convaincre : la démarche entrepreneuriale est aujourd’hui la seule valable pour développer l’activité vétérinaire et la rentabilité.

*** Acquérir : des compétences pour améliorer l’efficacité, la qualité de vie et du travail dans son entreprise.

*** Développer : un projet professionnel grâce à l’accompagnement de l’association sur le développement des vétérinaires.

*** Echanger : avec d’autres vétérinaires sur l’activité du « nouveau vétérinaire chef d’entreprise » et des entreprises du même milieu.

*** Partager : apporter sa propre expérience et ses idées, apprendre au contact des autres, mettre en commun les expériences et les énergies.

*** Evoluer : s’ouvrir et se développer, avoir une approche transversale du monde vétérinaire, voir apparaître un réseau de contacts au sein de l’association.
Location: Les Herbiers, Pays de la Loire

Name: Vetbook

Vetbook is an organization founded by a group of vets who aim to serve vet field in Egypt in a way to prepare, direct & train vets for better future.

Vision:
"Vetbook" will be the leading talent channel for vets in Egypt.

Mission:
Our mission is to support veterinary career in Egypt through developing of talented calibers.

Name: VES Veterinary Hospital - Singapore
Description:
VES (Veterinary Emergency & Specialty) Hospital is Singapore’s largest multidisciplinary referral hospital with 24/7 emergency care. We are committed to delivering expert patient care with compassion, clear communication, and a collaborative approach with referring veterinarians. Our team provides a comprehensive range of specialty, medical, surgical, and critical care services, ensuring the highest standards of care for animals. 

Page subject to mars.com/legal & mars.com/privacy. Mars is not responsible for content or activity made available via 3rd party sites/services.

Name: TudoDVet
Description: Somos uma Franquia de farmácia de manipulação exclusivamente veterinária, com foco na pesquisa pelos melhores tratamentos. Oferecemos soluções para que a vida de cada pet seja mais saudável e feliz!

Name: IVSA Standing Committee on Veterinary Education (SCOVE)
Description: Founded in August 2014, the mission of the committee is to facilitate the distribution of knowledge to veterinary students throughout the world.

Name: MiDOG LLC
Description:
The MiDOG All-in-One Test is an infectious disease diagnostic tool that uses microbiome science to accurately determine the microbial culprits causing infectious diseases in animals.

MiDOG uses DNA-evidence to detect and quantify all bacterial and fungal pathogens in clinical samples from pets, along with antibiotic susceptibility information for more than 40 antibiotics. 

Therefore, the MiDOG All-in-One Test offers the most accurate diagnosis of infections in all pets, faster than culture and sensitivity and more comprehensive than PCR panels.

Name: Access VetMed
Description:
Access VetMed is the voice of the European industry of generic and added-value veterinary medicines. 

Our mission is to increase the ACCESS - availability, compliance, convenience, efficacy, safety, and savings - of veterinary medicines to veterinarians, and farm and companion animal owners in Europe. 

We interact with authorities and decision-makers, and other stakeholders in the EU to achieve sustainable animal health policies and legislation.

Access VetMed, formerly known as EGGVP, was founded in 2002 as a non-profit organisation based in Brussels.

Name: Vetoavenue
Description:
La mission de Vetoavenue? C’est d’accompagner les vétérinaires et les propriétaires à garder les animaux en bonne santé le plus longtemps et de la manière la plus responsable possible. 
Nos services aux structures vétérinaires canines et mixtes s’articulent autour de 3 axes : être visible, bien acheter, bien vendre, progresser et faire grandir
Être visible : vetoavenue élabore des outils de communication clefs en main pour les structures vétérinaires (print et digital) ainsi que des sites internet de présentation des structures avec plusieurs niveaux d’offres. 
Bien acheter : centrale pharmaceutique vétérinaire, nous accompagnons les structures dans leurs négociations médicaments, petfood et matériel. Au-delà du prix, éclairer nos clients sur la notion de responsabilité dans leurs achats sur l’origine des produits ainsi que sur d’autres critères fait partie de nos valeurs fortes pour aider les équipes vétérinaires à être plus responsable.
Bien vendre : grâce à notre outil vetoavenue.fr, les structures vétérinaires mettent à disposition de leurs clients bien plus qu’un simple click and collect. Vetoavenue.fr est un véritable outil de fidélisation client. Il est 100% interfacé avec quanti’croc, le logiciel de rationnement multimarques qui permet en 3 clics de faire une ration pour chaque patient afin de les garder en bonne santé le plus longtemps possible. 
Et notre dernier pilier, progresser et faire grandir nos clients vétérinaires mais aussi les propriétaires grâce à des formations et l’analyse de données permettant de suivre l’activité.
enfin a chaque nouvelle action , nous nous poserons toujours la question de savoir si cela aide l'animal?

Name: Awanui Veterinary
Description:
Local labs, supporting local vets, nationwide.

Awanui Veterinary (previously Gribbles Veterinary) is New Zealand’s leading provider of veterinary diagnostic testing and pathology services, with laboratories strategically located in Auckland, Palmerston North, Christchurch and Dunedin. Maintaining this national network enables us to provide a ‘local’ service for the country’s animal health professionals, focusing on the issues and challenges specific to each particular region in which we operate.

Our four laboratories are all IANZ (International Accreditation New Zealand) accredited, providing clients with the confidence that our technical competence is of the very highest standard. Furthermore, our Christchurch laboratory is accredited for compliance with the OECD standards of Good Laboratory Practice (GLP), and our Palmerston laboratory is accredited under the Ministry for Primary Industries' Recognised Laboratory Programme to perform serological and microbiological testing for live animal and germplasm export.

Awanui Veterinary is committed to providing innovative laboratory services and delivering service excellence to New Zealand's animal health professionals, and in doing so supports the health and well being of animals throughout the country.

Name: VETOR DISTRIBUIDORA
Description: Distribuidora de produtos farmacêuticos veterinários.

Description: Çelik Çesa Group, ülke hayvancılığına hizmet ve ekonomiye katkıda bulunmak amacıyla koruyucu hekimlik faaliyetlerini 2003'ten bugüne büyük bir gururla sürdürmektedir.

Name: Sheep Embryo - Reprodução Animal
Description: A Sheep Embryo - Reprodução Animal (Assistência Veterinária e Treinamentos) tem como objetivo aproximar técnicos e produtores rurais da pesquisa científica, beneficiando-os com as biotecnologias mais avançadas na área da reprodução animal.  Neste sentido um dos focos de nosso trabalho é a promoção de eventos, como cursos e palestras na área da bovinocultura e ovinocaprinocultura. Além disso, oferecemos serviços que abrangem desde o manejo reprodutivo geral até a produção in vitro de embriões de bovinos, ovinos e caprinos. Respaldando o nosso serviço está a pesquisa, através do vínculo dos membros desta empresa ao programa de pós-graduação da Universidade Estadual de Londrina.

Description:

Name: Agrosul Produtos Agropecuários Ltda
Description: Fundada em 1984, a AGROSUL é uma empresa especializada na Distribuição de Produtos Veterinários.

Name: Animal Medical Clinic
Description:
Our mission is to provide the highest quality in Veterinary Medical care in a friendly, relaxed setting. We hope you will refer your family and friends to our practice.

Name: Veterinary Clinic Jobs India
Description:
We realize that professionals like veterinarians running their own private clinics find it difficult to recruit team members like vets & paravets for their clinics. At the same time, young veterinary graduates in our country find it difficult to connect with private pet clinics when they are looking for jobs and experience. 

So, this place is about jobs in veterinary clinics or pet clinics across India, be it a veterinary doctor, veterinary radiologist, veterinary surgeon, veterinary assistant (Para vet), receptionist, etc. We aim to offer an easy solution for veterinary professionals as well as other staff seeking work at veterinary clinics and to act as a one-stop-solution for veterinary clinic jobs. 

We will post current vet clinic job opportunities from time to time available throughout India and those interested may apply. If you are looking for a veterinary clinic job anywhere in India, you may apply on the advertised job and also email your resume to us at jobsvetmaze@gmail.com for our records.  

This is a place for Veterinary and Pet Industry professionals to obtain career-related information. We will share best practices in personal and professional growth, industry information, news, and other areas related to your success. With our in-depth knowledge of the veterinary industry, we understand the needs & requirements of private clinics as well as young veterinary professionals and we aim to match these two as quickly as possible. 

Clinics can share their job requirements with us at jobsvetmaze@gmail.com and we will run a suitable campaign on social media to advertise their job to find the suitable candidate.

Name: IVC Evidensia DACH
Description:
IVC Evidensia ist die führende Tiermedizin-Gruppe in Europa mit aktuell 2.500 Kliniken/ Praxen in 20 Ländern. Zur IVC Evidensia-Gruppe im deutschsprachigen Raum DACH (Deutschland, Österreich & Schweiz) gehören aktuell mehr als 90 Kliniken und Praxen. 

Evidensia wurde 2012 in Schweden durch den Zusammenschluss der führenden schwedischen Tierkliniken gegründet und ist seitdem schnell gewachsen. Ende 2016 erfolgte der Zusammenschluss mit Independent Vetcare (IVC) in UK.

Jede unserer Kliniken und Praxen wird von Tierärzt*innen geleitet, eine hervorragende medizinische Betreuung der Patienten steht daher stets im Mittelpunkt unseres Handelns. Obwohl wir schnell wachsen, legen wir großen Wert auf eine persönliche Herangehensweise, sei es im Umgang mit unseren Kunden, im Austausch zwischen den Kliniken oder bei der Zusammenarbeit in den Teams vor Ort. Jede Praxis und Klinik bei IVC Evidensia hat ihre eigene Identität und trifft eigene Entscheidungen. Die Zugehörigkeit zu einer größeren, paneuropäischen Gemeinschaft ermöglicht den einzelnen Praxen und Kliniken, ihre Unabhängigkeit zu bewahren, die ihnen finanzielle und fachliche Unterstützung bietet. Neben der Ausstattung mit hochmodernem Equipment sowie der Unterstützung in finanziellen und buchhalterischen Belangen stehen die Ansprechpartner im zentralen Team mit Rat und Tat beispielsweise in den Bereichen Human Resources, Recruiting, IT, Marketing zur Seite. So können sich unsere Tierärzt*innen, AssistentInnen und Tiermedizinischen Fachangestellten auf das konzentrieren, was ihnen am meisten am Herzen liegt: die Gesundheit ihrer tierischen Patienten. 

Impressum: https://ivcevidensia.de/impressum/

Name: Irish Equine Centre
Description:
The Irish Equine Centre is an independent organization whose aim is to protect the wellbeing of Ireland’s horse population. We provide Ireland's widest range of laboratory services for the diagnosis, management and prevention of diseases of horses. 

The IEC was awarded Irish Veterinary, Agricultural and Commercial Laboratory of the Year in 2018 against stiff competition from the human and food science areas. 

We serve the overall interest of the Irish equine industry with our constant vigilance aimed at maintaining Ireland's "low disease status" and ensuring international recognition of the value of the Irish horse. 

To find out more about what we do, please visit our website www.irishequinecentre.ie.

Name: SeineVet
Description:
Equipe pluridisciplinaire constituée de 12 vétérinaires et 9 assistant-e-s, dédiée à la santé et au bien-être des animaux.

- Médecine & Chirurgie générale des Animaux de Compagnie 
- Médecine & Chirurgie générale des Animaux de Rente et équidés

SEINEVET est une entreprise indépendante 100 % vétérinaire multi filière, fortement implantée en région normande. Héritage d'une histoire de plus de 100 ans, SEINEVET s’est toujours adaptée aux enjeux de la profession et a gardé son ADN.

SEINEVET, c’est avant tout une équipe soudée autour de valeurs et d’une mission partagée.

Notre mission : Assurer les meilleurs soins pour la santé de vos animaux.

Notre devise : Soigner ensemble !

Nos valeurs : Engagement – Plaisir au travail – Excellence

2 sites : Boos & Rouen

Name: Texas Animal Health Commission (TAHC)
Description:
"Serving Texans by protecting the health of livestock, poultry and exotic livestock since 1893"

The Texas Animal Health Commission (TAHC), one of the oldest
state regulatory agencies, was founded in 1893 by the legislature with a
mission to combat the fever tick that plagued the Texas cattle industry.
Today, the agency protects the health and enhances the marketability of
all Texas livestock, exotic livestock and poultry, including:
• cattle
• swine
• poultry
• sheep & goats
• equine
• exotic fowl
• exotic livestock (exotic bovidae, cervidae and camlids)

The TAHC has legislative authority to regulate the prevention, control and/or eradication of specifi c contagious or infectious diseases in livestock and poultry. Th e TAHC staff also works to keep foreign and emerging animal diseases from becoming a major livestock and poultry health hazard.

 The TAHC headquarters are in Austin, Texas. Seven regional offi ces are strategically located across the state so that the TAHC staff can work closely with veterinarians, ranchers, livestock markets, slaughter plants and other livestock industry representatives. Because many of the state’s livestock and poultry health programs coincide with those required by the federal government, the TAHC staff members oft en work closely with personnel from the U.S. Department of Agriculture-Animal and Plant Health Inspection Service-Veterinary Services (USDA-APHIS-VS).

Name: Veteos
Description: Veteos is a video production company that works with veterinary practices throughout North America to create engaging videos used for marketing, client education, compliance, and staff recruitment. We also produce video content for other businesses within the vet industry – promoting their products and services. Each of our seven team members specialize in veterinary video production, and are Fear Free certified. Veteos has received eighteen NAVC Vetty marketing awards, including a “Judges Choice” award in 2018 and “Best in Show - Nonprofit” in both 2019 and 2020.

Name: Globanimal
Description:
GlobAnimal, Servicios Veterinarios, nace en el 2008 como una inquietud de un equipo de Médicos Veterinarios por satisfacer todas las carencias y necesidades de los dueños de mascotas y preocuparnos por el bienestar animal de ellos, con el fin de llevar una Clínica Veterinaria a su Domicilio, educar sobre la Tenencia Responsable de Mascotas y ofrecer un servicio integral en las diferentes áreas veterinarias. 

Para esto contamos con un equipo de Médicos Veterinarios capacitados y con todos los implementos para satisfacer sus necesidades y las de sus mascotas, entregando un servicio integral y de calidad. 

Hoy, contamos con convenios con Clínicas, Hospitales y Laboratorios Clínicos Veterinarios donde podemos trasladar a sus mascotas en la medida que se necesite una derivación a Médicos Veterinarios Especialistas en diferentes áreas o se requiera un servicio más complejo, como intervenciones quirúrgicas, hospitalizaciónes o análisis de muestras. 

De esta forma, GlobAnimal, logra satisfacer las comodidades de los propietarios, su tranquilidad y el bienestar animal de sus mascotas, ya que estamos convencidos de que así como sus mascotas necesitan del cuidado y cariño de sus dueños, tanto ellos como ustedes necesitan de un buen equipo veterinario como nosotros. 

Visión

Ser una empresa líder en el mercado de servicios veterinarios integrales, ayudando así a mejorar la calidad de vida de las mascotas y también las de sus propietarios.

Misión

Entregar servicios veterinarios integrales y de calidad a domicilio, a través, de profesionales capacitados, garantizando la confianza y satisfacción de nuestros pacientes y clientes.

Valores y Competencias

Responsabilidad 
Honestidad 
Excelencia en el servicio 
Trabajo en equipo 
Justicia 
Lealtad

Name: Neftys Pharma Group
Description:
Neftys Pharma is an international group dedicated to animal health.
With more than 35 years of know-how, Neftys Pharma is today one of the European leaders in veterinary distribution. The group is present in more than 12 countries around the world with 650 employees.

Name: Génia France

Fournisseur leader de matériel vétérinaire

Depuis plus de 70 ans, la société Génia est dotée d’une forte expérience et d’une implication quotidienne auprès des professionnels de la santé animale.

Name: Volition Veterinary
Description:
The Nu.Q Vet Cancer Test is an affordable, accessible and easy to use ELISA based screening blood test which can help streamline the diagnostic process for older (7 years and over) or “at risk” dogs (over the age of 4). 
Now available in more than 20 countries!

Earlier detection of cancer can not only help save lives, it can also improve the quality of life of the dog and more quality time with its owner.

Yet, as of today, unlike the human healthcare world where screening for certain cancers is commonplace, there are few cancer screening tests on the veterinary market.

Currently, dogs are typically diagnosed when they are unwell or there is a suspicion of cancer. Even then dogs suspected of having cancer are required to undergo a variety of diagnostic tests that may be expensive, time consuming, and painful for the animal.

We hope to change this with the introduction of the Nu.Q Vet Cancer Screening Test. A simple, cost effective, easy to use screening blood test to be used with the annual wellness check for older dogs (7 years and older). It may also be a complementary test for younger dogs (4 years and older) of breeds with an increased risk for developing cancer in their lifetimes.

This revolutionary product has been developed in collaboration with Texas A&M University and the results of key studies have been presented at the world’s leading veterinary oncology conferences and published in peer reviewed journals. 

To find out more, go to www.veterinary.volition.com, email AskNu.QVet@volition.com or speak to your veterinarian.

Volition Veterinary Diagnostics Development is a majority-owned subsidiary of VolitionRx Limited (VNRX). For more information go to: www.volition.com

Name: NVMA (Nigerian Veterinary Medical Association)
Description:
The NVMA is a professional body committed to advancing the education, science and art of Veterinary Medicine and Production through advocacy, promotion of ethical standard and collaboration with other professionals. The NVMA is committed to best practices for upliftment of life through ethical professional animal health services.

The NVMA is an affiliate of the World Veterinary Association and a member of the Association of Professional Bodies of Nigeria.

Amacron Technologies is dedicated to supplying and continuing to develop the most advanced equine nutritional supplements - making sure that the products we sell give the best possible results on your horse, always using the latest research and skill available.
We also supply a range of Horse Care & Stable products including rubber matting for stables. 
We offer overnight delivery service on most of our products, this means that you will receive any product in stock into any major centre - Australia wide - the next business day.

Name: CardioVet Veterinary Clinic
Description:
Providing quality veterinary care. We work hard to maintain a friendly, comfortable environment and will always prioritize your pet’s individual needs. Our personalized medical solutions are aimed at treating your pet from nose to tail, helping them live long, happy, healthy lives.
Our veterinary team takes their job seriously and will never waiver when your pet is in need. We will take the time to educate you as a pet owner so you can rest easier that your pet is well taken care of inside and outside our clinic.

Name: Clinique Vétérinaire Alvetia
Description:
La Clinique Vétérinaire Alvetia à Thionville, anciennement Clinique Vétérinaire MELLINGER-THOMAS-DISS (fondée en 1998 par les Drs Roger Mellinger et Louis Thomas) s’est agrandie en 2012 et de nouveau en 2016 et possède désormais une surface de 600 m² où tout est mis en œuvre pour soigner au mieux nos compagnons.

L'activité canine pure de la clinique est généraliste avec notre clientèle propre mais une activité en référé (chirurgie, médecine interne, imagerie médicale, NAC) s'est développé ces dernières années grâce à un partenariat de confiance avec de nombreux vétérinaires mosellans mais également belges et luxembourgeois.

Name: VetBizz
Description:
A VetBizz Consulting é uma empresa em Portugal dedicada exclusivamente à consultoria para Centros de Atendimento Médico-Veterinários (CAMV), com o objetivo de impulsionar os seus negócios.

Certificada pela norma de Qualidade ISO 9001 pela SGS, a VetBizz Consulting foi reconhecida como uma das 38 melhores empresas de Consultoria de Gestão em Portugal pela prestigiada Daily Finance, do Reino Unido.

Fundada formalmente no início de 2012, a equipa da VetBizz Consulting já possuía vários anos de experiência na prestação de consultoria a CAMV. Com uma vasta especialização em Marketing e Estratégia, aprofundou o seu conhecimento sobre o setor veterinário e hoje está plenamente capacitada para responder às necessidades mais exigentes dos CAMV.

Atuando nas áreas de Marketing, Finanças, Recursos Humanos e Gestão Estratégica, a VetBizz Consulting dispõe dos recursos humanos e tecnológicos necessários para identificar oportunidades de melhoria e apresentar soluções que gerem valor concreto para os CAMV.

Para os CAMV, a oportunidade chama-se VetBizz Consulting.

Name: CityU Veterinary Medical Centre
Description:
CityU VMC recognize that pets are part of the family. We have committed our professional careers to the importance of the human-animal bond by providing the very best medical care for the pets of Hong Kong. Through our three services, we provide passionate care for the full spectrum of veterinary pet care needs, whether it is the well patient visit, an emergency condition or a complex condition requiring specialists.

CityU VMC manages an extensive small animal clientele in Hong Kong. With our multicultural professional veterinarian and support staff, we are committed to uphold the highest medical standards and provide exceptional care for pets by our Primary Care, 24/7 Emergency & Critical Care and Specialty Services including Internal Medicine, Neurology, Dermatology, Cardiology, Surgery, Oncology and Anesthesiology.

We have recently opened the largest small animal medical centre in Hong Kong with over 35,000 sq ft which include 22 consultation rooms, a first-of-a-kind in Hong Kong intensive care unit for animals, a cardiology suite, 7 surgical theatre suites, pharmacy and equipped with diagnosis and treatment, including 64-slice CT scanner, MRI system. digital radiography, ultrasound, colour doppler echocardiography, intra-operative fluoroscopy and endoscopy.

Name: Monte Real Distribuidora
Description:
A Monte Real surgiu em 1999 na cidade de Marília, objetivando se solidificar no mercado de distribuição de produtos veterinários no interior do estado de São Paulo.

Em 2011, depois de se firmar em cidades das regiões de Marília, Bauru, Presidente Prudente, Araçatuba e São José do Rio Preto, ampliou sua área de atuação para as regiões de Ribeirão Preto, Franca e São Carlos.

Hoje, a Distribuidora Monte Real está presente em cidades dos estados de São Paulo e Paraná, atuando na comercialização e distribuição de medicamentos veterinários para agropecuárias, pet shops e clínicas veterinárias.

Com uma ampla linha de produtos para cuidar, prolongar e melhorar a vida de animais de companhia e produção, trabalhamos com:

• Os melhores laboratórios
• Equipe qualificada
• Entrega rápida e eficiente

Name: VetSnap
Description:
VetSnap provides a simple, secure, and innovative solution that helps veterinary practices manage controlled substances.

We built VetSnap for veterinary practices so that they can easily stay up to date with their controlled substance records. Integrated with the most common practices management systems, VetSnap saves practices time and improves accuracy, making compliance a snap! All records, including modifications are permanently retained, readily retrievable, and DEA compliant.    

Founded in 2020, VetSnap’s co-founders have 20+ combined years of serving veterinary hospitals and 30+ years in software R&D.

Name: EICKEMEYER Canada
Description:

Name: Pet Corner UAE
Description:
We started a pet corner when we realized the importance of our little furry friends in our lives- whether emotionally, for physical assistance, or for peace of mind. The store opened it's gates in the early 2004, endeavoring to create a piece of heaven on earth for the little companions. 

The idea of helping humans humanize their relationships with their pets struck us soon after. Our platform expanded it's services- the right kind of aid to the human-borker relationship, through food, bedding, spa days and everything else that could make your little one (your pet, not your kid) feel like a million bucks. Our services are some of the most world-class experiences and are yet to be parallelled by someone new.
We didn't just jump in because pups are cute- we studied the market for years, understood the co-dependency, the psychology of both the parties, and the economics to create a system that was most beneficial, yet, sustainable. 
Because of our personalized service, we were also awarded for our instrumental role in the industry by Dubai Municipality.

Name: Vetzco

Com a Vetzco, não só estamos ajudando os tutores a encontrar ajuda para seus animais de estimação, mas também estamos valorizando e promovendo o trabalho essencial dos veterinários.

Name: Peninsula Humane Society & SPCA

Name: Pennard Vets
Description:
The core of Pennard Vets is to provide progressive pet care and a workplace where the team can thrive.

We believe that every pet deserves the right care, in the right way, at the right time and in a sustainable way 

Our aim is to combine intuition and innovation to deliver the very best personalised veterinary care.

Name: SmartDx
Description: SmartDx is focused on the development and commercialization of direct-to-consumer genetic testing predictive assessments for cardiac and cancerous diseases in canines. We believe that direct-to-consumer screening for such diseases will soon become one of the pillars of modern personalized veterinary medicine because such high-quality disease risk predictions can allow for early and directly relevant preventative care and monitoring of at-risk canines. These assessments can be initiated by the pet owner, breeder, or veterinarian with a simple mouth swab. Our proprietary bioinformatics and machine learning algorithms provide fast conversion of sequenced samples to a binary format and highly accurate/sensitive disease risk prediction.

Name: ICBAS/UP - Institute for the Biomedical Sciences Abel Salazar / Porto University

Apresentação
ICBAS – Escola de Saúde e de Ciências da Vida 
O Instituto de Ciências Biomédicas de Abel Salazar, doravante designado por ICBAS, é uma unidade orgânica da Universidade do Porto com estrutura de escola universitária e centro de ensino, investigação científica, cultura e prestação de serviços à comunidade.

Os domínios científicos do ICBAS situam-se no âmbito da Biologia Fundamental e Aplicada, nomeadamente nas áreas da Saúde, e do Ambiente, da Produção Animal, Transformação e processamento Alimentar e do Controlo de Qualidade.

Assim, essencialmente tecnológicas ou tecnoprofissionais, as formações do ICBAS privilegiam a preparação para o exercício profissional da medicina humana, da medicina veterinária, das ciências do meio aquático, da bioquímica e da bioengenharia, ou oferecem especialização de 2º e 3º ciclos nessas em áreas e outras relacionadas. A preparação dos estudantes requer professores altamente qualificados e profissionalmente exigentes, pelo que o ICBAS trabalha, em estreita colaboração, com estruturas associadas, como o Centro Hospitalar do Porto (Hospital Geral de Santo António), Hospital Magalhães Lemos, Instituto Português de Oncologia (IPO), Hospital Joaquim Urbano, Centro Hospitalar de Vila Nova de Gaia, o Instituto de Ciências Agrárias de Vairão (ICAV), o Instituto de Investigação das Pescas e do Mar (IPIMAR), o Instituto de Biologia Molecular e Celular (IBMC), o Instituto de Patologia e Imunologia Molecular (IPATIMUP), o Centro Interdisciplinar de Investigação Marinha e Ambiental (CIIMAR), a Estação Litoral da Aguda (ELA) e ainda as Faculdades de Ciências e de Engenharia da U. Name: PetCure Oncology
Description:
PetCure Oncology supports a national network of veterinary cancer care centers that specialize in the delivery of stereotactic radiation (SRS/SRT). Already proven successful in human medicine, SRS/SRT is an advanced form of radiation therapy that is delivered non-surgically with the intent to cure the cancer, resulting in minimal side effects.


PetCure Oncology has affiliated locations in 8 cities in the United States:
• Arizona Veterinary Oncology (AVO) in Phoenix, Arizona
• Veterinary Radiosurgery & Imaging Center (VRIC) in Clifton, New Jersey
• Lakeshore Veterinary Specialists (LVS) in Milwaukee, Wisconsin
• Pittsburgh Veterinary Specialty and Emergency Center (PVSEC) in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania
• SAGE Centers for Veterinary Specialty and Emergency Care (SAGE) in San Jose, California
• Southeast Veterinary Oncology and Internal Medicine (SEVO-Med) in Jacksonville, Florida
• Sugar Land Veterinary Specialists (SLVS) in Houston, Texas
• NorthStar VETS in Robbinsville, New Jersey
• Thrive Pet Healthcare Specialists, Mansfield, Texas
• Thrive Pet Healthcare Specialists, Hoffman Estates, Illinois 

PetCure Oncology has a Scientific Advisory Board (SAB) made up of board-certified human and veterinary oncologists as well as experts in medical physics. They are tasked with continually studying outcomes data to refine care protocols that deliver the best possible results for pet patients—and peace of mind for their owners. PetCure Oncology is the first to establish standards equivalent to those required in the delivery of human radiation therapy – ensuring exceptionally high-quality care at our centers. The goal is to provide personalized, concierge-level service to families who seek care at a PetCure Oncology center, making the experience as stress-free as possible.

Name: Alke Sağlık Ürünleri
Description:
ALKE Sağlık Ürünleri San. ve Tic. A.Ş. veteriner sağlık ürünleri üretimi, ithalatı ve ihracatı amacıyla  1995 yılında Alke ilaç San. ve Tic. Ltd. Şti adıyla İstanbul’da kurulmuştur.

     1996- 2002 yılları arasında veteriner ilaçların ruhsatlandırılması sonucunda ithalatı ve çeşitli üretim tesislerinde fason üretimleri gerçekleştirilmiştir. 2001 yılında İstanbulda kendi üretim tesisini kurmuş ve 2001 – 2010 yılları arasında kendi bünyesindeki Ar-Ge laboratuarınca geliştirilen ilaç ve hayvan sağlığına yönelik dezenfektan ve antiseptik ürünleri İstanbul üretim tesislerinde GMP standartlarında üreterek pazara  sunmuştur. Bu süreçte 80’in üzerinde veteriner ilacı ruhsatlandırılarak pazara sunulmuştur. Ülkemiz hayvancılık endüstrisinde dürüst ve kaliteli hizmet vermeyi ilke edinmiş olan Alke her zaman daha iyiye ulaşmayı hedeflemiş, klasik ilaç firması anlayışında yeni  açılımlar şekillendirerek hayvancılık sektöründe kalıcı olmayı hedeflemiştir.

    Artan kapasite ve Pazar talebini karşılamak için 2010 yılı itibarıyla üretim potansiyelini genişletmek ve dış pazarlara açılmayı hedefleyen Alke Tokat ili Organize Sanayi bölgesinde 16000 m2 alanda, 4 üretim tesisi binalarından oluşan yeni tesisini kurma çalışmalarına başlamıştır.  2011 yılı Nisan ayı itibarıyla yeni üretim tesislerinde üretime başlamış olup, yeni ürün gruplarının Alke portföyünde yer alması için çalışmalarına devam etmektedir.

Name: IMV Technologies Brasil
Description:
O grupo IMV Technologies é o líder mundial em tecnologias reprodutivas. Com atividades nos setores humano e veterinário, a IMV Technologies oferece soluções completas para inseminação artificial, transferência de embriões, OPU, análise de sêmen, banco biológico e ultrassom.

A IMV foi fundada em 1963 por Robert Cassou, inventor da “palheta francesa” e fundador do primeiro centro francês de inseminação artificial para gado em 1946. O grupo, baseado em L'Aigle, França, está distribuído em mais de 120 países e estabeleceu subsidiárias nos Estados Unidos, Índia, China, Itália, Holanda, Rússia, Escócia, Irlanda, Espanha, Bélgica e Brasil.

Há mais de 60 anos, a IMV Technologies fornece aos clientes treinamento, suporte e produtos e serviços de alta qualidade para se tornar líder em tecnologias de reprodução animal. 

Com um orçamento de P&D líder do setor e com as contribuições dos clientes, a IMV Technologies continua a desenvolver produtos inovadores para criação de animais em todo o mundo.

Mainly focusing on intestinal health; to contribute to healthy food production and public health by providing solutions for the prevention and protection of animal health, prevention of antibiotic resistance with less antibiotic use, and reduction of the incidence of food pathogens within the framework of the “One Health” concept; to reach biological boundaries with maximum production performance, to force these limits and to increase the productivity continuously by supporting animal health in this race. This forms the vision of NutriMOORE.

From this point of view, to provide innovative and environmentally friendly solutions to the industry by developing innovative products for animal health and public health by remaining focused mainly on intestinal health; to sustain general animal health and to make them resistant to changes, while reaching and extending biological boundaries in the ongoing race on production performance; to support the industry in the direction of technical knowledge and experience with result oriented technical services (TEKNİK360, GutTECH and NutriBlog); with the target “healthy intestine = healthy animal = healthy people” to protect and improve the health of animals and public are part of our missions.

Description: IAPWA (International Aid for the Protection & Welfare of Animals) is a UK registered charity dedicated to creating a better future for animals in need through our worldwide projects and campaigns.

Name: European Association of Zoo and Wildlife Veterinarians (EAZWV)
Description: The European Association of Zoo and Wildlife Veterinarians aims to promote the advancement and dissemination of veterinary knowledge and skill in the field of zoo and wild animal management and in so doing advance the health, welfare, husbandry and conservation of wild animals, whilst upholding the highest standards of professional ethics and contributing to comradeship amongst its Members.

Name: The Wildlife Aid Foundation
Description: The Wildlife Aid Foundation is dedicated to the rescue, care and rehabilitation of sick, injured and orphaned wild animals. Our dedicated aim is to return every patient to the wild once they have recovered. The Foundation’s work was the focus of the popular TV series Wildlife SOS on Discovery Channel’s ‘Animal Planet‘ and has now moved onto the worldwide platform of YouTube. The founder of the Foundation is the environmental broadcaster and campaigner Simon Cowell MBE.

Name: Somaticell
Description:
Somos uma empresa inovadora que nasceu com o propósito de desenvolver soluções únicas para a qualidade de produtos lácteos e prevenção de doenças pecuárias, impulsionando resultados e minimizando perdas em um mercado global guiado pela produtividade.

Criada em 1999 após vários anos de pesquisas do Idealizador da BD Pharma. A motivação da pesquisa foi uma vontade de desenvolver uma metodologia melhor, mais barata e mais eficiente para a avaliação de células somáticas.

O produto foi avaliado na Clínica do Leite da ESALQ-USP, e mostrou que os
resultados obtidos na análise laboratorial são muito semelhantes aos encontrados com o método de contagem eletrônica de células somáticas, que mostra o grau de confiabilidade que este produto transmite para o produtor e o consumidor.

Temos métodos destinados a fornecer uma análise de campo em tempo real da qualidade do leite de vaca e ausência de contaminação de qualquer tipo, através da mensuração da quantidade de células somáticas no leite sem a necessidade de quaisquer cálculos, análises laboratoriais com altos custos ou fórmulas complicadas para se chegar no resultado.

Name: LIBANVET

From its humble origin as a pharmacy, Libanvet has emerged as a trailblazing corporation with a workforce of over 65 dedicated professionals. Through our consultancy services, we guide clients towards modern techniques and foster invaluable networking opportunities.

At Sudvet, we are committed to sustainable production and believe that the use of natural products is fundamental to achieving it. Our solutions are designed to work in harmony with animals’ natural systems, minimizing environmental impact and promoting animal health and well-being.

Save Time – Rhapsody helps you find what you need, when you need it, quickly, so you can spend more time with your patients and clients. Have multiple locations? Rhapsody is cloud-based and lets you easily set up and manage 1 hospital or 1,000 with one simple log-in.

La santé des animaux de compagnie est notre priorité : nous avons opté pour un agencement favorisant des soins de qualité ainsi qu’une bonne surveillance des pensionnaires hospitalisés et/ou opérés. 

Notre devise : "Evolia, des animaux et des hommes". 

Domaines de référés proposés au sein de la clinique : 

Cancérologie, ophtalmologie, neurochirurgie, orthopédie, médecine interne, dermatologie, reproduction, physiothérapie, cardiologie, dentisterie. 

En plus de ces domaines, nous proposons un laboratoire d’analyses, de l’imagerie médicale et de la médecine préventive.  

Suivez-nous pour ne rater aucune de nos actualités et nos offres d’emplois !

Name: Deutsche Veterinärmedizinische Gesellschaft (DVG)
Description:
Die Deutsche Veterinärmedizinische Gesellschaft (DVG) ist die wissenschaftliche Gesellschaft der Veterinärmedizin. Tierärzte/innen aus Hochschulen, Praxis, Industrie, Behörden, Ministerien und Forschungsinstituten finden sich in 41 Fachgruppen sowie in speziellen Arbeitskreisen/Ausschüssen unter dem Dach der DVG zusammen. Gegründet 1951, ist die DVG die älteste Organisation der Veterinärmedizin in der Bundesrepublik. Die DVG verwaltet mehrere Stiftungen und verleiht Forschungspreise an herausragende Wissenschaftler.

Ihr findet uns auch auf Facebook und Instagram. 

Datenschutzerklärung: https://www.dvg.de/datenschutzerklaerung/
Impressum: https://www.dvg.de/impressum/

Name: IGUSOL
Description:
Igusol is a company focused on the development of natural products for animal nutrition with a strong innovative and technological component, which guarantees safety and profitability. 
Our mission is to generate strategies which optimize animal productive values, focusing on specific problems resolution in a natural way and improving the final product. 
Current market trends in animal health progress, an increase in the demand of natural components and the necessity of distinction of our clients have been key factors in our evolution. 
Igusol has supported internationalization since its foundation. Besides our headquarters in Spain, we sell our products in more than 35 countries all over the world, with the goal of giving direct support to our clients.

Name: Veterinary Osteoarthritis Alliance
Description: The Veterinary Osteoarthritis Alliance (VOA) was formed in 2016 to provide a resource utilising a body of multidisciplinary professionals to facilitate, support and assist the veterinary profession to manage osteoarthritis (OA) from point of diagnosis to end of life care. Our main effort is the provision of seminars throughout the UK that provide theoretical and practical training, giving access to the latest research, evidence, technologies and associates involved in the care of the canine patient with osteoarthritis.

Name: Evidensia Eläinlääkäripalvelut Oy
Description:
Evidensia Eläinlääkäripalvelut on Suomen suurin eläinlääkäripalveluiden verkosto, jossa työskentelee 1500 eläinlääkinnän ammattilaista 49 eläinlääkäriasemalla ja eläinsairaalassa yli 30 paikkakunnalla Helsingistä Rovaniemelle. 

Hoidamme koiria, kissoja ja eksoottisia eläimiä. Monipuolisena ja valtakunnallisena eläinlääkäreiden ja hoitajien verkostona meillä on mahdollisuus olla lemmikkien ja omistajien apuna niin arjessa kuin hädän hetkellä. Päivystävät eläinsairaalamme Tammistossa, Hattulassa ja Raisiossa ovat lemmikkien ja omistajien apuna ympäri vuorokauden, vuoden jokaisena päivänä.

Evidensia on osa eurooppalaista IVC-konsernia. Tarjoamamme eläinlääkäripalvelut perustuvat suomalaiseen huippuosaamiseen.

Eläinten hoidon ammattilainen, tule meille töihin! Katso avoimet työpaikat tai jätä avoin hakemus: www.evidensia.fi/avoimet-tyopaikat/

Name: Ordre des médecins vétérinaires du Québec
Description:
L’Ordre des médecins vétérinaires du Québec encadre la pratique des médecins vétérinaires du Québec.

Mandat
Le mandat de l’Ordre des médecins vétérinaires du Québec est d’assurer la protection du public. À cette fin, il surveille l’exercice de la profession et favorise l’actualisation et le développement des compétences des médecins vétérinaires pour garantir des soins et des services de qualité.


Mission 
L’Ordre veille à promouvoir et à favoriser l’implantation des meilleures pratiques en médecine vétérinaire au Québec. Pour ce faire, il assure le développement professionnel des médecins vétérinaires au Québec, encadre et surveille l’exercice et assure le respect de normes élevées de pratique et d’éthique professionnelle afin de contribuer pleinement à la santé et au bien-être des animaux et à la santé publique.

Name: MAS

Name: CPD Solutions
Description:
CPD Solutions helps dedicated professionals get better at what they do, through Continuing Professional Development. Vets, Veterinary Nurses and Physiotherapists develop their skills and update their clinical knowledge through our attendance and online learning formats. Our main areas of expertise are in providing the highest quality practical training for vets and vet nurses, and in facilitating fully flexible quality online learning. We have several innovative online formats to help professionals complete their CPD / CE in their own time and on any device.

Webinar Club gives vets and vet nurses fully flexible online learning all year round. There's a huge archive of quality webinars, with new content added on a regular basis. Choose Small Animal Practice Club for the full range of topics, or the focused Orthopaedic, Neurology, Emergency and Critical Care or Exotics Clubs. Combine any three Clubs of your choice in a VIP Membership for an unrivalled learning experience. Vet Nurses have their own dedicated Webinar Club.

For subject-specific online learning vets and VNs can choose a fully flexible Online Mini Series Course. These provide 8 Hours of CPD/ CE towards your annual totals, with unlimited access for 12 months - watch again whenever you have a relevant patient. 

For an immersive, interactive online learning experience and 25 Hours of CPD / CE, choose an Advance25 course for vets or an Advance15 course for vet nurses (15 Hours of CPD/ CE). Ask all the questions you like and get the help you need. 

Combine online learning with practical hands-on attendance sessions with our innovative PgCert Programme for vets. PgCerts can be completed in just 12 months,, they are primarily practical in format and fully in keeping with the RCVS focus on outcomes-based CPD and reflective learning. All of our PgCert programmes can be used as part of your route to Advanced Practitioner status. 

Call us now on 0151 328 0444 for help with your Veterinary CPD / CE.

Name: Genoa Biotechnology

Veterinary medical equipment is what we are all about, it is our passion, it is our love and it is what we do best. At Jorgensen Laboratories, we are widely recognized for our extensive selection of veterinary medical supplies, innovate values and superior service. Todo o mercado pet se encontra aqui, você não pode ficar de fora deste evento. Faça já o seu credenciamento e organize sua viagem caso seja de outra região. Confira nossos parceiros de hospedagem e transporte. Esperamos vocês!

Name: Vidium Animal Health
Description:
By informing veterinarians and pet parents about which mutations are causing their pet’s cancer to grow and spread, we intend to open up the use of precision medicine to combat canine cancer in new and more effective ways.

Vidium is dedicated to unravelling the genetic components of common and complex diseases, including cancer. As a result, the practice of medicine targeting these conditions can be more rational, more precise and more personal. Our focus is on shifting paradigms in cancer treatment to enable cures for cancer and other serious diseases in pets through programs at the intersection of personalized medicine and comparative genomics.

Name: AnimEd Solutions
Description:
Educated pet owners are the key to healthy pets.

With the wealth of information available on the internet, it can be difficult for pet lovers to distinguish between reliable information and that which may be false, out-of-date, or misleading. As a result, not only is overall pet health suffering, but so are the veterinarians who are now in competition with "Dr. Google" to convince clients of best health practices for their pets.

AnimEd Solutions is the first organization dedicated to public education to improve animal health & well-being AND to provide critical support to the veterinary profession.

AnimEd Solutions is the only global digital veterinary content provider that meets the need for 100% vet-validated client educational support. 
•	We have created over 500 videos of live interviews with vet specialists who speak to pet owners using accessible language, and over 200 articles validated by an independent veterinary scientific committee.
•	As the Gold Standard in pet health information, we replace Dr. Google and empower pet owners, vets, and vet techs.
•	We help pet owners understand and accept the vet’s recommendations.
•	We are consulted by vets & vet techs, and pet owners.

Our unique educational services arm pet owners with practical tools and guidance on best practices for working together with their veterinarian to establish a health & wellness program best adapted to their individual pet.

Veterinarians enjoy an increased quality of communication and collaboration with well-informed pet owners as well as the support of a quality-guaranteed source of information to which they can refer their clients.

Name: People for Animals Agra
Description:
People For Animals Agra (in short PFA Agra) is an animal welfare organisation that spearheads a popular movement for respecting all life on this earth and is a small but crucial part of India's growing environment awareness. PFA Agra is the Agra chapter of the Animals welfare NGO started by India’s popular animal activist Ms.Maneka Gandhi.
PFA Agra has been in operation since 1998 and has, since then, come a long distance from its humble beginnings. In the initial days we had no staff, no premises and no resources. The only thing that we did have was our love for animals and a desire to help them in their suffering. We aimed to create a safe haven for these poor souls, where they could live in peace without fear of cruelty. From treating animals on the roadside, we have reached a stage where we run a full-fledged animal hospital which was completed in July 2003.

Name: AFVAC - GEN (Groupe d'Etude en Neurologie)
Description:
Groupe d'étude de Neurologie de l'AFVAC
