Name: EMMSAR Veterinary Medical Diagnostic Services (EVMEDS)
Description:
EVMEDS as simply called is an organization founded by an experienced veterinarian to provide solution to paucity of data on animal disease incidence in Nigeria and neighbouring countries. It is also to incorporate technology into veterinary practice. We offer 5 main services
- Diagnostics
- Product promotion
- Project management
- Veterinary consultancy and
- Animal health services
We are located in Nigeria and we use our online presence to provide medical intervention to our animal owners across the country

Name: VOSM (Veterinary Orthopedic & Sports Medicine)
Description:
Veterinary Orthopedic & Sports Medicine Group (VOSM) is a small animal sub-specialty veterinary clinic based in central Maryland. Our services focus on veterinary orthopedic surgery, rehabilitation therapy, regenerative medicine, neurology, and canine sports medicine. 

Our board certified specialists and surgeons are trained in the most advanced, minimally invasive procedures and treatment options.

Our referral base spans the mid-Atlantic region and we routinely receive national and international surgical referrals. The majority of our caseload is derived from canine athletes and working dogs.
 
VOSM maintains excellent relationships with other specialty/referral practices and universities along the East Coast and often acts as a tertiary referral source for the most advanced and challenging orthopedic cases. We are known as the provider-of-choice for veterinarians seeking orthopedic treatment for their own pets in the mid-Atlantic region.

Our practitioners often lecture at both national and international industry conferences and commonly hold educational seminars for other veterinary professionals and dog owners. We are actively engaged in research projects with prestigious university collaborators.

Name: TW Medical Veterinary Supply
Description:
TW Medical specializes in meeting the unique needs of veterinarians, universities, research facilities, zoos, and the armed forces.  

TW Medical carries a comprehensive line of over 8,500 products from more than 165 leading manufacturers of  pharmaceuticals, surgical supplies and equipment.

Name: A.G.E.S.V.E.T. Grupo Gestión de A.V.E.P.A.
Description:
Nuestro grupo trabaja con el objetivo de tener centros veterinarios más rentables, modernos, más cercanos al cliente, sin perder la premisa de mejorar la salud y bienestar de los animales de compañía y de sus propietarios.

Ya no te sentirás desbordado y solo dirigiendo tu centro veterinario, podrás compartir tus dudas e inquietudes con otros compañeros en tu misma situación.

Y con la mejor formación científica y humana, como viene haciendo AVEPA desde su fundación en 1964.

Name: S.P. VETERINARIA ES
Description: S.P. Veterinaria is a pharmaceutical company, dedicated to the development, manufacturing, control and marketing of veterinary products. Originally established as a family business, S.P. Veterinaria expanded, over more than 50 years, towards an experienced organization focussed on animal health and welfare, however pursuing the concept of "One Health” for animals, humans and the environment. The extensive vademecum covers veterinary pharmaceuticals and nutritional supplements, meeting the requirements of different species and upcoming challenges.

Name: ANTECH Asia
Description:
As world-class leaders in veterinary diagnostics, technology and imaging, ANTECH partners daily with thousands of veterinary professionals to support better animal health outcomes. Our comprehensive diagnostics portfolio creates the confidence veterinary professionals need to make better care decisions day-in, day-out. We make it faster and easier to screen, diagnose, and monitor disease when our partners and their patients need it most. 
Because smarter diagnostics solutions lead to better care.

Name: Louisville Family Animal Hospital
Description:
At Louisville Family Animal Hospital our philosophy, Caring For Your Pets From Birth Through Life, is more than a statement. It is how we approach the needs of the companion animals that enrich and bring joy to our lives.

In veterinary medicine there are continuous and rapid changes. Not only in equipment and technology, but also in medical care technique and case management. Despite of all this, we realize the most important part of pet care is that you are comfortable and confident with how you and your pets are treated.

Name: VSSCo Veterinary Surgeons Supply Co. Ltd
Description: Veterinary Surgeon Supply Co. Ltd was established in 1956 to provide customer focused and innovative solutions, to veterinary practices throughout Ireland, to achieve our shared goal of improving animal health and welfare, whilst ensuring we achieve our mutual business goals.

Name: ConVet - Consorcio Veterinario
Description: Desde 2001, comprometidos con la salud animal. Contamos con el respaldo de los mejores laboratorios nacionales e internacionales, ofreciendo productos de calidad y servicio profesional. Hoy somos ConVet, la primera cadena de farmacias veterinarias más grande del Perú.

Name: J.A.K Marketing Limited
Description:
Founded in 1995, J.A.K Marketing Limited quickly established itself as a leading supplier of equipment and instrumentation to the U.K. veterinary sector. We supply private and corporate practice, veterinary wholesalers, universities and animal health charities. Drawing on many years of experience within this market, we are ideally positioned to offer advice as well as a wide range of products.

Included in our portfolio of over 5,000 products is our Purfect range of products which include AnaeSorber – our waste gas adsorber, Paw Covers, Disposable Drapes, Infusion products, Scales, Surgical Instruments, Clippers, Examination Tables, ProCare and AniWrap range of post operative care and much more.

J.A.K Marketing develops and manufactures many own-labelled products and we are proud to offer products from an extensive number of leading manufacturers.

We have an in-house Service Centre where our trained engineers are able to maintain a wide range of equipment including Infusion Pumps, Clippers, Scales,
Microscopes, Centrifuges, Dental machines, and more. We also offer a Clipper Blade Sharpening service using the most up to date machinery.

Name: Massachusetts Veterinary Medical Association (MVMA)
Description:
The voice of veterinary medicine in Massachusetts. Advocating for the profession, proving excellence in CE, and fostering community among our members.

The MVMA exists for the advancement and protection of the veterinary medical profession in Massachusetts by promoting the betterment of animal health and well-being, enhancing the human-animal bond, safeguarding public health, supporting legislative advocacy and providing excellence in continuing education.

The MVMA seeks to:
* promote excellence and fellowship amongst its members;
* enlighten the public as it relates to the practice and science of veterinary medicine;
* promote the highest standards of veterinary medicine through continuing educate in all fields of veterinary medicine; and
* encourage professional zeal amongst its members and seek protection of the professional rights and privileges of veterinarians.

Name: Homeo-Vita
Description:
A Homeo-Vita conta com laboratório de pesquisa próprio e uma equipe altamente qualificada, o que resulta na qualidade e nos resultados comprovados de seus medicamentos – sempre guiando-se por meio de pesquisas e pela satisfação de seus clientes.

Dirigido pelo professor Dr. Ranulfo Piau Júnior – uma das maiores autoridades do Brasil no assunto –, o laboratório da Homeo-Vita é referência nacional em pesquisa e desenvolvimento de medicamentos homeopáticos para animais.

Defendida por diversas autoridades do segmento no Brasil e no mundo, a Homeopatia Animal se apresenta como uma solução eficiente para a economia e a qualidade da produção. Oferece soluções preventivas e livres de substâncias químicas que comprometem as propriedades fundamentais da carne e do leite, tornando o produto final ainda mais seguro para o consumidor.

Name: Hospital Veterinário de São Bento
Description:

Diagnóstico médico-veterinário especializado

Name: Joii Pet Care
Description:
All of our pets create moments of Joii in our lives, so we're here to help you care for them whenever they need looking after. The Joii app puts professional pet care into the palm of your hand by allowing you to speak to a vet or vet nurse 24/7.
1 in 3 pet owners choose not to go to the vet when their pet is suffering because of the cost, at Joii we are putting this right by making pet care accessible and affordable for every pet owner on the planet. Our mission is to improve the lives of pets, pet owners and vets.
You can download the app here to speak to the Joii team about your pet's health:

Google Play - https://qoo.ly/36x758

Apple App Store - https://apps.apple.com/gb/app/joii-pet-care/id1436958921

At Joii, we want you to receive the best advice possible, that's why we don't provide medical advice via social media comments or messages but are more than happy to provide this via a free video call on the app with a vet nurse.

The Joii Pet Care app is complementary to all cat and dog policy holders with Animal Friends Insurance. Pet owners can access free video calls with vet nurses and vets and paid for access to behavioural consultants, and products including prescription medication, that can be delivered within 48hours.

Name: UNION PROFESSIONNELLE VETERINAIRE
Description: UNION PROFESSIONNELLE VETERINAIRE is a company based out of 11 Rue des Frères-Grisleins, Nivelles, Belgium. Our duty is to represent, defend and promote veterinary medicine in Belgium for french speaking vets, in Wallonie and Bruxelles. Our integrated approach make it possible for every side of veterinary medicine from large animals to companion animals, experts and industry vets to be represented. We are also active members of the Federation of European Vets (FVE)

Name: National Animal Handling & Husbandry
Description:
Australia's most experienced suppliers of Remote Drug Delivery Systems, and Animal Handling & Capture equipment. 
Supplying equipment to Councils, Government Departments, Farmers, Zoos, Researchers and National Park Rangers.

Name: Zabeel Veterinary Hospital
Description: Welcome to Zabeel Veterinary Hospital where we are committed to providing excellent veterinary care to any animal that comes through our door. The team taking care of you and your animals has been carefully selected to ensure that a high-quality service is provided to all our customers. We have the latest equipment, including MRI and CT scanners, to ensure your pet receives the best diagnosis and care possible. Customer Satisfaction is extremely vital to Zabeel Veterinary Hospital Management whether the client is coming for a simple grooming or a serious surgery for their beloved animal. Management speaks on behalf of the entire team when we say that we are looking forward to providing your pets with the care and attention they deserve.

Name: American College of Veterinary Radiology (ACVR)
Description: The American College of Veterinary Radiology (ACVR) is a member-driven, not-for-profit organization consisting of over 800 accredited veterinary radiologists and radiation oncologists.  The college was founded in 1961 by veterinarians committed to advancing veterinary diagnostic imaging  for the benefit of animal health.  Members undergo rigorous post-graduate (after veterinary college) training in a three or four-year residency program, followed by a comprehensive examination. The ACVR is one of 22 veterinary specialties recognized by the American Board of Veterinary Specialties (ABVS) of the American Veterinary Medical Association (AVMA).

Name: Cimex
Description:
A Cimex trabalha com as empresas líderes mundiais em soluções para o mercado veterinário. Formada por uma equipe de colaboradores multidisciplinar, prestamos assessoria nas diversas áreas que compõem a decisão de investimento de nossos clientes. Oferecemos soluções personalizadas, estudando a rotina dos médicos veterinários e seus desejos e necessidades. Colocamos à sua disposição ferramentas atuais e dinâmicas que contam com tecnologia de última geração. 


Investindo na formação acadêmica e no conhecimento, contribuímos com a formação de profissionais por meio de participação em cursos e eventos científicos. Incentivamos também a adoção de pesquisa em instituições de ensino público/privado e a troca de informações entre nossos clientes.

Name: CatsOnly Veterinary Services
Description:
CatsOnly isn’t just here to build clinics, we’re here to lead a shift. One that makes feline-first care expected, respected, and replicated across the profession. We center the Cat in everything we do and design care and experience around the Cat and Caregiver bond. We act with intention so every visit feels safe, kind, and clinically excellent. The CatsOnly philosophy is a species-specific, emotionally intelligent, bond-centered model of veterinary care. We have reimagined every touchpoint from environment to communication, from clinical delivery to industry alignment through the eyes of both the Cat and the Caregiver, as a team. Grounded in science, behavior, and human emotion our philosophy defines a new standard in feline care.

Our Mission
Rooted in our reverence for Cats, we’re building a nationwide network of feline-only hospitals to set a new global standard for compassionate, species-specific care — transforming how Cats are seen, served, and valued, and making feline-first medicine expected, respected, and replicated across the profession.

Name: Biobest Laboratories Ltd
Description:
Biobest is a specialist veterinary virology, serology and DNA diagnostics business. Our strength derives from our expertise in virology and molecular biology, allowing us to design and validate our own assays, all compliant with Good Laboratory Practice. This in turn enables us to provide laboratory procedures with an unmatched combination of quality, service and price

Biobest has been trading since 1995, with purpose built facilities near Edinburgh including cell culture, virus culture, serology, molecular biology and high security laboratories. We have allied strong academic and technical experience with commercial enthusiasm to be able to offer our customers a unique blend of quality in virology and genetics with excellent service.

Hasvet A.Ş. olarak bugüne kadar medikal, yazılım, cerrahi alanlarında veteriner hekimlerimizin yanında olarak mesleki gelişimlerine katkıda bulunduk.

"RANROSH HEALTH CARE" We Are ISO 9001:2015,  HACCP & GMP Certified Facility Seeking Top Reputation In The Animal Healthcare Products Market Worldwide.We Are The Pioneer Manufacturing Group Of Quality Veterinary Products. We Manufacture: - Herbal Feed Supplements, Growth Promoters, Disease Resistant’s, Immune Boosters, Herbal Medicines, Enzymes Blends, Prebiotics, Probiotics: Lactobacillus, Dry Active Yeast (Blends Of Prebiotics, Probiotics And Active Dried Yeast) And Feed Additives Of Vitamins, Trace Minerals, Acidifiers, Toxin Binders, Swine Products, Natural Choline Chloride, Herbal Lysine, Natural Lysine, Chelated Oral Calcium, Chelated Mineral Mixtures, Mastitis In Cattle, Herbal Wounds Spray, Respiratory Product, Weaning Diarrhea, Liver Booster Tonic, Pet Shampoos Which Are Essential For The Growth And Productivity Of Livestock, Poultry, Pets And Aqua.

Name: VetMotl, Inc.
Description:
About Us:

VetMotl, Inc. (www.vetmotl.com), established in December 2022, is commercializing first-of-their-kind VetMotl Sperm Separation Devices for use in veterinary assisted reproductive technology (ART) procedures. VetMotl devices are derived from the core technology inherent in ZyMōt Sperm Separation Devices, which have been used in more than 1,000 human fertility clinics worldwide for over 10 years, demonstrating time-proven, consistent performance in approximately 1 million clinical cases to date. 

We are a Germantown, Maryland, USA-based and globally recognized company who pioneered this innovative, game-changing laboratory tool for preparing high-quality, highly-motile sperm samples for veterinary assisted reproduction.

VetMotl devices have been proven to deliver increased efficiencies in blast development and viable implantable embryos in equine and bovine fertility procedures, with demonstrated effectiveness in other animal species as well (e.g., small ruminants (ovine, caprine), porcine). VetMotl devices provide considerable time savings and performance improvements when compared to traditional sperm sample preparation methods.

Name: Peterson Smith Equine Hospital + Complete Care
Description:
Peterson Smith is a state-of-the-art, full-service, 24/7 equine hospital located in Ocala, Florida, the state's horse country. Established over 30 years ago by Dr. John L. Peterson and Dr. Johnny Mac Smith, it has grown into one of the largest and most highly recognized equine practices in the United States. Services provided range from single patient management to large farm consultations, offering continuing education opportunities for both veterinarians and horse owners. 

Peterson Smith also founded the Advanced Fertility Center. The Advanced Fertility Center (AFC) conducts all aspects of assisted reproduction at its 91-acre facility in Summerfield, Florida.

Name: Solutia Vet&Pet
Description: Solutia Vet&Pet is deeply committed to enhancing the overall well-being of companion animals and their dedicated caregivers. At the forefront of innovation, we specialize in formulating premium products that set new standards in pet and veterinary care. Through our specialized divisions of PetCare and VetCare, we strive to deliver comprehensive solutions that address the diverse and evolving needs of animals. Our mission is to promote the health, happiness, and longevity of pets while supporting the expertise and dedication of veterinary professionals.

Name: Evidensia Referral & Emergency Animal Hospital - Hart van Brabant
Description: Referral and Emergency Animal Hospital in the region of Waalwijk

Name: Antelligence
Description:
Antelligence delivers the information animal health professionals need—when they need it most. We provide timely, comprehensive and expertly curated news and insights to help stakeholders across the animal health ecosystem make well-informed, strategic decisions.

Our flagship publications—The Fountain Report, Pet Care Weekly and Veterinary Student Insider—are the premier U.S.-based newsletters serving veterinarians, pet retailers, veterinary students, technicians, distributors, manufacturers and more. With a weekly reach of over 32,000 unique readers, we combine trusted journalism with actionable intelligence from leaders across the industry.

Antelligence also offers dynamic training programs designed to support professionals at every stage of their careers. The Foundations Training Program delivers a comprehensive orientation for new professionals entering the industry, while Understanding the DNA of the Veterinary Practice helps both new and experienced professionals gain a deeper understanding of how companion animal practices operate.

We are also the creators of the Enterprise Practice Database (EPD)—a powerful, web-based platform that provides unmatched visibility into every enterprise-owned veterinary practice location in the United States. EPD actively tracks more than 115 enterprise groups and over 10,000 locations across the country. It delivers structured, decision-ready insights that support strategic efforts across corporate planning, acquisition targeting, competitor intelligence and market expansion.

Antelligence is led by co-founder and Managing Partner Chris Kelly, the founder and former CEO of Vet-Advantage Magazine. He is supported by a team of respected industry leaders, including Chris Ragland, CEO of Animalytix; Steve Kirton, CEO of Circa Healthcare; Candise Goodwin, a pharmacy and pet retail expert; and David Thill, an experienced reporter and content director for all Antelligence publications.

Name: AWAKE Djursjukhus
Description:
AWAKE Djursjukhus – Veterinary Specialists, Scandinavia's first dedicated emergency and specialty small animal hospital, was established in 2021. Open 24/7, we're committed to transforming veterinary care. Our team provides specialist and emergency services, ensuring top-notch care for our patients and support for veterinary clinics across Sweden with complex cases. 

As an employee-owned animal hospital, we stand out in an industry largely governed by venture capitalists. We believe in investing in our employees and our service rather than maximizing the return for external stakeholders.

Through our NGO branch AWAKE Outreach we make a difference for animals and humans world wide

Name: Nuproxa EMEA
Description:
Nuproxa is a Swiss group founded in 2007, specializing in providing high-quality solutions for the Animal Nutrition and Health industry.

The Nuproxa Group identifies metabolites found in nature, researches, and combines them into smart nutritional blends to offer effective solutions for the animal feed industry. The company is committed to ensuring the efficacy of its products, focusing on optimizing performance and profitability for its clients in the sector.

Nuproxa strictly adheres to FAMI-QS certification standards, guaranteeing the integrity and reliability of its solutions, which strengthens customer trust in the brand. With a presence in over 35 countries across Latin America, Europe, and Africa, Nuproxa is dedicated to its business partners, product research and development, and, most importantly, its customers.

Join us in driving innovation and excellence in Animal Nutrition and Health. Follow Nuproxa to stay updated on our latest breakthroughs and discover how our smart solutions can elevate your business. Let's grow together!

www.nuproxa.ch

Name: Latinx Veterinary Medical Association
Description:
Mission: To empower Latinx professionals in Veterinary Medicine and support the next generation of Latinx veterinarians in the United States and Canada.

Our mission will be guided by LVMA’s four Pillars of Empowerment: Mentorship, Scholarship, Outreach, and Professional Development. 

Vision: To help create a veterinary community that is representative of our society in order to make veterinary care more accessible to the Latinx community. 
~
Misión: Empoderar a los profesionales Latinx en la Medicina Veterinaria y apoyar a la próxima generación de veterinarios Latinx en los Estados Unidos y Canadá.

Nuestra misión se guiará por los cuatro pilares de empoderamiento de LVMA: tutoría, becas, alcance comunitario y desarrollo profesional.

Visión: ayudar a crear una comunidad veterinaria que sea representativa de nuestra sociedad para hacer que la atención veterinaria sea más accesible para la comunidad Latinx.

Name: Petabyte Technology
Description: Petabyte Technology provides a veterinary management solution that emphasizes practice productivity and exceptional patient care. Cloud-based software gives veterinary practitioners greater understanding and control over their business.

Name: Association des Médecins Vétérinaires du Québec en pratique des petits animaux (AMVQ)
Description:
MISSION: L'AMVQ a pour mission de soutenir et de représenter ses membres. En voyant au développement professionnel et à la promotion des intérêts des membres, elle favorise la qualité de la médecine vétérinaire. Elle contribue aussi à One Health.

VISION: L'Association des médecins vétérinaires du Québec en pratique des petits animaux (AMVQ) est la référence incontournable en médecine vétérinaire des petits animaux au Québec. Elle fait preuve de leadership et représente les vétérinaires québécois. Elle fait la promotion de la santé et du bien-être animal, dans le but d'assurer des soins optimaux pour les animaux et ainsi contribuer à la santé humaine. Elle favorise l'accomplissement personnel et professionnel des médecins vétérinaires québécois. L'AMVQ s'adapte aux préoccupations de ses membres et innove constamment pour répondre aux nouveaux défis propres à la pratique de la profession.

L’Association des médecins vétérinaires du Québec en pratique des petits animaux est une organisation qui travaille pour offrir les meilleurs services à ses membres... mais à qui s’adressent ces services?
 
Les médecins vétérinaires pratiquant dans le domaine des animaux de compagnie partout au Québec peuvent rejoindre les rangs de l’AMVQ. 
 
Parmi ses membres, l’AMVQ regroupe des médecins vétérinaires généralistes, des médecins vétérinaires spécialistes, des professeurs, des cliniciens et des étudiants en médecine vétérinaire. C'est près de 1300 vétérinaires et futurs vétérinaires qui sont membres de notre association.

Name: KVP International
Description:
Manufacturer of Veterinary Supplies and Marketing Specialists in the Veterinary Community.

KVP is the veterinary industry leader in small animal wellness solutions, specializing in rehabilitation and recovery, surgical, patient care, behavior, and now renewables. Headquartered in McKinney, Texas KVP has several manufacturing facilities in Mexico and China, globally sources raw materials, and regularly ships to customers in more than 25 countries.

Founded in 1964, KVP entered the veterinary marketplace with the introduction of its Saf-T-Shield Elizabethan Collar. Widely praised by veterinarians and their technicians as innovative, highly effective and a great value, the Saf-T-Shield collar set the standard for each and every KVP product that would follow. More than 50 years later, KVP offers the world’s largest selection of recovery collars — from mice to mastiffs.

Our product line doesn’t stop there. We have the world’s largest selection of recovery collars, quality surgical supplies and effective patient care products. KVP proudly carries the full KONG catalog including the veterinary-exclusive KONG Blue.
Talk to your distributor and ask for KVP.

We're not a typical partner. We invest in the success of our customers, offer award-winning marketing value-add services, best-in-show customer service, and transparent business practices.

Better Products. Better Service. Better Together.
KVP Intl, The Better Pet Care Company.

Name: Synovetin OA
Description: We are a dedicated team of animal health professionals with a passion for solving the challenges of managing chronic pain in companion animals.  We are harnessing the power of the novel radiotherapeutic Synovetin OA (tin-117m) to treat canine elbow arthritis.  Synovetin OA targets inflammatory macrophages in the synovium and synovial fluid to break the cycle of inflammation and provide very long-lasting relief and improved mobility. Synovetin OA is administered in a minimally-invasive, outpatient procedure, convenient for the pet, pet parent and veterinary professional.

Verum Pet Service,  Il Primo Servizio di Nutrizione per Animali Domestici.

Dall'amore per il nostro fedele Amico è nato Verum, il Primo Servizio di Nutrizione pensato e studiato su misura per il tuo Cane .

Ingredienti freschi, pronto da somministrare :  Verum Non è il Solito Cibo per Cani e Gatti, è fresco e composto da ingredienti naturali di stagione come verdure (piselli, carote e patate), carne (manzo, maiale e pecora) e molti altri.

Description:
A APet é um plano de saúde e assistência para cães e gatos, com 11 anos de atividade, que atua no modelo livre escolha e com uma rede parceira de mais de 1,6 mil clínicas, entre outros diferencias, como tele consulta pet, tag de localização, clube de vantagens, etc.

Tem como propósito, Garantir acesso à saúde e cuidados de qualidade aos Pets.

Visite nosso site: www.apetsaude.com.br
Visite nosso instagram: apetsaude

Name: Veterinary Parasitology (ParasiteVet)
Description: Parasitology of dogs, cats, horses, reptiles, birds, small mammals and zoo animals.

Name: Bionet America Animal Health
Description: Our Veterinary Specific Multiparameter Monitors encapsulate over 20 years of our intricate research, development, and design dedicated to serve Veterinarians around the globe.

Name: Veterinary Anesthesia Nerds
Description: The Veterinary Anesthesia Nerds group provides expert education and resources to veterinary clinics, helping them enhance their knowledge and practices in anesthesia and pain management to improve patient care and outcomes.

Name: whiskerDocs
Description: whiskerDocs currently serves over 6 million pets and their pet parents in the United States and Canada with 24/7 access to veterinary expertise via phone, email, live chat and mobile messaging.  It's founders have deep roots in providing multi-channel tele-health and wellness services, as well as additional expertise in delivering quality telephonic disease and condition management, wellness, and patient advocacy services. The importance of the relationship between pets parents and their primary veterinarian is a core foundation of the whiskerDocs protocol driven pet support services.

Name: Baltimore Animal Rescue and Care Shelter (BARCS)
Description: The Baltimore Animal Rescue and Care Shelter (BARCS) is the largest companion animal shelter in Maryland and the only open-admission shelter in Baltimore City. BARCS takes in more than 10,000 animals yearly—including dogs, cats, small companion animals, wildlife, farm animals and exotics. BARCS serves as a resource to the community for citizens and their animals in need. In just a few years, BARCS significantly increased the number of animals saved from 2% in 2005 (under Animal Control) to over 90% dogs and cats saved in 2019. The shelter’s services include: providing housing and lifesaving care to homeless animals, public education and outreach, tracking lost and found pets, offering low cost vaccinations and microchip clinics, pet licensing, and the Trap, Neuter and Return (TNR) of community cats. In addition to the aforementioned services, BARCS provides families and individuals the opportunity to adopt loving companion animals and save lives. As Maryland’s largest open admission shelter, BARCS does not turn away any animal in need of shelter, food and a loving touch. BARCS grants refuge to every abandoned, neglected, abused, lost or surrendered animal that comes through our door.

Name: CVCA Cardiac Care for Pets
Description:
CVCA Cardiac Care for Pets is the leading veterinary cardiology practice in the country, with locations nationwide. We pride ourselves on our co-managed care and a model that walks the client through the process to ease their anxiety -- and their pet's. 

Meanwhile, we foster our employees' growth with industry-leading compensation, a 4-day workweek, and a culture that puts you first. 

Imagine your best life in the veterinary field with CVCA.

Name: Hospital Veterinário Verlengia
Description:
O nosso hospital oferece serviços completos, atendendo tanto os casos de emergências, como os casos menos urgentes: clínicos, cirúrgicos e odontológicos. Além dos cuidados de primeiros socorros, nós oferecemos também, um ambiente confortável, amigável e calmo; assim seu pet de estimação pode relaxar na sala de espera, enquanto aguarda para conhecer a nossa equipe. Se você nos procurar para uma cirurgia veterinária ou um tratamento clínico veterinário, você será recebido por um de nossos Representantes de Atendimento aos Clientes.

Depois você verá um dos nossos experientes médicos veterinários, que fará um exame completo e explicará as necessidades médicas do seu pet de estimação. Nesse momento, você será solicitado a autorizar o procedimento para o qual seu pet está agendado e também terá a oportunidade de esclarecer suas dúvidas. Com um simples telefonema você terá acesso direto às pessoas que estão cuidando do seu pet de estimação enquanto ele estiver em nosso hospital veterinário.

Name: International Animal Care
Description: International Animal Care is founded for the aim of bettering the lifestyle of pet ownership, to be the most trusted and respected pet care provider in Saudi.

Name: Veterinary Specialty Center
Description: Veterinary Specialty Center is guided by the belief that companion animals deserve state-of-the-art medical care in a kind and comforting environment. The courage of our patients, the loyalty of their human families, and the devotion of our referral veterinarians inspire our vision. It is sustained by the contributions of our compassionate, knowledgeable and dedicated staff and built upon a strong tradition of providing unsurpassed healthcare for animals.

Name: Distribuidora Playpet Domus
Description:
Distribuidora Playpet Domus: 
Idealizada pela necessidade de distribuição com o foco no seguimento pet. Desde outubro de 2012 atuando focado no atendimento de excelência ao cliente, petshop, clínica veterinária e Banho e Tosa de São Paulo. 

Atualmente, distribuímos as marcas: - Avert - PadariaPet - Nutribiótica - Bubbles - Vetoquinol - PetSensations - Accuvet - Homeopet - Botupharma.

Conheça a Distribuidora Playpet Domus. @playpetdomus"

Name: The Bridge Club
Description: The Bridge Club is a critical conversation company initiating meaningful conversations to elevate veterinary medicine. We strongly believe thoughtful discussions lead to realistic outcomes of the issues and topics affecting the veterinary profession. Our mission is to connect, engage and grow veterinary medicine and the services provided.

Name: Flourish Veterinary Consulting
Description:
Inspired by a vision of a world in which all veterinary professionals feel fulfilled at the
end of each day of work, we created Flourish Veterinary Consulting LLC.
Our purpose is to revolutionize the veterinary field by promoting self-sustaining,
flourishing work environments one hospital at a time. We do this by increasing the
well-being of individuals, teams, and hospitals through the use of positive
psychology and other evidence-based tools.

Name: VetFamily Danmark
Description: VetFamily er en frivillig dyrlægekæde, som bidrager til positiv kvalitetsudvikling. VetFamily har kontinuerligt satset på aktiv støtte og support til sine nu 95 medlemshospitaler og-klinikker samt innovativ forretningsudvikling for dyreejerne og deres kæledyrs bedste.

Name: Stansted Veterinary Specialists
Description:
We are a new veterinary referral clinic, that has recently started construction.

We will be offering specialist led, high quality care in a purpose built facility, working with vets across London, East and South-East England.

We are independent, owned by the people working in the clinic every day, who we believe are best placed to make decisions about the care of pets and running of the clinic.

We look forward to sharing more information with you over the coming months as we progress towards our launch!

Name: Total Vet Distribuidora
Description: Nossa área de atuação vem crescendo cada dia mais, junto com nossos parceiros/fornecedores. Atendemos 85% do território paranaense disponibilizando nossos serviços e mais de 900 produtos para 337 municípios, com exceção de Curitiba e região metropolitana, com oito marcas exclusivas, que abrangem diferentes áreas do mercado pet: banho e tosa, clínica, pet shop, lojas agropecuárias, mercado alimentício, etc.

Name: VET BUS
Description: A number of veterinarians aim to help and improve people's awareness. We do not limit ourselves to a specific category because science and learning are for everyone

Name: BattLab - Batt Laboratories Ltd
Description: Batt Laboratories Ltd has been established to provide veterinary surgeons with a personal high-quality diagnostic laboratory service to help them make accurate assessments of their patients from disease to optimal health. To do this, we offer not only a comprehensive portfolio of routine clinical pathology investigations but also a novel panel of gastroenterology, genetics, infectious disease and allergy services.

Name: VeterinaryCareers.com.au
Description:
VeterinaryCareers.com.au is a site dedicated to matching veterinarians to a wide variety of interesting and rewarding job opportunities. The Directors of veterinarycareers.com.au are each experienced in different sectors of public veterinary practice and have a good understanding of world trade, domestic biosecurity and food safety. We are keen and ready to work with veterinarians seeking job roles (including consultancies) and with employers seeking the right person for the role.

Our service is free for veterinarians looking for work – you can simply create a profile, save your resume and send through any job applications via the site (and your profile will record all your applications).

Our rate is very reasonably priced for advertisers - please go to our page and create a login and an advertisement to get a great deal today!

Name: Practice Sales Advisors
Description:
Practice Sales Advisors is a Veterinary Practice Brokerage Firm, and your trusted source for facilitating National Veterinary Practice Sales, Valuations, Associate Buy-Ins, Corporate Sales, and Buyer-Representation. Uniquely offering personalized service from industry expert, Rebecca Robinson Davis, M&AMI, CEPA, MCBI, PSA offers vast experience with strategic transitions & a track record of satisfied clients. 
 
At Practice Sales Advisors we know it's not about us; it's about you, your needs and your expectations. Buying or selling a veterinary practice is likely to be the most important personal and financial decision of your life. 

Even though we are here to make the process easier & less stressful by lending our expertise & guidance, you are still in control and ultimately make the decisions. We understand the confidentiality, complexity and emotional nature of this transaction. It is important to us that you remain informed and an integral part of the process. 

We keep a pulse on the market through effective marketing strategies and industry networking. We're ready for action the minute we come across a prospect that might be a good fit to purchase your practice. Our national services are offered with a personal agent and one central office. You'll always reach an individual agent and will never speak with an automated service. Creative solutions and custom structures are what we do best. It avoids frustration and saves time and money. Just like you have spent years perfecting your profession, we have done the same. 

This is not just a business transaction to us. It is the embarkation to a new chapter of your life, and that is why Practice Sales Advisors offers the unique service of free follow-up valuations to all PSA buyers. We want our buyers to excel and will assist with financing and business consulting. Our services don't end with the sale. We hope that you will continue to keep us involved in your business and find that we are an invaluable resource.

Name: Click to Vet
Description: Our mission: πρόσβαση σε κτηνιατρική υποστήριξη για όλα τα ζωάκια 24/7.

Name: IntroVet
Description:
WELCOME TO INTROVET (formerly Lone Star Vet Academy)
IntroVet offers RACE-approved CE programs for veterinary professionals who are dissatisfied with the typical loud and crowded conferences. In person, webinar, and On Demand veterinary CE for all veterinary professionals.

Name: Demarc
Description: A DEMARC empresa fundada em 1993, desde então vem aprimorando suas atividades de distribuição de medicamentos veterinários, medicamentos humanos, correlatos, alimentos extrusados e afins. Hoje a DEMARC é reconhecida nos setores atuantes como uma empresa parceira do cliente, em seu portifólio de produtos a DEMARC atua em todos seguimentos do setor veterinário: Hospitais Veterinários, Clinicas Veterinárias, Faculdades, Universidades, Distribuidores, Pet Shop, Banho e Tosa, Aviculturas, Agropecuárias, Cooperativas etc. Visando estar sempre próximo ao cliente a DEMARC vem se mantendo atualizada junto ao mercado, investindo em tecnologia na força de vendas, Internet, TeleVendas, Mídias sociais, Palestras técnicas e muito mais...

global veterinary services and agriculture
