Description: Animoscope propose des services de télémédecine vétérinaire aux propriétaires d’animaux de compagnie. Nous développons des solutions de conseils vétérinaires digitaux et des plans de préventions personnalisés adaptés à la santé animale.

Name: Rekaz Veterinary Company
Description: Veterinary pharmaceutical and food additives products

Name: Passionimo
Description:
Passionimo is a network of veterinary establishments created and managed in Quebec. The network includes a service center and more than 30 veterinary establishments. The members of the network all have in common the well-being of animals and the desire to offer the best services and advice to their clients.

In the Passionimo family, we share the love that unites a human being and his companion. The human-animal valorization is our daily mission.

At Passionimo, we are committed to making a difference:

- We collaborate, because together we go further
- We are professional in our knowledge and know-how
- We create value
- We are socially and environmentally responsible
- And we are passionate, of course!

Name: Vets for Climate Action
Description: We inspire the veterinary industry to advocate for and achieve climate action within and beyond our industry. This will benefit both our industry and the animals we care for, ensuring a sustainable future for all.

Name: Small Animal Teaching Hospital, University of Liverpool
Description: We are a multidisciplinary referral hospital for small animals, providing specialist veterinary services to veterinary surgeons and their clients. We are a multifaceted centre, providing a continuous output of clinical research and facilitating clinical teaching of veterinary undergraduates of the University of Liverpool.

Name: Harrison Family Vets
Description:
Harrison Family Vets are a family owned, independent group of brand-new practices providing pet health care that is second to none. When we decided to put Family in our name, we not only meant it from the perspective of being family owned, but in that the pets we treat become a part of our family, as are our team members. 

Due to continued growth and expansion, we're always on the look out for fantastic people to join our work family! Get in touch with Annabel Harrison annabelh@harrisonfamilyvets.co.uk to find out more!

Name: Onlinepethealth
Description: Staying up to date with your Vet Rehab professional development just got easier. Join our vibrant Vetrehabber community with a growing library of resources and support for all skill levels delivered by a broad range of international experts.

Name: Evidensia Referral & Emergency Animal Hospital - Barendrecht
Description: Referral and Emergency Animal Hospital in the region of Barendrecht

Name: Friendship Hospital for Animals
Description:
Friendship Hospital for Animals provides high-quality, compassionate veterinary care to the cats and dogs of the Washington DC metro area. We have been accredited by the American Animal Hospital Association (AAHA) for over 50 years. To best meet the needs of our clients and patients, we are open 24 hours a day, every day, all year long.

Whether your companion is a puppy or a kitten, an adult or a senior, our dedicated veterinarians and team members will provide you with a wellness care program custom-tailored to your animal’s needs. We also offer state-of-the-art referral services and have more than fifty full-time doctors on staff providing primary, emergency and board-certified specialty care, including anesthesia and pain management, clinical pathology, critical care, internal medicine, neurology, oncology, radiology, cardiology, dermatology, rehabilitation and surgery.

Name: Salmax Research
Description: Salmax Group AS er en nyoppstartet bedrift som driver service- og veterinærtjenester for norsk oppdrettsnæring. Koblingen mellom biologi og teknologi for utvikling av en bærekraftig og framtidsrettet næring er for oss et viktig fokusområde. Vår FoU-avdeling jobber med prosjekter relatert til mikrobiologi og teknologiutvikling.

Name: Advanced Pet Care Clinic Dubai
Description:
Advanced Pet Care Clinic is a full-service, veterinary clinic dedicated to becoming your partner in maintaining your pet's health. Our veterinarians and veterinarian assistants are very experienced and prepared to provide the best veterinary care for your pet in Dubai. We are proud of our reputation for providing excellent customer and patient care at a fair price.

Treatment of your pet @ APCC means highly qualified doctors, excellent care in the most advanced clinic with excellent facilities and quality service. We're passionate about animals and only offer the best care possible.

Name: Grovet - equine health company
Description:
Grovet is your equine specialist! 
Grovet is an independent Dutch company and we have been specializing 20+ years in medicines, consumables, feed supplements and care products for horses supplying exclusively veterinarians. 
With over 20 years of experience we are active in The Netherlands, Europe, Azië and The Middle East. 
We believe in high standards of service and knowledge. We are ready to take your questions on Equine veterinary and are happy to share our expertise and advise you in the best way. 
Our customers appreciate our personal service, our wide range of products and our effort to find the right product or an alternative product. 
Please have a look at our website: www.grovet.com
You can reach us by phone: +31 (030) 247 91 00 or send us an email: info@grovet.com

Name: Emergency Veterinary Care Centers (EVCC)
Description:
At Emergency Veterinary Care Centers (EVCC), our mission is to expand and support communities lacking easily accessible emergency veterinary services.

Operating 24 hours a day, 365 days a year, our hospitals cater to the pets of Northern Indiana, Southern Michigan, and Eastern Illinois. With existing locations in Highland, IN, Westville, IN, Mishawaka, IN, Holland, MI, and Kalamazoo, MI, we are dedicated to delivering top-tier emergency veterinary care to communities in need. Our focus lies on emergency medicine, offering a comprehensive range of services including urgent and emergency surgeries, on-site diagnostics, 24/7 hospitalization, and advanced imaging such as ultrasound.

At EVCC, we understand that investing in our team is crucial to our ongoing success. That's why we prioritize professional development through initiatives like our Student Experiences program. Pre-veterinary, veterinary, and veterinary technician students can participate in summer apprenticeships, while upper-division students have opportunities to serve as on-campus ambassadors or apply for externship positions. Post-graduation, we provide mentorship options and comprehensive training programs to support our new team members as they transition into their roles. Our commitment to ongoing education extends throughout our team members' careers, with expanding opportunities for professional growth and leadership roles.

Explore available career opportunities with EVCC by visiting our careers page at https://evcc.com/jobs/. Join us in making a difference in the lives of pets and their owners in our communities.

Name: MyVet Ireland
Description:
MyVet is part of the Linnaeus Veterinary Ltd (A Mars Company). You can find our terms of use and privacy policy by visiting:  

Privacy statement - www.mars.com/privacy 
Legal notice - www.myvet.ie/legal-notice/
Contact Information - www.myvet.ie/

Name: NoBACZ Healthcare
Description: Specialising in rapid set liquid barriers

Name: Zoolab Colombia S.A.S
Description:
Nacimos ante la preocupación constante frente a los muchos casos donde nuestros amigos peluditos son incapaces de expresar lo que siente y por esto necesitamos la ayuda de una herramienta que nos facilitase la determinación de su salud, cuidando su bienestar y calidad de vida; el diagnóstico.

Fundada en el 2001, Zoolab Colombia es el laboratorio diagnóstico clínico líder en el país frente al diagnóstico poblacional animal, detección y análisis de morbilidades y dolencias de todos aquellos compañeros de cuatro patas (y dos también), bien sean animales de producción, silvestres y/o de compañía.

La protección de la salud animal es uno de nuestros más grandes e importantes pilares como organización y compañía, es de esta manera, que nos apoyamos en el estudio de exámenes de rutina y especializados, para verificar, proteger y ayudar a mamíferos y ovíparos por igual.

Las observaciones de estas pruebas son hechas de la mano del equipo profesional de más alta calidad, preparado, entrenado, motivado y siempre a disposición del animal y su dueño. Para Zoolab es importante que su equipo brinde soluciones optimas, eficaces y breves, es así que se capacita constantemente a su personal, haciendo de ellos fuentes de conocimiento para identificar las necesidades del mercado y brindar una excelente asesoría a sus clientes.

Name: Pure Life Veterinarian Treatment
Description:
Located in the heart of Abu Dhabi, Pure Life is composed of dynamic professionals to ensure that your animal companions will receive the best value in animal care.

We aim to provide advanced veterinary care in competitive pricing, and to serve the medical needs for various animals such as dogs, cats, birds, etc.

With over 15 years combined experience of our expert’s doctors, we are confident that Pure Life Veterinarian Treatment will provide quality care for life your pets deserve.

We strongly believe that each animal deserves access to a proper veterinary care with experienced professionals. It is our main objective to create a massive impact to the customers through utmost-care and bringing pureness in each pet’s life.

At Pure Life Veterinarian Treatment, we are ready to serve the best way possible to ensure the health and safety of your pets.

Name: AdomVET - Urgences Vétérinaires
Leonvet SL
Description:
Distribución de productos zoosanitarios para profesionales.
En Leonvet hemos modernizado el concepto de distribución veterinaria, acercando a los profesionales los productos y añadiendo una serie de valores que queremos que estén a disposición del sector.

Name: KORVEDA INC.
Description: a trusted brand in the manufacture, distribution, and marketing of veterinary pharmaceuticals and animal health products. At Korveda, we provide solutions to maintain animal feed healthily and toxins-free.

Name: VetUpdates
Description:
VetUpdates is a project created to share veterinary knowledge within our community, with a focus on Small Animal Emergency and Critical Care Medicine and Diagnostic Imaging.

With this one-stop site, we aim to assist ECC and Radiology residents in training, as well as clinicians with a passion for our profession, in staying up-to-date with the latest literature in our small but vibrant community.

We are a collective of enthusiastic ECC and Radiology specialists who have crossed paths throughout our careers. Our team continues to grow as VetUpdates matures over time!

We release monthly literature newsletters and are thrilled to share this project with you!

We are always open to feedback to help us improve, so feel free to reach us at newsletter@vetupdates.org

Name: Londrivet
Description: Temos um portfólio de produtos dos principais laboratórios nacionais e multinacionais com mais de 2.500 itens. Oferecendo o que há de mais avançado em medicamentos veterinários e trabalhando pela saúde e qualidade de vida de grandes e pequenos animais.

Name: In Practice
Description: In Practice provides continuing educational material for veterinary practitioners. Peer-reviewed clinical review articles by experts in their field cover all species, but principally farm and companion animals, providing a regular update on clinical developments, ethical dilemmas and practice management. First published in 1979, it provides an extensive archive of useful articles for veterinarians wherever they practice.

Name: ALTIUS
Description:
Market leading distributor of animal health products to the farming and veterinary sectors in Romania and Bulgaria.

         Established in November 1999, Altius is now the trustful partner for more than 2600 businesses. We specialize in the direct import and distribution of veterinary medicines, vitamins and supplements, hygiene products, feed additives, medical equipment and supplies.   
              The company’s vision is a world in which animals enjoy a healthy life and its collaborators full support in their professional development. All our services are high quality, as we offer our partners the best from the best! We pride ourselves with the products in our portfolio, coming from some of the most important suppliers the market has to offer: Adifeed, Bioiberica, Chr Hansen, Elanco, Huvepharma, IDEXX, KRKA, Lallemand, Maymo, Polnet, Theseo, Tonisity, Vetagro, Virbac and Zoetis.
            The Altius sales team is composed of highly trained professionals who are always at our customer’s disposal. Altius specialists offer their knowledge and technical support for the acquisition of medical equipment and by organizing professional trainings for all interested collaborators. 
            
Values
•	Quality – all our services are high quality, as we offer the best available products on the market from some of the best suppliers in the industry. 
•	Efficiency – our team of highly trained professionals is always available to answer all our customer’s needs.
•	Experience – with more than 19 years in the animal health industry, we have become a trustworthy partner for more than 2,600 businesses both in Romania and in Bulgaria.
•	Respect – for us it means obedience to the company’s procedures, always considering the clients’ needs and maintaining harmony between co-workers.
•	Loyalty – is the commitment that we show every day to our company, our clients and our colleagues. Our clients and suppliers are our partners, and each one of them is important for us.

Name: Highcroft Veterinary Referrals
Description:
Highcroft Veterinary Referrals provides expert and specialist care for cats, dogs, rabbits and exotic pets. Our multi-disciplinary team includes highly qualified vets who offer the highest levels of expertise and care to all patients.

Based in Bristol, the service is run from our veterinary hospital with full diagnostic and treatment facilities, plenty of parking for clients and 24 hour emergency veterinary care.

Name: ASAP Laboratory
Description:
ASAP Laboratory is part of a network of veterinary pathology laboratories throughout Australia operating under the umbrella of Specialist Veterinary Services Pty Ltd. 

ASAP is a stand-alone specialised veterinary pathology laboratory servicing metro Melbourne, regional Victoria and South Australia. 

Queensland / Northern NSW are serviced by QML Vetnostics in Brisbane.

New South Wales and the ACT are serviced by Vetnostics in Sydney. 

Western Australia and the Northern Territory are serviced by Vetpath Laboratory Services in Perth.

Tasmania is serviced by TML Vetnostics laboratories in Launceston and Hobart.

In addition to our reputation for high ethical standards and pathologist expertise, we strive for continuous improvements through new technology and have a professional partnership with the veterinary community we service.

Central to all our activities is our aim to deliver a highly personalised and professional veterinary pathology service to our referring veterinarians in order to assist them in providing the best possible care to their patients.

Name: Brasão do Pampa
Description:
A Brasão do Pampa, é a pioneira no desenvolvimento de produtos para o Bioma Pampa.

Uma empresa gaúcha, fundada por gaúchos e inserida no Bioma Pampa, o que lhe dá legitimidade em produzir o melhor para a nutrição animal rio-grandense.

Name: CodaPet At Home Pet Euthanasia
Description:
We are an expanding network of veterinarians providing pets a peaceful passing at home via in-home pet euthanasia, group and private aftercare, deceased pet pick up, and memorial items.

If you are a veterinarian interested in learning more, visit https://www.codapet.com/vets

Name: Agromarc Comercio de Produtos Veterinários LTDA
Description: A Agromarc é uma empresa familiar com mais de 20 anos no mercado, oferecemos na região de São Paulo um atendimento de qualidade na distribuição das linhas Cepav, Duprat, Provets, MaxVet e Vetoquinol.

Name: Compromisso Pet
Description:
Compromisso Pet Distribution was founded with a clear purpose:
to distribute veterinary products in the state of Minas Gerais while placing animal well-being and human values at the center of every decision.

We believe that true care for animals begins before the sale.
It begins with commitment to people, ethical relationships, and responsibility throughout the entire distribution chain.
We do not seek to be the largest distributor in the market.

We strive to be a reliable, thoughtful, and human-centered company, delivering quality with care and respect for clients, employees, partners, and, above all, animal life.

We operate with transparency, technical responsibility, and attention to detail, choosing partners who share the same vision: genuine quality, long-term relationships, and a positive impact on the pet market.

Every Compromisso Pet delivery carries more than products.
It carries trust, care, and commitment.

Name: Animalia Pet Care Veterinária 24 horas
Description:
Fundada em 1991, no aprazível bairro do Itanhangá, a Animália é uma das clínicas veterinárias mais tradicionais do Rio de Janeiro. Sob a responsabilidade técnica da atual equipe desde 1993 e pautada pela excelência na prestação de serviços veterinários, foi pioneira na implantação do atendimento especializado em clínicas no Estado ao iniciar, em 1996, os serviços de dermatologia, cardiologia e oftalmologia.

Continuando a crescer e visando oferecer o máximo de conforto e segurança aos seus clientes foi implementado, em janeiro de 2001, o plantão veterinário 24 horas, (inclusive aos domingos e feriados).

Em 2010, para atender a demanda de atendimentos nos setores de cirurgia e ortopedia, foi iniciado o processo de expansão física da clínica com a locação de outro imóvel para instalação de moderno centro cirúrgico e implementação do serviço de fisioterapia e reabilitação física.

Com relevante destaque na medicina veterinária nacional, a Animália foi, em 2019, a primeira incorporação do grupo Pet Care/VCA no Brasil.

Atualmente, contando com uma equipe de mais de 50 veterinários, especializada em praticamente todas as áreas da medicina veterinária, a Animália continua na vanguarda buscando oferecer sempre o que há de melhor e mais moderno a seus clientes e pacientes.

Name: Livestock & Dairy Development Department Punjab, Pakistan
Description: Veterinary Profession Representation in Punjab Province, Pakistan.

Name: Women's Veterinary Leadership Development Initiative
Description: WVLDI’s mission is to support women in seeking and achieving leadership, policy, and decision-making positions within all areas of professional veterinary activity. Empowering women and allies.

Name: Cantabria Labs Stangest
Description:
Stangest es una empresa del sector veterinario, especialmente dedicada a los animales de compañía, que cuenta con 30 años de experiencia en la fabricación de productos para la salud de perros y gatos. 

Desde 1994, dirigimos nuestro esfuerzo a satisfacer, con la máxima profesionalidad, las necesidades de nuestras queridas mascotas, trabajando día a día para poder ofrecer productos de calidad y el mejor servicio al veterinario. 

En Stangest sabemos que un uso excesivo de medicamentos puede causar graves problemas sanitarios a largo plazo. Con nuestra gama de nutracéuticos queremos contribuir a una medicina veterinaria más natural e integrativa, para así reducir la cantidad de medicamentos que toman las mascotas a favor de un organismo fuerte y lleno de vitalidad.

Name: Vetro Solutions
Description:
Suntem o companie cu o echipa tanara dar formata exclusiv din profesionisti in domeniu, medici veterinari cu un puternic atasament fata de animale, dar si cu o intelegere profunda a problematicii de sanatate cu care se confrunta companionii nostri. 
Vetro are 7 ani de experienta, este unul din principalii distribuitori de produse pentru medicina veterinara din Romania.

Name: VETPASS
Description:
THE ALL-IN-ONE APP FOR PET PEOPLE

VETPASS removes the guesswork from pet parenting and makes life easier for vets. Join our supportive global community of owners, access vet-backed educational resources, utilize the world's first AI symptom checker and nutrition advisor, connect with a local, specialist, or emergency vet via virtual or in-clinic appointments, and store all your pet’s records, all in one app. 

Our proposition for vets is the most sophisticated global in-clinic and online appointment booking and consultation platform – please see our vet page for more info. We’re here to improve the lives of animals and the people who care for them.

Name: Rayne Nutrition
Description:
Rayne offers whole food nutrition, formulated by veterinarians,
To improve the lives of pets everywhere,
Available exclusively through the veterinary community.

Name: VitalPet
Description: VitalPet is composed of a select group of high-quality animal hospitals. Our animal hospitals form a dependable and advanced network of both doctors and facilities. With locations throughout the country, our clients have access to the best doctors who regularly rely on their VitalPet veterinary peer network to share knowledge, experience, and best practices. Each animal hospital maintains the high-quality standards and core values that VitalPet stands for, and continues to practice veterinary medicine services in their own notable uniqueness and expertise, all within their local communities.

Name: Banyan Animal Health
Description:
Banyan Animal Health is an emerging leading provider of veterinary solutions and services for the poultry and livestock sectors across the Middle East and Africa. With our motto NEVER STOP GROWING  and with over 20 years of experience, we combine deep regional expertise with a passion for innovation and strong scientific knowledge to deliver the best solutions that empower our partners for growth and optimization. Our commitment to “One Health” drives everything we do, helping farms, production and businesses thrive.

Our Story: is built on a foundation of deep veterinary expertise, Symbolizing The Banyan’s longevity, strength, wisdom, and interconnectedness, with our team bringing and applying their on-the-ground experience to serve the real needs of the poultry and livestock industries.

From our home bases at the Heart of MEA Region, and driven by our passion, innovation and creativity, we don't just supply products; we create profound and lasting partnerships.

Our Core Values: We prioritize animal welfare, product quality, and innovation in our endeavours. Our actions are influenced by principles of trust, transparency, accessibility, and a steadfast dedication to assisting our customers with premium veterinary solutions.

Our Vision: “The Partner for Tomorrow”
We aspire to be the Trusted Partner of choice for major poultry and livestock producers across the region, Empowering their success through our unwavering commitment to Premium quality, Innovative solutions and the core principles of NEVER STOP GROWING 

Our Mission: is to empower our partners with the cutting-edge tools and expertise needed to confidently champion animal health and meet the challenges of tomorrow.

Name: VetVise GmbH
Description:
VetVise stellt das Tier wieder in den Mittelpunkt der Geflügel- und Schweinehaltung. Wir kümmern uns um das Wohlbefinden jedes Tieres durch kontinuierliches Monitoring und künstliche Intelligenz. Dadurch geben wir dauerhaft spezifische Handlungsempfehlungen, die das Tierwohl und die Farmeffizienz verbessern. 
Wir verknüpfen dies mit weiteren Daten, wie Schlachtergebnissen, um die gesamte Wertschöpfungskette zu verbessern.
Wir tragen zu sichereren Lebensmitteln und einem geringeren ökologischen Fußabdruck bei und helfen, dass die Tierhaltung zukunftsfähig bleibt.

---
VetVise puts the animal back at the center of pig and poultry farming. We care for the well-being of all animals by continuously monitoring them with cameras and AI to recommend individual actions that improve animal welfare and farm efficiency.
AI analysis and linking with other data, such as slaughter data, optimises the entire value chain.
We contribute to safer food and a smaller environmental footprint, and help to ensure that animal farming remains sustainable.

Name: Telerradiologia e Teletomografia Veterinária Diagnóstico por Imagem
Description:
O serviço de Telerradiologia da Pronto Imagem conta com um sistema simples e de fácil acesso que permite o envio das imagens para nossa equipe de radiologistas para elaboração de laudos radiográficos e de tomografia computadorizada à distância.
Oferecemos treinamento presencial e acompanhamento on-line aos nossos clientes no intuito de garantir qualidade nos exames.

- Equipe altamente qualificada.
- Agilidade e qualidade na emissão de laudos. 
- Atendimento em todo território nacional, Uruguai e Argentina.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: LeoCan
Description: Clínica veterinaria 24hs, venta de accesorios para mascotas, farmacia, guardería felina, venta de alimento balanceado, farmacia, cirugía, radiografía, ecografía y otras especialidades.
Location: CABA, Autonomous City of Buenos Aires

Name: Equine Infectious Disease Surveillance
Description: Equine Infectious Disease Surveillance (EIDS) is generously funded by the UK's Thoroughbred industry and is based at Cambridge University. The EIDS team collaborates with equine industry stakeholders to control and prevent equine infectious disease occurrences in the UK. They oversee numerous surveillance schemes to aid the identification and reporting of specific infectious disease occurrences and provide a disease control advice service for veterinary surgeons. EIDS also collate and share disease information, through platforms such as the International Collating Centre (ICC), EquiFluNet and the Equine Quarterly Disease Surveillance report, which is produced by EIDS in collaboration with BEVA and Defra/APHA.

Name: Biotestlab
Description:
BioTestLab is a Ukrainian company. For over 30 years we specialize in the development, production, and sale of veterinary drugs with an individual approach to each client.
Our company is in the TOP-20 of the world leaders in the range of vaccines.

Creating innovative products for animal and poultry health, thereby improving the impact on human health and the environment, is at the core of our work.
Research and innovation are the priority of BioTestLab. We have our own R&D department, and annually register 10+ new unique veterinary products with the introduction to the markets of Ukraine and abroad. In the product range, there are 41 standards and 15+ autogenous vaccines, as well as 65+ chemical-pharmaceuticals for farm animals, poultry, and pets.

We manufacture products at our own facilities in Ukraine, equipped with modern equipment. Our company is certified by the world leader — the accreditation agency DQS (Germany) in accordance with the international standard ISO 9001:2015, production processes meet the requirements of GMP (Good Manufacturing Practice). BioTestLab works only with leading manufacturers of active substances and SPF embryos.

In the production process, 18 different technologies and 21 pharmaceutical forms (embryonic live and inactivated vaccines, cultural live and inactivated, viral and bacterial, tissue and autogenous, lyophilised, suspension and emulsified, injectable and oral vaccines, injectable and oral antibiotics, antiparasitics, anti-inflammatory, vitamin, mineral drugs, sprays, disinfectants, etc.) are used.

As of January 2022, the export geography of BioTestLab products covered 20+ countries.

Name: Animal Emergency Service
Description:
Animal Emergency Service is the home of emergency vet care for pets in Brisbane and on the Gold Coast and Sunshine Coast. We are open every weeknight, and 24 hours on weekends and public holidays.

Our Teams of Vets, Nurses, and Client Care Specialists are here for the love of pets and their families, and will always treat your pet like their own. An unexpected trip to the vet is an emotional time that may catch you off guard. We are committed to discussing your options for the best and most affordable pet treatment for your situation.

Name: Bova Aus
Description:
Bova are specialists in veterinary compounding. Over the last 13 years, Bova Aus has emerged as one of Australia’s few stand-alone compounding facilities. We have been dedicated to providing all vets an exceptional service, whilst focusing all our resources on offering our highest quality medications at an affordable price to help strengthen compliance by pet owners.

We are able to make medications suitable to each individual animal by offering tailor-made solutions in a variety of delivery methods such as sterile injections, chemotherapy medication, exact dose capsules, transdermals, flavoured pastes, powders and ophthalmics.

While large commercial companies may take some medication off the market, we are able to source these drugs from overseas to continue to supply vets with both discontinued medications and any medication which might be out of stock for any reason.
Not all veterinary compounded products are created equal.
You’ll only know you have a quality issue when it’s too late.
With Bova you can have confidence.

Name: Hypor España
Description:
Nuestro programa de genética porcina nació en 1968, bajo el contro de Euribrid.

40 años después, en 2007, Hypor entró a formar parte del grupo Hendrix Genetics, gracias al cual nos hemos convertido en una de las 3 mejores empresas dentro del campo de la genética porcina.
Actualmente somos más de 3.500 empleados (entre los cuales se incluyen 44 genetistas) distribuidos mundialmente por los 25 países en los que estamos presentes.

Trabajamos con múltiples especies, tanto a nivel terrestre como acuático, y contamos con 29 núcleos de selección genética y 326 granjas de multiplicación.

Llevamos más de 50 años de éxitos, que nos han permitido convertirnos en uno de los principales proveedores de genética porcina del mundo ya que esta es nuestra pasión.

Una pasión que es la que nos mueve y bajo la cual tenemos el firme compromiso de proveer genética compatible con la rentabilidad en la cadena de valor de la carne de cerdo.

¿Te unes a nosotros? Te esperamos!

Name: Sogeval Laboratories
Description:
Sogeval Laboratories, one of the world's fastest-growing animal health companies, is dedicated to developing, manufacturing and marketing innovative products. We bring new technology to veterinarians for the prevention and treatment of conditions affecting companion animals.

Leading product lines include Douxo (derm) and Clenz-A-Dent (dental).

The leader in Custom Labeling products for Veterinary practices to help elevate awareness of their business and generate more profit.

Name: Greencross Vet Hospital
Description:
The spacious, 3000sqm hospital features 14 modern consultation rooms, 3 state-of-the-art surgical theatres, a dedicated Emergency & Critical Care ward and advanced diagnostic equipment. At Greencross Vet Hospital we provide a wide range of veterinary services to our local community, and are here for all your pet care needs. Our hospital consists of a General Practice (GP) clinic, Emergency Service and Specialist Referral Hospital. Greencross also provides embedded clinical teaching and placement opportunities for University of Melbourne Doctor of Veterinary Medicine students.

Our highly qualified and experienced teams are passionate about pets and are committed to providing the very best in veterinary care with exceptional client service.

Name: Scarsdale Vets
Description:
Scarsdale Veterinary Group consists of 10 veterinary practices within the Derby and Burton-upon-Trent area.
Our services for pet owners:
Offering routine and preventative pet care, we have veterinary surgeons and nurses giving quality veterinary care 24 hours a day. Our own emergency 'out of hours' service is also based at Pride Veterinary Centre.
All our practices have a retail area, and we offer a repeat prescriptions service, nurse clinics and a VIP Pet Club, which offers great savings on annual pet care.
Pride Veterinary Centre is the location of our modern, state-of-the-art small animal hospital.  We offer routine consultations, nurse clinics, advise, large pet care store, and have vets and nurses with additional qualifications and special interests.
And finally, the Pride Veterinary Centre Pet Resort includes grooming for cats, dogs and rabbits, luxury cat and dog hotel, hydrotherapy and rehabilitation suite, and dog training classes.
The Scarsdale Farm team consists of 10 farm vets providing a range of farm veterinary services throughout the East Midlands
•	Phone access to farm vets 24/7
•	Wide range of farm drugs stocked at internet prices
•	Proactive health planning
•	Ultrasound scanners for fertility work
•	Bull & ram fertility testing
•	Comprehensive range of sheep veterinary services
•	Farmer meetings & workshops held frequently on a range of topics
•	Foot trimming service & Healthy Hoof Programme
•	Range of smallholder services
The Scarsdale equine veterinary team consists of dedicated equine vets and nurses, providing the highest standard of care for horses, ponies and donkeys in Derbyshire, Nottinghamshire, Leicestershire and Staffordshire.
•	Team of 11 equine vets
•	24hour Equine emergency service
•	Full hospitalisation facilities, operating suite & recovery
•	Fertility work & BEVA approved AI centre
•	Lameness investigation & treatment
•	Full range of dental services
•	Zone visit scheme
•	Horse healthcare shop

Name: Global Herbs Europe Ltd
Description:
The UK's leading supplier of  veterinary developed herbal supplements for the equine sector and growing into the poultry and pet sectors.

The sophisticated food supplements range that has been developed by Stephen Ashdown MRCVS using ancient wisdom that has been gathered mostly from Asia and Africa and then consolidated by modern science practices.

The company has a highly respected veterinary supported advice service that complements a UK wide sales team.  

As well as developing the understanding and benefits of the range to the UK market, Global Herbs is finding a growing number of export opportunities.

Name: Conselho Regional de Medicina Veterinária do Rio Grande do Sul (CRMV-RS)
Description: Autarquia Federal de Fiscalização do Exercício Profissional da Medicina Veterinária e da Zootecnia no Rio Grande do Sul
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: GerVetUSA
Description:
Improving Instruments, Refining Surgeries 

For over 3 decades, GerVetUSA Inc. has been a trusted name in veterinary surgical instruments, combining precision, innovation, and reliability. From selecting the raw material to forging it into a final product, we have strict quality checks on every step.

Our mission goes beyond manufacturing and selling veterinary instruments. We believe in solving problems and building lasting relationships with our veterinary professionals through exceptional customer service.

With cutting-edge, German-forged instruments for all specialties, from general surgery to orthopedics and dentistry, we strive to make veterinary practice easier and more effective. 

If we don’t have an instrument you’re looking for, we will manufacture it for you. Just let us know your requirements!

Connect with us to explore how we can support your practice.

Let’s grow together.

Name: SilvaFeed Brasil
Description:
A SilvaFeed acredita que a pecuária é parte da solução e é para isso que desenvolve produtos e pesquisas de desempenho animal e sustentabilidade. São aditivos alimentares de nutrição animal que são livres de antibióticos, 100% naturais e vegetais, reduzem a produção de gases de efeito estufa, melhoram o desempenho e a saúde animal e possuem o selo Carbon Trust de sustentabilidade.

A SilvaFeed é uma marca da SilvaTeam, empresa italiana com 167 anos de história, presente em 60 países com produtos próprios. Líder mundial na produção, transformação e comercialização de extratos vegetais, de taninos e seus derivados.

Name: ChromoXpert Research and Diagnostics Pvt Ltd
Description:
Established in the begining of 2014, ChromoXpert Research and DIagnostics is engaged in providing Cytogenetics, Molecular Genetics Diagnostic Services to Animal and Humans. The other areas company is dealing are, Avian DNA sexing and Disease DIagnosis, Stem Cell Genetics, Contract research testing etc. 
For details please visit the homepage.

Name: Brasfeed Nutrição Animal
Description: Após 7 anos de atuação no mercado brasileiro de Nutrição Animal, a Brasfeed cresceu e se fortaleceu, ampliando seu espectro de atuação. A partir de agosto de 2019 tornou-se uma marca corporativa, que integra os seguintes segmentos de negócios: Industrialização de Suplementos, Núcleos e Rações; Representação; Distribuição; Serviços.

Name: Vetcare Africa
Description:
Vetcare Africa was established following the need for quality veterinary medicine and services. It is recognised for its commitment to the productions of high quality veterinary products both locally and internationally. With the changing times, the company has invested in technology and makes consistent research and development of its products for the promotion of better animal health.

Vetcare Africa manufactures a wide range of products for treating ailments in all domestic animals in the following formulations:
•  Injectables
•  Water Soluble Powders
•  Oral Liquids
•  Feed Additives

Name: AmiVet SPRL
Description:
AmiVet, votre clinique vétérinaire à Neupré

AmiVet est une clinique vétérinaire dédiée aux chiens, chats et NAC à poils, située à Neupré. Notre équipe veille chaque jour à offrir des soins de qualité dans un cadre rassurant, professionnel et attentif aux besoins de chaque animal.

Nous proposons une prise en charge complète, allant de la prévention aux soins spécialisés, avec un plateau technique moderne incluant l’échographie et un scanner vétérinaire sur place.

Notre approche repose sur des valeurs fortes : professionnalisme, écoute, efficacité, confiance et travail en équipe.

Chez AmiVet, chaque animal compte. Chaque propriétaire aussi.

Name: Weatherford Equine Medical Center
Description: Equine Hospital in Weatherford, Texas, the cutting horse capital of the world. Board certified specialists and 24 hour emergency and critical care.  Our facility houses up to 60 hospitalized patients with several turnout paddocks also available. Videoendoscopy, digital radiography, in-house laboratory and the latest ultrasound equipment allow us to diagnose diseases with state of the art technology.

Name: ReferAVet
Description:
Nous avons le plaisir de vous annoncer l’ouverture prochaine de ReferAVet, centre vétérinaire de référé exclusif en imagerie, chirurgie spécialisée et médecine interne des animaux de compagnie.

Le centre sera situé sur la commune de la Motte-Servolex, entre Aix-les-Bains et Chambéry, à 2 min de la sortie d’autoroute à la jonction entre l'A41 et l'A43.

ReferAVet sera une structure indépendante, de taille humaine, proposant aux vétérinaires référents de la région, un plateau technique complet avec scanner pour la prise en charge de leurs patients, dans le plus grand respect des valeurs de confraternité.

Les patients seront accueillis uniquement sur prescription du vétérinaire traitant, et seuls les examens ou prise en charge demandés seront réalisés.

Aucune activité généraliste ni de vente au comptoir ne sera pratiquée.

Fort d'une dizaine d'années d'expérience dans nos domaines, ce projet est né de la fusion de nos pratiques respectives exclusives en chirurgie spécialisée et imagerie médicale.

Les travaux d’aménagement sont en cours et l’ouverture est prévue pour Avril 2024.

Nous vous tiendrons informés rapidement de l’avancée du chantier, de l’équipement du plateau technique et de notre équipe !

 

Au plaisir de collaborer ensemble


Nous vous souhaitons une excellente année 2024. Que tous vos vœux se réalisent !

 

Drs Marie Nennig et Paul Pillard

Co-gérants de ReferAVet

Name: DHL Kennels
Description: A local pet shop offering top quality pure bred puppies to loving homes, with a view to foster confidence in new pet owners. Breeds include rottweilers, boerboels, pitbulls, german shepherds to mention but a few. Get in touch for a loving canine for you and your family.

Name: Laboratorio de Referencia Regional de Sanidad Animal
Description:
LARRSA nace como respuesta a la demanda de diagnósticos especializados y para poder realizar investigación de enfermedades que afectan la salud animal. El proyecto inicia en el 2004 con el aval de Doctor Luis Leal, Rector de la USAC en ese momento, colocándose la Primera Piedra el 10 de octubre del 2007. La construcción del edificio se lleva a cabo con financiamiento del Banco Centroamericano de Integración Económica-BCIE/USAC. LARRSA inaugura sus instalaciones el 26 de mayo de 2014, por el Rector Magnífico Estuardo Gálvez y se inician labores el 11 de agosto del 2014, durante la gestión del Licenciado Carlos Saavedra como decano de la FMVZ.

A inicios del año 2015 LARRSA amplía su diagnóstico, por lo que transforma su nombre a Laboratorio de Referencia Regional de Sanidad Animal. LARRSA contribuyó con el Ministerio de Agricultura, Ganadería y Alimentación para la auto declaratoria de Guatemala como país libre de Fiebre Porcina Clásica (PPC), realizando el diagnóstico molecular por medio de Reacción en cadena de la polimerasa en tiempo real de 6621 muestras ingresadas en desde noviembre del 2015 hasta el mes de agosto del 2016.

LARRSA ha sido designado para ser el Laboratorio Subregional de OIRSA para la enfermedad de PPC, por los directores de Sanidad Animal de los países miembros.

Actualmente LARRSA trabaja en nuevos proyectos orientados a garantizar la sanidad animal de la región.

Name: MKG VETERINARY MEDICINES TRADING
Description:
Vision and Mission

Our Vision:
To be the trusted leader in veterinary medicine distribution, advancing animal health and well-being across the UAE, Oman, Africa, and the Middle East, through excellence, innovation, and sustainability."

Our Mission:
Delivering exceptional service that goes above and beyond for our valued customers.

Uncompromising Quality: Sourcing and distributing top-tier veterinary products, ensuring the highest standards of quality and safety.

Empowering Expertise: Equipping veterinarians and animal care professionals with cutting-edge knowledge and solutions through continuous education and support.

Sustainable Stewardship: Championing Eco-friendly practices within our operations, fostering responsible animal care, and promoting sustainability in our industry.

Global Reach: Expanding our footprint into Africa and the Middle East, creating a lasting impact on animal health and well-being across borders.

Community Commitment: Actively engaging with local communities, charities, and organizations to advance animal welfare and support community development.

At Vet MKG, we are passionate about animals and dedicated to enhancing their lives. As a company born in 2025, we are driven by our vision and mission to make a positive difference in the world of veterinary medicine."

Name: American Association of Veterinary State Boards
Description: The AAVSB's mission is to strengthen the veterinary regulatory community. It is is a nonprofit corporation with 501(c)(3) status from the IRS and is headquartered in Overland Park, Kansas. The AAVSB is an association of veterinary regulatory boards, whose membership includes licensing boards in the USA and Canada. Please take a moment to read through our Social Media Commenting Policy: https://www.aavsb.org/socialmedia

Name: One Health Organization
Description:
One Health Organization provides access to veterinary care through financial assistance to low-income older adults and people with disabilities. A 501(c)(3) nonprofit, it is the only organization in Northeast Ohio dedicated to supporting the unique family bond between people and their pets. Programs include:
 
Voucher-based Family Benefit Program - Older adults and those with disabilities living at or below 200% of the current federal poverty rate apply for Vouchers worth up to $250 per year, which help offset basic veterinary care for their pets. Recipients must live in Cuyahoga, Lake, Geauga, Portage, Summit, Medina or Lorain County. Veterinary care is provided by 33 Veterinary Partners, which are reimbursed after Vouchers are remitted with proof of services rendered. Initiated in 2014, benefits of the program include that it:
-Eases the financial burden for a disadvantaged population
-Reduces loneliness and isolation and maintains well-being
-Reserves the loving bond between vulnerable people and their pets
-Helps keep pets healthy and out of shelters

Pet Owner Services - One Health Organization informs pet parents about resources through its website, https://onehealth.org/we-can-help/pet-parents/, which organizes information about affordable pet-related services on one website page. Also included is a comprehensive list of veterinary clinics in Northeast Ohio. A COVID-19 webpage, https://onehealth.org/covid-19/, was created and is updated regularly with helpful information for pet parents.
 
Partnership Development - One Health Organization explores opportunities with other nonprofits and businesses toward making veterinary care affordable and accessible for more pet parents. The vision of One Health Organization leadership is to eventually create a space to provide comprehensive services for vulnerable pet-owning populations in the Greater Cleveland-area to fill unmet needs.

Name: CurEffect Hayvan Sağlığı
Description:
As Cureffect Animal Health, we offer innovative products specially formulated as a result of scientific research and R&D studies with our expert staff. By correctly identifying the needs of veterinarians and animals in our country, we say "Health is in our DNA!". Under the roof of Cureffect, we are taking firm steps towards becoming the sustainable solution partner of the animal health sector with innovative products that we will add new ones every day.

Our core values, which are fundamental to our work, enable us to serve our customers better and realize the mission we hold. Thanks to the values that inspire us, at Cureffect, we aim to continuously bring fresh perspectives to the industry with highly innovative projects.

Name: Angell Animal Medical Center
Description:
Care and compassion are the cornerstones of our mission. Each year, more than 50,000 animals receive outstanding routine and specialty care at Angell Animal Medical Center.

Appointment hours and specialty phone numbers for our Boston and Waltham locations are available at: www.angell.org/hours. Weekend & evening appointments are available, and there is free parking on-site. 

Angell has been providing world-class veterinary services since 1915. We have over 65 full time veterinarians and an experienced support staff who work as a team to ensure the best care for your pet’s general wellness, emergency, and specialty needs. With 33 board-certified specialists and advanced diagnostic equipment, Angell is committed to providing the highest standard of medical care for your dog, cat, bird or exotic pet. Whether in Boston or Waltham, our specialists regularly collaborate and plan treatments tailored to your pet.  Our specialty care is competitively priced, and if needed, a shuttle can transport animals to Boston and back from Waltham for further specialized care.  We offer a broad range of expertise, and deliver this care with the one-on-one compassion that our clients and patients deserve. 

State-of-the-Art Technology:
* Cardiac Surgery
* Critical Care Unit ( board-certified specialists in Waltham and Boston)
* Laparoscopic gastropexy surgery
* High-speed, multi-slice CT Scans (3-D imagery and 30-second scans)
* I-131 Treatment
* Linear Accelerator & board-certified radiation oncologist
* MRI Unit (V-shaped trough to accommodate large-breed animals)
* Neurosurgery
* Outpatient Ultrasonography
* Stem Cell Therapy
* Tracheal/Urethral Stenting

The mission of the MSPCA-Angell is to protect animals, relieve their suffering, advance their health and welfare, prevent cruelty, and work for a just and compassionate society.

Name: Neftys Farma Iberia
Description: Neftys Farma Iberia es un grupo de empresas dedicadas a la comercialización de productos y servicios para el bienestar animal, desde productos sanitarios y farmacéuticos, nutrición hasta accesorios e higiene.

Name: Sushima Pharmaceuticals Pvt. Ltd
Description:
Sushima Pharmaceuticals is one of the leading Manufacturing & Marketing Company in the Animal Health Industry. Sushima's journey was started in 1998 with only 5 leaders & today the same is accompanied with  340+ employees who are working with an only aim to provide a better life to Animal World. Sushima Pharmaceuticals believes in formulating, developing, commercializing innovative formulations to fulfil actual need required by Veterinary Industry.
Sushima Pharmaceuticals Pvt. Ltd having its Manufacturing unit at Pantnagar, Uttarakhand India, is an ISO 9001:2015 & ISO 14001:2015, GMP & GLP certified. The manufacturing unit is equipped with latest instruments to maintain high quality standards for Products development & manufacturing.

Our Vision-
-To become the front runner in providing Best, Innovative & Environment Safe Solutions.
-Leading position in high quality & result oriented products.
-Constantly improving on all the parameters.

Our Mission-
-To be an organization with the most progressive product range with cutting edge services.
-To become the most admired & trusted organization in the Veterinary Industry.

Name: Veterinarian Partners
Description: Veterinarian Partners is the organization built for veterinarians—because your career should support the life you want personally, professionally, and financially. Whether you’re stepping into your first role, exploring ownership, leading a team, or planning your legacy, we’re here to support your journey every step of the way. We build genuine, long-term partnerships tailored to where you are and where you want to go. With a reliable, collaborative support system behind you, you can focus on practicing great medicine, and shaping the next chapter of your career with confidence.

Name: MixVet Distribuidora
Description:
A MIXVET atua desde 2009 no estado de Minas Gerais, com sua sede localizada na cidade de Belo Horizonte, atendendo cerca de 450 municípios inseridos nas regiões metropolitana de Belo Horizonte, centro-oeste, campo das vertentes, vales do mucuri e rio doce e zona da mata mineiros. Contamos com uma base de aproximadamente 1800 clientes parceiros.

Consolidada pela qualidade dos produtos, eficiência na logística, facilidade de pagamento e principalmente na excelência de seus colaboradores. Com um solidificado perfil ético e transparente podemos contar com grandes parceiros na indústria PET. São eles: Elanco Saúde Animal, Organnact, Hill's e Idexx, nos quais temos exclusividade da distribuição na área em que atendemos,

Name: CEVET - Hospital Veterinário
Netpoulsafe
Description:
Create a self-sustainable and multi-actor EU thematic network on
supporting measures for biosecurity compliance in poultry farming. Designed to stimulate knowledge exchange between all relevant stakeholders in order to collect, analyze, validate in practice if necessary and widely disseminate effective supporting measures for the implementation and compliance of biosecurity knowledge and practices for ensuring safe and viable European poultry production.

This project has received funding from the European Union’s Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme under grant agreement No.101000728 (NetPoulSafe). This output reflects only the author’s view and the European Union cannot be held responsible for any use that may be made of the information contained therein.

Name: VETS CARE CLUB
Description: Vets Care Club (VCC) is a non-profit, non-political NGO working for the welfare of animals and uplift of the veterinary profession in Pakistan. VCC is dedicated to promoting a caring and humane attitude towards all living creatures. VCC is committed to make Pakistan an ideal and cruelty-free environment for animals. VCC believes in 'Helping hands are holier than praying lips'.

Name: Al Effat - العفت
Description:
Al Effat Trading is one of the leading market players in the feed additives and veterinary pharmaceuticals business in Egypt. Established in 1995 by an experienced group of veterinary doctors working in the field of feed additives, pharmaceuticals, and animal vaccines since 1976 and covering the Middle East and Africa.
We have different warehouses to stock our feed additives, veterinary pharmaceuticals, and vaccines separately.

Name: Ortocanis
Description:
Ortocanis develops and distributes orthopedic and rehabilitation products for dogs. 
Our goal is to make a better world where dogs with mobility problems can keep smiling.  

We have a large experience in design and manufacture of dog braces. We believe that the vast majority of vets do not know this line of articles and neither the advantages they can offer them. 

Our intention is to improve the awarenesss of the Canine Rehabilitation by offering all product's and tratements information. 
The distribution channels are an online shop and our existing network and collaborators.
If your want to become a distributor, just let us know.

Have a look on https://www.ortocanis.com

Name: ExoWild

Description: CAETA International, customizes and delivers specialized euthanasia certification to professionals and students in the veterinary industry consisting of educational topics & technique through a choice of live lecture CE, on-line CE, and cadaver lab. The educational programs are effectively designed to incorporate into both US & International veterinary university core curriculum, national convention education, national shelter staff education, national large group specialty and multiple general practice veterinary hospital training programs. These programs are are currently taught in the United States, Canada, & Europe through incorporation into veterinary university curriculum, national & local convention programming, stand-alone city 2-day courses, association speaking, and customized corporate veterinary practice CE programs.

Name: World Association for Veterinary Dermatology
Description:
In March 2010, the World Association for Veterinary Dermatology (WAVD) was formally incorporated as a nonprofit limited lability company registered in Scotland, succeeding the World Congress of Veterinary Dermatology Association. 

The primary goal of the WAVD is to promote the worldwide advancement of Veterinary Dermatology. 

Our Member, Affiliate, and Provisional Organisations are:

Nine Member Organisations:

American Academy of Veterinary Dermatology (AAVD)
American College of Veterinary Dermatology (ACVD)
Asian Society of Veterinary Dermatology (AiSVD)
Asian College of Veterinary Dermatology (AiCVD)
Canadian Academy of Veterinary Dermatology (CAVD)
Dermatology Chapter of the Australian and New Zealand College of Veterinary Scientists (DCANZCVS)
European College of Veterinary Dermatology (ECVD)
European Society of Veterinary Dermatology (ESVD)
Latin American Society of Veterinary Dermatology (SLDV)

3 Affiliate Organisations:

International Committee on Atopic Diseases of Animals (ICADA)
International Society of Veterinary Dermatopathology (ISVD)
Global Veterinary Dermatology Education Group (GVDEG)

No Provisional Organisations currently.

The World Congress of Veterinary Dermatology (WCVD) was initiated by Member Organisations representing American, Canadian and European specialists in veterinary dermatology. More recently, organisations from Asia and Australasia have joined. Every 4 years, the WCVD is organised by one of the WAVD Member Organisations, with the goal to be better and more successful than the predecessor. 

The prestigious WCVD provides an unparalleled opportunity to join leading international experts for a 4-day Congress featuring the latest innovations in cutting edge science and practical applications for veterinary dermatology. From the expert to the general practitioner, multiple lecture streams ensure there is something for everyone! 

The 9th WCVD will be held in Sydney, Australia on October 20th-24th. www.vetdermsydney.com

Name: Państwowy Instytut Weterynaryjny (PIWet-PIB) / National Veterinary Research Institute (NVRI)
Description:
Państwowy Instytut Weterynaryjny – Państwowy Instytut Badawczy (PIWet-PIB) w Puławach to nowoczesna jednostka naukowo-badawcza działająca w dziedzinie medycyny weterynaryjnej od 1945 roku. W 2025 roku PIWet-PIB obchodzi jubileusz 80-lecia. Instytut posiada zaawansowane zaplecze laboratoryjne spełniające najwyższe normy bezpieczeństwa biologicznego. Laboratoria akredytowane są przez PCA zgodnie z normą PN-EN ISO/IEC 17025:2018-02 oraz posiadają atestacje Europejskiego Dyrektoriatu ds. Jakości Leków i Opieki Zdrowotnej (EDQM). W PIWet-PIB pracuje zespół wybitnych ekspertów z zakresu medycyny weterynaryjnej i nauk pokrewnych.
Zakres działalności: diagnostyka chorób zwierząt (ASF, grypa ptaków, wścieklizna, pomór rzekomy drobiu, PRRS, IBR, BVD i inne), badania żywności i pasz (dioksyny, pozostałości leków), ocena jakości produktów leczniczych weterynaryjnych, badania oporności, identyfikacja gatunkowa mięsa, ekspertyzy, szkolenia oraz badania wirusobójczości.

The National Veterinary Research Institute (NVRI) in Pulawy (Poland ), is a modern scientific research institution in the field of veterinary medicine, operating continuously since 1945. In 2025, it celebrates its 80th anniversary.
The Institute is equipped with advanced laboratory infrastructure meeting the highest biosafety standards. Its laboratories are accredited by the PCA in accordance with PN-EN ISO/IEC 17025:2018-02 and hold official certifications from European Directorate for Quality of Medicines and Healthcare (EDQM). The Institute employs a team of leading experts in veterinary medicine and related sciences.
Our core activities include: diagnostics of animal diseases (including ASF, avian influenza, rabies, Newcastle Disease, PRRS, IBR, BVD and others), testing of food and feed (dioxins, drug residues), evaluation of veterinary medicinal products, antimicrobial resistance testing, meat species identification, expert opinions, specialized training, and virucidal efficacy testing.

Anciennement connu sous le nom du Groupe Vétéri Médic Inc., Vet et Nous (division de VCA Canada) est un regroupement de centres d'urgence et d’hôpitaux. Vet et Nous est une équipe multidisciplinaire de spécialistes et de vétérinaires généralistes de haut niveau. Description: Formed in the United States, under the direction of Dr. Jean-Marie Denoix, The International Society of Equine Locomotor Pathology (ISELP)  focuses on the problem of lameness in the equine athlete. Name: The Zero Pain Philosophy
Description:
Zero Pain Philosophy is here to help veterinary professionals worldwide achieve analgesic excellence in your clinic. 
 
Our telemedicine service is designed to give you Specialist input and support in managing your pain cases. 
 
We offer a variety of educational resources to help spread pain management knowledge. With our regular webinars, your whole team can stay up to date with current topics. For quick reference on a particular topic, our pain updates are short and easy to read summaries compiled by our Specialists. 

We believe everyone should have free access to video resources where techniques can actually be seen, and not just read about in a textbook.  Using our iPhones, we created videos to help you deliver great pain relief to your patients.
 
With your help, we sincerely hope the veterinary industry adopts and practises an attitude of zero tolerance towards pain so that no patient suffers unnecessarily under our care.

Vetopia is driven by one core idea: to create the best working environment for veterinary professionals so they can provide the best medical care for pets. To achieve this, we provide our clinics with the support and investments they need to focus on their true passion – caring for animals. 

Because we recognise that decisions are best taken in-clinic close to the pets and pet owners, we embrace a country-centric approach that respects the uniqueness of each clinic and country while fostering growth and collaboration across borders.

Currently, the Company is offering treatments for various forms of tumours.

Our product, vetIQure, is designed for animals based on a technology developed to treat humans. Its TSE technology makes it possible to treat tumours that do not respond to chemotherapy and tumours in sensitive places.

The Company headquarter is based at  Medicon Village in Lund, Sweden.

Name: IVC Evidensia Belgium
Description:
Bij IVC Evidensia willen we gezonde en gelukkige huisdieren zien. Het is onze missie om een hoge kwaliteit van zorg te leveren. We leggen de lat hoog door samen te werken, van de basis- en preventieve zorg tot de meest geavanceerde specialistische zorg.

Onze doelstellingen
“Samen Beter, dicht bij de klant”: samenwerken als uitgangspunt van IVC Evidensia.

Samen: omdat we geloven dat we als groep en door samen te werken veel meer kunnen bereiken.
Beter: omdat we ons willen onderscheiden op kwaliteit en continu willen verbeteren voor onze klanten en onze medewerkers.

Dicht bij de klant: omdat we onze mensen en praktijken hun eigen vrijheid en verantwoordelijkheid willen laten behouden om zo hun klanten het best te kunnen bedienen. Het werken aan kwaliteit is een continu proces van meten, kennis en ervaring delen, investeren en opleiden. Met als resultaat duurzame groei en onderlinge synergieën die ontstaan binnen de groep.

Met ontzettend veel plezier kijken wij er naar uit om samen verder te bouwen aan een goede en nieuwe toekomst voor de diergeneeskunde in ons land. Daarenboven zijn we ervan overtuigd dat we, door deze samenwerking van Belgische dierenartsen, zeer mooie resultaten gaan realiseren!

Samen beter, dicht bij de klant.

Name: Project Street Vet

Learn more about our programs at www.projectstreetvet.org

Name: AVC Association of Veterinary Consultants
Description:
The Association of Veterinary Consultants (AVC) is an experienced stakeholder organization recognized by the EMA (European Medicines Agency), EFSA (European Food Safety Authority), the European Commission, VMD (Veterinary Medicines Directorate, UK), ANSES and other global entities. 
AVC members are international veterinary practitioners, providing regulatory services to global food, pharmaceutical and feed industries, frequently involved in advising governments and regulators on key issues relating to human and animal health and nutrition. Among the AVC’s guiding principles are the key concepts of evidence-based science and animal welfare (e.g. 3Rs: replacing, reducing, refining use of animals in experiments, wherever possible).

The Association of Veterinary Consultants (AVC) is a non-profit association founded on 31 May 1995 in Brussels and is a legal entity based at La Maison des Vétérinaires 10 place Léon Blum, 75011 Paris, France (Nº W751220920).
 
AVC is a voluntary Association of Veterinary Consultants that work as independent consultants in a variety of areas.
 
AVC member activities are normally concerned with broad animal and public health issues, notably in regulatory affairs, clinical research for veterinary medicinal products, feed and food additives, animal feed and nutrition, and human food safety and production.

The scope of AVC is to provide the independent veterinary consultants with information and updates on general professional, scientific, financial and social issues, and to participate as stakeholders representing the AVC at the EMA, EFSA, and the EU Commission, and other National and International Regulatory Agencies.

Name: World Association for Buiatrics
Description:
HISTORY

Founded at the 2nd International Congress on Cattle Diseases in Vienna (Austria) in May 17, 1962, the preliminary meeting was held in Hannover (Germany) in October 6-10, 1960.

The World Association for Buiatrics (WAB) is an independent international association and legal entity. The official organ of the WAB is the WAB website (www.buiatrics.com). The information about the WAB should be published in veterinary journals such as The Bovine Practitioner and other national bovine veterinary journals.

OBJECTIVES

To organise meetings on diseases and production of cattle (buiatrics) in order to report the results of research work and other practical experiences in buiatrics.
To discuss these topics in an international forum and thus promote all aspects of buiatrics in both science and practice.
Even though the emphasis is on buiatrics, small ruminants and other “non-domestic” ruminant species (such as zoo and exotic animal species) are also considered as species of interest to the association.
To provide an organization for qualified individuals who dedicate a significant part of their professional activities to research, educational or clinical aspects of buiatrics to exchange ideas.
To issue, in compliance with the pertinent regulations, occasional or regular publications (circulars, conference proceedings, reminders, periodicals, newsletters) including materials of the topics outlined above.
To promote international research on ruminant animals and to keep veterinary practitioners and all interested agricultural specialists informed about the results achieved around the world.

We are proud to offer 24/7 emergency services, ensuring that pets have access to life-saving care whenever they need it.

At CCVS, we foster a collaborative and supportive environment where our staff can grow and thrive. We are passionate about ongoing education and professional development, which is why we invest in continuous training and learning opportunities for our entire team. Our commitment to excellence drives everything we do—from providing exceptional patient care to being a reliable partner to the veterinary community.

Located in beautiful Cape Cod, our hospitals offer an amazing work-life balance, with the opportunity to enjoy the scenic coastal surroundings, charming towns, and recreational activities. Fairy Tails is India's foremost destination for holistic pet care. With a deep commitment to the well-being of pets, we offer a comprehensive range of services including 24/7 Healthcare & Emergency Services, Customized Nutrition Plans, Natural Therapies, Grooming, Boarding, and Retail Therapy all under expert supervision & compassionate care of our experts. 

Our team of dedicated professionals ensures that every aspect of a pet's physical, mental, and emotional health is nurtured to perfection. Join us in providing unparalleled holistic care to our beloved furry companions.

Name: AniCura CHV Porto Hospital Veterinário
Description:
Uma equipa experiente e dinâmica espera-o para ajudar o seu animal a ter uma vida longa e saudável. Tratamos maioritariamente cães e gatos, mas, se tiver alguma outra espécie de animal para ser tratado, não hesite em contatar-nos, pois temos consultas especializadas em espécies exóticas. Porque nos preocupamos com a relação de qualidade e proximidade entre dono e seu animal procuramos manter uma relação de continuidade com os nossos clientes.

O CHV diferencia-se pela experiência da equipa clínica, pela diversidade de serviços, pela localização central e pela disponibilidade de um serviço de urgências com atendimento permanente 24h.

O CHV - Centro Hospitalar Veterinário resulta da vontade de um grupo de médicos veterinários de criar um hospital que concretize os seus ideais médicos, humanos e sociais.

A nosso proposta é: garantir, a qualquer hora ou dia, a prestação dos melhores cuidados médicos ao seu animal como se ele fosse único.

Como médicos experientes e donos de animais, criamos uma estrutura hospitalar que combina excelência técnica (suportada pela vasta experiência profissional e investigação clínica de ponta) com cuidados empáticos ao seu animal. Porque todos temos o mesmo objetivo: a saúde e bem estar do seu animal.

Name: Evidensia Ciudad Real
Description:
Ofrecemos servicios sanitarios especializados para animales las 24 horas del día en la zona de Ciudad Real.
Tanto animales domésticos habituales como animales exóticos. No dudes en llamarnos si tienes alguna consulta médica y pide precio sin ningún compromiso.

Name: Tierklinik Oberhaching
Description:
Die Tierklinik Oberhaching ist eine freie und unabhängige Tierklinik, die zusammen mit ihrer Niederlassung, dem Kleintierzentrum Starnberg in Percha am Starnberger See, zu Deutschlands größten privat geführten Tierkliniken gehört.

Seit nun mehr als 30 Jahren werden in der Tierklinik Oberhaching Kleintiere mit besonderem Schwerpunkt auf Hund und Katze in allen relevanten Teilbereichen der Tiermedizin behandelt und betreut. Um das 
medizinische Wohlergehen der tierischen Patienten kümmern sich mittlerweile mehr als 250 Mitarbeiter:innen, davon über 70 Tierärzt:innen. So gewährleisten wir an beiden Standorten, neben 
modernsten technischen Standards, höchstes tiermedizinisches Niveau für unsere vierbeinigen Patienten und deren Besitzer:innen. 

Neben der Behandlung von Notfällen im 24 Stunden Notdienst an 365 Tagen im Jahr, deckt die Tierklinik das gesamte Behandlungsspektrum für Kleintiere ab. Darunter fallen die Innere Medizin, Chirurgie, Anästhesie, Zahnheilkunde, Augenheilkunde, Neurologie, Gynäkologie, Dermatologie sowie die allgemeine Gesundheitsprophylaxe. Auch in der bildgebenden Diagnostik befindet sich die Tierklinik Oberhaching durch ihre Ausstattung mit CT und MRT auf dem aktuellen Stand der Technik. Unsere Leidenschaft für professionelle tiermedizinische Dienstleistungen zum Wohl unserer Patienten begeistert seit vielen Jahren die klügsten und engagiertesten Köpfe aus unserer Branche. Voneinander und miteinander lernen, Kollegialität und Teamentwicklung werden bei uns großgeschrieben.

Name: PetZone India
Description:
Petzone is building a world-class team of Veterinarians and operational staff, transforming the way animal patients receive medical care, so I'm spending time finding, recruiting, and hiring the best Veterinarians who can help us achieve that goal. Visit our website at www.petzone.in to learn more about what we do and how we live up to our motto of Exceptional Medicine, Compassionate Care.

I've spent decades of my life and a significant amount of money educating myself and honing my skills, and I've loved every minute of it! Now, my primary goal is to identify and develop new talent in the veterinary industry. Petzone assists recent graduates in their professional development. Nothing beats successfully recruiting a talented veterinarian and then watching him/her blossom into a superstar under my tutelage. Knowing that my efforts have an impact on Petzone's future motivates me every day. 

Petzone is large enough to provide world-class training and mentoring, but small enough to provide direct access to leadership. Our new vets learn and are exposed to far more than they would anywhere else.

There’s also nothing quite as fulfilling as taking on experienced and  already accomplished vets and working and even learning from them. For me, learning never stops. 

What matters at Petzone is that the job is done correctly in an ethical and compassionate manner. I also recognise that good ideas can come from anyone, and admire thinkers who think outside the box. The Petzone environment values competence and provides the freedom to exercise that competence. 

If you are interested in opportunities at Petzone, both veterinary and administrative, or would like to connect in the future, please contact me.

Our state-of-the-art Veterinary Center saves the lives of our clients’ pets, while generating critical funding to ensure that the cats and dogs living in our shelter are placed in healthy and loving homes.

Pets Unlimited’s Shelter and Adoption Center saves the lives of hundreds of injured and abused cats and dogs every year but we cannot do it alone. Our work is not possible without community support and generosity from clients and donors like you who care about saving the lives of pets in need.

Name: Canada West Veterinary Specialists
Description:
Canada West Veterinary Specialists is a dedicated referral centre with expertise in core disciplines. We work as an extension of your family veterinarian to provide second opinions or specialized care. Our team of specialists and support staff work together to facilitate the best possible outcome for each patient entrusted in our care by the referring veterinarians and our patients’ families.

The hospital is staffed with experienced doctors and technicians 24 hours a day, 365 days a year. We accept all referrals and strive to provide a high level of care for our patients, our clients and our referring veterinarians. We have access to extensive technology (on-site CT imaging, MRI and the ability to place pacemakers, to name a few), but our strength lies with the clinical expertise and diagnostic knowledge of our specialists as well as the dedication and experience of our hospitalists and support staff.

Name: Veterinary Healthcare Associates
Description:
Veterinary Healthcare Associates began as Maxwell Animal Clinic, established in Winter Haven over 30 years ago by Dr. John Maxwell. Maxwell Animal Clinic was a one-doctor general practice offering preventative care, dentistry, and standard surgical services to the community. As the years passed, Maxwell Animal Clinic evolved into a thriving 10-doctor general, referral, and emergency facility.

Dr. Maxwell mentored Dr. Loren Nations, who is now the owner of Veterinary Healthcare Associates. Dr. Nations is devoted to family and pets and believes they're truly one and the same. Working side by side with Dr. Maxwell, he learned that you could help people by helping their pets. This motivated Dr. Nations to obtain specialty board certification in canine and feline practice in 1999.

Name: BIOSINT NUTRACEUTICALS
Description: The Biosint Nutraceutical’s inception was with the philosophy of “Everything we've ever wanted was another side of challenge” in the year 2004. Today, Biosint Nutraceuticals is the well accepted quality solution providers for improving productivity of animal farming business through simple but diverse nutrient combinations. The organization truly values the culture of simplicity, science & service driven approach and sustainable solutions for the animal agriculture community.                                                                                                 Biosint nutraceuticals inception is an eye opener amongst this industry evolution. Dr. P Ravi’s technocratic vision was focused on farming which took a sharp turn when he realized the gap between local farming conditions and the requirements of the birds in the prevailing challenging environment. He took no time to change the focus of the clients from farm profitability to sustainable farming solutions. Biosint nutraceuticals addressed local issues by developing unique product solutions understanding local animal requirements in existing situations and farm conditions. Biosint nutraceuticals quickly after the state-of-the-art production facility also established the state R & D firm - A & L life sciences for experimenting and developed real-time nutritional solutions for 18 years relentlessly since 2004.                                         Biosint Nutraceuticals recently started the production of chemical feed essentials. The production is focused not only on quality API's like Halquinol, Betaine but it also along with essential feed additives like Vitamin E, Vitamin C and slowly expanding the basket to quality glycinates- quality minerals as well.

Description:
Oferecemos serviços veterinários de qualidade ao domicílio, proporcionando aos animais de companhia o conforto e a segurança na sua própria casa.

Name: AlignCare Health Inc.
Description:
AlignCare is a national One Health healthcare system designed to improve access to veterinary care for families who participate in means-tested assistance programs such as Food Stamps, Medicaid, WIC, Section 8, unemployment and/or SSI. AlignCarealigns community resources and activities resulting in healthier communities.

Community benefits:     
· More families able to access veterinary care     
· More pets recover from an injury/illness     
· Fewer economic euthanasias and relinquishments toanimal welfare organizations     
· More families receive needed emotional support when faced with a medical crisis involving their pets     
· Improved zoonotic disease prevention/control     
· Healthier families and communities     
     
Community Animal Welfare,Social ServicesandPublic HealthProfessionals have:     
· Predictable and consistent options when supporting families needing veterinary care, saving them time and resources     
· Access to trained professionals who support families with pet-related needs     
     
Veterinary Service Providers have:     
· The ability to treat pets of families with limited resources, reducing euthanasia of pets with treatable illnesses/injuries   
· A more significant impact in preventing/controlling zoonotic diseases in their community     
     
Veterinary Social Work Coordinators provide a service to:     
· Families by supporting their mental and emotional health needs related to their petsand connecting them with other community resources     
· Veterinary care teams, when challenged while helping a family with certain limitations and needs

Name: American College of Veterinary Behaviorists (ACVB)
Description:
The American College of Veterinary Behaviorists (ACVB) is the certifying board for veterinarians who are specialty trained to advance the behavioral health of animals through research, science-based behavior education, and the practice of clinical behavioral medicine.


Members of the ACVB:
Are veterinarians trained to assess the relationship between a patient’s health and behavior.
Provide clinical treatment of behavior concerns in all animal species.
Have extensive knowledge of psychotropic medications, their uses, potential side effects and interactions with other medications, and are licensed to prescribe them when indicated.
Perform behavior research that is published in journals of education for all veterinarians.
Lecture nationally and internationally to provide science-based behavior education to veterinarians, veterinary students, technical staff and the public.
Work together to define, educate and certify the veterinary behavior specialists of the future.

The American College of Veterinary Behaviorists (ACVB) is the AVMA-recognized veterinary specialty organization for certification of the ACVB. The ACVB undergoes a comprehensive evaluation by the American Board of Veterinary Specialties (ABVS), a committee of the American Veterinary Medical Association, every three years to ensure that we are maintaining the required standards for our certification process.
