Name: Fertilife - Fertilização In Vitro FIV
Description:
Somos um laboratório de biotecnologia animal especializado em fertilização in vitro assistida (FIV).

A FIV permite que a fêmea de alto valor genético produza vários bezerros(as) em um mesmo ano, o que não é possível na monta natural e nem na inseminação artificial.

Está técnica evita o descarte precoce de fêmeas geneticamente superiores devido a fatores diversos que impeçam que a reprodução ocorra de forma natural. Com esta técnica, é possível puncionar bezerras e novilhas, diminuindo o intervalo entre gerações. O resultado é o melhoramento genético significativo do rebanho em pouquíssimo espaço de tempo.

Name: Smart.Vet
Description:
Smart.Vet is a 24/7 virtual care service that supports veterinary hospitals with our network of over 150 Ontario and British Columbia licensed veterinarians and RVTs. 

We are another option for your clients when you are not available to see their pet, operating on a referral basis with local hospitals. 

Whether you are having a particularly busy day OR you are looking for support for your clients after-hours, we are there when you need us.

Name: VetAtHome
Description:
VetAtHome- en ambulerande djurklinik 

VetAtHome är precis som ett vanligt veterinärbesök, fast hemma i tryggheten hos dig och ditt djur. 

Vi kan göra det mesta som man kan på en klinik, såsom medicinska utredningar, vaccinationer, kemiska kastrationer, besiktningar och chipmärkning, provtagningar, utreda hud eller mag- och tarmproblem, göra seniorkollar och mycket mer. 

Att vara i sin hemmiljö minskar oftast stressen för djuret, vilket gör att vi lättare kan ställa rätt diagnos och ge korrekt behandling. 

Vi minskar risken för att ditt djur blir smittat i ett väntrum och dessutom slipper både du och ditt djur transport till och från klinik.

Boka din tid online eller hör av dig till oss för att boka en tid med en av våra veterinärer, alla dagar i veckan, även kvällstid.

•NYHET• 

Sommaren 2024 öppnade vi även vår egna djurklinik. Välkomna att boka din tid hos oss. Det gör ni enklast via vår hemsida eller per telefon eller mail. 

Varmt välkomna 

VetAtHome.se

Name: Ocean State Veterinary Specialists
Description:
Ocean State Veterinary Specialists (OSVS) is a state-of-the-art facility providing 24-hour emergency care and specialty services for companion animals. The hospital is staffed by experienced emergency clinicians and specialists in Internal Medicine, Surgery, Radiology, Critical Care, Ophthalmology, Oncology, Neurology, Exotic animal medicine, Clinical pathology, and Cardiology.

The hospital is dedicated to providing the highest level of veterinary care to our patients in an atmosphere of compassion and excellence. OSVS is also an educational center, providing advanced training for veterinarians, veterinary students, and veterinary technicians. Our beautiful facility in Rhode Island services all of Southern New England, including Massachusetts and Connecticut.

Our satellite hospital, Bay State Veterinary Emergency and Specialty Services (BSVESS), is located in Swansea, MA and is also open 24-hours a day for emergency care. The hospital is staffed by internship-trained emergency clinicians who have constant access to the specialists at Ocean State Veterinary Specialists, allowing them the ability to offer the best information and care available. Consultations with board-certified specialists in surgery and internal medicine are available by appointment.

The hospital is dedicated to providing the highest level of veterinary care to our patients in an atmosphere of compassion and excellence.

Name: The Vet Vault
Description:
We believe that as a group, and as individuals, the talented, intelligent and passionate humans who make up this profession have SO much value to bring the world. And we want to help you to do just that.

The Vet Vault is a space where we talk to high performing individuals from varying niches of the veterinary profession who have found ways to thrive in their careers and make veterinary science work for them. From cutting edge specialists to inspired new graduates – we unlock knowledge and passion through open and honest conversations to reveal the thoughts, beliefs and habits that will help you create the career that you always dreamed you’d have. 

In the Vet Vault Clinical podcasts we pick the brains of world class specialists in small animal medicine, surgery, and emergency and critical care to find all the insights, updates, tips and pitfalls that you need to lift your clinical knowledge to new levels. Three episodes per week. No lectures – just the stuff you need to know for better patient outcomes and to improve your clinical confidence. 

In the Vet Vault Thrive podcast we dive deep with some of the most inspiring and energised people in and around the vet profession to unlock the tips, tools and inspiration for making veterinary science work for you.

Name: Milk Plan Soluções Agropecuárias
Description:
A Milk Plan Soluções Agropecuárias foi criada em 2018 com o objetivo de se tornar referência em consultoria na área de pecuária leiteira no Brasil.
Os sócio-proprietários André Andrade e Lucas Repolês são os responsáveis pela gestão dos projetos. São médicos veterinários formados pela Universidade Federal de Viçosa com especialização em Pecuária Leiteira e mais de 8 anos de experiência no campo. Ambos trabalharam no projeto Educampo do Sebrae Minas em parceria com a Danone e Vigor respectivamente.
Entendemos que o ponto chave de qualquer projeto são as pessoas que estão no contato direto com o produtor. Nossa equipe de campo é composta por médicos veterinários e zootecnistas especialistas ou em fase de especialização em pecuária leiteira, rigorosamente selecionados e devidamente capacitados. A cada semestre realizamos um treinamento com a equipe para balizar conhecimentos e continuar nos desenvolvendo como técnicos e como pessoas.
Nosso diferencial é o foco nas pessoas. Nossos gestores acompanham de perto a equipe técnica de campo na execução das ações estabelecendo proximidade e confiança com o produtor fundamental para consolidar os resultados.

Name: A Veterinária Distribuidora
Description: Fundada em 1992, a A Veterinária Distribuidora LTDA é uma empresa mineira que atua no mercado veterinário,. Há 28 anos abastecemos petshops e supermercados com Produtos e Medicamentos Veterinários.

Name: Care Center Vets
Description:
Over twenty years ago, an idea was hatched between a few Cincinnati local veterinarians. That idea grew into the first 24-hour Emergency and Specialty Veterinary Hospital in the Tri-State. Now, all these years later, our team spans multiple specialties across two locations, and we are continuing to grow every year. With that growth comes additional opportunities to welcome strong, dedicated individuals who are looking for a career more than just a job.

Our success is achieved by providing rewarding careers to all of our team members, and being a compassionate, competent and ever-present resource for our referring community. Our team spans multiple specialties across two locations, and we are continuing to grow every year. With that growth comes additional opportunities to welcome strong, dedicated individuals who are looking for a career more than just a job. You will be provided with on-the job training to succeed in your role. With a structured advancement program, you will have tools at your fingertips to grow your skills, knowledge, and income as a veterinary professional.

Care Center is a 24-hour, seven-day-a-week emergency and critical care facility. If your family veterinarian is not available, there is an experienced emergency clinician on duty at all times at Care. We also function as an extension of your veterinarian's practice with specialists (available by referral) in Critical Care/24-hour Emergency, Acupuncture, Anesthesiology, Cardiology, Integrative Medicine, Internal Medicine, Medical, Radiation, and Surgical Oncology, Radioiodine (I-131), Radiology, and Surgery.

We are AAHA Accredited, earning both Traditional and Referral Accreditation in both our Cincinnati and Dayton locations. We also house the Tri-State's only animal blood bank.

Name: Philadelphia Animal Welfare Society (PAWS)
Description: PAWS is a 501(c)3 non-profit organization dedicated to saving Philadelphia’s homeless and at-risk pets. PAWS is the city’s largest rescue partner and provider of affordable, basic veterinary care for pet owners and rescue organizations that cannot otherwise access it. Each year, PAWS finds loving homes for thousands of animals in need, and enables thousands of families to keep their cherished pets. PAWS is working to make Philadelphia a no-kill city where every savable pet is guaranteed a home.

Name: Norvets
Description:
Norvets is an online veterinary consultation platform founded by XLRI and IIM students that aims to provide pet owners with easy access to licensed veterinarians for medical advice and treatment. 

Through Norvets, pet owners can book virtual consultations with experienced veterinarians, receive personalized treatment plans, and follow up remotely with their veterinarians for continued care.

We aim to revolutionize the pet healthcare industry by making veterinary care more accessible and convenient for pet owners in India.

Name: Abo Donkol Feed
Description:
بادرت شركة أبو دنقل للأعلاف على خطوة هامة عندما قامت الشركة بتأسيس مصنع نموذجي لإنتاج كافة أنواع الأعلاف بما فيه ذلك الداجن والحيواني والسمكي، ويعتبر إنشاء هذا المصنع نقطة تحول كبيرة بالنسبة للشركة والسوق المصري في مجال الأعلاف.
ويعمل المصنع الذي تأسس طبقاً لأعلى معايير الجودة والدقة والأمن والسلامة العالمية بطاقة إنتاجية تصل إلى أكثر من 300 ألف طن سنوياً من أجود أنواع الأعلاف المتعددة في أنواعها، ويهدف هذا الصرح الصناعي الرائد إلى تلبية احتياجات السوق المصري من كافة أنواع الأعلاف خاصة البروتين الحيواني مع إمكانية انتاج اغذية ذات طبيعة خاصة لفصائل حيوانية اخري ومتعددة.
وتهدف شركة أبو دنقل للأعلاف من إنشاء هذا المصنع المتميز للإسهام في الطفرة الاقتصادية التي تشهدها مصر والمشاركة في تنمية الاقتصاد الوطنية المصري من خلال انتاج وتوزيع أميز أنواع الأعلاف بكافة أنواعها وفئاتها وفقاً للمعايير العالمية، وتسعى الشركة في المرحلة القادمة تصدير منتجاتها للعديد من الأسواق في المنطقة وحول العالم.
وحرصاً من شركة أبو دنقل للأعلاف على تجهيز مصنع الأعلاف طبقاً لأخر ما توصل إليه العمل الحديث والتكنولوجيا فائقة الدقة، قررت الشركة الاعتماد على الخبرة الألمانية التي تشتهر بأنها الأفضل على الاطلاق حول العالم في مجال الأعلاف وكذلك العديد من القطاعات الصناعية الأخرى، وحصلت شركة أبو دنقل على كل المعدات والأجهزة التكنولوجية اللازمة لتأسيس مصنع تتماشى منتجاته مع متطلبات السوق المصري وتنافس أجود أنواع الأعلاف حول العالم من شركة أماندوس كول " AMANDUS KAHL" " الألمانية الرائدة في معدات تصنيع الأعلاف.
وسعياً من الشركة أبو دنقل للأعلاف ضمان الجودة والتأكد من أن أفضل وأميز أنواع الأعلاف الداجنة والحيوانية والسمكية تصل إلى كافة العالمين في المجال في مصر طبقاً لأعلى معدلات الجودة والدقة حول العالم، أسست الشركة معمل للرقابة الدائمة على الجودة ضماناً لمطابقتها للمواصفات العالمية من كافة النواحي، ونجحت الشركة من خلال هذا المعمل الذي يتبع أحدث الأساليب العلمية على الحصول على شاهدة صمان الجودة الأيزو” “ISO

Name: Wivet
Description: Postula acá!

Name: Oncovet
Description:
Depuis 2000, Oncovet a développé des soins vétérinaires précurseurs exclusivement référés au service des animaux, de leur maître et de leur praticien habituel.

En visant l’excellence, Oncovet s’est construit autour d’un plateau technique de pointe et d’une équipe dynamique dans laquelle se rejoignent spécialistes et passionnés de la première heure, épaulés par un personnel dévoué et compétent.

Oncovet dispose aujourd’hui du plateau technique et des compétences humaines permettant le diagnostic et le traitement des maladies cancéreuses chez le chien et le chat, ou d’autres affections chroniques ou aiguës (notamment cardiaques, rénales). Nous disposons d’un des rares centres de dialyse canine en France, pour le traitement de l’insuffisance rénale aiguë de vos animaux. Notre clinique propose également toutes les technologies modernes pour accompagner au mieux vos chiens et chats durant le traitement de leur cancer : Radiothérapie, chimiothérapie, curiethérapie…

Name: Austin Veterinary Emergency and Specialty Center
Description:
The Austin Veterinary Emergency and Specialty Center (AVES) is a comprehensive veterinary hospital consisting of state of the art technology and compassionate doctors and staff, which serves as an extension of family veterinary practices. Our team of highly trained board-certified specialists and support staff are committed to providing the highest level of integrated care for each and every patient. We utilize advanced diagnostic procedures, cutting-edge technology, and innovative thinking to help ensure that our client's treatment is delivered with the highest level of quality. Our brand new facility was designed to ensure that the pet owner and patient experiences are nothing short of exceptional.

Currently, AVES offers 24/7 emergency and referral specialty care in the departments of Surgery & Orthopedics, Oncology, Internal Medicine, Critical Care, Radiology, Interventional Radiology, Anesthesiology, and Neurology.  Additionally, Cardiology appointments are available  by CVCA Cardiac Care for Pets.

Name: Laboratório Genesi
Description: O Laboratório Genesi tem por finalidade atuar nas mais diferentes áreas de Diagnóstico Laboratorial na Medicina Veterinária. Com total dedicação, oferecemos com exclusividade a realização de mais de 500 exames.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Dr. Carol's Pets, LLC.
Description: CAROL OSBORNE, D.V.M., is recognized as an authority on alternative and holistic veterinary medicine and the new clinical science of aging-related pet diseases. A Board Certified Diplomat of the American Board of Anti-Aging Medicine, she has pioneered the exploration of new therapies for the treatment and prevention of age-related degenerative disease, as well as promotion of optimum health and performance for pets. Dr. Osborne created and patented PAAWS, Pet Anti-Aging Wellness System and authored Naturally Healthy Dogs and Naturally Healthy Cats. She has been featured in USA Today, The Los Angeles Times and the New York Daily News. An Emmy-nominated television journalist, Dr. Osborne has gained national prominence through her frequent appearances on popular shows including Today in New York, Good Day L.A., and Discovery’s Animal Planet. Currently, she devotes much of her time to the research and development of advanced biosciences for the benefit of animal health and welfare. For details visit www.carolonpets.com or call Dr. Carol’s veterinary office toll free at 866-372-2765.

Name: Hospital Veterinário Estimma
Description:
O Estimma iniciou suas atividades no ano de 2007 como Clínica Veterinária 24h e Pet Shop. 
Em 2017, a clínica foi elevada à categoria de Hospital 24h.

Situado na cidade de Campinas-SP, o Hospital Estimma é administrado e composto por uma Equipe de profissionais competentes, dedicados e comprometidos com a vida animal.
A equipe de Médicos Veterinários é formada por Clínicos Gerais e Especialistas.

Com uma infraestrutura de cerca de 2.200 m², o ESTIMMA é um centro completo composto por: consultórios, centro cirúrgico, sala de recuperação, internação, UTI, raio-x, ultrassom, hemogasometria, laboratório de análises clínicas,centro oncologia, farmácia e banho e tosa.

Sinônimo de profissionalismo e confiança, com uma equipe de profissionais qualificados e extremamente competentes, o ESTIMMA hoje é referência no mercado e se destaca na região de Campinas e São Paulo.

Name: Tierklinik Ismaning
Description: Die Tierklinik Ismaning ist eine überregionale Überweisungsklinik für Kleintiere und zeichnet sich durch die Fachbereiche Orthopädie, Weichteil- und Neurochirurgie, komplette Innere Medizin, Gynäkologie, Kardiologie, Augenheilkunde, Onkologie, Dermatologie, Zahnheilkunde und Notfalltiermedizin aus. Ein weiterer Schwerpunkt ist die Endoprothetik. Die Kleintierklinik ist mit hochmoderner Diagnose- und OP-Technik ausgestattet.

Name: BluePearl Pet Hospice
Description: We are passionate about offering care in the comfort of home. We share our skills and experiences to support families in making the most appropriate choices for their pet. Our focus is to return the center of care to the home while offering the best control of pain and symptoms, enhancing their quality of life for the best rest of life.

Name: Delmac Do Brasil Ltda.
Description: Delmac Do Brasil Ltda. is a company based in Brazil.

Name: Global Animal Health
Description:
Empowering Vets Worldwide (https://global-ah.net/)
Looking for a trusted partner in animal health?

Global Animal Health is a company that provides animal health products for a variety of animals including equine, camel, companion animals, cattle, sheep & goats, poultry, and pigeons. They believe that animals deserve to be treated responsibly and that they should be protected from diseases.

Explore informative content for animal health professionals:
https://global-ah.net/

Name: Animal Farma Farmácias de Manipulação Veterinária
Description:
Rede de Farmácias de Manipulação Veterinária, pioneira do ramo. Sendo a primeira farmácia de manipulação exclusivamente veterinária de Santa Catarina e uma das primeiras do Brasil. Há mais de 10 anos no mercado, trabalhamos sempre para cumprir nosso propósito de cuidar da saúde dos animais com dedicação, segurança, qualidade, exclusividade, praticidade e menor estresse, oferecendo a dose exata, em fórmulas inovadoras, formatos diferenciados e com sabores atrativos para facilitar a administração dos medicamentos e garantir o bem-estar dos animais.
Manipulamos medicamentos de uso veterinário, de antibióticos, anti-inflamatórios, antifúngicos, vermífugos, até shampoos, sprays, pomadas e uma linha natural completa de cosméticos e higiene.
Hoje atuamos com 6 unidades, em 3 estados do país.

Name: VCA ASEC - Animal Specialty & Emergency Center
Description:
VCA ASEC is a multi-specialty veterinary referral hospital located in West Los Angeles. With board-certified specialists, cutting-edge 24 hour critical care, state-of-the-art equipment, and a “team approach”, our goal is to work in partnership with the referring veterinarian, for the benefit of the pet.

ASEC started as a veterinary surgical referral clinic 30 years ago, and is now one of the largest referral and specialty hospitals in the country with veterinary specialists in critical care, cardiology, internal medicine, oncology and radiology, as well as surgery.

As an academic veterinary hospital, ASEC promotes the health and well-being of companion animals through advanced treatment and education.

At ASEC – our mission is to provide the best quality of care and service for the patient, the client, and the referring veterinarian.

Name: Animal Welfare Society
Description:
Founded in 1967, Animal Welfare Society (AWS) is a private 501(c)(3) non-profit organization located on a beautiful 40-acre property in Kennebunk, Maine. For more than 50 years, the organization has been a local and regional leader in progressive animal welfare and a champion of the human-animal bond. Each year, 20,000 pets and community members benefit from AWS’ programs and services.

AWS’ state-of-the-art, Fear-Free Adoption Center offers safe and secure accommodations for a variety of companion animals including dogs, cats, rabbits, birds, and small mammals. It also functions as the municipal impound facility for local animal control. Furthermore, the organization works with shelters and rescue groups in other parts of the state and country to transport pets to AWS for adoption. While bringing together families through adoption and reuniting lost pets with their loved ones, AWS’ community-focused approach promotes and protects the pets and people of Southern Maine.

Beyond adoptions, AWS offers a comprehensive suite of Stay@Home resources designed to keep pets and their people together, especially during times of hardship. These resources include temporary pet boarding, pet food and supplies and behavioral training assistance.

Furthermore, AWS’ on-site Community Veterinary Clinic provides affordable and accessible care to both resident (shelter) animals and pets belonging to local community members. The Clinic’s Companion Program offers discounts on many veterinary services to community members who qualify financially. AWS also supports spay/neuter efforts through Maine by organizing and staffing mobile surgery and wellness clinics statewide, particularly in areas lacking sufficient veterinary resources.

The organization’s work is driven by a compassionate and professional staff, supported by 300+ dedicated foster families and volunteers.

Name: Arff! Pet Care
Description:
ARFF PET CARE AND AT-HOME SITTING

Arff’s story is about loving animals

Arff has provided support to companion animals and their caretakers since 1985.    

Barbara Bailin and Arff display impeccable discipline and broad working knowledge across animals and their breed, size, age, and circumstantial differences.   

Arff  offers flexible and reasonable rates for pet sitting right in the comfort and convenience of your own home, PLUS playgroup for species socialization, pet taxi, field trips, brushing, meds, and more.  

Complete boutique pet care are provided for your own companion animal(s) in the comfort and convenience of your own home.  

Petuewy@GMail.com 
781-888-3276   

Leave your furry friends in good hands with Arff, and enjoy peace of mind and happy, healthy animals when you return to them.

Name: VetJobs.eu
Description:
Vetjobs.eu is de grootste onafhankelijke vacaturesite van Nederland en België die zich volledig richt op de diergeneeskundige sector. Of je nu een baan zoekt als practiserend dierenarts, paraveterinair of juist iets in de industrie, wij bieden een breed aanbod aan vacatures voor de diergeneeskundig opgeleide professional.

Gratis voor werkzoekenden en betaalbaar voor werkgevers. Vanaf 75 euro staat uw vacature online.

Name: Groupe Vétérinaire Eolia
Description:
Eolia, c’est au départ, l’histoire d’un homme, Laurent Brun et d’une vision entrepreneuriale.

Il ouvre en 1997 à Sorgues près d’Avignon, la Clinique Vétérinaire Sainte Anne et pendant plus de 10 ans, il va développer son établissement avec conviction et détermination : création d’un plateau technique de haute performance, élargissement et spécialisation d’une équipe, amélioration et diversification des services, parcours de soin et parcours clients revisités : confort, bien-être, sécurité des animaux, écoute active des propriétaires…
Sa motivation et son engagement l’amènent, en 2014, à créer les urgences vétérinaires, qui sont aujourd’hui le principal service de garde du Grand Avignon.

Eolia, c’est ensuite une histoire de rencontres. Celles de Virginie Ferri et Pauline Roche, respectivement Directrice de clinique et Responsable des Ressources Humaines. Véritables soutiens au développement de la clinique, elles seront essentielles dans l’évolution du projet et le nouveau positionnement de l’entreprise.

Eolia, c’est aussi une histoire d’opportunités. Celles des rachats entre 2017 et 2021 de quatre cabinets vétérinaires autour d’Avignon suite au départ en retraite de confrères. Ces acquisitions ont permis une mutualisation des ressources. Ainsi est née le Groupe Eolia représentant aujourd’hui une quarantaine de collaborateurs répartis sur cinq sites d’activité.
Eolia, pour finir, c’est une histoire de liberté, d’humanité et d’entreprenariat vétérinaire. C’est une équipe en perpétuelle ébullition et à l’écoute, qui souhaite poursuivre le développement du Groupe et créer une communauté de vétérinaires associés, eux-mêmes entrepreneurs, avec l’envie de devenir ensemble la référence santé animale en région d’Avignon.

Groupe Eolia
Simplement vétérinaire

Name: Veterinary Specialty Center of Tucson
Description:
Just as your family physician may refer you to a specialist to further investigate an illness or injury; your family veterinarian may suggest that your pet see a board certified, veterinary specialist. Together with the care of your family veterinarian, our commitment is to ensure that your best friend receives the highest quality compassionate care available.

When you choose the Veterinary Specialty Center of Tucson, you can be confident you are selecting the specialty and emergency medical center of choice for family veterinarians and pet owners.

Every day, our dedicated team of experienced board-certified veterinarians, veterinary technicians and support staff use their extensive experience, skill and love for animals to provide your pet with the best chance of a happy, healthy recovery. With a state-of-the-art, award winning facility, only the Veterinary Specialty Center of Tucson offers this depth of knowledge, scope of expertise and level of care under one roof.

Considered among the nation’s leaders in veterinary specialized healthcare, our doctors at the Veterinary Specialty Center of Tucson deliver compassionate, comprehensive veterinary emergency and specialty care in the fields of Emergency and Critical Care, Dentistry, Dermatology, Neurology/Neurosurgery, Internal Medicine, Surgery, Ophthalmology, Radiology, Behavior, and collaboration with the Valley Fever for Excellence.

Name: Vets & Pets Colombia
Description:
Somos importadores y distribuidores autorizados de IDEXX para Centro América, El Caribe y Colombia, mejorando la labor diaria de los veterinarios con soluciones de diagnóstico confiables, rápidas e innovadoras.

Nuestro compromiso es claro: apoyar a las clínicas y laboratorios de la región con tecnología de vanguardia, asesoría cercana y un servicio que marque la diferencia en el cuidado de las mascotas.

Porque juntos, hacemos posible una medicina veterinaria más precisa, accesible y humana.

Name: Altano France SAS
Description:
Créé en 2017, le groupe Altano est un réseau international de cliniques vétérinaires pour chevaux, plaçant au cœur de son projet le bien-être animal, le maintien de hauts standards d'expérience médicale, le respect et le développement de ses employés dans un modèle opérationnel durable. 

Avec plus de 70 cliniques et cabinets dans le monde, y compris en Allemagne, en France, au Danemark, en Suède, au Benelux, aux USA, en Nouvelle Zélande, en Suisse ou encore au Canada, nous construisons une organisation de référence pour diffuser notre vision en tant qu'acteur majeur du bien-être des chevaux et pionnier mondial d'une médecine vétérinaire moderne et innovante fondée sur des valeurs d'excellence, d'amélioration continue, d'éthique et de responsabilité sociétale. Nous croyons que le développement professionnel et le bien-être personnel de nos collaborateurs fera d'Altano un employeur de choix. Pour nous donner les moyens de nos ambitions, nous avons d'ores et déjà créé l'Altano Academy, un forum d'échanges, de formations et de partage de connaissances avec les meilleurs professionnels.

ALTANO, UN GROUPE, UNE VISION.

Name: Orangutan Veterinary Aid (OVAID)
Description:
Orangutan Veterinary Aid (OVAID) is a UK charity that supports vets working on the front line of orangutan rescue,  whether this is from human/orangutan conflict or the illegal wildlife trade. These vet teams often work in difficult, demanding and dangerous conditions with minimal equipment. 

Having volunteered for several years in orangutan rehabilitation centres across Borneo & Sumatra, the need to provide vital veterinary equipment, medicines and specialist training to aid vets working to save the critically endangered orangutan was recognised. Dr Nigel Hicks & Sara Fell Hicks co founded OVAID (a voluntary run grassroots charity) in 2014 to fulfil these needs. 

OVAID provides on the ground specialist training to orangutan NGO’s vet teams and also runs a scholarship for Indonesian vets working in orangutan conservation to gain specialist veterinary training in the U.K. 
OVAID dedicate their time, veterinary experience and knowledge to both practically help the vet teams on the ground in Indonesia and to spread the word on issues of orangutan veterinary welfare and conservation of their precious habitat through public and educational speaking.

In 2018 OVAID won the prestigious IFAW Animal Action International Conservation Award.

Orangutan Veterinary Aid ‘Where Compassionate Conservation Meets Veterinary Medicine.’

Name: AQUA VET
Description: AQUA VET is consistently supporting the Mediterranean aquaculture sector with a wide portfolio of specialised health products, innovative equipment and customised services. We operate since 1992, based in Athens, Greece, representing some of the most prestigious firms in the aquaculture industry.

Name: Wisdom Vet
Description:
With nearly 25 years of experience, Wisdom is a leading supplier and exclusive distributor of world-renowned veterinary
medicines, supplements, and animal healthcare products in the UAE. Serving sectors such as equine, camel, bovine,
poultry, and pets, Wisdom provides innovative solutions that enhance health, performance, and productivity.
Wisdom proudly supplies high-quality products to government
institutions, private facilities, farms, and clinics across the UAE.
From enhancing the performance of racehorses and camels to
improving the health and productivity of dairy cattle and
poultry, Wisdom is a trusted partner for veterinarians and
animal growers. Partnering with globally recognized
manufacturers, Wisdom ensures its offerings meet the highest
international standards while addressing the UAE's unique

Name: Anka Hoof Care
Description:
ANKA Hoof Care (Ankapodol SL) 

En 1988 ANKA Cuidado de Pezuñas comenzó con el recorte de pezuñas comprando el primer potro completamente hidráulico siendo pioneros en España.

Desde entonces el desarrollo de nuevas técnicas y la evolución de la maquinaria han sido una constante en el Grupo ANKA que ha ido expandiendo sus actividades hasta englobar toda la actividad en torno a la pezuña, desde el tratamiento diario a la fabricación de maquinaria específica.

Name: NDSU Veterinary Diagnostic Laboratory
Description: The North Dakota State University Veterinary Diagnostic Laboratory is an accredited, full service laboratory offering toxicology, bacteriology, virology, molecular diagnostic, clinical and anatomic pathology, parasitology and serology testing services.

Referenza Specialistica Veterinaria è un servizio innovativo offerto ai Medici Veterinari da un gruppo di strutture esclusivamente specialistiche, grazie alla presenza al loro interno di medici altamente qualificati, di tecnologia all'avanguardia e procedure dedicate alla relazione con il Medico Veterinario referente.
.
Un progetto per creare sinergie con i Medici Veterinari desiderosi di un servizio di esclusiva  referenza, altamente specializzato e professionale, cosi integrato da potere essere considerato  un reparto esterno della tua struttura, con unico obiettivo condiviso: il benessere, la cura per gli Animali  e un’attenzione  verso la preoccupazione dei  proprietari. 

CURIAMO INSIEME IL TUO PAZIENTE

Description: MVET.CH manages veterinary practices in Switzerland. We have a dedicated telemedicine mobile app with the capability for online consultations and live support chat with European veterinarians.

Description: VetFamily is een collectief voor ondernemende, zelfstandige dierenklinieken. VetFamily ondersteunt haar klinieken op het gebied van inkoop, facilitaire dienstverlening, nascholing en praktijkondersteuning. Voor zowel gezelschapsdieren, paard en rundvee.

Name: PettoCare
Description: Pettocare is a petcare company that offers a wide range of products for pets and their owners. We are a leading e-commerce retailer for pet products, and our mission is to make it easier for pet owners to find and purchase the products they need. We carry a large selection of high-quality pet food, treats, toys, accessories, and more from top brands, and we offer free shipping on orders over $50. Plus, our innovative customer service features make it easy for pet owners to find the right products for their pets. With Pettocare, it's easier than ever to take care of your beloved furry friend.

Name: Alabama Wildlife Center
Description:
Founded in 1977 as a small, home-based, all-volunteer organization, the Alabama Wildlife Center is now Alabama’s oldest and largest wildlife rehabilitation facility and annually receives over 2,000 birds from more than 100 different species. AWC is a nonprofit organization whose dual mission is to provide medical and rehabilitative care for Alabama’s injured and orphaned native birds in order to permit their return to the wild, and to educate people in order to heighten awareness and appreciation of Alabama’s native wildlife.

The Center's primary services are a native wild bird rehabilitation clinic, a public wildlife help line, and a variety of educational programs. Visitors are welcome to tour the Center and experience the fascinating details of wildlife rehabilitation.

Since its inception, well over 50,000 native Alabama wild animals have been helped because of the efforts of the Alabama Wildlife Center. The organization has been in continuous service 365 days a year for over 30 years.

Name: Simmons & Associates, Inc.
Description:
Connecting veterinarians and practices since 1977.
Simmons & Associates prides itself in providing expertise for buying, selling and appraising veterinary practices. Simmons specializes exclusively in veterinary practice sales, appraisals, brokering and consultation. No individual or firm has helped more veterinarians achieve their dreams of buying their own practice or reaping the rewards of their efforts by offering their veterinary practice for sale.

With 11 national offices, we have local business advisors who are committed to setting new standards of excellence for the profession overall. Veterinary practitioners nationwide rely on Simmons for brokerage, buyer agency, appraisals, and consulting services.

Name: ESAVA
Description: The Egyptian Small Animals Veterinary Association (ESAVA) is dedicated to advancing the skills of Egyptian veterinarians, connecting them with international expertise, and developing standardized medical guidelines supported by a precise national database

Name: Vetofficine
Description:
Vetofficine est un service complet par abonnement qui inclut : magazine trimestriel, site, hotline vétérinaire de la rédaction, formations (web-confèrences et présentielles), Chaine YouTube, Facebool, Linkedin...100 % dédié au développement du rayon vétérinaire en pharmacie.
Nos partenaires-clients sont les pharmaciens et préparateurs, les laboratoires vétérinaires, les groupements de pharmaciens, les répartiteurs...
Notre approche pour les annonceurs est innovante : multicanal numérique et papier, partenariat de diffusion avec les groupements et les répartiteurs pour le développement du rayon
Notre approche pour les abonnes est originale : site 100 % dédié au conseil vétérinaire, hotline vétérinaire, formations... concept de formation exclusif : méthode ACF - analyse de rayons vétérinaires par compartiments - cas de comptoir - actualités - produits....

Name: Bicho Vivo Consultoria
Description:
A BICHO VIVO CONSULTORIA  nasceu com o propósito da prestação de serviços relacionados com Medicina de Animais Selvagens, e para tal conta com o auxílio de profissionais especialistas em Medicina Veterinária, Biologia, técnicos e auxiliares de campo, dentre outras áreas relacionadas, para compor a equipe em projetos e assessorias.
Atua na área ambiental em processos de resgates e monitoramentos de fauna, licenciamento ambiental, avaliação dos impactos sobre meio biótico, manejo de fauna silvestre e sinantrópica tais como javalis, jacarés, serpentes, cães e gatos ferais, dentre outros; também atua no manejo de capivaras de vida livre, monitorando populações tanto em zona urbana quanto rural.
Oferecemos soluções para criatórios e zoológicos, podendo atuar desde implantação e adequação do projeto nas exigências dos órgãos ambientais, até assistência técnica especializada para manter o plantel em ótimas condições de saúde e produção.
A nossa equipe atende animais silvestres e exóticos de estimação e conta com uma experiência acumulada ao longo de 6 anos, além de vários cursos periódicos de aperfeiçoamento. Possuímos equipamentos para realizar capturas, resgates, procedimentos clínicos e transporte de animais silvestres com segurança.

Veterinary Vision offers a dedicated ophthalmology referral service for cases referred throughout the UK.

Description:
Hospital Veterinario en el centro de Barcelona. 
Para perros y gatos.
Disponemos de 2 entradas separadas: Hospital canino, y Hospital Felino.
En calle Balmes numero 205. 

Disponemos de todos los servicios veterinarios: medicina general, medicina interna, cirugía general y especializada, cirugía de mínima invasión,  traumatología, neurología, oftalmología, cardiología, reproducción, diagnóstico por imagen (TAC, ecografía, radiología), laboratorio propio, hospitalización, medicina transfusiones, oncología, dermatología, odontología y cirugía maxilofacial, etología, asesoramiento nutricional, certificados de viaje.

Abierto para urgencias 24h en el centro de Barcelona

Hospital Veterinario acreditado como Hospital "Fear Free" por la CAWEC

Parking gratuíto

Name: PetNut - Nutrição e Vida Saudável
Description:
PETNUT. Vida Saudável para seu Pet! Tanto Cão como Gato.

Temos um diferencial a preparamos e elaboramos apenas dietas prescritivas, tanto para animais saudáveis como para os que precisam de cuidados especiais.

Não trabalhamos com refeições prontas, todas nossas receitas são feitas sob medida e por encomenda, sendo totalmente personalizadas para o pet, com produtos naturais, sempre frescos e com tratamento profilático.

Veterinários Nutrólogos e Clínicos fazem parte de nosso time. Essa equipe não faz atendimento clínico aos tutores, o objetivo dela é analisar as dietas e dar suporte aos veterinários dos tutores.

Temos também nutricionista para acompanhar a preparação das dietas, garantindo o processo de boas práticas de produção e tornando tudo muito seguro e eficiente.

Para o atendimento ao Tutor, é absolutamente necessário que ele tenha um veterinário ou busque um durante o processo inicial de adaptação do pet a alimentação natural. Essa é uma exigência que faz parte do propósito de nossa empresa.

Se necessário, possuímos uma rede parceira de Veterinários para indicação aos tutores. Essa rede de veterinários clínicos e nutrólogos são especialistas também nas mais diversas patologias, o que garantirá mais segurança e confiança aos tutores e pets.

Nosso objetivo nessa indicação é ter uma parceria com os veterinários e tutores, para que sempre se busque uma vida saudável para os pets, não buscamos recompensa financeira alguma indicando esse veterinários, nem eles em nos indicar, prefiramos reverter para o tutor algum desconto que o profissional possa estar oferecendo, do que uma remuneração para a PetNut. 

Mais do que preparar alimentação natural e saudável de qualidade,  nosso objetivo é que o pet tenha uma vida completa, e o nosso atendimento e propósito busca mostrar esse diferencial. Estamos sempre junto ao tutor e ao veterinário. 

Sabemos e sentimos tudo isso porque também temos nossos amigos Pets que nos esperam com alegria todos os dias!

Name: ZebraVet Australia Pty Ltd
Description:
ZebraVet is an Australian owned veterinary wholesaler. For over 23 years we have supplied our valued customers with great quality disposables at exceptional prices.

At ZebraVet we specialise in providing a full range of generic disposable products, including all the well-known brands.
Our generics are produced by ISO 9001 accredited manufacturers. This means they have attained an internationally recognised standard for the manufacture of human medical products.  To give you innovative options, we also take the time to source products from the human market. 

At ZebraVet, we know what it’s like to run a business and we understand that looking after our customers is paramount.   Our enthusiastic team can assist you with your practice’s specific requirements.  

We deliver Australia wide, and now with warehouses in both Brisbane and Melbourne, we’re never too far away.
We would love to offer you and your practice significant savings and become your veterinary disposables specialist.

After all at ZebraVet...............our Price is your Profit!

Name: Central Texas Veterinary Specialty & Emergency Hospital
Description: Central Texas Veterinary Specialty & Emergency Hospital provides referral and emergency services in Emergency & Critical Care, Surgery, Allergy & Dermatology, Rehabilitation, Conditioning & Massage, Neurology, and Canine Sports Therapy for companion animals. Each department of the hospital functions and interacts together to provide pets with the best care possible in a "team approach." At CTVSEH your pet and you are the primary concerns. The Doctors and staff at CTVSEH are dedicated to providing our clients with an honest and accurate assessment of their pet's medical condition. The best treatment and/or diagnostic plans are formulated for each pet based on our client's desires and the information provided to us. Appointments are made by obtaining a referral from a primary care veterinarian for specialty services. Emergency Care is on a walk-in basis during Emergency Care hours. (holidays, nights & weekends) We will work closely with your veterinarian in a manner that allows advanced care while maintaining compassion and affordable options.

Name: Franklin Vets
Description:
Franklin Vets is the largest privately owned Veterinary business covering the South Auckland, Franklin, North Waikato and Hauraki areas.  

We offer complete veterinary care including consultancy and clinical trial work for our clients which cover the farm, equine, lifestyle block and companion animal sectors.

At Franklin Vets, we have built a strong, engaged team that is committed to creating value for our clients. 

We have a reputation for expertise in problem solving and preventative veterinary medicine programmes. This ensures we build long term, trusted relationships with our client base.

50 Vets across 9 sites (150 staff total) with Clinics in Beachlands, Papakura, Karaka, Pukekohe, Waiuku, Te Kauwhata, Taupiri, Paeroa and Kopu.

Name: Clinique vétérinaire HoMa
Description:
Notre clinique vétérinaire, située dans Hochelaga-Maisonneuve depuis 1995, a une approche empathique et adaptée à la réalité des propriétaires de chiens et de chats. 

Nous sommes touchés par la relation unique et positive qui existe entre un animal et son maître. Nous sommes convaincus que les animaux de compagnie peuvent jouer un rôle important pour leur propriétaire et contribuer considérablement au bien-être des habitants du quartier. Nous souhaitons également soulager et prendre soin de ces animaux, tout en contribuant à l’éducation de la communauté locale en matière de bien-être animal, afin d’améliorer la qualité de vie globale des animaux de compagnie de notre quartier. 

Nous sommes aussi d’avis que le maintien d’une offre de soins et de service à la clientèle de qualités passe par un milieu de travail harmonieux, collaboratif et stimulant pour le personnel de l’équipe.

Name: La Mascotera
Description:
Buscamos ser la solución practica y amigable para que dueños y mascotas puedan disfrutar de su vinculo. Brindamos servicio de veterinaria, peluqueria canina, venta de alimentos y accesorios y medicamentos para mascotas. 

Con 22 locales propios y 8 franquicias activas en Argentina, siempre en búsqueda de aportar positivamente a la comunidad y generar valor. Modelo franquiciable.

La Mascotera es parte de un grupo de empresas, algunas relacionadas como Studio Kai, Pets Plus importaciones y Astra Pet Health Nutrition. Compartiendo el espíritu, calidad y calidez.  

Somos curiosos, apasionados de hacer las cosas lo mejor posible. Un equipo que toma de forma profesional cada problema a resolver, trabajando codo a codo hacia un mismo objetivo, nos apoyamos en la tecnología para dar una experiencia satisfactoria a nuestros clientes y amigos Mascoteros.

Name: Dog Trainer
Description: Oferecemos uma variedade de cursos de treinamento para cachorros de todas as idades, de cachorros a cachorros mais velhos. Nós sempre nos esforçamos para manter o nosso lema Nós vamos treiná-lo para treinar seu cão.

Name: Animus Surgical Ltd
Description:
For over 20 years, Animus Surgical has been a trusted supplier of high-quality veterinary sutures and suture materials to veterinary practices across the UK and Ireland, predominantly through wholesalers. Now expanding into Europe, Animus continues to deliver exceptional products at highly competitive rates.

Our core range is designed around the most frequently used suture materials and sizes, ensuring veterinary professionals have access to the most reliable solutions for their needs. In addition, we are selectively expanding into specialist areas, including equine, dental, and ophthalmic sutures.

As the exclusive UK distributor for Vet Expert, Animus Surgical also offers a premium range of veterinary nutraceuticals and dermatological products. This partnership allows us to provide cutting-edge solutions that support both surgical and general veterinary care, helping practices enhance patient outcomes with scientifically developed, vet-approved products.

With a commitment to quality, innovation, and affordability, Animus Surgical is dedicated to supporting veterinary professionals with the best products for their practice.

Name: Alimenta Nutrição Animal
Description:
Presente no mercado há mais de 30 anos, a Alimenta Nutrição Animal utiliza todo o seu know-how para produzir rações de alta qualidade para aves, suínos, bovinos e equinos, nas formas peletizadas, micropeletizadas, trituradas e fareladas.
Localizada em Carmo do Cajuru – Minas Gerais, a fábrica possui capacidade de produção de milhares de toneladas de rações por mês, além de oferecer ao mercado a soja integral extrusada, um ingrediente com altos níveis de proteína e energia, e o milho integral moído, excelente fonte de fibras, carboidrato e proteína.
A Alimenta Nutrição Animal trabalha, ainda, com o sistema de industrialização de rações, com insumos do cliente e formulações customizadas, a fim de desenvolver soluções específicas e capazes de atender todas as necessidades de seus parceiros.
A empresa dedica-se para garantir a entrega de um produto final uniforme, sempre dentro das especificações técnicas contratadas. Além disso, atende aos padrões do BPF (Boas Práticas de Fabricação) e atua de acordo com todas as normas estabelecidas pelo Ministério da Agricultura e Pecuária.
 
MISSÃO
Garantir satisfação aos nossos clientes, fabricando produtos para nutrição animal, com garantia de performance através do controle de qualidade da matéria-prima, do processo produtivo até a entrega do produto final.
 
VISÃO
Até 2020 ser referência na fabricação de produtos para nutrição animal de aves, suínos, bovinos e equinos, na região sudeste do Brasil.
 
VALORES
Ética
Responsabilidade ambiental
Compromisso com o cliente
Foco em resultados
Transparência
Inovação

Name: Animals Solutions Sàrl
Description:
Vous êtes à la recherche de solutions innovantes afin de vous adapter aux défis de votre secteur en constante évolution, Animals Solutions saura vous accompagner dans vos besoins et y répondre précisément. 

Notre objectif premier est de vous écouter afin qu’ensemble nous trouvions des solutions concrètes vous permettant de prodiguer les meilleurs soins à vos patients animaux.

Name: MetronMind, Inc

Name: Royal Paws and Purrs Mobile Veterinary Services
Description: Royal Paws and Purrs knows how important your furry loved ones are. We also value your time and understand the hassle of taking your companion to the vet. This mobile veterinary hospital was started to offer high quality veterinary medical care, provide a stress-free, and luxury experience for your pet. We have a full range of services that cater to your pets’ needs with the added convenience of not ever having to leave your home.

Name: Calgary Wildlife Rehabilitation Society
Description:
The Calgary Wildlife Rehabilitation Society was established in 1993 to provide professional veterinary care to injured and orphaned wildlife.  Each year we receive 2200+ injured and orphaned wild animals and respond to 10,000+ wildlife-related calls from the public.  In addition Calgary Wildlife provides motivational, skill-building experiences for volunteers and valuable outreach and education services to the community.  Calgary Wildlife is a registered charity and the only veterinary based wildlife hospital located within The City of Calgary.    
We are Calgary’s wildlife hospital.  

Mission
The Calgary Wildlife Rehabilitation Society is dedicated to providing professional veterinary treatment of injured and orphaned wildlife, valuable outreach and education services to the community and engaging all volunteers in motivational work and skill building experience.

Vision
Calgary Wildlife strives to be recognized as a provincial leader in the delivery of professional wildlife rehabilitation services as well as community outreach and education related to human-wildlife interactions.

Name: AniCura Atlântico Hospital Veterinário
Description: AniCura Atlântico Hospital Veterinário is a companion animal hospital based out of Rua Quintino António Gomes nº12, Mafra, Portugal.

Name: Agrocape Distribuidora Veterinária
Description: A Agrocape foi fundada em 1984, celebrando 40 anos de dedicação ao mercado agropecuário em 2023. Sob a liderança do fundador, José Carlos, esta distribuidora familiar conta ainda com a participação ativa de seus dois filhos, Castler e Ríley. Ao longo das décadas, a Agrocape solidificou sua presença no cenário de distribuição, operando com destaque nos estados da Bahia e Sergipe.

Name: Demeter Services Vétérinaires
Description: Demeter fait partie du groupe Swine Veterinary Partners, un groupe de vétérinaires porcins qui offrent une gamme complète de services de santé animale aux producteurs canadiens. Quatre cliniques vétérinaires et pharmacies sont établies à travers le pays et offrent des services professionnels. Ce sont 16 vétérinaires d’expérience qui partagent leurs connaissances et leur savoir-faire au profit de l'industrie de la santé porcine canadienne.

Name: Nimrod Veterinary Products Ltd
Description:
Nimrod Veterinary Products brings new ideas, information, designs and products to the veterinary marketplace.  It is the world's leading manufacturer of equipment for oral fluid therapy for cattle and has the largest range of clinical-nutrition products for cows.  It also markets veterinary pharmaceutical products under licence or distribution agreements with pharmaceutical manufacturers.

Outside the UK, Nimrod markets its products through its affiliate, Nimrod Vet France SA, and has recently established a subsidiary in the Netherlands, Nimrod Nederland BV.

Name: La Clinique du Cheval
Description:
Fondée en 1991 la Clinique du Cheval regroupe à ce jour plusieurs sites en France (Toulouse, Albi, Cagnes-sur-Mer). Toujours soucieux d’apporter les meilleurs services et une médecine de pointe, la clinique du Cheval compte aujourd’hui 62 vétérinaires et collaborateurs. Ces développements ont ainsi pu aboutir à l’obtention d’un agrément en avril 2016 qui fait de la Clinique du Cheval l’un des deux premiers Centres Hospitaliers Vétérinaires spécialisés dans les chevaux reconnus en France.

En quelques chiffres : 35 praticiens dévolus au soin des équidés - 5.000 consultations par an - 20 ans d’expérience - 4 sites en France

Name: Nova Vet Equipment
Description:
Nova Vet Equipment is a regional company with offices in Europe, Asia, and North Africa. We are committed to providing the highest quality medical equipment to animal health experts. Nova Vet Equipment offers a comprehensive spectrum of chemical analyzers, hematology analyzers, digital radiography equipment, ultrasound, veterinary software, consumables, furniture, and all the needs in the veterinary sector (complete offer for veterinary clinics). Nova Vet Equipment has also created unique agreements with industry experts to ensure you get the best for your practice.

We recognize that in today's sophisticated veterinary solutions, excellent tools are not enough. Post-sales services, in-clinic training, continuous education, support, and maintenance make a significant impact on your veterinary practice.

Name: AcuMed Veterinary Specialty
Description:
Acumed Veterinary Specialty is a Referral Center for Neurology, Acupuncture and Pain Management for Pets

Apart from the referral services, we also offer limited basic general services for pets.

“Don’t Skip A Beat” Headed by Dr. Deepti Deshpande ( Diplomate AiCVIM - Cardiology ) is an extension of our services which provides consulting Cardiology and Anaesthesia services.

Name: Roza Arabia
Description:
Roza Arabia Trading Company is a trusted leader in Biosecurity Solutions and Feed Additives, dedicated to enhancing Hygiene, Animal Health, and Food Safety. We provide cutting-edge products and expert technical support, ensuring that our clients achieve higher productivity, efficiency, and sustainability in the food and agriculture industries.

With a commitment to quality, innovation, and customer success, we deliver science-backed solutions that help producers meet global safety standards and achieve long-term profitability.

 info@rozaarabia.com

Name: Vets & Pets Trading
Description:
En Vets & Pets nos importa la salud y el bienestar de las mascotas, proporcionamos productos y servicios sencillos e intuitivos con la más alta calidad. Estamos comprometidos con la distribución, transmisión de conocimiento científico-tecnológico y la prestación de servicios de 
vanguardia, para ayudar al veterinario en el diagnóstico y cuidado de sus pacientes.

Name: International Animal Health Products
Description: International Animal Health manufacture and market a range quality Australian owned products for cattle, horses, sheep, goat, pigs and poultry. Our aim is to provide solutions to improve the overall growth, health and well-being of your animals and birds. Our innovative research based solutions include feed additives, medications, probiotics, nutritionals, first aid, biological and worming products while servicing the needs of veterinarians, farmers and owners of livestock.

Name: Estima - Centro de Diagnósticos e Especialidades
Description:
O Estima foi criado para oferecer aos animais tecnologia, inovação e conhecimento na área diagnóstica e terapêutica. 

Conta com uma equipe especializada, equipamentos modernos e ampla infraestrutura 24 horas à disposição dos proprietários e seus animais.

Name: Relief Services for Veterinary Practitioners
Description: Relief Services for Veterinary Practitioners has been providing relief services since 1992. With over 350,000 shifts filled you can count on RSVP to handle your schedule in the most professional manner. As a veterinarian or vet tech, you can expect to have a personalized manager present you with opportunities for local relief shifts that you can pick up at your leisure. There is no cost to you and no obligation to work. Sign up today to start receiving shifts!

Name: Vetshop Distribuidora
Description:
A VetShop é uma distribuidora online de produtos veterinários que simplifica as compras dos profissionais de saúde veterinária, oferecendo uma variedade incomparável de insumos hospitalares, medicamentos diversos e mais outras soluções para saúde animal.

Queremos garantir que o profissional veterinário encontre tudo que precisa em um só lugar, de maneira prática e econômica.

Name: Bryanston Veterinary Hospital
Description: Bryanston Veterinary Hospital & Specialist Centre is a 24-hr first opinion and referral practice that was established in November 1970 for the then Peri-urban area. It has grown to provide a diverse expertise and offer the highest standard of professional pet care, which includes small animal medicine, diagnostics and treatment, small animal surgery and arthroscopy, small animal anesthesiology and small animal dentistry.

Name: Natural BR Feed
Description:
Alimento de qualidade começa com saúde e bem-estar animal. A Natural BR Feed trabalha para garantir mais eficiência produtiva, com soluções que respeitam as particularidades da produção animal no Brasil e contribuem para uma cadeia responsável.

Desde 2019, atuamos ao lado de quem vive o Agro todos os dias, desenvolvendo tecnologias que ajudam a melhorar o desempenho dos animais em todas as fases da produção. Nosso trabalho foca em nutrição de verdade, feita com conhecimento técnico, proximidade com o produtor e respeito à cadeia produtiva.

Nossas soluções são baseadas em aditivos nutricionais funcionais, que apoiam a saúde dos animais e otimizam o uso de recursos, sem atalhos. Atendemos as diferentes espécies (aves, suínos, ruminantes, pets, peixes e camarões), sempre com produtos adaptados para a realidade brasileira.

Temos um time técnico-comercial regionalizado e contamos com parcerias internacionais de referência, além do desenvolvimento de tecnologias próprias. Sabemos que quem está no campo precisa de confiança, resultado e agilidade.

Somos uma empresa feita por pessoas que entendem o Agro porque vivem o Agro. E por isso, trabalhamos para que cada etapa da produção faça sentido — da nutrição ao alimento que chega à mesa, da granja ao garfo.

Natural BR Feed vem das palavras em inglês Natural Feed (Ração Natural), o BR fortificando nossas raízes brasileiras.
Assim imprimimos nossas raízes em nosso nome! 

Ser referência em soluções inovadoras voltadas ao mercado brasileiro é nosso foco!

Name: Arcuri S.A.
Description: Distribuidora de fármacos para animales.

Name: مركز صحاري البيطري | Sahary Veterinary Center
Description:
Sahary Veterinary Center is a specialized center in camel breeding improvement and production, offering advanced reproductive health treatments and embryo transfer services. We provide camel breeders with the latest technologies and expert consultations to enhance herd management, ensuring healthier and more productive camels.

Our center is committed to genetic improvement, helping breeders accelerate the development of superior traits through embryo transfer technology. We also focus on breed preservation, allowing elite camels to continue producing offspring even after natural reproduction stops.

With cutting-edge diagnostic testing and a state-of-the-art veterinary laboratory, we offer precise medical insights to safeguard camel health. Our expertise in herd management enables breeders to optimize productivity and maximize the value of their camels.

At Sahary Veterinary Center, we strive to be the leading provider of reproductive health solutions and the most trusted veterinary laboratory in the Gulf region.

 Advanced veterinary laboratory diagnostics

Name: Phagovet
Description:
Phagovet is a research project supported by the European-union in the ambit of Horizon 2020. 
In response to the unmet need, Phagovet proposes a cost-effective alternative to antibiotics against Salmonella. Phagovet consists of a zootechnical additive product based on selected bacteriophages able to kill the target bacteria. Phagovet will be the first phage-based solution to naturally and effectively control salmonella in poultry production while avoiding side effects and residues associated with antibiotic use.

Description: Littleton Equine Medical Center was founded in spring 1950 by Dr. Harry W. Johnson in association with Dr. William "Bill" Howarth; the practice evolved to Littleton Large Animal Clinic then to Littleton Equine Medical Center over the next 60 years. What was initially a farm animal out-patient practice is now an equine veterinary clinic and referral hospital featuring mobile practice, surgery, ophthalmology and advanced diagnostic services including x-ray, ultrasound, magnetic resonance imaging and nuclear medicine. The Certified Surgeons and one Diplomate of the American Board of Veterinary Practitioners; a support staff of 50 including certified equine veterinary technicians, assistants and office personnel.

Name: Watkins & Tasker Vets
Description:
With surgeries in Portishead, Nailsea and Yatton, Watkins and Tasker Vets provide a local and convenient service in tandem with state-of-the-art equipment and excellent surgical and medical facilities. All this though would be meaningless if we didn’t have brilliant, caring people around to take care of both our clients and their pets. Fortunately this is exactly what we do have.

Our vets, clinical staff, nurses and administrative team understand the extraordinary bond between owner and pet. The love and affection they feel for their animal and the desire to provide the most informed advice and best healthcare achievable.

From the early beginnings of our practice in the 1970’s to now, our knowledge and ability to dispense enlightened advice, make considered healthcare interventions coupled with a dedicated and a friendly support team has helped to make us – your vets for adored pets.

Name: ESVE - European Society of Veterinary Endocrinology
Description: ESVE stands for the European Society of Veterinary Endocrinology. ESVE is affiliated with the European College of Verterinary Internal Medicine (ECVIM-CA) and the Society for Comparative Endocrinology (SCE).

Name: OAK TREE ANIMALS' CHARITY
Description:
Working for our community; caring for animals; making a difference. Oak Tree has been helping animals for 113 years. We are passionate about animal welfare and believe that every animal matters, helping hundreds of animals every year. In 2021 we were able to assist 2615 animals and their owners.

Our mission is to help companion animals in need. Finding them a safe and comfortable home and helping the community to understand their needs, through support and education. 

We find dogs, cats and horses loving new homes, rescuing and rehabilitating them to give them the best chance of a bright future. Rehoming is intrinsically reactive, something has gone wrong. Our proactive community approach seeks to find solutions for pet owners, wherever practical and appropriate, keeping pets in loving homes and avoiding unnecessary stress and heartache.  We work alongside our partners at the foodbank, social services, housing associations and other local organisations to help vulnerable pet owners who desperately need our help. Our Helping Paw programme provides vital short-term fostering for those who are homeless or fleeing domestic violence, helping them rebuild lives while knowing their pet is safe and well cared-for. We run community clinics and training classes to offer welfare advice and support and we also work with schools and community groups to educate the next generation of pet owners. 

Oak Tree is a full member of both the Association of Dogs and Cats Homes and the National Equine Welfare Council.

Contact us at: 01228 560082 or info@oaktreeanimals.org.uk

Name: Bridger Veterinary Specialists and Emergency
Description:
Located in beautiful Bozeman, MT, Bridger Veterinary Specialists & Emergency is a specialty hospital providing care that may not be available at primary care facilities. We offer internal medicine, surgery, oncology, and advanced imaging for cats and dogs. 

We are a team of passionate people devoted to providing exceptional veterinary care to pets of Montana and surrounding areas. We collaborate with primary care veterinarians to find the best possible solutions for our patients and their owners, striving for seamless communication throughout the process. 

We welcome new referrals from veterinary clinics throughout the U.S. and Canada.

Name: Asteris
Description:
Whether you run a companion animal or equine practice, Asteris can provide you with an all-in-one, secure, fast, and flexible digital imaging management solution. 

Designed specifically for veterinarians, our flagship product, Asteris Keystone Software Suite, allows you to store, transfer, retrieve, collaborate, and view digital images easily and efficiently. We provide real-time access to vital information while streamlining the practice workflow and simplifying the radiology consultation process. 

And maybe best of all, our simple pay-as-you-go model provides a lower cost of ownership, with NO costly extended service or annual maintenance fees required.
 
We make sure that your solution fits you. Because one size fits all... doesn't fit.
 
Visit our website to discover more about our story, services, products, and promise.

Name: Animal Friends Alliance
Description:
Animal Friends Alliance emerged in January 2020 from the union of Fort Collins Cat Rescue & Spay/Neuter Clinic and Animal House Rescue & Grooming. The overall goal of the merger is to amplify our organization’s community impact and allow our programs and services to benefit more people and animals.

Animal Friends Alliance is a “limited admission, adoption guarantee shelter” for cats and dogs. This means we have to limit how many animals we take in due to space and financial restrictions, but we guarantee that every animal we take in will stay with us until they find a good home. We are 100% committed to every cat and dog that comes to us, and we do our best to make sure each one goes to the right home with an adopter who is ready to make a lifelong commitment to them. If for any reason an adopter cannot keep the animal they adopted from us, we will always take them back.

By providing subsidized spay and neuter for both dogs and cats, our spay/neuter clinic offers a proactive solution to pet homelessness. The clinic also provides preventative health care including vaccinations, deworming, heartworm testing, feline viral testing, and microchipping. For pet owners who are in a low-income bracket or receive government assistance, we offer financial assistance for spay/neuter through the Prevent A Litter Plus (PAL+) Program, and free supplemental pet food through the Kibble Supply Pet Food Pantry.

Animal Friends Alliance is an IRS 501(C)(3) non-profit organization, tax ID# 20-4969731. We operate solely on monetary and in-kind donations, fundraising, and grants. We receive no government funding.

Name: Retrevr Veterinary Technology
Description:
Retrevr is the all-in-one, AI-powered operating system for modern veterinary care.
Not just a PIMS — a complete upgrade.

No more bouncing between 6+ clunky tools. Retrevr replaces your entire tech stack with one sleek platform that’s fast, intuitive, and actually makes your day easier.

From smart scheduling and AI transcription to built-in texting, forms, calls, follow-ups, and more — it’s all in one place.

Simple on the surface. Powerful underneath.
Built to boost productivity, reduce burnout, and grow your business.

Whether you’re a solo DVM or scaling across multiple locations, Retrevr helps you do more with less — and deliver care that clients remember.

We’re not just fixing workflows — we’re helping fix one of the biggest challenges in the industry: mental health.
Retrevr is designed to save you hours every single day, reduce stress, and make your workflow feel effortless. With tools that highlight the real impact your team is having, we’re helping veterinary professionals feel more fulfilled, connected, and in control.

And with built-in business analytics and revenue-driving features, you won’t just run your clinic better — you’ll grow it smarter.

Oh — and onboarding? It’s ridiculously smooth.
You’ll wonder why you didn’t switch sooner.

Name: Nutria Hellas - Animal Feed & Chemicals
Description:
FEED ΑDDITIVES & SUPERFEED INDUSTRY 

NUTRIA HELLAS established in 2004, is part of the 40 years’ long activities of its founder, Dimitris Tsolakis, an agronomist, animal husbandry specialist and economist.
The company is an enterprise based on accumulative knowledge, long experience, sound organization and high goals, propelling the modernization of Greek livestock industry, over and above its financial targets.
The company addresses the needs of all animal populations that either...... swim, or walk or fly as well as, the processing units of their respective products.
The company:
•	Produces and distributes feed additives (premixes, nuclei, balancers, protein concentrates, etc.) supplying farms and feed industries.
•	Produces and distributes special metabolism balancers and enhancers for livestock and companion animals (feed specialties-‘superfeeds’)
•	Provides scientific expertise and management services to farms, animal feed plants and livestock products processing units.
•	Is the distributor (since November of 2013), and the exclusive representative for Greece and the Balkans, of the British company EVANS VANODINE PLC products for the comprehensive cleaning and disinfection of livestock establishments as well as all the animal and vegetable food processing industries. The production of the EVANS VANODINE products, is planned to begin in Greece under a license agreement with EVANS VANODINE INTERNATIONAL PLC. 

NUTRIA HELLAS staff consist mainly of scientists (agronomists – animal husbandry specialists, veterinarians, chemists, economists) and highly trained staff, capable to respond to the needs of modern production facilities for sophisticated and specialized products.
NUTRIA HELLAS, continuing a longstanding social contribution through the development and introduction of innovations, contributed and contributes effectively during the crisis years, by increasing staff threefold, creating eight new jobs.

Name: Pets Pharma de México, SA de CV
Description:
Pet´s Pharma de México, SA de CV, es el el laboratorio numero uno nacional en la fabricación de productos farmacéuticos veterinarios de animales de compañía.  

Existe desde el año 2000 con la misión de proveer y facilitar al mercado farmacéutico Veterinario una gama de productos de calidad a través de la innovación tecnológica y humana que satisfaga las necesidades del Veterinario, de las mascotas y de sus propietarios, cumpliendo con la normatividad de una Empresa Socialmente Responsable.

Fabricamos medicamentos y productos veterinarios tales como vacunas, analgésicos, antibióticos, fungicidas, pulguicidas, garrpaticidas, desinfectantes, gastroprotectores, antidiarreícos, antiinflamatorios, estimulantes nutracéuticos y hormonales. 

Nuestros productos veterinarios han demostrado su efectividad y calidad a los largo de más de 15 años en el competitivo mercado mexicano, demostrando ser de gran valía para los médicos en el tratamiento y cuidado de la salud y el bienestar de mascotas en todo lo largo y ancho del país.

Para atender el mercado centroamericano en el año 2010 incursiona en Guatemala, y posteriormente se extiende a Costa Rica, Honduras, El Salvador y Panamá. En el 2015 inicia registros de productos en Colombia.

Name: Animal Referral and Emergency Centre
Description:
The Animal Referral and Emergency Centre (AREC) provides 24/7 emergency care for pets in the Newcastle, Maitland, Lake Macquarie, Port Stephens and Hunter regions, as well as an after hours referral service to GP vets.

Our staff provides high quality care when illness or injury occurs, or if pets need continuing after hours care. They're trained in emergency management to deal with any situation, including overnight care demands.

Emergency support is critical to the survival of the patient and its future quality of life. Our highly trained staff aim to provide the best possible initial and continuing care available. All visit records are returned to the general practice veterinarian and we may consult with, or refer patients to, specialist staff at other facilities to ensure the best care.

We provide on-site laboratory services, radiology and ultrasound, minor and major surgery, urgent care and critical care where needed, as well as referral rehabilitation and ophthalmology services.

We also work with HMRI Newcastle to provide MRI services (Monday to Thursday) for veterinary care.

Name: Hospital Veterinário Carinho De Bicho
Description:
Acreditamos que os animais não estão neste mundo para preencher lacunas em nossas vidas. Nem tampouco são posses nossas. Eles são SERES e estão aqui para nos ENSINAR.

Eles nos demonstram o seu amor incondicional através de cada CARINHO que nos fazem, de cada OLHAR, são o motivo do nosso ENCONTRO e o nosso guia no aprendizado na medicina veterinária.

Nós, seres humanos ainda estamos caminhando no entendimento dessa relação, mas sabemos que ela deve ser, sobretudo, uma relação de GRATIDÃO. 

Nós da Carinho de Bicho dedicamos nossa existência para a evolução dessa relação com os animais, ajudando Pais de Pets a retribuir todo CARINHO que recebem dos seus filhos no momento em que eles mais precisam.
Location: São José dos Campos, São Paulo

Name: Consejo Andaluz de Colegios Oficiales de Veterinarios
Description:
Desde el Consejo Andaluz de Colegios Oficiales de Veterinarios estamos orgullosos de poder mostraros una nueva imagen a través de este espacio digital, en el que se recogen todos los asuntos, eventos, noticias e información de nuestra importante labor profesional, social y sanitaria.

La vía online facilita y refuerza la comunicación y el contacto con nuestros colegiados y colegiadas y, sobre todo, genera y trasmite confianza y valor a la sociedad de los veterinarios como garantes de la salud pública, la protección y el bienestar animal.

Tanto el veterinario en la explotación ganadera, como el especialista en animales de compañía o equinos, el que trabaja en conservación de la fauna en entornos silvestres o el veterinario en Salud Pública, todos tendrán su espacio en esta red social, cuya misión es ofrecer un mejor servicio a todos los veterinarios y veterinarias de Andalucía y mejorar la comunicación, así como la transparencia y el intercambio de información, de ideas y de inquietudes con este Consejo y con sus Colegios provinciales.
