Name: Official Veterinary Services (SENASA) Costa Rica
Description: El ente responsable de la Salud Animal en Costa Rica es el Servicio Nacional de Salud Animal (SENASA), es un órgano con desconcentración mínima y personería jurídica instrumental adscrito al Ministerio de Agricultura y Ganadería, según lo establece la Ley Nº 8495, Ley General del Servicio Nacional de Salud Animal. En sus competencias está: la reglamentación, planificación, administración, coordinación, ejecución y aplicación de las actividades oficiales con carácter nacional, regional e internacional, relativas a la salud de la población animal, los residuos, la salud pública veterinaria, el control veterinario de la zoonosis, la trazabilidad/rastreabilidad, la protección y la seguridad de los alimentos de origen animal, los alimentos para los animales, los medicamentos veterinarios, el material genético animal, los productos y los subproductos, la producción, el uso, la liberación o la comercialización de los organismos genéticamente modificados que puedan afectar la salud animal o su entorno, y las sustancias peligrosas de origen animal.

Name: AllyDVM
Description: AllyDVM is the most powerful and customizable client engagement platform in the veterinary industry. As a cloud-based software solution, our client engagement platform integrates with most Practice Information Management Systems (PIMS) and amplifies and automates PIMS functionality, which enables veterinary practices to capitalize on opportunities to improve client retention, client compliance, and deliver better health outcomes for their patients and achieve better financial outcomes for their practice.

Name: Clinique Vétérinaire des Sablons
Description:
Notre entreprise compte deux structures vétérinaires.

La Clinique Vétérinaire des Sablons, située face à l’hippodrome de Chartres, a vu le jour en 2005. Aujourd'hui animée par une équipe de 10 vétérinaires et 16 assistants spécialisés dont 4 en cours de formation, et forte d'un plateau technique complet, elle offre un service de haute qualité dans diverses disciplines.

Le Cabinet Vétérinaire des Epars, situé en centre-ville, a ouvert ses porte en 2016. Son objectif est de fournir un service vétérinaire de proximité de haute qualité.
Nous y consultons aussi bien les chiens, les chats et les NACs que ce soit pour des consultations de médecine préventive ou curative. Les interventions chirurgicales mineures sont réalisées sur place. En cas de besoin une prise en charge par la Clinique Vétérinaire des Sablons peut être effectuée pour des soins plus lourds ou d'autres examens complémentaires.

Nos atouts : Les compétences avec 1 CEAV de Médecine Interne, 1 CES d’hématologie et biochimie clinique, 1 CES de traumatologie ostéo articulaire et orthopédie animale, 1 DE d’ophtalmologie, exercice référé en cancérologie et une vraie dynamique autour de la médecine préventive.
Nos équipements : radiographie capteur plan, échographe datant de début 2019, endoscopie et arthroscopie Storz, laboratoires d’analyse complet, 6 gazeuses, 2 monitorings  multiparamètres, Petmap, Tonopen, Cryopen, pompes à perfusion ,… 
Nos actes : prévention (vaccins, plan de prévention), analyses sanguines, échographie abdominale, médecine interne, arthroscopie, dentisterie, chirurgie générale et orthopédique, neurochirurgie, endoscopie digestive …

Name: Vetevate
Description: Vetevate is revolutionizing the future of veterinary medicine with cutting-edge AI technology. Created by a global veterinarian, the industry’s leading executive search consultant, and an expert technology consultant, our platform sets a new standard by seamlessly integrating advanced tools for job searching, employee engagement, and access to top talent. At Vetevate, we are dedicated to elevating the veterinary profession, empowering professionals to excel in their careers, embrace their passion, and enhance the lives of pets everywhere.

Name: Imvab
Description: Entidad privada creada en 1987 con capitales ecuatorianos, se han suscrito convenios con laboratorios internacionales de renombre en el sector de la salud animal, que cumplen con los premios de innovación, certificados de calidad como BPM y BPA.

Name: Petly
Description:
Petly was founded by experienced professionals at leading firms in the veterinary , pet care services industry. We offer very special services from A to Z to your pets .We provide the best experience for you and your pets ,with great experience veterinarians and stuff .

We Believe....Pets deserve better....
Petly...... Where Smart Pets Bring Their People

Name: Suprifarma Vet
Description:
A Suprifarma é jovem, mas o que não falta é história...

A Suprifarma Vet é fruto de uma história em constante evolução, enraizada em mais de 30 anos de experiência no mercado veterinário. Desde 1991, atuamos como distribuidores de produtos veterinários no Estado de São Paulo, construindo um legado baseado em confiança, qualidade e comprometimento.

Em 2018, expandimos nossas fronteiras para o Rio de Janeiro, ampliando nossa presença e fortalecendo nosso compromisso, com a excelência e o suporte contínuo aos profissionais e estabelecimentos do ramo.

E agora, 2023, é com grande entusiasmo que anunciamos nossa chegada a Goiás, estamos animados para aprender com vocês e prontos para oferecer nosso conhecimento, portfólio e dedicação a todo mercado pet do estado de Goiás* com a Linha de Animais  de Companhia Zoetis.

Name: vets4vets
Description:
Services collaboratifs pour vétérinaires 

Vous n'êtes plus seuls !

Cession de clientèle

Vous souhaitez céder votre clientèle ? vets4vets est là pour évaluer votre entreprise et vous proposer un successeur tout en assurant le suivi financier et juridique de l’opération.

Création de cabinet ou de clinique vétérinaire

Lancez-vous ! Nous avons identifié des zones géographiques pour votre activité. Nous serons là pour vous aider dans le financement, l’installation ou encore les négociations avec les différents interlocuteurs de votre projet (banques, avocats, notaires, laboratoires…).

Communiquer

Communiquer, communiquer et encore communiquer ! Peut-on se passer de toujours améliorer sa communication ? Et quelle communication ? Comment développer les messages au sein de la clinique ? Comment utiliser au mieux les outils numériques d’aujourd’hui en dehors de la clinique vétérinaire (Facebook, site internet, Instagram…)? Autant de questions sur lesquelles vets4vets est là auprès de vous !

Former

Pour accueillir au mieux les propriétaires, améliorer les compétences techniques de toute l’équipe (vétérinaires associés, ALD, ASV…), nous développons des modules de formations.

Améliorer sa rentabilité

Pour améliorer ses contrats, sa gestion des stocks ou encore améliorer les ventes, vets4vets met à votre service des compétences acquises au sein de cliniques. Nous ne donnons pas de conseils… nous faisons avec vous ! Nous aussi, nous sommes vétérinaires et nous ne proposons que ce qui fonctionne déjà !

Ressources Humaines

Vets4vets vous aider à recruter ou encore développer la motivation et l’engagement des équipes vétérinaires et assistantes.

Name: Beecroft Animal Specialist & Emergency Hospital
Description:
We provide compassionate, caring, and collaborative services to small animals and exotic pets. We approach every animal and its family with care and dedication.

We will stand by you before, during, and after surgery and pride ourselves on close communication every step of the way. 

Through kindness and teamwork, we strive to provide the highest level of care and service for all our patients.

Name: Chef du Monde (Grupo Asís)
Description:
100% Animal Health and Veterinary Language Services
With more than 16 years experience in servicing exclusively the animal health industry.
- True market understanding
- Extensive Vet Glossaries
- All lines of Business: Companion Animal (Cats & Dogs, Exotics, Equine), Production Animals (Cattle, Poultry, Swine), Petfood, Feed Industry, Regulatory Affairs, Market Research
- Access to, pet owners, farmers, vets, KOLs & Specialists
- Translations validated by our Global Network of Vets or other experts in the field

Name: Pieper Veterinary
Description: Pieper Veterinary is CT's pet emergency & specialty center, providing compassionate, cutting-edge care.

Name: Maryland SPCA
Description: The Maryland SPCA’s mission is to reduce pet homelessness by providing pet retention services, safety net housing, and community engagement that empowers citizens of Baltimore and beyond. Your support saves lives!

Name: East Lake Veterinary Hospital
Description:
East Lake is a multi-faceted organization focusing on Medical, Surgical, Wellness, and Urgent Care. We are devoted to helping pets and their families. Our mission statement is simply "Wags, Purrs, Smiles". If a dog's tail is wagging, or a cat is purring, that says a pet is happy and feeling well. "Smiles" are our goal too, because we are not happy unless our clients are happy too. We work hard to earn our client's trust. We have deeply bonded relationships with our clients and our work together is a partnership to insure that pets have the care they need and deserve. We also understand that our clients have unique needs too so that's why we are open 7 days a week and we have 24HR care. We also offer chauffeur services, and free pharmacy & pet food delivery. 

The East Lake campus includes our main Hospital, the Cat Care Center, the non profit East Lake Pet Orphanage, and the East Lake Continuing Education and Event Center. We believe that veterinary medicine is the BEST profession on earth where we can individually shape our own careers as part of a team, and work hard to grow personally. We work positively and collaboratively to build each other up and support each other to make a difference in the lives of pets, their people, and each other lives.

Name: Doorcas Africa
Description: Doorcas Africa is reducing livestock mortalities and derisking livestock farming by connecting farmers, vets, and buyers into a data driven ecosystem that guarantees healthy, casualty free production at scale.

Name: ANIMALcare
Description: ANIMALcare  Hospital veterinário, um espaço construído de base a pensar no bem-estar dos animais de estimação, a ANIMALcare funcionará com internamento e atendimento 24 horas por dia e todos os dias do ano, com equipa de médicos, enfermeiros e auxiliares veterinários apaixonados pelos animais.

Name: ARC Vets
Description:
At ARC we are committed to providing NZ’s best veterinary expertise and care, with two Auckland hospitals in Schnapper Rock (ARC North) and Freemans Bay (ARC Central).

We’re a family-owned business with a team of committed, caring professionals. We take a multidisciplinary approach to every patient’s care, in state of the art facilities equipped with the latest veterinary technology.

Our high quality services are recommended by pet owners to their family and friends, are chosen by our referring vets for their clients, and are an ongoing source of pride for our employees.

Name: Dômes Pharma US
Description: Dômes Pharma, an independent family-owned group, a pioneer in animal health, has been developing, manufacturing and marketing solutions for the health and well-being of pets since 1947. Established in Auvergne in central France, the region of volcanoes and its domes from which it takes its name, in 2016 the Group began its international expansion by opening subsidiaries in the UK, Germany, Spain and the USA.  In July 2023, the Group acquired the American company Sentrx Animal Care based in Salt Lake City (Utah), which develops and manufactures ophthalmology products, based on an exclusive patented technology that potentiates the action of Hyaluronic acid on the eye of animals. With this acquisition, Dômes Pharma strengthens its world leadership in veterinary ophthalmology while creating a launch pad for its range of therapeutic specialities in North America.

Name: GekkoVet
Description:
THE ONLINE DIAGNOSTIC AND TREATMENT TOOL
FOR VETERINARY PROFESSIONALS BY VETERINARIANS 

Read more: gekkovet.com

Name: Vetman Ltd
Description:
We have been in business for over 30 years to help the veterinary community and other animal care specialists. The company has a strong network of suppliers. We test our products before marketing: small animal products at our own small animal clinic EHYT, www.ehyt.info and large animal products with our partners like  hoof trimmers, equine practitioners etc.
We are proud partners of Draminski, iM3, HDE, K-laser Elltech, BBraun, Genia, Mano Medical, N2 and many others. Please, visit our website for more information.
We are the only Finnish company in the veterinary field only devoted to the veterinary practical work.
Vetman Ltd also provides continuing education courses. Our EHYT House has plenty of room (over 2000 square meters), so we can have wet labs or lectures. Many vets know well our Orange Hall and EHYT Arena. Fennovet is a remarkable partner for these courses.
We also partner with Fysioline Production to make ergonomic treatment tables. Our tables set a new standard for veterinary tables.

Name: ViVet UK
Description:
ViVet is an ambitious and wide-ranging programme designed to ensure veterinary professionals are at the centre of innovation in the animal health sector. ViVet is driven by the mission of ‘enabling creative veterinary solutions for the good of animal health and welfare’. 

The programme is managed by the Royal College of Veterinary Surgeons and was inspired by the Vet Futures research initiative.

Name: Axys Análises - Diagnóstico Veterinário e Consultoria
Description:
Análises é o novo conceito em laboratório diagnóstico veterinário. Conheça nossos serviços. Acesse http://axysanalises.com.br/

Rapidez e confiança:
O Axys Análises utiliza tecnologia de ponta e controle de todo processo diagnóstico, desde a entrada da amostra até a saída do resultado. Isso possibilita a diminuição no tempo de processamento e aumento na rapidez e confiança do resultado.

Respeito ao cliente:
A área exclusiva dos clientes no site permite a visualização passo a passo das amostras enviadas e o prazo de entrega dos resultados. Além disso, o Laboratório Axys tem numerosos canais de comunicação, auxiliando o clínico/Médico Veterinário na melhor tomada de decisão após o resultado do exame.

- Acesse a área exclusiva de clientes http://migre.me/5EMAy
- Entre em contato conosco http://migre.me/5EMBc
- Veja tabela de preços e prazos http://migre.me/5EMBC

Name: Healthy Pet Connect
Description: We are the first Remote Patient Monitoring (RPM) platform in Veterinary Medicine. We provide real time data and trends from pet to vet by a dashboard that connects best in class  IOT pet health devices and services in addition to our bluetooth connected scales. We have proven better outcomes and can increase efficiency while increasing accessibility.

Name: Pet Cancer Care Consulting
Description: There are approximately 430 boarded veterinary oncologists in the USA and Canada, and there are approximately 6 million dogs diagnosed with cancer each year according to the National Cancer Institute, which means there are not enough boarded oncologists to meet the demand. This leads to extensive wait times for pets to be seen, delays in treatment, and sometimes no treatment at all being provided, especially when pets are geographically distant from oncology locations. There is a huge need for oncology services today. Pet Cancer Care Consulting will bridge the gap and provide accessibility to oncologists from the convenience of the family vet’s office by live video consultations to the family vet and pet owners, which provide personalized responses, and additional information to make critical decisions for pet family members. There is also strong continuity of care as the family veterinarian and oncologist speak directly, so  no lost tests or records occur. Treatment plans and ongoing care can be requested.

Name: CRAR Centre de Rehabilitació Animal de Referència
Description:
Our mission is to return as much as possible the locomotive capacities to the patient and improve its quality of life.

We are veterinary rehabilitators; we want to be a reliable complement for all those hospitals, clinics and veterinary facilities that require a rehab service for their patients, without fear of losing the client, because we do not offer any other service outside our specialty. 
Thus, we also advise those veterinary rehabilitators who need a second opinion or need to refer a case to make a specific therapy.

Our center is fully enabled so that all pets with mobility problems can move easily.
Discover our underwater treadmill hydrotherapy area, where animals can recover their muscles mass without joint impact.
The center has a large gym area to exercise different muscle groups and work the proprioception.
In addition, we have a quiet and noise-free space, where animals can receive physical and manual therapy treatments without distractions.

If you are interested in being a referral center or wish to send us a case, contact us and we will provide you with all the information.

Name: Propecuária - Saúde e Bem-estar Animal
Description:
Pertencemos ao grupo de distribuição líder no mercado veterinário no estado do Paraná.

Com mais de 30 anos de presença na região, atendemos diariamente médicos veterinários, clínicas veterinárias, pet shops e outros com nossas linhas de referência mundial.

Somos distribuidores exclusivos dos Laboratórios:
- Boehringer Ingelheim
- Vetnil
- Syntec

Name: Brooke Hospital for Animals - Egypt
Description: Brooke Hospital for Animals - Egypt founded In 1934 is a non-governmental organization

Name: Ideant Veterinaria
Description:
Ser veterinario no es lo que muchos piensan. No son solo abrazos peludos y momentos de gratitud. Es aguantar jornadas eternas, sobrevivir con salarios injustos, lidiar con quejas constantes y sortear barreras que nunca deberían existir.

Y, aun así, ahí estás. Porque rendirse no es una opción para ti.

En Ideant Veterinaria, lo sabemos. Por eso, nuestras formaciones están diseñadas para adaptarse a tu realidad. Sin complicaciones ni cargas extra, para que puedas seguir creciendo en un sector que te exige tanto.

Lo que haces importa. Y mereces todo el apoyo. Con Ideant, la mejor formación veterinaria está en tus manos.

En 2013 Ideant Veterinaria iniciamos la actividad ofreciendo comunicación en Facebook para veterinarios. 

Desde entonces año tras año nos ponemos en los zapatos de los veterinarios y los Brand Managers de los laboratorios para poder ofrecer productos que cubran sus necesidades mediante la innovación en comunicación y tecnología y el contenido técnico veterinario de alta calidad: Redes sociales solo para veterinarios de España, Formación Microlearning vía Whatsapp, Publicaciones para la práctica clínica, revistas con formatos ágiles y orientados al día a día de los veterinarios,...

Nos hemos posicionado como partner integral de los laboratorios convirtiéndose en una empresa de referencia en formación práctica y comunicación digital para el veterinario.

Name: TARGET VETERINARY MEDICINE TRADING
Description:
Mission and Values

Our Vision:
To be the trusted leader in veterinary medicine distribution, advancing animal health and well-being across the UAE, Oman, Africa, and the Middle East, through excellence, innovation, and sustainability."

We fulfill our mission by:
Exceeding Expectations: Delivering exceptional service that goes above and beyond for our valued customers.

Uncompromising Quality: Sourcing and distributing top-tier veterinary products, ensuring the highest standards of quality and safety.

Empowering Expertise: Equipping veterinarians and animal care professionals with cutting-edge knowledge and solutions through continuous education and support.

Sustainable Stewardship: Championing Eco-friendly practices within our operations, fostering responsible animal care, and promoting sustainability in our industry.

Global Reach: Expanding our footprint into Africa and the Middle East, creating a lasting impact on animal health and well-being across borders.

Community Commitment: Actively engaging with local communities, charities, and organizations to advance animal welfare and support community development.

At Vet Target, we are passionate about animals and dedicated to enhancing their lives. As a company born in 2023, we are driven by our vision and mission to make a positive difference in the world of veterinary medicine."

Name: Dispovet
Description:
Dispovet levert veterinaire reinigings- en desinfectie oplossingen en disposables voor dierenartsen. Deze producten kunnen online 24 uur per dag, 7 dagen per week worden besteld.

Door fabricage en import van producten en een strakke organisatie kan Dispovet tegen scherpe prijzen leveren. Persoonlijke service, flexibiliteit en snelheid in de levering staan hierbij voorop.

Onder haar eigen Dispovet merk zijn diverse producten zoals hechtmateriaal, onderleggers en bandages beschikbaar. De prijs-kwaliteitverhouding van deze producten is zeer goed. Middels een proefpakket kunt u kennismaken met onze producten. Daarnaast bieden wij producten van merken als Ethicon, BBraun, BD en Terumo aan. "Generiek als het kan, merk als het moet".
 
Dispovet is opgericht door Norbert Seeger en Erwin Holl. Samen hebben zij ruim 25 jaar ervaring in de in- en verkoop van medische disposables. Deze ervaring delen zij graag met u.

Name: Veterinary Specialty Practice Alliance (VSPA)
Description:
The Veterinary Specialty Practice Alliance (VSPA), established in 1999, is a not-for-profit association representing veterinary specialty and emergency hospitals working in private practice throughout the United States. Membership includes owners, administrators, and doctors of these facilities. The VSPA is a collective voice for issues related to specialty veterinary medicine that includes the sharing of best practices related to hospital management and patient care.

VSPA Vision:
To ensure sustainability and prosperity of independently owned veterinary specialty hospitals.

VSPA Mission:
To nourish leadership and optimize organizational health within independently owned emergency and specialty veterinary hospitals, utilizing the development of relationships, benchmarks, and shared innovations.

VSPA Values: 
    Camaraderie
    Education
    Collaboration
    Catenation
    Trust

The purpose of the VSPA is to be leaders in and advance the delivery of specialty veterinary services. The VSPA is a defined membership of privately owned, independent, veterinary specialty, and emergency hospitals where members actively participate in creating benchmarks and tools through communication and collaboration.

Name: Wizzvet
Description:
Créée exclusivement pour les vétérinaires, Wizzvet est la 1ère plateforme européenne de téléexpertise vétérinaire et de webconférences. 

Wizzvet permet aux vétérinaires de se former en ligne grâce à : 
- de courtes webconférences de 15 minutes sur des sujets spécifiques, présentées par des spécialistes diplômés d'un collège européen ou américain, ou DESV ou des référents reconnus dans leurs disciplines 
- des cas cliniques complexes que les vétérinaires peuvent poster sur la plateforme, auxquels un spécialiste répond sous 48h

Avec plus de 1000 webconférences en live ou en replay, la plateforme compte aujourd’hui plus de 12000 vétérinaires francophones internationaux parmi ses membres. 

Wizzvet est disponible en français, anglais, espagnol, allemand, italien et portugais. 

Vous n'êtes plus seul derrière votre stéthoscope !

Name: Heartstrings Pet Hospice & In-Home Euthanasia & Aftercare
Description:
Heartstrings Pet Hospice & In-Home Euthanasia is a network of dedicated veterinarians with a mission to ensure a tranquil end-of-life journey for every pet. We prioritize preserving the profound human-animal connection during this challenging phase and take pride in collaborating with caring and empathetic veterinarians.

We firmly believe in providing aging pets with a serene, individualized end-of-life journey, guided by the understanding that pets are cherished family members. Our commitment is rooted in the belief that pets should depart on their own terms, in the comfort of their homes, and surrounded by the love of their human companions.

Our veterinarians are profoundly dedicated to the practice of veterinary hospice and euthanasia, driven by the conviction that pets are family. We maintain a robust network of doctors who communicate continuously, discussing innovative medical protocols and leading in the emerging field of veterinary medicine. Our passion for animals and our understanding of the grief experienced when losing a family member transcend species boundaries.

Name: International Veterinary Outreach
Description: Envisioning A World Free Of Animal Suffering Where Communities Connected With Animals Thrive

Name: Micro Animal Health Care
Description: Micro Animal Health Care!  We are a reputable manufacturer of top-notch animal health products, providing creative ways to improve the production and general well-being of livestock and companion animals. We prioritize research and development to fulfill our client's evolving requirements while upholding the strictest safety and efficacy standards. Come along with us as we work to enhance the quality of life for both animal caregivers and animals.

Name: Swine Health Information Center
Description: Our goal is to protect and enhance the health of the United States swine herd through targeted research investments that minimize the impact of future disease threats through collection and analysis of swine health data and global disease monitoring.

Name: Pet Space Group
Description:
Pet Space, Hong Kong’s largest veterinary group, we provide professional services through our unique “Medutainment” approach support both Pets and Pet’s owners from Medical, Education to Entertainment at a high standard of hospitality and customer service. Like the Rubik’s cube in our logo, we have different facets and flexibility to share, to care, and most importantly to love. 
Please join us to accompany the life journey of companions with our greatest heart and warm welcome.

Pet Space veterinary clinics are located in Hong Kong and Singapore.

Name: Vervetico
Description: Welcome to our veterinary practice! We are dedicated to providing the highest quality care for your furry family members. Our team of experienced veterinarians and support staff is here to assist with all of your pet's health needs. Whether it's a routine check-up or a more complex medical issue, we are here to help. Thank you for choosing us to care for your beloved pets.

Name: CANINE ARTHRITIS MANAGEMENT
Description:
Canine Arthritis Management (CAM) was developed by Hannah Capon, a veterinary surgeon with wide-ranging experience of working with arthritic dogs, their owners and fellow professionals to create effective long-term management plans.
CAM is committed to promoting better care of our ageing canine friends. We believe that through education the disease can be better tackled to give our dogs longer, healthier lives free from pain. CAM aims to challenge arthritis as the major cause of elective euthanasia in the UK.

CAM also offers manual therapies, educational talks and much more. Please don’t hesitate to get in touch if you’d like more information about us and what we do.

To contact hannah please email hannah@caninearthritis.co.uk

Name: Zoovet
Description: Bienvenidos al  Hospital Veterinario ZOOVET, es para nosotros un placer poder brindarles los mejores servicios Médicos Veterinarios enfocados en la Medicina Bioenergética en beneficio de la salud y bienestar de caninos, felinos, mascotas exóticas y fauna silvestre. Trabajamos en beneficio de la salud de su mejor amigo.

Name: EICKEMEYER Danmark
Description:
Hos Eickemeyer Danmark er vi stolte af at være blevet udnævnt til Gazellevirksomhed. Vi er ikke kun et datterselskab af Eickemeyer i Tyskland, men har en række selvstændige leverandører og samarbejdspartnere, som sikrer dig et bredt udvalg af veterinærmedicinsk udstyr af højeste kvalitet.

Vi tilbyder serviceaftaler og lovpligtige eftersyn på alt udstyr. Reparationer af udstyr samt slibning af instrumenter udføres også som en del af Eickemeyer's servicebegreb. 
Hos Eickemeyer har vi fokus alene på det veterinære marked, og går efter at opfylde selv den mest krævende dyrlæges behov.

Name: Animalytix
Description:
Animalytix is the animal health industry’s leading public clearinghouse for US sales information, capturing the results of 60+ million sales transactions of veterinary and animal health related pharmaceuticals, vaccines, insecticides, nutraceuticals, medical equipment, animal identification and other related supplies per year to more than 800,000 veterinarians, equestrians, OTC retailers, livestock producers and livestock production companies. Animalytix maintains a comprehensive database of over $75.0 billion in sales history dating from 2006, reflecting sales of 200,000+ unique distributor SKUs representing 10,000+ unique product brands from more than 500 manufacturers. Through our robust database, we deliver the industry’s most comprehensive actionable commercial insight via our timely reporting of geo-located sales information. 
Vetalytix, Animalytix’s reference services umbrella, provides the industry’s largest repository of localized economic insight, regulatory compliance resources and pharmacy support tools, all of which are designed to help veterinary practices compete in today’s challenging economy.

Name: MetroVet
Description:
Headquartered in Dubai, MetroVet is our animal health care division dealing with veterinary pharmaceutical products and feed additives. MetroVet is a company of Mazrui International LLC - a privately-held diversified holding company that operates across numerous Industries and asset classes in the MENA region.

We are committed to addressing local animal welfare concerns through our local and regional understanding. As a trusted partner, we work with Veterinary multinational brands to strengthen their business in the region, develop efficiency, deliver quality and control costs with our expert supply chain solutions and state of the art ERP-based warehousing facilities.

MetroVet has established itself as a trusted and long-term partner with consistent growth in revenues and market share. Our ever-expanding portfolio reflects our growing business partnerships and supports our rapidly expanding UAE-based customer base.

Name: Ackerman Group
Description: The Ackerman Group is the profession's premier practice broker. Boasting an unrivaled breadth of expertise and experience in the business of veterinary practice sales, Ackerman provides practice leaders with advice and support to realize more successful financial futures. Since 2017, the company has assisted sellers in transactions to corporate groups totaling in excess of $1,000,000,000, making the Ackerman Group the leading sales advisor in the industry.

Name: vtx_cpd
Description:
The vision for vtx is to provide high-quality friendly veterinary CPD that both educates and inspires our colleagues, and that is delivered in a professional and compassionate manner. 

We aim to offer engaging CPD events in distinct environments that delivers a memorable experience, in addition to offering personalised consultations for our members.
vtx takes an active interest in both the education and well-being of our members and colleagues working within the veterinary industry. We want to inspire, improve and support you as both a veterinary professional and as a person.

We work to offer bespoke tailor made CPD content for our members and other organisations through a variety of appraoches, including specialist-led webinars, CPD day events, discussion forums and we support all of our content with a consultancy advice service for those difficult cases that you want additional advice and support from specialists that you know and trust.

vtx aim to remove the barrier and support you as you progress throughout your career to whatever level you wish to pursue.

Name: JTPHARMA for vets
Description:
JT PHARMA is a Spanish company that began its journey in the veterinary sector in 2012 dedicated to the production and distribution of nutritional supplements for veterinary use. 

The company was born as a result of the dedication, experience and hard work of our CEO Juan Tarazona. His entrepreneurial character together with his passion for animals made this project possible. 

We work every day to provide the veterinary sector with innovative solutions with products based on high quality natural ingredients and formulations developed by veterinary experts. 

Continuous improvement and animal welfare are fundamental to our company.

 If you want to contact us:

 Email: info@jtpharma.es
 Tel.: 911 863 116

Animal welfare, our priority .

Name: VETERINARIA ALEM
Description:
Veterinaria Alem es una empresa creada por la Familia Alem con 66 años de experiencia. Nos enfocamos en atender las necesidades de las mascotas e impartimos nuestra experiencia para ofrecer día a día una mejor calidad de productos y servicios.

Apuntamos primordialmente al énfasis por la atención a nuestros clientes, quienes cuidan de sus mascotas, así como por ofrecer productos de excelente calidad. Mantenemos una extrecha relación empresarial con las más importantes compañías de alimentos, criaderos, medicamentos, químicos y accesorios en toda Argentina.

Los locales de Veterinarias Alem poseen un excelente resultado basado en la notable satisfacción de sus clientes lo que igualmente nos da excelentes referencias en el mercado y entre nuestros clientes. Las Veterinarias Alem nacieron en Córdoba Capital y se han expandido hacia todo el país.

Nuestra empresa busca constantemente nuevas metas, ampliando y expandiendo su campo de acción, nuestra principal filosofía sigue siendo ofrecer una mejor y mayor prestación de servicios queremos ser cada vez mas competitivos y mantener nuestro alto nivel de calidad.

Name: US Vet Shows
Description:
The US Vet Shows are built for busy veterinary professionals who want high-quality, practical education in a fun, fast-paced environment. Whether you’re looking to sharpen your clinical skills, explore new business strategies, or discover the latest innovations, Wild West Vet and New York Vet offer an unbeatable mix of learning, networking, and exhibitor connections.

With world-class speakers, 200+ exhibitors, and hands-on sessions, you’ll gain real-world insights you can use immediately in practice. Plus, with two incredible locations—Reno, NV, and New York City—you can choose the event that best fits your schedule and professional goals.

Don’t miss the veterinary event that works around your busy schedule—get the CE, connections, and experience you need in just a few days!

 Wild West Vet – October 14-17, 2026 | Peppermill Resort, Reno, NV
 New York Vet – October 29-30, 2026 | Javits Center, NYC

Name: Humeco
Description:
Consorcio Mercantil de Huesca S.L. (Humeco) es una empresa consolidada en el sector veterinario y ganadero especializada en distintas ramas de este: reproducción, sanidad animal, higiene y desinfección, formación, análisis, material veterinario y ganadero y pequeños animales.

Somos líderes en el ámbito de la reproducción animal y ecografía veterinaria. Disponemos de una amplísima gama de material veterinario y ganadero, productos nutricionales, de bioseguridad y productos zoosanitarios de los principales laboratorios.

Todo el equipo humano que compone Humeco posee una amplia experiencia adquirida en el día a día, trabajando, asesorando, investigando y buscando siempre la mejor solución, formado por un equipo multidisciplinar, implicado y comprometido.

Este trabajo diario ha tenido su respuesta en la incorporación de nuevas distribuciones, laboratorios y empresas internacionales que han encontrado en Humeco la empresa ideal donde desarrollar con profesionalidad la comercialización de sus productos y servicios.

Nuestra máxima ha sido y será siempre la misma: ofrecer a nuestros clientes y colaboradores nuestro mejor producto: nuestro servicio.

Name: Clinicanimal
Description:
Te damos la bienvenida a Clinicanimal!  

Estamos aquí para que tu animal tenga el mejor cuidado!  

Nuestras instalaciones están diseñadas pensando en el bienestar de tu compañero, nuestro equipo está formado por profesionales y utilizamos las tecnologías más avanzadas para diagnosticar y tratar cualquier problema de salud que pueda enfrentar tu animal a lo largo de su vida. 

Confía en nuestros servicios para mantener a tu mejor amigo feliz y saludable!  Descubre todo lo que ofrecemos al detalle aquí: https://www.clinicanimal.vet 

¿Quieres unirte a nuestra familia? Accede aquí: https://empleo.clinicanimal.vet/jobs

Description: To provide a community of likeminded professional from the veterinary profession, students, nurses, vets, and reception staff, to share advice, stories and knowledge to help us all make better, more informed and timely financial decisions to help us enjoy of journey wherever it may take us.

Name: Creature Comforts Group
Description:
From our ground-breaking house call practice to state-of-the-art hospitals, the Creature Comforts Veterinary Group has made it our mission to provide the highest level of veterinary service to the cats and dogs of Hong Kong. Established over twenty years ago, we have expanded into one of the largest veterinary groups in Hong Kong.



Creature Comforts is a progressive, professional group with a reputation for high-quality medicine and surgery. We believe in hiring, developing, and rewarding the highest talents in their fields and offer tailored career progression across all our roles. We foster a diverse and innovative workplace culture that prioritises personal development.



In 2022 the CCVG was acquired by Mars Veterinary Health, one of the world’s largest veterinary groups, providing CCVG staff even more opportunities for personal growth and career development.

Creature Comforts Group is dedicated to providing the highest quality compassionate, convenient veterinary care around the clock to the pets of Hong Kong.

Name: New Global Pet
Description:
New Global is proud to promote the health and well-being of our beloved pets since our beginning in 2004. We are a leading natural pet food company in our segment and distribute exclusively some of the world ́s best brands to Spain and Portugal.
We believe that our pet friends deserve the best nature can provide and therefore we solely work with brands that share our vision. Natural products, biologically appropriate, without cereals, gluten, artificial colours or preservatives are some of the characteristics found across our range of foods.
We believe in the development of partnerships with our clients and prioritize high quality service linked to the innovation of the products we promote.
We know that a nutritionally, complete and balanced meal makes all the difference for the health and vitality of our pet companions. We also know that healthy animals are always happier!

Name: LyraVet
Description: Lyravet reclaims hours of the workday for busy veterinarians. Clinicians who use LyraVet tools are better prepared for appointments, finish paperwork faster, and spend less time doing the work they hate. LyraVet’s suite of AI tools, including appointment primer and medical scribe has processed hundreds of thousands of pages of veterinary documents and reduced daily workload by an average of 20%. Lyravet has secured key channel partner Covetrus, and is preparing to deploy to their network of 20,000 clinics globally.

Name: Special Animals & Veterinary Emergency Relief Society
Description: Special Animals & Veterinary Emergency Relief Society (SAVERS) is a registered society working in University of Veterinary and Animal Sciences. This non-governmental organization  provides a platform for young vet students to get themselves aware of their profession, and help them to have maximum exposure with their future professional life, and that is to save animals, develop a passion to rescue them and conserve them, whatever sector is it, SAVERS has been striving hard to make a change between the modern society and the traditional values and practices regarding veterinary sciences, to make the young vet students to have international skills and well aware knowledge of their legacy. SAVERS is not just a name of an organization, it's a name of a journey, towards the road of a purposeful life and prosperity of both animals and humans. The Alumni network of SAVERS is itself a symbol of what this society strives to provide and achieve. SAVERS has raised many awareness seminars among the wild life, rabies, one health, animal day and all other related events regarding the public awareness of all the critical points residing in our society regarding humans and animals relation. Several free vaccination and deworming camps have also been arranged regarding the safety and precaution against lethal diseases that are the main threat to the main assets of our nation, the livestock and dairy. In a nutshell SAVERS is a Society that is trying to serve the nation by helping the youth to have an professional outlook on life and the helping those who can't even say the word HELP.

Name: FeedWise
Description:
Next-level voedingsadvies voor de veterinaire professional

Rangschik met slechts enkele muisklikken de juiste voedingsopties, geordend naar de geschiktheid voor de individuele hond of kat. Selecteer de meest geschikte keuze, en voorzie de eigenaar in no-time van een info-brief met alle belangrijke informatie.

Merk onafhanklijk voedingsadvies
Vergelijk geschikte voedingsopties van alle beschikbare merken dieetvoeding voor honden en katten

Voor alle levensfases en indicaties
Voor gezonde huisdieren en huisdieren met een aandoening die een specifieke voedingsbehoefte vereist

Efficiëntie
"5-minute nutritional consult”: bespaar in tijd en kosten, maar niet in kwaliteit

Specifieke groei- en afvaltrajecten
Speciale modules voor groeiende dieren en dieren die moeten afvallen

Ondersteuning zelfgemaakte diëten
Evalueer en/of formuleer zelfgemaakte diëten voor de individuele patiënt in slechts enkele stappen

Combinatie van verschillende voedingen
Combineer verschillende voedingen (bijv. nat- en droogvoer), terwijl u er toch voor zorgt dat aan alle energie- en voedingsbehoeften wordt voldaan

Finetuning met verschillende filteropties
Vind gemakkelijk de geschikte voedingsoptie voor uw patiënt met de diverse filteropties (bijv. voor allergenen, voermerk, multipele gezondheidsproblemen)

Evaluatie commerciële voeding
Evalueer gemakkelijk elk commercieel dieet op geschiktheid voor de individuele hond of kat en genereer eenvoudig een voedingsadvies

Name: VetWise
Description:
VetWise provides 24/7 after-hours support for veterinary practices — licensed RVTs and veterinarians answering your phones around the clock.

When a worried pet owner calls at 2 AM, voicemail leaves them feeling unsupported. They don't call back — they rush to the ER. 

You lose the appointment. Sometimes you lose the client.

We built VetWise because we lived this. Founded by veterinarians who understand the impossible choice between being available for clients and being present for life, VetWise exists so practices never have to choose between burnout and abandoned clients.

Our experienced RVTs (10+ years average) provide clinical triage with empathy and expertise. True emergencies are directed to the ER with case notes sent ahead. 

Everything else? Booked at YOUR practice for the morning. When clients need a vet tonight — not tomorrow, but not the ER — our telemedicine platform gives you options. Staff it with your own DVMs, use our locum veterinarians, or mix both. 

Your clients. Your pricing. Your revenue.

750,000+ calls handled. 
600+ practices trusting VetWise.

Technology makes us efficient. People make us different.

That's Care. Anywhere.

Name: Comac
Description:
A COMAC (Comissão de Animais de Companhia) é uma dentre as muitas comissões do SINDAN formada por empresas do segmento veterinário filiadas ao sindicato e que comercializam produtos para saúde animal. 
 
O SINDAN (Sindicato Nacional da Indústria de Produtos para Saúde Animal), é uma entidade de âmbito nacional que tem por objetivo estudar, coordenar, defender, proteger e representar legalmente a indústria de medicamentos veterinários.
 
A COMAC surgiu com a necessidade de compreender, estudar e dar ainda mais subsídios para o desenvolvimento do mercado de animais de companhia que possui características especiais e requer uma abordagem estratégica e mercadológica próprias.

Name: Metropolitan Veterinary Associates
Description:
Since 1986, Metropolitan Veterinary Associates has provided the highest quality of veterinary medicine.  It is our mission to enhance and improve the lives of our patients through exceptional care.  We concentrate on specialty, urgent care and emergency cases, allowing us to dedicate high-level care to the following disciplines: anesthesia, arthroscopy, cardiology, dentistry, dermatology, emergency & critical care (including urgent care at our location in Wayne, PA), internal medicine, interventional radiology, neurology, oncology, ophthalmology, radiology (including CT, MRI and I-131), and surgery.

Metropolitan Veterinary Associates is the preferred specialty and emergency care hospital in our region serving pets, pet owners and referring veterinarians. Our mission is to provide unsurpassed veterinary care to improve and enhance the quality of life for our patients.
 
Excellent Service – We pledge to provide the finest customer service through kindness, a proactive attitude and catering to our clients to ensure their complete satisfaction. Our team shares a love of pets and people and honors the best in each of our clients.

Exceptional Skill – We pledge to provide up-to-date therapies and comprehensive care while maintaining compassion in all interactions. We will promote, educate and disseminate medical knowledge to allow for well-informed decision making.

Extraordinary Care – Our practice is a place where genuine care, comfort and quality veterinary medicine for our patients and clients is our highest mission.

Description: Vetinova was born with the mission to "Provide excel Animal Health services in poultry production with a focus on preventive veterinary medicine, applied science, know-how, innovation, and method".

Name: Pharmacell S.A.
Description:
PHARMACELL S.A. Animal Health Care & Nutrition is a veterinary company, founded in 2009. Its mission is to successfully meet the growing needs of the veterinary industry, while its vision is to provide diversified, value-added products and services, in both the pet and the productive animal sector.
The company has established a national sales network, with distribution channels of vet clinics, the livestock units of all animals, as well as the feed shops of both productive animals and pets, serving more than 1,500 customers nationwide. The headquarter facility of 4,500 m2, includes a Logistics center, a wholesale store of veterinary drugs, the production line of feed supplements in large packaging and the laboratory to produce special supplements of smaller packaging, in both solid and liquid form, mainly for individual administration.
The company represents international brands and sells, exclusively in Greece,  their range of specialized products.
Pharmacell operates in the light of veterinary science and therefore, participates in research programs of University institutions.
In the MASTIN program, implemented under the auspices of the General Secretariat for Research & Technology, in collaboration with the School of Veterinary Medicine and the Department of Chemistry of AUTH University. The program entails the production of an intramammary preparation, without the use of antibiotics, for distribution both in Greece and internationally.
In the AMNOSELECT program, in collaboration with the University of Ioannina, the International University of Greece (Department of Animal Production) and the University of Thessaly (Department of Veterinary Medicine). The program examines the "Development and implementation of modern methods for sex selection in sheep, with the aim of maintaining and increasing the livestock and productivity of indigenous breeds of high genetic value."

Name: Vet Set Go
Description: Vet Set Go is the first and only community dedicated to teen and tween aspiring veterinarians.  Our goal is simple, ENCOURAGE today’s future veterinarians to explore their dream and show them HOW they can do it today.   We created the Vet Volunteer App - the first app that let’s future veterinarians find locations near them to volunteer with animals or shadow veterinarians while letting them track their volunteer hours.

Name: Honor Pet
Description:
→ FOR VET CLINICS ←
Every goodbye shapes how clients remember you. Let’s make it unforgettable.

Honor Pet is the cremation partner that elevates your clinic’s care—without extra cost, complexity, or headaches.

•  Save 15 minutes per patient: No double data entry. No clunky portals. Just seamless integration with your PMS.
•  Cut follow-up calls: We keep pet parents updated throughout, so your team doesn’t have to.
•  A memorial return you’ll be proud of: Beautifully packaged, thoughtfully handled. Comfort for families, credibility for you.
•  Leave a living legacy: We plant a tree for every cremation and send you monthly reports so your impact is visible and meaningful.

We’re not just a service provider—we’re your silent partner in delivering better care. We save your team time, strengthen your reputation, and help your clinic lead with heart.

→ FOR PET PARENTS ←
A new kind of goodbye, designed around you.

Honor Pet is changing how pet end of life can be. We’re the first truly pet parent–centered brand in the cremation space. That means every service, every decision, is built around you.

At our LA Comfort Center, we offer a full end-of-life care journey under one roof:
pre-planning, euthanasia, water cremation, memorial experiences, grief support, and community events.

It’s not just a better version of what came before. It’s a completely new approach—to give you more time, more transparency, and more choice. Because goodbyes matter.

Name: Denkavit Ibérica
Description:
Denkavit Group y Dinuvet unieron sus fuerzas en 2019 y su experiencia para crear Denkavit Ibérica y tener mayor presencia en el mercado nacional 
El reto es convertirla en un referente en el sector de la nutrición para animales jóvenes en España y Portugal.

Name: Uncharted Veterinary Conference
Description:
Uncharted has thrown out the elements of traditional veterinary conferences and doubled down on what brings results: networking, skill building, strategic planning and resource creation. 

We:
- Host unique online and in-person events which consistently inspire and engage
- Work with veterinary practice groups to develop their leaders and connect them together to make the biggest impact possible.
- Host a free, weekly management podcast that tackles common challenges for leading in veterinary medicine.
- Guide an online community of veterinary leaders who are each on their own paths with online courses, resources and a private place to connect.

Our members don't just leave our events or training with CE credits. They leave with a renewed sense of purpose, a network of lifelong friends, and the practical tools to create a more fulfilling and sustainable career.

Ready to change your career and find your people? Follow us to see how we're growing leaders who make waves in veterinary medicine, and visit our website to learn more about our upcoming events and how to become an Uncharted Member.

Name: ONCOnseil - Service d’Oncologie VET OCCITANIE
Description: Expertise et formation en oncologie vétérinaire : consultations spécialisées, télé-expertises, plans personnalisés de soins, formations, conférences...

Name: Arista Advanced Pet Care
Description: With over 25 years of industry expertise, Arista Advanced Pet Care revolutionizes veterinary emergency and specialty care. Our unique shared-ownership model empowers veterinary specialists and emergency doctors with meaningful ownership and a collaborative environment, enhancing the delivery of advanced care. We prioritize seamless support and communication among primary care veterinarians, pet owners, and specialty providers to improve outcomes and experiences. Our integrated approach ensures personalized, less transactional care, fostering a supportive community dedicated to enriching the lives of pets and their families. Join Arista and be part of a culture where your potential is unlimited, with competitive compensation, growth opportunities, and comprehensive health and wellness benefits.

Name: PLANET HEALTH
Description:
Crée depuis 2004, la société PLANET HEALTH est aujourd’hui un des laboratoires leaders de l’industrie pharmaceutique vétérinaire. Nous accompagnons les vétérinaires et le secteur de la santé animale avec une large gamme de produits et de solutions innovantes respectant les standards de qualité avec l’engagement constant de l’efficacité, de la productivité et de la sécurité.
 
Nous travaillons sur une approche globale allant de la prévention jusqu’au traitement des maladies au travers des vaccins, des additifs alimentaires et des suppléments nutritionnels (nutrition animale), de la désinfection (biosécurité et hygiène) et des médicaments avec une gamme de produits riche, couvrant différentes spécialités et classes thérapeutiques.
 
Aux côtés de ses propres produits fabriqués localement au Maroc, PLANET HEALTH est le distributeur des leaders mondiaux de la santé animale tels que MSD, Phibro Animal Health, Huevepharma, Inovet, CZV, Bimeda, ….

Name: VetNOW
Description: VetNOW is a global leader in livestock veterinary connected care. Our platform improves animal health, farmer profitability, and helps to ensure the safety and security of the global food supply chain.

Name: AniCura Norge
Description:
AniCura er en ledende leverandør av veterinærtjenester i Europa. Vårt selskap ble grunnlagt med filosofien om at deling av ressurser og kunnskap skaper bedre muligheter for veterinærpleie.

Våre tjenester dekker et bredt spekter av medisinske tjenester av høy kvalitet, inkludert forebyggende og grunnleggende helsehjelp samt spesialisert pleie. Dette omfatter avansert diagnostikk, indremedisin, intensivpleie, kirurgi og ortopedi. Vi tilbyr også rehabilitering, fysioterapi og kostholdsveiledning samt et utvalg av dyrefôr og pleieprodukter.

AniCuras nettverk består av 500 klinikker fordelt på 17 land i Europa, og tilbyr over 4,5 millioner konsultasjoner av høy kvalitet hvert år. AniCura har vært en del av Mars Veterinary Health siden 2018. Mars Veterinary Health omfatter et nettverk av over 3,000 klinikker globalt som tar hånd om mer enn 25 millioner kjæledyr årlig. Sammen kan vi tilby de høyeste standardene indenfor kjæledyrpleie og oppnå vårt felles formål: EN BEDRE VERDEN FOR DYR.

Legal: https://www.mars.com/legal-norway
Privacy: https://www.mars.com/privacy-policy-norway

Name: Aquivet Saúde Aquática
Description:
Somos referência em sanidade aquícola, pesquisa clínica e inteligência de mercado no mercado de aquicultura no Brasil.

Fundada em 2013, atuamos na interface entre ciência, dados e campo, desenvolvendo soluções técnicas baseadas em evidências para a gestão sanitária e econômica da aquicultura. Conduzimos estudos clínicos, avaliações epidemiológicas e análises de desempenho produtivo, transformando dados sanitários em inteligência estratégica para produtores, empresas e instituições. Nosso trabalho promove sistemas produtivos mais saudáveis, eficientes e rentáveis, alinhados às melhores práticas científicas, regulatórias e de bem-estar animal.
Location: São José do Rio Preto, São Paulo

Name: Humane Animal Welfare Society - HAWS of Waukesha
Description: The Humane Animal Welfare Society | Waukesha County Animal Shelter HAWS, is a non-profit organization established in 1965 that assists 8,000 animals each year and welcomes more than 35,000 human visitors annually. As an “open admissions” shelter, we accept animals regardless of age, health, temperament or breed. Our full service humane society offers programs and services that promote responsible pet ownership, preventing animal abuse and neglect in our community and beyond. HAWS promotes the humane care and treatment of all animals, in support of cooperative humane efforts throughout the state of Wisconsin. HAWS is a member of the Wisconsin Federated Humane Societies, and not affiliated with any other local or national humane society.

Description: Depuis 1993, GROUPE DMV s'engage avec force et constance à valoriser tous les professionnels de la santé animale et à soutenir l'entrepreneuriat vétérinaire québécois.

Name: Pet Preferred Diagnostics, LLC
Description:
Pet Preferred Diagnostics is a veterinary reference laboratory located in Alpharetta, Georgia. We use commercially developed innovative technologies designed for veterinary diagnostics.  We offer Allergy tests (IgE) for canine, equine and feline, Food intolerance tests (IgG) for canine and feline, Lyme Disease tests for canine and equine, testing canines for Tapeworm & a revolutionary Early Cancer Diagnostics test that is available for canines and felines. The test detects and differentiates 22 tumors and 14 associated paraneoplastic neurological syndromes and requires only .01 ml of serum or plasma. This is the only cancer test that is available for cats too.

Pet Preferred Diagnostics takes pride in being the first and only lab to deliver all results within 24 hours.

Our new multiplex immunoblot technologies for all our tests allow us to have the most sensitive tests used in veterinary diagnostics and require just 1 ml of serum for the largest 100-allergen panel.
Additionally, we test the widest selection of allergens in our state-of-the-art lab and ensure that we offer the most competitive pricing. 
We formulate the immunotherapy based on allergy test results.

Our vision is to make fast and quality diagnostics available for veterinary care providers and affordable to all pet owners.

Prices include free preassembled serum collection and transportation kit delivery to your office, a prepaid envelope to return the serum sample to Pet Preferred Diagnostics, and the results released to your office within 24 hours.
Our lab never requires a contract.
We’d love to get to know you and answer any questions you may have! Please, visit our website at www.petpreferreddx.com for more information about our service or contact us at contact@petpreferreddx.com.

Name: Blue Surgical Instruments
Description:
At Blue Surgical Instruments, we are veterinary surgeons dedicated to supporting colleagues and institutions with surgical instruments and implants that combine precision, durability, and trust.

We are proud to collaborate with leading veterinary training providers in Europe and to be present at the most important international congresses, where science, practice and innovation meet.

What sets us apart is not only the quality of our products, but the way we work:

• Always reachable, always human: our team is available through e-mail, phone or WhatsApp to provide immediate, personal support to the specific needs off every clinic or academy

• Fast logistics: well-stocked inventory and 48-hour delivery across Central Europe, with reliable shipping to Europe and the Middle East

• Lifetime warranty on all instruments

• Surgeon-led consultancy to help colleagues select the right instruments and optimise clinical outcomes

Whether you are a procurement manager, a director of a veterinary academy, or a surgeon in clinical practice, our goal is the same: to provide you with instruments and service you can trust when you need them most.

Learn more: www.blueveterinary.com

Name: BioVet
Description:
„BioVet“ – tai prekinis ženklas, apimantis homeopatinius „Heel Vet“ veterinarinius vaistus bei dažniausiai iš ekologiškų žaliavų pagamintus „ANIBIO“ vitaminus, pašarų papildus bei įvairias gyvūnų priežiūros priemones.

Kokius produktus Jums siūlome?

„Heel Vet“– vokiški homeopatiniai veterinariniai preparatai, kurių išskirtinumas bei stiprybė – harmoninga šiuolaikinių farmacijos technologijų bei natūralių, gamtoje randamų ir jau nuo seno žinomų komponentų dermė. Sintetiniai medikamentai neretai tiesiog nuslopina vienos ar kitos gyvūną varginančios ligos simptomus. Tuo tarpu „Heel Vet“, dėl produktų sudėtyje esančių natūralių, kruopščiai atrinktų bei tiksliai tarpusavyje suderintų komponentų, aktyvina tam tikrus vidinius procesus, padedančius gyvūnų organizmui pačiam greičiau grįžti į normalią būseną.

„ANIBIO“ – tai, bendradarbiaujant su augintinių mitybos specialistais bei veterinarais, sukurti vitaminai, pašarų papildai bei įvairios priežiūros priemonės, skirti geros Jūsų mylimų augintinių savijautos bei nepriekaištingos jų išvaizdos puoselėjimui. Vienas svarbiausių šios vokiečių gamintojų produkcijos privalumas – išskirtinis dėmesys produktų, kurių dauguma turi ekologiškumą patvirtinančius sertifikatus, sudėčiai. Čia nerasite konservantų, kvapiųjų medžiagų bei kitų cheminių priedų, kurių vengia sąmoningi gyvūnų augintojai. „ANIBIO“ produktų gamybai naudojamos tik kokybiškos, saugios, gyvūnų organizmo puikiai toleruojamos ir, kalbant apie puikią augintinio savijautą, efektyvų poveikį turinčios medžiagos.

Kur įsigyti? Jei esate veterinarės vaistinės ar klinikos atstovas dėl užsakymų kreipkitės el. paštu info@biomedela.com arba tel. nr. +370 656 60130

Name: Krajowa Izba Lekarsko-Weterynaryjna
Description:
Krajowa Izba Lekarsko - Weterynaryjna działa na podstawie art. 17 Konstytucji Rzeczypospolitej Polskiej  i należy do samorządów zawodów zaufania publicznego  skupiając wszystkich polskich lekarzy weterynarii. Samorząd Lekarsko-Weterynaryjny jest niezależny i wykonuje swoje zadania  na podstawie  przepisów ustawy o zawodzie lekarza weterynarii i izbach lekarsko-weterynaryjnych. Najwyższą władzą Samorządu jest Krajowy Zjazd Lekarzy Weterynarii, który między innymi uchwala zasady etyki i deontologii weterynaryjnej. Krajowa Rada Lekarsko-Weterynaryjna kieruje działalnością samorządu w okresie między Krajowymi Zjazdami Lekarzy Weterynarii. Krajowa Rada Lekarsko - Weterynaryjna koordynuje i nadzoruje działalność 16 okręgowych rad lekarsko-weterynaryjnych. Do ustawowych zadań Samorządu Lekarzy Weterynarii należy m.in.: sprawowanie pieczy i nadzoru nad należytym i sumiennym wykonywaniem zawodu lekarza weterynarii, ustanawianie obowiązujących lekarzy weterynarii zasad etyki i deontologii weterynaryjnej oraz dbałość o ich przestrzeganie, reprezentowanie i ochrona zawodu lekarza weterynarii, integrowanie środowiska lekarsko-weterynaryjnego oraz zajmowanie stanowiska w sprawach stanu zdrowotności zwierząt, weterynaryjnej ochrony zdrowia publicznego i środowiska oraz polityki państwa w tym zakresie. 
Każdy lekarz weterynarii otrzymując prawo wykonywania zawodu składa następujące przyrzecznie: „Jako lekarz weterynarii przyrzekam, że w zgodzie z mym powołaniem, w trakcie pełnienia obowiązków zawodowych będę postępował sumiennie i zgodnie z aktualną wiedzą weterynaryjną, strzegł godności zawodu, przyczyniał się w miarę możliwości do postępu nauk weterynaryjnych, a także wykonywał obowiązki wynikające z przepisów prawa oraz zasad Kodeksu Etyki Lekarza Weterynarii”.

Name: Gerozan - Solução de Negócios
Description:
Fundada em 1977, em Diadema pelo Sr. Wilson Ciasca, a Comercial Gerozan iniciou as atividades no beneficiamento de cereais e comercialização de gêneros alimentícios em geral. Atendendo todo pequeno e médio varejo (mercearias, restaurantes, mercadinhos, super mercados e feiras livres.) Em 1985 com a entrada do Sócio Sr. Luciano Ciasca, a empresa ampliou suas atividades com a introdução de rações de insumos e animais de pequeno porte. Com a criação de uma marca própria de arroz para cães em 1988, expandimos nossas vendas para as grandes redes (Carrefour, Wall Mart, CBD, etc).

No final de 1997, já ocupávamos uma das primeiras posições no ranking de vendas entre os atacadistas de alimentos pet do Brasil, e a convite da Mars Brasil, tornamos distribuidores exclusivos de seus produtos no Green Chanel. Hoje nossa área geográfica foi triplicada, como reconhecimento de nossos ótimos serviços prestados.

Com a finalidade de otimizar nossa logística e na excelência no atendimento, em maio de 2012, mudamos para uma nova sede com uma estrutura de 5.000 m2 de área. Continuaremos expandindo nossa empresa e buscando a cada dia o aperfeiçoamento e a excelência no atendimento aos nossos clientes, pois foram eles que proporcionaram o nosso sucesso de hoje.

MISSÃO
Ser referencia nacional em distribuição, priorizando a excelência na execução através da dedicação, respeito, dignidade e profissionalismo.

VISÃO
Atender e superar as exigências impostas pelo mercado. Assegurar o desenvolvimento através da participação ativa de nossos colaboradores, clientes e fornecedores, participando do desenvolvimento nacional, da conservação ambiental e da qualidade de vida.

VALORES
Manter a ética, comprometimento e a responsabilidade social. Conquistar nossos objetivos pessoais e profissionais com transparencia otimismo e reconhecimento.

Name: The City Vet Equine Clinic
Description:
Emergency/Critical Care 24/7/365:
We are happy to provide 24/7 ambulatory emergency services. There is always a doctor on call after hours, weekends and all holidays. We also offer 24 hour emergency services for all horses that can be shipped into our clinic.

On yard diagnostics and treatment:
Providing convenience and experience our yard visits allow flexibility and the ability to treat your horse or pony from the comfort of their own home. If further work ups or investigations are required, our clinic based facilities allow for more in depth diagnostics and treatments.

Routine and preventative health care:
Our preventative healthcare services aim to keep your horse in top health and condition throughout the year. These include vaccinations, routine dental care, worming, dietary requirements and supplementation.

Radiography and Ultrasonography:
Our advanced imaging modalities allow us to diagnose and treat a range of orthopedic and soft tissue ailments or injuries. Our state of the art veterinary x-ray machine allows us to be fully mobile, provide diagnosis and treatments at your yard and deal with any emergencies requiring imaging at the site of the incident. It allows us to travel to vettings requiring full sets of x rays on the yard saving clients the need to arrange transport. The speed of image acquisition, diagnostic quality and portability will allow us to offer a superior diagnostic tool to our client base far and wide.

Poor performance & lameness assessment:
Lameness examinations can be conducted both at your yard or at the clinic. Assessment, palpation, nerve blocking and imaging can all be conducted . Your horse can even be left with us for the duration of the work up to allow you flexibility, and our vets the time, to conduct a thorough examination.

Others:
- In house laboratory
- Gastroscopy
- Shock Wave Therapy
- Infrared Thermography
- Advanced Regenerative Care - IRAP
- Advanced Regenerative Care - PRP
- Routine dentistry
- Lameness Locator

Name: ECVO
Description: The European College of Veterinary Ophthalmologists strives to provide expert care for animals with ophthalmic diseases via our residency trained European Specialists in Veterinary Ophthalmology, who can offer the highest quality service to the animal owner and the general public. The ECVO is the only professional body in the field of veterinary ophthalmology that is officially recognised by the European Board of Veterinary Specialisation (EBVS) as a non-profit, non-political organisation for veterinarians specialised in ophthalmology within the EU. The primary objectives of the ECVO are to advance veterinary ophthalmology in Europe and increase the competency of those practicing in this field by establishing the guidelines of pre-approved, high quality, post-graduate training programmes known as residencies, for the training of future specialists, promoting and supervising these programmes, examining and certifying candidates enrolled in them as well as continuously validating the knowledge of those specialists who have successfully completed them. In addition, the ECVO encourages clinical and scientific research that will help advance the body of knowledge in the field of veterinary ophthalmology and the dissemination of this knowledge. ECVO members, also known as ECVO Diplomates, are Board-certified Veterinary Specialists, who have in addition to completing undergraduate veterinary school, have also completed another 3 to 5 years of study, including an internship and an approved three-year residency program. These programs focus on providing a deep understanding of ocular disease processes and treatments in all animal species and training in advanced ophthalmic surgical techniques under the supervision of specialists in the field, protecting the interests of residents, animal patients and pet owners. At the end of this intensive training, the candidate must pass rigorous examinations to become an ECVO diplomate.
