- 44 box : 4 box d’attente, 27 box d’hospitalisation, 5 box de soins intensifs mère-poulain, 4 box d’isolement, 4 box de scintigraphie
- 4 appareils de radiographie numérique : 1 colonne fixe en clinique, 2 générateurs portables, 1 capteur plan
- 14 appareils d’échographie
- 3 systèmes d’endoscopie : 1 en clinique, 1 pour les endoscopies au repos à l’écurie, 1 pour les endoscopies à l’exercice
- 15 véhicules équipés

Historique

La clinique a été fondée en 1991 par le Dr Géraud Tourtoulou suite à l’achat d’un bâtiment agricole et du terrain adjacent de 2 ha. En 2002, un bâtiment dédié à la pathologie locomotrice et l’imagerie a été construit. Ensuite, plusieurs phases de travaux ont eu lieu afin de construire les différents bâtiments actuels : médecine et gynécologie (2006), chirurgie (2009), IRM, scintigraphie, carrière et isolement (2012), scanner et soins intensifs (2019).

Name: VanoVet AMEA
Description: VanoVet AMEA is a veterinary company that offers high quality products for animals, such as vaccines, pharmaceuticals, vitamins supplements and premixes. VanoVet AMEA aims to be one-stop for all your needs in the veterinary industry. VanoVet AMEA is extension of VanoVet Iraq with the same vision and mission.

Name: Bayfeed Hayvan Sağlığı
Description: Hayvan Besleme ve Beslenme Hastalıkları

Name: Dignity Pet Crematorium
Description:
We believe that all pets should be treated with dignity and respect at all stages of their life. We help grieving pet owners to give pets the send-off they deserve. Our responsive collection service means we are here for you at that difficult time, taking care of everything so you don’t have to. Our team manage everything on your behalf to ensure your pet has a compassionate individual cremation and you retain memories of those happy times. 

Our service is tailor-made so you can choose the personal approach you want for your pet. At every step our team treats your pet with respect and consideration. We understand how difficult this time is, so we take care of everything, from collecting your beloved pet from your home or the vet surgery, allowing you time to say final farewells and either attending the cremation or collecting the ashes. 

At each point the emphasis is on careful personal attention, from our tailor-made pet hearses and arranging final farewells, through to organising an individual cremation and empathetic presentation of the ashes. 

We take the time to talk about your choices: whether you prefer a same-day or two-day service; if a favourite toy should accompany your pet or if the family would like to attend. We try to make it straightforward and simple and remove any burden. 

It’s also about holding onto special moments; having something that recalls wonderful memories. From a simple paw print, through to creating an exclusive piece of jewellery allowing you to keep them close at all times. We help you to remember and celebrate those happy times.

Name: LLM Farm Vets
Description:
We are a leading farm only veterinary practice covering the North West of the U.K.

Since establishment in 1999, we have been leading the way with progressive clinical services and innovative advice, continuously striving to be at the top of the veterinary profession to benefit our clients and the wider agricultural industry.

We operate across four major livestock regions of the U.K. - The Midlands, North Wales, Lancashire and Derbyshire and currently employ over 30 veterinarians, the majority of which have specialist post graduate qualifications in various aspects of veterinary and agricultural sciences.

We are often at the forefront of industry innovation and progression, offering a number of additional services beyond clinical vetting, including embryo transfer and technician services. Every service that we offer is designed to drive client performance and efficiency, and we are always willing to share our knowledge with the wider industry. 

We maintain a fun, friendly, happy and professional atmosphere and are proud of our service standards and community values that we offer to our clients.

Name: Veterinary Cannabis Society
Description:
Our mission is to create lasting solutions that ensure the safe use of cannabis in pets though education, advocacy and promoting product standards. 

We are a startup nonprofit comprised of dedicated professionals from around the world who share in the collective vision of 'an educated and empowered global veterinary medical cannabis community.'

The current system is confusing and full of pitfalls...veterinarians need education and the confidence to discuss and utilize cannabis, pet parents need accurate information, and corporate manufacturers need clarity and guidance.

The Veterinary Cannabis Society seeks to clarify the system to bring the benefits of cannabis to our pets in a legal, safe and efficacious way.

Name: Clinique vétérinaire AniCura Saint Roch
Description:
Depuis plus de 60 ans, la clinique AniCura Saint Roch basée à La Rochelle n'a cessé de proposer aux propriétaires d'animaux domestiques et aux vétérinaires partenaires des soins de haute qualité en se basant sur des compétences complémentaires et un matériel de pointe. Le bien être animal et la  proposition des meilleurs soins possibles est au cœur de notre entreprise, de nos métiers et de notre passion.



La clinique vétérinaire AniCura Saint Roch est membre du réseau AniCura, une société de Mars, Incorporated.
Mentions légales : https://www.mars.com/legal-France
Respect de la vie privée : https://www.mars.com/privacy-policy-France

Name: Global Veterinary Solutions Pty Ltd
Description: We help veterinarians do business as they help the world...

Name: Veterinary Specialist Services
Description:
Veterinary Specialist Services was established in 2000 as an extension of general veterinary practices all over Australia, particularly Queensland, and Northern New South Wales in providing the best possible care for your pets at a specialist level.

When your pet requires our expert attention, your primary veterinarian can refer the pet to either our Brisbane, Gold Coast or Jindalee Services via a simple referral process.

Name: Servive Portugal
Description:
Uma empresa pioneira no setor veterinário, que desde 2001 se tem consolidado como líder de mercado, reforçando de forma contínua a sua equipa comercial, técnica e administrativa, no sentido de uma melhor eficiência profissional, no que aos equipamentos e análises clínicas diz respeito.
Um reforço pensado e calculado de forma a manter as classes médico-veterinária e enfermagem veterinária atualizadas e informadas, no que toca a novas tecnologias e formação profissional.
Com a adesão de novos parceiros comerciais e linhas de representação cada vez mais específicas, iniciamos o caminho para a consolidação da equipa comercial com a integração de mais dois médicos veterinários, introduzindo uma linha de equipamentos específicos e exclusivos, de forma a dar resposta às exigências do mercado.
Desde sempre uma equipa em constante actualização, para um serviço mais eficaz e reconhecido.

Name: Siloal Vet
Description:
Ao serviço da veterinária desde 1976.

Somos distribuidores de medicamentos e produtos para uso veterinário, dispositivos médicos e nutrição animal. 

Comercializamos em todo o território nacional, a generalidade dos laboratórios existentes no mercado. 

Pretendemos contribuir com a nossa experiência, ajudando a estrutura produtiva pecuária nacional a atingir patamares de excelência alimentar e proporcionando qualidade de vida aos nossos animais de companhia.

Name: WECare Worldwide
Description:
Sri Lanka is home to an estimated three million street dogs. Many have food, freedom, and a safe place to sleep, but most lack even the most basic veterinary care. In 2014, UK vet Dr Janey Lowes witnessed this firsthand while backpacking and knew she couldn’t turn away. She relocated to the island and founded WECare Worldwide to provide high-standard care to animals who would otherwise go without. 

Since then, WECare has grown from a one-woman initiative into a dedicated team of over 70 people. We're a mixed bunch, from all corners of the globe, but there's one thing we have in common; we're absolutely bonkers about dogs!! Together we are a highly skilled team, working our little flip flops off to ensure that the WECare dream one day becomes a reality: a world where every dog is treated with compassion, care, and the veterinary attention they deserve. Our work focuses on three key areas: neutering and vaccinations to prevent suffering, treatment of illness and injury – from skin conditions to serious trauma – and community education to empower people to care for roaming dogs. 

We are always on the lookout for incredible people to come and join the charge here at WECare. Whether you can only spare a few months to volunteer, or you are looking for a full-time job, we want to hear from you!

Name: Vetcoop SA
Description: Vetcoop fédère les cliniques vétérinaires pour obtenir de meilleurs prix auprès des fournisseurs de produits pharmaceutiques, de services et de matériel.

Name: MOVES Mobile Veterinary Specialists
Description: Mobile Veterinary Specialists (MOVES) is a fast-growing and innovative company with a creative mindset. We are dedicated to breathing new life into the veterinary specialist vocation as a guide for positive outcomes for patients, practices, and people. Our core values of balanced boundaries, kind consideration, and trustworthy independence demonstrate our commitment to quality of life. We hire, equip, and promote the services of board-certified mobile specialists in cardiology, internal medicine and surgery.

Name: PRADA SABINC SAS.
Description: Somos un EQUIPO con más de 25 años de experiencia en el sector Agropecuario y de animales de compañía Colombiano. Nuestro compromiso de calidad e innovación siempre están enfocados hacia la Salud y el bienestar Animal. Ofrecemos productos de alta calidad para el sector Agroindustrial, las mascotas y el sector Veterinario.

Name: GRUPO CATIMA
Description: Somos una corporación 100% guatemalteca, que nace a través de satisfacer las necesidades del mercado veterinario brindando soluciones con nuestras diferentes unidades de negocio.

Name: My Pets Wellness
Description:
My Pets Wellness is a veterinarian-founded team redesigning the culture of veterinary medicine. We’re invested in our team members’ wellbeing, and we offer the benefits and company culture to foster our team both as people and as professionals. Providing the best care for your patients requires taking care of yourself first, and we’re here to make sure you can.

We encourage our teams to build meaningful, long-term relationships with clients. With appointment times double the national average, we emphasize quality over quantity so our doctors and technicians can take the time to communicate, educate, and build trust. 

Interested in joining our team? Visit our website to view open positions and learn more!

Name: Rehabilitacionvet
Description:
Servicio Profesional. Desarrollo profesional en el área de Fisiatría Veterinaria.
Sus campos: Fisioterapia. Kinesiterapia. Masoterapia. Técnicas de rehabilitación Funcional.

La Fisiatría en Medicina Veterinaria abarca el conjunto de medios físicos naturales- artificiales y kinésicos ejecutados por el Médico Veterinario Fisiatra, que nos llevan a una correcta recuperación física, motora y biomecánica del paciente.

Durante muchos años se ha empleado el nombre de Terapia Física Veterinaria. A partir de la fundación de la Asociación Ibero Americana de Fisiatría Veterinaria –AIFISVET- En Diciembre del 2009, hemos considerado la importancia del manejo médico asociado a la  recuperación de los pacientes.  
La Fisiatría es la especialidad médica que se ocupa fundamentalmente de la Rehabilitación de aquellos pacientes que presentan patologías motoras. 
La rehabilitación fisiátrica Veterinaria es la especialidad médica veterinaria desarrollada por los fisiatras veterinarios, que engloba al conjunto de procedimientos médicos, dirigidos a ayudar a los animales. Es un cuerpo doctrinal complejo, constituido por la agrupación de conocimientos y experiencias relativas a la naturaleza de los agentes físicos no ionizantes, a los fenómenos derivados de su interacción con el organismo y su aplicación diagnóstica, terapéutica y preventiva.
Location: Caba, Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Veterinary Emergency & Referral Group
Description:
Veterinary Emergency and Referral Group (a/k/a VERG) was formed in the spring of 2005 by Dr. Brett Levitzke. Open 24 hours, 7 days a week, our emergency & critical care unit consists of teams of experienced and dedicated emergency doctors, technicians, and assistants, working together to provide the highest quality, state-of-the-art care.  Our emergency team works closely with your veterinarian in caring for your pet. Veterinary Emergency and Referral Group’s specialty arm consists of dedicated, compassionate, highly qualified specialists in the fields of surgery, internal medicine, cardiology, neurology, oncology, dermatology, and diagnostic imaging. Our specialists work together within the services to provide your pet with the highest quality care, all within a caring and nurturing environment.

When your veterinarian says it’s time to see a specialist, ask them about VERG, Veterinary Emergency and Referral Group of Brooklyn, New York.

Name: Vienna Veterinary Clinic
Description:
A well-renowned veterinary clinic with a team of skilled veterinary healthcare professionals located in Umm Suqeim, Dubai, United Arab Emirates dedicated to ensuring the overall wellness of your beloved pets & furry friends alike. 

Offering a wide range of services from routine vaccinations & neutering over sophisticated medical treatments, dermatology, dentistry, oncology & geriatric care. Our surgeons do soft tissue & orthopeadic surgeries. With state-of-the-art X-ray, Ultrasound equipment & a full in-house Laboratory. We attend emergency care and house visits. Our nose-to-tail annual physical examination is extremely thorough & comprehensive. Vienna Vets also cater to birds, rabbits & other exotics whilst offering travel advice, healthy pet food advice, grooming, pet accessories & cosmetics. 

Vienna Veterinary Clinic is committed to providing the best possible service and care for you and your pets with the highest veterinary standards & expertise. Known to be one of the best veterinary healthcare providers in the country, with a lovely multinational team highly recognized for our passionate and professional approach to animals.

Name: UF College of Veterinary Medicine
Description:
The University of Florida's College of Veterinary Medicine is the state’s only veterinary medical college.  Employees and staff are committed to advancing the health and welfare of animals, humans, and the veterinary medical profession through world-class education, innovative research, and state-of-the-art clinical services.

 Following the graduation of its first class in 1980, the college has built on the university’s reputation for excellence. Today we claim approximately 3,600 graduates of our professional (DVM) degree program. Visit our Office for Academic and Student Affairs for more information about the DVM program at the University of Florida. Our veterinary medical alumni are active throughout Florida, the United States, and overseas in areas ranging from in-depth scientific research to traditional small and large animal practice, zoological and aquatic medicine, public health, epidemiology, and the military. For more information about alumni events and activities, visit the Office of Advancement and Alumni Affairs web page.

We pride ourselves in our commitment to advancing scientific knowledge. More than 900 individuals have completed either master of science (MS) or doctor of philosophy (Ph.D.) degrees in Veterinary Medical Sciences through our graduate studies program. These individuals are working in academia, in the biomedical sciences, in government, and in the industry to advance animal, human and environmental health.

Name: Clare Vet Distribuidora
Description:
Bem-vindos à Clare Vet - Sua distribuidora de confiança de produtos veterinários!

Somos uma empresa comprometida em fornecer soluções inovadoras para os cuidados de saúde animal. Nossa missão é proporcionar aos animais de estimação condições de saúde e longevidade por meio de produtos e serviços de alta tecnologia e qualidade.

Com uma equipe apaixonada e experiente, nos dedicamos para garantir que os animais recebam os melhores cuidados possíveis, permitindo que eles desfrutem de uma vida saudável e feliz.

Nossa parceria com marcas líderes do setor nos permite oferecer uma seleção diversificada de produtos veterinários. Além disso, oferecemos um atendimento excepcional e orientações especializadas para ajudar médicos veterinários e tutores no cuidado com os animais de estimação.

Na Clare Vet, acreditamos que os animais merecem o melhor cuidado possível, e é com essa convicção que impulsionamos nossos esforços diariamente. Convidamos você a fazer parte dessa jornada de cuidado e proteção aos nossos amigos de quatro patas, se conectando com a gente e explorando nossas soluções de saúde animal.

Junte-se a nós para uma experiência única em cuidados veterinários e nos ajude a tornar o mundo um lugar melhor para os nossos amados companheiros peludos. Estamos ansiosos para colaborar com você e contribuir para a saúde e felicidade de nossos animais de estimação.

Name: Vetology - AI + Teleradiology
Description:
At Vetology, we believe that the future of veterinary radiology isn’t just about AI—it’s about partnerships, collaboration, and leveraging expertise to improve patient care. Our AI and teleradiology services are built by radiologists, for veterinarians, designed to enhance clinical decision-making while keeping you in control.

AI Virtual Radiology Reports
Vetology AI generates structured reports that mirror a radiologist’s approach, providing detailed findings, differentials, and clinical insights within minutes. AI is a tool to support, not replace, veterinarians—helping you triage cases, confirm diagnoses, and work more efficiently.

Veterinary Teleradiology Services
For cases requiring expert review, our US and European board-certified veterinary radiologists provide comprehensive reports across all species, including canine, feline, exotic, reptile, equine, and avian patients, covering radiographs, ultrasound, CT, and MRI. With stat options available, we help you make time-sensitive decisions with confidence.

More Than a Service—A True Partnership
At Vetology, we value teamwork and shared expertise. We’re here to build relationships, not lock you into contracts—so you can use our services as needed, without obligations. Our friendly, dedicated customer support team is always available to help, because we believe technology should make your job easier, not harder.

Skeptical? Curious? See it in action. Book a demo today: vetology.net

Name: SOQVET
Description: منصة السوق البيطرى هى منصة خدمية تعمل على ربط كافة أطراف المنظومة البيطرية تحت سقف واحد.

Name: Sage Veterinary Imaging
Description:
We get answers for pets and their vets using human-quality diagnostic imaging technology, including 3T MRI, 128 slice CT, Ultrasound-guided biopsies, scintigraphy, and more. Our patient-centered approach means that we integrate our diagnostic imaging services with the rest of the patient's care team, including the other specialists who may be involved in treatment decisions. Radiologists often act as a conduit for critical treatment decisions and collaboration between other specialists after imaging is completed, meaning they see how the puzzle pieces fit together. This gives us the experience to help guide owners and their veterinarians toward the most effective treatment options.

Sage Veterinary Imaging is proud to be an ACVR-accredited teaching facility, training the next generation of world-class radiologists with our unique combination of advanced technology, experienced team, and hands-on training.

Name: Consell de Col·legis Veterinaris de Catalunya
Description:
És una corporació de dret públic, amb plena capacitat i amb personalitat jurídica pròpia, que integra i agrupa als quatre Col·legis Oficials de Veterinaris de Catalunya. 
Un dels seus objectius principals és el foment de la tinença responsable dels animals de companyia i gestiona, des del 1987, l'Arxiu d'Identificació d'Animals de Companyia. És una base de dades informatitzada que acumula gairebé un milió i mig d'animals inscrits. 
A més, el Consell de Col·legis Veterinaris de Catalunya (CCVC) representa el veterinari col·legiat davant l'administració i treballa per facilitar la seva feina diària.

Name: ThinkPets
Description: ThinkPets combines client communications and practice analytics in a single package to help veterinary practices increase pet visits and compliance, build long-term client relationships, and measure practice performance. We combine print, email and web-based communications, along with online analytics, allowing practices to assess practice performance. All services include one-on-one support from a dedicated account consultant who helps each veterinary practice interpret data and identify and execute appropriate client communications programs.

Name: IBRIZE
Description: We then began our challenging journey with the vaccine industry through the rehabilitation and development of the bacterial vaccine production center of the Ministry of Agriculture, where the company produced bacterial vaccines with international quality standards and under the supervision of a team of experts and specialists.

Name: Whole Pet Veterinary Hospitals
Description:
The mission of Whole Pet Veterinary Hospitals is to help people take the best possible care of their pets by providing a variety of treatment options, both traditional and alternative, to achieve maximum results while working within the budget and personal goals of our clients.

We are a small animal and exotic animal veterinary hospital that integrates alternative therapies like acupuncture and herbs with traditional medicine in surgery to achieve the highest level of success in our animal patients.  

All of our veterinarians follow principles of holistic medicine, focusing on a high level of nutrition, the importance of gut health and a healthy immune system.  All integrate herbal medicine and laser treatments into their treatments when necessary, and some are certified in acupuncture, as well as other alternative modalities.  

What we are most known for and most proud of is kindness and care in which we handle our patients and the commitment to finding answers for our clients.

Name: Grupo DESPA
Description: Grupo DESPA es un holding empresarial compuesto por Despa, PyP y Marketeria. El grupo es especialista en comercialización y gestión de negocios para la Industria de Mascotas en Chile y Perú, desarrollando ventas, distribucion y marketing para clínicas veterinarias y tiendas de mascotas. Entre las marcas que representa oficialmente se encuentran Agrovet, Anasac, Boheringer, Calibra by Covetrus, Elanco, MSD, Zoetis, entre otros...

Name: VETMARINHA - Serviços Veterinários e de Bem-Estar Animal, lda
Description: We are a Veterinary Clinic with the mission of providing the best services to your pets, as if they were our family. Above all, we offer the best welfare care and dedication so that your pet is happy in your family for many years to come.

Name: Malven DEU
Description:
With innovation as one of our corporate values, great emphasis is directed toward the continuity of shifting scientific boundaries. Research and development form an essential role in our innovative products as well as in Malven’s general strategy, reflected in developing products that are safe for animal, environment and consumer.

Broad range of high quality preparations of feed additives, premixes, disinfectants, natural herbals and medicinal products are not our only commitments for our customers, but we offer also the potentiality of new formulations that fulfill the aspiration of our customers and meet the stringent government regulatory and food safety requirements while providing a positive economic return for farm animal production.

In order to meet our customer ambitions and convenience, which is one of our basic purposes, we offer also innovative technical support and solutions in parallel with our veterinary speciality products.

Name: PLURIVET - VETERINÁRIA E PECUÁRIA, LDA.
Description: Proporcionamos aos profissionais do sector animal os melhores meios para o exercício da sua profissão, para que consigam obter performances mais elevadas.

Name: Brihans Laboratories Private Limited
Description:
Brihans is a well-established veterinary pharma company with a strong reputation, specialising in the production of premixes for animal feed supplements and nutrition & therapeutics. With our extensive experience in the veterinary business since 1987, we take great pride in offering our clients high-quality products and exceptional services.

Our Cattle Feed product line encompasses a wide range of offerings that have been carefully formulated to meet the specific needs of cows, heifers, and pregnant cows. Our range includes Bolus, Liver Tonics, Probiotics, Vitamin Supplements, Calcium Supplements, Vitamins and Minerals, Glycine Chelated Zinc Supplements, Multi Vitamins, Amino Acid Feed Supplements, and Energy boosters for Pre and Post Parturition. These scientifically proven feeds have demonstrated their effectiveness in improving herd health, enhancing milk yield, and providing crucial support during reproduction.

In addition to our Feed products, we also offer a comprehensive range of Therapeutics for both Cattle & Poultry. Our portfolio includes Amikacin, Bricef, Cprin Injection, Antibacterial Bolus, medicines designed to combat diarrhoea, dysentery infections, Paracetamol & Meloxicam, Anti-inflammatory & Analgesic Vet Gel, as well as an exceptional treatment for respiratory infections. These therapeutics are carefully formulated to address specific health concerns and contribute to the overall well-being of cattle & poultry.

At our company, we have assembled a team of experienced professionals who are dedicated to delivering high-quality products on time and within budget. Their expertise and commitment ensure that our clients receive products that meet the highest industry standards. Moreover, we have invested in the necessary infrastructure and resources to support our supply chain needs. This includes maintaining adequate inventory levels, implementing stringent quality control processes, and establishing efficient logistics capabilities.

Name: Hemolife Blood Bank
Description:
A passionate team dedicated to ensure every pets in need have quick and safe access to blood transfusions.

Kind gestures make a wonderful world.

Name: VetCare Animal Supply
Description: Our mission is to have a direct impact on making the jobs of veterinarians and veterinary technicians safer and easier. To accomplish this, we focus on innovative products that are designed to respond to a veterinary market that is constantly in motion and changing rapidly.

Name: AMVAC
Description:
Somos la Asociación Madrileña de Veterinarios de Animales de Compañía. Nuestros fines son los de defender los intereses de nuestros asociados individual y colectivamente.
Colaborar con las Administraciones en asesoramiento y apoyo de las actividades relacionadas con los animales de compañía
Fomentar el espíritu de servicio a la sociedad, inherente al ejercicio de nuestra actividad profesional.
Colaborar en todas las actividades que repercuten en la mejora de la Sanidad Pública.
Trabajar por el bienestar animal.

Name: SALMAX GROUP
Description: Salmax Group AS er en nyoppstartet bedrift som driver service- og veterinærtjenester for norsk oppdrettsnæring. Koblingen mellom biologi og teknologi for utvikling av en bærekraftig og framtidsrettet næring er for oss et viktig fokusområde. Vår FoU-avdeling jobber med prosjekter relatert til mikrobiologi og teknologiutvikling.

Name: Equine Analysis Systems LLC
Description:
Equine Analysis Systems LLC specializes in scientific performance testing of thoroughbred racehorses.  The company implements cardiac ultrasounds, photographic conformation analysis, and genetic profiling for horses of all ages. For horses of training age, Equine Analysis also offers a Metabolic Response to Exercise profile, a Motion Efficiency profile using accelerometer data and the patented Wind Test.  We use the information gathered from these protocols to advise our clients on how to best manage their thoroughbred investment.  

For more information please contact us at info@equineanalysis.com

Name: TELEVETS - Seu Veterinário Online 24 horas!
Description: Teleorientação veterinária para pets 24 horas, 7 dias por semana. Nossa empresa surgiu no grupo de saúde RCS, que já realiza mais de 4.000 atendimentos diários em telemedicina pelo canal @eusaudeoficial e agora amplia sua área de atuação para o atendimento virtual de tutores de cães e gatos.

Name: The Rural Vet
Description: The Rural Vet provide veterinary services like general treatment, pregnancy test, deworming, wound care, vaccination, theriogenological issues, obstrectical issues, feedlot fattening farm consultancy, milch farm consultancy. We cover every aspect of veterinary field. We provide services currently in Punjab region.

Name: Laboklin N.V.
Description:
LABOKLIN is een veterinair diagnostisch laboratorium. Wij hebben sinds 2013 in Nederland een kantoor en in 2015 is hier een laboratorium bij gekomen. Door onze samenwerking met de hoofdvestiging in Duitsland, bieden wij een breed spectrum aan diagnostische testen.

Ons doel is om dierenartsen zo goed mogelijk bij te staan bij de diagnostische uitdagingen in de praktijk. In ons team werken onder andere 5 dierenartsen, van wie twee pathologen, die u graag terzijde staan voor advies over welke testen aan te vragen of voor de interpretatie van resultaten.

Name: Elite Tecnología Veterinaria
Description: Compañía dedicada a la venta y distribución de equipamiento veterinario. Estamos especializados en equipamiento de quirófano, imagen para el diagnóstico y análisis clínicos.

Name: Veterinary value
Description:
We don’t do dashboards.
We don’t do KPIs.
We don’t do coaching.
We stop leakage.

Veterinary clinics lose 5–12% of their annual revenue every year through hidden operational leakage — missed fees, discount drift and everyday billing errors.

You’ve already done the work.
We make sure you get paid for it.

Name: Pawssum mobile Vets
Description:
Founded in 2016, the idea was inspired by a friend who had a sick pet at home with her son, with no available vets in the area to make a house visit. Pawssum was then launched with the mission to provide pet owners affordable, available and accessible home vet services.
Pawssum Vets is Australia’s largest network of Mobile Vet care service providers. At the core of our business, we connect Pet Owners with experienced, trusted and local Vets.

As a national service Pawssum Vets deliver a personalised Vet care to your pet at your home, or via a video link through our Telepet vet video call service.

80% of today’s vet visits can be done at home, if your pet requires a surgery or an x-ray or any other treatment that cannot be done as part of the home, Pawssum Vets will refer you to one of our Vet clinic partners.

With technology at its core Pawssum Vets record and keep all of your pet information, Vet medical notes on our secured cloud platform, where the medical history of your pet, can be reviewed by any future vets, or at the ER, contributing to the continuity of care for your pet.

With over 92,000 booking in Australia and New Zealand serviced by our amazing network of over 200 trusted local vets, we are best positioned to assist pet owners with any Vet care or treatment their pet might need.

Operational 365 days inc. after hours in all major cities, we provide the following services:

Consult for Sick pet
Vaccination
At-home peaceful Euthanasia
Telepet – Vet video call.
Surgeries in one of our local partner clinics

Partnership with other players in the Australian Pet industry:
Mad Paws - the largest pet sitting company
Pet Circle - the largest online food and accessories company in Australia
PetScript - for online prescription medications used by our vets
Lyppard – wholesaler pharmaceutical and medical supplies.  

We feel appreciated:
The feedback from both our Vets and customers is amazing, as can be seen by the awesome reviews on social and Google reviews.

Name: Veneza Pet Distribuidora
Description: A 16 anos no mercado, a Veneza Pet Distribuidora prioriza excelência no atendimento com os clientes do Mercado Pet. Atuando nas regiões do Vale do Paraíba, Fundo do Vale, Litoral Norte, Serra da Mantiqueira e Alto Tietê, trabalhamos na distribuição de medicamentos veterinários e estética para o bem estar animal.

Name: VetPartners Germany
Description: We are a network of veterinarians for veterinarians, providing individualized support from practice succession to employee search to accounting. Our goal is to enable veterinary practices to refocus on medical practice by providing administrative support and empowerment through a community.

Name: White Cross Vets
Description:
Welcome to White Cross Vets on LinkedIn!

At White Cross Vets, we’ve been providing exceptional veterinary care to pets and peace of mind to their owners for over 80 years. With practices across the UK, we’re proud to combine a rich heritage of compassionate service with a modern, progressive approach to animal healthcare.

Our team is made up of passionate professionals who put pets and their families at the heart of everything we do. From routine check-ups and preventative care to complex treatments and surgery, we’re committed to making a difference in every animal’s life—with kindness, integrity, and excellence.

We believe in creating a supportive, inclusive workplace where our people can thrive. That’s why we invest in continuous development, team wellbeing, and a strong culture built on respect, trust, and shared purpose.

Follow us for the latest updates, pet care tips, career opportunities, and stories from our community. Whether you’re a pet owner, veterinary professional, or animal lover, we’re glad you’re here.

White Cross Vets – Caring for pets. Caring for people.

Name: Malven Animal Health
Description:
With innovation as one of our corporate values, great emphasis is directed toward the continuity of shifting scientific boundaries. Research and development form an essential role in our innovative products as well as in Malven’s general strategy, reflected in developing products that are safe for animal, environment and consumer.

Broad range of high quality preparations of feed additives, premixes, disinfectants, natural herbals and medicinal products are not our only commitments for our customers, but we offer also the potentiality of new formulations that fulfill the aspiration of our customers and meet the stringent government regulatory and food safety requirements while providing a positive economic return for farm animal production.

In order to meet our customer ambitions and convenience, which is one of our basic purposes, we offer also innovative technical support and solutions in parallel with our veterinary speciality products.

Name: Boston Veterinary Clinic
Description:
Boston Veterinary Clinic is a state-of-the-art veterinary clinic that provides compassionate, fear-free veterinary care for our patients and trusted, relationship-focused services to our clients.  We are Your Other Family Doctor.  

Boston Veterinary Clinic was founded by Dr. Brian J. Bourquin and opened its doors in historic Bay Village/South End in 2014.  Today, we have grown to a five-doctor practice that offers individualized, nose-to-tail care to dogs & cats in Greater Boston.

In 2016, Boston Veterinary Clinic was accredited by the American Animal Hospital Association (AAHA).  AAHA-accredited hospitals are recognized among the finest in the industry, and are consistently at the forefront of advanced veterinary medicine. That means your furry family member will be cared for by one of the top 12-15% of animal hospitals in the United States and Canada.

Our scheduled appointments are 30 minutes, not 15  or 20 minutes like other clinics, to ensure no question goes unanswered.  We will get to know you and your companion’s lifestyle and address your needs individually.  

In 2018, Boston Veterinary Clinic became a Certified Fear Free Practice, the first and only practice in Boston to receive that designation.  Our veterinary team is trained in Fear Free℠ techniques designed to provide a stress and anxiety-free environment during your time at the clinic.  Stress-free visits improves the overall health of our patients and their guardians.  

As an urban practice in New England, we are experts in the challenges and opportunities for our four-legged family in Greater Boston.  We are your trusted partners in their daily care.

Name: Scout Veterinary Urgent Care
Description:
Scout Veterinary Urgent Care was created with a simple goal: to help make the unexpected moments of pet ownership easier. Our dedicated urgent care practices are here to support both the veterinary community and the pet community by providing accessible care when pets need it most, filling the widening gap between primary care and specialty care. Our modern and technology-driven practices are designed to make life easier for our team while providing same-day and next-day appointments to the city’s ever-growing population of dogs and cats. Cases range from routine last minute care to those requiring more extensive in-house diagnostics, treatments and nursing care. 

Scout was built on the premise that the veterinary profession can and should be better. We can have better mental health, provide better care, be better partners, support our teams better and grow better together. Come join a better way at Scout!

Name: VetOvation
Description:
The VetOvation team provides laparoscopic and endoscopic equipment along with training to veterinarians interested in adopting this technology. Our goal is to help your practice adopt technology that can improve patient outcomes and attract new referrals. This equipment is not always about smaller incisions, but safer surgery with better visualization and better outcomes. 

Learn more about us at http://vetovation.com.

Name: Bright Leaf Recruitment
Description: Bright Leaf Recruitment offer a bespoke service for veterinary professionals looking for a new challenge within the sector.  We specialise in clinical and non clinical practice roles as well as veterinary commercial roles. Visit our website to view our current vacancies or to register a vacancy.

Name: Nupsala Ltd - Part of Nupsala Group
Description:
We specialise in equine and small animal veterinary orthopaedic products and have particular expertise in the use of biological and non-biological intraarticular or intralesional medication. We are involved in industry research and product development and are continually adding to our portfolio of biologicals, medical devices, lasers and conventional drugs for the treatment of musculoskeletal disorders. 
Our expertise is highly valued in the industry and we are often asked to lecture either in-practice or at veterinary conferences. Rather than product promotion, these scientific lectures cover tissue engineering and give useful tips and guidelines that will help vets formulate their treatment strategies.

 In 2025, Nupsala was awarded the BVA Great Workplace Gold Accreditation, becoming the first non-clinical business to achieve Gold. This recognition reflects our commitment to a supportive, inclusive, and people-first culture.

Name: Blue Oasis Vet
Description: The Blue Oasis Pet Care Hospital in Dubai is a place of healing, warmth and good care. With a staff dedicated to attending to the best interest of both you and your beloved pets, our aim is to provide the most comprehensive veterinary care in the UAE.

Name: Anadolu Hayvancılık
Description:
Anadolu Stockbreeding was established in 1996 with all the required authorization from the Prime Ministry of the Turkish Republic, the Treasury, and the General Directorate of Foreign Investment. 

Since the year of establishment, the company has been conducted the imports of heifers, genetic materials such as frozen bovine sperma and embryos, veterinary tools and equipment, A.I. materials, milk replacer for the calves and lambs, machinery i.e. pasteurizers. These imports are implemented from the companies in the U.S.A, Canada, Germany, Holland, France, Denmark, and England that Anadolu is holding exclusive distributorships for Turkey. 

Anadolu Hayvancilik is active in training activities and arranging programs for the sector workers both in Turkey and abroad. The Company  personnel are consisted of Veterinarians and Zootechnicians. The sale, 
distribution and advising team is working all over the country.

Name: Felix and Fido at Home Nursing Care
Description:
Felix and Fido At Home Nursing Care is a trusted platform that connects experienced Registered Veterinary Technicians (RVTs) with pet owners in need of in-home support. We serve as an extension of veterinary practices, offering essential hands-on care for anxious, sick, injured, or aging pets—all from the comfort of home.

Our team consists exclusively of highly qualified RVTs with a minimum of three years of clinical experience. Each technician is trained to deliver compassionate, professional care tailored to each pet’s unique medical and emotional needs.

We work in partnership with veterinarians to provide continuity of care, helping pet owners manage daily treatments, post-operative recovery, chronic conditions, and palliative care. By bridging the gap between clinic-based services and at-home needs, we reduce stress for both pets and their caregivers.

Felix and Fido is here to ensure every pet receives the attentive, expert support they deserve—where they feel safest: at home.

Name: Armando Veterinary Services
Description: We provide the best treatment for animals by diagnosing precisely the problem. Name: Tierklinik Hofheim
Description:
Die Klinik
Die Tierklinik Hofheim ist eine der größten Kleintierkliniken Deutschlands. Mit unserem Spezialistenteam decken wir fast alle relevanten Teilgebiete der Kleintiermedizin ab. Unser Ziel ist die Versorgung der uns anvertrauten Patienten auf höchstem medizinischen Niveau.

Bei all unserem Tun steht das Wohl des Tieres im Mittelpunkt. Dabei pflegen wir einen intensiven Dialog - sowohl mit den Besitzern als auch den überweisenden Haustierärzt/innen.

Stark im Team
Wir haben uns der interdisziplinären Arbeit verschrieben. Bei komplexen medizinischen Fragestellungen gewährleisten der enge fachliche Austausch und die gegenseitige Unterstützung in unserem Spezialistenteam die optimale Versorgung unserer Patienten.

Modernste Technik
Beste medizinische Versorgung erfordert modernste Verfahren und Ausstattung für Diagnostik und Therapie. Top-Equipment bei Röntgenanlage, CT, MRT, Ultraschall und EMG (um nur einige zu nennen) sind in der Tierklinik Hofheim selbstverständlich. Unser Linearbeschleuniger zur Tumortherapie ist eines der modernsten Geräte weltweit.

Das Tier im Fokus
Bei all unserem Tun steht das Wohl der uns anvertrauten Tiere an erster Stelle. Dies gilt sowohl für die medizinische Versorgung als auch für das Drumherum: getrennte Wartezimmer für Hunde und Katzen, möglichst kurze Wartezeiten und ruhig und großzügig gestaltete Räume für Stationärpatienten – unser Ziel ist es, Ihrem Tier den Aufenthalt so stressfrei wie möglich zu gestalten.

Spezialistensprechstunde
In der ambulanten Sprechstunde der Tierklinik Hofheim decken wir mit Spezialistenteams die Fachbereiche Bildgebende Diagnostik, Chirurgie, Dermatologie, Hals-Nasen-Ohren Erkankungen, Innere Medizin, Kardiologie, Labordiagnostik, Neurologie, Onkologie, Ophthalmologie, Orthopädie, Schmerztherapie, Wundversorgung, Zahnmedizin sowie Zuchtuntersuchungen ab. Auch in den Räumen der Ambulanz befindet sich unser Physiotherapiezentrum für Kleintiere.

Name: Animal Pet
Description:
A nossa clínica dispões de uma excelente estrutura para cuidar do seu melhor amigo. Contamos com uma equipe altamente qualificada que vai tratar do seu animal com muito carinho e profissionalismo.

Name: Infiniti
Description:
Infiniti Medical is a global company that designs and distributes medical devices for the veterinary market.  The Infiniti Medical group also includes Orthomed UK Ltd. and Orthomed North America Inc., both leaders in veterinary orthopedic devices.  Neuromed is the Company's division dedicated to veterinary neurology products.  With a presence in 5 continents and over 35 countries, Infiniti Medical is the largest provider of minimally invasive devices for the veterinary market.

The company's core business is designing and distributing devices that target diseases in the companion animal market. Infiniti Medical focuses on devices commonly used in interventional cardiology, interventional radiology, minimally invasive surgery, orthopedics, and endoscopic procedures.

Name: Heritage Vet Partners
Description: Heritage Vet Partners is the nation’s leading veterinary partnership specializing in mixed/large animal practices.  We believe there is great value in the legacy, customer relationships, brand, culture and team that you have built. Our goal is to provide services and support around the foundation you have developed. Most importantly, we believe that together we can best meet the changing needs of the customers and industries that we serve. We are very excited about the future of mixed and large animal practice and want our partnering practices and veterinarians to enjoy the success of Heritage Vet Partners. Our model provides practices and veterinarians the ability to monetize the value of their business and the opportunity to invest in Heritage Vet Partners through stock ownership. We are committed to veterinarian ownership, leadership and culture while ensuring that veterinarians recognize the success of Heritage Vet Partners in the future.

Name: HT Vista
Description:
HT Vista is the first non-invasive screening tool that allows vets & nurses to rule out subcutaneous & dermal cancer in their clinic through the power of Heat Diffusion Imaging (HDI) technology.

A decision support tool that helps practices rule out cancer in dogs, HT Vista was created by a team of experts with backgrounds in veterinary medicine, algorithms, engineering, design, and more.

Name: Barakaldo Vet Shop (BVS)

Aprovecha la oportunidad!

Name: Veterinária Anchieta
Description:
A Veterinária Anchieta é uma clínica 24 horas, presente no mercado de Belo Horizonte (MG) há nove anos, que tem como propósito manter a saúde do seu pet sempre em equilíbrio, principalmente, por meio do carinho e do incentivo à prevenção.   

Para isso, conta com um corpo clínico composto por profissionais capacitados em diferentes áreas e uma estrutura equipada e moderna, blocos cirúrgico e de internação e laboratório próprio, que garantem maior conforto aos animais e tutores atendidos e contribuem para diagnósticos rápidos e eficazes. 

Aliado a isso e para maior comodidade dos seus clientes, a Veterinária Anchieta oferece serviços de Pet Shop e Estética, que também permitem um acompanhamento mais próximo e o cuidado constante junto aos animais.

Name: Hippo Veterinary Group
Description:
We are a Culture Obsessed team, with current locations across Arizona, Utah, &  Idaho - look for us in new states soon! We believe veterinary medicine should be as fun as it is rewarding. With 750% less turnover than the industry average, it’s clear - when you love where you work, success follows. We believe in “Choose Your Own Adventure” career paths - because no two veterinary professionals have the same journey!

New Graduates: The 5th Year Mentorship immerses new graduates in diverse, hands-on experiences across ECC or GP-focused programs accelerating clinical skill development & building confidence, in a single transformative year.

Medical Director/Equity Partners: Veterinarians who are ready to build their legacy & lead their new, state-of-the-art freestanding hospital have a unique opportunity. No practice loan, no down payment, & no financial contribution, means less personal risk as you grow your equity and legacy. 

Strategic Partnerships: For Practice Owners exploring strategic partnerships, we offer something different. Whether you are considering passing the torch, leveraging our significant recruiting power & add to your Dream DVM Team, or stay in your leadership role with added support, we believe in preserving your entrepreneurial spirit. Our unique partnerships let you benefit from future growth while continuing to drive innovation & success.

Backed by our Culture-Obsessed mindset & a network of 70+ collaborative Hippo leaders, we collaboarate and provide full support for recruiting, HR, IT, marketing, & operations so you can focus on what matters most: excellent medicine & your team. Your voice and vision matter, & we can’t wait to grow with you. We’re Big, We’re Fun, & We’re Not Afraid to Make a Splash!

Name: Izfaar Pharmaceuticals (Pvt.) Ltd
Description:
In the Name of Allah, the Most Merciful, Compassionate and Gracious. All praises to Him because He is Creator of universe and guides us through the way of Holy Prophet Muhammad (Peace be upon Him) and Holy Quran.

Izfaar Pharmaceutical Industries is a pioneer in veterinary pharmaceutical industry serving throughout the national and international market since 1984. By the Grace of Allah Almighty Izfaar is successfully manufacturing and supplying Antibiotic, Anti-inflammatory, Anti-Allergic, Anti-Cholinergic, Anti-Protozoal, Anthelmintic, Liver Tonic, Vitamins products to national and international clients. 

Professionals from the field of Pharmacy and Business Administration carry out manufacturing at Izfaar in accordance with the rule of Good Manufacturing Practices (cGMP). High quality and presentation of our products has gained immense acceptance among the Veterinarians, Clinical trials carried out at various institutions have verified efficacy and value of respective drugs. 

We assure at our part full cooperation to our valued customers.

Name: Rata Vet Surgery
Description:
Rata, short for Rata Kararehe is the Maori (Native New Zealand) for animal doctor. Andrew Scrimgeour, founder of Rata Vet Surgery, hails from NZ and 10 years ago recognised the benefit of a visiting orthopaedic service.

Rata Vet Surgery has grown to become a team of 10 RCVS Advanced Practioners, 2 RVNs and 2 administrators. Our surgeons are all experienced in referral orthopaedics who, supported by a dedicated administration and nursing team, provide a professional, cost effective and efficient surgical service to patients in primary care practice.

We cover a geographical area from Penzance to London and, comprehensively equipped, offer a range of orthopaedic and soft tissue surgical services from arthroscopy to anal saculectomy. Surgeons arrive to meet and consult with clients prior to surgery ensuring the correct diagnosis is made and explain in detail the condition, surgery, potential complications and required post operative care.

Provision of information sheets along with a range of resources for the primary care team are available from the website. We stock Arthrex Synergy arthroscopy system, fracture systems from 1.0 to 3.5mm in Veterinary Instrumentation, N2, Intrauma Fixin, Securos PAX to name a few.

We are passionate about delivering high level communication and surgical treatments to support the primary care team. Ongoing clinical audits ensure we are within the industry standards for surgical complications.

Whilst we treat complex cases; angular limb surgeries, multi-traumas, OATS we will recommend referral to tertiary referral centres when we feel this is in the patient’s best interest.

Name: Bush Veterinary Neurology Service
Description:
Bush Veterinary Neurology Service is a veterinary referral specialist offering neurology and neurosurgery at locations throughout Virginia, Maryland and Georgia. Our service provides accessible, available and compassionate service to clients who have pets who are having neurologic symptoms and have already been seen by their local, family veterinarian. 

Each BVNS location features a team  of highly skilled, compassionate professionals who have undergone extensive training. Each location also features onsite MRI, a critical  tool in the diagnostic process for veterinary and human neurology. At BVNS we pride ourselves on offering an excellent client experience alongside expert medical care that extends lives, improves the quality of life, restores mobility and often, saves lives. 

For veterinary professionals, BVNS offers a friendly and fun working environment that is stimulating, educational and that provides access to top-level training and expertise. We also accept veterinary internships and competitive residencies. Please visit our site to learn more.

Name: VETODIAG
Description:
VETODIAG, créé en 2012 en Normandie, est un laboratoire d’analyses vétérinaires indépendant, apprécié pour sa qualité, sa rapidité et la disponibilité de ses vétérinaires. Le laboratoire propose une large gamme d’analyses équines, canines et félines, grâce à un plateau technique de pointe en constante évolution.

L’équipe grandissante du laboratoire se compose de 5 vétérinaires (4 spécialistes en diagnostic de laboratoire), 1 responsable qualité, 7 techniciennes et 2 secrétaires.
Afin de garantir des résultats de qualité, nos automates sont régulièrement calibrés, contrôlés (contrôle qualité) et soumis à des maintenances périodiques. Grâce à un acheminement pratique et efficace de vos prélèvements, la majorité de vos résultats d’analyse sont rendus sous 24h.

Name: Evviva

Name: IVH International Veterinary Hospital
Description:
Founded in 2003, International Veterinary Hospital (IVH) is Kuwait’s largest and most technologically advanced veterinary hospital. IVH combines decades of medical expertise, a strong international team, and cutting-edge innovations to provide comprehensive, state-of-the-art services dedicated to enhancing the health and well-being of pets.

As pioneers in the region, our commitment extends beyond treating illness — we strive to advance veterinary medicine, foster strong partnerships between pets and their owners, and support the continued growth of Kuwait’s pet community.

What We Offer
- Comprehensive Medical Care: From routine health checks to advanced diagnostics, including X-rays, CT scans, ultrasounds, surgery, dental care, and in-house laboratory testing for accurate and timely results.
- Complete Pet Care Facility: IVH provides all essential pet services under one roof, including grooming, boarding, daycare, pet relocation, cremation, and a pet shop.
- A Dedicated, Expert Team: Our greatest asset is our people — a highly skilled and compassionate team united by a passion for providing exceptional veterinary care.
- Trusted Partnership with Owners: We support pet owners by offering clear, honest, and professional advice, empowering them to make informed decisions for their pets’ health and well-being.

Our Mission
To make a difference in Kuwait's pet community by saving animal lives, helping pets stay healthy, and making pet owners' lives easier by providing competent guidance and support. 

Our Vision
To be the standard of reference for veterinary hospitals in Kuwait, recognized as a company focused on dedication, honesty, integrity, and service reliability to our local community. 

IVH — Your Partner in Advanced Veterinary Care.

Name: Imaginalis USA
Description:
Every patient deserves the best care, and every clinician needs the right tools to provide it. At Imaginalis USA, we empower veterinary and medical professionals with advanced imaging solutions that enhance precision, efficiency, and confidence—helping clinicians see more, diagnose faster, and treat with greater accuracy. We understand the challenges professionals face—unclear imaging, complex workflows, and the need for real-time, high-quality insights. That’s why our technology is designed with practitioners in mind. Whether you're treating small animals, exotics, equine patients, or performing advanced surgical procedures, our imaging systems provide the clarity and versatility needed to deliver better diagnostics and superior patient outcomes. 

From private practices to specialty hospitals and research institutions, Imaginalis USA is more than an imaging provider—we’re your partner in advancing care. Because when imaging works better, care gets better.

Name: Orgânica Homeopatia Veterinária
Description:
Localizada em Chapecó, SC, a Orgânica Homeopatia Veterinária é uma empresa consolidada, fundada em 2004 e portanto com ampla expertise no campo homeopático. É referência no setor, fruto do resultado de um trabalho pautado na qualidade dos produtos ofertados,
gerando saúde e bem-estar aos animais.

Através de uma sólida infraestrutura de representantes, revendas e distribuidores especializados, distribui medicamentos em todo o Brasil. Contamos com profissionais capacitados que oferecem suporte técnico e acompanhamento em todos os setores.

Nossos medicamentos são formulados a partir de rigorosa técnica de produção e objetivam estimular os mecanismos naturais de defesa do organismo.

A homeopatia não tem efeitos colaterais nem causa intoxicações. A ausência de resíduos além de favorecer todas as espécies de animais é benéfica também ao produtor e ao meio ambiente.

Em produção animal (bovinos, caprinos, ovinos, aves, peixes e suínos) os medicamentos homeopáticos contribuem para melhorar o ciclo reprodutivo, a produção, o tratamento e prevenção de doenças, o controle de parasitoses, o tratamento de infecções, o controle do estresse e aumentar a conversão alimentar, entre tantos outros eventos relativos à saúde.

Os medicamentos da linha pecuária são de fácil uso, podendo ser adicionados aos alimentos ou à água de beber, dispensando manejos trabalhosos e custos operacionais. Enfim, saúde, bem-estar e economia é o que se obtém com os produtos da Orgânica Homeopatia Veterinária.

Name: CAPAE-Ouest - centre antipoison vétérinaire
Description: Le Centre Antipoison Animal répond gratuitement à toute question sur les risques toxiques pour les animaux, l’environnement et le consommateur de denrées animales. C'est un service de l’Ecole nationale vétérinaire, agroalimentaire et de l’alimentation (Oniris), animé par des enseignants-chercheurs, des vétérinaires et des étudiants vétérinaires.

Name: STUA Aulendorf - Diagnostikzentrum
Description:
Diagnostik mit HERZ und HIRN. „Sind die Tiere gesund - freut sich der Mensch“. 

Und wenn nicht - dann untersuchen wir schnell, unabhängig, sicher und wirtschaftlich in allen relevanten Bereichen der tiermedizinischen Diagnostik wie Pathologie und Mikrobiologie.

Gribbles Veterinary Pathology, est. 1989

At Gribbles Veterinary Pathology, we're committed to providing you, the animal health professional, with a quality pathology service that delivers excellence, meets the needs of your practice, and supports the health and well-being of animals.

We are a veterinary pathology laboratory that is passionate about the health of animals and providing an effective, reliable and efficient diagnostic service. When you partner with us you can expect a down to earth, customised service ensuring your practice is our number one priority.

Our clients include private veterinary practitioners, zoological gardens, government, research organisations and pharmaceutical companies.

History

Gribbles Veterinary Pathology (Australia) was originally established in Victoria, Australia in 1989 and is now the veterinary trading entity of the privately-owned Clinical Laboratories Pty Ltd. Gribbles Veterinary Pathology (Australia) is now a distinct entity to Gribbles Veterinary Pathology in New Zealand.

Gribbles Veterinary Pathology has grown to provide veterinary diagnostic and analytical services throughout Australia. From 1996 - 2013, Gribbles Veterinary Pathology was the preferred supplier to the Department of Environment and Primary Industry (DEPI) in Victoria until their own laboratory, AgriBio was established. Since 2004, Gribbles Veterinary Pathology has been the provider of animal health diagnostic pathology services to Primary Industries and Resources South Australia (PIRSA).

Nuestra misión es ser el vínculo clave entre laboratorios y veterinarios de todo el país, brindando soluciones integrales y honestas, adaptadas a cada cliente, con un equipo comprometido con los valores de integridad, esfuerzo, cercanía y fidelidad. Name: Svenska Djurambulansen
Description:
Vad gör Svenska Djurambulansen?
Svenska Djurambulansen är en ideell förening som gör precis det som namnet antyder, transporterar skadade eller sjuka djur till veterinär eller annan lämplig instans. Föreningen drivs med tanken att inget djur ska behöva lida, och startades 2008 av William Wright.

Just nu har vi 2 djurambulanser som täcker Västra Götalands län och 2 djurambulanser som täcker Stockholms län. Visionen är att en dag finnas i hela Sverige och vi jobbar hårt för att vidareutveckla till nya regioner. De personer som kör ambulanserna gör detta ideellt och får således inte betalt. Föreningen får inga statliga bidrag utan är helt beroende av stödmedlemmar, donationer, sponsorer och gåvor.

För djur och djurägare är det helt gratis att åka med Svenska Djurambulansen och vi finns tillgängliga dygnet runt, året om.

Name: Blå Stjärnans Djursjukhus
Description:
Vi tar emot mer än 42 000 besök varje år och har, utöver specialistkompetens inom hundens och kattens sjukdomar, även spetskompetens inom bland annat kirurgi, invärtesmedicin, akut- och intensivvård, ortopedi, oftalmologi, bilddiagnostik, kardiologi och neurologi. Vi är dessutom unika med vår kompetens inom exotiska smådjur och gnagare.

För oss är kvalitet viktigt, därför är vi certifierade Cat Friendly Clinic Gold level och Kaninvänlig klinik, vilket innebär att vi har anpassat vår verksamhet och utbildat personal för att kunna ta hand om och bemöta katter och kaniner på bästa sätt.

Vår hundgrupp har som syfte att på olika sätt göra besöket på Blå Stjärnan så bra för hunden som det kan bli med hänsyn taget till undersökningar och provtagning som måste ske. Vi ser över helheten och tittar på olika sätt att tillgodose hundens behov. Det kan gälla allt ifrån att den rädda hunden skall blir hanterad av så få människor som möjligt, hur väntrummet ser ut, att ge godis vid vaccination, till att utbilda personalen i hur man läser hund och hur man på bästa sätt gör hunden bekväm även i en stressad situation.

Blå Stjärnans Djursjukhus är stiftelseägt och drivs inte av vinstintresse utan av ett engagemang för djur och deras ägare. Djursjukhuset är ett helägt dotterbolag till stiftelsen Svenska Blå Stjärnans Djursjukhus i Västra Götaland och all vinst återinvesteras i ny utrustning, bättre lokaler och vidareutbildning av vår personal.

Description:
Pilchuck Veterinary Hospital is a full-service, mixed practice providing professional veterinary care 24 hours a day, seven days a week. Having served the Pacific Northwest since 1963, Pilchuck is one of the largest multi-species hospitals in the United States and specializes in equine field and hospital services, small-animal care, and integrative medicine. As a state-of-the-art hospital, PVH offers compassionate, comprehensive primary health care, emergency care, and referral benefits to the surrounding veterinary community. Located in Snohomish, Pilchuck Veterinary Hospital is the future of veterinary medicine in our community today. 


Pilchuck Veterinary Hospital	
11308 92nd Street SE
Snohomish, WA 98290

Name: Queensland Veterinary Specialists
Description:
QVS was established in Brisbane in 1982 to provide specialised patient care across a range of disciplines via referrals from veterinarians.

Surgeons at QVS provide a range of soft tissue, oncologic and orthopaedic procedures including:
+ Joint replacement and arthrodeses (fusion)
+ Simple and complex fracture management
+ Arthroscopy
+ Congenital limb deformities
+ Various joint diseases
+ TTA, TPLO and TWO options for cruciate ruptures
+ Abdominal and thoracic surgery
+ Laparoscopy and thoracoscopy
+ Correction of congenital cardiovascular defects
+ Portosystemic shunt management
+ Reconstructive surgery
+ Intervertebral disc disease
+ Spinal trauma
+ Fractures
+ Wobbler syndrome
+ Lumbosacral disease

Internal Medicine accepts referrals seven days a week and commonly perform procedures such as bone marrow aspirates, CSF collection, endotracheal washes, joint taps and feeding tube placement.
Services available include: Ultrasound, MRI, Digital Xray and Endoscopy. QVS has a complete range of endoscopes, enabling us to perform endoscopy of the gastrointestinal, respiratory (rhino, broncho), and urogenital tracts.

Our Reproduction service was founded by reproduction specialist, Dr Philip Thomas in 1990 and offers assistance with:
+ Infertility
+ Subfertility
+ Promotion of fertility
+ Diagnosis and management of diseases of the reproductive system
+ Artificial breeding in male and females
Services are available all hours

We accept all referrals in oncology, most commonly for lymphoma, mast cell tumours, osteosarcoma and soft tissue sarcomas. We provide all aspects of treatment, including diagnosis, staging, surgery and chemotherapy.

Dermatology for Animals provides services including:
+ Allergen-specific immunotherapy for atopic skin disease and
 feline asthma
+ Treatment of immune-mediated and neoplastic skin conditions
+ Diagnosis and treatment of ear diseases

Our centre is available 24/7 for all emergencies.

Name: Vet Bros Company
Description:
Un’azienda di professionisti con l’obiettivo di offrire ai veterinari una gamma completa di prodotti nutraceutici e dermocosmetici  innovativi e di sicura efficacia, confermata da studi clinici indipendenti.

Veterinari, partner e fornitori scelgono Vet Bros per la serietà e per il valore scientifico dell’offerta e condividono con essa l’obiettivo di costruire solide relazioni per una crescita professionale comune.

Name: Clinique vétérinaire de Hésingue
Description:
Fondée en 1994 par le Dr Vet Claudine Erbland, la clinique vétérinaire de Hésingue s’est développée initialement avec une activité généraliste exclusive. 

En 2020, le service de chirurgie spécialisée est créé par le Dr Vet Arnaud Baldinger, spécialiste européen en chirurgie (Dipl.ECVS). Depuis mars 2025, le Dr Vet Joséphine Roels (Dipl.ECVS) vient renforcer l’équipe. Le service de chirurgie peut également compter sur deux assistants de chirurgie en cours de formation. Nos services comprennent l’arthroscopie, l’orthopédie, la traumatologie, la cœlioscopie, les chirurgies abdominales, thoraciques, oncologiques et neurologiques. 

Dans une dynamique constante de progression, la clinique vétérinaire de Hésingue comptera un service de médecine interne spécialisée à partir de juillet 2025. avec l’arrivée du Dr Vet Lorris Lecot, ancien résident européen en médecine interne.

Notre engagement de soins d’excellence s’appuie notamment sur une communication claire et fluide avec nos vétérinaires référents.

Name: Pennsylvania Veterinary Medical Association (PVMA/PAVMA)
Description:
The Pennsylvania Veterinary Medical Association (PVMA) is the only statewide professional membership association dedicated to exclusively to the profession of veterinary medicine and the interests of the veterinary team. Established in 1883, PVMA membership has grown from its original 22 founding members to more than 3,000.

Today, we represent every member of the veterinary team. The Pennsylvania Veterinary Medical Association is dedicated to ensuring the vitality of the veterinary profession by promoting excellence in veterinary medicine, advancing animal health and welfare, and protecting and enhancing human health.

Name: Synovetin OA
Description: We are a dedicated team of animal health professionals with a passion for solving the challenges of managing chronic pain in companion animals.  We are harnessing the power of the novel radiotherapeutic Synovetin OA (tin-117m) to treat canine elbow arthritis.  Synovetin OA targets inflammatory macrophages in the synovium and synovial fluid to break the cycle of inflammation and provide very long-lasting relief and improved mobility. Synovetin OA is administered in a minimally-invasive, outpatient procedure, convenient for the pet, pet parent and veterinary professional.

Description: Rubinum SA is the sole manufacturer and trader of Toyocerin, a natural micro-organism with the function of microbiota stabilizer in animal’s gut which improves performance and enables a better digestion of the nutrients provided by the feed. Toyocerin is registered in various counties for swine, cattle poultry, rabbits and aquaculture. Toyocerin enhances productivity of animal production systems by reducing pathogens, and increasing beneficial gut bacteria. Consequently, Toyocerin stimulates the animals’ immune system.

With scalable, role-specific learning paths and a focus on innovation, collaboration, and accessibility, VetBloom helps veterinary professionals grow their skills, strengthen teamwork, and deliver exceptional care.

Name: Celia Hammond Animal Trust
Description: 1986 Celia Hamond founded the Celia Hammond Animal Trust, with the main objective of setting up low cost neuter and vaccination clinics, thus bringing responsible pet ownership within the reach of everyone. After a huge fund raising effort, the first clinic opened in Lewisham, South East London, in October 1995 and was fully booked almost from day one. After a short while an average of fifty dogs and one hundred cats were being neutered every week. In January 1999 a second clinic was opened in East London and was soon neutering the same numbers. Both London clinics operate a 24-hour rescue/rehoming service. Celia's sanctuary in East Sussex usually has around three hundred animals either awaiting rehoming or resident in comfort in the sanctuary's sixty acres of beautiful countryside for the rest of their lives.

Name: Blue Cross Animal Hospital
Description:
Blue Cross Animal Hospital is a full-service veterinary hospital located in Las Vegas, Nevada. Our family owned veterinary practice is a clean, loving place where pets receive the individual attention needed to keep them healthy and happy.

We provide services from vaccinations and laparoscopic surgery, laboratory work and dental care, to spaying and neutering your pets. View our complete list of veterinary services for dogs and cats. 

To schedule your pet's appointment please give us a call, 702-384-8737 or visit our website at www.bluecrossah.com and fill out the new client form. 

Be sure and join us on Facebook at http://www.facebook.com/bluecrossanimalhospital.

Name: Charleston Veterinary Referral Center
Description:
Charleston Veterinary Referral Center (CVRC) is the most advanced and comprehensive small animal referral and emergency hospital in the Lowcountry (greater Charleston, SC area). We see appointments by referral from your primary veterinarian and are open and staffed for emergencies 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year. 

Specialties include emergency medicine, critical care, internal medicine, cardiology, neurology, oncology, surgery, physical rehabilitation, sports medicine and theriogenology. Patients visit us from South Carolina and surrounding states.

CVRC is a 24-hour specialty and emergency referral hospital located in West Ashley, about 15 minutes from downtown Charleston, SC. The Veterinary Emergency and Critical Care Society (VECCS) has awarded us its highest certification for emergency and critical care, Level 1, making Charleston Veterinary Referral Center one of a select few veterinary hospitals in the nation and the only hospital in South Carolina to attain this recognition.

Our goal is to deliver an exceptional patient and pet owner experience, which requires excellent medical, surgical and nursing care, as well as compassionate custom service.  We firmly believe that our staff is the key to our success and to deliver on our goals.

Name: DUVASU, Mathura, U.P. (India)

P. Act. No. 27 of 2001 on 25.10.2001 with the College of Veterinary Science & AH., the erstwhile U.P. College of Veterinary Science & Animal Husbandry, Mathura as its main constituent College.

Name: Veterinarians Without Borders
Description: Working with public-sector and private partners, we develop the power of people and systems to promote veterinary health education, promotion and capacity while directly improving veterinary care.  VWB’s approach is to integrate professionals from public, institutional and private veterinary practice to develop clinical, as well as teaching/training skills, in veterinary students and practitioners to disseminate that knowledge to people around the world.  We aim to assist people who live in areas with limited knowledge of animal care, livestock production, areas of devastation from conflict limiting capacity, and areas of limited livestock production from endemic or epidemic disease.  We believe that by increasing awareness of principle diseases affecting species of interest, as well as, basic husbandry practices such as feeding, housing and basic care, we will improve productive capacity and livelihoods, while limiting diseases transmitted between animals and man.

Our mission is to contribute to an innovative and sustainable livestock sector in an economically responsible way. Thanks to our extensive practical expertise, we can provide valuable support to every type of farming operation.

Name: Bridge Referrals
Description:
Small Animal Veterinary Referrals

We are an independent multidisciplinary small animal veterinary referral hospital based in South Tyneside. Bridge Referrals offers advanced veterinary services from experienced referral clinicians to primary care veterinary practices in the North of England and Southern Scotland. We offer a holistic, collaborative approach in treating your pets, giving them the best possible outcomes. Our multidisciplinary team can take referrals in orthopaedics and soft tissue surgery, neurosurgery, ophthalmology, diagnostic imaging, internal medicine, cardiology and oncology.

Bridge Referrals is owned by families local to the area. We are proud of the North East’s picturesque countryside and wildlife, we have put sustainability at the heart of how we created and run Bridge Referrals to minimise our impact on our local environment.

Name: EVS Pet Urgent Care
Description:
EVS Pet Urgent Care is a daytime urgent care facility. While we are located inside of Petsmart, we are a separate entity and our clinic is 100% veterinary-owned and operated. We want to partner with veterinarians, and see the patients that they may not have the space in your schedule to care for immediately. These are patients who do not have emergencies, but who do need to be seen right away.
Examples include:
Ear/eye concerns/infections
Skin concerns - itching, lumps, bumps
Lameness
Vomiting/diarrhea
Urinary tract concerns
Stable neurologic disease
Lethargy and inappetence
End of life care and euthansia
We operate similar to a referral center. We have full diagnostic capabilities in house. After your patient's visit at our facility, you will be sent a discharge instruction, medical record, and your patients will be sent back to you for follow-up care.
We do not perform any preventive care, such as vaccinations, nor do we carry any preventive medications such as heartworm, flea or tick prevention. We will also not perform any preventive surgical procedures or dentistry. All of these services will be referred back to your clinic to be completed, or if it is outside your scope, referred to a specialty center at your request.
Our current locations are:
Kissimmee, FL
Northbrook, IL
Reno, NV
