Name: PetConnVet
Description:
At present, there is no cloud based, pet management system in Hungary where keepers and veterinarians can access and edit pet data at any time. The lack of this application prolongs, makes the healing process costly and cumbersome.

The aim of PetConnVet is the creation of digital platform where keepers can collect, edit and query important information about their pets in one place. In the meantime, veterinarians can also edit and retrieve this information through a web interface developed for them. This ensures that the medical history is shared, making the treatment process faster, simpler and more cost-effective.

In the mid of January 2022 we will release our free-to-use application for pet owners „PetConnVet” and our webapplication for the professional veterinarians. 

The vision of PetConnVet is to become a leader in the provision of all the necessary software tools and applications that attain to animal care and welfare. Our responsibility is to continually improve through innovation, development, creation and marketing in all aspects of the animal care and welfare world in which we operate. Get ready for the change in our industry!

Name: VetLab
Description:
VetLab is the first serbian veterinary laboratory for clinical diagnostics. Our laboratory services are available to all stations, clinics and farms in Serbia, Montenegro and Bosnia & Herzegovina.
We offer more than four hundred analysis and our deadlines are guaranteed. VetLab is a modern laboratory and our analysis contribute to the solution of health problems of pets and farm animals, and improve the quality of the work of veterinarians. We do all the work on the most modern equipment and appliances. VetLabs mission is to apply the latest technology and scientific developments in laboratory diagnosis and offer the best care to customers, primarily veterinarians, but also anyone who works towards good health of pets and domestic animals.
VetExpress servis is there for safe transport of samples from all parts of Serbia. With this service, we make it easier for our partners to send samples without worrying about  safety and arrival time. We consider our obligation to continue with the implementation of new methods to improve the quality as well as the development and improvement of ancillary services.

Name: MYOS Animal Health
Description:
MYOS Canine Muscle Formula is an all-natural product, derived from fertilized egg yolk, that is clinically proven to improve canine muscle health, mobility, and recovery from injuries. Fortetropin is a revolutionary ingredient made through a patented process that maintains the powerful and vital nutrients of Fertilized Egg Yolk. These unique egg yolks are all-natural and have complex molecules that have been clinically proven to increase muscle size and mass.
Our Vet Strength Formula is available exclusively to veterinarians. This advanced  supplement is powered by Fortetropin and contains additional branched-chain amino acids (BCCA's) for added muscle support.

Name: VetFamily Australia
Description:
VetFamily Australia is a unique collaboration for independent veterinary clinics and animal hospitals. By working together VetFamily members gain access to a wide range of benefits that improve clinic profitability, reduce administrative work and increase the time you can spend with animals.

VetFamily Australia emerges from the union of two successful Australian buying groups, IVA and Vettr, who have been committed to providing unparalleled value to independently owned clinics since 2013.

Supported by the global entity VetFamily, our network today currently has over 7,000 member clinics in 11 countries. At VetFamily, we take pride in our commitment to delivering substantial value to our members. This is achieved through robust local partnerships, offering valuable opportunities for profitability through rebates, discounts, and other revenue-generating avenues. 

At VetFamily Australia, our core focus is on bolstering the veterinary community by providing support, fostering knowledge sharing, and enhancing buying power, all without the constraints of corporate ownership. This approach not only fosters a more vibrant and diverse veterinary landscape but also upholds the values and autonomy of individual clinics.  

By focusing on empowering clinics rather than owning them, VetFamily Australia offers a refreshing alternative in an industry increasingly influenced by corporate consolidation.

Name: Ranzijn Dierenarts
Description:
Het is een bijzonder verhaal: in 1912 begonnen we als bescheiden tuincentrum en dierenspeciaalzaak, inmiddels zijn we uitgegroeid tot 16 grote vestigingen met 15 hypermoderne dierenartspraktijken. Huisdierbezitters vinden bij ons de beste producten én de beste zorg onder één dak. En daar zijn we trots op.

Van preventief advies tot complexe laparoscopie - ons veterinaire team van ongeveer 200 medewerkers staat altijd klaar voor alle honden, katten en andere gezelschapsdieren die bij ons binnenkomen. Het werk is elke dag anders en uitdagend. Maar in onze moderne, uitgebreid uitgeruste klinieken is gelukkig veel mogelijk. Heeft je labrador de drone van je buurjongen opgegeten? Wij halen hem er veilig uit.

Bij Ranzijn Dierenarts maken we de beste veterinaire zorg voor iedereen bereikbaar. Klanten kiezen voor onze toegankelijke klinieken, de eerlijke tarieven en voor onze gespecialiseerde medewerkers. Want hun enthousiasme, vakkennis en liefdevolle zorg is de sleutel tot ons succes.

De Ranzijn Dierenarts praktijken zijn volledig uitgeruste dierenartspraktijken met gekwalificeerd personeel. Het is de eerste Nederlandse combinatie van een tuincentrum met een hoogwaardige dierenkliniek. De praktijken beschikken over o.a. een operatiekamer, laboratorium, opnameruimte en echo- en röntgenapparatuur. De volledig van het tuingedeelte afgescheiden kliniek verzorgt inentingen, preventief advies, operaties en onderzoek van honden en katten, maar ook knaagdieren, vogels en reptielen kunnen worden behandeld.

Name: Rao Farmaceutici
Description:
La Rao Farmaceutici nasce a Partinico nel 1997 con uno spirito marcatamente zootecnico, capace di soddisfare la domanda di prodotti farmaceutici per uso Veterinario e per il reparto Caseario. 

Negli anni la Rao Farmaceutici srl accresce la propria capacità di distribuzione e di offerta divenendo da piccola realtà locale espressione di qualità sia sul territorio regionale che su quello nazionale, inserendosi con successo e a tutto campo nel settore.

Per questa ragione è scelta come partner strategico dai più qualificati operatori del settore con i quali cresce ben oltre le prospettive di mercato.

Name: Dog Authority - Dog Training & Dog Behavior
Description: Holistic in-home dog behavior and dog training is our passion. We have been training dogs since 1998 and love working with all breeds. Holistic dog training means we deal with the dog as a whole. Nutrition is where we start first. The better the food fed to your dog the more balanced in general your dog will be. Dog behavior problems are affected by what your dog is eating. Once we have the nutrition under order, we move on to the other concerns. We work with all types of dog behavior, whether your dog currently has a behavior issue or you are trying to prevent a puppy from starting certain behaviors. A puppy is never too young to start puppy training and a dog is never too old to modify it's behavior and training. Besides typical dog and puppy obedience and behavior, we also work with deaf dogs and blind dogs as well. Plus we have a great program to prepare your dog for a baby to arrive. Give us a call today to schedule your in-home dog training session!

Name: VetChat
Description:
At VetChat, we believe healthier pets start with better access to veterinary care.

We’re here to support both pets and the vets who care for them. Through our telehealth platform, pet owners can connect with qualified veterinarians anytime, especially after hours when most clinics are closed. 
This means peace of mind for pet carers and timely advice when it’s needed most.

For veterinary clinics, VetChat isn’t a replacement for in-person visits - it’s a powerful complement. We work alongside clinics to extend their reach, ease the pressure on in-clinic teams (especially after hours), and ensure pets receive the right care at the right time.

Our mission is simple: to make veterinary care more accessible, to support veterinarians in delivering exceptional service, and to help pets live healthier, happier lives.

Name: Pet Resource Clinic of Kansas City
Description:
SNKC is a 501(c)(3) formed in 2002 that serves the Greater Kansas City Community. You are an important part of our team! Your support decreases the number of homeless, unwanted, and neglected pets in our community and entering our area shelters, as well as increases the quality of care for pets and strengthens the animal-human bond in the Kansas City Community.

Mission Statement

Our mission is to decrease pet homelessness, increase pet retention, and improve the quality of life for pets through education and supportive services for families in need.

Vision Statement

We educate and assist families to improve their pet’s quality of life, increase the animal-human bond and make long term positive impacts in our community and animal welfare.

Philosophy Statement

We pride ourselves in acknowledging our diverse community with a non-judgmental and compassionate approach. Our programs target families who need assistance with education, wellness and resources to help their pets live a long, healthy and happy life.

Position Statement

Spay and Neuter Kansas City is the only targeted spay neuter program in the Greater Kansas City area working to help all families in need regardless of financial means. Our unique approach is to provide exceptional customer service and high standards of care through commitment to our core values.

Name: Positivity in Practice
Description:
Positivity in Practice is a neuroscience-based coaching and training business that helps veterinary professionals feel better, build confidence and create more fulfilling careers.

The reality of practice today is tough.
Relentless workload, emotional intensity, and a culture of “just push through” leave even the most passionate professionals feeling drained.

A lot of people are quietly struggling and blaming themselves for not coping better.
But what if the problem isn’t you?
What if the way you’ve learned to survive in practice is now keeping you stuck?

Positivity in Practice exists to change that.
We help veterinary professionals develop the tools to feel calmer, clearer and more confident — even in challenging environments.

Our programmes are grounded in science, built for busy people and designed to create real, lasting change.

We help you:
 Handle pressure without it taking over your whole life
 Rebuild confidence in your decisions and abilities
 Experience more meaning and motivation in your day
 Let go of constant overthinking and second-guessing
 Feel more like yourself again  - happy, capable, fulfilled

This isn’t about pretending everything is fine.
It’s about giving you the tools to feel better and show up as the version of yourself you actually want to be.

What’s on offer right now?
Our 6-week coaching programme combines bite-sized, neuroscience-based strategies with small-group support and a personalised app that guides you every step of the way.

A flexible membership is coming soon for those who want to keep building on their progress with community, accountability and next-level tools.

 Want to know more? Drop us a message or email sarah@positivityinpractice.com

Positivity starts here and we’re in this together

Name: Oncotect
Description: Oncotect is a Raleigh-based biotech startup committed to pioneering early screening of cancer risks in dogs using their urine. Oncotect is the only urine-based non-invasive, convenient, affordable, and accessible multi-cancer screening test available to dogs.

Dutch Farm International is GMP certified and is regularly inspected by the Netherlands Public Health and Veterinary Authorities. All products have their origin in the E.U. Our widely experienced regulatory affairs staff is able to support distributors with all relevant technical information to register our products in the local markets. 
As will be evident: we never compromise on quality!

Our products are currently marketed in over 50 countries worldwide and we are always looking for new distributors in regions that are not yet serviced by our existing partners.

Nascemos com o propósito de transformar a distribuição veterinária num processo mais simples e justo. Assumimos o formato de cooperativa para garantir as vantagens de uma economia de escala, preservando a autonomia do CAMV.

Queremos reduzir custos para o médico veterinário, aumentar a eficiência dos processos e garantir acesso rápido a medicamentos. Vamos continuar a apostar na formação e partilha de conhecimento. Vamos inovar e continuar a surpreender com modelos de gestão criativos e eficientes. Vamos inovar e continuar a crescer em número de sócios para aumentar as vantagens para todos.

Os serviços e vantagens Codivet são pensados para responder a todas as necessidades dos CAMV. Formamos, apoiamos e tornamos mais eficiente o dia a dia dos médicos veterinários.

Tudo o que precisa, quando precisa. A Codivet garante a entrega de medicamentos e todo o material veterinário a nível nacional. Encomende na nossa plataforma online 24 horas e nós entregamos entre 12 e 24 horas.

Description: Heelix is veterinary referral centre. We offer orthopedic examination, arthroscopy, radiology, ultrasound, cardiology, internal medicine and scopic procedures. Description: Vetted PetCare brings honest and stress-free veterinary care to the comfort and convenience of your home. By connecting pet parents with the best vets for their pets, we improve vet care and create peace of mind for pet lovers everywhere.

Name: CentralVet
Description:
Desde 2007, somos uma empresa dedicada à importação e distribuição de produtos veterinários. Movidos por uma motivação singular, nossa equipe compartilha o compromisso de promover a qualidade de vida dos animais. Nosso amor pelos animais é evidente em cada membro da equipe. 

Acreditamos que qualidade exige comprometimento e excelência, por isso investimos em conhecimento científico e tecnológico nacional e internacional. Estamos sempre atualizados com as mais recentes inovações da ciência na área da saúde animal e acreditamos que o progresso deve ser compartilhado e difundido.

Acompanhe-nos para ficar por dentro das últimas novidades e descobrir como promover o bem-estar dos seus companheiros de quatro patas. Juntos, podemos fazer a diferença na vida dos animais que tanto amamos. 
Oferecemos para o mercado veterinário mais de três mil produtos, incluindo as melhores opções do mercado em fármacos e materiais de qualidade que auxiliam na rotina de clínicas e hospitais. Afim de promover a saúde, qualidade de vida e longevidade aos animais. E através de uma equipe especializada, com agilidade, inovação, e uma gestão comercial eficaz, agregar valor e promover resultados positivos aos nossos clientes.

Acesse nosso site e surpreenda-se conosco!

Name: Humane Society for Tacoma & Pierce County
Description:
Founded in 1888 by a handful of concerned citizens, the Humane Society for Tacoma & Pierce County has grown into the state's largest animal welfare agency. We care for nearly 10,000 animals every year, reunite thousands of lost pets with their owners, provide medical care for ill and injured pets, and offer comprehensive low-cost spay-neuter programs.

The Humane Society for Tacoma & Pierce County is striving to create a compassionate community where every pet has a loving home.  We invite you to support our mission through volunteering, donating, adopting, and advocating for the welfare of pets in our community.

The Humane Society for Tacoma & Pierce County is a local, independent 501(c)3 non-profit which relies on donations to fund its vital programs. The Humane Society for Tacoma & Pierce County is not associated with any government agency, nor affiliated with any national organization.

Name: ClinicWise
Description: Meet ClinicWise, the AI-powered virtual assistant designed specifically for veterinary clinics. Streamline your operations and enhance client communication effortlessly.

Name: Veterinary Orthopaedics
Description:
Veterinary Orthopaedics was founded in 2012 by Alasdair Frost in order to supply high quality and affordable implants and instruments which were lacking in the veterinary market.

We are a company that pride ourselves on our experience in the veterinary field. We have two orthopaedic surgeons to hand who have tested all implants and can discuss how you can best use our range of products.

Innovation is the key to the success of Veterinary Orthopaedics. We are continually working with human consultant surgeons across the globe to develop new equipment and implants for veterinary use. 

If you require an item that is not available online or in the catalogue please contact us and we will do our utmost to source this for you.

Name: Snout School
Description:
Throw the generic veterinary marketing ideas out! We're here to teach you to disrupt the veterinary status quo. 

Using our Veterinary Brand Formula system, you'll discover how to create and market a unique veterinary brand for yourself or your clinic. 

Our courses and coaching are based on the in-depth brand and marketing strategy work our founder, Danielle K. Lambert, does at TheSnoutGroup.com. 

With a background in practice management and nearly 10 years experience as a consultant, Danielle teaches Snout School students how to go from vet, clinic, or consultant to brand.

Name: Palms & Paws Veterinary Center, Inc.
Description:
Welcome to Palms & Paws, delivering kind and compassionate veterinary medical services in a calm, friendly, and professional environment.

We improve the lives of pets by supporting, educating, and empowering pet lovers. When we succeed, we ensure that we always deliver on our promise of Empowering People, Advancing Pets.

Palms & Paws Veterinary Center is a brand new, state of the art veterinary care facility in Santa Monica, CA. 

We are a committed group of professionals, dedicated to seeing pets thrive, and making pet-parents happy. By empowering our staff to succeed personally as well as professionally, we are able to deliver the highest level of client service possible.

Name: VetThing
Description:
"It’s a vet thing..." 

How many times have we uttered those words to each other?  

They mean we’re united by the same passion for animals.  
We’re devoted to the people that care for them.  
And we’re fused together by a deep professional pride.  

But as veterinary professionals, our work also brings unique challenges every day. The long hours, the hard calls, the weight that comes with caring. 

VetThing is building the country’s strongest veterinary community, delivering the support, resources, and ownership opportunities veterinary teams deserve. 

We’re proud to offer a refreshing alternative for people seeking to sell their veterinary practice.  

We’re proud to fight for the uniqueness in every great team, build for long-term strength instead of short-term scale, and show how true togetherness can be truly transformative.  

We’re building a culture where we learn, share and grow in a way that benefits each other and elevates our profession. 

Curious? We'd love to hear from you.

Description: Somos una empresa dedicada a la distribución de productos veterinarios en el mercado colombiano, con mas de 29 años de experiencia en el mercado.

Name: Globalvet
Description:
Globalvet, c’est un réseau d’établissements vétérinaires engagés à faire plus que soigner! 

À la maison-mère, le rôle de notre équipe est d’aider à favoriser et assurer le développement des pratiques vétérinaires qui composent notre réseau. En joignant Globalvet, les propriétaires des établissements et leurs équipes bénéficient d'une multitude de services offerts par la maison-mère, ce qui leur permet de se concentrer sur les soins des animaux. Notre équipe offre du support médical, de la formation continue, de l’optimisation, du support administratif et bien plus! 

Inspirée par le désir de soutenir et développer des relations agréables, l'équipe de Globalvet développe également plusieurs services afin d'aider la population à mieux vivre avec ces espèces animales qui créent tant de moments de plaisir pour les humains. 

Les animaux de compagnie rendent le monde meilleur et nous leur rendons hommage en leur faisant une place de choix dans notre quotidien. Globalvet leur fait la promesse de faire plus que soigner!

Name: MilkCare - Cursos, Treinamentos e Consultoria em Qualidade do Leite

Name: Clínica Felina Barcelona
Description:

Un centro diseñado especialmente para que el gato pueda ser atendido en las mejores condiciones y por personal ampliamente formado para ofrecer un servicio completo y de calidad.

Name: Cremare Tierkrematorien GmbH
Description:
Der respektvolle Umgang mit einem verstorbenen Tier, das die Besitzer jahrelang begleitet hat, ist für uns eine Herzensangelegenheit – seit mehr als einem Vierteljahrhundert. Tiere sind Lebensbegleiter, beste Freunde, Vertraute oder Seelengefährten und das meist über viele Jahre. So ist der Verlust für viele genauso schlimm wie der Verlust eines engen Familienmitgliedes oder Freundes.

Bestattungsrituale zu gestalten und Erinnerungen zu bewahren ist ein menschliches Bedürfnis und ein inniger Wunsch. Wir geben Tierhaltern in der Abschiedssituation Raum und Zeit für diese wichtigen Emotionen.

Cremare wurde vor über 25 Jahren von einem Tierarzt in Wesel am Niederrhein gegründet. Somit war der Grundstein für den respektvollen Umgang mit dem Verlust von Haustieren gelegt. Seit 2018 gehört zudem die Marke Horsia zu Cremare und ermöglicht es nun auch Besitzern von Pferden, Ponys und Eseln mit dem größten Respekt Abschied von ihren Gefährten zu nehmen. 

Weitere Infos findet ihr auf unserer Website: https://tierkrematorium-cremare.de/

Impressum: https://tierkrematorium-cremare.de/impressum/

Datenschutz: https://tierkrematorium-cremare.de/datenschutzerklaerung/

Name: Ceva Ridgeway Biologicals Ltd
Description:
Ridgeway Biologicals are licensed by the VMD (Veterinary Medicines Directorate) to manufacture autogenous vaccine which are veterinary prescription only medicines.

Autogenous vaccines are prepared from a pathogen extracted from a host animal or group which is then used to inoculate the rest of the group. We are able to manufacture autogenous vaccine for many farm animals and fish. For more information on autogenous vaccines please contact your veterinary surgeon.

Name: Leeds Birstall 24/7 Small Animal Hospital
Description:
Gold Standard, fast-paced RCVS Hospital and Emergency Clinic with first opinion practice rolled into one. Well-being orientated practice where having fun at work, getting better every day, caring for each other (and our families) and practicing the most current, evidence-based medicine are key to the culture of our 66 colleague team members. Excellent customer service, thorough, compassionate patient care and looking after our team members are at the heart of what we do.

We benefit from offering colleagues the dual experience of learning good, First Opinion consulting (both vet and specialist nursing clinics), following cases from beginning to end with clients, within a busy hospital environment with Certificate level veterinary support (both in the vet surgeon and vet nurse teams). 

Our First Opinion boasts an ISFM Gold Standard cat clinic & cattery, high surgical standards (as you'd expect from University), extensive in-house laboratory and a dedicated IM3 Dental Suite with all the kit, led by our very own Dental RVN.

Our Hospital supports Referral, overnight hospitalisation and OOH support for 13 Vets4Pets practices (as well as many Animal Charities) in the area, resulting in busy OOH night shifts, a large and interesting case-load for both the day and night clinical teams.

With almost 60% of our pets Insured and/or on Healthcare Plans, we have a really engaged client-base who expect everything to be worked up thoroughly and extensively, be it a vomiting cat or itchy-eared dog. If you're into jabbing animals with steroids and antibiotics and 'see how it gets on', this isn't the practice for you!


Team communication, admin support and in-house training CPD are at the forefront of what we do, reflected in the fact that we have 66 colleagues currently in our practice supporting 11 vets. That ratio of both clinical to administrative/finance support is also reflected in our 2:1 qualified RVN to vet working ratio at any one shift.

Name: Cascade Animal Sciences
Description:
Cascade Animal Sciences was acquired by U.S.-based ToeGrips LLC in 2024. Cascade focused on advancing canine geriatric health by providing veterinary dietary interventions for the adjunct treatment of canine cognitive decline and epilepsy. Its primary product was a medium-chain triglyceride formulation backed by decades of scientific research in canines. 

 ToeGrips LLC is a leader and pioneer in the burgeoning market of canine geriatric care. The acquisition will expand its offering and capabilities to address more needs in this area. 

For more information on Cascade, please visit www.cascadeanimalsciences.com or refer to the product press release here - www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/growing-awareness-of-brain-health-for-senior-dogs-as-cascade-animal-sciences-launches-neuro-pro-301853849.html

Name: Labvet.cz, s.r.o.
Description:
Správně odebrat, rychle vyšetřit. To je oč tu běží.

Provádíme odběry i vyšetření v Praze. Vzorek na vyšetření může poslat i váš ošetřující veterinární lékař. Při odběru u nás je zajištěn profesionální odběr biologického materiálu, který je okamžitě zpracováván pro stanovená vyšetření. Časový rozestup mezi odběrem a zpracováním vzorků může výsledky vyšetření výrazně ovlivnit. Vzorek necestuje po Evropě a za jedny peníze vidí vašeho miláčka další veterinář, který pomůže se stanovením diagnózy a následným léčením. Nepoužíváme zrychlené testy, které nemusí odhalit všechny problémy. Výsledky většiny dopoledních odběrů vám sdělíme ještě týž den.

Name: Miami Veterinary Specialists
Description:
Miami Veterinary Specialists is a pet specialty hospital with 24-hour emergency services, state-of-the-art equipment, and a diverse medical care team of board certified specialists, emergency veterinarians and certified veterinary technicians.

For more than 20 years, Miami Veterinary Specialists has treated the most complex and rare conditions affecting South Florida pets. Miami Veterinary Specialists continues to be the pet specialty hospital that meets and exceeds the specialty needs of the veterinarian community across Miami-Dade and Monroe counties.

Name: LBV Centroamérica
Description:
HISTORIA
Laboratorios Biológicos Veterinarios S.A. de C.V.(LBV), se fundó el 19 de enero de 1977 a iniciativa de Don Juan Duch, empresario de origen catalán, debido a que en esa época en El Salvador se carecía de un laboratorio dedicado a la producción de medicamentos de uso veterinario. Como parte de su portafolio de productos, el primer producto que LBV  fabricó se llamó Vitaminas Hidrosolubles para Aves, luego se elaboraron otros dentro de la línea nutricional, logrando al final su primer año de operaciones, el desarrollo de 4 productos, que a la fecha ya representan más de 50 en diversas especialidades. Con el pasar del tiempo se incorporó la producción de pre-mezclas para aves, asimismo se amplió la línea de producción para cerdo y ganado, actualmente también se fabrican para mascotas, acuícolas, incluyendo líneas de productos líquidos.

NOSOTROS
En LBV producimos y ofrecemos  productos de salud y nutrición animal, además distribuimos de marcas reconocidas, biológicos de origen natural en los diferentes  requerimientos y necesidades de las industrias pecuarias, brindando así una oferta tanto a nivel nacional como centroamericano.

Adicionalmente, se cuenta con un  abanico de servicios orientados a potencializar los beneficios dentro de las explotaciones pecuarias como el Control de Plagas, servicio de Laboratorio de Diagnostico en Serología, Microbiología, determinación y cuantificación de Micotoxinas, Parasitología, Bromatología, entre otros. De la misma manera cuenta con personal y equipo capacitado para el servicio en campo, y asesoría en el área de nutrición.

Name: Ikafeed
Description:
ما در شرکت ایده پردازان خوراک آریان با هدف واردات، توزیع و فروش کالاهای مربوط به خوراک دام، طیور و آبزیان با انتقال دانش از شرکای بینالمللی و اتکا به فرهنگ یادگیری سازمان خود، ظرفیتهای علمیمان را توسعه میدهیم و متعهد هستیم که  آخرین راهکارهای روز دنیا را در دسترس همگان قرار دهیم.
ما دریافته ایم که تغذیه بهتر دام و طیور باعث بهبود سلامت وعملکرد آنها میگردد که ضمن کاهش مضرات زیست محیطی، در نهایت موجب افزایش بازده واقعی سرمایه گذاری می گردد. همچنین با ارائه محصولاتی که بتوانند با افزایش کمیت، حفظ کیفیت و تامین مواد مغذی مورد نیاز انسانها، سلامت و بهداشت و ایمنی غذایی آنها را تامین نماید، بتوانیم به سهم خود در توسعه پایدار کشور نقشی ایفا نموده و نهایتا قدمی کوچک در راه ایجاد آرامش و سلامت جامعه برداریم.
به همین دلیل ما فعالیتهای تحقیقاتی پردامنه ای در سطح کشور در ارتباط با مشتریان ایجاد کرده ایم که ما را قادر می سازد راه حلهای اختصاصی برجسته ای ارائه دهیم.
ما در خانواده ایده پردازان خوراک آریان کوشیدهایم تا فرهنگ کیفیت را در قلب و ذهنمان نهادینه کنیم و سهمی در ارتقاء سلامت و بهبود کیفیت زندگی افراد جامعه داشته باشیم. همواره به کیفیت و نوآوری پایبند خواهیم ماند تا فردایی بهتر و جامعهای سالمتر بسازیم.

In IKA Co. with the goal of import and distribution of all products related to feed for Livestock, Poultry and Aquaculture by transferring knowledge from our international partners and relying on our organization educational culture, we develop our scientific capacity. We committed to make the latest solutions in the world available for our customers.
We found that superior feed for Livestock and Poultry can cause better health and performance and less environmental disadvantages and increase return on investment. We can do our part in sustainable development of our society and have a small step in our community peace and health by sourcing products which can offer health and food safety with increased quantity, maintaining quality and providing nutritional requirement for mankind.

Description:
O Hospital Veterinário Santa Marinha nasceu da convicção partilhada por uma equipa de Médicos Veterinários jovens de que era possível fazer mais e melhor pela saúde dos animais de estimação. O propósito da sua criação era melhorar a prestação dos serviços de saúde dos animais de companhia e, ao fazê-lo, garantir que o convívio com eles seja seguro, são e tranquilo.

Por eles, o HVSM está presente 24 horas por dia, com o compromisso de acompanhar todas as inovações científicas e tecnológicas, apostando na formação e especialização criando uma equipa multidisciplinar, dedicada e acessível.

Para sua comodidade, dispõe de uma localização com boas acessibilidades, estacionamento fácil, horários alargados, instalações modernas e confortáveis e uma equipa disponível para o ajudar a qualquer hora do dia. Dedicação a eles a 100%, tal como eles se dedicam a si.

Name: DVM Launch
Description: Jumpstart your career with DVM Launch! We are not a corporate: our network of privately-owned practices offer hands-on, structured training programs. With over 60 hospitals (and counting) all over the United States currently offering programs, we’re sure you’ll find a great fit! DVM Launch ensures you’ll be joining a community of elite, like-minded veterinary professionals who will support and foster your career in veterinary medicine, even after your program is complete. We’re on a mission to prepare the next generation of DVMs for success via our network of seasoned, independently-practicing veterinarians. Our core goals – train, connect, inspire, and lead – are the baseline of every DVMLaunch program.

Name: MicroVet Diagnostics
Description: Providing unique and cost effective clinical laboratory, imaging analyzers and consumables that will add to your in-clinic test menu.

Name: Mano Médical
Description:

Mano Médical, c'est une entreprise de 24 personnes, qui développe et distribue des équipements professionnels innovants destinés au marché vétérinaire. 

Nos nombreuses gammes de produits telles que l’Imagerie, la Chirurgie et le Monitoring sont commercialisées en France et à l’international. 

Notre équipe de technico-commerciaux est à votre disposition pour vous rendre visite, vous présenter nos produits et vous conseiller.

Notre service client est à votre écoute.

N'hésitez pas à nous solliciter !

Merci de votre confiance.

Name: Genevet
Description:
A missão do Genevet é proporcionar um serviço de diagnóstico veterinário fiável e rápido, assegurando sempre um apoio técnico e médico qualificado, associado aos melhores métodos disponíveis.
 
Trabalhamos com elevados padrões de qualidade e competência, em conformidade com os requisitos dos clientes e requisitos técnicos aplicáveis aos métodos de diagnóstico. Desenvolvemos e implementamos novos métodos sempre na vanguarda da atualização técnica e científica.

Pretendemos ser o seu parceiro no diagnóstico médico no dia-a-dia!

Name: VetEasy
Description:
Hola!  Somos veteasy.es, el seguro veterinario 100% digital para perros y gatos que lucha para que nuestras mascotas vivan más años y con mejor calidad de vida

 ¿Por qué VetEasy?

 Mejores coberturas del mercado: Devolvemos el 80% de las facturas veterinarias hasta uno de los límites anuales más altos del mercado, 3.000€.

 Atención Personalizada: Entendemos que cada mascota es única, por lo que ofrecemos planes personalizables que se adaptan a las necesidades de tu peludo amigo y a tu presupuesto. Por eso, ofrecemos un Plan Cirugía y un Plan Completo. 

 Educación y Prevención: Promovemos la salud a largo plazo a través de recursos educativos y consejos de expertos en cuidado animal.

 Compromiso con la Comunidad: Trabajamos con TODAS las clínicas y hospitales veterinarios de España y la Unión Europea, para que tú decidas el mejor veterinario para tu compañero peludo.

 Todas las razas son bienvenidas! Adoramos a todos los animales y, por eso, en VetEasy aseguramos a todas las razas de perros y gatos que existen.

 Únete a nuestra comunidad que confían en VetEasy para proteger a tus compañeros de cuatro patas. Juntos, estamos construyendo un futuro más saludable y feliz para todos nuestros peluditos

Name: Vilavet Saude Animal
Description: Excelência em saúde e bem-estar animal.

Name: Paws & Claws Veterinary Clinic
Description: We are specialized veterinary clinic based in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia

Name: Vet Together
Description: Vet Together is an invitation-only event designed for veterinary professionals who value their time. Hosted-buyers can meet with top-tier vendors of their choice during pre-scheduled appointment times. The event includes keynote speakers, curated networking, and continuing education sessions—all in a professional setting focused on getting business done, while having fun.

Name: Colégio Brasileiro de Médicos Veterinários Higienistas de Alimentos
Anipanion
Description: Anipanion is a leading veterinary telehealth platform that seamlessly connects pet parents and veterinary professionals through chat or video calls with the goal of delivering better patient health outcomes and improving quality of life for all.

Name: Veterinary Health Innovation Engine
Description:
The Veterinary Health Innovation Engine (vHive) is a unique partnership between the University of Surrey and Zoetis Centre for Digital Innovation, supported by a co-investment of £8.5 million in resources dedicated to the development and adoption of new digital technologies in animal health.

This new centre will utilise transformational digital and data analytics tools to advance the wellbeing of domestic animals. Digital technologies including wearables, apps, sensors and satellites promise to transform real-time information capture for animal owners and their veterinary advisors. Access to Big Data and engagement with the emerging Internet of Things will lead to new opportunities in research, business and education. This will enable improved understanding of animal health and early identification of problems in an analogous manner to eHealth for people.

The Veterinary Health Innovation Engine (vHive) is an exciting new partnership between the University of Surrey and Zoetis Centre for Digital Innovation, with specialist input from the School of Veterinary Medicine, the Centre for the Digital Economy at the Business School, and the 5G Innovation Centre.

The vHive partnership is unique due to the multi-disciplinary collaboration between various centres from the University of Surrey and Zoetis.

Name: Veterinary Specialist Association
Description:
Our charity strives to educate the public on the wellbeing of animals through the development, understanding and application of veterinary specialist care. 

We represent specialists across all disciplines and covering all species. 

We provide support and education for our UK based specialists as well as representing the interests of both specialists and the general public to regulatory and national veterinary organisations. 

Our aim is to improve animal welfare through understanding of how the knowledge and expertise of our veterinary specialists can contribute to contextualised care of animals.

Name: Vet Network
Description:
Vet Network is an online company that develop online tools for vets and vet practices. Through designing a community website where by vets can go for information on interesting topics, book CPD courses, find jobs and get business solutions the veterinary profession is becoming united and the opportunity to share information is increased.

Vets are required each year to perform a certain amount of continued professional development, vet network have a medium for CPD suppliers to showcase there courses. By making CPD more accessible it is possible to allow vets to pick the courses that are right for them.

At present the vet recruitment market is saturated with expensive recruitment companies. Vet Network allows practice to recruit through a simple and effective jobs center for a great price.

Other tools that are available to members are designed based on requests. Recently Vet Network have teamed up with a payroll administration company to offer contractors payroll solutions. 

Also Vet Network is working with a webdesign company to enable  vets to get the very best website for their vet practice at a super price.


Tools listing;

Recruit practice colleagues simply and efficiently,
Book online CPD from a range of national suppliers
Use Forums to discuss various topic
Case Logs to get second opinions on cases.
Sell Products to other practices
Locum Payroll Solutions
Events / Groups / Chat / Discussions / Video Conferencing

Name: Bem Cuidar Animal
Description: Trata-se de uma metodologia própria e patenteada de ensino, que segue uma cronologia, focada nos principais pilares que garantirão aos animais uma existência harmoniosa, saudável e feliz, como por exemplo, nutrição, vacinação, vermifugação, comportamento, diferenças de tipos e raças, entre outros. As aulas, palestras e apresentações são ministradas por profissionais treinados em nossa metodologia, utilizando 100% do nosso material didático e obedecendo os critérios e requisitos das diferentes faixas etárias, sempre de forma interativa e positiva.

Name: Advanced Animal Diagnostics
Description:
Advanced Animal Diagnostics provides on-farm diagnostics that increase profits and empower more precise care of animals so they live healthier, more productive lives.

We are committed to researching, developing and commercializing the industry’s most reliable, on-farm diagnostic tests, such as QScout MLD for early detection of subclinical mastitis in dairy cows. With our diagnostic offerings, we aim to empower real-time management decisions that increase productivity, prevent losses, improve animal welfare and protect our food supply.

Go to https://www.qscoutlab.com/careers for a complete list of open opportunities.

Name: Nextmune UK Laboratories
Description:
At Nextmune UK Laboratories, our primary focus is to support veterinary professionals in successfully managing allergy cases, and help relieve animals of the often-distressing symptoms associated with allergic disease.

As a UK laboratory, based in beautiful West Yorkshire, we are proud to have our own in-house Research and Development team on site. Their work is at the heart of our business. Using leading technologies and techniques, our highly experienced scientists collaborate industry-wide to advance allergy research and produce high-performance allergy tests.

We are driven by a desire to make a real-life difference to the health and welfare of animals, with our team including a number of veterinary surgeons and veterinary nurses. We also work in partnership with allergy experts and other veterinary professionals, enabling us to offer unrivalled service with exceptional technical support and a tailored, personal approach.

Name: Dr.Paw
Description: Dr.Paw, established in 2022, believes that pets help us reconnect with our true selves and teach us the value of life. At Dr.Paw, we offer you a variety of premium pet services designed to save you time, money and stress. At your fingertips, a complete, affordable, real-time pet care solution resulting in proactive health care pets in Sri Lanka. Dr.Paw is the smart way to handle your pet care. Dr.Paw is for the real animal lovers.

Name: Veterinary Dental Specialties & Oral Surgery (VDS)
Description: Veterinary Dental Specialties and Oral Surgery (VDS) is the premier center of excellence for your animal’s oral care. We do oral care and nothing else on dogs, cats, and exotics nationally and internationally!  In veterinary medicine, pet dental care is still too often considered a nice-to-have. Yet oral health is the gateway—and often a predictor—of overall animal health. We are on a mission to bring the best, most comprehensive and cutting-edge oral health care to animals and their pet parents everywhere.

Fetch works closely together with you and your primary care veterinarian to resolve any complex health problems your pet might have. Regardless of their ultimate diagnosis, our team will stop at nothing to find an effective treatment that is uniquely tailored to your pet.

Name: Interchem (Ireland) Ltd
Description:
Interchem (Ireland) Ltd. is a unique and independent marketing, sales and distribution company for pharmaceutical and biological and superpremium pet food products for the animal health market.

The company was set up in June 2007 by Pat O' Callaghan and Gerard Perry after reaching agreement with Greencore Group plc to purchase the assets of Interchem Ltd., which was a formally wholly owned subsidiary of Greencore.

Interchem (Ireland) Ltd. has a quality brand which has been established in Ireland since 1966. It has always had a prominent position in Irish agriculture since its formation. 

The company has a history of successful product introductions in all animal species. In an era when manufacturers are cutting back on direct sales forces and relying more on outside distributors with market capabilities, Interchem stands apart in the Irish market. 

Interchem functions as an active marketing partner, which explores new markets and develops new markets, with its principals. 

In 2011, the business was successfully re-located from Tougher Business Park, Naas, Co. Kildare, to a new warehouse and offices in Cookstown Industrial Estate, Dublin 24. This location is approximately 30 minutes from Dublin airport.

Name: ALPHA: Alimento Evolutivo Canino
Description:
Nuestro amor por los perros, sumado a nuestra preocupación por su salud y prosperidad nos llevó a crear ALPHA. Una solución práctica que te envía la comida ideal para tu familia canina hasta la puerta de tu casa. Es un alimento elaborado con ingredientes de consumo humano y personalizado para cada integrante de tu manada a través de recetas formuladas por nuestra veterinaria experta en nutrición canina. Para chuparse las patas!

Nuestra filosofía se centra en una alimentación biológicamente apropiada para la especie. Te acompañamos muy de cerca en todo momento, guiándote y brindándote las herramientas y conocimientos necesarios para lograr nuestro propósito juntos: darle #LargaVidaAlPerro.
Location: Santa Cruz de la Sierra, Santa Cruz

Name: Pet Partners LLC
Description:
While other group practices promote a one size fits all approach, a Pet Partners’ veterinary hospital is encouraged to retain their unique personal style. We work with practices to remove roadblocks and enable them to reach goals they never thought possible. By having us behind-the-scenes to support operations, doctors and their staff are able to dedicate their attention to creating a superior experience for pets and their owners. We find that makes for a pretty satisfying partnership.

Pet Partners specializes in purchasing neighborhood animal hospitals. We provide each with a wide suite of business management support services. These services are in place to assist animal hospitals in the pursuit of reaching their goals.

Our business was founded by two well-respected veterinarians who practiced for a combined total of almost 40 years and had experienced the opportunities, challenges, inspirations and frustrations that drive a veterinarian and a private practice.

Name: National Human-Animal Bond Awareness Day
Description: A national awareness day that aims to promote the numerous ways in which animals benefit humans through companionship, assistance methods, or work. During the year we will be promoting the charities or organizations that harness the bond, sharing their stories and opportunities to volunteer for their causes. On Sunday 28th July 2024 we will be running virtual talks with animal lovers and healthcare experts. The day will be thoughtful and fun.

Name: European College of Veterinary Pathologists (ECVP)
Description: The European College of Veterinary Pathologists (ECVP) was established in 1995 to advance veterinary pathology. Its purpose is to promote  teaching, research and practice of anatomic veterinary pathology to highest standards. Specialised veterinary pathologists deliver excellence services relating to animal health to the public, governmental and non-governmental institutions and increase the prestige of the veterinary profession.

Name: Tryadd México

Name: FauneVet
Description:
FauneVET est une équipe vétérinaire expérimentée qui se consacre exclusivement à la santé des Nouveaux Animaux de Compagnies (NAC) et des animaux sauvages et exotiques.
La clinique FauneVET est basée au 23 impasse du pré de l'arche à CARQUEFOU (44) et assure également des consultations à Montaigu, Auray et Beaucousé-Angers.

L'équipe FauneVet se déplace dans toute la France pour les visites en parc zoologiques. Notre équipe s'appuie sur son expérience des animaux d’espèces très variées, qu’il s’agisse d’ongulés, de carnivores, de mammifères marins, de primates, de mégavertébrés (éléphants, rhinocéros et girafe), de reptiles ou d’oiseaux. Cette expérience s’accompagne d’une connaissance étendue des contraintes liées au fonctionnement des parcs zoologiques.

Ainsi FauneVet est en mesure d'assurer le suivi sanitaire global de la collection animale, les soins aux animaux, la nutrition, le contrôle et suivi de la reproduction, l'élaboration et mise en oeuvre du plan de prévention et surveillance des maladies. Ce suivi se fait dans le cadre de visites régulières dont la fréquence est fixée selon les besoins de la collection.

--- Soutien aux praticiens vétérinaires de parcs zoologiques :

Certaines procédures nécessitent des moyens techniques et humains supplémentaires. Une équipe FauneVET est en mesure de se déplacer et de projeter sur le terrain des outils diagnostics précieux (échographie, endoscopie, fibroscopie). La sédation et l’examen échographique de l’appareil reproducteur des rhinocéros et éléphants est un exemple de procédure assurée par FauneVET.

--- Permanence vétérinaire :

En l’absence du vétérinaire traitant, FauneVET assure la permanence vétérinaire du parc et garantit ainsi la continuité des soins.

--- Conseils :

FauneVET propose son expertise vétérinaire dans les domaines de la conception des enclos, de la sécurité sanitaire et de la sécurité des personnels.

Providing specialist care & education in a different way:

Sign up to our newsletter:

http://eepurl.com/jxQc3w

Name: Association of Pet Behaviour Counsellors (APBC)
Description:
The APBC is an international network of experienced and qualified animal behaviour counsellors who work on referral from veterinary surgeons to treat behaviour problems in dogs, cats, birds, rabbits, horses and other animals. APBC members are able to offer the time and expertise necessary to investigate the causes of unwanted behaviour in animals, and outline practical treatment plans that are suitable for their clients’ circumstances.

The APBC also runs seminars and workshops for its members, veterinarians, and members of the public interested in the field of animal behaviour therapy and training.

Name: Ducktor
Description:
Ducktor a été créé par trois associés dotés d’une passion commune: les animaux et leur bien-être.

 Chez Ducktor, nous sommes convaincus qu’en facilitant la relation entre le vétérinaire et les propriétaires d'animaux, nous améliorerons le suivi et la médicalisation des animaux, contribuant ainsi à une meilleure prise en charge et à un effet bénéfique en terme de bien-être animal.

 Ducktor propose un ensemble de solutions, entièrement dédiées au métier vétérinaire, innovantes et intégrées dans une seule et même interface. Tout cela pour vous faire gagner du temps!

 Visibilité de la clinique sur Internet, prise de RDV en ligne, tchat, téléconsultation, téléexpertise, régulation en cas d’urgence, envoi systématique de compte rendu, et bien plus encore…

Les services Ducktor ont été pensés pour répondre
 aux propriétaires qui souhaitent profiter d’un meilleur suivi et d’échanges facilités avec leur vétérinaire grâce à des outils de toute dernière génération, simples, interconnectés et en adéquation avec leurs habitudes et leur mode de vie
 aux vétérinaires praticiens, en manque de temps, qui souhaitent disposer de solutions simples, professionnelles, sécurisées et rentables pour améliorer la performance de leur clinique

 Rejoignez Ducktor, gratuitement et sans engagement!

Name: Medgene
Description:
Medgene is an animal health company focused on providing Prescription Platform vaccines to veterinarians and producers.  Medgene serves both livestock and companion-animal practices.

Medgene’s Prescription Platform system ensures that all the ingredients that go into our vaccines are animal origin free.

Name: Fido Fitness and Play
Description: We are an independent pet transportation service certified by the United States Department of Agriculture - located in Washington, DC with services across the entire metropolitan area. We also provide long-distance ground transportation. Our pet taxis are fully insured, air-conditioned, and heated to keep your pet as comfortable as possible. Your pet will be safely transported in a crate to ensure maximum safety. Give us a call now to schedule your next trip with your pet!

Description:
Oncura Partners Diagnostics 

Oncura Partners was established to provide veterinarians with the tools necessary to offer a comprehensive disease management plan to their patients.  With online access to board-certified veterinary specialists, our clients will receive the most advanced treatment protocols and techniques available today in veterinary medicine. Oncura Partners Diagnostics is proud to provide a leading edge Ultrasound technology for all small animal practices. This is the FIRST and ONLY ultrasound equipment that will provide REAL –TIME training and support in your practice.

Name: British Animal Hospital Egypt
Description:

Our growth reflects our mission to make the world a better place for your furry friends.
We offer a wide range of services delivered with the highest global standards, from house calls, X-rays, ultrasound, vaccinations, surgeries, microchip implantation, and blood analysis, to travel certificates, boarding (pet hotel), and flea and tick control programs.

Name: VIC Animal Health
Description:
Year of foundation: VIC GROUP was founded in 1990. During 25 years of successful work has been established its own production of veterinary drugs, has been opened 19 offices in the largest cities of Russia, Belarus and Kazakhstan.

Currently the company is one of the largest and most dynamically developing Russian veterinary companies.
Manufacturing: Private high-tech production VIC GROUP is the research and manufacturing company "VIC - Animal Health", focused mainly on the production of import-substituting products spectrum.

Production facilities are located in Russia and Belarus. The plant complies with GMP (Good Manufacturing Practices) international norms. The achieved level of manufacturing organization confirmed by certification of ISO: ISO 9001 Quality Management System, ISO 14001 Environmental Management System and ISO 18001 for occupational safety management system. Particular attention "VIC - animal health" pays research activities: investments in promising new research and development of veterinary drugs and improvement of existing forms.

Construction of a new industrial complex "VIC - Animal Health" was began in the Belgorod region, in April 2013. The plant will conform the latest requirements of industrial safety and ecological cleanliness.

Product range: "VIC - animal health" presents more than sixty different pharmacological groups of drugs for all kinds of animals: anthelmintics, antibiotics, hormones; coccidiostatics; aseptics, medicines for the treatment of endometritis and prevention of iron deficiency anemia. 
Nine products are innovative and patented.

VIC GROUP is the official distributor of Zoetis (USA); MSD Animal Health (Netherlands); Lallemand (Canada); Novus (USA); MS Schippers (Netherlands); Virbac (France); Biochem (Germany); BioChek (Netherlands) and Hauptner (Germany).

The company's slogan: Concern for animal health is our profession!
Location: Lyubertsy district, poselok Kraskovo, Moscow region

Name: Sealife Response, Rehabilitation and Research (SR³)
Description:
SeaLife Response, Rehabilitation, and Research (SR³) is a non-profit dedicated to promoting the health and welfare of Pacific Northwest marine wildlife such that it can flourish. 

RESPONSE
SR³ assists animals entangled in marine debris, victims of ship strikes, and stranded or injured animals on or near shore.

REHABILITATION
Wildlife rehabilitation helps SR³ monitor environmental and human health while saving endangered species. It also provides direct benefit to the welfare of individual animals.

RESEARCH
SR³'s research builds scientific understanding and trains future generations to protect, restore and conserve our region's unique ecosystems while improving human community health.

Besides the headquarters in Singapore, Zagro has registered offices in Malaysia, Philippines, Thailand, Indonesia, Taiwan, Sri Lanka, Germany and South Africa. Zagro also has local staff presence in Latin America and Middle East.

Name: TAH | The Animal Hospital and Vetshop
Description:

The strength of our network enables us to centralise certain non-clinical functions and support our practices in doing what they do best: providing quality pet care.

We support pet parents and families in giving their pets the best lives they can by providing a high-quality, local veterinary and pet retail service whenever it's needed. As a network of practices, we collaborate to offer the highest levels of clinical expertise and shared knowledge to our customers and patients. Our three 24-hour clinics and 15 practices offer unrivalled access to advanced diagnostics and treatment at all hours of the day.

At the core, TAH’s culture is one of teamwork and togetherness. You are never alone at TAH. Our people-first approach ensures the well-being of our staff and pet parents, creating an environment in which pets can ultimately thrive and live happy, healthy lives. TAH promotes continuous education to develop our people and their careers, including the TAH Graduate Programme that offers learning, personalised coaching and hands-on experience from top specialists and veterinarians at TAH.

Our vision is to be South Africa’s most trusted veterinary brand.

Built on a surface area of 5000 m2, the covered manufacturing unit of 2400 m2 comprises a department for liquid forms, another one for dry forms as well as annexes consisting of storerooms, air conditioning units and maintenance workshops.
The pharmaceutical specialties produced or distributed by ATLAS VETERINAIRE are medicines in the form of solutions, suspension, gels and powders. They cover the full gamut of therapeutic classes: anti-parasitic, antibiotic, anti-inflammatory, vitamins, anticoccidial medicines and nutritional additives.
The company has enough human resources and competencies to carry out its missions in all areas of activity (development, manufacture, distribution, etc.). It has set up a program for the qualification and in-service training of its personnel both internally and externally.

Name: Together for Animals
Description:
Together for Animals is four leading animal welfare charities working throughout the UK and abroad to save pets and working animals from a life of disease, neglect and abuse. 

Because of the kind support and donations Together for Animals receives, we are able to help change the lives of cats, dogs, donkeys, and horses by:

* Fighting to ensure animals are treated with the respect and kindness they deserve
* Finding happy homes for abandoned or unwanted pets and horses
* Campaigning for animal welfare
* Providing free veterinary care for working animals in the world’s poorest communities
* Researching and treating disease and injury in animals

Every animal helped is dependent upon donations from people who share our love of animals. Together we can ensure that all animals have happier, healthier lives. 



All of the funds raised through Payroll Giving, and all of the donations received by Together for Animals are split equally between the five member charities making it an effective way of helping even more animals in need.

• Animal Health Trust – exists to fight disease and injury in animals. Thanks to our pioneering work improving diagnosis, treatment and prevention, horses, dogs and cats are living healthier, happier lives – in the UK and across the world.
• Blue Cross – We find happy homes for abandoned or unwanted pets and we keep pets healthy by promoting welfare and providing treatment. 
• Mayhew – Mayhew is an animal welfare charity working to improve the lives of dogs, cats and the people in our communities – at our Home in London and internationally.
• SPANA – helping to improve the welfare of working animals in the world’s poorest communities, inspiring others to act in the best interests of working animals and providing practical, professional and sustainable solutions.
• World Horse Welfare – an international horse charity that improves the lives of horses in
the UK and around the world through education, campaigning, and hands-on care.

Name: Evidensia Dyrehospital A/S
Description:
Evidensia Danmark er en del af Europas største veterinærkoncern, IVC Evidensia, som i dag har over 1300 dyrehospitaler og klinikker i 11 lande.  

Dyrene og deres ejere er altid i centrum i Evidensia, og vi gør os umage hver dag ved at tilbyde den bedste behandling og service af højest veterinærfaglige kvalitet. 

Vi tilbyder alt fra vaccinationer til komplicerede operationer og udredninger, og har veterinærfagligt personale med den nyeste viden og ekspertise, som hele organisationen kan trække på. Det betyder, at vi kan tilbyde den optimale ydelse uanset, hvilken Evidensia dyreklinik du vælger at besøge. 

Alle i Evidensia Danmark er med i et fællesskab, der investerer massivt i efteruddannelse og løbende geninvesterer i medicinsk udstyr – alt sammen noget, der kommer vores patienter til gode. 

Vi tror på, at kvalitet i veterinærmedicin er vejen frem, og at vores patienter fortjener at få den mest optimale behandling nu og i fremtiden.

Evidensia Danmark har en klar mission. Vi ønsker at være markedsledende, og at tilbyde den nyeste og mest avancerede behandling, til gavn for den enkelte patient og dens familie.

Name: ACCESS Specialty Animal Hospitals
Description:

ACCESS offers a comprehensive range of services and treatments including: Critical Care, Cardiology, Emergency, Endoscopy, Interventional Radiology, Internal Medicine, Surgery, Neurology and Neurosurgery. 

Working with veterinarians and pet owners, ACCESS medical professionals are dedicated to providing the highest quality care to sick or injured pets. ACCESS provides care 24 hours a day, seven days a week by the industries most advanced specialists. Services include full critical care, from advanced diagnostics and monitoring procedures to a state-of-the-art ICU and emergency surgery.

Our associates build positive relationships with patients and their families while keeping pets calm and stable. We do everything possible to make our hospital a home away from home during both inpatient and outpatient surgery and procedures. ACCESS accepts referrals from the continental US and can support critical care transport services 24 hours a day, 365 days a year. 

ACCESS is an extension of the veterinary practices in the community. From spinal surgery to the treatment of epilepsy, hip replacement and neuromuscular disorders, ACCESS is here to supplement veterinarians by providing the best possible care for their clients and patients.

Check out this video to learn more about our hospitals and what it's like to work with us! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6YS72a-fMWQ

Cristiano Bossardi

Name: Państwowy Instytut Weterynaryjny (PIWet-PIB) / National Veterinary Research Institute (NVRI)
Description:
Państwowy Instytut Weterynaryjny – Państwowy Instytut Badawczy (PIWet-PIB) w Puławach to nowoczesna jednostka naukowo-badawcza działająca w dziedzinie medycyny weterynaryjnej od 1945 roku. W 2025 roku PIWet-PIB obchodzi jubileusz 80-lecia. Instytut posiada zaawansowane zaplecze laboratoryjne spełniające najwyższe normy bezpieczeństwa biologicznego. Laboratoria akredytowane są przez PCA zgodnie z normą PN-EN ISO/IEC 17025:2018-02 oraz posiadają atestacje Europejskiego Dyrektoriatu ds. Jakości Leków i Opieki Zdrowotnej (EDQM). W PIWet-PIB pracuje zespół wybitnych ekspertów z zakresu medycyny weterynaryjnej i nauk pokrewnych.
Zakres działalności: diagnostyka chorób zwierząt (ASF, grypa ptaków, wścieklizna, pomór rzekomy drobiu, PRRS, IBR, BVD i inne), badania żywności i pasz (dioksyny, pozostałości leków), ocena jakości produktów leczniczych weterynaryjnych, badania oporności, identyfikacja gatunkowa mięsa, ekspertyzy, szkolenia oraz badania wirusobójczości.

The National Veterinary Research Institute (NVRI) in Pulawy (Poland ), is a modern scientific research institution in the field of veterinary medicine, operating continuously since 1945. In 2025, it celebrates its 80th anniversary.
The Institute is equipped with advanced laboratory infrastructure meeting the highest biosafety standards. Its laboratories are accredited by the PCA in accordance with PN-EN ISO/IEC 17025:2018-02 and hold official certifications from European Directorate for Quality of Medicines and Healthcare (EDQM). The Institute employs a team of leading experts in veterinary medicine and related sciences.
Our core activities include: diagnostics of animal diseases (including ASF, avian influenza, rabies, Newcastle Disease, PRRS, IBR, BVD and others), testing of food and feed (dioxins, drug residues), evaluation of veterinary medicinal products, antimicrobial resistance testing, meat species identification, expert opinions, specialized training, and virucidal efficacy testing.

Name: ROSENGARTEN GmbH
Description:
EINE ENTSCHEIDUNG AUS LIEBE

Wir schaffen eine bleibende Erinnerung der Liebe und Wertschätzung für Haustier und Pferd. Wir sind bundesweit das gesamte Jahr die einfühlsame Tierbestattung an deiner Seite.

Das Thema Tod betrifft uns alle irgendwann. Doch gesprochen wird darüber meist nicht. Tierbestattung ist vielen Menschen noch kein Begriff. Wenn wir allerdings ehrlich mit uns sind: Ist es so weit und ein geliebtes Tier verstirbt, dann weiß man nicht, wohin mit seinen Emotionen. In dieser Phase wünscht man sich einen Ort der Geborgenheit und Sicherheit. Die ROSENGARTEN-Tierbestattung hat genau so einen Ort geschaffen: den Rosengarten.

Für uns ist die Tierbestattung eine würdevolle und sensible Dienstleistung, die wir mit viel Sorgfalt und aufrichtigem Mitgefühl in allen Bereichen ausüben. Unser Qualitätsmanagement (DEKRA geprüft) verspricht jederzeit Sicherheit und Transparenz innerhalb unserer wichtigsten Abläufe. Neue Mitarbeiter werden ausführlich eingearbeitet. Außerdem erhalten unsere Teams regelmäßig Fortbildungen, um den bestmöglichen Service auch weiterhin zu garantieren.    

Wir sind ein freundlicher, fortschrittlicher und krisensicherer Familienbetrieb mit flachen Hierarchien. Wir zeichnen uns durch Ehrlichkeit und persönliche Entwicklung aus. Wir bieten eine hoch emotionale Dienstleistung an, in der mutige sowie ehrgeizige Teamplayer herzlich willkommen sind. Bewerber erwartet ein abwechslungsreiches und dynamisches Arbeitsumfeld mit Fort- und Weiterbildungsmöglichkeiten sowie Raum für eigene Ideen und Strukturen. Ob Tierbestattung, Buchhaltung oder Technik, in den unterschiedlichen Bereichen unseres Unternehmens findet jede/r seinen idealen Platz.

Bewirb Dich noch heute schnell und bequem online über unsere Karriereportal. 
https://www.rosengarten-tierbestattung.de/karriere/stellenanzeigen/

Name: Bioculture Group
Description:
Bioculture Group is a world class player in breeding and supplying naturally born 100% Specific pathogen-free non human primates to premier international pharmaceutical companies, universities and non-clinical research organisations.

Founded in 1985, Bioculture Group is the pioneer in cynomolgus monkey breeding and export in Mauritius. From a purely Mauritius-based family business, the organisation has steadily expanded over the years. We currently operate in Mauritius through Bioculture (Mauritius) Ltd (BCM) and in Florida, since 2012, through BC US LLC.

A core mission has been at the heart of our endeavours for the past four decades: “Caring for Life”. Bioculture Group cares for the life of the animals under our care and ultimately for that of hundreds of millions of people around the world who benefit from ground breaking medical research involving non human primates.

We care for the life of our employees by making sure that they work in a fulfilling environment as they gather around our shared values of Humility, Integrity, Compassion, Perseverance and Team Spirit.

Bioculture Group also cares for the life of the community and the environment by committing resources to life-changing local projects and protecting the biodiversity in Mauritius and neighbouring islands through conservation and education efforts.

All our 9 sites in Mauritius and 3 in the US implement the highest standards of animal welfare, veterinary care and husbandry. All our operations are AAALAC accredited and ISO certified while our housing facilities strictly comply with European ETS 123 norms.

Bioculture Group is now positioning itself as a new operator in the emerging biotechnology industry in Mauritius. We aim to develop non clinical research capabilities both in Mauritius and in the US. To achieve this ambition, we plan on attracting talented research and medical professionals from across the world.

Name: Bahrain Veterinary Centre
Description: Bahrain Veterinary Centre is one of the best medical centres specialised in providing pet care services in Bahrain. All our operations are performed by highly skilled & experienced veterinarians who are continuously evolving to stay at the top of specialised veterinary care for pets and provide the best possible service and care.

Name: JR Veterinary
Description:
We are a family run Recruitment Agency that specialise in finding the right role for Veterinary Professionals. We pride ourselves on our transparent and dedicated approach to supporting both clients and candidates in the recruitment journey.

JR Veterinary has a transparent and positive approach to recruitment, which allows Veterinary Professionals to progress in a leading market. JR strives to use reliable family values to build professional and happy relationships with our clients, candidates, and community, which in turn, will enhance the veterinary sector.

Name: viggoVet
Description:
viggoVet is an Clinical Veterinary AI-driven PMS that is Veterinary Business Intelligence Platform, a new generation that addresses the problems and limitations of traditional veterinary practice software.

viggoVet includes every core PMS function—plus powerful new capabilities that turn your clinic into a smart, scalable, data-driven business.

Features:
- SOAP Notes, prescriptions, labs, and imaging in one view.
- Full control of purchases, expenses, appointments.
- The First True Veterinary AI that has been trained by over 300 vet specialists. 
- Intelligent workflows and automations.
- Full audit logs start from the module and go down to the one-step level.
- Native UI support of 25+ languages and more to come.
- 24/7 team support access
- Swiss Data Privacy and Encryption. We don't share, use, or sell your data.
- Dashboards with revenue, costs, and KPIs
- Alert system for anomalies
- And much more!

Name: Vet Alliance
Description:
Vet Alliance is Canada's largest network of independently owned veterinary practices. Our member hospitals have access to:
•	Discount and reward programs with Vet Alliance partner companies
•	High quality continuing education for all staff members

We have negotiated partnerships with a wide variety of companies in the veterinary industry, including: 
•	pharmaceutical
•	veterinary diet
•	equipment and instrument suppliers
•	compounding
•	merchant services
•	insurance
•	payroll services
•	pet insurance and more….. 

Vet Alliance member hospitals choose the partner companies they wish to purchase from, and earn superior discounts and rewards from these companies.  The more partners they participate with, the better the return. 

We also coordinate an exceptional continuing education program.  All staff have full access to all CE events.  Each year we bring a variety of speakers to various locations across the country, and we host a series of webinars throughout the year.  Event topics are a mixture of medical, business, customer service and communication talks. 

Vet Alliance is not a distributor, does not process orders and does not warehouse products.  Members continue to purchase products from their current suppliers.

Name: Bionova SAC
Description:
Bionova SAC, cuenta con 9 años en el mercado pecuario nacional, somos una empresa distribuidora de productos veterinarios de reconocidas empresas transnacionales como: Pfizer, Alltech, Bayer, Dex Iberica, VMD, Intervet Shering-Ploug, complementando así nuestro portafolio de productos, en el rubro de biológicos aviares.
Por lo mismo, gracias a la confianza de nuestros proveedores - socios estratégicos, podemos mencionar que contamos con un amplio portafolio de productos en distintas categorías: desinfectantes, promotores de crecimiento, secuestrantes de micotoxinas, anti-fúngicos, antibióticos, vacunas aviares, entre otros; que nos permite atender al mercado avícola, porcino y ganadero, brindando a nuestros clientes soluciones innovadoras y eficaces, que satisfagan sus necesidades de salud y bienestar en los animales y contribuyan así al éxito de sus operaciones y por consiguiente al desarrollo del país.

Name: MAI Animal Health
Description: Mark Anderson and Associates Inc. represents a family of multi-faceted manufacturers and brands that service the Animal Health Industry, under one common ownership. Founded by Mark L. Anderson, DVM, Genesis Industries Inc. draws on more than four decades of veterinary expertise with a commitment to improving both the quality and efficiency of animal healthcare solutions. With our veterinary experience and manufacturing expertise, we supply innovative, practical solutions to enhance the lives of animals and their caregivers.

Name: European College of Laboratory Animal Medicine (ECLAM)
Description: The primary objective of ECLAM is to promote high standards for laboratory animal medicine, by providing a structured framework to achieve certification of professional competence; and by stressing the need for scientific inquiry and exchange via progressive and continuing educational programmes.

Name: NVA Pet Resorts
Description: At NVA, our 25 years of animal care experience doesn't stop with veterinary medicine. We've developed a dynamic network of pet resorts across the country, offering boarding, daycare and grooming services. We believe in investing in the full spectrum of pet care services because pets are not just one of our many interests—they are our only interest. As a trusted leader in pet care, our team is uniquely qualified to ensure the pets who stay at our resorts are happy and well cared for. As true animal lovers, our mission is to ensure every pet receives the same love, care, and playtime they receive at home.

Name: Walco International
Description: Walco International, Inc. specializes in providing quality service and an extensive selection of products to dairies, beef, swine, and poultry producers. With over 60 locations across the U.S., there is always a Walco near enough to meet your needs! A professional and experienced sales force will assist you in finding that special product or everyday essential item.

Name: Pet Happy
Description:
Pet Happy es una empresa pensada en acercar a las familias el cuidado de sus mascotas, por ello reunimos un solo lugar todo lo que nuestros animales puedan necesitar.

Nuestra misión es asegurar la mejor calidad posible son: junto con el profesionalismo de nuestros veterinarios; la mayor variedad disponible de productos farmacéuticos, de aseo, alimenticios y accesorios a su elección. Siempre ofreciendole a nuestros clientes un servicio accesible comodo y amable.

Nuestros valores hacen de PetHappy un lugar centrado en la tenencia responsable de mascotas, por ello concebimos la medicina preventiva como mejor opción para evitar enfermedades, sufrimiento y gastos excesivos; la opinión y educación de nuestros clientes para mejorar el cuidado de sus animales; y la capacidad de establecer una relación cercana, cordial, cálida y personalizada.

En PetHappy encontrará un espacio donde la salud y el bienestar de su mascota son lo más importante. Es por ello que nuestros locales están abiertos todos los días del año, desde las 10:00 hrs. hasta las 21:00 hrs, con atención profesional, expedita y especializada del más alto nivel, precios convenientes y en un entorno acogedor.

Name: Kawell USA
Description:
Kawell USA cares for the total welfare of your animal. We develop our products based on the best elements of nature by adding passion, quality, and most importantly love in each detail to offer the best product in the market. 
Kawell's mission is to innovate in the development of animal care products based on copper and natural extracts that will enhance performance, protection, and comfort for the horses and pets all while caring for the environment. Our horseshoes, inserts, and copper curry brush are made of a special copper alloy devised to give your horse a better quality of life from the very first day of use. They have bactericidal and fungicidal properties certified by the Environmental Protection Agency #82012-3. Our Natural healing shampoo and oral/topical sprays have been developed to help heal and maintain your pet and horses skin/coat in the most natural way possible without running into the risk of harsh chemicals or allergic reactions your pet and horse may have. 
Kawell USA Cares because YOU care.

https://kawellusa.com/

Name: Clinica Veterinaria Gran Sasso
Description: La Clinica Veterinaria Gran Sasso nasce nel 1986 per opera dei fondatori: la Dr.ssa Maria Cristina Crosta ed il Dott. Claudio Bussadori. Il 3 dicembre 1998 è stata inaugurata l’attuale sede che ha una superficie di circa 900 mq. Offre un servizio di Pronto Soccorso e degenza 24h per 365 giorni l’anno.

Name: Clinique vétérinaire Olliolis
Description: La clinique vétérinaire OLLIOLIS est un centre de soins vétérinaire recevant exclusivement des cas référés. Cela signifie que c’est sur demande d'un vétérinaire traitant ou avec son accord explicite que nous pouvons recevoir les animaux qui nous sont adressés. La clinique est structurée en différents services travaillant en étroite collaboration : médecine, chirurgie, neurologie, dermatologie, pathologie du comportement et imagerie (radiologie, échographie, scanner, IRM).

Name: Agrivet
Description:
A Agrivet é uma rede de Unidades de Medicina Veterinária, concebida para estar próxima dos animais e dos seus tutores, respondendo às necessidades de saúde e de bem-estar animal. Pode encontrar-nos em Torres Vedras, Mafra e Leiria. 

MISSÃO
Disponibilizar os cuidados de saúde para os animais de companhia, através de uma vasta diversidade de serviços e produtos ao melhor preço, promovendo a relação afetiva e de confiança.

Name: Hospital Veterinário Cão Bernardo
Description:
Aqui no Hospital Veterinário Cão Bernardo você encontra veterinários altamente qualificados para atender o seu companheiro 24 horas por dia.

Nosso centro hospitalar possui uma infraestrutura de primeira: Consultórios de atendimento, medicações, uma completa e moderna internação, diversos exames, raio-x, Ultra sonografia, laboratório com equipamentos da melhor qualidade, centro cirúrgico completo e moderno, e os melhores equipamentos para as mais diversas especialidades (internação semi intensiva – monitoramento de lactato, delta TPC, encubadora aquecida, suporte de oxigênio, monitoramento cardíaco e parâmetros vitais, anestesia inalatória com ventilação mecânica, monitor cardíaco, aferição de pressão arterial com doppler vascular, oximetria, monitoramento pós cirúrgico).

Agora também com um diferencial para o atendimento de felinos: Consultório e sala de espera feito especialmente para a tranquilidade e conforto de nossos gatinhos.

Contamos com uma equipe de profissionais experientes e aptos a atender emergências, casos de maior complexidade, casos de rotina, vacinas, check ups e atendimento clínico nas variadas especialidades.

Estamos prontos para cuidar do seu pet a qualquer hora!
Location: São Bernardo do Campo, São Paulo

Name: Artevet
Description:
Artevet is a global force in the animal health industry with efforts ranging from healthcare to technology. Artevet specializes in animal nutrition while constantly innovating and developing solutions to help the community around us.
