Name: Calier Portugal
Description:
“Calier é um laboratório de referência no sector da saúde animal. O seu compromisso é melhorar a qualidade e quantidade de proteína animal que a população consome, assim como zelar pelo bem-estar dos animais de companhia, dos seus proprietários e famílias.
Com este objetivo, e desde a sua criação em 1968, tem se centrado na investigação, desenvolvimento, fabrico e comercialização de produtos farmacológicos e biológicos para animais de produção e de companhia, assim como em colocar ao alcance dos profissionais do sector veterinário serviços que facilitem o seu trabalho diário.
Com sede em Les Franqueses del Vallès (Barcelona), a Calier conta com uma ampla rede de filiais e tem atividade comercial na Europa, América Latina, Médio Oriente e Ásia. 
Com fabricas de produção de vanguarda em Espanha, Colômbia y Uruguai, todos os seus processos regem-se por rigorosas normas de produção (GMPs).”

Name: Oradell Animal Hospital
Description:
EMERGENCY 24/7 - SPECIALTY - PRIMARY CARE

Established in 1961 by Drs. Gary Johnson and Anthony Palminteri, Oradell Animal Hospital has grown into one of the largest, most technologically advanced, state-of-the-art veterinary facilities in the country. Our award winning hospital, located in Bergen County, NJ, is open, staffed and equipped to see emergencies and referrals 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.

Name: VECCUS
Description:
Our goal is to bring together clinicians, technicians, and students from all specialties and styles of veterinary practice who share a common passion for the use of point of care ultrasound. Our mission is to promote the safe and effective use of veterinary POCUS and increase its use in all practice settings, by all levels of users, and improve training programs and standards of care in the application of veterinary POCUS. 

We support further research exploring and validating the application of clinical veterinary POCUS by specialists and non-specialists alike as a safe evidence-based practice, and support the development of innovative ultrasound techniques and education methods to improve veterinary patient care. 
We hope to encourage and support veterinarians and related health care professionals to integrate and utilize veterinary POCUS with success and confidence.  We proudly encourage novices, faculty, and students who have a desire to increase their ultrasound confidence to ask questions, challenge and hopefully embrace veterinary POCUS.  We are hoping to be able to sponsor veterinary POCUS research projects and workshops in the future.

Name: Family Pet Medical Center
Description:
At Family Pet Medical Center, we believe every pet deserves exceptional, compassionate care — day or night. As South Florida’s trusted 24/7 veterinary hospital, we’re proud to provide comprehensive services for dogs, cats, birds, and exotic pets under one roof.

Our experienced team of veterinarians and support staff are dedicated to keeping your pets healthy through:
 24/7 Emergency & Urgent Care
 Preventive Wellness Exams (including FREE first wellness exam for new patients)
 Surgery, Diagnostics, and Advanced Imaging
 Exotic Pet Care (birds, reptiles, small mammals, and more)
 International Health Certificates and Travel Support

Located in Fort Lauderdale, we combine state-of-the-art medical technology with a personal, family-oriented approach. From first visits to lifelong wellness programs, we’re here to be your partner in every stage of your pet’s journey.

 Why Choose FPMC?

Open 24/7 with a dedicated emergency team.

Compassionate care in a warm, welcoming environment.

Convenient services including Cherry financing, on-site pharmacy, and VIP Exam Program with unlimited visits.

A passionate, animal-loving team committed to your pet’s health and happiness.

 Visit us at 2750 North Federal Highway, Fort Lauderdale
 Contact us: Info@FamilyPetMedicalCenter.com
 | (954) 567-2500
 Learn more: FamilyPetMedicalCenter.com

At Family Pet Medical Center, we don’t just treat pets — we treat family.

Distribuição e representação de aditivos nutricionais e medicamentos, além de serviços através de corpo técnico especializado.

Name: American Veterinary Supply Co. [AmeriVet]

Name: Nutriliq
Description: Located in Kortrijk, Belgium, Nutriliq specializes in creating high-quality private label feed supplements and cosmetics designed for pets. Our team of experts is dedicated to developing innovative products, from urinary health chews for cats to calming supplements for dogs and luxurious coat care shampoos. Our mission? To empower pet care brands with tailor-made, science-backed formulations that enhance pet health and well-being. Nutriliq’s products are crafted with natural ingredients, quality-tested, and fully customizable to meet the unique needs of our clients and their market demands. Discover how Nutriliq can help you expand your product range with trusted, effective solutions made right here in Belgium!

Name: Veterinarian Partners
Description: Veterinarian Partners is a private equity-backed, Midwest-based veterinarian support and partnership organization dedicated to improving the lives of veterinarians by helping them achieve their professional and personal goals. Our leading suite of non-clinical support services is complemented by a differentiated commitment to True partnership, rooted in flexibility, transparency, and alignment of interests among all team members. Veterinarian Partners accelerates the professional growth of all Partner veterinarians and support staff members through continuing education sponsorship, hands-on mentorship, and long-term leadership development within the organization.

Name: PANACEA
Description:
Panacea es la compañía líder en comercialización y distribución de productos específicos del canal veterinario en Argentina.

Con más de 30 años de trayectoria, se ha consolidado como un actor fundamental del sector, a partir de un profundo conocimiento del mercado, una articulación eficiente y transparente entre las principales marcas y los profesionales de todo el país, y la implementación de soluciones que favorezcan la práctica profesional y contribuyan a su desarrollo.

CO PANACEA is a veterinary company based out of Austria 796 , Troncos del Talar - Parque Industrial TIGRE, TIGRE, Buenos Aires, Argentina.

Name: Trans Feed Futuro Lab Sp. z o.o. S.K.A.
Description:
Natural and Safe Feed Solutions for Livestock – Trans Feed Futuro Lab
We are a leading Polish manufacturer of premium feed additives and supplements designed to address animal health challenges in a natural, non-invasive, and sustainable way. Our product lines cater to the specific needs of cattle, poultry, and pigeons, ensuring optimal health, performance, and well-being.
Our production facility, located at Graniczna 8, 06-500 Mława, Poland, utilizes advanced technology and stringent quality standards to create innovative and effective feed solutions.
Three Core Product Lines:
1.	Cattle (Cows/Calves): Feed supplements and additives that support immunity, digestion, reproduction, and milk production.
2.	Poultry: Solutions aimed at enhancing growth, immunity, and feed efficiency for optimal performance.
3.	Pigeons: Specialized supplements designed for vitality, energy, and recovery, particularly for racing and breeding pigeons.
Additionally, we offer customized solutions through our private-label production, allowing partners to create products tailored to their specific market requirements while benefiting from our expertise and advanced manufacturing capabilities.
Partnership with Expertise
Trans Feed collaborates closely with the University of Warmia and Mazury in Olsztyn, combining innovative research, laboratory testing, and educational initiatives. 
This partnership ensures that our products incorporate the latest advancements in animal nutrition and feed technology.
Commitment to Quality and Safety
We hold the prestigious GMP+ Feed Safety Assurance certificate (GMP013999), certifying the production of safe and high-quality feed materials and compound feed. 
Recognized by AIC UFAS, this certification reflects our unwavering commitment to global feed safety standards.
At Trans Feed Futuro Lab, we combine innovation, sustainability, and a focus on animal well-being to deliver feed solutions that drive success for our partners worldwide.

Name: Ontario Veterinary Group
Description:
About the Ontario Veterinary Group:
In 2000, a small group of Toronto veterinarians came together to be able to share expertise and maximize
individual strengths to create a model where high quality medicine and superior customer service is the priority.
Since then, the Ontario Veterinary Group has grown to 6 hospitals in 3 communities in Southern Ontario.
With centralized management and administrative support, our team of 160 professionals and health care team
members are able to focus on sharing of knowledge and expertise to best serve our clients and patients.
OVG strives to be the preeminent veterinary care model.

Our Mission
We are devoted to nurturing the human-animal bond by exceeding the expectations of our clients. In order to strengthen and sustain long-term relationships our dedicated healthcare team practices the highest and most innovative standards of veterinary medicine.We consider it a privilege to care for your pet.

Name: ADIVIT
Description:
In ADIVIT we make research, development, production and trading of additives intended to the leading feed companies.
Our company excels thanks to our policy of offering solutions by means of specific products customized to the needs of each client. We achieve this by combining innovation, creativity and technology. For that purpose, ADIVIT counts with a significant R&D+i department, where research projects are managed and developed. Such projects involve from creating new products till the continuous improvement of their quality.

Name: Cara Veterinary
Description:
BECOME A PART OF THE CARA FAMILY. We are a family-owned network of premier veterinary practices in the Pacific Northwest, focused on providing the highest quality of care for each pet patient, and building a long-term home for doctors, staff, and pet parents. What’s best for our people and our pet patients is the cornerstone of every decision we make.
 
While we are a group of hospitals, we retain the attitude and spirit of a neighborhood veterinarian. We take what’s good about combining the resources of multiple practices and reinvest our success in the people and animals we are here to serve. We believe that being good means doing good at every level, from our leadership support team to the local communities where we live and work. Our values-driven approach to business keeps us aligned with our shared humanity and love for animals. 
 
Our family has a long time horizon, and unlike many veterinary practice ownership groups, our focus is on the long-term value of a hospital. We are dedicated to the Pacific Northwest, and provide each of our practices with individualized support to drive success. At Cara, success is measured through employee satisfaction and customer experience. 
 
Part of the support provided to our partner practices also includes knowledge and resources from our close relationships with some of the most well-respected healthcare institutions in the world and from our decades of experience in building businesses to national and international scale. At Cara, we aspire to be a different kind of partner, and the best kind of friend.

Name: VSH Hong Kong
Description:
VSH Hong Kong (Veterinary Specialty Hospital of Hong Kong) is the first and only specialty referral hospital in Hong Kong, bringing genuine referral medicine to Hong Kong’s veterinary community.

We are committed to providing specialized, expert veterinary care for complex medical problems and 24/7 urgent care and emergency services to the pets of Hong Kong. We believe in the important relationship between the pet owner, their family veterinarian, our urgent care & emergency veterinarians, and our specialists, in order to provide the most comprehensive collaborative veterinary care for your pet.

In April 2020, VSH joined the family of Mars Veterinary Health business units that includes a network of approximately 65,000 veterinary professionals globally. At VSH, your pet's medical illness is cared for by our experienced veterinary team in Hong Kong, and should they need, our team have access to an extensive network of veterinary professionals and specialists in over 2000+ hospitals worldwide, including North America, United Kingdom, Europe, Japan and in South East Asia.

Name: Inventory Ally
Description:
Unlock Efficiency and Maximize Profits with Inventory Ally! 

At Inventory Ally, we are on a mission to revolutionize inventory management for veterinary hospitals. We believe that the valuable time and resources spent on inventory should be redirected towards what truly matters—providing exceptional care to your patients and growing your business.

Managing inventory can be a complex and stressful task, but it doesn't have to be. Our innovative software solution is specifically designed for veterinary hospitals. With Inventory Ally, you can say goodbye to wasteful spending and inefficiencies in your inventory management processes.

Our powerful software utilizes advanced forecasting techniques to accurately predict demand for each item in your inventory. By understanding your hospital's unique needs, we guide you on optimal reorder amounts, ensuring that you have the right products at the right time.

By partnering with Inventory Ally, veterinary hospitals have saved tens of thousands of dollars annually on inventory expenses. Our solution helps reduce the high cost of goods sold (COGS) and eliminates the storage issues and waste caused by product loss.

We understand the challenges that veterinary hospitals face, such as inadequate training, incomplete inventory functionality, and time wasted on auditing systems. That's why we have developed Inventory Ally to address these pain points directly. Our user-friendly software streamlines the inventory management process, saving you hundreds of staff hours and eliminating guesswork.

With Inventory Ally as your trusted ally, you can free up resources to invest in your most valuable assets—your people, equipment, and facility. Imagine what you could achieve with the additional time, money, and peace of mind gained from optimizing your inventory.

Discover the hidden power of efficient inventory management today. Schedule a demo with us at www.inventoryally.com to see how our solution can transform your business.

Name: PetCentric Health
Description:
Elevated access to predictable and affordable pet healthcare is necessary for both veterinarians and pet families. The predominant pet care payment models are outdated, unpopular, and do not improve access to care for pets – resulting in poor preventative care compliance and delays in the treatment of acute issues.
  
Our subscription-based care plan solution delivers a win-win for veterinarians and pet families. We are disrupting the status quo by helping veterinarians displace an archaic fee-for-service model with an answer that meets consumers where they are and elevates access to high-quality, predictable, and affordable pet care. 
 
Guided by a mission-driven culture and fueled by expertise, scalable technology, and unmatched customer service, PetCentric Health is accelerating with:   

Primed coast–to-coast pet health market 
Technology-driven care intelligence 
Compelling growth velocity and potential 
Scale-based customer relationship model 
Powerful recurring revenue growth outlook
Proven disruptive B2B and B2C solution

Won't you join us?

Name: Uranolabpt
Description:
Laboratório de análises clínicas veterinárias.
A medicina veterinária está em constante evolução, sendo cada vez mais os exames introduzidos na prática clínica para obter um diagnóstico rigoroso e profissional. Oferecemos-lhe uma vasta gama de provas que cobrem praticamente todas as suas necessidades.
Assumindo o aconselhamento veterinário como valor acrescentado, somos o seu laboratório próximo: aquele que entende o seu trabalho, as exigências dos seus clientes e a importância de conseguir respostas rápidas e fiáveis para as suas questões e consultas.
Contamos com uma equipa altamente qualificada em Medicina Interna, Anatomia Patológica, Imunologia, Biologia Molecular, Hematologia, Bioquímica, Microbiologia.
A Uranolabpt é uma empresa concebida exclusivamente por e para médicos veterinários.
Para nós, os médicos veterinários são e sempre serão o mais importante.

Name: National Bio Vet Laboratory
Description: Independent full service reference laboratory serving veterinarians worldwide.

Name: Veterinary Pharmaceutical Solutions
Description:
•	Veterinary Pharmaceutical Solutions(VPS) is the market leader in the livestock industry for pharmaceutical compounding solutions, based in St. Peter, Minnesota. 
•	VPS is known throughout the veterinary community for its focus on innovation, service, and quality.
•	The roots of VPS stretch back more than 110 years and include four generations of compounding pharmacists. This history paired with a strong commitment to our customers has been the driving force behind Veterinary Pharmaceutical Solutions since its inception in 1995 as Vet Rx. 
•	Our product portfolio includes exclusive and patented solutions for the delivery of antibiotics, minerals and pain medications.

Name: Toronto Animal Health Partners Emergency and Specialty Hospital
Description:
Providing access to human quality diagnostic and therapeutic platforms combined with leading clinician oversight and training, our veterinarians are equipped to exceed current quality of care standards and veterinary healthcare outcomes.

The pace of technological change and advancement in healthcare innovations require us to be intimately involved with solution providers.  Integration enables our veterinarians to lead the profession, while providing valuable healthcare insights to our partners for the future of better care for all.

Communication, comfort and care is our promise to our pet owners.  We are expected to be partners in the health and wellness of companion animals, the foundation of which is respect and openness

Name: Verbund Unabhängiger Kleintierkliniken e.V.
Description: Der Verbund Unabhängiger Kleintierkliniken e.V. (VUK) vertritt die Interessen von privaten und inhabergeführten Kleintierkliniken, Tiergesundheitszentren und auf Klinikniveau arbeitenden Kleintierpraxen. Er versteht sich als Arbeitgeberverbund und entwickelt Strategien und Lösungen für die Zukunftsfähigkeit seiner Mitglieder. Im Mittelpunkt der Arbeit des VUK stehen das Wohl und die Stärkung des tierärztlichen Berufsstandes, Impulse für die innovative Tiermedizin, die Aufwertung des Arbeitgeberimages und die gezielte Förderung der angestellten TierärztInnen, der Tiermedizinischen Fachangestellten und der Studierenden in einem starken bundesweiten Netzwerk. Jedes Mitglied im VUK behält seine Individualität und seine Selbständigkeit.

Name: Viking Veterinary Services, LLC.
Description:
Viking Veterinary Services, Small Animal Hospital announced that Dr. Whitney Heiken, Veterinarian, will be the Medical Director and lead Veterinarian at, 840 Harleysville Pike, Suite 1, and, specializing in Wellness Visits, Illness Services, Surgical Procedures and overall Pet Health.
Dr. Whitney Heiken, originally from Ohio, completed her Bachelor of Science in Zoology degree at Michigan State University before enrolling at the Tufts Cummings School of Veterinary Medicine for her Masters of Science in Animals and Public Policy and Doctor of Veterinary Medicine degrees.
She worked as a veterinary technician for several years before becoming a veterinarian. After graduating with her DVM in 2017, she practiced near Boston, Massachusetts for several years before moving to Pennsylvania in 2020. Dr. Heiken has strong interests in preventative medicine, pain management and client education and has a passion for sharing her knowledge of animals with her clients so that they are truly involved in their pets’ care plans.
Outside of work, Dr. Heiken enjoys fishing and golfing, though her biggest hobby is training and competing in dog agility with her two Swedish Vallhunds, Valkyrie and Fish; so far she has competed in the AKC Agility National Championships and the Westminster Masters Agility Championship, and she has been invited to the AKC Agility Invitational for 2022.

Name: Al Galayel Equine Center
Description:
Established in 2017, Al Galayel Equine Center provides a high-quality service dedicated to reproduction and fertility of mares and stallions in the State of Qatar. Providing a team of highly skilled veterinarians applying the latest methods and techniques in this field, and a state of the art brand new equipment and laboratory and introduce new methods and technique in this field.
 
In addition, in 2018 we establish a veterinary pharmaceutical distributions and veterinary pharmacy with a variety of products and medications.


OUR GOALS AND STRATEGY

The main target of our service is to improve the breeding program in Qatar by offering an updated high-quality medical service and providing a diversity of stallion bloodlines in our center and held the largest Arabian semen bank of the Middle East.  Providing technical support and awareness for the local breeder by making annual seminars regarding horse health and nutrition given by the best professionals in these fields.  Meet the needs of all the necessities of horse supplements, feeds, and medicines without any shortage.

Biocan Pet’s es un laboratorio creado por y para veterinarios. Contamos con un comité de expertos, profesional y especializado, que además de mantenernos en contacto directo con el día a día de la clínica y el hospital, participa activamente en el desarrollo de nuestros productos y en el de los estudios necesarios para evaluar su calidad y eficacia.

La formación es nuestra mayor premisa. Por ello, ofrecemos a nuestros clientes veterinarios más fieles cursos y talleres impartidos por un equipo de especialistas, actualizado en los últimos avances en el sector.

Name: ANIMAL HEALTH EXPO FORUM
Description:
ANIMAL HEALTH EXPO FORUM
Onde o mundo da Saúde Animal se encontra. 

É o evento líder em equipamentos veterinários, soluções, produtos, serviços e tecnologias para Saúde e Nutrição Animal para a América Latina.

O evento é realizado em formatos de congressos científicos internacionais, incluindo conferências paralelas sobre gestão e educação executiva para indústrias de saúde animal, e traz a maior feira comercial com mais de 100 marcas expositoras, desde startups a empresas nacionais e internacionais classificadas na Fortune 500.

A área de exposição se destaca por ser a porta de entrada para novos produtos, serviços, tendências e inovações para o segmento médico veterinário, indo além das fronteiras do Brasil e da América Latina, trazendo marcas da América do Sul, América Central, América do Norte, Europa e Ásia.

O evento se consolidou como a principal plataforma presencial para realização de negócios, networking e além, somos movidos pelo objetivo de gerar, disseminar e manter conhecimento técnico, estratégico e econômico para o desenvolvimento da Medicina Veterinária Brasileira em âmbito global.

Name: Massapê Distribuidora
Description:

O solo Massapê traduz a essência da nossa empresa, onde buscamos a valorização e crescimento pessoal e profissional dos nossos colaboradores, e do mercado que atuamos. Name: Total Practice Solutions Group
Description:
Veterinary Practice Sales and Transitions

We realize that the sale or purchase of a veterinary practice is one of the most important financial decisions you make in your lifetime. Thus, the need for information, consultation, and other professional support is needed when involved in this life changing event.  Total Practice Solutions Group is here to hold your hand and offer sound guidance throughout the process.

Total Practice Solutions Group is made up of ten veterinary, attorney and long term professional business brokers who have completed countless successful practice sales and combine over 100 years of expertise.  Many of us were owners or still own practices.  We are licensed real estate brokers that bring an expertise and network second to none.  Our creative thinking helps design custom structures that save buyers and sellers time and money. TPSG is the largest & fastest growing brokerage in the country.

You personally spend years building relationships with staff, clients, and colleagues. During those practice years, you work hard in developing surgical, medical, and management skills. The one area lacking is in selling and buying practices.  Most doctors do this once in their career. And just like your surgical skills honed over the years, TPSG has sharpened our skills with scores of successful practice transitions.  Our goal at TPSG is to deliver essential information to our veterinary colleagues in an easy to understand and effective manner.

Name: Vet Link
Description:
Vet Link is a groundbreaking referral vet clinic network that is revolutionizing the way veterinary care is delivered. Our unique approach involves partnering with leading vet hospitals to ensure access to the highest level of expertise and cutting-edge treatments. 

As a part of Vet Link, our clinics are strategically located in various neighborhoods, making it convenient for pet owners to find a nearby vet hub. We understand the importance of accessibility, and our goal is to bring exceptional veterinary care closer to our customers' doorstep.

At Vet Link, we believe in fostering strong connections between pet owners and our team of skilled veterinarians. We prioritize building relationships and trust, which is why we encourage customers to schedule in-person appointments to meet our dedicated vets networks. Whether it's routine check-ups, preventive care, or specialized treatments, Vet Link is committed to providing exceptional veterinary services that prioritize the well-being and happiness of pets. Name: Al Rawdah Veterinary Clinic
Description:
Al Rawdah Veterinary Clinic (RVC) is the oldest Small Animal Pet Veterinary clinic in Al Ain. 

Our clinic offers a very wide range of Veterinary services for Pets, Exotic Animals and Falcons. 

We have state of the art technology and equipment that enables us to provide your pet with the highest healthcare standards.

RVC's services and facilities are designed to assist in routine preventive care for young, healthy pets; early detection and treatment of disease as your pet ages; and complete medical and surgical care as necessary during the pet's lifetime. 

We are focused on Cats and Dogs with a special section for Birds (parrots, pigeons, canaries, exotic birds), Reptiles (lizards, iguanas, tortoises, turtles) and small mammals (rabbits, guinea pigs, chinchillas, rats and hamsters).

Here at Al Rawdah Veterinary Clinic, we take pet care very seriously. Your pet’s health and well being is very important to us and we will take every step to give your pet the best possible care. Our licensed veterinarians are experienced in all types of conditions and treatments.

We understand the special role your pet plays in your family and are dedicated to becoming your partner in your pet’s health care. 

Our goal is to practice the highest quality medicine and surgery with compassion and provide client education. 

Our healthcare team is committed to providing personal attention to the unique concerns of each individual pet owner.

It is also part of Emirates Food Industries which holds diversified interests in the agriculture, animal feed, and dairy industries. Which also consists of more than 10 companies and partnership models.

Name: Hellenic Veterinary Medical Society
Description:
Η Ελληνική Κτηνιατρική Εταιρεία (ΕΚΕ) είναι το αρχαιότερο επιστημονικό σωματείο στην Ελλάδα με ίδρυση το 1924. 

Η ΕΚΕ  από την ίδρυσή της μέχρι σήμερα έχει σαν βασική της αποστολή την επιστημονική μεταπτυχιακή κατάρτιση των Ελλήνων κτηνιάτρων σε όλους τους τομείς της κτηνιατρικής επιστήμης.

Απαρτίζεται από τρεις κλάδους:
- Ζώα συντροφιάς
- Παραγωγικά ζώα
- Τρόφιμα/Δημόσια Υγεία

Η ΕΚΕ πάντα στην πρώτη γραμμή των εξελίξεων λειτουργεί υπό το πρίσμα των αρχών της Ενιαίας  Υγείας (One Health concept) όπου η υγεία του ανθρώπου, των ζώων και το περιβάλλον αποτελούν έννοιες αλληλένδετες και αλληλοεξαρτώμενες. 

Με αυτό το γνώμονα οι δράσεις της αφορούν στην υγεία των ζώων, των ανθρώπων και το περιβάλλον καθώς  ο ρόλος των κτηνιάτρων στην προάσπιση της δημόσιας υγείας είναι καθοριστικός.

Name: Midwest Veterinary Supply, formerly known as Victor Medical Company
Description:
Victor Medical Company is the largest privately owned veterinary distributor in California, Arizona, Nevada, and Pacific Northwest. We are also a family company, founded by people who believe in excellence and who are dedicated to providing our customers with exceptional service. It is how we began over 41 years ago, and how we continue to grow today.

-1966 Victor and Fran Louchios began selling quality surgical instruments from their garage.
-1978 Victor Medical Company began selling pharmaceuticals establishing itself as a full line veterinary distributor.
-2002 Victor Medical Company moved into a state of the art warehouse facility and implemented an automated order fulfillment system.

Victor Medical Company has developed long standing relationships with all major industry vendors as well as hundreds of other niche vendors.

Victor Medical Company and their employees share an enormous respect for our customer's clinics which provide quality veterinary care. We realize that maintaining proper levels of supplies and products is essential to running your business. Therefore, our primary focus is to streamline your ordering processin order to ensure an effective and efficient solution. As such, we have developed a state-of-the-art, user friendly website in order to meet your needs.

Our new Loyal Leash allows everyone to experience the joy of walking the family dog safely and with total control.

Name: UNIVITTÁ SAÚDE ANIMAL
Description: Empresa de aditivos e suplementos destinados a nutrição animal.

Name: Experto Avicultor
Description:
Experto Avicultor es un ecosistema en distintas plataformas digitales creado por MSD Salud Animal que tiene como objetivo principal convocar a una comunidad entorno a la Salud Animal de Aves en México.

En MSD Salud Animal somos expertos en la prevención, cuidado y bienestar de los animales, por ellos nos pusimos la meta de convocar a una comunidad en torno a un tema que nos preocupa: la salud de las aves en nuestro país.

En ella encontrarás información especializada y contenido útil sobre el mundo de la Avicultura en México. Además de que encontrarás un intercambio de conocimiento y el contacto entre expertos en vacunación, manejo y cría de aves con los usuarios finales.

Con Experto Avicultor, buscamos ofrecer a productores avícolas, pequeñas y medianas empresas, así como a veterinarios especializados, contenido útil sobre cuidado y prevención de posibles enfermedades en aves. 

Se trata de una comunidad de expertos, para expertos!

Name: Australian Veterinary Clinic
Description:
We are a veterinary hospital located in Khalifa City A and recently on Reem Island, Abu Dhabi and are here to help you make sensible decisions, which will help enhance the life of your pet. The Australian Veterinary Hospital provides the highest quality of veterinary care standards in the Middle East. Our veterinarians are members of the UK's Royal College of Veterinary Surgeons (MRCVS), with the vision to bring a brand new, competitively priced option for veterinary care to Abu Dhabi within easy reach of all areas of Abu Dhabi.

Our professional team of vets and nurses offer an extensive range of veterinary services and friendly advice. Together with the investment in the latest equipment, this sets us apart in the provision of quality veterinary care in the Middle East.
We also operate as a 24 hour emergency vet if your pet requires emergency treatment. Our emergency cover is offered 24 hours a day, 365 days of the year. The Centre is superbly equipped with an operating theatre and a very comprehensive in house laboratory. We practice at a very high level and stemming from this we have nothing to hide. We have an open practice policy and are proud to show you around. If your pet is in the hospital, we encourage you to visit.
If you have any concerns about your pet's health, behavior, or well-being, please make an appointment to see one of our veterinary surgeons. We look forward to caring for your pet.

At the Australian Veterinary Hospital, we are committed to becoming your partner in maintaining your pets' health, and in doing so, enhancing and preserving the unique and valuable bond you share. Our commitment is not only to treat your pets when they are not feeling well, but also to help you learn how to keep your four (or 2)-legged family members thriving. This will allow you to enjoy the benefits of each other's company for as much quality time as possible.

Name: VEDIM
Description:
Since 2007, VEDIM has offered veterinarians the expertise of specialists in medical imaging.
We have developed our own web software VETFLOW to facilitate the exchange of dicom images and clinical informations from the various sites and our radiologists.


VEDIM offers:

- practicing veterinarians the necessary means to make a request for interpretation of digital medical images taken in their clinic (radiology, scanner, MRI, scintigraphy) from specialist veterinary radiologists (DACVR, DipECVDI, etc.).

- veterinary radiologists with the necessary means to organize and develop their teleradiology activity by providing them with an independent platform for requesting the interpretation of medical images.
VEDIM gives the possibility to expand or create a veterinary teleradiology site without any initial cost and radiologists do not need to have computer network experience to start.

Name: Vetersalud Red de Clinicas
Description:
Vetersalud nace en julio de 2004 como resultado de la asociación de un grupo de clínicos veterinarios procedentes de de diferentes regiones españolas. 

Estos profesionales veterinarios, con una dilatada experiencia al frente de sus clínicas y hospitales veterinarios, deciden aunar esfuerzos y aportar todos sus conocimientos para crear la primera agrupación veterinaria de especialistas en animales de compañía que se presenta bajo una misma marca.

Nuestros objetivos ...
El objetivo de Vetersalud es ofrecer al sector de animales de compañía una imagen de marca única que agrupe al suficiente número de clínicas y hospitales veterinarios para dar cobertura a todo el territorio nacional. 

Las clínicas veterinarias de Vetersalud ponen a disposición del propietario de animales de compañía un servicio uniforme y de alta calidad. 

La imagen de Vetersalud se percibe desde los elementos de fachada y sala de espera hasta el último detalle en la atención al cliente, tanto clínica como personal. 

Unos detallados protocolos de actuación ante todas aquellas situaciones que pueden presentarse en la clínica veterinaria diaria, permiten que los servicios prestados sean completos, rápidos y altamente eficaces

Name: Flint Animal Cancer Center
Description:
The Flint Animal Cancer Center is a world leader in pet cancer treatment and comparative oncology research. We offer comprehensive treatment options for pet cancers, including chemotherapy, surgery, radiation therapy, and clinical trials. As the world leader in training of veterinary oncology specialists, we have trained more veterinary medical oncologists, veterinary surgical fellows, and veterinary radiation oncologists than any other program.  Our dedicated comparative oncology research program includes fourteen established research programs and also offers graduate Ph.D. training in cancer biology and post-doc fellowships.

Name: VetPartners Ireland
Description: Home to some of the most trusted and respected small animal, equine, mixed and farming veterinary practices

Name: PulseVet Technologies, LLC
Description: PulseVet is the leader in veterinary shock wave technology for regeneration - and the only system backed by twenty years of clinical research.

Name: Pet Stuff Spital Veterinar
Description:
Spitalul Veterinar PET STUFF este cel mai complex spital veterinar din România, cu o experiență de peste 17 ani, oferind servicii de chirurgie de urgență non-stop și îngrijire la cele mai înalte standarde europene. Suntem singurul spital din țară care implementează standardul Low Stress Handling pentru a reduce anxietatea pacienților noștri blănoși.

Misiunea noastră este să consolidăm legătura dintre om și animal, să oferim servicii medicale personalizate, să educăm proprietarii despre sănătatea animalelor și să promovăm un mediu de lucru respectuos, care susține creșterea profesională.

Viziunea noastră este să tratăm fiecare pacient ca pe un membru al familiei noastre, cu respect, empatie și servicii adaptate nevoilor sale unice. Suntem dedicați să oferim o experiență caldă și prietenoasă pentru animalele de companie și familiile acestora, cu grijă și profesionalism.

Certificat de ISFM pentru îngrijirea pisicilor, PET STUFF continuă să stabilească standarde înalte în medicina veterinară.

Începând cu anul 2024, Spitalul Veterinar PET STUFF se alătură Grupului LuxVet, cea mai mare platformă de unități veterinare din Polonia, consolidându-și angajamentul de a oferi servicii de îngrijire veterinară la cele mai înalte standarde europene și continuându-și poziția de lider printre spitalele veterinare din România.

Name: RUNUO IFT
Description: RUNUO is one of the IFT Corporation affiliates and the agent of MSD Animal health.

Name: VetWise
Description:
VetWise (formerly Smart.Vet) is a 24/7 virtual care service that supports veterinary hospitals with our network of over 150 Ontario, Alberta, and British Columbia licensed veterinarians and RVTs. 

We are another option for your clients when you are not available to see their pet, operating on a referral basis with local hospitals. 

Whether you are having a particularly busy day OR you are looking for support for your clients after-hours, we are there when you need us.

Looking for our careers page? Check it out here: https://getvetwise.com/careers

Name: VETTOFIT
Description: Vettofit is a dedicated pet care brand focused on developing healthcare products that improve the health of pets. Our innovative solutions aim to enhance pets' well-being, and we're continuously working toward products that can increase their lifespan. At Vettofit, we believe in creating a healthier, happier future for pets, helping them live longer, more vibrant lives.

Name: Nextmune US
Description:
For 30 years, Nextmune has been dedicated to providing exceptional diagnostic tools that make management of pet/horse allergies more reliable, convenient, and effective for doctor and patient. Utilizing patented processes that reside at that forefront of the industries, along with exceptional customer service, tools and support, Nextmune,  looks to broaden our partnerships until all patients, no longer struggle with these health related issues.

We have launched so many amazing initiatives this year including our Test and Treat Package which allows clinics to package our 91 allergen serum allergy testing panel AND the first round of treatment for one low price - call us for details.

Name: CEDIVET IBERIA
Description: Laboratorio de referencia de análisis clínicos veterinarios

Name: PetLive
Description: PetLive is a fully integrated multi-solution community-based digital pet care system. PetLive is the first veterinary telehealth platform in the Middle East and Africa that connects pet parents with veterinarians via video calls or text messaging.

Name: Axiom Veterinary Laboratories Ltd
Description:
Axiom Veterinary Laboratories Ltd provide high quality, cost effective diagnostic testing options to Veterinary practices across the UK, Ireland and parts of Europe.

We offer high quality diagnostic results as standard; these are in accordance with our stringent internal quality control policy, numerous external quality assessment schemes and our certification to ISO 9001. We pride ourselves, and base our reputation on, providing the highest level of service across the diagnostic referral sector.

The foundation of our success has been the choice of exceptional personnel to process your submissions; one or more of our team of 14 clinical pathologists, aided by the input of 67 scientific and diagnostic support staff, will review each report in order to offer you qualified and experienced support, advice and interpretation on an extensive range of testing options

Name: VERG Brooklyn
Description:
Veterinary Emergency and Referral Group (a/k/a VERG) was formed in the spring of 2005 by Dr. Brett Levitzke. Open 24 hours, 7 days a week, our emergency & critical care unit consists of teams of experienced and dedicated emergency doctors, technicians, and assistants, working together to provide the highest quality, state-of-the-art care.  Our emergency team works closely with your veterinarian in caring for your pet. Veterinary Emergency and Referral Group’s specialty arm consists of dedicated, compassionate, highly qualified specialists in the fields of surgery, internal medicine, cardiology, neurology, oncology, dermatology, and diagnostic imaging. Our specialists work together within the services to provide your pet with the highest quality care, all within a caring and nurturing environment.

When your veterinarian says it’s time to see a specialist, ask them about VERG, Veterinary Emergency and Referral Group of Brooklyn, New York.

Name: Metropolitan Veterinary Hospital
Description:
When an urgent situation arises, the Emergency Department at Metropolitan Veterinary Hospital acts as an extension of your family veterinarian providing high quality care. Metropolitan Veterinary Hospital’s staff of emergency veterinarians and highly trained technical personnel offer state of the art diagnostic tests and treatments to accommodate any trauma or illness.

From our affiliated veterinarians to our in-house specialists, we are a state-of-the-art medical center wholly dedicated to the care of the fluffy members of your family.

We’re a teaching Hospital

What does that mean for you? Take the case of Fluffy, for instance, a middle-aged dog who was brought to her MVH-affiliated veterinarian for vomiting. After a thorough physical exam is performed at the office, her veterinarian notes that more extensive testing may be needed. Referred to the hospital, Fluffy’s MVH-affiliated general veterinarian would still oversee her case, possibly ordering hospitalization with intravenous fluids, laboratory testing and diagnostic imaging. If necessary, her MVH-affiliated veterinarian could call on the expertise of one or more of the many board-certified specialists practicing in the hospital. Fluffy’s veterinarian is able to offer her superior diagnosis and care because he’s part of a centralized hospital.

Name: Socel
Description:
A Socel é uma distribuidora de produtos veterinários que atende principalmente o interior do estado de São Paulo e o norte do estado do Paraná. 
Fundada em 12 de dezembro de 1990, tem como foco o mercado de avicultura.
Sua equipe conta com os melhores técnicos comerciais e médicos veterinários oferecendo a eles melhor capacitação para pronto atendimento aos clientes.
Ao montar seu mix de produtos, escolheu marcas líderes de mercado em seu segmento, reconhecidas internacionalmente.
A Socel proporciona a integridade do produto, a segurança para o cliente e a eficácia comprovada a campo sempre.

Name: Vetmat Saúde Animal
Description: Atuamos há mais de 35 anos na distribuição de produtos veterinários nos 79 municípios de Mato Grosso do Sul. Atuamos comercializando produtos para bovinos, equinos, suínos e pets.

Name: AMCOVET - U.A.E
Description: AMCOVET animal health is a leading in (Veterinary Medicines, Vaccines and Equipment) in the Middle East, Africa, East Europe and Asia.

Name: Omics Biotecnologia
Description:
Somos uma empresa que atua na área de Medicina Biomolecular e Medicina Regenerativa, com o objetivo de disseminar os avanços da biotecnologia em prol da medicina veterinária.

A empresa atua no ramo da Terapia Celular, com uso de Células Tronco cultivadas para pequenos e grandes animais.

Composta por médicos veterinários, com PhD, mestrado, especialização e anos de experiência na Área de Biotecnologia.

Name: Seleste
Description:
En réponse à l’évolution des besoins des vétérinaires et des familles en matière d’accompagnement lors du décès des animaux, SIAF, acteur historique du secteur en Île-de-France, devient Seleste autour d’un projet national coopératif innovant. 

En effet, de plus en plus attachés à leur compagnon animal, les français les considèrent très souvent comme un membre à part entière de la famille. 
En cas de décès, ils se tournent donc naturellement vers leur vétérinaire pour des conseils et de l’aide. Et celui-ci souhaite conserver ce lien direct et privilégié, tout en se reposant sur des professionnels des services funéraires animaliers.

Fort de ce constat et de son expertise en matière de prestations funéraires pour animaux, SIAF devient Seleste et développe en 2021 un projet national coopératif. 
Sous la forme d’une SCIC, Société Coopérative d’Intérêt Collectif, Seleste projette de créer des centres funéraires et des crématoriums pour animaux couvrant l’ensemble du territoire et de prendre en charge crémations, transports, collectes, accueil et recueillement, restitution des cendres, inhumations, etc.  

Avec les vétérinaires mais aussi des collectivités locales, des sous-traitants, des bailleurs et des bénévoles, Seleste intègre l’ensemble des professions au service du bien-être des animaux. 

En devenant partenaires de Seleste, les vétérinaires s’assureront donc de proposer un service de qualité aux familles, avec du personnel sélectionné pour son professionnalisme.

Seleste s’engage dans un modèle vertueux et solidaire. 
•	Respect de la réglementation et des normes 
•	Qualité des équipements, des prestations et des produits associés 
•	Engagements RSE et environnementaux 
•	Transparence de toutes les prestations proposées
•	Co-construction et participation des associations locales

Name: VetXbill.AI
Description:
At VetXbill.AI, we believe veterinary professionals should spend more time with patients—not paperwork. Our mission is to simplify and strengthen the financial backbone of veterinary medicine through intelligent automation that ensures every charge is captured, every time.

Founded by veterinary medical professionals and revenue cycle management experts, VetXbill.AI applies proven charge capture protocols and billing integrity practices to enhance the financial operations of veterinary facilities. Our goal is to optimize and strengthen workflows, deliver greater invoice accuracy, operational efficiency, and revenue protection across every stage of the billing process.
Built by those who understand the daily challenges inside veterinary facilities, VetXbill.AI seamlessly integrates into your facility’s existing workflow to analyze, detect, and correct billing discrepancies before discharge. By auditing patient records, estimates, and invoices in real time, our platform eliminates missed or duplicate charges, generates accurate end-of-day revenue reports, and transforms billing data into actionable staff training tools.

VetXbill.AI redefines billing integrity, one invoice at a time. Your team can finalize invoices confidently, improve efficiency, and reclaim lost revenue, all while focusing on what matters most: delivering exceptional patient care.

Name: Etkin İlaç
Description:
1999’dan bu yana Türkiye’nin kanatlı ve büyükbaş sektörüne yenilikçi çözümler sunuyoruz. Koruyucu hekimlik odaklı ürünlerimizle hayvan sağlığını koruyor, çiftlik performansını artırıyoruz. Antibiyotik, aşı, yem katkı maddeleri ve vitamin-mineral çözümlerimizle birçok ürün kategorisinde aktif bulunuyoruz.

Şeffaflık, sürdürülebilirlik ve etik değerlerimizle, hem Türkiye çapında hem de uluslararası pazarlarda güçlü bir etki yaratıyoruz. Dinamik ve yaratıcı ekibimizle, hayvan sağlığını korumak ve tedaviye yönelik yenilikçi çözümler sunmak için çalışıyoruz.

Hayvan sağlığında fark yaratıyoruz.

Daha fazlası için: www.etkinilac.com.tr

Name: Partner Veterinary Emergency & Specialty Center
Description: Partner Veterinary is a leading provider of emergency and specialty care, doing our part to improve the veterinary landscape and pioneer a transformative approach to team health and happiness, creating a healing environment for ourselves and our partners, pet families, and patients.

Name: Willows Veterinary Group
Description:
The Willows Veterinary group has grown substantially over the last 50 years. As well as expanding organically by providing excellent service to local clients, there have been a number of purchases of other neighbouring practices and two mergers. Presently we work from twenty-four companion animal practices, a companion animal referral centre, two Equine sites and five farm offices. One small animal centre has hospital status as does one of the equine centres. In addition, we also have our own retail farm store. 
We embrace all the latest technology and actively encourage our staff to further their ongoing professional development and learning. Our head office support centre looks after all the marketing, IT and HR needs of the staff and business, thereby freeing up our vets to look after our patients. We are proud to have many long-standing staff members who find our practices and offices, fun and rewarding places to work in. In 2018 we were acquired by Vet Partners who embody our principles and ethics.
We will always be very interested in hearing from veterinary professionals looking to work in a forward thinking, customer centric practice.

Name: Vet Practice Support
Description:
We are a market leading, multi-disciplinary, advanced practitioner-led,  clinical service delivering to a growing number of veterinary practices across the UK. 

We are an ambitious company striving for excellence across all of our services, which include cardiology, internal medicine, dermatology and ultrasound. 

We pride ourselves on delivering in-house, bespoke CPD to our network of veterinary practices, supporting high standards of knowledge and expertise.

Name: petvectors
Description: VBDs: Gebissen und Gestochen - Forschung, Diagnostik, Therapie

Name: WestVet
Description:
WestVet provides the highest quality emergency and specialty veterinary care to pets and their families in Idaho, Northern Utah and surrounding regions.       

If your pet is experiencing an emergency, come directly to our hospital. We have a team of critical care veterinarians and technicians on staff to assist you immediately.

In addition, our team of veterinary specialists works in partnership with your family veterinarian to provide compassionate, continuous care.

Name: Fertplan Reprodução Animal
Description:
Fundada por médicos veterinários formados na Univiçosa, a Fertplan é uma empresa que atua nas áreas de pecuária de leite e corte. Sediada na cidade de Governador Valadares, atualmente conta com uma equipe multidisciplinar que busca inovações e tecnologias que aumentem a produtividade e a renda do produtor rural.
Nossa missão consiste em “construir relacionamentos de longo prazo, criando valor para nossos clientes. Melhorar a lucratividade de cada rebanho, entregando genética de confiança, além de serviços reprodutivos e de gerenciamento de alta qualidade”.
Temos como visão “ser reconhecida como a principal empresa privada de geração e difusão de tecnologia e inovação, e prestação de serviços na área de reprodução animal”.
Atendemos 21 cidades, somando 86 propriedades rurais com uma produção diária total de 70.000 litros/leite. Ao longo do último ano foram realizadas 1500 transferências de embrião, resultando numa taxa de concepção de 41% e 615 animais gestantes. Já na estação de monta 2018/2019, atingimos a marca de 9223 Inseminações Artificiais em Tempo Fixo (IATFs). Tais números refletem o nosso trabalho realizado com transparência, confiança e responsabilidade, cumprindo nossa missão e ajudando nosso produtor a alcançar seus objetivos.

Name: VetinLab
Description:
Laboratório Veterinário desde 2003 entregando bons resultados.

Tudo que fazemos é para salvar vidas, e fazer famílias mais felizes com seus Pets. A forma como salvamos vidas, é através de exames laboratoriais de excelência. Nós auxiliamos o médico veterinário no diagnóstico.

Name: Pharmavet S.A.
Description: Laboratorios Pharmavet nace dentro en el año 1995, dedicado a la Medicina Veterinaria, con el compromiso de brindar un servicio completo de la mano de la calidad y excelencia del producto. Con la realización de inversiones de capital en equipamiento y el empleo de personal de gran profesionalismo y amplia experiencia, día a día nuestra empresa ha ido incrementando su presencia en el mercado interno, lo cual ha permitido que nuestros productos sean exportados a distintos países de América.

Name: Greenville Humane Society
Description: Founded in 1930, the Greenville Humane Society is the largest no-kill shelter in the Southeast, and operates one of the largest low-cost spay/neuter clinic in South Carolina. Its mission: “As a no-kill facility, we work in partnership with our community to create an environment where all animals are treated with compassion and respect.”

Name: Vet Neuro Specialists Ltd
Description: We offer remote and on-site specialist veterinary neurology support for referral practices and clinics in the UK, in Europe and abroad.

Description:
El Hospital Veterinario Indautxu nace en 1986 en Bilbao con un proyecto innovador desarrollado por sus tres socios fundadores: Carmen Diego, Juanjo Martínez y Angel Rubio.

El alto nivel de especialización de nuestro equipo humano y los medios técnicos más avanzados, hacen del Hospital Veterinario Indautxu el centro más grande y mejor equipado de Bilbao y el centro de referencia de la zona Norte.

mars.com/privacy-policy-spanish
mars.com/legal-spain

Name: Phartec Sac Perú
Description: Somos una empresa peruana dedicada a la comercialización de productos dirigidos a la nutrición y salud animal a través de nuestra división de negocios veterinaria y de nutrición y manejo de suelos a través de nuestra división agrícola
