Description: Clinica veterinaria, sita a Cavaria con Premezzo (VA), dedita alla cura degli animali da compagnia.

Name: Isophós Nutrição Animal
Description:
Em 2003, surgiu a isophós com a elaboração de uma linha completa de nutrição animal, produzindo suplementos minerais, proteinados, rações e núcleos. oferecendo assim diversos produtos inovadores para bovinos, equinos e ovinos e com qualidade comprovada. 

Após muitos anos de trabalho e conquistas ao lado de nossos clientes, em 2019 iniciamos um novo projeto, ampliar nossa área de atendimento aos clientes e as linhas de produtos oferecidos, assim procuramos parcerias com grandes laboratórios veterinários, fabricantes de fertilizantes, sementes, herbicidas, ferragens, arames, selaria e muitos outros, para sempre oferecer produtos de qualidade com preço justo. agradecemos a todos amigos clientes pela confiança e oportunidade de podermos atendê-los!
Location: São José do Rio Preto, SP

Name: Caring Hands Animal Hospital
Description: We value the importance of the human-animal bond and realize the depth of emotions that are a part of this bond. At Caring Hands Animal Hospital you may stay with your pet during all aspects of the office visit and medical treatments. If your pet is hospitalized you are always welcome to visit during hospital hours. If your pet needs to be taken to the treatment room during an appointment, you may come right along with them!  We have 6 locations and are actively growing.

Name: Importadora Representaciones IIP
Description: Importadora de medicamentos veterinarios con mas de 22 años de experiencia en el rubro.

Name: Geneplus Global Limited
Description: Geneplus is a developer of an agricultural innovation and technology platform designed to enhance sustainable agricultural production.

Name: CVS Caladrius
Description:
Caladrius est le 1er Centre Vétérinaire de Spécialistes en Belgique.
C’est le regroupement de multiples spécialistes, ayant pour objectif d’offrir un service d’expertise médicale et chirurgicale aux vétérinaires généralistes, en un seul endroit. 

Un centre de 1200m2, au cœur de la Belgique, au service des vétérinaires.

Name: Soft Care
Description:
O cuidado é a nossa especialidade.
Resultados excelentes no dia a dia de clínicas veterinárias.

Name: University Veterinary Teaching Hospital Sydney
Description: The Sydney University Veterinary Teaching Hospital (UVTHS) is acclaimed internationally for its exceptional health, care and welfare of animals. It is a general practice veterinary clinic and a referral centre for other vets to send complex cases.

Name: Wisconsin Equine Clinic & Hospital
Description:
When you choose Wisconsin Equine Clinic for your horse, you are assured that every medical condition, from critical care to routine, will be handled under one roof by outstanding doctors who have been recognized as the best in their field.  Wisconsin Equine's dynamic group of veterinary specialists in medicine, surgery, reproduction, field service, and sports medicine work together to provide the best care for your horse.

This state-of-the-art equine veterinary hospital contains the latest equipment and technology to diagnose and care for your horse, including an open, standing MRI, making it just one of 16 equine medical centers in the world to offer this advanced tool.  From MRI, digital radiography and ultrasound, to advanced regenerative therapies including stem cell, PRP, IRAP and more, Wisconsin Equine stays current on cutting edge advancements to optimize your horse's care.

In addition to our premier reputation, many of our doctors, technicians and staff own horses themselves, or have worked alongside horses for much of their lives. For us, helping your pleasure horse, race horse, and every horse in-between is more than just a chosen career...it's our passion

Visit our website at www.wisconsinequineclinic.com for more information.
Like us on Facebook for horse health information and industry news as well as fun and interactive posts https://www.facebook.com/#!/WisconsinEquineClinicandHospital

Name: IVET GRUPO VETERINARIO
Description: Grupo veterinario familiar con centros veterinarios en Asturias y Comunidad de Madrid. Con más de 40 trabajadores. -IVET RIBADESELLA , Asturias. -IVET POSADA DE LLANES, Asturias. -IVET LAS ROZAS, Madrid. -IVET EL BURGO, Madrid. -IVET RIOS ROSAS, Madrid. -IVET MALASAÑA, Madrid -IVET GANADERÍA AMBULANTE, Asturias.

Name: Lisbon Vet Specialists
Description:
Lisbon Vet Specialists é o primeiro centro em Portugal liderado por especialistas nas áreas de Oftalmologia e Cardiologia, certificados pelo European Board of Veterinary Specialisation. 
 
Como centro de referenciação, a nossa filosofia é complementar o sector veterinário de modo que outros profissionais, médicos veterinários, possam referenciar casos complexos que necessitem de um serviço especializado incluindo métodos de diagnóstico e tratamento de última geração.
 
O nosso objectivo é trabalhar em equipa com o veterinário referenciador para que os animais de estimação beneficiem dos melhores cuidados de saúde, sustentados na mais recente evidência científica, na inovação e na excelência clínica.

Name: My Pet Nutritionist
Description:
My pet nutritionist is a nutrition consultation service for cats and dogs, whether seemingly healthy or unwell. 

We take all of the confusion out of what you should be feeding your pet and help personalise a diet and lifestyle plan for their specific needs.

We offer nutritional consultations to provide the very best advice on the better commercial foods, personalised home prepared and raw food diets for your cat or dog, alongside supplements and lifestyle tips.

Name: Wolfe Vets
Description:
Launched in June 2020, Wolfe Vets is an independently owned, small animal veterinary hospitals based in Chiswick and in Fulham (24/7 and ECC care). We offer an exceptional standard of round the clock care, treatment and facilities, as well as all the routine consultations, health checks and procedures expected at a family vet. We are passionate about pets and animal welfare; we believe that pets and their owners deserve to be treated with expertise and compassion. 

Our client base has grown significantly since we first opened our doors and we are delighted that our reputation for the highest standards of care, means that many new pet owners register with us every day.

Name: AEP Imaging
Description:
AEP Imaging is uw partner voor röntgen– en echoapparatuur, met snelle service en deskundig onderhoud in diverse sectoren.

SEE MORE. KNOW MORE. CARE BETTER.

Sinds de oprichting in 1979 heeft AEP International B.V. zich ontwikkeld tot een ervaren en veelzijdige speler binnen meerdere sectoren en divisies. Eén van deze divisies is AEP Imaging. Met een enthousiast team van gedreven professionals streven wij dagelijks naar optimale resultaten, met een sterke focus op klantgerichtheid en service.

AEP Imaging levert hoogwaardige röntgen- en echoapparatuur voor uiteenlopende sectoren, waaronder dieren- en paardenklinieken, de humane zorg en industriële toepassingen. Onze oplossingen ondersteunen diagnostische processen en kwaliteitscontroles met uiterste precisie en betrouwbaarheid.

Naast de levering van apparatuur bieden wij uitgebreide service- en onderhoudsdiensten. Dankzij ons eigen lokale serviceteam kunnen wij snel en efficiënt reageren op al uw technische vraagstukken, zodat klanten altijd kunnen rekenen op de ondersteuning die zij nodig hebben. Wij denken proactief mee over passende oplossingen en zorgen ervoor dat gebruikers hun systemen optimaal kunnen inzetten.

Name: Animor Pet Healthcare
Description: Animor is making life better for pets, their owners and our clinicians that care for them.

Name: Colourful CPD
Description:
Colourful CPD is the leading provider of non-clinical skills training, supporting all roles in veterinary practice. Anytime, anywhere, at a pace that suits you!

In September 2023, Colourful CPD was acquired by Agilio Software, the UK’s leading provider of frontline healthcare operations software.

Name: Atascadero High School
Description: Atascadero High School is a public high school located in Atascadero, California. The Greyhounds are part of the Atascadero Unified School District.

Name: Petable
Description: Petable is a preventive pet health plan management software for pet owners and vet clinics, specially focusing on all owners that make caring for their pets a priority. Petable brings vets and patients together, by providing proactive and relatable information and reminders for owners , and giving vets access to pets’ lives at home.

Name: VETiSearch
Description:
VETiSearch is the largest online knowledge platform for veterinary medicine, available in Denmark, Norway, Sweden, Great Britain and Germany - an essential tool if you work in a modern, specialised practice.

If a veterinary medical product is approved, you can be sure it’s listed on VETiSearch. The platform is updated daily with information from national public databases and the European Medicines Agency (EMA). As a veterinarian, you will always have access to the latest information on all authorised products.

VETiSearch launched its FREE service in autumn 2020 and is already used by more than 10.000 veterinarians across 1500 clinics.

The platform is used across all professional groups in the veterinary field – whether you work with companion animals, horses, or herd health for poultry, swine, and cattle.

Not using VETiSearch in your clinic yet, or have questions? 

Go to:
Denmark: www.vetisearch.dk
Norway: www.vetisearch.no
Sweden: www.vetisearch.se
Great Britain: www.vetisearch.co.uk
Germany: www.vetisearch.de

Name: Anexa Vet Services
Description: Anexa Vets offer a friendly and professional vet service for dairy,  and dry stock farmers as well as your family pets. We care about your animals’ health and we care about the communities we work with.  From the veterinary advice we provide, to the products we use  – all our recommendations are based on quality science, with your animals, and your needs well considered.

Name: Charlie's Animal Rescue centrE
Description:
Charlies Animal Rescue Centre – CARE was started in January 2013 by a group of animal lovers who felt that Bangalore city was in dire need of an animal shelter where stray and abandoned animals could be housed, given timely medical aid, rehabilitated and rehomed. The inspiration behind the Trust is Charlie, a 10-year-old 3 legged Indian dog who is a therapy dog and who has been doing amazing work with specially-abled children in the field of Animal Assisted Therapy since 2005.

The Trust was formed with 3 Trustees who have years of experience in the field of animal welfare. The Trust was registered on 18.1.2013. The Trust also enjoys Income Tax Exemption u/s 80G of the Income-tax Act vide Order no. DIT(E)BLR/80G/G-39/AABTC4700C/ITO(E)-1/Vol.2013-14/MANUAL dated 14.6.2013.

The task of setting up an Animal Shelter, accessible to the people of Bangalore city was a big challenge and in this direction, we have taken up a piece of land on rent measuring approximately half an acre at Survey no.19/1, Jakkur Village, Yelahanka Hobli for the purpose of the Animal Rescue Centre. The Shelter is now functional.

The founder of the NGO Ms. Sudha Narayanan is also the recipient of the CJ Memorial Community Community Guardian Award.

Name: ProVéto Junior Conseil Lyon
Description:
ProVéto Junior Conseil Lyon est la Junior-Entreprise de VetAgroSup campus vétérinaire, située à Marcy l'Étoile. Elle a pour but de faire le pont entre professionnels du monde vétérinaire et étudiants lyonnais par le biais de missions à plus-value pédagogique. 
Nos intervenants réalisent des études avec sondage et analyse auprès des étudiants et vétérinaires, de la rédaction d'articles, des études bibliographiques, de l'animation d'ateliers en clinique, etc. Cette liste est non exhaustive et tous nouveaux projets qui permettraient aux étudiants de mettre en pratique leurs enseignements peuvent être envisagés, donc n'hésitez pas à nous contacter pour en parler !

Name: The Veterinary Project
Description: Our project is aimed at the veterinary community.  We will be providing value aimed at helping veterinary professionals live a more purposeful and fulfilling life. We will focus on personal development and the business of veterinary medicine.

Name: 4Dvets AG
Description: Committed to advancing canine health, 4Dvets specializes in cutting-edge gait analysis solutions tailored for dogs. Our LupoGait system delivers precise insights into canine movement, empowering veterinarians, canine care specialists, and pet owners with early detection of musculoskeletal issues, while supporting effective rehabilitation for optimal recovery and well-being.

Name: Christchurch Veterinary Referrals
Description: Christchurch Veterinary Referrals is an independent centre in Ipswich specialising in small animal surgery. Vets from across East Anglia refer cases to us knowing our experienced and highly qualified veterinary surgeons operate with great skill.

Name: Foran Healthcare
Description:
Established in 1974, Foran Healthcare has grown to become a market leader in the field of specialised nutrition and health care. Products are available in over 40 countries worldwide.

Comprehensive and innovative product range
Foran Healthcare boasts a comprehensive, well-established range of products. These include superior quality nutritional supplements specifically designed to optimise health and boost performance.

Commitment to quality and safety
Only the highest quality ingredients available go into every batch of Foran Healthcare products manufactured ensuring products can be most effectively utilised, even in small dosage amounts, due to high bioavailability and quality levels reached.

Our Science, Your Success
We are firmly committed to testing products and raw materials used in their production, to ensure absolute compliance with global anti-doping regulations. 

The S.A.F.E. mark of approval is awarded to our Foran Equine range of products only when we are certain that it contains no prohibited substances and is safe for use in competition horses.

Technical support
Foran Healthcare can provide in-depth technical support and guidance to all customers courtesy of our in-house nutritional team.

Name: Avalon Animal Health
Description:
Avalon Vet is a forward-thinking company dedicated to enriching the lives of pets and aquatic ecosystems. We specialize in developing high-quality dry food and supplements for dogs and cats, alongside advanced water contamination treatment solutions for aquariums.

Guided by science and innovation, Avalon Vet prioritizes sustainability and care in every product we create. Whether supporting the health of beloved pets or maintaining balanced aquatic environments, our goal is to empower pet owners to provide the best possible care while fostering a deeper connection with their companions.

Name: Vetcom
Description: Comércio, Distribuição, Representação, Importação e Exportação de Produtos Veterinários para Campinas e Região.

Name: Gabriele Sauerland Tiermediatorin communicanis
Description:
Seminare für Menschen mit und ohne Tier sind meine Leidenschaft.
Meine Ziel: mehr Hygge, mehr Zufriedenheit, mehr Lebensfreude - für Sie !
Sie wünschen sich, Ihr Tier besser zu verstehen.
Sie wünschen sich mehr Lebensfreude, weniger Drama, mehr Zufriedenheit.
Als Tierkommunikatorin lasse ich Sie an der Sicht des Tieres teilhaben. Ich helfe Ihnen dabei ein Verhaltensproblem zu verstehen und die Lösung zu finden.  Allerdings bin ich mehr als eine Expertin für Tierkommunikation. Ich bin Impulsgeberin und Motivatorin, Reisebegleiterin und Loslasshelferin.

Name: Smart TRCVet Corp
Description:
Smart TRCVET Corp provides premium and affordable teleradiology and online specialist consultation services to veterinarians, veterinary clinics, and animal owners.
We connect veterinarians, veterinary clinics, hospitals and animal owners with appropriate veterinary specialists to provide and facilitate Teleradiology and Teleconsultation.
1.	Smart TRCVET Corp. provides communication between general veterinarians and animal owners with specialists when specialist opinion (expert diagnosis and treatment plan) is needed (e.g, Teleradiology).

2.	Smart TRCVET Corp establishes a unique specialist veterinary commission (consisting of different specialists or several specialists in a specific field) for complicated cases requiring the opinion of several veterinary specialists.

3.  Veterinary Ultrasonography Training Programs: Smart TRCVET offers specialized training programs in ultrasonography.

Smart TRCVet connects veterinary clinics with specialists whenever a specialist opinion is needed to diagnose or provide a treatment plan. It also helps pet owners to connect with veterinarians in real-time for virtual diagnosis stress-free visits, providing pet owners, especially in rural areas access to reliable health care for their pets and animals without the long commutes for diagnosis visits.
In the second phase of development, Smart TRCVET will use artificial intelligence to monitor, control, and evaluate radiological images and documents of sick animals before sending them to specialists.
We pursue two objectives:
1.	Establishing an Effective and Intelligent Web Application for Premium Communication.
	Connecting Vet Clinics with Specialists in the   (B2B).
	Connecting Pet/Animal Owners with Vet Clinics and Specialists (B2C).

2.	Developing Artificial Intelligence and Advanced Technology Systems to Monitor, Control, and initial evaluation of Diagnostic Images and Documents of Sick Animals to automate this process.

Name: Pink Paws
Description: Pink Paws is an eminent one-stop pet store in Kolkata. As a noteworthy pet retailer, we provide a wide range of premium pet products and services. Be it your cat, dog or fish, our products and services will certainly offer 100% satisfaction.

Name: Acana Polska
Description:
Jesteśmy dystrybutorem jakości, najwyższych standardów, pewności i zaufania. Już od blisko 25 lat Acana Polska zapewnia Miłośnikom zwierząt dostęp do wysokiej klasy, różnorodnych artykułów dla psów i kotów. Zwierzęta są naszą pasją, dlatego pragniemy zaoferować im i ich Właścicielom bezkonkurencyjne i wyjątkowe produkty.

Jesteśmy wyłącznym dystrybutorem:

    Biologicznie Odpowiedniego Jedzenia ORIJEN & ACANA
    woreczków na odchody EARTH RATED
    gryzaków dentystycznych WHIMZEES

Siedziba naszej firmy znajduje się w miejscowości Jelcz-Laskowice. Tutaj odnajdą Państwo zarówno tętniące życiem Centrum Dowodzenia – biura, w których zajmujemy się obsługą Klientów z całej Polski, jak i Serce firmy Acana Polska – magazyn, w którym przechowujemy całą naszą tajemnicę i klucz do sukcesu – bezkonkurencyjne produkty najlepszych światowych marek.

Na terenie całego kraju reprezentuje nas „Sześciu Wspaniałych” – wykwalifikowanych Doradców Klientów Biznesowych, którzy dbają o to, aby w każdym regionie Polski miłośnicy zwierząt mogli sprawiać radość swoim pupilom i zadbać o ich zdrowie dzięki naszym produktom.

Jesteśmy rzetelni!

Name: Amcovet-Jordan
Description:
Amcovet is a distribution company. Our areas of activity include the distribution of medicines, vaccines, and feed additives.
AMCOVET Jordan was established in 2001, led by Agricultural Materials Company (Miqdadi).

Name: Árbol Hospital Veterinário
Description: O Árbol Hospital Veterinário está chegando em São Bernardo do Campo! Com o objetivo de trazer para a região uma nova opção de atendimento especializado 24 horas, o Árbol oferece atendimento humanizado e dispõe de laboratório próprio, exames de imagem, internação, centro cirúrgico, emergência e muito mais.
Location: São Bernardo do Campo, São Paulo

Name: Elbevet GmbH
Description: We vow to generate distinctive paths to enhance livestock health, growth and quality through innovative science-based solutions. Via understanding our customers’ needs and expectations, we at ELBEVET pioneer tailored cutting-edge paths to improve feed and animal performance adding financial value.

Name: Punto Fértil S.A.S.
Description: Somos una empresa Colombiana, que distribuye productos y servicios en el sector agropecuario y veterinario en general en Colombia desde hace 16 años.

Name: Pets'n'Vets
Description:
Pets‘n’Vets is part of the Linnaeus Veterinary Ltd (A Mars Company). You can find our terms of use and privacy policy by visiting:  

Privacy statement - https://www.mars.com/privacy 
Legal notice - https://petsnvets.org/legal-notice
Contact Information - https://petsnvets.org/contact-us

Name: CARE | Charlotte Animal Referral & Emergency
Description:
Charlotte Animal Referral & Emergency (CARE) is a state-of-the-art veterinary facility in Charlotte offering 24/7 emergency care and board-certified specialty care. We see specialty appointments by referral from your primary veterinarian and are open and staffed for emergencies 365 days a year. Board-certified specialty services offered include internal medicine, cardiology, neurology, surgery, oncology and ophthalmology. Our advanced diagnostic services include ultrasonography and echocardiography, endoscopy, non-invasive surgical procedures, rapid-scan CT imaging, and high-field MRI, in addition to many others.

At CARE, we strive to be the Charlotte region’s leader in advanced veterinary care. Our mission is to set the standard for veterinary care and service by delivering outstanding specialty and emergency medicine. To remain on the forefront, we will attract and foster accomplished professionals at every level of care. Through our expertise and compassion we will work as a team with our clients to provide the best quality of life for their pet.

Name: Vetworks do Brasil
Description:
A Vetworks é uma equipe dinâmica de consultores independentes que fornece suporte técnico, treinamento prático e soluções para seus clientes em todo o mundo.
Entendemos os problemas dos nossos clientes de uma maneira ampla, através de coletas e diagnósticos, para então desenvolver soluções personalizadas e assertivas focadas no seu sistema de produção.

Name: Pet People Vets
Description:
As a team of people who absolutely love pets, we understand how important they are and the incredible effect they have on all our lives. It’s why we dedicate our lives to improving theirs.

At Pet People we always make sure that we look after ourselves and our colleagues too, because we know that happy people make happy pets.

Name: Animal Medical Center
Description: Animal Medical Center is a full service animal hospital that cares for dogs and cats in Hesperia, California. Our wide range of services includes exams, consultations, preventive care, low cost vaccinations, diet recommendations, junior and senior pet wellness care, dental, surgical procedures, digital radiology, and ultrasound, etc.

Name: Arenales Homeopatianimal
Description:
A Arenales Homeopatianimal é uma empresa brasileira, fundada em maio de 1998, iniciando suas atividades em 2000 sob a direção da bióloga, médica veterinária homeopata, engenheira agrônoma e jornalista, Maria do Carmo Arenales. A unidade nasceu com três funcionários em uma área de 310 m2, expandindo atualmente para 3.500 m2 de área construída, e com capacidade para produzir até 1.000.000 de doses mensais de medicamentos.
A Arenales tem como o objetivo, controlar e prevenir patologias, redução de custos, evitar resíduos em produtos animais e minimizar o impacto ambiental, através dos Fatores Homeopáticos.A partir de pesquisas e investimentos tecnológicos, a Arenales Homeopatianimal, viabiliza a aplicação dos Fatores Arenales, como um meio prático de prevenção e tratamento de endo e ectoparasitas, acelerando o desenvolvimento dos animais, combater infecções, entre outro inúmeros benefícios.
Somos uma empresa pioneira na tecnologia no segmento homeopático veterinário no país, sendo o primeiro Laboratório das Américas, apto a fabricação de medicamentos seguros, que protegem o meio ambiente, atuando sob um rigoroso controle de qualidade, de acordo com as normas de Boas Práticas de Fabricação de produtos veterinários. Todos os produtos são cadastrados no MAPA (Ministério da Agricultura, Pecuária e Abastecimento).

VALORES
Desenvolver tecnologia sustentável e nanotecnologia aplicada ao laboratório veterinário homeopático, visando utilizar o conhecimento da arte de curar de Samuel Hahnemann aos benefícios da homeopatia aplicado aos animais.

MISSÃO
Equilibrar os mais altos fins da vida empresarial e corporativa à pesquisa, tecnologia sustentável, divulgação e produção de medicamentos homeopáticos para todas as categorias de animais, “assim como gerar desenvolvimento sustentável cooperando para um Brasil e mundo mais sadio, próspero e principalmente ético”.

Name: HTM Vet
Description: A HTM VET nasceu de uma indústria referência no desenvolvimento e fabricação de equipamentos eletro-eletrônicos dirigidos ao segmento de saúde no Brasil, a HTM Eletrônica.A HTM Eletrônica está no mercado, há mais de 20 anos, desenvolvendo e fabricando equipamentos com alta tecnologia, design exclusivo e garantia de resultados. Hoje a HTM Eletrônica é líder em inovação, resultados e segurança. Assim como sua origem, a HTM VET tem como compromisso oferecer ao mercado os melhores e mais eficazes produtos, integrando conhecimento científico à praticidade.

Name: Lebanese Veterinary Referrals
Description: LVR is a team of dedicated itinerant vets that wants to move regional medical care forward at international standards by providing with compassion and integrity the best treatment for every animal referred and entrusted to their care. The team intervenes on a referral basis to provide the needed support in different specialties such as internal medicine, intensive care, orthopedics, general surgery, neurosurgery, minimally invasive surgery, medical imaging, endoscopy, interventional medicine, physiotherapy, rehabilitation, anesthesia and pain management.

Name: Equine Performance Center
Description:
Situated on nearly 30 pristine acres adjacent to Highway 27 in northwest Marion County,  our goal is to develop The Equine Performance Center ( EPC) into the finest and most complete conditioning and equine rehabilitation facility in the nation. The EPC has quickly been recognized by horsemen and women from all disciplines as the finest, most comprehensive facility of its kind.

EPC is centrally located in the heart of the Horse Capital of the World.  EPC has two 20 stall barns and the therapy building has two 12 x 24 air-conditioned & heated stalls.

The EPC features the most advanced conditioning and rehab equipment available in the world today including an Equine Hyperbaric Chamber – box stall type for freedom of movement while therapy is administered, an Aqua Pacer Water Treadmill – the safest, most effective water treadmill available, Cold Saltwater Leg Spa – 34 degree, highly salinated water for all types of leg therapy, Equine Swimming Pool – 110 foot long, 14 foot deep inline pool with therapeutic water, two Eurocisers with therapeutic tracking surface – one undercover and one outdoors, Solariums, Temperature-controlled veterinary inspection area with semi-surgical lighting, and rubberized surfaces in most areas. In addition to this, The EPC offers Mobile Therapy, Equine Massage, Chiropractic, Dental, Pegasus Therapy Laser, MagnaWave/P3 Electromagnetic Pulse Therapy, PRO Orthopedic Devices, DAC Vitamins & Minerals, and Therapeutic Farrier services as well as many other cutting-edge treatment options.

The staff of The EPC has decades of experience treating equine athletes of all breeds and this experience has been invaluable in helping horses of all kinds successfully return to useful lives and competition as well as conditioning and preparing them to perform at their best in their next big event. Including two lameness veterinarians available on site, experienced horsemen and horsewomen.

The EPC has numerous success stories from all facets of the equine world.  We at Equine Performance Center deliver a Rejuvenated Horse through Proven & Innovative Rehabilitation as well as conditioning techniques. Through open & honest Communication we can help any horse in any situation. We pride ourself on maintaining an excellent communication with our patients, veterinarians, owners & trainers which is the key to our success.

You can contact the staff of The Equine Performance Center at 352-369-HEAL (4325).

Name: Charis Vets
Description:
Charis Vets has been in the practice of veterinary health care in Bahrain since 2015. We have an enthusiastic and caring team ready to respond to the growing needs of our community and their beloved pets. Our professional team is happy to serve the diverse needs of our clients and you are welcome to join our family of caring animal lovers.

Our state of the art clinic is fully committed to your pet’s health and will always do our best to treat and heal them. The focus of integrative veterinary care is to nurture and support an animal’s own healing process, thus helping to prevent the development of disease. 

We do not believe in a ‘one-size fits all’ concept, when it comes to Veterinary care and medicine. Each individual animal, even within the same species, is very unique. So, at Charis Vets, we tailor make each of our services to meet each of these unique, different and complex animal needs. At Charis Vets we understand that pets are not mere add-ons to a family but rather an integral part of it. We provide holistic veterinary care to strengthen that family bond.

Name: Premier Pet Care Plan
Description: The UKs most successful premium healthcare plan provider. Our proven training and support model, in addition to a state of the art Direct Debit and administration system means vets can focus on what they love doing - keeping pets at their best - whilst benefitting from high compliance, increased revenue and footfall, and guaranteed monthly cash-flow.

Name: Balmesvet Hospital Veterinari 24h
Description: Clínica Veterinaria en el centro de Barcelona. En calle Balmes numero 205. Disponemos de todos los servicios veterinarios: medicina general, medicina interna, cirugía, traumatología, neurología, oftalmología, cardiología, reproducción, diagnóstico por imagen, laboratorio propio, hospitalización, medicina transfusiones, oncología, urgencias 24h.

Name: Instituto SAMITEC - Soluções Analíticas, Microbiológicas e Tecnológicas
Description: Somos uma empresa que colabora com a indústria (alimentos, bebidas, e cosméticos) para a otimização da qualidade e desenvolvimento de produtos melhores, mais seguros e confiáveis para o consumidor, através da medição objetiva de diferentes parâmetros. As nossas análises laboratoriais são realizadas com tecnologia de alta complexidade e desempenho em diversas áreas de competência. Além disso, a fim de garantir confiabilidade analítica, possuímos acreditações e certificações nacionais e internacionais, além de uma equipe altamente qualificada que oferece apoio técnico durante o processo em todo o território nacional, além do desenvolvimento de atividades de pesquisa de primeira classe, que nos permitem fornecer soluções de ponta e exclusivas.
Location: Santa Maria, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Valley Veterinary Care
Description: Proudly leading the charge in caring for those who care for life's greatest companions. At Valley Veterinary Care, we pride ourselves in a comprehensive approach to veterinary medicine; ensuring everyone is properly cared for, from the pet, to the pet owner, to the veterinarian and patient care teams. Founded on compassion, humility, honesty and transparency, we believe in truly making a positive impact for pets and those who care for them.

Name: Round Lake Animal Hospital Lahore
Description:
A state-of-the-art 𝐕𝐞𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐲 𝐇𝐨𝐬𝐩𝐢𝐭𝐚𝐥 for your 𝐁𝐞𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐝 𝐏𝐄𝐓

Name: Langhill Veterinary Practice Partners
Description:
Langhill VPP set out to specialise solely in Practice Recruitment, working hard to create a lifelong relationship be that a fully managed partnership or a platform to manage your own recruitment needs.
We offer tailored resources for both Practice and Candidate ensuring we meet all your specific requirements. Langhill VPP helps practices find the perfect candidate and candidates find the perfect role covering all disciplines. 
Our mission is to help veterinary practices find and attract top talent, while also helping veterinary professionals find the best career opportunities within the industry.

Name: Arthrex Belgium Vet Systems
Description: Arthrex Vet Systems is a division of Arthrex, Inc., a leading global medical device manufacturer. Over the last decade, Arthrex has applied its expertise in orthopedics and orthobiologics to develop hundreds of products for the treatment of large and small animals.

Name: VetSpecialistes
Description: VetSpecialistes a pour but de compléter l’offre des vétérinaires de Genève et du reste du bassin lémanique en proposant des actes médicaux spécialisés. Vous trouverez chez nous une médecine hautement qualifiée dans les domaines de la chirurgie conventionnelle et minimale invasive, de l’ophtalmologie, de l’imagerie médicale comprenant scanner et échographie, de la cardiologie, ainsi que dans le domaine de la réhabilitation avec de l’ostéopathie et de la physiothérapie pour les animaux de compagnie.

Name: Corb Science Solutions
Description:
A Corb possui vasta experiência em gestão de riscos e quer ajudar os seus clientes com soluções para a integração de uma gestão de riscos descomplicada e menos burocrática, seguindo critérios técnicos e padrões internacionais.

Ajudamos a sua instituição a utilizar a ferramenta de forma estratégica e contínua, desde a identificação de riscos e possíveis danos, realizando o mapeamento da sequência de eventos que podem levar ao risco, até a implementação da gestão e comunicação de riscos.

Name: PET 360 PK
Description:
Welcome to our new 24/7 location. We take pride in delivering personalised & compassionate care to our patients in a comfortable veterinary facility that offers all the advantages of modern veterinary technology.
Services we offer:
- Internal Medicine
- Surgeries (Soft Tissue/Orthopaedic)

Name: Boundary Bay Veterinary Specialty Hospital

Name: Thonglor Pet Hospital | โรงพยาบาลสัตว์ทองหล่อ
Description:
Thonglor Pet Hospital was first started as a small pet clinic. It was truly nurtured with love and interwoven with the inseparable bond between human and animals. Very often, our clinic needed to lengthen our service time greatly due to the death-and-life matters of our patients. Sometimes, our medical equipment was insufficient to provide the medical care to all animals. In those days, only the Small Animal Hospital of Chulalongkorn University had a full medical service and facility. But this state-run clinic still had a shortcoming in that it couldn’t provide medical treatment to its patients throughout 24 hours. Yet, such problems can be fixed. 
Eventually the overtime animal clinics serving as the new oasis  for those pet owners have sprouted in every nook and cranny of the city. With the strong aspiration to establish a full-service animal hospital that meets the international standards, the founder then recruited those like-minded people to join the team and then set up the private animal hospital in the heart of Bangkok. Newfangled medical equipment was installed. Specialists from different fields were invited to join the team. Inaugurated on August 21, 1994, the top-level animal hospital stands majestically on Sukhumvit Road of Thonglor area, hence its name Thonglor Pet Hospital.

Name: PetVivo Animal Health
Description:
PetVivo Animal Health provides veterinarians with regenerative therapies that improve the quality of life for companion animals. 

Our Products:

Spryng with OsteoCushion Technology: veterinarian-administered, intra-articular injection designed to manage lameness, osteoarthritis, and other joint afflictions, in cats, dogs, and horses. This innovative medical device provides joint support with no drug interactions or systemic effects. The components (derived from collagen and elastin) provide a natural scaffold similar to components of healthy synovial tissue, and may promote a constructive remodeling of the synovium and joint tissue - going beyond just masking the symptoms of osteoarthritis. 

PrecisePRP: a first-in-class, off-the-shelf leucoreduced allogeneic pooled freeze-dried platelet-rich plasma (PRP) product intended to provide a species-specific source of concentrated platelets in plasma for intra-articular administration in dogs and horses. Unlike traditional PRP kits, PrecisePRP does not require a blood draw or centrifugation, offering a convenient and consistent PRP solution for veterinary practices.

Name: European Wildlife Vets - EWV
Description:
EWV is dedicated to providing both its local and international clients the highest standard of service excellence. EWV operates mainly in Portugal and Spain but has also been involved in conservation projects in other countries like Angola or the United Arab Emirates.

EWV aims to provide professional and reliable wildlife veterinary services to the conservation and zoo industry and adds to the market the combined experience of 3 veterinarians with different backgrounds and areas of interest. We are equipped to perform advanced diagnosis and surgical procedures in “difficult” species or plan and execute the capture and translocation of large numbers of wild animals with the highest standards utilizing the most updated techniques, drugs and equipment.

EWV have expanded significantly in the last years and currently provide veterinary and curator services in a large African Safari Park in Portugal, consult for several wildlife and hunting reserves and attend to a number of wildlife rehabilitation centers.

We are involved with numerous other smaller projects, providing veterinary expertise.

Our company is also becoming a reference in Europe in the training and education of wildlife veterinarians providing unique hands-on practical experience to vets and students that desire to understand and get involved is this highly competitive field of the veterinary profession.

Rowe Veterinary Referrals provides second opinion Veterinary Services across ten disciplines (ophthalmology, medicine, soft tissue and orthopaedic surgery, dermatology, ultrasound, MRI, CT, acupuncture and radioactive iodine treatment). RVR staff work out of three separate sites, caring for

Our Bristol Hospital is home to most of the referral team and has recently undergone significant building work which has allowed consolidation of the existing Referral teams and provide space for growth of our referral services.

Name: Pawlyclinic
Description:
Pawlyclinic is a complete on-demand pet healthcare platform operating in Singapore and Indonesia. Our mission is to continuously drive improvement in the quality of life of all pets by helping pet parents proactively manage their pets’ health. We start by making veterinary care omnipresent, simple and efficient for all pet parents through technology and innovation

Core to this mission is our integrated platform that comprises two applications - the Pet Parent App and the Vet Portal - in a unified ecosystem

The Pet Parent App provides pet parents on-demand access to veterinary teleheath, in-clinic veterinary care, prescriptions and electronic health records for their pets. 

With Pawlyclinic, pet parents can consult a vet online anytime, anywhere, and have medication delivered to their doorstep. If further in-clinic care is needed, pet parents are seamlessly referred into our network of affiliate and partner clinics.

The Vet Portal offers vet practices and vets an all-in-one platform to practise veterinary telemedicine, receive and organise physical appointment requests, issue digital prescriptions and provide medical records of their patients. Find out more at: https://www.pawlyclinic.com/for-vets

Description:
We are Aquilón CyL S.L., a technology-based company established in March 2012 on the basis of technologies developed by the University of León (ULe) and the Autonomous University of Barcelona (UAB). This initiative arose from the interaction between Mr Pedro Rubio, Professor of Infectious Diseases at the ULe's faculty of Veterinary Medicine, and the company formerly named Janus Developments, currently Spherium Biomed (www.spheriumbiomed.com), which is licensee of UAB's technology. This project became a reality thanks to the firm financial support of the technological fund "Seguranza", fostered by the regional government of Castille and León and managed by Clave Mayor. Aquilón aims to become the natural way to develop the findings and inventions of Spanish research, basically in the veterinary medicine field.
 
Nowadays, Aquilón has a permanent team supported by experts in oriented sciences, regulatory affairs, business, industry and finance, setting up a management model based on variable costs and focused on bringing the technologies acquired from its academic environment to a stage where its value is acknowledged by animal health and nutrition industries.

Name: ECCO Vet
Description:
A reabilitação animal com tratamento com Fototerapia veterinária consiste em um procedimento inovador e acessível, que visa aliviar sintomas incômodos e contribuir em melhorias no condicionamento funcional do animal.  Além disso, esse tipo de tratamento tem por objetivo de recuperar o bem-estar e qualidade de vida do animal, isso porque seus efeitos contribuem com uma rápida cicatrização, melhoras em quadros inflamatórios, analgesia e melhoras em dores, relaxa a musculatura, diminui edemas, consolida a região óssea e ainda aumenta a produção de colágeno.

O Ecco VET é um equipamento multifuncional com inovadora tecnologia de laser e led terapêutico, o mais potente do mercado. Melhor resultado, eficiente e indolor! O Ecco Vet atende todos os portes de animais. É uma ferramenta muito utilizada em clínicas veterinárias e tem o papel fundamental em processos de cicatrização de feridas e lesões, pós-operatórios, inflamações, edemas e nevralgias, entre outros. Além disso, também pode ser usado em casos de dermatites e problemas de pele, problemas alérgicos ou causados por bactérias, fungos ou parasitas. O resultado é rápido e o procedimento, simples, não causa dores ao animal.

ÁREAS DE ATUAÇÃO DA FOTOTERAPIA NA VETERINÁRIA:
- Fisioterapia Veterinária
- Clínica e Cirurgia
- Acupuntura Veterinária
- Dermatologia e Estética Animal
- Odontologia Veterinária
- Neurologia Veterinária
- Prevenção e Qualidade de Vida

TRATAMENTOS:
- Alívio de dores e inflamações crônicas
- Displasia Coxofemural
- Rupturas, distensões e estiramentos musculares de nervos ou tendões
- Luxação de Patela
- Artrite e artrose
- Lesões em articulações
- Hérnia de Disco
- Síndrome da Cauda Equina
- Síndrome de Wobbler
- Lesões de Nervos Periféricos
- Controle de Patologias Sistêmicas, hormonais e ligadas a Idade avançada
- Promoção de Bem-Estar e Qualidade de vida
- Controle da obesidade
- Cicatrização de Lesões de Pele
- Pós-operatórios
- Dermatites
- Problemas de pele alérgicos ou por fungos

Name: VetWing
Description: Vetwing provides products and services based on artificial intelligence to increase poultry farms' production and improve management. Our product is a smart digital measure that records chickens' weight and ecological parameters such as temperature, humidity, ammonia gas, and light intensity. This product is installed in poultry farms and sends data to the Vetwing platform, and then machine learning algorithms analyze data and portray graphs. The most appropriate management solution to each region's climate and disease prevalence is suggested to the poultry farmers and displayed on a personal dashboard. This startup aims to offer products and services based on artificial intelligence and big data in the poultry industry for the whole food chain, from farm to fork.

Name: Celia Hammond Animal Trust
Description: 1986 Celia Hamond founded the Celia Hammond Animal Trust, with the main objective of setting up low cost neuter and vaccination clinics, thus bringing responsible pet ownership within the reach of everyone. After a huge fund raising effort, the first clinic opened in Lewisham, South East London, in October 1995 and was fully booked almost from day one. After a short while an average of fifty dogs and one hundred cats were being neutered every week. In January 1999 a second clinic was opened in East London and was soon neutering the same numbers. Both London clinics operate a 24-hour rescue/rehoming service. Celia's sanctuary in East Sussex usually has around three hundred animals either awaiting rehoming or resident in comfort in the sanctuary's sixty acres of beautiful countryside for the rest of their lives.

Name: Vetpath Laboratory Services
Description:
Vetpath Laboratory Services is a specialist veterinary laboratory in Western Australia, dedicated to providing our clients with the finest diagnostic service.

At Vetpath we are committed to supporting veterinarians deliver timely, accurate and high quality diagnostic results through our personalised and responsive service. Our primary aim is to assist practitioners improve the health and well-being of patients by providing the crucial information needed to enable veterinarians to prevent illness, diagnose disease, guide treatment pathways, monitor disease progression and confirm patient recovery.

Vetpath provides complete laboratory services to veterinarians and patients, through blood biochemistry, haematology, microbiology, endocrinology, serology, histopathology,cytology, evaluation and interpretation services.

The team at Vetpath includes couriers, receptionists, accounts,clients services, IT, medical scientists and pathologists; all of whom are dedicate to providing you with a reliable and world class pathology service for you and your patients.

Name: Renove Distribuidora

Name: Greater Birmingham Humane Society
Description:
The Greater Birmingham Humane Society, founded in 1883, is the largest and oldest humane society in Alabama. Over the course of our history we have witnessed the changes in our community and yet have never left the original mission of Dr. Phillips “to promote the humane treatment of people and animals through education, advocacy and services.”

The Greater Birmingham Humane Society is an open access humane society, meaning that we will accept any animal in need of our services. We have two divisions:

GBHS Animal Care & Control: The Greater Birmingham Humane Society provides animal care & control to many cities in the Greater Birmingham/Jefferson County area. We regulate uncontrolled domestic animals, assist with bites and attacks by aggressive animals (depending on the jurisdiction), investigate reports of possible animal cruelty and neglect, pick up stray animals, pick up confined strays, pick up loose animals without proper rabies identification, rescue injured animals, keep records of lost/found cats and dogs, give animal information and referrals, and promote responsible pet ownership through education.

GBHS Animal Care & Adoptions: Our state-of-the-art adoption center at 300 Snow Drive can house around 300 adoptable pets in need of homes. These pets are both owner surrendered pets and rescued strays from GBHS Animal Care & Control. Our caring and well-trained staff of animal care technicians and adoption counselors provides care to the pets and assists the public with making informed choices about adopting pets into families in the community.

Name: Souq Waqif Falcon Hospital
Description:
Souq Waqif Falcon Hospital (SWFH) is a specialty practice for falcons established in the year 2008. In 2011 construction work on a 3-floor hospital was completed and the facility was subsequently inaugurated and clinical work begun in August of that year to face the challenges of expected heavy caseloads in the following month of September when falconry season officially begins. 

Currently, the hospital provides clinical and laboratory services to a daily turnover of 130-150 falcons during the peak season and up to 50 falcons daily during the moulting season. 

The location of SWFH is conveniently located in the Falcon Souq, within the popular Souq Waqif – the ‘Standing Market’. The Souq was and is still famous for buying and selling goods ranging from livestock and fish, to spices and cereal grains, to teas and coffees, fresh and dry fruit, to garments and cloths; and various other goods. 

It takes a team of 30 hospital staff plus a 24 hour hospital service team that keeps the hospital clean and operational.

Name: Australian College of Veterinary Nursing
Description:
At the Australian College of Veterinary Nursing, we provide Australia’s top veterinary nurse training courses. Our graduates are amongst the most sought-after and highly-skilled veterinary nurses, able to provide the best care possible for their patients.

The Australian College of Veterinary Nursing is a member of the Veterinary Nurse Solutions training group.
 
Run in conjunction with the University of Queensland (RTO: 1511), when you train with us you can be sure you’re receiving the industry’s best, most up-to-date and relevant veterinary nurse training.

Name: MissionVet Specialty & Emergency
Description:
MissionVet Specialty & Emergency is a comprehensive multidisciplinary specialty and emergency veterinary hospital located in San Antonio, TX.  Our highly trained specialists, doctors and support staff are devoted to providing the most advanced, compassionate medical care for your pet in collaboration with your family veterinarian. We take pride in not only delivering world-class medicine, but also taking time to educate our clients about their pet’s condition. We know that dealing with pet health issues can be difficult and stressful, so our warm hospital atmosphere and friendly staff will make our clients feel as comfortable as possible during their visit. We take pride in delivering care that you can count on.

Our veterinary specialists and support staff are fully committed to the following values:

Quality Medicine
Compassion
Communication
Teamwork
Education 
Friendliness

This multidisciplinary hospital was created in 2012 by partners of Gulf Coast Veterinary Specialists in Houston and local partners Tige Witsberger, DVM, DACVS and Jocelyn Cooper, DVM, DACVIM (Neurology) to provide family veterinarians, clients, and patients in the San Antonio area with “Care You Can Count On.” In July 2016, MissionVet and its sister hospitals of Gulf Coast Veterinary Specialists and the Austin Veterinary Emergency & Specialty Center partnered with the Compassion-First Pet Hospitals to accelerate their growth and network with other best-in-class specialty and emergency hospitals. Then in December 2016, MissionVet acquired Mission Pet Emergency, creating a comprehensive specialty and 24/7 emergency hospital. Additional specialty services offered at MissionVet include critical care, internal medicine, neurology & neurosurgery, oncology and general surgery & orthopedics.

4. Dental care.
5. Emergency and critical care.
6. Boarding service.

Pet Products:

3. Grooming supplies

We ensure that all our products are carefully selected, ensuring the highest quality and meeting the specific dietary and health requirements of pets.

Are you looking for a reliable and caring veterinary clinic for your beloved pet? Do you desire top-quality pet products? We invite you to experience the exceptional services and products offered by Sanchu Animal Hospital.

Name: ΠΛΑΚΕΝΤΙΑ Όμιλος Κτηνιατρικών Κλινικών
Description:
Η Κτηνιατρική Κλινική Πλακεντία ιδρύθηκε το 2015 στην Αγία Παρασκευή. Προσφέρει ολοκληρωμένη κτηνιατρική φροντίδα, με έμφαση στις εξειδικευμένες υπηρεσίες δεύτερης γνώμης και στη θεραπεία επειγόντων περιστατικών 24/7. Εμπνευστής και δημιουργός της είναι ο κτηνίατρος Ιγνάτιος Λιαπής που μετρά 35 χρόνια επιτυχημένης πορείας στην Κτηνιατρική επιστήμη.

Σήμερα η Κτηνιατρική Κλινική Πλακεντία μετεξελίσσεται σε Όμιλο Κτηνιατρικών Κλινικών και με αρωγό το επενδυτικό ταμείο SMERC δημιουργείται η ΠΛAΚΕΝΤΙA Όμιλος Κτηνιατρικών Κλινικών.

Όραμα μας αποτελεί η  ολοκληρωμένη και ποιοτική εμπειρία φροντίδας των ζώων συντροφιάς.

Δέσμευση μας είναι η  συνεχής βελτίωση των ποιοτικών κτηνιατρικών πρακτικών στις υπηρεσίες μας.

Σκοπός μας είναι να δημιουργήσουμε σχέσεις εμπιστοσύνης με τους  κηδεμόνες κατοικίδιων,  τους κτηνιάτρους 1ης γνώμης και τους συνεργάτες μας.

Δίπλα στο ζώο που ασθενεί!

Name: ACOVENE
Description:
The Accreditation Committee for Veterinary Nurse Education (ACOVENE) aims to create a harmonized and thriving European veterinary nursing community, where highly skilled professionals are valued, recognized, and empowered to deliver exceptional patient care.

ACOVENE is a voluntary organisation to accredit veterinary nurse education programmes in Europe.

Accreditation by ACOVENE provides an assurance of quality, international parity and recognition for a veterinary nursing programme.

Veterinary nurses who graduate from an ACOVENE-accredited programme have attained a known minimum standard of knowledge and skills.

Name: Gulf Coast Humane Society
Description:

GCHS is a no-kill shelter and does not euthanize any animal for lack of space or length of time that they are in our care.

Name: Activet Tierarztpraxen
Description:
Unter dem Namen Activet etablieren wir ein attraktives und wirtschaftlich erfolgreiches Tierarztpraxen-Netzwerk mit einem einheitlichen Markenauftritt. Derzeit gibt es deutschlandweit sieben Activet Praxen in den Fachhandelsmärkten der Fressnapf-Gruppe sowie in einer Megazoo-Filiale. Außerdem planen wir die Zusammenarbeit mit Tierarztpraxen, die sich nicht innerhalb eines Fressnapf-Marktes befinden, sondern räumlich unabhängig sind – sogenannte „StandAlone“ Praxen. Daher suchen wir die langfristige Partnerschaft mit Tierärztinnen und Tierärzten, die unsere Begeisterung teilen, kompetenter Ansprechpartner rund um das Zusammenleben zwischen Mensch und Tier zu sein. Activet achtet dabei besonders auf die Personifizierung der Praxen. Denn der Erfolg jeder einzelnen Praxis ist nicht zuletzt geprägt von der Persönlichkeit der jeweiligen Tierärztin bzw. des Tierarztes.

Die Liebe zwischen Mensch und Tier ist für uns eine Herzensangelegenheit, denn gesunde Tiere sind glücklichere Tiere. Deshalb möchten wir unseren Kunden an ausgewählten Standorten die – in unseren Augen – hochwertigste Dienstleistung am Tier anbieten, die Versorgung in einer Tierarztpraxis. Unsere hoch qualifizierten Tierärzte und Tierärztinnen sowie unsere tiermedizinischen Fachangestellten stehen dabei für klare Werte, auf die sich unsere Kunden verlassen können. Activet - eine Tierarztpraxis Ihres Vertrauens.

Activet ist eine Gesellschaft der Fressnapf Holding SE. Die Fressnapf-Gruppe (Fressnapf | Maxi Zoo) ist Europas Marktführer im Heimtierbedarf.

Name: VETS IN THE CITY
Description: Remaining your partner for honest, compassionate and complete pet healthcare. Our services and facilities have been designed to assist in all routine preventative care for young, healthy pets; early detection and treatment of disease as your pet ages; and complete medical and surgical care as necessary during their lifetime.

Name: Orchard Park Veterinary Medical Center
Description:
Orchard Park Veterinary Medical Center (OPVMC) is a well-established, PRIMARY CARE, 24/7 EMERGENCY, & SPECIALTY REFERRAL small animal veterinary hospital.


Located in the suburbs of Buffalo, NY, we are a full service, 24 hour, small animal hospital that has primary care, emergency and referral services all in one building. We serve the greater Western New York Area and beyond including Southern Ontario, Canada all the way down to Central Northwest, Pennsylvania. 

~200 employees including 20+ veterinarians (including board certified internal medicine specialists, board certified surgeon, and a boarded oncologist) 

We are open and fully staffed 24/7, 365, including all holidays.

Always the Patient's Advocate

OPVMC is prior to be an AAHA accredited practice

Name: The City Vet Clinic
Description: The City Vet Clinic is not only well-known because of treating animals all over the United Arab Emirates, but also because it occupies Veterinary Doctors specialized in different medical fields and pet categories. Our vets are able to handle and treat, apart from dogs and cats, all sorts of exotic animals and avian species including falcons. Our highly trained staff also includes experienced Soft Tissue and OrthopedicSurgeons as well as Internal Medicine and Cardiology Specialists.

Name: VetSoftwareHub
Description:
VetSoftwareHub is the independent guide to veterinary software. We help busy hospitals discover, evaluate, and choose the right tools with confidence. Our marketplace brings together clear product profiles, category specific feature comparisons, and practical buying resources in one place.

What veterinary teams can do:
• Build a focused shortlist in minutes
• Compare products by category specific features and workflows
• Use scorecards, checklists, and how-to guides to run better demos
• Learn from our weekly blog and newsletter on software, security, and data privacy

What vendors can do:
• Update listings so buyers see accurate, workflow based screenshots
• Share what makes your product different, with clarity and proof
• Explore respectful sponsorship options that add value for practitioners

Why it matters:
Software choices shape client experience, team morale, and medical outcomes. We promote transparency, workflow fit, and responsible data practices so clinics spend less time guessing and more time caring for patients.

Visit vetsoftwarehub.com to explore the marketplace, submit or update a product, and tap into resources that make software decisions faster and smarter.

Name: Hospital Veterinário Cambuí
Description:
O Hospital Veterinário Cambuí, localizado em Campinas, é referência em Medicina Veterinária Intensiva, trouxe à cidade e região o primeiro leito de UTI para cães e gatos.

Conta com equipamentos de primeira linha e uma equipe ampla e especializada. O ambiente possui uma estrutura hospitalar moderna e de qualidade dispondo de diversas áreas da medicina veterinária.
O único com Ressonância Magnética da região.

Name: AniCura San Vicente Hospital Veterinario
Description:
Hospital Veterinario San Vicente, fundado en 1949, es una institución privada para el ejercicio clínico veterinario mixto, en pequeños animales, animales exóticos y caballos, lo que le confiere unas características especiales poco habituales en el ejercicio veterinario privado.

Nuestro Hospital Veterinario está dividido en 2 secciones principales: Clínica de Pequeños Animales y sección de Clínica Equina. Se estableció en 1949 en el casco urbano de San Vicente del Raspeig, población próxima a Alicante, por su fundador, el Dr. Manuel Isidro Rodríguez García, que evolucionó en su ejercicio paralelo a la actividad veterinaria en España en los últimos 50 años, pasando del ejercicio oficial y rural en su mayoría, dedicada a los animales de renta y trabajo, a una clínica más especializada y compleja, dedicada a los pequeños animales y animales de deporte, como el caballo.

Actualmente es una S.L. (Sociedad Limitada). En 1992, ante las nuevas exigencias y necesidades planteadas por el aumento de la actividad, y consecuentemente del número de profesionales, se inauguran las nuevas instalaciones, ubicadas entre las poblaciones de San Vicente del Raspeig y Alicante, ya fuera del casco urbano y junto a la autopista del Mediterráneo.

Nuestra misión es procurar la salud y el bienestar de las mascotas de nuestros clientes a través de profesionales especializados, con la ayuda de medios técnicos avanzados. Trabajamos también como Centro de Referencia colaborando estrechamente con otros veterinarios que solicitan nuestros servicios especializados.  En nuestro hospital central disponemos de servicio de urgencias 24 horas.

En el año 2019 el Hospital pasa a formar parte de manera del grupo de Hospitales Vetsum. Esto supone un gran crecimiento a nivel profesional y de especialización. Posteriormente, en el 2022 pasa a formar grande del grupo AniCura, con una amplia proyección en el sector veterinario.

Name: AquaPredict
Description:
Vår teknologi kombinerer analyse av biomarkører med maskinlæringsmodeller. 

Med AquaPredict kan fiskeoppdrettere utføre avansert blodtesting av fisk i sanntid, direkte på anlegget. 

Løsningen krever hverken laboratorium eller avansert utstyr: Prøven legges i maskinen, og når den er ferdiganalysert lastes resultatet opp til helseportalen - helt automatisk. 

Analysen tar 12 minutter, og gir presis kunnskap som gjør det enkelt å ta de beste beslutningene for produksjonen, øke fiskevelferden og senke dødeligheten. 

Les mer på https://aquapredict.io/no, eller ta kontakt for en demonstrasjon eller en prat om hvordan vi kan løfte produksjonsresultatene dine!

Name: Birsen Kimya Sanayi A.Ş.
Description: We are manufacturing both powder and liquid feed additives such as premixes, feed concentrates, toxin binders, growth promoters, probiotics, etc. We are exporting our products. We are importing vitamins, minerals, amino acids, etc and sell them locally.

Name: Callvet Animals & Birds Hospital Lahore
Description:
CALLVET (SMC) Pvt Ltd is a full-service veterinary medical facility, located in Pakistan The professional and courteous Dr. Abdul Waheed Fatim with his team of Vets in this Project seeks to provide the best possible medical care, surgical care and for their highly-valued patients. Dr. Abdul Waheed Fatim
Our Mission is to innovate Clients' thoughts about their Animals by Making “Animal Health Revolution” To provide our clients with access to leading-edge products and services and authoritative educational content focusing on enhancing the human animal bond.

Name: SurgiVets - Veterinary Surgery & Medicine
Description:
SurgiVets is a privately owned Greek veterinary company that aims to set the benchmark in veterinary practice standards and care. It is the life-work of Veterinary Surgeons Dimitris Kalligeris and Konstantinos Bikos, both experienced veterinary professionals with years of experience in private practice. 

SurgiVets offers state-of-the-art facilities to address all aspects of companion animal surgery and medicine, with a special focus on orthopaedics and soft-tissue surgery, intensive care and diagnostic imaging. 

Currently it operates one fully equipped Veterinary Surgery at the Moschato district in Southern Athens, that offers expertise, compassion and guidance to pet owners both locally and nationwide.

Name: CESASP - Centro de Estética e Saúde Animal
Description:
A CESASP é um Centro de Estética e Saúde Animal localizada na cidade de São Paulo que tem como objetivo dar melhor qualidade de vida ao animais, complementar e potencializar os tratamentos veterinários convencionais.

Além dos serviços clinico e cirurgicos convencionais, também oferecemos alguns serviços de terapias complementares ( terapias alternativas ) como: acupuntura, florais e homeopatia.

Name: Kin Vet Community
Description:
Launched in July 2023 with 11 practices, we aim to create a thriving veterinary community that improves the wellbeing of our colleagues, clients and animals.

Our Vision:

To create a thriving veterinary community where knowledge and compassion intersect to improve the wellbeing of our colleagues, our clients and their animals.

Our Purpose:

To be the trusted vet across local communities, promoting animal health and fostering long term relationships with our clients and their beloved pets.

Our Mission:

We will create a workplace culture  and experience that values our colleagues’ professional growth and wellbeing.

By nurturing and fulfilling our passionate veterinary professionals we ensure our communities receive the best possible care.

We are guided by our values:

Empathy - We approach our clients, their pets and each other with the warmth and understanding we all deserve. Within our community we nurture and respect each other.

Transparency - We openly share intentions and knowledge to build understanding and integrity. We provide clear and straightforward communication across our community.

Trust - We earn the trust and confidence placed in us. We are collaborative and dependable, ensuring we deliver the best possible care.

Name: Production Animal Consultation
Description: Production Animal Consultation (PAC) is a science-driven, people-focused group of experts that offers protein producers all over the world a competitive advantage through strategic planning and access to a global database of industry data.

Name: Veterinary Specialist Advice (VSA)
Description:
𝐕𝐞𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐲 𝐒𝐩𝐞𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐭 𝐀𝐝𝐯𝐢𝐜𝐞 (𝐕𝐒𝐀): 𝐀 𝐒𝐩𝐞𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐭 𝐢𝐧 𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐏𝐨𝐜𝐤𝐞𝐭. 
We provide fast, affordable telemedicine support from board-certified specialists across 15+ disciplines, along with accessible subscription packages for both veterinary professionals and practices. Our subscription tiers include “specialist-in-your-pocket” advice, written consultations, CPD, journal clubs, podcasts and login access for entire teams.

Our multidisciplinary team includes diplomates, residents, professors and PhD holders dedicated to making specialist level expertise available to every veterinary professional.

𝐖𝐞 𝐬𝐮𝐩𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭 𝐯𝐞𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐲 𝐭𝐞𝐚𝐦𝐬 𝐛𝐲 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐯𝐢𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠:
