 veterinaryspecialistadvice.com

Name: Core Imaging
Description: Core Imaging brings connected ultrasound to the veterinary market.  Using our exclusive CoreVu Scan Assist, we have made learning how to acquire the correct images a breeze.  Our product lineup includes Wisonic and Philips ultrasounds.

Name: Mount Laurel Animal Hospital
Description:
Our mission is to serve our community, by providing a family friendly environment, which delivers the highest level of veterinary care available, 24 hours a day.

At Mount Laurel Animal Hospital, we strive to be an employer where exceptionally talented people want to work. We are especially honored and proud when that drive is publicly recognized by respected local, regional and national industry authorities including USA Today, Burlington County Times, Courier Post, and many others. 

We are a privately-owned hospital located in beautiful Mount Laurel, NJ (close proximity to Philadelphia). We are the premier veterinary critical care and referral center for Southern New Jersey and the surrounding areas, providing compassionate and progressive veterinary care for a wide range of companion and exotic pets. We currently have 50 practicing doctors and a support staff of over 180 employees. Our specialty care departments, led by board certified veterinarians, include cardiology, exotics, internal medicine, oncology, ophthalmology, orthopedics, neurology, dermatology, surgery, acupuncture, rehabilitation, pain management and behavioral medicine. We also have a convenient house call service.

To learn more please visit mlahvet.com

Name: Quokka Vet
Description:
A Quokka Saúde Animal, integrante do grupo ONmnia que inclui as empresas GT Group, VIDA Biotecnologia, RenyLab e a Imaes. Diagnósticos In Vitro, é a mais recente adição ao portfólio, contribuindo para tornar o grupo ainda mais completo no mercado brasileiro do segmento de saúde em diagnostico in vitro.

A Quokka Saúde Animal entrará forte no mercado veterinário oferecendo uma ampla gama de soluções, incluindo linhas de hematologia, bioquímiica, gasometria, coagulação, urianálise, pré-analíticos e analíticos.

Neste contexto, apresentamos o bichinho mais feliz do mundo, o Quokka com seus adoráveis cerca de 50 centímetros de comprimento, o marsupial Quokka conquista corações ao redor do mundo com sua aparência que lembra um bichinho de pelúcia ou uma versão miniatura de um canguru. Sua simpatia e fofura são verdadeiramente encantadoras. Esse marsupial australiano é conhecido como o "rei das selfies". Sua expressão facial parece estar sempre sorrindo, tornando-o o modelo perfeito para fotos espontâneas e adoráveis.

Estamos empenhados em oferecer aos profissionais veterinários as ferramentas necessárias para garantir a saúde e a felicidade de seus pacientes.

Na QUOKKA | SAÚDE ANIMAL, estamos prontos para contribuir com a excelência no cuidado veterinário

Name: Dovecote Veterinary Referrals
Description:
Dovecote Veterinary Referrals is a purpose-built specialist small animal referral centre based in Castle Donington, serving both local veterinary clients and referring practices across the Midlands. We deliver a multi-disciplinary, specialist referral service with advanced facilities and a dedicated team focused on excellent outcomes and communication. Our modern hospital environment supports comprehensive diagnostic and surgical care, combining expert clinicians with state-of-the-art equipment to provide trusted, high-quality service.
Our hospital is equipped with in-house high-field MRI (1.5T), 64-slice CT, electrodiagnostics, endoscopy and fully equipped surgical suites, enabling comprehensive investigation and treatment within one site.
Overnight patient care is provided on site through our dedicated MiNight team, ensuring continuous monitoring and support outside normal hours.

We offer specialist services in:
• Neurology & Neurosurgery
• Orthopaedics
• Soft Tissue Surgery
• Internal Medicine
• Dermatology
• Oncology
• Ophthalmology

Committed to collaborative care and the best possible experience for referring vets and their patients.

Name: Campofértil S.A.S
Description: Somos una empresa enfocada en proveer soluciones integrales para el sector pecuario.

Name: Biostar Pharmaceutical S.A.
Description: We are a veterinary pharmaceutical company with social and environmental responsibility that contributes to the well-being of various animal species by offering high-quality therapeutic solutions.

Name: PRONOVO Nutrición y Sanidad Animal
Description:
Somos una distribuidora de productos de nutrición y sanidad para pequeños y grandes animales, con más de 15 años de trayectoria en el mercado. No solo nos dedicamos a la comercialización de productos de calidad, sino que también nutrimos el éxito de nuestros clientes, brindando acompañamiento técnico y soluciones efectivas que impulsan su crecimiento.
Distribuidor Oficial de Provimi del Sur de Córdoba.

Name: Clinique vétérinaire AGORAVET
Description: La clinique vétérinaire AGORAVET, proposant un service de référé vétérinaire exclusif, a ouvert ses portes en Septembre 2022 et propose une gamme très étendue de services. Les consultations pour vos animaux se font uniquement sur rendez-vous et sur recommandation de la part de votre vétérinaire traitant habituel. Le centre est équipé de moyens techniques de pointe et notamment d'une IRM haut champ aux performances exceptionnelles. Nous pourrons vous accueillir également pour tout autre examen d'imagerie : scanner, échographie cardiaque, abdominale ou musculo-tendineuse, endoscopie, imagerie de l'oeil. Nous assurons également toutes consultations et chirurgies en ophtalmologie, médecine interne, neurologie, orthopédie ainsi que pour vos nouveaux animaux de compagnie.

Name: ALHAMRY TRADING Co.
Description:
At Alhamry Trading Company, we are driven by a strong vision and an unwavering commitment to making a difference in the lives of animals. We believe that every animal deserves the best care possible, and our mission is to provide the highest-quality veterinary pharmaceutical products to ensure their well-being and health.
By partnering with reputable manufacturers and suppliers, we guarantee that our products meet the highest standards of quality and efficacy. We continuously strive to offer a comprehensive range of innovative solutions that cater to the diverse needs of veterinarians and animal owners alike.
But our commitment goes beyond just delivering exceptional products. We understand the importance of expert knowledge and support in the veterinary industry. That is why we invest in a team of highly trained professionals who are dedicated to providing outstanding customer service. Whether it's answering your questions or offering guidance, we are here to support you every step of the way.
We are not just another pharmaceutical trading company; we are a trusted partner in the pursuit of animal health. Our passion for animals drives us to constantly improve and innovate, ensuring that we stay at the forefront of the veterinary industry. We believe that by improving the lives of animals, we contribute to a better world.
Join us on this journey towards brilliance. Together, let's make a lasting impact on the well-being of animals worldwide.

Name: Hospital Veterinário 4cats
Description: Hospital 4cats is a company based out of 1311 Av. Pacaembu - Pacaembu, São Paulo, Brazil.

Name: AniCura LorraineVet
Description:
Clinique vétérinaire AniCura LorraineVet
La clinique vétérinaire AniCura LorraineVet est située à Ludres, près de Nancy. 

L'activité de l'établissement s'oriente autour de deux pôles principaux : 
- la clinique offre des services de médecine générale et de chirurgie de convenance (castration, stérilisation, petite intervention chirurgicale) ; 
- AniCura LorraineVet est également un centre médico-chirurgical de référés. A ce titre, la clinique couvre les disciplines suivantes : chirurgie, imagerie, médecine interne, ophtalmologie, dermatologie ainsi que cardiologie. 

La clinique vétérinaire AniCura LorraineVet est un établissement du réseau AniCura, une société du groupe Mars.
Mentions légales : https://www.mars.com/legal-france
Respect de la vie privée : https://www.mars.com/privacy-policy-france

Name: Lintjeshof
Description: Lintjeshof is een dierenartsenpraktijk in Nederland, België en Duitsland en richt zich op Farm Health Solutions in de varkens-, geiten- en rundveehouderij, ondersteund door eigen diagnostiek en apotheek. Lintjeshof is onderdeel van LH Vet Group.

Name: ArriA Vet
Description:
ArriA Vet porte en son nom la promesse de soigner et de prendre soin de nos précieux amis à quatre pattes. 
Pour nous, ArriA Vet est bien plus qu'une simple entreprise ; c'est le fruit d'une passion profonde pour les animaux, la santé, l'excellence et le bien-être. 
Le nom "Arria" trouve ses racines dans la langue provençale, où il signifie "Soigner les animaux". Cela incarne parfaitement notre engagement à apporter la meilleure qualité de soins à vos patients.
Mais ArriA Vet, c'est aussi l'histoire de deux amis, Clément SELLIER et Nicolas VALLARINO, deux chirurgiens vétérinaires diplômés du Collège Européen (ECVS), deux amoureux des animaux, de la nature et du sport, réunis par un projet commun : offrir des soins chirurgicaux de haute qualité dans le confort de votre propre établissement médical. Nous croyons fermement en la valeur de la chirurgie itinérante pour offrir des services médicaux essentiels de manière pratique, efficiente et accessible à vos patients.

Name: Pet Med
Description:
Há 17 anos, a Pet Med atua ao lado de profissionais veterinários em mais de 20 países, tornando-se referência global em roupas e protetores pós-cirúrgicos para cães e gatos.

O que começou com o compromisso de melhorar os resultados clínicos evoluiu para um ecossistema completo de soluções integradas — o Pet Med 360: uma linha desenvolvida para oferecer proteção, conforto e performance em todas as etapas da recuperação veterinária.

Com presença em mais de 20.000 pontos de venda no mundo e mais de 4 milhões de pets recuperados, a Pet Med se consolidou como uma marca de confiança e excelência técnica para clínicas, hospitais e distribuidores que buscam qualidade comprovada e alto valor agregado.

Nosso portfólio abrange roupas protetoras, colares anatômicos, faixas de suporte, protetores específicos e acessórios de recuperação, todos desenvolvidos com tecnologia têxtil veterinária exclusiva — equilibrando respirabilidade, resistência e conforto.
Cada produto é desenhado com base na anatomia e comportamento animal, assegurando mobilidade, segurança e adesão terapêutica.

Parcerias estratégicas com instituições como a ABHV (Associação Brasileira dos Hospitais Veterinários) e o Instituto Pet Brasil reforçam nosso compromisso com inovação, sustentabilidade e prática clínica baseada em evidências.

Presente nos principais congressos e eventos veterinários do mundo, a Pet Med participa ativamente do diálogo global sobre o futuro da recuperação e do bem-estar animal — conectando ciência, tecnologia e propósito.

Ao escolher a Pet Med, distribuidores e redes internacionais contam com um parceiro sólido, escalável e comprometido com resultados, oferecendo:

Portfólio completo de soluções pós-cirúrgicas e protetoras
Produção industrial padronizada e certificações de qualidade
Suporte técnico e comercial especializado
Inovação contínua em materiais e design funcional

Name: Caservet
Description:
Caservet es la línea de negocio veterinario del Grupo Caser, creada para ofrecer un servicio de calidad tanto a las mascotas como a las familias que las cuidan. 

Contamos con una red propia de 24 clínicas veterinarias distribuidas entre Madrid y Zaragoza, donde atendemos a todos los animales de compañía, sin necesidad de tener un seguro contratado. Apostamos por una atención accesible, profesional y centrada en el bienestar animal.

Las clínicas se encuentran en: Acacias, Arganzuela, Paseo de los Melancólicos, Arroyomolinos, Barajas, Brunete, Chamartín, Escosura, Fauna, Hermosilla, Las Tablas, Olavide, Parque El Calero, Pilar de Zaragoza, Pinar del Rey, Príncipe Pío, Ramón y Cajal, Ríos Rosas, Rivas Este, Rivas Santa Mónica, Sanchinarro 24h, Valdebebas, Virgen del Cortijo, Zurbano y Albéitar (Zaragoza).

Somos expertos en medicina preventiva y ponemos a disposición de nuestros clientes Planes de Salud para mascotas, que incluyen coberturas como Responsabilidad Civil y reembolso de gastos veterinarios, pensados para garantizar una atención continua y de confianza.

Nuestro objetivo es crear un entorno seguro, cercano y altamente cualificado, donde veterinarios, tecnología y cariño se unen para acompañar a cada familia en el maravilloso proceso de incluir un animal en su vida.

En Caservet, no solo cuidamos de las mascotas: crecemos con ellas.

Tu mascota, nuestra familia.

Name: Embryo Plus
Description: Embryo Plus is a company based out of 41 Hendrik Verwoerd Ave, Brits, 0250, South Africa, Brits, Province Of North West, South Africa.

Name: Ready Vet Go - Pet Ambulance & Mobile Urgent Vet Care
Description: Ready Vet Go is a veterinary mobile urgent care clinic & pet ambulance that is new to the inner suburbs of Melbourne, Victoria. Starting in September 2023, we will provide multiple services, including home urgent care visits, transport for ill pets that need critical support to be moved safely between vet hospitals, telehealth consultations for triage of your pet's health concern, & quality of life consultation, palliative care & humane euthanasia for pets in need. With a service found nowhere else in Victoria, we bring the expertise of a highly skilled emergency & critical care veterinarian to your front door. Our aim is to bridge the gap between home & hospital.

Name: Oxilia
Description:
The Oxilia locum community was born out of the entrepreneurial spirit and the desire for involvement of two veterinary medicine students at the Faculty of Veterinary Medicine at the University of Montreal.

Oxilia is a website that helps veterinary practices by creating a network of locums all across Canada. The platform is open for practices, veterinarians, registered veterinary technicians and veterinary students.

Name: Delegação Regional do Sul - Ordem dos Médicos Veterinários
Description: Página da Delegação Regional do Sul da Ordem dos Médicos Veterinários (OMV)

Name: Poultry Shorts
Description: We are in business of integrating poultry industry utilizing the digital media.

Name: Vet Partners Pet Hospital
Description:
Vet Partners was established to help create a one-of-a-kind veterinary experience that pet owners will love and trust. Have you ever just been given an invoice for your pet’s care with minimal explanation of the services provided? At Vet Partners, we are committed to thoroughly educating clients on why their pet needs the care that was recommended. Through state-of the-art equipment and technology, Vet Partners gives you a quality experience that is like no other vet experience you have had before.

Unsure if your pet needs to be seen for a problem? Vet Partners offers a peace-of-mind Virtual Visit option that could save you a potential trip to the hospital, freeing up time for your busy schedule. A Virtual Visit allows you to FaceTime or Skype our Doctors to see if a concern with your pet warrants a trip to the hospital or not.

Vet Partners Pet Hospital’s vision is to partner with people, families and the community to provide the best medical care for pets. We are extremely passionate about preventative care. Vet Partners has preventative care packages that focus on keeping your pet healthy and happy. Our Doctors are skilled in providing routine wellness care, as well as, advanced medical and surgical case management. We also give you access to your pet’s medical records and their schedule from the convenience of your own home. Our website will host an online pharmacy that allows you to order medications for your pet and have them shipped right to your front door.

Name: Summit Veterinary Advisors
Description:
Summit Veterinary Advisors has been providing a broad range of consulting services to veterinarians since 1998.

Our goal is to make veterinarians more successful, both personally and professionally. We're committed to your success, and we will be a valuable addition to your team. We offer a unique synergy based on our diverse backgrounds and comprehensive knowledge of veterinary practice management. We have worked with veterinarians and managers for over 25 years, and we appreciate that every practice is unique. 

Our well-rounded financial and management services provide a comprehensive focus on your needs and those of your practice. We focus on what you need, not what we sell, even if that means referring you to another consultant who specializes in areas we do not.

Name: AMSvet
Description:
Tanto si eres profesional veterinario como si tienes una mascota o explotación ganadera, te interesa quedarte por aquí para estar al tanto de toda la actualidad relacionada con la salud animal y la toxicología veterinaria. 
AMSvet es la línea especializada de AMSlab que añade valor a la atención veterinaria que reciben tanto los animales de compañía como los de producción ganadera.
Somos un laboratorio especializado en toxicología veterinaria.

Name: PetplusClinica

Name: Dog Adventure
Description:
A Dog Adventure é um espaço projetado e enriquecido para socializar, divertir e ensinar cães. Cada detalhe foi pensando e estudado para que tivesse uma função importante nas atividades diárias e pudesse favorecer os diferentes sentidos da vida animal desde seus instintos até a vida na sociedade moderna, respeitando sempre a singularidade de cada um deles. O comportamento de um cão é reflexo direto do ambiente em que ele vive. A oportunidade de estar em um espaço em que possa extravasar energia, exercitar o corpo, praticar instintos e viver em companhia de sua própria espécie possibilita a prevenção e reabilitação de problemas de comportamento. 

-Missão: proporcionar bem-estar físico e psicológico aos cães e potencializar a qualidade do relacionamento emocional no ambiente familiar humano. 
-Visão: basear a qualidade de vida dos cães domésticos em seus instintos, mas também na melhor adaptação à vida na sociedade humana. 
-Valores: prevenção, segurança, conhecimento teórico, integridade, respeito à natureza e ao próximo.

Nossa equipe tem uma base sólida, composta por profissionais com formação e anos de experiência. Defendemos a idéia de uma equipe multidisciplinar, integrada por médicos veterinários, psicólogos, biólogos, zootecnistas, pois ao agregar conhecimentos e visões diferentes podemos oferecer serviços cada vez mais completos. Além disso, toda a nossa equipe passa por um extenso treinamento interno com nossos padrões de excelência.

Name: UAB Magnum Veterinarija
Description:

Nuo pat veiklos pradžios įmonė tikslingai siekė ir įsitvirtino Lietuvos veterinarijos farmacijos ir kitų produktų didmeninių tiekėjų lyderių gretose.

Įgyvendinti užsibrėžtus įmonės tikslus padeda aiškiai suformuluoti pagrindiniai principai, atspindintys įmonės veiklą ir siekius:
- aukščiausios kokybės produktai,
- specialistų konsultacijos,
- lanksčios bendradarbiavimo sąlygos,
- geras servisas.

Jau daugelį metų kompanija dirba su pasaulinėmis veterinarijos farmacijos lyderėmis Boehringer Ingelheim Vetmedica, Hill’s Pet Nutrition, Bayer AH. Įmonė taip pat atstovauja Norbrook Laboratories Limited, Kela Laboratoria, LNB International Feed B.V., Jorgen Kruuse, Detia Degesch GmbH, Evans Vanodine, Synbiotics, Diapharm, Data Mars.

Per 24 valandas nuo užsakymo visoje Lietuvos teritorijoje klientams tiekiami:
- veterinariniai medikamentai,
- vakcinos,
- pašarų priedai,
- įranga ir instrumentai,
- fumigantai,
- biocidai,
- ėdalas ir veterinarinės dietos smulkiems gyvūnams;
- priemonės laboratorijoms.

2003 metų pabaigoje įmonė pradėjo veiklą Baltarusijoje ir yra Norbrook Laboratories Limited bei Kela Laboratoria kompanijų atstovė šioje šalyje.

Description:

We're a family of fun and smart animal lovers who commit every day to providing a truly unique veterinary experience and breaking the mold of stuffy and impersonal veterinary medicine. We pride ourselves on exceptional, concierge-style customer service,  tailored, integrative veterinary medicine, and welcoming, inspiring clinics that make our clients and their pets feel at home.

Description:

We are accredited with The Good Laboratory Practices (GLP).

We organize and perform preclinical and clinical studies with large animals, avian species, rabbit and guinea pig following the regulatory guidelines.
 
We also supply biological products following strict collection protocols to assure quality and traceability, such as, animal tissues, whole blood, plasma and serum, hair, etc. 

Seguridad y Bienestar Animal S.L. is provided with an Ethics Committee and several professionals from different areas, such as: Veterinarians, Pharmacists, Biochemists and Animal Welfare Assessor.

-	Breeding centers
-	Controlled livestock farms 
-	GLP compliant bioanalysis laboratories

Our aim is to understand the Clients' requirements and provide them with tailored products and services.

Name: Scandivet
Description:
Scandivet - veterinärens leverantör av förbrukning och utrustning!

I Scandivets sortiment hittar du tusentals veterinärprodukter för både stora och små djur. Här finns alltifrån traditionella veterinärprodukter till exklusiva och specialanpassade lösningar.

Scandivet AB grundades 1993 av Stefan Lindblom och Lennart Grandell och var redan då en totalleverantör av produkter för veterinärmedicinsk verksamhet i Sverige. Företaget har sitt säte i Enköping, där både lager och kontor finns.  Scandivet tillgodoser veterinärbranschens behov av bra produkter som levereras snabbt och korrekt. I bolaget finns stor erfarenhet av veterinärsjukvård och av de produkter som används inom veterinärmedicinsk verksamhet, vilket möjliggör att service och support kan leva upp till kundernas höga krav. Under åren har ett välfungerande nätverk av leverantörer byggts upp, vilket innebär ett sortiment väl anpassat för såväl det stora djursjukhuset som för den enskilda veterinären. I sortimentet finns över 6000 artiklar för både stora och små djur, både traditionella produkter och exklusivt framtagna, allt för att kunna vara en komplett och pålitlig samarbetspartner och leverantör till den veterinära marknaden. 

Sedan juni 2021 ägs Scandivet AB av OneMed Sverige AB.  Onemed är en ledande distributör av förbrukningsmaterial och vårdrelaterade tjänster till hälso- och sjukvården i Europa.

Name: AniCura Polska
Description:
AniCura jest wiodącym dostawcą opieki weterynaryjnej w Europie. Nasza firma powstała z przekonania, że współpraca i dzielenie zasobów może poprawić opiekę weterynaryjną i jej rezultaty.

Nasza oferta obejmuje wysokiej jakości usługi medyczne, takie jak profilaktyka, podstawowa opieka zdrowotna oraz opieka specjalistyczna. Zapewniamy zaawansowaną diagnostykę, internę, intensywną terapię, chirurgię i ortopedię. Ponadto, zajmujemy się rehabilitacją, fizjoterapią, poradami dietetycznymi oraz oferujemy wybrane karmy i produkty pielęgnacyjne dla zwierząt.

Sieć AniCura obejmuje 500 klinik w 17 krajach Europy, które każdego roku zapewniają ponad 4,5 miliona wysokiej jakości konsultacji dla opiekunów zwierząt domowych.

Od 2018 roku AniCura jest częścią Mars Veterinary Health. Mars Veterinary Health obejmuje sieć ponad 3000 klinik na całym świecie, które każdego roku opiekują się ponad 25 milionami zwierząt domowych. Razem jesteśmy w stanie zapewnić najwyższe standardy opieki nad zwierzętami i osiągnąć nasz wspólny cel: LEPSZY ŚWIAT DLA ZWIERZĄT.

Name: Veterinary Specialists Aotearoa
Description:
We are a group dedicated to the care of sick animals through our specialist and emergency hospitals in New Zealand. 

Our goal is to provide exceptional care to all our patients and their families and to give every cat, dog and small animal that enters our hospital the very best treatment available and a better way of life.

We do this by working closely with the general practice vets of New Zealand, working as an extension to their practice – utilising state-of-the-art equipment, progressive techniques, clinical expertise and exceptional care.

We have three hospitals across New Zealand. Two in Auckland, one at Sylvia Park and another in Henderson, and our Christchurch hospital in which opened in 2021. Our team of includes specialist surgeons, imaging specialists, internal medicine specialists, medical oncology and cardiology specialists, 24hour emergency vets, veterinary physiotherapists and hydrotherapists plus a team of incredible nurses, technicians, animal care staff and support teams.  We run residency and intern programmes and also operate a 24 hour, 7 day a week animal emergency services in our Auckland hospitals.

Sinder Group is a national 'Contract Abiding and Trustworthy' enterprise, 'Key leading enpterprise of agricultural industrialization in Shandong Province', 'Key high-tech enterprises of the national Torch Plan', a 'high-tech enterprise' jointly recognized by the Department of science and technology of Shandong Province, the Department of finance, the State Administration of Taxation and the Local Taxation Bureau, the chairman of 'Shandong Veterinary Medicine Association', and 'National High-Tech Enterprise'.

Sinder Group has 10 R&D teams, including technology center, research institute, Beijing Sinder vaccine technology R&D, Shandong Sinder Vaccine technology R&D, Zhuzi technology suspension platform, chemical medicine preparation, traditional Chinese medicine, crude medicine preparation, pet health care, feed nutrition and quality, also has a LAB in Silicon Valley, USA. Name: Queensland Alliance for One Health Sciences
Description:

The SCAV community provides continuing education and other professional development opportunities to advance the animal-human bond. Become a part of the SCAV community today at scav.org.

Name: Gene Tatuapé
Description:
Iniciamos nossas atividades na cidade de Três Lagoas-MS, em 1983 sob o comando de Guilherme Penteado Coelho. Desde aquela época, com a aquisição das primeiras matrizes, trabalhamos tendo em vista o melhoramento genético de nosso rebanho. Os objetivos da seleção sempre foram a precocidade sexual e a fertilidade, bem como o ganho de peso precoce.
Em 2006, já sob a administração de Guilherme P. Coelho Filho, a fazenda passou a integrar a Conexão Delta G. A ideia inicial de ingressar em um programa de melhoramento era a de conhecer melhor o nível genético de nossos animais e, principalmente, aumentar a produtividade da fazenda. Desde o primeiro ano da implantação, começamos a identificar animais que eram realmente superiores. Com isso, passamos a comercializar, além de carne, genética comprovada.
No 2° ano de avaliação Genética pela Conexão Delta G, produzimos o touro Araguaia TAT (filho do Torpedo PA), melhor macho da Conexão na safra de 2008. Já na primeira safra avaliada na fazenda, surgiu o touro Jatobá TAT, hoje na 1ª página do Sumário Aliança. 
No ano de 2011, tomamos a decisão de mudar a Fazenda Tatuapé de Três Lagoas-MS para o estado de São Paulo, adquirindo uma propriedade no município de Guararapes-SP.
De olho no mercado de venda de sêmen, adquirimos um bom estoque do lendário Kulal AJ e, no início de 2012, compramos o Touro Torpedo PA .
Hoje a Fazenda Tatuapé dedica-se à comercialização de touros geneticamente superiores.

Name: Vet Stem Cell Hub
Description: Veterinary stem cell therapy is an exciting emerging discipline within veterinary medicine and surgery.  Knowledge is growing at an exponential rate.  This can leave us feeling overwhelmed by the sheer volume of scientific material constantly being produced. There is a need for a clear source of up-to-date, trustworthy, and accurate information on veterinary stem cell therapy without any hype.  Welcome to vet stem cell hub.  This site is for veterinary professionals who wish to learn more about stem cell therapies.  VSCH is a guide only, it does not replace the essential requirement for examination of a patient by a qualified veterinary clinician.  VSCH may refer to or mention various products or services, this is not necessarily an endorsement of those products or services.  VSCH seeks to disseminate information in a responsible way.  We do not comment on individual cases as all clinical judgements are the responsibility of the attending veterinary clinician.  While every effort is made to verify the accuracy of the information presented, the field is advancing rapidly so veterinary professionals must use their own clinical judgement when managing their patients.  Thank you for visiting VSCH.

Name: Association of Advanced Veterinary Practitioners
Description:
There are over 1,300 recognised Advanced Practitioners on the RCVS register, working in both general practice and referrals.  Together, we are an important store of knowledge, skill and experience within the profession, and provide a large part of the UK's veterinary referrals to a high level, and often at a more affordable cost.  We have a huge respect for the learning and skill of Specialists, but alongside them we are an important part of the structure of the profession, often providing more flexibility and a wider view.  We, essentially, provide contextualised care.  Until now, there has been no body that represents AVPs as a group - to represent their skills, promote their work, and present their opinions on decisions about the Advanced Practitioner role, career plan, and their position in referral structure.  This group was therefore founded by a group of APs with an aim of providing that voice, so we can speak together for ourselves, rather than be defined by others.  
Membership is open to any colleague who is currently on the RCVS register of advanced practitioners.  Please email your name, RCVS reg number and AP Discipline(s) to aavpvets.gmail.com, join our facebook group and start contributing to the discussion.

Dyrlæger & Ko er en professionel rådgiver og samarbejdspartner for landmanden. Dyrlæger & Ko’s kunder er landmænd med ambitioner og tro på, at sunde køer og sund forretning hænger sammen. Vores fokus er at hjælpe landmanden til at optimere sin besætnings sundhed – også økonomisk. Vi griber vores arbejde systematisk an og baserer vores råd og behandling på et dokumenteret og fagligt grundlag. 

Dyrlæger & Ko består af 27 kvægpraksis og knap 140+ professionelle kvægdyrlæger fordelt over hele landet. Vi har vores daglige gang i knap 1.800 besætninger med sundhedsrådgivningsaftale og tilser således over 60% af den samlede malkekvægbestand i Danmark.

Name: DoctorVet
Description:
DoctorVet is Lambda division dedicated to veterinary laser therapy. Lambda is an Italian company founded in 1996, formed by a team of people united by the love and passion for laser technology, who want to spread the potential of this technology at all levels. 
From this desire was born DoctorVet brand, Lambda's latest innovation: a new holistic therapy for animal care, conceived to improve animal patients' well-being and help veterinary clinics to grow, to serve more and more patients. Follow us to stay updated on veterinary laser therapy and to discover all the benefits of DoctorVet for you, for your animal patients and for your business.

Name: Exiagricola JD
Description: Somos una empresa con una trayectoria en el mercado de más de 15 años. Con nosotros puede encontrar todos los productos que necesita su mascota, también el sector ganadero, insumos agrícolas, veterinarios y ferretería agropecuaria.

Name: Denali Equine
Description:
Denali Equine was created in 2019 with the goal of being able to solve problems that were causing horses to need rehabilitation from injury and performance problems. We felt that there was more we could do then heal a horse from injury.

The goal became identifying the root cause of the injury, pain, behavior or performance issue and treating, rehabbing and healing that. This is how we got to Body Soundness, we found that the majority of the problems come from the horse’s body.

Name: Al Kamal Veterinary Medicines Trading
Description:
Welcome to AL KAMAL COMPANY, your trusted partner in veterinary medicines, trading, and distribution. Established in the UAE in 2021 and expanded to Oman in 2023, Al Kamal has quickly become a leading provider of high-quality products and services in the Gulf Area.

Our experienced team ensures that all products meet the highest standards of quality and safety, providing peace of mind to our customers, because they have over ten years of experience at Gulf market.

In addition to our focus on quality, AL KAMAL COMPANY is also committed to customer satisfaction. We work closely with our clients to understand their needs and provide tailored solutions that meet their specific requirements. Discover the difference with Al Kamal and experience a new standard of excellence in veterinary medicines, trading, and distribution. Join us in our mission to promote animal health and well-being, one product at a time.

Name: Southwest Veterinary Surgical Service, PC
Description:
Southwest Veterinary Surgical Service, P.C. is a privately owned specialty referral surgical practice whose board-certified surgeons have over eighty years of combined surgical expertise and are dedicated to providing your pet with the highest quality surgical care with an emphasis on pain management and prevention. Our highly-trained staff is committed to enhancing the quality of life for our patients and strengthening the human-animal bond.

We are an extension of veterinary practices throughout the communities we serve, working in conjunction with primary care veterinarians to provide comprehensive patient care and exceptional client service. We routinely collaborate with our board-certified colleagues at the Arizona Veterinary Specialty Center, Scottsdale Veterinary Specialty and Emergency Center, Southern Arizona Veterinary Specialty and Emergency Center, Canyon State Veterinary Specialties coming soon to the West Valley, and with emergency services throughout the valley in order to assure that all aspects of your pet's medical and surgical condition are carefully considered. This multidisciplinary interaction with our colleagues provides optimum treatment for patients with complex medical and surgical conditions.

Interested in a career with us?  Follow the link to our current openings.
http://swvetsurgery.com/careers/

Name: Beijing Yahe Nutritive High Tech Co.,Ltd
Description: Beijing Yahe Nutritive High Tech Co., Ltd (Essential Oil BU: Beijing Feedig Feed Sci.&Tec.Co., Ltd). is a technical advisor specialized in R&D, production and promotion of ruminant, poultry and swine products as well as offering professional socialized services. Our products are of premix and feed additives. Our star products are rumen protected products, including rumen protected glucose, rumen protected choline chloride, rumen protected methionine, rumen protected lysine and rumen protected vitamins; moreover, including essential oil for poultry and swine.

Name: BC US LLC
Description:
BC US LLC is based in SW Florida  to allow us to operate close to our USA clients. 
BC US was founded in 2012 in SW Florida.
We have AAALAC accreditation from 2020. 

We have 3 core activities :
Breeding , holding and CDC quarantine.
Breeding of SPF (Specific Pathogen Free) Mauritian origine Cynomolgus monkeys for biomedical research. BC US LLC core value is to breed naturally occurring SPF Cynomolgus monkeys with the best possible welfare and environmental enrichment. 
Quarantine : we have 2 CDC approved quarantines. We were approved by CDC as the first social group quarantine in the US and we have also indoor quarantine for pair housing of animals.
NHP imported & kept exclusively from one source = Bioculture Mauritius. 
Outdoor quarantine is more cost effective and welfare friendly than indoor holding.

Holding : All our cages are built by Florida  Hurricane  construction codes.
All our cages have both outdoor & indoor setting + environmental enrichment devices & welfare program . 
All animals from the same source will guarantee no cross contamination from non-Bioculture SPF cynos.
Holding in the best cyno-specific large outdoor housing existing in the market.
Our holding is done in social group housing of compatible animals
We are located in an ideal weather for NHP with the most naturalistic feeding .
NHP holding under CDC, USDA and FW supervision. 
Peer review by AAALAC and global client/collaborator visits.
NHP are in the US so once needed for study they can be delivered in short time to clients and this give more flexibility.

Name: Acravet Limited
Description:
Acravet was founded in 1987 and very quickly achieved full licensed veterinary wholesaler status.
Initially the service was local but by the early nineties, business expanded to a full nationwide distribution service. There are 20 employees of which 3 are sales representatives supplying both products and services on animal medicines, pet accessories, equipment and repair services.

We are working with industry leading companies and brands. Acravet Ltd is an authorized distributor for industry leading brands which have been selected for their effectiveness and cost efficiency. These veterinary products are used for both the treatment and prevention of diseases in animals ranging from cattle, sheep, horses and pigs, to domestic pets such as dogs, cats and hens.Looking after the customer is Acravet’s main priority.

Our warehouse is located in Mallow, Co. Cork. The warehouse distributes products to both ROI and Northern Ireland. It is approximately 25,000 square feet in size. We dispatch in excess of 150,000 packages annually for more than 400 different companies.

It is our mission to provide veterinary practices and all other customers with products and services at a fair and competitive price. Customer service is the main priority for the business.

Name: ROOTS BIOTECH PRIVATE LIMITED
Description: Welcome to Planting the Science of Success. Roots Biotech Pvt. Ltd. believes in bringing the power of scientific thinking to develop products for our valuable customers, as we at Roots Biotech Pvt. Ltd. believe that Growth and Prosperity of our company is directly interlinked to the Growth and Prosperity of our Customers.

Name: De Graafschap Dierenartsen
Description:
De Graafschap Dierenartsen is een moderne gemengde praktijk in de Achterhoek en de Liemers. Met onze Landbouwhuisdierenlocatie in Steenderen, Paardenkliniek in Vorden, Gezelschapsdierenklinieken in Vorden en dependances in Doesburg, Eerbeek, Ruurlo, Velp, Wehl, Zutphen centrum en Zutphen Leesten staan wij garant voor hoogwaardige dienstverlening. Onze diersoort gedifferentieerde teams van dierenartsen en paraveterinairen, bieden naast eerstelijns, ook gespecialiseerde zorg, zowel binnen als buiten de regio. De tevredenheid van de cliënt en het welzijn van het dier staan hierbij centraal.
Onder één dak vindt u bij ons ook een oogspecialist, osteopaat, Europees specialist voortplanting paard, gedragstherapeut en hondentrimsalon.
Samen met IVC Evidensia Dierenziekenhuis Arnhem staan wij garant voor 24-uurs dienstverlening. Voor meer informatie kunt u terecht op onze website.

Name: Servicios Veterinarios Santa Fe Joy
Description:
Consultoría y Soluciones Avícolas
Productos Veterinarios Confiables para Porcicultura y Animales de Compañía.

Name: Maxvet Animal Health
Description: Maxvet Animals Care has grown into export and import in the fields of animal feed additives. Throughout the world, with many years of experience. The culture of our company has been respect the significance of what we do and of the individual need and qualities of our customers and suppliers.

Name: MarkPet
Description:
Ecomarkpet es una importadora y distribuidora que se especializa en la representación y distribución exclusiva de alimentos y snacks para mascotas, en en canal especializado conformado por Clínicas Veterinarias y Petshops a lo largo del país. 
El segmento de mercado en el que se enfoca es aquel que demanda productos de la más alta calidad que tienen como objetivo principal mejorar el bienestar de las mascotas. 
La misión de Ecomarkpet es traer al mercado un amplio surtido de productos de la más alta calidad para suministrarlos en el canal especializado de mascotas, contribuyendo de esta forma a lograr una tenencia responsable y el mayor bienestar de las mascotas. 
Nuestros principales valores son el aprendizaje continuo, el respeto a nuestro entorno, el desarrollo de relaciones de largo plazo, el bienestar de mascotas y la integridad de nuestras operaciones.

Name: ANIMAL LAB
Description: Bienvenidos a Animal Lab.  Un cliente nuestro una vez nos dijo que eramos parte de su familia de trabajo. Esa es la mejor manera de describir lo que queremos lograr. Que nuestros clientes no sean solo clientes. Que exista simplicidad entre ustedes y nosotros. Complicidad y confianza. Que podamos involucrarnos y seamos un equipo. Que nos permitan hacer lo que hacemos mejor para convertirnos en una buena herramienta del día a día en el consultorio. Lo mejor de esto es que nos encanta.

Name: West Hills Animal Hospital & 24hr Emergency Veterinary Center
Description: West Hills Animal Hospital & 24hr Emergency and Specialty Center is a 24-hour Full-Service, Emergency, and Specialty Veterinary Medical Facility, located on Long Island in Huntington, NY. We seek to provide the best possible medical care, surgical care, and dental care for our highly-valued patients.

Name: Australasian Veterinary Poultry Association (AVPA)
Description: The Australasian Veterinary Poultry Association (AVPA) was established in 1961 dedicated to the advancement of knowledge in poultry health and husbandry.  AVPA has a wide membership of Australian and New Zealand poultry veterinarians and also those with an interest in poultry health and science. Poultry scientists and researchers, who may or may not be veterinarians, are also active members of the Association.

Name: Focused Ultrasound Resources
Description:
We are improving the standard of care in veterinary ultrasound by using a unique collaborative approach. We are bridging the gap between efficiency of human medicine and the need of qualified and experienced veterinary ultrasound specialists. Our team of experienced board certified professionals work with you to gather the diagnostic information that you need to provide the best treatment options for your patients. This unique model incorporates radiologists, cardiologists and board certified sonographers working together for you.  

ACVR Ultrasound Society member.

Name: Telford Veterinary Hospital
Description: Telford Veterinary Hospital is a Fear Free Certified practice and a full service companion animal hospital nestled in the beautiful Indian Valley less than an hour north of Philadelphia. Established in 1998 by Dr. Sharon Minninger, the hospital has maintained a strong commitment to providing quality veterinary care with sound Fear Free principles throughout the lives of their animal clients. Their services and facilities are designed to assist in routine preventive care for young, healthy pets; early detection and treatment of disease as pets age; and complete medical and surgical care as necessary during a pet’s lifetime. Telford Veterinary Hospital provides wellness/preventative/sick care, advanced in-house diagnostics, surgical procedures, digital radiology, dental care, therapeutic laser therapy, behavioral training, and hospice/end of life care for dogs, cats, and pocket pets. The unique 7200 square foot facility is a one-of-a-kind, technology based veterinary hospital and boasts a large, comfortable waiting room with fireplace and an “endless water bowl”, ample examination and treatment areas, a private visitation and grieving room as well as extensive laboratory, pharmacy and surgical suites. Unparalleled customer service has been at the heart of Telford Veterinary Hospital’s daily practices and the incorporation of technology such as digital X-ray services and paperless patient records; have served only to strengthen that commitment to their clients and their pets. Mr. Jonathan Detweiler co-owns the hospital and has been a driving force behind the progressive management style that has led the Telford Veterinary Hospital to be the proud recipient of the Forbes Enterprise Award for innovation in service and to be featured in the prestigious Philadelphia Business Journal.

Name: Státní veterinární správa
Description: Úkolem SVS je především ochrana spotřebitelů před případnými zdravotně závadnými produkty živočišného původu, monitorování a udržování příznivé nákazové situace zvířat, veterinární ochrana státního území České republiky, ochrana pohody zvířat a ochrana před jejich týráním.

Name: Portland Veterinary Emergency and Specialty Care
Description:
Portland Veterinary Emergency and Specialty Care is a multi-specialty veterinary center. We have been serving Maine for more than thirty years. We provide compassionate, expert specialty and emergency care for your pet, and peace of mind for you.

EMERGENCY SERVICES: Emergency services are available at our Warren Avenue campus 24/7/365. Staffed with Critical Care Specialists, experienced emergency veterinarians, and skilled technicians, you can count on PVESC to care for your pet when your regular day clinic isn’t open or if critical care is needed. Be advised that care is prioritized based on triage determination. This may affect wait times. We thank you in advance for your patience and understanding. 

SPECIALTY SERVICES: Our board-certified veterinary specialists receive referrals from veterinary hospitals and work in partnership with your family veterinarian for the benefit of your pet. PVESC provides advanced diagnostics, sophisticated techniques, and the treatment of complex diseases and injuries, working together to provide diagnoses and effective therapies for the most challenging conditions.

When your family veterinarian refers you to Portland Veterinary Emergency and Specialty Care, it is because they know we will work hand-in-hand with them to ensure the best help for your pet. Your veterinarian will provide us with supportive documentation of your pet’s condition for the initial consultation. We will continue to work with you and your pet throughout the duration of the illness for which you sought our attention.

Name: Practice Made Purrfect
Description:
Practice Made Purrfect is a specialist consultancy for the veterinary profession, providing industry-leading marketing and business advice to practices around the world. 

We take an innovative approach to growing practices, pioneering pet health plans and digital solutions to allow clinical and customer service teams to do what they do best – caring for pets and their owners. 

We have specialist copywriting, design, web development and technical resources available to build brands, sharpen communication and generally provide practices with a platform from which to thrive.

Name: Victoria Plimmer Consultancy
Description:
Victoria Plimmer Consultancy was launched in May 2024 to support practices with streamlining anaesthesia and analgesia processes.
Having spent much of her career as a locum and peripatetic nurse, Victoria has noticed that there are differences in the general approach to anaesthesia and analgesia, as well as the confidence of the staff involved. She firmly believes that small modifications can make a significant positive impact to the working environment.
Working synergistically with practice teams, Victoria Plimmer Consultancy aims to provide a standardised approach that maintains clinical standards of best practice to enhance anaesthetic and analgesic safety, efficiency, and patient care.
With your practice ethos and patients at the heart of decision making and working alongside your clinical caseload, Victoria Plimmer Consultancy offers tailored, transparent, confidential feedback to validate existing anaesthesia/analgesia processes and strengthen future performance.
The service includes practice visits and observation with summary assessment and a comprehensive written report on observations and current strengths with recommendations for enhancements. Time is spent in joint discussion and reflection and targeted CPD sessions are available with ongoing support for a period post visit.

Name: Beacon Veterinary Specialists
Description:
Beacon Veterinary Specialists offers the area’s pet owners with some of the best medical expertise in advanced surgery, internal medicine, diagnostic imaging, and 24/7 emergency & critical care available.

Beacon is home to three veterinary practices formerly known as Ohlone Veterinary Emergency, Veterinary Orthopedic and Surgery Service, and Veterinary Internal Medicine Service. In 2016, we came together as one practice to better reflect the collaborative nature of how we care for our patients.

Conveniently located off I-680 in Fremont, CA, we are one of the few locally owned and operated specialty veterinary care facilities in the San Francisco Bay Area. Our highly trained and compassionate veterinarians have been serving the community for over three decades.

Name: Basetto Agro
Description:
Desde 1966 trabalhamos com armazenamento, monitoramento e distribuição de produtos veterinários destinados ao bem-estar de animais de produção.

Nossas vendas são diretamente para empresas de avicultura e suinocultura, sempre prezando pela qualidade dos produtos e saúde animal.

Visando resgatar a imunidade dos animais de produção através da venda de produtos altamente tecnológicos, buscamos diminuir gradativamente o uso de antibióticos.

Hoje somos uma referência no atendimento de empresas de agronegócios em todo o estado de São Paulo.

MONITORAMENTO E FROTA PRÓPRIA

Nosso armazenamento de vacinas conta com um sistema de monitoramento eletrônico por telemetria, controlado por acesso remoto a temperatura 24h por dia.

Além disso, possuímos uma frota própria comprometida com a segurança, manuseio e prazos dos produtos.

Com a Basetto Agro a segurança e saúde do seu plantel estará em 1° lugar!

Name: LabOniris
Description:
LabOniris est le laboratoire d'analyses vétérinaires d'Oniris VetAgro Bio Nantes.

Nous vous offrons une expertise pluridisciplinaire pour vous accompagner dans vos diagnostics au quotidien.

Name: Veokee
Description: L’expertise d’une marque au service de vos besoins en équipements vétérinaires. Investissez et développez votre activité en toute sérénité grâce à des offres souples et des services personnalisés de location et de maintenance de votre matériel. Gagnez du temps, nos équipes sont à votre écoute et vous accompagnent pour trouver des solutions claires, durables et au meilleur rapport qualité-prix.

Name: PetMantraa
Description:
Online Service Platforms for Pets 
 #pets #veterinary #petonline #petconsultation, #PetTraining 
#PetGrooming

Name: Veterinary Students For Animal Welfare
Description:
Vet-SAW is a student-led non-profit organization which works
to inform, educate, and aware the community about the basic welfare needs of animals by building and improving the bridge between veterinary professionals and the public.

It aims to uplift animal welfare by organizing, educating, and involving emerging veterinarians in the veterinary profession.

Established in 2018, Vet-SAW has been continuously working to build a community of youth-led and motivated group of veterinary students who constantly advocate and promote the importance of animal welfare to ensure healthier and longer life of animals. Vet-SAW strongly believes in building a society where both human and animal can co-exist and thrive in their best way.

Name: The Raptor Center
Description:
Established in 1974 as part of the University of Minnesota College of Veterinary Medicine, The Raptor Center sees around 1,000 sick and injured raptors each year in our clinic, while helping to identify emerging environmental issues related to raptor health and populations.

An internationally renowned education facility, The Raptor Center trains veterinary students and veterinarians from around the world to become future leaders in raptor medicine and conservation.

In addition, The Raptor Center reaches over 150,000 people annually through its unique public education programs and events.

Name: MerlinVet-cel Ltd
Description: MerlinVet-cel Ltd is the UK’s longest-established veterinary buying group, providing independent veterinary practices with tailored support to improve profitability. By offering competitive rebates, reduced administration costs, and transparent pricing, MerlinVet-cel helps practices operate more efficiently. Members benefit from a simplified payment system with one monthly invoice and access to exclusive products and services. Committed to empowering vets, MerlinVet-cel offers freedom in ordering, ongoing support, and resources to navigate stock shortages, delivering long-term value for veterinary businesses.

Name: Greifenhof
Description: Betrieb einer Greifvogelpflegestation für kranke, verletzte oder verwaiste junge einheimische Tag- und Nachtgreifvögel zur Widerauswilderung. Unterstützung und Mitarbeit bei Forschungsprojekten.

Name: Chicks Poultry
Description: 7 سنوات هي عمر شركة شركة شيكس للدواجن البريطانية في مصر، لكنها استطاعت أن تحدث ثورة حقيقة في مجال تربية وإنتاج الدواجن والمزارع السمكية والحيوانية. البداية عام 2014 انطلقت شركة شيكس للدواجن البريطانية في مصر عام 2014 وكانت البداية في مجال إنتاج الكتاكيت وتسمين أمهات الدواجن، وإنشاء وتجهيز مزارع الدواجن وتجارة الأعلاف والخامات وتوزيع الأدوات البيطرية. إلا أنه مع نجاحها استطاعت التوسع في عمليات الإنتاج فلم يعد الأمر قاصر على الدواجن فقط، بل وصل إلى الانتاج الحيواني، والسمكي، والنعام، فهي تقدم أفضل الخدمات وبأنسب الأسعار. ومع التوسع الكبير لشركة شيكس البريطانية، كان لابد من إطلاق موقع الكتروني وتطبيق للهواتف الذكية، يحتوى على قاعدة بيانات متكاملة في مجال الطب البيطري والدواجن والحيواني والزراعي والسمكي، وكل ما يخص المجال، يمكن المواطن والمستثمر والمربي والتاجر من الإطلاع على كافة التفاصيل التي يبحث عنها في مكان واحد. وذلك إيمانًا من أن الشركة تسعي للوصول إلى أقصي درجات الجودة والتميز في مجال الثروة الداجنة والثروة الحيوانية والثروة السمكية والزراعية، والوصول إلى المستويات العالمية لنرتقي بجودة ومستوى تلك الصناعات لتصبح الأولى على مستوى مصر والشرق الأوسط، وفي سبيل ذلك اتبعت أحدث الوسائل والطرق وهي كالآتي: معمل التفريغ أسست الشركة معمل لتفريغ الدجاج هو الأول من نوعه في الشرق الأوسط، فهو على أحدث مستوى علمي كما أن الأجهزة تعمل اوتوماتكيا باستخدام وحدات الكمبيوتر وأجهزة الإنذار وتحتوى على كافة الأدوات والمعدات الأساسية الحديثة اللازمة لإنتاج أفضل الكتاكيت جودة. كما تمتلك الشركة أسطول سيارات مجهزة لنقل البيض ضمن مزارع الأمهات ونقل الكتاكيت من معامل الشركة إلى المزارع أو المربين، بالإضافة إلي توفر سبل الراحة للمهندسين والعاملين حيث يتم توفير استراحات بها كافة الإمكانيات الأساسية. لماذا كتكوت شيكس للدواجن لأن المراحل التي يمر بها أمهات الدواجن من الرعاية الصحية، وتحصين المناعة، مما يضمن وجود كتكوت يتميز بهيكل عظمي مناسب، ومناعة مرتفعة ضد الأمراض، كما ان شيكس هي الشركة الوجيدة التي تعيد حق وتحصين الأمهات لرفع المناعة رغم أن ذلك يمكن أن يؤدى إلى تخفيض الإنتاج بشكل كبير. تجهيزات المزارع من شركة شيكس ولأن خدمات شركة شيكس لا تتوقف عند تقديم خدمة معينة بل تستمر بعدها، بل تتبع أفضل

Name: Vetpharma Nutrition
Description: Vetpharma Solutions India Private Limited markets high quality, safe, effective feed supplements for Livestock Companion Animals.

Name: Joyful Dogs GmbH
Description: Hundetagesstätte mit Abhol- und Bringservice in einem voll ausgerüsteten Fahrzeug. Spiel, Spass, Sozialisieren, Fressen und Schlafen in der Doglounge in Buchs ZH

Name: LaVeterinaria
Description:
La Veterinaria covers all major food-producing animal species and, during
the years, it has build up a specific experience on water buffaloes. More
recently we also entered the Pet and Aqua market, with new innovative
ideas, products and services.
The Quality Control Laboratory is routinely performing chemical and
microbiological assays on all the incoming raw materials and the outgoing
finished preparations: thanks to the strict quality protocols the company
has obtained the FAMI-QS certification, thus a Total Quality Approach.
The sales of the products are supported by a strong technical back-up,
either for the nutritional aspects, or the sanitary problems, or the whole
management.

Name: CLINICA VETERINARIA EUROPA-FERRARA
Description:
La nostra Clinica Veterinaria  è interamente dedicata alla cura e alla salvaguardia della salute dei nostri pazienti ,cani e gatti, animali non  convenzionali (conigli, furetti, piccoli roditori , rettili , uccelli). Il nostro staff specializzato offre ogni giorno un supporto concreto per la cura e la salute dei nostri pets, dedicando loro tutto il tempo, l’attenzione e la sensibilità in quanto importanti  compagni di vita.

La Clinica Veterinaria Europa è collocata in un contesto sereno ed accogliente, circondato da natura ed attrezzato con i migliori strumenti di diagnostica e cura.

 Il benessere dei nostri pazienti e la felicita’ dei loro proprietari e’ il nostro piu’ importante valore.

Contattaci: 
Tel.: +39 0532 732009
E-mail: info@veterinaria-europa.it

Name: Columbia Pike Animal Hospital and Emergency Center
Description: At Columbia Pike Animal Hospital in Annandale, we hold ourselves to the promise of delivering the exceptional care and services they need, when they need them. Since 1974, we’ve dedicated ourselves to caring for and improving the lives of pets and their owners. Whether your pet is having an emergency or needs to get their vaccines up to date, our compassionate, hard-working veterinarians and support staff are here for you.

Name: Veterinary Management Consultation
Description: Our name is Veterinary Management Consultation and we've been exceeding our clients' expectations for over 30 years. With more than 2,000 individual practices served and teaching at 22 veterinary schools across the nation, VMC sets the standard of excellence in the veterinary industry.

Name: Total Livestock Genetics
Description:
At the forefront of animal genetics and reproduction technology, Total Livestock Genetics is committed to providing a link between evolving technologies and the commercial needs of producers, whilst maintaining optimum customer service.
Total Livestock Genetics (TLG) was established in 1989 by Shane and Erin Ashworth in response to the need for an independent and professional semen and embryo collection service. Since that time, TLG has expanded its range of complementary services and now includes storage and despatch, import and export of genetic material, live animal export, genomic testing, as well as complete suite of reproductive services for equine and ovine clients.

Name: Veeeet
Description:
Every day, over 800 million pet owners worldwide ask themselves the same question, “Is my pet okay?” But a dog or cat can't tell you if they are in pain, scared or tired.

Veeeet delivers personalized health recommendations for your pet, built on a detailed profile capturing its breed, age, genetic risks, weight, behavior, and medical history.

We use cutting-edge technologies, including AI and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), to ensure the recommendations are tailored to your pet's unique characteristics.

Additionally, the AI Vision feature in our app simplifies pet care by automatically reading and saving medical documents.

A unique feature of Veeeet is surveys for early diagnosis. They are designed by veterinarians with over 20 years of experience. The surveys are personalised and stored in your pet`s digital twin.

Veeeet: Because care should be personal

Name: The Hills Veterinary Clinic
Description: We are here for your pets 7 days a week.

Name: Victory Genomics
Description:
The VGnome is not a pass-or-fail test; it is an evaluation of an individual horse’s genetic code based. The information we provide you is a blueprint that can be used now and in the future.

Our aim is to provide you with the best head start when it comes to your horse's training, management, and nutrition by filling in the blanks that are only visible through genetics. 

Every gene we test for has been certified by peer-reviewed research and analyzed by our expert bioinformatics team, and your horse’s data is banked securely in the secured VG Database, readily available for future testing requirements to make proactive and informed decisions for your horse. as new data becomes available.

Como bom grupo português que somos, nascemos com uma vontade contínua de crescer e ir mais além, tanto pelas famílias que recebemos, como pela equipa e rede de parceiros que nos compõem. Trabalhamos sempre com o objetivo de assegurar a melhor qualidade de serviço, e orgulhamo-nos das relações próximas e de confiança que procuramos cultivar. Sempre ao seu lado, por eles.
 
No Grupo Pet24 sabemos do desafio que pode ser cuidar de um animal que passa a fazer parte da família - exige tempo, recursos e, claro, muito afeto. Respeitamos o seu compromisso com o bem-estar e saúde do seu pet, e assumimos a responsabilidade de dar o nosso melhor, ao seu lado, nesse caminho. Juntos, por eles, procuramos o melhor cuidado em cada família e em cada contexto, que é único! 
 
Contamos por isso com uma capacidade de resposta 24h por dia, 365 dias por ano, e uma equipa comprometida. O Grupo Pet24 é atualmente composto por duas unidades, o Hospital Veterinário de Alfragide e a Clínica Veterinária "Os Nossos Bichos", em Massamá, mais de 20 profissionais totalmente dedicados, e uma rede de parcerias multidisciplinar, assegurando uma sólida cobertura nos mais diversos serviços de saúde médico-veterinários.
 
E continuamos a crescer... Se é um profissional ou estudante da área, ou representa uma unidade de saúde médico-veterinária, universidade, instituto de formação, ou empresa, entre em contacto e junte-se a nós!

Our offerings include: 

*Yoga and Meditation Classes (virtual/in-person)
Tailored by veterinary professionals, for veterinary professionals, our classes give you and your team everything you need to relax, breathe, and improve your resilience and flexibility. 

*Bespoke Wellbeing Workshops
Designed for practices or groups, we will work with you to build a yoga and CPD workshop tailored to your specific needs and budget. Starting from our half-day package, we can also offer full-day mini retreats for your company, or design sessions taught regularly over a few weeks. We pride ourselves on delivering what our customers need. 

*Speaker Sessions
Drawing on my public speaking experience, presenting skills and ability to deliver and breakdown scientific content into daily user-friendly tips, Chloe is available to speak at your in-person and virtual events and conferences, on a variety of different topics including yoga, meditation and breath work. 

*Speaker/Team Gifts
Our range of yoga-inspired eco and vegan-friendly home fragrance products, yoga props, clothing, accessories and more, means that there is something for everyone when it comes to showing your team and event speakers you appreciate them! We are able to deliver large orders on request. 

For more information please see vetyogi.com or for enquiries contact chloe@vetyogi.com directly.

Name: American Society of Laboratory Animal Practitioners
Description:
Our mission is to advance laboratory animal medicine and welfare through member development and representation in the greater professional community. We achieve this through advocacy, education & collaboration.

Our objectives:
* To provide a mechanism for the exchange of scientific and technical information among veterinarians engaged in laboratory animal practice.
* To actively encourage its members to provide training for veterinarians in the field of laboratory animal practice at both the pre and postdoctoral levels and lend their expertise to institutions conducting laboratory animal medicine programs.
* To encourage the development and dissemination of knowledge in areas related to laboratory animal practice.
* To act as a spokesperson for laboratory animal practitioners within the AVMA House of Delegates and to work with other organizations involved in the care and use of laboratory animals in representing our common interests and concerns to the scientific community and the public at large.

 Après avoir exercé plusieurs années en Clinique Vétérinaire au poste de E-ASV, j'ai eu la chance d'intégrer la belle Equipe de Dr Patounes en Mars 2022. 

 Heureuse d'avoir évolué au sein de ma profession, j'ai vraiment à coeur d'apporter mon aide à l'ensemble de mes collègues désireux de mettre en place 𝘂𝗻𝗲 𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗲́𝗴𝗶𝗲 𝗱𝗲 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗺𝘂𝗻𝗶𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 au sein de leur structure. 

 C'est donc naturellement que j'ai créé cette micro-entreprise afin de 𝗽𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗮𝗴𝗲𝗿 𝗮𝘃𝗲𝗰 𝗩𝗲́𝘁𝗼𝘀 𝗲𝘁 𝗔𝗦𝗩 toutes les connaissances de Community Management que j'ai pu acquérir au fil de ces dernières années.

 Vous me verrez ainsi, de façon ponctuelle, 𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗺𝗲𝗿 𝗰𝗲𝗿𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗻𝘀 𝘄𝗲𝗯𝗶𝗻𝗮𝗿𝘀 liés à mon métier de E-ASV, vous m'apercevrez peut-être dans certaines 𝘃𝗶𝗱𝗲́𝗼𝘀 ou lirez (peut-être même sans le savoir ), certains de mes 𝗽𝗼𝘀𝘁𝘀 𝘀𝘂𝗿 𝗹𝗲𝘀 𝗿𝗲́𝘀𝗲𝗮𝘂𝘅. 

Vous avez la possibilité de me contacter par mail si vous le souhaitez  contact@e-asv.fr.

Name: Invetus
Description:
Invetus Proprietary Limited (‘Invetus’) is the largest veterinary contract research organisation (CRO) in Australasia.

For customers who are looking to develop products or techniques targeting improvements in the health, welfare and productivity of animals, we offer a comprehensive range of veterinary research services to generate high-quality information to support the product development process. We are developing expertise in the preclinical area of human medicines. 

We also offer networks of clinicians and animal owners across the eastern states of Australia, in a range of conditions. From pets in cities to production animals on land or laboratory animals, we are here to assist in your research interests or animal health improvement ideas.

HOW WE DO IT
We know animals. We know research.

Invetus' core strengths are our people, our ability to use best practice methodology, and our integration of processes to drive efficiency and high-quality research.

We employ highly qualified and capable veterinarians, scientists, veterinary nurses and animal attendants. We are GLP accredited.

OUR CAPABILITIES
Invetus sets the standard in animal research: Any species. Any degree of rigour (POC, GCP, GLP),in any area of animal health.

Invetus is independent, and fearless in providing the right information to clients. 

Invetus has the capacity, expertise and experience to successfully conduct animal and pre-clinical human research throughout Australia in purpose-designed facilities, through a range of associated veterinary clinics, research institutions, or on properties in the field. 
Our services include but are not limited to:

•      Target animal safety studies 
•	Animal Product residues 
•	Pharmacokinetics, Toxicokinetics 
•	Proof of concept for new compounds
•	Preclinical studies for biomedical research for human applications in laboratory animals
•	Infectious diseases challenge models

3. Education & Advocacy: Raise awareness and educate communities and stakeholders on the importance of combating AMR and adopting sustainable farming practices.

Name: Evvivax
Description:
EVVIVAX is a Biotech Company created in June 2016 as a spin off from Takis, a Biotech created by a group of scientists previously part of Merck Research Laboratories (MRL). EVVIVAX pursues the discovery and development of innovative Therapeutic Veterinary Cancer Vaccines  based on a Adenoviral vector/DNA platform technology, leveraging on its strong track record in drug discovery.
EVVIVAX’ frontline candidates are two therapeutic cancer vaccines for canine tumors: a) Tel-eVax, targeting Telomerase (TERT), a key molecule in Oncology. b) Erb-eVax, against HER2/neu oncogene, a well-known and validated target in Oncology. The main cancer types suitable for these immunotherapies are: Lymphomas, Breast, Osteosarcoma and Tensitional cell carcinomas. EVVIVAX business strategy for the next 5 years is: 1) to develop Tel-eVax and Erb-eVax as marketed products in USA and then in Europe; 2) license out the products to Pharma/large Biotech companies, in exchange for upfront, success-based milestones and royalty fees. Other R&D projects are under advanced pre-clinical development. EVVIVAX aims at translating scientific breakthrough achievements in Cancer Immunotherapy into marketed innovative products in Veterinary and subsequently in Human Oncology. 
Veterinary Oncology is an extraordinary growing market opportunity: one in every four dogs will develop cancer during its lifetime and this generally kills nearly half of pet dogs over the age ten. Cancer in canines is still predominantly treated through surgical excision, chemotherapy and radiation therapy, highly invasive procedures that can result in unpleasant side-effects. Name: ENOVAT
Description: The global antimicrobial resistance crisis has been the driver of several international strategies on antimicrobial stewardship. Despite their good intentions, such broad strategies are only slowly being implemented into “real life”. This is particularly unfortunate for veterinary medicine, which is challenged by (i) a shortage of experts in key disciplines related to antimicrobial stewardship, (ii) few antimicrobial treatment guidelines, and (iii) inferior diagnostic tests compared to human microbiology. The aim of this Action is to optimize veterinary antimicrobial use with special emphasis on the development of antimicrobial treatment guidelines and refinement of microbiological diagnostic procedures. For this purpose, the Action will first survey the state-of-the-art in terms of microbiological diagnostic practices and veterinary treatment guidelines across Europe. Secondly, tools in the form of an extensive European strain database and a standard for making antimicrobial treatment guidelines will be created. Third, Action Participants will exploit these tools for the development and refinement of microbiological methods and European treatment guidelines. Finally, the surveys, tools, diagnostic methods, and treatment guidelines will be disseminated to national and international stakeholders. Furthermore, the Action will recommend priority research areas for future optimization of antimicrobial treatment in animals, and develop a roadmap outlining how European countries can advance towards a common high level of veterinary antimicrobial stewardship. The planned investigations and the educational activities will raise the critical mass of expertise in veterinary antimicrobial stewardship in Europe, especially in less resourceful countries and among Early Career Investigators.

WHAT WE DO

We advance the veterinary profession and support veterinarians in places of need by:

- providing educational resources, research funding, scholarships, and exchanges with veterinary organisations across Europe and the USA

- facilitating the development of veterinary associations and networks

- supporting rabies vaccination campaigns

With a proven record of collaboration and impact – especially across Africa – we are now expanding our programmes to other places in need.

Name: NeoCare ENVT
Description: En Juin 2016, le centre NeoCare (Néonatalogie des Carnivores Reproduction et Elevage) a vu le jour. NeoCare a 3 missions : développer l’activité clinique en élevage et en reproduction, assurer la formation des acteurs de la filière canine et féline et améliorer les connaissances en néonatalogie et pédiatrie. Ses principaux interlocuteurs sont les vétérinaires, les étudiants vétérinaires et les éleveurs, canins et félins. La structure a ainsi pour vocation de soutenir les vétérinaires dans le cadre d’audits d’élevages lors de problèmes identifiés, ou lors de visites sanitaires, visites devenues obligatoires deux fois par an depuis 2015. Le centre propose aussi des soirées de formation gratuites destinées aux éleveurs, aux vétérinaires, étudiants vétérinaires et passionnés. La recherche clinique du centre NeoCare porte sur la santé néonatale canine et féline, avec le soutien du secteur Recherche et Développement de Royal Canin. L’équipe travaille notamment sur les facteurs modifiant la qualité immunologique et nutritionnelle du colostrum et du lait, les facteurs influençant les chances de survie des chiots et des chatons, et l’impact de la croissance précoce sur la santé à l’âge adulte. NeoCare développe également une biobanque d’échantillons biologiques collectés en élevages et lors d’autopsies. Ces ressources biologiques permettront dans les années à venir de développer les connaissances en pédiatrie et en élevage via notamment la recherche de nouveaux agents infectieux lors de la survenue d’une crise sanitaire en élevage. L’ensemble de ces activités repose sur de solides collaborations avec différents acteurs : les éleveurs canins et félins et leurs vétérinaires, le Centre d’Etude, de Sélection et d’Elevage de Chiens guides pour Aveugles et autres Handicapés (CESECAH), le Syndicat National de Profession du Chien et du Chat (SNPCC) et différents partenaires privés (Merial, Royal Canin, Scanelis).
