* We empower vet clinic "Employers of Choice" who put their people first to help veterinary professionals easily find great employers who respect their team and value staff retention.  

* We share effective career management strategies through our podcast, blogs, and free resources, providing specialised support tailored to the veterinary industry.  

When you're ready to boost recruitment and retention at your clinic through better team fit and get your staff excited about Monday mornings again, incorporating DISC-Flow personality assessments, Functional Imagery Training (FIT), Emotional Intelligence, and coaching is the way to go. Let's chat about customising these proven methodologies to empower your clinic's success.

Name: Vet O´clock
Description: Vetoclock is the first Spanish platform conceived  as vaas (Vet as a service). A multidisciplinary renowned vet team that solve clinical cases in 24-48h.

Name: Dogukan İlaç
VetPrac
Description:
VetPrac workshops provide a nurturing and safe environment for veterinary professionals to practice hands-on skills and gain confidence. We also offer live and interactive online courses to make CPD even more accessible to the veterinary community.

VetPrac connects Australia’s finest specialists with you, the active professionals in general veterinary practice. Our educators are primed to share their practical and contemporary techniques for veterinarians, veterinary nurses and veterinary technicians.

Every VetPrac workshop is inspired by you. If you have a topic of interest for a VetPrac workshop, comment on our page or email us at getanswers@vetprac.com.au

Name: cdVet Naturprodukte GmbH
Description:
The cdVet Naturprodukte GmbH was founded in 1999 with the goal to go new ways in the animal health sector. A main reason for this was increasing use antibiotics and other chemical substances in the livestock farming. Many animal diseases are also the result of "civilized" mass farming, one-sided nutrition, and a lack of attention to biological relationships in animal husbandry. This knowledge is the basis for the innovative cdVet product and company concept.

cdVet offers animal owners a vast variety in alternatives in form of natural products that not only meets the demands of pet and hobby animal husbandry but also the high-quality standards of the health management in professional and modern farm animal husbandry and feeding.

Name: LatamVet
Description:
LatamVet es la primera red de clínicas veterinarias independientes de Latinoamérica.

LatamVet permite a los veterinarios seguir practicando la medicina de forma independiente, al mismo tiempo que proporciona recursos y asistencia en las operaciones comerciales y administrativas. Los veterinarios conservan todos los beneficios de ser un negocio independiente, pero obtienen las ventajas de formar parte de una red más grande. Esto incluye acceso a marketing profesional, experiencia en gestión de inventario, economías de escala, apoyo en reclutamiento, implementación de tecnología, sinergias colaborativas y recursos financieros.

Nuestra red de clínicas es tan única como cada uno de los miembros que la componen. Nuestros socios veterinarios están altamente calificados y trabajan arduamente para entregar la calidad de atención personalizada que nuestra profesión merece. Nos enorgullecemos en mantener una cultura de colaboración y comunicación abierta, para seguir siendo innovadores y estar a la vanguardia en el mundo veterinario de hoy, sin perturbar la autonomía médica de nuestros socios veterinarios.

Name: Pet Dream Serviços Veterinários LTDA
Description:
Inaugurado em 1994, o Hospital Veterinário Pet Dream surgiu do ideal de excelência na assistência à saúde animal. Entendendo que, devido aos pacientes não poderem se comunicar e expressar seus sentimentos, é necessário que haja muita sensibilidade e experiência profissional na prática do tratamento.

Ao longo de uma trajetória de pouco mais de duas décadas, o Pet Dream conquistou o sonho de se tornar o maior complexo pet hospitalar de Pernambuco, sendo referência no segmento em todo o estado. Com três unidades estrategicamente localizadas em Boa Viagem (24h), Piedade (24h) e Setúbal, o Pet Dream conta uma gama de serviços e produtos para pets de todos os portes, desde um completo suporte médico-hospitalar até serviços agregados de bem-estar, lazer e estética (sendo estes últimos, oferecidos em uma estrutura específica, fora do ambiente hospitalar).

O Pet Dream também conta com uma equipe de profissionais de diversas especialidades clínicas e cirúrgicas, além de uma equipe de colaboradores de larga experiência na área. Mas nosso trabalho não para por aí! Para permanecer como referência no estado, o hospital sempre oferece os exames e tratamentos mais modernos (e muitas vezes pioneiros na região), amparado por contínuos investimentos e atualizações dos profissionais. Isso permite o Pet Dream a receber e tratar seus pacientes de forma única, realizando modernas e seguras técnicas de diagnóstico, tratamento clínico e cirúrgico.

Name: Feed Concentrate Factory Company (FEEDCO)
Description:
FEEDCO was established as an animal feed and concentrate producing company in 1975 dedicated to serving the local Jordanian market. Ever since the company has gained experience in several veterinary and animal health fields. 
FEEDCO had established its credible and reputable name in the Jordanian market depending on the quality principle that had been followed since the start of our business.

Name: Matacura
Description:
A Matacura tem por missão, fornecer soluções diversificadas destinadas à higiene, beleza e tratamento veterinário, proporcionando saúde e bem estar a toda família.
     Com área construída de 1.500 m2, instalações e equipamentos de alto padrão, colaboradores capacitados, comprometidos e em constante busca por melhorias, a Agro Industrial Catarinense Ltda é uma das maiores e mais modernas indústrias farmacêutica veterinárias do sul do país.
     Registrada no Ministério da Agricultura, Pecuária e Abastecimento e com produtos licenciados e cadastrados desde 1945, atende com responsabilidade as exigências estabelecidas pelos órgãos fiscalizadores, o que a torna atualmente, referência nacional na industrialização e comercialização de produtos veterinários como sabonetes em barras, shampoos, condicionadores, sprays e pomada.
     Possui infra-estrutura própria para pesquisa e desenvolvimento de produtos, com equipamentos de ponta, que proporcionam segurança e credibilidade em cada inovação e através de uma equipe multidisciplinar e comprometida, busca criar soluções voltadas à saúde animal, desde o diagnóstico da necessidade do cliente, desenvolvimento das formulações, até a comprovação de eficácia e segurança dos seus produtos.
     Com profissionais habilitados e especializados em cada área afim, o controle de qualidade monitora a integridade física, química e microbiológica do ambiente fabril, dos materiais em processo e dos produtos industrializados. Inspeciona, controla e valida meticulosamente todos os seus fornecedores, suas matérias-primas, materiais de embalagem e produtos acabados para que seus produtos cheguem em perfeitas condições até o cliente final.
     Esta é a AIC, uma empresa onde valores como pioneirismo, ousadia, valorização do ser humano fazem parte do dia a dia.
Location: São Miguel do Oeste, Santa Catarina

Description:
Petscribers is an end-to-end, comprehensively integrated, digital prescription platform addressing the current issues in the online veterinary medicines marketplace.


Petscribers aspires to remove barriers to purchasing veterinary medications online, making medication affordable and accessible to all, with the end goal of improving animal welfare.

Name: Saúde Pet Gestão
Description:
Desenvolvemos um serviço especializado para atender às necessidades de saúde e gestão veterinária para sua petshop, clínica e hospital, de forma abrangente e acessível.

Proporcionamos ao seu negócio, a tranquilidade de saber que a gestão dos seus veterinários está na mão de especialistas.

Name: Krönen Distribuidora de Productos Veterinarios
Description:
Desde el año 2002 venimos forjando un camino como Empresa Distribuidora de Productos Veterinarios Contamos con un equipo de trabajo especialmente capacitado y reconocido en el sector, gracias al cual seguimos creciendo en este proyecto, que tanta satisfacción nos da. 

Comercializamos productos de reconocidos Laboratorios nacionales e internacionales y ofrecemos a nuestros clientes varias opciones para adquirilos ya sea en nuestra sede, telefónicamente, solicitando la visita de un vendedor o mediante la plataforma de transacción online desarrollada en nuestra página web. Hacemos envíos a todo el país.

Además le damos un valor agregado a la atención de nuestros clientes, enviándoles vía e-mail nuestro Newsletter Comercial con la presentación de ofertas y nuevos productos, y nuestro Newsletter Técnico con información y temas esenciales para la profesión veterinaria.

Sumamos a esto nuestra presencia en facebook y twitter.

Name: Agromilena Feed Additives
Description:
Agromilena. Nutrição animal sustentável.

A eliminação de antibióticos e produtos químicos é a grande fronteira a ser ultrapassada na produção de produtos cárneos e lácteos. 

O consumidor está mais consciente e preocupado com a origem e tipo de sistema de criação dos animais, exigindo cada vez mais produtos sustentáveis. E para dar este salto é que a Agromilena Feed Additives existe.  Criada no ano 2000, com capital 100% brasileiro, a empresa possui sede em Ituverava, interior de São Paulo. 

De forma sistemática organiza todas as ações pautadas em sustentabilidade, integrando em seus três pilares: o econômico, o social e o ambiental, para desenvolvimento, produção e comercialização de produtos para a nutrição animal.

Para isso, busca no meio ambiente elementos orgânicos para desenvolvimento e soluções naturais para a criação de criação, sempre com o objetivo de melhorar o desempenho, saúde e bem-estar dos animais.   

Atuando na melhoria de índices zootécnicos e sanidade, fornecemos produtos livres de antibióticos e 100% naturais, para a produção de proteína animal sustentável e rentável ao criador.

Name: Puppies & Kittens Pet Market
Description:
En Puppies & Kittens nos apasionan las mascotas tanto como a ti. Somos una tienda especializada en productos y servicios pensados para el cuidado, la salud y la felicidad de tus compañeros peludos.

Ofrecemos una amplia variedad de alimentos premium, accesorios, juguetes, productos de higiene, camas y mucho más. Además, contamos con servicios profesionales como peluquería canina, baño y corte, asesoría nutricional y atención personalizada.

Nos comprometemos a brindarte productos de calidad y atención cercana, porque sabemos que tu mascota no es solo una mascota: es parte de tu familia. 
 
Visítanos en tienda o compra en línea con envío rápido y seguro.

Name: Orthopaedic Specialist Services
Description:
Orthopaedic Specialist Services (OSS) is a mobile surgical team based in Oxfordshire and the surrounding counties. We travel to your veterinary practice to operate on dogs and cats with orthopaedic conditions including, but not limited to, cranial cruciate ligament disease, patellar luxation, elbow dysplasia, hip dislocation, and fractures. Email us, or visit our website to find out more!

 

We are committed to making specialist care accessible for pet owners and achieving the best outcomes for their pets. Our experienced clinical team consists of a European & RCVS recognised specialist surgeon, and a registered veterinary nurse with a postgraduate certificate in surgical nursing. Having worked in both busy first opinion practices and large referral hospitals, we understand how clinical excellence is achieved in a general practice setting. 

 

We provide our own referral level instruments & implants, and we are dedicated to ensuring our practices and pet owners receive a professional and compassionate experience. Clear pre- and postoperative communication is vital and, in addition to surgical cases, we are also able to review radiographs and offer advice on case management.

Name: IndyVet Emergency and Specialty Hospital
Description:
IndyVet is a 24-hour specialty practice comprised of a collaborative team of emergency, internal medicine, surgery, ophthalmology, neurology, oncology and rehabilitation services. Our 22,000 square foot state of the art facility possess the resources, innovated technology and skilled professional staff to diagnose and treat almost any medical, surgical or emergent condition. 

At IndyVet we pride ourselves on our positive, supportive company culture; fostering an environment of personal growth and development. Our valued team members are encouraged to showcase their talents for the betterment of organization, as our success is dependent upon the success of our team. 
 
Mission Statement
To better the lives of people by improving the lives of pets.

Our Values
Primary Value: Patient care comes first.

Integrity: We adhere to the highest standards of professionalism, ethics, and personal responsibility.

Respect: We grant courtesy and dignity to patients, clients, and colleagues.

Innovation: We encourage and develop the creative ideas of each team member to infuse our organization with change, growth, and enthusiasm.

Service: We serve by aiding, assisting, and comforting our patients, their families, and referring veterinarians.

Compassion: We provide the best care possible and treat each client with kindness, sensitivity, and empathy.

Education: We provide educational opportunities for the growth of our team, the veterinary community, and future veterinary professionals.

Excellence: We demonstrate a positive attitude and a constant commitment to improved performance.

Teamwork: We work together in a collaborative and cooperative environment to provide optimal patient care.

We are certified Fear Free Hospital, Feline Friendly, as well as AAHA (American Animal Hospital Association).

Name: Grupo Agility
Description: O Grupo Agility surgiu da união de profissionais qualificados e especializados no ramo de nutrição e produção animal. Atuando nas áreas de  consultoria, indústria e comércio, a Agility visa difundir soluções eficazes, assegurando o máximo desempenho de toda a cadeia produtiva agropecuária. Com uma visão detalhada das necessidades do campo, tem como objetivo principal, levar conhecimento e a mais avançada tecnologia  ao produtor. Preconizando sempre, a saúde, o bem-estar animal e o desenvolvimento sustentável. Por entender que cada região possui características individuais, a Agility Produção Animal desenvolve produtos específicos às diferentes fases de produção, juntamente com acompanhamento técnico personalizado, customizado e direcionado às necessidades de cada cliente.

Name: Muscat Veterinary Center
Description:
Muscat Veterinary Center,  Is all-new state of the art full facility clinic that offers a wide range of veterinary services to keep your companions healthy and happy. The Center presents a wide range of Diagnostic and Therapeutic Services to cover all needs of your pets and furry friends. Our services include: 
Diagnostic and Therapeutic Services: Our Veterinary Center is equipped to provide diagnostic and therapeutic services to care for your pets complete health care needs including ECG services on-site and complete in-house laboratory facilities. 

Surgical Services: Our surgical suite provides for the performance of a wide variety of surgical procedures such as: Orthopedic, fracture repair, exploratory procedures. Soft tissue surgeries include gastrotomy, enterotomy, cistotomy, and routine surgeries such as neuters etc. 

Anaesthesia: We utilize the safest available anaesthetic to provide an extra margin of safety that include inhalant anaesthesia, especially for our older or high -risk patients. Using the most modern equipment including: Pulse oximetry, ECG and blood pressure monitoring. The patient's vital signs are monitored during all anesthetic procedures.

Internal Medicine: We offer complete in-house diagnostic procedures. 

Radiology services: Digital X-ray, USG provides high quality radiography for quick diagnosis and many disorders. 

Behaviour counselling: We can provide advice regarding the correction of problems such as excessive barking, chewing, spraying, scratching, digging, house soiling and aggression. 

Boarding: We provide pet boarding as a service to our clients. All boarders receive personal attention from our caring staff. 

Grooming and Bathing: Routine and therapeutic bathing services are available. We also have a groomer available for all your pets beauty needs.

Permanent identification: We offer microchip identification.

Emergency Care: Please call our emergency phone nr. (+968 94972891) for instructions for after-hour emergencies. 

Laboratory: Our in-house laboratory facilities provide: Chemistry, CBC, urine analysis, cytology parasite testing, ELISA testing. 

Dentistry: Teeth cleaning and polishing, tooth extractions and surgeries.   

Pharmacy: We maintain a complete inventory of pharmaceuticals, vitamins, shampoos, flea and tick control products to meet the needs of your pet. We also carry prescription diets.

Individualized external-parasite control program: We develop programs for the specific needs of your pet and your own particular environmental situation. We will review with you the best ways to control fleas and ticks in your house, yard and your pet. 

Dietary Counselling: We will provide guidance  regarding your pets nutritional needs for each life stage, including dietary requirements for growth, weight maintenance and performance.

Name: BusiVet
Description:
BusiVet provide property and business solutions that are demand-led, data-led and operator-led.  We bridge the gap between landlords and tenants much higher in the project lifecycle. 

Working with operators, understanding their growth strategy, operational model and financial objectives early on leads to a better, more sustainable property solution. 

We exist to give operators the edge in their property and growth solutions.

Midwest Cremation Service is a professional pet cremation service helping veterinarians and pet parents since 1980.

We know each family has a unique set of wishes when memorializing their pet.  our staff works with your family to tailor a distinctive pet cremation to meet your needs. Midwest Cremation Service has serviced the
Veterinarian community and Pet Parents for over 30 years.

Wir verbinden Fachwissen und Mitgefühl mit einem integrierten Teamansatz für eine individuell abgestimmte Behandlung unserer Patienten und bauen eine vertrauensvolle Beziehung zu den Patientenbesitzern und überweisenden Tierärzten auf.

Description: Vets Pets Consultancy is an online veterinary consultancy platform providing video-graphical, blog-graphical and social media information. It aims to provide services of the veterinary in a way that empowers local community. It is promoting veterinary in Pakistan by mingling DigiTech and health revolution, with more efficient easier and profitable approach for writers, media persons and veterinarians, which is managed by our mobile application.

Name: Vet Med Baby
Description:
Being a working parent in veterinary medicine comes with its own unique challenges, starting with trying to conceive and pregnancy, and continuing through parental leave and returning to work. Vet Med Baby is here to give you the information you need to thrive and to help you support your employees and coworkers on their journeys.

A career in veterinary medicine should enrich the lives of working parents and their families, not drive them away. Together, we can help make a career in veterinary medicine more rewarding and sustainable for all of us.

Name: Oakland Veterinary Referral Services
Description:
Oakland Veterinary Referral Services (OVRS) is a leading center for specialty veterinary care in the Midwest. Our locally owned and operated multi-specialty veterinary center is housed in one of the best-equipped animal care centers in the country. 


From referring veterinarians in search of specialty care to pet owners looking for top specialty or emergency services, OVRS is ready to help. We have a team of board-certified specialty veterians, each with advanced training in each of their specialty areas. They are backed by a highly trained support staff, and a care center full of some of the most advanced technology in veterinary services. 


Thanks for our commitment to providing top quality care and exceptional customer service, we have already earned the respect, trust and confidence of thousands of referring veterinarians and pet owners in and around Southeastern Michigan. It is our mission to continue to provide the best veterinary care possible.

Name: Addison Biological Laboratory, Inc.
Description:
Addison Biological Laboratory, Inc. is a Fayette, MO based manufacturer and marketer of exclusive veterinary technologies. For over a third of a century, J. Bruce Addison, president and founder, has been recognized as a leader in veterinary diagnostics and herd specific bacterin production. The reputable MAXI/GUARD product line is best known for its M. bovis (pinkeye) cattle bacterin among bovine veterinarians and Nasal Vac (intranasal respiratory) baby pig vaccine among swine practitioners. Both technologies are recognized as efficacy leaders and privately labeled for large multinational biological manufacturer/marketers.

Companion animal product offerings in veterinary dental home care, dermatology, otology, and wound care provide medical researched technologies that define today’s zinc-based product standards. Marketing accomplishments include a successful export history to over 25 countries and recognition as Missouri’s Exporter of the Year. The U.S. Chamber of Commerce selected Addison Biological Laboratory, Inc. as the recipient for its prestigious Regional Blue Chip Enterprise Initiative Award.

“Our mission is to be the premier provider of exclusive and innovative technologies to assist the global betterment of animal care by solving problems for veterinary professionals, animal producers, and pet owners.”

Name: EV
Description: E.V. Soc. cons. a r.l. è una società operante dal 1990 quale fornitore di servizi professionali per i medici veterinari. E' composta da due Dipartimenti, Edizioni Veterinarie ed Eventi Veterinari. Edizioni Veterinarie svolge attività di editore scientifico e di società di distribuzione; Eventi Veterinari gestisce le attività congressuali e i corsi di aggiornamento professionale delle Società Scientifiche dell'ANMVI (AIVEMP, SCIVAC, SIVAE, SIVE, SIVAR, SIVAL) e della FSA (Fondazione Salute Animale).

Name: Universitäres Tierspital Zürich
Description:
Das Universitäre Tierspital Zürich bietet umfassende veterinärmedizinische Dienstleistungen für Kleintiere, Pferde, Nutztiere sowie Zoo-, Heim- und Wildtiere. Als integraler Bestandteil der Vetsuisse-Fakultät der Universität Zürich verbindet das Tierspital erstklassige klinische Praxis mit moderner Forschung und Lehre. In spezialisierten Kliniken und Abteilungen werden sämtliche Fachgebiete der Tiermedizin abgedeckt – von präziser Diagnostik und effektiver Behandlung spezifischer Erkrankungen bis zur präventiven Gesundheitsvorsorge. 

Als Anstalt des kantonalen öffentlichen Rechts folgt das Tierspital dem Dienstleistungsauftrag der Vetsuisse-Fakultät, bildet angehende Tierärztinnen und Tierärzte aus und fördert die Anwendung modernster wissenschaftlicher Erkenntnisse zur Verbesserung der Behandlungsverfahren und Patientensicherheit in der tierärztlichen Versorgung. Das integrierte Veterinärmedizinische Labor analysiert Patientenproben aller klinischen Bereiche und sichert so höchste Versorgungsqualität. Mit mehr als 400 Mitarbeitenden werden Patienten an 365 Tagen rund um die Uhr versorgt. Notfälle bei Nutztieren, Pferden und Kleintieren werden jederzeit durch die zuständigen Notfalldienste behandelt. 

Als attraktive Arbeitgeberin bietet das Universitäre Tierspital Zürich ein inspirierendes Arbeitsumfeld, in dem moderne Tiermedizin und Spitzenforschung Hand in Hand gehen. Unser engagiertes Team umfasst nicht nur erfahrene Veterinärmediziner:innen und Pflegefachkräfte, sondern auch Spezialist:innen in technischen und administrativen Bereichen sowie wissenschaftliches Personal. 

Zudem fördern wir aktiv den Nachwuchs, indem wir Lernende ausbilden und so den hohen Ansprüchen der modernen Tiermedizin gerecht werden. Hohe Integrität, persönlicher Kundenkontakt und exzellente Qualität bilden die Basis unseres Erfolgs.

Impressum: https://www.tierspital.uzh.ch/impressum/
Datenschutzerklärung: https://www.tierspital.uzh.ch/datenschutzerklaerung/

Name: Upstate Veterinary Specialties
Description:
Upstate Veterinary Specialties, PLLC is a multi-specialty veterinary referral practice located in Upstate New York that offers caring, state-of-the-art specialty veterinary services to pet owners and veterinarians in the community, throughout the Capital District and beyond. Our specialists are fully committed to the care of their patients and providing exceptional service to clients and referring veterinarians. The hospital’s available technologies include on-site advanced diagnostic imaging including MRI and CT.

We are committed to hiring the best, most compassionate staff members to give the best service to each of our clients.

Name: Parker & Ace
Description:
We’re an innovative, membership-based veterinary practice with the heart of a neighborhood clinic. 

To say we're pet obsessed is an understatement. Forever inspired by the deep connection between people & pets, our name represents our commitment to strengthen & care for these bonded pairs as we would any other member of the family.

We know that happy vets mean happy pets, so we support our vet team with sophisticated technology, 24/7 virtual care, thoughtfully-designed spaces, personalized & preventive veterinary care, and benefits that actually make them happier and healthier. That means no long waits and crowded waiting rooms, and better, more focused care for both our pets & vets.

Here for scratches, sniffs, and honest to goodness care, we’re Parker & Ace, your friendly, neighborhood veterinary team that leaves everyone feeling better—not just your pet.

Parker & Ace is backed by Redesign Health, a healthcare innovation platform that brings together entrepreneurs, industry experts, and investors to fund and launch companies that transform the healthcare system and empower people to live healthier lives.

Name: Slate Hall Veterinary Services

Slate Hall Veterinary Services are a team of dedicated poultry veterinarians providing solutions to the poultry industries veterinary needs. We provide a holistic and pragmatic approach to disease control and prevention to help maximise performance and profitability through all sectors of the poultry industry.
We provide veterinary services to all tiers of the poultry production chain, in all sectors including broiler breeders, broilers, commercial pullets and layers, turkeys, and gamebirds. We also provide services for hatchery, processing plants and egg processing facilities. We have six strategically located centres to service the UK, based at:

- Rampton, Cambridgeshire.
- Diss, Est Anglia
- Metheringham, Lincolnshire.
- Atcham, Shropshire.
- Hereford, Herefordshire.
- Northallerton, Yorkshire.

Our range of services to find the right solution for your business includes:
•	Disease and production investigations
•	Routine health care
•	Vaccination programmes
•	Veterinary Health and welfare plans
•	Hatchery investigations, advice and hygiene assessment
•	Hygiene assessment and advice
•	Processing plant investigations
•	Data analysis
•	Medication usage analysis
•	Full laboratory support and diagnostics

Slate Hall Veterinary Services are able to provide a complete range of poultry vaccines and therapeutic medications as well as an extensive range of nutraceuticals and supplements.
We are able to provide a vast array of laboratory services, including serological  testing and analysis, PCR testing, bacterial cultures (including Salmonella and Campylobacter), water analysis, faecal oocyst and worm counts with the ability to carry out bespoke testing to meet your business’s needs.

Name: Assisi Animal Sanctuary
Description:
Founded in 1997, Assisi Animal Sanctuary is an independent animal welfare charity, providing shelter for hundreds of unwanted and stray animals throughout Northern Ireland.  Each year Assisi rescues over 2,000 animals.
Before re-homing all animals are neutered, microchipped, vaccinated, wormed and de-flead. Assisi operates a strict rehoming criteria to ensure our rescue animals find the best possible home.  Assisi is committed to providing an excellent quality of life for our animals no matter what their age or state of health.
The Sanctuary operates a ‘No Kill Policy’ which means that euthanasia is carried out only in exceptional circumstances, i.e, terminal illness causing suffering or severe behavioural problems which put at risk staff, volunteers or other residents. This can only be assessed and administered by a professional vet in consultation with the CEO and the chairperson of the Board.

Nuestra historia comienza en 2010 con un servicio veterinario a domicilio y un servicio ambulante de ecografía y cardiología especialista para clínicas veterinarias de la provincia de Barcelona. Gracias a la determinación de nuestros veterinarios conseguimos salvar muchas vidas y ayudar en el diagnostico avanzado de patologías complejas a muchos compañeros veterinarios.

Gracias al apoyo de nuestros clientes, nuestro equipo de veterinarios y de enfermeros no ha parado de crecer y con ellos el número de vidas a cuatro patas ayudadas y salvadas.

Nuestros servicios van desde la medicina general, como las vacunaciones, al diagnóstico por imagen más avanzado con ecografía digital y tomografía, hasta llegar a la cirugía por mínima invasión, la laparoscopia, toracoscopia y endoscopia digestiva y urológica. Todo sin perder de vista nuestra misión de cuidar de ellos como lo haríamos con los nuestros.

Name: I.T. Guru - Veterinary Information Technology Experts
Description:
It's easy to feel lost in the world of veterinary information technology.
Trust I.T. Guru to be your guide.

A successful veterinary practice simply can't operate without information technology (IT) today. From practice management functions like medical records, billing, and payroll, to leading-edge clinical capabilities such as telehealth, to integrating all your various systems into a cohesive network, IT is the backbone of your practice's viability.

But IT can be rough waters to navigate by yourself. You need to avoid hazards like data breaches, computer crashes and server failures. And because IT is always evolving, you must be positioned to adopt new functionality when it makes operational and financial sense. You can't afford to make a wrong turn when it comes to investing your hard-earned capital in new technology or upgrades. 

Fortunately, IT Guru can show you the way.

Learn more about our services and how we help veterinary practices of all types throughout the country.

Name: Kanyana Wildlife
Description:
What is Kanyana?
Kanyana Wildlife Rehabilitation Centre Inc. is a not-for-profit organisation dedicated to protecting and caring for some of Western Australia’s most threatened native wildlife. At our facility located in the Perth Hills, Kanyana Wildlife rehabilitates sick, injured, orphaned and displaced wildlife, and undertakes broad-based training and education for community and corporate groups. 

Breeding 
Kanyana is successfully breeding bilbies at our Lesmurdie facility and participates in nation-wide gene exchange programs. Our animals are sent around Australia for release, or to other facilities to diversify the breeding populations of these threatened species.

Education 
Through outreach visits, tours, interactive displays and training, Kanyana strives to further the public’s knowledge and appreciation of wildlife, and increase understanding about the need to conserve native habitats. Learn more about our Discovery Centre experiences, Nocturnal Tours and Fauna First Aid courses on our website.                                                                                         

Research
Research conducted at Kanyana, and in collaborative studies with Murdoch and Curtin Universities, has significantly contributed to the knowledge of native animal health, captive breeding and husbandry. 

Find out more at www.kanyanawildlife.org.au

Name: sovet vétérinaires
Description:
Fondé en 2016, sovet vétérinaires dispose d'un centre équin et rural à Senarclens, ainsi que d'un centre pour petits animaux récemment ouvert à Cossonay. 
 
Notre écosystème de travail c'est : 
 
Une intelligence collective

Nous croyons en une culture d'entraide et de transparence où les défis deviennent des opportunités de croissance, et où l'esprit d'équipe est le moteur de nos réalisations.

Notre engagement se manifeste par des horaires flexibles, des options de travail à temps partiel, du travail hybride, ainsi que l’organisation de plusieurs sorties d'équipe durant l’année. 
 
Des responsabilités

En rejoignant notre équipe, vous aurez l'opportunité de façonner vos idées en actions tangibles, tout en collaborant avec une équipe qui valorise votre contribution et vos compétences. Notre responsabilité se reflète également à travers nos divers projets axés sur un environnement et une économie plus durables. 
 
Des formations continues  
Nos domaines d'expertise connaissent une évolution constante, et notre désir d'innover est profondément enraciné. Nous offrons des opportunités de formation continue tout au long de votre parcours au sein de notre entreprise, favorisant ainsi le développement d de vos compétences interpersonnelles et professionnelles, ainsi que votre contribution à la croissance de sovet.

Name: Sydney Animal Pain Clinic
Description:
PAIN MANAGEMENT CONSULTATION
Pain is a common side effect in a multitude of conditions and syndromes. The GP vets can manage a vast amount of cases, but, occasionally, pain extends beyond their expertise and requires the input of highly specialised veterinarians. Our initial consultation involves a thorough exam of the animal, medical history, current medications and current pain condition. We can then advise a pain management plan. This plan involves:

PAIN MANAGEMENT MEDICATION
Prescription pain medications are almost always a core component of successful pain management. We offer the knowledge and ability to prescribe acute and chronic pain medications that are not standard therapy. 

PAIN MANAGEMENT PROCEDURES 
We offer interventional analgesic procedures for acute and chronic pain conditions (within the chronic conditions, neurological, oncologic and osteoarthritis are the most common complains in our clinic). These procedures can significantly change our patients' quality of life in most cases and to act as an adjunctive to parental medications, or to reduce the side-effects of parental medication in those patients with sensitivities. 
The most common interventional procedure that we perform involves the use of an ultrasound to locate the nerves supplying painful joints and muscles with administration of a long-acting (2 - 3 months) anti-inflammatory medication.

Name: Gardner Llewelyn Veterinary Recruitment- Award Winning Agency
Description:

Gardner Llewelyn are a specialist Veterinary Recruitment agency supplying Veterinary Surgeons and Nurses to the profession throughout the UK and abroad.

At Gardner Llewelyn our approach is about being thorough and fair. We have been recruiting solely for the veterinary profession for almost 20 years now which gives us an in depth understanding of the profession.

We love finding people work- it’s what we do all day every day, and by matching the right job for the right person everyone’s happy, in our view that’s how it should be done.

We’re not the only agency; we don't make any outlandish claims, everyone trusts us already. People come to us because they know they will get a quality service from us- as they should.

Binnen deze praktijken was al sprake van vergaande samenwerking en uitwisseling van kennis en ideeën. De gedachte om een landelijke verband op te zetten was een logische stap. Immers, de ontwikkelingen in de sector en de wens van de varkenshouder om meer specialistische ondersteuning en een proactieve dienstverlening vraagt om expertise, kwaliteit en goede communicatie.

De keuze voor een coöperatie werd gemaakt omdat dit de mogelijkheid biedt dat varkensartsen/praktijken eenvoudig kunnen toetreden. Er ontstaat zo een landelijk actief netwerk van deskundige en betrokken varkensartsen. Met een regionaal gezicht, maar met gezamenlijke (landelijke) voordelen en synergie.

Nossa atuação está em conformidade com as legislações vigentes a nível nacional e internacional. A PETMEP utiliza e aplica todo o conhecimento adquirido em tecnologia e controle de qualidade na área humana com mesmo rigor na área animal.

A EQUIMEP é a divisão especializada em células-tronco e plasma rico em plaquetas. Sua missão é desenvolver um serviço de excelência em terapia celular equina, e proporcionar a melhora do desempenho e a cura de lesões e enfermidades.

Name: Centre National de Veille Zoosanitaire
Description:
Le CNVZ est une institution publique tunisienne placée sous la tutelle du Ministère de l'Agriculture.
Il est notamment chargé de :
•	collecter et répertorier les données épidémiologiques, les informations, les publications nationales et internationales relatives aux maladies animales, les analyser et évaluer l’impact des dites maladies sur la santé et la production animale et diffuser les informations y afférentes.
•	réaliser des études et des recherches de prospective et d’évaluation en matière d’épidémiosurveillance et de lutte contre les maladies animales et établir des rapports de synthèse et élaborer des publications périodiques et conjoncturelles en la matière.
•	faciliter le contact entre les divers intervenants dans le domaine de la veille et de la surveillance zoosanitaire.
•	formuler toute remarque découlant de l’observation et du suivi des maladies animales et proposer les mesures et les procédures susceptibles d’améliorer l’état sanitaire du cheptel en vue de contribuer à l’élaboration des politiques et programmes nationaux visant à améliorer l’état sanitaire des animaux et leur production.
•	définir les domaines prioritaires en terme de Surveillance épidémiologique des maladies animales, évaluer des opérations de lutte réalisées et proposer des mesures susceptibles d’améliorer et d’accroître leur efficacité.
•	aider les autorités vétérinaires à accomplir leurs missions par l’organisation des séminaires formation, symposiums,  journées d’études et manifestations relatives à l’épidémiologie d’intervention, au contrôle vétérinaire et la prévention zoosanitaire.

Name: American Association of Zoo Veterinarians
Description:
Based in Jacksonville, Florida, AAZV is the professional association for individuals who apply the principles of comparative veterinary medicine to zoo and wildlife species. With over 1000 members, we work in clinical zoo medical practices, diagnostic laboratories, reproductive and pathological laboratories, pharmaceutical companies, and a wide range of governmental health and wildlife management agencies throughout the world.

AAZV is an umbrella organization that provides advocacy, collaboration and partnerships for combined efforts for sustaining and improving the well-being of wildlife in all habitats. The key functions of AAZV are producing the Journal of Zoo and Wildlife Medicine (JZWM), coordinating an annual conference promoting the dissemination of state-of-the-art knowledge in the field of wildlife health, operating the Zoo and Aquarium All Hazards Partnership (ZAHP), and supporting the Wild Animal Health Fund.

Name: Profit Solver
Description:
Profit Solver is a patented pricing and profitability platform built exclusively for veterinary practices of all sizes, structures, and specialties.

With more than 3,800 veterinary practices implemented, Profit Solver takes complex financial challenges and simplifies them into a clear, objective, and repeatable process that delivers measurable results.

The foundation of Profit Solver begins with efficiency and accuracy. Through built in time and motion analysis, the software identifies how services are actually delivered, who performs the work, and how time, labor, equipment, inventory, and overhead truly impact cost. This creates a reliable financial baseline removing assumptions and exposing inefficiencies that often go unnoticed.

Once that foundation is established, Profit Solver allows practices to layer in a variety of practical, strategic pricing approaches, including value based pricing, competitive market considerations, and targeted pricing adjustments, all while staying grounded in real cost data and desired profit goals.

The result is a rational, defensible pricing strategy that:

•	Eliminates guesswork
•	Improves profitability and cash flow
•	Keeps practices competitive in their market
•	Provides clear visibility into the profit or loss of every service

Profit Solver is often the first and most critical step in a veterinary practice’s financial management strategy, giving owners, accountants, and consultants the confidence to focus on medicine and operations, knowing pricing decisions are intentional and informed.

If your practice is busy but profits don’t reflect the effort, Profit Solver can help.
Connect with us to learn how objective pricing strategies can put you back in control of your financial future.

Name: ABRAVES GO
Pets Haven Foundation
Description:
The premise upon which the Foundation was born was based on the exorbitant amount of animals being euthanised in pounds and shelters. This is a prevalent issue that has a potential resolution and thus our goal is to educate the community about responsible pet ownership. As well as to provide rehabilitation for abused or neglected animals in order to responsibly rehouse them back into the community.  
The reality that each year thousands of innocent and healthy animals lose their lives is soul destroying. Furthermore, the sad fact is that most shelters operate with ‘pound contracts’ meaning that they receive generous revenue for incoming stray animals at the expense of euthanising healthy animals to create room, this is inconceivable to us. 
This is where Pets Haven Foundation is different. As a pro-life shelter that values the essence of “life” and what is represents, we will never compromise our beliefs. We will never euthanise innocent and healthy animals just to create space. We will always be there to provide hope and a second chance for our companion pets. 
The pedestal upon which we place both “human and fur” is second to none. Our doors are always open to members of the community and we are focused on providing a safe haven for people along with orphaned animals.

Name: 360 Vet Sales
Description:
Packaging your practice, knowing its value, and negotiating the best deal possible is stressful. Staying on top of all the necessary details of a sale can be overwhelming too. Our goal is for you to get higher multiples so you can move on to the next stage of your life knowing you received the best return on investment possible for your years of hard work.

At 360 Vet Sales, we understand this is your life's work. We won't rest until you close on the best offer for your veterinary practice. And until the sale is concluded, you can keep doing what you love with confidence that you will have everything you want once the transition is complete.

If you own an animal clinic, hospital, or specialty practice with two or more DVMs and are considering an exit, your timing is excellent. With lower overhead costs, an easier process, higher valuations, and down-to-earth input, 360 Vet Sales is the team you want by your side.

We also help veterinarians transition from owner to employee. We will lead you through every step of the process and maximize your valuation so you can remove all debt and get back to doing what you love.

Name: Our Honor
Description:
As humans continue to recognize the sentience and suffering of other beings, our circle of compassion is ever widening. Practices that were once deemed acceptable are becoming outlawed in order to protect the lives of the most vulnerable among us.

Challenging our systems and institutions is an arduous task. Many of those in power have been ingrained in the old methods and belief systems. Confronting authority can be emotionally exhausting and without appropriate support systems in place, can result in damage to one's mental health, livelihood and reputation.

Our goal is to create an organized network of professionals who are able to formally challenge unethical institutionalized systems and amplify the voices of those who have been marginalized.

We practice nonviolence and believe in forging alliances with industry. We believe everyone who seeks out a career with animals has the desire to protect them from suffering. 

Together, we can create better ways to help and protect the animals we love and achieve the highest levels of compassionate care and transparency.

Na nossa unidade de saúde, trabalhamos diariamente para garantir a saúde dos nossos pacientes, disponibilizando um vasto leque de serviços, com uma equipa altamente profissional, experiente e disponível.

Protegemos com amor!

Name: The Barkley Pet Hotel & Day Spa
Description:
The Barkley Pet Hotel & Day Spa is a resort-style vacation for dogs, cats, birds and exotics, which combines homelike amenities with recreational activity.  Our trained and caring professionals provide unparalleled customer service and animal expertise to ensure the utmost in comfort, safety and happiness - 24-hours a day, 365 days a year; All while providing owners with incomparable peace-of-mind at an affordable price!

The new 23,000 square foot Barkley Pet Hotel & Day Spa allows owners to choose from a variety of spacious overnight accommodations for their pets - ranging from traditional guest rooms to luxury suites complete with flat screen televisions, web cam access and leather furniture. The guest services menu makes sure each pet stays active with an array of activity options designed to fit every lifestyle. The salon & day spa offers simple spa baths to full body massages and "pawdicures". And, the day camp is a cage-free, dog-friendly outlet to expend excess energy, socialize and exercise.

Name: SLU University Animal Hospital (UDS)
Description:
At the University Animal Hospital (UDS) of the Swedish University of Agricultural Sciences (SLU), general veterinary medicine and qualified animal health care are practiced around the clock. UDS can offer expertise in most clinical areas. Through our collaboration with academic teachers, researchers, lecturers and professors at the Faculty of Veterinary Medicine and Animal Science (VH faculty), who participate in the clinical practice, we have access to leading expertise in many clinical areas.
In addition to the large and small animal clinics, we run an advanced diagnostic imaging practice, and at the clinical chemical laboratory, annually large sample volumes from all over the world are being handled. The UDS has also an ambulatory clinic, which serves farm animals in neighbouring areas.

Name: Animal Behaviour Clinics
Description:
ABTC registered Clinical Animal Behaviourist. ASAB Certificated Clinical Animal Behaviourist. APBC Full Member. Equine and canine behaviour and welfare consultations online and face to face, with veterinary referral. Expert witness. Author.  Public Speaker.  PhD researcher. Full member APBC, ASAB, BVBA, BPS, ISES, IAABC, A-Law.

As a cross-disciplinary behaviour change adviser I write, present, lecture, supervise and mentor internationally on all aspects of behaviour and consulting, and in my role as an expert partner in Human Behaviour Change for Animals I present talks and facilitate workshops on human behaviour change, specialising in effective communication and reflective learning.

I take clinical equine and canine behaviour cases and equine expert witness and insurance claim cases and am available for face to face or online consultations, student supervision, dissertation marking, professional mentoring, academic research interviews and focus groups, rehoming, temperament and welfare assessments and presentations/workshops/articles/book contracts.

Name: Partnar Animal Health Inc
Description:
Partnar Animal Health was founded in 2004 by Greg Shewfelt. As a science graduate from the University of Guelph, and with an MBA from Durham University in the UK, Greg's education coupled with a track record of success in the global animal health industry provided the platform in which to launch this new venture.

Developing partnerships has been a key to this company's success. All people and companies have specific areas of knowledge and skills wherein they excel. By partnering with others, Partnar Animal Health has been able to access knowledge and capabilities far beyond that of which a small company on its own could be capable of.

Partnar was initially focused on marketing products for bovine and equine embryo transfer in North America. To support these market activities, the company has warehouses located in both St. Joseph, Missouri and Ilderton, Ontario.

In Canada, seeing opportunities arising from industry consolidation, the company broadened its market scope and began to register and market veterinary products that larger animal health companies had discontinued. With this core of registered veterinary drugs, Partnar further expanded its product offering by partnering with other manufacturers looking for distribution in the Canadian market. As a result of the success Partnar has enjoyed by implementing these strategies, the company now boasts a sales force of six people covering Canada from coast to coast.

Name: ITEQVET
Description:
ITEQVET - Instituto de Treinamento, Educação e Qualificação Veterinária

O ITEQVET surgiu com o propósito de capacitar Médicos Veterinários, estudantes e auxiliares, com um ensino de excelência e didática diferenciada.

Nosso maior objetivo é expandir conhecimento através de nossas mídias sociais e também presencialmente, por todo Brasil.

Visamos sempre dispor de um conteúdo de qualidade, atualizado e de preço acessível. Além de sempre nos colocarmos à disposição para resolução de dúvidas e troca de experiências.

Name: VIBE Vet
Description:
VIBE Vet (Veterinary Industry Board for Empowerment) is a national nonprofit organization committed to transforming veterinary medicine through inclusive governance, equitable advocacy, and professional elevation for every role on the veterinary team.

Founded by a coalition of credentialed veterinary technicians, assistants, practice managers, students, educators, and veterinarians, VIBE Vet was created to fill long-standing gaps in representation, credentialing, and legislative empowerment across the field. We believe every member of the veterinary team deserves a real voice—not just a token seat at the table, but true influence over the systems that shape our professional lives.

Our mission is to build a profession worth staying in. That starts with dismantling the hierarchical silos that stifle innovation, burnout prevention, mental health, and retention. VIBE Vet centers real stories and frontline insight to drive bold reforms in scope of practice, licensing, education pathways, and workplace sustainability.

We are currently in our Founding Visionaries phase, finalizing our bylaws, federated governance structure, and onboarding systems in preparation for our full public launch during National Vet Tech Week in October.

 What we’re building:

A multi-role national board with equitable voting power

State partnerships for title protection & credentialing infrastructure

Legislative toolkits & advocacy campaigns across all 50 states

A digital home where all veterinary professionals can organize, lead, and be heard

We’re not just here to elevate titles—we’re here to protect purpose, uplift voices, and create a future that works for everyone. If you've ever felt like your role was invisible, you're exactly who we're here for.

Let’s VIBE.

Name: MVMA Charities
Description:
Our mission is to provide medical and lifesaving support for animals at risk, as the charitable arm of the Massachusetts Veterinary Medical Association.

The MVMA Charities (MVMAC) has two key programs to help protect and serve the pet communities of Massachusetts.

Our Stray Animal Program provides financial assistance for emergency veterinary care of unowned animals so they can be rehabilitated and re-homed. Funds are made available to every city and town in Massachusetts.

Our Emergency and Disaster Preparedness Programs provide materials and education for first responders so that they can effectively address animal-related emergencies. This includes distributing pet oxygen mask kits to fire stations and training first responders (fire fighters, EMS) in basic animal first aid across Massachusetts. We've also provided funding for the State of Massachusetts Animal Response Team (SMART), Pawsitive Pantry to assist with pet food distribution to food pantries, and Mass Vest-A-Dog to purchase equipment for police K9 officers.

Peace and love for animals, peace of mind for pet owners.

We have built a platform that targets aging at the cellular level to extend the healthspan and delay the onset of age-related diseases in companion animals.

Our soft chew, daily supplement system for dogs Leap Years, is now available for order.

Name: Veterinary Medical Center of CNY
Description:
The Veterinary Medical Center of CNY is unique in its offerings to the pet owning public in the Greater Syracuse area.  Patients are referred to us either due to a need for our 24-hour emergency services, or because their needs have exceeded the capabilities of their primary—or “family”—veterinarian and require one of our various board certified specialists.

We offer the Syracuse area's only board certified veterinary specialists in oncology, internal medicine, and critical care, as well as specialists in radiology, surgery, sports medicine, and more.

Veterinary medicine, like human health care, is constantly striving to incorporate better options for maintaining our beloved pet’s health.  We offer different and interesting therapies here at VMC that may be of interest to the pet owning public, and that can significantly improve their pets’ quality of life.   Therapeutic options exist at both ends of the financial spectrum – from complex surgeries and diagnostics to hydrotherapy for arthritic pets.  Our specially qualified staff can knowledgeably discuss these treatments, and can also serve as a source of information for individuals considering different paths in veterinary medicine.

Through our nonprofit programs, we imagine a world where all animal caregivers have access to animal hospice and palliation=comfort for the pet and their family. Over a decade in this field, we know that pet parents can do their best caregiving when their emotional and spiritual needs are well met. 

Here, we share content to raise professional awareness intended for highly bonded caregivers in your practice. Name: Ind. e Com. de Alimentos Desidratados Alcon Ltda
Description:
Alcon é tudo de bom para seus Pets, a Natureza e Você!

Entre os preceitos que regem os nossos valores e missão ao longo destes 36 anos de existência, destacamos o amor, dedicação, respeito, inovação, tradição, pioneirismo, qualidade e confiança.

Ao escolher nossos produtos, você está oferecendo o que há de melhor em nutrição, proporcionando saúde e bem-estar para os animais de estimação que fazem parte da sua família, sejam eles, peixes, pássaros, répteis, roedores, coelhos e primatas. A saúde e o bem-estar dos Pets estão sempre em primeiro lugar.

Garantindo a constante qualidade dos nossos produtos, investimos em treinamentos e aperfeiçoamento das nossas equipes, automação dos processos de preparação, fabricação e embalagem. Implantamos o Sistema BPF (Boas Práticas de Fabricação) e possuímos os devidos licenciamentos ambientais, tais como IBAMA. Nossos procedimentos e práticas de controle visam a produção e distribuição dos produtos de forma segura e padronizada. Nossas pesquisas vão muito além do estudo das necessidades nutricionais e comportamento alimentar das espécies. Elas abrangem a busca por novos ingredientes, processos e tecnologias, visando oferecer um produto de excelência. Qualidade reconhecida e atestada pelo mercado brasileiro e internacional. Esta é a marca registrada da Alcon.

Somos uma empresa especializada em nutrição e cuidados dos animais silvestre, exóticos e ornamentais. Fomos a empresa pioneira no mundo a desenvolver em 1986 as primeiras rações balanceadas para aves ornamentais. Pioneiros também no lançamento de alimentos funcionais para Aves e Peixes, passando a utilizar corantes naturais e ingredientes diferenciados que auxiliam, aprimoram e garantem uma excelente nutrição. Inovação faz parte da nossa história.

Oferecer produtos de alta qualidade para o mercado brasileiro e internacional, proporcionando saúde e bem-estar aos nossos amigos pets é a nossa missão. E tão importante quanto levar novidades ao mercado, é amar e cuidar do meio ambiente.

Amiga da Natureza, o cuidado com o meio ambiente é constante no nosso dia a dia. A água retorna à natureza devidamente tratada, o ar devidamente filtrado e todos os resíduos sólidos são coletados por empresas licenciadas pelos órgãos de fiscalização ambiental. É nosso papel contribuir para um mundo melhor e, ao fazermos parte do projeto “Selo Social” das Prefeituras de Camboriú e Balneário Camboriú, acreditamos que estamos no caminho certo. Ao adquirir os produtos Alcon, você, cliente amigo, nos proporciona apoiar projetos sociais, além, é claro, dos mais de 3.000 empregos diretos e indiretos que fazem parte da Alcon e da nossa história. A extensão do nosso amor e compromisso com a natureza, nos levou a criar uma RPPN (Reserva Particular do Patrimônio Natural). Esta reserva tem como missão o estudo e a preservação da fauna e flora regional.

Muito obrigado por deixar nossos alimentos nutrir seu pet amigo, pet filho, com o que há de melhor em nutrição, amor e dedicação. Por isto tudo, temos o orgulho de ser uma empresa 100 % brasileira e estar presente na sua casa há mais de 35 anos.

Description:
Welcome to Veterinary Referral Associates - one of the oldest and best known specialty veterinary and 24 hour emergency animal hospitals in the country, serving the Greater D.C. metropolitan area including Potomac, Frederick, Germantown, Bethesda, Silver Spring and Rockville, Maryland pets. Our specialty veterinarians, veterinary technicians and administrative staff provide referral and pet emergency care for animals throughout Maryland and see cases from as far away as Pennsylvania every day. Our unparalleled emergency care is available 24 hours per day seven days per week without an appointment.

As nationally recognized veterinarians, we are a dedicated and compassionate team of professionals who excel in the care of companion animals. Providing the very best care for you and your pet is our primary mission and one which we take very seriously. As pet owners ourselves, we understand the special bond that we have with our furry family members and so are committed to providing your pet with the same care we would provide our own pet.

As a premier Gaithersburg animal hospital, our specialty veterinarians and technicians have unparalleled expertise and years of experience in companion animal medicine. Our knowledge of the latest veterinary medical techniques and procedures ensures that all of our patients receive the highest quality of animal care available throughout Maryland. Coupled with our hospital's state of the art technology, Veterinary Referral Associates is fully prepared and equipped to handle your pet's emergency or specialty veterinary needs.

The staff at Veterinary Referral Associates look forward to serving you and your pet. You have our assurance that from the moment you arrive at our animal hospital, you'll be assisted by experienced, knowledgeable and compassionate members of our staff. For more information about our Maryland animal hospital, please don't hesitate to contact us at 301-926-3300.

 O que oferecemos:

Exames PCR em campo com resultado no mesmo dia

Diagnóstico rápido de agentes infecciosos e controle sanitário

Suporte técnico especializado

Redução de perdas e aumento da eficiência produtiva

Nosso objetivo é tornar o controle sanitário mais ágil, acessível e assertivo para o produtor rural, contribuindo para um plantel mais saudável e um mercado mais competitivo.

Tecnologia, inovação e confiança para o agronegócio brasileiro.

Name: Ziweto Enterprise
Description: Ziweto Enterprises provides access to quality and affordable animal health and nutrition products to smallholder livestock farmers in Malawi who want to improve productivity of their livestock. Ziweto operates a network of micro-franchised veterinary shops and works with last mile distributors to deliver quality and affordable veterinary medicines, vaccines, animal nutrition products and livestock production equipment to smallholder farmers in Malawi. Ziweto partners with leading veterinary and animal nutrition products manufacturers across the World to source quality products that are distributed through its network of 15 “Ziweto Agro-vet Shops.” Three are company owned and four are operated by young people as micro-franchises. We recruit, train and equip Livestock Lead Farmers (currently 106), who operate as last mile distributors reaching thousands of smallholder livestock farmers in remote parts of Malawi. Ziweto believes that with improved nutrition and health of livestock, smallholder farmers will raise healthier and productive farm animals that will give them more meat, milk and eggs, resulting in increased food security and incomes.

Name: De Oosthof Dierenartsen
Description:
De Oosthof is een uniek samenwerkingsverband van 3 dierenartsenpraktijken in het oosten van het land. GELRE Dierenartsen, Dierenartsenpraktijk de Hagmolen en Dierenkliniek Hellendoorn-Nijverdal waarin gezamenlijk 35 dierenartsen werkzaam zijn. Binnen de varkenshouderij zijn 8 dierenartsen fulltime aan het werk, de rundveehouderij 10 mensen en onze andere dierenartsen behandelen alle andere diersoorten. De Oosthof werkt kwalitatief geborgd aan duurzame en veilige voedselproductie en diergezondheid. Wij zijn kenniscreërend, kennisgevend en innovatief.

De Oosthof biedt diergeneeskundige dienstverlening aan op basis van diersoortspecialisten met een hoog kennisniveau. Wij streven een bewust antibioticumgebruik na, werken met onafhankelijke laboratoriumuitslagen en een marktconforme prijs. Onze dierenartsen werken vanuit het principe: doe waar je goed in bent en leuk vindt. Wij hebben per dierenarts een voorkeurskennisgebied en creeren zo een hoog kennisniveau.

Bedrijven groeien en vragen steeds meer kennis. Door kennis actief uit te wisselen binnen gespecialiseerde diersoortteams bieden wij een hoog kennisniveau van iedere Oosthof-dierenarts. Binnen de Oosthof hebben een aantal dierenartsen zich nog weer toegelegd op deelspecialismen binnen de verschillende diersoorten. Wij werken als Oosthof-dierenarts graag samen met de veehouder, zijn medewerkers en de voorlichter in een managementteam.

Name: Pet Sanat Academy di Medicina Veterinaria Integrata
Description:
E se potessimo migliorare il processo di guarigione degli animali attraverso una medicina che unisce tradizione e innovazione?

Come veterinario, sai che ogni animale è unico. Ma cosa succederebbe se potessi offrire un approccio curativo che combina la medicina tradizionale con l’integrazione di scienze naturali? Un approccio che considera l’animale nella sua interezza e non solo la malattia?

Ti sei mai chiesto se la medicina veterinaria che pratichi potrebbe fare di più?

Ti sei mai sentito limitato dagli strumenti a tua disposizione?

E se potessi accedere a una formazione che non solo ti insegna nuove tecniche, ma ti permette di applicarle quotidianamente nella tua pratica clinica?!

Immagina un approccio che accoglie le più efficaci scienze veterinarie integrate e le unisce con armoniosa sinergia… Un percorso che ti permette di vedere l’animale come un tutto e di trattarlo con una prospettiva olistica.

Abbiamo pensato ad un programma flessibile, dove puoi studiare online in qualsiasi momento, con accesso acca 24. E una volta l’anno, parteciperai ad una settimana di formazione intensiva sul campo presso la nostra clinica. Acquisendo un approccio pratico e coerente che potrai così utilizzare quotidianamente.

La nostra missione è essere promotori di una nuova medicina veterinaria, dove la medicina tradizionale si arricchisce della medicina integrata, lavorando assieme per ottimizzare il processo di guarigione della malattia animale.

Crediamo fortemente che la medicina veterinaria possa andare oltre… La nostra visione è creare un nuovo paradigma, dove tradizione e innovazione si fondono per offrire cure più complete e personalizzate.

Un percorso triennale specialistico che unisce e rafforza le scienze integrate come omotossicologia, micoterapia, medicina funzionale, agopuntura, alimentazione naturale, ozonoterapia, medicina tradizionale cinese, comportamentismo, fitoterapia, floriterapia e osteopatia, dandoti gli strumenti per un approccio clinico completo.

Name: Pares y Álvarez Ingenieros Asociados Ltda.
REMEVET
Description:
Hoy REMEVET es un portal electrónico de acceso abierto, gratuito y en español, que está dirigido a los médicos veterinarios, estudiantes de veterinaria, académicos y personas interesadas en la medicina tanto de equinos, pequeñas especies y fauna silvestre en general.

En dicho portal se ofertan servicios de difusión como la calendarización de eventos, directorio veterinario, bolsa de trabajo y aviso oportuno. Pero además, para satisfacer la demanda de oportunidades de educación continua para los médicos veterinarios, y entendiendo la poca disponibilidad de espacios y tiempos para poder hacerlo mientras se compagina con el ejercicio profesional, REMEVET decide incursionar en el desarrollo de videos de temas médicos de actualidad, protagonizados por expertos en el tema.

Actualmente existen tres revistas de publicación periódica (REMEVET PEQUEÑAS ESPECIES, REMEVET FAUNA SILVESTRE Y REMEVET EQUINOS) que son dependientes de REMEVET y albergadas en www.remevet.com; estas revistas apoyan la educación continua y actualización del médico veterinario en tres áreas médicas y es importante destacar que no tiene ningún costo de publicación para los autores.

REMEVET es hoy en día el mejor medio en español para estar actualizado y aprender sobre los avances médicos, procedimientos actuales y casos clínicos, con aportaciones de los especialistas más reconocidos de nuestros país y del extranjero.

Name: Algebra Bio Limited
Description:
Newly incorporated in June 2016 the Algebra Bio business is the creation of some like-minded industry specialists looking to offer more than standard products and services. The business team in Algebra brings:
-- Experience in and knowledge of developing Asian food, feed and agribusinesses
-- Technical knowledge of animal nutrition
-- Extensive network of contacts both in the areas of supply and end user utilisation
-- Sound analytical and business management knowledge and experience
-- Understanding of the key requirements of innovators and manufacturers
-- Knowledge of the changing and developing needs of the markets and region
-- Experience and knowledge of the mechanisms for trading in Asia and other global markets

The industry is seeking ever more effective yet natural products and this is where Algebra is focused, on natural solutions to meet the needs of the feed and food producer and the ever more discerning consumer. Working closely with technology providers and specialist manufacturers, innovation of approach to product development and application is vital.

The business is based in Hong Kong, and is looking to meet the many complexed requirements of specific markets, particularly Asia, and is focused on ways to add value for customers through application of improved or more cost effective products or technologies.

Name: Peninsula Vet Emergency & Referral Hospital
Description:
Whether visiting us for an emergency or you have been referred to one of our surgery or medicines specialists, Peninsula Vet Emergency and Referral Hospital ensure the highest level of personalised care for you and your pet. 

STATE OF THE ART FACILITIES
Our hospital in Mornington was purpose built to provide the highest level of care to its patients. We have the latest in ultrasound and endoscopy technology, as well as an on-site CT Scanner, to give you a clearer understanding of the issue.

INDUSTRY LEADING SPECIALISTS
We are lucky to have some of Australia’s best specialists working here at Peninsula Vet Emergency and Referral Hospital. Arthur and Alison are trusted specialists in the industry who are passionate about ongoing research and education to ensure their patients are always given the best care.

EMERGENCY SERVICES
Sometimes your pet requires unexpected, urgent medical care or out-of-hours support. Open 24 hours, 7 days a week, we are there for you and your pet when you can’t wait until your general practice veterinarian is open. In these critical moments, our dedicated team of experts are there to help – any time of the morning or night.

WE CARE
Our team genuinely care about you and your pet. We understand they are an important part of your family. Visiting us can sometimes be unexpected, upsetting or overwhelming and we do our best to ensure you are informed and supported throughout the whole process. Our team are only ever a phone call, visit or email away and every question is welcome.

WE WORK WITH YOUR VET
We support your pet’s regular veterinarian throughout the entire process and ensure everyone is kept informed of all available options. We aim to return your pet’s to the care to their regular veterinarian whilst providing support as required.
