Unser eigenes Fortbildungsangebot richtet sich sowohl an Tierärzt:innen (www.MyVetlearn.de), Tierhalter:innen (www.tierhalter-wissen.de) als auch Landwirt:innen (www.vetMAB.de).
Für unsere Partner aus der veterinärpharmazeutischen oder der Futtermittel-Industrie führen wir ebenfalls Online-Fortbildungen durch und unsere Web-Entwickler:innen konzipieren und programmieren in-house die passende firmeneigene Fortbildungsplattform dazu.
Unser breites Netzwerk und unsere Marketing-Expertise nutzen wir zur Bewerbung Ihrer Veranstaltung/Ihres Produktes. Unser tiermedizinischer Background macht es uns leicht, Ihre Zielgruppe zu verstehen und Content für Ihre Websites zu erstellen.
Mit unseren Ideen möchten wir den Berufsstand voranbringen. Unser neustes Projekt dahingehend ist www.deutschkurs-tieraerzte.com. 2022 ist diese Online-Sprachschule mit dem Ziel gestartet, Tierärztinnen und Tierärzten aus dem Ausland die notwendige tiermedizinische Fachsprache für ihren Praxisalltag in Deutschland zu vermitteln. Das geschieht interaktiv und spielerisch. Denn nur mit dem richtigen Fachvokabular ist eine effiziente Kommunikation mit Tierbesitzer:innen und Kolleg:innen möglich. So stärken wir die Deutsch lernenden Mitarbeiter:innen und die Praxen/Kliniken für die Zukunft.

Name: True Vet Potential
Description:
You’ve worked hard to become a veterinarian and you deserve a rewarding career. In a profession plagued by high burnout, there is a path forward where you can thrive both professionally and financially. 
Whether you are a vet student, an associate, or practice owner, True Vet Potential gives you the tools and training for a life-time career that delivers true satisfaction.

Name: ESVOT : European Society Of Veterinary Orthopaedics and Traumatology
Description:
The European Society of Veterinary Orthopaedics and Traumatology (ESVOT) is a leading international organization committed to advancing the fields of veterinary orthopaedics and traumatology. Through fostering collaboration among veterinary professionals, ESVOT promotes excellence in clinical practice, research, and education.
ESVOT offers a range of initiatives, including the annual ESVOT Congress, which brings together experts to discuss cutting-edge developments in joint surgery and related disciplines. The society also provides members with access to the Veterinary and Comparative Orthopaedics and Traumatology (VCOT) journal.
Membership is open to veterinarians worldwide who are interested in orthopaedics and traumatology.

Name: Canine Rehabilitation & Conditioning Group
Description:
Canine Rehabilitation & Conditioning Group (CRCG) leads the industry of animal rehabilitation, and our caring team will help your dog or cat to feel stronger, move better and get back into the game of life. 

Canine Rehabilitation & Conditioning Group's (CRCG) caring team of rehabilitation experts will help your dog or cat to feel stronger, move better and get back into the game of life. 

CRCG's state-of-the-art clinic operates as a referral center for dog rehabilitation, and our certified expert personnel work as a team with a referring veterinarian and other animal healthcare professionals to evaluate, restore and maintain a dog's (and cat's) physical function and movement. The goals of therapy are to relieve pain, restore range of motion/movement, improve function, prevent injuries and expand the physical potential of the patient.

CRCG is committed to sponsoring healthy, safe and fun indoor recreation and fitness opportunities for dogs and their owners. The rehabilitation therapists of CRCG strive to provide an environment that is fun and safe for your dog and to help your dog feel safe and comfortable.

HELPING YOUR DOG FETCH MORE OUT OF LIFE.

Name: Nova Spoed- en Verwijskliniek
Description: Nova is opgericht door drie dierenartsen met jarenlange ervaring in de spoed- en verwijszorg, namelijk Talitha Grotens, Ties Koolen en Ischa Swartz. Daarnaast bestaat ons team uit zeer ervaren dierenartsen, paraveterinairen én dierverzorgers. Samen vormen we een team met passie. Want alleen vanuit passie voor ons vak kunnen we iedere dag de beste zorg voor huisdieren realiseren.

Name: Animals Fiji
Description: Animals Fiji (operated by West Charity Trust Society) is a registered Fiji charity (#889) under the Charitable Trusts Act (Cap. 67) with the focus of animal welfare. We operate clinics where owners can seek treatment for their pets. We also operate as a welfare agency taking in strays, injured and abused animals, who are treated and rehomed. Animals Fiji also operates 'out-clinics' directly in the communities where needed. One of our most critical goals is to reduce the epidemic of stray and diseased roaming dog and cat populations that plague villages, towns and rural areas, through de-sexing programs.

Name: Elite Veterinary Staffing Solutions
Description: Elite Veterinary Staffing Solutions is a branch of Elite Staffing Solutions and specialises in the recruitment of non-clinical and clinical staff in veterinary practices.

Name: Seaham Veterinary Centre
Description:
Seaham Vets is a place where we have been caring for pets from across the North East for a number of years. Priding ourselves on providing total care for pets, from routine pet vaccinations and pet neutering to medical treatments and healthy pet food advice, as well as major veterinary surgery and geriatric care. We know your pet is part of your family and we aim to treat your pet as an extended part of our own family.
At Seaham Vets we are all pet lovers (it comes with the job) we all own our own pets and we fully understand the type of care we would want for our own pets and expect if they were visiting a vets practice, we always want you as an owner to have full peace of mind.
We are 100% committed to ensuring the very best in quality care and services for all of our clients and all creatures great and small. So if you are looking for a Vets in Seaham that are well priced, friendly and go the extra mile for you and your pet – contact Seaham Vets today.
Awards: Small Business Of the Year Award 2016 (Sunderland Echo)

Name: Veterinaria PUNTOVet
Description: La veterinaria donde las sonrisas se multiplican. somos un equipo multidisciplinario que va desde veterinarios, vendedores y encargados, transporte y logística, marketing y tecnología, gerencia y administración. Todos enfocados a fortalecer el vínculo entre mascotas y humanos para tener un mundo + feliz
Location: Villa Urquiza, Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Vetel Diagnostics
Description:
In this rapidly expanding market, digital imaging providers have come and gone, merged, sold, and reorganized. Vetel was established in 1999 by a veterinarian for veterinarians and has become a reliable resource, understanding and exceeding the technological needs of the veterinary community. Vetel is part of a twenty-acre medical campus, which includes a tertiary level equine surgical hospital and ambulatory practice, an equine rehabilitation facility, and a small animal surgical hospital. The proximity to working veterinary practices allows Vetel to design and rigorously test Vetel products in the environments they will be used. Vetel is in the hub of technological creativity in San Luis Obispo, California, attracting the best and brightest to our Research and Development team.

Vetel has been at the forefront of diagnostic digital imaging as each modality has been introduced to the veterinary profession. It began with a vision of creating a company built around our knowledge of the needs of daily clinical practice, while staying responsive to the fast pace of progress in imaging technology. Vetel has matured into a technological powerhouse and established itself as a market leader and proven brand in veterinary imaging. Vetel has sold and supported thousands of diagnostic imaging solutions worldwide with a record of cutting edge development and service. In 2009, Vetel introduced the first Wireless DR to the veterinary market and five years later remains the market leader, providing the highest level of customer satisfaction. A true technological pioneer, Vetel is the developer and exclusive provider of the Generation II Digital Radiography systems, and the first to offer Sound Speed corrected diagnostic ultrasound. Straightforward technology, straightforward service, simple workflow, and transparency in everything Vetel does means you’ll always know what you’re getting and that it's the best.

Name: Petriage
Description: Petriage is a health-monitoring platform that enables veterinarians to satisfy the needs of their customers through the adoption of telemedicine. Central to the platform is a patented statistical algorithm that predicts urgency and makes recommendations to pet owners while keeping their family vet engaged. This serves to solidify the connection between family vets and their clients, reduces unnecessary costs to pet owners and generates new revenue streams for veterinarians.

Name: Green Mountain Animal, LLC
Description:
Animal Health Worldwide

Green Mountain Animal is a contract manufacturer of custom animal supplements & treats.  Located in Burlington Vermont, we specialize in producing & packaging premium quality extruded soft chews for dogs and cats.  With over 25 years of experience in the Animal Health Industry, our creative Product Development team is available to help you bring your new product ideas to market with an emphasis on safety and quality.  We are pleased to offer low minimum order size requirements to facilitate the launch of new products for our customers.  Newly founded in 2016 by Dale Metz, Green Mountain Animal is on track to begin manufacturing custom products by Fall 2016.

Name: La Clinique Féline de la Cartoucherie
Description: Le bien-être de votre chat est notre priorité : nous souhaitons vous proposer les solutions les plus adaptées à vous et à votre chat.

Name: Anova Corporation
Description:
Anova Corporation has established itself as a leading company in Vietnam veterinary industry
The company currently comprises of 8 subsidiaries, all of them have been strong brands in the market for the last  15-20 years
Anova Corp. has three main lines of business that strongly support each other:
      
     > Finished products of veterinary and aquaculture medicines:  covering a wide range of products and among only few players in Vietnam conformed to GMP WHO standard. Bio-Pharmachemie, Anova and SaigonVET are familiar brands for Vietnamese farmers.

     > Distribution of feed and veterinary raw materials, feed additives: our subsidiaries are leading distributors to veterinary, animal health and animal feed manufacturers, covering both South and North Vietnam markets 

     > Animal nutrition specialised in fish and swine feeds; the group has 2 factories with a total production capacity of 250,000 tons


While strengthening current position in the industry, we plan to expand our business vertically with the vision to become the first Vietnamese food supplier that can provide consumers completely traceable, healthy and eco-friendly swine and fish products

Anova Corp. is currently a member of Nova Group, which has other businesses such as feed ingredient and real estates

Name: Zoopa Veteriner Ürünleri İlaç ve Gıda LTD ŞTİ
Description:
Sevgi ve şefkat dışında hiçbir beklentileri olmadan insanlara dostluklarını sunan bu güzel varlıkların ihtiyaçlarını düşünmek, Zoopa olarak üstlendiğimiz bir misyondur. Hayvanlara hak ettikleri güvenlik, aile sıcaklığı ve sevgiyi sağlamak için öncelikle sağlıklı bir yaşam sürmelerine yardımcı olmamız gerektiğinin farkında olarak Chosen Family çatısı altında vitamin, probiyotik, süt tozu gibi çeşitli gıda takviyelerini özenle formüle etmekteyiz. Uluslararası standartlara ve etik değerlere uygun olarak tasarladığımız ürünlerle yalnızca ailelerimizin tüylü üyelerine yardımcı olmakla kalmayıp, tüm insanların evcil hayvan bakımı konusunda bilinçlenmesine destek olmayı da hedeflemekteyiz.

Bilhassa hayvanların yaşamsal haklarının anayasal çerçevede korunmaya alınması gerekliliğini seçilmiş aile vurgusuyla hatırlatmak ve siz değerli tüketicilerimizin bu mesaja sahip çıkarak dünyayı tüm canlılar için daha yaşanılabilir kılmaya çağırmak isteriz. Aile kurumunun kutsallığına inanan toplumumuzun kültürüne yerleşmiş olan bir sözü slogan olarak belirlememizin sebebi de budur.



Unutmayın, “aile her zaman önce gelir”.

Name: New England Wildlife Center
Description:
New England Wildlife Center (the Center) is the first non-profit wildlife hospital and education center built to green LEED specifications in the United States.  The Center's veterinary team provides emergency medical care and rehabilitation to sick, injured and orphaned wild animals.  Our medical team and educators use this care as a new kind of educational catalyst to teach, to provide job training and to build our community.  

For more information about the Center, please visit our website at www.newildlife.org

We host many different things, ranging from:

Wildlife Care
Undergraduate Student Internships & Job training
In-school Science Education
Partnerships in underserved schools
Sustainability education
Free Choice Hands-on Learning 
Virtual Academy
Catbird Cafe -  concerts and open mic
Camps
Wildthings playgroup
Community events
Wildlife rehab training courses
Guest lecturers
Nature trails
Odd Pet Vet

Name: BMR GROUP
Description:
From humble beginnings in 1991, in the idyllic village of Iskapally in Nellore District of Andhra Pradesh, BMR Group has grown to be industry leaders in the shrimp farming and export sector. Under the able leadership of its Chairman, Dr. B. M. Masthan Rao, the Group has been credited as the pioneers of L.Vannamei cultivation in India. BMR Group is vertically integrated and can boast of total traceability with its farm to fork program.

Over 25 years the BMR Group has grown to an industrial conglomerate with 250 hectares of hatcheries, 600 hectares of farming, on-site labs, and feed mills, a state-of-the-art factory covering 50,000 sq. ft. in Dhamavaram, Nellore District in Andhra Pradesh, with a capacity of 25 metric tonnes per day and compliance with industry-specific standards like BAP, BRC, HACCP, etc. BMR Group has many awards and accolades to its name, including Best Hatchery in India 2014 from the Ministry of Commerce, Govt. of India & MPEDA.
Lauded for introducing the L.Vannamei species to the Indian subcontinent, the Group utilizes its certified seed and premium feed to produce shrimp that is acclaimed for its exceptional color and flavour. BMR group is also known for its commendable support to local farmers.

Name: Vanderburgh Humane Society
Description:
Mission: Leading our community to eliminate pet overpopulation through Spay/Neuter, Adoption, and Humane Education. Alter. Adopt. Adore.

The Vanderburgh Humane Society, Inc. (VHS), a tax exempt, 501(c)(3) organization, was founded in 1957 to provide protection for homeless animals, intervention for animals in abusive environments, and community education to encourage prevention of animal abuse and pet overpopulation. The VHS receives no tax-based funding whatsoever. Therefore, it depends on the generosity of the corporate community and the public at large to continue, and hopefully expand, the much needed services it offers.

Located in Evansville, Indiana, the VHS is the largest surrender and adoption agency for unwanted pets, serving over 10,000 animals each year. In addition to finding homes for animals, the VHS also works to build public awareness of the problem of homeless and abandoned pets. Through special events, media coverage and other outreach activities we hope to reduce the flow of animals to our shelter.

Name: The Kindest Goodbye
Description:
The Kindest Goodbye offers peaceful in-home euthanasia services and after-care for cherished pets across Australia and the United Kingdom. Our network of compassionate vets can visit your home day or night to give your beloved family a member a peaceful and dignified farewell in the comfort of the home they know and love.

We are always looking to expand our network, so if you are a veterinarian interested in rewarding and flexible work in the home euthanasia space, please reach out to our CEO and founder Tom Milton at tom.milton@thekindestgoodbye.com.au

Name: SageTech Veterinary
Description:
At SageTech Veterinary, we are committed to eliminating waste, pollution and unnecessary environmental harm caused by volatile anaesthetic agents.

Our mission is to provide veterinary clinics with a safe, sustainable and easy to use solution for the capture, recovery and recycling of these agents, to lower their carbon footprint, and help to protect the planet for future generations.

Name: Evervet
Description:
This is the professional gateway to Evervet:   An organisation at the forefront of veterinary care in Melbourne, as well as being a nationally recognised ASAV Hospital of Excellence.  Watch this space for our perspective on the issues that matter to pet families.  

Stay connected for fulfilling and exciting career opportunities in our growing organisation.

Name: Ruminant Revival
Description:
Ruminant Revival is the UK’s first veterinary-led consultancy dedicated to helping food producers keep their animals healthy and build adaptable, productive farms, while reducing reliance on chemicals and pharmaceuticals.

As qualified veterinary professionals, we are bound by an oath to put animal welfare first, act with integrity, and provide impartial, evidence-based advice. This foundation shapes everything we do. We combine scientific insight with practical experience and strong communication skills to guide food producers through change, step by step.

Our consultancy is built on trust. We remain independent of commercial ties and are committed to long-term client relationships. By improving animal health, we help unlock productivity and profitability in ways that are ethical, sustainable, and tailored to each farm’s needs.

Name: Mivet-Prodotti cosmetici per animali
Description: The MIVET brand was born in 2010 thanks to a team of veterinarians and experts in the field of natural elements. This gave rise to functional food supplementation and cosmetic products for the treatment, management and care of certain problems that often beset our animals. A range of hypoallergenic and non-toxic natural cosmetic products that make the most of the various properties of essential oils. A minimum percentage of alcohol is used, only the bare minimum needed to extract the active ingredient from the essences. The products are formulated through the exclusive use of essential oils, excluding the use of desensitising chemicals or synthetic fragrances. They do not pollute the environment and do not contain GMOs.

Name: Central Hospital for Veterinary Medicine
Description:
The Central Hospital for Veterinary Medicine was founded in 1973 by several local veterinarians to improve their individual abilities to practice veterinary medicine through centralization of staff, equipment, facilities and ideas. We are a small-animal practice, which means our primary focus is on cats, dogs, birds, amphibians, reptiles, rabbits, gerbils, ferrets, hamsters, hedgehogs, sugar gliders and more. 

Our current in-house staff includes more than twenty doctors supported by a hospital team of nurses, technicians, technician assistants and administrators. Central Hospital saw referral cases from more than 300 veterinary clinics last year. 

Our two locations are open and fully staffed 24 hours a day, 365 days a year by experienced veterinarians and technicians, we provide:

• Round-the-clock urgent and emergency care
• Veterinary specialists in surgery, emergency/critical care, anesthesia, cardiology, ophthalmology, oncology, exotics, behavior, dermatology, internal medicine and radiology/ultrasound
•Interventional Radiology and Canine Rehabilitation departments.
•I-131 therapy

Name: Veterinary Hospital
Description: Is a long established practice, providing veterinary care throughout Wiltshire and Gloucestershire. Working under The George Veterinary Group banner are four separate species departments, staffed by over 30 vets, each dedicated to caring for those animals covered by the individual departments. This allows us to provide you with the depth of expertise required in each area for continuity of care.

Name: Zia Vet Clinic
Description:
Welcome to Zia Veterinary Clinic, Lahore's premier destination for advanced pet care since 2014! 

At Zia Veterinary Clinic, we pride ourselves on offering cutting-edge veterinary services tailored to meet the unique needs of every furry companion. As a surgery referral clinic, we specialise in providing advanced medical and surgical care for pets, ensuring they receive the highest quality treatment available.

Our state-of-the-art facility is equipped with the latest technology and staffed by a team of experienced veterinarians who are dedicated to the health and well-being of your pets. From routine check-ups to complex surgeries, we provide comprehensive care to address a wide range of pet health issues.

Whether your pet requires a routine procedure or specialised treatment, you can trust Zia Veterinary Clinic to deliver compassionate care and excellent outcomes. Join us in providing your furry friend with the advanced care they deserve!

Name: VetIndonesia
Description: We are committed to share information about animal health, animal welfare and related knowledge for Veterinarian and animal lovers.

Name: Alifeed
Description: Somos una empresa peruana cuyo negocio es desarrollar, fabricar y comercializar ingredientes para la industria animal. Estamos en constante búsqueda de soluciones innovadoras que permite aumentar la eficiencia productiva de la industria animal.

Name: Hebei Veyong Pharmaceutical CO.,LTD.
Description:
Our factory established during the year 2002, Subsidiary of LIMIN GROUP, We have our Head office and factory located in Shijiazhuang city which is the capital city of Hebei Province and about one hour by train to the city Beijing - capital city of China. Veyong is a domestic veterinary drug enterprise integrating the R&D, production and sales of veterinary APIs , preparations, premixed feeds and feed additives. With 2 productions bases and 16 APIs , 11 preparation production lines including powder, pulvis, premix, bolus, injection, pesticides and disinfectant , ects, and 2 sanitary disinfectant production lines for liquids and powders.
Veyong follows the development strategy of "Integaration of API& preparations", takes "Maintain animal health and improve quality of life" as the mission, and strives to become the most valuable veterinary drug brand. 
For getting more information, please visit our website: www.veyongpharma.com

Name: Animal Rescue League of NH
Description:
The Animal Rescue League of New Hampshire is a 501(c)3 nonprofit organization that helps more than 2,200 cats, dogs, and small animals each year. Being more than a shelter, the League also employs one of only three shelter-based Animal Cruelty Investigators in the state. To help people who love their pets, but are currently struggling to care for them, The League offers community outreach programs, such as a Pet Food Pantry and Low-Cost Spay/Neuter Clinics.
 
Mission:  
The Animal Rescue League of NH improves animal welfare in our communities by helping pets and the people who care for them.

Many of our services are open to all residents of NH, with focus on the local communities of Amherst, Auburn, Bedford, Brookline, Candia, Dunbarton, Francestown, Goffstown, Hollis, Hooksett, Litchfield, Londonderry, Lyndeborough, Manchester, Merrimack, Milford, Mont Vernon, New Boston, Peterborough, Wilton, and Windham.

Name: Vetwest Animal Hospitals
Description:
Vetwest has been the local and trusted vets in Perth for nearly 30 years. We exist today because thousands of WA pet owners have been delighted with the compassion we provide to them and the care we provide to their companions. Our team is made up of people that truly love animals, and have dedicated their working careers to a high standard of veterinary medicine.

We have purpose built facilities with an extensive range of diagnostic equipment and are committed to continuous improvement, namely the medical treatment and care of pets, the working conditions of our team, the service we provide to our clients, and promoting responsible pet ownership in the community.

We do all of this by implementing the "Vetwest standards of care."

Employment opportunities

We are committed to providing excellence in veterinary care, where you can work autonomously but also be part of a larger team of vets for support and access to special interest services within the group such as endoscopy, ultrasonography and complex surgery. Our aim is to provide a friendly work environment with an emphasis on high standards of care and continuing education. You will be supported by a team of highly trained and enthusiastic nurses and a clientele who truly value their pets.  
For more information please visit  www.vetwest.com.au/careers

Name: Faculty of Veterinary Medicine, University of Belgrade
Description: Misija fakulteta Veterinarske medicine, Univerziteta u Beogradu (FVM UB) je da, u skladu da svojim profesionalnim mogućnostima i iskustvom, obezbedi edukaciju omni-kompetentnih veterinara radi poboljšanja veterinarske profesije u polju zdravlja i dobrobiti životinja, javnog zdravlja odnosno bezbednosti hrane i prevencije širenja zaraznih bolesti, kao i obezbeđenja izvrsnosti kliničkih i istraživačkih laboratorija fakulteta.

Name: Animal Care Centers
Description:
Animal Care Centers consists of three state-of-the-art, full service veterinary hospitals and boarding facilities that have been serving the Fairfield, Forest Park and Blue Ash communities for over 30 years. 

Our goal is to deliver the highest quality of veterinary medicine to our patients, while adhering to the highest possible professional and ethical standards.

Name: VetsKart
Description:
Welcome to our compassionate veterinary service, where we bring quality care right to your doorstep. Our dedicated team of experienced veterinarians specializes in providing exceptional veterinary services through convenient home visits.

Say goodbye to the stress of transporting your furry friend to the clinic. With our at-home visits, we eliminate the anxiety of traveling and waiting rooms, creating a calm and comfortable environment for your pet. We understand the importance of reducing stress and ensuring a personalized experience for both pets and their owners.

Our comprehensive range of services includes routine check-ups, vaccinations, preventive care, diagnostics, and minor treatments. From regular examinations to addressing specific health concerns, our skilled veterinarians are equipped to handle a variety of conditions, all in the convenience of your home.

We believe in building strong relationships with our clients and their beloved pets. We take the time to listen, address your concerns, and provide guidance on maintaining your pet's health and well-being. Our goal is to work collaboratively with you to create a tailored care plan that meets your pet's individual needs.

At our veterinary service, we understand that your pet is a valued family member. We are committed to providing compassionate care that ensures your pet's comfort and happiness. By offering home visits, we strive to minimize disruption to your pet's routine and create a stress-free environment for examinations and treatments.

Contact us today to schedule a home visit and experience the convenience and compassion of our veterinary services. We look forward to serving you and your cherished pet, bringing top-quality care to your doorstep.

Name: veterinary center for birds and exotics
Description:
The only all-bird/exotic pet hospital in Westchester County, NY, & surrounding counties, and the only American Animal Hospital Association accredited exotics hospital in NY. Owned by Dr. Laurie Hess, board-certified bird vet, with 25+ years experience caring for exotics & birds, with Dr. Amanda Dewey, residency-trained in birds & exotics. We provide advanced care for birds, rabbits, ferrets, guinea pigs, chinchillas, smaller rodents (rats, mice, gerbils, hamsters, degus), reptiles, amphibians, backyard chickens, waterfowl, & other exotics such as sugar gliders, hedgehogs, & pot-bellied pigs - no dogs or cats. Complete medical/surgical care and boarding for birds & exotic pets. In-hospital blood testing, digital x-rays, ultrasound, CT, laser therapy, endoscopy, alternative medicine/acupuncture. Available for 24/7 for after-hours phone consultations for emergencies. Support from local 24-hr vet hospitals and several other specialists.
Exceptional care for extraordinary species.
See http://www.avianexoticsvet.com to make an appointment
Like us on Facebook: Veterinary Center for Birds and Exotics
Follow us on Twitter: birdexoticvet

Name: Медицинский центр
Description: Мы всегда рады помочь Вам! Мы всегда рады помочь Вам! Мы всегда рады помочь Вам! Мы всегда рады помочь Вам! Мы всегда рады помочь Вам! Мы всегда рады помочь Вам! Мы всегда рады помочь Вам! Мы всегда рады помочь Вам! Мы всегда рады помочь Вам! Мы всегда рады помочь Вам!

Name: AniMed Djursjukhus AB
Description: Vår strävan är att kunna erbjuda ett fullutrustat djursjukhus med god tillgänglighet för djurägare. Hög standard, kompetent personal och vård till humana priser.

Name: Southern Thailand Elephant Foundation
Description:
STEF is a registered UK charity (number 25737067) dedicated to the ethical treatment, health and welfare of Thailand's elephants. 
We believe that through veterinary care at our new specialised elephant hospital, plus education, science and by example we are helping in safeguarding Thailand's current and future elephant populations. 
Every possible effort must be made to preserve this majestic animal but we cannot do our work without the support of donors, personal, corporate, and foundations/trusts. 
If you care, share our beliefs and would like to help, please contact us via the website or by writing to info@southernthailandelephants.org

Thank you for your support!

Name: Vetamac
Description: Vetamac provides new veterinary anesthetic machines, service of existing machines, and support for all your anesthesia needs.  We have been providing quality service, with integrity, since 1990. Our service technicians combine a total of over 100 years experience in anesthesia.

Name: Holiday Vet
Description:
Holiday Vet was founded by Caren Carney, a seasoned veterinarian, to serve animal hospitals and clinics with professional relief care. 

NEED RELIEF? Holiday Vet places quality veterinarians in your hospital when you need it. A dedicated Scheduling Manager works with you to find the best doctor-clinic matches and schedules your dates in advance.

Name: AMR Vet Collective
Description:
Hi! We’re the AMR Vet Collective and we're here to help veterinarians (especially Aussie and Kiwi vets!) to keep up to date with Antimicrobial Resistance (AMR) and Antimicrobial Stewardship (AMS) and what it means for our patients and our practices.

 We translate the science around AMR and stewardship into meaningful and practical continuing education and resources that veterinarians can call upon to make informed, evidence-based decisions in their daily practice. 

We want every clinician to feel confident in understanding stewardship principles so that they can diagnose, prescribe, and manage infectious patients with confidence. 

We talk to experts from all areas of veterinary science to get their perspective and share what they tell us through our social media, website, and Online Vet AMS course. 


What is antimicrobial resistance?
 
When microorganisms such as bacteria, viruses and fungi are able to resist the effects of medicines designed to destroy or inactivate them, they are considered 'antimicrobial resistant'. The mechanisms for this varies between microorganisms but one of the key factors influencing selection for these microorganism is our use of antimicrobial agents.

What does AMR mean for human and animal health?
 
When microorganisms become resistant, simple infections can become chronic, serious, or even life threatening. This leads to increased costs of care, more antimicrobial use, and a higher rate of treatment failure. 

More antimicrobial use leads to more selection pressure for resistance and a growing reliance on a shrinking group of effective antibiotics.

As the World Health Organisation has acknowledged, AMR does not recognize geographic or human–animal borders. It is a true One Health challenge, that requires human, animal and environmental health professionals to work together to #savethelobster.

Name: Egyptian Veterinarians Syndicate
Description:
The Egyptian Veterinarians Syndicate was established by Law No. 65 of 1940 as a subsidiary of the Federation of Medical Professions.

It is now operating under Law No. 48 of 1969 under the General Union of Medical Syndicates in Law No. 13 of 1983, which includes the syndicates of medical doctors, veterinarians, dentists, and pharmacists.

The Council of the Federation of Medical Professions is composed of representatives of the Medical Syndicate (human physicians) and the other three chair persons are vice president of the Union President.

The syndicate administers the following corporates:

The General Assembly: - All members registered in the General Schedule are included in the General Union.

The Board Council of the Syndicate: - It consists of 25 members elected by secret ballot for 4 years of the captain and the number of 24 members, half of them members who have been members of the union more than 15 years and the other half members less than 15 years and be represented at the level of the Republic.

The Board Council of the Syndicate comprises among its members an office of: the President, the Vice President, the Secretary General, the Treasurer, Assistant Secretary General, Assistant Treasurer.

The Council of the Union shall also form specialized committees and sub-committees, including:

Committee of Registration in the Syndicate
Legislative Committee

Since then Four Star Veterinary Service has expanded to eight clinics and 24 veterinarians based in Indiana, Iowa, Ohio, Michigan, Pennsylvania and North Carolina.

Our board certified team of specialists and experienced emergency doctors work as one unit to provide the best integrated veterinary care available. 

While general veterinarians typically treat a broad variety of animals and conditions, veterinary specialists have completed several years of residency training in a specific area of veterinary medicine and taken an exam evaluating their knowledge and skills in that specialty area. 

At CVS, our talented, passionate and world-renowned specialists offer comprehensive care in specialized fields – oncology, internal medicine, surgery, imaging, dentistry, ophthalmology, and dermatology, neurology, as well as emergency and critical care.   Consider CVS as the next level of care for your pet. 

Our collaborative team works closely with your primary care doctor to provide the next step of needed specialized or advanced veterinary care. Our highly trained specialists complement  your veterinarian and we work together to provide the best care for your pet.

Our seasoned team of multidisciplinary specialists provides Southern California with high quality care at three state-of-the- art facilities: 

-CVS Carlsbad (San Diego County)              
-CVS Murrieta (Riverside County)       
-CVS Ontario (San Bernardino County) 
   
Our 24-hour specialty facilities and staff offer a combination of leading-edge technology, experience, and compassion to ensure the health, happiness and overall wellbeing of your pet. We not only care about your pets, but also the whole family. That’s why we form long-lasting, trusting relationships with pet owners. Thanks for letting us be part of your family.

La nostra formazione affiancata all’esperienza di clinica quotidiana ci permette di gestire casi complessi che riguardano diverse branche della medicina interna.

La nostra consulenza sfrutta la tecnologia della video chiamata e questo permette di instaurare una relazione efficace. Abbiamo scelto questa modalità al fine di avere un confronto maggiormente efficace ed eliminare qualsiasi dubbio.

I vantaggi del nostro servizio.
Supporto al tuo caso clinico: le nostre consulenze ti aiutano a definire l'iter diagnostico, ottimizzare le scelte terapeutiche ed impostare il follow-up.
Risparmia tempo e denaro: siamo competitivi sul mercato e flessibili nella programmazione delle consulenze, sappiamo quanti sono i tuoi impegni e quanto è prezioso investire sulla tua formazione.
Formazione del professionista e del team: collaboriamo al tuo fianco per accrescere le tue competenze ed il livello professionale del tuo team di lavoro, partiamo da un caso e vi aiutiamo a saperne di più.

Hai un caso su cui vuoi confrontarti?
Inviaci gratuitamente la tua richiesta e fissa con noi un appuntamento per risolvere i tuoi dubbi.

Name: International Symposium of Veterinary Epidemiology and Economics (ISVEE)
Description:
The major objective of the International Society for Veterinary Epidemiology and Economics (ISVEE) is to organise scientific meetings, at regular intervals, in order to exchange information on developments in the fields of veterinary epidemiology and economics. 

The 15th International Symposium of Veterinary Epidemiology and Economics (#ISVEE15) is coming to Chiang Mai, Thailand, on 12 - 16 November 2018. As in previous symposiums, ISVEE 15 will be a global forum for interdisciplinary collaboration and communication among graduate students, postdoctoral fellows, practitioners, junior and senior researchers, as well as policymakers, health, veterinary public health, social science, and animal health economic professionals, to learn and share with a vision of building a better life tomorrow for veterinary epidemiology at the local, regional, and international levels.

Description:
Solo Select Horses is one of the most influential and fastest-growing equine companies in the industry. Founded in 2018, Solo Select has revolutionized the way high-end horses are bred, marketed and sold.

Our full-service ranch in Gainesville, Texas, provides elite boarding, sale preparation, and equine reproduction services, including ICSI, embryo transfer, and stallion management. We offer USDA-certified frozen semen storage and international export capabilities, making Solo Select a leader in breeding innovation.

Name: Equinosis, LLC
Description:
Our Mission
Helping veterinarians provide the most objective, efficient and profitable biomechanical care possible.

History and Development
The Equinosis Q with Lameness Locator software is a real-time, handheld, field-based system that enables a licensed veterinarian to objectively measure lameness in horses with non-invasive inertial sensors.

In a collaborative effort between practicing equine veterinarians, led by University of Missouri Professor of Equine Surgery Dr. Kevin Keegan, and engineers, led by Professor of Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering Dr. Frank Pai, algorithms were developed for the specific purpose of lameness evaluation in horses using a high-speed camera and treadmill-based system.

The motion variables most likely to detect and quantify lameness were first found using sophisticated data mining techniques and then tested and validated with neural network classification schemes.

Continued collaboration with the late Professor of Electrical Engineering at the Hiroshima (Japan) Institute of Technology Dr. Yoshiharu Yanezawa produced a system of wirelessly transmitted, body-mounted inertial sensors, ideal for field use.

After years of development, private investment, and nearly $1MM in National Science Foundation grants, the Equinosis Q has evolved into the world’s foremost locomotor health maintenance platform.

About Equinosis
Equinosis, LLC was founded in 2007 in Columbia, Missouri with its first objective to make the Equinosis Q with Lameness Locator available to equine veterinarians and to elevate the quality of care, health, and well-being of horses.

Ongoing research and development endeavors were supported by the National Science Foundation’s Small Business Technology Transfer Research program from 2009 to 2015 with 5 STTR awards.

www.felinerescue.org

We are a primarily volunteer organization, with one full-time and one part-time employee. We are funded exclusively through donations and grants, receiving no municipal, state, or federal funding.

Description: There are many common mistakes that can extend the sale of your business by up to 12 months? At VSP, we have the expertise to to make the sale of your practice as efficient and painless as possible.

Name: International Pharmacy SAS
Description: International Pharmacy SAS es una empresa Colombiana especializada en la producción y distribución de innovadores productos veterinarios  exclusivos  para Avicultura, Porcicultura.

Name: Mostafizor Rahman
Description: An advisory platform for online open-source education, multimedia and field-based pricing or free services.The best services are provided online and directly under the overall supervision of eminent young and old experts in the field of agriculture, veterinary and fisheries.

Name: Alhayat vet Jordan
Description:
Alhayat Company is focused on marketing and distributing high value veterinary products with a main interest in veterinary pharmaceuticals, feed additives and vaccines for both poultry and ruminants
which echo with our abundant expertise in the Jordanian veterinary health sector.

Name: Hospital Veterinari Balmes
Description:
En Hospital Veterinario Balmes estamos comprometidos con el bienestar de tu mascota desde hace mucho tiempo, y valoramos la confianza que depositas en nosotros.

Sabemos que tu perro o gato es un miembro muy importante de tu familia, por lo que nuestra meta es ofrecerte unos servicios médicos veterinarios equiparables a los que puedas recibir tú mismo.

Apostamos en formar a nuestros profesionales técnicamente, pero sin olvidar nuestro lado más humano.

Nuestra prioridad ha sido y será siempre el bienestar de los animales, y para ello utilizamos, también, la última tecnología que nos ayude a minimizar el dolor, agilice la recuperación y, en general, que ayude a nuestros pacientes a estar sanos y felices.

Entre los servicios especializados que ofrecemos tenemos: traumatología, cardiología, dermatología, oncología, cirugía endoscópica, atención UCI, y medicina y cirugía de urgencias

Name: Agrovet Alliance
Description:
Agrovet Alliance "AVA" has been serving the Live Stock Industry throughout the Middle East, Africa and Turkey with quality products and services for quality results. We believe healthy animals produce healthy profits.

Our customer's success is our business and we are dedicated to helping them make a difference.

Our portfolio includes veterinary vaccines, feed additives, vitamin premixes, mineral premixes, raw materials and consultation services. “We will not sacrifice our long term prosperity by taking short term profits “

Name: European Advisory Board on Cat Diseases
Description: ABCD Europe is an independent panel of veterinary experts on feline infectious diseases. Using an evidence-based approach, we promote disease prevention and control for improved feline health and welfare. We issue regularly updated recommendations.

Name: SC SERVICII PUBLICE S.A.
Description: Furnizăm produse de cea mai bună calitate în 3 domenii esențiale încă din 1995: practică veterinară, zootehnie, controlul dăunătorilor

Name: Vet2Go
Description:
Vet2Go es una startup española que ofrece servicio de veterinario a domicilio a través de la app. 

En Vet2Go disponemos de un equipo de veterinarios propios para garantizar la máxima calidad en cada servicio. Ofrecemos consultas veterinarias sin estrés para tu mascota, sin esperas ni desplazamientos, en la comodidad del hogar. 

Pide ya tu cita en la app!

Name: The Herbal Horse and Pet
Description:
the herbal horse and pet believes in what we call "cutting edge nature". This is the combination of what is available naturally with what has been scientifically proven to work. 

So many companies sell natural products without any real belief in them. They provide the 'flavour of the month'. 

We don't. We will only include ingredients in our products which are:
a) effective
b) safe

Which seems like a simple thing, but is actually something often overlooked in the race to keep up with the latest, most fashionable ingredient.

As a result, our formulations are completely different to most other supplements. But, you can be assured, they are included as a result of us keeping up with the very latest research.

Name: Arizona Veterinary Emergency & Critical Care Center
Description: Arizona Veterinary Emergency & Critical Care Center (AVECCC) serves pets needing critical, after hours, surgical, and medical care in the Phoenix metro area. AVECCC Gilbert and AVECCC Peoria are available for cat and dog emergencies and urgent care services, 24 hours a day. Our newest hospital, AVECCC Buckeye, has urgent care hours and services. We are proud to be leaders in emergency veterinary care! Our care team consists of leading board-certified veterinary specialists, emergency doctors, and highly skilled support staff. We pride ourselves on being at the forefront of the field of veterinary care technology. Our goal is to ensure the well-being of each pet while expanding the horizons of veterinary care.

Name: Pet Suites
Description:
Pet boarding for Orange County, California, serving Aliso Viejo, Laguna Hills, Mission Viejo, Lake Forest, Ladera Ranch, Laguna Niguel, Laguna Beach, Newport Coast, Irvine and surrounding cities.

Pet Suites and The Animal Keeper Management Group are working together to set the standard of excellence in pet care as the premier provider and resource for pet boarding, doggie camp, doggie daycare, grooming and training of household pets in Southern California.

Choosing comfortable kennel quarters for your pet while you’re away is a difficult process. We consider your pet part of our family. With four convenient Southern California locations to serve you, we invite you to tour our “home away from home”, and meet the staff. Our passion is providing your best friend the best possible care in a professional, safe, clean and loving environment. To insure availability, Pet Suites recommends advanced reservations.

Since 1979, we’ve been the leader in specialized pet care & hope to see you & your pet soon at Pet Suites.

Name: boa vets for vets
Description:
Hoe haal je het beste uit jezelf en je onderneming? boa inspireert en ondersteunt je op deze fronten:

Wetenschappelijke kennis: informatie over de laatste nieuwe technieken en studies.
Communicatie: tips en ondersteuning voor een optimale communicatie met je cliënten én je medewerkers.
Bedrijfsvoering: begeleiding in je marketing- en aankoopbeleid.

Name: İstanbul Hayvan Hastanesi
Description:
İstanbul Hayvan Hastanesi kendini hayvanlara merhamet ve saygı ile yaklaşmayı, yenilikçi klinik araştırma ve eğitim yoluyla veteriner tıbbın ilerlemesine öncülük etmeye adamıştır.

*Temel değerlerimiz;

İstanbul Hayvan Hastanesi 2007 yılında kurulan BBÇ veteriner kliniğinin devamı olup, aynı ilkelerle yoluna devam etmektedir. Bu ilkeler;

MERHAMET
Hastanemize getirilen tüm hastalarımıza aynı şefkat içinde yaklaşırız.

YENİLİKÇİLİK
Doğal olarak oluşan hastalıkların teşhisi için veteriner tıbbın yeniliklerini güncel olarak takip ederiz.

SAYGI
Hastanemize gelen insanlara ve her hayvana hak ettiği hassasiyetle yaklaşırız.

MÜKEMMELLİK
Mesleğine kendini adamış kadromuzla, hayvanlara en üst düzeyde bakım ve hizmet sunmaktayız.

Name: Vetti
Description:
A Veterinary PR and marketing learning hub bought to you by registered vets, including certified, online learning and support with exclusive courses, guides, and content packages.

New bite-sized lessons every month aimed at saving you money and time on PR, marketing and digital communications by increasing your knowledge in easy to digest modules.

Name: CIMA Animal Health
Description:
At CIMA Animal Health, our mission is simple: to improve the lives of animals and those who care for them. We strive to bridge gaps in veterinary medicine by offering effective, accessible, and science-driven solutions tailored to the evolving needs of the industry.

Through continuous innovation and strategic partnerships, we empower animal professionals with the tools they need to make a lasting impact.

Name: AniCura Dierenziekenhuis Drechtstreek B.V.
Description:
De beste zorg voor uw huisdier 24 uur per dag, zeven dagen per week. Dat is AniCura Dierenziekenhuis Drechtstreek. 
Met elk diergeneeskundige expertise in huis, de modernste apparatuur en liefdevolle aandacht weten wij snel wat er met uw dier aan de hand is. Met tandheelkunde als ons paradepaardje. 
Ook is onze kliniek Cat Friendly, voor uw kat wel zo fijn. 

anicura.nl/legal
anicura.nl/privacy

Name: Animal Planet Hospital Veterinário
Description:
O Animal Planet, é um hospital veterinário com mais de 22 anos no mercado. Fundada e dirigida por Paulo Côrte Neto (CRMV-SP 15279), a instituição é reconhecida regionalmente pelos cuidados com a saúde e o bem estar dos peludos.

O hospital conta com aproximadamente 2000 m², possui recepção externa e interna, sala de vacina para filhotes, duas salas para exames, dois centro cirúrgico, unidade de tratamento intensivo, sala de esterilização de equipamentos, laboratório clínico, pet store, centro estético e farmácia especializada 

O atendimento funciona 24 por dia, 7 dias por semana, para garantir o socorro rápido e especializado em casos de emergências.

É possível efetuar consultas pré-agendadas com especialistas ou clínico geral, inclusive marcar uma consulta domiciliar.

Name: ConsuPEJ - Consultoria Agropecuária
Description:
Empresa júnior do Instituto Federal Catarinense - Campus Araquari. Atendimento à produtores rurais na região norte catarinense.
FEJESC | BRASIL JÚNIOR

Name: Cerberus Sciences
Description:
Cerberus Sciences is Australia's largest laboratory animal testing facility with over 20 years of experience catering for the laboratory animal community. We hold accreditation with the Department of Agriculture, Water and the Environment (DAWE). Certification to ISO 9001 in addition to international recognition as an International Council for Laboratory Animal Science (ICLAS) associate member.

Cerberus Sciences provide a full range of services in laboratory animal health monitoring, disease investigation and research support.

Innovation and a desire to ensure that we keep up to date with all aspects of laboratory animal science have resulted in a huge expansion of our capabilities, with many tests being developed in-house.
 
Personalisation of service and the introduction of easy communication channels such as CerberNet, demonstrate our commitment to developing co-operative relationships with our client base.

Name: METAVET
Description: Nous sommes des vétérinaires passionnés par notre métier et convaincus qu’il est possible de façonner un avenir meilleur pour le soin animal.

Name: Southern Oregon Veterinary Specialty Center
Description: Southern Oregon Veterinary Specialty Center is open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week at 4901 Biddle Road in Central Point, Oregon. We receive emergency cases and monitor critical care patients. Our doctors, certified technicians and support staff are committed to caring for your pet, using high quality treatments and technology. We provide surgery, emergency care and diagnostics services through referrals or on an emergency basis. Our clinic serves Southern Oregon and Northern California and offers specialized, advance veterinary care for these regions. We work with your pet’s primary veterinarian and inform them of your pet’s status and treatments. This ensures the best care and a smooth experience for everyone involved. We offer the same quality of care you would find in a veterinary hospital in a larger city.

Name: BSE Veterinary Agro Allied Consults
Description:
ABOUT US:
We are a private consulting veterinary agro allied service oriented business.
Our services ensure sustainable safe interrelationship between humans, animals and the environment for optimal benefit, welfare, healthcare, socioeconomic development, livelihood support and peaceful coexistence.
The interrelationship between humans, animals and the environment plays a major role in disease outbreaks and other outcomes. We as a private consulting veterinary agro allied service oriented business, ensure a healthy Human - Animal - Environmental interaction through our services. 
We provide expert advice on best practices for optimal animal welfare and healthcare, public healthcare and environmental protection for food safety and food security, self sufficiency, socioeconomic and livelihood developments; in remote and semi urban communities. Our services are both profit and non profit. Our social and humanitarian services target mostly peasant women and youths in the agricultural sector, residing in remote local communities. 

OUR SERVICES:
•	Veterinary consultancy, animal welfare and healthcare 
•	Public healthcare and environmental safety
•	Veterinary agro allied inputs supplies
•	Capacity building, training and retraining
•	Mentoring
•	Freelance copywriting, proofreading and editing
•	Project management
•	Advocacy, public enlightenment and sensitization programs
•	Disease outbreak investigation, identification, control, containment
        and monitoring 
•	Laboratory and post mortem services for scientific evidence - based
        outcomes
•	Collaboration and linkages with Governments, Institutions and
        Development Partners
•	Research, surveys and baseline studies
•	General contracting
•	Public - Private - Partnerships  
#We offer full time, hybrid and remote services#

OUR CORE VALUES: 
•	Service
•	Equity
•	Integrity
•	Passion
•	Team work, collaboration and synergy

Name: VETS Clinics
Description:
VETS Clinics est le premier groupe de cliniques vétérinaires en Tunisie. 
Notre objectif est de donner une dynamique nouvelle à la médecine vétérinaire en Tunisie en réunissant les plus belles compétences autour d’une aventure au service du bien être animal. 
Les valeurs qui nous animent sont avant tout le respect profond de l'animal, l'esprit d'équipe, le professionnalisme, l'amélioration continue et la communication digitale. Nous mettons ces valeurs à votre service en plaçant le client et son animal au centre de notre organisation.
Nous dotons nos cliniques de matériel haut de gamme afin de garantir le meilleur diagnostic et la meilleur prise en charge aux animaux domestiques.
Nous disposons actuellement de 3 cliniques parfaitement équipées à El Manar, à La Marsa et à Hammam Lif avec un plateau médical opérationnel 24/24h et 7/7j . Notre ambition est de développer notre réseau de cliniques sur l'ensemble du territoire national puis à l'international grâce au développement d'applications et de plateformes digitales permettant une mise en relation permanente des propriétaires d'animaux avec les cliniques du groupe Vets.
Notre ADN est assurément sociale avec une volonté forte de créer de nouveaux métiers autour de l'activité animalière, de faire évoluer la relation à l'animal, d'inscrire pleinement la Tunisie dans le projet "One Health" qui associe santé humaine et santé animale et enfin de proposer des solutions éthiques et sociales pour les animaux de la rue et les propriétaires d'animaux disposant de peu de moyens grâce à deux programmes :

Notre programme 3aweni est spécialement réservé pour les personnes à faible revenus et/ou en difficulté pour soigner leur animal. Tous les jours de 9h à 11h à la clinique Vets Hammam Lif.

Notre programme VetsCare est spécialement réservé aux animaux de la rue, Vets Prend en charge totalement les couts médicaux, chirurgicaux et d'hospitalisation de cas lourds sauvés de la rue jusqu'à leur adoption.

Name: DOCVET | Clinica Veterinaria Nervianese srl
Description:
Clinica veterinaria di second opinion, dotata di un team altamente qualificato e di tecnologie all’avanguardia, con l’obiettivo di offrire un supporto specialistico in diverse aree della medicina veterinaria.

Specializzazioni: 
- Chirurgia mininvasiva, dei tessuti molli e oncologica
- Oncologia medica
- Dermatologia 
- Medicina interna

Name: Smartemis AG
Description:
We are building the leading, enduring network of independent veterinarians in Europe. 

The heart of veterinary care is shifting, as more independent clinics become part of large corporate groups.
At Smartemis, we believe there’s a better way. We’re building an innovative, collaborative network that unites independent veterinarians, experienced consultants, and private equity experts – to grow and create value together while preserving independence.
Our members gain the tools, resources, and financial strength – without ever giving up ownership or control.
With over 120 clinics and 500 veterinarians across France and Germany, Smartemis is the leading network of independent veterinarians in Europe.

Contact us: contact@smartemis.com

Name: Chronos Vet
Description: Chronos works with a reliable network of veterinary professionals across the country. We have the ability to hire, train and place remote employees who are hand-picked to serve your practice's individual needs.

Name: Save the Animals Foundation
Description: Save The Animals Foundation is a volunteer-driven, no-kill shelter providing rescue and rehabilitation to alleviate the suffering of dogs and cats, while helping each animal find a loving home.

Name: Pet Community Center
Description:
We want to end pet homelessness and we believe it can be done.  Keeping pets in their loving homes is the key to our success.
 
Pet Community Center (PCC) operates a high-volume, low-cost spay/neuter and vaccine clinic in East Nashville run by highly skilled veterinarians, clinicians, and nonprofit professionals. In partnership with Metro Animal Care and Control and local rescue groups,  PCC has been pivotal in the decline of the euthanasia rate in Davidson County, which has dropped from 80% in 2011 to less than 10% in 2020. 

Additionally, PCC is tackling barriers to veterinary care and provides outreach and support to pet owners who live in veterinary care deserts through the Pets for Life program. The results of PCC’s work include lower pet homelessness rates, lower shelter euthanasia rates, and improved public health and quality of life in neighborhoods across Davidson County.

Name: British Cattle Veterinary Association
Description:
The British Cattle Veterinary Association, established in 1967, is the cattle specialist division of the British Veterinary Association.

BCVA is run by a Board elected by members. The association is involved with all aspects of cattle veterinary matters and is consulted by many organisations for informed opinion.

Role of BCVA includes:
•	Representing the views of members in the wider livestock industry
•	Signposting lifelong learning for cattle practitioners

Name: vetkim
Description: vetkim, çiftlik hayvanlarının sağlıklı büyümesi ve verimliliğini desteklemek amacıyla özel olarak formüle edilmiş bolus,  ürünleri sunan bir lider şirkettir.  Veterinerlik bilimiyle mükemmel bir şekilde entegre olan işimiz, çiftliklerin hayvanlarını en iyi şekilde korumalarına ve bakımlarına yardımcı olur. Hayvan sağlığı ve verimliliği konularında çiftliklerin ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak için yüksek kaliteli ürünler sunmaktayız.

Name: Two Hands Four Paws
Description: Two Hands Four Paws is the oldest and largest wellness center for canines in California. We provide massage and swim therapies, canine physical rehabilitation and pain management. The staff of Two Hands Four Paws, consisting of veterinarians, physical therapists, veterinary technicians and massage therapists works with dogs and their people for fast, effective and lasting recovery. We've improved the lives of hundreds of clients (and their guardians), speeding recovery from injury or surgery, incorporating a whole-body approach to pain management, helping with weight loss, and assisting canine athletes to reach peak performance levels. We specialize in senior care and offer a unique, low-volume dog day care for all ages, with lots of fresh air, natural lighting and access to our hydrotherapy equipment.

Name: International Congress of Advances on Veterinary Sciences and Technics (ICAVST)
Description:
Dear Colleagues and Friends

On behalf of the Organizing Committee, we would like to invite you to the 8th International Congress on Advances in Veterinary Sciences & Technics (#ICAVST2023) which will be organized in Sarajevo, Bosnia & Herzegovina on June 21-25, 2023. #ICAVST2023 is organized by the Association of Eurasian Veterinary Medicine, Biological Sciences, and Biotechnology (AVetBioTech) and the Journal o Advances in VetBio Science and Technics with the support of the International University of Sarajevo (IUS) and Turkish Equine Veterinary Association (TEVA)

The ICAVST aims to share your novel work, receive feedback, observe what is done in your field and related disciplines, collaborate with colleagues from different parts of the world, and sail new horizons. Also, the congress will provide an environment suitable for learning and motivation.

The #ICAVST2023 will be held as a hybrid event (online & in-person). Participants from all areas of Veterinary Science and Technic can present oral and/or poster presentations face to-face or online.

It is an honor for us to invite you to the unique international platform of the 8th International Congress on Advances in Veterinary Sciences & Technics which brings veterinarians, representatives of related sectors, and students together. The congress will be a great opportunity to discover the beauties of Sarajevo.
We look forward to meeting with you at the congress.
Respectfully,

Prof. Dr. Ilker CAMKERTEN
President of the ICAVST

Name: Vet Pursuits
Description:
We are here to help you with the next stage of your veterinary journey… whether that’s through landing an exciting new job role, travelling the world to explore stimulating career development opportunities or simply investing in your own wellbeing!

Whatever your role in this great profession, Vet Pursuits can provide a plethora of career opportunities for vets, vet nurses, practice managers, veterinary paraprofessionals, students and so on, with both clinical and non-clinical positions aplenty.

Vet Pursuits is an independent organisation that does not share information with recruitment agencies. We encourage direct and transparent communication between employers and potential candidates. There are no recruitment or finder fees so that both parties can benefit directly from prudently investing in new relationships, with the ability to access enhanced remuneration packages where available. 

Members can build their own profile page, allowing you to show others what makes you special and stand out to future employers! We are also developing our member benefit area, which will soon provide access to retail and travel discounts…watch this space!

Name: Hospital de Mascotas SAJI
Description: Somos un Hospital Veterinario en presencial en alcance estatal, con presencia en Tijuana y Ensenada, desde Baja California, México, conjunto de 100 colaboradores cumplimos con nuestros servicios de 24 horas de servicio veterinario.

Name: IVSA ELAZIG
Description:
IVSA NEDİR ?

International Veterinary Students’ Association, Türkçe karşılığı ile Uluslararası Veteriner Öğrencileri Birliği; 1953 yılında kurulmuş, merkezi Danimarka olan, Veteriner hekimliği eğitimi, Veteriner halk sağlığı, staj ve öğrenci değişim programları gibi özelleşmiş alanlarda çalışmalar yapan uluslararası bir öğrenci organizasyonudur.

IVSA ELAZIĞ
IVSA Elazığ, 2014 Eylül ayının ikinci haftası resmi olarak kurulmuştur. 2014 Mayıs ayından itibaren başlayan çalışmalar neticesinde Endonezya’da 28 Temmuz-09 Ağustos tarihleri arasında gerçekleşen 63. International Veterinary Students’ Association ( IVSA) kongresinde yapılan sunum sonrası oylama ile resmî olarak kurulmuştur. Temel misyonumuz;

• Yurt içi ve yurt dışı exchange (değişim) programlarıyla birlikte veteriner hekimliği öğrencilerinin bir bütünün parçası olduğunu hissettirmek ve akademik çalışmalara katılımını sağlamak,

• Ulusal ve uluslararası kongreleri düzenlemekle birlikte çeşitli meslek büyüklerimizle organize olarak yaptığımız iletişimler sayesinde öğrencilerin mesleki gelişimine katkı sağlamak,

•  Yabancı dil (özellikle İngilizce) konusunda kurslar ve programlar düzenleyerek fakülte öğrencilerinin dil gelişimine katkı sağlamak,

• TÜBİTAK lisans öğrencileri programları (örneğin 2209-A) ile öğrencilere bilimsel okur yazarlığı öğretmek, akademi ile bağını güçlendirmek,

• IVSA topluluklarının yaptığı çalışmalara (kongre,sempozyum,çalışta vb) katılarak diğer IVSA üyelerine destek olmak,

• Online çalışmalarımız ile (YouTube) dijital çağın enstrümanlarını kullanarak veteriner çalıştaylarını yapmak. Böylece gelişmeleri Dünya’nın her yerinden takip edebilmek,

• Sosyal programlar yaparak öğrenciler arasında arkadaşlığı, paylaşımı ve meslektaş bilincini geliştirmek,

• Yapılan tüm bu etkinlikler ile veteriner hekimliği mesleğinin adını ve vizyonunu güçlendirmektir.


TOPLULUĞUMUZ;

1. Exchange Koordinatörlüğü

2. Sosyal Medya Koordinatörlüğü

3. Halkla İlişkiler Koordinatörlüğü

4. ARGE

Name: HOSPITAL VETERINARIO SIERRA DE MADRID
Description:
El Hospital Veterinario Sierra de Madrid, ubicado en el término municipal de San Agustín del Guadalix (Madrid), es un complejo veterinario de referencia en el ámbito nacional.
Ofrecemos una atención integral, en un mismo recinto, a pequeños animales y équidos, las 24 horas al día, los 365 días del año.
Entre nuestros servicios se encuentran: consulta médica general, vacunaciones, servicio de cirugía general, servicios de especialidad (traumatología, neurología, odontología, ecografía, oftalmología,……) reproducción, etc.
Disponemos de laboratorio de análisis clínicos, servicio de ecografía, endoscopia, radiología digital, TAC, resonancia magnética, varios quirófanos, salas de recuperación, UCI, hospitalización, aislamiento…
También ofrecemos el servicio de clínica ambulante, dotada de unidades móviles equipadas para prestar servicios que no necesiten hospitalización. Todo con atención 24h.
Confía en nosotros!

Name: ENSOLVET
Description:
Somos la división de sanidad animal de ENSOL.

Contamos con la paleta mas amplia de productos veterinarios hidrosolubles y en premix que mejor se adaptan a su establecimiento.

Name: TelmyVet
Description:

Name: Medi-Vet Animal Health
Description:
Medi-Vet Animal Health began out of a need to provide affordable veterinary care and products to local humane societies, animal rescue groups and to the people they serve. With ever increasing costs of pet health care, many clients were finding it difficult to provide for all the needs of their pet, especially when they became ill or required special medications.
Our Mission at Medi-Vet is to provide a complete line of quality, veterinary labeled medications and pet supplies at the lowest prices available anywhere. Our goal is to become your trusted supplier for veterinary products, and your veterinarian's partner in providing total pet health care. We carry products from all the leading drug manufacturers in their original packaging. These are exactly the same medications and pet products available at veterinary hospitals, but at a fraction of the cost. Our inventory rotates frequently keeping products fresh and current. We stock only products with proven efficacy and that are well respected in the veterinary community. Medi-Vet Animal Health works closely with veterinary hospitals and the primary care veterinarians as an affiliate to the practice and as a member of the veterinary support team providing quality care for your pet.

Medi-Vet is a licensed Wholesale Drug Distributor (License: LA 4358). Prescription Medications Are Available Only to Licensed Veterinarians, Pharmacies, Drug Companies and Wholesalers.

Dr. Kent P. Walker, DVM, the Founder and CEO of Medi-Vet Animal Health, LLC has over 37 years of experience in the practice of veterinary medicine. Graduate in Veterinary Medicine from Oklahoma State University, Dr. Walker has always had a passion for helping animals, he strongly believe that no animal should have to go without proper healthcare due to inflated costs. In 1998 he founded Medi-Vet Animal Health, LLC in order to help provide affordable veterinary products to local humane societies, animal rescue groups and to the people they serve.

Name: SANALIO
Description:
Sanalio, c’est une nutrition canine cohérente, efficace et alignée avec les pratiques professionnelles modernes et durables.

Développée avec des experts en nutrition canine, des vétérinaires et des praticiens du bien-être animal, Sanalio propose une base complète, à laquelle il suffit d’ajouter une source de protéine fraîche et de l’eau. Le résultat ? Une gamelle maison au quotidien, simple, saine et toujours parfaitement équilibrée.

Nos formules sont :
✓  Basées sur les recommandations scientifiques en nutrition canine
✓  Formulées à partir d’ingrédients bio, européens, sans OGM ni pesticides
✓  Adaptées à chaque chien, quel que soit son âge, sa race ou ses besoins (soutien digestif, dermatologique, articulaire, etc.)

Notre objectif : offrir une alimentation fonctionnelle, lisible, respectueuse du vivant, tout en valorisant le rôle du professionnel dans le conseil nutritionnel.

Notre approche repose sur 3 piliers : une formulation fondée sur les recommandations scientifiques en nutrition animale (FEDIAF, NRC). Des ingrédients bruts, digestes et traçables, issus d’une agriculture biologique locale. Une volonté constante de valoriser le rôle des professionnels dans le conseil nutritionnel et la personnalisation de l’alimentation 

Nos produits sont conçus selon une charte nutritionnelle exigeante : sans additifs de synthèse, sans conservateurs chimiques, sans procédés de transformation industrielle lourde. 

Nous maîtrisons chaque étape de notre chaîne : de la formulation (en collaboration avec la Faculté de Médecine Vétérinaire de l’Uliège), à la fabrication dans notre propre site de production en Belgique, jusqu’à la distribution via des réseaux professionnels (centrales d'achats).

Vous êtes vétérinaire, nutritionniste, naturopathe canin ou professionnel du bien-être animal ?
 Parlons nutrition, collaboration ou co-développement. Sanalio est une marque ouverte, exigeante et résolument tournée vers l’avenir.

Name: Northwest Referrals
Description:
Northwest Referrals was established in 2008 within Anrich Vets which was established in 1983. We are a family owned independent company that enables us to ensure a custom service for each individual customer, in which most referral centres are unable to achieve. We have a state-of-the-art facility which includes in-house MRI and CT scanning, we are one of very few independents in the country to be able to achieve this high standard of equipment.

We have recruited the finest team of vets and nurses to ensure the best veterinary care. We have 4 RCVS advanced practitioners in Surgery, Diagnostic imaging and Cardiology. Although we have a very high caliber of staff we still ensure that our services are more affordable than some of the other referral centres without compromising the quality of care.

Some of the advantages of using our service are that we provide outpatient and referral service, waiting times are maximum of 24 hours, we have fixed price scanning which ensures that our referring vets and their clients know exactly how much the price will be before they even send the patient, this is extremely popular as it is already a worrying time for the owners and finances should be less of a problem. We also provide an ambulance service that picks patients up for my referring vets and also drop some off, this service is available for all over the UK and we find most of our customers find it more convenient than taking a day off work and bringing the patient to us directly.

Name: Wisconsin Veterinary Diagnostic Laboratory
Description:
The Wisconsin Veterinary Diagnostic Laboratory (WVDL) was established in 1999 by Wisconsin Act 107 (1999 Senate Bill 358) which was enacted on 28 April 2000. With that Act, effective July 1, 2000, the Wisconsin Animal Health Laboratory was transferred from the Department of Agriculture, Trade and Consumer Protection to the University of Wisconsin System and renamed the Wisconsin Veterinary Diagnostic Laboratory. This change occurred through the collaborative efforts of the Wisconsin Veterinary Medical Association (WVMA), the School of Veterinary Medicine, and the State of Wisconsin. Continued support from the State and UW campus, along with increasing demand for diagnostics with exceptional quality, led to the design and construction of a new laboratory on the UW-Madison Campus. The current state-of-the-art facility on Easterday Lane opened its doors in 2006.

As part of the University of Wisconsin, the WVDL has continued to grow and currently employs approximately 75 people. In 2002, the laboratory became a core laboratory in the National Animal Health Laboratory Network (NAHLN) of the USDA. This designation permits the laboratory to be a full partner to state and federal agencies in protecting animal agriculture.

We pride ourselves on our customer service, dedication, and forward thinking. Many members of our doctoral staff have national reputations for being leaders in their field. As part of the Wisconsin Idea, we also continually strive to be global leaders in the field of diagnostic testing and have established reputations for excellence in testing for the dairy and bull stud industries as well as emerging infectious diseases such as transmissible spongiform encephalopathies (TSE). The Barron Laboratory continues to be an important part of the National Poultry Improvement Program (NPIP) through its service to the poultry industry.

Description:
As Vermont’s only specialty and 24/7 emergency animal hospital, Burlington Emergency & Veterinary Specialists (BEVS) provides a level of care you simply won’t find anyplace else in the state.

From expert emergency and critical care 24 hours a day to advanced veterinary specialty and referral services—including surgery, internal medicine, dentistry, neurology, rehabilitation, radioiodine therapy, and acupuncture—BEVS is a trusted partner not only to the region’s primary care veterinarians but to pet owners in Vermont, Eastern NY and lower Canada.

Name: GULFDRUG Veterinary Healthcare
Description:
GulfDrug Veterinary Healthcare, a trusted leader in animal welfare, is designed to provide our partners with products, solutions, and knowledge, to help them add real value to their clients & end-users.

It caters to all the pharmaceutical needs related to animal health; veterinary vaccines (oral & injectable), veterinary medicines dry forms (powders, tablets, boluses, etc.), liquid, semiliquid oral and injectable forms.It also supplies a wide range of veterinary instruments and equipment such as surgical instruments, veterinary equipment, disposables, and assisted reproductive technologies etc, beside veterinary hygiene and public health products and solutions serving governmental, non-governmental organizations, farmer organizations, veterinary hospitals, clinics, pharmacies, and animal shelters. Our commitment lies in ensuring the welfare of animals, guaranteeing they receive top-tier care and treatment, thus contributing to the overall health and vitality of the animal kingdom.

Maintaining the efficacy of veterinary vaccines and medicines is crucial to the successful delivery of animal health. This is why GulfDrug has invested heavily in its Cold Chain Management and Temperature Mapping Technologies. The state-of-the-art logistics and supply chain facilities and solutions are ISO-certified, and our processes adhere to the TQM system, with high-standard storage and distribution practices (GSDP). These facilities are manned by well-trained staff, ensuring efficient delivery of products to the end user.

Name: Dr. Treat
Description:
Dr. Treat is a pet health & wellness startup headquartered in San Francisco and as the name suggests, a happy place to work. Our mission is to help pets live their healthiest, happiest, and longest lives by using technology and data in a way that’s never been done before. 

By using technology and data in a way that’s never been done before, we are building the best-in-class veterinary clinics by rethinking processes, workflows, and services that will make the lives of companions, providers, and care providers better.

Name: VMG - Veterinary Management Group
Description:
Built upon the success of the Veterinary Practice Management Association, the Veterinary Management Group aims to support the continued learning, development and growth of all of our members, whilst reflecting and celebrating the diversity of management structures seen in practice today.
The VMG is open to everyone working in veterinary practice management, whether your background is as a practice manager, a veterinary surgeon, a veterinary nurse or a member of the support team, as well as to those coming into practice management from outside the veterinary sector. No matter whether you are completely new to practice management or to management within the veterinary sphere or consider yourself an old hand, the VMG has plenty to offer you and will welcome your input into its support, education and networking opportunities.

Name: SURGIPHARMA For Veterinary Tools
