Name: Companion Clinic
Description:
Full-service veterinary clinic that provides care for large and small animals. We pride ourselves on providing the high-quality veterinary medicine and being involved with out community.
We welcome both emergency treatment cases as well as patients in need of routine medical, surgical and dental care. Our clinic is comfortable, kid-friendly, and calm, so your animal can relax in the waiting room and look forward to meeting one of our outstanding veterinarians.

Name: BIOVETOL
Description:
BIOVETOL est une marque de Bien-être et Hygiène pour animaux domestiques et d’ornement (chiens, chats et animaux à plumes de basse-cour). 
Solutions avec ingrédients actifs d'origine végétale et biologiques, contrôlées par ECOCERT, élaborées et fabriquées en France. 

Produits d’hygiène, antiparasitaires, aliments complémentaires et bien-être pour animaux.

Les solutions BIOVETOL favorisent le bien-être de votre animal. Ils ne peuvent en aucun cas être envisagés comme une réponse thérapeutique à un problème de santé, pour lequel la consultation d’un vétérinaire est indispensable. Avant toute utilisation, lire attentivement l’étiquette du produit et respecter les indications présentes.

Name: HIPROTEC for Animal Health Products
Description:
Hiprotec stands resolute as a premier vanguard in the landscape of animal health products. Our enduring commitment to fostering the well-being of animals is a testament to our unwavering dedication, ceaseless innovation, and tireless pursuit of excellence. With an innate understanding of the intricate balance between science and compassion, we have meticulously curated a diverse portfolio of cutting-edge solutions that transcend conventional boundaries.

At Hiprotec, the crucible of our success is our unrelenting emphasis on research and development. Through rigorous scientific exploration and meticulous refinement, our products not only meet the highest industry standards but often set them anew. This dedication is underpinned by an unshakeable commitment to quality assurance, ensuring that each product that bears the Hiprotec insignia is a paragon of reliability, safety, and efficacy.

Moreover, our global footprint has been shaped by strategic alliances and partnerships that span continents. Collaborations with veterinary professionals, industry stakeholders, and academia have not only enriched our knowledge base but also afforded us the privilege of collectively advancing the boundaries of animal care.

As stewards of a healthier future for all creatures great and small, Hiprotec remains steadfast in its vision to empower veterinarians, farmers, and pet owners with the tools they need to safeguard and elevate the health of animals. Our legacy is rooted in nurturing this delicate yet profound relationship between human and animal, a bond that transcends time and culture.

With every product bearing our emblem, we continue to write a narrative of compassionate care, pioneering innovation, and transformative impact. Hiprotec: Illuminating the Path to Enhanced Animal Health.
+201001555345

Name: Maritime Veterinary Emergency and Specialty Centre
Description:
NOW OPEN in Dartmouth, Nova Scotia!

Maritime Veterinary Emergency and Specialty Centre will bring together an experienced team of emergency veterinarians, specialists, registered veterinary technicians, technician assistants, and client care representatives to provide advanced medical care for pets in the greater Halifax Regional Municipality and beyond.   

The brand-new 24,000 square foot facility in Dartmouth, Nova Scotia features advanced diagnostic capabilities, an in-house lab, dedicated critical care/ICU suites that are separate for canine and feline, GE Revolution EVO 128-slice CT, a rehabilitation suite complete with Underwater treadmill, and a conference center for continuing education.

Name: Sean Casey Animal Rescue, Inc.
Description:
SEAN CASEY ANIMAL RESCUE IS A 501(C)(3) NOT-FOR-PROFIT, NO-KILL RESCUE & SHELTER
FED ID: 35-2244558
*We specialize in the rescue, rehabilitation and placement of dogs, cats, reptiles, amphibians, birds and small mammals.
*MISSION: The purpose of this endeavor is to aid unfortunate animals in the interest of a higher quality of life. We take in rescued, confiscated, neglected, injured, ill, unmanageable, or otherwise unwanted animals from private owners, zoos, shelters, and other public organizations. These animals are cared for, and/or rehabilitated to the best of our ability and means until which time they can be found healthy, happy homes–whether it be through adoption to qualified candidates or legally released into habitats suitable to the specific species in conjunction with licensed wildlife rehabilitators.

-WINDSOR TERRACE: 153 East 3rd Street, Brooklyn, New York 11218
PHONE: 718.436.5163
-SUNSET PARK: 551 39th Street, Brooklyn, New York 11232
PHONE: 347.599.1500
EMAIL: info@nyanimalrescue.org
WEB: www.nyanimalrescue.org
-----
We are a community based organization; we welcome you to spend some time at our facility. We are a family friendly place focused on educating pet owners and animal lovers about the needs and responsibilities of pet ownership. Our staff is always available to help with your questions about the health and maintenance of your pet as well as behavior and training issues. 

We strive to educate the public about respecting, understanding and coexisting with the natural wildlife of New York City through our programs and events. In conjunction with our licensed wildlife rehabilitators, we can inform the public on the way to handle situations involving wildlife as well as rehabilitating injured and orphaned animals.

Name: Sarvet Poultry
Description:
Sarvet Poultry… a new title for an old work and long experience in the field of poultry and its diseases for more than 30 years spent by Dr. Turk Sarakbi in Syria, Egypt, Jordan, and Yemen, spreading his scientific experience through his books, researches, and scientific publications related to poultry and its farming, nutrition and diseases.

Sarvet Poultry was found in 2010 with new trends to provide high quality products that keep pace with global trends in poultry industry, including natural products, nutritional products, in addition to other modern medicinal products that proved their good activity against poultry diseases, and satisfy the needs of the Yemeni market and poultry industry in Yemen.

Name: MCC-Vlaanderen
Description:
Melkcontrolecentrum Vlaanderen - MCC for short - is the reliable partner of the Flemish dairy farmer and the dairy sector. Our non-profit organisation guarantees the quality and composition of all raw milk produced in Flanders and delivered to the dairy industry. It supervises the sampling, carries out high-quality analyses on the samples it collects from producers and takes care of both data processing and reporting. 

In addition, MCC supports the connection between the Flemish dairy farmers and the buyers of milk. The MCC field service provides guidance to Flemish dairy farmers, in consultation with the other partners involved (dairy industry, agricultural organisations, etc.). 

MCC invests continuously in its employees, in knowledge and innovation. Annually, MCC performs over 12 million analyses on milk samples in its specialised laboratory in Lier. Thanks to this fast and efficient approach, MCC guarantees the quality of the dairy products that eventually end up on shop shelves. MCC's laboratory is accredited by BELAC to ISO 17025, the standard for quality management in laboratories, and ISO 17020, the standard for control activities in the distribution sector. 

In addition, MCC is also certified to ISO 17065 for the certification of IKM's specifications and grazing and can be called upon within the sector for other certification initiatives. In this way, MCC helps ensure that Flemish dairy products are among the best in the world.

Name: VetSERV ACPL
Description:
VetSERV is offering in innovation led diagnostics to veterinary clinicians in India - leading to better treatment decisions for better health outcomes for animals.

VetSERV is committed to enable faster, more accurate and more informed health interventions for an animal’s health, guided by credible diagnostics from VetSERV Lab.  We make this happen through pursuit of best of diagnostic practices, practitioners, and equipment -with focus on continuous evolution and learning. It is the referral diagnostic lab of choice for small animal vets across India.

VetSERV is the FIRST Veterinary lab in India- 
- To introduce molecular diagnostics for companion animals in India
- Offering Blood Parasite detection through 8x sensitive test methodology
- To introduce barcodes for patient identification and automation -right from the collection stage
- To use automation & technology for speed, accuracy and reliability –with ongoing investment in Information Technology Backbone

VetSERV Team:
The diagnostics team is headed by an experienced and trained veterinary diagnosticians with an active interest in small animal healthcare.  With well trained veterinary pathologists and biotechnologists on the team, VetSERV goes all-out to satisfy clinicians and pet guardians.

Name: Vet Report

Name: Esalpet
Description:
O Esalpet nasceu em 2008 pelo amor que tem com os animais. Atualmente, a loja do Esalpet possue um universo completo para atender e cuidar do seu pet. Amamos o que fazemos e trabalhamos para que você e seus pets tenham a melhor experiência em nossas lojas. Oferecemos toda a atenção e zelo que os animais de estimação merecem. No Esalpet  você encontra tudo o que seu pet precisa. Contamos com uma grande variedade de produtos para cães e gatos, além dos serviços de banho, tosa e veterinária.

O Esalpet é considerado um dos maiores e mais completos petshops da cidade, oferecendo um mix de produtos que inclui dezenas de opções de rações, acessórios para transporte animal, coleiras para identificação, medicamentos, roupas, artigos para higiene e muito mais.


Além de comercializar produtos que ajudam seu cão ou gato a viver com mais qualidade de vida, o Esalpet possui um centro de atenção animal com farmácia em sua sede. Nele, uma médica veterinária presta atendimentos de urgência, faz aplicação de vacinas, prescrição de medicamentos, realização de consultas de rotina e acompanhamento da saúde de seu bichinho em todas as fases da vida dele. Para a higiene regular de seu animal, o Esalpet também oferece serviço de banho, corte de pelo, escovação dental e tosa higiênica.

Consultoria e Assessoria Veterinária especializada em ovinos, oferece a seus clientes um serviço diferenciado de manejo sanitário preventivo do rebanho, incluindo orientação nas áreas de manejo, nutrição, reprodução e clínica, além da Elaboração e Acompanhamento de Projetos para todos os Sistemas de Produção (cruzamento industrial, reprodutores e matrizes, criação extensiva, confinamento etc.) e fornecendo treinamento e capacitação a seus funcionários.

Name: AniCura Albea Hospital Veterinario
Description:
Hace casi veinte años, dos estudiantes de veterinaria pensaron que había muchas cosas por avanzar en medicina veterinaria en Canarias. Pensaban en agotar todos los medios que la medicina veterinaria podía ofrecer para salvar vidas. Soñaban con un hospital con las mejores instalaciones y los mejores profesionales para los pacientes. Los fundadores de Albea son los que dan nombre a nuestro hospital: AL de Alexis Santana y BEA de Beatriz López.

En AniCura Albea Hospital Veterinario ofrecemos una gran variedad de servicios y especialidades. 
Contamos con el Servicio de Diagnóstico por Imagen más grande de Canarias y disponemos del TAC más moderno y el único con inyector de contraste hasta la fecha en el archipiélago. Somos pioneros en Terapia Endovascular (cirugía vascular y cardíaca por mínima invasión) y los únicos en disponer de un servicio de referencia exclusiva como hospital veterinario en las islas. 
Contamos con un servicio de laboratorio propio que también ofrecemos a otros centros de la isla. Somos uno de los laboratorios más completos dentro de un hospital veterinario del país. 
Estamos reconocidos como hospital NIVEL ORO por la ISFM (Sociedad internacional de medicina felina). 
Somos el hospital de referencia de más de 150 centros veterinarios por toda la geografía española (desde Galicia hasta El Hierro), damos cobertura en multitud de servicios.
Location: Las Palmas de Gran Canaria, Las Palmas

Name: Assistance Animals Consulting
Description:
Assistance Animals Consulting partners with healthcare professionals and organizations to serve as a veterinary resource for all human-animal intervention treatment plan.  Our mission is the bridge the gap between human-animal healthcare to maximize the therapeutic impact of the human-animal bond.

After realizing there was a gap between veterinarians, health care professionals, support animals, and the patients they serve, Assistance Animals Consulting was formed.

As the need for assistance animals grows, so does the need for more qualified care to monitor the health and welfare of these animals. And that's where we come in - it is our mission to be a meaningful resource for enhancing human-animal interaction.
Assistance Animals Consulting is comprised of licensed veterinarians with a passion for the human-animal bond. Our job is to evaluate any animal being considered as an assistance animal for therapeutic purposes. We also guide institutions, professionals, and animal owners through the process of establishing the human-animal bond.

We have one goal - to create an integrated One Health team approach to your patient's health by facilitating successful human-animal bond treatment plans, all while ensuring the health and welfare of the support animal and the general public.

Name: Companion CBD, LLC.
Description:
In 2018, CompanionCBD set out to create a new paradigm for Cannabinoid science for veterinary medicine, not only for veterinarians, but also for all pet parents. Our award winning products are designed using an evidence-based approach, incorporating the latest scientific evidence and clinician experience.

 CompanionCBD was founded with a simple idea in mind: CBD (cannabidiol) can be a valuable tool in the management of a wide range of diseases in pets, but only if it can be made available in a safe, palatable, easy-to-administer form, and dosed effectively. We have done just that.

CompanionCBD is the leading producer of CBD-based products for the veterinary market. We pioneered continuing education for veterinary medicine on a globally platform, in collaboration with The Veterinary Practice News (The Vedmed Team). We have trained over 30,000 veterinary professionals on the clinical applications,  pharmacogenetics and dynamics of CBD.

Our CBD products were created to improve the veterinarian’s ability to manage many difficult, chronic conditions with or without the use of pharmaceutical agents. Our comprehensive approach to these formulations is unique, integrating additional supplements that have clearly been shown to have a positive impact on the management of many chronic conditions.

From osteoarthritis to anxiety, to the management of cancer side effects, our products enhance a patient’s quality of life while minimizing the potential for side effects commonly associated with more traditional therapies.

Our products are proudly produced from 100% USA-grown Hemp and are THC-free, made here in the USA.

We sell direct to Vet Hospitals globally, and retail and online. Contact us to be a authorized retailer or to learn more about how we can help your pet.

Name: Laboratório Centervet

O laboratório CenterVet está em constante aprimoramento para manter o padrão de excelência e confiabilidade.

Name: Tolnagro Csoport
Description:
Tolnagro Állatgyógyászati Ltd. was established in Szekszárd in 1996 by the merger of two successful distributors of veterinary medicinal products in the South-Transdanubium region: Tolnavet Ltd. (1993) and Agrovet Ltd. (1990). The aim of the merger was to create a company that offers higher quality services to its customers. Turnover, warehouse capacity, logistics and the number of employees increased with the development of the company, which is by now the leading wholesaler in the Hungarian market of veterinary medicinal products. 
 
Today we serve customers from all Hungarian regions. Net turnover in 2007 was 6 billion Forints, placing the company far ahead of its competitors. Tolnagro has retained its position as the leader of the veterinary pharmaceutical wholesale market for three years.

Name: PriorityPet Urgent Care
Description:
PriorityPet Urgent Care is here to bridge the gap between routine check-ups and emergency care, offering walk-in services for pets with urgent, non-life-threatening issues. From after-hours worries to “this-can’t-wait-until-morning” moments, we’re ready to help your pets get the care they need, right when they need it.

For veterinarians dreaming of practice ownership, PriorityPet Urgent Care can help you get there. We take care of the business side so you can focus on your patients and practice medicine on your terms. With our support, resources, and know-how, you get the freedom to build a practice that’s truly yours, shaped by your vision and fueled by our commitment to your success.

Name: Animalis, d.o.o.
Description:
Animalis wants to understand the essence, the soul (anima) of animals.

Our passion is animal health. We believe that most often prevention is the key to healh: appropriate nutrition, hygiene, breeding and rearing conditions. Therefore, we are interested in everything related to nutrition, hygiene and health of domestic animals.

We want to help find modern ways of animal rearing and breeding to breeders, veterinarians, owners and everyone involved in the production of animal feed. We offer products that contribute to their success and satisfaction and to animal health and welfare.

Animalis, Ltd., represents world-renowned companies in the field of nutrition, hygiene and animal health.

Our team is in close contact with veterinarians, farmers and feed mills.

Animalis is authorized for dealing with dangerous chemicals and is approved as animal feed business with alfa number: α 705 07034.

Animalis is also approved as a veterinary medicines wholesaler with GDP certificate in Slovenia.

We are willing to discuss possible co-operation with companies involved in animal health, hygiene and nutrition.

En nuestro compromiso de brindar un servicio excepcional, nos enorgullece ofrecer una atención dedicada y personalizada. Contamos con un equipo de profesionales altamente especializados, comprometidos y apasionados por el bienestar de tu mascota

A través de nuestra plataforma en línea, puedes acceder a una variedad de funciones diseñadas para proporcionarte rápidamente toda la información relevante sobre la salud, el cuidado y el comportamiento de tu compañero peludo

Name: International Veterinary Immunology Symposium
Description: IVIS2025 will bring together experts to share the most exciting results and insights in the field of veterinary science and immunology, including biological mechanisms underlying host-pathogen interactions and specificities, vaccine and therapeutic strategies, innate and protective immunity, disease diagnosis and control, and reagent and methodological developments. This symposium will provide an opportunity for delegates from all involved sectors to engage with leaders in the field and network in the comfort of a state-of-the-art conference facility.

Name: Adibio
Description:
Adibio es una empresa especializada en complementos nutricionales innovadores, definidos como nutracéuticos por su orientación a la mejora de la salud, el bienestar, y la calidad de las producciones animales. Todos ellos se basan en combinaciones sinérgicas y complementarias de componentes vegetales con actividad biológica que responde, en cada caso, a un objetivo específico de aplicación.

Nuestro empeño por la investigación, innovación y desarrollo nos permite ofrecer a nuestros clientes programas específicos, adaptados a sus necesidades, con un demostrado aval científico y una rentabilidad contrastada.

Adibio es una empresa integrada en TERVALIS, importante Grupo Agroalimentario español, que lleva más de 30 años aportando al mercado nuevas soluciones para una agricultura y ganadería más sostenible y eficiente (FERTINAGRO BIOTECH – nutrición vegetal, GLOBALFEED – nutrición mineral y PORTESA- producción porcina).

Somos conscientes del impacto de las nuevas políticas sanitarias sobre el uso responsable de antimicrobianos en Producción Animal.

Por este motivo, en Adibio llevamos años comprometidos en reducir el uso de antibióticos en las producciones ganaderas, mediante la utilización de nutracéuticos, convencidos de que ésta será la opción de futuro. Contamos con una amplia experiencia en el empleo de nuestras formulaciones magistrales en distintos sistemas ganaderos, que han demostrado su eficacia en Producción Libre de Antibióticos (PLA) certificadas por AENOR, en porcino y en vacuno de carne.

Name: Vitals4Pets
Description:
REMOTE ECG & VITALS MONITORING FOR ANIMALS

Vitals4pets gives the veterinarian and the animal owner the power to access the animal's vital health insights; Anytime, Anywhere, 24/7.

A ONE DEVICE SOLUTION
Can measure all relevant physiological vitals without the need for a blood sample

Vitals4pets is an easy-to-use lightweight medical device that wirelessly and continuously measures a plurality of clinically relevant physiological vitals to assess animal well-being and disease management.

The physiological vitals can be monitored remotely anywhere and anytime by veterinarian professionals with a mobile application.

Vitals4pets digitally measure different physiological vitals from the patient, converting them with an algorithm into reliable measurements for professionals.

Name: Grupo Impotrade

Name: Animal Trade Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Animal Trade is a company solely committed to the sales and distribution of animal health products, veterinary diagnostics, feed supplements and additives. The company was established in 1990 as a marketing and technical company active in the field of agriculture: feed industry and veterinary business. Animal Trade has acted as an exclusive distributor with the responsibility for registration, sales and marketing activities for multinational companies such as American Cyanamid, SmithKline Beecham, Pfizer, Boehringer Ingelheim and Virbac SA, Tessenderlo Chemie, Alpharma SA, Institut Pourquier and IDVET. 

For the past 20 years, Animal Trade has not only developed its commercial activities, but also cooperated closely with leading Polish opinion leaders, scientists and registration authorities in terms of registration as well as technical services for partner companies. The company sells diagnostic kits to regional veterinary hygiene stations, private laboratories and veterinary clinics. Animal Trade operates in the veterinary distribution segment on the basis of licences  issued by the Main Polish Veterinary Officer, as animal health products wholeseller and consignment stock operator. 

In 2008 Animal Trade was awarded the Forbes Diamond Title as the fastest growing and most profitable company in the segment of medium enterprises. For two consecutive years (2008,2009) Animal Trade received the title of "Gazela Biznesu".

Name: VetTalk Indonesia
Description:
Empowering Indonesian Veterinary Clinics through Innovation

At Vettalk Indonesia, our mission is to revolutionize the way veterinary clinics operate by providing cutting-edge, integrated solutions that streamline clinic management. As a growing startup, we focus on creating impactful technology designed specifically for veterinarians, helping them optimize their workflow, enhance client care, and ensure seamless clinic operations.

Our flagship product, Vethub, is an all-in-one clinic management software that simplifies everyday tasks like patient record management, appointment scheduling, billing, and inventory tracking. With Vethub, veterinary professionals can reduce manual work, improve service quality, and focus more on delivering the best care to their animal patients.

We believe that Indonesian veterinarians should be empowered with the right tools to run their clinics efficiently and deliver excellent care. That's why Vethub is designed to be intuitive, scalable, and secure, making it the perfect solution for clinics of any size.

Join us as we continue to transform the veterinary industry with innovation and technology.

Name: Grupa Weterynaryjna FENIX
Description:
Firma FENIX VET powstała w październiku 2011 roku, w odpowiedzi na rosnące zapotrzebowanie lekarzy weterynarii oraz właścicieli zwierząt na najwyższej jakości produkty, nutraceutyki weterynaryjne, które mogłyby być bezpiecznie stosowane w profilaktyce i leczeniu zwierząt domowych.

Jesteśmy wyłącznym dystrybutorem nutraceutyków weterynaryjnych marki VetPlus w Polsce - najwyższej jakości nutraceutyków dla zwierząt. Oferujemy kompletną linię produktów, których jakość została potwierdzona licznymi badaniami klinicznymi. 

Nasze produkty mogą być stosowane w ponad 50% przypadków klinicznych spotykanych w praktyce lekarza weterynarii. Nutraceutyki VetPlus spełniają najwyższe standardy jakości i bezpieczeństwa - cieszą się zaufaniem lekarzy weterynarii w 36 krajach na całym świecie.

Oferta naszej firmy skierowana jest w 100% do lekarzy weterynarii.

Podstawowe elementy naszej strategii to:

- Najwyższa jakość i skuteczność produktów,
- Wyłączna i bezpośrednia dystrybucja preparatów do praktyk weterynaryjnych,
- Unikalne partnerstwo pomiędzy firmą a lekarzem, 
- Korzystne warunki handlowe.

Zapraszamy do współpracy!

Name: Nerthus
Description:
Somos uma startup deeptech dedicada a transformar a produção animal por meio da ciência, da inovação e do respeito à vida. Nosso propósito é impulsionar o crescimento econômico e social com soluções que elevam o bem-estar animal e tornam o sistema produtivo mais sustentável e eficiente.

Acreditamos que é possível alinhar lucratividade, ética e responsabilidade ambiental, e é isso que buscamos em cada projeto que desenvolvemos. Nossa principal inovação — o ninho artificial biodegradável BioNest — representa esse compromisso ao permitir que cerdas expressem seus comportamentos naturais, reduzindo o estresse e aumentando a produtividade.

 Acesse o link para o principal artigo científico que apresenta as vantagens do ninho: https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S016815912500053X

O reconhecimento desse trabalho tem ultrapassado fronteiras, reforçando nossa missão de levar soluções de impacto global:

 https://pesquisaparainovacao.fapesp.br/ninho_artificial_melhora_bemestar_animal_e_aumenta_produtividade_na_industria_suina/3758

https://globorural.globo.com/pecuaria/suinos/noticia/2025/09/ninho-artificial-biodegradavel-auxilia-porcas-antes-do-parto-conheca.ghtml
 https://infopork.com/2025/10/brasil-desarrolla-nido-artificial-para-mejorar-bienestar-y-productividad-porcina/

Nosso objetivo é sermos referência no Brasil e no mundo no desenvolvimento de novas tecnologias para uma pecuária moderna, que gere resultados para produtores, conforto para os animais e orgulho para todos que constroem essa cadeia.

Valorizamos a ética nas relações, a responsabilidade social e a excelência científica como pilares para harmonizar desenvolvimento econômico e conservação ambiental.

Name: Mobashir Multi Activities

Name: CoraVets Referrals
Description:
CoraVets is Ireland’s newest specialist referral hospital, founded on a clear vision: to combine advanced veterinary expertise with genuine compassion, clear communication, and a supportive experience for every pet, family and veterinary colleague.

We make specialist care accessible and approachable by taking time to explain diagnoses, understand concerns, outline treatment options and guide families with empathy at every stage. Our approach is built on clinical excellence, openness and continuity of care — fostering long-term trust with primary care vets and pet owners alike.

Name: Hook Norton Veterinary Group
Description:
We are a mixed practice with separate pets, farm and equine departments with over 30 dedicated vets providing round-the-clock care.

Our main branch at White Hills Surgery is a tier 3 Small Animal Hospital under the Royal College of Veterinary Surgeons (RCVS) accreditation scheme. This means that we have passed rigorous inspections covering areas such as health and safety, hygiene, the provision of 24-hour cover and clinical governance. All departments have access to on-site laboratory facilities and diagnostic testing.

We are proud to be one of the founding members of XLVets. This is a group of privately owned veterinary practices spanning the length and breadth of the UK, working together to share veterinary ideas, knowledge, and skills. We are able to share information and ideas, using forums and continuing education meetings.

With the aim of delivering the best care for your pets, horses, and livestock we are committed to providing a professional modern veterinary service with traditional values in an approachable compassionate manner.

Name: Alivet Produtos Agropecuarios Ltda
Description: Distribuição e Representação de produtos agropecuários

Name: Hospital Veterinário 24h Limeira - HV24h
Description:
O hospital veterinário foi fundado em 24 de fevereiro de 1992, e mantém a filosofia de trabalhar 24h,  sendo a pioneira e até hoje a única a manter-se desta forma na região.

Por ser 24 horas, presta-se um atendimento contínuo e traz segurança aos seus clientes a qualquer hora e momento.

Ao longo dos anos,  a preocupação da empresa com  diagnósticos e tratamentos mais precisos está aumentando,  com isso a necessidade de se especializar nas diversas áreas (dermatologia, cardiologia, fisioterapia, cirurgia, ultrassonografia e radiologia). 

Todas as especialidades são extensivas aos colegas de outras clínicas que acharem oportuno usufrui-las.

Temos estrutura de uma clínica completa, com 2 consultórios, centro cirúrgico, sala de repouso, UTI, equipamentos para raio-x, eletrocardiograma, ecodopplercardiograma, mensuração da pressão arterial e ultrassom. 

Além disso, o Hospital  oferece serviços de Pet Shop que possui as melhores marcas do mercado e o Banho e Tosa, que para a praticidade do nosso cliente, funciona com o sistema leva e traz.

Hospital Veterinário Limeira, 24 horas com você.

Name: Ospedale Veterinario San Francesco - Milano
Description:
L’Ospedale Veterinario San Francesco è aperto dal gennaio 2015. Il progetto nasce dalla volontà di fornire un servizio veterinario il più completo possibile concentrando, in un’unica struttura sanitaria, l’offerta di prestazioni diversificate per le sempre più crescenti esigenze dei nostri pazienti. 

Vogliamo offrire un servizio di pronto soccorso veterinario altamente qualificato con reperibilità chirurgica, anestesiologica, cardiologica ed ecografica 24 ore su 24 che possa essere fruibile sia dai pazienti già afferenti alla nostra struttura sia da quelli di referenza. Proprio per offrire un servizio d’eccellenza, il personale coinvolto nelle attività di pronto soccorso e terapia intensiva lavora in parallelo ma in maniera autonoma rispetto all’attività ospedaliera diurna, che normalmente si svolge per appuntamento. 

Investiamo molto nella formazione dei veterinari e nel continuo aggiornamento sia dal punto di vista delle competenze specialistiche che per quanto riguarda macchinari e strumentari medici, in modo da offrire maggiori opportunità ai nostri pazienti e dare ai nostri collaboratori la possibilità di crescere.

Name: Sunset Vets Palliative and End of Life Care
Description:
Sunset Vets Palliative and End of Life Care is a dedicated palliative care and euthanasia service helping families to access specialised end-stage care at home.  

End-of-life care is an emerging field of veterinary medicine and we’re dedicated to being at the forefront of it. We believe that the moments at the end of a pet’s life are to be treasured and are committed to helping families access a different type of care during this difficult time.  

In many cases, our most important role is to help families to say a gentle goodbye at home, supported by a care team who truly understand how hard that day can be. 

Our network of mobile veterinarians provide a unique service, offering compassionate and personalised care in your own home. We work in conjunction with your primary care veterinarian to deliver additional support to patients with complicated medical needs and those approaching end of life. 

Our clients are supported by an incredible patient care team in head office who are there to ensure you’re connected with the right support and services for you.

Name: AlchemyPet
Description:
AlchemyPet is redefining pet wellness with science-backed, bioavailable supplements that help dogs live longer, healthier lives.

Formulated in collaboration with Swiss scientists, integrative veterinarians, and board-certified pet nutritionists, our clean-label products use proprietary microencapsulation technology to enhance absorption and effectiveness.

From gut and immune support to joint and cognitive health, AlchemyPet is committed to whole-system vitality — because healthier pets make happier families.

Name: The Grand Lake Veterinary Hospital
Description:

We are a family of dedicated, educated, compassionate caregivers for all phases of your pet's life, created through listening, educating, and skillfully combining state of the art medicine with understanding.  We recognize that our patients are family members, and treat them as such, with dignity and respect. We seek to foster a caring relationship between our staff and our clients, because in doing so, our clients and patients become a part of the Grand Lake Veterinary Hospital family too.

Fishguard is part of a growing group of companies all connected to the global fish farming industry. The wealth of experience and knowledge provided by our multidisciplinary teams in some of the world’s biggest markets for aquaculture production puts Fishguard in a unique position.

Name: North Shore Veterinary, Specialist & Emergency Hospital
Description:
North Shore Veterinary Hospital (NHVS) was established in 1935 and has serviced our local community for 85 years and prides itself on delivering the highest quality care for your pets.

We are proud to be operating at our new and purpose-built Artarmon veterinary hospital in Sydney’s lower North Shore. Here our general veterinary practice services suburbs such as Artarmon, St Leonards, North Sydney, and Crows Nest and their surrounding areas.

For emergencies we are open 24 hours 365 days a year, with specialists and critical care emergency veterinarians always on hand. Our skilled team is always available for consultation and advice when it is needed and we have people travel from all over Sydney for the high quality of specialist and emergency veterinary care we offer.

In addition the hospital is home to North Shore Veterinary Specialist & Emergency Centre, which operates independently of the general practice.

Name: Trio Pet Care
Description:
In today’s fast lifestyle, it is hard to find the time to look after your own dietary needs let alone your pets. Even finding the right activity to keep us active and dedicated at the same time is very challenging.

That’s where Trio Pet Care comes in with our quality range of toys, treats packages, and dedicated staff to grow you’re bond bigger than ever and making it fun at the same time. Who says being active can’t be fun? 

Unfortunately, our pets can’t talk, if they could they’d probably ask us to change their food range so now and again to keep it interesting. Our enjoyment comes in designing your pets’ diet to not only keep them healthy but also to give them tasty food that helps keep away general diseases, improving their skin, and brightens their furry coats. Switching from wet food to dry and back again is great as both have their benefits. A simple diet can make your friend feel happier and healthier than they’ve ever felt before while keeping them guessing as to what is next on the dinner table.  

All your pet needs, one destination!

Mission: Keeping people and pets together while enjoying longer, happier, and healthier lives.

Core Values:
Caring 
We treat our patients, clients and team members with respect, kindness, and empathy.  

Innovation
We maintain an environment of creativity and excellence. We will settle for nothing less. 

Education
We commit to learning, teaching, and mentoring. They permeate all aspects of our practice and contribute to the development and growth of our team members, our clients and our community.

Integrity
We believe that through clear communication, excellent service, and compassionate care we will earn and maintain trust.

Community
We embrace teamwork and camaraderie. They are the foundation for a nurturing environment and enhance the quality of life of our team members, our clients, and our community.

Name: Clinique Equine de Meslay
Description:
La Clinique Equine a été créée au début des années 80 sur la place centrale du village de Meslay-du-Maine. Les fondateurs, les docteurs Geslin & Dutertre, faisaient partie des premiers – et rares – vétérinaires ayant une activité équine exclusive.

L’augmentation du nombre de patients a requis la croissance de vétérinaires au sein de l’établissement et conduit à l’agrandissement et le déménagement nécessaire en 1992. Sur le site de « La Tannerie » ont été bâties les fondations de la clinique actuelle : la technologie de pointe, l’hospitalisation et les chirurgies.

En février 2012, la clinique emménage dans ses locaux actuels pour répondre aux demandes croissantes sur l’hospitalisation et la chirurgie. Situé aux abords de l’hippodrome de Meslay-du-Maine, la clinique équine perpétue les valeurs d’exigence et d’innovations de ses fondateurs.La Clinique Équine de Meslay-du-Maine est située dans un point stratégique du territoire français. La Mayenne se trouve au centre du plus grand vivier de chevaux de tout le territoire français, le Grand Ouest. Terres d’élevage et d’entraînement, tous les départements alentours vivent au rythme des sabots, que les équidés soient des chevaux de course, de sport ou de loisirs, mais aussi des poneys et des ânes.

Chaque année, 110 000 chevaux sont soignés pour le compte de 28 000 clients. Pour réussir cette prouesse, la clinique équine de Meslay-du-Maine peut s’appuyer sur sa formidable équipe. Ce sont 8 associés, 13 vétérinaires salariés, 6 auxiliaires spécialisées vétérinaires (ASV) et 6 secrétaires qui s’épaulent pour prendre soin de vos équidés. Découvrez les membres de la clinique équine de Meslay-du-Maine et pour les vétérinaires, retrouvez leurs formations et les liens vers leurs publications professionnelles.

Name: RG - Genética Avançada
Description:
Situada em Água Boa/MT a RG GENÉTICA AVANÇADA foi fundada em 2006 pelo Médico Veterinário e Pecuarista Renato Girotto e hoje conta com 11 colaboradores, entre veterinários, técnicos e administrativo.
Somos uma empresa de consultoria e gestão reprodutiva que trabalha pelo desenvolvimento da pecuária desde 2006. Atendimento com qualidade, respeito com os nossos clientes e compromisso com resultados nos consolidou como um dos líderes no segmento em Gestão Reprodutiva.
Atuamos nos estados do MT, PA e GO, onde atualmente temos mais de 80 clientes ativos.
Em 2007 a RG GENÉTICA AVANÇADA estabeleceu parceria Prof. Dr. Pietro Sampaio Baruselli (USP-SP) onde em conjunto executamos diversos projetos de pesquisa a campo visando contribuir com o desenvolvimento da pecuária nacional, parceria essa que se estende até os dias de hoje.

Name: Clinique vétérinaire AniCura Vet24
Description:
Située à Marcq en Barœul, à 4 km de Lille, la clinique Vet24 est ouverte 7j/7 et 24h/24. Vet24 regroupe 18 vétérinaires et 23 auxiliaires spécialisées. 
Vet24 reçoit des cas référés en médecine interne, ophtalmologie, chirurgie, imagerie, neurologie, physiothérapie, laser thérapeutique et soins intensifs. Le service d’imagerie est équipé d’un scanner GE Brivo, de deux échographes doppler couleur (Canon Applio, Esaote MyLabClass), d’une radiologie numérique et d’une colonne de vidéoendoscopie (deux gastroscopes, un bronchoscope, un rhinoscope, un arthroscope). Le service de chirurgie est pleinement équipé pour tous types d'interventions : orthopédie, neurochirurgie, coelioscopie, arthroscopie, phacoémulsification, microchirurgie.
N'hésitez pas à nous contacter en visitant le site web de la clinique vétérinaire : www.vet24.fr ou en nous appelant au 03 20 40 90 21.
La clinique vétérinaire Vet24 est un établissement du réseau AniCura, une société du groupe Mars.

Name: Gatton Pet
Description:
Empresa #1 no Brasil em Camas e Prateleiras Suspensas para Gatos. 

Fundada em 2014 por uma Veterinária e um Designer, a Gatton é uma empresa especializada em Mobiliário Felino Indoor com a missão de desenvolver produtos com design único, seguros e práticos. 

Nasceu da paixão por esses seres amáveis que ronronam e pelo sonho em desenvolver produtos que possam integrar ambientes, gatos e tutores. 
Oferecer um ambiente enriquecido que traga aconchego, refúgio e estimule o comportamento natural é essencial aos gatos, pois contribuem para uma melhor saúde física e mental.
 
Temos um rigoroso controle de qualidade, desde a seleção de matéria-prima, testes de produtos, desenvolvimento de embalagem, logística e atendimento ao cliente. Trabalhamos com materiais de alta performance e resistência, o que faz de nossos produtos serem referência em qualidade e segurança. Já são mais de 80 SKUs, todos desenvolvidos e certificados por veterinários.
Todo isso pensado para a melhor experiência do tutor e o seu gato.
São diversas histórias e depoimentos que recebemos de nossos clientes e isso age como combustível para criarmos sempre mais. Por isso para nós, Gatificar não é só transformador, Gatificar é Gratificante!

Name: ReadiVet
Description:

Our veterinarians don’t disrupt the environment where your pet thrives— that means less stress for our patients and for their people.

Name: Den Engelske Dyrlæge
Description:
Referral surgery within your own 4 walls

We believer, that you, as a client, should be able to trust, that advanced operations are carried out be a referral veterinary surgeon who has specialised within and has experience with the specific operation. 
We also believe, that referring vet clinics should be able to be assured, that they can refer their clients without worrying whether the client will move their pets to the referral hospital.

Can we agree on that?

Den Engelske Dyrlæge offers mobile referral surgery, where we carry out advanced operations locally at your own vet clinic. That means that advanced operations are carried out under safe and flexible conditions for both client and vet clinic.
We offer for example orthopaedic procedures for cruciate disease (e.g. TTAs), patella luxation, fractures, ligament ruptures and arthrodesis.
We also carry out soft tissue surgery on for example BOAS, TECA, neuterings, intestinal and urinary problems, skin reconstruktion and oncologic surgeries.
All surgeries are carried out by Damian Strudwick, who has over 10 year of experience in referral surgery both in the UK and Denmark, along with further education in orthopaedics, arthroscopy, neurosurgery, soft tissue surgery and CT-scanning. Damian decided to start his own mobile practice in 2019.
Operations can only be booked through veterinary clinics. Clinics can contact Den Engelske Dyrlæge on info@denengelskedyrlaege.dk.
For further information please also visit www.facebook.com/denengelskedyrlaege

Name: ASOCIACIÓN ESPAÑOLA DE VETERINARIOS MUNICIPALES
Description:
Somos una asociación de profesionales que desarrollamos nuestro trabajo como veterinarios oficiales en las administraciones locales: ayuntamientos, diputaciones y cabildos.
Nuestro trabajo se desarrolla en el ámbito de la SALUD PÚBLICA VETERINARIA donde nos encargamos de la higiene y seguridad alimentaria, el control vectorial (gestión de plagas) y la bioseguridad  de las ciudades, la sanidad y el bienestar animal y las zoonosis.
Organizamos múltiples actividades informativas – formativas en diferentes formatos: seminarios, jornadas, cursos, talleres, etc. Habitualmente abiertos a todos los profesionales, de otras administraciones y de las empresas privadas,  con los cuales tenemos relación en nuestro trabajo y compartimos objetivos de mejorar la sanidad y el bienestar de la población.

Name: Angels of Assisi
Description:
We provide reduced-cost medical care to animals with an emphasis on spaying/neutering to prevent overpopulation. We provide shelter, care, & sustenance to animals in need. Our adoption center is open seven days a week to help connect people with the right pet.
We believe that pets enhance the lives of all people, and we are deeply invested in community outreach.  Our Pets for Life program provides ongoing neighborhood outreach and offers free or very low-cost services, including humane education, spay/neuter surgeries, and wellness care. We strive to keep people with their pets whenever possible. Our Guardian Angel program provides services and support to individuals and families dealing with domestic violence, hospice, and/or homelessness. We provide outreach to local assisted living facilities and partner with Pets for Patriots.
Angels of Assisi seeks to change the traditional definition of an animal shelter by offering services and programs to benefit the community, the people that live there, and the pets they love. We operate the largest private animal shelter in the Roanoke Valley, as well as a low-cost Community Pet Clinic and farm animal sanctuary.

Name: Provet Italia
Description:
Provet Cloud è un software gestionale veterinario facile da usare che aiuta i professionisti veterinari a risparmiare tempo e a concentrarsi su ciò che conta di più: curare i pazienti e far crescere la loro attività.

Provet Cloud è il miglior strumento di gestione veterinaria sul mercato. Il nostro sistema software basato su cloud vi permette di gestire la vostra clinica da qualsiasi luogo e in qualsiasi momento. 

Abbiamo un grande team di professionisti che si dedica a migliorare l'accessibilità, ad ampliare le funzioni, a migliorare le statistiche e a curare i piccoli dettagli e che vi fanno lavorare con il supporto tecnico e il software più aggiornato che voi e i vostri clienti meritate.

Migliora l'assistenza ai pazienti con una cartella clinica digitalizzata da condividere con il resto del team. Risparmia tempo organizzando i programmi delle visite o delle operazioni, programmando gli appuntamenti o persino automatizzando i promemoria per i clienti, in modo che nessuno dimentichi le vaccinazioni annuali. La sua configurazione personalizzabile ci permette di adattarci a cliniche grandi e piccole, università e ospedali veterinari.

Se non fai ancora parte della nostra grande comunità di oltre 13.000 professionisti e più di 2.300 cliniche e ospedali che si avvalgono del nostro software, chiedi un appuntamento per una demo personalizzata.
Provet Cloud è un servizio cloud, quindi è accessibile ovunque da qualsiasi dispositivo connesso a Internet, dal lavoro o dal tavolo della cucina.

Name: Monroe Veterinary Associates
Description:
Since its inception in 1969, Monroe Veterinary Associates (MVA) has been delivering high quality pet care with friendly professionalism and the utmost respect for the human–animal bond. Founded by Dr. Jack Bloch, MVA originated at the Animal Hospital of Pittsford and has since expanded its reach to include one 24-hour emergency and specialty hospital and 15 general practices (including one low-cost animal clinic serving income-qualified patients) spread across the greater Rochester, New York area. Kindly welcoming dogs, cats, and exotic animals, we collectively offer advanced full-service veterinary care for all ages, ranging from puppies and kittens to adults and seniors.

Check out our job page to see all current openings: http://www.monroevets.com/join-our-team/

Name: Pittsburgh Veterinary Specialty and Emergency Center
Description: Pittsburgh Veterinary Specialty & Emergency Center's (PVSEC) opened its doors to patients on June 2, 2008. The state-of-the-art facility is the most comprehensive multi-specialty veterinary hospital in the Western Pennsylvania area also saw a 4500 square foot expansion in June 2014. It features the modern facilities and equipment necessary to offer the best care for our clients' pets. Our 34,795 square-foot multi-specialty veterinary center contains a variety of specialized areas to accommodate pets' needs.

Name: Las Vegas Veterinary Specialty Center
Description:
The Las Vegas Veterinary Specialty Center is a specialty practice comprised of dedicated, board certified and residency trained doctors, licensed veterinary technicians, and support teams who are highly trained in cardiology, internal medicine, oncology, ophthalmology, surgery, and physical rehabilitation.

We are a resource to general practice veterinarians and their clients when patients need a specialty consultation, procedure, and/or a second opinion. We provide thorough examinations, advanced diagnostic testing and treatment in our 20,000 square foot, well-equipped, state-of-the-art hospital. 

We have the dedicated staff and meticulously designed hospital needed to provide excellent care; including several fully equipped surgical suites, a dedicated post operative recovery room, a dedicated intensive care unit, diagnostic and therapeutic ultrasound, telemetry, oxygen therapy, private consultation and visitation rooms, and kennels and runs to comfortably house all size pets. We offer 24 hour care by doctors and technicians for all patients to give pet owners peace of mind.

We believe in setting the standard of excellence in veterinary specialty care, so you will find that we provide rapid access to a range of advanced and in-depth diagnostic testing, treatment, and medical and surgical services for our community. On-site Computed Tomography (CT – Cat Scan) and Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) enhance our ability to perform neurodiagnostics, neurosurgery, cancer staging, and a variety of other diagnostic and surgical procedures. Our digital radiography system ensures files can be easily shared online or via email with referring veterinarians, and our underwater treadmill and resistance pool offer the best standard of care in physical rehabilitation.

Name: Cães & Gatos Centro Veterinário
Description:
Cuidar dos animais é nosso objetivo. Por isso, contamos com profissionais que amam o que fazem e se dedicam pela saúde e bem-estar de nossos cães e gatos. O Centro Veterinário Cães & Gatos está sempre preparado para emergências e consultas específicas, sendo equipado com tecnologia avançada em diagnóstico e tratamento. A infraestrutura se completa com espaços amplos para hospedagem e variedade de produtos em nossa farmácia veterinária. Com muito amor e dedicação, o Cães & Gatos está sempre ao seu lado, acompanhando o desenvolvimento do seu animal. 

Missão:
Proporcionar bem-estar e melhora na qualidade de vida dos cães, gatos e seus proprietários, oferecendo os melhores serviços veterinários com o nosso mais precioso instrumento de trabalho: o amor.

Visão:
Ser referência no mercado onde atuarmos pelo pioneirismo, excelência na qualidade do atendimento e respeito aos proprietários, com dedicação integral aos animais.

Valores:
• Excelência – busca contínua pela melhoria.
• Amor – incondicional aos animais.
• Integridade – atuar com honestidade e ética.
• Respeito – aos animais, proprietários, colaboradores e fornecedores.
• Espírito empreendedor – colaboradores inovadores, determinados e com alta capacidade de realização.

Name: World Veterinary Association Congress
Description: The World Veterinary Congress provides a unique opportunity for veterinarians in all branches of the profession globally to come together and explore.
