Name: Colegio Oficial de Veterinarios de Granada
Description:
El Ilustre Colegio Oficial de Veterinarios de Granada agrupa a todos los Licenciados en Veterinaria que realizan sus tareas profesionales en el ámbito de la provincia.

Tiene como objetivos principales la ordenación de la profesión, la salvaguarda de los principios deontológico, la mejora del nivel científico de sus miembros y la colaboración con otros organismos y administraciones en la consecución de la salud de las personas y los animales, la mejora de la ganadería, la atención al medio ambiente y la defensa de los consumidores.

El Colegio es una Corporación de Derecho Público constituida y regida según lo dispuesto en el artículo 36 de la Constitución Española , la Ley 2/ 74 de 13 de febrero, de Colegios Profesionales, así como la normativa autonómica aplicable. Su estructura y funcionamiento son democráticos, tienen carácter representativo y personalidad jurídica propia, independiente de la Administración Estatal , Autonómica y Local, de las que no forma parte integrante, sin perjuicio de las relaciones de derecho público que con ellas legalmente le correspondan.

El Colegio de Veterinarios de Granada se rige, asimismo, por los Estatutos Generales de la Organización Colegial Veterinaria Española, aprobados por Real Decreto 1840/2000, de 10 de noviembre, publicados en el Boletín Oficial del Estado número 289, de 2 de diciembre de 2000.

Name: International Partnership for Dogs (IPFD)
Description:
The International Partnership for Dogs (IPFD), legally registered in Sweden, is a non-profit organization whose mission is to facilitate collaboration and sharing of resources to enhance the health, well-being, and welfare of pedigreed dogs and all dogs worldwide. 

The issues of dog health, well-being, and welfare are extremely complex and extend across international borders to include organizations and individuals from numerous jurisdictions, sectors, and disciplines. A coordinating mechanism is essential to bringing these stakeholders together, harnessing their strengths, and facilitating collaboration among them.

The IPFD and our internet platform DogWellNet.com came into being following a long history of efforts to address dog health and well-being by many stakeholders. The organization was founded with an intent to provide information and support to the global dog community – not to limit access to the members/populations of our Partners.

We are truly a "people driven" service organization. We allocate the bulk of our financial resources to maintain a small but dedicated team to manage our modest resources and facilitate the activities of our dedicated volunteers and other stakeholders – with the aim of achieving our collective goals.

Learn more about IPFD here: https://dogwellnet.com/content/ipfd/about-us/an-overview-of-the-international-partnership-for-dogs-ipfd-r156/

Name: Veterinet
Description:
Wij zijn Veterinet. Een organisatie die zich ten doel stelt dierenklinieken samen te brengen. Bij ons blijf je mede-eigenaar van je praktijk en zodoende ook in controle, maar wel met de voordelen van het netwerk.

Samen en individueel bouwen we aan ons gemeenschappelijke doel: De juiste zorg voor dieren.

Wij ondersteunen het netwerk van dierenklinieken op maat in zaken als inkoop, hr en
boekhouding. De kliniek kan zich zo vanuit een gezond werkklimaat en met focus op haar hoofdtaken richten.

Bent u ondernemer op veterinair gebied en spreekt ons verhaal u aan? Neem dan contact op met:

Rogier de Wind
0624838133
rdw@veterinet.nl
www.veterinet.nl

Veterinet - De juiste zorg, met ondersteuning op maat.

Name: Tierärztliche Klinik Gessertshausen
Description:
Alles begann mit der Gemischtpraxis für Kleintiere und Nutztiere von Dr. Josef Erben: Die im Jahr 1956 gegründete Tierarztpraxis wurde 1987 mit dem Klinikneubau in Gessertshausen zum heutigen Umfang ausgebaut. Im Jahr 2018 folgte zudem der Zusammenschluss mit der Altano Gruppe. Seither sind wir unter dem Namen Tierärztliche Klinik Gessertshausen bekannt und somit Teil des Altano-Netzwerks. Das ermöglicht Ihnen immer die bestmögliche medizinische Versorgung Ihres Tieres.

Gesunde Tiere sind glückliche Tiere! Deswegen haben wir es uns zur Aufgabe gemacht, für das Wohlergehen von Kleintieren und Exoten sowie Pferden und Rindern zu sorgen. Unser Team aus über 70 spezialisierten Tierärzten deckt ein breites Leistungsspektrum ab. Von der Internistik und Orthopädie über die Chirurgie und Kardiologie bis hin zu Zahn- und Augenheilkunde: Wir untersuchen und behandeln Ihren Vierbeiner nach höchsten medizinischen Standards. Denn Gesundheit ist auch für Tiere das höchste Gut.

Instagram: tierklinikgessertshausen
https://www.instagram.com/tierklinikgessertshausen/

Facebook: Tierklinik Gessertshausen
https://www.facebook.com/tierklinikgessertshausenaltano

Name: Study Association Archaeopteryx
Description:
Archaeopteryx is a study association about birds and exotic animals. It is based at the faculty of Veterinary Medicine in Utrecht, the Netherlands. For almost 35 years, we have been organizing various activities regarding all aspects of exotic animals. These activities are mainly organized by 5 different working groups: wildlife, terrarium, birds, aquafauna and KKF (Dutch for rabbits, rodents and ferrets). By now Archaeopteryx has grown to an association with almost 1300 members consisting of veterinarians, veterinary students and other interested parties. 

We are always looking for enthusiastic speakers or good ideas to organize activities in our course. Do you have a good tip or a fun idea? Don't hesitate to send us a message!

Name: Manly Road 24hr Veterinary Hospital
Description: Manly Road 24hr Veterinary Hospital has been the primary 24hr Veterinary Hospital for the beloved pets of Manly, Wynnum and the greater Brisbane area for over 40 years. Our beautiful Hospital was built to the specificitations of Dr Christine Kidd & Dr Pauline Gaven down to the last detail. MRVH now has a wonderful, caring team of more than 100 Veterinary & Support professionals.

Name: Farmanimal Vet Arg
Description:
Comenzamos con la actividad como laboratorio en productos Veterinarios en 1990, siendo los pioneros en el desarrollo y promoción de la utilización de GLICOSAMINOGLICANOS (Acido Hialuronico y Condroitin Sulfato) en medicina veterinaria en Argentina.
Desde entonces, cumpliendo con un estricto control de calidad de sus productos, en un todo de acuerdo con las normas internacionales vigentes para la elaboración de específicos veterinarios, hemos continuado la expansión de productos hacia diferentes mercados del exterior del país, fundamentalmente en Latinoamérica, Union Europea y Medio Oriente. Siendo especialmente destacable la gran aceptación de nuestros productos en el exigente mercado de Equinos de deporte a nivel Internacional.

Name: IVSA Standing Committee on Career Attributes - SCOCA
Description: The Standing Committee on Career Attributes (SCOCA) was founded in July 2019 working to improve the professionalism and soft skills of International Veterinary Students Association (IVSA) members around the world and provide structure to the previously established IVSA Trainer’s Network. SCOCA aims to complement veterinary education with opportunities to improve career attributes to allow for a successful future career in veterinary medicine.

Name: Swift Referrals
Description: Swift Referrals is a specialist veterinary referral center based on Thorp Arch Estate & Retail Park, Unit 706 Ave E W, Wetherby, United Kingdom.

Name: Expert Pet Nutrition
Description:
Expert Pet Nutrition is a recent advisory and support service born with the aim of helping pet care professionals in their daily work offering solutions to pet nutrition issues at different levels.
We are an association of pet nutrition experts with 10 years’ experience. Our main expertise is clinical nutrition consulting to veterinarians and pet care professionals and scientific consulting and advice to pet care companies. 

Our main activities enclose
	Nutritional support advice for clinicians 
o	Recommendation of the most adequate commercial diet(s) and management for specific patients
o	Formulation of adequate complete and balanced homemade diets for specific patients
o	Protocol and follow up for nutritional support in hospitalized patients 
o	Protocol and follow up for overweight and obesity treatments
Scientific and technical advice for pet care professionals
o	Advice on product development
o	Scientific support on pet food products development, evaluation and commercialization
o	Development of scientific and technical materials about pet food
o	In-service training for pet care professionals in the pet nutrition field
o	Advice and support of scientific research protocols in the pet nutrition field
Seminars and conferences in the field of clinical nutrition 


If you need more information do not hesitate to contact us, we will be glad to answer any questions.

Name: My Pet's Vet Group
Description: My Pet's Vet is a small but expanding group practice with nine locations: Mason, Eastgate (Cincinnati); San Antonio/Wilderness Oaks (TX); Buford and Kennesaw (GA), Florence, KY; Summerville, SC.  Our culture of "Do the right thing the right way" connects us to our mission of "healthy pets and happy pet-parents" and fuels a pleasant work environment where staff members respect each other and are rewarded for achievement.

Name: Pawmetto Lifeline
Description: Pawmetto Lifeline is a 501(c)3 not-for-profit animal rescue organization located in Columbia, SC, solving pet overpopulation in the Midlands with the overarching goal to establish a no-kill community in the Midlands, meaning no healthy, adoptable dog or cat dies because it is homeless. Pawmetto Lifeline uses research proven programs implemented into a strategic plan to end pet overpopulation in the Midlands through education, legislation, spay/neuter programs and responsible pet adoptions.

Name: Wagg
Description: En Wagg Vets, nos dedicamos a redefinir la asistencia veterinaria con un enfoque preventivo y atención personalizada 24/7 para tus clientes, los padres de mascotas.

Name: ANIDEV
Description: ANIDEV is a company based out of 14 RUE SCANDICCI, Pantin, Île-de-france, France, specialized in animal health.

Name: VetGuide Medicina Veterinária
Description:
O melhor guia de condutas médicas veterinárias para você.

A gente sabe que tempo é o seu bem mais precioso. Por isso queremos descomplicar seu dia-a-dia através de conteúdos simplificados, precisos e de alta qualidade.
Tenha mais agilidade consultando o VetGuide: abra o app, busque o conteúdo e tenha a resposta que precisa. Fácil e rápido.

Name: Wildlife Vets Namibia
Description:
Wildlife Vets Namibia is the company of wildlife veterinarian Ulf Tubbesing. Our team has got many years of experience in the wildlife field, and work with all sorts of wildlife species, from antelope to rhinos and elephants, to carnivores. We can you offer a wide variety of wildlife veterinary services, e.g. dart immobilization, (dart) vaccination, treating sick and injured animals, preventative medicine, post mortem research etc. We can assist you in all your questions concerning game and veld management. 

Our services are honed for Namibian and foreign game farmers, as well as organisations involved with wildlife and conservation. We seek to build lasting and mutually beneficial partnerships with our clients by providing exceptional customer service and education. With a registered wildlife vet and a registered wildlife para-professional in the team we are able to optimize the services rendered to our clients as well as the care and treatment of our patients. As a team we are able to complete even big jobs quickly and efficiently, which minimizes both the disruption game work may have on the normal running of your farm as well as helicopter costs for the jobs done. Needless to say, this also reduces the stress to both you and your animals with the risk of mortalities being dramatically cut. Our work is conducted based on current best veterinary practice with the highest ethical standards. We strictly comply with laws and regulations, and take our environmental responsibilities serious.

Via the company Super Game Dealers, in which Ulf is the co-owner, we can help you with all sorts of game translocations, within Namibia or abroad. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us.

Visit our website www.wildlifevetsnamibia.com for more information, and like us on Facebook to receive updates on our work. If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us!

Name: SynergyVet
Description:
SynergyVet was born from the belief that veterinarian-owned community-based practices provide the best our profession offers. From patient care to client experience to team health, we desire to change the direction veterinary medicine is going. 

Our Mission is to provide true ownership opportunities for entrepreneurial veterinarians in community-based practices. We provide support in all aspects of creating and building a successful practice, including: leadership, mentoring, human resources, marketing, finance, management, and development.

Name: Harvest Veterinary Oncology Centre
Description:
In HVOC, we have a group of dedicated, experienced and enthusiastic professionals consisting of Veterinary Oncologists, Veterinary Surgeons, Medical Physicists, Radiation Therapists, Nurses and Administrative staff across different specialties. We are committed to providing comprehensive services with state-of-the-art technologies and personalised care for our patients. We also provide a spacious, modern and comfortable environment to ensure a relaxed visit for them.

HVOC is an oncology hospital providing comprehensive cancer treatments including surgery, radiation therapy and medical therapy for pets. Instead of running through different veterinary specialists, patients receive holistic treatment in our centre with an all-inclusive setting. HVOC is equipped with a Linear Accelerator (Linac) for radiotherapy, a Positron Emission Tomography – Computed Tomography (PET-CT) scanner and a 1.5T Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) scanner for medical imaging. Our cutting-edge medical imaging and therapeutic equipment combined with specialist expertise provide patients with different diagnostic and treatment options.

Name: The Net Vet
Description:
Connecting our vets with your pets. Anytime, anywhere.

Unlimited instant real time text, picture and video consults with UK registered vets for £10 per month.

Discover the convenience and peace of mind with The Net Vet’s text and video consultations. Say goodbye to stressful vet visits and hello to instant access to qualified advice. You can efficiently address your pet’s health concerns from the comfort of your home, on a walk or whilst on holiday. Trust in our experienced veterinarians to provide quick, efficient, and expert guidance, ensuring your furry friend receives the care they deserve, whenever they need it.

Name: PuppyClassBrasil
Description:
O Projeto Puppy Class Brasil têm 3 objetivos principais, que são: 
1- Preparar Médicos Veterinários, Zootecnistas, Biológos, Adestradores, Day Cares, Clínicas e Hospitais, Veterinários à preparar filhotes de cães para o mundo, através de uma metodologia exclusiva. 

2- Difundir e popularizar as Puppy Class pelo Brasil, a fim de melhorar a sociabilidade desses filhotes, garantindo as 5 liberdades, as 5 necessidades básicas de um cachorro e principalmente tornar esse filhote em um cão adulto equilibrado, confiante e educado.

3- e tão importante quanto os outros, educar os futuros tutores de cães a respeito de diversos assuntos do mundo canino, como a aprendizagem, comunicação e necessidades básicas. 

Guia Prático - Como preparar seu filhote para o mundo - https://www.hotmart.com/product/prepare-seu-filhote-para-o-mundo/I56836057Y

Name: Sea Change Health
Description:
We believe that a healthy world benefits us all. 

The mission of Sea Change Health is to massively shift our understanding and cultivation of health, for all those who rely on the sea. 

We achieve this mission through three areas of focus:

Marine Mammal Health: Innovating marine mammal veterinary care, through support of the aquatics practitioner.

Human Health: Focused on safeguarding the health of those that dedicate their lives to healing others. 

Conservation Health: Maximizing the impact of conservation work by prioritizing the health of the whole.

Name: Congresso Hospital Veterinário Montenegro
Description:
O Hospital Veterinário Montenegro, fundado em 1999, orgulha-se de prestar um serviço completo 24 horas por dia, com médicos veterinários em permanência nas suas instalações, possuindo equipamento médico de ponta e destacando-se por possuir uma equipa jovem motivada e pronta a abdicar da sua vida pessoal em prol de um serviço cuidado e completo. O objectivo, desde a fundação, consiste numa formação permanente (procurando sempre fazer melhor.) Os clínicos residentes apresentam-se divididos em áreas de interesse, por forma a podermos intervencionar em áreas que vão desde a oftalmologia aos cuidados intensivos.

O maior congresso português de veterinária debate pela primeira vez os desafios de gestão das empresas do sector. O organizador aponta essas singularidades e por que não basta saberem tratar de cães e gatos.

Normalmente é por amor à camisola, dizem. Mas aqui, no projeto Montenegro, em rigor é mais por amor ao diagnóstico. O Hospital Referência Veterinária Montenegro tem vindo a investir em equipamentos que só fazem sentido quando servem não só os pacientes deste projeto, mas toda uma comunidade de veterinários. E é isso que tem vindo a acontecer.

O tema escolhido para a 15ª edição do congresso que terá lugar no Europarque, em Santa Maria da Feira, é “Dermatologia”.

Name: Veterinary Pathology Services
Description:
VetPath provides diagnostic services in histopathology, cytology and necropsies. We have over 25 years of experience in serving the veterinary industry, providing the most accurate results and fastest turnaround time at the most competitive rates in the industry.

We offer:

Concise and dependable results
Complimentary nationwide overnight shipping via FedEx
Competitive pricing
Private consultation
Complimentary supplies
Fast turnaround time
At Veterinary Pathology Services, we take pride in delivering a personal customer service experience unmatched by larger corporate labs in the industry. Please contact us today for a complementary startup kit.

Name: frank. Pet Surgeons
Description:
We are called frank, because that's what we are. Our business is underpinned by truly open, honest, active communication, and that is how we provide the best possible experience for referring vets, pets and owners
Our hospitals deliver the most advanced small animal surgical facilities in the North of England, where we provide a wide range of innovative surgical procedures, backed up by the very best pre and post operative care. We believe that specialist care should be accessible, and have a transparent pricing structure that makes our services  more affordable for pet owners, backed up by a unique “Surgical Complications Guarantee*” that covers any complications arising from surgery within 6 months of the procedure.  
Our specialist surgical teams are up to date with the latest surgical techniques, and routinely carry out highly complex surgeries, enabling us to confidently take on the most challenging cases.

Name: Dublin Bay Vets
Description: The best in veterinary care, delivered with the best client communication

Name: Petpack
Description:
We are the experts in online marketing and communications for vets.

We empower people to improve their animals’ health through effective communications and improved connection with local vets

Our veterinary marketing services help hundreds of practices across Australia and New Zealand attract more clients, save time, engage with their communities and generate improved animal health care outcomes. We specialise in partnering with practice owners and managers to create long-term value and grow their businesses.

Name: Enpav - Ente Nazionale di Previdenza e Assistenza Veterinari
Description:
L'Enpav, nato nel 1958 come ente esclusivamente assistenziale, si è successivamente trasformato in Ente erogatore anche di trattamenti pensionistici in favore degli iscritti e dei superstiti del veterinario, oltre che di una serie di servizi per il welfare.

L'Enpav eroga pensioni di vecchiaia, invalidità, inabilità e pensioni ai superstiti. L'iscritto può inoltre aderire alla Pensione Modulare versando facoltativamente un'aliquota variabile tra il 2% ed il 14% del proprio reddito professionale. L'Ente eroga prestiti, indennità di maternità, provvidenze straordinarie in caso di bisogno, borse di studio e offre una polizza assicurativa sanitaria. Nell'intento di rafforzare i servizi agli iscritti, nel 2014, l'Enpav ha introdotto i sussidi a sostegno della genitorialità per favorire il rientro al lavoro della professionista dopo la maternità e ha aderito a Confidi per agevolare l'accesso al credito. 

Per i giovani vi sono facilitazioni per la concessione dei prestiti ed il pagamento dei contributi.

Name: Horse Center Laboratório e Clínica Veterinária
Description: Fundada em 1991, pelo Médico Veterinário Dr. Carlos Eduardo Martins de Oliveira Veiga, a Clínica Horse Center é um estabelecimento bem conceituado no tratamento de cavalos de todas as raças e modalidades. Sendo conhecida e respeitada dentro da Indústria do Cavalo por sua competência e inovações na reabilitação equina, graças a seus profissionais extremamente capacitados e dedicados, além de uma infra-estrutura altamente preparada e equipada para atender qualquer necessidade clínica ou cirúrgica. Nossa equipe é composta por um cirurgião, dois residentes, um enfermeiro e estagiários, além da nossa equipe de escritório, laboratorista e cavalariços.

Name: Clinica Veterinaria San Petronio
Description:
La Clinica Veterinaria San Petronio, nasce dalla passione di tre veterinari con oltre 15 anni di esperienza, ognuno in diverse discipline: Anestesiologia, Medicina Interna, Pronto Soccorso e Terapia Intensiva. Il nostro obiettivo è creare una struttura moderna, che porti nuovamente al centro il paziente, inteso come essere vivente e parte integrante della famiglia e che sia attrezzata a tutte le emergenze veterinarie.
La Clinica Veterinaria San Petronio si trova a Castel Maggiore, a 3 Km da Bologna città.
E’ facilmente raggiungibile dall’uscita 5 della tangenziale di Bologna, dall’uscita Bologna-Interporto dell’A13/ SP3 (Trasversale di Pianura) e dall’SP 87 (Nuova Galliera).
La struttura è immersa in una vasta area di verde pubblico ed è presente, antistante alla clinica, un comodo e ampio parcheggio gratuito.
Gli spazi interni della struttura sono stati pensati secondo standard moderni, che prevedono diverse esigenze fra la specie canina e felina (sale d’attesa, sale visita, ricoveri).
L’area di degenza, frutto dell’esperienza sul campo maturata in tanti anni di professione, si sviluppa su una superficie di 60 mq ed è stata progettata nel minimo dettaglio per garantire massimo comfort ai nostri pazienti. Il nostro scopo è di ottimizzare il rapporto tra degente e medico, riducendo notevolmente lo stress legato all’ospedalizzazione e favorendo la massima efficacia dei protocolli diagnostici e terapeutici.
Particolare attenzione è stata posta nella messa in opera dell’AREA CRITICA (una vera e propria terapia intensiva per animali), cuore pulsante del nostro progetto.

Name: Veteralia, S.L.
Description:
El nostre objectiu és desenvolupar el negoci de les Clíniques Veterinàries, millorant la seva gestió integral, incorporant noves oportunitats de negoci i enfortint tant la seva imatge com la seva presència en el mercat, amb un criteri de rendibilitat que generi majors beneficis per a les clíniques associades.

Donem suport als gerents de la Clínica en qualsevol aspecte que pugui necessitar; no només en la compra de productes sinó també en la intermediació de serveis, en la gestió del centre, en els articles amb marca pròpia, en els cursos de formació i en millorar la relació amb els clients.

------------------

Nuestro objetivo es desarrollar el negocio de las Clínicas Veterinarias, mejorando su gestión integral, incorporando nuevas oportunidades de negocio y fortaleciendo tanto su imagen como su presencia en el mercado, con un criterio de rentabilidad que genere mayor beneficio a las clínicas asociadas.

Damos apoyo a l@s gerentes de la Clínica en cualquier aspecto que puedan necesitar; no sólo en la compra de productos sino también en la intermediación de servicios, en la gestión del centro, en los artículos de marca propia, en los cursos de formación y en mejorar la relación con los clientes.

Name: East Neuk Veterinary Clinic
Description: East Neuk Veterinary Clinic is a modern, state-of-the-art Veterinary Surgery that offers unparalleled veterinary care and treatment. We provide veterinary services for animals in the local East Neuk of Fife area and also specialist treatment for cats and dogs with orthopaedic and spinal problems referred from other veterinary practices throughout Scotland.

Name: Maine Veterinary Medical Center
Description: Dedicated to providing advanced, compassionate care for pets while supporting their owners and building trusted, professional relationships with referring veterinarians. With a team of over 20 board-certified specialists, MVMC offers a comprehensive range of services to meet all your pet’s medical needs.

Name: Manor Vets
Description:
We look after animals as if they were our own...

Our practice is based on mutual trust and respect, offering support, compassion and genuine care, and involving you in all decisions about your pet. Our team can advise you how to keep your pet as healthy as possible, using safe and effective preventative medicines.

 All our surgeries are air conditioned, and we regularly invest in the very best modern veterinary diagnostic instruments, x-ray, laboratory, anaesthetic and surgical equipment. This means your pet will receive the best possible care and treatment.

There are seventeen full time and three part time veterinary surgeons across our four sites. They share their vast knowledge of the latest treatments through frequent meetings. We also have consulting veterinary nurses at all sites. And from February 2012 we are open 24 hours at our Halesowen site. Our own vets and nurses work through the night looking after our hospital patients as well as dealing with urgent cases and surgical emergencies that might arise.

Leading Midlands Veterinary Practice...

In short, we have superb levels of equipment, facilities and veterinary knowledge,  so that we are considered one of the leading first opinion practices in the Midlands. Manor Vets has been approved as a centre for the training of veterinary nurses and is an RCVS accredited practice.

    * All our vets are fully qualified and RCVS registered.
    * We guarantee you can see a vet today if you need one
    * In house specialists in many disciplines
    * 24 hour service 365 days a year with vets and nurses on site round the clock

Name: East End Vets
Description:
In founding East End Vets, Dr. Lara and Dr. Matt's vision was simple yet profound: to create a clinic where every pet and their family feels valued, heard, and cared for, from the moment they walk through our doors.

What sets us apart is our unwavering commitment to personalized care and attention. We understand that every pet is unique, with their own set of needs, quirks, and personality traits. That's why we take the time to get to know you and your pet on a deeper level, forging lasting connections built on trust, compassion, and respect.

Whether it's a routine wellness check-up, a complex medical case, or anything in between, you can trust that your furry friend is in the best hands possible with our experienced team. With years of expertise under our belts, we're equipped to handle any situation with skill, precision, and a whole lot of heart.

But our dedication to your pet's well-being doesn't stop there. We're here to support you every step of the way, providing guidance, education, and reassurance to help you make the best decisions for your pet's health and happiness. Because at East End Vets, we're not just your pet's caregivers; we're your partners in their journey to a long, happy, and healthy life.

Name: Ana Margarida Pereira - Equine Veterinary Services
Description: Ambulatory Equine Veterinary Services

Name: The Veterinary Company Limited
Description:
At The Veterinary Company Ltd, we pride ourselves on being able to offer the very best quality products at the fairest of prices. 

Our aim is to become the preferred supplier and trusted business partner of major distributors and veterinary professionals around the world. By working with our partners on a one-to-one basis, we are able to offer a personal service that is second to none. Our mission is to produce and distribute products that improve animal well-being and assist those specialists in the veterinary field to deliver first class care at reasonable cost. 

The method we use to bring top quality products to the veterinary market enables us to maximize our manufacturing efficiencies and pass the savings directly onto our customers. We firmly believe that this ethic forms the cornerstone of mutuality in any business relationship. 

The Veterinary Company’s unerring focus on customer satisfaction and efficient manufacture enable us to offer top quality products at exceptional value. By maximising our efficiencies to achieve low costs and, by keeping our aims high, we strive to make doing business with The Veterinary Company Ltd the natural choice. Rapidly responsive to our customer’s requirements and innovative in our approach to manufacture singles us out as a business partner on whom you can rely.

Name: EAVDI-BID
Description:
The European Association of Veterinary Diagnostic Imaging is a non profit organisation which encompasses all aspects of diagnostic imaging, including radiography, ultrasonography, CT, MRI and nuclear medicine.

Join us today! Ordinary membership of the Association is open to members of the veterinary and medical professions and to other suitably qualified workers who are interested in the aims of the Association. https://www.eavdi.org/become-a-member

Enjoy access to the private areas of the EAVDI web site: access all EVDI meeting abstracts, communicate with any other members across Europe and the rest of the World and participate/create forums/discussions, be part of the mailing list to get the latest news, job postings etc.

Name: RUMA Companion Animal and  Equine
Description:
Inspired by the success of the UK farm animal sector in reducing antibiotic use during the past five years, the RUMA Companion Animal and Equine Alliance (RUMA CA&E) will draw on those learnings to help protect important medicines for future human and animal use.
RUMA CA&E  will cover the responsible use of medicines in dogs, cats, rabbits, small mammals, exotic animals kept as pets, and equids. The aim is for the UK to lead the way in these sectors through evidence-based and measurable activities that will promote and enhance stewardship.

Name: VetQuip
Description: VetQuip supplies the Australian veterinary industry with quality equipment and instruments, services and repairs.

Name: Dinovite
Description:
Is your pet itching, scratching, shedding, stinking? Tired of spending on things that just don't work? You’ve come to the right place!

We are the manufacturer and online retailer of the world's finest nutritional supplements, all natural shampoos and treats for dogs and cats.

Pet foods today are lacking what dogs and cats need to properly digest and absorb what nutrition there is in the food you feed.

Dinovite supplements are loaded with delicate nutrients, digestive enzymes and other good bacteria that's destroyed in the extreme heat and pressure used in the manufacturing process of pet foods.

Name: Antrozoología
Description:
¿Para qué sirve la antroozoologia?
La Antrozoología es la ciencia que estudia cómo los seres humanos nos relacionamos con el resto de especies animales”. No solo se trata de etología o educación canina, es decir, de modificar la conducta de perros y gatos con problemas de convivencia en sus familias humanas. 
Ya qu además se considera una ciencia multidisciplinar, al beber de otras muchas disciplinas para poder aglutinar el conocimiento de todas ellas y así poder entender mejor cómo interactuamos con el resto de animales. Especialmente, la antrozoología se nutre de la psicología social, la biología, la antropología, la medicina, la veterinaria, y la etología, entre otras materias.

Name: Rebecca Rose Coaching, LLC
Description: Welcome to Rebecca Rose Coaching, LLC.

Name: SOPRO - Distribuição Farmacêutica, Lda
Description:
A SOPRO é um Distribuidor por Grosso de Medicamentos Veterinários e Produtos Fitofarmacêuticos, reconhecido como um dos principais operadores no mercado nacional. 
Fundada em 1999, a empresa conta com 20 colaboradores, incluído uma equipa técnica e comercial especializada no apoio ao cliente.
A SOPRO tem duas plataformas logísticas localizadas em Vila Nova de Famalicão e Évora, distribuindo diariamente cerca de 6000 referências por todo o território nacional. 
Aposta na capacidade de se distinguir pela qualidade do serviço e capacidade logística.

Name: Intracare Italy
Description:
Intracare Italy ha sede a Sarcedo (Vicenza), ma opera in tutte le regioni italiane. Siamo un'azienda giovane e dinamica composta da professionisti del settore. 

La nostra forza è la costante ricerca di soluzioni in grado di risolvere i bisogni dei clienti. Proponiamo infatti prodotti veterinari antibiotic-free non classificati come farmaci, innovativi, sostenibili, sicuri ed economicamente vantaggiosi.

Name: Apex Vets
Description:
Apex Vets is an independently-owned specialty veterinary hospital in Silver Spring, MD. We believe in Care, Collaboration, Continuous Improvement, and Collective Responsibility. Our philosophy revolves around supporting and empowering our team so they can best treat our patients. 

www.apex.vet

Name: Patch Ventures - Software and Analytics
Description:
Patch is on a mission to transform the Veterinary Industry with end to end data insights and AI empowered workflows. 

Siloed, Inefficient. Fragmented. Outdated. Untapped. We're fixing data in the Vet space.

Name: IVSA Wild and Exotic Animals Community
Description: IVSA Wild and Exotic Animal Community welcome you, to join us on our new journey to explore the vast expanse of Wild and Exotic Animal Veterinary Medicine! We are delighted to finally present a community under IVSA SCoVE, fully committed to expanding the connections and interests of students interested in Wild and Exotic Animal Medicine with the help of our gracious partners and of course... you!

Name: Heartland Veterinary Supply & Pharmacy
Description:
Heartland Vet Supply & Pharmacy is a Veterinary-Verified Internet Pharmacy Practice Sites (Vet-VIPPS) accredited online pharmacy located in Hastings, Nebraska, USA.  We have been in business since 1981 as a functioning veterinary clinic involved with the diagnosis and treatment of health problems in the equine, canine, and feline species. We are America's horse, dog and cat discount supply headquarters and award winning discount cataloger. 

For the Horseman, we have a complete line of animal health care products for your horses, mules or donkeys. Our canine products include heartworm prevention, flea control, medications for skin infections, smelly ears, ear infections, and hot spots as well as antibiotics for other infections. For the cats in your life, our pet supply store carries the necessary pet supplies and information for cat vaccine, feline vaccination charts, discounted supplements and supplies for hairballs, discounted vitamins and feline flea prevention. We have all the pet products and supplies needed to aid you in preventive care for your pets.

We have made a reputation for responding to your needs as a horse and/or pet owner. We offer a complete line of discount horse supplies and products as well as discount pet products and supplies to ensure the health & longevity of your horse and pets. For general information about products or ordering, contact customerservice@heartlandvetsupply.com or phone us at 800-934-9398.

Name: The Pet Hospitals
Description:
At The Pet Hospitals, we know your pets are a part of your family — and when you come to us, they become a part of ours. We offer full-service veterinary care, top-quality boarding and grooming, and a staff committed to providing the highest quality care at affordable, competitive prices.

You’ll find excellence in wellness exams, dental care, surgical services, and vaccinations provided by a compassionate staff at any of our locations: Collierville on Byhalia Road, Germantown on Wolf River Blvd, Lakeland on Canada Rd, East Memphis at Poplar and Massey, Cordova at Houston Levee and Macon, Downtown on Jefferson Ave, and Midtown on Union Ext.

Specialty services include affordable vaccination packages for puppies, kittens, dogs, and cats. In addition, complete patient records are digital and on-site at all locations for your convenience.

Name: Interpharma Co.
Description: We are working in importation and sale of human and veterinary products as we are considered one of the pioneer companies in the Egyptian Market

Name: O'Brien Veterinary Group OVG
Description:
OVG is an independent, family-run veterinary group with a
heritage of providing customized operational support to a diverse
collection of practices and fostering a growth culture where skilled
professionals can practice exceptional veterinary medicine.

Name: Pezz life
Description:
Our mission at PEZZ is to enable pet parents to detect health risks at an early stage from the convenience of their pockets.

As pets rarely show any early signs of disease, it helps owners to decide if and when a vet visit is necessary. This saves money and time - and in the case of a disease it increases the chances of recovery significantly.

We use smart software to reliably interpret data derived from innovative hardware - easy, quick and stress-free for the pet and the owner.
 
Our first product is an easy to use urinalysis kit that gives pet owners a clear and simple indication on their pets health status.

Name: CHOU2 PHARMA
Description: Flipping the script on pet cannabinoid science. CHOU2 PHARMA is bridging the gap in pet cannabinoid care for vets and pet owners. With science and education at the forefront, Chou2 Pharma offers the only pet cannabinoid products crafted using the Cannolation Purification System — a process surpassing industry standards for ingredient purity, dosage accuracy, safety, and effectiveness. Chou2 Pharma products specifically target your pet’s needs. Available now at chou2pharma.com

Name: Digitalvet - Medicina Veterinária
Description: Somos um centro de medicina veterinária em Florianópolis/SC e membros da Associação Brasileira dos Hospitais Veterinários (ABHV). Diferente de uma clínica veterinária comum, a DigitalVet é um Coworking Veterinário. Aqui, você encontra profissionais de diversas especialidades da Medicina Veterinária, atuando para o bem-estar e a saúde do seu pet. Com infraestrutura completa para a realização de exames e centro cirúrgico, atendemos desde os casos mais simples aos mais complexos, com muita competência e carinho.

Name: Petcare Veterinary Clinic and Petshop
Description:
Petcare Veterinary Clinic and Petshop is where your pet feels at home.
Our mission is to provide the highest quality medical and surgical care and to provide you with all the aspects of Petcare and ownership including public health and transmitted animal disease awareness, We treat and cure your pet with respect and honesty to leave you always with positive impression towards us.

Our vision is to let people know more about animal welfare to increase the animal lovers therefore, Less animals will be left without homes.

Name: VIN Practice Communications
Description:
~~ 8/12/24: VIN Practice Communications has ended its service. The VPC team has loved serving the veterinary community, and will continue to do so in new roles at VIN, our parent company. Many thanks to all who've trusted us with your business over the years.  ~~ 
https://www.vinpractice.com/important-news-about-vin-practice-communications/

As veterinary professionals ourselves, we understand the unique joys and challenges of working in this field. We believe you deserve exceptional service and support from a team inspired and powered by shared experiences, passion, and empathy.

The way we support you, our fellow veterinary professionals, is by helping you to communicate with your clients more efficiently, effectively, and meaningfully, with innovative client communication and engagement tools and services.

Name: Pharmill
Description:
We produce effective complementary feed mixtures that support animal health and rapid growth. We collaborate with over a thousand veterinarians, continuously developing and improving the quality and effectiveness of our products.

Certainty from Nature
Only natural ingredients and high concentrations of active substances—these are the two main characteristics of every Pharmill product. We aim to provide breeders who care about their animals with a proven and effective alternative to antibiotics and synthetic agents. We harness the natural healing properties of plants and herbs from around the world to create products that allow for sustainable, responsible, and eco-friendly livestock care.

Proven Raw Material Quality
We place great emphasis on the selection and quality control of the components used in our production. We have consciously adopted high standards for raw material suppliers and established a dedicated team for continuous quality monitoring of the ingredients used in our preparations. As a result, we are confident that our products deliver excellent results in treating viral, bacterial, and fungal infections in animals while promoting their healthy and rapid growth.

Modern Formulations
Our production technology and all formulations are entirely based on scientific research that confirms the effectiveness of the herbs, essential oils, minerals, vitamins, and organic substances we use. Farmers and over 1,000 veterinarians trust us to ensure animal health and welfare, ultimately providing consumers with high-quality, eco-friendly, and safe products.

Versatile Product Range
The quality of Pharmill products is certified by GMP+. We offer a wide range of products that enable precise selection of substances tailored to the needs and condition of animals. Our team continuously collaborates with veterinarians and breeders, conducting research on improvements and new solutions in response to their needs.

Name: VETAN NL
Description:
Wij zijn VETAN; een jonge onderneming gespecialiseerd in veterinaire anesthesie. 

Met ons bedrijf staan wij voor kwalitatieve anesthesiologische zorgverlening binnen de diergeneeskunde en willen dierenartsen en dierenartsassistenten hierbij helpen. 

Het is ons doel om onzekerheid omtrent het leveren van anesthesiologische zorg, bij het diergeneeskundig team weg te nemen door middel van onze diensten. 

- Trainingen en cursussen:
Wij bieden op maat gemaakte trainingen en cursussen aan voor zowel dierenartsen als dierenartsassistenten. Daarbij kunnen deze lezingen en praktijklessen op locatie gegeven worden, zodat er meteen gebruik gemaakt kan worden van uw eigen inventaris. We zijn ervan overtuigd dat de verworven kennis op deze manier beter toepasbaar is! 

- Live case consultaties: 
Door middel van 'on the job learning' kan u gerichte kennis opdoen. Wij behandelen samen met u een moeilijke anesthesiologische casus, live op locatie! We richten ons op verschillende specifieke vraagstellingen vanuit het team, medicamenteuze strategieën, beademingstechnieken of actief advies bij ontwikkelingen tijdens de operatie.

- Anesthesiologische zorg analyse: 
Volgens het principe 'twee paar ogen zien meer dan één' analyseert VETAN de geleverde anesthesiologische zorg binnen uw dierenartsenpraktijk. We kijken samen met u naar de mogelijke verbeteringen met betrekking tot: logistieke inrichting, medicamenteuze inventaris en de aanwezige kennis en kunde. 

Bent u benieuwd wat VETAN voor u kan betekenen? Neem een kijkje op onze website of stuur ons een berichtje! 

Team VETAN
'Because anesthesia shouldn't keep you awake!'

Name: e-vet : les rencontres de la e-santé animale
Description:
Les rencontres #evet, évènement entièrement consacré aux nouvelles technologies en pratique vétérinaire, la 2ème édition aura lieu le 30 janvier 2020, à Paris.

Les pratiques et les outils sont, sous l'influence du développement du numérique et du partage de données, en plein bouleversement. Les organismes techniques vétérinaires sont logiquement amenés à se pencher sur l'évolution inéluctable de nos métiers. C'est pourquoi l'AFVAC, l'AVEF et la SNGTV s'associent pour organiser les 2èmes rencontres e-Vet, au coeur de la médecine vétérinaire connectée le 30 janvier 2020, à Paris.
 
Les enjeux sont importants. Il s'agit de positionner d'emblée le vétérinaire comme acteur de cette évolution, en l'aidant à intégrer les outils connectés et la télémédecine à son exercice. Les organismes techniques, au cœur de la pratique généraliste et spécialisée, sont naturellement à même d’inventorier et d’évaluer ces nouveaux outils.

Les participants, qu’ils soient fascinés par les nouvelles technologies ou qu’ils se posent des questions sur leur intérêt dans la pratique vétérinaire, y trouveront les réponses à leurs interrogations.

Dal 2018 la Clinica Veterinaria dell’Orologio fa parte del gruppo AniCura.

Name: Cat Hospital

Geçen 24 yıl içinde Ayrancı Veteriner Muayenehanesi 1996 yılında Ayrancı Veteriner Kliniğine, 2000 yılında Vet Hospital Hayvan Hastanesine ve son 2008 yılında Cat Hospital Kedi Hastanesine kadar gelişme göstermiştir.  Cat Hospital kurulduğu 2008 yılından günümüze Türkiye’nin ilk ve tek kedi hastanesi olma özelliğini korumaktadır.
Cat Hospital 2015 yılından beri kısaca ISFM olarak bilinen International Society of Feline Medicine isimli Uluslararası Kedi Hekimliği Topluluğunun Türkiye’deki ilk ve tek üyesi ve Türkiye temsilcisidir.
Hastanemiz halen 1100 m2’lik alanda 20 Kedici personeli, 96 yatak kapasitesi, son teknoloji ile donatılmış 2 ameliyathane ve tüm bölümleri sadece kediler için ile 7/24 kesintisiz hizmet vermektedir.

Name: Botica Pets
Description:
Quem faz uso de terapias naturais para prevenção ou auxílio ao tratamento de enfermidades sabe bem os benefícios de plantas e elementos da natureza para o nosso organismo. Então, porque não estender este hábito saudável aos pets?

Foi assim que em 2011 surgiu a Botica Pets, em São Paulo (SP). O termo “botica” refere-se ao local onde, tradicionalmente, se preparava e vendia produtos para saúde humana, formulados com plantas medicinais. Para tornar ainda mais clara a paixão que temos, em especial, pelos cães e gatos, incluímos a palavra “pets”. Daí o nome Botica Pets.

Na Botica Pets, as matérias-primas são ingredientes provenientes da natureza como a cenoura, a beterraba, a alcachofra, o maracujá, e outras. Sabemos que, assim como nós, os pets precisam de um cuidado especial em todas as fases da vida. Para isso, temos uma linha de produtos focada em prover equilíbrio e bem-estar para os pets! Tudo isso por meio de ingredientes naturais e sem conservantes. Quer saber mais sobre os produtos? Conheça o nosso e-commerce!

O nosso compromisso é ajudar você a cuidar da saúde do seu pet. Sabemos o quanto isso é importante para a qualidade de vida dele e para o fortalecimento desta relação única, de carinho e respeito, que temos com estes peludos.

Name: VETMED Specialty Referral & 24-hr Emergency Care Veterinary Hospital
Description:
VETMED is a 13,000-square-foot specialty referral and 24-hour emergency veterinary hospital.  We offer specialty services in cardiology, internal medicine, oncology and surgery, along with emergency care to family veterinarians 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.  Having multiple specialties under one roof, allows VETMED to practice collaborative medicine and provide patients with continuity of care  between medical disciplines while at VETMED.  Our Doctors are able to benefit professionally from a multidiscipline practice where they can discuss treatment plans, drug protocols, research and innovative techniques.
 
In 2013 VETMED was awarded an Emergency Service and Referral Accreditation for our specialty services by the American Animal Hospital Association (AAHA), an industry standard-bearer. We are one of five veterinary referral hospitals in Arizona to hold this distinction.

VETMED was founded by a veterinarian, is managed by veterinarians, and is supported by a team of dedicated people. Our primary goal is to provide extraordinary care and service to our patients, clients and our VETMED team. 

Learn more by visiting our website: VETMEDAZ.com
 
WORKING AT VETMED:
We want VETMED to be the last veterinary hospital you want to work at in Arizona. We feel secure about the growth stability and potential at VETMED. This begins with a team that loves to have fun at work while providing outstanding customer service to one another and friends of the hospital.
 
BENEFITS INCLUDE:
·         Multi-specialty Board Certified Doctors and Emergency service all under one roof
·         Locally owned and operated
·         Non-corporate culture
·         Collaborative team approach to medicine
·         Growing practice with many personal and professional opportunities

Name: Zoobie
Description:

Zoobie is a classified advertisement and community site that assists in the regulation of pet sales. Zoobie promotes humane breeding practices and encourages a reduction in puppy farming/kitten factories across the country, with our secure payment methods focusing on decreasing the risk of fraudulent activity within the industry. Zoobie want to help every pet find their perfect home and make the adoption process an enjoyable experience for everyone.

Our platform is an integrated adoption site where animal shelters, breeders and families who need to re-home their pets will be able to generate a listing. Zoobie will allow all animals to have an equal chance of finding their new family and it will be the adoption site for individuals wanting to improve animal welfare throughout Australia.

Zoobie is proud to support the dedicated organisations and individuals who improve the outcomes for Australian pets. That’s why if you are an animal shelter, please get in touch with us as we are happy to discuss ways Zoobie can assist you.

Name: Histovet - Servicio de diagnóstico histopatológico veterinario
Description:
Histovet es el primer servicio de diagnóstico anatomopatológico en España bajo dirección científica acreditada por patólogos diplomados por el European College of Veterinary Pathologists (ECVP).

Centramos nuestro trabajo en la Anatomía Patológica, a la que dedicamos una formación continuada, garantizando así que el servicio que ofrecemos sea lo más cualificado posible. La finalidad del servicio es proporcionar soporte a la labor clínica veterinaria en todos aquellos aspectos que tengan que ver exclusivamente con la Anatomía Patológica de animales domésticos. Este enfoque permite conseguir un diagnóstico más ágil, un contacto más eficiente con las Clínicas Veterinarias y disminuye el riesgo de pérdida de información o errores de identificación.

- Un servicio de diagnóstico histopatológico de calidad y rápido.
- Soporte antes y después del dignóstico (en el envío de citologías y biopsias y en la interpretación de los diagnósticos).
- Informes detallados, con interpretación clínica, opiniones personales e información bibliográfica con referencias a la patogenia y pronóstico de los procesos.
- Aplicación de técnicas especiales (inmunocitoquímica, pruebas moleculares i pruebas de pronóstico).

Name: Aerapy Animal Health
Description:
Aerapy Animal Health (formerly PetAirapy) manufactures researched, tested, and study-backed UV systems to help ensure clean and healthy animal care environments not only for animals, but also for the people who care for them.

Since its founding in 2008, Aerapy Animal Health has taken the lead in air and surface sanitizing for the animal care industry, responding to the specific needs of veterinarians, animal shelters, pet boarding facilities, doggie daycare centers, groomers, and other pet-friendly industries. Aerapy Animal Health has teamed with leading UV scientists, healthcare professionals, and engineers in ongoing efforts to help eliminate airborne respiratory sickness and surface disease transmission. 

Today, the company’s UV air purification systems with proprietary sizing help clean and sanitize the air and surfaces in animal care environments across the U.S. and internationally, helping prevent and eliminate airborne pathogens, such as canine influenza (dog flu), feline calicivirus, canine parvovirus, canine distemper, canine (kennel) cough, as well as allergens. Aerapy Animal Health’s UV systems have been shown to kill more than 99.9% of tested virus and bacterial pathogens. 

Aerapy Animal Health recognizes that each animal care space is unique, with its own concerns and challenges, that’s why there is no “one-size-fits-all” approach when it comes to creating the clean and healthy environments that animals, and the people who care for them, deserve. 

Winner 2019 IBPSA Pet Care Business Excellence Vendor Award

Winner 2019 Pet Independent Innovation Award: Boarding Service of the Year

Winner 2020 Pet Age Women of Influence (Annette Uda, President)

Certified WOSB (Women-owned small business)

Name: HIGIENIZO
Description:
HIGIENIZO es una empresa española creada en el año 2006 especializada en la higienización, cuyo negocio principal se desarrolla dentro del área de la nutrición animal. Reunimos una gran experiencia en la aplicación de ácidos orgánicos para la alimentación animal, el tratamiento de agua y la producción de ensilaje.

En el año 2007, desarrollamos en nuestra gama de acidificantes un concepto muy innovador: Softacid, la NO CORROSIVIDAD DE LOS ACIDIFICANTES MEDIANTE UN ÁCIDO

Como especialistas en alimentación animal, somos sensibles a la importancia de una fuente de proteína con una óptima calidad sanitaria y nutricional. Nuestra experiencia en la conservación de materias primas y en la producción de ensilado de pescado nos proporcionó la idea de desarrollar una técnica para la conservación de los subproductos orgánicos de origen animal generados, fundamentalmente, en los mataderos. Desde 2011 hemos realizado numerosos ensayos y pruebas que han permitido desarrollar un sistema sencillo y asequible de implementar en los mataderos para conservar los subproductos. Este método ha sido objeto de una solicitud de patente internacional.

Fabricamos bajo certificados de calidad ISO 9001:2008 e ISO 14001:2004 certificadas por ENAC y FAMI-QS para nuestra gama de productos líquidos en una fábrica situada en el mismo puerto de Barcelona.

Nos gustan los retos profesionales. Prueba de ello es el importante crecimiento de la empresa en estos últimos años, llegando a exportar a diferentes países de Sudamérica y otros como Vietnam o Marruecos.

Name: Crampton Consulting Group

We know that one size does not fit all and are dedicated to achieving the best result that is tailored to your needs.

Our solutions focus on all support areas required by veterinary professionals. Our consulting, training, and coaching services focus on resolving pain points in the areas of HR, business, leadership, inventory management, veterinary nurse consultations and technical skills training, customer service training, consultation communication, staff health and wellness, and team harmony – including our DISC based suite of services with our DISC-accredited consultants.

Our clients consist of veterinarians, veterinary nurses, client care teams, business owners, industry leaders, new graduates, industry suppliers and more. Our diverse range of solutions empowers us to support a wide variety of clients. This means we have extensive experience across the spectrum of challenges experienced by veterinary professionals, ensuring you will always receive the best solution to meet your needs.

Name: COWBEL - Consortium on Workplace-Based Education & Learning
Description:
The Consortium of Workplace Based Education and Learning (COWBEL) is a group of international veterinary colleges and universities that provide students real-world clinical learning opportunities using a distributed clinical year model. The group has been formed to develop and share ideas and best practices. The group is a 501 (c) 3 charitable group.

Additionally, COWBEL looks to educate the veterinary community regarding the benefits of using a workplace-based or distributed model of education to prepare new veterinary graduates.

COWBEL looks to partner with innovative and like-minded individuals and groups to improve the education and preparation of veterinary graduates.

Name: VetMeasure
Description:
Understanding animals is more than just knowing their weight, breed, activity level, and production type. It’s about preventing disease, fighting sickness faster, and bridging the gap between veterinarians, owners, and animals.

Post-surgical monitoring is critical, not only for patients who endured complications, but also for those patients that seem healthy, making the first 3 hours after surgery a crucial time for monitoring vitals as it has the highest percentage of animal fatalities. We now have a way to monitor every patient more efficiently, ensuring veterinary practices have adequate time to record vitals and respond to recovering patients.

Our MeasureON! harness is reliable, comfortable, and designed to give a complete animal health and well-being profile to be shared between veterinarians and owners to improve and maintain animal health.

Name: Western Australian Veterinary Emergency and Specialty
Description:
WAVES provides 24 hour care with an after hours emergency service combined with access to veterinary specialists during the day. 

We are a veterinary referral hospital designed to provide high quality advanced and specialist care for family pets. At WAVES, we believe that your pets are family and should receive the same level of care that you would expect the human members of your family to receive in hospital. Our staff are friendly, dedicated, compassionate  and highly knowledgeable veterinarians and nurses who aim to provide the highest level of care for pets in Perth in a supportive partnership with the pets general practitioner.

WAVES offers a range of specialist referral services which includes surgery, medicine, emergency and critical care and diagnostic imaging. All of these services (except emergency) require a referral from your pet's regular veterinarian to the specialist prior to consultation. The emergency service is staffed by specialist and non- specialist veterinarians. 

WAVES aims to work together with your veterinarian much in the same way your family general practitioner works with your specialist in providing the best medical care.

With some of Australia's most prominent specialists in their fields on staff, you can be assured of the quality of care and expertise at WAVES.

Name: Raw Feeding Veterinary Society
Description:
Our Mission is to promote the principles and practical aspects of species-appropriate nutrition, through education of veterinary professionals and the pet-owning public.

As practising veterinary surgeons it is important we give clients clear, practical feeding strategies they can follow in their busy lives. In a biologically- ideal world every hunting carnivore would be fed on live prey. Clearly this is socially un-acceptable, morally questionable and impractical. A spectrum of ‘lesser’ alternatives are available, and there will always be a trade-off between convenience, ideology, cost and practicalities. What is right for one pet owner may not work for another.

So let’s not talk in ‘definites’ – there is no right or wrong, simply different ways of improving our pets nutrition to greater or lesser degrees.


It is UK based, but we welcome any veterinary professional from around the world. Formed in 2014, it represents another step in the evolution of the recognition of feeding pet animals food they would, logically, have adapted to over millennia in the wild. We are committed to professional, responsible communication, education and research on all areas of nutrition in dogs and cats.

Name: Vetlig - Veterinary orthopeadic products.
Description:
Vetlig is a UK company that has been involved in the artificial ligament business for humans and animals for over 25 years. We work closely with the veterinary community by providing them with proven technology. We are the worlds first for providing evidence based artificial replacements for achilles, tricpes, patella with the products we sell. We believe in evidence based medicine.

Vetlig supplies products mostly relevant to dogs and cats but, due to the nature of the products, they can be cut to shape or shortened according to surgical need.

Artificial ligaments are able to be implanted into the dog or cat to help reconstruct virtually any tendon or ligament which needs help to heal or re-grow in the correct position or be replaced completely.

Vetlig also supplies a range of biomaterials for bone void filling, lateral sutures, ligament anchors, suspensory button fixation devices and post operative cryotherapy compression braces for any stifle operation or injury.

Vetlig work in partnership with veterinarians across the world and give their patients a chance to get back to normal activities with minimal downtime.

Only Vetlig LTD sell these products in the UK, we don't use any other distributor even if they are using our name.

Name: Polwet (PGF Weterynaria)
Description: Jesteśmy hurtownią weterynaryjną z nowoczesną bazą magazynową, konkurencyjnymi cenami i bezkonkurencyjnym serwisem dostaw.

Name: Pawprint Inc.
Description:
Pawprint is digitalizing pet medical records to increase the quality, convenience, and accuracy of pet care for owners and their furry friends. Enter your pet and vet's information and we will retrieve the information you need.

Description: The WSAVT is a non-profit organization representing a membership of veterinary technicians, veterinary technician students, and veterinary assistants in Washington State.

Description: Indiana State Board of Animal Health (BOAH) is a state agency with four primary mission areas:  Animal health, food safety, disaster preparedness, and animal care.

Name: SLAIS Srl
Description:
SLAIS Animal Health è un'azienda farmaceutica italiana, che opera nel campo della salute animale, con particolare riferimento agli animali da compagnia.
Lavoriamo ogni giorno per sviluppare Linee di prodotti veterinari innovativi ed accessibili.

Name: VRCC Veterinary Specialty & Emergency Hospital
Description: We are a 24 hour emergency and specialty veterinary hospital located in Englewood, Colorado.  With a combination of some of the world’s leading board-certified veterinary specialists in the fields of Cardiology, Dermatology, Emergency, Internal Medicine, Neurology, Oncology, Ophthalmology, and Surgery, state-of-the-art technology, and an on-site diagnostics laboratory, we are able to provide the finest care available for your animal companion.

Name: Recruit 4U
Description:
Recruit 4U – Advertising vet jobs including Veterinary Surgeon Jobs and Vet Nurse Jobs

Name: Phelenx Healthcare LLP
Description: Phelenx Healthcare LLP is primarily a B2B venture, specializing in development and manufacturing  Animal Health, Pet Grooming, Pet Nutrition, Human Nutrition and Cosmetic products. We provide flexible business models including contract development & manufacturing , co-branding, licensing, brand designing and life cycle management. Name: Central Vet
Description: We are a locally owned and operated full service veterinary hospital committed to our patients' health, our clients' satisfaction and our employees' quality of life. We strive to continuously improve our services and be a leader in the veterinary industry.

Name: Nutreminas
Description:
Seja bem-vindo à Nutreminas, onde nutrir é mais que uma missão, é uma paixão há 30 anos!

Name: Boreal Veterinary Centre
Description: We are privately and locally owned by veterinarians and technologists, each with over a decade of clinical and management experience. As parents who are raising young families, we are aware of the challenges that veterinary medicine presents, and are committed to building a strong, collaborative, and compassionate community for employees, clients, and patients.

Name: Gestão Pecuária
Description:
Portal de conteúdo criado por Phyllypi Melo, zootecnista e nutricionista animal, com objetivo de publicar conteúdos relevantes à pecuaristas e acadêmicos de ciências agrárias, para ajudar a promover o desenvolvimento da pecuária brasileira.

Visite nosso site e saiba mais.

Name: Animal Cancer Care Clinic
Description: At ACCC you benefit from the shared knowledge and experience of the nation’s largest team of in-house veterinary cancer specialists. Our carefully chosen, board-certified professionals, along with skilled Veterinary Technician, and support staff, share one company culture with common standards for quality in oncology, technology, communication, methodology and service that ensure reliable, consistent delivery of expert CARE and Optimal OUTCOMES for you.

Name: Animal Anti Cruelty League Cape Town
Description:
The Animal Anti-Cruelty League was established as a self-sufficient welfare organisation that exists to prevent and eliminate cruelty to all animals whether arising from ignorance, neglect or deliberate cruelty and to service the less advantaged communities though education to care for their pets.  We house unwanted, stray, rescued and abandoned animals at our facilities with the aim to rehabilitate them for adoption.

The AACL endeavours to provide shelter for abandoned animals, promote an efficient & safe adoption program, prosecute animal cruelty cases and run welfare hospitals for lower income groups.

We are dedicated to educating society on the proper care and welfare of our beloved domestic pets by visiting underprivileged areas with fully equipped mobile clinics and regularly addressing schools and clubs on the challenges of animal welfare.
The staff and volunteers work tirelessly to advocate for members of society who’s only voice is that of woofs & meows. It is thanks to our team that we are able to serve up to 100 pets in need per day!

Name: New Jersey Veterinary Medical Association (NJVMA)
Description: New Jersey Veterinary Medical Association (NJVMA) is a professional membership association representing the state’s licensed veterinarians.

Name: Animal Health Options
Description: "The Antioxidant Company since 1990" Manufacturer and exporter of nutritional supplements for cats and dogs (previously horses) in the veterinary market. Nutritional support for various applications including joints, skin/coat/allergy, immune system, cancer support, anti-anxiety, liver/kidney, cognitive dysfunction, etc.

Name: Veterinários Sem Fronteiras Portugal
Description: The Association Veterinários Sem Fronteiras Portugal (VSF Portugal) is a Non-Profit Organization recognized by the ONGD platform and the Camões Institute. Founded in 2006, it has developed several actions and projects to promote the health of animals, people, and the environment in a sustainable way and in developing countries. The activity of VSF-Portugal is strongly based on the concept of One Health, particularly through the prevention and control of zoonotic diseases, education and sensitization of populations to good human-animal relationships, and the carrying out of campaigns population control and also through the implementation of projects for the development of sustainable livestock production. In this sense, with a pattern of supporting official entities from different countries, protocols with local NGOs were identified, as well as institutional relationships, with the implementation of projects on the ground in collaboration with local authorities. Membership of VSF Portugal is allowed by those who share the Association's values and confirm the principles and objectives. They are mostly veterinarians and veterinary medicine students, but there is no limit to the membership of professionals from other areas.

Name: Royal Veterinary Centre Al Ain
Description: Comprehensive veterinary clinic offering preventative, diagnostic, treatment and internal veterinary care, boarding, grooming, mobile grooming, behavioural services, retail, training, pet relocation and more. Highly qualified and experienced team. Working to the highest national and international standards.

Name: Booking.vet
Description: Booking.vet is the first directory specifically dedicated to veterinarians , allowing pet parents book appointments 24/7 with their veterinarian or with vets nearby. Our software fully integrates with  practice management softwares offering pet parents the best real time booking experience.

-  La visco-supplémentation articulaire et tendineuse

Name: Taveta Animal Care

Name: VetSynova
