A platform, which will provide access to pet parents to consult vets and also to educate themselves in caring their pets, Petwer strives hard to maintain its quality in serving every single individual possessing pets.

Name: Nupsala Musculoskeletal Clinic
Description:
Nupsala is a state-of-the-art veterinary referral centre in Leicestershire, specialising in orthopaedic problems in dogs and cats. 

The dedicated team of vets and nurses offer a friendly, caring service. The team are all highly qualified veterinary professionals. 

We offer a complete service from diagnosis to treatment, nutritional advice, follow-up rehabilitation and ongoing monitoring.

Name: Association pour la Formation en Ophtalmologie Vétérinaire (AFOV)
Description:
L’Association pour la Formation en Ophtalmologie Vétérinaire est une association de type Loi 1901 dont les statuts sont déposés en France.
Cependant de nombreux pays sont représentés, ainsi en 2010, les membres présents lors de nos journées étaient originaire de plus de 7 nations.
Le but de cette association comme il est écrit dans nos statuts est de promouvoir la formation en ophtalmologie vétérinaire auprès des confrères praticiens généralistes ou spécialistes.

Name: VETSCOPE Marketing & Business Development
Description: VetScope is a community where veterinary professionals can come together to talk about cases, learn from each other, and help each other. We work together to educate and empower professionals all over the world. We want to see a world where every animal patient, no matter where they are in the world, gets the best veterinary care available.

Name: GEFEL UAM - Grupo de Estudos de Felinos da Universidade Anhembi Morumbi
Description:
Somos um grupo de estudos que foi fundado em 2017 por alunos de graduação do curso de medicina veterinária da Universidade Anhembi Morumbi e nossa missão é levar aos alunos de medicina veterinária novos conhecimentos na área da medicina felina, que vão além da sala de aula.

Realizamos palestras quinzenais, abordando assuntos diferenciados e buscando trazer aos alunos INOVAÇÕES e ATUALIZAÇÕES da área de medicina felina. Contando sempre com o apoio de empresas do ramo, que possuem o compromisso e a responsabilidade na área da educação.            

O grupo é mantido pelo trabalho voluntário de graduandos do curso de medicina veterinária da Universidade Anhembi Morumbi e sendo orientado por docentes da mesma instituição de ensino.

Name: The Animal Neurology Center
Description: The ANC seeks to cure neurologic conditions of pets through limitless innovation, persistent compassion and unparalleled state-of-the-art care.

Name: ViaSul Pet Supplies
Description: Distribuidora inovadora no estado do Paraná, atendemos diariamente médicos veterinários, clínicas veterinárias, pet shops e outros com nossas linhas de referência.

Name: Synergy Farm Health Ltd
Description:
The largest and expanding farm animal practice in the UK, 100% independently owned by integral members of our extensive team,110 staff including 45 Vets, 20 Vet Techs.
Our dedicated, locally based, vet led teams, work with herds and flocks across Dorset, East Devon, Somerset, Wiltshire and Hampshire, include a broad spectrum of vets, from industry leaders to recent graduates including Royal Veterinary College (RVC) Production Animal Interns.
We cater for a wide range and size of farming enterprise providing bespoke Schemes from Flock Consultancy packages; Beef Health Scheme; Smallholder Club; Mastitis and Youngstock advisory services, alongside proactive Herd Health and Fertility visits and reactive sick animal and emergency cover.
Our pioneering Vet Techs, work with our clients and those of other practices to deliver specific livestock management tasks including foot trimming, mobility scoring, vaccinations and mobile plunge sheep dipping. Our highly experienced and qualified Techs arrive with all the tools and crushes required.
We run training courses, educational client meetings and are launching an online training platform. We boast Post Graduate qualifications, awards from Epidemiology to Welfare to Fellowships and embrace a strong vision of people development.
Team members are involved in other ventures supporting veterinary and animal health via our Cattle Lameness Academy – consultancy, training and research in Lameness control; Surefarm our sister company specialising in TB diagnostics development; RVC final year student teaching; food chain consultancy; Research; Post Graduate Residency Programme; various Government work including the management of DEFRA West region Veterinary Delivery Partnership.
Founder members of XL Vets UK Ltd and Vet Salus a new global and sustainability focused consultancy and training business; active members of the British Cattle Veterinary Association (BCVA), Sheep Veterinary Society, Goat, Pig and Camelid Veterinary Societies.
Location: Rampisham Down, Maiden Newton, Dorset, DORSET

Name: International Veterinary Seminars
Description:
At IVS our mission is to provide Veterinarians with the highest quality continuing education with world-renowned speakers in fun and exciting locations.
As veterinarians, we know how valuable your limited free time is to you and your family. When selecting a CE program you want to make sure that you are not wasting your time. IVS strives to provide you with current practical information that you can take back and immediately utilize in your practice. Also, our 3, 4 & 5 day seminars are held in locations that will provide both you and your family with plenty of other enjoyable activities and quality down time when the half-day seminars are completed.
IVS is an American Association of Veterinary State Boards RACE approved provider of continuing education. Our seminars are accepted in all states-including New York and North Carolina-which does not accept the RACE programs. We submit courses individually to NC for approval.

Name: Veterra
Description:
Lansat în 2022, lanțul de servicii veterinare Veterra (farmacii veterinare, pet shops și saloane de cosmetică felină și canină) își propune să ofere soluții integrate pentru iubitorii de animale. În acest moment, lanțul Veterra, numară un total de 200 unități, la nivel național.   
      
Misiunea companiei este simplă: Veterra își propune să depășească, zi de zi, așteptările proprietarilor de animale printr-o abordare personalizată și profesionistă. La baza noului brand Veterra stau valori precum grija, empatia,  profesionalismul, pasiunea, accesibilitatea produselor și a serviciilor.
    
”Din grijă pentru animale” este motto-ul echipei Veterra iar ceea ce ne motivează este faptul că iubim animalele și ne dorim sa fim suport pentru proprietarii acestora, oferind cele mai bune soluții de prevenție și tratament. 
    
Dacă te regăsești în valorile noastre, te așteptăm în universul Veterra!

Name: Randlab Pty Ltd
Description:
Randlab is a proud and passionate supporter of the equine industry worldwide. Our involvement in this industry comes in the form of providing new, innovative and cost effective veterinary medicines for equine veterinarians and horse owners.

It retains the same family ownership and focus on  client relationships that it started with in 2004. Since that time the business has expanded to include offices in New Zealand, Dubai, Singapore, China, Malaysia, Belgium, Cyprus and most recently, Argentina.

Randlab welcomes you to be part of our journey.

Name: Howells Veterinary Services
Description: Howells Veterinary Services, is a family run veterinary practice dedicated to providing an excellent standard of care.  With 20 Veterinary Surgeons, qualified Veterinary Nurses and experienced support staff behind the scenes, we offer a comprehensive 24 hour service for pets, farm animals and horses.

Name: Instituto BW
Description: O Instituto BW é uma ONG que trabalha com conservação e reabilitação de animais selvagens na Região dos Lagos/RJ.

Name: CESAC
Description:
El Centro de Sanidad Avícola de Cataluña y Aragón (CESAC) es una empresa fruto de la colaboración entre las Administraciones de Cataluña y Aragón, el Sector Privado y el Sector Cooperativo de la avicultura catalana y aragonesa. 

Somos el laboratorio designado por el Departament d'Agricultura, Ramaderia, Pesca, Alimentació i Medi Natural de la Generalitat de Catalunya, para la realización de los análisis oficiales de las enfermedades incluidas en los programas oficiales de las aves en Catalunya.

Dedicamos nuestros esfuerzos en dar servicio de diagnóstico, de soporte a la producción avícola y de formación técnica a todos nuestros asociados. Además, somos el punto de encuentro y de intercambio de conocimientos de los técnicos de la avicultura de Cataluña y Aragón.

Name: Veterinary Public Health Association (VPHA)
Description:
Veterinary Public Health Association (VPHA) is a division of the British Veterinary Association dedicated to advancing veterinary public health in the UK and internationally. Our diverse membership includes veterinarians and allied professionals working across government, academia, industry, and practice.

We influence legislation, deliver training, and promote the vital role of vets in public health—spanning animal health, food safety, zoonoses, and environmental protection. Through national and international representation, including the Federation of Veterinarians of Europe, VPHA supports the "One Health, One World" mission.

Name: Niceway India
Description: We Provide Best Ever Animal Feed Supplements, That Ensures Farmers a Healthy & Fit Animal.

Name: COMFURT COLLAR
Description: Introducing a comfortable solution to an uncomfortable situation. This soft micro-plush poly-filled recovery collar is a great alternative to the plastic E-collar as well as the inflatable ones. Provides the animal comfort and ease of movement while protecting them from reaching the surgical site or injury. It is fully adjustable with a drawstring collar for extra snug fit. It is available in 7 sizes (size chart on next page). No more scratching furniture, banging into walls, dealing with pets not wanting to eat, drink or play and becoming depressed. No deflating collars thus allowing the pet to reach the site. The pillow-like collar provides the ability for pet to sleep with ease, similar to a pillow used by travelers. It is securely fastened by additional velcro making it impossible to open. The extra adjustability of the drawstring within the neck makes for a more custom fit for each dog. Treat your pet to a Comfurt Collar following surgery, an injury or a troubled spot and help them “RECOVER IN COMFORT”

Name: Small Animal Blood Bank
Description: Provide simple alternatives to improve animal welfare and educate veterinary professionals benefiting patient outcome.

Name: Vets Place
Description:
Onder de naam Vets Place wordt gebouwd aan een keten dierenartspraktijken welke gevestigd zijn in de Pets Place, de grootste dierenspeciaalzaak. Door het samenvoegen van deze concepten wordt een breed publiek in staat gesteld om de beste zorg te bieden voor het huisdier. Een afspraak is gemakkelijk te maken tijdens een winkelbezoek of telefonisch.

Het bieden van goede zorg is een leidend principe en door de unieke samenwerking “instore” kan dit tegen een scherpe prijs. Het personeel is gekwalificeerd en streeft naar een hoge mate van vertrouwen tussen dier en de eigenaar. Vets Place adviseert tevens over de gezondheid, voeding, parasieten en (vacht)verzorging. Kortom, we gaan voor een lang en gezond leven van je favoriete huisdier.

Name: GlobalVET Practice Management Software
Description:
Introducing GlobalVET Practice Management Software!

We’re a team of dedicated veterinary professionals and programmers who have been working since 2016 to make running your daily work efficient, effective, and accessible, absolutely everywhere you can connect.
We looked at all the bottlenecks and pain points in veterinary practice, and started with a blank sheet of (digital) paper. We believe veterinary practice should flow, and connect everyone in your practice with the least amount of effort.

Name: Preventive Vet
Description:
Preventive Vet is a content publishing and consulting company. All our content and consulting strategies are developed by industry experts, preventive health and critical care veterinarians, board-certified surgeons, oncologists, certified behavior consultants, certified trainers, and other pet care professionals. 

Our mission is to help minimize and prevent suffering in cats and dogs by educating pet parents. To help you focus on providing exceptional care to veterinary patients and shelter adopters, Preventive Vet offers a wealth of educational resources to share with clients — much of which is at no cost or affordably priced to veterinary practices, shelters/rescues, and other pet healthcare organizations.

We provide a multidisciplinary approach to our content development and offer a diverse range of expertise across all facets of veterinary medicine, as well as from every corner of the pet care industry. We rely on clinical and real-world experience, as well as pet owner and client input and feedback. 

Visit us at https://www.preventivevet.com to see what we offer pet owners. If you are in the pet healthcare industry, check out: https://www.preventivevet.com/4vets

Name: AniCura Benipeixcar Hospital Veterinario
Description: Hospital Veterinario Benipeixcar is a company based out of Valencia, Spain.

Name: Adviescentrum Klinische Genetica Gezelschapsdieren
Description:
The Center for Clinical Genetics in Companion Animals (AKGG) is a dedicated clinical genetics and genetic counselling service, located at the Faculty of Veterinary Medicine at Ghent University.
Our mission is to contribute to the health and well-being of cats and dogs by helping owners, breeders and veterinarians deal with genetic diseases and traits. We address various questions regarding heredity, recommended tests, and more. Thanks to our multidisciplinary approach, we can provide the most optimal care and guidance.

The Center for Clinical Genetics in Companion Animals (AKGG): your partner for healthy cats and dogs!

Made possible thanks to the support of Royal Canin, together towards a better world for pets.

Name: iV FORMATION
Description:
iV FORMATION, c'est la nouvelle plateforme de conférences cliniques et bien-être pour les vétérinaires.

Née du rêve de deux jeunes vétérinaires, iV FORMATION oeuvre dans un but audacieux : rendre l'épanouissement professionnel accessible à tous les vétérinaires, quel que soit leur niveau.

Les conférences cliniques sont plus modernes, plus attrayantes, plus praticopratiques, et surtout plus adaptées au quotidien des vétérinaires généralistes. Elles sont dispensées exclusivement par des Spécialistes diplômés des Collèges Européens vétérinaires, afin de vous partager des connaissances scientifiques mises à jours, basées sur l'Evidence Based Medicine.

L'épanouissement professionnel des vétérinaires est notre priorité chez iV FORMATION, par le savoir, mais aussi par le développement personnel. En effet, dans une profession soumise à un rythme de travail élevé et à de nombreux challenges émotionnels, il est essentiel de libérer la parole. Il est grand temps de lever le tabou et d'apprendre à s'entretenir dans ce métier-passion.

iV FORMATION est fière de proposer aujourd'hui gratuitement ses vidéos et podcasts aux vétérinaires après simple inscription sur notre site !

iV FORMATION peut aussi réaliser sur commandes des vidéos de conférences pour votre organisation ou entreprise vétérinaire. 

Bon visionnage sur iV !

Name: Veterinary Medical Center of Long Island
Description:
The Veterinary Medical Center of Long Island (VMCLI) is a 28,000 square foot, state of the art, 24-hour, emergency and multi-specialty referral practice, located in West Islip, Long Island.

At the Veterinary Medical Center of Long Island, we know that the connection to your pet lasts a lifetime. Next to you and your family, your veterinarian is one of the most important people in your pet’s life. Our caring approach places emphasis on an efficient and accurate diagnosis, gained by the use of the least invasive techniques permissible. This often requires the expertise of our specialist staff. We are committed to providing cutting-edge veterinary medicine and sharing this knowledge and expertise with both pet owners and referring family veterinarians. We specialize in critical emergency care and offer a variety of services to meet your pets needs.

Name: Clinique Vétérinaire SYNERVET
Description: SYNERVET est une clinique vétérinaire d'exercice exclusif en référé sur la région Rouennaise. Nous mettons toutes nos compétences aux services de nos Consoeurs et Confrères ainsi que de leurs patients 24h/24 et 7j/7.

Name: GençVet Veteriner Kliniği
Description:
GençVet Kliniği 2012 yılında Veteriner Hekim Ender Er tarafından kurulmuştur. Bundan önce 2007 yılında Erender ismi ile hizmete giren kliniğimiz 2009 yılında kurulan ortaklık ile birlikte Pasteur ismini almıştır. Sakarya Veteriner Kliniği olarak hizmet vermeye GençVet olarak devam eden kliniğimiz veterinerlik konusunda deneyim sahibi ekibimizle evcil hayvanlarınızın her türlü bakımını ve ihtiyacınızı karşılamak amacı ile hizmet vermektedir.

Mesleki etik ve deontoloji kurallarına kayıtsız uyan bu ekibin, öncelikli inandığı değerler; ortak bir hayat sürdüğümüz can dostlarımızla ilgili sizleri doğru şekilde yönlendirmek, bilinçlendirmek, sağlıklarını ve canlarını emanet ettiğiniz dostlarımızı ve sizleri mutlu kılmaktır…
Kliniğimiz 2 veteriner hekim 1 Veteriner Teknikeri ve 3 yardımcı personel ile birlikte toplam 6 kişi hizmet vermektedir. (30 Eylül 2013)

Name: Unipharma - Malaysia Sdn. Bhd.
Description: Established in 1994, Unipharma started as a poultry house that makes its own feed premixes. Soon, Unipharma started to distribute its unique premixes and additives to other poultry houses.

Name: Rollin' Vets
Description: Rockin' Pets, Rollin' Vets (formerly known as South By South Vets) is a full-service Veterinary clinic on wheels serving the pets and families of the greater Houston area.

Name: Personal PEC
Description: A Personal PEC é uma empresa sul-matogrossense de assistência técnica e consultoria que atua no segmento agropecuário com objetivo de auxiliar seus clientes a gerir dados, aferir processos, planejar suas atividades e produzir excelentes resultados econômicos. Temos disponibilidade e infra-estrutura para atendimento de projetos pecuários em todo o Brasil.

Name: Waggle Mail
Description:
Finally… a subscription box for dogs that’s full of purpose, not filler.
With vet-curated information and products specific to your dog’s need and breed, Waggle Mail takes the worry out of wellness.

Name: Hospital Veterinário Muralha de Évora
Description: Hospital Veterinário Muralha de Évora, com uma equipa de veterinários disponível 24h. Urgências, Cirurgia, Internamentos, tosquias e banhos. Animais de Produção e Equinos 24h.

Name: Fluff N' Woof Specialist Veterinary
Description: We seek to make a positive, lasting impact on animal health care in clinics, our community, and the field of veterinary medicine. We’re currently searching for a bright, high-energy person to join our practice, and help us make our services more complete. This individual should be a natural hard worker and show a willingness to pitch in and support our other veterinarians in performing their work.

Name: Rohini Minerals Private Limited
Description:
Rohini Minerals Pvt Ltd, a company registered with The Registrar Of Companies, Hyderabad, Andhra Pradesh is floated by Dr.G.Ranjith Reddy & Dr.A.Thirupathi Reddy, with the main objective of manufacturing quality and cost effective poultry and cattle feed. Both the promoters are qualified post graduate and graduate veterinarians. After completing their studies, they worked for some reputed Companies. Having gained sufficient experience in poultry field and having developed good relations with most of broiler & layer farmers and broiler breeders these doctors have started diversified businesses dealing with Broiler Breeding, Commercial Broilers, trading of poultry medicine and poultry feed production.

The company increased its production from the financial year 2007-08 onwards due to increase in the demand of its product. The increase in the demand is mainly due to the quality feed, excellent performance, cost effective and also due to after sales service. The company stand by its main motto “QUALITY IS OUR COMMITMENT”. The company owned three feed plants at different locations and have five leased out plants. Presently it is producing and selling around 15000 tonnes of feed in the state of Andhra Pradesh, parts of Maharashtra, Karnataka, Chattigarh and Karnataka. It is planning to expand its business though out India in the coming years. Its marketing network spreaded though south India.

Name: Orthovet
Description:
HVEM ER VI?
OrthoVet åbnede dørene i 2022 med det formål at etablere en dyreklinik med ekspertise inden for kirurgi og sportsmedicin. Vores vision er at skabe en klinik med høj faglighed, stor troværdighed og et serviceniveau i topklasse.  

Vi tror på at dyrene får den bedste behandling, når vi kan fokusere på specifikke fagområder. Derfor modtager vi ikke patienter til sundhedstjek, tandrensning eller vaccination. Til gengæld vil vi gøre vores ypperste for at tilbyde den bedste behandling inden for led problemer, knoglebrud og rygkirurgi. Det gør vi, fordi vi tror på at fokus på specialiserede ydelser giver den bedste behandling for det enkelte dyr.  

Et godt samarbejde med vores henvisende kollegaer er altafgørende i vores virksomhed, og netop derfor tilbyder vi løbende foredrag og temaaftener, hvor vi iblandt kolleger kan udveksle erfaringer og viden. Jo mere viden der deles på tværs af klinikker, des bedre kan vi give den bedste behandling til den enkelte patient, til gavn for dyr og ejer.

Name: Paws Universe
Description:
In a world where pets are not just animals but cherished members of families, the need for exceptional veterinary care remains vital. 
Our State-of-the-art  Super Speciality Veterinary Hospital  sets new industry standards in India.  We take pride in shared passion towards companion animals, a commitment to their well-being through our advanced, and comprehensive healthcare services. We are on a mission to establish a oasis of hope where every wagging tail, furry friend, and feathered companion receives the finest care available all through out their lives. 
Paws Universe where the pursuit of excellence in veterinary medicine meets the celebration of the human-animal bond. It is where latest technology harmonizes with old-fashioned values like compassion and integrity. 

Our Vision:
"To be the leading compassionate and affordable destination for pet healthcare, where every pet receives expert, innovative and compassionate care and every pet parent is empowered with knowledge to ensure their beloved companions live happy and healthy lives."

Our Mission: 
"Our mission is to provide exceptional veterinary care to pets, delivered with integrity, empathy, and a commitment to excellence. We strive to promote responsible pet ownership through education, preventive care, and community engagement. Our dedicated team of professionals is driven by a passion for the well-being and a deep respect for the bond between pets and their parents."

Core Values:
Compassion: We approach every pet with empathy, understanding their unique needs and providing care with kindness and warmth
Excellence: We uphold the highest standards of veterinary medicine, continually learning and innovating to provide the best possible care.
Integrity: We prioritize the well-being and comfort of pets, ensuring they receive personalized, gentle, and stress-free care through honest, ethical, and transparent in all our interactions, ensuring trust and confidence among pet-parents and our team.
Innovation:

Name: PreVet sanidade aquícola
Description: Estamos ingressando no mercado de Aquicultura para suprir a demanda na área de diagnóstico e manejo sanitário em pisciculturas. Com atuação inovadora, utilizamos técnicas de diagnóstico com uma abordagem diferenciada, centrada não somente sobre o peixe enfermo, mas inclui o estudo de todo o sistema de produção e ambiente aquático, que é essencial para o diagnóstico preciso das condições higiênico-sanitárias das pisciculturas. Comprometidos com o crescimento sustentável, temos uma visão holística da aquicultura, possibilitamos soluções criativas, contribuindo para a maximização da produtividade, respeitando o consumidor e o bem-estar animal.

Name: IAVET Insumos y Aditivos Veterinarios S.A.S.
Description: Somos una empresa importadora y comercializadora de medicamentos y aditivos para el sector pecuario y veterinario, ofreciendo complementos para la nutrición que agregan bienestar y solución a las necesidades de nuestros clientes en la producción avícola, porcícola, ganadera, equina y animales de compañía; estableciendo relaciones de confianza en el largo plazo.

Name: Alumed - Equipamentos Veterinários
Description:
Fundada na cidade de São Paulo, a Alumed se destaca como líder na revolução diagnóstica, oferecendo equipamentos de raio-x e ultrassom veterinário de última geração. Somos a primeira empresa a importar e comercializar equipamentos de ultrassom veterinário da empresa norte americana SonoSite (Fuji Film) por 7 anos. Em 2018, recebemos o convite da GE Healthcare, líder mundial no segmento, para promover a empresa e as vendas, tornando-nos líderes de vendas de equipamentos de ultrassom. 

Em 2020, nos tornamos representante da Samsung, outra gigante no segmento de tecnologia, promovendo a venda de ultrassom. No mesmo ano, expandimos nossa atuação para radiologia digital, sendo a primeira empresa a importar placas digitalizadoras de alta tecnologia da empresa coreana Vieworks e raio-x portátil das marcas japonesa JOB e coreana Poskom, alcançando sucesso de vendas de centenas de kits radiológicos portáteis e satisfazendo clientes em todo o Brasil.

Nossos equipamentos proporcionam alta definição de imagem, são de fácil uso e grande durabilidade, garantindo precisão e confiabilidade em todos os diagnósticos.

Ao longo dos anos, mantemos nosso compromisso com a excelência, estabelecendo-nos como referência no fornecimento de equipamentos de qualidade incomparável. Investimos incessantemente em treinamento e desenvolvimento da equipe, tornando-nos um parceiro confiável para profissionais de saúde animal em todo o Brasil.

Queremos construir relacionamentos sólidos, oferecendo suporte técnico excepcional e serviços personalizados para capacitar nossos clientes a oferecer o melhor cuidado possível aos seus pacientes.

Se você é um profissional de vendas apaixonado e proativo, ansioso para fazer parte de um mercado em constante crescimento, a Alumed é o lugar para você. Estamos sempre em busca de talentos que compartilhem nossa paixão por oferecer soluções de saúde animal de alta qualidade.

Name: N2 (UK) LTD
Description:
N2 (UK) LTD is a Veterinary Implant design and supply company with its own in house UK manufacture, based in Portsmouth, Hampshire.
We are proudly a family owned business, and pride ourselves on high quality products and services.

Name: MILA International, Inc.
Description: Since 1991, MILA International has consistently prided itself in the areas of innovation, education and customer service. Because of our dedication to the teachers, technicians and doctors of veterinary medicine, we are a leading provider of critical care products for all animals throughout the world. We promise to continue in the tradition of listening to the needs of all veterinary care providers and collaborating with them to provide the very best in healthcare for animals.

Name: MartinDog
Description: Distribuindo produtos veterinários em São Paulo desde 1989

Name: Sugar Land Veterinary Specialists & Emergency Care
Description:
Sugar Land Veterinary Specialists is a multi-specialty & emergency center offering care in the areas of: Emergency Care, Critical Care, Internal Medicine, Medical Oncology, Radiation Oncology, Neurology & Surgery.  
Follow us on LinkedIn, Facebook, and Instagram to learn more about us!
Sugar Land Veterinary Specialists-we're here when you need us most.

Name: Kreavet
Description:
Kreavet provides scientific support for sustainable animal health solutions.

Kreavet supports companies, research/public institutions and professional organizations in their efforts to meet today’s challenges in the field of animal health and sustainable livestock farming. We help our clients to deliver their solutions faster by services in the field of Research & Development, Strategic Collaboration and Training. We offer specific expertise in the field of veterinary parasitology, epidemiology and socio-economics in animal health.

•	R&D: scientific writing, project management, clinical trials from design to analysis, 
        literature and project review;
•	Strategic collaboration: support to your innovation trajectory by finding suitable partners, 
        scanning for funding opportunities and writing your grant application;
•	Training: customized training in the field of diagnosis, economics and sustainable control 
        of parasitic helminth infections in ruminants.

Name: Liga para la protección de animales y plantas de Barcelona
Description:
Desde que fue creada en 1944, La Lliga per a la Protecció d'Animals i Plantes de Barcelona tiene como misión acoger a animales en situación de desamparo, maltrato y/o abandono, albergarlos en nuestro refugio en las mejores condiciones y durante el tiempo que sea necesario hasta encontrar para ellos un hogar definitivo y responsable donde sean cuidados y queridos.

Paralelamente, fomentamos los valores de defensa de los derechos de los animales, la tenencia responsable y el trato en positivo para todos ellos mediante campañas de concienciación y participación en eventos.

Name: VET Festival
Description:
VET Festival is a two day CPD conference for veterinary professionals in companion animal practice. 

 Veterinary Education for Tomorrow 

Held in a beautiful outdoor setting, choose lectures from 18 different CPD streams to feature a handpicked line-up of pioneering speakers. Enjoy the experience of the Festival Village of exhibiting industry representatives and be sure not to miss VETFest Party Night on the Friday evening.

Name: DARVET FOR TRADING AND INVESTMENT CO. LTD.
Description:
Darvet is a newly founded Veterinary Pharmaceutical Company works in importing and distributing both animal medicines and feed additives.
Using our unique model of good storing and distribution assures that our products arrive to the end user in the best quality.
Darvet is proud to adopt a unique business model that puts more emphasis on end user's growth via providing a strong CRM along with continuous technical support.

Name: Biofarm
Description:
Biofarm is a wholesale distribution company that offers a comprehensive range of products and solutions. We specialise in products/services for companion animals, large animals, poultry, swine, and equine. 

Founded in 1998 in Kroonstad, our company was created with the mission to offer a tailored sales and distribution services primarily to manufacturers and distributors of pet food and accessories. Initially covering the expansive regions of the Free State and North West, our reach later extended when we inaugurated branches in Cape Town, the Northern Cape, Jeffrey’s Bay, and Namibia. 

Biofarm is the link between the manufacturer and the importer. We boast a history of excellence in stock management, warehousing, sales, and logistics. Our role extends beyond merely being the sales and distribution arm for our suppliers; we are also committed to nurturing, developing, and expanding relationships and sales channels with various outlets.

Since its inception in 1998, Biofarm has evolved into a significant player in the market, driven by a core belief that encapsulates our mission: “Taking care of people that take care of life.” This guiding principle emphasises our dedication to supporting those who contribute to the well-being and care of life in all its forms.

Name: A1 Locums Ltd
Description:
A specialist recruitment agency, we place qualified locum and permanent veterinary professional staff within small, mixed and equine veterinary practices throughout the UK. We cover the entire United Kingdom and are able to help with short and long term #locum placements as well as help with permanent vacancies.

Our efficient, friendly and highly professional team have over 20 years recruitment experience, which is why our clients and candidates choose to stay with us year on year. Our extensive database veterinary surgeons, veterinary nurses and other staff, coupled with our folio of all sizes and location of practice, means we can effectively match staff with employer.

We pride ourselves on team work; we are helpful, supportive, knowledgeable and proactive.

How can A1 Locums help you?

• If you are a vet or vet nurse looking for a locum position.
• If you are looking for a permanent position in the veterinary industry.
• If you are a practice and have a new vacancy.

Contact us on:

www.A1locums.com
info@a1locums.com
Telephone: 01280 850575
The Arched Barn, Priesthay Wood Farm, Syresham, Northants NN13 5PU.+++

Name: Poolvet
Description:
Ponemos al servicio del productor ganadero, veterinario y el público en general los mejores productos agroveterinarios del Uruguay. 

Somos una empresa joven en el mercado pero con una vasta experiencia en el rubro y nuestro objetivo es ofrecerle un buen servicio y asesoramiento a nuestros clientes.

Estamos presentes en Montevideo (Casa Central - Districamp), Tacuarembó (Sucursal Poolvet Tbó) y Lavalleja (Sucursal Agromariscala).

Name: COALITION FOR THE VETERINARY PROFESSIONAL ASSOCIATE  (CVPA)
Description:
The Coalition for the Veterinary Professional Associate (CVPA) announces the advancement of the Veterinary Professional Associate (VPA) position. The driving force for this new VPA role is "Access to Care." This will be an accredited and licensed new role that will directly address the call related to the existing national veterinary provider shortage in support of rural and companion animal needs (farmers, pet owners, shelters, and other stakeholders) with access to care.

The CVPA is a 501c4 (pending) nonprofit association with over 32 expert veterinary professionals representing a wide variety of stakeholders in their respective fields nationwide. The active CVPA committees include: Standards, Certification, and Accreditation; Finance and Governance, Legislative, Veterinary Industry Liaison; and, Marketing, Communications, and Public Relations. With solid support from universities, rural settings, shelters, and companion animal environments, this coalition has come together to lobby for and support the creation of these new mid-tier veterinary providers.
cvpa.vet

Name: Elsalhy For Importing & Trading & Investment
Description:
El Salhy Group, our journey began in 1983, guided by the visionary leadership of Dr. Mohamed El Salhy, a renowned businessman with an impressive 20-year track record in the Egyptian parliament. 
Our group comprises four companies:
 El Salhy for Import, 
Megatrade for Export and Trade, 
Horizon in UAE, 
 Gulf Nutrition in KSA.

Our roots as traders of feed grains and protein feed stuff, such as corn and soy, laid the foundation for our growth. 
By 1995, we embraced poultry production, establishing our own farms, feed mill, and hatcheries. This marked a significant milestone in our evolution.

In 2008, we ventured into the trade of raw materials and macro ingredients, including Dicalcium Phosphate (DCP), Monocalcium Phosphate (MCP), and bicarbonate, along with amino acids.
 Our commitment to innovation and progress led us to a pivotal moment in 2015, when we stepped into the realm of importing vitamins, minerals, and premixes.

In 2018 We diversified our portfolio to include an extensive range of feed additives sourced from reputable suppliers across the globe. 

Today, our group stands as a beacon of quality, integrity, and innovation. Driven by the legacy of Dr. Mohamed El Salhy and fueled by our passion for growth, we continue to shape the future of the feed additives and raw materials industry.

Name: U.S. Animal Health Association (USAHA)
Description: The United States Animal Health Association is a forum for communication and coordination among State and Federal governments, universities, industry, and other concerned groups for consideration of issues of animal health and disease control, animal welfare, food safety and public health.  It is a clearinghouse for new information and methods, which may be incorporated into laws, regulations, policy, and programs.  It develops solutions of animal health-related issues based on science, new information and methods, public policy, risk/benefit analysis and the ability to develop a consensus for changing laws, regulations, policies, and programs.

Name: Metro Paws Animal Hospitals
Description:
About Metro Paws Animal Hospitals:

Dr. Jennifer Lavender and Dr. Kathryn Junkins Sarpong founded MPAH at Skillman and Live Oak in East Dallas in 2006, to offer residents personalized veterinary care. In July of 2012, to better serve our clientele, Drs. Sarpong and Lavender built and opened our second location in Oak Cliff and in 2016 we opened a location near White Rock Lake. We want to know your pets’ unique health needs and be accessible to our clients. Our phenomenal staff is comprised strictly of individuals who love animals as much as we do.  

We hope to see you and your pets in one of our clinics in Dallas soon. The staff of MPAH is happy to help you with all of your cat or dog’s healthcare needs. Our modern facilities offer convenience and quality care for your pets. Our Skillman location serves Central Dallas, M Streets, Junius Heights, Swiss Avenue, Munger Place, West Lakewood and Vickery Park.

Our Oak Cliff location on Fort Worth Avenue, next to the Belmont Hotel, serves Kessler Park, Bishop Arts, The Belmont Area, Stevens Park, Oak Cliff, Downtown Dallas, and West Dallas. MPAH Oak Cliff is located only blocks from the Trinity Groves Entertainment area and Trinity River Greenbelt Park.

Our third location, Metro Paws Animal Hospital - White Rock, serves East Dallas, Casa Linda, Forest Hills, Little Forest Hills, Enclave, Gastonwood, Lakewood, and Hollywood Heights. MPAH White Rock is on Grand Avenue, near the Garland Road intersection.

Please stop by and say hello or call and let us know how we can help you!

Skillman 214-887-1400
Oak Cliff 214-939-1600
White Rock 214-324-1500

Name: Kleintierklinik in Ludwigsburg-Oßweil
Description: Die Kleintierklinik in Ludwigsburg-Oßweil steht für Tiermedizin auf höchstem Niveau. Mehr als 100 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter setzen sich bei uns täglich für das Tierwohl ein. Wir sind sowohl als Haustierarzt wie auch als Überweisungszentrum mit Spezialisten in ihren Fachgebieten tätig. Für Notfälle stehen wir den Patientenbesitzern und ihren Tieren an 365 Tagen im Jahr für 24 Stunden am Tag zur Verfügung.

Name: City Veterinary Care
Description:
Founded in November of 2003 by Dr. Andrew Kaplan, a Board-Certified Veterinary Internal Medicine Specialist, City Veterinary Care offers both high-quality general practice as well as specialty medical and surgical care for dogs and cats. City Veterinary Care is the Upper West Side's best source for education and treatment for dogs and cats.

Our highly acclaimed veterinarians, our professional, knowledgeable and caring front desk staff and our highly skilled and compassionate veterinary nursing staff instills, with confidence, what every pet owner desires; that their pet is receiving the best possible care.

City Veterinary Care is committed to all of New York City's dogs and cats. We operate a non-profit organization, The Toby Project, whose objective is to solve New York City's pet overpopulation problem which claims the lives of approximately 10,000 dogs and cats each year in our City's shelter system. In addition, we provide medical and surgical care at markedly reduced prices to over 30 other registered 501(c)3 non-profit, animal rescue organizations, helping to prepare those dogs and cats for new homes.

Name: Alvétis by Émergence
Description:
Centre de régulation vétérinaire sur l'ensemble de la France, Alvétis a été créée par la société VétoAdom fondée en 1981. Ses fondateurs, Christian Lecomte (ENVA 80) et Jean-Louis Patin (ENVL 80) souhaitaient répondre à une demande des propriétaires et des vétérinaires qui recherchaient un moyen efficace et économique d’assurer la continuité des soins vétérinaires.
Depuis 2011, VétoAdom CDA a été créé conjointement à la demande des vétérinaires du Nord de la France et en partenariat avec l’Ordre des vétérinaires, pour répondre à une demande croissante de trouver une solution de continuité des soins pendant les heures de fermeture.
En mars 2017, VétoAdom CDA change d’identité et devient ALVETIS qui gère désormais la régulation téléphonique de centaines de structures vétérinaires sur l’ensemble du territoire et même sur l’ile de la Réunion.

Alvétis, créée par des vétérinaires, pour des vétérinaires!

Name: VETDOM
Description:
“Est dénommée vétérinaire à domicile la personne physique ou morale habilitée à exercer la médecine et la chirurgie des animaux qui, n'ayant pas de domicile professionnel d'exercice, exerce exclusivement sa profession au domicile du client.” ext. Art. R.* 242-57. du Code Rural 

Quels animaux soignent les vétérinaires à domicile VETDOM ? 

Nous assurons exclusivement les soins pour les animaux de compagnie, c’est à dire les chiens, les chats et ce que l’on appelle les NAC (Nouveaux Animaux de Compagnie) qui comportent entre autre les furets, cochons d’inde, les hamsters, les lapins nains ainsi que les oiseaux et les reptiles.

Quelles interventions réalisent les vétérinaires à domicile VETDOM ?

Les vétérinaires à domicile peuvent réaliser tout type d’intervention à domicile, y compris chirurgicales, tant qu’ils estiment que les meilleures conditions sont réunies pour l’animal. Dans la pratique, les interventions lourdes sont confiées à d’importantes structures spécialisées que l’on trouve dans chaque grande ville, un peu comme un médecin de famille envoie son patient à l'hôpital quand cela est nécessaire.

Name: VETERINARY INDEPENDENT PURCHASING GROUP
Description: VETERINARY INDEPENDENT PURCHASING GROUP LTD is a company based out of DRAKE COTTAGE HIGH ROAD, SUFFOLK, United Kingdom.

Name: VetPath Specialists
Description: Το Εργαστήριο VetPath Specialists δημιουργήθηκε από ειδικούς, στην κλινικοεργαστηριακή διαγνωστική και στην ιστοπαθολογία, κτηνιάτρους με στόχο την παροχή εξειδικευμένων υπηρεσιών διάγνωσης υψηλής ποιότητας. Οραματιστήκαμε και υλοποιούμε στην Ελλάδα τη δημιουργία ενός κτηνιατρικού διαγνωστικού εργαστηρίου στα πρότυπα των καλύτερων εργαστηρίων του εξωτερικού, με στόχο την παροχή εξειδικευμένων, ολοκληρωμένων, αξιόπιστων και τάχιστων υπηρεσιών.

Name: Veto Protec
Description: Veto Protec est une société qui crée des dispositifs médicaux vétérinaires pour aider les praticiens spécialistes et généralistes dans leur travail au quotidien.

Name: Langhill Associates Ltd
Description:
Langhill Associates Ltd is an Independent, National Executive Search and Selection Organisation, passionate about healthcare.

 We specialise in providing a valuable and ever-evolving recruitment search and selection service right across healthcare and medical opportunities from junior to director level including sales, marketing, commercial and engineering roles

Name: Your Pets Vets
Description: Your Pets Vets is a team of dedicated people in a state of the art animal hospital, ready to help your furry little friends.

Name: Exotic Veterinary Education
Description:
We are a small independent company responsible for providing Continuing Professional Development to veterinary and zoological professionals.

The company is managed by Marie Kubiak, a veterinary surgeon with post-graduate qualifications in exotic species and advanced training under the European College of Zoological Medicine.

Name: North Dallas Veterinary Emergency & Specialty Hospital
Description: North Dallas Veterinary Emergency & Specialty Hospital brings together a team of board-certified specialists and experienced emergency veterinarians to combine their extensive training with state-of-the-art equipment to provide advanced medical care for pets in the Dallas metroplex. The brand new 13,000+ square foot facility in Frisco, Texas features advanced diagnostic capabilities, minimally invasive surgical and scoping capabilities, separate respiratory and GI isolation wards, and a dedicated classroom space for continuing education. In August of 2025, we welcomed DVSC Frisco as a partner in care, offering advanced surgery with Dr. Franks, a board-certified surgeon with over 20 years of experience.

Name: Pinaka Vets
Description: Pinaka Vets is India’s fastest-growing chain of multi-specialty veterinary hospitals, offering comprehensive medical, surgical, and diagnostic care for pets. With a strong presence across multiple cities, we are redefining pet healthcare by combining compassionate treatment, cutting-edge technology, and a skilled team of veterinary professionals. Our services include advanced diagnostics, soft tissue and orthopedic surgeries, telehealth consultations, grooming, pet wellness programs, and 24/7 emergency care. At Pinaka Vets, we’re on a mission to make world-class veterinary care accessible, affordable, and trustworthy for every pet parent in India

Name: Ticino Animal Hospital
Description:
Ticino Animal Hospital is one of the first veterinary hospitals in Switzerland, the first one in Canton of Ticino. Created in 2018 by Dr. Simone Benenati and Dr. Andrea Amatulli. On 2 June 2018, the current headquarters were inaugurated 500m from the exit of the Lugano Nord motorway. It has emergency and hospitalization services 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.

Our Vision
Our professional experience can give a competent answer to requests for medical assistance 24/7, but also focus on the concept of preventive medicine.

Our Mission
To provide veterinary care by meeting the highest standards of professionalism, ethics and responsibility thanks to a team of veterinary surgeons working in a synergy of expertise with excellent diagnostic and therapeutic equipment.

Name: Dierenkliniek De Morette
Description:
Dierenkliniek De Morette is een paardenkliniek centraal gelegen in de rustieke omgeving van Asse. Iedere dierenarts heeft hier zijn eigen specialisatie om uw paard of pony op een optimale manier te kunnen verzorgen.
Er kan gebruik gemaakt worden van verschillende geavanceerde technieken, waaronder digitale radiografie, high-tech echografie, endoscopie, laserchirurgie, ...
Wij staan bekend voor onze professionele aanpak, klantvriendelijkheid en sportbegeleiding op maat van uw paard of pony.

Name: Porfenc
Description:

Name: Hôpital Vétérinaire de Montréal
Description:
Un des premiers hôpitaux vétérinaires destinés exclusivement à la pratique chez les animaux de compagnie de la région de Montréal, l'Hôpital vétérinaire de Montréal a été fondé par le Dr Villeneuve en 1957. Lors du décès de son fondateur, l'Hôpital fut repris par le Dr Yvon Léonard en 1970. C'est en 1996 que le Dr Michel Gosselin fit l'acquisition de cet établissement qui était déjà renommé dans la région de Montréal. Il procéda à des rénovations majeures et à l'ajout des équipements médicaux les plus modernes pour maintenir la haute réputation de cet établissement. 

 Avec la Dre Isabelle Bernier et une équipe de soutien dévouée, misant sur la recherche constante de l'excellence, le Dr Gosselin a réussi à rehausser encore plus cette réputation.

 En 2010, en s'associant avec la Dre Lucie Hénault qui en prit la direction, il s'assurait que l'Hôpital vétérinaire de Montréal continue sa progression vers l'excellence. Avec la venue de la Dre Catherine Pelletier, puis de la Dre Nathalie Nissaire, l'avenir de cette institution est des plus prometteur. C'est avec joie que Dre Marianne Bond s'est ensuite jointe à notre équipe en 2012.

Name: Critters and Cultures Podcast
Description:
Welcome to 'Critters and Cultures,' a podcast exploring the rich intersection of cultural diversity, animal welfare, veterinary medicine, and the human-animal bond. Hosted by Dr. Azalia Boyd, this show celebrates how culture shapes, influences, enhances, and sometimes challenge the ways we care for animals and relate to each other. On this journey, the show highlights global traditions, diverse perspectives, and advocates for empathy and respect in all interactions.

Whether you’re an animal lover, animal welfare or veterinary professional, or simply curious about the global diversity of human-animal interactions, you’ll leave each episode with new insights and a deeper understanding of the cultural influences that shape our world and who we are as individuals. Expect stories of compassion, innovation, and unity, as we uncover how animals bring us closer across cultural boundaries.

Subscribe and join us on this exciting journey! Follow us on YouTube, Spotify, and Apple Podcast!

Name: Skallebølle Slagtehus
Description:
Kødproduktion i pagt med naturen
På gården Skjoldmose i Tommerup har Ruth & Egon Karlsen en besætning, som består af 35 amme køer med opdræt samt 2 avlstyre. I alt ca. 80 dyr.
Køerne afgræsser vore enge i sommerhalvåret, hvor hovedparten af kalvene bliver født, kalvene patter til de er 6-8 mdr.
Når efterårs kulden begynder tages kalvene på stald. De er løsgående i bokse strøet med halm. Køerne nyder efteråret uden kalvene og æder sig i god stand til vinteren. Når det bliver for koldt og vådt kan køerne gå ind i dyb strøelses stalden, hvor de ligger lunt i halmen.
Fodringen foregår så naturligt som muligt, i sommerperioden lever dyrene af saftigt kløvergræs. I vinterperioden fodres men hjemmeavlet valset korn og halm samt vac. pk. græs, vitaminer og mineraler.
Kødkvæget tilgodeser vort ønske om kødproduktion i pagt med naturen, de har et godt temperament, de lette fødsler, gode moderegenskaber, meget højt klassificeret slagt kroppe samt
kødprocent (62-64%), dette skyldes den meget fine skeletik dyrene er i besiddelse af, desuden er kødet magert med tilpas fedtmarmorering.
Dyrene lever under de mest naturlige forhold og uden vækstfremmer m.v. Når dyrene skal slagtes benytter vi vores eget slagtehus i Skallebølle, derved undgås de lange køreture med stresset kød til følge.

Name: VETS+OUEST
Description:
VETS+OUEST est une société vétérinaire indépendante au service des éleveurs des filières de productions animales.

Notre mission est d’accompagner nos éleveurs pour contribuer durablement à la Souveraineté Alimentaire de la France (des aliments sains au meilleur prix pour nourrir tous les français), à travers une approche holistique, innovante et responsable, du suivi de l’élevage. 

Nous mettons les « datas » au cœur de notre méthodologie afin d'améliorer les performances techniques et la résilience sanitaire des élevages. Grâce à une expertise terrain, des audits réguliers et des outils digitaux de suivi des performances d’élevage, nous construisons en partenariat avec chaque éleveur, des solutions technico-sanitaires sur-mesure, fondées sur la confiance, la transparence et la coopération. 

Notre modèle se distingue par son indépendance, son fonctionnement collaboratif et son engagement plus humain. Nous défendons une pratique vétérinaire qui place la relation avec l’éleveur, la santé animale et la durabilité des filières de production au centre de nos priorités. VETS+OUEST s’adresse aux éleveurs de porcs, de volailles ou ruminants à la recherche d’un conseil efficace, performant et indépendant.

Nous sommes à l’écoute et à la recherche de jeunes vétérinaires en quête d’un cadre stimulant, coopératif et porteur de sens.

Nous croyons à un avenir où l’expertise vétérinaire indépendante contribue activement à une agriculture performante, responsable et harmonieuse.

Rejoignez-nous pour découvrir notre vision, nos valeurs et nos actions sur le terrain.

Dinamismo y versatilidad son dos de sus características mas fundadas en las áreas de producción y comercialización. La búsqueda de nuevos productos presentándolos en las formas farmacéuticas mas adecuadas hacen la elección mas segura al uso profesional de esta línea de productos veterinarios.

Un calificado grupo de técnicos pone a punto cada detalle para la correcta formulación y elaboración de sus preparados.

Orientada en un principio al clínico en pequeñas especies, contempla todas las necesidades del medido veterinario tanto en la medicación parenteral como en la indicación domiciliaria.

El respaldo técnico que encuentra el profesional cuando administra o prescribe alguno de nuestros productos le permite en su quehacer diario contar con la confiabilidad de usar productos probados y controlados.

Sólidos principios éticos y comerciales apegados a la normativa de las autoridades sanitarias a nivel local e internacional nos permiten incursionar con éxito en mercados exigentes.

Name: Petyaari
Description:
Welcome to Petyaari Pet Clinic, Hyderabad’s trusted destination for compassionate pet care. Founded by Dr. Mohd Sajeed, a dedicated veterinarian with a passion for treating pets like family, we are committed to ensuring every pet lives a healthy, happy life. With state-of-the-art facilities in Hyderabadi, we provide comprehensive veterinary services tailored to your pet’s unique needs.

Our Services

At Petyaari Pet Clinic, we offer a full spectrum of care, including:





Emergency Services: Immediate care for critical cases, backed by advanced diagnostics.



Spaying & Neutering: Affordable procedures (₹6,500 for female cats, ₹5,500 for males) to promote pet health and population control.



Pet Grooming Spa: Hygienic, stress-free grooming to keep your pet looking and feeling their best.



Advanced Treatments: Cutting-edge procedures like pet blood transfusion and specialised surgeries.



Vaccinations & Wellness: Preventive care to ensure long-term health.

Our Mission

Our motto, “Compassionate Care, Healthy Pets,” drives everything we do. We combine modern technology with a warm, empathetic approach to create a welcoming environment for pets and their parents. Whether it’s a routine check-up or an emergency, our skilled team, led by Dr. Sajeed, is here to provide personalised care you can trust.

Why Choose Petyaari?





Expertise: Dr. Sajeed’s leadership, backed by his published case reports and innovative treatments, sets us apart.



Trusted by Pet Parents: Rated 4.9/5 on Google Reviews for our commitment to excellence.


Community Focus: From World Veterinary Day celebrations to local outreach, we’re proud to support Hyderabad’s pet community.

Book Your Visit

Experience the Petyaari difference. Follow us for expert pet care tips, or visit petyaari.com to book an appointment today.

Name: VetEmbryo ApS

We offer:
→ Equine oocyte pick up
→ ICSI
→ Freezing of embryos
→ Transfer of embryos 
→ Consultancy, teaching and training
→ Applied clinical research projects

We are exclusive ICSI partners for several of the stallion stations across Europe, have more than 350 stallions available for ICSI and importantly, we never compromise with integrity and honesty in the relationship with our clients and partners.

Name: Apollo College of Veterinary Medicine - India
Description: Apollo Animal Medical Group Trust was established in 2003. The trust has established Apollo College of Veterinary Medicine, Jaipur (Rajasthan) with a broad vision, mission and mandate. The college is affiliated with the Rajasthan University of Veterinary & Animal Sciences (RAJUVAS), Bikaner recognized by Veterinary Council of India, Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying, Govt. of India. College follows course-curriculum as per Minimum Standard of Veterinary Education-2016 prescribed by the Veterinary Council of India (VCI) New Delhi, with emphasis on the disease of bovines including sheep & goats, camel, equines, poultry and companion animals to meet specific requirements of the state. The three-storey building is available for teaching, research and extension education with the most modern clinical, para-clinical and production departments. On each floor of the building there are five wings, each one is housing an independent department with sitting rooms, research labs, store and office accommodations. Five lecture halls are spacious to accommodate 100 students each provided with audiovisual aids, good lighting and sitting facilities.

Somos profesionales con más de 10 años de experiencia práctica en la captura y manejo de fauna silvestre, y gestión comercial internacional. Nuestro lema apunta a una cultura de manejo ético y respetuoso con la fauna silvestre que permita disminuir la morbilidad y mortalidad. 

Nuestra misión es dar respuesta a los requerimientos de productos y servicios para el manejo de fauna silvestre de manera oportuna y eficiente, ofreciendo servicios de calidad, innovadores, seguros y respetando el bienestar animal.

Name: HVD - Hospital veterinário Darabas
Description: O HVD desde 1996 esta dedicado ao atendimento veterinário de cães e gatos. Sempre na vanguarda da tecnologia e da excelência, contamos com uma equipe de profissionais especializados e aparelhos de última geração disponíveis para o bem-estar do seu pet 24 horas por dia.

Name: The Veterinary Surgery
Description: The Veterinary Surgery is oldest small animal hospital in Doha which is run by vets from Canada , Australia, South Africa and UK. It is run to the standards of British and American Hospitals.One of the most up to date clinics in Doha with all the latest gadgets you name it ! It's a full service clinic offering vaccinations, full lab, all surgeries , Rabies Serology (RNATT) test , 24/7 emergency ,Grooming, Boarding, Pet Relocation , Pet Pharmacy , Rehoming , and pet accessories shop

Name: Laboratorios Apinevada S.L
Description:
Atesoramos más de 23 años de experiencia como especialistas en ofrecer a nuestros clientes, nuestros servicios en el control de calidad, logrando evaluar la calidad de la miel y polen u otro producto que compren, vendan o fabriquen, facilitando sus transacciones comerciales y asegurándose la confianza en sus mercados. Del mismo modo, evaluamos y optimizamos los procesos de producción y/o envasado de productos relacionados con la apicultura, así como los conocimientos y formación necesaria para llevar a cabo los ensayos y certificaciones que necesiten, además de realizar el análisis de todo tipo de productos apícolas, aceites, aguas, alimentos y bebidas, calidad del producto, residuos, etc.
Además contamos con una división veterinaria con la que desarrollamos y comercializamos medicamentos veterinarios y complementos nutricionales (nutracéuticos) para abejas.
Actualmente, contamos con clientes en 15 países, con más de 2.300 empresas y apicultores que depositan su confianza en nuestros laboratorios para llevar a cabo el control de calidad de sus productos. Junto a ellos se suma la confianza puesta en nosotros de diversos organismos de certificación y control de producto (DOP, IGP, laboratorios, producción ecológica…).

Name: PetMedic Hospitals
Description:
PetMedic Hospitals is a locally owned and operated group of veterinarian practices serving the Las Vegas Valley. 

We have built a practice based on trust, compassion, and putting our customers first. Our goal is to set the new standard for the veterinary industry, which is why we are early adopters of technology and innovation. 

Our team is comprised of life-long learners and we firmly believe in continued education and growth. Through this philosophy, we've committed ourselves to fostering a work environment where our team shares in our success and grows together. 

We have grown at a healthy and sustainable pace, and are constantly looking for the right opportunities to expand - both in people and locations.

Why work for PetMedic Hospitals? 

With a rapidly growing network, the sky’s the limit with growth opportunities. Team members are offered a variety of benefits, including, but not limited to:

•Ultra-Competitive Compensation Package
•Paid Time Off
•Career Progression
•Professional Development Opportunities
•Bonus Programs
•Discounts

For more information about locations and services, please visit www.petmedic.vet. Follow PetMedic Hospitals on LinkedIn for company updates and career opportunities.

Description:
Desde 2002, a Città Vet tem se consolidado como um hospital veterinário de referência, unindo tecnologia de ponta, equipe altamente capacitada e um atendimento humanizado que coloca o bem-estar dos animais em primeiro lugar.

Com três unidades na Barra da Tijuca – Città Office Mall, Jardim Oceânico e BarraShopping –, oferecemos uma infraestrutura completa para atendimentos clínicos, cirúrgicos e serviços especializados, sempre com foco na inovação e no carinho que cada pet merece.

Nosso compromisso vai além da medicina veterinária: construímos relações de confiança com tutores e entregamos um serviço baseado em ética, transparência e respeito. Acreditamos que cada atendimento deve ser uma experiência única, porque cuidar dos animais não é apenas nossa profissão, é nossa paixão!

Brook Farm Veterinary Center
Description: Brook Farm Veterinary Center is a member of the American Animal Hospital Association. Our practice provides veterinary care for small animals. We are committed to excellence in the provision of professional care for your pets. They are, after all, members of your family - so we treat them like members of ours.

Name: OrthoPets
Description:
OrthoPets is the industry leader in Veterinary Orthotics and Prosthetics (VOP). The company was founded in 2003 by Martin Kaufmann, trained in the field of orthotics, prosthetics, and wheelchair seating, who has worked on designing, fabricating and fitting custom orthotic and prosthetic devices for pets for over 20 years. Additionally, Martin lectures at major universities, consults and teaches veterinarians and continues to advance the VOP industry with research and publications. The Colorado based OrthoPets team has treated over 30,000 pets from 35 different countries since its founding.  

Read more about OrthoPets products and team at https://orthopets.com/

Name: LimesVet
Description:
3D Technology for Vets

The aim of LimesVet is to implement the most advanced technologies in the current veterinary practice and take a novel level in both digital and physical visualization.

These include professional:
- data visualization
- 3D-modelling
- 3D printing
- bioengineering

We are proud that we can work together with veterinarians, physiotherapists & engineers who are proven to work with high quality standards in their fields!

Name: Coral Springs Animal Hospital
Description: Coral Springs Animal Hospital is a three-tier animal hospital offering General Practice Medicine, Emergency, and Specialty care. Our hospital is one of the most modern, state-of-the-art equipped hospitals in the United States and is accredited by the American Animal Hospital Association. We pride ourselves on practicing the highest standards of Veterinary Medicine while taking a fear-free approach with all our patients. Coral Springs Animal Hospital’s goal is to provide pets with the best veterinary care available. Professional, compassionate, and trusted since 1977.

Name: Veterinary Specialists of the Rockies
Description:
Veterinary Specialists of the Rockies is a privately-owned 24/7 emergency animal hospital that offers a full range of advanced specialty medical services in a state-of-the-art facility with the latest in veterinary technology.

        Our brand new facility in Castle Rock was designed to ensure that the pet owner and patient experiences are nothing short of exceptional. We offer care in the departments of Cardiology, Surgery, Internal Medicine and Emergency and Critical Care. Other specialty care areas coming soon are Ophthalmology, Oncology, Dermatology, Rehab and Dentistry.

        Our specialized veterinary services and patient-driven care center attracts pets and their families throughout the Castle Rock and Castle Pines, Douglas County, and beyond. We seek to give pets the best possible treatment outcomes, through personalized, family-friendly attentiveness to all patients with the convenience and education of multi-specialty veterinary care. 

        Your referring veterinarian knows your pet best and this enables them to provide the best primary care services available. By not performing wellness visits, we can focus solely on providing the best veterinary emergency and specialty care possible. We will partner closely with you and your vet to ensure they are as involved with your pet’s care as they would like to be.

Name: VN Recruitment Ltd
Description:
VN Recruitment is a Specialist Veterinary Recruitment Agency, formed independently in October 2014. We provide a personal and professional service helping both Veterinary Nurses and Veterinary Surgeons Nationwide, and place candidates in both temporary and permanent roles. 

When working with clients we aim to always focus on building long term working relationships. We always work honestly and will keep in contact with you through every stage of the recruitment cycle. We appreciate you are also a working business and consequently charge very reasonable fees for the service you receive. 

We strive to always work differently to all other recruitment services in the current marketplace by maintaining an approachable, friendly and dynamic service. 

We endeavour to always build and preserve strong, long-lasting relationships with both our clients and candidates. 

Our goal at VN Recruitment is to be recognised as the most efficient, affordable, personable and dedicated recruitment specialist in the market. 

We are very proud to be considered Preferred Suppliers by ALL of the leading veterinary care providers across the country. 

Our services also include: 
• Strategic Business Planning & Reporting 
• Policy and Procedure Development 
• Marketing, Advertising and Relationship Management 
• Resourcing, Retained Search and Selection 
• Advanced and Preferred Supplier Negotiations 
• Leading Incentive Schemes, Team Competition and Corporate Social Responsibility Initiatives 
• Maintaining own Revenue Stream 

All our team cover both Veterinary Surgeon and Veterinary Nurse roles in their regions. This enables each consultant to gain a broader and more in-depth knowledge of their locations; consequently, making even stronger placements for both clients and candidates.

Name: Hearts Alive Village
Description:
Founded over a decade ago, with the mission of nurturing a compassionate society where animals are supported in their homes and on their journey to find new homes, Hearts Alive Village supports Southern Nevada in many ways.

In 2024, we had a record-breaking year and we expect to see continued growth.

- Treated over 17,000 animals at our low-cost veterinary clinic,
- Found new homes for over 2,000 animals through our foster/adoption programs 
- Distributed over 60,000 pounds of pet food to our local community
- Administered over $180,000 in veterinary care assistance to those in need including low-income individuals, seniors, veterans and children
- Oversaw a veterinary forensics program, where we serve as the final voice for animals
- Run one of the only cat cafes in Las Vegas!

In 2025, we will be opening a high-volume, affordable, spay and neuter clinic in East Las Vegas. This clinic will help us reduce pet overpopulation while simultaneously creating a healthier community. 

Please visit our website to learn more about our work!

Name: BARF COLOMBIA SAS INTERTRADING ARDILA CIA LTDA
Description:
Se trata de alimentar a los perros y gatos adecuadamente. 
Una dieta natural a un carnívoro básicamente consiste en dar alimentos crudos biológicamente apropiados para ellos. 
La meta es maximizar la salud, longevidad y capacidad reproductiva, de modo que se minimice la necesidad de intervención veterinaria. 

Hay una serie de mitos que, por desgracia, están inculcados en la mente de la mayoría de la gente, que hacen que el uso de alimentos comerciales para animales de compañía esté tan extendido y que creo importante destacar a modo de resumen con el fin de resaltar el error que ello supone. 
uno es que  cada comida tiene que ser perfectamente equilibrada. Si pensamos por un minuto como comemos nosotros mismos, nos damos cuenta que esto es antinatural, no vamos a un restaurante y pedimos porcentajes de nutrientes para hacer una comida completamente equilibrada, sino que alcanzamos ese equilibrio con el tiempo a lo largo de varias comidas. Viendo las costumbres de los carnívoros salvajes, entendemos que ellos hacen lo mismo.
Todo esto lleva al siguiente mito que es que el mejor modo de alimentar a un perro o a un gato es con alimentos comerciales perfectamente equilibrados. Todos estos mitos han conducido a que se alimente a los carnívoros domésticos de formas antinaturales, cuyos resultados no pueden ser más que desastrosos como se está viendo.

Alimento de verdad para un amigo verdad

Name: PlutoVets
Description:
PlutoVets is a new generation of veterinary care.
We bring high-quality, compassionate veterinary services directly to your home, making healthcare less stressful for pets, and easier for their humans. 

Founded by a team with backgrounds in tech, marketing, and veterinary medicine, PlutoVets combines innovation, empathy, and convenience to modernize an industry that has long been standing still.

Whether it’s vaccinations, health checks, EU passports, or end-of-life care, our licensed veterinarians deliver personalized care where pets feel safest, at home.
We also operate select clinics to offer flexible care when needed.

At PlutoVets, we put animal welfare, transparency, and veterinarian well-being at the center of everything we do.

Pets are family. They deserve the best, without the stress.

Name: Wild Spirit Foundation
Description:
Wild Spirit Fund is a distinguished non-profit Foundation with operations in Africa and Europe, led by a prominent international coalition of wildlife professionals, scientists, and veterinarians. Our primary focus lies in wildlife conservation and the implementation of the One Health approach. Our fundamental mission is to safeguard biodiversity preservation and promote the health of ecosystems.

As ardent advocates for wildlife health, biodiversity protection, and the sustainable future of our planet, we deeply understand the inherent significance of nature in interconnecting all living organisms, including humans. Nature plays a pivotal role in the survival and advancement of all species on Earth.

In pursuit of our mission, we place special emphasis on two critical aspects: wildlife veterinary capacity building and wildlife health surveillance. By investing in and enhancing the skills of wildlife veterinarians, we empower them to address the complex health challenges facing wildlife populations. Additionally, our wildlife health surveillance efforts allow us to proactively monitor and respond to potential threats, ensuring early detection and containment of diseases that may impact both wildlife and human health.

Through concerted and unwavering efforts in upholding the principles of conservation medicine and One Health, we are firmly dedicated to fostering a harmonious coexistence between wildlife and humanity. Together, we are committed to making a profound and positive impact on the shared world we inhabit, securing a promising future for all living beings.

Name: Gulf Vet Academy
Description: The Gulf Vet Academy is a nonprofit organization dedicated to providing vital information on medicines and treatments for all animals. Aimed at veterinarians, veterinary staff, and animal lovers alike, the academy offers newsletters and resources that enhance knowledge and promote best practices in animal care throughout the community.

Name: IVSA Equine Community

The IVSA Equine Community is a project of the Standing Committee on Veterinary Education (SCoVE) in International Veterinary Students’ Association (IVSA). In order to join the community, please fill the form under this link http://bit.ly/equinecommunity

Description: Le RéPAAS est un réseau de phyto-aromathérapie vétérinaire transversal aux trois organismes techniques vétérinaires : l’AFVAC (Association Française des Vétérinaires pour Animaux de Compagnie), l’AVEF (Association Vétérinaires Equine Française), et la SNGTV (Société Nationale des Groupements Techniques Vétérinaires). Name: Pequenos Animais - Clínica Veterinária
Description:
A Pequenos Animais é uma clínica veterinária em atuação em Presidente Prudente, São Paulo, desde 1983. Foi fundada pelo Médico Veterinário Marco José V. Peixoto, que até hoje é o proprietário, Médico Veterinário responsável e cirurgião.
O nosso quadro de funcionários é formado por dois médicos veterinários, um gerente, uma secretária, dois tosadores (um com experiência de 20 anos em tosas) e um motorista de ambulância veterinária.

Contamos com os serviços de consulta clínica, vacinação e vermifugação, cirurgia, banho e tosa, comercialização de medicamentos e produtos veterinários de alta qualidade.

Name: Friendicoes SECA
Description: Friendicoes SECA (Society for the Eradication of Cruelty to Animals) is a registered non-profit charity in India. It is dedicated to the welfare and protection of domestic animals.  Operating a clinic in Delhin and Nicobar Islands as well as a mobile equine vet service and a country sanctuary.   It sister charity Wildlife SOS rescues and rehabiltates India's wild animals

Name: Animal Imaging - Veterinary Radiology
Description:
Animal Imaging is your resource for all imaging services for both companion animals and equine patients. 

Animal Imaging’s team of board-certified radiologists and technical staff utilize every diagnostic imaging option available to arrive at an accurate diagnosis, which is essential for the implementation of a successful treatment plan. 

We operate as a seamless extension for referring veterinarian’s, providing timely detailed reports and a collaborative environment that’s dedicated to supporting them in all aspects of care. 

Providing unparalleled imaging capabilities and exceptional personal service, Animal Imaging offers quick scheduling and prompt care; all with the convenience and comfort of outpatient service.

Name: New England Wildlife Centers
Description:
The New England Wildlife Centers provide emergency medical care and rehabilitation to sick, injured and orphaned wild animals. Our veterinarian medical teams and educators use this care as a new kind of educational catalyst to teach, to provide job training and to build our community.

We operate two non-profit wildlife hospitals and education Centers: "The Center" in Weymouth, MA, and the Birdsey Cape Wildlife Center, our Cape hospital in Barnstable, MA.

The Center is the first non-profit wildlife hospital and education center built to green LEED specifications in the United States.  

For more information about The Center, please visit our website at newildlife.org.

We host a range of experiences and opportunities, including:

Wildlife Care
The Odd Pet Vet

Wildlife rehab training courses
In-school Science Education
Partnerships in underserved schools
Sustainability education
Free Choice Hands-on Learning

Catbird Cafe -  concerts and open mic

Guest lecturers

Name: Pet Wellness Clinics
Description:
Pet Wellness Clinics is a privately owned, small general practice with nine convenient locations. As a market-leading practice, our mission is to provide Indianapolis-area pets with comprehensive veterinary services and unmatched, compassionate care. Our highly skilled team works together to make a difference, demonstrating a passion for the field and a commitment to providing an exceptional standard of medical care and client education.

At Pet Wellness we thrive on a fun, team-oriented, supportive environment and are proud to have the most current, state of the art, surgical diagnostic tools and equipment available when caring for patients. Digital dental x-ray, full digital radiology system, artificial intelligence (AI) reviews of every radiology case, and a complete in-house lab are only just a few of the tools we utilize at all nine Pet Wellness Clinic locations, and the list continues to grow!  

Pet Wellness Clinics is rapidly expanding our multi-location practice. We are always looking to add to our team and have open positions at several of our locations!

Name: Wheat Ridge Animal Hospital
Description: Providing compassionate, specialty care to pets in the Greater Denver area. The skilled veterinary team at Wheat Ridge Animal Hospital provides 24-hour emergency services, board certified veterinary specialty services, and primary care for dogs and cats.

Name: Pets Forever Chile
Description:
Pet Forever ofrece te ofrece apoyo, un servicio respetuoso y profesional para acompañarte en este momento tan difícil. 

Entendemos que tu mascota es un miembro más de tu familia y cuidar de su último adiós es un honor que nos tomamos muy en serio.

Nuestro Servicio
Contacto (24/7) : Estamos las 24 horas del día, los 7 días de la semana. Sabemos el momento difícil que estas teniendo, por eso estamos a tu servicio.

1.- Retiro a domicilio
Si necesitas el servicio de eutanasia o tu mascota falleció; nos coordinamos para ir a buscarlo a tu casa o Clinica Veterinaria

2.- Cremación
Nuestro proceso de cremación es individual, por lo que ten la certeza que tu mascota sera tratada con mucho respeto.

3.- Devolución
