Name: VetCheck 24/7 & Medechat
Description:
After hours triage service for veterinary practices.

Delivering a professional after hours service to your pet owners just got easier. Divert your after hours calls to the vet nurse triage service trusted by practices across Australia and New Zealand.

Name: Hannah Pet Hospital
Description: Hannah Pet Hospitals offer a unique Pet healthcare model and are expanding nationally. Instead of paying for every visit to the veterinarian and every medical procedure, Hannah provides comprehensive veterinary and behavioral care services for one predictable, low monthly fee.

Name: Madison Veterinary Specialists
Description: Madison Veterinary Specialists (MVS) is a group of veterinary caregivers providing multi-specialty and 24/7 emergency care. We strive to provide a high level of specialized and emergency care in a compassionate setting. We embrace the team approach to medicine working collaboratively between in-house services and closely with referring primary care family veterinarians. We have board certified specialist in ophthalmology, oncology, surgery, internal medicine, neurology and dermatology.  Dogs and cats have 24/7 emergency care access with specialists on-call for a wide variety of challenging medical and surgical cases. Our facility is staffed and equipped to accommodate a full spectrum of emergency and specialty cases ranging from canine cataract surgery, management of challenging medicine cases, toxicities, traumas and complete orthopedic, soft tissue and neurological surgery services. We have a complete state of the art in house laboratory, digital radiography, CT, complete scoping equipment and a canine and feline blood bank.

Name: Dierenartsenpraktijk De Linde

Name: Woozelbears Canine Hydrotherapy and Dog grooming
Description:
Woozelbears is a successful hydrotherapy and dog grooming centre, first established in 2010. 
Our passion is to create successful professional veterinary referral centres for the rehabilitation of small animals, primarily dogs. Our existing centres are currently servicing Oxfordshire, Wiltshire and West Sussex in 5 locations and we are looking for new members to join our team.
We are looking for candidates that are willing to work hard but primarily have a love for dogs and a passion to work in rehabilitation.
We have 5 successful centres that have been developed since 2010 and we consistently service over 100 dogs a week in each location. With my experience in the veterinary practice and hydrotherapy I set out to provide partnerships to show dog lovers how to set up successful professional centres and to support them throughout the process of business, which can be a daunting process.
Our specialist finance team will work with you to help provide you with the funds, so don't be put off thinking you have to finance alone!
The centres have top of the range equipment including large bespoke hydrotherapy pools, aquatic treadmills, hydrotherapy spa's, K-laser and we have a gait assessment treadmill. Our team at Woozelbears are highly qualified personnel and we take pride in our vast knowledge of gait analysis and rehabilitation.
There are many areas that are waiting for a facility like this, full of todays technology for rehabilitating man's best friend.

We also offer Small Animal Hydrotherapy courses with Animal Courses Direct. For more details go to https://animalcoursesdirect.co.uk/our-courses/hydrotherapy-courses/

Description: 3A offers specialist services carried out by specialist veterinarians with more than 15 years of experience in the field of pain treatment (acute and chronic) and individualized anesthetic management of your pet.

Name: Improve Veterinary Education AU
Description:
Improve Veterinary Education Australia provides veterinary training and education through year-long modular programs and weekend fast track courses.

Improve was established as a veterinary education company by a dedicated group of veterinary surgeons in the UK. It has now expanded across the globe with offices in the UK, Europe and around the world, including Australia. The primary mission of the company is to provide the highest quality continuing veterinary education to practicing veterinarians, nurses and technicians.

Our focus is on a practical and small group teaching format, which allows delegates to develop skills and knowledge in a hands on logical way, with the close supervision and mentoring of specialist veterinarians.

Name: Max Vets
Description: Max Vets Referal Hospital( Since 1952) is a full-service Veterinary Hospital in East of Kailash with branches in NCR that offers comprehensive medical services for cats, dogs and other small animals  in New Delhi and the surrounding areas. From preventive care to surgery, our broad and varied service offering can meet all of your pet’s health needs in one place.

Name: Bell Equine Veterinary Clinic
Description:
Located in the heart of Kent, the BELL EQUINE VETERINARY CLINIC (BEVC) was established in 1989. Since then it has expanded to become a large specialist equine hospital and ambulatory practice. BEVC aims to offer a professional, efficient and compassionate service to all our clients and their horses, as well as pursuing the goal of clinical excellence.

Currently, 30 veterinary surgeons work in the practice, supported by over 40 nursing, stable and administration staff. Our nursing team includes 3 Equine Veterinary Nurses (EVNs) and 9 Registered Veterinary Nurses (RVNs) (with equine specialism in imaging and surgical nursing). We are also a registered veterinary nurse training practice and currently have 2 trainee RVNs as well as Patient Care Assistants (PCA).

We are fully accredited by the RCVS Practice Standards Scheme as an Equine Veterinary Hospital and have received 'outstanding' awards in all available categories of the scheme; client services, in-patient services, diagnostic services, team and professional responsibility and ambulatory service.

Name: GOAT & SHEEP FARMERS WELFARE ASSOCIATION
Description: GSFWA is a non government organization working extensively for the welfare of Goat & Sheep Farmers of India through technical support, farmer friendly policy reforms & recommendations, research & development, improvement of indigenous breeds of Goats & Sheep, support organized farming, motivate farmers to adopt innovative management techniques at their farms and do all other activities to fulfill its objectives.

Name: AeroCollect
Description:
With AeroCollect, you capture and retain bacteria and
viruses directly from the air quickly and efficiently. You will
receive the results of your measurement within a few days.

This state-of-art veterinary surveillance technology allows you
to monitor the health of your herds, optimize your production,
and only initiate medical treatment when it is considered
necessary after consultation with your veterinarian.

The purpose is to optimize animal welfare, production quality
and reduce the use of antibiotics. Thus, benefitting you, your
company, the industry as well as the welfare of your animals.

Name: Dr Pet - Planos de Saúde para Pets
Description:
A Doutor Pet é a maior operadora de planos de saúde para cães e gatos do Brasil. 

Nosso DNA é proporcionar saúde, bem-estar, proteção e melhoria na qualidade de vida dos pets e seus tutores de maneira prática e sem burocracias.

Orientada pelo legítimo sentimento de melhorar a qualidade de vida e o bem estar dos animais de estimação, nós oferecemos (e incentivamos!) o acesso à prestação de serviços preventivos e assistenciais para cães e gatos. 

Venha usufruir da maior Rede Credenciada do Brasil! 

Visite nosso site: www.doutorpet.com ou baixe nosso aplicativo, disponível para GooglePlay e Apple Store.

Name: Cat Haven
Description:
Cat Haven is Western Australia’s largest shelter for homeless, lost and abused cats.

 We are a not-for-profit organisation that is dedicated to caring for abandoned cats and kittens by finding new families for thousands each year.

 If you're a cat lover, consider supporting us through a donation or membership, by volunteering, or by using our specialist boarding facilities and veterinary services.

Name: Onpets
Description:
Our focus and objective are to build a new age pet care solution that can provide pet parents with a hassle-free experience to manage and take care of their pets sitting at home, our love for animals drives us to go the extra mile to ensure that your pets get best available healthcare facilities at affordable costs.
We are a group of skilled professionals trained with advanced preventive pet care techniques which can help your pets led a healthy life, we love to communicate with pet parents to understand their pain areas and work closely to address their issues in managing their pets.
Our work is demanding and emotional, we bring loads of compassion and positive energy to see happy and satisfied clients.

Services
Our services are derived and planned based on the requirements of pet parents, we bring the best healthcare facilitates to your doorsteps so that your pets and you can have a stress free experience. 

Vet On Call (Home Visit): We know your pain areas, So we are bringing our experienced veterinarians right to your home to help you navigate your dog’s or cat’s health issues.

Pet Vaccinations: We’ll keep your pet safe from Rabies, Distemper, Parvo, Hepatitis, Leptospirosis, Heartworm, Bordetella and more. Register your pet with the Onpets vaccination program for a complete home-based service.

Custom Pet Nutrition: Every pet has a unique requirement in terms of nutrition; our nutritionist can help you customize the foods and ingredients that work best for them.

Diagnostic Tests: We perform blood, urine and fecal tests, digital X-rays, USG and other tests on location to provide fast and reliable results which can help detect and prevent major illness.

Name: Nutricor S.L
Description:
We are veterinarians and nutritionists

Nutricor was set up as a company to improve the quality of life in the cattle-breeding sector.

We are a well-consolidated company among the most important in the field of animal nutrition.
We handle and feed a high percentage of the dairy cows, sheep, goats, calves and horses of Spain.
This has led to our becoming market leaders in our country.

Name: American Board of Veterinary Practitioners
Description: ABVP was founded in 1978, and our Diplomates have a common desire and willingness to deliver superior, comprehensive, multi-disciplinary veterinary service to the public. We are veterinarians who have demonstrated expertise in the broad range of clinical subjects relevant to their practice and display the ability to communicate medical observations and data in an organized and appropriate manner. ABVP currently awards certification in eleven recognized veterinary specialties (RVS's).

Name: FAMV | Federação Académica de Medicina Veterinária | IVSA Portugal
The Veterinary Hospital
Description:
Located in the River Road area of Eugene, the veterinarians at The Veterinary Hospital are committed to your pet's health. Our Eugene based AAHA accredited hospital excels in the science of Veterinary medicine and was founded in 1965. Dr. Nancy Johnson and our team thrive on providing compassionate veterinary care in the Lane County area.

The Veterinary Hospital is a full-service pet hospital whose mission is to provide the highest standard of veterinary care for pets. We bring friendly, informative, and supportive services to you and your pet, while maintaining a superior working environment for our employees.

The Veterinary Hospital offers the Eugene pet community emergency veterinary services as well as medical, surgical, dental and wellness veterinary care. With an in-house pharmacy and access to specialists, our facility offers one stop for your pet's health and medical care.

Name: Versa Vet Partners
Description:
At Versa, we are wholeheartedly committed to our mission: Empowering veterinary professionals with state-of-the-art products and solutions, enabling them to make a profound impact on the lives of their patients.
 
Our vision guides us towards a future where we stand as the leading provider of revolutionary clinical veterinary solutions, driving meaningful change and enhancing the welfare of animals within veterinary care.

Name: Norecopa
Description: Norecopa is Norway's centre for the 3Rs (Replacement, Reduction and Refinement of animal experiments). Norecopa maintains a large database of global quality resources to help all stakeholders achieve these ends.

Name: Arrovet
Description:
Arrovet is the animal health arm of Arrotex, one of Australia’s most trusted healthcare companies. For over 25 years, Arrotex has improved access to quality medicines for Australians. Now, Arrovet brings that same commitment to animal health. 

Arrovet’s mission is to make animal care smarter and more accessible. We support vets, farmers, and animal health professionals with affordable medicines, intelligent technology, and lasting partnerships.

We care for people that care for animals!

Name: San Luis Rey Equine Hospital
Description:
For over 40 years, San Luis Rey Equine Hospital (SLREH) has provided dedicated care to the Pacific West Coast and Southern California Equine community.  San Luis Rey Equine Hospital combines true compassion with state-of-the-art technology to provide unparalleled medical and specialized surgical equine care with our expertise branching beyond these specific fields into sports medicine, lameness and rehabilitation.  As leaders in the equine industry, we dedicate our resources to put your horse first, providing unwavering compassionate care and attention to detail.

Mission Statement – San Luis Rey Equine Hospital strives to provide superior equine health services in a compassionate environment to make a positive, measurable difference in the well-being & athletic success of horses.  We commit our resources to deliver responsible, state-of-the-art diagnostics & treatments while focusing attention to the individual needs of horses, clients, and the local veterinary community. It is our goal to work hand in hand with referring veterinarians to provide the best possible solutions for you and your horse at the hospital, as well as at home.

Vision Statement – Advancing equine veterinary health services through dedication, compassion, collaboration, & education to deliver a continuum of care that benefits the equine athlete and equine community.

Name: Dimedium Group
Description:
Dimedium Group is a pan-Baltic group that unites three companies in Estonia, Latvia and Lithuania. All the companies operate under a uniform motto „Full animal health“ and have more than 25 years of industry experience in promoting and supporting agriculture and animal well-being. 

Dimedium Group’s vision and aim are to be the intermediator that brings global top products from the industry’s forerunners to local clinics, farms and our customers’ homes. We provide a diverse portfolio of products, covering the needs of the entire sector: high-quality veterinary medicines and vaccines, feeds and feed additives, milk replacers, health and hygiene products, breeding material, farming equipment, instruments and software. For companion animals, we offer a wide selection of pet foods, feed additives and pet supplies from the world’s leading producers.

We are constantly updating our portfolio to meet the needs of our customers in the best way. Our brand Smart Farm unites precise technology and modern solutions that facilitate sustainable growth and support animal welfare. We evaluate livestock farmers’ time, peace of mind, and animals’ health. Our aim is to to increase farmers’ profitability and performance. 

Dimedium Group is a responsible company – our activities are in line with the concerns of the natural and market environment of the community as well as the interests of our employees, customers and business partners.

Dimedium Group is always open to collaboration with partners all over the World who share our values.

You can reach us via info@dimediumgroup.eu

Name: Facultad de Medicina Veterinaria y de Zootecnia UNAL
Description: La Facultad de Medicina Veterinaria y de Zootecnia forma profesionales al más alto nivel académico que contribuyen con la generación, transmisión y aplicación del conocimiento científico y tecnológico en el campo de la salud y la producción animal, teniendo en cuenta las necesidades prioritarias de la sociedad Colombiana, a través de la investigación, la extensión y  la formación de profesionales de pregrado y de posgrado afianzados en los valores que caracterizan a la Universidad Nacional de Colombia.

Name: Mobile Vet
Description:
A MobileVet, empresa de diagnóstico veterinário e especialidades, surgiu desta necessidade. Desde 2005, realiza exames de diagnóstico por imagem diretamente nos consultórios e clínicas veterinárias, garantindo a comodidade do animal de estimação e do seu tutor, além da possibilidade de elaborar, juntamente com o médico veterinário responsável, diagnósticos e condutas com maior eficácia. Isto permite uma troca valiosa de informações e fortalece o relacionamento técnico/profissional entre o clínico e o especialista.

Além dos benefícios para o cliente e o profissional veterinário, os serviços da Mobile Vet  otimizam a estrutura física existente das clínicas, junto com a possibilidade de criar renda extra.

EXAMES QUE A MOBILEVET REALIZA:
Aferição da Pressão Arterial
Ecodopplercardiograma
Eletrocardiograma
Eletrocardiograma a Distância
Holter 24 horas
Monitoramento Eletrocardiográfico
Radiologia Digital
Telerradiologia
Ultrassonografia Abdominal
Ultrassonografia Cervical
Ultrassonografia Torácica

PROCEDIMENTOS QUE A MOBILEVET REALIZA
Abdominocentese
Cistocentese
Citologia Guiada por Ultrassom
Pericardiocentese
Toracocentese

ESPECIALIDADES QUE MOBILEVET ATENDE
Acupuntura
Cardiologia
Dermatologia
Endocrinologia
Felinos
Fisioterapia
Nefrologia
Nutrologia
Odontologia
Oftalmologia
Oncologia

Name: Association of Asian Veterinary Medical Professionals - AAVMP
Description:
The AAVMP was founded by Asian veterinary professionals to foster a community for Asian veterinary professionals and establish a veterinary profession that reflects the diverse communities that we serve. 

Our mission is to empower and support Asian veterinary professionals and encourage cultural awareness in a diverse society.

The AAVMP upholds the following core values: 
- Representation: To increase visibility of Asian professionals within the veterinary community, fill leadership positions, and motivate future generations, - Mentorship: To foster success for Asian pre-veterinary and veterinary professionals by offering support and mentorship with the consideration of individual cultural backgrounds. 
- Advocacy: To advocate for the needs of our members within the veterinary profession, to provide information about minority struggles within the profession, and to highlight the value in having a diverse community. 
- Fellowship: To unite and support the Asian veterinary community as a whole and demonstrate our allyship alongside other affinity organizations.

Name: Hospital Referência Veterinária Montenegro
Description:
O Hospital Veterinário Montenegro, fundado em 1999, orgulha-se de prestar um serviço completo 24 horas por dia, com médicos veterinários em permanência nas suas instalações, possuindo equipamento médico de ponta e destacando-se por possuir uma equipa jovem motivada e pronta a abdicar da
sua vida pessoal em prol de um serviço cuidado e completo. O objetivo do hospital, desde a sua fundação, consiste numa formação permanente (procurando sempre fazer melhor.)

Name: The Barkley Pet Camp
Description: The Barkley Pet Camp is Dubai's #1 pet care destination for dogs and cats. At The Barkley, we combine long-term care principles with homelike amenities and recreational activity to provide and personalize the ultimate comfort, safety and happiness for each individual pet guest.

Name: Revistele Veterinarul
Description: Veterinary Social Platform - Online Science Community - free registration, free access to news, videos, photos, discussion groups, forums, science articles and many more... Join us on: www.veterinarul.ro

Name: ALCYON FRANCE
Description: First veterinary central purchasing organization in Europe

Name: Catskill Veterinary Services, PLLC
Description: Catskill Veterinary Services, PLLC is a mixed animal veterinary practice located in Rock Hill, New York.   The practice strives to offer a full range of veterinary care including routine care and advanced veterinary care

Name: TopVet
Description:
TopVet is a growing veterinary network that connects pet owners with trusted local practices through intelligent search, direct scheduling, and verified online visibility.

Our platform helps veterinary practices strengthen their digital presence through local SEO optimization, premium listings, and data-driven visibility tools. By integrating with existing calendars and streamlining discovery, TopVet empowers clinics to attract more clients and convert online searches into real appointments.

With thousands of pet owners using TopVet to find and schedule care each month, our network is redefining how modern veterinary practices connect with their communities.

Name: Vetario Intensive Care Units
Description: The Vetario Intensive Care Units are animal care products designed, manufactured and distributed by Brinsea Products Ltd in Somerset, England. Brinsea has worked for many years with vets and animal rescue centres to provide equipment designed to give sick and injured animals the environment they need to make the quickest and safest recovery. Vets and vet nurses need to spend as much of their time as possible on their patients and Vetario products are designed to be practical and functional. The emphasis is on ease of use, toughness and above all, ease of cleaning. Vetario intensive care products are popular with vets, animal hospitals, rescue centres and animal breeders across a wide range of countries. Vetario – where animal care comes first.

Name: Suinesp
Description: O Suinesp é o grupo de estudos em suinocultura da Unesp/FCAV. Realizamos cursos, palestras, eventos e encontros, afim de contribuir na formação profissional e humanística de seus membros e, de todos que participam das nossas atividades.

Name: The Urban Pet
Description: We are dog and cat people. Organise pet care retail store for life time needs of your pet with the promise of unconditional love . For us pet are family. We believe in safety innovation and empathy .

Name: CURADLE
Description:
Hi, we are CURADLE, a PET ICU brand from South Korea. CURADLE Smart Pet Incubator has been exported to about 30 countries around the world, including medically advanced countries like the USA, UK, Austria, Japan, etc.

CURADLE is based on the needs and requirements of real veterinary professionals. We've conducted clinical tests and offer an optimal recovery environment post-surgery, specifically designed for our furry patients requiring oxygen therapy.

For more information on the CURADLE Pet Incubator, please check the website link below!
Thank you :)

Name: doc4pets GmbH
Description: Die doc4pets GmbH ist eine Gruppe von fünf inhabergeführten Kleintierpraxen im südwestdeutschen Raum mit Standorten in Karlsruhe, Karlsbad, Malsch und Renchen.

Name: BeFeed
Description:
En BeFeed, desarrollamos aditivos nutricionales revolucionarios que optimizan el rendimiento de tu producción, mientras cuidamos el planeta.
Combinamos la ciencia, la tecnología y el respeto por el medio ambiente para ofrecer soluciones nutricionales que no solo mejoran el rendimiento animal, sino que también protegen nuestro planeta. Nuestro compromiso es maximizar la productividad, mejorar la salud animal y liderar la sostenibilidad en la industria.

Name: TechVet Júnior
Description: A TechVet Jr. é uma empresa júnior da UFSM (Universidade  Federal de Santa Maria) formada por alunos dos cursos de Medicina Veterinária e Zootecnia, uma associação civil sem fins lucrativos, os quais procuraram colocar em prática o conhecimento adquirido em aula por meio de vivências ao lado do produtor. Tais práticas envolvem manejos nutricional e forrageiro, controle de rebanho, acompanhamento de produções animais, protocolos IATF e exames e análises laboratoriais.
Location: Santa Maria, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Wizzvet Italia
Description:
Wizzvet – La piattaforma leader per la formazione continua e la tele-expertise veterinaria
Wizzvet è la prima piattaforma europea progettata esclusivamente per veterinari, offrendo formazione continua di alto livello e un servizio innovativo di tele-expertise.

 Cosa offriamo
-Formazione online con webinar brevi (15 min), tenuti da specialisti diplomati nei college europei e/o americani.
-Accesso a casi clinici complessi, con risposte personalizzate da esperti in meno di 48 ore.
-Una community internazionale con oltre 14.000 veterinari che aggiornano quotidianamente le proprie competenze.
 Perché scegliere Wizzvet?
 Apprendimento flessibile: Formazione accessibile ovunque e in qualsiasi momento.
 Esperti di livello: I migliori specialisti condividono conoscenze pratiche ed aggiornamenti scientifici.
 Crescita professionale garantita: Migliora le tue competenze e offri cure migliori ai tuoi pazienti.

 Oltre 280 conferenze online in diretta o replay già disponibili!

 Unisciti a Wizzvet e porta la tua carriera al livello successivo!
 Scopri di più su www.wizzvet.com

Name: SI-Vétérinaire
Description: Fort d’une longue expérience depuis de très nombreuses années dans le domaine de l’imagerie diagnostique vétérinaire, l’équipe SIV, en relation étroite avec ses fabricants et ses fournisseurs, commercialise et distribue des solutions d’imagerie diagnostiques destinées et dédiées au monde vétérinaire.

Name: Dyrlægegruppen Dania
Description:
Dyrlægegruppen Dania er en lokalt forankret dyrlægepraksis med moderne og veludstyrede hospitalsfaciliteter i Hinnerup og Hammel. Vi arbejder #medorsorg, og et besøg hos os skal altid være en god og tryg oplevelse – for både dig og dit kæledyr.

Vi interesserer og bekymrer os for dyr. Det er dét, vi kalder omsorg. Vi tager hånd om dit dyrs sundhed og trivsel. Et besøg hos Dyrlægegruppen Dania er altid kendetegnet ved trygge omgivelser, nærværende personale og faciliteter og udstyr af højeste kvalitet. 

Hos Dyrlægegruppen Dania er omsorg en mærkesag, der er dybt forankret i vores DNA og den måde, vi dagligt interagerer og kommunikerer med både dyr, ejere og kolleger. Omsorg er et tilvalg, en prioritet, som vi vægter højt og tager os tid til, selv på dage hvor tempoet på klinikkerne kan være højt. 

Vi er lokalt forankret med moderne hospitalsfaciliteter i Hinnerup og Hammel til medicinsk og kirurgisk behandling af de fleste lidelser hos hunde, katte og andre smådyr. Foruden faciliteter til smådyr består hospitalet i Hammel af en veludstyret hesteafdeling med undersøgelses- og operationsfaciliteter. 

Vi har særlig ekspertise i reproduktion og arbejder lokalt, nationalt og globalt med fertilitetsbehandling af hunde, katte og heste.

Velkommen til Dyrlægegruppen Dania – stedet med omsorg for dyr og mennesker.

Name: DMS Veterinary
Description:
Direct Medical Supplies Limited offers a comprehensive range of Critical Care, IV Administration, Surgical and Wound Care products to the Healthcare and Veterinary market.

DMS is committed to offering customers more than your normal supplier, by providing unique products and general everyday requirements for the operating room, intensive care, nursing, wound care and infection control.

Providing a one source, multi product choice that enables customers to manage their consumable supplies in a efficient and cost effective manner.

Name: My Animal Dispensary
Description: My Animal Dispensary is Singapore’s first dedicated online veterinary dispensary for pet owners and businesses. We provide a reliable, personal and professional service that fulfils pet prescriptions and veterinary products at accessible prices, conveniently delivered to your door.

Name: Animari Hayvan Sağlığı
Description: Pet ve Çiftlik Hayvanları için Destek Ürünler

Name: Cow Coach
Description:
Are you a dairy farmer looking to invest in automatic milking & precision dairy technologies? Cow Coach helps you make better decisions by offering independent, science-based advice. We want to boost the health & welfare of your dairy herd, while improving your return on investment. 

We offer the following services:

1) Preparing for robotic milking

Are you thinking about switching to automatic milking? That means you will have to make some important decisions which determine the future course of your farm. You need to be well-prepared. Cow Coach offers a starter pack to dairy farmers who are planning on using automatic milking systems.

2) Robotic milking benchmarking

Would you like to get more insight into your farm's performance? Are you focusing on the right KPI's? Cow Coach can help you identify areas of improvement. 

3) Troubleshooting

Are you facing a particular problem with automatic milking, dairy technology or general herd management? Or do you simply wish to dot the i's and cross the t's on your dairy farm? Cow Coach offers support in the following areas: general herd health, automatic milking, mastitis and milk quality. 

4) Training & workshops

We love to share our knowledge and exchange ideas. We love to share out knowledge! Cow Coach gives presentations, workshops and trainings on the topic of robotic milking, dairy sensors & dairy health. 

Check out our website for more information.

Name: Two By Two Veterinary Centre
Description:
Nestled in the heart of Finchley, north London, Two By Two Veterinary Centre understands that your pet means the world to you. Founded in 2017 as an independent veterinary practice, we provide a friendly, caring and individually tailored service that puts your pet’s health and wellbeing first and foremost.

We are proud to welcome pets of all shapes and sizes – whether they come with fur, beaks, scales or feathers. Rest assured, we always go that extra mile to give you and your pet the very best level of support, care and professional advice that animals inevitably need through life.

Name: ProSource Veterinarian Supplier
Description:
ProSource Veterinary Supplier specializes in bridging the gap between the Veterinarian World and the Manufacturer. As Veter.Sut's Exclusive North American Distributor we set up an account with your location and offer direct drop shipping from the manufacturer facility to your door. All products ship directly from the manufacturers facilities to eliminated part of the supply chain and give to the best direct prices and service on all your suture needs. With over 35 years of combined experience ProSource Vet will provide you with the the best products and advise.

Our supplier Veter.Sut uses high-quality raw materials in the manufacturing process that maintain quality as well as safety. This gives our customers a high-quality, high-performance product and peace of mind that their patients are being taken care of. We hold international certifications that help to guarantee quality. Vete.Sut is FDA registered, ISO 13485 and ISO9001 certified.

Name: Clínica Veterinaria Taco
Description:
Nuestro Hospital se inauguró en el año 1983, comenzando como consultorio, continuó
como Clínica Veterinaria y desde hace muchos años continuó como Hospital Veterinario
de pequeños animales y exóticos, con SERVICIO PERMANENTE, 24 HORAS.
Nuestro centro acoge estudiantes y veterinarios con Becas Erasmus a nivel Europeo, así
como a alumnos de la Universidad y centros extranjeros de formación.
El Director es autor del libro: Hepatología Clínica y Cirugía hepática en pequeños
animales y exóticos. Edit. Servet. 2012. 

Los clientes disfrutan de un aparcamiento privado delante de las puertas del hospital.

EQUIPAMIENTO:
- Equipo TAC que nos permite acceder a los diagnósticos más complejos.
- Ecógrafo-ecocardiógrafo-doppler de alta definición.
- Equipo de Rayos X digital directo de última generación.
- Banco de sangre de perros y gatos.
- Electrocardiógrafo (con 6 derivaciones simultáneas e interpretación automática)
- 3 Salas de hospitalización. Todas disponen de un sistema de grabación que permite a los
propietarios observar su mascota a través de internet. Hay múltiples bombas de infusión
para la administración de fluidos intravenosos.
- Equipo de Limpieza dental por ultrasonidos.
- El material se esteriliza en autoclave de máxima seguridad, de última generación y se
confirma la total esterilidad obtenida mediante técnicas químicas y biológicas.
- El Quirófano dispone de equipo de anestesia inhaladora, respirador automático, monitor
multiparamétrico, doppler de presión, monitor de presión invasiva y no invasiva,
electrocauterio, gafas lupa binoculares, bomba de infusión de sueros etc. Dispone de
motor especial para cirugía ortopédica y columna y un Equipo de Sistema Ligasure.
- Equipo de Video-endoscopia digestiva.
- Equipo de Broncoscopia.
- Equipo de Laparoscopia y Toracoscopia.
- Pruebas de imagen como Artroscopia, Cistoscopia, Rinoscopia y Vaginoscopia.
- Laboratorio Veterinario.
- Peluquería de pequeños animales.
Location: Santa Cruz de Tenerife, Santa Cruz de Tenerife

Name: Eastern Animal Hospital
Description: Eastern Animal Hospital is an award-winning, AAHA accredited, small animal hospital. We have been setting the standard in Veterinary medicine, surgery and client experience for over 30 years. We treat every patient, and owner, with the utmost kindness and respect. We offer an array of services to nutrure you and your pet from puppy and kitten-hood through their senior years.  Our services include: wellness care, emergency/urgent care, dental care, surgery, boarding and doggie daycare.

Name: VetEnvoy Ltd
Description:
Our VetEnvoy eClaim service works with Practice Management Systems (PMS), enabling clinics to quickly and securely process insurance claims on a completely paperless basis. Free up your time and get paid quicker with VetEnvoy’s fast, simple and low-cost service. 
Additional services such as microchip registration and laboratory reporting are also available, check out our website partners page for more details!

Name: Compassion Without Borders
Description:
CWOB is a non-profit dedicated to providing brighter futures to animals in need on both sides of the border.  We help those who have the most urgent need and the least likely to be helped due to geographic, cultural and socioeconomic barriers.

Founded in 2001, Co-Founders, Dr. Christi Camblor and Moncho Camblor, combined their skills and passion to help at-risk animals.  Dr. Camblor has been a practicing Veterinarian for nearly 20 years.  Moncho Camblor is an established Creative Director and Graphic Designer.  Today, CWOB has a strong presence in Sonora, Mexico and Northern California, providing our rescued dogs with shelter, veterinary care and adoption placement.  In addition, CWOB provides a full range of veterinary services to thousands of animals living with their families in low income communities. 

These are the foundational programs of our life-saving work.

Homelessness Prevention
•We provide low cost veterinary care and spay/neuter for animals in underserved communities. 

Rescue - International and US
•We directly rescue and transport dogs living in impoverished areas on both sides of the border, with a focus on Sonora, Mexico and Central Valley, California.

Veterinary Care
•We provide veterinary services by staff veterinarians and vet technicians, offering care, treatment and surgical procedures to our rescued animals.  

Housing and Adoption
•Our rescue dogs are sheltered at our facilities in both Mexico and Northern California.  We transport dogs from Mexico and Central Valley, CA to our shelter in Santa Rosa, where the dogs are ultimately adopted.

Partnerships and Collaborations
•Our ability to save more lives is directly linked to the strong partnerships we have nurtured over the years.  Our Interstate Chihuahua Transport Program is one example of a collaborative effort between many groups and shelters that has saved the lives of 1730 Chihuahuas to-date.

Name: Gobuddie
Description:
Plataforma digital con la mayor comunidad de profesionales del cuidado animal y servicios a nivel nacional.

Ayudamos a familiares de mascotas encontrar, comparar y reservar servicios veterinarios de forma ágil y fácil, cerca de ti.

Nuestro objetivo es conectar a los profesionales de la veterinaria con los familiares de mascotas , digitalizando el sector, ofreciéndoles visibilidad y reputación online , trabajando distintos servicios adaptados a las necesidades de cada animal y con ello, perfeccionando  la comunicación entre ellos.

Únete a Gobuddie, crea tu perfil GRATIS y sé GoDigital! 

No te quedes atrás, participa a la revolución digital del sector veterinario!

Name: Bio98 srl
Description:
Bio98 srl, con sede a Milano, è un'azienda farmaceutica italiana, completamente dedicata al settore della Medicina Veterinaria. 
Nata nel 1998, distribuisce in Italia farmaci e prodotti immunologici per Bovini, altri Animali da Reddito, Equini ed Animali da Compagnia, sia in qualità di distributore per l'Italia che come titolare dell'Autorizzazione all'Immissione in commercio. Bio98 si propone come partner del medico veterinario nella sua attività clinica quotidiana. 

Ha lanciato con successo sul mercato italiano, tra l'altro, importanti prodotti immunologici: Trichoben per la prevenzione e la terapia della dermatofitosi nel bovino, Kolibin per la prevenzione delle diarree neonatali nel bovino, Biofel M Plus per la prevenzione e la terapia della dermatofitosi nel cane e nel gatto e  il  vaccino marker per IBR: BioBos IBR Marker Inattivato.  Dalla fine del 2024 ha espanso la propria attività anche nel settore suinicolo, lanciando ben quattro prodotti immunologici in 5 mesi: Biosuis Rokoclos (unico prodotto che contiene anche Rotavirus suino), Biosuis Salm, Biosuis Mhyo e Parvoerysin.

Dal 2008 all'inizio del 2025,  Bio98 srl è  stata il distributore esclusivo per l'ITALIA degli ecografi dedicati alla Medicina Veterinaria di BCF Technology, ora parte di IMV imaging costruendo in prima persona il  grande successo di Easi Scan e del più recente Easi Scan Go nel nostro Paese!

Name: Veterinary Specialist Consultations
Description:
Veterinary Specialist Consultations was founded by Dr Yaiza Forcada and Professor Dr Stijn Niessen, two Board Certified Veterinary Specialists (internal medicine), with extensive experience in veterinary clinical practice, academia, private practice, education, project and people management and research.

VSC aims to provide ethically sound, evidence-based, high quality, innovative help in all matters relating to animal health and veterinary, including education, mentorship, research and clinical support. 

Among many other things, we have expertise in telemedicine and one of our first achievements has been helping the global Teleradiology company VetCT transform into a global Telemedicine company, providing not just radiology, but instead 360 degree telemedicine services. Our latest collaboration involves helping the Veterinary Information Network (a community of >90,000 veterinarians; www.vin.com) create a Veterinary Mentorship Academy (www.vin.com/vma), as well as grow its membership globally, with a focus on Europe. In addition we helped develop a new oral drug for diabetes in pets after years of having only insulin injections as a treatment option. Trial design and execution are second nature to us.

Veterinary Specialist Consultations also provides unique and innovative Continuous Professional Development (CE) services driven by passion to teach, a strong believe in application of logic and growth mindset. We provide these services for Universities, non-profit societies, other CE providers as well as many other interested parties.

In addition VSC delivers advice on a consultancy basis to a range of veterinary, medical, educational, one health, pharmaceutical and other (animal) health institutions, individuals and companies.

We take pride in trying to do the right thing for the right reasons. 

We are "mental health awareness" trained. 

We always strive to remain independent, friendly, ethical and kind.

Alles für Ihr Tier an einem Ort

Alle Praxen sind mit modernster medizinschen Technik ausgestattet. So sind das umweltfreundliche und tierschonende digitale Röntgen, Ultraschall und Labor bei uns Standard.

Name: Green Dog Dental & Veterinary Center
Description:
Green Dog Veterinary Center is one of Los Angeles's first hybrid outpatient specialty veterinary centers. Offering general practice & wellness appointments, full-service dental care, board-certified specialty services, and some of the most advanced imaging services available.

You may have heard of a veterinary hybrid hospital, but a hybrid clinic works a little differently. Typically, if your general practice veterinarian recommends specialty medicine they can't provide, your only option is a large hybrid hospital where walk-in wait times can be up to 4 hours and appointment dates could be 3 to 4 months away. Additionally, costs for services range in the tens of thousands of dollars at these corporate hybrid hospitals. Green Dog offers the accessibility and personal touch of a local veterinarian with the resources of a large hospital without the wait times and in many cases at a more competitive price.

We all want the best for our pets, sometimes that means being referred to a board-certified specialist, getting full-mouth dentistry, or more advanced imaging- things your general practitioner may not be able to provide. It may also be intimidating to go to a large corporate emergency hospital for such services.  Green Dog Veterinary Centers are built from the ground up to provide the service that general practitioners want, clients appreciate, and pets need.

Description:

Este hospital veterinario ofrece atención integral a los animales de compañía. Entre su gran variedad de especialidades y servicios propios de la práctica clínica veterinaria, se cuentan los siguientes:

- Peluquería canina y felina
- Tienda especializada
- Servicio de hospitalización veterinaria
- Anatomía patológica
- Vacunaciones y desparasitaciones, 
- Atención a animales exóticos,
- Cirugía general, 
- Traumatología veterinaria, 
- Laboratorio propio, 
- Oncología, 
- Radiografía, 
- Oftalmologia veterinaria, 
- Radiografía de alta frecuencia, 
- Reproducción asistida, 
- Tratamientos en spa... 

Este hospital veterinario lleva más de 30 años al cuidado de los animales de compañía. La empresa fue fundada en 1984 por cuatro veterinarios para cumplir mejor con sus clientes y sus mascotas ofreciendo un servicio de atención continuada las 24 horas del día.

Cuenta con unas modernas instalaciones y tecnología de vanguardia en permanente renovación, a cargo de un equipo humano eficiente y profesional, personal perfectamente formado para una correcta actuación en cualquier momento. Todos los veterinarios que trabajan en el Hospital veterinario Cruz Cubierta cubren turnos tanto diurnos como nocturnos y de fines de semana. Name: Pawprint Oxygen
Description:
Pawprint Oxygen provides trusted oxygen solutions for pets, empowering veterinarians and pet owners to administer life saving oxygen in any situation. We offer both rescue and extended oxygen therapy options which can be shipped directly to your animal hospital or a pet owner’s home with a valid prescription. Visit our website using the link below for more information!

Rescue and Transport Oxygen for Pets
Our Pawprint Oxygen Canisters are safe and effective to use for short-term oxygen therapy in your clinic and during transport. Pawprint Oxygen Canisters can also be dispensed to patients to manage episodes of respiratory distress at home. Canisters are lightweight and easy to use, providing up to 20 minutes of life saving oxygen therapy.

Extended Oxygen for Pets
We also offer medical-grade Oxygen Concentrators and Oxygen Cages for pets that require more than 1 hour of oxygen a day or for pets that require higher flow rates. Our Oxygen Concentrators filter oxygen from the air to deliver high purity oxygen (>90%) to pets. Our Oxygen Cages allow pet owners to administer oxygen therapy at home over a long period of time.

We make it super simple to start carrying Pawprint Oxygen products in your clinic. Sign up for an account to view and buy Pawprint Oxygen products online (https://bit.ly/Pawprintoxygengetstarted). We also accept orders over the phone, so feel free to call us at 855-699-4366. 

Are you a pet owner? We can ship Pawprint Oxygen to your door with a valid prescription from your veterinarian. Visit us at https://bit.ly/Pawprintlearnmore to learn more!

Name: Vida Livre - Medicina de Animais Selvagens LTDA.
Description:
Missão: Atender com qualidade e excelência animais selvagens em cativeiro, animais de estimação não convencionais e animais de vida livre. Buscando oferecer aos nossos pacientes o melhor tratamento possível e as melhores condições de saúde e de manejo em cativeiro. Oferecendo ainda aos nossos clientes as melhores condições de manter seus animais de estimação em boas condições ambientais e saudáveis.
Visão: Queremos ser sempre um serviço de referência em Medicina de Animais Selvagens no Brasil, sendo reconhecidos pela nossa qualidade técnica e pela qualidade dos serviços que prestamos.

Name: BCF Ultrasound Australasia
Description:
BCF Ultrasound Australasia is a locally owned and operated company who specialise in veterinary equipment, service and training solutions.

At BCF Ultrasound we understand the importance of patient care and pride ourselves in providing the most suitable solution in veterinary ultrasound and equipment to allow our customers to grow and improve their skills and services.

Specialisation is our core strength. We are one of the leading providers of portable ultrasound solutions for the veterinary market and with fully equipped service centre’s in New Zealand and Australia along with an enthusiastic and experienced team we are able to offer world class service, sales and support.

We are proud to be locally owned and operated.

Name: The Dermatology Referral Service Ltd.
Description: The Dermatology Referral Service is a veterinary practice based in Glasgow that is solely dedicated to the diagnosis and treatment of skin and ear diseases in pets and other animal species. The practice is staffed by Peter Forsythe, Hilary Jackson and Christian Ortalda, recognised specialists in the field of Veterinary Dermatology who between them have over 50 years of experience in the diagnosis and management of all types of skin and ear disease.

Name: Emergere Animal Health Consulting LLP
Description:
Who are we
Emergere Animal Health Consulting LLP is a pure-play Animal Health consultancy set up by Animal Health leaders with nearly 175 years of the domain & international experience, especially in emerging markets, across all facets of business & its cycles. We have had demonstrable, documented & sustainable success in our professional life, working with leading Global Animal Health companies in various geographies and cultures. 

Why are we 
In our extensive corporate experience leading business & various projects, whenever we felt the need for seeking external consultancy support, more often than not, a specific gap in domain knowledge, insights & that of customer perspective of the Animal Health Industry was visible. We believe our background will bring to our suite of services these critical needs, complementing process, structure & discipline vital to a project and substantially improve the chances of success.

What do we offer
- Strategy Advisory      
- Transaction Advisory                                                           
- Ops. Excellence Advisory                                                     
- Business Transformation                         
- Technology Transfers 
- People & Culture

You can visit us at www.emergereah.com or write to us at contact@emergereah.com.

Name: Vetlife
Description: Vetlife is er voor alle veterinaire professionals. We delen het laatste veterinaire nieuws, verhalen uit de praktijk, interviews met collega’s, handige tips en artikelen waar je echt iets aan hebt. Fris, herkenbaar en met oog voor wat er speelt in onze wereld. Volg Vetlife en blijf verbonden met je vak en je collega’s.

Name: Acutely
Description: Our software simplifies the pre-appointment experience for both veterinary teams and pet parents. Automated triage + intake to optimize hospital flow.

Name: Hope Springs Veterinary
Description:
Hope Springs Veterinary is dedicated to be innovative with our practice of veterinary medicine while always remaining true to our purpose of being rooted in relationships with our clients, patients and team members. We strive to provide a positive team culture that encourages communication and a supportive environment where our teams work together toward our common goal.  

Being a single doctor owned, three location organization, we embrace the feeling of family and the special place pets hold in the lives of our clients and team members.  We currently have two locations in Virginia Beach and one location in Chesapeake.  All of our locations are AAHA accredited with two of them reaching their 25 year milestone.  

It is an exciting time to be in veterinary medicine and we embrace the new developments and technology that are being discovered and coming available.  Our diagnostic and treatment capabilities include but are not limited to: therapy laser, in house blood machines, digital dental and primary radiography, ultrasound, laparoscopy, endoscopy along with a recently added CT scanner at our Sajo Farm location.  We continue to maintain the core belief that our team is our greatest asset without whom we would not be able to provide care for so many.

Name: DIOPTRIX
Description:
DIOPTRIX company is just dedicated on the veterinary Ophthalmology field.
Our Portfolio is wide enough to interest someone starting and some professional as well. Our best products are Vizoovet Protect, a natural ingredients drops, containing Propolis, Aloe Vera, Chamomile; effective on KCS but on non specific conjunctivitis and Blepharitis. Univers and Univers Mini, our last unique size high flexible semi preloaded hydrophilic acrylic intra ocular lenses. Multiwaves CXL our last cross linking affordable device made for the veterinary ophthalmology only, different waves length probes, cylindrical beam with no specific working distance, 6 pre-registered power makes the difference with equipment made for the human field. 2021 will see the birth of brand new and various products particularly for the surgery with a total transparent, synthetic, wet cornea. A kind of revolution on the lamellar deep keratectomy and corneal transplantation as well.

Name: Croft Vets
Description:
We know every individual animal has become an integral part of our family life.  That’s why we strive to provide the best veterinary care possible.

We take pride in every aspect of our work.  Whether it’s a routine treatment of a minor ailment or an emergency life-saving operation.

Since 1992 our Veterinary Centres in Bolsover and Totley have continued to serve Chesterfield, Sheffield and the surrounding areas.

Our team are highly trained, skilful and passionate individuals who, as a group, devote their lives to patient care.

We understand just how important pets are.

Name: Clínica Veterinaria Ariznabarra
Description:
Tras muchos años trabajando en diferentes centros de Vitoria-Gasteiz, en 2.009, Roberto Pascual fundó la Clínica Veterinaria Ariznabarra.
Al comienzo fue una clínica generalista que con el paso de los años y, sin abandonar su esencia, ha ido creciendo tanto en personal como en equipamiento técnico y evolucionando hacia la especialización.
Hoy en día podemos destacar la Unidad de Endoscopia y Cirugía de Mínima Invasión y el Servicio de Oncología.

Name: Colegio Oficial de Veterinarios de Toledo
Description:
Es una gran satisfacción para esta Junta de Gobierno del Ilustre Colegio Oficial de Veterinarios de Toledo el poder dar la bienvenida a la página web del mismo.

 Con ello pretendemos dar un mejor servicio tanto a los propios veterinarios colegiados, como al resto de ciudadanos interesados en lo que esta querida Profesión Veterinaria les puede aportar.

 Queremos mostrar a todos las importantes tareas que nuestra profesión Veterinaria tiene encomendadas en la sociedad, desde la promoción y cuidados de la a la protección de la, con responsabilidades desde el control de las epizootías y de las zoonosis al control de la seguridad alimentaria a lo largo de toda la cadena alimentaria, desde el alimento animal al alimento humano.

 También son propias de la Profesión Veterinaria, tareas de protección del bienestar animal y del medio ambiente, entre otras.

 Nuestra apuesta de servicio es clara, pues somos conscientes de que las instituciones deben de ser Útiles y dar la respuestas que de ellas se demanda y espera.

 Los veterinarios, como otros agentes decisivos de la sociedad, necesitamos actualizarnos permanentemente en nuestros conocimientos, para mantener la eficiencia que la sociedad nos reclama y esperamos que esta pagina web del Colegio de Veterinarios de Toledo, sea una herramienta para conseguirlo.

 El Colegio en la adaptación a las necesidades de los nuevos tiempos quiere apostar desde esta pagina, por las nuevas tecnologías, como medio de difusión y de mejora de la información, de la inmediatez y del acercamiento ya con los propios colegiados ya con la sociedad en general a la que destinamos nuestros quehaceres, informando de las prestaciones que ofrece el Colegio y de las actividades que realiza.

 Solicitamos la participación de todos en la actualización y mejora continua de esta página, estando abiertos a cualquier sugerencia que en ello redunde.

Name: appbubu.com
Description:
Application for animal lover and veterinarian.

As an animal owner, you must be responsible for maintaining the health of your pet.

Bubu + can help connect you and your pet with your vet easily. Starting from chat and video calls with veterinarians, pet medical management, and presenting articles and information about the animal world.

Bubu + was launched on April 16, 2021, as a health service platform in the form of tele-advice that helps first aid and follow up on pets.

Veterinarians registered with Bubu + are veterinarians who have a Practice License (SIP) and are members of the Indonesian Veterinary Doctors Association (PDHI)

Bubu + main features:
1. Consultation via chat
2. Consultation via video call
3. Articles about information on the animal world (bubupedia)
4. Management of pet medical records
5. Animal Adoption Katalogue and Donations Channel
6. Pets Grooming
7. Animal Travel

This app requires permission to access your location, mobile number, email and media.

Name: Florida Veterinary Referral Center
Description:
At Florida Veterinary Referral Center (FVRC) we know your pet is an integral part of your everyday life. They are truly a member of your family. When there is an unexpected emergency or your veterinarian recommends specialty care for your pet, Florida Veterinary Referral Center is here to help. We’re centrally located to service the Fort Myers, Estero, Bonita Springs, and Naples veterinary community. We are here 24/7/365 to help you and your pet when you need us.

We believe in a team approach to veterinary care. Our diverse group of doctors work closely with your family veterinarian helping to ensure the best and most comprehensive medical care possible for your pet. Studies have shown that patients benefit when a collaborative or team approach to medicine is utilized. This allows for a more rapid diagnosis and treatment of illnesses, shorter hospital stays, better management of chronic (long term) diseases, and improved overall patient care.

Name: Dierenkliniek Ridderkerk B.V.
Description:
Dierenkliniek Ridderkerk ten voeten uit!

Wist u dat Dierenkliniek Ridderkerk een van de grootste gezondheidscentra voor gezelschapsdieren is in heel Nederland? En dat we elke dag voor uw dier klaar staan in onze praktijk zodat u zeker weet dat u op ons kan rekenen? Buiten onze openingstijden sturen wij door naar de spoed- en verwijskliniek te Barendrecht.

Deze zorg kunnen wij u bieden dankzij een toegewijd team van dierenliefhebbers bestaand uit ruim 55 personen, waaronder dierenartsen, dierenartsassistentes en ondersteunend personeel. Verdeeld over onze 7 vestigingen in Ridderkerk, Zwijndrecht, Hendrik-Ido-Ambacht en Barendrecht waken we over de gezondheid van duizenden dieren: honden, katten, konijnen, fretten maar ook knaagdieren, reptielen, vissen en vogels verwelkomen we. Naast dagelijkse zorg zoals inentingen en gezondheidschecks kunnen we nog veel meer.

Door de jaren heen is Dierenkliniek Ridderkerk steeds bekender geworden om het bieden van hooggespecialiseerde zorg en ontvangen we regelmatig patiënten van andere klinieken voor verdergaand onderzoek of gespecialiseerde behandelingen. Uw huisdier kan op onze operatie-afdelingen terecht voor zowel orthopedische als weke delen chirurgie. 
Maar onze dierenartsen kunnen ook overweg met echografie, tandheelkunde, oogheelkunde, röntgendiagnostiek en te veel om verder nog op te noemen.

Name: Vetlab Supplies Ltd
Description:
Vetlab Supplies Ltd - A National Veterinary Laboratory Supplies Distributor

Veterinary Equipment, Diagnostics, Consumables and Expertise for You, Your Veterinary Practice and Veterinary Laboratory When and Where You Need It.

Quality Equipment, Expert Advice, Personal Service

Vetlab Supplies Ltd exists to serve your veterinary practice and testing laboratory with high quality veterinary equipment, dependable MegaCor Diagnostik FASTest diagnostic kits and affordable veterinary consumables delivered when and where you need.

Reliable, Affordable Laboratory Equipment and Consumables
Vetlab's comprehensive catalogue is compiled from suppliers and manufacturers of the very best veterinary resources worldwide. Every one of our professional quality veterinary microscopes, compact and reliable veterinary centrifuges and small equipment laboratory essentials is expertly chosen for quality, ease of use and affordability in your diagnostic, teaching or research application.

Technical Advice and Product Enquiries

First hand knowledge and experience of veterinary lab practice makes Vetlab your first call for technical questions, product advice and service enquiries. Whether you need the technical specifications on our best selling Premiere veterinary microscopes, the performance data for our best value veterinary centrifuges or the scientific principles underpinning our exclusive MegaCor Diagnostik FASTest diagnostic kits, our Technical Help Line will have the answer for you.

Best Quality, Reliable Results, Competitive Prices

Competitive pricing is the essential factor in our commitment to you. Transparent pricing ensures that you'll always find itemised prices, with and without VAT, clearly displayed. And we're always ready to help with large order pricing where we can. All our contact details are at the foot of this page. Give us a call or drop us an email and we'll be only too pleased to help you make the right choice of what's best for you. That's what we do.

Name: VetNova Santé Animale
Description:
Fondée en 2007 par des vétérinaires, VetNova est une entreprise dédiée à la santé et au bien-être des animaux de compagnie et des chevaux. Notre mission est de concevoir des produits innovants, efficaces et faciles à administrer, pour renforcer le lien entre l'animal et son propriétaire. Nous proposons plus de 60 produits pour les animaux de compagnie et plus de 70 pour les chevaux, couvrant divers domaines tels que la neurologie, la dermatologie, la santé digestive et bien d'autres.

Présente à l'international dans plus de 40 pays, VetNova a fait le choix de se lancer en France via sa filiale VetNova Santé Animale.

Name: Mindful Veterinary Care
Description: Mindful Veterinary Care is a South Florida based veterinary practice founded by Dr. Jonathan S. Block in early 2023. We are a privately owned and operated general small animal practice that focuses on high quality, individualized medicine, surgery, and integrative therapies. The practice's philosophy is rooted in workplace wellness- the concept that if the energy of the working environment  is infused with mindfulness and a positive culture, then the team feels valued and enjoys coming to work each day. This results in a happier, more well-adjusted team, better clinical outcomes, and more satisfied clients!

Name: Endoscopet | Convida
Description:
Primeiro Centro de Endoscopia Veterinária e Cirurgias Avançadas do Brasil

Com um corpo clínico altamente especializado, a Endoscopet é referência nacional em procedimentos minimamente invasivos e de alta complexidade, oferecendo:

 Endoscopia Digestiva Alta
 Laringotraqueobroncoscopia
 Rinoscopia
 Colonoscopia
 Cistoscopia
 Videocirurgia
 Cirurgias Avançadas, entre outros.

Utilizamos as mais modernas técnicas para diagnósticos precisos, abordagens terapêuticas inovadoras e cirurgias de alta performance, incluindo a remoção de corpos estranhos e tumores com mínima invasividade.

 Liderada pelo Dr. Franz Naoki Yoshitoshi, Médico Veterinário, MSc. e Presidente do Colégio Brasileiro de Endoscopia e Videocirurgia Veterinária (CBEVV), a Endoscopet reúne mais de 20 anos de experiência clínica, com um histórico de +9.300 procedimentos realizados com excelência.

 Cuidar bem. Sempre!

Name: Clínica Veterinária São Francisco
Description: A Clínica Veterinária São Francisco foi inaugurada em 2011 no bairro Altos de Santana, em Jacareí, com um novo conceito em saúde animal. Desenvolvemos um atendimento completo em clínica e cirurgias, com instalações modernas e equipamentos que proporcionam maior conforto, comodidade e segurança.

Name: Legacy Veterinary Advisors
Description:
Legacy Veterinary Advisors helps veterinary practice owners find the best offer and culture fit for their practice through our "Culture Fit First" sales approach. Finding the right culture fit with a buyer is just as important, if not more important, than the purchase price and is essential to ensuring a successful transition of ownership. 
With culture fit as the foundation and using previous experience working for a corporate buyer, we've helped many clients navigate the sales process with fantastic results. Aside from our clients receiving above-market offers, they all truly found the best fit for the staff and clients at their practice. 
If you are a practice owner looking for a similar outcome, let's connect!

Name: bio3Dvet
Description:
Bio3Dvet is a  tech company founded in 2018 in Ioannina, Greece. Bio3Dvet is an innovator in the veterinary field providing advanced orthopedic services based on state-of-the-art technological solutions. Bio3Dvet’s professional team consists of orthopedic veterinarians and engineers. Our cutting-edge solutions are based on CAD Systems, 3D printing & 3D scanning technology as well as custom-fabricated orthotics and prosthetics devices for our four-legged friends. Our target is to provide personalized medical care during minimally invasive to optimize surgical procedures for all our little patients who need it.

Bio3Dvet’s innovative services include custom-made surgical guides (front & hind limb, Spinal stabilization, HIF/IOHC), custom-made implants (Intraosseous Transcutaneous Amputation Prosthesis-ITAP, Craniomaxillofacial plates, PGR implants), individual anatomical bones and custom-made Orthotics and Prosthetics devices for pre-post and lifetime animal support.
Bio3Dvet help vets move forward through innovative technological solutions.

Name: Rossdales Hertfordshire
Description:
Rossdales Hertfordshire is a dedicated first opinion equine practice providing high quality, comprehensive veterinary services for all types of horses and ponies across Hertfordshire.

Our experienced team of veterinary surgeons provides a fully ambulatory service for routine appointments and emergencies (24 hours, 365 days a year).

Name: Z&B Saúde Animal
Description:
Somos uma empresa especializada na condução de estudos clínicos e zootécnicos voltados a animais de produção. Atuamos na geração de dados técnicos para o desenvolvimento, validação e registro de produtos e tecnologias, conforme as exigências regulatórias nacionais e internacionais.

Nossa equipe técnica é formada por zootecnistas e médicos veterinários com experiência em experimentação animal, análise de dados e aplicação à produção e saúde animal.

Nossas principais áreas de atuação são:

Estudos zootécnicos
Pesquisa clínica veterinária
Conduzimos os estudos com base na legislação vigente, princípios éticos e boas práticas experimentais, garantindo padronização, rastreabilidade, bem-estar animal e integridade dos dados.

Atendemos empresas dos setores de nutrição, saúde animal, genética e biotecnologia. Nosso compromisso é entregar resultados consistentes, cientificamente embasados e aplicáveis, que contribuam com a sustentabilidade ambiental e a eficiência dos sistemas de produção animal.
Entre em contato:
contato@zbsaudeanimal.com.br

Name: Central Qualifications
Description:
Central Qualifications (CQ) is an Ofqual recognised awarding body whose primary role is to develop and provide a wide range of qualifications to meet the needs of the veterinary and other animal related establishments.

Staff training and their further development are pivotal to the success of modern veterinary practices and CQ engages with colleges, training providers and learners to support this. 

Everyone at CQ is committed to delivering a high quality and customer focused service to learners, employers, and training providers

Vocational training as it should be…with Central Qualifications. 

If you would like to find out more then please contact us on 01359 245316.

Name: Ortho4vets
Description:
Ortho4vets, your partner in your everyday orthopedic surgery.
Through the webshop a wide range of orthopedic implants/instruments is available: TPLO, TTA Rapid, Locking Plates, ...

Ortho4vets Academy, the training center, for those veterinarians who want to improve their skills into the technique of orthopedic surgery. During the workshop, beside the presentations, the opportunity will be offered to test the techniques during dry labs (saw bones) & wet labs.

Name: Agvisory.NZ
Description:
Agritech is growing at pace in New Zealand. At Agvisory.NZ we are looking to use our farm system knowledge, close alignment with end users, and skills with data to help companies offer a "solution" to the New Zealand agricultural market, not just a "cool piece of tech". 
Ryan Luckman has a proven track record of turning tech into solutions, especially in the world of collar technology, and offers a unique set of skills to pair with businesses. 
If you're an overseas business looking to "New Zealandify" your offering, a local business looking to better position your offering, or a fledgling start up wanting to discuss your options feel free to get in touch!
Together we can position agritech offerings to better solve the key issues facing the New Zealand agriculture sector.

Name: Equine Welfare
Description: We aim to improve horses' quality of life in Hispanic countries by offering education,  behaviour modification consultations and guidance about their mental and physical health.

Name: Pawfect Care
Description: Pawfect Care is Meerut's premier specialty hospital, dedicated to providing exceptional veterinary services to pets and their owners 24/7. As the first facility of its kind in the region, Pawfect Care combines advanced medical technology with a compassionate approach to ensure the highest standard of care for small animals. Our experienced team of veterinarians and support staff is committed to the well-being of every pet, offering comprehensive services including diagnostics, surgery, and emergency treatment.

Name: Sanam Veterinary Care
Description: Sanam is a veterinary care company that offers it's services through pharmacies and clinics for animals

Name: Natturo
Description: Welcome to Natturo Agronegócios, a pioneering company in the development and supply of innovative additives for animals. Designed to revolutionize the industry, our company is driven by a vision of the future where product excellence and sustainability go hand in hand

Name: OneAlpha veterinary solutions
Description:
We are OneAlpha veterinary services 
 we are agents for leading mega companies as Polifar group china and ED pharma Egypt ,
 we hope to add value for animal production field in the egyptian market

Name: Calm Pet Vet
Description:
We are an #inclusive low-stress handling mobile & telehealth behavioural #veterinary service in Melbourne, Australia. 
Our vet Dr Channy is very passionate about #education surrounding pet mental health and wellbeing, especially within veterinary clinics as well as the home. 
Check out & follow our socials @calmpetvet to find out more!

Name: VSx Veterinary Surgery
Description:
At VSx, our goal is to be the #1 most trusted provider of advanced and specialty surgical services to referring veterinarians and their patients in the communities we serve. 

We are bootstrapped, locally and veterinarian-owned. Our board-certified Surgeons and advanced care team open and manage state-of-the-art surgical centers that are equipped with leading instrumentation, technology and equipment to provide the most advanced and highest level of surgical service and advanced imaging (CT) all in a comfortable and focused setting. We also provide a mobile concierge service in our Indianapolis practice, offering specialty surgery directly in referring general practices' facilities.

Name: Central Max
Description: Somos uma equipe orientada para alta performance em distribuição de Pet Food na região da Grande São Paulo. Atendemos desde o Canal Especializado, Criadores até Veterinários.

Name: Veterinary Emergency + Critical Care
Description:
Opened in May 2011, VE+CC filled a void in animal care for Las Vegas, providing the only fully staffed, dedicated 24 hour emergency and critical care facility. Our highly trained doctors, including Nevada's only board certified emergency and critical care specialist, are here 24 hours a day to make sure your pet gets the best and most immediate care possible.

Unlike other local animal emergency facilities, VE+CC has both doctors and technicians in the hospital at all times, specialized equipment, and board certified and residency trained doctors. We provide continuous emergency and critical care for your pet, and are proud to be the only 24 hour facility of its kind in southern Nevada.

Name: OWL Vets Ltd
Description:
We're an independent veterinary partnership, providing Named Veterinary Surgeon (NVS)/ Designated Veterinarian services, expertise and training to the research community.

Passionate about animal welfare, we work closely with Institute to help colleagues apply the 3Rs of Replacement, Reduction and Refinement throughout their in-vivo research, and to safeguard animal health & welfare, within an excellent Culture of Care.

Drawing on many years' experience in the field in a variety of research settings and species, we bring a wealth of knowledge, good practice and an enquiring mindset to share with you. Working with researchers and animal care colleagues in progressive facilities, our goal is to promote great science and to optimise humane, ethical care and use of animals where their use is necessary.

Qualified and experienced educators, we provide small-group and bespoke training and assessment of competence for researchers, animal carers and vets. Themes include legislation, animal care, technical procedures and ethical use of animals. Other courses include "Skills enhancement for trainers" , "Train the Assessor" and more.

Ask us for advice about OV (export) services for lab animals, embryos/ germplasm and some research products too!

Our service is tailored to your requirements, so please do be in contact for an informal discussion about how we can assist you!

Name: Doral Centre Animal Hospital
Description:
Welcome to Doral Centre Animal Hospital, where compassionate care and customer service are our number one priorities. Our veterinary team continually strives to maintain high standards of quality care and we focus on exceptional care and compassionate service for both our patients and their owners! We are a full-service veterinary hospital that can address all of your pet's medical and wellness care needs.

Doral Centre Animal Hospital was founded by Dr. Anjanette Cabeza in 1998 and has been providing exceptional veterinary care since the beginning. This practice is the culmination of her love for animals, combined with a passion for medicine and a calling to serve people, and it was built on Christian principles and a calling to serve animals and the community. Dr. Cabeza’s commitment to compassionate treatment for her patients and clients is evident in our practice, and we are pleased to share our experienced & talented staff and quality service with you.

Our staff consists of 35 individuals all committed to caring for the needs of your pets. We have highly qualified team members at our hospital, including two certified paramedics, two foreign veterinarians as technicians, two nursing students, and a certified veterinary assistant.

Name: Porfenc
Description:
Fundada en 1998, Porfenc es una empresa multinacional de origen argentina pionera en el desarrollo e introducción de aditivos naturales innovadores en el mercado de la nutrición animal. Con una sólida presencia en los mercados nacional e internacional, proporcionamos soluciones efectivas para aves, bovinos, porcinos, mascotas y otras especies. 

Nuestro compromiso con la calidad, la sostenibilidad y la continua investigación y desarrollo, junto con pruebas rigurosas y certificaciones como IRAM inocuidad alimentaria BPM y GMP+, nos posiciona a la vanguardia en la entrega de valor en la nutrición animal. 

Nuestra misión gira en torno al servicio comunitario, el cuidado del medio ambiente y el fomento del crecimiento para nuestros clientes a través de productos confiables y rentables.

Name: Tierklinik Rostock
Description:
Die Tierklinik Rostock ist DAS Kompetenzzentrum für Kleintiermedizin im Nordosten Deutschlands. 
Seit 1992 sorgen wir nicht nur durch unsere langjährige Expertise sowie hochmoderne technische Ausstattung für die bestmögliche Versorgung von Kleintieren, sondern kümmern uns auch mit Leidenschaft und Mitgefühl um unsere Patienten. Jedes Tier liegt uns persönlich am Herzen, denn wir wissen, wie wichtig Haustiere für ihre Besitzer sind. 
Deshalb bietet unser vielfältiges Leistungsspektrum ausschließlich modernste Behandlungen, Therapien und Operationen.

Name: Fazenda da Cadeia
Description:
A velha Fazenda da Cadeia, localizada no Planalto Catarinense,
dedica-se à criação de bovinos da raça Crioula Lageana e ovinos da
raça Crioula Preta Serrana.
 
 
 
Esses animais são criados livres no mesmo ambiente natural em que 
se desenvolveram a séculos atrás, nas matas de araucárias e campos
nativos.
 
 
Temos a missão de CONSERVAR essas espécies com bem-estar animal
e melhorá-las através de seleção zootécnica. Fornecemos ao mercado exemplares
com potencial genético para cruzamentos com outras raças.
 
 
 
 
A Fazenda da Cadeia possui um importante núcleo genético do gado
Crioulo Lageano e suas variedades aspado e mocho, registrados
na Assosciação Brasileira de Criadores da Raça Crioula Lageana (ABCCL)
 
 
 
Responsável
 
 
 
Márcio Camargo
Médico Veterinário
(49) 9 9910-4321 (Tim/Whats)

Name: Fantastic Beasts Veterinary Services
Description: Our goal is to provide high quality primary care and preventive medicine to companion animals in central Vancouver Island. We intend to focus on enhancement of the local veterinary community through structured staff training programs and partnerships with animal rescue organizations.

Name: Miscotas.com
Description:
Miscotas.com es una empresa integrada por un equipo de jóvenes entusiastas que entienden que la gente busca SOLUCIONES y buscan hacer su aporte a ellos en el MUNDO DE LAS MASCOTAS. 
Un sitio donde podrás comprar todo lo necesario para el cuidado de las mascotas, alimentos balanceados, accesorios, vestimenta, antipulgas, etc.

Name: Animal Rehabilitation Crete
Description:
Rehabilitation for wildlife and domestic animals (and occasionally a human). 
Lecturing about Behaviour, Evolution, Ethology, Primatology, Anatomy, Chronic pain and Movement. 
Human dominance on earth is overrated.

Name: Bodega Veterinaria
Description:
En Bodega Veterinaria, somos líderes en la importación directa de productos de medicina veterinaria, ofreciendo una amplia gama de productos para el cuidado de mascotas y la producción pecuaria. 

Representamos marcas reconocidas internacionalmente, garantizando calidad y eficacia en cada producto. Nuestro compromiso con la innovación y el bienestar animal nos distingue, proporcionando a veterinarios, pet shops y productores pecuarios herramientas confiables para optimizar la salud y el rendimiento de los animales. 

Tambien contamos con Laboratorio de Diagnóstico: Ofrecemos necropsias y titulación de sueros para aves, análisis de agua, análisis coproparasitológico, aislamiento bacteriano, antibiogramas y análisis de micotoxinas en materia prima y alimento terminado.

Visita nuestra página web para conocer más:

Name: AscendVets
Description: AscendVets is the family of privately owned veterinary practices serving our local communities. We are committed to developing people, personally and professional to achieve their dreams while serving people and their pets.

Name: Hospital Veterinário VetPrado
Description:
Com 630 m² de área construída, o Hospital Veterinário Vet Prado é um dos mais conceituados da Região Metropolitana de Campinas (RMC).
