Agora você não precisa mais esperar o dia amanhecer.

Name: Veterinary Specialty Center of Seattle
Description:
Veterinary Specialty Center of Seattle in Lynnwood offers 24-hour emergency and critical care for your pet. Our AAHA-accredited team includes emergency and board-certified veterinary specialists whose approach to veterinary medicine enables them to work together in support of our mission to improve the quality of life for pets and their owners.

As an AAHA accredited animal hospital – a title only given to 12% of animal hospitals in the US and Canada – we maintain a gold standard of care in every aspect of our practice. Our procedural standards, customer service, facility maintenance, continuing education, and more factor into qualification. We are confident that you will see the benefits of using an AAHA accredited practice when you visit our animal hospital.

Name: Tuveterinario.org
Description: Plataforma de reserva de veterinarios en España que da la oportunidad a todo tipo de centros veterinarios de aumentar su visibilidad en internet. Lo cual, puede proporcionarles más clientes y posibilidades de crecimiento.

Name: Mike Valera
Description:
Me encanta ayudar a otros veterinarios a ganar más dinero mejorando la gestión de su clínica veterinaria.
Y como coach veterinario, ayudarles a alcanzar sus sueños después de convertirlos en objetivos.
Soy feliz viendo cómo, en muy pocas semanas, mis clientes consiguen lo que estaban buscando.

Name: Center for Animal Health Innovation
Description:
The mission of the Center for Animal Health Innovation (CAHI)  is to connect innovation to industry with the express goal of producing breakthrough products and services that can have a major impact on the animal health industry. 

At the core of CAHI is its Proof of Concept Program that is devoted to identifying, evaluating, funding and helping to commercialize the most promising technologies. The fundamental principle of the Proof of Concept program is that by connecting innovators to industry early in the development process breakthrough products and services are more likely to be created quickly and have greater value. In addition, the Proof of Concept program maintains that connection until the project reaches commercial ready status through a strong mentoring program that strives to increase the number of projects that move from idea to market.

Our industry led Board and Staff will help validate market needs, guide initial research plans, inform the regulatory and clinical plans, help develop the business plans, and help provide the necessary connections to industry partners and capital. Commercial partners may be from established industry, entrepreneurs or venture capital groups.

CAHI sponsors innovation in pharmaceuticals, nutritionals, diagnostics, biologics, and medical devices.   Projects with interdisciplinary activity (veterinary, medical, engineering, agricultural, etc.) are encouraged as they often drive the most innovative solutions.

Name: Heal Veterinary Hospital
Description: Skillful veterinary team working in one place to save animals.

Name: AniCura ACH
Description:
AniCura is a family of well-known animal hospitals and clinics specialized in veterinary care for companion animals. Born out of the idea that sharing resources creates opportunities for better veterinary care, the company was established in 2011 as the first merger of companion animal hospitals in the Nordic region. Since 2018, AniCura is part of Mars Veterinary Health, a family-owned company focused on veterinary care. Today, AniCura is a role model within specialized veterinary care and a valued partner for pet owners and referring veterinarians across Europe. 

In Austria and Switzerland (ACH), we presently employ over 440 veterinarians, nurses and other veterinary staff, a number which is expected to increase in the coming years as further clinics will join AniCura.

The company offers a wide range of high quality medical services covering preventive and basic health care as well as advanced diagnostics, internal medicine, intensive care, surgery and orthopaedics. AniCura also provides rehabilitation, physiotherapy and dietary advice and offers selected pet food and care products. 

For information on how AniCura is working to shape the future of veterinary care, please visit our website www.anicura.at or www.anicura.ch

Name: Vet Rio Comércio
Description:
A VetRio é uma empresa que foi criada no início de 2002 para satisfazer a demanda de produtos veterinários principalmente dentro do Estado do Rio de Janeiro.

Mercado que teve um crescimento muito grande nesta última década e junto com o aumento da demanda, houve também um aumento expressivo no número de empresas concorrentes na distribuição de medicamentos veterinários.
 
Porém, existe uma projeção crescente pelo tipo de produto que nossa empresa comercializa. A VetRio mantém uma margem competitiva através de nossa entrega imediata de medicamentos, de excelentes relações com os clientes e sua capacidade de se adequar as suas necessidades.
 
A empresa está instalada estrategicamente numa área de 1200 m², mais especificamente em Petrópolis - Região Serrana do Estado do Rio.
 
Existe uma preocupação com a logística de distribuição (entrega dentro do Rio e Grande Rio em 24 horas) e inovações tecnológicas para otimização de tempo na realização de serviços.

Name: Southern Rockies Animal Emergency + Specialty
Description:
At Southern Rockies Animal Emergency + Specialty, we operate as one coordinated team in support of your pet, your veterinarian, and you. We are here to help pets in need of advanced care in Colorado Springs and the surrounding areas.  

For referring veterinarians we are your emergency and specialty team, we make you an integral part of the collaborative care process; as a proven system that fosters communication and the timely sharing of information. We have many advanced capabilities that can assist your patients with advanced care needs including:
•	Only MRI in southern Colorado strictly for pets
•	Only Radioiodine (1-131) facility south of Castle Rock/Denver metro 
•	Largest and most comprehensive rehab facility 

At Southern Rockies, you can trust in our experienced veterinary specialists, collaborative approach to medicine, and our high-quality care. 

One team. One Purpose. One patient at a time.

Name: Centre for Animal Referral & Emergency (CARE)
Description:
The Centre for Animal Referral & Emergency (CARE) is a veterinary specialist and 24-hour emergency centre, situated in Collingwood (3km from Melbourne CBD).

CARE aims to provide gold-standard specialist and emergency veterinary care to companion animals of Victoria and beyond. Our goal is to provide diagnostic and treatment plans which achieve the best possible outcome for each case. We consider the unique requirements of each individual pet, their owners, and their primary care veterinarian.

Opened in 2013, CARE is a rapidly growing centre with in-house 16-slice CT, ultrasound, digital subtraction fluoroscopy, computed radiography suite, in-house clinical pathology (serum biochemistry and blood-gas analysis, PT/APTT) and regular off-site access to MRI. 

We have a large specialist referral team that encompasses surgery, internal medicine, emergency and critical care, diagnostic imaging, neurology, and diabetes. Referral services are available by appointment from Monday to Friday during business hours.

Our Emergency centre has a motivated team of emergency/ICU veterinarians and an exceptional group of experienced nurses and support staff, who look after their patients as if they were their own. The hospital is staffed 24 hours a day, throughout the year; no appointment is necessary if presenting to our emergency department.

Name: Ravioza Biotech
Description:
Ravioza Biotech is a team of professionals, with an aim to contribute in the development of animal health industry by providing latest knowledge, new technologies and world class manufacturing support to its stakeholders and customers to improvise their business output. Ravioza also aims to be partner with nation in providing affordable and choice of animal protein to its youth for building a strong nation.

The journey of Ravioza Biotech began with his founders who have experience of more than 25 years in poultry industry since 1988. There objective is to bring forth the best of technologies and services available globally to Indian farmers.

The feed additives and enzymes are basic feed supplements for poultry industry. The poultry industry is generating employment to the urban and rural youths. The Poultry industry is now being considered as a core industry sector.

In view of this, it was thought desirable to undertake the review of present status of the industry and to identify and analyze the critical inputs required for implementation of new technologies. Ravioza biotech has envisaged and analyzed the importance of new technologies for poultry industry.

Ravioza Biotech is committed to provide full satisfaction and support to its business partners by providing them the latest new technologies available in the world and offering suitable solution to the farmer to improvise their efficiency and profitability. Ravioza biotech is supported by a well qualified team of business entrepreneurs, sales, marketing and technical managers.

Name: Tharos Ltd
Description:
Welcome to Tharos – Revolutionising Gut Health for Horses, Dogs, and Beyond!

At Tharos, we’re passionate innovators in animal gut health, committed to transforming the wellbeing and performance of animals through cutting-edge science and natural solutions. Specialising in advanced prebiotic products, we empower animal owners with the tools needed for optimal health, happiness, and performance.

 Our Products:

 EquiNectar – Scientifically proven gut health supplements trusted by equine professionals worldwide to enhance digestive wellness, support immunity, and optimise horse performance. Learn more at equinectar.com.

 CaniNectar – Our newest innovation specifically formulated for canine gut health. Whether your dog is a family companion, a working animal, or a competitive athlete, CaniNectar helps ensure your dog’s digestive system is healthy and balanced. Discover more at caninectar.com.

 Why Choose Tharos?

Scientifically backed, vet-approved formulas

Commitment to natural, safe, and effective solutions

Proven results in performance and health improvements

Exceptional customer satisfaction and loyalty

 Learn more about our mission, innovative research, and the full range of our groundbreaking products by visiting our corporate website tharos.co.uk.

Join us as we continue to lead the way in animal health innovation!

Name: Blue Ridge Wildlife Center
Description: The Blue Ridge Wildlife Center is a full-service nonprofit wildlife hospital open 7 days a week, 365 days a year. We provide professional rehabilitative and veterinary services to native wildlife, taking in over 2,000 patients annually from Virginia, West Virginia, and Maryland, and operate a hotline to help assess and mitigate human-wildlife issues. We also provide wildlife-specific educational programming, attending schools, events, and providing on-site education programs with about 20 non-releasable ambassador animals and biofacts, as well as training and maintaining over 50 volunteers and interns each year. Our veterinary staff is also involved with a multitude of research studies to help further our understanding of local wildlife, parasites, and many other relevant topics.

Description:
Được thành lập từ năm 2001, Công ty Cổ phần Thú y Xanh Việt Nam mà tiền thân của nó là công ty TNHH Thú y Xanh VN với các lĩnh vực hoạt động chính hiện nay là cung cấp các sản phẩm thuốc thú y dùng trong chăn nuôi gia súc, gia cầm, thuốc thú y thuỷ sản, phụ gia dùng trong ngành chế biến thức ăn gia súc, giết mổ và chế biến thực phẩm sạch, cung ứng các trang thiết bị dùng trong chăn nuôi,....tất cả lĩnh vực kinh doanh của công ty đều kiên định theo con đường đã chọn – “con đường an toàn sinh học”
Với gần 200 nhân viên, Công ty CP Thú Y Xanh VN đã xây dựng được mạng lưới phân phối bán sỉ rộng khắp trên phạm vi cả nước.Công ty CP Thú Y Xanh Việt Nam kế hoạch phát triển 9 đơn vị thành viên- hiện tại đang có 5 đơn vị được hình thành và đang phát triển trên toàn quốc. Với định hướng chiến lược đúng đắn, Công ty CP Thú Y Xanh Việt Nam đã và đang đạt tốc độ tăng trưởng liên tục đạt trên 40%/ năm.

Name: Eclipse Veterinary Software Ltd
Description:
Practice management system software developer with integrated PACS and LIMS.  Suitable for equine hospitals and ambulatory practice, as well as small animal referral centres offering diagnostic imaging services.  Mobile app extends facility to carry information outside the clinic, including complete animal histories, client details, appointment info, Dicom images, recent discharge instructions, reports, and lab test results.  Drugs dispensed and services provided can be billed quickly and easily on iPads, improving accuracy of batch-tracing and reducing delays in booking work carried out on visits.

Equine veterinary systems can be supplied and maintained from as simple a starting point as one Mac with Horos or OsiriX for viewing medical images, to a full-scale hospital management system with complete electronic patient records, clinical imaging, laboratory automation and sophisticated pharmacy stock management.

All products are cross-platform, working equally well on Macs and PCs.  IT support services also available for routine requirements such as mail systems, backup systems, networking, anti-virus protection, etc.

Eclipse Veterinary Software Ltd has designed and developed a range of products for many prestigious equine bloodstock and racing clients, including the sales auction system used at Tattersalls, and extensive database development work for Weatherbys, and various projects for Godolphin worldwide.

Als één van de weinige pluimveepraktijken in België zijn wij actief betrokken bij nagenoeg alle schakels in de pluimveesector. We hebben een team van 14 pluimvee-dierenartsen, die zowel actief zijn in de vlees- als in de legsector. De praktijk is 7/7 beschikbaar.

Name: Lenity Vet Specialists + Emergency Care
Description:
Lenity Vet Specialists + Emergency care offers 24/7 emergency care, internal medicine, orthopedics, surgical oncology, laparoscopic and soft tissue surgeries, wound management and reconstruction surgery, stem cell/PRP therapy, emergency surgery and diagnostic imaging services for referring veterinarians in San Mateo, San Francisco and the larger Bay Area.

We're also thrilled to announce our newly launched community blood bank for animals - BRAVE UNITY! Check out www.braveunitybloodbank.com for more information.

Name: SNIPSA
Description:
SNIPSA is an organization formed by a group of veterinarians and caring individuals dedicated to helping homeless and unwanted animals in San Antonio and the surrounding area. SNIPSA does not have a standing shelter and depends on a core group of volunteers to foster and rehabilitate animals in their homes. This provides us with the opportunity to learn first hand about the animal’s needs and behavior in order to facilitate an appropriate adoption. SNIPSA was incorporated in 2006 and has re-homed more than 15,000 animals.

While we know we can’t adopt our way out of this problem, SNIPSA has set out to address the overpopulation problem in San Antonio too. By offering free spay/neuter services to underserved areas of this city, we’re able to target neighborhoods where we’ll have a definite impact. Several times a year, SNIPSA holds Big Fix clinics. These MASH style operations provide sterilization, vaccinations, and microchipping to over 450 cats and dogs in a single day.

Community centers are transformed into surgical suites, and countless veterinarians, staff, and volunteers come together to change our community. By preventing the birth of additional unwanted litters, we’re not only saving the city taxpayers thousands of dollars, but we’re providing our companion animals with a better life of health and wellness. SNIPSA has provided over 18,500 spay/neuter surgeries to date, and we’re not stopping!

Name: Animal Behaviour Kent
Description: Dog trainers, dog behaviourists, and cat behaviourists covering Kent, Surrey, and South East London. Providing practical and effective training and behaviour solutions, from training basic skills such as recall, to tackling complex behaviour problems.

Name: South Carolina Association of Veterinary Technicians
Description:
Veterinary Technician Oath
I solemnly dedicate myself to aiding animals and society by providing excellent care and services for animals, by alleviating animal suffering, and by promoting public health.  I accept my obligations to practice my profession conscientiously and with sensitivity, adhering to the profession's Code of Ethics, and furthering my knowledge and competence through a commitment to lifelong learning.

Name: Olympic Veterinary Cardiology, PLLC
Description:
Teamwork and collaboration are essential to successful management of any patient.   Bringing the specialist into your practice allows for a direct line of communication, ensuring all questions are answered and all nuances conveyed and taken into consideration.  Having the trusted veterinarian and team directly involved in the advanced diagnostics ensures complete understanding and making sure your questions are answered.   We increase availability of advanced diagnostics for all animals and minimize patient stress by using a familiar environment with your client and team members, while keeping advanced diagnostics affordable.

Dr. Maran will meet with you and your team, discuss the clinical history, evaluate the patient, and then perform the appropriate diagnostics.  All results are immediately shared with your clinic and can be discussed prior to the conclusion of the appointment.  Veterinarians and owners are welcome to be present for all portions of the cardiac consultation and ask questions as they arise.  

Olympic Veterinary Cardiology is proud to offer cutting edge, complete diagnostics.  All patients receive a comprehensive cardiac evaluation, systemic blood pressure assessment, digital diagnostic ECG (6 Lead), and detailed echocardiogram (including B-Mode, M-Mode, and Doppler studies).  There are no 'up sells' with our team.  We provide these diagnostics every time to ensure no detail is missed.

When the consultation is complete, the requesting veterinarian will receive a comprehensive report via e-mail that can be printed or added to any electronic medical record system.   Faxed reports are also available, if preferred.

If any questions persist or arise, Dr. Maran remains available to assist in the management of your cases.  We do request owners follow up with their regular veterinarian first to avoid any miscommunication that could have adverse effects to our patients.

Name: AFVAC Est
Description: L'AFVAC Est est la section régionale de l'AFVAC dans le Grand Est, organisant la formation continue de l'association dans cette région.

Name: K&M Vet IT KG
Description:
Die K&M Vet IT KG ist ein auf Veterinärmedizin spezialisiertes IT-Unternehmen. Wir bieten technischen Rundum-Support sowie Fortbildungen, Beratung, (HR) Marketing, Design und eigens für Tierarztpraxen und Tierkliniken entwickelte IT-Lösungen. 

Als Praxis- oder Klinikinhaber fallen heute neben der eigentlichen medizinischen Arbeit eine Vielzahl anderer Aufgabenbereiche an. Neben Management, Personal- und Finanzwesen ist die technische Infrastruktur ein umfangreiches Feld.  Unser Hauptanliegen besteht darin unseren Kunden mit exzellentem Service und breitgefächertem Know-How den Rücken freizuhalten - von der IT-Risiko- und Bedarfs-Analyse bis zum Telefonvertrag, vom DICOM-Archiv bis zur Webseite, vom passenden Social Media Auftritt bis zur Visitenkarte - damit sich diese ganz auf ihre eigentliche medizinische Tätigkeit konzentrieren können.

Unsere Kunden haben bei Fragen rund um das Thema IT und Marketing nur einen Ansprechpartner: UNS. Wir lösen Computer-Probleme umgehend selbst oder kontaktieren nach fundierter Analyse die entsprechenden Firmen. Auch in Sachen Praxismarketing und Employer Branding bieten wir unseren Kunden Beratung oder ein Rundumsorglos-Paket genau nach individuellen Wünschen und aktuellen Bedürfnissen. Unsere Kunden müssen sich nicht mehr mit unterschiedlichen Zuständigkeiten (Hardwarefirma, Softwarefirma, Marketingagentur, Druckerei...) beschäftigen, sondern haben wieder mehr Zeit für die eigentlichen Aufgaben.

Als Arbeitgeber verstehen wir uns nicht als 08/15 Unternehmen mit herkömmlichen nine-to-five Jobs. Teamzusammenhalt und eine lockere, angenehme Atmosphäre gehören bei uns genauso dazu, wie selbstorganisiertes Arbeiten. Wir pflegen eine offene Firmenstruktur, in der jedes Teammitglied Gehör findet und sich nicht nur einbringen darf, sondern soll. 
Dass wir alle an einem Strang ziehen und unser Unternehmen gemeinsam weiterbringen, ist bei uns obligatorisch.

Name: IVNA
Description:
The IVNA is a voluntary organisation and acts as the voice of its members in protecting and promoting the Veterinary Nursing profession within Ireland.
The IVNA is the only representative organisation for Veterinary Nurses in the Republic of Ireland. The association promotes animal health, care and welfare and fosters a need to cultivate the highest standard of veterinary nursing through the continuing advancement of professional development and ongoing education

Name: VETERINARIUS
Description:
Veterinarius, c’est la référence en formation pour les vétérinaires praticiens. Depuis plus de 15 ans, nous accompagnons les professionnels dans le développement de leurs compétences cliniques, techniques et scientifiques, avec des contenus de haut niveau, animés par des experts reconnus dans leur domaine.

 Notre mission :
Permettre à chaque vétérinaire de rester à la pointe de sa pratique, de progresser en confiance, et de faire évoluer son exercice au quotidien – pour le bien-être des animaux et la satisfaction des propriétaires.

 Nos points forts :
 Un large catalogue de formations présentielles et en ligne
 Des intervenants référents dans leur spécialité
 Une pédagogie concrète, clinique et interactive
 Des cycles certifiants et des formats courts adaptés à vos besoins

 Domaines couverts :
• Médecine interne et spécialisée

 Rejoignez une communauté de praticiens passionnés, en quête d’excellence et d’échange.

Name: Vital Vet Animal Hospital

Welcome to Vital Vet Animal Hospital, a place where our core values of stewardship, teamwork, adaptability, and responsibility are not just words, but the guiding principles of our every action. We are committed to providing trusted, high-quality veterinary care that focuses on the well-being and relationships essential for dogs, cats, and exotic species to enjoy long, healthy lives.
In a rapidly changing landscape that includes corporately owned practices, private-equity-backed practices, and high-volume, low-cost clinics, we stand out as a locally owned practice dedicated to our community. Name: Digatherm
Description:
Digatherm has created innovative products that are non-invasive and non-destructive. Assisting Dr's & DVM's in early detection of disease symptoms.

Working with the scientists and engineers at Infrared Cameras Inc. (a FDA cleared manufacturer and 20 years experience with Medical Thermography) has created a digital thermal imaging system that is designed, tested, and manufactured to provide the veterinary profession with advanced veterinary-specific infrared technology. 

Digatherm consists of veterinarians, including an advisory board of experts, professional sales representatives familiar with the veterinary profession and infrared thermography, and a trained customer care center. 

Digital Thermal Imaging provides a quick and easy objective measurement - represented in thermal gradients - to precisely outline anatomical areas in need of further examination.

We proudly address every aspect of the veterinarian's business, and integrating this proven technology within. Practice Managers and owners will learn where, why, and how to communicate with clients using thermal imaging, and the incredible marketability of it. Certification is provided for those that are capturing images to ensure correct image acquisition. Veterinary led training to give doctors confidence in interpreting images.

Name: Sinai Pure Pharmaceutical
Description: Fast growing Veterinary Pharmaceutical company specialized in production and marketing of very characteristic high quality Veterinary products and feed additives with high purity active principles.

Name: The Pet Vet
Description:
The Pet Vet is a family-owned, full-service group of animal hospitals founded in 2009 by Dr. Danny R. Cox, a 1982 graduate of the Oklahoma State University College of Veterinary Medicine. During his 36 year career, Dr. Cox has managed more than 30 veterinary hospitals and trained hundreds of licensed veterinarians in the fields of veterinary surgery, anesthesia, and clinical medicine.

Today, The Pet Vet has grown to 8 locations in Texas, Oklahoma and Arkansas and is bringing their unique brand of veterinary care to Kansas in 2019. The Pet Vet offers quality, full-service care at prices you can afford. Our goal is to keep your pet healthy by providing affordable preventative and wellness care and to be there during your time of need if your pet becomes sick or injured. 

The Pet Vet is located inside select Petco stores. We are a separate company with a unique partnership with Petcothat provides you convenient and affordable access to veterinary services in a pet-loving environment you have already come to know and trust.

Name: Racetrack Veterinary Services
Description:

24 HOURS A DAY, 7 DAYS A WEEK.

Name: More Purrs
Description:
More Purrs inspires humans to create the home environment their cat would choose! One which respects their natural feline behaviour and provides a dependable place of comfort, love and safety (and of course great food!)

Following our Happy Cat Blog will help you discover your home through your cat’s eyes and explore the wonder of this fascinating species.

As humans, we are born to think as humans (which makes perfect sense) however, this doesn’t equip us brilliantly for sharing our homes with another species.  Naturally, we make lots of assumptions (usually with the best of intentions) and we often forget that our furry friends don’t think like us.  This isn’t your fault, or mine – it’s just a species thing!

There are many things that common sense doesn’t tell us about cats and things which we couldn’t possibly know as humans; such as why a cat won’t always drink from her bowl, why a cat has suddenly started to scratch an old settee or why a cat has suddenly become more vocal.

So, if you are willing to challenge some old assumptions and are determined to give your cat the most wonderful and fulfilling life, More Purrs welcomes you to a world of feline fascination.

Name: ECTAD Asia and the Pacific
Description:
Strengthening animal health systems to protect health and livelihoods

The Asia and the Pacific region is home to a large portion of the world's population. Meeting the demand for safe food while ensuring the health of our ecosystem is a constant challenge. Globalization coupled with significant changes in climate, land use, livestock production systems and human behaviours increases the risk of disease emergence and spread.

Animal health threats
Zoonotic diseases such as avian influenza continue to circulate in the region and have the potential to spill over from animals to humans. Non-zoonotic but high-impact transboundary animal diseases such as African swine fever (ASF) pose a serious threat to the livelihoods and food security of about 421 million farmers in the region.

Meanwhile, the misuse and overuse of antimicrobials in food producing animals makes antimicrobial resistance (AMR) a growing One Health concern. The Asia-Pacific has become the most impacted region in the world with over 643 thousand human deaths attributed to bacterial AMR in 2019.

Our role
FAO ECTAD has been working with Member Nations to strengthen the capacities of their animal health sectors since the highly pathogenic avian influenza (HPAI) emerged in the region in 2004.

FAO ECTAD continues to support countries to reduce the risk of animal health threats at national, regional and global levels. By building countries capacities to prevent, detect and respond to these threats, FAO ECTAD plays an essential role in protecting the health of people and animals, and safeguarding farmers' livelihoods, economy and food security.

Name: Vets Against Insanity CON
Description:
When we were young, the pursuit of the perfect veterinary conference was a noble one. The methods were simple, and attendees were easy to please. There were only two conferences then: big...and small.

But then several years ago there was a conference renaissance, an explosion of creativity as conference creators sought to push the boundaries of what vet conferences were, and what veterinary conferences could be. Suddenly, there were conferences for vet moms, conferences for anesthesia nerds, conferences with memberships, conferences on ships, conferences that look like not-conferences, and the great equalizer of them all: on-demand virtual conferences where you can learn...in your pajamas. 

The last few years have forced us to forget everything we've known about veterinary conferences.

Enter Vets Against Insanity CON…a veterinary conference that boldly goes where no conference has gone before….or maybe we are making conferences great again? Or perhaps it’s with great conferences come great responsibility? Ack…who knows…

In celebration of 5 years serving the veterinary profession by boosting morale and making you laugh so hard you almost pee your pants with our slightly scandalous Vets Against Insanity games, we are offering the inaugural Vets Against Insanity CON, a unique, regional veterinary conference October 21-23, 2022 at Ameristar Casino and Spa Resort in beautiful Blackhawk, Colorado.

What makes this conference different? 

Well...the premise is built on a card game, so you have to know that its' going to be out-of-the-box and you are going to have fun and partay. By keeping the conference limited to 200 regional attendees, you are guaranteed to create relationships and connections that will support you long after the conference is over.

Having fun, playing the hottest game in vetmed with fellow game-o-philes, lurnin' and earnin' CE, making friends and creating supportive connections that last...

COME LEARN AND PLAY AT VETS AGAINST INSANITY CON.

Name: Perth Wildlife Hospital
Description:
Perth Wildlife Hospital (PWH), located in Malaga, is proudly owned and operated by Native Animal Rescue Inc.(NAR), a not-for-profit, non-government incorporated organisation committed to the care and conservation of Western Australia’s native wildlife.

Our Mission

At Perth Wildlife Hospital and at our Broome branch, we’re committed to:

Providing expert treatment and care for sick, orphaned, and displaced native animals, with the goal of successful rehabilitation and release
Contributing to the development of long-term conservation strategies across Western Australia
Offering facilities and hands-on training in wildlife management skills
Educating the community about native species, habitats, and how to safely coexist
Supporting and participating in research into wildlife health and recovery

In addition to our main hospital in Malaga, Native Animal Rescue operates a regional branch in Broome, expanding our reach and impact across WA. Both locations work collaboratively under the Native Animal Rescue banner to provide expert wildlife care and rehabilitation.

Native Animal Rescue leads innovative conservation programs in partnership with local councils, government departments, and universities, developing and implementing effective strategies to protect native species in both metro and regional communities.

Name: Animal Protective Foundation
Description:
WHO WE ARE
The Animal Protective Foundation is a humane society providing services to Schenectady County and the greater Capital Region. Since 1931, the APF has held true to the mission of its founders. We have an open admission policy which ensures that animals are not turned away based on their breed, age, condition, or circumstance.

We accept owner relinquished cats, dogs and small animals and stray cats from Schenectady County residents. We request a minimum donation of $25 per animal at the time of intake or surrender. The APF cares for upwards of 2,500 animals each year.

OUR MISSION
The mission of the Animal Protective Foundation is to promote and protect the human-animal bond by providing resources to our community and humane care to companion animals. 

OUR VISION
Our vision is a community where all companion animals are loved, respected and receive exceptional care.

OUR COMMITMENT TO THE ANIMALS
Upon arrival, animals receive an incoming exam and are vaccinated against distemper, rabies, and other diseases. They are also treated for fleas, worms and other parasites, as needed. Then they are given time to settle into their new surroundings and provided with comforting amenities, such as blankets, beds and toys.

Prior to spay/neuter surgery, cats over 6 months old are tested for feline leukemia (FeLV) and feline immunodeficiency (FIV) and cats under 6 months old are tested for feline leukemia (FeLV) only. Dogs are tested for heartworm, Lyme disease, ehrlichia and anaplasma (both tick-borne illnesses). The average cost of care we provide for each dog and cat is $250.

We get to know our pets through behavioral assessments so that we can place them with adopters whose lifestyles best match their needs. Staff members and volunteers provide daily exercise, enrichment, and socialization for the animals.

Description:
Company Description
INNOVET TECH is a simplified joint-stock company specializing in the development of advanced technological solutions for animal health. Mission
Our mission is to revolutionize the animal health sector through advanced technologies and innovative methodologies, ensuring animal well-being while supporting veterinary professionals with cutting-edge tools.

Vision
We aim to become the global leader in providing comprehensive technological solutions to improve animal health and support veterinary practice through continuous innovation and multidisciplinary research.

Services and Products
Advanced virtual solutions for equine veterinarians.
Monitoring and regulation systems for veterinary technological solutions.
Advanced AI for theoretical and practical analysis of animal health systems.
Methodologies and Approaches
Advanced Mathematical Modeling: Utilizing Rosettes-Audubert equations to optimize solutions.
Integrated and Adaptive Analysis: Applying principles of sheldonology for a holistic understanding of animal health dynamics.
Multidisciplinary Collaboration: Integrating scientific, philosophical, and theological perspectives for balanced and innovative development.

Vetz is an AI-driven workspace that frees up time and improves care quality for veterinarians.

Name: Centro Veterinario Horses&Pets IL CHIRONE
Description:
Il Centro Veterinario a Cagliari Il Chirone è stato fondato nel 2003 dal dott. Fabio Schirru.
La struttura situata a Flumini di Quartu, nei pressi di Cagliari, è nata con lo scopo di ricreare in Sardegna un referral center simile a quelli funzionanti da oltre un ventennio negli Stati Uniti, in Gran Bretagna, in Germania ed in altre nazioni che rappresentano l'avanguardia del settore veterinario.
La sede coperta ha una superficie di 1200 mq, un ampio parcheggio e giardino esterno ed è rapidamente e facilmente raggiungibile. Le possibilità di contatto e di relazione con altri veterinari hanno ispirato l'attività del Centro Veterinario Il Chirone fin dalla nascita e sono anche alla base di tutto il lavoro di ricerca eseguito allo scopo di dare rilievo scientifico alla varia casistica che viene proposta.
Lo sviluppo e la crescita del Centro Veterinario Il Chirone hanno seguito in parallelo quello della categoria dei veterinari. Oggi si avverte a tutti i livelli una richiesta di specializzazione che fa di ciascun professionista un potenziale esperto.
La Struttura Veterinaria Il Chirone è stato il primo ed è tutt'ora l'unico a proporsi, in Sardegna, come centro di referenza, con personale operante all'interno della struttura in grado di operare in campo in ogni condizione, anche grazie ai supporti logistici della struttura stessa, dotata di attrezzature fisse in loco e movibili, quali sala operatoria per le diverse discipline chirurgiche, diagnostica per immagini di alta qualità, ambulanza per il trasporto di equini in condizioni critiche.
E' costituita da quattro sezioni: una sezione clinica in cui svolgono attività medici veterinari ed infermieri, con la Direzione Sanitaria del dott. Fabio Schirru; una sezione dedicata alla chirurgia del cavallo; una sezione dedicata alla chirurgia dei piccoli animali; una quarta sezione è dedicata alla diagnostica per immagini che dispone di radiologia tradizionale, radiologia digitale diretta, ecografia e endoscopia.

Name: Pneu-Dart, Inc
Description:
Pneu-Dart, Inc. A Proud Company Working for you!  Pneu-Dart offers the best remote injection equipment for your remote delivery needs. Effective and reliable, our remote drug delivery systems are designed to capture or medicate without harming the animal.

Pneu Dart, Inc. associates take great pride in providing the best possible products and services at an affordable price. We build the experience of an established business with the latest advances in remote drug delivery systems into every Pneu-Dart, Inc. product. Our products are as simple to use, as they are functional and reliable. Just connect with your target and let us do the rest. Whether you are home on the range, deep in the back country, or out on safari, you’ll be sure to hit your mark the first time — every time with Pneu-Dart.

While our products are most typically used for the control and capture of free-ranging ranch-raised exotics, Pneu-Dart, Inc. makes a product to handle every target situation, even from inside a helicopter! This catalog and field guide provides detailed information on our complete line of products. Browse our expertly crafted darts, tranquilizer guns (or “projectors” as we prefer to call them), and a full range of accessories.

Pneu-Dart, Inc. was born in the majestic mountains of Central Pennsylvania in the village of Barbours. Founded in 1967, Pneu-Dart started as a small basement operation developing animal darting equipment for livestock and wild game industries. Our mission was based simply on the philosophy of giving the customer what it wants – and what works. We have enjoyed steady growth over the years due to invaluable feedback from ranchers and rangers. These ideas have improved and continue to improve the product line. In fact, eight of the seventeen projectors we have produced are still in production today. Our darts have been modified and perfected to the point that they are unparalleled in design and effectiveness.

Name: Humane Society of Harford County
Description:
The Humane Society of Harford County, Inc., located in Fallston, Maryland, is a non-profit, 501(c)(3), open-admission animal support organization dedicated to providing shelter and care to the homeless and neglected animals of Harford County.  

We serve nearly 3,500 animals each year including dogs, cats, ponies, birds, hamsters, guinea pigs, rabbits, bearded dragons, lizards, snakes, spiders, iguanas, turtles, ducks, turkeys, chickens, goats and pigs, just to name a few!

We provide a safe and healthy temporary shelter and seek loving, permanent homes to ensure the long-term welfare of the animals we serve. Through education and advocacy, we promote the humane treatment of companion animals and work toward reducing, and ultimately eliminating, pet overpopulation in the county through low-cost spay and neuter programs. We have welcomed more than 300,000 animals since 1946 and provide service to the community in conjunction with animal control to safeguard public health and safety.  We strive to promote the special bond between humans and their companion pets in securing forever homes for our animals.

Description:

The WTG does not receive any government funding or support. It is only due to the kind and generous help of our donors and supporters that we are able to help suffering animals around the globe.

Our mission statement

Our vision is a world in which all animals are appreciated and treated respectfully by humans around them.
Our mission is to work closely together with the right people to apply our work in the places where it is most effective

Our mission is to apply our work at the source where it is most effective, which is working closely together with humans.

www.welttierschutz.org

Name: MSM Vets
Description:
Are you a vet returning to practice, starting out, or looking to widen your repertoire?

A veterinary nurse looking to enrich your career?

At MSM (Mobile Surgical Mentoring) Vets, we believe surgery belongs in first opinion practice.  

You don't need fancy instruments or diplomas to make a massive difference to your patients - you need the right mindset, a great team and excellent communication.

We aim to close the continually widening gap between first opinion and referral surgery. Our surgeons will come to you, operate in your local premises and mentor you through the procedures you wish to retain in-house. Within a few visits, you will be performing these procedures solo, retaining turnover, clients and most importantly, empowering your team along the way.

We offer customised mentorship programmes to increase the operating potential of your practice cost-effectively. Our mentorship extends to the nursing team, where we can help set up a surgical nursing programme to optimise the practice offering and enrich careers.

We also offer on-site surgical services in diagnostic and therapeutic endoscopic/endosurgical procedures through to soft tissue and orthopaedic surgery. 

Are you looking to start performing the increasingly popular 'Lap Spay'? MSM Vets also provides complete laparoscopic services, and we can offer a start-up package where we bring all the equipment you need to your premises. We will train the team over a number of days, including guiding managers through the financial intricacies of billing and purchasing equipment.

Veterinary surgery is amazing, and we want to see practices loving it again.

See our website msmvets.co.uk for full details.

Name: Neel Veterinary Hospital
Description:
Neel Veterinary Hospital is one of the only animal hospitals in the state of Oklahoma that offers the convenience of 24 hour pet care and services. We have veterinarians on staff around the clock, 7 days a week, including holidays. There are no emergency fees EVER and we accept appointments, emergencies, and walk-ins, 24-hours a day, 365 days a year. Neel Veterinary Hospital also houses the only pet-specific Hyperbaric Oxygen Therapy Chamber in the state of Oklahoma.

The goal of Neel Veterinary Hospital is to provide the care and facilities necessary to make sure that the pets entrusted to us live a long and healthy life, as pain free and as comfortably as possible. This will be accomplished:
-by employing only an empathetic, respectful, knowledgeable and dedicated staff,
-by maintaining a state of the art, clean and comfortable hospital,
-by utilizing cutting edge technology and preventative health care plans,
-and by always putting the health and comfort of the pet first above all else.

At Neel Veterinary Hospital, your pet has access to the greatest variety and most advanced medical services and procedures available in the state. Our services include:

Round-the-clock, fully staffed Intensive Care Unit
24/7 Emergency & Critical Care
Hyperbaric Oxygen Chamber Therapy
CT with Fluoroscopy and Ultrasound
Digital Radiographs (X-Rays)
Multiple Specialists on site
In-house Labwork
Surgery Suite
Dental Suite
Rehabilitation Program with Water Treadmill, Laser Therapy and Acupuncture
Laparoscopic surgeries
Orthopedic and Arthroscopic surgeries
Endoscopy, Rhinoscopy, Cystoscopy, Gastroscopy, Colonoscopy, and Otoscopy
Miscropchiping and Health Certificates

Description:

A. To provide a wild animal facility for the rescue, treatment, and release of sick, injured, and orphaned native wildlife and other waterfowl; B. To educate the public about and to promote understanding of the local wildlife and their habitats; C. To increase awareness of and appreciation for the value of wildlife and the environment, and to protect these natural resources. D. To promote the highest standards in all activities of the wildlife rehabilitator profession; E. To promote networking, communication, and cooperation among rehabilitators, wildlife organizations, and facilities on local, statewide, and national levels.

Name: Veterinary Visionaries
Description:
Established in 2021, Veterinary Visionaries is a collaboration of veterinary associations and higher education organizations bringing their collective memberships together to share ideas, co-create solutions, and unify our profession’s approach to solving shared challenges. 

Solving events are held to address one issue at a time on an innovative platform that allows interactive responses, solution tracking and idea judging by expert panels. In addition to offering systemic solutions that will globally benefit the profession, participants are incentivized with cash awards.

Veterinary Visionaries is generously funded by CareCredit, IDEXX, and Boehringer Ingelheim.

Name: Nebraska Wildlife Rehab
Description:
The Baldwin Wildlife Center and Hubbard Family Hospital at Nebraska Wildlife Rehab is a 15,500 sq. foot state of the art wildlife rehabilitations facility and education outreach center.

Wildlife rehabilitators provide medical management and compassionate care for injured, sick, and orphaned wild, native Nebraska species and migratory birds. Working closely with veterinarians and other wildlife and health professionals, our goal is to rehabilitate the wildlife in our temporary care for reintroduction to the appropriate wild habitat.

NWR also work closely with the public to create a strong community that support natural habitats and our local fauna and instills youths to become leaders in conservation.

Name: Quoin Island Turtle Rehabilitation Centre
Description:
Quoin Island Turtle Rehabilitation Centre (QITRC) is located on Quoin Island in the Gladstone Harbour, the gateway to the Southern Great Barrier Reef. We are dedicated to the rescue and rehabilitation of critically endangered and endangered sea turtles.

QITRC opened in March 2012, and is our region's first sea turtle rehabilitation facility. We service Central Queensland, from Yeppoon to Agnes Water, about 300km of coastline. 

Sea turtles are constantly at risk of injury or illness. They are heavily impacted by environmental events like flooding, and the constant threat of human interference such as fishing, boating and littering.

Each turtle requires an unique assessment and care program, with successful rehabilitation taking many months. The centre has a steady success rate of 71%, which means the majority of our patients are successfully rehabilitated and released back into the wild.

QITRC receives no income or government funding, and is run through the support of local businesses, individuals and passionate volunteers.

If you’ve spotted a sea turtle in distress or are concerned about a turtle, please phone the centre directly on 0408 431 304.

Name: My Pet's Brace
Description:
My Pet’s Brace was formed in 2010 by our founders, Jim Alaimo and Mark Hardin. Jim, a Certified Prosthetist Orthotist, and Mark, a Certified Public Accountant, were colleagues at a human orthotic and prosthetic company. Both were beginning the second chapters of their careers and decided to work together to determine whether they could apply their knowledge to the veterinary world.

After surveying veterinarians and rehabilitation professionals across the country, they discovered the very real need for high-quality custom-made leg braces for ACL/CCL injuries and other conditions. Our doors opened at our facility in Morgantown, Pennsylvania and Jim began seeing patients as well as fabricating braces for dogs located around the world.

The business has grown exceptionally as more and more veterinarians, rehabilitation professionals, and pet families learn how custom leg braces can help dogs lead happy active lives. In June 2017, we moved to a larger facility, across the street, to be able to help more pups. Every device continues to be hand-made at our Morgantown facility.

In the fall of 2018, a second My Pet’s Brace facility opened in Canonsburg, just south of Pittsburgh, PA. Pet families from across Pennsylvania are now within driving distance of one of our two facilities.

Name: ROADMAP H2020
Description:
The ROADMAP project has received funding from the European Union's Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme under Grant Agreement No 817626.

ROADMAP will foster transitions towards prudent antimicrobial use (AMU) in animal production in a large variety of contexts, by favouring a rethinking of antimicrobial decision-systems all along the food supply chain. Even if it is possible to learn from successful experiences, there is no “one-size-fits-all” solution to reduce AMU but various strategies working according to local conditions, defined by social, economic, technical and institutional variables. ROADMAP will develop innovative conceptual approaches within a transdisciplinary and multi-actor perspective to engage with animal health professionals, stakeholders and policy-makers. It will adapt, combine and produce tailored strategies to reduce AMU in diverse production systems in Europe and low- and middle-income countries (pig, poultry and cattle sectors).

Name: Big Fluffy Dog Rescue
Description:
Big Fluffy Dog Rescue is a 501(c)(3) organization dedicated to helping giant breed mixed breed dogs in need. We value dogs of all breeds, but we specialize in what the name says: big, fluffy dogs. We have volunteers in several states in the South and New England who work to help homeless big fluffy dogs find a home to call their own. Big Fluffy Dog Rescue works to save Great Pyrenees, Saint Bernards, Newfoundlands and their mixes from euthanasia.

Our dogs come in to rescue for many different reasons. Many were abandoned at high kill shelters in the South. Some were turned in by owners who could not properly care for them and still others are failed livestock guardian dogs. Regardless of their origins, our goal for every dog we have is the same: a safe, happy home where each dog is a well-loved member of the family. Big Fluffy Dog Rescue has its headquarters in Nashville, Tennessee. We have volunteers in several states in the South and across New England.

Name: Cedar Vets
Description:
Cedar Veterinary Group is a local independent veterinary practice.

Our practice was first established in Alresford in 1893. It then expanded to Alton in 1923 and then to Four Marks in 1985.
The Alton surgery, having recently undergone an extensive refurbishment, now offers the most up to date facilities.

As a RCVS accredited practice , we are dedicated to providing an excellent service for all animals in our care. We actively promote preventative healthcare to help your much-loved pet remain happy and healthy. We provide our own 24 hour emergency service to all of our patients and have a comprehensive range of diagnostic equipment, allowing us to examine and diagnose conditions quickly. From routine vaccinations to major surgery, our team are fully committed to providing the expert veterinary care your pet deserves.

We have a dedicated team working together to improve the health and wellbeing of your pets and livestock.  We are committed to providing an excellent service 24hours a day and 365 days a year.  We offer our own out of hours service so in an emergency your pet will be seen by our own staff in our own surgeries.
Our vets relish the challenges of veterinary work and our whole team have their own pets of all varieties and are therefore perfectly placed to sympathise with the highs and lows of responsible pet ownership.

Our family of trained counselors understand that overwhelming sorrow. With full-time licensed funeral directors on staff offering the same grace and dignity of a human funeral home and offering 24 Hour Service, Pet Angel Memorial Center gives you the opportunity to receive the same types of services as when a human family member passes away with.

Our hospitals offer a wide range of services, from primary and urgent care to emergency, specialty, mixed animal, and avian/exotic medicine, creating an ecosystem of growth and opportunity for every member of the veterinary profession.

At VetmEDUcate, we believe in Empowerment, Empathy, Professionalism, Integrity, and Collaboration- the values that define our EPIC culture and the way we care for our patients, our clients, and each other.

Together, we’re shaping the future of veterinary medicine.

Name: Teddy Vets
Description:
Transforming pet care in Israel, one tail at a time. At Teddy Veterinary, we're building Israel's most innovative network of veterinary clinics, powered by leading veterinarians and cutting-edge technology 

We understand that pets aren't just animals – they're cherished family members deserving exceptional care. That's why we're revolutionizing the veterinary experience through our Vet 2.0 vision: a network of modern, state-of-the-art clinics where technology meets compassion. With our first location launching next month, we're setting new standards for pet healthcare in Israel.
For pet parents, we offer an unparalleled care experience that combines clinical excellence with genuine compassion. Our approach focuses on making pet healthcare more accessible, transparent, and enjoyable for both pets and their families.
For veterinary professionals, Teddy represents the future of veterinary practice in Israel. We're creating an environment where talented veterinarians, technicians, and clinic owners can thrive. Join us to access:

- Cutting-edge facilities and technology
- Continuous professional development
- Industry-leading compensation and benefits
- A supportive, collaborative network of peers
- Resources to grow and enhance your practice

As Israel's fastest-growing veterinary network, we're actively seeking passionate professionals who share our vision of elevating pet healthcare. Whether you're a veterinary professional looking to advance your career or a pet parent seeking exceptional care, become part of the Teddy family today.
Together, we're building more than just a veterinary network – we're creating communities of healthier, happier pets and the people who love them. Don't miss the opportunity to be part of this transformative journey.

#TeddyVeterinary #PetCare #VeterinaryCareers #IsraelHealthcare #vet2.0

Name: Association of Zoo and Exotic Veterinary Nurses (AZEVN)
Description:
The Association of Zoo and Exotic Veterinary Nurses (AZEVN) began in 2012 as the Zoo and Exotic Veterinary Nurses workshop (ZEVN), with an ever-growing network of like-minded veterinary nurses, ZEVN workshop grew to capacity and the AZEVN was created in 2016!

We have been holding annual conferences and facilitating networking opportunities for veterinary nurses and students across the world, raising the profile of exotic, zoo and wildlife nursing and promoting best practice and high welfare for our patients.

Name: Animal Medical Center of Seattle
Description:
Animal Medical Center of Seattle is an emergency, urgent care, and specialty veterinary hospital located in Shoreline, WA. We offer a wide array of services, including 24/7 emergency/critical care, urgent care, neurology, oncology, internal medicine, interventional radiology, dentistry, surgery, and hyperbaric oxygen therapy. With a focus on interventional medicine, our goal is to provide advanced medicine, diagnostics, and emergency care to the pets of the Pacific Northwest and beyond.

We value the relationships we have with referring veterinarians and recognize the vital role they play in the patient's treatment and final outcome. Our top priority is working with a pet's primary veterinarian and family to provide excellent, coordinated, and compassionate medicine.

Name: VetCEE Veterinary Continuing Education in Europe
Description:
VetCEE is an independent entity which guarantees the quality of continuing professional development (CPD) and facilitates CPD recognition across Europe. VetCEE has established minimum standards for the accreditation of any kind of veterinary CPD activity or e-learning material that fulfils the expected quality requirements. VetCEE closely collaborates with the Veterinary Statutory Bodies or National Competent Authorities and all stakeholders of the veterinary profession.
VetCEE was founded jointly by different European organisations representing academia EAEVE, the veterinary profession FVE/UEVP and the veterinary specialists EBVS. Current members are EAEVE and EBVS with membership open to veterinary competent authorities from countries in geographical Europe starting in 2025.

Name: Equine Specialty Hospital
Description:
The Equine Specialty Hospital is Ohio’s premiere veterinary care facility
for horses because every patient, either by appointment or as an emergency admission, is evaluated and under the direct care of a board-certified specialist.  If your horse requires continued treatment in the hospital, the same board-certified specialist will directly manage every aspect of your horse’s care.  You will be able to communicate daily, or more frequently if necessary, with the specialist regarding your horse’s condition.  Your horse’s specialist will also consult with your primary-care veterinarian to assure the continuum of care.  This caliber of care cannot be achieved at a university teaching hospital and this sets the Equine Specialty Hospital apart from other equine care facilities.

At the Equine Specialty Hospital, all horses are monitored 24 hours per day.  Our specialists are assisted in your horse’s care by a highly trained team of registered veterinary technicians and veterinary assistants.  These dedicated individuals provide continuous exceptional nursing care to all of our patients.  Their years of experience coupled with the compassionate care they deliver allow them to provide the best in medical care for your horse.

The Equine Specialty Hospital is committed to the health, well-being, and 
performance of horses through excellence in medical and surgical care.  

The Equine Specialty Hospital evaluates non-emergency horses by appointment Monday through Friday, and emergencies are admitted 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

Name: Delaware Humane Association
Description:
Founded in 1957, Delaware Humane Association (DHA) is a nonprofit no kill animal shelter and adoption center serving a four state area.

We make "friends for life" by connecting people with animals, and by building strong relationships to better serve our community. We envision a day when every animal is loved, has a home, and has a "friend for life."

At DHA, we make "friends for life" by:

* Matching the right people with the right animals
* Offering a friendly, welcoming environment
* Empowering others to care for animals
* Being kind, caring and compassionate

Each year, hundreds of animals come to DHA in search of a warm bed, good meal, and most importantly, a new home. Our dedicated staff and volunteers work hard to ensure that each animal receives the best care possible during his/her stay at our adoption shelter. We're committed to preparing all adoptable dogs and cats for a new home by keeping them well-groomed, giving them daily exercise and affection, and providing obedience training and any necessary medical care.

DHA serves the community by offering affordable spay/neuter services, low cost vaccination clinics, and a pet food pantry. 

We receive no government funding, and rely on the support of the community in the form of volunteers, private donations, bequests, grants, fundraising events, and our Guardian Angel Program to complete our mission.

Description:
Dit jaar zal alweer de 24e editie van het Feline Symposium plaatsvinden! Volg deze pagina om op de hoogte te blijven van de datum en het programma.

In 1998 is deze stichting opgericht door studenten diergeneeskunde, met als doel de kattengeneeskunde in Nederland meer onder de aandacht te brengen. Sindsdien wordt ieder jaar het Feline Symposium, een symposium over kattengeneeskunde, georganiseerd. Name: AVMA PLIT
Description:
AVMA PLIT: 
The AVMA founded the Trust in 1962 as a means to ensure that veterinarians would have an advocate in the management of their professional liability claims. Since the 1960s, this has been a vital component of the PLIT-sponsored Program. Building on the success of the malpractice insurance program, the PLIT expanded its sponsored program offerings to include veterinary license defense, business owner policies, workers’ compensation, employment practices liability, automobile, and comprehensive personal insurance solutions for AVMA and student AVMA members. The security, stability, and strength over the past five decades explain why the PLIT-sponsored Program is the first choice for so many veterinarians and veterinary students for business, malpractice, and personal insurance solutions. Today, more than 65,000 veterinarians participate in the PLIT-sponsored Program.

About our partner, HUB International:
HUB International Midwest Limited is the insurance broker for the AVMA PLIT. HUB is one of the largest insurance brokers in North America and has been the only insurance broker for AVMA PLIT since its inception in 1962. One of the reasons for the success of the relationship between HUB and AVMA PLIT is the shared vision to help veterinarians protect what matters most. HUB works on behalf of veterinarians to represent their interests to top-rated insurance carriers, and has the market leverage to negotiate the best policy terms and rates for the veterinary industry. Since the founding of the Trust, HUB’s team for the PLIT has focused solely on supporting veterinarians and the veterinary profession.

Name: Fur and Floss: The Veterinary Dental Nonprofit
Description:
Fur and Floss: The Veterinary Dental Nonprofit

About
Fur and Floss is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to improving the lives of shelter pets and underserved communities through accessible, compassionate dental care.

We believe every animal deserves a healthy smile and that oral health is essential to overall well-being, comfort, and adoptability. By providing expert veterinary dental services, education, and outreach, we bridge the gap between need and access.

Our team partners with shelters, rescues, and community organizations to deliver:
 Free or low-cost dental procedures for shelter and rescue pets
 Education for pet parents and shelter staff on preventive dental care
 Collaboration with local clinics, rescues, and sponsors to expand impact

At Fur and Floss, we care for the bond between pets, people, and communities.

Join us:
 Donate · Volunteer · Partner
Together, we can make every smile a second chance.

 www.furandfloss.org

Name: VETEX Perú

En VETEX creemos que el trabajo más recio, necesita la fórmula más recia. Por eso, junto a nuestro equipo de expertos, creamos los fármacos veterinarios con los insumos de mayor calidad, los porcentajes exactos para cada fórmula y los empaques ideales para todo tipo de temperaturas. Así, expertos como tú podrán mantener a sus animales siempre recios y seguir haciendo crecer la industria más recia de nuestro país.

Name: The Neighbourhood Vet
Description:
When it comes to the health of your pet we know that you want to find a veterinary practice that offers unrivalled care; after all, your pet is one of the family. You want to know that they will be seen by experienced vets using the most up-to-date facilities, in an environment that is comfortable and as stress free as possible - look no further than The Neighbourhood Vet. 

At The Neighbourhood Vet we pride ourselves on providing the very best level of care and understand that no two animals are the same - for that reason, we tailor every consultation. Although we have excellent staff and facilities to achieve this, we believe that client communication is paramount. Name: VetExplain
Description:
Biz Kimiz?
VetExplain, Veteriner Hekimliği öğrencileri öncülüğünde kurulan, karmaşık internet çağında size doğru bilgiyi kolay ve pratik bir şekilde sunmayı hedefleyen bir öğrenci topluluğudur.

Misyonumuz her daim kendini geliştirmeye açık ve azimli meslektaşlarımız ile birlikte interaktif şekilde çalışmalar yaparak bulunduğumuz çağa en uygun versiyonumuzu ortaya çıkartabilmek ve hayvan sağlığı konusunda toplumsal farkındalık seviyesini geliştirmektir.

Çıktığımız bu değişim ve gelişim yolunda veteriner hekimler tarafından doğrulanan bilimsel içeriklerimiz ile sizlere rehberlik etmekten keyif duyuyor olacağız.

Who are we?
VetExplain, established under the leadership of veterinary medicine students, in this complicated internet era our student association aims to provide you the right information in a way as easy and practical.

Our mission is to work interactively with our colleagues who are always open to self-improvement and determined, to reveal the most appropriate version of our era and to improve the level of public awareness on animal health.

We will be pleased to guide you with our scientific contents verified by veterinarian doctors on this change and development path we have embarked on.

Name: VetXtend

Name: Pegasus Orthobiologics
Description:
Pegasus Orthobiologics is redefining equine regenerative medicine by taking the guesswork out of orthobiologics.

Historically, products like platelet-rich plasma (PRP) have been unreliable. Because blood cell counts change throughout the day, and because every horse’s biology is different, the PRP produced with a commercial kit can vary widely. In fact, the same kit, used on two horses––or even the same horse at different times––may yield very different results.

Pegasus changes this. We use a state-of-the-art hematology analyzer to measure every component of the PRP. By knowing each patient’s exact cell counts, we can:

Standardize: Guarantee a therapeutic platelet dose with consistently low red and white cell level

Customize: Tailor the PRP to the unique biology of each horse and the tissue or joint being treated.

Advance Research: Collect patient data (age, history, platelet recovery, and more) to refine our methods and drive forward equine regenerative medicine.

Our goal is to transform what has long been a hit-or-miss therapy into a consistently reliable treatment that veterinarians and owners can trust.

Name: Veterinary Diagnostic Centers
Description: We are a referral center for veterinary ultrasounds in Chicago, IL.  We provide an alternative to specialty centers and mobile sonographers.  Referring veterinarians can request basic abdominal and echocardiogram reports or a comprehensive remote internal medicine or cardiology consultation for their referred patients.  Specialist reports will be provided within 24 hours.  We can also collect and submit requested laboratory tests such as ultrasound guided cystocentesis samples, blood samples while the patient is fasted and ultrasound guided FNAs (when deemed safe).  Referring veterinarians can feel confident that their clients will thank them for the referral because we allow the family to stay with the pet throughout the ultrasound instead of having to drop of their beloved family member for an unknown amount of time.  They get to have a set appointment time and stay with their pet in a calm, Fear Free environment as we only see one patient at a time.   Referring veterinarians will provide their client our contact information so that the family can easily book an appointment online.  Once the appointment is booked we will contact the referring veterinarian for a history which is also simple to provide as an online form via our website.

Name: Translational Research Platform for Veterinary Biologicals (TRPVB)
Description:
TRPVB is an unique novel partnership programme between Department of Biotechnology (DBT) and Tamilnadu Veterinary and Animal Science University (TANUVAS) in the field of translational research for Veterinary Biologicals. The research team includes an amalgamated combination of academia / industry and regulatory experts who can leverage and assist clients in various stages of product development. It is housed in one of the leading Veterinary Universities in India which would provide the much needed academic ambience and act as a knowledge hub for information resources. 


The idea evolved through deliberations and discussions at a translational research workshop conducted at TANUVAS in January 2011, which had participation of Secretary DBT, academicians from various national and international institutions such as Virginia Tech University, USA and industrial stakeholders. There was a consensus among all the experts on the need for a platform that would converge the requirements of academia, industry and regulation for efficient productization of veterinary biologicals.

A need for a knowledge hub in this area was also felt at this juncture which would facilitate to create a favorable eco system to lure investments in this virgin area of veterinary sciences. Hence, this platform was initiated to be housed at TANUVAS and was christened as Translational Research Platform for Veterinary Biologicals (TRPVB) to make the dream and vision of DBT and TANUVAS come true.

Description:

Ictiovet offers veterinary consultancy and diagnostic tools for aquaculture related companies.

Ictiovet offers veterinary advice and diagnostic services. In addition, we provide a variety of diagnostic tools for other veterinarians and fish health personnel.

HISTOLOGY AND CITOLOGY: Processing and staining of tissue samples. Citological and histopathological analysis. Special stains. Immunehistochemistry.

ANIMAL EXAMINATION: Necropsy and subsequent parasitological, microbiological and histopathological examination. 

MICROBIOLOGY: Cultivation, Identification and screening for antibiotic susceptibility.

ENDOCRINOLOGY AND CLINICAL BIOCHEMISTRY: Detection of serum hormone levels (eg cortisol, sexual hormones), glucose, liver enzymes, circulating levels of cholesterol and triglycerides, determination of plasma proteins and proteinograms.

WATER SAMPLES: detection of hormone levels (cortisol).

HAEMATOLOGY: determination of hemoglobin, hematocrite and blood smear studies (differential counts, identification of haematological parasites, etc.).

MOLECULAR BIOLOGY: Detection of pathogens by molecular tools (eg PCR for Enteromyxum leei).

I am very active within the veterinary profession and was the Southern California Veterinary Medical Association’s 2018 Paraprofessional of the year.  And I have served on the Board of Trustees for the SCVMA since 2020.

In 2011 I co-founded the North Orange County Veterinary Hospital manager’s group.  I help organize our monthly meetings and help provide quality education to our local managers.  I love helping other managers and team members grow within the veterinary profession.

I have published multiple articles in DVM360.com, Veterinary Team Brief, and veterinary economics.  I have been a speaker at multiple conferences and symposiums, including ASEC’s Annual Symposium, California Veterinary Specialists Management/Technician Spring forum & Symposium, and Fur Paws Consulting Training Symposium.  I was a featured speaker on how to create a Cat Friendly Practice with Ceva Animal Health, at the 2016 AVSG Wet Lab as well as AAFP’s 2019 National Conference.  I have presented at local, state and national conferences on a variety of topics as well.

Becoming a veterinary practice consultant allows me to do what I love best, which is helping other veterinary professionals grow their business.

Name: Wolf Trap Animal Rescue
Description:
Wolf Trap Animal Rescue (WTAR) focuses efforts on rescuing high-risk animals from euthanasia, neglect, and abuse. These animals primarily come from Mississippi, where young animals are euthanized by the hundreds each and every day due to overpopulation. Lack of spay-neuter laws and large sections of rural land allow for free-roaming animals to reproduce, leading to a surplus of neglected, homeless, and starving puppies and kittens. These animals are then found and brought to local animal shelters, which simply cannot provide the care or homes these pets need in order to survive. Ultimately, they get euthanized for space or for illnesses contracted at the shelter.

There simply are not enough people to adopt.

We rescue these animals by operating a life-saving transport, foster, and adoption program. WTAR finds the pets who need us the most by employing a full-time transport coordinator on the ground in Mississippi (WTAR South), with the goal of working directly with these shelters and communities to be a resource when they cannot accept any more animals or find enough homes.  These transports operate weekly, relieving the shelters and communities from overcrowding and needless euthanasia.  Redirecting the intake of young, at-risk animals from the shelter to WTAR allows additional time and resources to be spent on the older, less adoptable residents of the shelter that would otherwise be euthanized for space. Rescued animals are then scheduled and placed on emergency transport with WTAR to Northern Virginia. Upon arrival, they undergo an extensive veterinary intake evaluation and then are placed in foster homes until they find their forever homes through private Meet & Greets.

Description:

Cardiology, Ophthalmology, Dentistry, Soft Tissue and Orthopaedic Surgery.

Name: CNV - Centro di Neurologia Veterinaria
Description:
Il Centro di Neurologia Veterinaria (CNV) offre cure di eccellenza in ambito neurologico grazie a tecniche moderne e all’avanguardia all’interno dell'Ospedale Veterinario Gregorio VII di Roma.

Il reparto, formato da un team di professionisti guidato dal Dr. Daniele Corlazzoli (diplomato all’European College of Veterinary Neurology) e dalla Dr.ssa Laura Porcarelli, fornisce un servizio 7 giorni su 7 sia su appuntamento che in emergenza, per la diagnosi e il trattamento delle patologie neurologiche. 

È possibile effettuare esami di diagnostica per immagini avanzata (RM e TC) fondamentali per la diagnosi di patologie spinali e cerebrali, studi elettrodiagnostici (EMG) per la diagnosi di patologie a carico del sistema nervoso periferico (miastenia, miositi, neuropatie), test audiometrici (BAER) per la diagnosi di sordità e ipoacusia, studi elettroencefalografici (EEG) per diagnosi di epilessia e monitoraggio stato epilettico.

La moderna sala operatoria equipaggiata di microscopio operatorio e intensificatore di brillanza permette di effettuare i delicati interventi spinali per il trattamento delle ernie del disco, con un approccio mini-invasivo. È possibile effettuare rimozioni di tumori spinali e cerebrali mediante l’utilizzo dell’aspiratore a ultrasuoni CUSA.

Il reparto di neurochirurgia è in grado di trattare patologie complesse quali la spondilomielopatia cervicale caudale (sindrome Wobbler), instabilità atlanto assiali (C1-C2), diverticoli subaracnoidei, emivertebre, fratture vertebrali ecc.

Il Centro di Neurologia Veterinaria si pone l’obiettivo di garantire in ogni sua attività i più alti standard di eccellenza e innovazione in ambito neurologico nel costante impegno di fornire le migliori cure possibili ai nostri amici a quattro zampe.

Name: Nexovet
Description:
Transformamos o Conhecimento Veterinário em Performance de Mercado.

A Nexovet é uma consultoria estratégica focada em um pilar: o mercado veterinário cresce com profissionalização. Não vendemos treinamentos; nós desenhamos e implementamos sistemas de performance.

Atuamos em duas frentes críticas para o crescimento do setor:

1. PARA DISTRIBUIDORAS: Acelerando o Sell-Out

O desafio da distribuição não é mais o sell-in (vender para a clínica). É o sell-out - ''out'' (ajudar a clínica a vender para o tutor).

Sua equipe comercial precisa deixar de ser "tiradora de pedidos" e se tornar "consultora de negócios" do seu cliente.

Nossa Solução: Desenhamos Imersões e Workshops (presenciais e online) focados 100% em estratégias de sell-out, transformando seus representantes em verdadeiros parceiros de negócios dos veterinários.

O Resultado: Aumento da recorrência, maior market share e clientes mais fidelizados.

2. PARA HOSPITAIS E CLÍNICAS: Transformando o Dono em Método

A maioria das clínicas de sucesso tem um "gargalo": o próprio dono. O negócio não cresce sem ele, pois a equipe não entrega com a mesma qualidade.

Nós extraímos o "método do dono" e o transformamos em processos replicáveis.

Nossa Solução: Um programa de consultoria e treinamento que mapeia sua excelência operacional, cria protocolos (técnicos e de atendimento) e treina a equipe para que ela execute no seu padrão de qualidade.

O Resultado: Menos dependência do dono, mais tempo estratégico para você e uma operação escalável.

NOSSOS SERVIÇOS:

Palestras Corporativas de Alto Impacto

Workshops e Imersões de Sell-Out para a Indústria

Programa de Extração e Replicação de Método (Gestão de Clínicas)

Treinamentos de Liderança e Atendimento

Description:

Description:
