We are proud of the 15 highly skilled veterinarians on staff, including Board-certified specialists in Internal Medicine, Canine Reproduction, and Advanced Canine and Feline Practice. Two of our veterinarians are specialists in Acupuncture and Traditional Chinese Medicine, and we are active members of the Veterinary Emergency and Critical Care Society. Our doctors and staff are committed to the belief that pets deserve medical care as advanced as their owners receive, yet as personal as the friendship they provide us. We work with you to provide the highest level of care for your pet.

We understand that modern life is busy and want to help make managing your pet's health care as easy and convenient as possible. That's why we offer extended night and weekend hours for both primary care appointments and emergency care. It's frightening when you're faced with an emergency and your pet needs immediate veterinary attention. At Bishop Ranch Veterinary Center & Urgent Care we're open when most veterinary offices are closed - providing life-saving services 7 days a week!

Name: Cassadol Equine Software
Description:
Developers created Cassadol Equine at Business Infusions – they are experts in Equine Veterinary Practice Management systems with decades of experience in the veterinary arena. We know what it takes to develop, implement, and support software and it is all we do.

Business Infusions has worked with thousands of veterinarians and staff with our existing suite of veterinary software programs, providing practice management software solutions to some of the world’s largest veterinary practices. Our most popular product is HVMS, Hospital Veterinary Management System, designed for medium to large equine veterinary practices needing a highly configurable software system to manage multiple locations, vehicles, doctors, and modalities.

Cassadol Equine was established in 2020, based on direct feedback from veterinarians looking for a simple cloud-based program to manage their solo-doctor equine practices. You wanted something smart, mobile, and affordable. We delivered.

LEARN MORE ABOUT BUSINESS INFUSIONS AND OUR FULL SUITE OF EQUINE VETERINARY MANAGEMENT SOFTWARE PRODUCTS 
https://businessinfusions.com/

Name: Clinica Veterinaria Modena Sud SRL
Description:
Struttura Veterinaria dedicata alla cura di Cani, Gatti e Animali Esotici (Uccelli, Rettili, Pesci, Piccoli Mammiferi).

Visite Specialistiche e Gestione delle Emergenze h24.

Name: Huronia Veterinary Emergency Clinic
Description:
Barrie and areas longest running, full-service veterinary facility dedicated to emergency and critical care services.  
Opened a new, custom designed 7500 sq ft facility in August 2019.
Open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week - including all holidays.

Name: Mosaic Animal Health Center
Description:
Mosaic Animal Health Centers provide a new kind of veterinary care through whole-health treatment outcomes and a commitment to animal welfare support.

We don't only focus on your pet's physical health. Our teams care about your pet's happiness, well-being, and their relationship with you. We strive to understand their needs and provide compassionate care at every visit.

Name: Small Animal Ultrasonography
Description: Companion website for the Atlas of Small Animal Ultrasonography, but more importantly, a broader eLearning platform.

Name: East of England Veterinary Specialists Ltd
Description:
East of England Veterinary Specialists is an independent veterinary referral practice established by orthopaedic specialists Martin Owen and Mark Bush.  We are one of only a few referral practices that can promise 100% of cases will be operated on by a Recognised Specialist.
 
We offer the highest level of veterinary orthopaedic expertise.  We charge all routine cases on a fixed price basis. This means we can clearly explain the costs of any procedures, giving pet owners the peace of mind to focus on their much-loved pet getting better, not the worry of rising bills.   
 
East of England Veterinary Specialists is one of the few independent specialist veterinary practices in the UK, locally owned and run by veterinary surgeons. Because we are independent, we are not driven to meet sales targets and growth forecasts. We can keep our fees and costs lower than those of the large corporate hospitals by concentrating on what we do best, orthopaedic surgery. 

We have taken over a purpose-built hospital in the beautiful South Cambridgeshire countryside, close to the National Trust's Wimpole Estate. We have converted the hospital for veterinary use and have two spacious operating theatres in addition to comfortable accommodation for cats and dogs, reception and waiting areas, offices and a seminar room. 

Both Mark and Martin have been providing CPD nationally and internationally for many years. We offer free CPD evenings for vets and nurses, on a range of orthopaedic topics. If there is a subject you would like us to present to your team, or if you would just like a tour of our new practice, please call us and we will arrange it for you.

Name: PetBase
Description:
PetBase is dé toonaangevende databank van Nederland en Europa voor het registreren en herenigen van huisdieren. Samen met gepassioneerde dierliefhebbers werken we elke dag aan een snelle hereniging van vermiste dieren met hun baasjes. Als officieel portaal voor de Nederlandse overheid bieden we veilige en betrouwbare registratie van honden, katten, chips en Europese dierenpaspoorten.

Sinds onze oprichting in 1998 als de eerste online dierendatabank (voorheen DAISYWeb) zijn we uitgegroeid tot één van de grootste dierendatabanken in Nederland. Huisdieren registreren, veiligstellen en eigenaren ontzorgen – dat is onze missie bij PetBase.

Name: NutricareVet
Description:
Trabalhamos com um time que realmente entende de nutrição de cães e gatos. Pautados na ciência, dados e pesquisas sérias, nossa equipe está na vanguarda de tudo que há de novo no mercado.

Somos uma empresa veterinária relacionada à nutrição de cães e gatos. Prestamos serviços como atendimento direto a clientes (e seus animais) e consultorias para veterinários e empresas que desejam criar alimentos para cães e gatos. Também realizamos cursos, aulas e palestras de modo a atualizar nossos colegas e parceiros deste mercado tão dinâmico.

Estamos aqui para difundir o conhecimento sobre nutrição pet para toda a sociedade. Com ampla experiência atuando nesta área, por meio de residência, pós-graduação e atuação profissional, temos certeza que podemos auxiliar nos seus objetivos.

Name: Sussex Equine Hospital
Description: The Sussex Equine Hospital was founded in 1951, it was formerly known as the Arundel Equine Hospital. The hospital moved from Arundel to Ashington in July 2017. The brand new, state of the art, purpose built facilities allow us to provide our patients and clients with the best standards of equine veterinary health care.

Name: KRUUSE China
Description:
古氏中国
古氏贸易（上海）有限公司成立于2011年，致力于为中国宠物和畜牧业市场带来专业产品和服务，以满足中国日渐增长的对高质量产品的需求，为宠物医师及专业化的农户服务。
依靠着我们自身强大的科研发展部门，以及对本地化需求的深入了解，我们为中国市场带来了全新的技术和一流的产品，将提高生产效率，保障动物身体健康，同时改善动物工作者工作环境。
所有古氏产品均为动物健康产业专门研发。
古氏中国工作团队在产品来源，质量控制，兽医医疗，物流运输，及销售营销等方面能力卓越。
古氏中国将不断拓展在华销售的产品范围，也欢迎广大客户及伙伴提出更深入的改善需求。
古氏中国公司建立了庞大的零售经销网络，产品在全国范围内均有销售。

古氏集团
JØRGEN KRUUSE A/S于1896年成立，总部设在丹麦Langeskov。
如今，古氏已经发展为全球领先的动物相关产品供应商，公司员工超过250人，遍及丹麦，瑞典，挪威，英国，波兰，及中国。
此外，古氏旗下还设有多个子品牌公司，直营经销商包括在丹麦，瑞典，挪威，波兰的兽医院，农产品经销商和宠物商店。我们在其余超过100个国家也有约350个指定兽医产品分销商，以确保产品品质及标准化的服务。
旗下知名品牌包括古氏，BUSTER, KRUTEX, EQUIVET，以及BOVIVET，系列产品质量优良，功能强大，可满足专业兽用的需求。
在古氏，我们致力于不断研发升级产品，同时保持对全球兽用产品市场的紧密联系。我们的团队包括了常驻外科兽医，以及负责产品研发，技术性销售支持，培训项目的产品经理。

Name: Canadian Pre-Veterinary Medical Association
Description:
The Canadian Pre-Veterinary Medical Association is committed to fostering connections and providing resources to pre-veterinary students across Canada. As a student-run initiative, it was created to address the growing need for a national platform to bring together those interested in pursuing a career in veterinary medicine. Through our symposium we will offer innovative labs, informative lectures, networking opportunities, and virtual tours of the five Veterinary Colleges across Canada during the spring semester of 2022. We intend to make this an annual event to strengthen the pre-veterinary community and develop long-lasting relationships between pre-veterinary students, undergraduate veterinary clubs, veterinary schools, and veterinarians. 

L’Association canadienne des pré-médecins vétérinaires a pour but d'encourager la communication et l'accès aux différentes ressources aux étudiant(e)s inscrits au programme pré-vétérinaire à travers le Canada. En tant qu'initiative étudiante et dirigée par celle-ci, elle a été créée afin de répondre à la demande croissante d'une plateforme qui rassemblerait ceux et celles qui souhaiteraient poursuivre une carrière en médecine vétérinaire. Notre symposium se déroulera au cours du semestre 2022. Il offrira des laboratoires novateurs, des conférences d'information, une opportunité d'élargir son réseau et des visites virtuelles des cinq écoles vétérinaires canadiennes. Notre intention est d'en faire un événement annuel, ceci afin de renforcer les liens qui unissent la communauté pré-vétérinaire et aussi développer des relations durables entre cette communauté étudiante, les clubs vétérinaires, les écoles vétérinaires et les vétérinaires.

Name: RIPAC-LABOR GmbH
Description:
Ripac-Labor, under full ownership of Dopharma, offers veterinary diagnostics and provides tailor made vaccines. 

To be able to offer the highest quality in compliance with future regulations, Ripac initiated the start of a new era: the Ripac New Build.

Follow this page to stay updated of the progress of this project. Join us on the road to #HealthyLivestock.

Name: Tribeca Veterinary Dentistry & Oral Surgery
Description:
At Tribeca Veterinary Dentistry & Oral Surgery (TVDOS), smiles aren’t just for people—we make sure pets can enjoy them too. 

We’re a specialty practice led by board-certified experts in veterinary dentistry & oral surgery, anesthesia, and cardiology. That means every patient receives advanced, compassionate care in a safe and supportive environment. Whether it’s a routine dental cleaning, complex oral surgery, or managing heart health under anesthesia, your pet is in the hands of specialists who do this every day.

Our mission is simple: combine cutting-edge medicine with a gentle touch, so pets feel better, live longer, and thrive. 

If you’re looking for the highest level of specialty veterinary care—delivered with precision, expertise, and heart—you’ll find it here in the heart of Tribeca

Name: Tierklinik Lüsche GmbH
Description:
Mit unseren über 80 Pferdeboxen inkl. der Intensiv- und Isolationsstation und über 120 MitarbeiterInnen, verteilt auf 2 Standorten, zählen wir zu einer der modernsten und größten Pferdekliniken Europas. 

Wir decken alle wichtigen Fachbereiche der Inneren Medizin und der Orthopädie bzw. der Sportmedizin ab. Zudem bieten wir mit unseren Röntgen- und Ultraschallgeräten aber auch unter anderem  der Szintigrafie, dem MRT, dem Qualisys und unserem innovativen CT, umfangreiche Bildgebungsmöglichkeiten an. Neben der Arbeit in der Klinik, betreuen unsere TierärztInnen die deutschen ReiterInnen des Olympia-Teams.

Name: Pueblo Zoo
Description: The Pueblo Zoo is a not-for-profit organization and is an accredited member of the Associations of Zoos and Aquariums (AZA) featuring more than 400 animals, 125 species, and beautiful spacious grounds.  Look for the AZA logo whenever you visit a zoo or aquarium as your assurance that you are supporting a facility dedicated to providing excellent care for animals, a great experience for you, and a better future for all living things.

Name: Humanivet Relief Veterinary Services
Description: At Humanivet, we believe in keeping veterinary practices running strong—even when you need a break. As Oregon’s first dedicated veterinary relief agency, we specialize in filling gaps so your clinic never skips a beat. From equine and large animal care, including ambulatory services, emergencies, surgery, reproduction, diagnostics, and sport medicine, to small animal and exotic care covering preventive medicine, surgery, radiography, intensive care, and dentistry, we provide comprehensive relief support tailored to your needs. What sets us apart is our reliability and flexibility—we’re available 24/7 to step in during emergencies, vacations, parental leave, growth phases, or unexpected departures. Our personalized service means we integrate seamlessly into your team, respecting your protocols and client relationships, while ensuring patients receive the same standard of care your clients expect. Each veterinarian we place is selected for expertise and compassion, so you can trust that your patients are in capable hands. Our mission is to support veterinary practices by reducing overload, increasing profitability, and maintaining care continuity, giving you peace of mind when you can’t be there. If you’re a veterinarian looking for temporary or ongoing support, or a clinic ready to ensure uninterrupted service, Humanivet is your partner in keeping your practice thriving. When you can’t be there, we are.

Name: RAPS Animal Hospital
Description:
The RAPS Animal Hospital is a full-service, not-for-profit veterinary facility operated by the Regional Animal Protection Society. Our devoted, empathetic veterinary professionals are equipped with innovative technologies and proficiency in the most advanced methods of care. 

In addition to caring for your furry family members, the RAPS Animal Hospital exists to provide medical services for the animals in the care of the Regional Animal Protection Society. RAPS operates an Adoption & Education Centre, the RAPS Cat Sanctuary, a fostering network and a social enterprise Thrift Store. 

With more than two decades of roots in Richmond (first as Richmond Homeless Cats, later as the Richmond Animal Protection Society), RAPS changed its name to the Regional Animal Protection Society in 2017, to more accurately reflect the geographical reach of our services.
 
As a no-kill animal-serving agency, animals come to us from jurisdictions throughout British Columbia where they would be euthanized.
 
By trusting RAPS Animal Hospital for your pet’s veterinary care, you are not only ensuring top-quality health care for your animals, you are supporting RAPS in saving and improving the lives of more animals than ever before.

Name: Maricopa County Animal Care & Control
Description: Serving the people and pets of Maricopa County by fostering a safe community and reducing the homeless animal population.

Name: Dee Veterinary Products
Description: Dee Veterinary Products is a manufacturer and supplier of veterinary medical devices and supplies.

Name: British Veterinary Neurology Society (BVNS)
Description:
The British Veterinary Neurology Society (BVNS) hopes to foster a professional environment through continued education, creating a vibrant international network of veterinary neurologists, residents, students and nurses. 
Each year, we host  the BVNS Symposium featuring varied lectures (including speakers from human neurology/neurosurgery), case discussions and networking opportunities. While based in the UK, BVNS welcomes veterinary professionals and students from around the world who share an interest in neurology  to attend and collaborate.
The BVNS aims to provide:
- A forum to promote the study and development of veterinary neurology and neurosurgery, stimulating exchange of knowledge in this area
- Advanced CPD for anyone with an interest in veterinary neurology and neurosurgery
- A platform for the presentation of studies or novel case reports
- A platform for discussion of interesting cases
Encouragement of collaboration in clinical research in veterinary neurology and neurosurgery

Name: Vetolinks
Description: Vetolinks is a platform that brings owners, veterinarians and research centers together to enhance clinical research and the development of new therapeutic solutions for our beloved pets.

Name: The Veterinary Referral Centre
Description: The Veterinary Referral Centre (TVRC) is more than a hospital; it’s a movement that aims to transform the field of veterinary medicine in the UAE. Founded by Mansoor Alshiha, CEO of Vet Alliance, TVRC is the country’s first facility designed specifically for referral-only, specialty veterinary medicine. This facility is intended to fill a void within the veterinary care provided across the UAE, bridging the gap between local service and global standard of excellence, delivering specialized clinical expertise, state-of-the-art diagnostics, and professional training.

Name: Vet Domus Centro Veterinário 24h
Description:
O Vet Domus é um centro Veterinário 24H com estrutura hospitalar completa para atendimentos emergenciais, de rotina e de alta complexidade.
Em um espaço moderno e agradável, nosso local possui uma equipe preparada para oferecer uma experiência única, eficiente e marcante durante o seu atendimento.

Name: Dr. Tom Seahorn, Equine Veterinary Specialist
Description: Dr. Tom Seahorn is your trusted equine internal medicine specialist, offering expert assessment, advanced diagnostics (including ultrasound and spinal fluid collection), and precise treatment plans for ill horses. With a commitment to equine well-being, Dr. Seahorn excels in managing challenging internal medicine cases, ensuring tailored care for every equine patient. Choose excellence in equine healthcare with Dr. Seahorn.

Name: VETFUTURS France
Description:
VETFUTURS est un projet qui a pour objectif de préparer le futur de la profession de vétérinaire à la lumière des changements humains, sociaux, économiques, techniques et scientifiques qui impactent ou impacteront l’exercice quotidien en fixant des objectifs précis, mesurables, réalistes et acceptables pour les 15 ans à venir.

Il a été initié en France conjointement par le Syndicat National des Vétérinaires d’Exercice Libéral (SNVEL) et par le Conseil National de l’Ordre des Vétérinaires. Toutes les forces vives de la profession vétérinaire seront sollicitées pour ce projet ambitieux. Organismes techniques, associations, écoles vétérinaires, syndicats, administration, consœurs, confrères, tous ceux qui constituent la Vétérinaire, seront appelés à apporter leur pierre à l’édifice.

Name: Alamo Pintado Equine Medical Center
Description: The Alamo Pintado team is dedicated to returning your horse to health and peak performance.  We were founded with a commitment to innovation, always with the goal of solving problems and providing exceptional care for the horses we serve.  Our veterinarians continue to practice the highest level of medicine and compassionate care.

Name: ACUIPHARMA AQUACULTURE HEALTH SL
Description:
Somos expertos en acuicultura.
Acompañamos al acuicultor durante el proceso productivo para diseñar soluciones de salud animal customizadas para cada cliente. Ofrecemos asesoramiento experto, desarrollo y producción de autovacunas únicas para cada cliente y servicios de análisis y seguimiento de la salud.

Nuestro objetivo es ayudar a que nuestros clientes tengan una producción eficiente y eficaz, con altos estándares de salud y con un producto final de calidad.
Location: Basque Country, Polígono Industrial Erratzu, 331 c

Name: Chimiray - Productos Veterinarios
Description:
Empresa importadora y distribuidora de Productos Veterinarios para pequeños y grandes animales.
 Los mejores productos, soporte pre y post venta para veterinarias y el sector ganadero en todo Paraguay.

Name: Streuli Tiergesundheit AG
Description:
Streuli Tiergesundheit ist ein unabhängiges Veterinärpharma-Unternehmen mit Sitz in Uznach SG. Wir beliefern Schweizer Tierkliniken und Tierarztpraxen mit Arzneimitteln, Praxisbedarfsartikeln, Ergänzungsfuttermitteln und Pflegeprodukten. 

Die folgenden Werte zeichnen uns aus:

Viel Schweiz für gesunde Tiere:
Als unabhängiges Schweizer Unternehmen setzen wir auf Qualität, Flexibilität und Kundennähe. Immer im Dienste der Tiergesundheit.

Alles aus einer Hand:
Wir bieten ein attraktives Vollsortiment, das wir abgestimmt auf die Kundenbedürfnisse stetig erweitern.

Mit Erfahrung und Verlässlichkeit:
Unsere Kompetenz wächst seit über 150 Jahren. Sie können sich heute und in Zukunft auf uns verlassen.

Persönlich und für Sie da:
Persönliches Engagement und eine hohe Servicequalität sind seit jeher ein wichtiger und fester Bestandteil unseres Angebotes.

Name: DVMoms
Description: We are a safe and supportive professional culture that celebrates and emulates the remarkable qualities of women in leadership. Our goal is to provide resources that promote the health and sustainability in our profession by adapting to the challenges of the 21st Century as they pertain to veterinary families.

Name: Copper Hawk
Description:
COPPER HAWK uses naturally occurring ingredients to develop products that seek to enhance animal health and wellbeing.

 Copper Hawk Natural Animal First Aid (Formerly Eire Hide) is one such product that incorporates a specific blend of botanical extracts. Individually these tradionally-used-herbs have been seen to accompany accelerated healing of affected skin such as wounds, burns, ulcers and support hair regrowth.

Name: WetChallenge

The company has introduced its business in Animal health Sector aiming to be the market leader in coming.

Name: Golden Heart Veterinary Care
Description: Golden Heart Veterinary Care is a company based out of 13205 Reams Rd Suite 172, Windermere, Florida, United States.

Name: Animal Emergency & Specialty Center
Description:
Welcome to Animal Emergency & Specialty Center (AESC), a 24-hour veterinary facility offering emergency and critical care, cardiology, internal medicine, neurology and neurosurgery, rehabilitation, surgery, and oncology care for your pets. 

Conveniently located in Parker at 17701 Cottonwood Drive (1/4 mile north of E-470 or about three miles south of Arapahoe Road), our state-of-the-art facility is a comfortable and welcoming environment. Serving the Parker, Douglas County, Elbert County, SE Arapahoe County, Englewood and surrounding communities, our expert specialists and advanced technologies provide our patients with the most comprehensive specialty and emergency care available. 

AESC’s professional, knowledgeable, expert staff provides experienced, compassionate care for our all our clients.

Name: PetH.vet
Description:
Discover your new go-to way to communicate with your veterinarian. 
Imagine all your pet's healthcare needs right at your fingertips in one digital solution.

Find everything you need on one Central Animal Health Platform.
Connect with TED - Your Telemedicine Service 
PAM - Your Pet’s Personal Appointment Manager 
PETE - Your Pet’s Personal Health Tracker  

 Get ready to stress less and enjoy more peace of mind. 

www.peth.vet

Name: Lawnswood Pet Cremation & Cemetery
Description:
Our team has been providing pet cremation services since 1984. In that time, we’ve drawn on our personal experience to develop a trusted reputation by offering a service that is as compassionate as it is professional.

We’re passionate about providing consistent support for vets, your clients and their pets. We take great pride in setting the benchmark for quality in everything we do, ensuring we deliver a smooth and seamless journey of care.

We’ve brought our pet-loving values to our work, which makes our business more than just a business – it’s a profession for all of us. 

Our experience and attention to even the smallest of details sets a benchmark of excellence you know you can always trust.

Name: Canadian Academy of Veterinary Dermatology
Description:
Established in 1986, we are a not-for-profit organization intended for everyone with a professional interest in veterinary dermatology. We are one of the member organizations of the World Association of Veterinary Dermatology. 

Core Values: Passion, Integrity, Leadership, Compassion, Communication

Our Vision is that all animals suffering from skin and ear disease are able to live the lives they're meant to. 

Our mission is to advance the science and practice of veterinary dermatology in Canada by providing education and resources for veterinary teams, supporting research, and promoting excellence in care for animals with skin and ear disease

Name: VICEN VET
Description:
At Vicen Vet, we are transforming veterinary through cutting-edge technology. Our mission is clear: to provide innovative solutions that enable veterinarians to diagnose and treat diseases with greater precision, efficiency, and safety.

We develop and distribute advanced diagnostic and treatment equipment. Our focus is on enabling faster, less invasive, and more effective veterinary care.

By connecting science, technology, and clinical practice, we help veterinary professionals deliver top-tier eye care, enhance their patients’ quality of life, and build stronger trust with pet owners.
Location: Las Palmas de Gran Canaria, Canary Islands

Name: ALAVET Das Analyse-Labor für Veterinärmedizin
Description: Wir sind ein junges und modernes Unternehmen für klinische Labordiagnostik in der Veterinärmedizin. Die Alavet GmbH agiert als das Veterinärteam eines der letzten inhabergeführten und wirtschaftlich unabhängigen Labore in Norddeutschland. Unser engagiertes Team bietet Ihnen einen umfassenden Service: Von der Abholung der Proben bis hin zur kompetenten Beratung. Unser labormedizinisches Fachpersonal steht Ihnen für die verschiedensten Fragestellungen gerne und partnerschaftlich zur Verfügung.

Name: National Wildlife Centre Canada
Description:
The National Wildlife Centre works within the interconnection of humans, Canadian wildlife and the environment. We help native wildlife through our programs aimed at conservation goals to protect ecosystems, populations of wild animals, and the health of individual animals.

The NWC aims to be a Centre of Excellence for conservation, wildlife clinical research, wildlife medicine, training, and education. We see ourselves as a platform for training future wildlife custodians, responders, conservation and wildlife biologists, rescue staff and veterinarians in native wildlife issues. We are a resource for wildlife emergency prevention, preparedness, and response planning in Canada and act as a hub of new discovery and dissemination of knowledge.

We seek to be recognized for our leadership, creation and transfer of knowledge to others, highest quality and standards, and excellence in caring for native wildlife.

Charitable Registration No: 896568417RR0001

Name: Stichting Vogelklas Karel Schot
Description:
Bird shelter in Rotterdam. See http://www.vogelklas.nl for more (Dutch) information. 

In 2009, over 8.500 birds, bats and hedgehogs were treated. Our employees were assisted by 60 to 70 volunteers. Our organisation is funded by local government subsidies, inheritance and gifts from our donors.

Name: Animal Cancer and Referral Center
Description: 9000 sq ft privately-owned specialized veterinary cancer center focused on creating exceptional client, patient, and employee experiences.

Name: VettyPet
Description:
VettyPet is a white-label SaaS platform that helps veterinary clinics streamline operations, unlock new revenue, and better serve their clients—especially when they can’t be in the exam room.

We’ve built proprietary tech that uses AI, machine learning, and data science to power clinic-branded shops, automate pet product recommendations, and deliver personalized wellness experiences. Our platform centralizes inventory, marketing, client communication, and fulfillment—so clinics can focus on care, not logistics.

Spun out of Waggle Mail (Canada’s only vet-curated dog subscription box), VettyPet combines 20+ years of veterinary expertise with a proven DTC model to modernize how clinics support today’s pet parents.

Name: Vet24h - Vlab
Description:
VET24H ANIMAL HEALTH SERVICES:
- Monitoring, diagnosis in Lab & in farms, control biosecurity, health status, support the activities of Swine production, Poultry production, Duck production, cow production.
- Training about vet diagnosis, vet internal medicine, veterinary medicine basis, diseases of animal for students of VNUA for 10 years. Training technical for sales, vet technical of companies in Vets, Feeds, Farms.
- Technical consulting for farm systems: vaccine programe, production process, biosecurity control, animal health management, farm management…

Name: Pferdeklinik Leichlingen
Description:
Die Pferdeklinik Leichlingen wurde 2011 gegründet und zählt heute zu den größten Pferdekliniken in Deutschland. In Zahlen: Mehr als 100 Mitarbeiter und mehr als 100 Boxen für Patienten. Description: Global Veterinary is considered as the largest chain of veterinary pharmacies in Qatar with more than 14 branches and 50 years of experience. Our vision is to be the leading company in the Middle East and the world in providing integrated veterinary services and keenness to develop veterinary science in the Gulf countries to meet the common interests and goals of customers. and company

Name: Alivet - Insumos Agroveterinarios
Description:
Empresa dedicada a la venta y distribución de insumos veterinarios, instrumental, alimentos balanceados y todo lo relacionado al sano crecimiento de sus animales de produccion y mascotas. 
Con fuerte experiencia en feedlot, cerdos, y hacienda.
Llegando en el menor tiempo posible, a todas las ciudades del interior, representando a los principales laboratorios.

Name: Parkvets Ltd
Description:
Parkvets provides emergency and routine veterinary care for pets in North Kent and South East London.

With eight branches and a veterinary hospital, Parkvets provides premier veterinary services to the discerning pet owner. We pride ourselves on the time we take with clients and the gold standard approach we adopt when diagnosing their pets' problems. 

We have our own out-of-hours service within the hospital, staffed by our regular vets and nurses at which we see pets from all over the South East.

We have facilities and expertise across all disciplines and as a result rarely have need to refer patients to third parties, meaning our clients largely enjoy a 'one stop shop' approach to their pets' welfare.

Parkvets offer the following clinical services:

•Private Consultations
•Health checkups, vaccinations and a well pet service
•Diagnostic Imaging - Ultrasound, X-Rays and MRI Surgical Services
•Orthopaedics
•Soft tissue surgery
•Spinal surgery
•Dental Services
•Ophthalmology Services
•Internal Medical Services
•Laboratory Services - On site lab for rapid turnaround of tests
•Hospitalisation - For day and night care of unwell pets
•Euthanasia Services

Name: Ospedale Veterinario San Francesco
Paws App
Description:
The purpose of Paws App is to nurture and enhance the relationship between pet parents and their veterinarian so pets live their best lives.

We do this by providing an easy to find and use digital platform for connecting pet parents with their preferred veterinarian where they can register their pets, book appointments and be reminded of upcoming treatments encouraging preventative health.

Name: Iowa State University Veterinary Diagnostic Laboratory
Description:
The ISU VDL is a national leader in protecting animal and human health, the full-service laboratory processes upwards of 124,000 cases each year and conducts more than 1.6 million tests annually.

Fully accredited by the American Association of Veterinary Laboratory Diagnosticians, the VDL provides quality diagnostic services for animal species, including necropsy, bacteriology, serology, histopathology, virology, parasitology, molecular diagnostics, and toxicology as well as offering analytical services.

Name: Clinica Veterinaria La Campana
Description:
Especialistas en animales de compañia

Nos dedicamos desde 1996 a cuidar de su animal de compañía. Nuestros programas preventivos son la mejor solución para conseguir que su animal siempre esté sano.Para ello, ponemos a su disposición un completo y moderno equipamiento y un equipo profesional volcados en solucionar cualquier problema que su mascota pudiera sufrir, siempre con el mejor trato.

Nosotros nos ocupamos de la salud de su Mascota, usted solo preocúpese de disfrutar de su compañía y cariño!

Tres  puntos por los que elegirnos para cuidar de la salud de su querida mascota.
1. Experiencia y profesionalidad

Desde nuestra apertura hemos continuado nuestra formación en salud animal para ofrecer un servicio profesional y de calidad a nuestros apreciados clientes, y un cuidado excelente de la salud de sus “compañeros de cuatro patas.”
2. Prevención

Nos preocupamos ante todo de que su animal no enferme, asesorándole sobre todos los aspectos de la prevención en salud veterinaria, desde que nace, hasta que se nos hace mayor.
3. Servicios añadidos
Para ello contamos con modernos equipos de analítica sanguínea, radiología, electrocardiografía, que nos permiten en poco tiempo evaluar el estado de salud de su perro.
De un completo quirófano con los mas modernos equipos de control vital para monitorizar al paciente en todo momento.
Además su mascota dispondrá de un portal propio, donde usted podrá consultarnos cualquier duda y revisar cuales son las próximas cita que su animal tiene con nosotros.

We a Hyper-local pet parenting marketplace platform that connects pet owners and pet care service providers. We are a one stop solution for pet-care services and products. 
Our mission is to bring a change to the way pet-care industry is functioning and improve the standards in services using technology.

Description:

GCVP develops, manufactures, and distributes animal vaccines, chemicals and feed additives. It has 232 registered products, of which 74 biologics and 158 pharmaceuticals.

Name: Bay State Veterinary Emergency & Specialty Services
Description:
Bay State Veterinary Emergency & Specialty Services (BSVESS) is a state-of-the-art facility providing 24-hour emergency care and specialty services for companion animals. The hospital is staffed by experienced emergency clinicians and specialists in Internal Medicine, Surgery and Critical Care.

The hospital is located in Swansea, MA and is open 24-hours a day for emergency care. The hospital is staffed by internship-trained emergency clinicians who have constant access to specialists allowing them the ability to offer the best information and care available. Consultations with board-certified specialists in surgery and internal medicine are available by appointment.

The hospital is dedicated to providing the highest level of veterinary care to our patients in an atmosphere of compassion and excellence. Working in conjunction with Ocean State Veterinary Specialists to offer full spectrum of quality advanced care.

Nos vétérinaires travaillent en synergie, et sont donc à même de prendre en charge vos animaux, dans les meilleures conditions possibles, et nous nous engageons à tout mettre en œuvre pour assurer la sécurité et le bien-être de votre animal.

 Nos services :

Name: Larkmead Veterinary Group
Description:
Larkmead Vets is a proudly independent, mixed practice, which provides veterinary care and advice to pet owners as well as the local farming and equine community. We have several branches across South Oxfordshire - Cholsey, Didcot, Benson and Sutton Courtenay.

The main branches at Cholsey and Didcot have extensive modern hospital facilities, and are well equipped to deal with a wide range of animal healthcare services. The branch surgeries at Great Western Park, Benson and Sutton Courtenay aim to provide convenient consultations locally, with surgical and hospitalisation facilities within easy reach at the main surgeries. Livestock and equine care is provided through the large animal department at the Cholsey practice.

Larkmead Veterinary Group Ltd is a member of XLVets and the Practice Standards Scheme of the Royal College of Veterinary Surgeons (RCVS), achieving level two accreditation.

Name: Comporvet Medicina Veterinária Comportamental
Description:
A Comporvet oferece atendimento veterinário focado em problemas comportamentais de cães e gatos.

Nosso objetivo é promover comportamentos saudáveis em animais de estimação fortalecendo o vínculo entre o homem e seus melhores amigos.

A clínica comportamental é uma especialidade veterinária que busca diagnosticar e tratar problemas de comportamento em animais, bem como condições médicas subjacentes capazes de induzir ou contribuir para comportamentos impróprios.

Name: first lvl pets
Description:
first lvl pets ermöglicht eine Analyse von Gesundheitsparametern durch Bilderkennungssoftware, Algorithmen und KI. 

Unsere Plattform trackt zahlreiche Indikatoren und schafft einen völlig neuen Standard in der Haustiergesundheit: Moderne Technologie verpackt in einer Lifestyle-App. 

Tierärztliche Expertise kombiniert mit datengestützter Analyse, um Tierbesitzern einen intuitiven, effizienten und proaktiven Zugang zur Gesundheit ihrer Tiere zu bieten.

Name: Everest Tecnovet
Description:
Somos una empresa, fundada en el año 1992, especializada en la creación y distribución de productos para clínicas y hospitales veterinarios. Tenemos una amplia cartera de productos, trabajamos con marcas líderes del sector y además somos especialistas en mobiliario veterinario y equipos de anestesia, diseñados y fabricados en exclusiva por nosotros con las técnicas más avanzadas. Nuestra dedicación al estudio y desarrollo de productos nos permite ofrecer artículos de alta calidad, para así hacer más fácil la labor del veterinario tanto en España como en el mercado internacional.

I+D INNOVAR PARA MEJORAR
Invertimos en investigación y desarrollo pues estamos convencidos de que estar a la vanguardia de la tecnología y del diseño trae beneficios no solo a nuestra compañía, sino también a todo el sector veterinario.

• COMPETIR AL MISMO NIVEL CON FABRICANTES MUNDIALES
Hemos logrado conquistar espacios en el mercado internacional y nuestro objetivo es mostrar que en España se diseña y fabrica equipos veterinarios de calidad similar o superior a otros equipos ya consolidados en el mercado actual mundial. 

• NOTABLE EVOLUCIÓN EN NUESTRO SISTEMA DE PRODUCCIÓN 
En el año 2015 ampliamos nuestras instalaciones y creado una planta exclusiva a los trabajos de producción. Hemos generado empleo de personal altamente capacitado para poner en práctica nuestros equipos.

• COLABORACIÓN DE PROXIMIDAD 
Apostamos por la colaboración de proximidad y cada vez más trabajamos junto a talleres y proveedores ubicados cerca de nosotros, acciones que impulsan la economía local y la salud del planeta. Queremos asegurarnos de la excelencia de todos nuestros equipos y de la facilidad de asistencia técnica si un día es necesario.

• RESPETO AL MEDIO AMBIENTE
Tenemos una especial preocupación en cuidar el medio ambiente y la preservación de nuestro entorno. Estamos trabajando sin pausa para disminuir nuestro impacto medioambiental con la seriedad que exigen nuestros tiempos.

Name: Rhino Facilities: Professional Veterinary Facilities Management and Equipment Solution
Description:
Rhino Facilities is the premier veterinary facilities management and equipment maintenance company.







Our service is focused in 2 areas:
Facilities Management  - preventative maintenance and maintenance of break-fix items including HVAC, plumbing, electrical, med gas plumbing, security, emergency generator, roofing, fire safety equipment, millwork, signage, lighting, construction services, handyman services

Equipment Management - preventative maintenance and maintenance of biomedical equipment including, but not limited to fluid pumps, syringe pumps, transfusion pumps,ECG and multiparameter monitors, imaging equipment (radiography, CT, MRI, ultrasound), centrifuges, autoclaves, gas sterilizers, surgical lights, intensive care units such as Snyder, vessel sealing devices, microscopes, Tonopen, endoscopes, patient warming units, oxygen concentrators, surgical ventilators, dental equipment.

HOW WE DO IT
We manage a network of highly qualified and vetted vendors to provide best in industry service for our clients. Our centralization of services allows us to bring the best vendors for low cost to each of our client's facilities.

We utilize a system of asset tagging in conjunction with a Computerized Maintenance Management System to streamline Facilities Management and Biomedical Equipment Maintenance. This allows your team to make service tickets for equipment and building assets that need servicing with minimal effort. Rhino Facilities takes care of the rest!

WHO WE SERVE
We serve all veterinary hospital care settings including primary care hospitals, specialty care hospitals, emergency hospitals, urgent care clinics.

We specialize in facilities management and equipment maintenance for veterinary corporate companies. There is no need to create a facilities department, Rhino Facilities is your facilities department. 

We also specialize in veterinary construction project management!

Contact us to learn how we can improve your veterinary hospital(s)!

Name: PapaDog
Description:
At PapaDog, we consider not just pets, but also the individuals who love them when we select our products. A healthy pet makes having a pet more enjoyable.

Because we comprehend the unconditional love our pets give us and to help you give that love back, we have chosen products that contain only quality ingredients. Our first priority is the health and well-being of your pet.

Our dedication to wholesome, natural, quality pet products is unparalleled. 

Our Vision: To provide people & their pets with honest information & wholesome products to better the lives of animals & the individuals who love them.  

Our mission is to help other dog lovers learn how they can have a healthier, happier pet & surroundings by sharing information about our own green lifestyle through articles, & the products & services they find that they would welcome in to our life.

Jsme přesvědčeni, že význam slova „group“ (česky „skupina“) lépe vystihuje rozsah různorodých služeb, které dnes firma poskytuje.

Name: Serbuvet
Description: A Serbuvet inclui os médicos veterinários Bernardo Cortes, Bruno Moreira, Dário Guerreiro, José Pedro Lima, João Paisana e Ricardo Bexiga. Inclui ainda como consultor fora do país, Nuno Gaspar, e surgiu em primeiro lugar da amizade e da partilha de trabalho entre colegas que trabalhavam na mesma área geográfica e que há muito tempo se entreajudavam e partilhavam trabalho entre si. Para responder às urgências de forma rápida, fazermos um trabalho com qualidade e, mesmo assim, podermos passar tempo em família, cremos que é essencial trabalhar em equipa. À medida que os anos foram passando, foram também sendo desenvolvidas competências específicas em determinadas áreas, que foram alargando o espectro dos serviços que fornecemos aos nossos parceiros. Na Serbuvet partilhamos um conjunto de valores que nos faz agir da mesma forma, com os interesses dos produtores a ditarem as opções a tomar, e com respeito pelos colegas fora da equipa.

Name: Veterinary Care and Specialty Group
Description:
Veterinary Care and Specialty Group (VCSG), an emergency and referral hospital located in the South Broad area of Chattanooga, TN, is a full-service hospital for small animal emergencies, treating a myriad of cases from simple to complex.

Our facility has the latest diagnostic equipment including ultrasound, digital x-ray, CT, hyperbarics, MRI, and state-of-the-art lab equipment. We have full-time ER veterinarians on a rotating schedule and trained staff on hand at all times. 

During the week, we also have board-certified specialists seeing cases on a referral basis from local veterinarians. Specialists include internal medicine, surgery, neurology, oncology, and critical care. Board-certified surgeons perform soft tissue and orthopedic surgeries.  

VCSG is proud to offer cutting-edge technology and medical diagnostic equipment to provide fast and reliable diagnostics and treatments.

Name: Atlantic Coast New York Veterinary Specialists
Description: Atlantic Coast New York Veterinary Specialists provides superb Emergency and Specialty Care services to the Long Island community! If your pet is having an emergency, please come directly to our hospital right away. There is no appointment needed for emergency services; we’re here to help! Since March 2021, we have TWO locations which are both staffed 24 hours a day with a dedicated team who is ready, willing and able to assist your beloved fur baby in an emergency. Working along side our emergency team, you’ll find a wonderful and compassionate group of board-certified veterinary specialists who practice in a variety of different areas including Cardiology, Surgery, Neurology, Internal Medicine and more! If you think your pet may be in need of specialty treatment, talk to your primary veterinarian about a referral to Atlantic Coast New York Veterinary Specialists. Our staff and state-of-the-art technology allow us to provide the absolute best care possible any time you need it. We’re always open and we’ve got your back!

Name: VETS&WILDLIFE
Description:
L’empresa dona suport a totes aquelles entitats i organismes públics i
privats que mostrin la necessitat de gestionar temes que
tinguin relació amb animals, ja sigui de companyia, domèstics
o de fauna salvatge.

Serveis: 
- Gestió i assessorament de fauna salvatge i domèstica conflictiva.
- Captura de fauna salvatge i domèstica conflictiva. 
- Gestió de la problemàtica provocada pel senglar en àrees urbanes i periurbanes dels municipis.
- Gestió de la problemàtica provocada pel senglar en clubs esportius i àrees de conreus.
- Maneig de fauna salvatge (captura, immobilització, anestèsia, trasllat, cirurgies,…).
- Assessorament en normativa relacionada amb animals i el seu benestar (participació activa en la redacció de ordenances municipals, protocols de maneig, etc...). 

Col·laborem amb el Servei de Prevenció en Salut Animal de la Generalitat de Catalunya com a veterinaris de vigilància sanitària en el nostre àmbit. 

Donem formació sobre manipulació i gestió d'animals de companyia,
domèstics i de fauna salvatge a Bombers de la Generalitat de Catalunya, Bombers de Barcelona, Agents Rurals, URMA Cos de Mossos d'Esquadra de la Generalitat de Catalunya, ISPC Institut de Seguretat Pública de Catalunya i Tècnics de Medi Ambient d'Ajuntaments.

Col·laborem amb:
- Universitat Autonòma de Barcelona
Desenvolupament i col·laboració en el nou projecte de control de la població de senglars urbans i periurbans mitjançant la immunocontracepció promogut pel Departament de Sanitat i d'Anatomia Animal de la Facultat de Veterinària.
- Bombers de la Generalitat de Catalunya
Veterinaris i personal auxiliar vinculats a l’empresa formen part del Grup d’Emergències Veterinàries del Cos de Bombers de la
Generalitat de Catalunya, el qual realitza assistència a tot tipus de serveis que impliquin el salvament d’animals en situacions de risc.

•	CT scanner

•	Radiation therapy

Name: Mobile Vet Referral
Description: Mobile Vet Referral offers advanced mobile veterinary referral services in internal medicine dedicated to providing advanced ultrasound and endoscopy solutions for small animals at local practices. Our peripatetic approach ensures that pets receive the care they need in the comfort of their familiar environment. With a commitment to excellence and convenience, we strive to elevate the standard of veterinary care for every pet companion we serve.

Name: Vetool
Description:
Vetool puts everything you need right at your fingertips. Whether you're calculating medication doses, staying up-to-date with the latest research, or connecting with your veterinary community, we've got you covered.

Here's what you'll find in Vetool:

- Quick and reliable calculators for daily practice - get quick answers while understanding the calculations behind them

- Fresh research updates delivered daily - browse summaries, save your favorites, and never miss important developments in your field

- Stay connected with your community through our events feature - discover and bookmark conferences, workshops, and learning opportunities

But that's just the beginning! Coming soon: helpful guides, smart notifications, and much more - all shaped by what you tell us you need.

We're building Vetool together with veterinarians like you!

Download on your App store and join our growing community of veterinary professionals who are shaping the future of this tool, one feature at a time.

Name: Veko Care Private Limited
Description: Veko Care Pvt. Ltd. are manufacturers of veterinary medicines. Veko has a world-class manufacturing facility accredited by WHO, Australia, USA – EPA, Costa Rica, Kenya and compliant with stringent GMP guidelines. We make specialty medicines for Dogs, Cats, Equine, Poultry, Livestock, Cattle and Aquaculture. Our manufacturing unit stands as a testament to our dedication to quality. Equipped with cutting-edge machinery and technology, the facility adheres to the highest industry standards, ensuring the production of safe, effective, and reliable veterinary pharmaceuticals. The facility houses two dedicated manufacturing units with unidirectional workflow – one for external preparation and the other for oral preparation. At this manufacturing facility, Veko manufactures a large suite of oral solids in the form of tablets, bolus, powders, granules and oral paste – batch sizes ranging from 30 to 250 Kgs. Veko also manufactures external preparations that include ear drops, spot-on, sprays, pour-on, shampoo and dusting powders in flexible batch sizes from 5 to 500 liters. 73% of the dosages form applicable in the Veterinary Medicines Industry (both Value / Volume wise)

Name: MEDVET
Description:
A MEDVET DISTRIBUIDORA é um grande sonho!

Com fundação em dezembro de 2012, a MEDVET DISTRIBUIDORA é uma empresa especializada na distribuição de produtos veterinários, oferecendo soluções de qualidade para o cuidado e bem-estar animal. Atuamos com um portfólio diversificado que abrange medicamentos, suplementos, vacinas, estética pet, entre outros. Nossa missão é fornecer produtos de alta confiabilidade que promovam a saúde animal e o sucesso de nossos parceiros comerciais.

Com um time compromissado com a excelência no atendimento, a MEDVET DISTRIBUIDORA se destaca pelo suporte e pela agilidade logística, garantindo a entrega eficiente dos nossos produtos em todo o território estadual. Acreditamos em parcerias duradouras e no desenvolvimento contínuo para atender às necessidades do mercado veterinário em constante evolução.

Nossa missão: Prover soluções veterinárias de qualidade, com compromisso e inovação, visando o bem-estar animal e o fortalecimento das parcerias comerciais.

Nossos valores: Ética, transparência, compromisso com a saúde animal, seriedade no que oferecemos, excelência no atendimento e inovação constante.

Name: Veterinary-gamification
Description: The goal of gamification is to motivate people to change behaviors, develop skills, or to drive innovation. At its core, gamification is about engaging people on an emotional level and motivating them to achieve their goals.Consequently the organization achieves its goals. Essential elements: -Autonomy; Players are given goals, tools, rules and a space to “play” without being directed on the next steps to take. -Mastery; the urge to make progress and get better at something that matters. It is not an attainable goal but a journey with signposts to indicate progress. Gamification is about getting better at something (within the safety of a game environment). -Purpose; Gamification must start and finish with a purpose that is centered on achieving meaningful player goals. Purpose is the yearning to act in service of something larger than ourselves.

Name: Veterinair Centrum Someren B.V.

Name: Melbourne VETWorks
Description:
Ben and Irina are both specialist veterinarians in surgery and oncology. They both underwent residency training in the UK before relocating to Australia to continue their careers. 

They have both worked in general practice, private referral clinics as well as Universities. This has allowed a unique understanding for the different work environments and people’s career stages. 

Ben has been part of resident career development and building a new soft tissue service at his previous employment. This allowed him a unique connection with referring vets; discussing their needs for specialist services and valuing their case assessment and management. 

Irina has been part of the congress content development for ESVONC and ECVIM. Bi-annually she has also organised Oncology Camp furthering the career development for Oncology residents and interns. This has allowed her to be part of larger congress organisation and develop strategies to offer a unique experience for delegates and speakers alike.

We have both travelled nationally and internationally to participate as delegates and speakers. 

The concept of a collaborative conference for both vets and nurses is unique. Vetworks is centred on the premise of  showcasing, understanding and discussing different employees’ views on topics. The team is at the very core of our approach to education and veterinary care.

VETWorks is a collaborative approach to the patient. Bringing vets, nurses, and industry together.

Name: Vetama
Description:
Vetama is redefining veterinary care through AI-driven automation and mobile-first solutions.
We provide professional, fast, personalized veterinary medicine, leveraging advanced technology to enhance accessibility, efficiency, and pet health outcomes.
Our approach combines innovation, collaboration, and compassion to streamline veterinary workflows—delivering smarter, more seamless care for pet owners.

Name: Protect My Pet Limited

Our furry friends are irreplaceable members of the family who give us unconditional love. Our mission at Walking Paws Rehab  is to give your pet the level of care they deserve. Name: AniCura Sverige
Description:
AniCura är en ledande leverantör av veterinärvård i Europa. Vårt företag föddes ur filosofin att dela resurser kan skapa möjligheter för bättre veterinärvård och resultat.
Våra tjänster inkluderar ett brett utbud av högkvalitativa medicinska tjänster som täcker förebyggande och grundläggande hälsovård samt specialiserad vård, inklusive avancerad diagnostik, internmedicin, intensivvård, kirurgi och ortopedi. Vi tillhandahåller även rehabilitering, sjukgymnastik och kostrådgivning och erbjuder utvalda djurfoder och vårdprodukter.
AniCuras nätverk omfattar 500 kliniker i 17 länder i Europa, som genomför över 4,5 miljoner högkvalitativa veterinärbesök varje år. AniCura har varit en del av Mars Veterinary Health sedan 2018. Mars Veterinary Health består av ett nätverk av mer än 3 000 kliniker världen över som tar hand om mer än 25 miljoner husdjur varje år. Tillsammans kan vi tillhandahålla de högsta standarderna inom veterinärvård och uppnå vårt gemensamma syfte: EN BÄTTRE VÄRLD FÖR VÅRA DJUR.

Legal: https://www.mars.com/legal-sweden

Name: CLOSAVETS
Description:
L’empresa dona suport a totes aquelles entitats i organismes públics i
privats que mostrin la necessitat de gestionar temes que

o de fauna salvatge.

Serveis:

- Maneig de fauna salvatge (captura, immobilització, anestèsia, trasllat, cirurgies,…).
- Assessorament en normativa relacionada amb animals i el seu benestar (participació activa en la redacció de ordenances municipals, protocols de maneig, etc...). 

Col·laborem amb el Servei de Prevenció en Salut Animal de la Generalitat de Catalunya com a veterinaris de vigilància sanitària en el nostre àmbit. 

Donem formació sobre manipulació i gestió d'animals de companyia,
domèstics i de fauna salvatge a Bombers de la Generalitat de Catalunya, Bombers de Barcelona, Agents Rurals, URMA Cos de Mossos d'Esquadra de la Generalitat de Catalunya, ISPC Institut de Seguretat Pública de Catalunya i Tècnics de Medi Ambient d'Ajuntaments.

Col·laborem amb:
- Universitat Autonòma de Barcelona
Desenvolupament i col·laboració en el nou projecte de control de la població de senglars urbans i periurbans mitjançant la immunocontracepció promogut pel Departament de Sanitat i d'Anatomia Animal de la Facultat de Veterinària.
- Bombers de la Generalitat de Catalunya
Veterinaris i personal auxiliar vinculats a l’empresa formen part del Grup d’Emergències Veterinàries del Cos de Bombers de la
Generalitat de Catalunya, el qual realitza assistència a tot tipus de serveis que impliquin el salvament d’animals en situacions de risc.

The objectives of the Society are:

We are an AAHA-accredited hospital, employing advanced technologies and procedures, including digital X-ray, ultrasound, laser therapy and dentistry as well as routine examinations and vaccinations.

Our veterinarians and staff understand the importance of the special bond you share with your pet and are dedicated to providing the best that modern veterinary care has to offer. Our ultimate goal is to keep your companion healthy and happy, so that you can enjoy each other’s company for many years to come.

We are a seven doctor AAHA certified hospital with fabulous clients. We have a long term client base who expect compassionate, competent, and very personalized care.
Together as a team, we provide the highest caliber of medical care in Virginia Beach. 
Our support staff is enthusiastic, and we live our values of Respect, Expertise, Compassion, Integrity, and Teamwork.

Name: Parklands Veterinary Group
Description:
Parklands Veterinary Group have 5 Branches in Dungannnon, Cookstown, Portglenone, Aughnacloy and Drumahoe. We have vet teams specialising in Large Animal, Small Animal, Equine, Poultry and Pigs.
We aim to provide the best care and experience to our animals with innovative care, technology and advice.

Organisational values
At Parklands vets we believe if we do "good vetting" (best practice approach)  then all the rest will follow, being passionate about the patients care will resonate through to our conversations with the owners.
What we mean is the animal will receive the most appropriate treatment for its condition. From this best practice the team will achieve a sense of fulfilment they looked forward to from starting training! 
The client feels and understands we are doing the best for their animals and this aids in building a trusting relationship.
Honesty and integrity are cornerstones of veterinary medicine, and we believe it's always best to be honest, the clients will appreciate you for it in the long term.
We have a strong team approach where there is always someone available to talk to about treatment plans or just what your day has been like! Every day is a school day in veterinary medicine (another of the reasons its a great job!), we encourage discussion and asking for help, we have all started at the bottom and no one knows it all!
We believe in our teams and rely on them, this a two way street so we believe everyone should be treated fairly.

What makes our organisation a great place to work?
Parklands has all you need for a fulfilling working life. We have a great team who have a young bias and willing to help each other. We strive to be a place where everyone's voice is heard. A caseload more diverse than some other practices means we are often challenged with case presentations we have not seen before so keeping things fresh and our grey matter in peak condition!
Our ideal employee is someone who is enthusiastic!

Name: CENTAUR ANIMAL HEALTH
Description:
Since it was founded in 1986, Centaur Animal Health’s business focus has been concentrated in adaptations of proven new technology — with special emphasis in biotechnology — converting successes from the human healthcare market to address similar problems in the animal health markets.

Centaur’s first products of prominence were concentrated in the equine market, and focused on diagnostic technologies that were representative of ‘breakthrough innovations’. One such product is the Equine Infectious Anemia (EIA) diagnostic that was adapted from the human AIDS test and for which a patent was granted to Centaur in 1995.

While Centaur sells most of its products through distributors of national prominence, Centaur also maintains the right to sell its products direct, (as is required by the USDA on the EIA tests), should an interested laboratory or veterinarian not wish to deal with one of the select pharmaceutical distributors. Centaur’s ‘direct customer base’ currently numbers approximately 1000 accounts, with Centaur currently stocking, shipping and billing its EIA tests to many of the 450 USDA approved laboratories.

Today Centaur Animal Health is focused on developing innovative diagnostics, pharmaceuticals and nutraceuticals that address significant therapeutic needs for companion and production animals. Centaur licenses patent-protected technologies acquired from animal health or human pharmaceutical and biotechnology companies. Contract manufacturing is available at our FDA, DEA certified plant.

Name: Alicia Pet Care Center
Description:
Alicia Pet Care Center is a full service state-of-the-art veterinary hospital that has been providing medical, surgical, and dental services for dogs and cats in Orange County, CA for over 30 years. We have six awesome veterinarians: Dr. Matthew Wheaton, Dr. Sarah Northrop, Dr. Lara Ashbran, Dr. Melissa Rellinger, Dr. Camille Coffey, Dr. Jennifer Burpo & Dr. Cortney Benson and a fun and friendly health care team to help take care of your babies! 

Our pledge "We're taking care of your babies" means a lot to us. We realize that your pet is an important part of your life and we make every effort to provide the very best in caring veterinary service. We understand that your trust in us presents a special responsibility to us and one that we don't take lightly. That's why we combine a detail-oriented approach with state-of-the-art diagnostic tools and a compassionate, professional manner. Our goal is to give your pet the same level of care we would give our own pets, and it's what makes Alicia Pet Care Center one of the top veterinary facilities in Southern California. 

We place a major emphasis on personal attention and client education. Our mission takes us far beyond treating sick and injured pets. We strive to teach you how to properly care for your pet and prevent diseases. It is the key to keeping your pet happy and healthy over the years.

Name: Mission Animal Hospital, Eden Prairie, Minnesota
Description:
Mission Animal Hospital is the first and only nonprofit, full-service animal hospital in the Midwest. Created with the goal of removing barriers to veterinary care for low-income pet owners, Mission meets the needs of thousands of families every year. As planned when we moved into a new facility, we now see over thirty-five percent more pets per month, a fact that tells us many owners desperately need our help. With an anticipated 15,000 patients visiting our hospital this year, we continue to provide programs to support all pet owners, including:

•	Subsidizing veterinary care for all pets with Team Mission: As a member of our Team Mission, clients receive the best in class veterinary services from our talented team while still enjoying pricing an average of 20% below other area providers. When you pay for your pet’s care at Mission, you effectively open the door for more pet lovers to access care. 

•	Removing barriers to veterinary care for qualifying clients with our Mission Qualified Assistance Program: Almost 60% percent of Mission’s clients rely on discounted pricing offered to those who qualify. Pets receive the high-quality, timely care needed regardless of their owners’ financial status.

•	Working to ensure that no pet suffers unnecessarily with our Mission Assistance Fund: Financial support available in time-sensitive, high-need situations when pets and their owners are under extreme financial stress and facing often life-threatening health challenges. Over 100 pets and their families have benefitted from the Mission Assistance Fund this year alone.

•	Meeting the needs of all clients with weekend hours and walk-in care: Work commitments, life balance and unforeseen emergencies all can stand in the way of pet wellness. To overcome those barriers, Mission doctors see patients, perform surgery and welcome walk-ins seven days a week – the only clinic in Minnesota to do so.

Onboard is pilot, travelling man, and bush vet Dr Campbell Costello (Cozy) who has spent many years working within varying countries, cultures, and practices. What is his goal? Ultimately he wants anyone to have access to Veterinary Services, regardless of their postcode. With his pilots license in hand and a Piper Lance aeroplane sitting in his backyard, he has the means to get to locations in the middle of nowhere in a short period of time. 

Dr Cozy grew up on a cattle station in QLD and has a rich understanding of how limited vet services can be. Dr Costello wants to bring to life the beauty of Outback Australia and why more vets & vet nurses should be heading out bush to work! 

So jump aboard and follow Dr Cozy’s journey through blue skies and over red dirt.

Name: ESAVS Asia
Description:
ESAVS Office for Asia is a nonprofit organization under the umbrella of the European Association of Veterinary Specialization (EAVS), registered in Luxemburg (A.S.B.L., reg Nr vol 411 fol case 4), R.C.S. Luxembourg F4152.

The European School for Advanced Veterinary Studies (ESAVS) was founded in 1991 by three veterinarians, one from academia and two from small animal practice.

The basis was the conviction that every veterinarian, regardless of income, country of residence or veterinary school attended, can be supported according to his or her abilities and performance, and achieve first-class professional competence and success, through contemporary continuing education at an international veterinary postgraduate school that enables all to develop professionally at the highest level.

Today's ESAVS proves that this ambitious goal has been achieved to a large extent. ESAVS stands as a broad-based, international non-profit school that is distinctly different from the commercial CE course providers that have emerged in recent years.

ESAVS has succeeded in coupling the desire for self-improvement and the thirst for knowledge of veterinarians in a way that can be compared to the "charm of anticipated success" described by Alexis de Tocqueville (The American Dream), which spurs students on to professional excellence. This philosophy and the outstanding teaching quality of ESAVS have led over twenty thousand veterinarians from all over the world to participate in ESAVS study programs and courses.

ESAVS has an outstanding faculty with over 400 veterinary lecturers from more than 20 countries. All are certified specialists with excellent teaching skills. ESAVS offers continuing education based on face-to-face courses at various locations in Europe and Asia, as well as distance learning.

ESAVS is the leading international postgraduate school in clinical veterinary medicine for companion animals.

Description:

We are working towards creating a world where being a clinician is synonymous with a sustainable career where you can do something you’re passionate about and make a living without burning out. We want you to look forward to your next day as a vet.

Name: Oklahoma Veterinary Medical Association
Description:
The Oklahoma Veterinary Medical Association, also known as the OVMA or OkVMA, is a professional trade organization for veterinarians. The association was formed in 1907 and incorporated in 1934.

The membership of the association is composed of more than 1,000 individual Oklahoma veterinarians, Oklahoma State University Center for Veterinary Health Sciences faculty, veterinary students, out-of-state veterinarians, and allied members. Member veterinarians enjoy many benefits of belonging to the OVMA. They are bound to the common goals of animal welfare and professionalism. Every year, each veterinarian licensed in Oklahoma must obtain 20 hours of continuing education to maintain their license to practice veterinary medicine in Oklahoma. The OVMA is a source for their education.

The objectives of the OVMA shall be to: advance the art and science of veterinary medicine; promote high educational and ethical standards within the veterinary medical profession; protect the rights and privileges of its members; promote the health and welfare of the livestock industry of Oklahoma and protect and improve the health of all animals; protect the public against diseases transmissible from animals to human beings; educate the public concerning animal health and its relationship to human health; cooperate with all organizations, agencies, and persons whose objectives are consistent with those of the OVMA.

Name: Endeavour Veterinary Ecology
Description:
WHERE EVERY KOALA COUNTS!  
 
Founded by Dr Jon Hanger, Endeavour Veterinary Ecology (EVE) is a Queensland ecology business, pioneering a pragmatic solution in recovering koalas at the intersection where major development meets critical koala habitat.  
 
EVE IS UNIQUE  
 
Established in 2009, and over 1850 koalas tracked and monitored since this time, we have designed a multi-disciplined approach to koala population and health management delivered by a specialised team of ecologists, veterinarians, drone pilots and wildlife trackers and catchers. Our application of veterinary services, smart wildlife technologies and scientific expertise is fundamental in our work. 
 
Some of our proudest achievements are:  
 
Zero koalas harmed by vegetation clearing on projects managed by us  

Successfully reversed declines in koala populations heading to likely extinction, to a 25% year-on-year population growth  

Created the only dedicated, and multi-award-winning, koala tracking and monitoring technology (the K-Tracker) allowing up to hundreds of koalas on our projects to be monitored in near-real time throughout the most critical times of development  
 
Please follow along our story being on the frontline of koala recovery and contact us for more information on our expert wildlife management services.  
 
We work with our clients to go beyond compliance for wildlife management and recovery. You can find us on: 
 
For more information: hello@endeavourvet.com.au  
Instagram: @endeavourvet 
Website: www.endeavourvet.com.au

Name: The Open College of Equine Studies
Description:
The Open College of Equine Studies (TOCES) is the leading provider of educational equine health, science, veterinary nursing and equine physiotherapy programmes.  

TOCES provides the highest standards of training in equine subjects to students worldwide via blended e-learning programmes.  

The courses range from level 1 foundation diplomas for the complete newcomer to horses, through to advanced higher education level 6 programmes.  

TOCES is the leading provider of equine veterinary nursing programmes, with students studying worldwide.  Programmes include accredited level 3 Veterinary Nursing Diplomas, both full and top-up routes.  

Some programmes include practical study weeks which are held near Newmarket, Suffolk, England.

Programmes can be provided in all languages and bespoke programmes designed to meet the needs of the international equine industry.

Name: Virtual VetDoc
Description:
Virtual VetDoc is for pet parents who need the convenience and comfort of telehealth vet care. We're not a huge corporation where your pet is just another number. We offer affordable subscription packages to ensure your pet gets the care they need, when they need it.

Cover pet-vet needs with a stress-free telehealth visit on your phone, tablet or computer. Book a virtual consultation with one of our hand-picked, licensed veterinarian for:   

*ROUTINE HEALTH ISSUES: Tick bites, vomiting, diarrhea, etc.

*PRESCRIPTION REFILLS: If pet needs to be seen to continue medication. You can pick up at your local pharmacy.

*INJURY OR SUDDEN CHANGE IN BEHAVIOR: not walking on one leg; lethargy, skin conditions, etc.

*CONVENIENT SECOND OPINIONS: For diagnoses, surgery, etc.

*SENIOR CARE & MANAGING CHRONIC CONDITIONS: Regular visits to manage aging pets or those with a chronic disease or condition. 

*MULTIPLE PET OWNERS: Avoid the hassle, time and cost of transporting each pet to the vet. Set up virtual appointments from the comfort of home. 
 
We're pet parents, too! Learn more about us and meet Bombay, the 90-pound Labrador who led our founder to create VirtualVetDoc. Visit our website below.

Name: Orthovetplus - App

IT: Orthovetplus è una app per telefono e tablet, iOS e Android. Contiene dei corsi di ortopedia, organizzati in capitoli, ad ogni riga dell’indice corrisponde un video, con traccia audio e testo scritto. Si tratta di una biblioteca di tutorial. Lo scopo è quello di poter selezionare tra i preferiti i contenuti più utili in maniera da poter accedere ai tutorial in maniera pratica e veloce, anche mentre si lavora. Un esempio può essere l’esecuzione di uno studio radiografico in cui non si è sicuri sul posizionamento oppure sulla valutazione delle radiografie o le misure, insomma tutto quello che serve per arrivare ad una diagnosi o prognosi.
In alcune sezioni sono presenti dei test interattivi.  

A breve un intera sezione sull'esecuzione delle radiografie di bacino nel cane in crescita disponibile gratis

ENG: Soon a whole section on the execution of pelvis radiographs in the growing dog is available for free


Orthovetplus is an app (phone and tablet), iOS and Android. It contains orthopedics courses, organized in chapters, each row of the index corresponds to a video, with audio track and written text. This is a tutorial library. The aim is to be able to select among the favorites the most useful contents in order to access the tutorials in a practical and fast way, even while working. An example can be the execution of a radiographic study in which you are not sure about the positioning or evaluation of the radiographs or the measurements, in short all that is needed to arrive at a diagnosis or prognosis.
In some sections there are interactive tests.

Peticare Medical Limited於2013年成立。 我們的理念是從醫療發展出不同類型服務，利用完善的醫療和保健系統為寵物提供卓越的照顧。因為經營醫療服務的我們明白到，寵物的健康和愉快生活不僅由優質的醫療服務構成，還有健康的飲食和適當的護理。 我們的集團已發展成三間動物醫院分佈港九，其中兩間更分別是動物物理治療中心和動物手術中心，另設有寵物美容中心、處方糧購物網、寵物用品購物網。 為了寵物，我們想得更遠。我們的科研團隊將會用創意和科技，為牠們創造更美好生活。

Our Values
Leadership with Integrity | Learning & Innovation | Lifetime Commitment to Quality Care

Our mission:
To treat our patients as though they were our own animals, and to treat our clients in the way we would wish to be dealt with as a family. This motto carried through at all levels, in terms of our demeanour, appearance, professionalism and communication (between vets, clients and staff).
All clinicians are committed to providing a consistently high-quality, professional veterinary service for referring veterinary surgeons, referred clients and their beloved pets.

BIONMAR
Description:
BIONMAR is established in 2021 by Dr.Özlem Hasanoğlu to provide solutions to the stakeholders in the field of animal health with the academic knowledge and 23 years of field experience.

BIONMAR Mission is to support healthy animal production which its importance is increasing day by day.

Dr.Özlem Hasanoğlu was graduated from Uludağ University, Faculty of Veterinary Medicine in 1998. She has completed her PhD in Animal Nutrition and Nutrition Diseases Department of the same university in 2007.

Description: The Center for Vaccines and Immunology (CVI) at the University of Georgia was established in fall 2015. In addition to training future scientists, the Center’s researchers focus on expanding their understanding of the immunology of infectious diseases and how vaccines work in different populations based upon age, gender and ethnicity.

A su vez, se encargan de organizar las citas programadas y hacer un seguimiento personalizado de cada uno de nuestros pacientes.
