Description:
Depuis plus de 30 ans, notre équipe d’une cinquantaine de personnes, composée de vétérinaires et d’ASV passionnés par leur travail, est à votre disposition 24H/24, 7J/7, 365 jours/an. 
Chaque unité de soins est spécialisée dans son domaine et dispose d’un équipement de pointe qui permet d’assurer la quasi-totalité des soins en interne pour mieux vous servir.
Différents espaces vous sont dédiés :
- Accueil central pour les 3 espèces
- Espace équin
- Espace rural
- Espace animaux de compagnie : chiens / chats et NAC

Name: South Valley Equine Hospital
Description:
SVE is the largest referral surgical clinic in Utah. Our medical facility in Saratoga Springs, Utah houses 64 stalls in addition to multiple private exam rooms, surgical suites, recovery rooms and an Intensive Care Unit. Ambulatory and out-patient services are also provided. 

Our on-site Reproductive Center boasts 100 additional stalls to provide full-service mare care with foaling out services and a robust recipient mare herd. Stallion services can be tailored to entail breeding season management or haul-in. 

A satellite clinic at Heritage Ranch in Farr West, Utah features an underwater treadmill to assist in equine rehabilitation and conditioning, a reproductive center and medical clinic. 

From pasture to performance, our expertise touches all aspects of equine health, wellness, and reproduction.

Name: PetLife
Description:
PetLife brings the Primary/Urgent Care Affordable Walk-In health center to the pet world!  
We offer everything for the pet owner, under one roof, meeting all the needs of the small companion animal, when they need it, at a cost they can afford. We offer wellness and annual preventative care, vaccinations, parasite control, dermatology, diagnostics, to dental services, surgical services and everything in between.  We fit squarely between the primary care provider (veterinarian) and the Emergency Hospital.  We see our patients through the entire life cycle from puppy and kitten times through adolescence to the changing needs of the senior pet.  

Our retail pet supplies department carries a wide range of healthy, holistic, natural and affordable nutrition options for the caring pet owner who understands that pet's, like people, are what they eat.  The pet owner does not have to spend more, they just have to know the difference when it comes to feeding the furry member of their family. 

Our Grooming Salon not only keeps our companion animals beautiful and sweet smelling, but the salon understands the dermatologic needs of the Florida pet.  The salon can assist with external parasite control and recovery of the skin after infestation.  The Salon offers holistic mud massages and a variety of other options for skin issues for those pets whose skin struggles with the symptoms of allergy, fungal infections, parasite infestation, dry aging skin and a host of other skin related disorders, all common to the Florida pet.  

Why PetLife stands apart from other centers?  We work hand in hand throughout each department in a "whole pet" concept of care.  We care for and treat the whole pet, inside and out, to assure our pet guardians that they are providing optimum care, meeting all their pets needs, and we do so at the most affordable cost!  Today, post our recent economic downturn, pet owners struggle to provide the best possible care. PetLife is here to help!

Name: Nutrifeira
Description: Atuamos há mais de 30 anos promovendo soluções nos mercados de nutrição e saúde animal. Com o nosso lema de distribuir qualidade, construímos uma referência em credibilidade e eficiência no atendimento a nossos parceiros.

Name: PASE - Philadelphia Animal Specialty & Emergency
Description:
Our goal at PASE is simple: we strive to advance veterinary medicine by providing unparalleled emergency and specialty healthcare for patients and their families with an emphasis on teamwork, service, diversity, respect, and expertise.

For more information about employment opportunities with PASE, please visit: www.PASE.vet/Careers.

Name: Vision Care For Animals
Description: Our veterinary ophthalmology referral practice is located in the San Francisco Bay Area peninsula town of Palo Alto, California. VISION CARE FOR ANIMALS (VCFA) is devoted exclusively to the medical and surgical treatment of animal eye diseases and injuries. Dr. Patrick McCallum, DVM is an ACVO (American College of Veterinary Ophthalmologists) board-certified ophthalmologist (animal eye specialist) with advanced training and expertise in the treatment of cataracts, glaucoma, corneal grafting, eyelid reconstruction, tear abnormalities, and inflammatory eye conditions. We work together with your pet's primary care veterinarian to help solve challenging ocular problems.

Name: Achieve Equine, LLC
Description:
At Achieve Equine, our passion is horses. 

We deliver innovative, functional, and high performance products that enhance the health and safety of both horse and rider. 

Located near Minneapolis, Minnesota - where the pastures are green, innovation is intentional, and tater tot hot dish is a weeknight dinner staple - our team embodies a culture of reliability, kindness, and expertise. 


About FLAIR Equine Nasal Strips,:
Developed by veterinarians, FLAIR Strips are drug-free, self-adhesive nasal strips that support horses’ nasal passages and promote optimum respiratory health of equine athletes at every level of competition. More than eight clinical studies have been conducted on FLAIR Strips at leading equine research centers. FLAIR Strips are clinically proven to: make breathing easier, reduce fatigue, conserve energy, quicken recovery, and reduce lung bleeding.

Name: Blacks Vets
Description:
Blacks Vets is part of the Linnaeus Veterinary Ltd (A Mars Company). You can find our terms of use and privacy policy by visiting:

Contact Information - www.blacksvets.co.uk/contact-us/

Description:
Pet-Aura: where pet feels at home

"At Pet Aura Animal Hospital, we understand that your pet is more than just a friend - they're family!  That's why we're dedicated to providing comprehensive care that meets their unique needs. Trust us to give your furry friend the love and care they deserve. "

Name: LICKING COUNTY HUMANE SOCIETY
Description:
At the Licking County Humane Society, we save lives. As a non-profit, no-kill shelter, LCHS depends on the generosity of our community to give Licking County’s homeless and abused animals the life they deserve. We listen and respond to the needs of people who surrender animals to us, adopt from us, report abuse to us, use our services, work for us, volunteer for us, and to other animal
welfare organizations that turn to us for help.
We understand that helping animals is accomplished by helping people, and as such, we work daily to provide programming and services that directly impact people and pets in a positive way. Changing the world starts by supporting our local communities to change, and at the Licking County Humane Society, we change the world for homeless and abused animals every day.

Name: Policlinico Veterinario Gregorio VII - Gruppo Ca' Zampa
Description:
Fondato nel 1984 a Roma, il Policlinico Veterinario Gregorio VII rappresenta un centro di eccellenza nel panorama della medicina veterinaria.

Parte del gruppo BluVet, la struttura è specializzata nella diagnosi e nella cura di cani, gatti e animali non convenzionali, ed offre un’ampia gamma di servizi specialistici.

Il pronto soccorso veterinario, operativo 24 ore su 24, garantisce un’assistenza continua e tutti i reparti esprimono l’impegno verso standard clinici di altissimo livello e il benessere animale.

www.bluvet.it

Name: Vétérinaire 33
Description: Vétérinaire 33 est un magazine digital français d'Edra Media visant à fournir aux vétérinaires des nouvelles et mises à jour, des avis d'experts, afin de les aider dans leur métier.

Name: The Animal Hospital
Description: By choice we remain a small hospital allowing all of our staff to know you and your pet, giving whatever time is necessary to meet your needs. Our veterinarians have served the Albany area's dogs, cats, rabbits, ferrets, guinea pigs, sugar gliders, gerbils, chinchillas, hamsters, wildlife and endangered species for 38 years.

Name: Megacor Diagnostik GmbH
Description: Megacor Diagnostik GmbH is a company based in Hörbranz, Vorarlberg, Austria

Name: Clyde Vet Group
Description:
We aim to provide best in industry standards of veterinary care – delivered by three distinct teams: small animal, farm and equine.

This allows us to focus on exactly what our clients and their animals need, and to train our teams to the highest standards.

From our hospital in Lanark, to our sites in Stirling, Lesmahagow and Wishaw, we aim to advance veterinary standards while providing our clients with a friendly, compassionate service.

Name: Carolina Animal Specialty & Emergency
Description:
A premier veterinary referral hospital in western North Carolina, the Carolina Animal Specialty & Emergency (CASE) operates 24 hours a day. We are the veterinarians other veterinarians call when they need special expertise, special procedures, or special equipment. By working together, CASE and your veterinarian provide the best, most comprehensive veterinary care for your pet.

Our state-of-the art services include:

Emergency Services
Critical Care
Internal Medicine
Surgery
Diagnostic Imaging
Rehabilitation
Dermatology
Radioiodine Therapy

Our board-certified veterinarians are leaders, ensuring quality, comprehensive care for envy pet that comes through our doors. Our emergency medicine department is staffed with an experienced veterinary team on premises at all times to manage any illness or injury.

For more information on services, please call 828.328.6697

Name: LegalVet - Assessoria Regulatória
Description:
Oferecemos consultoria com notório saber e estrutura necessária para a dinâmica da evolução da legislação, sua regulamentação e adequação aos requerimentos.

O principal objetivo da Legal Vet é suprir as necessidades e carências do mercado nessa área, o que consiste em um conjunto de facilidades para que o cliente foque no que ele deve focar: seu sucesso.

Procuramos sempre entregar uma Assessoria Regulatória de Excelência. Através da nossa experiência na área e conhecimento aprofundado, podemos adaptar todo processo burocrático para um processo mais simples e de fácil entendimento para as empresas. O conhecimento é essencial para passar por todas as etapas, seguindo a linguagem do órgão regulador, otimizando o processo.

Atualmente o Brasil possui um mercado veterinário enorme. Além de um grande público consumidor e grandes oportunidades para empresas estrangeiras que querem se instalar ou adquirir empresas em território brasileiro. Sendo assim, o empresário que conta com a nossa Assessoria Regulatória na hora de regulamentar sua empresa, irá encontrar diversas soluções que agregam à empresa (Praticidade, Qualidade, Processos e Tranquilidade), ao seu funcionamento e ao seu crescimento.

Name: Australian Veterinary Receptionist Association
Description:
The AVRA is a not-for-profit membership organisation whose mission is to recognise and raise the status of veterinary receptionists within the Australian veterinary profession. The AVRA does this by:
- Acting as a professional body that focuses on the interests of veterinary receptionists across Australia.
- Promoting the status of veterinary receptionists within the profession and in the public.
- Setting the standard for veterinary receptionists through training and accreditation.
- Enabling career progression by up-skilling through training and certification.
- Acting as a networking hub to share experiences and learning
- Providing member benefits

Name: Bozo Wags Veterinary Hospital
Description:
Welcome to Bozo Wags Veterinary Hospital, where your beloved pets' health and well-being take center stage. At Bozo Wags, we have dedicated ourselves to addressing the pressing concerns of pet owners in Bengaluru – escalating veterinary care costs, limited access to trained veterinarians, and inadequate pet care facilities. Our journey over the past six years has been nothing short of remarkable and our unwavering commitment to excellence.

Bozo Wags Veterinary Hospital has earned a reputation as one of Bengaluru's most trusted veterinary care providers. Our comprehensive range of services covers all aspects of pet care, including veterinary hospital and diagnostics, outpatient and inpatient care, pharmaceutical sales, pet products and accessories, pet boarding, transportation, and professional grooming. We are firmly committed to delivering high-quality, affordable, and convenient pet care solutions, positioning ourselves as the go-to destination for comprehensive pet care in the city.

Name: Raintree Veterinary Clinic and Rehabilitation Centre
Description:
Raintree Veterinary Clinic is Pune's first multi-species speciality clinic with 24-hour emergency services available on call. Founded in 2017, Raintree was borne of a desire to provide accessible yet high-quality care to all animals, and we continue to approach every case with principles of compassion and unparalleled excellence in veterinary care.

With complete diagnostic facilities, a fully-equipped operating theatre, the latest in cutting-edge technology, and a relentlessly dedicated team, Raintree offers a wide range of services to care for all your pet's needs under one roof. We treat all kinds of animals, providing specialist care to dogs, cats, horses, rabbits, birds, and more. We provide routine and emergency veterinary services, post-operative care, complete diagnostics, physiotherapy options including hydrotherapy, acupuncture, and more, treating each animal as if they were our own.

Name: Vet Center Distribuidora
Description: Com 20 anos de experiência no mercado, trabalhamos com os melhores fornecedores para oferecer uma ampla variedade de produtos veterinários com qualidade garantida e preços acessíveis.

Name: Allied Veterinary Emergency & Referral
Description:
Allied is an employee-owned network of emergency and specialty veterinary hospitals—something truly rare in our profession. In an industry increasingly dominated by corporate-owned clinics, we believe in a different approach—one that prioritizes patient care, accessibility, and the well-being of our team.

Founded by Dr. Kara Nelsen, Allied was built not only to provide exceptional veterinary care but also to create meaningful career opportunities for veterinary professionals. Our employee-ownership model ensures that every decision is made by the people who work directly with pets and their families, not distant investors.

With five locations—Brooklyn Park, Eau Claire, Eden Prairie, Minneapolis, and Rochester—we are available 24/7 for emergency care and offer advanced specialty services, including surgery and oncology. At Allied, we’re more than a veterinary group—we’re a community of dedicated professionals invested in the health and happiness of your pets.

Name: Institute for Infectious Animal Diseases (IIAD)
Description: The Institute for Infectious Animal Diseases (IIAD) delivers translational research-driven risk-based solutions and training applications to address animal diseases through a One Health systems approach.

Name: Al Rafeeq Veterinary Clinic
Description:
Al Rafeeq Veterinary Clinic
Providing top-quality care for your pets with comprehensive services and a compassionate team. Your trusted partner in pet health.

Name: Sleepy Hollow Animal Hospital
Description: At Sleepy Hollow Animal Hospital we provide the best in personal attention teamed with the latest technologies, treating your pets like the valued family members they are.  We are here "for your pet's health and for your peace of mind!"

Name: Vet-GP
Description: Vet-GP is a guide to small animal practice covering common presentations, conditions, emergencies and point of care ultrasonography. It helps ease the difficult transition from student to qualified vet. The online format allows for regular updates and for embedded video clips of abdominal and focused cardiac ultrasonography. Made by first opinion vets for first opinion vets, this is the resource we wanted and needed when we first graduated.

Name: Bishopton Veterinary Group LLP
Description:
Bishopton Veterinary Group is an independent mixed veterinary practice based in North Yorkshire, and is a member of the XLVets community of progressive independent veterinary practices.

We provide high quality first opinion care for pets from North Yorkshire, along with referrals from further afield to our small animal hospital. We also have a team of dedicated farm and pig vets who provide high level consultancy advice to farms across Yorkshire and the North of England.

Name: The Animal Hospital At Murdoch University
Description: Multi-disciplinary Hospital associated with the School of Veterinary Medicine Murdoch University

Name: VTM | Ankara Veteriner Tıp Merkezi
Description:
VTM Hayvan Hastanesi 2000 yılında kurulmuştur.
20'yi aşkın personeli 8 Veteriner Hekimi, son teknoloji eksiksiz medikal donanımı ve 800 m2'lik hizmet binası ile Türkiye'nin en büyük hayvan hastanelerinden biridir.

Dünya standartlarında hekimlik nosyonunu her geçen gün üst seviyelere taşıyarak, ülkemiz pet sektöründe lokomotif görevi almak; Yenilikleri takip ederek, güncel bilgiler ışığında kaliteli ve ulaşılabilir hizmeti verebilmektir.

Teknolojik yatırımları artırarak, hekimlik bilgisini geliştirici her türlü eğitim programlarını takip ederek, amatör ruh ile profesyonel hizmet kalitesini sentezleyip, sadece gerekli olan tedavi seçenekleri ile hayvan refahını en üst seviyede tutmak birincil önceliğimizdir.

Name: Nexderma
Description:
At Nexderma, we are focused on creating state-of-the-art products for advanced dermatological healing — through our technology, Nexderma is able to provide quality advancements that help veterinary professionals provide better care outcomes and speed animal healing time without compromising or interfering with preexisting treatments or medications. Our products work with veterinary treatments in order to safely accelerate their impact with natural alternatives.

Through continuous research and development, Nexderma has been able to provide a new dimension to skin care, wound care, dermatological conditions, and continues to create natural, safe, effective alternatives to traditional, harsh, synthetic medications. Through our use of natural alternatives we are focussed on spear-heading the campaign to prevent the spread of antimicrobial resistance.

Headquartered in New York, Nexderma sells its skin care products worldwide. All Nexderma products are proudly manufactured and assembled in the U.S., which allows for meticulous product monitoring and the highest quality assurance in manufacturing.

Our products are 100% natural containing NO chemicals like hypochlorous acid, NO antibiotics, and NO steroids. Natural alternatives for wound care and healing are critical as we navigate the new world of anti-microbial resistance and holistic health and wellness.

Name: Jong Cluster Paard
Description: Speciaal voor bijna en pas afgestudeerde (tot 5 jaar na afstuderen) paardendierenartsen is, in samenwerking met het Cluster Paard Jong CP opgericht. Cluster Paard vertegenwoordigt de Nederlandse paardendierenartsen en draagt bij aan een professionele ontwikkeling van de paardendiergeneeskunde, in het belang van paard en eigenaar. JongCP heeft als doel een brug vormen tussen het Cluster Paard, de jonge paardendierenarts en student en het ‘gat’ te vullen tussen de faculteit en praktijk. Jong CP organiseert vier keer per jaar nascholingen en daarnaast is het bestuur van jong CP altijd bereikbaar voor vragen.

Name: Heal House Call Veterinarian
Description:
Heal House Call Veterinarian is a franchise opportunity for veterinarians. Heal vets confidently own their own mobile practice, enjoy a close relationship with their clients, practice the medicine they want, and have a healthy work/life balance. All of this while being part of a close veterinary community, having access to a medical liaison and comprehensive business support. We take the headaches and uncertainty out of practice ownership.

Veterinary medicine by compassionate veterinarians who care for your pets where they are most comfortable, in their home. Cats, dogs, small animals, large animals, and pet parents -- all feel better in their own environment.

Name: IVSA Mansoura
Description:
International Veterinary Students' Association (IVSA) is a non-profit, non-partisan organization run by the volunteer efforts of veterinary students worldwide.
It was established in 1951 To benefit the animals and people of the world by harnessing the potential and dedication of veterinary students, and to promote the international application of veterinary skills, education, and knowledge.
IVSA Mansoura “Egypt“ is an accepted chapter in the 64th summer congress in Romania on 8/8/2015.

Name: Dow Animal Welfare Society
Description: From wings to whiskers, we are committed to caring for all animals. Our mission is to protect and support creatures of all kinds—birds, cats, dogs, and even the tiniest beings in need. With compassion at our core, we strive to make a difference in every life we touch. Join us in our journey to create a safer, kinder world for animals everywhere.

Name: Nutridian Animal Health
Description:
Nutridian Animal Health Located at Mumbai

In the present scenario of the poultry Industry, cost effective and standard quality animal feed supplements play a very important role in the performance of the birds.

We have the technical back up of leading Pharmacists with more than 4 decades of proven experience. We observe TQM and have our own QA/QC fortesting and stability checking of all our products

Name: Veterinary Neuro Services LLC
Description:
PASSION TO CARE, MISSION TO CURE

Our veterinary specialists are here for your pets' medical needs

At CriticalVetCare, we understand that your pets are part of your family. We are dedicated to giving your animal companions compassionate and high quality animal critical care in a 24-hour emergency veterinary hospital. Providing outstanding services for our patients, clients and referring veterinarians is a matter of personal pride for us. The well-being of our patients and the satisfaction of our clients and referring veterinarians are priorities.

24 hours vet emergency hospital providing so much more than first aid for dogs and cats

With access to experts in areas ranging from emergency and critical care, surgery (both soft tissue and orthopedic), neurology, chiropractic, acupuncture and cardiology, we give our patients more high-quality time with their loving families whether they come to see us for a mild case of canine lameness or for serious conditions like paralysis or tumors requiring spinal or brain surgery.

Name: White Whiskers Aging Pet Care
Description:
At White Whiskers Aging Pet Care, we proudly serve as Colorado Springs' leading provider of senior pet care and end-of-life support. Our commitment goes beyond simply showing up in critical moments; we're here to support you and your pet throughout your entire journey together. We understand that your senior pet is a beloved member of your family, which is why we focus not only on longevity but on enriching and celebrating every stage of their life. From regular health check-ups to specialized care for aging pets, our dedicated team is here to ensure your pet enjoys their golden years with comfort and dignity.

When the time comes to say goodbye, White Whiskers is by your side. We believe that this most challenging transition should be a heartfelt experience shared with a trusted friend and neighbor. Our compassionate end-of-life care is designed to provide both you and your pet with the peace and comfort you deserve. As a community-focused service, we prioritize the comfort and convenience of both pets and their owners. We offer in-home consultations, personalized care plans, and a deep understanding of the unique needs of senior pets. With White Whiskers, you're not just getting a service—you're gaining a partner who truly cares.

Explore our website or contact us today to learn more about how we can support you and your senior pet. Whether you’re seeking routine care, specialized services, or compassionate end-of-life support, White Whiskers is here to help every step of the way.

Name: The Wheelhouse Veterinary Centre
Description:
The Wheelhouse has centres based in Chesham, Amersham and Chalfont St Giles,  Buckinghamshire enabling us to cover areas such as: Bovingdon, Flaunden, Tring, Little Chalfont, Chenies,  Great Missenden, Prestwood, Chalfont St Peter, Beaconsfield, Seer Green, Gerrards Cross, High Wycombe, Hazelmere, Chorleywood.

At the Wheelhouse Veterinary Centre we like a more personal approach to animal care. Our experienced, friendly and professional team of staff offer not only first class veterinary treatment, but also advice and encouragement for our clients to help keep their much-loved pets in the very best of health.

From nail clipping your hamster to major surgery on your dog, we are here to provide your pets with the expert care they deserve.

We use the services of the dedicated emergency team Vets Now, based in Hemel Hempstead or High Wycombe for our out of hours.

Name: Aliança Medicamentos e Insumos Hospitalares

Name: FORWARD SOLUTIONS ANIMAL HEALTH COMPANY
Description: M/s Forward Solutions through the careful and responsible application of science delivers products to promote animal & birds well-being and sustainable productivity. The company has developed strong relationships with a number of distribution partners globally. Our products are recognized as offering security to both distributors and end users, through their consistently high quality. M/s Forward Solutions always provide the best products of the world.

Name: Dallas Veterinary Surgical Center
Description: The Dallas Veterinary Surgery Center (DVSC) was initially founded in 1986, principally as a neurosurgical referral practice, with greater than 50% of the total case load being neurosurgical. Throughout the years we have always strived to be on the “cutting-edge” of neurosurgical techniques and diagnostic procedures. Our surgeons have been involved with the development and advancement of several neurosurgical techniques currently in use by other surgeons across the country.

Name: MYPETCLINIC
Description:
MYPETCLINIC è un gruppo di cliniche veterinarie polispecialistiche, punto di riferimento per chi pone la salute del proprio animale domestico al centro di tutto. 

Il gruppo è nato nel 2023 ed è presente sul territorio lombardo con tre cliniche veterinarie: Milano, Curno (BG) e Verano Brianza (MB).

Grazie a una pluralità di competenze altamente professionali, personale qualificato e strumentazione all'avanguardia, MYPETCLINIC garantisce servizi d’eccellenza e cure veterinarie accurate e di qualità per la salute e il benessere dei Pet.

Name: Veterinarians for Animal Welfare Aotearoa (Registered Charity | CC60741)
Description:
Veterinarians for Animal Welfare Aotearoa (Registered Charity | CC60741) was established in 2022, to provide a science-based, unconflicted, animal welfare advocacy voice. Our vision is “A Good Life for All’ – animals, people and the environment. Veterinarians for Animal Welfare Aotearoa seeks to create better lives for animals using our knowledge and expertise in veterinary and animal welfare science.

Veterinarians for Animal Welfare Aotearoa is a collective of animal welfare advocates, including veterinarians, allied veterinary professionals, animal welfare scientists, and other non-veterinary and body corporate members.

Name: Bingle Vet Clinics
Description:
YOUR VISION, OUR SUPPORT, YOUR PRACTICE
Bingle Vet Clinics Makes Optimized Clinic Ownership Possible

Do you dream of owning or optimizing your own clinic, but dread the idea of managing the business side? Bingle Vet Clinics can make your dreams a reality. As part of our family of clinics, you can focus on practicing veterinary medicine while we provide resources that can help make your clinic business grow and thrive.

Bingle Vet Clinics place equal emphasis on high quality veterinary care and efficient business operations – so there’s no need to struggle with various aspects of running a clinic. Instead, you can focus on what you love and are trained to do: care for animals.

Name: Catalyst LifeSciences Private Limited
Description: A professionally managed and a quality certified, multi-divisional organization dedicated to the development and marketing of innovative and value added solutions providing complete care for improving the health and productivity for the farming fraternity with successfully diversified business units for Aquaculture, Poultry, Equines, Ruminants, Companion pets and Crop  Protection

Name: Caninos y Felinos Hospital Veterinario
Description: Caninos y Felinos nace en Febrero de 1995 como un centro médico veterinario adecuado para la atención de consultas, rayos x, cirugías, peluquería y atención de urgencias las 24 horas. Hoy en día continua siendo una empresa familiar con un fuerte enfoque de especialización, profesionalismo y sentido de pertenencia.

Name: Vet & Cie
Description:
Vet & Cie is an independent family-owned Quebec business, inspired by Fear Free and AAHA. 

We offer great opportunities for veterinarians and TSA at Vet & Cie Brossard as well as at our new site in Saint-Léonard.

Name: HAMA - Centro Veterinário de Hematologia e Diagnóstico
Description:
O HAMA é um centro multidisciplinar localizado no Jardins, São Paulo/SP — referência em hematologia, hemostasia e patologia clínica veterinária. Nossa equipe é composta por professores e pesquisadores altamente qualificados, apaixonados por animais, que buscam diariamente oferecer diagnósticos confiáveis e eficientes, com informações claras para tutores e apoio técnico especializado para médicos veterinários. Estamos ao lado dos nossos pacientes e parceiros do início ao fim dos tratamentos, oferecendo cuidado, responsabilidade e carinho incondicional. 

A cura começa com amor

Name: Vet'Ntic
Description:
Vet'Ntic est une plateforme digitale innovante qui transforme les interactions au sein du marché vétérinaire. Conçue pour les fabricants, importateurs, grossistes-distributeurs, vétérinaires et propriétaires d’animaux, elle offre un espace unique pour connecter, simplifier et optimiser leurs activités.

Sur Vet'Ntic, les fabricants et importateurs peuvent ajouter leurs marques, produits, fiches techniques et ressources pour les rendre accessibles à tous les acteurs. Les vétérinaires et grossistes-distributeurs y trouvent une solution simple pour découvrir et commander les produits nécessaires à leur activité, tout en accédant à des ressources et à des informations techniques centralisées.

En plus de faciliter les commandes entre clients et fournisseurs directs, Vet'Ntic met en avant la collaboration et le partage de connaissances grâce à des outils modernes comme des espaces personnalisés, un blog communautaire et des tableaux de bord dédiés.

Notre mission est de renforcer les liens entre les acteurs de la santé animale en Algérie et au-delà, en intégrant des solutions numériques adaptées à chaque besoin.

Rejoignez Vet'Ntic pour faire avancer la santé animale grâce à l’innovation et à la collaboration.

Name: AFPV - Le réseau des vétérinaires exerçant en physiothérapie vétérinaire.
Description:
L’AFPV – Association Française de Physiothérapie Vétérinaire est un réseau national de professionnels de santé engagés pour le développement, la reconnaissance et la pratique de la rééducation fonctionnelle appliquée aux animaux ainsi qu'à l'entrainement du chien de sport.

Notre mission :
 Promouvoir la rééducation fonctionnelle et la physiothérapie dans le milieu vétérinaire et sensibiliser les propriétaires d'animaux.
 Fédérer les acteurs du secteur autour des meilleures pratiques
 Soutenir la formation, la recherche et l’expertise clinique
 Favoriser une approche éthique, collaborative et interdisciplinaire du soin animal

 L’AFPV rassemble des vétérinaires, praticiens, enseignants et étudiants autour d’une vision commune : améliorer la qualité de vie des animaux grâce à la physiothérapie sur la base de connaissances scientifiques régulièrement mises à jours au travers d'échanges et de formations.

Name: qTUS
Description: Our mission is to train and certify veterinarians worldwide in the use of qTUS, establishing it as an essential tool in managing Bovine Respiratory Disease (BRD). Beyond education, qTUS is growing into a specialized contract research organization, offering expert support for trials focused on lung health. Through this innovative approach, we strive to improve animal welfare, encourage responsible antimicrobial use, and contribute to a more sustainable future for cattle husbandry.

Name: Small Animal Veterinary Association Kerala
Description:
The Small Animal Veterinary Association of Kerala (SAVAK), founded in 2015, is a professional organization dedicated to advancing the field of small animal veterinary medicine. SAVAK serves as a platform for veterinarians across Kerala to collaborate, exchange knowledge, and enhance their expertise in treating companion animals such as dogs, cats, and exotic pets. Its mission is to promote excellence in veterinary care, foster professional development, and elevate the standards of animal health and welfare in the region.

SAVAK is committed to staying at the forefront of veterinary science by organizing workshops, seminars, and training programs that address contemporary challenges in small animal practice. The association brings together experts and practitioners to share insights on emerging trends, advanced diagnostic tools, innovative treatment methods, and preventive healthcare strategies. By creating these learning opportunities, SAVAK ensures that its members remain updated with the latest advancements in the field.

The association also plays a crucial role in advocating for the importance of small animal care in Kerala’s veterinary landscape. It collaborates with educational institutions, government bodies, and animal welfare organizations to create awareness about responsible pet ownership, vaccination, and disease prevention. SAVAK emphasizes ethical practices, evidence-based treatments, and compassionate care, aligning with global standards in veterinary medicine.

With a vision to build a robust network of veterinary professionals, SAVAK encourages membership from practitioners, students, and researchers, fostering a sense of community and mutual support. Through its initiatives, the association has significantly contributed to the professional growth of veterinarians and the well-being of countless pets in Kerala.

Name: Vetletics Inc.
Description:
Vetletics Inc. is an organization consisting of Key Opinion Leaders in the areas of Equine Sports Medicine, Orthopedic Surgery, veterinary entrepreneurship, and compression therapy systems where state of the art solutions are provided to meet challenges associated with animal health.   Vetletics Inc. has modified proven technology and developed the very first and only pneumatic compression device for horses.

Vetletics Inc. is the pioneer in dynamic compression therapy dedicated for athletic recovery of horses and for the treatment of horses with lymphatic drainage problems with its flagship device, the EQ Press.  The EQ Press is a patented pneumatic dynamic compression device designed to fit the contours of the horse’s front and back legs all the way up to the elbows and stifles. The device is able to actively push lymph fluid up and out of the legs of the horse in order to help remove waste products and metabolites, reduce inflammation, enhance the immune response, and promote overall health. We  aim to pursue a future of wellness and enhanced recovery, not only  for athletic animals but a wide range of species who can benefit through innovative compression therapy devices.

Currently, VDI has fully validated a new biomarker for canine and feline lymphoma and canine hemagiosarcoma which we are actively promoting in the US. We also have a new biomarker for canine sepsis.

VDI also runs the Glycominds laboratory - a CLIA certified lab performing proprietary biomarkers for Multiple Sclerosis.

We partner with veterinary professionals who value quality, education, and responsible adoption of advanced modalities. Our focus is not on trends—but on tools that earn trust through performance, durability, and long-term impact.

- Built for patients who heal better.
- Designed for practices built to last.
- Everything we do is grounded in three core principles:

Durability
Veterinary environments are demanding. Our technology is engineered to withstand daily clinical use—supporting busy teams without compromising performance over time.

Longevity
We design with the full life of the practice in mind. That means equipment that delivers consistent value, predictable ownership costs, and long-term reliability—for both patients and businesses.

Precision Engineering
Clinical confidence comes from control and consistency. Our systems are engineered with precision to support repeatable outcomes and thoughtful, case-specific care.

Name: Tierklinik Düsseldorf GmbH
Description:
Die Tierärztliche Klinik für Kleintiere „Tierklinik Dr. Krauß Düsseldorf GmbH“, gegründet vor nunmehr 40 Jahren durch Herrn Dr. Rainer Krauß, ist in und um Düsseldorf herum ein Begriff, wenn es um Kleintiermedizin geht.

Der Anspruch, sich ständig weiterzuentwickeln, um den Tieren auf hohem Niveau auch bei seltenen Krankheiten helfen zu können, wird hier sehr ernst genommen und macht die Klinik zu einer fachlich anerkannten Institution im Bereich der Tiermedizin.

Mit aktuell 16 gut ausgebildeten Tierärzten, die sich auf die unterschiedlichsten Fachgebiete spezialisiert haben, wird der Vielfalt der Erkrankungen Rechnung getragen.

Das Leistungsspektrum umfasst neben der Chirurgie, Neurochirurgie und minimalinvasivenChirurgie die Innere Medizin, Kardiologie, Neurologie, Onkologie sowie die stationäre Intensivmedizin. Auf dem Gebiet der Augenheilkunde hilft eine anerkannte Spezialistin den erkrankten Tieren. Für Vögel und Reptilien steht ein international anerkannter Fachtierarzt zur Verfügung.

Für die Rehabilitation der Patienten wird auch Physiotherapie angeboten.

Um eine bestmögliche Versorgung der Patienten zu gewährleisten, bedienen sich die Tierärzte modernster Technik. In der bildgebenden Diagnostik sind u. a. ein SIEMENS-Computertomograph (64-zeilig), ein SIEMENS-Kernspintomograph und drei Doppler- Ultraschallgeräte zu nennen. Für die Labordiagnostik und Bakteriologie kommen hochwertige Analysegeräte zum Einsatz.

Sollte eine Bluttransfusion erforderlich sein, kann auf die klinikeigene Blutbank zurückgegriffen werden.

Ein hochqualifiziertes und engagiertes Team von Tierärzten und Tiermedizinischen Fachangestellten sorgt sich an sieben Tagen in der Woche rund um die Uhr um die Gesundheit der Patienten.

Name: MEP Equine Solutions
Description:
MEP Equine Solutions is recognized worldwide for its innovative problem solving and its ability to deliver technology based solutions for veterinary industry. 

Formed to develop and commercialize on-site diagnostic tools for animals, the founders of MEP Equine Solutions (MEP Equine) have successfully commercialized veterinary medical devices and technologies and have developed strong relationships with over 100 veterinary clinicians.  MEP is led by a seasoned MBA entrepreneur with proven success in raising capital and bringing new technologies to market. Prototyping, market verification, marketing, and manufacturing management are all done in house, with various consultants supplementing the company’s needs in mechanical and electrical design, software and web development, manufacturing, distribution, and sales.
 
MEP Equine Solutions developed The Parasight System, an on-site quantitative diagnostic and management tool for veterinarians; Eggsight Test Kit, an integrated semi-quantitative parasite detection test; Parasight App, a mobile application to perform tests and manage results; and Parasight Metrics that aggregate anonymous result data to aid in case management and anthelmintic resistance monitoring.
 
The company was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Lexington, Kentucky.

Name: Amigato Clínica Felina
Description:
Amigato Clínica Felina es la 1ª Clínica de la Región de Murcia Exclusiva para Gatos.

Somos un equipo de locos enamorados de los gatos. Son nuestra vocación y por eso, dedicamos a ellos nuestras vidas. En el cuidado de tu gato, contamos con la mejor formación certificada en medicina felina de vanguardia, los reconocimientos más prestigiosos y los mimos más tiernos para mejorar su bienestar y el tuyo.

¿Qué diferencia AMIGATO de otras clínicas veterinarias?

Somos diferentes al resto de clínicas veterinarias. Descubre porqué:
Primera Clínica Exclusiva de Gatos del Levante:
Aunamos un trato amigable de los gatos realmente diferenciador y una medicina felina de vanguardia.
Trato Amigable con los Gatos:
Proporcionamos el trato especial necesario para evitar estrés y sufrimiento de los pacientes.
Excelencia en formación en Medicina Felina:
Nuestras acreditaciones demuestran que podemos resolver los casos más difíciles.
Centro de Referencia en Medicina Felina:
Multitud de profesionales ya confían en nosotros para que resolvamos junto a ellos los casos más complejos.

Entre otros muchos cuidados felinos específicos, hemos creado un ambiente libre de estrés para el gato y su cuidador. En Amigato, tu querido gato no encontrará ladridos ni olores caninos que tanto le estresan, como ocurriría en otras clínicas.

Pero eso no es todo, porque llevamos a cabo protocolos de manejo amigables con los gatos tanto antes de acudir a la clínica, durante la visita a la misma y una vez regresan a casa. Nos tomamos el tiempo necesario para tratar con cada gato, la clave es el amor hacia ellos, la experiencia y conocimientos más avanzados y altas dosis paciencia. En Amigato…

No usamos nunca jaulas de contención para gatos, ni guantes de cuero “antimordiscos” ni cualquier otro aparato o instrumental que suponga un estrés innecesario para el animal.

No requerimos del dueño a la hora del trato con el gato evitando así accidentes y sobretodo que el gato pueda “guardarte rencor”.

Name: Selarl EPIDALIS
Description:
Cabinet vétérinaire indépendant exerçant exclusivement en médecine/santé/élevage porcine 

Notre équipe se compose de 10 vétérinaires praticiens répartis sur 4 sites dans le Grand Ouest (Vitré, Château Gontier, Plouagat et Cerizay) permettant une activité de suivi d'élevage sur les secteurs Bretagne, Pays de la Loire, Normandie, Poitou Charentes.
Notre offre de service va du suivi sanitaire quotidien des élevages avec un conseil indépendant auprès des éleveurs, à la formation (biosécurité, bien-être animal, autopsie…) en passant par un panel d'audits réalisable grâce à la diversité des compétences des praticiens:
- Cannibalisme et comportements des porcs par Alexis NALOVIC
- Homéopathie par Hélène HURTH
- Diagnostic électrique par Vincent MULLER
- Bonne tenue de la pharmacie d'élevage par Marie RETUREAU
- Conseil et suivi de la nutrition des porcs par Hugues PERRIN
- Solution Alterbiotique par Dominique MARCHAND
- Laboratoire et microbiologie par Fabrizio TATONE
- Facteurs de risque de streptococcie par Morgane REMOND
A l'écoute des éleveurs, notre travail repose sur des valeurs de confiance, de respect, d'indépendance et de souplesse pour répondre aux problématiques d'élevage avec une volonté de s'inscrire dans une démarche Alterbiotique. Cette démarche vise décliner le volet préventif sur l'ensemble de l'élevage (optimisation des bonnes pratiques d'élevage: vaccination, nettoyage et désinfection, alimentation, gestion d'ambiance, bien-être des animaux et des éleveurs…) afin d'optimiser les performances de l'élevage en privilégiant le bon état de santé des animaux.

Pour plus d'informations, n'hésitez pas à vous rendre sur notre site www.epidalis.com et à nous contacter.

Name: Vet-Source
Description:
ABOUT US - "We Are the Vet Source"

Vet-Source was created in 2011 by Veterinary Surgeons. Over the years, our foundation has established itself as a trusted business-to-business company bridging the veterinary trade with other global industries. Our mission is to provide progressive and complementary solutions for veterinary practices, distributors, providers, and producers, while also acting as representatives of the veterinary trade for companies from various industrial sectors.

Having been deeply rooted in the veterinary business for three generations, Vet-Source unites tradition with innovation. This combination allows us to find common ground across various business areas, helping us deliver creative and effective solutions tailored to each client. We specialize in delivering highly specialized services and products in a unique, client-centered way.

Our services and strategies are built on the core values of professionalism, reliability, and individualized attention to each customer. Our operational approach is based on in-depth research and collaboration, ensuring that we provide optimal solutions to our clients and partners. We believe in mutual success through continuous engagement, innovation, and tailored advisory services.

A New Chapter in Innovation

As we have grown, our focus has evolved, and today, the most important area of our business is the development of blockchain solutions for the veterinary industry. With our expertise in technology and a deep understanding of the veterinary landscape, we are now leading the charge in transforming veterinary practices through blockchain, offering new opportunities for security, efficiency, and growth.

Our goal is to foster strong partnerships with foreign organizations looking to expand. With our extensive knowledge of local culture, history, language, and legal frameworks, we help our partners navigate this complex market, create new opportunities, and achieve their goals.

Name: VetTutor
Description:
An interactive online study tool to help you pass your veterinary exams. 
@VetTutor is the UK's first premium study platform! #VetStudent #VetSchool #VetFinals

VetTutor is part of MediTutor, a company in the education sector. VetTutor was started when an equine veterinary surgeon and a medical doctor joined forces who believed that current resources weren't good enough, affordable or user friendly. We are the UK’s first veterinary education platform to deliver high quality educational resources utilising evidenced based revision strategies. 

Questions are written by students who have just passed finals or veterinary surgeons. We have a very strong ethos of only providing high quality, relevant questions, and teaching notes. Questions and answers are all then peer reviewed by our expert team of over 15 vets, we have vets with a specialist interest in exotics, farm, equine and small animals who review questions in the relative section. There is a rigorous 10-point checklist for question answers followed by a detailed professional editorial process before a question is added to the platform.

At a time when being a vet is becoming increasingly expensive (think Royal College registration fees, the dreaded student loan repayments, CPD and the continually rising cost of living); VetTutor is committed to offer a quality revision resource at the lowest cost to yourself as possible. This is in part achieved by relying on word-of-mouth recommendations rather than funding expensive advertising campaigns. If you find VetTutor useful, please tell a friend!

Haustiere haben in unserer heutigen Gesellschaft einen sehr hohen Stellenwert und sind vollwertige Familienmitglieder. Entsprechend groß ist die Angst oder die Sorge, wenn es den Lieblingen nicht mehr gut geht. Wir haben uns in unserer täglichen Arbeit dem höchsten tiermedizinischen Level verschrieben. Name: The Sheffield Cats Shelter
Description:
Our Mission:

With an estimated nine million stray cats in the UK, the number of strays roaming the UK has reached a critical level.

Because of this it’s our mission to make sure that every cat that needs a home, finds a home.

We shelter our rescues in rooms, not cages, to let them adjust to living in a home-like environment where they are not only safe, but have the space and facilities to express normal cat behaviour. We provide all of our cats with lots of comfy beds, igloo beds, cat trees and scratch posts, toys, catnip, quality food and exceptional care. We aim to keep them as happy and fulfilled as possible until they find their forever home.

We also neuter, vaccinate, and microchip every cat that comes to us. This means that our cats are safe from unwanted pregnancies, and cat-lovers can adopt from us in confidence.

With your help we can make sure that cats throughout Sheffield and surrounding areas are cared for and protected, and never have to be scared or hungry ever again.

The Sheffield Cats Shelter is a registered charity founded in 1897 and is one of the oldest in the UK. The Shelter cares for and re-homes over 400 cats and kittens each year. 

We have two successful charity shops: Ecclesall Road in S11 and Hillsborough in S6.

Name: Myhealthyherd .com Ltd
Description: Myhealthyherd.com is a web based health management program designed to make cattle herds healthier by linking vets and farmers together. A veterinary practice can build robust health management plans for all their farmer clients. The farmers can also access the program and help create a shared health plan. The program is built on sound veterinary principles created by two highly experienced cattle vets,  Pete Orpin BVSc FRCVS and Dick Sibley BVSc HonFRCVS.  The program helps predict the likelihood of disease on a farm utilizing questions and algorithms for disease entry and spread within the farm. This allows for a truly preventive approach to be adopted by the farmer to keep diseases out of the herd. Each cattle disease has its own particular risk profile and these are traffic light scored. The risks can be managed effectively utilizing the 4 pillars of disease control ( Biosecurity, biocontainment, surveillance and resilience). Health planning templates are available to allow farmers and vets to create simple protocols to keep their herds healthy. Options exist for more comprehensive disease management plans to be created. The vet practice can store lab results and monitor the health programs remotely via the web or via an App. Options also exist to store notes, economically calculate the impact of disease with comprehensive reminders for actions needed to keep the herd healthy.

The best thing is, it doesn’t cost you a penny.

If you’re a practice looking for a locum or permanent Vet or Nurse, you’ve come to the right place. We pride ourselves on our ability to listen and understand your needs, so we won’t bombard you with unsuitable candidates, we aim to find the right people for the right practices. It costs nothing to advertise with us, we only charge if you decide to take on one of our introductions, so there’s really nothing to lose.

Whether you’re a Vet or Nurse looking for work, or a practice looking for a locum or new addition to the team, we’d love to hear from you, even if its just for an initial chat.

Validamos e discutimos os casos clínicos e necropsias com os profissionais envolvidos, juntamente com os achados laboratoriais.
Desenvolvemos também o Projeto de Monitoramento de Impactos de Plataformas e Embarcações sobre a Avifauna – PMAVE, que tem como objetivo, registrar todas as ocorrências envolvendo aves debilitadas, feridas ou mortas nas embarcações e plataformas, bem como aglomerações de avifaunas nas estruturas das mesmas. Para isso, a BW Consultoria Veterinária conta com uma equipe técnica habilitada a executar, quando necessário, procedimentos que envolvam captura, coleta, transporte ou manejo dos animais visando sempre o bem estar animal e a segurança da equipe operacional. 
Auxiliamos na prestação de serviço, como: resgate de fauna, licenciamento ambiental e avaliação dos Impactos sobre o Meio Biótico (Fauna) nos EIA/RIMAs (Estudo de Impacto Ambiental).
Promovemos cursos de capacitação e treinamento de estudantes e profissionais nas mais diversas áreas, a fim de contribuir para a grade curricular e desenvolver a formação de um profissional mais apto para o mercado de trabalho.
