Name: Animed - Hospital Veterinário de Gondomar
Description:
A ANIMED é uma inovadora unidade de serviços veterinários localizada em Gondomar, que surge como o primeiro Hospital Veterinário da região, concebido de raiz a pensar no bem-estar do seu animal.
Abriu ao público a 7 de Maio de 2009 como Centro Veterinário Animed sendo posteriormente acreditado como Animed - Hospital Veterinário pela Ordem dos Médicos Veterinários a 7 de Junho de 2010. Tem como objetivo marcar pela diferença com um serviço de atendimento permanente, dotado de uma vasta gama de equipamentos para um rápido diagnóstico.
Todos os colaboradores regem-se pelos princípios do profissionalismo, honestidade, integridade, empenho e dedicação, procurando estar sempre atualizados para oferecer os melhores serviços médicos aos nossos pacientes.
Na conceção deste projeto não descuramos todos os padrões de higiene e segurança, privilegiando a funcionalidade do espaço bem como o conforto e a privacidade dos nossos clientes, sendo a Animed, deste modo certificada pela NP EN ISO 9001:2015.
O ponto de partida para o início deste projeto surgiu da necessidade de fornecer aos nossos animais um serviço médico veterinário mais abrangente de qualidade e versatilidade.
Consideramos os animais de companhia um elemento familiar importantíssimo na sua dinâmica e equilíbrio. A nossa paixão pela medicina veterinária revela-se não só pelo respeito por estas premissas, mas também por oferecer um serviço digno no qual
valorizamos a vida dos animais a nós confiados.
Somos uma equipa de especialistas nas mais diversas áreas da medicina veterinária, motivados e dedicados, qualificados a oferecer os melhores cuidados médicos aos nossos pacientes, privilegiando o profissionalismo.
As nossas modernas instalações dispõem dos mais atuais meios de diagnóstico que nos permite uma eficiente resposta médica, sendo de destacar a imagiologia digital, a ecografia, laboratório altamente equipado, unidade de cuidados intensivos com vigilância permanente e unidade de doenças infecto-contagiosas.

Name: Tampa Veterinary Hospital
Description:
We are proud to be Tampa's oldest veterinary practice, serving Tampa's pets and their owners since 1953 in our Kennedy location.

Despite the fact the practice has some years, the medicine we practice is state-of-the-art.  We offer wellness and preventative care, critical care, surgery, hospice care and much, much more.  Our veterinarians have close to 100 years combined experience and stay up to date on the latest technology and procedures.

We now offer laser therapy as well as stem cell therapy. Call us for more details.

Name: Clínica Veterinaria Danke
Description:
Clinica Integral Veterinaria - Atención las 24Hs.

Nuestra misión es ayudar a nuestras mascotas brindándole una atención  de excelencia durante toda su vida, tanto para mantener como para restablecer la salud.

Nuestros dos pilares son la medicina preventiva y tratar siempre de evitar el sufrimiento;  cuidando siempre del bienestar animal y el vinculo con las personas.

Name: Access Vet Exports
Description:
Access Vet Exports provides certification of Export Health Certificates (EHCs) and support for companies exporting animal-based foods and products (POAO) worldwide. 
We certify all product EHCs for every country enabling efficient access to new global markets.

Name: Tropical Vets
Description: Providing caring and competent veterinary services to all creatures, great and small.’ Servicing from Cairns to Ayr and the Atherton Tablelands

Name: Dra. Maiara Massafera | Nutrologia de Cães e Gatos
Description: Nutrição estratégica e personalizada para cães e gatos.

Name: Brisbane Veterinary Specialist Centre
Description:
Located in Brisbane, Brisbane Veterinary Specialist Centre is a state of the art, purpose built animal hospital providing around the clock emergency care and in house specialists in medicine, surgery, ophthalmology and oncology. At BVSC we have a high-energy radiation therapy facility dedicated to treating pets with cancer. 

As well as being the premier cancer hospital for animals in Australia, BVSC has world-renowned specialists in small animal surgery, internal medicine and ophthalmology.   

Featuring high quality facilities and hi-tech, advanced equipment, BVSC offers 24-hour continuous care, after hours emergency services, a team of experts and a modern and caring hospital environment for all sick small animals.

Name: NUTRIGEN ITALIA SRL
Description:
Fin dai suoi inizi la missione di Nutrigen è stata chiara: prendersi cura delle esigenze specifiche dei nostri piccoli amici animali con un approccio che coniuga conoscenza e rispetto per l’animale, assieme alla passione per il loro benessere, fattore che da sempre ci contraddistingue.
Dedichiamo ai piccoli animali il massimo della cura e dell’attenzione e proprio per questo abbiamo creato un ampio catalogo di prodotti, capaci di rispondere ai molteplici bisogni dei nostri amici, per essere sempre al loro fianco nel modo migliore.
Per realizzare i nostri prodotti e per offrirvi le migliori soluzioni siamo guidati da un approccio che guarda sempre a ciò che la Natura ci offre perché, come sosteneva Albert Einstein, “qualunque cosa puoi immaginare, la Natura l’ha già creata”.

Name: Dogs and Cats Emergency & Specialty
Description: At Dogs and Cats Emergency & Specialty (DCES), we pride ourselves on a mission-driven approach to veterinary care, combining individualized, quality care with collaboration, education, integrity, and compassion. Since 2003, DCES has been providing specialized care to the Baltimore-Washington DC Metro community. Our 24/7 ECC department is comprised of internship- and mentorship-trained Emergency Clinicians, a board-certified Criticalist, and highly skilled technicians who care for our patients around the clock. Our ER doctors and specialists work together in a friendly, approachable, collaborative atmosphere that includes specialists in Internal Medicine, Critical Care, Neurology, Oncology, Surgery, Radiology, and Ophthalmology.

Name: GVN Saúde Animal
Description: Representação e distribuição de produtos veterinários

Name: Grupo Vet Planet
Description:
As clínicas veterinárias Vet Planet, com inicio de actividade em 2011,  são constituídas por uma equipa motivada, dinâmica e empenhada que visa prestar cuidados de saúde médico veterinários de excelência. Prezamos a formação contínua da nossa equipa através da participação constante em vários congressos.

Dispomos de espaços modernos e inovadores, construídos e equipados com os mais avançados meios de diagnóstico e terapêutica, permitindo assim alcançar mais rapidamente, e de forma rigorosa, os melhores resultados para o seu melhor amigo.

A Vet Planet tem também um papel activo na sociedade promovendo a adopção consciente, e responsável, de cães e gatos, integrando-os num lar e proporcionando todo o carinho e atenção que os nossos amigos de 4 patas merecem.

Name: Healing Arts Animal Care
Description: Healing Arts Animal Care in Beaverton, Oregon provides veterinary acupuncture, pet rehabilitation therapy, physical therapy and athletic conditioning to the dogs and cats of Portland, Oregon. We strive to create a team among you, your pet, your veterinarian and ourselves to create a whole package of care for your pet. Pets come through our door knowing that we’re going to have fun here and this isn’t “another trip to the vet.” Through manual therapies, animal acupuncture, laser, ultrasound, underwater treadmill and creating a tailored individual home exercises, we strive to bring your injured pet back to speed, keep your elderly pet as an active member of the family, return your obese pet back to a functional friend and keep your athletic pet at the peak of his performance.

Name: Kempex Holland BV
Description:
Kempex Holland BV is a leading European distributor of animal feed additives and pharmaceuticals (API) for animal healthcare. 
Founded in 1987, Kempex is serving customers in Europe, Middle East and Globally with quality and safe products – on time, every time. Kempex HQ is based in The Netherlands and we hold office China. 

Our trusted Kempex brand provides a long list of feed additives and a broad range of high quality API. We are qualified and specialized suppliers of more than 200 different products. 
Kempex' portfolio includes all essential and non-essential amino acids, vitamins and trace minerals; veterinary API's such as antimicrobials and coccidostats, as well a a broad range of pharmaceutical APi's.

Please visit our website www.kempex.net for more information or contact us via info@kempex.net (general info) or sales@kempex.net (quotes and orders).

Name: Harvest Veterinary Specialty & Emergency Hospital
Description:
為了進一步提升對動物患者的全面及前瞻性醫療服務，HVOC在2024年再注資超過4,000萬港元的投資，創立了豐盈動物專科及急症醫院（HVSEH），以拓展動物專科及24小時急症服務，致力於為社區的動物提供全方位和高品質的專科獸醫護理。

豐盈動物專科及急症醫院（HVSEH）將作為一所多學科合作醫院，提供24小時急救和深切治療服務。醫院配備先進的醫療設備及技術，並致力於營造一個功能完善且舒適的環境，為急救及轉診動物患者提供周全護理。

感謝大家的支持，我們期待以卓越的服務回饋社區及動物！詳情請留意我們的網站更新！

To further enhance comprehensive and forward-looking medical services for animal patients, HVOC made an additional investment of over HK$40 million in 2024 to establish the Harvest Veterinary Specialty & Emergency Hospital (HVSEH). This new facility expands our specialty and 24-hour emergency services, dedicated to providing a full range of high-quality veterinary care for animals in the community.

 

The Harvest Veterinary Specialty & Emergency Hospital (HVSEH) will operate as a multidisciplinary collaborative hospital, offering 24-hour emergency and critical care services. Equipped with state-of-the-art medical technology and facilities, the hospital is committed to creating a well-equipped and comfortable environment for the comprehensive care of emergency and referral animal patients.

 

Thank you all for your support! We look forward to providing exceptional service to the community and our animal companions. For more details, please stay tuned for updates on our website!

Name: Petsalut, plano de saúde pet
Description:
A Petsalut nasceu da necessidade de criar um ambiente que priorizasse o bem-estar dos animais de estimação e facilitasse a vida dos tutores. 

A ideia surgiu a partir da observação de que muitos tutores enfrentavam desafios na hora de cuidar de seus pets, como encontrar serviços de qualidade e com previsibilidade financeira. 

Com isso, a Petsalut se propôs a oferecer soluções promovendo não apenas a saúde e felicidade dos animais, mas também proporcionando suporte e orientação para os tutores.

Name: DSL UK
Description:
At DSL UK, we take a personal interest in each of our clients, ensuring tailored and effective debt collection services. 

Since our establishment in 2006 in Redditch, Worcestershire, we have built a reputation for being highly receptive to our customers and consistently delivering outstanding results. With over 17 years of service, we emphasise regular communication and a deep understanding of client needs. We combine traditional methods with modern practices, offering innovative and flexible debt collection and tracing absconders services.

Name: Brava
Description:
Brava brings together decades of expertise in veterinary pharmacy and animal health technology to provide best-in-class compounding pharmacy solutions, effortless administration of care, competitive pricing, and dedicated customer service. 
 
Our PCAB-accredited pharmacies - including two sterile compounding facilities - provide a complete formulary, and our team of pharmacists continue to develop innovative preparations for your most complex needs.
 
Brava’s fully-integrated technology platform, powered by Blue Rabbit, offers e-prescribe, PIMS write back, client auto ship, and fast refills to ensure a seamless experience for your medical team and your clients.

Name: European Veterinary Conference Voorjaarsdagen
Description: The annual European Veterinary Conference VOORJAARSDAGEN is the biggest veterinary conference on the European continent and is an initiative of the Netherlands Asso-ciation for Companion Animal Medicine (NACAM) of Royal Netherlands Veterinary Association. NACAM is a founding member of the Federation of European Companion Animal Veterinary Associations (FECAVA) and is a member of the World Small Animal Veterinary Association (WSAVA). The VOORJAARSDAGEN also presents the annual congress of the Netherlands Equine Veterinary Association (NEVA).

Name: Croce Blu Alessandria
Description:
Abbiamo progettato Croce Blu seguendo la stessa logica di un ospedale per le persone, per offrire ai nostri amici animali la migliore assistenza possibile.

Qui, il comfort e la cura degli animali sono garantiti ad ogni livello.

La nostra missione è quella di assicurare la salute e il benessere degli animali da compagnia, creando un ambiente accogliente e familiare e senza dimenticarci le caratteristiche uniche di ognuno di loro. Dal cane al coniglio, dal gatto alla categoria NAC, ogni animale per Croce Blu ha la sua importanza e le sue esigenze. 

Proprio perchè ci siamo prefissati gli obiettivi di qualità, accessibilità e inclusione abbiamo creato un ambiente allo stesso tempo innovativo, moderno dotato di apparecchiature all’avanguardia e tecnologie diagnostiche avanzate, che consentono di effettuare diagnosi precise e tempestive e abbiamo fatto focus sulle necessità uniche come sale d’aspetto e degenze separate tenendo conto dei caratteri sociali e naturali di ogni specie. 

Non abbiamo dimenticato il cuore di Croce Blu: una squadra unica composta da medici e tecnici veterinari altamente qualificati e costantemente aggiornati sulle ultime scoperte e tecniche nel campo della medicina veterinaria.

Name: Pure And Natural Pet
Description:
Pure and Natural Pet is dedicated to delivering the highest quality products using only the best ingredients the Earth has to offer. Our product development team works tirelessly each day to find better ingredients, use renewable and Earth friendly sources, create more effective formulas, and develop innovative products. Our passion is the health and happiness of our 4-legged family members. All of our products are made in the USA, cruelty free, non-toxic and made with food grade ingredients. This passion and philosophy flow through everything we do making it easy to put your pet’s health first.

Our mission is simple: The desire to help pets live longer, healthier lives. Our dedication to quality in both ingredients and manufacturing gives us the ability to ensure that you are using a product with no skin irritants or chemicals, that nature itself designed to be effective and safe.

Discover Pure and Natural Pet, the perfect blend of the Earth’s best providing the safest care for your pets.

All of our products are Made in the USA.  We use American factories that engage in environmentally friendly practices and comply with product quality standards and strict guidelines.

Name: Community Veterinary Medicine
Description:
We are a clinician founded and led general practice hospital located on the Upper West Side of Manhattan in New York City. We provide a broad range of services for cats, dogs and other small animals.

We recently moved into a new, state-of-the art facility built from the ground up to provide leading veterinary services and an optimal work environment for our employees. We provide a caring atmosphere with minimal turnover, consistent volumes, and a high level of medicine. Our facility, culture, technology, and infrastructure provide the ideal environment to practice leading veterinary medicine and best serve our clients and their pets.

Name: Mercordi BV
Description:
Welcome to the forefront of poultry health innovation with Mercordi BV!

Founded in 1999 by visionary field veterinarians who recognized a critical gap in nutritional tools for managing poultry health in antibiotic-poor environments, Mercordi has been pioneering solutions that redefine industry standards.

At Mercordi, we're driven by a relentless commitment to the well-being of poultry and the sustainability of the industry. Our journey began with a simple yet profound mission: to empower poultry producers with cutting-edge functional feed solutions that enhance performance while reducing reliance on antibiotics.

Nestled in Belgium in the heart of Europe, our state-of-the-art production facility stands as a beacon of excellence and ingenuity. Here, meticulous research and development converge with advanced manufacturing processes to craft functional feeds of unparalleled quality and efficacy.

What sets Mercordi apart is our unwavering dedication to collaboration and partnership. We understand the challenges faced by poultry producers around the globe, and it's our privilege to work hand-in-hand with them to deliver tailored solutions that address their specific needs.

Our commitment to excellence extends beyond product development; it's a promise we uphold in every aspect of our operations. From stringent quality control measures to sustainable manufacturing practices, we strive for excellence at every turn.

Join us in reshaping the future of poultry health and performance. With Mercordi as your trusted partner, you'll not only unlock new levels of productivity and profitability but also contribute to a healthier, more sustainable world for generations to come.

Experience the Mercordi difference today and discover a world where innovation knows no bounds. Together, let's soar to new heights in poultry health and prosperity. Welcome to Mercordi BV – where every feed is a testament to our unwavering commitment to excellence.

Name: Haiken
Description: En Haiken observamos, investigamos y creamos soluciones. Desde el año 2020 tenemos el objetivo de acerca la Ciencia a los Médicos Veterinarios aplicando nuestros conocimientos y creatividad en el desarrollo de soluciones biotecnológicas que contribuyan al bienestar de los animales, además de mejorar la calidad de diagnósticos microbiológicos veterinarios y la comunicación con la clínica veterinaria, tratando cada muestra como un paciente.

Name: Junior Vet Hub
Description:
For 9 years, Junior vet has been providing online and onsite continuous veterinary education for vet students and young veterinarians from Romania and nearby countries. We encourage vet people to learn from the best, at the highest standards and at accessible fees, because trying to build a better future through education, is the key. 

Starting with December 2023, the dream came true and Junior Vet Hub, our vet training center was born. Our facility is a vet practice used only for vet education and is equipped accordingly. At every course and workshop, we encourage vet students to volunteer and apply for educational grants. All our events are friendly (we encourage networking), sustainable (trying to respect as much as possible the Reduce-Reuse-Recycle life motto) and at high level content (tutoring is done by interns, residents, specialists and certified experienced vets).  

We also have our own platform of online courses, through which we bring vet education closer to the vet community. We love vet students and young graduates and we are doing our best to feel the pulse of the vet community and offer the help and support they need and want.

Also, we are curious (we ask many questions about how to be successful within the profession), we raise awareness about mental health, we encourage personal development through soft-skills classes and we have fun doing serious stuff. 

Our background is 10+ years of experience in the veterinary community and we are not planning to stop. Thank you for your support.

Name: SKYEVET
Description: SKYEVET is an agency of ER and specialty veterinarians working in concert to aid ER and specialty hospitals throughout the United States.

Name: Connecticut Veterinary Center
Description: Connecticut Veterinary Center is a 24/7, Emergency, Critical Care Referral Hospital

Name: ArkVets
Description:
About ArkVets
At ArkVets, we honor a tradition of compassionate honesty and the gold standard of veterinary care, so you can live your best life with your pet.

Our clinics blend accessible urgent care services with premium-level treatment, creating a welcoming, trustworthy, and distinctive experience for pets and their people. Every visit is rooted in transparency and delivered with Love—because we believe exceptional care should always be within reach.

From general wellness to advanced treatments, we're more than just checkups—we’re your partner through every stage of your pet’s journey.

Name: UVEMA Servicios Veterinarios
Description:
UVEMA Servicios Veterinarios, es una empresa que se encarga de ofrecer un servicio de calidad, cuyo fin es mejorar la atención que las clínicas veterinarias proporcionan a sus clientes.

Disponer de un teléfono de contacto al que los clientes puedan acudir en una situación de "emergencia" es fundamental. En UVEMA, disponemos de un servicio de atención telefónica en el que nuestro equipo de veterinarios y auxiliares especializados se encargarán de la gestión de todas las llamadas, ofreciendo la mejor solución en cada caso. Además, este servicio se encarga, día a día, de realizar seguimiento personalizado, de cada uno de los pacientes que más lo necesita.

En el momento en el que un centro cierra sus puertas, aparecen numerosas situaciones que, sin ser una urgencia, necesitan ser atendidas. Ante este escenario, nuestros técnicos y veterinarios estarán disponibles para ayudar a tus clientes a determinar la severidad de la situación y planear la mejor solución. En muchas ocasiones tan sólo informándoles y tranquilizándoles pueden esperar a acudir a su propio centro al día siguiente, pero en caso necesario nuestro equipo de veterinarios puede intervenir para solucionar cualquier problema que se presente. 

Ofrecer este servicio desde de tu clínica, ayudará a la fidelización de tus clientes generando una mayor sensación de tranquilidad y confianza con su clínica veterinaria.

No dejes a ningún cliente sin atender y ofrecerles un servicio para que se sientan seguros 24 horas/365 días al año!

Name: Pet Instincts
Description:
Pets are complex creatures that require a lot of care and understanding in order for them to stay happy. In the UK alone 2.1 million dogs are left home alone for 5 or more hours on a typical weekday. So much boredom, isolation and under stimulation can have a dramatic impact on a dog’s well-being with 7.2 million dogs in the UK experiencing Separation Anxiety.

Pet Instincts is a London-based Pet-Tech Start-Up developing IOT solutions centred around the mental health and well-being of all animals.

Our current venture is a platform, hardware and software, that bridges the gap between dogs and owners when separated. Enabling owners to monitor and care for their home alone pet.

Name: ლეოპოლდ • Leopold
Description:
If you are located in Georgia,
If you really admire exotic Leopard Bengal cats, then you are at the right place...You are already able to get one of our beauties with every important documentations, vaccinations, parent documents, lower than its market price!

Name: European Veterinary Center
Description: The first veterinary center in Egypt who really cares and uses behavior and nutrition in treatment and to keep your pet healthy as years as he could.

Name: ANAPORC (ASOCIACION DE PORCINOCULTURA CIENTIFICA
Description:
Promover la expansión de conocimientos en todos los aspectos de la ciencia e industria porcina.
Editar una revista sobre investigación y divulgación porcina,
Cooperar con otras Asociaciones y organizaciones nacionales e internacionales 
Representar a todos los profesionales y veterinarios del sector porcino
Desde 1980, con sede itinerante por toda España, se organiza anualmente el Simposio/Congreso Anaporc

Name: Hotel for Homeless Dogs (New England Humane Society)
Description: We are a state-of-the-art animal care facility and adoption center. The Hotel offers a place of warmth, love and healing. We save animals from high-kill areas and bring them to New England where they can start their new lives. We survive purely on the generous donations of our supporters. Please consider making a donation or joining our No Place Like Home Program.

Name: Vestjyske Dyrlæger ApS
Description:
Vestjyske Dyrlæger er lokaliseret i Nr. Nebel, nord for Varde.
 Vores smådyrs dyrlæger favner i bredeste forstand familidyrenes liv fra første sundhedstjek til seniordyrene.
I den udkørende landpraksis varetager vi alle former for akutarbejde og sundhedsrådgivning hos kvæg, svin og mink. Landpraksis er også medlem af netværket - Dyrlæger og Ko - der arbejder professionelt med sundhedsrådgivning i kvægbesætninger og efteruddannelse af dyrlæger.
Vagten køres i samarbejde med nabopraksis i Ølgod.

Name: Sanidad Urbana y Agropecuaria
Description: Nos hemos enfocado en brindar las mejores soluciones en sanidad animal y nutrición de grandes y pequeñas especies. Somos distribuidores autorizados de productos de la mejor calidad por su respaldo mundial en investigación y resultados probados. Hoy hemos crecido, hemos expandido y estamos consolidando una empresa, sana, rentable y profesional con el soporte de las marcas reconocidas mundialmente como Elanco (Bayer), Purina, MSD, Impotrade y Waggy´s  con las cuales mantenemos alianzas actualmente.
Location: Veracruz, Veracruz de Ignacio de la Llave

Name: Centre Clinic Veterinari de Lleida i Segrià
Description:
El Centre Clinic Veterinari de Lleida tiene abiertas sus nuevas instalaciones desde Junio del 2009 en la calle Taquígrafo Martín n° 13, pero fue fundado como tal en el año 1991 fruto de la asociación de dos clínicas veterinarias ya existentes en esta ciudad.

Ofrecemos la mayor superficie clínica y hospitalaria de Lleida, con el fin de proporcionar la más amplia oferta de servicios veterinarios para conseguir la excelencia en el cuidado de la salud de nuestras mascotas. La innovación y el desarrollo de nuevas tecnologías en el diagnóstico y tratamientos veterinarios y la formación continuada de nuestro personal son nuestros argumentos.

El cariño, en el manejo y en el cuidado de las mascotas es nuestra norma tal y como nuestros clientes conocen y aprecian.

Name: Lahore Division Cattle Market Management Company
Description: Lahore Division Cattle Market Management Company (LDCMMC) is a company incorporated under Section 42 of the Companies Ordinance, 1984 by the Government of Punjab with the mandate to standardize and modernize the cattle markets and trading business for improving the quality of cattle, cattle tracking and focus on exports to other countries. Furthermore, to eliminate extortion, distortion, corruption and to minimize the role of middle man.

Name: Fourlimb Surgical Solutions
Description:
As a surgeon, the care of the animals entrusted to you is literally in your hands. 
At Fourlimb, that knowledge is at the forefront of everything we do. 
Central to our privately owned business is years of clinical in-practice experience.
Well-forged relationships with domestic and international suppliers and consultants means a direct link to world class products and expertise.
Our carefully chosen portfolio of products is designed to assist you as a surgeon and the animals you treat.
Coupled with our personal support and training opportunities, consider us your most reliable surgical solution.

Name: AMOUR CANIN
Description: Amour Canin , entreprise spécialisée dans les services auprès des animaux. Offre aux propriétaires canins et aux institutionnels des services de toilettage, pension, dressage, nutrition, ventes d'accessoires et vente de chiens et chats.

Name: PupPilot
Description:
PupPilot is an AI front office platform for veterinary clinics and pet care businesses.

We help teams reduce friction, eliminate repetitive administrative work, and keep front office workflows running smoothly using AI-driven orchestration.

We build our products with a core belief that AI should support people—not replace them—giving teams visibility, control, and confidence in every outcome.

Founded by a veterinarian–software engineer and a multi-exited AI founder, PupPilot was built from firsthand experience with the challenges of running a pet care front office.

Name: VET House Animal Clinic
Description: 24H Animal Practice in Garopaba

Name: My Pet Bowl app
Description: Pawsitive Plan is a free, non-biased platform that uses vet-sourced data to personalise top nutrition plans for your pet.

Name: AGROVET ANIMAL HEALTH
Description: Agrovet Animal Health Austria is a manufacturer of feed additives with headquarters in Vienna,Austria. Agrovet has a network of distribution and aims to be the leading player in supplying high performance natural feed additives – enhancing health, growth and sustainability in the Live Stock industry in the world, we offer full technical support for our range of products by professionals for the respective industry.

Name: Visco4Dogs GbR
Description: Weil uns die Gesundheit Ihres Hundes wichtig ist! Bettenhaus Traumhund steht für hoch qualitative, handgenähte, orthopädische Hundebetten, Hundematten und Hundekissen aus original medizinischem Visco-Schaum, sowie dazu passende Inkontinenzbezüge und Hundedecken (auch für medizinische Anwendung) Das Kontaktliegen bei Hunden und die richtige Schlafposition tragen maßgeblich zur Gesundheit Ihres Hundes bei und beugen Arthrose vor. Ob drinnen oder draußen, fürs Restaurant, das Auto, große oder kleine Vierbeiner, die Visco4Dogs GbR bietet individuell angepasste Produkte an. Eine breite Auswahl an Farben, Materialien und Mustern steht in unserem Shop bereit, Oeko-Tex Standard 100 zertifiziert, schadstoffgeprüft und nachhaltig.

Name: Global Pharma Vet - Manipulação Veterinária
Description: A Global Pharma VET é uma empresa inovadora e especializada em manipulação de fórmulas veterinárias, oferecendo aos animais de estimação formas farmacêuticas diferenciadas, tais como: cosméticos, shampoo, cremes, pomadas, loção, cosméticos orais, pasta oral, gomas, cápsulas, biscoitos medicamentosos, xarope e suspensão, todos com os mais variados sabores, proporcionando maior aceitação pelos animais e melhores resultados nos tratamentos ministrados pelo médico veterinário.

Name: Vet Pharma Trading Co (Pakistan)
Description: Vet Pharma is a dynamic and innovative Pharmaceutical company working closely with Poultry and Cattle Industry.

Name: Petsalut Plano Pet
Description:
Na Petsalut, acreditamos que os pets são mais do que apenas animais de estimação; eles são parte vital de nossas famílias e nos trazem alegria, amor e companheirismo incondicional. Por isso, nossa missão é garantir que eles tenham a melhor vida possível, repleta de saúde e felicidade.

Sabemos que a prevenção é a chave para alcançar uma vida longa e saudável, e é por isso que estamos comprometidos em oferecer planos de saúde que priorizam o cuidado preventivo. Desde consultas regulares, vacinação até a detecção precoce de doenças, cada serviço é pensado para proteger e prolongar a vida do seu pet.

Nosso compromisso vai além dos serviços; ele se estende à construção de uma comunidade onde tutores e pets tenham acesso a informações confiáveis e apoio contínuo. Juntos, podemos transformar o cuidado com os pets, garantindo que eles vivam vidas plenas ao nosso lado.

Na Petsalut, cuidamos de cada pet com a mesma dedicação e amor que você dedica a eles. Porque para nós, cada pet merece não apenas viver, mas viver bem.

Our primary programs and services include:
•  Pet Food Bank - Feeding approx. 500 animals in the Greater Kalamazoo area each day

•  Dog Houses - We provide shelter and straw for outdoor pets in our communities

Name: Second Nature Behaviour
Description:
On veterinary referral, Second Nature Behaviour helps pets and their owners better understand each other, using reward- and evidence-based techniques. We provide expert advice and support with behaviour problems such as: aggression, phobias, overexcitability, compulsive disorders, age-related conditions and inappropriate elimination, destruction or vocalisations.

We counsel for dogs, cats and parrots in and around the Midlands, primarily through home visits and behaviour clinics. Each individual and their family is provided with extensive ongoing tailored support specific to their issues and circumstances. We are here to listen and work with you to find a kind, realistic solution. Having attained exceptional academic qualifications and extensive practical experience, Second Nature Behaviour is fully insured and committed to the highest ethical standards set by the profession.  

Second Nature Behaviour is also passionate about developing the next generation of clinical animal behaviourists.  So we mentor pet behaviour students working towards independent accreditation by the CCAB Certification.  This allows them to eventually become fully qualified members of practitioner trade bodies, such as the Fellowship of Animal Behaviour Clinicians, thereby allowing registration with the overarching regulatory body, the Animal Behaviour and Training Council.

Our Veterinary Behaviourists and Clinical Animal Behaviourists will travel to see cases approximately 1½ hours' drive from Birmingham. This includes the West Midlands, Shropshire, Worcestershire, Warwickshire, Staffordshire, Leicestershire, Northamptonshire and South Derbyshire.

Name: Rhinebeck Equine
Description:

The practice was founded in the 1940s by Dr. Kenneth Gumaer and began its equine focus in 1967 when Dr. Paul Mountan joined Dr. Ronnie Miller. Renamed Rhinebeck Equine in 1996, the practice’s veterinarians have been providing quality care to the equine population of New York’s Hudson Valley for over 50 years. This experienced and trusted practice has progressively grown into a comprehensive ambulatory and referral clinic with twelve veterinarians, five intern veterinarians, and over 30 support staff.
The Rhinebeck Equine LLP team offers a full spectrum of services to horses of all breeds, providing comprehensive equine health care, including services in the areas of surgery, sport horse care, lameness evaluations, pre-purchase exams, reproduction, neonatal care, internal medicine, ophthalmology, dentistry, and wellness care.
Our referral hospital is staffed by board-certified specialists in equine surgery, internal medicine, theriogenology (reproduction), ophthalmology, dermatology, interns, and a team of highly experienced support personnel. Name: Mbwa Wa Africa Animal Rescue
Description:
•	Founded in 2013, Mbwa Wa Africa (Dogs of Africa) Animal Rescue is a non-profit organisation based in Usa River, Tanzania, with a registered charity in Scotland under the Name of Friends of Mbwa Wa Africa with the charity number SC045521
•	Whilst Tanzania is famed for its wild animals little or no provision is made for its domestic and companion animal populations.  Education and health care for human beings is amongst the most neglected on the continent.  
•	Animal welfare education does not feature and cases of abuse and neglect are constantly seen.  
•	The population at large does not have the tools to understand that healthy happy animals lead to healthier happier communities.
•	In urban areas such as Meru District of Arusha almost all households have one or 2 dogs which are seldom vaccinated or neutered and live under harsh conditions which reflect not only the owners’ poverty but their ignorance of basic animal husbandry. 
•	Improved livelihoods are reflected in an uncontrollable increase in dog populations and there is no mechanism for reproduction control.  
•	Rabies is common and packs of feral dogs roam the streets at night.  
•	Veterinary services available to livestock are rudimentary but are greater than those available to companion animals.  There is a dire need for such services. 
•	Current dog population control by the city authorities is done by mass poisonings and shooting. 
•	Municipalities lack the funding to carry out their duty of rabies vaccination.  
•	Dogs in Tanzania are used as household guards. Most citizens perceive that dogs needs to be incarcerated because they are vicious and need to remain so in order to deter intruders. 
•	Mbwa Wa Africa was founded to help address companion animal welfare needs in the community, with a spay/neuter programme, a community and schools education programme and a rescue and rehoming programme.  
•	It runs the only rescue kennels in the region.

Description:

AsturBiotech cuenta con un equipo técnico propio, altamente cualificado y dispone de los últimos avances tecnológicos, con el fin de ofrecer una respuesta eficaz a nuestros potenciales clientes ASTURBIOTECH dispone de tres laboratorios:
Laboratorio FIV
Producción de embriones in vitro, a partir de ovocitos procedentes de la punción de ovarios de animales vivos, por técnica de OVUM-PICK UP, así como de ovocitos procedentes de ovarios de matadero, para la producción de los embriones terapéuticos y su puesta en el campo, tanto en fresco como en congelado, por el método de puesta directa para solucionar problemas reproductivos en animales con problemas reproductivos. También contamos con servicios de rescate genético para animales de alto mérito genético sacrificados de urgencia. Este laboratorio procesará tanto los ovocitos propios como los de cualquier otro equipo profesional que lo pudiera demandar.
Laboratorio de Bioquímica y Biología Molecular
El laboratorio de Bioquímica y Biología Molecular pondrá a disposición de sus usuarios el diagnóstico de enfermedades infecciosas, parasitarias, genéticas, etc., mediante técnicas RT-PCR y ELISA. 
Laboratorio de Microbiología
En este laboratorio se llevarán a cabo cultivos y análisis microbiológicos de muestras de origen animal complementando los diagnósticos moleculares realizados en el laboratorio de Bioquímica y Biología Molecular, complementando de ese modo la gama de pruebas diagnósticas ofrecidas por AsturBiotech

Name: CEALVET
Description: Gut health is of major importance in animals. The gastrointestinal mucosa is the first tissue that comes in contact with dietary constituents. Anything that affects the health of the gut will influence the animal as a whole, and consequently alter its nutrient uptake and requirements. LICUICEL or PROCELFEED range products help in a sustainable poultry production to secure intestinal health, minimizing the enviromental impact, improving animal welfare and letting the birds perform to their maximum Improvements in growth performance observed in broilers fed butyrate and essential oils may be attributed to a lower inflamatory response to nutritional, enviromental and immune challenges associated with improved digestibility and absortion of dietary nutrients.

The Veterinary Technician who becomes certified as a VTS (Anesthesia) demonstrates superior knowledge in the care and management of anesthesia cases.  Certification as a VTS (Anesthesia) promotes patient safety, consumer protection, professionalism and excellence in anesthesia care.  The Veterinary Anesthesia arena is constantly evolving, thus, the attainment of competence is a continual activity.

KVOS provides comprehensive consulting, support, and fractional management services —giving your leadership flexible access to executive-level operational and financial expertise. We offer strategic solutions that move practices beyond day-to-day management.

We bridge the gap between patient care and practice success  using deep, proven expertise:
- Credentialed Trust: Led by an MBA and a Credentialed Veterinary Technician licensed in five states
- Dual Expertise: Over two decades of operational knowledge from both corporate veterinary medicine and external business sectors
- Financial Command: Utilize experience in P&L review, invoicing, and A/P-A/R management to strengthen financial health
- Zero-Disruption: Proven ability to manage inventory and equipment during critical staffing gaps, ensuring operational continuity

Name: PetCheck 24/7 Vets & App
Description:
PetCheck is the easy-to-use app for Apple and Android devices that allows users to keep all of their pet’s vital information in one place along with vet appointments, contact details, treatment plans and more!

As a responsible pet owner, you know how important it is to keep your vet informed of your pet’s vital information such as age, injuries and vaccination history but how often do you have it to hand in an emergency or visit? Thanks to VetCheck - the answer is always! VetCheck is the easy-to-use app for Apple and Android devices that allows users to keep all of their pet’s vital information in one place along with vet appointments, contact details, treatment plans and more!

VetCheck is suitable for any kind of pet from dog, cat, horse, fish to anything rarer or more exotic. Created by a qualified vet, you can be assured that the information is correct, up to date, relevant and useful in helping you care for your pets. 

Are you worried about your pet but can't get to the vet clinic? Now you can get veterinary advice from a VetCheck 24/7 Vet, when you need it without leaving your home with a Medechat Video Consultation. Perfect for general and after hours advice, initial consultations or any behavioural issues you are experiencing.

Name: Loved Veterinary Services
Description: At Loved Vet Care, we understand that saying goodbye to a beloved pet can be an emotional and difficult time. That’s why we are proud to offer compassionate end-of-life care services for your furry family member. Our experienced team of veterinarians provides gentle, dignified in-home euthanasia & quality of life assessment services in the comfort of your own home, ensuring your family and loved one receive the respect and deliberate care you deserve. We also offer aftercare services such as cremation and memorialization, and complimentary grief counseling and support resources to help you cope with the loss of your pet. Name: MiraVista Veterinary Diagnostics
Description: MiraVista Veterinary Diagnostics is headquartered in Indianapolis, Indiana. We are an expert in fungal infection diagnostics for animal populations. Our organization meets the most stringent regulatory requirements for infectious disease control, workplace safety, materials handling, specimen integrity, documentation and environmental responsibility. We are one of the very few veterinary reference laboratories with certification by the College of American Pathologists (CAP) and Clinical Laboratory Improvement Amendments of 1998 (CLIA). The company was founded in 2002 by the renowned infectious disease scientist, Dr. Lawrence Joseph Wheat, whose groundbreaking research contributions resulted in the development of the first histoplasmosis antigen test in 1986. Today, MiraVista Veterinary Diagnostics serves veterinary practitioners throughout the U.S., Canada and worldwide, processing thousands of tests per year for serious fungal infections. This includes antigen and antibody detection tests for Blastomyces, Histoplasma, Cryptococcus, Coccidioides and Aspergillus. To set up an account & order tests, call 888-841-8387 or visit www.MiraVistaVets.com.

Name: SONHAR
Description:
SONHAR a été créée en septembre 2020 à Ecully par les docteurs Sonet et Harel.
Le Dr Harel est diplômé du collège européen d’imagerie médicale, et le Dr Sonet a été enseignante pendant de nombreuses années à l’école vétérinaire de Lyon (VetAgro-Sup) au service d’imagerie.
 
SONHAR est né d’un désir de travailler en partenariat avec les vétérinaires généralistes, pour leur proposer une expertise en imagerie médicale. Il s’agit du seul cabinet d’imagerie médical vétérinaire exclusivement consacré à cette discipline.
 
L’activité se décompose en trois services :
Le premier est la lecture de radiographie envoyée par des confrères via leur site internet (téléradiologie). 
Le second est la réalisation d’échographies et actes échoguidés divers (cytoponctions, biopsies) directement au cabinet d’Ecully, sur référé de confrères/consoeurs.
 Le troisième est la mise en place de formation en imagerie médicale destinées aux vétérinaires qui souhaitent approfondir leurs connaissances dans cette discipline.

Name: Flex Vet Staffing
Description:
FlexVet Staffing is a new kind of veterinary staffing partner — built by people who care about people, not just a platform. We connect veterinarians, vet techs, and animal hospitals across the U.S. with a focus on trust, flexibility, and balance.

We know relief work and staffing can feel stressful: hospitals scrambling to cover shifts, professionals juggling demanding schedules, and everyone stretched too thin. That’s where FlexVet Staffing comes in. We’re here to make the process simpler, more human, and better for both sides.

For veterinary professionals, FlexVet Staffing means freedom. Set your own schedule, choose where you want to work, and enjoy quick, reliable pay. Whether you’re looking to protect your work-life balance, supplement your income, or explore new clinics, we’ll help you do it — without the burnout.

For hospitals, FlexVet Staffing brings peace of mind. Every veterinarian and vet tech in our network is carefully vetted to ensure they fit your needs and values. Whether you need short-term relief shifts or long-term placements, we’ll connect you with professionals you can trust, so your team can stay supported and your patients cared for.

We may be new, but we’re driven by something timeless: treating people with respect. At FlexVet Staffing, we’re reimagining staffing with a personal touch — because veterinary medicine deserves better.

Work when, where, and how you want.

Nuestro equipo veterinario multidisciplinar está especializado en las distintas áreas de la medicina y cirugía canina y felina. Contamos con especialistas en diagnóstico por imagen, cirugía de tejidos blandos, anestesia, hospitalización y medicina interna de pequeños animales.
Como veterinarios buscamos eficacia y precisión en nuestro trabajo, por ello, nuestro equipo veterinario se encuentra en permanente formación y especialización.
Nuestra filosofía es practicar la medicina veterinaria de manera cercana y personal, procurando que las mascotas y sus propietarios tengan una experiencia lo más agradable posible junto a nosotros en nuestra clínica veterinaria en C/ ALCOR 8, ALCALA DE HENARES, Madrid.
Location: Alcalá de Henares, Comunidad de Madrid

Name: SAPV - société d'actions et de promotion vétérinaires
Description:
La SAPV regroupe des services et des produits dont a besoin le vétérinaire en clientèle. Ses missions sont de :
- Fournir du matériel : puces électroniques et objets connectés liés à l’identification , passeports, imprimés réglementaires, et ordonnances , enseignes et signalétique
- Proposer des services externalisés : radioprotection (PCR externe, assistance à la PCR), rédaction des documents réglementaires (tels que dossier de déclaration ASN, dossier d’autorisation ASN, conformité de l’installation radiologique, document unique d’évaluation des risques professionnels) ou imprimés sur mesure
La SAPV est également gestionnaire (DSP) du fichier IFAP

Name: ELOAQUA Consulting, Research and Solutions in Aquaculture
Description:
We are an independent Research and Development (R&D) service provider, offering high-quality professional R&D services for the aquaculture sector.

We focus on the evaluation, development, and transfer of new technologies and processes in the field of fish production, collaborating with companies in the aquaculture sector to develop, test, and validate new nutritional additives and feeds.

Name: Gateway Veterinary Services
Description:
At Gateway Veterinary Services, we offer full service animal hospital care and will take both emergency cases as well as less urgent medical, surgical, and dental issues. Our licensed team is experienced and trained in all types of conditions and treatments. Beyond our AAHA accredited first rate pet care, we make our clinic comfortable, kid-friendly, and a very calm environment so your pet can relax in the waiting room and look forward to meeting their Gateway Veterinary Services veterinarian and team. 
Our team of vets, vet techs, vet assistants, kennel assistants, client services reps and management all work together to provide a top quality service experience for you and your animals. At Gateway Veterinary Services, we treat your pets as if they were our own.

Check us out online at www.gatewayvet.ca.

Victor Kernaleguen DVM & Janine Kernaleguen RVT VPM | Gateway Veterinary Services | 1 (844) 752-7387

710 Hamilton Ave W Melfort, Saskatchewan S0E 1A0

Name: Vets4Pets Adelaide
Description:
Vets4Pets was founded in 1972 and has grown to provide a wide range of small animal veterinary care in Adelaide, through seven convenient locations in Adelaide’s north eastern suburbs.

We are dedicated to small animal veterinary care and seek to offer pets and owners large practice resources combined with personal veterinary care.

Every Vets4Pets local practice offers modern equipment and highly trained people who love animals. We believe in offering the best in general veterinary care at reasonable prices.

Name: RadsForVets
Description: RadsForVets is a pioneering teleradiology company dedicated to revolutionizing veterinary healthcare through innovation and collaboration. By prioritizing people and leveraging advanced technology, we empower our team of highly skilled professionals to deliver exceptional service and contribute to improved patient outcomes. Our commitment to excellence is reflected in our intuitive, streamlined, and continuously evolving technology solution, which facilitates efficient and accurate interpretation. Through our collaborative approach, we strive to foster strong relationships with veterinarians, enabling them to make informed decisions and provide optimal care for their patients.

Name: bio3Dtech
Description:
Bio3Dvet is a  tech company founded in 2018 in Ioannina, Greece. Bio3Dvet is an innovator in the veterinary field providing advanced orthopedic services based on state-of-the-art technological solutions. Bio3Dvet’s professional team consists of orthopedic veterinarians and engineers. Our cutting-edge solutions are based on CAD Systems, 3D printing & 3D scanning technology as well as custom-fabricated orthotics and prosthetics devices for our four-legged friends. Our target is to provide personalized medical care during minimally invasive to optimize surgical procedures for all our little patients who need it.

Bio3Dvet’s innovative services include custom-made surgical guides (front & hind limb, Spinal stabilization, HIF/IOHC), custom-made implants (Intraosseous Transcutaneous Amputation Prosthesis-ITAP, Craniomaxillofacial plates, PGR implants), individual anatomical bones and custom-made Orthotics and Prosthetics devices for pre-post and lifetime animal support.
Bio3Dvet help vets move forward through innovative technological solutions.

Name: Oakham Veterinary Hospital
Description:
Oakham Veterinary Hospital is a long established practice on the outskirts of Oakham, Rutland.  Our premises are purpose built and set in 8.5 acres surrounded by rural countryside.

We have extensive hospital facilities and diagnostic equipment in both our equine and small animal departments.  Our experienced and caring teams of vets, nurses and support staff offer a complete veterinary service from routine examinations, vaccinations, visits, etc. to specialist surgery with the very latest 'state of the art' equipment. 

We are dedicated to deliver the very best of veterinary care and service and are proud to have a Tier 3 hospital status, accredited by the Royal College of Veterinary Surgeons.  We also have a clinical association with the University of Nottingham School of Veterinary Medicine and Science giving us access to the expertise from leading veterinary specialists.

Name: Calusa Veterinary Center
Description:
Calusa Veterinary Center is one of Southeast Florida's largest veterinary practices, focused on general practice and referral veterinary services. Operating 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year, our facility and veterinary team provides patients with compassionate care, personalized treatments and unparalleled service. 

Recognized for our array of advanced diagnostic and surgical capabilities, we are regularly referred cases by veterinarians in our community in need of a second opinion or second set of hands. With over 125 years of combined veterinary experience, our talented doctors are able to care for animals in specialty areas such as advanced dentistry, hyperbaric oxygen therapy, physical rehabilitation & aquatic therapy, critical care & ultrasound, cardiology and neurology. Our Barker Raton Pet Resort also offers luxurious overnight boarding accommodations for pets and a wide variety of grooming services.

Name: JouwDierenartsAanHuis
Description: Een dierenarts aan huis bespaart uw huisdier een hoop stress; geen spannende ritjes naar de dierenarts, reismandjes, wachtkamers of een vreemde spannende omgeving. Het onderzoek en de behandeling vinden rustig plaats in de vertrouwde omgeving van uw huisdier. Ideaal voor baasje en huisdier!

Name: Colegio de Veterinarios de Alicante
Description:
Te damos la bienvenida al Ilustre Colegio Oficial de Veterinarios de Alicante.
Nuestra organización fue declarada oficial en el año 1905 con el objetivo de reunir una asociación de veterinarios en todo el territorio de la Provincia de Alicante, contribuir al progreso científico de la asociación y velar por la defensa de los derechos profesionales.

Queremos que este nuevo canal en Linkedin sea una vía para conectar veterinarios y ciudadanos, así como informar a ambos grupos sobre noticias relevantes sobre medicina animal, producción de alimentos, seguridad alimentaria y crear conciencia sobre la labor veterinaria en la sociedad.

Os invitamos a participar de las actividades que desde el Colegio promovemos y a hacer uso de las instalaciones que tenemos en exclusiva para nuestros veterinarios colegiados. Igualmente os agradecemos cualquier tipo de sugerencia.

Name: Animates Vet Care Multispeciality Hospital
Description:
Animal Vet Care Hospital (AVC Hospital) is one of its kind Veterinary hospital in gurugram with a panel of  specialized doctors having advance diagnostic tools like IDEXX laboratory , Digital Radiography, ECG, Ultrasonography, Dental X-Ray unit and well equipped OT  to revolutionize animal healthcare in India.
 At AVC Pet Hospital, we offer a comprehensive range of facilities to ensure the best care for your pets like routine OPD, Vaccinations, minor to major Surgeries, Hospitalisation. 
We also provide basic amenities like Grooming parlour ,Pet shop and Fully air conditioned boarding for dog and cat.

Name: Beach Animal Rehabilitation Center
Description:
Beach Animal Rehabilitation Center (BARC) is a specialty clinic aimed at helping pets live longer, healthier lives by treating them using a holistic approach combining both Eastern and Western medicine techniques.  Rehabilitation is performed by a combination of caring, qualified veterinarians and physical therapists specifically certified in this growing field.  Treatment can include acupuncture, physical therapy modalities such as LASER, therapeutic ultrasound, manual therapies as well as exercise, nutrition, supplements and other state of the art technologies designed to provide pain relief, aid in recovery and provide overall improved functional mobility.

Rehabilitation is beneficial in treating many conditions including:
Arthritis, post-surgical treatment, accidents or trauma, pain, gait abnormalities, hip or elbow dysplasia, knee injuries, disc disease, un-diagnosed lameness, age related issues, weight loss/gain.

Name: Florens Dierenziekenhuis
Description: Dé zelfstandige 24/7 spoed- en verwijskliniek

Name: Metairie Small Animal Hospital
Description:
Originally named Metry Animal Hospital, the practice was founded by Dr. Tom Melius in 1946. In 1952, Metairie Small Animal Hospital was built at its present location at 101 Metairie Road. One year later, in 1953, Dr. Henry Melius joined the practice, and from such humble beginnings, MSAH has evolved and grown to keep pace with the ever-increasing technology and medical advances. The practice currently has 15 doctors and over 80 employees on staff. In addition to the Main Hospital on Metairie Road, we also operate four Out Patient Clinics in Metairie, Kenner, Lakeview, Freret Street, and the Marigny to better serve our clients. Our Clinics offer a wide variety of services including doctor's office hours, bathing, grooming, food sales and more.

Metairie Small Animal Hospital is open 24 hours a day, seven days a week for all of your emergency care needs, including all holidays. Our Main Hospital is fully equipped to handle even the most severe emergencies, so please do not hesitate to call us at any time to speak with a doctor about your concerns.

Name: Vetora Waikato
Description: Providing vet services for over 75 years, we are a not-for-profit farmer-owned cooperative that specialises in providing expert and friendly support to our members. Our group of clinics offer our families and farmers a focused team of professionals with both practical and technical expertise in looking after your farm animals and pets.

Name: Pick The Brain
Description:
Founded in 2013, VMD Technology is a free website for veterinary professionals covering all things technology in the pursuit of better animal health care.

For lack of a better term, it is technically a “blog” on all things technology in veterinary medicine.

From discussions about phones and tablets, to veterinary “apps”, to website links, to useful spreadsheets, to practice management software, to tech tools for your hospital, to cutting edge ways to continue your education, we hope to provide an organized space for the technology that exists to help us care for our animal patients.

Veterinary medicine is advancing faster than most can keep up. We have more to know and more tools to use than ever before. Thankfully, technology has advanced as well.

The goal of the site is to help veterinary professionals everywhere keep all that knowledge more accessible so that we can provide the best care possible.

We promise to keep it simple, practical, and current. The hope is that you will be able to take some of our ideas, and share some of yours, so that this website can grow into a useful resource.

Name: The Animal Keeper
Description:
Serving North San Diego County, Encinitas, Oceanside, Poway, Del Mar, Fallbrook and surrounding cities, we offer Pet Boarding, Day Camp, Play Time, Grooming, Training and more for your beloved pets!

Choosing comfortable kennel quarters for your pet while you’re away is a difficult process. We consider your pet part of our family. With four convenient Southern California locations to serve you, we invite you to tour our “home away from home”, and meet the staff. Our passion is providing your best friend the best possible care in a professional, safe, clean and loving environment. To insure availability, the Animal Keeper recommends advanced reservations.

Since 1979, we’ve been the leader in specialized pet care and hope to see you and your pet soon at the Animal Keeper.

Name: Welpen Centro Veterinário
Location: São Leopoldo, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Vitelvet
Description:
Vitelvet est un réseau de vétérinaires spécialisés dans le Veau de Boucherie.
Le réseau regroupe les groupes : Anibio, Chêne vert et Clair matin.
Nous sommes présents sur une grande partie du territoire français et nous suivons de nombreux types d'élevages de veaux différents (veau sur paille, DAL, Caillebotis). Ces particularités nous permettent d'avoir une expertise importante que nous mettons au service de nos clients.

Name: Adm Animal Health Nutrition
Description: Livestock feed and nutrition and suppliments.

Name: Dog Walker & Pet Sitter
Description:
I'm here to take your dog for a walk, for a good play time and all the care he needs to make him happy and healthy! I also have Pet Sitter service. And the best part is: I'm available to travel to any corner of the world! Lets go!
Don't forget to check my website, a Facebook Page, where I post new things every week! If you're thirsty for some knowledge about dog caring, some interesting tips and awesome recipe treats, you definitely have to check it out!

Name: Woovet
Description: Meet Woovet the cloud veterinary software that speaks your language, delivers 360 clinic performance insights and streamlines your practice with ease. Your ultimate veterinary companion.

Name: Havepharm
Description:
Στόχος του Συνδέσμου Αντιπροσώπων Εισαγωγέων και Παρασκευαστών Κτηνιατρικών Φαρμάκων και των εταιρειών-μελών του είναι η ανάπτυξη, παραγωγή και ορθή προώθηση παλαιοτέρων, νέων καθώς και βελτιωμένων κτηνιατρικών προϊόντων για τον έλεγχο, την πρόληψη και τη θεραπεία ασθενειών των ζώων, με την συνεχή τήρηση της ισχύουσας Ευρωπαϊκής και Εθνικής Νομοθεσίας, συμβάλλοντας κατ΄ αυτόν τον τρόπο στη βελτίωση της καλής διαβίωσης των ζώων και στην ενίσχυση της Εθνικής Οικονομίας.

Ο Σύνδεσμος μας έχοντας επίγνωση της σημασίας της διατήρησης της εμπιστοσύνης του κοινού χάρις στην υπεύθυνη συμπεριφορά των εταιρειών-μελών του από τα στάδια ανάπτυξης και παραγωγής μέχρι την προώθηση και τη διανομή των προϊόντων τους, και από τη διαφανή ανταλλαγή πληροφοριών με τα αρμόδια όργανα, προχωρά στην υιοθέτηση γενικών αρχών και κατευθυντήριων οδηγιών οι οποίες αφορούν ένα μεγάλο εύρος των δραστηριοτήτων των εταιρειών-μελών. Ειδικότερα οι διατάξεις του σχετικού Κώδικα Δεοντολογίας του Συνδέσμου  διέπουν την αλληλεπίδραση των εταιρειών-μελών με τους Ε.Υ., την διοργάνωση επιστημονικών εκδηλώσεων, την εν γένει προώθηση των προϊόντων που εμπίπτουν στο πεδίο εφαρμογής του, την διαφήμιση στο κοινό, πάντα με γνώμονα και προς υποστήριξη της ισχύουσας οικείας νομοθεσίας.

Ο Σύνδεσμος, μέσω και του Κώδικα Δεοντολογίας του, έχει ως σκοπό την πρόβλεψη και οριοθέτηση κοινών γενικών αρχών και κανόνων για όλες τις εταιρείες-μέλη του, οι οποίες αποτελούν νομικά πρόσωπα που ασκούν εντός Ελλάδας εμπορική, συμβουλευτική ή τεχνική δραστηριότητα ως αντιπρόσωποι, παρασκευαστές και εισαγωγείς κτηνιατρικών φαρμάκων και συμπληρωμάτων ζωοτροφών, καθώς και συναφών προϊόντων.

Name: Animalicos Hospital de Día
Description: Servicios Veterinarios Integrales, dedicados a la Medicina y Cirugía Veterinaria. Especialistas en Cirugía y Traumatología.

Name: Poplité Architecture
Description:
Poplité Architecture est née de la collaboration entre Romain NEMOZ, vétérinaire, et Laure BLANCO, architecte.

Ensemble, nous allions nos expertises pour conseiller les vétérinaires sur des plans de conception ou d’aménagement de leur clinique. Nous les accompagnons dès leurs premières réflexions jusqu’à leur entrée dans les lieux. 

Notre compréhension du métier nous permet de leur proposer des environnements ergonomiques et accueillants pour leurs équipes et leurs patients à 4 pattes.

Name: Affordable Pet Labs
Description: We are: A modern approach to Pet Diagnostics that puts pet parents in charge of their pet’s care. Affordable Pet Labs team of veterinary technicians provide innovative in-home access to diagnostic testing. Our highly skilled pet care team always includes two team members and collects lab samples with less stress in the comfort of the pet’s home. With these in-home services offer nearly all lab testing and provide custom panels for our partners. We also deliver easy to use fecal and urine test kits directly to the home for fast and convenient monitoring. Our service is convenient, easy and affordable. Affordable Pet Labs uses nationally respected veterinary reference labs and there are no surprise charges, our list price is all-inclusive of the test, home visit, and the technicians.

Name: AvianDoc
Description: AvianDoc take shape from a project of Dr. Tommaso Collarile: an established veterinarian in the field of avian medicine and known both nationally and internationally. From May 2020 the main place of business is located inside one of the most important veterinary centers in the capital and beyond: Ospedale Veterinario Gregorio VII. The project develop from both a structural and professional point of view with state-of-the-art equipment and through the interaction between excellences from different sectors. AvianDoc also generously and actively deals with dissemination and teaching. The second pillar of the project is the young Dr. Ciro Cococcetta. Dr. Cococcetta has channeled his immense passion into a courageous project, that of pursuing the European College in Avian medicine (ECZM), one of the most prestigious titles in the field, to date not yet boasted by any colleague in Italy.

Name: Alpharetta Veterinary Specialty & Emergency
Description:
Now Open in Alpharetta, GA!

At Alpharetta Veterinary Specialty & Emergency (AVSE), it is our priority to be a trusted veterinary provider for emergency, surgical, and specialty services.

Our services include:
-24/7 Emergency & Critical Care
-Advanced diagnostics: MRI, CR, Ultrasound, Digital Radiography (X-Ray)
-Internal Medicine
-Oncology
-Surgery
-Neurology

Name: Steel City Emergency Vets
Description: Steel City Emergency Vets leverages the latest technologies and an experienced staff to give your pet the best care.

Name: Forveter
Description:
Somos la 1ª plataforma de compras 100% digital creada exclusivamente por y para veterinari@s. Nacemos con una visión muy clara: dar más, exigir menos y ayudar a transformar tu clínica.

¿Te sumas a la (r)evolución?

Name: Southside Animal Hospital
Description: Southside Animal Hospital offers medical care for dogs and cats. Their services include wellness, prevention, testing, diagnostics, advanced care, surgical procedures, urgent care, and pet boarding.

Name: PharMiVet
Description: Somos una farmacia veterinaria con cuatro años en el mercado. La salud de tu mascota es nuestra prioridad. Nuestra motivación es verte feliz disfrutando del amor de quien se ha convertido en un miembro más de tu familia .

Name: Vets for Animal Welfare
Description:
Vets for Animal Welfare (VFAW) is a non-political, non-profit, and non-governmental organization founded by passionate veterinary students of IAAS, Paklihawa. Committed to the welfare of animals, VFAW actively provides free medical support to animals in need while fostering awareness and education in the veterinary field.
Our initiatives include Animal Birth Control (ABC) programs, vaccination drives, virtual sessions, veterinary talk series, and various online and offline events aimed at promoting responsible animal care. With the core theme "Animal Welfare for a Better World," we also focus on enhancing the practical knowledge and clinical skills of veterinary students, empowering them to make a meaningful impact in the field of animal health and welfare.
Join us in our mission to create a compassionate world for animals!

Name: Agraria
Description: Agraria merupakan situs online dimana anda dapat berinvestasi dibidang pertanian, perkebunan, peternakan dan perikanan dengan konsep gotong-royong. Sistem ini memungkinkan anda berbisnis dengan keuntungan yang menjanjikan serta berkontribusi langsung terhadap pembangunan ekonomi Indonesia

Name: Vet Line International
Description: Vet Line International is a dynamic organization, established in year 2000 with the intentions to improve healthcare and production of animals in Pakistan by introducing most innovative and qualitative veterinary products. Having its head office in Lahore with roots across the country. Our team comprise of highly professional and skilled veterinarian who have years of experience in the business. With the ambition and commitment to provide most innovative and standarized products, Vet Line International have collaborative with world's renowned International business partners. Which are illustrious for providing state of art products after years of research to maintain the international standards to achieve the optimized results

Name: Vet Nurse School
Description: Vet Nurse School is the ultimate platform  filled with short, fun and easy-to-digest courses & online resources for current and aspiring Veterinary Nurse to fulfil their dreams & aspiration!

Name: IVC Evidensia Academy NL
Description:
Welkom bij de IVC Evidensia Academy (NL) !

Bij de IVC Evidensia Academy ondersteunen we veterinaire professionals in hun professionele en persoonlijke ontwikkeling.  Ons onderwijs varieert van korte online microlearnings tot meerjarige leergangen, altijd geleid door één van onze eigen specialisten of trainers of door een externe expert. Zo bouwen we samen aan de diergeneeskundige zorg van morgen!

Name: ALWalaa Company For Veterinary Drugs
Description: At Al-Walaa Veterinary Pharmaceuticals, we are dedicated to enhancing animal health with high-quality veterinary solutions. With a strong commitment to innovation and excellence, we provide a wide range of pharmaceutical products tailored to meet the needs of veterinarians and livestock farmers. Our mission is to ensure the well-being of animals by delivering trusted, effective, and safe treatments.

Name: Goodbye Good Boy
Description:
We believe that a pet’s end-of-life journey should be just as caring, loving and unique as they are. We support pet owners in writing the final chapter of their best friend's story with home euthanasia, aftercare, pet memorials and specialist grief counselling.
Dedicated owners treat their pets as equals in life. Goodbye Good Boy promises the same in death - offering a similar type of send-off you would expect for any other family member.

Our complete service includes quality-of-life checks, at-home euthanasia, grief counselling, cremation and memorialisation. 

LINKTREE: https://linktr.ee/GoodbyeGoodBoy

Name: Hospital Veterinario Los Tarahales
Description:
Los Tarahales es un Hospital Veterinario 24 horas con servicios plenos para mascotas. Nuestro principal objetivo es satisfacer las necesidades y el bienestar de nuestros animales. 

Gracias a nuestro equipo humano y técnico tenemos las capacidades de descubrir que necesitan nuestros clientes aunque no hablen. Nuestra misión es que cada paciente cruce nuestras puertas sano y con una sonrisa de vuelta a casa. 

Y así, aunque a nadie le guste ir al médico, el Hospital Veterinario Los Tarahales siempre será su hogar.
Location: Las Palmas de Gran Canaria , Las Palmas

Name: CVMS - Clinica Veterinaria Milano Sud
Description: La Clinica Veterinaria Milano Sud, fondata dal Dr. Massimo Petazzoni, rappresenta un punto di riferimento di eccellenza per la medicina veterinaria ortopedica in Italia e nel mondo.

Name: FarmLab Diagnostics
Description: FarmLab Diagnostics is a provider of animal health diagnostic solutions to the animal health industry.

Name: Dimedium Lietuva
Description:
Dimedium Lietuva is part of a pan-Baltic company – Dimedium Group. We distribute high quality global agricultural and veterinary products. We are one of the market leaders in the field of veterinary and animal nutrition products.

VISION
We work to ensure that the fields in Estonia are fertile, animals healthy, and our grandchildren can eat healthy local food.

MISSION
We are the bridge from the top of the world´s practice to the Estonian veterinary clinics, farms, and homes.

CORE VALUES
Joy – Deriving happiness from what we do
Yes! Attitude – Solutions instead of excuses
Teamwork – Going further together
Care – Thinking beyond yourself
Modernity – Thinking ahead
Competence – Capability and knowledge


We provide a diverse portfolio of products, covering the needs of the entire agricultural sector: high quality veterinary medicines and vaccines, feeds and feed additives, milk replacers, health and hygiene products, breeding material, farming equipment, instruments and software.

For pet clinics we offer a wide selection of veterinary medicinal products, high quality pet foods, as well as supplements and care products from the world’s leading producers.

Name: Animal Care Center
Description:
When you want hope, love and compassionate care for your pets, your pets will love you even more when you choose Animal Care Center of Smyrna, in Smyrna, GA.

Here at Animal Care Center, we specialize in caring for cats and dogs with hope, love and dignity. That’s why cats and dogs from all over Smyrna and the nearby communities prefer us. Pets prefer Animal Care Center because Dr. Williams is so good at calming them down and making them feel better about their visits. He takes a lot of time with them and educates their people, too. Plus everyone at Animal Care Center is super-friendly.

You won’t find a friendlier, more down-to-earth, more caring veterinarian and staff than those at Animal Care Center in Smyrna, GA. Otto H. Williams, DVM, is all about treating your furry, four-legged friends like welcome members of our Animal Care Center family.

Our mission is to give your pet hope, love, dignity and the best veterinary medical care available. Our philosophy of care is based on respect for the patient and unwavering dedication to achieving the best results for pets and pet owners. We want you and your pets to enjoy long, happy and healthy lives together.

But we’re also about warm hearts and kind words for all the members of our Smyrna community – including and especially the four-legged ones.

Name: Clínica Ambulatória de Equinos Rodrigo Araújo
Description:
Clínica veterinária dedicada ao tratamento, acompanhamento e cuidado do seu cavalo de desporto ou lazer, proporcionando o seu bem-estar e optimizando o desempenho desportivo. 
Todos os serviços são prestados no domicílio em território nacional assim como no estrangeiro.
A clínica tem parcerias com hospitais de referência.

Veterinary practice dedicated to the treatment, monitoring and care of your sport or leisure horse, 
providing its welfare and optimizing its sports performance.
All services are provided at home, in Portugal and abroad.
The practice has partnerships with referral hospitals.

Name: SURGE DVM
Description:
WHAT IS SURGE?
SURGE is a community of veterinary surgeons. It’s a buying group – sort of. It’s a network. It’s a group of like-minded surgeons. And so much more. It’s 100% designed to help you.  Originally designed to help mobile surgeons only, we have expanded and can offer value whether you are mobile or engaged in a number of other surgery settings.

Name: Main Street Veterinary Hospital
Description: Main Street is a full service veterinary hospital located in the community of Cornelius, North Carolina that is committed to providing exceptional veterinary care and client service.  We believe educated owners raise healthy animals and we are dedicated to ensuring that you understand the range of options that best serve your pet. We treat you as a family member and care for your pet as if they are our own.

Name: Sandy Pines Wildlife Centre
Description: We are a very busy wildlife centre that helps 5200+ wild animals a year. We have amazing volunteers, staff and interns that help make this possible. We are always looking to have new volunteers join us, so contact us today about opportunities! Email volunteerspwc@gmail.com for more information.

Name: Bark Of The Town Mobile Grooming
Description:
We are Las Vegas' premium mobile grooming service.
At Bark of the Town we understand that your furry friends are more than just pets, they are part of the family.  We treat your furry family members the same way we would treat our own! We strive to ensure all our clients, and their humans have the best experience possible!
We cater to dogs of all sizes! 
We also groom cats!

Name: Vet Doc Hospitals
Description: Compassionate Care for Your Furry Friends nationwide. Our hospitals are located all over the United States with more hospitals opening up each month. If you are a veterinarian looking to work for a new practice please apply to one of our currrent openings on LinkedIn.

Name: Clinique Vétérinaire Ric et Rac
Description: Clinique Vétérinaire Ric et Rac is a veterinary center based out of BRETELLE DE L'AUTOROUTE, Le Cannet, France.

Name: ILN
Description: We are a company specialized in animal nutrition, with many years of experience in the sector. We have always been dedicated to the development of new products to improve the zootechnical indexes of our animals with more efficient and more profitable nutrition. Taking special care of the health and welfare of animals and respecting the environment.

Name: VetRec (Veterinary Recruiters)
Description:
VetRec has been asked to support a large number of Veterinary practices throughout the UK giving us trusted relationships with a wide variety group and independent Veterinary enterprises.  Our clients employ over 10,000 UK registered Vets & Nurses, and currently support over 1.5 million vulnerable pets in care. 

We are chosen as a preferred supplier for many independent practices and market leading veterinary groups as we continue to meet our clients’ needs and expectations. 

Both Locums and permanent employees are an integral part of their workplace providing the stability and reassurance our clients need. Register with us today and join is in going above and beyond in supporting world class care for their patients.

Name: Animais & Cia
