Name: Pieper Veterinary
Description:
Pieper Veterinary is a Connecticut-based network of emergency, specialty, and primary care hospitals rooted in a legacy of compassionate care and clinical leadership. With a history dating back to 1937, Pieper has grown into a trusted name across the region, known for our collaborative medical teams, advanced services, and strong partnerships with local referring veterinarians.

Today, Pieper Veterinary serves as the Connecticut regional network of COVE Animal Health—a veterinarian-led platform founded by Pieper’s sibling leadership team, Tessa Olson, MBA, and Ben Olson, DVM, DACVIM (Neurology). Together, they continue the family tradition of advancing veterinary care, building on the vision of their parents, Dr. Robert Olson and Dr. Virginia Nunez.

Our hospitals operate under a hub-and-spoke model, with a 24/7 emergency and specialty center in Middletown and a growing network of connected general practices across the state. Whether treating a critical case or providing lifelong wellness care, we’re united by a shared mission: to deliver thoughtful, high-quality medicine that strengthens the human-animal bond.

We are proud to be a teaching institution, a referral destination, and a workplace where veterinary professionals grow their careers through collaboration, mentorship, and purpose-driven care.

Learn more at www.pieperveterinary.com

Name: Petwello宠我点
Description:
PetWello is a company dedicated to bringing a new world of knowledge, choice and empowerment to the China’s pet owners. We help equip them with advanced knowledge of pet grooming and pet care. Meanwhile, we celebrate their dedication to the well-being, health, welfare and beauty of their pet companion. 

PetWello are here to educate, shine a bright light on what professional grooming should be about. It is a light that is for every dog and cat pet parent and their heartfelt desire to do the best for their pet. Professional grooming is not one dimensional simply for style and looks, it is holistic and multidimensional. It is physical, psychological and environmental. So we illuminate Holistic Grooming. Body check, coat brushing, bathing and shampoo, hair cutting, nail trimming, ear cleaning, eye cleaning, teeth care, product, tools and environment, they all contribute to the grooming experience - connecting for the whole wellness, well-being, health and joy of pet companions. 

If you'd like to cooperate with us, or want to know more, follow our WeChat official account @PetWello宠我点, start care and learn.

Petwello 宠我点致力于为中国的宠物主们建立一个全新的知识和选择平台。对他们来说，宠物的身心健康和形象健康都值得每一份努力。宠我点用权威专业的知识、建议、和推荐去阐释专业的宠物美护。我们根据专业严肃的研究和分析来定义和界定，为铲屎官们指明方向、避开雷坑。

教育普及是我们的宗旨。专业的宠物美护并不是单一的洗浴和造型，而是对宠物全面的养护和关怀，因此我们提出了“全方位宠物美护”的概念：体检、梳毛、洗浴、毛发修剪、修甲、耳部清洁、眼部清洁、牙齿清洁等，甚至环境都紧紧关联，共同作用，造就宠物们舒适健康的美护体验。

想了解更多及合作，关注微信公众号@宠我点，联系我们。

Name: Veterinarium Clinic
Description:
Veterinarium Clinic of the Agricultural University of Georgia is a leading hub of veterinary excellence, integrating services, education, and research. The clinic operates in alignment with international standards, offering expert consultations, vaccinations, diagnostics, advanced therapeutic and surgical care, dental services, animal travel documentation, and grooming. Every animal receives personalized attention in a state-of-the-art facility equipped with modern technology.

Veterinarium is also a cornerstone of veterinary education, providing practical training for students enrolled in veterinary medicine programs. Through laboratory sessions and hands-on classes, it bridges theoretical knowledge with real-world application.

By driving innovation and fostering excellence in animal care and education, Veterinarium serves as a vital contributor to advancing veterinary medicine. It is the ultimate destination for exceptional care and professional development.

Name: AniCura de Tweede Lijn
Description:
Op het moment dat uw dierenarts, de eerste lijn, van mening is dat een aandoening of probleem van uw huisdier te complex is om zelf op te pakken, kan zij/hij u verwijzen naar 'de Tweede Lijn'. Wij bieden uw dier gespecialiseerde medische zorg.

Dag en nacht is een ervaren chirurg bereikbaar voor ongevallen en andere spoedeisende operaties, 7 dagen per week. Ook voor patiënten die intensieve zorg nodig hebben, zijn alle benodigde faciliteiten in huis. 'de Tweede Lijn' is een samenwerkingsverband waarin iedere arts een eigen specialisatie heeft. Daarnaast werken wij nauw samen met uw eigen dierenarts, hierdoor ontstaat een geheel dat er voor zorgt dat uw huisdier de best mogelijke zorg krijgt.

Wij begrijpen dat u de zorg voor uw huisdier niet zomaar aan ons toevertrouwt. Buiten het bieden van de beste zorg hechten wij dan ook veel waarde aan een goede communicatie en zullen hier ruimschoots de tijd voor nemen. Nadat uw huisdier is onderzocht worden alle behandelingsmogelijkheden besproken. Ook de benodigde nazorg en de te verwachten kosten zullen aan bod komen.

Onze missie luidt dan ook: het bieden van de beste kwaliteit in zorg voor huisdier en eigenaar.
.

Name: Central Veterinary Services

There are a number of ways to develop your practice – maybe you’re particularly interested in developing and training your staff, or maybe you’re interested in considering new ways to promote the practice. 

If you want to put in place a membership scheme for your clients, or maybe you want to develop your business but you’re not sure which route to take. In any of these circumstances, the team at Central can advise regarding your best options and how to make them happen.

Name: VRC Malvern
Description:
VRC is a comprehensive, specialty veterinary healthcare center located in Malvern, Pennsylvania, a western suburb of Philadelphia. We are an AHAA accredited practice, open 24 hours a day, 365 days a year, for appointments and emergency care.

At VRC, you’ll have access to a team of experienced, board-certified veterinarians with advanced specialized training, who utilize the latest innovations in medicine and technology to treat your pet.

We work together, and in partnership with your family veterinarian, to ensure open communication, timely and effective care, appropriate follow-up, and most importantly—the comfort and well-being of your pet.
We offer advanced diagnostic testing, treatment and ongoing management of your pet’s medical condition.

Our services include comprehensive cancer care, cardiology, internal medicine, orthopedic surgery, general soft tissue surgery, ophthalmology, dentistry and oral surgery, neurosurgery, endoscopy, holistic medicine, reproductive services, rehabilitation and emergency services.

VRC is committed to providing the highest quality of specialty veterinary care, for the best quality of life.

Name: Choose People Love Pets: The Veterinary Culture Podcast
Description:
Welcome to "Choose People Love Pets," the podcast where we delve into the dynamic intersection of culture and leadership within the world of veterinary medicine. Join us as we embark on a journey through the diverse landscapes of clinics, hospitals, and research facilities, uncovering the stories, challenges, and triumphs that shape the professional landscape for those dedicated to the care and well-being of our furry companions.

Each episode, we'll sit down with veterinarians, technicians, practice managers, and diverse industry leaders to explore topics ranging from organizational culture and team dynamics to innovative leadership strategies and the evolving role of technology in veterinary practice. Whether you're a seasoned practitioner, an aspiring veterinary professional, or simply an animal lover eager to peek behind the scenes, "Choose People Love Pets" promises to inspire, inform, and ignite meaningful conversations about the future of veterinary medicine.

Tune in to gain insights, strategies, and perspectives that will empower you to navigate the complexities of modern veterinary practice with confidence and compassion. Together, let's unleash the potential for positive change and progress within this vital and evolving field.

Subscribe now to "Choose People Love Pets" and join us as we pave the way forward for a healthier, happier world for pets and the people who care for them.

Name: Sage Compassion for Animals
Description:
About Sage Compassion for Animals
Sage Compassion for Animals works at the powerful intersection of animal and human welfare, providing life-saving financial support to pets and the people who love them. In the Bay Area alone, over 1.5 million families live in low to very low income households — many caring for beloved companion animals without the resources for emergency veterinary care.

We believe no family should be forced to choose between financial survival and a pet’s life.

Since 2020, we’ve helped prevent suffering and unnecessary euthanasia by providing over $1 million in grants to help families afford critical care for their pets. With the support of 45+ veterinary partners, we’ve saved nearly 400 pets, ensuring each is spayed or neutered as part of our commitment to long-term wellbeing and prevention.

We also play a vital role in addressing compassion fatigue among veterinarians, giving hospitals the ability to say “YES” when pets’ lives hang in the balance.

From emergency aid to community education, we serve all nine counties of the San Francisco Bay Area, building a more compassionate world — one animal, one family, and one life at a time.

Your donation helps keep pets with the families who love them. Donate now: https://sagec4a.org/donate
